name: 30 Days of Powerful Words
description: Master essential IELTS vocabulary organized by topic

words.definition: The gap between people who have access to technology and those who do not.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli tafovut — bu texnologiya, internet va kompyuterlardan foydalana oladigan odamlar bilan ulardan foydalana olmaydiganlar o‘rtasidagi farqdir.
words.example1: The digital divide makes it harder for students in rural areas to complete online homework.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli tafovut qishloq joylardagi o‘quvchilarga onlayn uy vazifalarini bajarishni qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example2: Governments are working to close the digital divide by providing free internet in low-income neighborhoods.
words.example2Translation: Hukumatlar kam daromadli mahallalarda bepul internet taqdim etish orqali raqamli tafovutni bartaraf etishga harakat qilmoqda.
words.example3: The digital divide affects older people who struggle with new smartphone apps.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli tafovut yangi smartfon ilovalarini ishlatishda qiynalayotgan keksa odamlarga ta’sir qiladi.
extraExamples: Bridging the digital divide is essential for equal access to education and jobs.
In many developing countries, the digital divide still separates urban and rural populations.
She wrote a research paper about how the digital divide impacts women in technology fields.
During the pandemic, the digital divide became more obvious as classes moved online.
Companies can help reduce the digital divide by offering affordable devices and training.
The digital divide is not just about hardware, but also about digital skills and knowledge.
Efforts to narrow the digital divide include building better infrastructure in remote areas.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli tafovutni bartaraf etish ta’lim va ish o‘rinlariga teng kirish uchun juda muhim.
Ko‘p rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda raqamli tafovut shahar va qishloq aholisini ajratib turadi.
U texnologiya sohasidagi ayollarga raqamli tafovut qanday ta’sir qilishi haqida ilmiy ish yozdi.
Pandemiya davrida darslar onlaynga o‘tgani uchun raqamli tafovut yanada yaqqol ko‘zga tashlandi.
Kompaniyalar arzon qurilmalar va o‘quv dasturlarini taklif qilish orqali raqamli tafovutni kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Raqamli tafovut faqat qurilmalar bilan bog‘liq emas, balki raqamli ko‘nikmalar va bilimlarga ham taalluqli.
Raqamli tafovutni qisqartirishga qaratilgan harakatlar uzoq hududlarda infratuzilmani yaxshilashni o‘z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: The use of machines or technology instead of human labor to perform tasks.
words.definitionUz: Avtomatlashtirish — bu inson mehnati o‘rniga mashinalar yoki texnologiyalardan foydalanib, vazifalarni bajarish jarayonidir.
words.example1: Automation in factories has increased production speed but reduced the need for manual workers.
words.example1Translation: Zavodlardagi avtomatlashtirish ishlab chiqarish tezligini oshirdi, ammo qo‘l mehnati ishchilariga bo‘lgan ehtiyojni kamaytirdi.
words.example2: Many banks use automation to process customer transactions quickly and accurately.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab banklar mijozlar operatsiyalarini tez va aniq bajarish uchun avtomatlashtirishdan foydalanadi.
words.example3: The company introduced automation to handle repetitive tasks like data entry.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya ma’lumot kiritish kabi takroriy vazifalarni bajarish uchun avtomatlashtirishni joriy etdi.
extraExamples: Automation is transforming the transportation industry with self-driving cars.
While automation boosts efficiency, it also raises concerns about job losses.
Small businesses are adopting automation tools to compete with larger companies.
The rise of automation requires workers to learn new technical skills.
Automation helps reduce human error in complex manufacturing processes.
Governments are studying the long-term effects of automation on the economy.
Office automation software has made administrative work much faster.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtomatlashtirish o‘zini o‘zi boshqaradigan avtomobillar bilan transport sanoatini o‘zgartirmoqda.
Avtomatlashtirish samaradorlikni oshirgan bo‘lsa-da, ish o‘rinlarini yo‘qotish xavotirlarini ham keltirib chiqarmoqda.
Kichik korxonalar yirik kompaniyalar bilan raqobatlashish uchun avtomatlashtirish vositalarini qo‘llamoqda.
Avtomatlashtirishning o‘sishi ishchilardan yangi texnik ko‘nikmalarni o‘rganishni talab qiladi.
Avtomatlashtirish murakkab ishlab chiqarish jarayonlarida inson xatolarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Hukumatlar avtomatlashtirishning iqtisodiyotga uzoq muddatli ta’sirini o‘rganmoqda.
Ofis avtomatlashtirish dasturlari ma’muriy ishni ancha tezlashtirdi.

words.definition: The protection of computer systems, networks, and data from digital attacks.
words.definitionUz: Kiberxavfsizlik — bu kompyuter tizimlari, tarmoqlar va ma’lumotlarni raqamli hujumlardan himoya qilishdir.
words.example1: Strong cybersecurity measures are essential to prevent hackers from stealing personal information.
words.example1Translation: Shaxsiy ma’lumotlar o‘g‘irlanishining oldini olish uchun kuchli kiberxavfsizlik choralari juda muhim.
words.example2: The company invested heavily in cybersecurity after a major data breach.
words.example2Translation: Katta ma’lumotlar sizdirilishidan keyin kompaniya kiberxavfsizlikka katta mablag‘ sarfladi.
words.example3: Cybersecurity experts are in high demand as online threats continue to grow.
words.example3Translation: Onlayn tahdidlar kuchayib borayotgani sababli kiberxavfsizlik mutaxassislariga talab yuqori.
extraExamples: Learning basic cybersecurity practices can help protect your online accounts.
Governments are creating new laws to improve national cybersecurity.
A simple software update can significantly enhance your device’s cybersecurity.
Cybersecurity awareness training is now mandatory for all employees.
The rise of remote work has created new challenges for cybersecurity.
He specializes in cybersecurity and helps companies defend against ransomware.
Without proper cybersecurity, even large organizations can lose millions.
extraExampleTranslations: Asosiy kiberxavfsizlik qoidalarini o‘rganish onlayn hisoblaringizni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
Hukumatlar milliy kiberxavfsizlikni yaxshilash uchun yangi qonunlar yaratmoqda.
Oddiy dastur yangilanishi qurilmangizning kiberxavfsizligini sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.
Kiberxavfsizlik bo‘yicha xabardorlik o‘quvlari endi barcha xodimlar uchun majburiy.
Masofaviy ishning o‘sishi kiberxavfsizlik uchun yangi muammolarni keltirib chiqardi.
U kiberxavfsizlikka ixtisoslashgan va kompaniyalarga ransomwaredan himoyalanishda yordam beradi.
To‘g‘ri kiberxavfsizliksiz hatto yirik tashkilotlar ham millionlab zarar ko‘rishi mumkin.

words.definition: Over-reliance on technology in daily life and work.
words.definitionUz: Texnologik qaramlik — bu kundalik hayot va ishda texnologiyaga haddan tashqari ko‘p bog‘lanib qolish holatidir.
words.example1: Technological dependence has made many people feel anxious when they lose internet connection.
words.example1Translation: Texnologik qaramlik ko‘p odamlarda internet uzilganda xavotir paydo bo‘lishiga olib kelmoqda.
words.example2: Reducing technological dependence can improve mental health and real-life relationships.
words.example2Translation: Texnologik qaramlikni kamaytirish ruhiy salomatlik va haqiqiy hayotdagi munosabatlarni yaxshilashi mumkin.
words.example3: Schools are teaching students how to manage technological dependence responsibly.
words.example3Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarga texnologik qaramlikni mas’uliyat bilan boshqarishni o‘rgatmoqda.
extraExamples: Our technological dependence on smartphones affects how we communicate with each other.
The elderly often struggle with technological dependence in modern society.
Breaking technological dependence requires conscious effort and discipline.
Technological dependence can lead to decreased physical activity.
Experts warn that technological dependence may weaken problem-solving skills.
Many families are trying to set limits to reduce technological dependence at home.
Technological dependence became more noticeable during the pandemic lockdowns.
extraExampleTranslations: Smartfonlarga texnologik qaramligimiz bir-birimiz bilan muloqot qilish usulimizga ta’sir qiladi.
Keksa odamlar zamonaviy jamiyatda texnologik qaramlik bilan ko‘pincha qiynaladi.
Texnologik qaramlikdan qutulish ongli harakat va intizomni talab qiladi.
Texnologik qaramlik jismoniy faollikning pasayishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
Mutaxassislar texnologik qaramlik muammolarni hal qilish ko‘nikmalarini zaiflashtirishi mumkinligidan ogohlantirmoqda.
Ko‘p oilalar uyda texnologik qaramlikni kamaytirish uchun chegaralar o‘rnatishga harakat qilmoqda.
Texnologik qaramlik pandemiya davridagi karantinlarda yanada yaqqol sezildi.

words.definition: The introduction of new methods, ideas, or products that improve existing solutions.
words.definitionUz: Innovatsiya — bu mavjud yechimlarni yaxshilaydigan yangi usullar, g‘oyalar yoki mahsulotlarni joriy etishdir.
words.example1: The company’s success is driven by continuous innovation in product design.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya muvaffaqiyati mahsulot dizaynidagi doimiy innovatsiyalar bilan ta’minlanadi.
words.example2: Innovation in renewable energy is helping combat climate change.
words.example2Translation: Qayta tiklanadigan energiyadagi innovatsiyalar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kurashishga yordam bermoqda.
words.example3: Teachers encourage innovation by allowing students to experiment with new ideas.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchilar o‘quvchilarga yangi g‘oyalar bilan tajriba o‘tkazishga imkon berib, innovatsiyani rag‘batlantiradi.
extraExamples: Technological innovation has completely changed how we shop and communicate.
Governments offer grants to support innovation in small businesses.
True innovation often comes from thinking differently than others.
The smartphone was a major innovation that transformed daily life.
Innovation requires both creativity and practical implementation.
Medical innovation has led to better treatments for many diseases.
Companies that fail to embrace innovation risk falling behind competitors.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologik innovatsiya xarid qilish va muloqot qilish usullarimizni butunlay o‘zgartirdi.
Hukumatlar kichik bizneslarda innovatsiyani qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun grantlar taklif qiladi.
Haqiqiy innovatsiya ko‘pincha boshqalardan farqli o‘ylash natijasida paydo bo‘ladi.
Smartfon kundalik hayotni tubdan o‘zgartirgan katta innovatsiya edi.
Innovatsiya ham ijodkorlikni, ham amaliy joriy etishni talab qiladi.
Tibbiy innovatsiyalar ko‘p kasalliklar uchun yaxshi davolash usullariga olib keldi.
Innovatsiyani qabul qilmaydigan kompaniyalar raqobatchilardan orqada qolish xavfiga duch keladi.

words.definition: The simulation of human intelligence by machines, especially computer systems.
words.definitionUz: Sun’iy intellekt (AI) — mashinalar, ayniqsa kompyuter tizimlari tomonidan inson intellektini taqlid qilishdir.
words.example1: Artificial Intelligence is used in virtual assistants like Siri and Alexa.
words.example1Translation: Sun’iy intellekt Siri va Alexa kabi virtual yordamchilarda qo‘llaniladi.
words.example2: Many companies are investing in Artificial Intelligence to improve customer service.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p kompaniyalar mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatishni yaxshilash uchun sun’iy intellektga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
words.example3: Artificial Intelligence can help doctors diagnose diseases more accurately.
words.example3Translation: Sun’iy intellekt shifokorlarga kasalliklarni aniqroq tashxislashda yordam berishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The development of Artificial Intelligence raises important ethical questions.
Artificial Intelligence is transforming the way we drive with self-driving cars.
Schools are starting to teach students the basics of Artificial Intelligence.
Artificial Intelligence tools can write articles, compose music, and create art.
Experts predict that Artificial Intelligence will change many jobs in the future.
Using Artificial Intelligence in agriculture helps farmers increase crop yields.
Artificial Intelligence must be developed responsibly to benefit society.
extraExampleTranslations: Sun’iy intellektni rivojlantirish muhim axloqiy savollarni keltirib chiqarmoqda.
Sun’iy intellekt o‘zini o‘zi boshqaradigan avtomobillar bilan haydash usulini o‘zgartirmoqda.
Maktablar o‘quvchilarga sun’iy intellektning asoslarini o‘rgata boshladi.
Sun’iy intellekt vositalari maqolalar yozishi, musiqa yaratishi va san’at asarlarini yaratishi mumkin.
Mutaxassislar sun’iy intellekt kelajakda ko‘p ish o‘rinlarini o‘zgartirishini bashorat qilmoqda.
Qishloq xo‘jaligida sun’iy intellektdan foydalanish fermerlar hosildorligini oshirishga yordam beradi.
Jamiyat foydasiga bo‘lishi uchun sun’iy intellekt mas’uliyat bilan rivojlantirilishi kerak.

words.definition: The ability to use social media critically, responsibly, and effectively.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi — ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan tanqidiy, mas’uliyatli va samarali foydalana olish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: Social media literacy helps people distinguish between real news and fake information.
words.example1Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi odamlarga haqiqiy yangiliklarni soxta ma’lumotlardan ajratishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Schools should teach social media literacy to protect students from online risks.
words.example2Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarni onlayn xavflardan himoya qilish uchun ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligini o‘rgatishi kerak.
words.example3: Improving your social media literacy can lead to more meaningful online interactions.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligingizni oshirish onlayn muloqotlaringizni mazmunliroq qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Parents play a key role in developing their children’s social media literacy.
Social media literacy includes understanding privacy settings and data sharing.
Lack of social media literacy makes people vulnerable to online scams.
Universities now offer courses on digital and social media literacy.
Social media literacy encourages critical thinking about content we consume.
She became an advocate for social media literacy after experiencing cyberbullying.
Good social media literacy helps maintain a healthy balance with real life.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar farzandlarining ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligini rivojlantirishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi maxfiylik sozlamalari va ma’lumotlar almashishni tushunishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligining yetishmasligi odamlarni onlayn firibgarliklarga qarshi zaif qiladi.
Universitetlar endi raqamli va ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi bo‘yicha kurslar taklif qilmoqda.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi biz iste’mol qiladigan kontent haqida tanqidiy fikrlashni rag‘batlantiradi.
U kiberzo‘ravonlikni boshdan kechirgandan keyin ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi tarafdori bo‘ldi.
Yaxshi ijtimoiy tarmoqlar savodxonligi haqiqiy hayot bilan sog‘lom muvozanatni saqlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Working from a location outside a traditional office, usually from home.
words.definitionUz: Masofaviy ish — an’anaviy ofisdan tashqarida, odatda uydan ishlashdir.
words.example1: Remote work has become very popular since the COVID-19 pandemic.
words.example1Translation: Masofaviy ish COVID-19 pandemiyasidan keyin juda mashhur bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: Many employees prefer remote work because it offers better work-life balance.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p xodimlar masofaviy ishni ish va hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashi uchun afzal ko‘radi.
words.example3: Companies need good tools to support effective remote work.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyalar samarali masofaviy ishni qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun yaxshi vositalarga muhtoj.
extraExamples: Remote work allows people to live in different cities from their workplace.
Communication skills are especially important in a remote work environment.
Some people find remote work challenging due to feelings of isolation.
Remote work policies vary greatly between different companies.
Productivity in remote work depends on self-discipline and good time management.
The trend toward remote work is changing the real estate market.
Managers are learning new ways to lead remote work teams successfully.
extraExampleTranslations: Masofaviy ish odamlarga ish joyidan boshqa shaharlarda yashash imkonini beradi.
Masofaviy ish muhitida aloqa ko‘nikmalari ayniqsa muhimdir.
Ba’zi odamlar yolg‘izlik hissi tufayli masofaviy ishni qiyin deb hisoblashadi.
Masofaviy ish siyosati turli kompaniyalarda juda farq qiladi.
Masofaviy ishdagi samaradorlik o‘z-o‘zini intizom va vaqtni boshqarishga bog‘liq.
Masofaviy ishga o‘tish tendensiyasi ko‘chmas mulk bozorini o‘zgartirmoqda.
Rahbarlar masofaviy ish jamoalarini muvaffaqiyatli boshqarishning yangi usullarini o‘rganmoqda.

words.definition: Discarded electronic products such as computers, phones, and appliances.
words.definitionUz: Elektron chiqindilar — kompyuter, telefon va maishiy asbob-uskunalar kabi tashlab yuborilgan elektron mahsulotlardir.
words.example1: Proper recycling of e-waste is important to protect the environment.
words.example1Translation: Elektron chiqindilarni to‘g‘ri qayta ishlash atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun muhimdir.
words.example2: Developing countries often receive large amounts of e-waste from richer nations.
words.example2Translation: Rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar boy davlatlardan katta miqdorda elektron chiqindilarni oladi.
words.example3: The rapid growth of technology is creating more e-waste every year.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiyaning tez o‘sishi har yili ko‘proq elektron chiqindilarni keltirib chiqarmoqda.
extraExamples: Many electronic devices contain harmful chemicals that make e-waste dangerous.
Governments are introducing stricter laws to manage e-waste responsibly.
Consumers should check if their old phones can be repaired before throwing them away as e-waste.
E-waste recycling creates jobs and recovers valuable materials like gold and copper.
Reducing e-waste requires buying fewer new gadgets and using them longer.
Schools are educating students about the environmental impact of e-waste.
Companies are designing products to make e-waste easier to recycle.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p elektron qurilmalar zararli kimyoviy moddalarni o‘z ichiga oladi, shuning uchun elektron chiqindilar xavfli.
Hukumatlar elektron chiqindilarni mas’uliyat bilan boshqarish uchun qattiqroq qonunlar joriy etmoqda.
Iste’molchilar eski telefonlarini elektron chiqindi sifatida tashlashdan oldin ta’mirlanishi mumkinligini tekshirishlari kerak.
Elektron chiqindilarni qayta ishlash ish o‘rinlarini yaratadi va oltin, mis kabi qimmatbaho materiallarni qaytaradi.
Elektron chiqindilarni kamaytirish uchun kamroq yangi gadjet sotib olish va ularni uzoqroq ishlatish kerak.
Maktablar o‘quvchilarga elektron chiqindilarning atrof-muhitga ta’siri haqida ma’lumot bermoqda.
Kompaniyalar mahsulotlarni elektron chiqindilarni qayta ishlashni osonlashtiradigan tarzda loyihalashtirmoqda.

words.definition: The data and information left behind when using the internet and digital services.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli iz — internet va raqamli xizmatlardan foydalanganda qoldiriladigan ma’lumot va axborotdir.
words.example1: Be careful what you post online because your digital footprint lasts forever.
words.example1Translation: Onlaynga nima joylashtirishingizga ehtiyot bo‘ling, chunki raqamli izingiz abadiy saqlanadi.
words.example2: Employers often check a candidate’s digital footprint before hiring.
words.example2Translation: Ish beruvchilar odatda ishga olishdan oldin nomzodning raqamli izini tekshiradi.
words.example3: Teaching children about their digital footprint is an important part of online safety.
words.example3Translation: Bolalarga raqamli izlari haqida o‘rgatish onlayn xavfsizlikning muhim qismidir.
extraExamples: Your digital footprint includes browsing history, social media posts, and online purchases.
It’s difficult to completely erase your digital footprint once it’s created.
A positive digital footprint can help build your personal brand.
Cybersecurity experts recommend regularly cleaning up your digital footprint.
Many people underestimate how large their digital footprint actually is.
Governments use digital footprints for security and law enforcement purposes.
Managing your digital footprint responsibly protects your privacy.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli izingiz brauzer tarixi, ijtimoiy tarmoqlardagi postlar va onlayn xaridlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Raqamli iz yaratilgandan keyin uni butunlay o‘chirish qiyin.
Ijobiy raqamli iz shaxsiy brendingizni yaratishga yordam beradi.
Kiberxavfsizlik mutaxassislari raqamli izingizni muntazam tozalashni tavsiya qiladi.
Ko‘p odamlar o‘z raqamli izlari qanchalik katta ekanligini yetarlicha baholamaydi.
Hukumatlar xavfsizlik va huquqni muhofaza qilish maqsadlarida raqamli izlardan foydalanadi.
Raqamli izingizni mas’uliyat bilan boshqarish shaxsiy maxfiyligingizni himoya qiladi.

words.definition: Technology designed to be environmentally friendly and resource-efficient.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror texnologiya — atrof-muhitga zararsiz va resurslarni tejaydigan tarzda yaratilgan texnologiyadir.
words.example1: Many startups are focusing on sustainable tech to reduce carbon emissions.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p startaplar uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish uchun barqaror texnologiyaga e’tibor qaratmoqda.
words.example2: Sustainable tech includes solar-powered devices and energy-efficient appliances.
words.example2Translation: Barqaror texnologiya quyosh energiyasi bilan ishlaydigan qurilmalar va energiyani tejaydigan asboblarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: Consumers are increasingly choosing sustainable tech products over traditional ones.
words.example3Translation: Iste’molchilar an’anaviy mahsulotlar o‘rniga barqaror texnologiya mahsulotlarini tanlamoqda.
extraExamples: Sustainable tech is essential for achieving global climate goals.
The company develops sustainable tech solutions for waste management.
Investing in sustainable tech can save money in the long term.
Governments are offering incentives for companies that create sustainable tech.
Sustainable tech aims to minimize electronic waste and energy consumption.
Education about sustainable tech is becoming part of school curriculums.
Innovation in sustainable tech is growing rapidly in the green economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror texnologiya global iqlim maqsadlariga erishish uchun zarur.
Kompaniya chiqindilarni boshqarish uchun barqaror texnologiya yechimlarini ishlab chiqadi.
Barqaror texnologiyaga sarmoya kiritish uzoq muddatda pulni tejashga yordam beradi.
Hukumatlar barqaror texnologiya yaratadigan kompaniyalarga imtiyozlar taklif qilmoqda.
Barqaror texnologiya elektron chiqindilar va energiya sarfini kamaytirishni maqsad qiladi.
Barqaror texnologiya haqidagi ta’lim maktab darsliklariga kirmoqda.
Barqaror texnologiyadagi innovatsiyalar yashil iqtisodiyotda tez sur’atlar bilan o‘smoqda.

words.definition: The state of having too much information to process, leading to difficulty in understanding.
words.definitionUz: Axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi — qayta ishlash uchun juda ko‘p ma’lumot bo‘lgani uchun tushunish qiyinlashadigan holatdir.
words.example1: Information overload makes it hard to focus while studying online.
words.example1Translation: Axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi onlayn o‘qish paytida diqqatni jamlagani qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example2: Social media often causes information overload by showing endless content.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar cheksiz kontent ko‘rsatib, axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligiga sabab bo‘ladi.
words.example3: Taking regular breaks helps reduce the effects of information overload.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam tanaffuslar axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi ta’sirini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Managers suffer from information overload due to too many emails and reports.
Information overload can lead to stress and poor decision-making.
Learning to filter important information is key to dealing with information overload.
News websites contribute to information overload by updating constantly.
During elections, voters often experience information overload.
Simple tools like note-taking apps can help manage information overload.
The digital age has significantly increased the problem of information overload.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbarlar juda ko‘p email va hisobotlar tufayli axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligidan aziyat chekishadi.
Axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi stress va noto‘g‘ri qaror qabul qilishga olib kelishi mumkin.
Muhim ma’lumotlarni filtrlay olish axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi bilan kurashishning kalitidir.
Yangiliklar saytlari doimiy yangilanib, axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligiga hissa qo‘shadi.
Saylovlar paytida saylovchilar ko‘pincha axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligini boshdan kechirishadi.
Eslatma ilovalari kabi oddiy vositalar axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligini boshqarishga yordam beradi.
Raqamli davr axborot haddan tashqari ko‘pligi muammosini sezilarli darajada kuchaytirdi.

words.definition: The protection of personal data and information of individuals using digital services.
words.definitionUz: Foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi — raqamli xizmatlardan foydalanadigan shaxslarning shaxsiy ma’lumotlarini himoya qilishdir.
words.example1: Apps should respect user privacy by asking for permission before accessing data.
words.example1Translation: Ilovalar ma’lumotlarga kirishdan oldin ruxsat so‘rab, foydalanuvchi maxfiyligini hurmat qilishi kerak.
words.example2: Recent scandals have made people more concerned about user privacy.
words.example2Translation: So‘nggi janjallar odamlarni foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi haqida ko‘proq tashvishlantirdi.
words.example3: Strong laws are needed to protect user privacy on social media platforms.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoq platformalarida foydalanuvchi maxfiyligini himoya qilish uchun kuchli qonunlar kerak.
extraExamples: User privacy is a major issue in the debate about data collection by big tech companies.
Using VPNs can help improve user privacy when browsing the internet.
Companies that value user privacy often gain more customer trust.
Teaching user privacy awareness is important for young internet users.
New regulations aim to give users more control over their privacy settings.
Breaches in user privacy can lead to identity theft and financial loss.
Balancing security and user privacy remains a challenge for technology developers.
extraExampleTranslations: Foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi yirik texnologiya kompaniyalarining ma’lumot yig‘ishlari haqidagi bahsda asosiy muammo hisoblanadi.
VPNlardan foydalanish internetdan foydalanganda foydalanuvchi maxfiyligini yaxshilashga yordam beradi.
Foydalanuvchi maxfiyligini qadrlaydigan kompaniyalar odatda mijozlar ishonchini ko‘proq qozonadi.
Yosh internet foydalanuvchilari uchun foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi xabardorligini o‘rgatish muhim.
Yangi qoidalar foydalanuvchilarga maxfiylik sozlamalari ustidan ko‘proq nazorat berishni maqsad qilgan.
Foydalanuvchi maxfiyligining buzilishi shaxsiy ma’lumotlar o‘g‘irlanishi va moliyaviy zarariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Xavfsizlik va foydalanuvchi maxfiyligi o‘rtasidagi muvozanatni topish texnologiya ishlab chiqaruvchilari uchun qiyin vazifa.

words.definition: Innovation that fundamentally changes or displaces established industries and systems.
words.definitionUz: Texnologik buzilish — mavjud sanoat va tizimlarni tubdan o‘zgartiradigan yoki almashtiradigan innovatsiyadir.
words.example1: The rise of streaming services caused technological disruption in the movie industry.
words.example1Translation: Striming xizmatlarining paydo bo‘lishi kinosa’nati uchun texnologik buzilishga sabab bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Technological disruption creates new opportunities but also challenges for traditional businesses.
words.example2Translation: Texnologik buzilish yangi imkoniyatlar yaratadi, ammo an’anaviy korxonalar uchun qiyinchiliklar ham keltiradi.
words.example3: Companies must adapt quickly to survive technological disruption.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyalar texnologik buzilishdan omon qolish uchun tez moslashishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Technological disruption in transportation is driven by electric and autonomous vehicles.
Many jobs have disappeared due to technological disruption over the past decade.
Technological disruption encourages innovation and competition in the market.
Governments are trying to prepare workers for technological disruption through retraining programs.
The smartphone caused massive technological disruption in the photography industry.
Understanding technological disruption helps businesses stay ahead of change.
Technological disruption can improve efficiency but may increase inequality.
extraExampleTranslations: Transportdagi texnologik buzilish elektr va avtonom transport vositalari tomonidan boshqarilmoqda.
So‘nggi o‘n yillikda ko‘p ish o‘rinlari texnologik buzilish tufayli yo‘qoldi.
Texnologik buzilish bozorda innovatsiya va raqobatni rag‘batlantiradi.
Hukumatlar ishchilarni qayta o‘qitish dasturlari orqali texnologik buzilishga tayyorlamoqda.
Smartfon fotografiya sanoatida katta texnologik buzilishga sabab bo‘ldi.
Texnologik buzilishni tushunish korxonalarga o‘zgarishlardan oldinda bo‘lishga yordam beradi.
Texnologik buzilish samaradorlikni oshirishi mumkin, ammo tengsizlikni kuchaytirishi ham mumkin.

words.definition: To reduce or eliminate differences between two groups, situations, or things.
words.definitionUz: Farqni bartaraf etmoq — ikki guruh, holat yoki narsa o‘rtasidagi farqlarni kamaytirish yoki yo‘q qilishdir.
words.example1: The program aims to bridge the gap between rich and poor communities.
words.example1Translation: Ushbu dastur boy va kambag‘al jamoalar o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etishni maqsad qilgan.
words.example2: New technology can help bridge the gap in access to education.
words.example2Translation: Yangi texnologiya ta’limga kirishdagi farqni bartaraf etishga yordam berishi mumkin.
words.example3: Teachers work hard to bridge the gap between theory and practice.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchilar nazariya va amaliyot o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etish uchun ko‘p mehnat qilishadi.
extraExamples: Efforts to bridge the gap in digital skills are increasing across the country.
The new policy tries to bridge the gap between generations in the workplace.
International organizations help bridge the gap between developed and developing nations.
Good communication is essential to bridge the gap between management and employees.
We need innovative solutions to bridge the gap in healthcare access.
Cultural exchange programs can bridge the gap between different societies.
Bridging the gap requires understanding and cooperation from both sides.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli ko‘nikmalardagi farqni bartaraf etish bo‘yicha harakatlar mamlakat bo‘ylab kuchaymoqda.
Yangi siyosat ish joyida avlodlar o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etishga harakat qilmoqda.
Xalqaro tashkilotlar rivojlangan va rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etishga yordam beradi.
Yaxshi aloqa rahbariyat va xodimlar o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etish uchun zarur.
Sog‘liqni saqlashga kirishdagi farqni bartaraf etish uchun innovatsion yechimlar kerak.
Madaniy almashinuv dasturlari turli jamiyatlar o‘rtasidagi farqni bartaraf etishi mumkin.
Farqni bartaraf etish ikki tomonning tushunchasi va hamkorligini talab qiladi.

words.definition: The total amount of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases released into the atmosphere due to an individual’s, organization’s, or product’s activities.
words.definitionUz: Uglerod izi — bu biror odam, tashkilot yoki mahsulot faoliyati natijasida atmosferaga chiqariladigan karbonat angidrid va boshqa issiqxona gazlarining umumiy miqdori.
words.example1: Flying frequently increases your carbon footprint significantly.
words.example1Translation: Tez-tez samolyotda uchish sizning uglerod izingizni sezilarli darajada oshiradi.
words.example2: Many companies are working to reduce their carbon footprint by using renewable energy.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab kompaniyalar qayta tiklanadigan energiyadan foydalanish orqali uglerod izini kamaytirish ustida ishlamoqda.
words.example3: Eating locally produced food can help lower your carbon footprint.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy ishlab chiqarilgan ovqatni iste’mol qilish uglerod izingizni pasaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Calculating your carbon footprint is the first step toward a greener lifestyle.
The fashion industry has a huge carbon footprint due to manufacturing and shipping.
Switching to electric cars is an effective way to shrink your carbon footprint.
Governments encourage citizens to offset their carbon footprint by planting trees.
Remote work has surprisingly helped many people reduce their daily carbon footprint.
Tourists are becoming more aware of the carbon footprint of their holidays.
Tracking household energy use helps families monitor their carbon footprint.
extraExampleTranslations: Uglerod izingizni hisoblash ekologik turmush tarziga o‘tishning birinchi qadami hisoblanadi.
Moda sanoati ishlab chiqarish va yetkazib berish tufayli juda katta uglerod iziga ega.
Elektr mashinalarga o‘tish uglerod izingizni qisqartirishning samarali usuli.
Hukumatlar fuqarolarni daraxt ekish orqali uglerod izini qoplashga undamoqda.
Masofaviy ish ko‘pchilik odamlarning kundalik uglerod izini kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
Sayyohlar o‘z ta’tillarining uglerod iziga ko‘proq e’tibor bermoqda.
Uy xo‘jaligi energiya sarfini kuzatish oilalarga uglerod izini monitoring qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Energy collected from resources that are naturally replenished on a human timescale, such as sunlight, wind, and water.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya — quyosh nuri, shamol va suv kabi tabiiy ravishda tez tiklanadigan manbalardan olinadigan energiya.
words.example1: Many countries are investing heavily in renewable energy to fight climate change.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p mamlakatlar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kurashish uchun qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga katta sarmoya kiritmoqda.
words.example2: Solar panels are a popular form of renewable energy for homes.
words.example2Translation: Quyosh panellari uylar uchun qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning mashhur turidir.
words.example3: Renewable energy sources create less pollution than fossil fuels.
words.example3Translation: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalari qazilma yoqilg‘ilarga qaraganda kamroq ifloslanish hosil qiladi.
extraExamples: Wind farms are becoming a major source of renewable energy in coastal areas.
The transition to renewable energy requires significant technological advancement.
Governments offer subsidies to promote renewable energy adoption.
Renewable energy jobs are growing faster than traditional energy sectors.
Hydroelectric power is one of the oldest forms of renewable energy.
Using renewable energy at home can significantly cut electricity bills.
International agreements encourage nations to increase renewable energy use.
extraExampleTranslations: Shamol fermalari qirg‘oq hududlarida qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning asosiy manbaiga aylanmoqda.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga o‘tish katta texnologik yutuqlarni talab qiladi.
Hukumatlar qayta tiklanadigan energiyani qo‘llashni rag‘batlantirish uchun subsidiyalar taklif qiladi.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiya sohasidagi ish o‘rinlari an’anaviy energiya tarmoqlariga qaraganda tezroq o‘smoqda.
Gidroelektrostansiyalar qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning eng qadimgi turlaridan biri.
Uyda qayta tiklanadigan energiyadan foydalanish elektr energiyasi hisobini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
Xalqaro shartnomalar mamlakatlarni qayta tiklanadigan energiyadan ko‘proq foydalanishga undaydi.

words.definition: The large-scale removal of trees from forests, usually for agriculture, logging, or urban development.
words.definitionUz: O‘rmonlarni kesish — bu qishloq xo‘jaligi, yog‘och kesish yoki shahar qurilishi uchun o‘rmonlardan daraxtlarni katta miqyosda olib tashlash.
words.example1: Deforestation in the Amazon is threatening thousands of animal species.
words.example1Translation: Amazonka o‘rmonlaridagi o‘rmonlarni kesish minglab hayvon turlariga tahdid solmoqda.
words.example2: Illegal deforestation continues despite government efforts to stop it.
words.example2Translation: Noqonuniy o‘rmonlarni kesish hukumat choralariga qaramay davom etmoqda.
words.example3: Deforestation contributes significantly to global warming.
words.example3Translation: O‘rmonlarni kesish global isishga katta hissa qo‘shadi.
extraExamples: Reforestation projects aim to reverse the damage caused by deforestation.
Palm oil plantations are a major driver of deforestation in Southeast Asia.
Indigenous communities are often the first victims of large-scale deforestation.
Satellite images clearly show the rapid rate of deforestation in tropical regions.
Reducing paper consumption can help slow down deforestation.
Deforestation leads to soil erosion and loss of biodiversity.
The government introduced stricter laws to combat deforestation.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘rmonlarni qayta tiklash loyihalari o‘rmonlarni kesish natijasidagi zararni bartaraf etishga qaratilgan.
Palm yog‘i plantatsiyalari Janubi-Sharqiy Osiyoda o‘rmonlarni kesishning asosiy sabablaridan biri.
Mahalliy jamoalar ko‘pincha katta miqyosdagi o‘rmonlarni kesishning birinchi qurbonlari bo‘ladi.
Sun’iy yo‘ldosh tasvirlari tropik hududlarda o‘rmonlarni kesishning tez sur’atlarini aniq ko‘rsatadi.
Qog‘oz sarfini kamaytirish o‘rmonlarni kesishni sekinlashtirishga yordam beradi.
O‘rmonlarni kesish tuproq eroziyasiga va biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishiga olib keladi.
Hukumat o‘rmonlarni kesishga qarshi kurashish uchun qat’iyroq qonunlarni joriy etdi.

words.definition: Economic and social development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror rivojlanish — hozirgi avlod ehtiyojlarini qondirish bilan birga, kelajak avlodlarning o‘z ehtiyojlarini qondirish imkoniyatini cheklamaydigan iqtisodiy va ijtimoiy rivojlanish.
words.example1: Sustainable development is a key goal for many international organizations.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror rivojlanish ko‘plab xalqaro tashkilotlarning asosiy maqsadlaridan biridir.
words.example2: The city adopted a plan focused on sustainable development and green spaces.
words.example2Translation: Shahar barqaror rivojlanish va yashil maydonlarga asoslangan rejani qabul qildi.
words.example3: Sustainable development requires balancing economic growth with environmental protection.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror rivojlanish iqtisodiy o‘sishni atrof-muhitni himoya qilish bilan muvozanatlashtirishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Education plays a vital role in achieving sustainable development.
Sustainable development goals were set by the United Nations in 2015.
Farmers are adopting sustainable development practices to preserve soil health.
Tourism can support sustainable development if managed responsibly.
Investing in sustainable development creates long-term economic benefits.
Many businesses now incorporate sustainable development into their strategies.
Sustainable development helps reduce poverty while protecting nature.
extraExampleTranslations: Ta’lim barqaror rivojlanishga erishishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Barqaror rivojlanish maqsadlari Birlashgan Millatlar Tashkiloti tomonidan 2015-yilda belgilangan.
Fermerlar tuproq salomatligini saqlash uchun barqaror rivojlanish amaliyotlarini qo‘llamoqda.
Turizm mas’uliyat bilan boshqarilsa, barqaror rivojlanishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Barqaror rivojlanishga sarmoya kiritish uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy foyda keltiradi.
Ko‘plab bizneslar endi o‘z strategiyalariga barqaror rivojlanishni kiritmoqda.
Barqaror rivojlanish tabiatni himoya qilgan holda qashshoqlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Gases in the Earth’s atmosphere that trap heat, such as carbon dioxide and methane, contributing to global warming.
words.definitionUz: Issiqxona gazlari — Yer atmosferasida issiqlikni ushlab turadigan gazlar (masalan, karbonat angidrid va metan), ular global isishga sabab bo‘ladi.
words.example1: Burning fossil fuels releases large amounts of greenhouse gases.
words.example1Translation: Qazilma yoqilg‘ilarni yoqish katta miqdorda issiqxona gazlarini chiqaradi.
words.example2: Methane is one of the most potent greenhouse gases.
words.example2Translation: Metan eng kuchli issiqxona gazlaridan biridir.
words.example3: Reducing greenhouse gases is essential to slow down climate change.
words.example3Translation: Issiqxona gazlarini kamaytirish iqlim o‘zgarishini sekinlashtirish uchun zarur.
extraExamples: Agriculture is a significant source of greenhouse gases worldwide.
International treaties aim to limit greenhouse gas emissions.
Cars and factories are major producers of greenhouse gases.
Scientists monitor greenhouse gas levels in the atmosphere regularly.
Switching to renewable energy helps decrease greenhouse gases.
Greenhouse gases create a blanket effect that warms the planet.
Cutting down on meat consumption can reduce personal greenhouse gas emissions.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloq xo‘jaligi butun dunyoda issiqxona gazlarining muhim manbaidir.
Xalqaro shartnomalar issiqxona gazlari chiqindilarini cheklashga qaratilgan.
Avtomobillar va zavodlar issiqxona gazlarining asosiy ishlab chiqaruvchilaridir.
Olimlar atmosferadagi issiqxona gazlari darajasini muntazam kuzatib boradi.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga o‘tish issiqxona gazlarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Issiqxona gazlari sayyorani isitadigan adyol effekti yaratadi.
Go‘sht iste’molini kamaytirish shaxsiy issiqxona gazlari chiqindilarini qisqartirishi mumkin.

words.definition: Not harmful to the environment; designed to have minimal negative impact on the natural world.
words.definitionUz: Ekologik toza — atrof-muhitga zararli bo‘lmagan, tabiatga minimal salbiy ta’sir ko‘rsatadigan narsalar uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She always chooses eco-friendly cleaning products.
words.example1Translation: U har doim ekologik toza tozalash vositalarini tanlaydi.
words.example2: The company launched a new line of eco-friendly packaging.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya ekologik toza qadoqlashning yangi turini chiqardi.
words.example3: Using public transport is an eco-friendly way to travel.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat transportidan foydalanish sayohat qilishning ekologik toza usuli.
extraExamples: Eco-friendly habits like recycling can make a big difference.
Many hotels now offer eco-friendly amenities to attract tourists.
The government promotes eco-friendly building materials.
Buying eco-friendly clothes supports sustainable fashion.
Bamboo is a popular eco-friendly alternative to plastic.
Parents are teaching children to make eco-friendly choices.
Eco-friendly products often cost a bit more but are worth it.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayta ishlash kabi ekologik odatlar katta farq yaratishi mumkin.
Ko‘p mehmonxonalar sayyohlarni jalb qilish uchun ekologik toza qulayliklarni taklif qilmoqda.
Hukumat ekologik toza qurilish materiallarini rag‘batlantiradi.
Ekologik toza kiyimlarni sotib olish barqaror modani qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Bambuk plastmassaning mashhur ekologik toza alternatividir.
Ota-onalar bolalarga ekologik toza tanlov qilishni o‘rgatmoqda.
Ekologik toza mahsulotlar biroz qimmatroq bo‘lsa-da, arziydi.

words.definition: The presence of harmful substances or contaminants in the natural environment, causing adverse effects.
words.definitionUz: Ifloslanish — tabiat muhitida zararli moddalar yoki ifloslantiruvchilar mavjud bo‘lib, salbiy oqibatlarga olib keladi.
words.example1: Air pollution in big cities is a serious health problem.
words.example1Translation: Katta shaharlardagi havo ifloslanishi jiddiy sog‘liq muammosidir.
words.example2: The factory was fined for water pollution.
words.example2Translation: Zavod suv ifloslanishi uchun jarimaga tortildi.
words.example3: Reducing plastic use helps prevent ocean pollution.
words.example3Translation: Plastmassa ishlatishni kamaytirish okean ifloslanishining oldini olishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Noise pollution affects both humans and wildlife.
Governments are introducing stricter laws against pollution.
Pollution from vehicles contributes to respiratory diseases.
Cleaning up pollution in rivers takes many years.
Light pollution makes it difficult to see the stars at night.
Soil pollution reduces the quality of agricultural land.
Raising awareness is key to fighting pollution.
extraExampleTranslations: Shovqin ifloslanishi odamlar va yovvoyi hayvonlarga ta’sir qiladi.
Hukumatlar ifloslanishga qarshi qat’iyroq qonunlarni joriy etmoqda.
Avtomobillardan chiqadigan ifloslanish nafas olish kasalliklariga sabab bo‘ladi.
Daryolardagi ifloslanishni tozalash ko‘p yillar talab qiladi.
Yorug‘lik ifloslanishi tunda yulduzlarni ko‘rishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Tuproq ifloslanishi qishloq xo‘jaligi yerlari sifatini pasaytiradi.
Axborotni oshirish ifloslanishga qarshi kurashning kalitidir.

words.definition: The protection and careful management of the environment and natural resources.
words.definitionUz: Muhofaza qilish — atrof-muhit va tabiiy resurslarni himoya qilish va ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarish.
words.example1: Wildlife conservation is important for protecting endangered species.
words.example1Translation: Yovvoyi hayvonlarni muhofaza qilish yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarni saqlash uchun muhim.
words.example2: Energy conservation can significantly reduce your bills.
words.example2Translation: Energiyani tejash sizning hisobingizni sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3: The national park focuses on the conservation of forests and rivers.
words.example3Translation: Milliy bog‘ o‘rmonlar va daryolarni muhofaza qilishga e’tibor qaratadi.
extraExamples: Water conservation is essential in dry regions.
Many organizations work on marine conservation.
Conservation efforts have helped bring some animals back from extinction.
Personal conservation habits include turning off lights when not needed.
Soil conservation prevents erosion and maintains farmland productivity.
International conservation projects often involve local communities.
Conservation education should start from a young age.
extraExampleTranslations: Suvni tejash qurg‘oq hududlarda juda zarur.
Ko‘p tashkilotlar dengiz muhofazasida ishlamoqda.
Muhofaza choralar ba’zi hayvonlarni yo‘q bo‘lishdan qaytarishga yordam berdi.
Shaxsiy tejash odatlari orasida kerak bo‘lmaganda chiroqlarni o‘chirish bor.
Tuproqni muhofaza qilish eroziyani oldini oladi va qishloq xo‘jaligi hosildorligini saqlaydi.
Xalqaro muhofaza loyihalari ko‘pincha mahalliy jamoalarni jalb qiladi.
Muhofaza bo‘yicha ta’limni yoshlikdan boshlash kerak.

words.definition: A long-term change in global or regional climate patterns, mainly caused by human activities.
words.definitionUz: Iqlim o‘zgarishi — asosan inson faoliyati tufayli global yoki mintaqaviy iqlim naqshlarining uzoq muddatli o‘zgarishi.
words.example1: Climate change is causing more extreme weather events worldwide.
words.example1Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi butun dunyoda ob-havoning ekstremal hodisalarini ko‘paytirmoqda.
words.example2: Scientists warn that urgent action is needed to combat climate change.
words.example2Translation: Olimlar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kurashish uchun shoshilinch harakatlar zarurligini ogohlantirmoqda.
words.example3: Reducing carbon emissions is one of the best ways to slow climate change.
words.example3Translation: Uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish iqlim o‘zgarishini sekinlashtirishning eng yaxshi usullaridan biri.
extraExamples: Climate change affects agriculture and food security.
Young people are leading protests against climate change.
The melting of polar ice is a clear sign of climate change.
Governments are setting targets to address climate change.
Climate change impacts coral reefs and marine life.
Adapting to climate change is as important as preventing it.
Climate change education is now part of many school curricula.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishi qishloq xo‘jaligi va oziq-ovqat xavfsizligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Yoshlar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi norozilik namoyishlarini boshqarmoqda.
Qutb muzlarining erishi iqlim o‘zgarishining aniq belgisi.
Hukumatlar iqlim o‘zgarishini hal qilish uchun maqsadlar qo‘ymoqda.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi marjon riflariga va dengiz hayotiga ta’sir qiladi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishiga moslashish uni oldini olish kabi muhimdir.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi bo‘yicha ta’lim endi ko‘plab maktab darsliklariga kiritilgan.

words.definition: The variety of plant and animal life in a particular habitat or ecosystem.
words.definitionUz: Biologik xilma-xillik — muayyan yashash muhiti yoki ekotizimdagi o‘simlik va hayvonlarning xilma-xilligi.
words.example1: The rainforest is known for its incredible biodiversity.
words.example1Translation: Tropik o‘rmon o‘zining ajoyib biologik xilma-xilligi bilan mashhur.
words.example2: Protecting biodiversity is crucial for ecosystem stability.
words.example2Translation: Biologik xilma-xillikni himoya qilish ekotizim barqarorligi uchun juda muhim.
words.example3: Loss of biodiversity can lead to the collapse of food chains.
words.example3Translation: Biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi oziq-ovqat zanjirlarining parchalanishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Urban development often threatens local biodiversity.
Farmers can support biodiversity by planting different crops.
Marine biodiversity is declining due to overfishing.
National parks play an important role in preserving biodiversity.
Scientists study biodiversity to discover new medicines.
Biodiversity makes ecosystems more resilient to changes.
Conservation programs aim to restore biodiversity in damaged areas.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar qurilishi ko‘pincha mahalliy biologik xilma-xillikka tahdid soladi.
Fermerlar turli ekinlarni ekish orqali biologik xilma-xillikni qo‘llab-quvvatlashi mumkin.
Dengiz biologik xilma-xilligi ortiqcha baliq ovlash tufayli kamaymoqda.
Milliy bog‘lar biologik xilma-xillikni saqlashda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Olimlar yangi dori-darmonlarni kashf etish uchun biologik xilma-xillikni o‘rganadi.
Biologik xilma-xillik ekotizimlarni o‘zgarishlarga nisbatan chidamliroq qiladi.
Muhofaza dasturlari zarar ko‘rgan hududlarda biologik xilma-xillikni tiklashga qaratilgan.

words.definition: The deterioration of the environment through the depletion of natural resources and the destruction of ecosystems.
words.definitionUz: Atrof-muhitning yomonlashishi — tabiiy resurslarning kamayishi va ekotizimlarning vayron bo‘lishi orqali atrof-muhitning pasayishi.
words.example1: Environmental degradation in the region has led to desertification.
words.example1Translation: Mintaqadagi atrof-muhitning yomonlashishi cho‘llanishga olib keldi.
words.example2: Poverty often forces people into activities that cause environmental degradation.
words.example2Translation: Qashshoqlik ko‘pincha odamlarni atrof-muhitni yomonlashtiradigan faoliyatlarga undaydi.
words.example3: Governments must address environmental degradation to ensure a healthy future.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar sog‘lom kelajakni ta’minlash uchun atrof-muhitning yomonlashishini hal qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Industrial activities are a major cause of environmental degradation.
Reforestation can help reverse environmental degradation.
Environmental degradation affects the quality of life for local communities.
The report highlights the rapid environmental degradation in coastal areas.
Education can play a big role in preventing environmental degradation.
Environmental degradation leads to loss of habitats for wildlife.
Sustainable practices aim to minimize environmental degradation.
extraExampleTranslations: Sanoat faoliyati atrof-muhitning yomonlashishining asosiy sabablaridan biri.
O‘rmonlarni qayta tiklash atrof-muhitning yomonlashishini bartaraf etishga yordam beradi.
Atrof-muhitning yomonlashishi mahalliy jamoalar hayot sifatiga ta’sir qiladi.
Hisobot qirg‘oq hududlarida atrof-muhitning tez yomonlashishini ta’kidlaydi.
Ta’lim atrof-muhitning yomonlashishini oldini olishda katta rol o‘ynashi mumkin.
Atrof-muhitning yomonlashishi yovvoyi hayvonlar uchun yashash joylarining yo‘qolishiga olib keladi.
Barqaror amaliyotlar atrof-muhitning yomonlashishini minimallashtirishga qaratilgan.

words.definition: A lifestyle or approach that aims to eliminate waste by reusing, recycling, and composting everything possible.
words.definitionUz: Nol chiqindi — iloji boricha hamma narsani qayta ishlatish, qayta ishlash va kompost qilish orqali chiqindilarni yo‘q qilishga qaratilgan turmush tarzi yoki yondashuv.
words.example1: She follows a zero-waste lifestyle by using reusable bags and containers.
words.example1Translation: U qayta ishlatiladigan sumkalar va idishlardan foydalanib, nol chiqindi turmush tarzini olib boradi.
words.example2: The zero-waste movement is gaining popularity around the world.
words.example2Translation: Nol chiqindi harakati butun dunyoda mashhurlikka erishmoqda.
words.example3: Restaurants are adopting zero-waste practices to reduce their environmental impact.
words.example3Translation: Restoranlar atrof-muhitga ta’sirini kamaytirish uchun nol chiqindi amaliyotlarini qo‘llamoqda.
extraExamples: Zero-waste shopping involves buying products without packaging.
Achieving a completely zero-waste home takes time and commitment.
Many cities are encouraging zero-waste initiatives in schools.
Zero-waste principles can be applied to both households and businesses.
The zero-waste approach helps conserve natural resources.
She started a blog about her journey toward zero-waste living.
Zero-waste events are becoming more common at conferences.
extraExampleTranslations: Nol chiqindi xarid qilish qadoqsiz mahsulotlarni sotib olishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
To‘liq nol chiqindi uyga erishish vaqt va sadoqatni talab qiladi.
Ko‘p shaharlar maktablarda nol chiqindi tashabbuslarini rag‘batlantirmoqda.
Nol chiqindi tamoyillarini ham uy xo‘jaliklari, ham korxonalar qo‘llashi mumkin.
Nol chiqindi yondashuvi tabiiy resurslarni tejashga yordam beradi.
U nol chiqindi hayotiga o‘tish sayohati haqida blog ochdi.
Nol chiqindi tadbirlari konferensiyalarda tobora ko‘proq uchramoqda.

words.definition: Natural fuels formed from the remains of ancient plants and animals, such as coal, oil, and natural gas.
words.definitionUz: Qazilma yoqilg‘ilar — qadimgi o‘simlik va hayvonlar qoldiqlaridan hosil bo‘lgan tabiiy yoqilg‘ilar (ko‘mir, neft va tabiiy gaz).
words.example1: Most of the world’s energy still comes from fossil fuels.
words.example1Translation: Dunyo energiyasining katta qismi hali ham qazilma yoqilg‘ilardan olinadi.
words.example2: Burning fossil fuels is the main cause of air pollution and climate change.
words.example2Translation: Qazilma yoqilg‘ilarni yoqish havo ifloslanishi va iqlim o‘zgarishining asosiy sababi.
words.example3: The shift away from fossil fuels is necessary for a sustainable future.
words.example3Translation: Qazilma yoqilg‘ilardan voz kechish barqaror kelajak uchun zarur.
extraExamples: Fossil fuels are non-renewable resources that will eventually run out.
Many countries are trying to reduce their dependence on fossil fuels.
Extracting fossil fuels can damage local ecosystems.
The price of fossil fuels fluctuates based on global supply and demand.
Fossil fuel subsidies are being phased out in several nations.
Scientists are developing alternatives to replace fossil fuels.
Reliance on fossil fuels contributes to geopolitical tensions.
extraExampleTranslations: Qazilma yoqilg‘ilar qayta tiklanmaydigan resurslar bo‘lib, oxir-oqibat tugaydi.
Ko‘p mamlakatlar qazilma yoqilg‘ilarga bog‘liqlikni kamaytirishga harakat qilmoqda.
Qazilma yoqilg‘ilarni qazib olish mahalliy ekotizimlarga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Qazilma yoqilg‘ilar narxi global taklif va talabga qarab o‘zgaradi.
Bir necha mamlakatlarda qazilma yoqilg‘ilarga subsidiyalar bosqichma-bosqich bekor qilinmoqda.
Olimlar qazilma yoqilg‘ilarni almashtirish uchun alternativlarni ishlab chiqmoqda.
Qazilma yoqilg‘ilarga tayanish geosiyosiy ziddiyatlarga hissa qo‘shadi.

words.definition: The release of carbon dioxide and other carbon compounds into the atmosphere, primarily from burning fossil fuels.
words.definitionUz: Uglerod chiqindilari — asosan qazilma yoqilg‘ilarni yoqish natijasida atmosferaga karbonat angidrid va boshqa uglerod birikmalarining chiqarilishi.
words.example1: Factories must report their annual carbon emissions.
words.example1Translation: Zavodlar yillik uglerod chiqindilarini hisobot qilishlari shart.
words.example2: Carbon emissions from transportation are a major environmental concern.
words.example2Translation: Transportdan chiqadigan uglerod chiqindilari atrof-muhitning asosiy muammolaridan biri.
words.example3: International efforts focus on cutting carbon emissions by 2030.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro harakatlar 2030-yilga qadar uglerod chiqindilarini qisqartirishga qaratilgan.
extraExamples: Planting trees is one way to offset carbon emissions.
Carbon emissions trading is used in some countries to control pollution.
Electric vehicles help reduce personal carbon emissions.
The steel industry produces high levels of carbon emissions.
Monitoring carbon emissions is essential for climate policy.
Many companies have set targets to achieve net-zero carbon emissions.
Rising carbon emissions continue to accelerate global warming.
extraExampleTranslations: Daraxt ekish uglerod chiqindilarini qoplashning bir usuli.
Uglerod chiqindilarini savdo qilish ba’zi mamlakatlarda ifloslanishni nazorat qilish uchun qo‘llaniladi.
Elektr transport vositalari shaxsiy uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Po‘lat sanoati yuqori darajadagi uglerod chiqindilarini hosil qiladi.
Uglerod chiqindilarini monitoring qilish iqlim siyosati uchun zarur.
Ko‘p kompaniyalar sof nol uglerod chiqindilariga erishish maqsadlarini qo‘ygan.
Uglerod chiqindilarining o‘sishi global isishni tezlashtirmoqda.

words.definition: A community of living organisms interacting with each other and their physical environment.
words.definitionUz: Ekotizim — bir-biri bilan va atrof-muhit bilan o‘zaro ta’sir qiluvchi tirik organizmlar jamiyati.
words.example1: Coral reefs are one of the most diverse ecosystems on Earth.
words.example1Translation: Marjon riflari Yer yuzidagi eng xilma-xil ekotizimlardan biridir.
words.example2: Pollution can disrupt the balance of an ecosystem.
words.example2Translation: Ifloslanish ekotizim muvozanatini buzishi mumkin.
words.example3: The forest ecosystem provides habitat for thousands of species.
words.example3Translation: O‘rmon ekotizimi minglab turlar uchun yashash joyini ta’minlaydi.
extraExamples: Understanding the ecosystem is important for effective conservation.
Climate change is altering many natural ecosystems.
Farmers work to maintain healthy soil ecosystems.
An ecosystem includes both biotic and abiotic components.
Human activities often have unintended effects on ecosystems.
Wetland ecosystems are vital for water purification.
Scientists study how species interact within an ecosystem.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekotizimni tushunish samarali muhofaza uchun muhim.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi ko‘plab tabiiy ekotizimlarni o‘zgartirmoqda.
Fermerlar sog‘lom tuproq ekotizimini saqlash ustida ishlaydi.
Ekotizim tirik va noorganik komponentlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Inson faoliyati ko‘pincha ekotizimlarga kutilmagan ta’sir ko‘rsatadi.
Suvli-botqoq ekotizimlari suvni tozalash uchun juda muhim.
Olimlar turlar ekotizim ichida qanday o‘zaro ta’sir qilishini o‘rganadi.

words.definition: Educating the whole person by addressing intellectual, physical, emotional, and social development rather than focusing only on academic knowledge.
words.definitionUz: Holistik ta’lim – bu faqat bilim berish bilan cheklanmay, insonning aqli, jismi, his-tuyg‘ulari va ijtimoiy jihatlarini ham rivojlantirishga qaratilgan yondashuv.
words.example1: The school follows a holistic education approach that includes mindfulness and physical activities.
words.example1Translation: Maktab ong va jismoniy mashqlarni o‘z ichiga olgan holistik ta’lim yondashuviga amal qiladi.
words.example2: Holistic education helps students develop better emotional intelligence alongside academic skills.
words.example2Translation: Holistik ta’lim o‘quvchilarga akademik ko‘nikmalar bilan birga yaxshiroq emotsional intellektni rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Many parents prefer holistic education because it nurtures creativity and well-being.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab ota-onalar ijodkorlik va farovonlikni rivojlantirgani uchun holistik ta’limni afzal ko‘rishadi.
extraExamples: Holistic education emphasizes the connection between mind, body, and spirit.
Schools practicing holistic education often have smaller class sizes.
The curriculum in holistic education integrates arts, sciences, and ethics.
Holistic education aims to create balanced and responsible citizens.
Teachers in holistic education act more as facilitators than traditional instructors.
Research shows that holistic education can reduce student stress levels.
Implementing holistic education requires trained teachers and supportive policies.
extraExampleTranslations: Holistik ta’lim aql, tan va ruh o‘rtasidagi bog‘lanishni ta’kidlaydi.
Holistik ta’lim qo‘llaydigan maktablarda ko‘pincha sinflar kichikroq bo‘ladi.
Holistik ta’lim dasturida san’at, fan va axloq birlashtiriladi.
Holistik ta’lim muvozanatli va mas’uliyatli fuqarolarni shakllantirishni maqsad qiladi.
Holistik ta’limdagi o‘qituvchilar an’anaviy o‘qituvchilarga qaraganda ko‘proq yordamchi rolini o‘ynaydi.
Tadqiqotlar shuni ko‘rsatadiki, holistik ta’lim o‘quvchilarning stress darajasini pasaytirishi mumkin.
Holistik ta’limni joriy etish uchun malakali o‘qituvchilar va qo‘llab-quvvatlovchi siyosat kerak.

words.definition: Learning by memorizing information through repetition without understanding its meaning or context.
words.definitionUz: Mexanik o‘qish – bu ma’noni tushunmasdan, faqat takrorlash orqali ma’lumotni yodlab olish usuli.
words.example1: Many students rely on rote learning to pass exams but forget the material soon after.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab o‘quvchilar imtihonlarni topshirish uchun mexanik o‘qishga tayanadi, lekin keyin tez unutib yuboradi.
words.example2: Rote learning is less effective than understanding-based methods for long-term knowledge.
words.example2Translation: Mexanik o‘qish uzoq muddatli bilim uchun tushunishga asoslangan usullarga qaraganda kamroq samarali.
words.example3: Critics argue that rote learning discourages critical thinking in classrooms.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilarning fikricha, mexanik o‘qish sinflarda tanqidiy fikrlashni susaytiradi.
extraExamples: Traditional education in some countries is heavily based on rote learning.
Rote learning can help with basic facts like multiplication tables.
Modern teaching methods are moving away from rote learning toward deeper understanding.
Students who use only rote learning often struggle with problem-solving questions.
Rote learning requires constant revision to keep information in memory.
The teacher discouraged rote learning and encouraged students to ask questions.
Rote learning is sometimes necessary when learning vocabulary in a new language.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba’zi mamlakatlarda an’anaviy ta’lim mexanik o‘qishga asoslangan.
Mexanik o‘qish ko‘paytirish jadvaliga o‘xshash asosiy faktlarni o‘rganishda yordam berishi mumkin.
Zamonaviy o‘qitish usullari mexanik o‘qishdan chuqurroq tushunishga o‘tmoqda.
Faqat mexanik o‘qishdan foydalanadigan o‘quvchilar ko‘pincha muammolarni yechish savollarida qiynaladi.
Mexanik o‘qishdagi ma’lumotni eslab qolish uchun doimiy takrorlash kerak.
O‘qituvchi mexanik o‘qishni rad etib, o‘quvchilarni savol berishga undadi.
Yangi tilda lug‘atlarni o‘rganishda mexanik o‘qish ba’zan zarur bo‘ladi.

words.definition: The process of designing, planning, implementing, and evaluating the courses and content taught in educational institutions.
words.definitionUz: O‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish – bu maktab yoki universitetlarda o‘qitiladigan fanlar va mazmunni rejalashtirish, yaratish va baholash jarayoni.
words.example1: Curriculum development requires input from teachers, experts, and policymakers.
words.example1Translation: O‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish o‘qituvchilar, mutaxassislar va siyosatchilarning fikrlarini talab qiladi.
words.example2: The school is undergoing curriculum development to include more digital skills.
words.example2Translation: Maktabda raqamli ko‘nikmalarni ko‘proq qo‘shish uchun o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish jarayoni ketmoqda.
words.example3: Effective curriculum development ensures that education meets current societal needs.
words.example3Translation: Samarali o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish ta’limning hozirgi jamiyat ehtiyojlariga mos kelishini ta’minlaydi.
extraExamples: Curriculum development is an ongoing process that adapts to new technologies.
Stakeholders play an important role in curriculum development.
Poor curriculum development can lead to irrelevant learning materials.
The ministry announced a major curriculum development project next year.
Curriculum development involves setting clear learning objectives.
Teachers are involved in curriculum development to make it practical.
International standards often influence national curriculum development.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish yangi texnologiyalarga moslashadigan doimiy jarayon.
Manfaatdor tomonlar o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Yomon ishlab chiqilgan o‘quv dasturi o‘rganish materiallarini keraksiz qilishi mumkin.
Vazirlik kelasi yilda katta o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish loyihasini e’lon qildi.
O‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqish aniq o‘quv maqsadlarini belgilashni o‘z ichiga oladi.
O‘qituvchilar amaliy bo‘lishi uchun o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqishda ishtirok etishadi.
Xalqaro standartlar milliy o‘quv dasturini ishlab chiqishga ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: The objective analysis and evaluation of an issue in order to form a judgment.
words.definitionUz: Tanqidiy fikrlash – bu biror masalani xolis tahlil qilib, baholash va shu asosda o‘z xulosasiga kelish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Schools should teach critical thinking to help students make better decisions.
words.example1Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarga yaxshiroq qaror qabul qilishda yordam berish uchun tanqidiy fikrlashni o‘rgatishi kerak.
words.example2: Critical thinking is essential in today’s world full of misinformation.
words.example2Translation: Soxta axborotlar ko‘p bo‘lgan bugungi dunyoda tanqidiy fikrlash juda muhim.
words.example3: The course improved my critical thinking skills significantly.
words.example3Translation: Kurs mening tanqidiy fikrlash ko‘nikmalarimni sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.
extraExamples: Critical thinking involves questioning assumptions and evidence.
Parents can encourage critical thinking by discussing news with their children.
Critical thinking is a key skill employers look for in graduates.
Games and puzzles are great tools for developing critical thinking.
Without critical thinking, students may accept information without verification.
Universities focus on developing critical thinking through debates and essays.
Critical thinking helps people avoid manipulation by advertising and politics.
extraExampleTranslations: Tanqidiy fikrlash taxminlar va dalillarni shubha ostiga olishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ota-onalar bolalari bilan yangiliklarni muhokama qilish orqali tanqidiy fikrlashni rivojlantirishi mumkin.
Tanqidiy fikrlash ish beruvchilar bitiruvchilarda izlaydigan asosiy ko‘nikma.
O‘yinlar va boshqotirmalar tanqidiy fikrlashni rivojlantirish uchun ajoyib vosita.
Tanqidiy fikrlashsiz o‘quvchilar ma’lumotni tasdiqlamasdan qabul qilishlari mumkin.
Universitetlar bahs va insholar orqali tanqidiy fikrlashni rivojlantirishga e’tibor beradi.
Tanqidiy fikrlash odamlarga reklama va siyosat orqali manipulyatsiyadan qochishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The ability to use digital technologies effectively and responsibly to find, evaluate, create, and communicate information.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli savodxonlik – bu raqamli texnologiyalardan samarali va mas’uliyatli foydalanish, axborotni topish, baholash, yaratish va tarqatish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Digital literacy is now considered as important as reading and writing.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli savodxonlik hozir o‘qish va yozish kabi muhim hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The program aims to improve digital literacy among senior citizens.
words.example2Translation: Dastur keksa avlod orasida raqamli savodxonlikni oshirishni maqsad qilgan.
words.example3: Without basic digital literacy, people struggle to access online government services.
words.example3Translation: Asosiy raqamli savodxonlik bo‘lmasa, odamlar davlatning onlayn xizmatlaridan foydalanishda qiynaladi.
extraExamples: Schools are integrating digital literacy into the regular curriculum.
Digital literacy includes understanding online safety and privacy.
Improving digital literacy can help reduce the digital divide.
Employers value employees with strong digital literacy skills.
Digital literacy workshops are offered free in many libraries.
Parents should guide their children on responsible digital literacy.
The government launched a national digital literacy campaign.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktablar raqamli savodxonlikni oddiy o‘quv dasturiga kiritmoqda.
Raqamli savodxonlik onlayn xavfsizlik va shaxsiy hayotni himoya qilishni ham o‘z ichiga oladi.
Raqamli savodxonlikni oshirish raqamli tafovutni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Ish beruvchilar kuchli raqamli savodxonlikka ega xodimlarni qadrlaydi.
Ko‘plab kutubxonalarda raqamli savodxonlik bo‘yicha bepul seminarlar o‘tkaziladi.
Ota-onalar farzandlariga mas’uliyatli raqamli savodxonlikda yo‘l-yo‘riq ko‘rsatishlari kerak.
Hukumat milliy raqamli savodxonlik kampaniyasini boshladi.

words.definition: An education system where all students, including those with disabilities or special needs, learn together in the same classrooms.
words.definitionUz: Inklyuziv ta’lim – nogironligi bor yoki maxsus ehtiyojli barcha o‘quvchilar oddiy sinflarda birga o‘qishi mumkin bo‘lgan ta’lim tizimi.
words.example1: Inclusive education promotes equality and social integration.
words.example1Translation: Inklyuziv ta’lim tenglik va ijtimoiy integratsiyani rag‘batlantiradi.
words.example2: The school has successfully implemented inclusive education for autistic children.
words.example2Translation: Maktab autizmli bolalar uchun inklyuziv ta’limni muvaffaqiyatli joriy etdi.
words.example3: Teachers need special training to support inclusive education effectively.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchilar inklyuziv ta’limni samarali qo‘llash uchun maxsus tayyorgarlikdan o‘tishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Inclusive education benefits all students, not just those with disabilities.
Many countries are shifting toward inclusive education policies.
Inclusive education requires appropriate classroom resources and support.
Parents of children with special needs advocate strongly for inclusive education.
Challenges in inclusive education include large class sizes.
Inclusive education fosters empathy and understanding among peers.
Successful inclusive education depends on collaboration between teachers and specialists.
extraExampleTranslations: Inklyuziv ta’lim nafaqat nogironligi bor bolalarga, balki barcha o‘quvchilarga foyda keltiradi.
Ko‘plab mamlakatlar inklyuziv ta’lim siyosatiga o‘tmoqda.
Inklyuziv ta’lim mos sinf resurslari va yordamni talab qiladi.
Maxsus ehtiyojli bolalarning ota-onalari inklyuziv ta’limni faol qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Inklyuziv ta’limdagi qiyinchiliklardan biri katta sinf hajmi hisoblanadi.
Inklyuziv ta’lim tengdoshlar orasida hamdardlik va tushunishni rivojlantiradi.
Muvaffaqiyatli inklyuziv ta’lim o‘qituvchilar va mutaxassislar hamkorligiga bog‘liq.

words.definition: The use of uniform tests administered and scored in a consistent manner to measure student performance across schools or regions.
words.definitionUz: Standartlashtirilgan testlash – barcha maktablarda bir xil tarzda o‘tkaziladigan va baholanadigan testlar orqali o‘quvchilarning bilimini o‘lchash usuli.
words.example1: Standardized testing is used to evaluate the quality of education nationwide.
words.example1Translation: Standartlashtirilgan testlash butun mamlakat bo‘ylab ta’lim sifatini baholash uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example2: Many students feel stressed because of frequent standardized testing.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab o‘quvchilar tez-tez o‘tkaziladigan standart testlar tufayli stressga tushadi.
words.example3: Critics say standardized testing does not measure creativity or practical skills.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilarning aytishicha, standart testlash ijodkorlik yoki amaliy ko‘nikmalarni o‘lchamaydi.
extraExamples: Standardized testing results are often used for school rankings.
Teachers sometimes teach to the test due to standardized testing pressure.
The government is reforming the standardized testing system.
Standardized testing can help identify areas where students need more support.
Some countries are reducing the number of standardized tests.
Standardized testing has both advantages and disadvantages in education.
Preparing for standardized testing takes up a lot of classroom time.
extraExampleTranslations: Standart test natijalari ko‘pincha maktablarni reytinglash uchun ishlatiladi.
O‘qituvchilar standart test bosimi tufayli testga qaratib o‘qitishadi.
Hukumat standart test tizimini isloh qilmoqda.
Standart testlash o‘quvchilar qo‘shimcha yordamga muhtoj bo‘lgan joylarni aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Ba’zi mamlakatlar standart testlar sonini kamaytirmoqda.
Standart testlash ta’limda ham afzalliklar, ham kamchiliklarga ega.
Standart testlarga tayyorgarlik ko‘p sinf vaqtini oladi.

words.definition: The continuous pursuit of knowledge and skills throughout one’s entire life, beyond formal education.
words.definitionUz: Umr bo‘yi o‘qish – bu rasmiy ta’lim tugagandan keyin ham butun hayot davomida bilim va ko‘nikmalarni doimiy ravishda oshirib borish.
words.example1: In today’s fast-changing world, lifelong learning is essential for career success.
words.example1Translation: Tez o‘zgaruvchan dunyoda umr bo‘yi o‘qish karyera muvaffaqiyati uchun zarur.
words.example2: Many adults engage in lifelong learning through online courses.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab kattalar onlayn kurslar orqali umr bo‘yi o‘qish bilan shug‘ullanadi.
words.example3: Lifelong learning keeps the mind active and improves quality of life.
words.example3Translation: Umr bo‘yi o‘qish miyani faol saqlaydi va hayot sifatini yaxshilaydi.
extraExamples: Lifelong learning includes both professional development and personal hobbies.
Governments encourage lifelong learning to build a skilled workforce.
Reading books is one of the simplest forms of lifelong learning.
Lifelong learning helps older people adapt to new technologies.
The concept of lifelong learning is becoming more popular globally.
Companies support lifelong learning by offering training programs.
Lifelong learning fosters personal growth and adaptability.
extraExampleTranslations: Umr bo‘yi o‘qish professional rivojlanish va shaxsiy qiziqishlarni ham qamrab oladi.
Hukumatlar malakali ishchi kuchini shakllantirish uchun umr bo‘yi o‘qishni rag‘batlantiradi.
Kitob o‘qish umr bo‘yi o‘qishning eng sodda shakllaridan biri.
Umr bo‘yi o‘qish keksa odamlarga yangi texnologiyalarga moslashishga yordam beradi.
Umr bo‘yi o‘qish tushunchasi dunyo bo‘ylab tobora ommalashmoqda.
Kompaniyalar o‘quv dasturlarini taklif qilib, umr bo‘yi o‘qishni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Umr bo‘yi o‘qish shaxsiy o‘sish va moslashuvchanlikni rivojlantiradi.

words.definition: The level of performance or success a student achieves in formal education, such as grades, exams, and qualifications.
words.definitionUz: Akademik yutuq – o‘quvchi rasmiy ta’limda erishgan natijalar, ya’ni baholar, imtihonlar va malaka darajasi.
words.example1: Her academic achievement earned her a scholarship to a top university.
words.example1Translation: Uning akademik yutuqlari unga nufuzli universitetga stipendiya olishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Academic achievement is influenced by both student effort and teaching quality.
words.example2Translation: Akademik yutuqqa ham o‘quvchining mehnati, ham o‘qitish sifati ta’sir qiladi.
words.example3: The school celebrates students with outstanding academic achievement every year.
words.example3Translation: Maktab har yili ajoyib akademik yutuqlarga ega o‘quvchilarni tantanali ravishda taqdirlaydi.
extraExamples: Parental involvement can positively affect children’s academic achievement.
Standardized tests are one measure of academic achievement.
Academic achievement alone does not guarantee success in life.
There is a strong link between academic achievement and future career opportunities.
Improving academic achievement is a priority for the education ministry.
Socioeconomic factors often influence academic achievement.
The program aims to raise academic achievement in underperforming schools.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalarning ishtiroki bolalarning akademik yutuqlariga ijobiy ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin.
Standart testlar akademik yutuqning bir o‘lchovi hisoblanadi.
Faqat akademik yutuqning o‘zi hayotdagi muvaffaqiyatni kafolatlamaydi.
Akademik yutuq va kelajakdagi karyera imkoniyatlari o‘rtasida kuchli bog‘liqlik bor.
Akademik yutuqlarni oshirish ta’lim vazirligi uchun ustuvor yo‘nalish.
Ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar ko‘pincha akademik yutuqlarga ta’sir qiladi.
Dastur past natija ko‘rsatayotgan maktablarda akademik yutuqlarni oshirishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: Education and training focused on practical skills and knowledge needed for specific trades or professions.
words.definitionUz: Kasbiy ta’lim – muayyan kasb yoki mutaxassislik uchun zarur bo‘lgan amaliy ko‘nikma va bilimlarni beradigan ta’lim.
words.example1: Vocational training helps young people enter the workforce quickly.
words.example1Translation: Kasbiy ta’lim yoshlarga ishchi kuchiga tezroq kirishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many countries are investing more in vocational training to address skills shortages.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab mamlakatlar malaka yetishmasligini bartaraf etish uchun kasbiy ta’limga ko‘proq sarmoya kiritmoqda.
words.example3: She completed a vocational training course in plumbing and started her own business.
words.example3Translation: U santexnika bo‘yicha kasbiy ta’lim kursini tugatib, o‘z biznesini ochdi.
extraExamples: Vocational training is often more hands-on than traditional academic education.
Vocational training can lead to well-paying jobs in technical fields.
The college offers vocational training in hospitality and tourism.
Apprenticeships are a popular form of vocational training.
Vocational training is crucial for economic development.
Some students combine vocational training with university studies.
Government scholarships are available for vocational training programs.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasbiy ta’lim an’anaviy akademik ta’limga qaraganda ko‘proq amaliy bo‘ladi.
