Kasbiy ta’lim texnik sohalarda yaxshi maoshli ishlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Kollej mehmondo‘stlik va turizm bo‘yicha kasbiy ta’lim taklif qiladi.
Shogirdlik kasbiy ta’limning mashhur shakli hisoblanadi.
Kasbiy ta’lim iqtisodiy rivojlanish uchun juda muhim.
Ba’zi o‘quvchilar kasbiy ta’limni universitet o‘qishi bilan birlashtiradi.
Kasbiy ta’lim dasturlari uchun davlat stipendiyalari mavjud.

words.definition: The degree of attention, interest, curiosity, and active involvement students show in the learning process.
words.definitionUz: O‘quvchilarning faolligi – o‘quv jarayonida ularning e’tibori, qiziqishi va faol ishtirok etish darajasi.
words.example1: Teachers use interactive methods to increase student engagement.
words.example1Translation: O‘qituvchilar o‘quvchilarning faolligini oshirish uchun interaktiv usullardan foydalanadi.
words.example2: Low student engagement can lead to poor academic performance.
words.example2Translation: O‘quvchilarning past faolligi akademik natijalarning yomonlashishiga olib keladi.
words.example3: Student engagement improves when lessons are relevant to real life.
words.example3Translation: Darslar hayotga yaqin bo‘lsa, o‘quvchilarning faolligi oshadi.
extraExamples: Technology can be a powerful tool for boosting student engagement.
Student engagement is higher in smaller classes.
Surveys are used to measure levels of student engagement.
Parental support plays a role in student engagement.
Games and group activities promote student engagement.
Lack of student engagement is a common challenge in online learning.
Schools are focusing more on student engagement strategies.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiya o‘quvchilar faolligini oshirishda kuchli vosita bo‘lishi mumkin.
Kichik sinflarda o‘quvchilarning faolligi yuqoriroq bo‘ladi.
So‘rovnomalar o‘quvchilar faolligi darajasini o‘lchash uchun ishlatiladi.
Ota-onalarning qo‘llab-quvvatlashi o‘quvchilar faolligiga ta’sir qiladi.
O‘yinlar va guruh mashg‘ulotlari o‘quvchilar faolligini rag‘batlantiradi.
O‘quvchilar faolligining pastligi onlayn o‘qishdagi keng tarqalgan muammo.
Maktablar o‘quvchilar faolligini oshirish strategiyalariga ko‘proq e’tibor bermoqda.

words.definition: Official certificates, diplomas, or degrees awarded by recognized educational institutions.
words.definitionUz: Rasmiy malakalar – tan olingan ta’lim muassasalari tomonidan beriladigan rasmiy sertifikat, diplom yoki darajalar.
words.example1: Formal qualifications are often required for professional jobs.
words.example1Translation: Professional ishlar uchun ko‘pincha rasmiy malakalar talab qilinadi.
words.example2: She gained formal qualifications in accounting through evening classes.
words.example2Translation: U kechki kurslarda buxgalteriya bo‘yicha rasmiy malaka oldi.
words.example3: Some employers value experience more than formal qualifications.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi ish beruvchilar tajribani rasmiy malakalardan muhimroq deb bilishadi.
extraExamples: Formal qualifications can open doors to higher education.
Obtaining formal qualifications requires passing exams and assessments.
The country recognizes foreign formal qualifications through an evaluation process.
Many people pursue formal qualifications later in life.
Formal qualifications provide a standardized measure of competence.
There is a growing debate about the value of formal qualifications in the modern job market.
Vocational courses also lead to recognized formal qualifications.
extraExampleTranslations: Rasmiy malakalar oliy ta’limga yo‘l ochishi mumkin.
Rasmiy malaka olish imtihon va baholashlardan o‘tishni talab qiladi.
Mamlakat chet el rasmiy malakalarini baholash jarayoni orqali tan oladi.
Ko‘p odamlar hayotning keyingi bosqichlarida rasmiy malaka oladi.
Rasmiy malakalar malaka darajasini standartlashtirilgan tarzda ko‘rsatadi.
Zamonaviy ish bozorida rasmiy malakalar qiymati haqida bahs kuchaymoqda.
Kasbiy kurslar ham tan olingan rasmiy malakalarga olib keladi.

words.definition: A method of education where students learn remotely, usually through online platforms, without being physically present in a classroom.
words.definitionUz: Masofaviy ta’lim – o‘quvchilar sinfda jismonan bo‘lmasdan, asosan onlayn platformalar orqali uzoqdan o‘qishi mumkin bo‘lgan ta’lim usuli.
words.example1: Distance learning became very popular during the pandemic.
words.example1Translation: Masofaviy ta’lim pandemiya davrida juda ommalashdi.
words.example2: Distance learning offers flexibility for working adults.
words.example2Translation: Masofaviy ta’lim ishlayotgan kattalar uchun moslashuvchanlik beradi.
words.example3: The university provides high-quality distance learning programs.
words.example3Translation: Universitet yuqori sifatli masofaviy ta’lim dasturlarini taklif etadi.
extraExamples: Distance learning requires good self-discipline from students.
Many platforms now offer interactive distance learning experiences.
Distance learning can help students in remote areas access education.
Some people prefer traditional classes over distance learning.
Distance learning has improved thanks to advances in technology.
Assessment in distance learning often includes online quizzes and assignments.
The government is expanding distance learning opportunities.
extraExampleTranslations: Masofaviy ta’lim o‘quvchilardan yaxshi o‘zini tuta bilishni talab qiladi.
Ko‘plab platformalar interaktiv masofaviy ta’lim tajribasini taklif qilmoqda.
Masofaviy ta’lim uzoq hududlardagi o‘quvchilarga ta’lim olish imkonini beradi.
Ba’zi odamlar masofaviy ta’limdan ko‘ra an’anaviy darslarni afzal ko‘rishadi.
Texnologiya rivoji tufayli masofaviy ta’lim yaxshilandi.
Masofaviy ta’limda baholash ko‘pincha onlayn test va topshiriqlar orqali amalga oshiriladi.
Hukumat masofaviy ta’lim imkoniyatlarini kengaytirmoqda.

words.definition: A detailed examination and evaluation of the elements or structure of something, often involving questioning and reasoning.
words.definitionUz: Tanqidiy tahlil – biror narsaning tarkibiy qismlari yoki tuzilishini chuqur o‘rganib, baholash va savol berishga asoslangan jarayon.
words.example1: The assignment required students to write a critical analysis of the novel.
words.example1Translation: Vazifa talabalardan romanning tanqidiy tahlilini yozishni talab qildi.
words.example2: Critical analysis skills are vital for research and academic writing.
words.example2Translation: Tanqidiy tahlil ko‘nikmalari tadqiqot va ilmiy yozuvlar uchun juda muhim.
words.example3: She presented a critical analysis of the government’s new policy.
words.example3Translation: U hukumatning yangi siyosatini tanqidiy tahlil qilib taqdim etdi.
extraExamples: Critical analysis goes beyond simply summarizing information.
Developing critical analysis abilities takes practice and guidance.
Critical analysis is an important part of higher education.
The article provides a critical analysis of current economic trends.
Students learn critical analysis through discussions and essays.
Critical analysis helps identify strengths and weaknesses in arguments.
Good critical analysis is based on evidence rather than personal opinion.
extraExampleTranslations: Tanqidiy tahlil shunchaki ma’lumotni qayta hikoya qilishdan ko‘proq narsani talab qiladi.
Tanqidiy tahlil qobiliyatini rivojlantirish mashq va yo‘l-yo‘riqni talab qiladi.
Tanqidiy tahlil oliy ta’limning muhim qismidir.
Maqola hozirgi iqtisodiy tendensiyalarning tanqidiy tahlilini beradi.
Talabalar munozaralar va insholar orqali tanqidiy tahlilni o‘rganadi.
Tanqidiy tahlil dalillarga asoslanib, dalillar va zaif tomonlarni aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Yaxshi tanqidiy tahlil shaxsiy fikrdan ko‘ra dalillarga asoslanadi.

words.definition: The method, style, and practice used by teachers in the process of teaching and facilitating learning.
words.definitionUz: Pedagogik yondashuv – o‘qituvchilarning o‘quv jarayonini boshqarish va o‘qitishda qo‘llaydigan usul va amaliyotlari.
words.example1: The teacher uses a student-centered pedagogical approach.
words.example1Translation: O‘qituvchi o‘quvchiga yo‘naltirilgan pedagogik yondashuvdan foydalanadi.
words.example2: Different pedagogical approaches work better for different subjects.
words.example2Translation: Turli fanlar uchun turli pedagogik yondashuvlar samaraliroq bo‘ladi.
words.example3: Modern pedagogical approaches emphasize collaboration and creativity.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy pedagogik yondashuvlar hamkorlik va ijodkorlikni ta’kidlaydi.
extraExamples: Her pedagogical approach focuses on experiential learning.
The school is adopting new pedagogical approaches to improve outcomes.
Pedagogical approach should match the age and needs of the students.
Technology has changed traditional pedagogical approaches.
Teachers are trained in various pedagogical approaches during their studies.
A good pedagogical approach encourages active participation.
Research helps educators refine their pedagogical approaches.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning pedagogik yondashuvi tajribaga asoslangan o‘qishga qaratilgan.
Maktab natijalarni yaxshilash uchun yangi pedagogik yondashuvlarni qo‘llamoqda.
Pedagogik yondashuv o‘quvchilarning yoshi va ehtiyojlariga mos bo‘lishi kerak.
Texnologiya an’anaviy pedagogik yondashuvlarni o‘zgartirdi.
O‘qituvchilar o‘qish davrida turli pedagogik yondashuvlarga o‘rgatiladi.
Yaxshi pedagogik yondashuv faol ishtirokni rag‘batlantiradi.
Tadqiqotlar o‘qituvchilarga pedagogik yondashuvlarini takomillashtirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Working from outside a traditional office, usually from home or another location using technology.
words.definitionUz: Masofaviy ish — bu ofisga borish o‘rniga uyda yoki boshqa joydan kompyuter va internet orqali ishlashni anglatadi.
words.example1: Many companies adopted remote work during the pandemic to keep operations running.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab kompaniyalar pandemiya davrida faoliyatini davom ettirish uchun masofaviy ishlashni joriy etdi.
words.example2: Remote work allows employees to save time and money on commuting.
words.example2Translation: Masofaviy ish xodimlarning yo‘lga ketadigan vaqt va pulini tejashiga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Effective communication tools are essential for successful remote work.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli masofaviy ish uchun samarali aloqa vositalari juda muhim.
extraExamples: She prefers remote work because it gives her more flexibility with family responsibilities.
Remote work has become a key factor in attracting new talent.
Not everyone has a suitable environment for productive remote work.
The company is offering hybrid models combining remote work and office days.
Remote work can improve work-life balance for many professionals.
Managers need special training to lead remote work teams effectively.
Internet reliability is one of the biggest challenges of remote work in rural areas.
extraExampleTranslations: U oilaviy mas’uliyatlari tufayli masofaviy ishlashni afzal ko‘radi.
Masofaviy ish yangi xodimlarni jalb qilishda muhim omilga aylandi.
Hamma ham samarali masofaviy ish uchun mos muhitga ega emas.
Kompaniya masofaviy ish va ofis kunlarini birlashtirgan gibrid modelni taklif qilmoqda.
Masofaviy ish ko‘plab mutaxassislar uchun ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashi mumkin.
Rahbarlar masofaviy ish jamoalarini boshqarish uchun maxsus tayyorgarlikdan o‘tishlari kerak.
Internetning ishonchliligi qishloq joylarda masofaviy ishning eng katta muammolaridan biridir.

words.definition: The feeling of fulfillment or enjoyment that a person derives from their job.
words.definitionUz: Ishdan qoniqish — bu odamning o‘z ishidan zavq olishi va o‘zini foydali his qilishi holatini bildiradi.
words.example1: High job satisfaction leads to better performance and lower staff turnover.
words.example1Translation: Yuqori darajadagi ishdan qoniqish yaxshi natijalarga va xodimlar almashinuvining kamayishiga olib keladi.
words.example2: Salary is important, but job satisfaction often matters more in the long term.
words.example2Translation: Maosh muhim, ammo uzoq muddatda ishdan qoniqish ko‘proq ahamiyatga ega.
words.example3: The company conducts surveys to measure employee job satisfaction.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya xodimlarning ishdan qoniqish darajasini o‘lchash uchun so‘rovnomalar o‘tkazadi.
extraExamples: Creative freedom is a major source of job satisfaction for designers.
Poor management is one of the main reasons for low job satisfaction.
Job satisfaction can improve significantly with recognition and rewards.
Many people changed careers in search of greater job satisfaction.
Flexible hours contributed to her overall job satisfaction.
Job satisfaction is closely linked to mental health and wellbeing.
The new project has greatly increased team job satisfaction.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijodiy erkinlik dizaynerlar uchun ishdan qoniqishning asosiy manbalaridan biridir.
Yomon boshqaruv ishdan qoniqish past bo‘lishining asosiy sabablaridan biri.
Tan olish va mukofotlar bilan ishdan qoniqish sezilarli darajada oshishi mumkin.
Ko‘p odamlar kattaroq ishdan qoniqish izlab kasbini o‘zgartirdi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti uning umumiy ishdan qoniqishiga hissa qo‘shdi.
Ishdan qoniqish ruhiy salomatlik va farovonlik bilan chambarchas bog‘liq.
Yangi loyiha jamoaning ishdan qoniqishini sezilarli oshirdi.

words.definition: The use of technology to perform tasks with minimal or no human input.
words.definitionUz: Avtomatlashtirish — bu texnologiyalardan foydalanib, vazifalarni odam aralashuvisiz yoki minimal aralashuv bilan bajarishni anglatadi.
words.example1: Automation has transformed manufacturing by increasing efficiency and reducing errors.
words.example1Translation: Avtomatlashtirish ishlab chiqarishni samaradorlikni oshirib va xatolarni kamaytirib o‘zgartirdi.
words.example2: Many routine office tasks are now handled through automation software.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab oddiy ofis vazifalari endi avtomatlashtirish dasturlari orqali bajarilmoqda.
words.example3: While automation creates new jobs, it also makes some traditional roles redundant.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish yangi ish o‘rinlarini yaratishi bilan birga ba’zi an’anaviy lavozimlarni keraksiz qiladi.
extraExamples: The rise of automation is changing the skills required in the job market.
Factories are investing heavily in automation to stay competitive.
Automation in customer service includes chatbots and automated responses.
Employees fear that automation will replace their jobs.
Smart home automation allows control of lighting and security from a phone.
Automation helps companies reduce operational costs significantly.
Governments are discussing policies to support workers affected by automation.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtomatlashtirishning o‘sishi ish bozorida talab qilinadigan ko‘nikmalarni o‘zgartirmoqda.
Zavodlar raqobatbardosh bo‘lish uchun avtomatlashtirishga katta sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatishdagi avtomatlashtirish chat-botlar va avtomatik javoblarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Xodimlar avtomatlashtirish ularning ish o‘rnini egallab olishidan qo‘rqishadi.
Aqlli uy avtomatlashtirish telefondan yorug‘lik va xavfsizlikni boshqarishga imkon beradi.
Avtomatlashtirish kompaniyalarga operatsion xarajatlarni sezilarli kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Hukumatlar avtomatlashtirishdan zarar ko‘rgan ishchilarni qo‘llab-quvvatlash siyosatlarini muhokama qilmoqda.

words.definition: An economic system based on short-term contracts, freelance work, and temporary positions rather than permanent jobs.
words.definitionUz: Gig iqtisodiyoti — bu doimiy ish o‘rniga qisqa muddatli shartnomalar, frilans va vaqtinchalik ish turlariga asoslangan iqtisodiy tizim.
words.example1: The gig economy offers flexibility but often lacks traditional benefits like health insurance.
words.example1Translation: Gig iqtisodiyoti moslashuvchanlik beradi, ammo sog‘liqni saqlash sug‘urtasi kabi an’anaviy imtiyozlardan mahrum bo‘lishi mumkin.
words.example2: Many young people earn income through the gig economy by driving for ride-sharing apps.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab yoshlar taksi xizmatlari ilovalari orqali gig iqtisodiyotida daromad topishadi.
words.example3: The growth of the gig economy has changed how we think about employment.
words.example3Translation: Gig iqtisodiyotining o‘sishi ish haqidagi fikrimizni o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: Gig economy workers often have to manage their own taxes and retirement savings.
The platform connects freelancers with clients in the growing gig economy.
Critics argue that the gig economy exploits workers with unstable income.
She enjoys the freedom that the gig economy provides.
Governments are creating new regulations for the gig economy.
The gig economy is especially popular among students and parents.
Technological advances have fueled the expansion of the gig economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Gig iqtisodiyotidagi ishchilar ko‘pincha soliq va pensiya jamg‘armalarini o‘zlari boshqarishlari kerak.
Platforma frilanserlarni o‘sib borayotgan gig iqtisodiyotidagi mijozlar bilan bog‘laydi.
Tanqidchilar gig iqtisodiyoti ishchilarni beqaror daromad bilan ekspluatatsiya qiladi deb hisoblashadi.
U gig iqtisodiyoti beradigan erkinlikdan zavqlanadi.
Hukumatlar gig iqtisodiyoti uchun yangi qoidalarni ishlab chiqmoqda.
Gig iqtisodiyoti talabalar va ota-onalar orasida ayniqsa mashhur.
Texnologik taraqqiyot gig iqtisodiyotining kengayishiga turtki bo‘ldi.

words.definition: The advancement and development of one’s career through promotions, skill development, and new opportunities.
words.definitionUz: Karyera o‘sishi — bu ish joyida lavozim o‘sishi, yangi ko‘nikmalar o‘rganish va imkoniyatlar orqali kasbiy rivojlanishni bildiradi.
words.example1: The company offers clear career progression paths for ambitious employees.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya maqsadli xodimlar uchun aniq karyera o‘sish yo‘llarini taklif qiladi.
words.example2: Continuous learning is essential for long-term career progression.
words.example2Translation: Doimiy o‘qish uzoq muddatli karyera o‘sishi uchun zarur.
words.example3: Lack of career progression is a common reason why people leave their jobs.
words.example3Translation: Karyera o‘sishining yo‘qligi odamlarning ish joyini tark etishining keng tarqalgan sabablaridan biri.
extraExamples: Mentorship programs can greatly support career progression.
She achieved rapid career progression by taking on challenging projects.
Career progression in tech moves much faster than in traditional industries.
Networking is an important factor in career progression.
The organization values internal career progression over external hiring.
Career progression often requires developing both technical and soft skills.
Many employees feel stuck without clear career progression opportunities.
extraExampleTranslations: Murabbiylik dasturlari karyera o‘sishini sezilarli qo‘llab-quvvatlashi mumkin.
U qiyin loyihalarni bajarganligi uchun tez karyera o‘sishiga erishdi.
Texnologiya sohasida karyera o‘sishi an’anaviy sohalarga qaraganda ancha tez.
Tarmoq yaratish karyera o‘sishida muhim omil hisoblanadi.
Tashkilot tashqi yollash o‘rniga ichki karyera o‘sishini qadrlaydi.
Karyera o‘sishi ko‘pincha ham texnik, ham yumshoq ko‘nikmalarni rivojlantirishni talab qiladi.
Ko‘p xodimlar aniq karyera o‘sish imkoniyatlari bo‘lmaganda o‘zlarini tiqilib qolgan his qilishadi.

words.definition: The equilibrium between time spent on work and personal life activities.
words.definitionUz: Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati — bu ishga sarflangan vaqt bilan oila, dam olish va shaxsiy hayotga ajratilgan vaqt o‘rtasidagi muvozanatni bildiradi.
words.example1: Many employees are looking for jobs that offer better work-life balance.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab xodimlar yaxshiroq ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini taklif qiladigan ish joylarini qidirmoqda.
words.example2: Working from home has helped improve her work-life balance.
words.example2Translation: Uyda ishlash uning ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Poor work-life balance can lead to stress and burnout.
words.example3Translation: Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatining buzilishi stress va charchoqqa olib keladi.
extraExamples: Companies that support work-life balance have higher employee satisfaction.
Setting boundaries is important for maintaining work-life balance.
Parental leave policies contribute to better work-life balance.
Technology sometimes makes it harder to achieve work-life balance.
He decided to change jobs to achieve a healthier work-life balance.
Work-life balance looks different for everyone depending on their priorities.
Managers should encourage their teams to maintain good work-life balance.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydigan kompaniyalarda xodimlar qoniqishi yuqori bo‘ladi.
Chegaralarni belgilash ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini saqlash uchun muhim.
Ota-ona ta’tili siyosatlari yaxshiroq ish-shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga yordam beradi.
Texnologiya ba’zida ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga erishishni qiyinlashtiradi.
U sog‘lomroq ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga erishish uchun ish joyini o‘zgartirishga qaror qildi.
Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati har bir inson uchun uning ustuvorliklariga qarab farq qiladi.
Rahbarlar o‘z jamoalarini yaxshi ish-shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini saqlashga undashlari kerak.

words.definition: Reducing the number of employees in a company to cut costs.
words.definitionUz: Qisqartirish — bu xarajatlarni kamaytirish maqsadida kompaniyada xodimlar sonini qisqartirishni anglatadi.
words.example1: The company announced downsizing due to financial difficulties.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya moliyaviy qiyinchiliklar tufayli xodimlar sonini qisqartirishini e’lon qildi.
words.example2: Downsizing often creates anxiety among remaining staff.
words.example2Translation: Xodimlar sonini qisqartirish qolgan xodimlar orasida tashvish uyg‘otadi.
words.example3: After downsizing, the company focused on improving efficiency.
words.example3Translation: Xodimlar sonini qisqartirgandan keyin kompaniya samaradorlikni oshirishga e’tibor qaratdi.
extraExamples: Downsizing can sometimes lead to loss of valuable experience and knowledge.
The merger resulted in significant downsizing across both organizations.
Management tried to handle downsizing as fairly as possible.
Many employees were offered early retirement during the downsizing process.
Downsizing is often a last resort when companies face economic challenges.
Survivors of downsizing may experience increased workload.
Strategic downsizing can help companies become more competitive.
extraExampleTranslations: Xodimlar sonini qisqartirish ba’zida qimmatli tajriba va bilimlarni yo‘qotishga olib keladi.
Birlashtirish ikkala tashkilotda ham katta miqdorda xodimlar qisqartirilishiga sabab bo‘ldi.
Rahbariyat xodimlar sonini qisqartirishni iloji boricha adolatli amalga oshirishga harakat qildi.
Qisqartirish jarayonida ko‘plab xodimlarga erta pensiyaga chiqish taklif qilindi.
Xodimlar sonini qisqartirish ko‘pincha kompaniyalar iqtisodiy qiyinchiliklarga duch kelganda oxirgi choradir.
Qisqartirishdan omon qolganlar ish yuki ortishini his qilishlari mumkin.
Strategik qisqartirish kompaniyalarga raqobatbardoshlikni oshirishga yordam berishi mumkin.

words.definition: The process of learning new skills or improving existing ones to enhance job performance.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘nikmalarni oshirish — bu ish faoliyatini yaxshilash uchun yangi ko‘nikmalar o‘rganish yoki mavjudlarini takomillashtirish jarayoni.
words.example1: The company provides upskilling programs to help employees adapt to new technology.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya xodimlarning yangi texnologiyalarga moslashishi uchun ko‘nikmalarni oshirish dasturlarini taqdim etadi.
words.example2: Upskilling is essential in today’s fast-changing job market.
words.example2Translation: Bugungi tez o‘zgaruvchan ish bozorida ko‘nikmalarni oshirish juda muhim.
words.example3: Many professionals invest in upskilling through online courses.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab mutaxassislar onlayn kurslar orqali ko‘nikmalarini oshirishga sarmoya kiritishadi.
extraExamples: Government initiatives are promoting upskilling to reduce unemployment.
Upskilling can lead to better career progression opportunities.
The training focuses on upskilling workers in digital literacy.
She dedicated weekends to upskilling in data analysis.
Companies that encourage upskilling tend to retain talent longer.
Upskilling helps employees stay relevant in their industry.
Budget constraints sometimes limit opportunities for upskilling.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat tashabbuslari ishsizlikni kamaytirish uchun ko‘nikmalarni oshirishni rag‘batlantirmoqda.
Ko‘nikmalarni oshirish yaxshiroq karyera o‘sish imkoniyatlariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Trening raqamli savodxonlik bo‘yicha ishchilarning ko‘nikmalarini oshirishga qaratilgan.
U dam olish kunlarini ma’lumotlar tahlili bo‘yicha ko‘nikmalarini oshirishga bag‘ishladi.
Ko‘nikmalarni oshirishni rag‘batlantiradigan kompaniyalar xodimlarni uzoqroq ushlab turishadi.
Ko‘nikmalarni oshirish xodimlarga o‘z sohasida dolzarbligini saqlashga yordam beradi.
Byudjet cheklovlari ba’zida ko‘nikmalarni oshirish imkoniyatlarini cheklaydi.

words.definition: A work schedule that allows employees to adjust their working hours.
words.definitionUz: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti — bu xodimlar o‘z ish vaqtini o‘zlari moslashtirib olishlari mumkin bo‘lgan ish jadvalini bildiradi.
words.example1: Flexible hours help parents manage childcare responsibilities.
words.example1Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti ota-onalarga bolalarni parvarish qilish masalalarini hal qilishda yordam beradi.
words.example2: The company introduced flexible hours to improve employee wellbeing.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya xodimlar farovonligini oshirish uchun moslashuvchan ish vaqtini joriy etdi.
words.example3: Flexible hours require good self-discipline and time management.
words.example3Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti yaxshi o‘zini tuta bilish va vaqtni boshqarishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Many tech companies offer flexible hours as a benefit.
Flexible hours can boost productivity for night owls.
She negotiated flexible hours with her manager.
Flexible hours are especially valuable during personal emergencies.
The policy on flexible hours varies between departments.
Flexible hours help reduce traffic during peak commuting times.
Not all jobs are suitable for flexible hours.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab texnologiya kompaniyalari moslashuvchan ish vaqtini imtiyoz sifatida taklif qiladi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti tungi odamlar uchun samaradorlikni oshirishi mumkin.
U rahbari bilan moslashuvchan ish vaqtini kelishib oldi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti shaxsiy favqulodda holatlarda ayniqsa qimmatli.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti siyosati bo‘limlar o‘rtasida farq qiladi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti eng yuqori transport vaqtida tirbandlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Hamma ishlar ham moslashuvchan ish vaqtiga mos kelavermaydi.

words.definition: The assurance that one’s job is safe and unlikely to end unexpectedly.
words.definitionUz: Ish barqarorligi — bu ish joyingiz xavfsiz ekanligi va kutilmagan tarzda tugashi ehtimoli pastligini bildiradi.
words.example1: Job security is one of the main attractions of working in the public sector.
words.example1Translation: Ish barqarorligi davlat sektorida ishlashning asosiy jozibadorliklaridan biridir.
words.example2: Economic uncertainty has reduced job security in many industries.
words.example2Translation: Iqtisodiy noaniqlik ko‘plab sohalarda ish barqarorligini pasaytirdi.
words.example3: Employees with strong skills usually enjoy greater job security.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli ko‘nikmalarga ega xodimlar odatda yuqoriroq ish barqarorligiga ega bo‘lishadi.
extraExamples: Automation is threatening job security in some traditional professions.
She values job security more than a high salary.
Long-term contracts can provide better job security.
During the recession, job security became a major concern.
Good performance reviews help strengthen job security.
Freelancers generally have less job security than permanent staff.
The company guarantees job security for the next two years.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtomatlashtirish ba’zi an’anaviy kasblarda ish barqarorligiga tahdid solmoqda.
U yuqori maoshdan ko‘ra ish barqarorligini ustunroq qo‘yadi.
Uzoq muddatli shartnomalar yaxshiroq ish barqarorligini ta’minlashi mumkin.
Inqiroz davrida ish barqarorligi katta tashvishga aylandi.
Yaxshi natijalar haqidagi baholar ish barqarorligini mustahkamlashga yordam beradi.
Frilanserlar doimiy xodimlarga qaraganda kamroq ish barqarorligiga ega.
Kompaniya keyingi ikki yil uchun ish barqarorligini kafolatlaydi.

words.definition: A company’s ability to keep its employees from leaving.
words.definitionUz: Xodimlarni saqlab qolish — bu kompaniyaning xodimlarini ketishdan saqlab qolish qobiliyatini bildiradi.
words.example1: High salaries and good benefits are key to employee retention.
words.example1Translation: Yuqori maosh va yaxshi imtiyozlar xodimlarni saqlab qolishning asosiy omillaridir.
words.example2: Employee retention has improved since the company introduced flexible hours.
words.example2Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqtini joriy etgandan keyin xodimlarni saqlab qolish darajasi yaxshilandi.
words.example3: Poor management is often the main cause of low employee retention.
words.example3Translation: Yomon boshqaruv ko‘pincha xodimlarni saqlab qolishning past bo‘lishiga sabab bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: Employee retention is cheaper than constantly hiring and training new staff.
Regular feedback helps with employee retention.
The company runs retention programs to keep top talent.
Work-life balance plays a big role in employee retention.
Low employee retention can hurt company morale and productivity.
Career development opportunities are crucial for employee retention.
Surveys help companies understand factors affecting employee retention.
extraExampleTranslations: Xodimlarni saqlab qolish doimiy ravishda yangi xodimlarni yollash va o‘qitishdan arzonroq.
Muntazam fikr-mulohazalar xodimlarni saqlab qolishga yordam beradi.
Kompaniya eng yaxshi mutaxassislarni saqlab qolish uchun maxsus dasturlar o‘tkazadi.
Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati xodimlarni saqlab qolishda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
Past xodimlar saqlanishi kompaniya ruhiyati va samaradorligiga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Karyera rivoji imkoniyatlari xodimlarni saqlab qolish uchun juda muhim.
So‘rovnomalar kompaniyalarga xodimlarni saqlab qolishga ta’sir etuvchi omillarni tushunishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The values, beliefs, behaviors, and practices that characterize a company.
words.definitionUz: Korporativ madaniyat — bu kompaniya uchun xos bo‘lgan qadriyatlar, e’tiqodlar, xulq-atvor va amaliyotlar to‘plamidir.
words.example1: A positive corporate culture can significantly boost employee morale.
words.example1Translation: Ijobiy korporativ madaniyat xodimlar ruhiyatini sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.
words.example2: The company is known for its innovative and collaborative corporate culture.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya innovatsion va hamkorlikka asoslangan korporativ madaniyati bilan mashhur.
words.example3: Changing corporate culture takes time and consistent effort from leadership.
words.example3Translation: Korporativ madaniyatni o‘zgartirish vaqt va rahbariyatning izchil harakatlarini talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Corporate culture affects how employees interact with each other.
Many candidates research corporate culture before accepting a job offer.
Toxic corporate culture is a major reason for high staff turnover.
Team-building activities help strengthen corporate culture.
Remote work has changed aspects of corporate culture in many organizations.
Strong corporate culture can be a competitive advantage.
The new CEO wants to transform the corporate culture.
extraExampleTranslations: Korporativ madaniyat xodimlarning bir-biri bilan munosabatini belgilaydi.
Ko‘p nomzodlar ish taklifini qabul qilishdan oldin korporativ madaniyatni o‘rganishadi.
Zaharli korporativ madaniyat xodimlar almashinuvining yuqori bo‘lishining asosiy sabablaridan biri.
Jamoaviy mashg‘ulotlar korporativ madaniyatni mustahkamlashga yordam beradi.
Masofaviy ish ko‘plab tashkilotlarda korporativ madaniyatning ayrim jihatlarini o‘zgartirdi.
Kuchli korporativ madaniyat raqobatbardosh ustunlik bo‘lishi mumkin.
Yangi bosh direktor korporativ madaniyatni o‘zgartirmoqchi.

words.definition: The lowest legal hourly wage that employers must pay their workers.
words.definitionUz: Minimal ish haqi — bu ish beruvchilar xodimlariga to‘lashi shart bo‘lgan eng past qonuniy soatlik ish haqi.
words.example1: The government raised the minimum wage to help low-income workers.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat kam daromadli ishchilarga yordam berish uchun minimal ish haqini oshirdi.
words.example2: Many people struggle to live on minimum wage in big cities.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar katta shaharlarda minimal ish haqi bilan yashashga qiynalishadi.
words.example3: Some argue that increasing the minimum wage could lead to job losses.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zilar minimal ish haqini oshirish ish o‘rinlarini yo‘qotishga olib kelishi mumkin deb hisoblashadi.
extraExamples: Minimum wage laws vary from country to country.
The restaurant pays all staff at least the minimum wage.
Debates about raising the minimum wage happen regularly in parliament.
Young workers often start their careers earning minimum wage.
Living on minimum wage requires careful budgeting.
Some states have a higher minimum wage than the national level.
Minimum wage is reviewed and adjusted periodically.
extraExampleTranslations: Minimal ish haqi qonunlari mamlakatdan mamlakatga farq qiladi.
Restoran barcha xodimlariga kamida minimal ish haqini to‘laydi.
Minimal ish haqini oshirish haqidagi bahslar parlamentda muntazam bo‘lib turadi.
Yosh ishchilar ko‘pincha karyerasini minimal ish haqi bilan boshlaydilar.
Minimal ish haqi bilan yashash uchun puxta byudjet tuzish kerak.
Ba’zi shtatlarda minimal ish haqi milliy darajadan yuqori.
Minimal ish haqi vaqt-vaqt bilan ko‘rib chiqilib, yangilanadi.

words.definition: Working independently on short-term projects for different clients rather than for one employer.
words.definitionUz: Frilansing — bu bitta ish beruvchi o‘rniga turli mijozlar uchun qisqa muddatli loyihalarda mustaqil ishlashni bildiradi.
words.example1: Freelancing gives her the freedom to choose projects she is passionate about.
words.example1Translation: Frilansing unga qiziqadigan loyihalarni tanlash erkinligini beradi.
words.example2: Many graphic designers earn a living through freelancing.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab grafik dizaynerlar frilansing orqali daromad topishadi.
words.example3: Successful freelancing requires strong self-discipline and marketing skills.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli frilansing kuchli o‘zini tuta bilish va marketing ko‘nikmalarini talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Freelancing platforms make it easier to find clients worldwide.
He left his full-time job to pursue freelancing full time.
Irregular income is one of the challenges of freelancing.
Freelancing allows people to work from anywhere in the world.
She built a successful career in freelancing over five years.
Taxes and insurance are the responsibility of the freelancer.
The gig economy has made freelancing more common than ever.
extraExampleTranslations: Frilansing platformalari butun dunyodan mijozlarni topishni osonlashtiradi.
U to‘la vaqtli ishini tashlab, to‘liq frilans bilan shug‘ullanishga qaror qildi.
Beqaror daromad frilansingning muammolaridan biridir.
Frilansing odamlarga dunyoning istalgan joyida ishlash imkonini beradi.
U besh yil ichida frilansingda muvaffaqiyatli karyera qurdi.
Soliq va sug‘urta frilanserning o‘z zimmasidadir.
Gig iqtisodiyoti frilansingni har qachongidan ham keng tarqalgan qildi.

words.definition: A state of physical and emotional exhaustion caused by prolonged stress, especially from work.
words.definitionUz: Charchoq — bu uzoq vaqt davom etgan stress, ayniqsa ish tufayli yuzaga keladigan jismoniy va ruhiy charchash holati.
words.example1: She took a long break to recover from burnout.
words.example1Translation: U charchoqdan tiklanish uchun uzoq ta’til oldi.
words.example2: Burnout is increasingly common in high-pressure jobs.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori bosimli ish joylarida charchoq tobora keng tarqalmoqda.
words.example3: Setting boundaries and taking regular breaks can help prevent burnout.
words.example3Translation: Chegaralarni belgilash va muntazam dam olish charchoqning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Burnout can lead to decreased productivity and health problems.
The company introduced wellness programs to reduce employee burnout.
Constant deadlines contributed to his burnout.
Recognizing early signs of burnout is important.
Many healthcare workers experienced burnout during the pandemic.
Burnout affects both mental and physical wellbeing.
Taking a sabbatical helped her overcome severe burnout.
extraExampleTranslations: Charchoq samaradorlikni pasaytirishi va sog‘liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Kompaniya xodimlar orasidagi charchoqni kamaytirish uchun salomatlik dasturlarini joriy etdi.
Doimiy muddatlar uning charchoqqa duch kelishiga sabab bo‘ldi.
Charchoqning dastlabki belgilarni erta payqash muhim.
Ko‘plab tibbiyot xodimlari pandemiya davrida charchoqni boshdan kechirdi.
Charchoq ruhiy va jismoniy farovonlikka ta’sir qiladi.
Sabbatikal (uzoq ta’til) olish unga og‘ir charchoqdan chiqishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: A way of life that involves little or no physical activity, often with long periods of sitting.
words.definitionUz: O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzi — bu ko‘p vaqt o‘tirib ishlash yoki dam olish bilan kechadigan, jismoniy harakat kam bo‘lgan hayot tarzi.
words.example1: A sedentary lifestyle increases the risk of obesity and heart disease.
words.example1Translation: O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzi semirish va yurak kasalliklari xavfini oshiradi.
words.example2: Many office workers struggle to break out of their sedentary lifestyle.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab ofis xodimlari o‘zlarining o‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzidan chiqib ketishda qiynaladi.
words.example3: Switching from a sedentary lifestyle to an active one improved his energy levels.
words.example3Translation: O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzidan faol hayot tarziga o‘tish uning energiya darajasini yaxshiladi.
extraExamples: Doctors recommend regular exercise to counteract a sedentary lifestyle.
The rise of remote work has led to more people adopting a sedentary lifestyle.
A sedentary lifestyle can negatively affect both physical and mental health.
She started cycling to work to escape her sedentary lifestyle.
Children with sedentary lifestyles often spend too much time on screens.
Fighting a sedentary lifestyle requires small daily changes in habits.
Public campaigns aim to reduce sedentary lifestyles in urban populations.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokorlar o‘tirib turadigan turmush tarziga qarshi muntazam jismoniy mashq qilishni tavsiya qiladi.
Masofaviy ishning ko‘payishi ko‘proq odamlarning o‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzini qabul qilishiga olib keldi.
O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzi ham jismoniy, ham ruhiy salomatlikka salbiy ta’sir qiladi.
U ishga velosipedda borishni boshladi, o‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzidan qochish uchun.
O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzi bilan yashaydigan bolalar ko‘pincha ekran oldida ko‘p vaqt o‘tkazadi.
O‘tirib turadigan turmush tarziga qarshi kurashish uchun har kuni kichik odatlarni o‘zgartirish kerak.
Jamoatchilik aksiyalari shahar aholisida o‘tirib turadigan turmush tarzini kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: Measures taken to prevent illness or disease before it occurs rather than treating it afterward.
words.definitionUz: Profilaktik tibbiy yordam — kasallik paydo bo‘lishidan oldin uning oldini olishga qaratilgan choralar.
words.example1: Preventive healthcare includes regular check-ups and vaccinations.
words.example1Translation: Profilaktik tibbiy yordam muntazam tibbiy ko‘rik va emlashlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: Investing in preventive healthcare can save billions in treatment costs.
words.example2Translation: Profilaktik tibbiy yordamga sarmoya kiritish davolash xarajatlarini milliardlab tejashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Many countries are shifting focus toward preventive healthcare strategies.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p mamlakatlar e’tiborini profilaktik tibbiy yordam strategiyalariga qaratmoqda.
extraExamples: Preventive healthcare helps reduce the burden on hospitals.
She believes preventive healthcare should start in schools.
Smoking cessation programs are part of preventive healthcare.
Governments promote preventive healthcare through awareness campaigns.
Preventive healthcare is more effective than reactive treatment.
Access to preventive healthcare remains limited in rural areas.
Doctors emphasize the importance of preventive healthcare for longevity.
extraExampleTranslations: Profilaktik tibbiy yordam shifoxonalardagi yukni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
U profilaktik tibbiy yordam maktablarda boshlanishi kerak deb hisoblaydi.
Chekishni tashlash dasturlari profilaktik tibbiy yordamning bir qismidir.
Hukumatlar xabardorlik aksiyalari orqali profilaktik tibbiy yordamni rag‘batlantiradi.
Profilaktik tibbiy yordam reaktiv davolashdan ko‘ra samaraliroq.
Qishloq hududlarida profilaktik tibbiy yordamga kirish hali ham cheklangan.
Shifokorlar uzoq umr ko‘rish uchun profilaktik tibbiy yordam muhimligini ta’kidlaydi.

words.definition: The state of emotional, psychological, and social well-being where a person can cope with normal stresses of life.
words.definitionUz: Ruhiy farovonlik — bu odam kundalik hayotdagi odatdagi stresslarga bardosh bera oladigan, his-tuyg‘u, psixologik va ijtimoiy jihatdan sog‘lom holati.
words.example1: Exercise is important for both physical health and mental well-being.
words.example1Translation: Jismoniy mashqlar nafaqat jismoniy salomatlik, balki ruhiy farovonlik uchun ham muhim.
words.example2: The company offers programs to support employees’ mental well-being.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya xodimlarning ruhiy farovonligini qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun dasturlar taklif qiladi.
words.example3: Social connections play a key role in maintaining mental well-being.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy aloqalar ruhiy farovonlikni saqlashda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
extraExamples: Mental well-being has become a priority after the pandemic.
Practicing mindfulness can greatly improve mental well-being.
Schools are now teaching students about mental well-being.
Financial stress can seriously damage mental well-being.
She takes regular breaks to protect her mental well-being.
Mental well-being affects productivity at work.
Community support is essential for elderly mental well-being.
extraExampleTranslations: Pandemiyadan keyin ruhiy farovonlik birinchi o‘ringa chiqdi.
Onglilikni mashq qilish ruhiy farovonlikni sezilarli darajada yaxshilashi mumkin.
Maktablarda endi o‘quvchilarga ruhiy farovonlik haqida o‘rgatilmoqda.
Moliyaviy stress ruhiy farovonlikka jiddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
U o‘z ruhiy farovonligini himoya qilish uchun muntazam tanaffuslar qiladi.
Ruhiy farovonlik ishda samaradorlikka ta’sir qiladi.
Jamiyat yordami keksa odamlarning ruhiy farovonligi uchun zarur.

words.definition: A long-lasting health condition that typically cannot be cured but can be managed over time.
words.definitionUz: Surunkali kasallik — bu uzoq vaqt davom etadigan va odatda butunlay davolanmaydigan, lekin boshqarib turish mumkin bo‘lgan sog‘liq holati.
words.example1: Diabetes is a common chronic disease that requires daily management.
words.example1Translation: Qandli diabet — har kuni boshqarishni talab qiladigan keng tarqalgan surunkali kasallik.
words.example2: Lifestyle changes can help prevent many chronic diseases.
words.example2Translation: Turmush tarzi o‘zgarishlari ko‘plab surunkali kasalliklarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She has been living with a chronic disease for over ten years.
words.example3Translation: U o‘n yildan ortiq vaqt davomida surunkali kasallik bilan yashamoqda.
extraExamples: Chronic diseases are a major cause of death worldwide.
Regular check-ups help detect chronic diseases early.
Obesity is linked to several chronic diseases.
Managing chronic disease often involves medication and diet.
Public health programs focus on reducing chronic disease rates.
He joined a support group for people with chronic diseases.
Chronic diseases put a heavy burden on healthcare systems.
extraExampleTranslations: Surunkali kasalliklar dunyo bo‘ylab o‘limning asosiy sabablaridan biri.
Muntazam tibbiy ko‘riklar surunkali kasalliklarni erta aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Semirish bir necha surunkali kasalliklar bilan bog‘liq.
Surunkali kasallikni boshqarish ko‘pincha dori-darmon va parhezni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Jamoat salomatligi dasturlari surunkali kasalliklar darajasini kamaytirishga qaratilgan.
U surunkali kasalliklari bor odamlar uchun qo‘llab-quvvatlash guruhiga qo‘shildi.
Surunkali kasalliklar tibbiyot tizimiga katta yuk tushiradi.

words.definition: A healthcare system in which all citizens receive medical services regardless of their ability to pay.
words.definitionUz: Universal tibbiy yordam — barcha fuqarolar to‘lov qobiliyatidan qat’i nazar tibbiy xizmatlardan foydalana oladigan tizim.
words.example1: Many European countries have implemented universal healthcare.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p Yevropa mamlakatlarida universal tibbiy yordam joriy etilgan.
words.example2: Universal healthcare aims to provide equal access to medical services.
words.example2Translation: Universal tibbiy yordam tibbiy xizmatlarga teng kirishni ta’minlashni maqsad qiladi.
words.example3: The debate about universal healthcare continues in many nations.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p mamlakatlarda universal tibbiy yordam haqidagi bahslar davom etmoqda.
extraExamples: Universal healthcare can reduce overall healthcare costs in the long run.
Critics argue that universal healthcare may lower service quality.
Supporters believe universal healthcare is a basic human right.
Implementing universal healthcare requires significant government funding.
Universal healthcare improves public health outcomes.
She moved to a country with universal healthcare for better medical access.
Universal healthcare helps prevent people from going bankrupt due to medical bills.
extraExampleTranslations: Universal tibbiy yordam uzoq muddatda umumiy tibbiy xarajatlarni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Tanqidchilar universal tibbiy yordam xizmat sifatini pasaytirishi mumkin deb hisoblashadi.
Qo‘llab-quvvatlovchilar universal tibbiy yordamni asosiy inson huquqi deb bilishadi.
Universal tibbiy yordamni joriy etish katta hukumat mablag‘larini talab qiladi.
Universal tibbiy yordam aholining salomatlik ko‘rsatkichlarini yaxshilaydi.
U yaxshi tibbiy yordam olish uchun universal tibbiy yordam mavjud mamlakatga ko‘chib o‘tdi.
Universal tibbiy yordam odamlarning tibbiy hisoblar tufayli bankrot bo‘lishining oldini oladi.

words.definition: A strong awareness and concern about maintaining good health and making healthy choices.
words.definitionUz: Salomatlikka onglilik — bu yaxshi salomatlikni saqlash va sog‘lom tanlovlar qilish haqida yuqori darajada xabardorlik va qiziqish.
words.example1: There is a growing health consciousness among young people today.
words.example1Translation: Bugungi kunda yoshlar orasida salomatlikka onglilik kuchaymoqda.
words.example2: Health consciousness has led to more people choosing organic food.
words.example2Translation: Salomatlikka onglilik ko‘proq odamlarning organik ovqat tanlashiga olib keldi.
words.example3: His health consciousness motivated him to start running every morning.
words.example3Translation: Uning salomatlikka ongliligi har kuni ertalab yugurishni boshlashiga turtki bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Social media has increased health consciousness in society.
Companies are responding to rising health consciousness with healthier products.
Health consciousness includes both physical and mental aspects.
She developed health consciousness after her father’s illness.
Health consciousness helps prevent lifestyle-related diseases.
Schools should promote health consciousness from an early age.
Marketing often targets consumers with high health consciousness.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar jamiyatda salomatlikka onglilikni oshirdi.
Kompaniyalar ortib borayotgan salomatlikka onglilikka javoban sog‘lomroq mahsulotlar chiqarmoqda.
Salomatlikka onglilik jismoniy va ruhiy jihatlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
U otasining kasalligidan keyin salomatlikka onglilikni oshirdi.
Salomatlikka onglilik turmush tarzi bilan bog‘liq kasalliklarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Maktablar erta yoshdan salomatlikka onglilikni rivojlantirishi kerak.
Marketing ko‘pincha yuqori salomatlikka ongliligi bor iste’molchilarni nishonga oladi.

words.definition: The health of the population as a whole, especially as monitored and promoted by government programs.
words.definitionUz: Jamoat salomatligi — butun aholining salomatligi, ayniqsa hukumat dasturlari tomonidan kuzatiladigan va rivojlantiriladigan holat.
words.example1: Public health officials are working to control the spread of the virus.
words.example1Translation: Jamoat salomatligi mutaxassislari virus tarqalishini nazorat qilish ustida ishlamoqda.
words.example2: Vaccination programs are a key part of public health policy.
words.example2Translation: Emlash dasturlari jamoat salomatligi siyosatining muhim qismidir.
words.example3: Improving public health requires cooperation between government and communities.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat salomatligini yaxshilash hukumat va jamiyatlar o‘rtasidagi hamkorlikni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Public health campaigns have successfully reduced smoking rates.
Clean water is fundamental to public health.
The field of public health includes epidemiology and health education.
Public health systems were strained during the pandemic.
She studies public health at university.
Public health focuses on prevention rather than just treatment.
Global public health issues require international cooperation.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoat salomatligi aksiyalari chekish darajasini muvaffaqiyatli pasaytirdi.
Toza suv jamoat salomatligi uchun asosiy hisoblanadi.
Jamoat salomatligi sohasi epidemiologiya va sog‘lom turmush tarzi ta’limini o‘z ichiga oladi.
Pandemiya davrida jamoat salomatligi tizimlari zo‘riqdi.
U universitetda jamoat salomatligini o‘qiydi.
Jamoat salomatligi faqat davolash emas, balki oldini olishga e’tibor qaratadi.
Global jamoat salomatligi muammolari xalqaro hamkorlikni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A diet that contains the right proportions of carbohydrates, proteins, fats, vitamins, and minerals.
words.definitionUz: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish — uglevodlar, oqsillar, yog‘lar, vitaminlar va minerallar to‘g‘ri nisbatda bo‘lgan parhez.
words.example1: Eating a balanced diet is essential for good health.
words.example1Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish yaxshi salomatlik uchun juda muhim.
words.example2: A balanced diet helps maintain a healthy weight.
words.example2Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish sog‘lom vaznni saqlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Nutritionists recommend a balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables.
words.example3Translation: Ovqatlanish mutaxassislari meva va sabzavotlarga boy muvozanatli ovqatlanishni tavsiya qiladi.
extraExamples: Children need a balanced diet for proper growth.
It’s hard to maintain a balanced diet when eating out frequently.
A balanced diet can improve energy levels and mood.
She plans her meals to ensure a balanced diet every day.
Fast food often lacks the nutrients of a balanced diet.
A balanced diet reduces the risk of chronic diseases.
Teaching kids about a balanced diet is important in schools.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar to‘g‘ri o‘sishi uchun muvozanatli ovqatlanishga muhtoj.
Tez-tez tashqarida ovqatlansa muvozanatli ovqatlanishni saqlash qiyin.
Muvozanatli ovqatlanish energiya darajasi va kayfiyatni yaxshilashi mumkin.
U har kuni muvozanatli ovqatlanishni ta’minlash uchun ovqatlarini rejalashtiradi.
Tez tayyorlanadigan taomlar ko‘pincha muvozanatli ovqatlanishdagi ozuqa moddalariga ega emas.
Muvozanatli ovqatlanish surunkali kasalliklar xavfini kamaytiradi.
Maktablarda bolalarga muvozanatli ovqatlanish haqida o‘rgatish muhim.

words.definition: The average number of years that a person is expected to live.
words.definitionUz: O‘rtacha umr ko‘rish davomiyligi — odamning o‘rtacha qancha yil yashashi kutilayotgan muddat.
words.example1: Life expectancy has increased dramatically over the past century.
words.example1Translation: O‘tgan asr davomida o‘rtacha umr ko‘rish davomiyligi keskin oshdi.
words.example2: Women generally have a higher life expectancy than men.
words.example2Translation: Ayollar odatda erkaklarga qaraganda yuqoriroq umr ko‘rish davomiyligiga ega.
words.example3: Healthy lifestyle choices can improve your life expectancy.
words.example3Translation: Sog‘lom turmush tarzi tanlovlari sizning umr ko‘rish davomiyligingizni oshirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Life expectancy varies greatly between different countries.
Access to healthcare affects life expectancy in a population.
Smoking can reduce life expectancy by many years.
Japan has one of the highest life expectancies in the world.
Researchers study factors that influence life expectancy.
Life expectancy in rural areas is sometimes lower than in cities.
Medical advances continue to raise global life expectancy.
extraExampleTranslations: Turli mamlakatlarda o‘rtacha umr ko‘rish davomiyligi juda farq qiladi.
Tibbiy yordamga kirish aholining umr ko‘rish davomiyligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Chekish umr ko‘rish davomiyligini ko‘p yillarga qisqartirishi mumkin.
Yaponiya dunyodagi eng yuqori umr ko‘rish davomiyligiga ega mamlakatlardan biri.
Tadqiqotchilar umr ko‘rish davomiyligiga ta’sir etuvchi omillarni o‘rganadi.
Qishloq hududlarida umr ko‘rish davomiyligi ba’zan shaharlarnikidan pastroq bo‘ladi.
Tibbiy yutuqlar global umr ko‘rish davomiyligini doimiy oshirib bormoqda.

words.definition: The ease with which individuals can obtain needed medical services and care.
words.definitionUz: Tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyati — odamlar kerakli tibbiy xizmatlarni qanchalik osonlik bilan olishi mumkinligi.
words.example1: Healthcare accessibility is a major issue in remote villages.
words.example1Translation: Uzoq qishloqlarda tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyati katta muammo.
words.example2: Improving healthcare accessibility can reduce health inequalities.
words.example2Translation: Tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatini yaxshilash salomatlikdagi tengsizliklarni kamaytiradi.
words.example3: Mobile clinics help increase healthcare accessibility in rural areas.
words.example3Translation: Mobil klinikalar qishloq hududlarida tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatini oshirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: High costs reduce healthcare accessibility for low-income families.
Technology is improving healthcare accessibility worldwide.
Healthcare accessibility includes both physical and financial aspects.
The government is working to enhance healthcare accessibility.
Language barriers can affect healthcare accessibility for immigrants.
Good transportation is important for healthcare accessibility.
During emergencies, healthcare accessibility becomes critical.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori xarajatlar kam daromadli oilalar uchun tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatini pasaytiradi.
Texnologiya butun dunyoda tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatini yaxshilamoqda.
Tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyati ham jismoniy, ham moliyaviy jihatlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Hukumat tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatini kuchaytirish ustida ishlamoqda.
Til to‘siqlari muhojirlar uchun tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyatiga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Yaxshi transport aloqasi tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyati uchun muhim.
Favqulodda vaziyatlarda tibbiy yordamga kirish imkoniyati juda muhim bo‘lib qoladi.

words.definition: The state of being in good physical condition as a result of regular exercise and proper nutrition.
words.definitionUz: Jismoniy chiniqish — muntazam mashq va to‘g‘ri ovqatlanish natijasida yaxshi jismoniy holatda bo‘lish.
words.example1: Physical fitness is important for overall health and energy.
words.example1Translation: Jismoniy chiniqish umumiy salomatlik va energiya uchun muhim.
words.example2: She maintains her physical fitness by going to the gym regularly.
words.example2Translation: U sport zaliga muntazam borib jismoniy chiniqishini saqlab turadi.
words.example3: Schools should prioritize physical fitness in their curriculum.
words.example3Translation: Maktablar o‘quv dasturida jismoniy chiniqishga ustunlik berishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Physical fitness can help reduce stress and anxiety.
Military training focuses heavily on physical fitness.
Good physical fitness improves quality of life in older age.
Many apps now help people track their physical fitness.
Physical fitness levels vary greatly among teenagers.
Regular swimming is excellent for building physical fitness.
Companies offer wellness programs to improve employee physical fitness.
extraExampleTranslations: Jismoniy chiniqish stress va tashvishni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Harbiy tayyorgarlik jismoniy chiniqishga katta e’tibor beradi.
Yaxshi jismoniy chiniqish keksa yoshda hayot sifatini yaxshilaydi.
Ko‘plab ilovalar odamlarga jismoniy chiniqishini kuzatishga yordam beradi.
O‘smirlar orasida jismoniy chiniqish darajasi juda farq qiladi.
Muntazam suzish jismoniy chiniqishni rivojlantirish uchun ajoyib.
Kompaniyalar xodimlarning jismoniy chiniqishini yaxshilash uchun salomatlik dasturlarini taklif qiladi.

words.definition: Techniques and strategies used to control, reduce, or cope with stress in daily life.
words.definitionUz: Stressni boshqarish — kundalik hayotdagi stressni nazorat qilish, kamaytirish yoki unga bardosh berish usullari va strategiyalari.
words.example1: Learning stress management techniques can improve your quality of life.
words.example1Translation: Stressni boshqarish usullarini o‘rganish hayot sifatini yaxshilashi mumkin.
words.example2: Meditation is a popular form of stress management.
words.example2Translation: Meditatsiya stressni boshqarishning mashhur usullaridan biridir.
words.example3: Workplaces are increasingly offering stress management workshops.
words.example3Translation: Ish joylarida stressni boshqarish bo‘yicha seminarlar tobora ko‘paymoqda.
extraExamples: Effective stress management helps prevent burnout.
Exercise is one of the best tools for stress management.
She uses breathing exercises for quick stress management.
Poor stress management can lead to health problems.
Time management is closely linked to stress management.
Books on stress management are very popular these days.
Parents need good stress management skills when raising children.
extraExampleTranslations: Samarali stressni boshqarish charchoqni oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Jismoniy mashqlar stressni boshqarishning eng yaxshi vositalaridan biri.
U tez stressni boshqarish uchun nafas olish mashqlaridan foydalanadi.
Stressni yomon boshqarish sog‘liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Vaqtni boshqarish stressni boshqarish bilan chambarchas bog‘liq.
Stressni boshqarish haqidagi kitoblar hozirgi kunda juda mashhur.
Ota-onalar farzand tarbiyalashda yaxshi stressni boshqarish ko‘nikmalariga muhtoj.

words.definition: The unequal distribution of health resources and health outcomes between different groups of people.
words.definitionUz: Salomatlikdagi tengsizlik — turli guruhlar o‘rtasida sog‘liq resurslari va salomatlik natijalarining tengsiz taqsimlanishi.
words.example1: Health inequality is a serious problem in many developing countries.
words.example1Translation: Salomatlikdagi tengsizlik ko‘p rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda jiddiy muammo.
words.example2: Poverty is one of the main causes of health inequality.
words.example2Translation: Qashshoqlik salomatlikdagi tengsizlikning asosiy sabablaridan biri.
words.example3: Governments are implementing policies to reduce health inequality.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar salomatlikdagi tengsizlikni kamaytirish uchun siyosatlar joriy etmoqda.
extraExamples: Education level often correlates with health inequality.
Health inequality affects life expectancy in different communities.
Addressing health inequality requires systemic changes.
The pandemic worsened existing health inequalities.
Researchers study the roots of health inequality.
Rural populations often experience greater health inequality.
Social justice movements fight against health inequality.
extraExampleTranslations: Ta’lim darajasi ko‘pincha salomatlikdagi tengsizlik bilan bog‘liq.
Salomatlikdagi tengsizlik turli jamiyatlarda umr ko‘rish davomiyligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Salomatlikdagi tengsizlikni bartaraf etish tizimli o‘zgarishlarni talab qiladi.
Pandemiya mavjud salomatlik tengsizliklarini yanada kuchaytirdi.
Tadqiqotchilar salomatlikdagi tengsizlikning ildizlarini o‘rganadi.
Qishloq aholisi ko‘pincha kattaroq salomatlik tengsizligini boshdan kechiradi.
Ijtimoiy adolat harakatlari salomatlikdagi tengsizlikka qarshi kurashadi.

words.definition: Food produced without the use of synthetic chemicals, pesticides, or genetically modified organisms.
words.definitionUz: Organik oziq-ovqat — sun’iy kimyoviy moddalar, pestitsidlar yoki genetik o‘zgartirilgan organizmlarsiz yetishtiriladigan oziq-ovqat.
words.example1: Many people prefer organic food because it is considered healthier.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p odamlar organik oziq-ovqatni sog‘lomroq deb hisoblab afzallik berishadi.
words.example2: Organic food is usually more expensive than conventional produce.
words.example2Translation: Organik oziq-ovqat odatdagi mahsulotlarga qaraganda qimmatroq bo‘ladi.
words.example3: She buys organic food to avoid harmful chemicals.
words.example3Translation: U zararli kimyoviy moddalardan qochish uchun organik oziq-ovqat sotib oladi.
extraExamples: The demand for organic food has increased significantly in recent years.
Organic food is grown using natural fertilizers and methods.
Farmers’ markets are great places to find fresh organic food.
Some studies question whether organic food is actually more nutritious.
Organic food certification requires strict standards.
Eating organic food supports environmentally friendly farming.
Parents often choose organic food for their children.
extraExampleTranslations: So‘nggi yillarda organik oziq-ovqatga talab sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Organik oziq-ovqat tabiiy o‘g‘itlar va usullar yordamida yetishtiriladi.
Dehqon bozorlari yangi organik oziq-ovqat topish uchun ajoyib joy.
Ba’zi tadqiqotlar organik oziq-ovqat haqiqatan ham ozuqaviy jihatdan boyroqmi degan savolni tug‘diradi.
Organik oziq-ovqat sertifikatsiyasi qat’iy standartlarni talab qiladi.
Organik oziq-ovqat iste’mol qilish atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazmaydigan dehqonchilikni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha farzandlari uchun organik oziq-ovqatni tanlashadi.

words.definition: Epidemic: a widespread occurrence of an infectious disease in a community at a particular time. Pandemic: an epidemic that has spread across multiple countries or continents.
words.definitionUz: Epidemiya — yuqumli kasallikning muayyan vaqtda bir jamiyatda keng tarqalishi. Pandemiya — bir necha mamlakat yoki qit’aga tarqalgan epidemiya.
words.example1: The government took strict measures to control the epidemic.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat epidemiyani nazorat qilish uchun qattiq choralar ko‘rdi.
words.example2: COVID-19 was declared a pandemic by the World Health Organization.
words.example2Translation: Jahon sog‘liqni saqlash tashkiloti COVID-19 ni pandemiya deb e’lon qildi.
words.example3: Pandemics can have devastating effects on the global economy.
words.example3Translation: Pandemiyalar global iqtisodiyotga halokatli ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Early detection is crucial in preventing epidemics from becoming pandemics.
Vaccines play a vital role in controlling epidemics.
The 1918 flu pandemic killed millions of people worldwide.
Public health systems must be prepared for future pandemics.
Travel restrictions are often used during pandemics.
Epidemics can spread rapidly in densely populated areas.
Learning from past pandemics helps us prepare better for the future.
extraExampleTranslations: Epidemiyalarning pandemiyaga aylanishining oldini olishda erta aniqlash juda muhim.
Vaktsinalar epidemiyalarni nazorat qilishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
1918 yildagi gripp pandemiyasi butun dunyoda millionlab odamni o‘ldirdi.
Jamoat salomatligi tizimlari kelajakdagi pandemiyalarga tayyor bo‘lishi kerak.
Pandemiyalar paytida ko‘pincha sayohat cheklovlari qo‘llaniladi.
Epidemiyalar aholi zich joylashgan hududlarda tez tarqalishi mumkin.
O‘tmishdagi pandemiyalardan saboq olish kelajakka yaxshiroq tayyorgarlik ko‘rishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The sharing of customs, traditions, ideas, and values between different cultures.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy almashinuv — bu turli madaniyatlar o‘rtasida urf-odatlar, an’analar, g‘oyalar va qadriyatlarning o‘zaro almashinishidir.
words.example1: Studying abroad promotes cultural exchange and helps students understand different perspectives.
words.example1Translation: Xorijda o‘qish madaniy almashinuvni rivojlantiradi va talabalarga turli nuqtai nazarlarni tushunishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: International festivals are great platforms for cultural exchange between nations.
words.example2Translation: Xalqaro festivallar mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi madaniy almashinuv uchun ajoyib maydonchadir.
words.example3: The program encourages cultural exchange through art, music, and food workshops.
words.example3Translation: Dastur san’at, musiqa va oshpazlik ustaxonalari orqali madaniy almashinuvni rag‘batlantiradi.
extraExamples: Social media has accelerated cultural exchange among young people around the world.
Cultural exchange programs help reduce stereotypes between different societies.
Through cultural exchange, we learned that hospitality traditions vary widely across Asia.
The museum exhibition focused on cultural exchange during the Silk Road era.
Many universities offer cultural exchange opportunities for both local and foreign students.
Food is one of the most enjoyable forms of cultural exchange.
She participated in a cultural exchange that completely changed her view of the world.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar butun dunyodagi yoshlar o‘rtasida madaniy almashinuvni tezlashtirdi.
Madaniy almashinuv dasturlari turli jamiyatlar o‘rtasidagi stereotiplarni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Madaniy almashinuv orqali biz Osiyoda mehmondo‘stlik an’analari juda farqli ekanligini bilib oldik.
Muzey ko‘rgazmasi Ipak yo‘li davridagi madaniy almashinuvga bag‘ishlangan edi.
Ko‘plab universitetlar mahalliy va xorijiy talabalar uchun madaniy almashinuv imkoniyatlarini taklif qiladi.
Ovqat madaniy almashinuvning eng yoqimli shakllaridan biridir.
U dunyo haqidagi qarashini butunlay o‘zgartirgan madaniy almashinuvda ishtirok etdi.

words.definition: The process of connecting economies, cultures, and policies across the world.
words.definitionUz: Global integratsiya — bu dunyo mamlakatlarining iqtisodiyotlarini, madaniyatlarini va siyosatlarini bir-biriga bog‘lash jarayonidir.
words.example1: Global integration has made it easier for companies to source materials from different continents.
words.example1Translation: Global integratsiya kompaniyalarga turli qit’alardan materiallar sotib olishni osonlashtirdi.
words.example2: The European Union is a prime example of regional global integration.
words.example2Translation: Yevropa Ittifoqi mintaqaviy global integratsiyaning yorqin namunasidir.
words.example3: Global integration brings both opportunities and challenges for developing countries.
words.example3Translation: Global integratsiya rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar uchun ham imkoniyatlar, ham qiyinchiliklar keltiradi.
extraExamples: Advances in technology have greatly accelerated global integration in recent decades.
Critics argue that global integration can weaken local traditions and industries.
Global integration allows ideas and innovations to spread faster than ever before.
Many experts study the effects of global integration on employment patterns.
The conference discussed strategies to promote fair global integration.
Global integration has transformed how we communicate and do business.
Countries must adapt their policies to benefit from global integration.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiya taraqqiyoti so‘nggi o‘n yilliklarda global integratsiyani sezilarli darajada tezlashtirdi.
Tanqidchilar global integratsiya mahalliy an’analar va sanoatni zaiflashtirishi mumkinligini ta’kidlaydilar.
Global integratsiya g‘oyalar va yangiliklarning oldingidan tezroq tarqalishiga imkon beradi.
Ko‘plab mutaxassislar global integratsiyaning bandlik shakllariga ta’sirini o‘rganadilar.
Konferensiya adolatli global integratsiyani rag‘batlantirish strategiyalarini muhokama qildi.
Global integratsiya bizning muloqot va biznes yuritish usullarimizni o‘zgartirdi.
Mamlakatlar global integratsiyadan foyda olish uchun siyosatlarini moslashtirishlari kerak.

words.definition: Large companies that operate and have offices in several different countries.
words.definitionUz: Transmilliy korporatsiyalar — bu bir necha mamlakatlarda faoliyat yuritadigan va ofislari mavjud bo‘lgan yirik kompaniyalardir.
words.example1: Many multinational corporations have factories in Asia and headquarters in Europe.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab transmilliy korporatsiyalarning Osiyoda zavodlari va Yevropada bosh ofislari bor.
words.example2: Multinational corporations often influence local economies and employment.
words.example2Translation: Transmilliy korporatsiyalar ko‘pincha mahalliy iqtisodiyot va bandlikka ta’sir qiladi.
words.example3: Working for a multinational corporation gave her the chance to live in three different countries.
words.example3Translation: Transmilliy korporatsiyada ishlash unga uchta turli mamlakatda yashash imkonini berdi.
extraExamples: Multinational corporations play a major role in global trade and investment.
Some people criticize multinational corporations for avoiding taxes in certain countries.
The company grew from a small startup into a powerful multinational corporation.
Multinational corporations must respect local cultures while maintaining global standards.
Many governments offer incentives to attract multinational corporations.
She works in the legal department of a well-known multinational corporation.
Technological innovation is often driven by multinational corporations.
extraExampleTranslations: Transmilliy korporatsiyalar global savdo va investitsiyalarda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Ba’zilar transmilliy korporatsiyalarni ba’zi mamlakatlarda soliq to‘lashdan qochishda ayblaydilar.
Kompaniya kichik startapdan kuchli transmilliy korporatsiyaga aylandi.
Transmilliy korporatsiyalar global standartlarni saqlab, mahalliy madaniyatlarga hurmat ko‘rsatishlari kerak.
Ko‘plab hukumatlar transmilliy korporatsiyalarni jalb qilish uchun imtiyozlar taklif qiladi.
U mashhur transmilliy korporatsiyaning yuridik bo‘limida ishlaydi.
Texnologik innovatsiyalar ko‘pincha transmilliy korporatsiyalar tomonidan boshqariladi.

words.definition: The process by which different cultures become increasingly similar due to globalization.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy bir xillashtirish — bu globallashuv tufayli turli madaniyatlar bir-biriga tobora o‘xshab borishi jarayonidir.
words.example1: Critics worry that cultural homogenization is threatening traditional lifestyles.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar madaniy bir xillashtirish an’anaviy turmush tarziga tahdid solayotganidan xavotirlanadilar.
words.example2: The spread of fast food chains is often cited as an example of cultural homogenization.
words.example2Translation: Tez ovqatlanish tarmoqlarining tarqalishi madaniy bir xillashtirishning namunasidir.
words.example3: While cultural homogenization simplifies communication, it can reduce cultural diversity.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy bir xillashtirish muloqotni soddalashtirsa-da, madaniy xilma-xillikni kamaytirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Global media contributes significantly to cultural homogenization.
Some communities actively resist cultural homogenization to preserve their heritage.
Cultural homogenization is a controversial topic in discussions about globalization.
The internet has accelerated the pace of cultural homogenization.
Fashion trends show clear signs of cultural homogenization worldwide.
Experts debate whether cultural homogenization is mostly positive or negative.
Local languages sometimes disappear as a result of cultural homogenization.
extraExampleTranslations: Global media madaniy bir xillashtirishga katta hissa qo‘shadi.
Ba’zi jamoalar o‘z merosini saqlash uchun madaniy bir xillashtirishga faol qarshilik ko‘rsatadilar.
Madaniy bir xillashtirish globallashuv haqidagi muhokamalarda munozarali mavzudir.
Internet madaniy bir xillashtirish sur’atini tezlashtirdi.
Moda tendensiyalari butun dunyoda madaniy bir xillashtirishning aniq belgilarini ko‘rsatadi.
Mutaxassislar madaniy bir xillashtirish asosan ijobiy yoki salbiy ekanligini bahslashadilar.
Mahalliy tillar ba’zan madaniy bir xillashtirish natijasida yo‘qoladi.

words.definition: The spread of customs, practices, ideas, and innovations from one culture to another.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy tarqalish — bu urf-odatlar, amaliyotlar, g‘oyalar va yangiliklarning bir madaniyatdan ikkinchisiga o‘tishi jarayonidir.
words.example1: The cultural diffusion of coffee drinking began in the Middle East and spread worldwide.
words.example1Translation: Qahva ichish odati Yaqin Sharqda boshlanib, butun dunyoga tarqaldi.
words.example2: Social media has dramatically increased the speed of cultural diffusion.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar madaniy tarqalish tezligini keskin oshirdi.
words.example3: Cultural diffusion can be seen in the popularity of yoga in Western countries.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy tarqalishni G‘arb mamlakatlarida yoganing mashhurligida ko‘rish mumkin.
extraExamples: The Silk Road was a major route for cultural diffusion in ancient times.
Music genres like hip-hop have experienced rapid cultural diffusion globally.
Cultural diffusion often occurs through migration and trade.
Not all cultural diffusion is voluntary; some happens through colonization.
Scholars study cultural diffusion to understand how societies change.
Japanese anime represents an interesting case of cultural diffusion from East to West.
The internet has made cultural diffusion more democratic and widespread.
extraExampleTranslations: Ipak yo‘li qadimda madaniy tarqalishning asosiy yo‘li bo‘lgan.
Xip-xop kabi musiqa janrlari global miqyosda tez madaniy tarqalishni boshdan kechirdi.
Madaniy tarqalish ko‘pincha migratsiya va savdo orqali sodir bo‘ladi.
Hamma madaniy tarqalish ixtiyoriy emas; ba’zilari mustamlakachilik orqali sodir bo‘ladi.
Olimlar jamiyatlar qanday o‘zgarishini tushunish uchun madaniy tarqalishni o‘rganadilar.
Yapon anime madaniyati Sharqdan G‘arbga madaniy tarqalishning qiziqarli misolidir.
Internet madaniy tarqalishni yanada demokratik va keng tarqalgan qildi.

words.definition: The mutual dependence of countries on each other’s economies through trade and investment.
words.definitionUz: Iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlik — bu mamlakatlarning savdo va investitsiyalar orqali bir-birining iqtisodiyotiga bog‘liqligidir.
words.example1: Economic interdependence means that a crisis in one country can affect the entire world.
words.example1Translation: Iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlik bir mamlakatdagi inqiroz butun dunyoga ta’sir qilishi mumkinligini bildiradi.
words.example2: The global supply chain is a clear example of economic interdependence.
words.example2Translation: Global ta’minot zanjiri iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikning yorqin misolidir.
words.example3: Increased economic interdependence has reduced the likelihood of large-scale wars.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikning kuchayishi keng ko‘lamli urushlar ehtimolini kamaytirdi.
extraExamples: Economic interdependence makes countries more vulnerable to global events.
Many economists view economic interdependence as beneficial for growth.
The COVID-19 pandemic exposed the risks of high economic interdependence.
Trade agreements aim to strengthen economic interdependence between nations.
Small countries often benefit greatly from economic interdependence.
Political tensions can strain economic interdependence between countries.
Understanding economic interdependence is key to modern international relations.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlik mamlakatlarni global voqealarga nisbatan zaifroq qiladi.
Ko‘plab iqtisodchilar iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikni o‘sish uchun foydali deb bilishadi.
COVID-19 pandemiyasi yuqori iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlik xavfini ochib berdi.
Savdo shartnomalari mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikni kuchaytirishga qaratilgan.
Kichik mamlakatlar iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikdan katta foyda ko‘radilar.
Siyosiy keskinliklar mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikni buzishi mumkin.
Iqtisodiy o‘zaro bog‘liqlikni tushunish zamonaviy xalqaro munosabatlarda muhimdir.

words.definition: The concept that the world has become highly interconnected, like a small village, due to technology and globalization.
words.definitionUz: Global qishloq — bu texnologiya va globallashuv tufayli dunyo kichik qishloqdek bir-biriga juda bog‘langan degan tushunchadir.
words.example1: Thanks to the internet, we truly live in a global village where news spreads instantly.
words.example1Translation: Internet tufayli biz haqiqatan ham yangiliklar bir zumda tarqaladigan global qishloqda yashayapmiz.
words.example2: The global village idea was first popularized by Marshall McLuhan.
words.example2Translation: Global qishloq g‘oyasini birinchi bo‘lib Marshall Maklyuhan ommalashtirgan.
words.example3: In the global village, cultural differences are easier to see but also easier to understand.
words.example3Translation: Global qishloqda madaniy farqlar ko‘proq ko‘zga tashlanadi, lekin ularni tushunish ham osonroq.
extraExamples: Social media has turned the world into an even smaller global village.
Living in a global village means we are all affected by distant events.
The global village brings both cooperation and conflict closer together.
Young people today grow up feeling part of a global village.
Critics say the global village concept overlooks power imbalances.
Technology continues to shrink the global village every year.
The pandemic reminded us how connected we are in this global village.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar dunyoni yanada kichikroq global qishloqqa aylantirdi.
Global qishloqda yashash uzoqdagi voqealar hammamizga ta’sir qilishini bildiradi.
Global qishloq hamkorlikni ham, to‘qnashuvlarni ham yaqinlashtiradi.
Bugungi yoshlar o‘zlarini global qishloqning bir qismi deb bilib o‘sadilar.
Tanqidchilar global qishloq tushunchasi kuch muvozanatini e’tiborga olmasligini aytishadi.
Texnologiya har yili global qishloqni yanada kichraytirmoqda.
Pandemiya bizni bu global qishloqda qanchalik bog‘langanligimizni eslatdi.
