words.definition: The removal or reduction of trade barriers between nations to encourage free trade.
words.definitionUz: Savdo liberallashtirish — bu erkin savdoni rag‘batlantirish uchun mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi savdo to‘siqlarini olib tashlash yoki kamaytirishdir.
words.example1: Trade liberalization has boosted economic growth in many developing countries.
words.example1Translation: Savdo liberallashtirish ko‘plab rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda iqtisodiy o‘sishni kuchaytirdi.
words.example2: The WTO promotes trade liberalization among its member countries.
words.example2Translation: JST o‘z a’zolari o‘rtasida savdo liberallashtirishni rag‘batlantiradi.
words.example3: While trade liberalization creates jobs, it can also lead to job losses in certain sectors.
words.example3Translation: Savdo liberallashtirish ish o‘rinlarini yaratadi, ammo ba’zi sohalarda ish o‘rinlarini yo‘qotishga ham olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Trade liberalization often leads to lower prices for consumers.
Some industries oppose trade liberalization to protect local businesses.
The agreement focused on further trade liberalization in agriculture.
Critics argue that trade liberalization increases inequality.
Many countries have benefited from gradual trade liberalization.
Trade liberalization is a key component of economic globalization.
Negotiations on trade liberalization can take many years.
extraExampleTranslations: Savdo liberallashtirish iste’molchilar uchun narxlarni pasaytiradi.
Ba’zi sanoat tarmoqlari mahalliy biznesni himoya qilish uchun savdo liberallashtirishga qarshilik ko‘rsatadi.
Shartnoma qishloq xo‘jaligida savdo liberallashtirishni yanada kuchaytirishga qaratilgan edi.
Tanqidchilar savdo liberallashtirish tengsizlikni kuchaytirishini ta’kidlaydilar.
Ko‘plab mamlakatlar bosqichma-bosqich savdo liberallashtirishdan foyda ko‘rdilar.
Savdo liberallashtirish iqtisodiy globallashuvning muhim tarkibiy qismidir.
Savdo liberallashtirish bo‘yicha muzokaralar ko‘p yillar davom etishi mumkin.

words.definition: Communication between people from different cultural backgrounds.
words.definitionUz: Madaniyatlararo muloqot — bu turli madaniy kelib chiqishdagi odamlar o‘rtasidagi aloqadir.
words.example1: Effective cross-cultural communication is essential in international business.
words.example1Translation: Samarali madaniyatlararo muloqot xalqaro biznesda juda muhimdir.
words.example2: Misunderstandings often arise due to poor cross-cultural communication.
words.example2Translation: Tushunmovchiliklar ko‘pincha madaniyatlararo muloqotning zaifligi tufayli yuzaga keladi.
words.example3: Training in cross-cultural communication helps employees work better in diverse teams.
words.example3Translation: Madaniyatlararo muloqot bo‘yicha trening xodimlarga xilma-xil jamoalarda yaxshiroq ishlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Cross-cultural communication skills are highly valued in the global job market.
Body language varies greatly, making cross-cultural communication challenging.
The book provides practical tips for improving cross-cultural communication.
Diplomats must master cross-cultural communication to succeed.
Social media has created new opportunities and challenges for cross-cultural communication.
Humor can be tricky in cross-cultural communication.
Universities offer courses on cross-cultural communication.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniyatlararo muloqot ko‘nikmalari global ish bozorida yuqori baholanadi.
Tana tili juda farq qiladi, shuning uchun madaniyatlararo muloqot qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
Kitob madaniyatlararo muloqotni yaxshilash uchun amaliy maslahatlar beradi.
Diplomatiya mutaxassislari muvaffaqiyat qozonish uchun madaniyatlararo muloqotni mukammal egallashlari kerak.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar madaniyatlararo muloqot uchun yangi imkoniyatlar va qiyinchiliklar yaratdi.
Humor madaniyatlararo muloqotda qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
Universitetlar madaniyatlararo muloqot bo‘yicha kurslar taklif qiladi.

words.definition: The full right and power of a nation to govern itself without outside interference.
words.definitionUz: Suverenitet — bu bir mamlakatning tashqi aralashuvsiz o‘zini mustaqil boshqarish huquqi va qudratidir.
words.example1: The country fiercely protects its sovereignty against foreign influence.
words.example1Translation: Mamlakat xorijiy ta’sirga qarshi o‘z suverenitetini qattiq himoya qiladi.
words.example2: Joining the union raised concerns about loss of national sovereignty.
words.example2Translation: Ittifoqqa qo‘shilish milliy suverenitetni yo‘qotish xavotirini tug‘dirdi.
words.example3: International law tries to balance state sovereignty with global cooperation.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro huquq davlat suverenitetini global hamkorlik bilan muvozanatlashga harakat qiladi.
extraExamples: Sovereignty is a fundamental principle of the modern international system.
Economic globalization sometimes challenges traditional notions of sovereignty.
The government emphasized its commitment to national sovereignty.
Disputes over sovereignty can lead to serious political conflicts.
Many indigenous groups seek greater sovereignty over their lands.
Sovereignty includes the right to control borders and resources.
The treaty respected the sovereignty of all participating nations.
extraExampleTranslations: Suverenitet zamonaviy xalqaro tizimning asosiy tamoyillaridan biridir.
Iqtisodiy globallashuv ba’zan suverenitetning an’anaviy tushunchalarini shubha ostiga qo‘yadi.
Hukumat milliy suverenitetga sodiqligini ta’kidladi.
Suverenitet bo‘yicha bahslar jiddiy siyosiy mojarolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ko‘plab mahalliy guruhlar o‘z yerlari ustidan ko‘proq suverenitet izlaydilar.
Suverenitet chegaralarni va resurslarni nazorat qilish huquqini o‘z ichiga oladi.
Shartnoma barcha ishtirokchi mamlakatlarning suverenitetini hurmat qildi.

words.definition: A social system in which the buying and consumption of goods and services is highly emphasized.
words.definitionUz: Iste’molchilik madaniyati — bu tovar va xizmatlarni sotib olish va iste’mol qilishga katta ahamiyat beriladigan ijtimoiy tizimdir.
words.example1: Modern consumer culture encourages people to buy things they don’t really need.
words.example1Translation: Zamonaviy iste’molchilik madaniyati odamlarni haqiqatan ham kerak bo‘lmagan narsalarni sotib olishga undaydi.
words.example2: Advertising plays a powerful role in shaping consumer culture.
words.example2Translation: Reklama iste’molchilik madaniyatini shakllantirishda kuchli rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: Some critics argue that consumer culture harms the environment and personal happiness.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi tanqidchilar iste’molchilik madaniyati atrof-muhit va shaxsiy baxtga zarar yetkazishini aytishadi.
extraExamples: Consumer culture has spread rapidly with the rise of global brands.
Black Friday is a clear symbol of consumer culture.
Young people are heavily influenced by consumer culture through social media.
The shift towards sustainable living challenges traditional consumer culture.
Consumer culture values newness and constant upgrades.
In many societies, success is often measured by consumer culture standards.
Understanding consumer culture is important for marketers and sociologists.
extraExampleTranslations: Iste’molchilik madaniyati global brendlarning o‘sishi bilan tez tarqaldi.
Qora juma iste’molchilik madaniyatining aniq ramzidir.
Yoshlar ijtimoiy tarmoqlar orqali iste’molchilik madaniyatiga kuchli ta’sirlanadilar.
Barqaror turmush tarziga o‘tish an’anaviy iste’molchilik madaniyatiga qarshi chiqadi.
Iste’molchilik madaniyati yangilik va doimiy yangilanishlarni qadrlaydi.
Ko‘plab jamiyatlarda muvaffaqiyat iste’molchilik madaniyati me’yorlari bilan o‘lchanadi.
Iste’molchilik madaniyatini tushunish marketologlar va sotsiologlar uchun muhimdir.

words.definition: The international network of economic activities connecting countries through trade, investment, and finance.
words.definitionUz: Global iqtisodiyot — bu savdo, investitsiya va moliya orqali mamlakatlarni bog‘laydigan xalqaro iqtisodiy faoliyatlar tarmoqidir.
words.example1: The global economy was severely affected by the financial crisis of 2008.
words.example1Translation: Global iqtisodiyot 2008 yildagi moliyaviy inqirozdan qattiq zarar ko‘rdi.
words.example2: Technology companies play a huge role in today’s global economy.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya kompaniyalari bugungi global iqtisodiyotda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: Understanding the global economy helps governments make better policies.
words.example3Translation: Global iqtisodiyotni tushunish hukumatlarga yaxshiroq siyosat yuritishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Globalization has made the global economy more interconnected than ever.
Fluctuations in oil prices can impact the entire global economy.
Emerging markets are becoming increasingly important in the global economy.
The pandemic caused major disruptions in the global economy.
Economists forecast continued growth in the global economy next year.
Supply chain problems continue to challenge the global economy.
Sustainable practices are essential for the future of the global economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Globallashuv global iqtisodiyotni oldingidan ham ko‘proq bog‘ladi.
Neft narxlaridagi o‘zgarishlar butun global iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Rivojlanayotgan bozorlar global iqtisodiyotda tobora muhim ahamiyat kasb etmoqda.
Pandemiya global iqtisodiyotda katta uzilishlarga sabab bo‘ldi.
Iqtisodchilar kelasi yilda global iqtisodiyotning o‘sishini bashorat qilmoqdalar.
Ta’minot zanjiri muammolari global iqtisodiyotni qiyinlashtirmoqda.
Barqaror amaliyotlar global iqtisodiyot kelajagi uchun zarurdir.

words.definition: The distinctive traditions, culture, and sense of belonging of a specific local community.
words.definitionUz: Mahalliy o‘zlik — bu muayyan mahalliy jamoaning o‘ziga xos an’analari, madaniyati va o‘ziga tegishlilik hissi.
words.example1: Globalization sometimes threatens local identity in small towns.
words.example1Translation: Globallashuv ba’zan kichik shaharchalardagi mahalliy o‘zlikka tahdid soladi.
words.example2: Festivals help preserve and celebrate local identity.
words.example2Translation: Festivallar mahalliy o‘zlikni saqlash va nishonlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She is proud of her local identity and traditional clothing.
words.example3Translation: U o‘z mahalliy o‘zligi va an’anaviy kiyimidan faxrlanadi.
extraExamples: Maintaining local identity is important in the face of global influences.
Local identity can be a source of community strength and resilience.
Tourism can both support and endanger local identity.
Language is a key part of local identity.
Young people often blend local identity with global trends.
The museum showcases the rich local identity of the region.
Efforts to protect local identity have grown stronger in recent years.
extraExampleTranslations: Global ta’sirlar sharoitida mahalliy o‘zlikni saqlab qolish muhimdir.
Mahalliy o‘zlik jamoa kuchining va chidamliligining manbai bo‘lishi mumkin.
Turizm mahalliy o‘zlikni ham qo‘llab-quvvatlashi, ham xavf ostiga qo‘yishi mumkin.
Til mahalliy o‘zlikning muhim qismidir.
Yoshlar ko‘pincha mahalliy o‘zlikni global tendensiyalar bilan birlashtiradilar.
Muzey mintaqaning boy mahalliy o‘zligini namoyish etadi.
So‘nggi yillarda mahalliy o‘zlikni himoya qilish harakatlari kuchaydi.

words.definition: Globalization that considers and addresses environmental, social, and economic impacts for long-term benefit.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror globallashuv — bu atrof-muhit, ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy ta’sirlarni hisobga olib, uzoq muddatli foyda keltiradigan globallashuvdir.
words.example1: Sustainable globalization aims to reduce environmental damage while promoting economic growth.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror globallashuv iqtisodiy o‘sishni rag‘batlantirish bilan birga atrof-muhitga zararini kamaytirishni maqsad qiladi.
words.example2: Many organizations are calling for a shift toward sustainable globalization.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab tashkilotlar barqaror globallashuvga o‘tishni talab qilmoqdalar.
words.example3: Sustainable globalization includes fair labor practices and poverty reduction.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror globallashuv adolatli mehnat amaliyotlari va qashshoqlikni kamaytirishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: Sustainable globalization requires cooperation between rich and poor nations.
The concept of sustainable globalization is gaining popularity among policymakers.
Technology can help achieve sustainable globalization goals.
Critics say current globalization is far from sustainable.
Education plays a vital role in promoting sustainable globalization.
Sustainable globalization seeks to balance global integration with local needs.
Investors are increasingly interested in companies supporting sustainable globalization.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror globallashuv boy va kambag‘al mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi hamkorlikni talab qiladi.
Barqaror globallashuv tushunchasi siyosatchilar orasida mashhurlik kasb etmoqda.
Texnologiya barqaror globallashuv maqsadlariga erishishga yordam beradi.
Tanqidchilar hozirgi globallashuv barqaror emasligini aytishadi.
Ta’lim barqaror globallashuvni rag‘batlantirishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Barqaror globallashuv global integratsiyani mahalliy ehtiyojlar bilan muvozanatlashga intiladi.
Investorlar barqaror globallashuvni qo‘llab-quvvatlovchi kompaniyalarga tobora ko‘proq qiziqish bildirmoqda.

words.definition: A scattered population with a common origin living outside their original homeland.
words.definitionUz: Diaspora — bu umumiy kelib chiqishi bo‘lgan va o‘z vatanidan tashqarida yashayotgan tarqalgan aholi.
words.example1: The Indian diaspora has made significant contributions to many countries.
words.example1Translation: Hindiston diasporasi ko‘plab mamlakatlarga katta hissa qo‘shgan.
words.example2: Diaspora communities often maintain strong cultural ties to their homeland.
words.example2Translation: Diaspora jamoalari ko‘pincha o‘z vatanlari bilan kuchli madaniy aloqalarni saqlab turadilar.
words.example3: The Armenian diaspora played an important role in international recognition efforts.
words.example3Translation: Arman diasporasi xalqaro tan olish harakatlarida muhim rol o‘ynadi.
extraExamples: Modern technology helps diaspora members stay connected with their roots.
The African diaspora has influenced music, art, and cuisine globally.
Governments often reach out to their diaspora for investment and support.
Diaspora networks are powerful forces in global business and politics.
She grew up in the Chinese diaspora in Canada.
Diaspora remittances are a major source of income for many developing countries.
Preserving language and traditions is important for diaspora communities.
extraExampleTranslations: Zamonaviy texnologiya diaspora a’zolariga o‘z ildizlari bilan aloqada bo‘lishga yordam beradi.
Afrika diasporasi musiqa, san’at va oshxonaga butun dunyoda ta’sir qilgan.
Hukumatlar ko‘pincha o‘z diasporalariga investitsiya va yordam uchun murojaat qiladilar.
Diaspora tarmoqlari global biznes va siyosatda kuchli kuchdir.
U Kanadadagi xitoy diasporasida o‘sgan.
Diaspora pul jo‘natmalari ko‘plab rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar uchun daromadning asosiy manbaidir.
Til va an’analarni saqlash diaspora jamoalari uchun muhimdir.

words.definition: Tourism that minimizes negative impact on the environment, culture, and local economy while supporting long-term benefits.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror turizm — bu atrof-muhit, madaniyat va mahalliy iqtisodiyotga salbiy taʼsirni kamaytiradigan va uzoq muddatli foyda keltiradigan sayyohlik turi.
words.example1: Many countries are promoting sustainable tourism to protect their natural landscapes.
words.example1Translation: Koʻplab mamlakatlar tabiiy landshaftlarini himoya qilish uchun barqaror turizmni rivojlantirmoqda.
words.example2: Sustainable tourism helps local communities benefit from visitors without being overwhelmed.
words.example2Translation: Barqaror turizm mahalliy jamoalarga mehmonlardan foyda koʻrishga yordam beradi, lekin ularni bosib qoʻymasdan.
words.example3: Choosing eco-friendly hotels is one way to support sustainable tourism.
words.example3Translation: Ekologik toza mehmonxonalarni tanlash barqaror turizmni qoʻllab-quvvatlashning bir usuli.
extraExamples: The government introduced new policies to encourage sustainable tourism practices.
Travelers are becoming more aware of the importance of sustainable tourism.
Sustainable tourism can help preserve endangered wildlife habitats.
Many resorts are adopting sustainable tourism principles to reduce plastic waste.
Sustainable tourism creates jobs while protecting cultural heritage.
She prefers sustainable tourism destinations that respect local traditions.
Investing in sustainable tourism leads to better long-term economic growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat barqaror turizm amaliyotlarini ragʻbatlantirish uchun yangi siyosatlar joriy qildi.
Sayyohlar barqaror turizmning muhimligini tobora koʻproq anglamoqda.
Barqaror turizm yoʻqolib borayotgan yovvoyi hayvonlar yashash joylarini saqlab qolishga yordam beradi.
Koʻplab kurortlar plastik chiqindilarni kamaytirish uchun barqaror turizm tamoyillarini qoʻllamoqda.
Barqaror turizm madaniy merosni himoya qilgan holda ish oʻrinlarini yaratadi.
U mahalliy urf-odatlarni hurmat qiladigan barqaror turizm maskanlarini afzal koʻradi.
Barqaror turizmga sarmoya kiritish uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy oʻsishga olib keladi.

words.definition: The act of adopting elements from another culture without understanding or respecting its original meaning or context.
words.definitionUz: Madaniyatni oʻzlashtirish — bu boshqa madaniyat elementlarini uning asl maʼnosi va kontekstini tushunmasdan va hurmat qilmasdan qabul qilishdir.
words.example1: Wearing traditional clothing as a fashion trend can sometimes be seen as cultural appropriation.
words.example1Translation: Anʼanaviy kiyimlarni moda tendensiyasi sifatida kiyish baʼzan madaniyatni oʻzlashtirish deb baholanishi mumkin.
words.example2: The debate about cultural appropriation often arises in the music and fashion industries.
words.example2Translation: Madaniyatni oʻzlashtirish haqidagi bahslar koʻpincha musiqa va moda sanoatida paydo boʻladi.
words.example3: She was criticized for cultural appropriation after using sacred symbols in her artwork.
words.example3Translation: U oʻz sanʼat asarlarida muqaddas ramzlardan foydalangani uchun madaniyatni oʻzlashtirishda ayblandi.
extraExamples: Cultural appropriation can offend people whose traditions are being borrowed.
Understanding the difference between cultural appreciation and appropriation is important.
Many celebrities have faced backlash for cultural appropriation on social media.
The festival organizers made sure to avoid any form of cultural appropriation.
Cultural appropriation often ignores the historical struggles of the original culture.
Young designers are learning to avoid cultural appropriation in their collections.
Respectful cultural exchange is very different from cultural appropriation.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniyatni oʻzlashtirish oʻz anʼanalari qarz olinayotgan odamlarni xafa qilishi mumkin.
Madaniyatni hurmat qilish va oʻzlashtirish oʻrtasidagi farqni tushunish muhim.
Koʻplab mashhurlar ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda madaniyatni oʻzlashtirgani uchun tanqidga uchragan.
Festival tashkilotchilari har qanday madaniyatni oʻzlashtirishdan qochishga harakat qilishdi.
Madaniyatni oʻzlashtirish koʻpincha asl madaniyatning tarixiy qiyinchiliklarini eʼtiborga olmaydi.
Yosh dizaynerlar oʻz kollektsiyalarida madaniyatni oʻzlashtirishdan qochishni oʻrganmoqda.
Hurmat bilan madaniyat almashinuvi madaniyatni oʻzlashtirishdan butunlay boshqacha.

words.definition: The situation when a popular tourist destination receives too many visitors, causing damage to the environment and local quality of life.
words.definitionUz: Haddan tashqari turizm — mashhur sayyohlik maskaniga juda koʻp mehmon kelib, atrof-muhit va mahalliy hayot sifatiga zarar yetkazadigan holat.
words.example1: Venice is struggling with overtourism, which is damaging its historic buildings.
words.example1Translation: Venetsiya haddan tashqari turizmdan aziyat chekmoqda, bu uning tarixiy binolariga zarar yetkazmoqda.
words.example2: Local residents are protesting against overtourism in their town.
words.example2Translation: Mahalliy aholi oʻz shaharlaridagi haddan tashqari turizmga qarshi norozilik bildirmoqda.
words.example3: Overtourism has led to higher prices and crowded public spaces.
words.example3Translation: Haddan tashqari turizm narxlarning oshishiga va jamoat joylarining gavjum boʻlishiga olib keldi.
extraExamples: Many destinations are introducing measures to control overtourism.
The effects of overtourism can be seen in the polluted beaches of Bali.
Overtourism makes it difficult for locals to enjoy their own city.
Travel bloggers are encouraging people to avoid overtourism hotspots.
Governments are trying to spread tourism more evenly to prevent overtourism.
Overtourism has become a major issue in popular mountain villages.
Sustainable practices help reduce the negative impacts of overtourism.
extraExampleTranslations: Koʻplab maskanlar haddan tashqari turizmni boshqarish choralarini joriy qilmoqda.
Haddan tashqari turizm taʼsiri Balidagi ifloslangan plyajlarda koʻrinib turibdi.
Haddan tashqari turizm mahalliy aholi uchun oʻz shaharidan zavqlanishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Sayyohlik bloggerlari odamlarni haddan tashqari turizm markazlaridan qochishga undamoqda.
Hukumatlar turizmni tengroq taqsimlashga harakat qilmoqda, haddan tashqari turizmning oldini olish uchun.
Haddan tashqari turizm mashhur togʻ qishloqlarida katta muammoga aylandi.
Barqaror amaliyotlar haddan tashqari turizmning salbiy taʼsirlarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Responsible travel to natural areas that conserves the environment and improves the well-being of local people.
words.definitionUz: Ekoturizm — tabiat hududlariga mas’uliyatli sayohat bo‘lib, atrof-muhitni saqlaydi va mahalliy aholining farovonligini oshiradi.
words.example1: They went on an ecotourism trip to the Amazon rainforest.
words.example1Translation: Ular Amazonka tropik o‘rmoniga ekoturizm safariga chiqishdi.
words.example2: Ecotourism is becoming increasingly popular among environmentally conscious travelers.
words.example2Translation: Ekoturizm atrof-muhitga mas’uliyatli sayyohlar orasida tobora ommalashmoqda.
words.example3: The national park promotes ecotourism to protect its wildlife.
words.example3Translation: Milliy bog‘ yovvoyi hayvonlarini himoya qilish uchun ekoturizmni targ‘ib qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Ecotourism helps fund conservation projects in remote areas.
Many lodges in Africa offer genuine ecotourism experiences.
She studied ecotourism as part of her environmental science degree.
Ecotourism encourages visitors to learn about local ecosystems.
Responsible ecotourism can benefit both nature and local communities.
The island developed ecotourism to reduce reliance on mass tourism.
Ecotourism operators must follow strict environmental guidelines.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekoturizm uzoq hududlarda tabiatni saqlash loyihalarini moliyalashtirishga yordam beradi.
Afrikadagi ko‘plab mehmonxonalar haqiqiy ekoturizm tajribalarini taklif qiladi.
U ekologiya fanlari bo‘yicha o‘qishida ekoturizmni o‘rgandi.
Ekoturizm mehmonlarni mahalliy ekotizimlar haqida o‘rganishga undaydi.
Mas’uliyatli ekoturizm tabiat va mahalliy jamoalar uchun foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.
Orol ommaviy turizmdan kamroq bog‘liq bo‘lish uchun ekoturizmni rivojlantirdi.
Ekoturizm operatorlari qat’iy ekologik qoidalarga rioya qilishlari kerak.

words.definition: A place recognized for its cultural, historical, or natural importance, often protected by law.
words.definitionUz: Merossiy joy — madaniy, tarixiy yoki tabiiy ahamiyatga ega bo‘lgan va ko‘pincha qonun bilan himoyalangan joy.
words.example1: The Great Wall of China is a famous UNESCO heritage site.
words.example1Translation: Xitoyning Buyuk devori mashhur YuNESKO merossiy joyidir.
words.example2: We visited several heritage sites during our trip to Italy.
words.example2Translation: Italiyaga sayohatimizda bir necha merossiy joylarga tashrif buyurdik.
words.example3: Preserving heritage sites is important for future generations.
words.example3Translation: Merossiy joylarni saqlab qolish kelajak avlodlar uchun muhim.
extraExamples: The ancient city was declared a world heritage site last year.
Tourists must follow rules when visiting sensitive heritage sites.
Heritage sites attract millions of visitors every year.
Local authorities are restoring the old heritage site.
Some heritage sites are in danger due to climate change.
She works as a guide at a national heritage site.
UNESCO helps protect important heritage sites around the world.
extraExampleTranslations: Qadimiy shahar o‘tgan yili jahon merossiy joyi deb e’lon qilindi.
Sayyohlar nozik merossiy joylarga tashrif buyurganda qoidalarga rioya qilishlari kerak.
Merossiy joylar har yili millionlab mehmonlarni jalb qiladi.
Mahalliy hokimiyat eski merossiy joyni tiklamoqda.
Ba’zi merossiy joylar iqlim o‘zgarishi tufayli xavf ostida.
U milliy merossiy joyda gid bo‘lib ishlaydi.
YuNESKO dunyo bo‘ylab muhim merossiy joylarni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Facilities and services such as hotels, transport, and information centers built to support tourism.
words.definitionUz: Turistik infratuzilma — mehmonxonalar, transport va axborot markazlari kabi turizmni qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun qurilgan inshootlar va xizmatlar.
words.example1: The city invested heavily in tourist infrastructure before the big event.
words.example1Translation: Shahar katta tadbir oldidan turistik infratuzilmaga katta mablag‘ sarfladi.
words.example2: Poor tourist infrastructure can discourage visitors from returning.
words.example2Translation: Yomon turistik infratuzilma mehmonlarni qaytib kelishdan to‘xtatishi mumkin.
words.example3: Good tourist infrastructure makes travel more comfortable and convenient.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi turistik infratuzilma sayohatni qulayroq va osonroq qiladi.
extraExamples: The government is improving tourist infrastructure in rural areas.
Modern tourist infrastructure includes free Wi-Fi in public spaces.
Lack of proper tourist infrastructure affects the local economy.
They are building new roads as part of the tourist infrastructure project.
Tourist infrastructure should be developed sustainably.
Many islands struggle with inadequate tourist infrastructure.
Well-planned tourist infrastructure benefits both visitors and residents.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat qishloq hududlarida turistik infratuzilmani yaxshilamoqda.
Zamonaviy turistik infratuzilmaga jamoat joylarida bepul Wi-Fi kiradi.
To‘g‘ri turistik infratuzilmaning yo‘qligi mahalliy iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qiladi.
Ular turistik infratuzilma loyihasi doirasida yangi yo‘llar qurmoqdalar.
Turistik infratuzilma barqaror tarzda rivojlantirilishi kerak.
Ko‘plab orollar yetarli bo‘lmagan turistik infratuzilma bilan qiynalmoqda.
Yaxshi rejalashtirilgan turistik infratuzilma mehmonlar va mahalliy aholi uchun foydali.

words.definition: Deeply engaging with and participating in the daily life and traditions of a local culture.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy chuqur singish — mahalliy madaniyatning kundalik hayoti va an’analarida chuqur ishtirok etish va ularga qo‘shilish.
words.example1: Living with a host family provided her with true cultural immersion.
words.example1Translation: Uy egasi oilasida yashash unga haqiqiy madaniy chuqur singish imkonini berdi.
words.example2: The program focuses on cultural immersion rather than just sightseeing.
words.example2Translation: Dastur faqat diqqatga sazovor joylarni ko‘rish emas, balki madaniy chuqur singishga e’tibor qaratadi.
words.example3: Cultural immersion helps travelers understand local customs better.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy chuqur singish sayyohlarga mahalliy urf-odatlarni yaxshiroq tushunishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: He learned the language quickly through cultural immersion.
Cultural immersion experiences are becoming very popular.
The village offers cultural immersion activities like cooking classes.
True cultural immersion requires spending time with local people.
Many students choose study abroad programs for cultural immersion.
Cultural immersion changed the way she sees the world.
They organized a week of cultural immersion in a remote mountain community.
extraExampleTranslations: U madaniy chuqur singish orqali tilni tez o‘rgandi.
Madaniy chuqur singish tajribalari juda mashhur bo‘lib bormoqda.
Qishloq pazandalik darslari kabi madaniy chuqur singish mashg‘ulotlarini taklif qiladi.
Haqiqiy madaniy chuqur singish mahalliy odamlar bilan vaqt o‘tkazishni talab qiladi.
Ko‘plab talabalar chet elda o‘qish dasturlarini madaniy chuqur singish uchun tanlashadi.
Madaniy chuqur singish uning dunyoga qarashini o‘zgartirdi.
Ular uzoqdagi tog‘ jamoasida bir haftalik madaniy chuqur singishni tashkil qilishdi.

words.definition: The sector of the economy that includes hotels, restaurants, and other services for travelers.
words.definitionUz: Mehmondo‘stlik sanoati — mehmonxonalar, restoranlar va sayyohlar uchun boshqa xizmatlarni o‘z ichiga olgan iqtisodiyot sohasi.
words.example1: She works in the hospitality industry as a hotel manager.
words.example1Translation: U mehmondo‘stlik sanoatida mehmonxona boshqaruvchisi bo‘lib ishlaydi.
words.example2: The hospitality industry was badly affected by the pandemic.
words.example2Translation: Mehmondo‘stlik sanoati pandemiyadan qattiq zarar ko‘rdi.
words.example3: Tourism growth has boosted the hospitality industry in this region.
words.example3Translation: Turizm o‘sishi bu mintaqada mehmondo‘stlik sanoatini rivojlantirdi.
extraExamples: The hospitality industry employs millions of people worldwide.
Good customer service is essential in the hospitality industry.
Many young people are training for careers in the hospitality industry.
Sustainability is becoming important in the hospitality industry.
The hospitality industry includes everything from luxury resorts to small guesthouses.
He studied hospitality industry management at university.
New technologies are changing the hospitality industry rapidly.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmondo‘stlik sanoati dunyo bo‘ylab millionlab odamlarni ish bilan ta’minlaydi.
Yaxshi mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatish mehmondo‘stlik sanoatida juda muhim.
Ko‘plab yoshlar mehmondo‘stlik sanoatidagi kasblarga tayyorlanmoqda.
Barqarorlik mehmondo‘stlik sanoatida muhim bo‘lib bormoqda.
Mehmondo‘stlik sanoati hashamatli kurortlardan tortib kichik mehmon uylarigacha hamma narsani o‘z ichiga oladi.
U universitetda mehmondo‘stlik sanoati boshqaruvi bo‘yicha o‘qidi.
Yangi texnologiyalar mehmondo‘stlik sanoatini tez o‘zgartirmoqda.

words.definition: In or to a place that is not well known or popular with tourists.
words.definitionUz: Odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joy — ko‘pchilik sayyohlar bilmaydigan yoki mashhur bo‘lmagan joyda yoki unga.
words.example1: We decided to go somewhere off the beaten track for our vacation.
words.example1Translation: Biz ta’til uchun odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joyga borishga qaror qildik.
words.example2: Traveling off the beaten track allows you to experience authentic local life.
words.example2Translation: Odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joylarga sayohat qilish haqiqiy mahalliy hayotni his qilish imkonini beradi.
words.example3: The small village is completely off the beaten track.
words.example3Translation: Kichik qishloq butunlay odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joy.
extraExamples: She loves discovering restaurants off the beaten track.
Getting off the beaten track can be more rewarding than visiting famous places.
The guide took us to several spots off the beaten track.
Many adventurers prefer destinations that are off the beaten track.
It’s harder to find good accommodation off the beaten track.
Exploring off the beaten track requires more preparation.
Their honeymoon was spent in a beautiful place off the beaten track.
extraExampleTranslations: U odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan restoranlarni topishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joylarga borish mashhur joylarga borishdan ko‘ra ko‘proq foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.
Gid bizni bir necha odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joylarga olib bordi.
Ko‘plab sarguzashtchilar odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan maskanlarni afzal ko‘rishadi.
Odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joylarda yaxshi turar joy topish qiyinroq.
Odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joylarni o‘rganish ko‘proq tayyorgarlikni talab qiladi.
Ularning asal oyi go‘zal, odatda sayyohlar bormaydigan joyda o‘tdi.

words.definition: Official rules or limitations on movement between countries or regions, often for health or security reasons.
words.definitionUz: Sayohat cheklovlari — ko‘pincha sog‘liq yoki xavfsizlik sabablariga ko‘ra mamlakatlar yoki hududlar o‘rtasidagi harakatni cheklovchi rasmiy qoidalar.
words.example1: Travel restrictions were introduced due to the new virus variant.
words.example1Translation: Yangi virus shtammi tufayli sayohat cheklovlari joriy qilindi.
words.example2: We had to change our plans because of sudden travel restrictions.
words.example2Translation: To‘satdan joriy etilgan sayohat cheklovlari tufayli rejalarni o‘zgartirishga majbur bo‘ldik.
words.example3: Many countries have eased their travel restrictions recently.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab mamlakatlar yaqinda sayohat cheklovlarini yumshatdi.
extraExamples: Travel restrictions made international tourism difficult last year.
Always check current travel restrictions before booking a trip.
The government lifted all travel restrictions in June.
Travel restrictions can change quickly during a health crisis.
She couldn’t visit her family due to strict travel restrictions.
Business travel has been affected by ongoing travel restrictions.
Tour operators are adapting to frequent travel restrictions.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayohat cheklovlari o‘tgan yili xalqaro turizmni qiyinlashtirdi.
Sayohatni bron qilishdan oldin mavjud sayohat cheklovlarini har doim tekshirib turing.
Hukumat iyun oyida barcha sayohat cheklovlarini bekor qildi.
Salomatlik inqirozi paytida sayohat cheklovlari tez o‘zgarishi mumkin.
Qattiq sayohat cheklovlari tufayli u oilasiga borolmadi.
Ish safari davomiy sayohat cheklovlaridan ta’sirlandi.
Tur operatorlari tez-tez o‘zgaradigan sayohat cheklovlariga moslashmoqda.

words.definition: The process of local people starting and running their own businesses, especially in tourism-related areas.
words.definitionUz: Mahalliy tadbirkorlik — mahalliy odamlarning, ayniqsa turizm bilan bog‘liq sohalarda o‘z bizneslarini boshlash va yuritish jarayoni.
words.example1: Local entrepreneurship has grown thanks to increased tourism.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy tadbirkorlik turizmning o‘sishi tufayli rivojlandi.
words.example2: The program supports local entrepreneurship by providing training and funding.
words.example2Translation: Dastur o‘qitish va moliyalashtirish orqali mahalliy tadbirkorlikni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
words.example3: Successful local entrepreneurship helps keep money within the community.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli mahalliy tadbirkorlik pulni jamiyat ichida saqlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Local entrepreneurship is key to sustainable tourism development.
Many women are engaging in local entrepreneurship through handicraft businesses.
The government encourages local entrepreneurship in rural areas.
Local entrepreneurship creates jobs and reduces poverty.
Tourists love buying products from local entrepreneurship initiatives.
Challenges remain for small-scale local entrepreneurship.
Supporting local entrepreneurship strengthens the local economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahalliy tadbirkorlik barqaror turizm rivojlanishining kalitidir.
Ko‘plab ayollar qo‘l mehnati bilan bog‘liq bizneslar orqali mahalliy tadbirkorlikka qo‘shilmoqda.
Hukumat qishloq hududlarida mahalliy tadbirkorlikni rag‘batlantiradi.
Mahalliy tadbirkorlik ish o‘rinlarini yaratadi va qashshoqlikni kamaytiradi.
Sayyohlar mahalliy tadbirkorlik tashabbuslari mahsulotlarini sotib olishni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
Kichik miqyosli mahalliy tadbirkorlik uchun qiyinchiliklar hali ham mavjud.
Mahalliy tadbirkorlikni qo‘llab-quvvatlash mahalliy iqtisodiyotni mustahkamlaydi.

words.definition: The time of year when the largest number of tourists visit a particular destination.
words.definitionUz: Sayyohlik mavsumi — yilning ma’lum bir maskanga eng ko‘p sayyohlar keladigan vaqti.
words.example1: Hotel prices are higher during the tourist season.
words.example1Translation: Mehmonxona narxlari sayyohlik mavsumida yuqoriroq bo‘ladi.
words.example2: The town becomes very crowded during the peak tourist season.
words.example2Translation: Sayyohlik mavsumining eng yuqori paytida shahar juda gavjum bo‘lib ketadi.
words.example3: Many locals work extra hours during the tourist season.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab mahalliy aholi sayyohlik mavsumida qo‘shimcha soatlab ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The tourist season usually lasts from June to September.
Businesses prepare months in advance for the tourist season.
Avoid traveling during the main tourist season if you want peace.
The tourist season brings both opportunities and challenges.
Weather plays a big role in determining the tourist season.
She visits her hometown outside the tourist season to enjoy it quietly.
The island relies heavily on income from the tourist season.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayyohlik mavsumi odatda iyundan sentyabrgacha davom etadi.
Korxonalar sayyohlik mavsumiga bir necha oy oldin tayyorgarlik ko‘rishadi.
Tinchlik istasangiz, asosiy sayyohlik mavsumida sayohat qilishdan qoching.
Sayyohlik mavsumi imkoniyatlar hamda qiyinchiliklar keltirib chiqaradi.
Ob-havo sayyohlik mavsumini belgilashda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
U o‘z tug‘ilgan shahrini sayyohlik mavsumidan tashqari vaqtda tinchroq zavqlanish uchun boradi.
Orol sayyohlik mavsumi daromadiga juda bog‘liq.

words.definition: A pre-arranged holiday that includes transport, accommodation, and sometimes meals and activities at a fixed price.
words.definitionUz: Paket sayohat — transport, turar joy va ba’zan ovqat hamda tadbirlarni belgilangan narxda o‘z ichiga olgan oldindan tashkillashtirilgan dam olish.
words.example1: We booked a package tour to Thailand that included flights and hotels.
words.example1Translation: Biz Tailandga parvoz va mehmonxonani o‘z ichiga olgan paket sayohatni bron qildik.
words.example2: Package tours are convenient for people who don’t want to plan everything themselves.
words.example2Translation: Paket sayohatlar hamma narsani o‘zlari rejalashtirishni xohlamaydigan odamlar uchun qulay.
words.example3: The package tour included a guided visit to the ancient ruins.
words.example3Translation: Paket sayohat qadimiy xarobalarga gid bilan tashrifni o‘z ichiga oldi.
extraExamples: Many families prefer package tours for their summer holidays.
The travel agency offers various package tours to Europe.
Package tours can be cheaper than arranging everything separately.
She was disappointed with the quality of the package tour.
Package tours are popular among first-time international travelers.
The company specializes in luxury package tours.
We saved money by choosing an all-inclusive package tour.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab oilalar yozgi ta’tillari uchun paket sayohatlarni afzal ko‘rishadi.
Sayyohlik agentligi Yevropaga turli paket sayohatlarni taklif qiladi.
Paket sayohatlar hamma narsani alohida tashkillashtirishdan arzonroq bo‘lishi mumkin.
U paket sayohat sifatidan hafsalasi pir bo‘ldi.
Paket sayohatlar birinchi marta xalqaro sayohat qiluvchilar orasida mashhur.
Kompaniya hashamatli paket sayohatlarga ixtisoslashgan.
Biz hammasi o‘z ichiga olgan paket sayohatni tanlab pul tejadik.

words.definition: A genuine and real encounter with local culture or life, not designed primarily for tourists.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqiy tajriba — asosan sayyohlar uchun emas, balki mahalliy madaniyat yoki hayot bilan chinakam va haqiqiy uchrashuv.
words.example1: Staying in a local home gave us a more authentic experience.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy uyda qolish bizga yanada haqiqiy tajriba berdi.
words.example2: Travelers are increasingly seeking authentic experiences rather than tourist traps.
words.example2Translation: Sayyohlar sayyohlar uchun tuzoqlardan ko‘ra haqiqiy tajribalarni izlamoqda.
words.example3: The cooking class offered an authentic experience of Italian cuisine.
words.example3Translation: Pazandalik darsi italyan oshxonasi haqida haqiqiy tajriba taklif qildi.
extraExamples: Finding authentic experiences is one of the joys of travel.
The village festival provided a truly authentic experience.
Many tours now focus on delivering authentic experiences.
She prefers quiet markets for a more authentic experience.
Authentic experiences often involve interacting with local people.
The museum recreated an authentic experience of daily life in ancient times.
Tourism companies are trying to offer more authentic experiences.
extraExampleTranslations: Haqiqiy tajribalarni topish sayohatning zavqlaridan biridir.
Qishloq festivali chinakam haqiqiy tajriba taqdim etdi.
Ko‘plab sayohatlar endi haqiqiy tajribalarni yetkazishga e’tibor qaratmoqda.
U yanada haqiqiy tajriba uchun tinch bozorlarni afzal ko‘radi.
Haqiqiy tajribalar ko‘pincha mahalliy odamlar bilan muloqotni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Muzey qadim zamonlarda kundalik hayotning haqiqiy tajribasini qayta yaratdi.
Turizm kompaniyalari ko‘proq haqiqiy tajribalarni taklif qilishga harakat qilmoqda.

words.definition: Practices and choices in travel that minimize environmental damage and support social responsibility.
words.definitionUz: Sayohat barqarorligi — sayohatda atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazishni kamaytiradigan va ijtimoiy mas’uliyatni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydigan amaliyot va tanlovlar.
words.example1: Travel sustainability is becoming a major concern for many tourists.
words.example1Translation: Sayohat barqarorligi ko‘plab sayyohlar uchun asosiy tashvish bo‘lib bormoqda.
words.example2: We chose airlines with strong travel sustainability policies.
words.example2Translation: Biz kuchli sayohat barqarorligi siyosatiga ega aviakompaniyalarni tanladik.
words.example3: Travel sustainability includes reducing plastic use and supporting local businesses.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat barqarorligi plastikdan foydalanishni kamaytirish va mahalliy bizneslarni qo‘llab-quvvatlashni o‘z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: The hotel focuses on travel sustainability in all its operations.
Travel sustainability helps protect destinations for future generations.
Many guidebooks now include tips on travel sustainability.
Carbon offsetting is one aspect of travel sustainability.
She writes a blog about travel sustainability.
Governments are promoting travel sustainability through new regulations.
True travel sustainability requires changes in how we travel.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmonxona barcha faoliyatida sayohat barqarorligiga e’tibor qaratadi.
Sayohat barqarorligi maskanlarni kelajak avlodlar uchun himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘plab qo‘llanmalarda endi sayohat barqarorligi bo‘yicha maslahatlar mavjud.
Uglerodning qoplanishi sayohat barqarorligining bir jihati.
U sayohat barqarorligi haqida blog yozadi.
Hukumatlar yangi qoidalar orqali sayohat barqarorligini rag‘batlantirmoqda.
Chin sayohat barqarorligi bizning sayohat qilish usulimizni o‘zgartirishni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Media distributed through the internet and digital platforms such as websites, social media, and streaming services.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli media — internet, veb-saytlar, ijtimoiy tarmoqlar va striming xizmatlari orqali tarqatiladigan kontent va axborot turlarini bildiradi.
words.example1: Digital media has changed the way people consume news and entertainment.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli media odamlarning yangiliklar va o‘yin-kulgini iste’mol qilish usulini o‘zgartirdi.
words.example2: Many companies now focus their marketing efforts on digital media instead of traditional TV.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p kompaniyalar endi marketing harakatlarini an’anaviy televizordan ko‘ra raqamli mediaga qaratmoqda.
words.example3: She studied digital media at university and now works as a content creator.
words.example3Translation: U universitetda raqamli media yo‘nalishida o‘qigan va hozir kontent yaratuvchi bo‘lib ishlaydi.
extraExamples: Digital media allows instant sharing of information across the world.
The rise of digital media has reduced the influence of traditional newspapers.
Parents are concerned about how much time their children spend on digital media.
Artists use digital media to reach fans directly without record labels.
Digital media platforms collect user data to personalize content.
The government is investing in digital media to promote local culture.
Fake accounts on digital media can spread misinformation quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli media ma’lumotni dunyo bo‘ylab bir zumda ulashish imkonini beradi.
Raqamli medianing o‘sishi an’anaviy gazetalar ta’sirini kamaytirdi.
Ota-onalar farzandlarining raqamli mediaga qancha vaqt sarflashidan xavotirda.
Rassomlar raqamli media orqali yozuvchi kompaniyalarsiz to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri muxlislariga yetib boradi.
Raqamli media platformalari foydalanuvchi ma’lumotlarini yig‘ib, kontentni shaxsiylashtiradi.
Hukumat mahalliy madaniyatni targ‘ib qilish uchun raqamli mediaga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Raqamli mediadagi soxta akkauntlar noto‘g‘ri ma’lumotni tez tarqatishi mumkin.

words.definition: Advertising directed at specific users based on their online behavior, interests, and demographics.
words.definitionUz: Maqsadli reklama — foydalanuvchilarning onlayn harakatlari, qiziqishlari va demografik ma’lumotlariga qarab aniq guruhlarga yo‘naltirilgan reklama turidir.
words.example1: Targeted advertising helps businesses reach potential customers more effectively.
words.example1Translation: Maqsadli reklama bizneslarga potensial mijozlarga samaraliroq yetib borishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: I keep seeing ads for running shoes because of my fitness app activity.
words.example2Translation: Fitnes ilovasidagi faolligim tufayli doim yugurish poyabzali reklamalarini ko‘ryapman.
words.example3: Critics say targeted advertising invades people’s privacy.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar maqsadli reklama odamlarning shaxsiy hayotiga tajovuz qilishini aytishadi.
extraExamples: Social media platforms excel at targeted advertising using user data.
Targeted advertising increases sales by showing relevant products.
Many people use ad blockers to avoid targeted advertising.
The company improved its marketing with targeted advertising campaigns.
Targeted advertising can sometimes feel a bit creepy.
Regulations are being introduced to limit targeted advertising for children.
Small businesses benefit from affordable targeted advertising on Facebook.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar foydalanuvchi ma’lumotlaridan foydalanib maqsadli reklamada ustunlik qiladi.
Maqsadli reklama tegishli mahsulotlarni ko‘rsatish orqali savdoni oshiradi.
Ko‘p odamlar maqsadli reklamalardan qochish uchun reklama bloklagichlardan foydalanadi.
Kompaniya maqsadli reklama kampaniyalari bilan marketingini yaxshiladi.
Maqsadli reklama ba’zida biroz noqulay tuyulishi mumkin.
Bolalar uchun maqsadli reklamani cheklash bo‘yicha qoidalar joriy etilmoqda.
Kichik bizneslar Facebookdagi arzon maqsadli reklamadan foyda ko‘radi.

words.definition: The ability to critically analyze media messages and understand their effects on individuals and society.
words.definitionUz: Media savodxonligi — media xabarlarini tanqidiy tahlil qilish va ularning odamlar hamda jamiyatga ta’sirini tushunish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: Schools should teach media literacy to help students spot fake news.
words.example1Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarga soxta yangiliklarni aniqlashga yordam berish uchun media savodxonligini o‘rgatishi kerak.
words.example2: Improving media literacy can reduce the spread of misinformation.
words.example2Translation: Media savodxonligini oshirish noto‘g‘ri ma’lumot tarqalishini kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3: Her media literacy skills helped her question the biased article.
words.example3Translation: Uning media savodxonligi ko‘nikmalari unga tarafkash maqolani shubha ostiga olishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Media literacy is essential in the age of social media.
Parents play a key role in developing their children’s media literacy.
The workshop focused on building media literacy among teenagers.
Good media literacy helps consumers make better decisions.
Countries with high media literacy tend to have better-informed citizens.
Media literacy includes understanding how advertisements influence us.
She wrote her thesis on media literacy in developing countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar davrida media savodxonligi juda muhim.
Ota-onalar farzandlarida media savodxonligini shakllantirishda asosiy rol o‘ynaydi.
Seminar o‘smirlar orasida media savodxonligini rivojlantirishga qaratildi.
Yaxshi media savodxonligi iste’molchilarga yaxshiroq qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradi.
Media savodxonligi yuqori bo‘lgan mamlakatlarda fuqarolar yaxshiroq xabardor bo‘ladi.
Media savodxonligi reklamalar bizga qanday ta’sir qilishini tushunishni ham o‘z ichiga oladi.
U dissertatsiyasini rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda media savodxonligi haqida yozgan.

words.definition: False or misleading information presented as genuine news, often spread online for political or financial gain.
words.definitionUz: Soxta yangiliklar — ko‘pincha siyosiy yoki moliyaviy manfaat uchun onlayn tarqatiladigan, haqiqiy yangilik sifatida ko‘rsatilgan yolg‘on yoki chalg‘ituvchi ma’lumotdir.
words.example1: It’s becoming harder to distinguish real news from fake news on social media.
words.example1Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda haqiqiy yangiliklarni soxta yangiliklardan ajratish tobora qiyinlashmoqda.
words.example2: The politician accused the media of spreading fake news about him.
words.example2Translation: Siyosatchi ommaviy axborot vositalarini o‘zi haqida soxta yangiliklar tarqatishda aybladi.
words.example3: Fact-checking websites help fight the spread of fake news.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqatni tekshirish saytlari soxta yangiliklar tarqalishiga qarshi kurashadi.
extraExamples: Fake news can influence election results if not addressed.
Many people share fake news without verifying the source.
The company lost customers because of fake news about its products.
Governments are creating laws to combat fake news.
Fake news often uses emotional headlines to attract clicks.
Educating the public is one way to reduce fake news.
She fell for a fake news story and later felt embarrassed.
extraExampleTranslations: Soxta yangiliklar hal qilinmasa, saylov natijalariga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Ko‘p odamlar manbani tekshirmasdan soxta yangiliklarni ulashadi.
Kompaniya mahsulotlari haqidagi soxta yangiliklar tufayli mijozlarini yo‘qotdi.
Hukumatlar soxta yangiliklarga qarshi qonunlar yaratmoqda.
Soxta yangiliklar odatda hissiy sarlavhalar bilan bosishlarni jalb qiladi.
Jamoatchilikni o‘qitish soxta yangiliklarni kamaytirishning bir usulidir.
U soxta yangilikka ishonib qoldi va keyin xijolat bo‘ldi.

words.definition: The use of a famous person to promote a product or service in advertising.
words.definitionUz: Mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlash — reklama orqali mashhur odamdan foydalanib mahsulot yoki xizmatni targ‘ib qilish usulidir.
words.example1: The sports drink brand used a famous athlete for celebrity endorsement.
words.example1Translation: Sport ichimlik brendi mashhur sportchi bilan mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlashdan foydalandi.
words.example2: Celebrity endorsement can significantly boost product sales.
words.example2Translation: Mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlash mahsulot savdosini sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.
words.example3: Not all celebrity endorsements are successful if the celebrity doesn’t match the brand.
words.example3Translation: Agar mashhur shaxs brendga mos kelmasa, barcha mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlashlar muvaffaqiyatli bo‘lavermaydi.
extraExamples: Many beauty brands rely on celebrity endorsement from influencers.
The actor received a large payment for the celebrity endorsement.
Celebrity endorsement works best when the celebrity actually uses the product.
Some consumers are skeptical of celebrity endorsement.
The campaign featured multiple celebrity endorsements.
Celebrity endorsement is a common strategy in the fashion industry.
Negative news about the celebrity can damage the endorsement effect.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p go‘zallik brendlari inflyuenserlarning mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlashiga tayanadi.
Aktyor mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun katta haq oldi.
Mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlash eng yaxshi natija beradi, agar mashhur shaxs haqiqatan ham mahsulotdan foydalansa.
Ba’zi iste’molchilar mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlashga shubha bilan qarashadi.
Kampaniya bir nechta mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlashni o‘z ichiga oldi.
Mashhur shaxs tomonidan qo‘llab-quvvatlash moda sanoatida keng tarqalgan strategiyadir.
Mashhur shaxs haqidagi salbiy yangiliklar qo‘llab-quvvatlash ta’sirini buzishi mumkin.

words.definition: The suppression or prohibition of speech, content, or information considered harmful or inappropriate.
words.definitionUz: Tsenzura — zararli yoki noo‘rin deb hisoblangan nutq, kontent yoki ma’lumotni cheklash yoki taqiqlashdir.
words.example1: The government imposed strict censorship on the press.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat matbuotga qattiq tsenzura o‘rnatdi.
words.example2: Many artists protest against internet censorship.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p san’atkorlar internet tsenzurasiga qarshi norozilik bildiradi.
words.example3: Censorship can limit freedom of expression.
words.example3Translation: Tsenzura so‘z erkinligini cheklashi mumkin.
extraExamples: Social media companies face criticism for their censorship policies.
Censorship during wartime is often justified for national security.
The book was banned due to heavy censorship in that country.
Parents sometimes practice censorship with their children’s internet use.
Censorship can prevent important discussions from happening.
There are ongoing debates about balancing censorship and free speech.
The film was released without any censorship.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoq kompaniyalari tsenzura siyosati uchun tanqidga duch kelmoqda.
Urush paytida tsenzura ko‘pincha milliy xavfsizlik uchun oqlanadi.
Kitob o‘sha mamlakatdagi kuchli tsenzura tufayli taqiqlandi.
Ota-onalar ba’zida farzandlarining internetdan foydalanishini tsenzura qiladi.
Tsenzura muhim muhokamalarni oldini olishi mumkin.
Tsenzura va so‘z erkinligi o‘rtasidagi muvozanat haqida doimiy bahslar mavjud.
Film hech qanday tsenzurasiz chiqarildi.

words.definition: The study of how individuals, groups, and organizations select, buy, use, and dispose of goods and services.
words.definitionUz: Iste’molchi xatti-harakati — odamlar, guruhlar va tashkilotlar tovar va xizmatlarni qanday tanlashi, sotib olishi, ishlatishi va ulardan voz kechishini o‘rganishdir.
words.example1: Understanding consumer behavior helps companies design better products.
words.example1Translation: Iste’molchi xatti-harakatini tushunish kompaniyalarga yaxshiroq mahsulotlar yaratishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: The rise of online shopping has changed consumer behavior significantly.
words.example2Translation: Onlayn xarid qilishning o‘sishi iste’molchi xatti-harakatini sezilarli o‘zgartirdi.
words.example3: Price is one of the main factors influencing consumer behavior.
words.example3Translation: Narx iste’molchi xatti-harakatiga ta’sir qiluvchi asosiy omillardan biridir.
extraExamples: Cultural differences greatly affect consumer behavior.
Marketers analyze consumer behavior to create effective campaigns.
Environmental concerns are changing consumer behavior towards sustainable products.
Consumer behavior during holidays is very different from normal days.
Social media influences consumer behavior more than ever.
The company conducted a survey to study consumer behavior.
Economic conditions often shape consumer behavior.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniy farqlar iste’molchi xatti-harakatiga katta ta’sir qiladi.
Marketingchilar samarali kampaniyalar yaratish uchun iste’molchi xatti-harakatini tahlil qiladi.
Atrof-muhit muammolari barqaror mahsulotlarga nisbatan iste’molchi xatti-harakatini o‘zgartirmoqda.
Bayramlarda iste’molchi xatti-harakati oddiy kunlardan juda farq qiladi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar har qachongidan ham ko‘proq iste’molchi xatti-harakatiga ta’sir qiladi.
Kompaniya iste’molchi xatti-harakatini o‘rganish uchun so‘rov o‘tkazdi.
Iqtisodiy holatlar ko‘pincha iste’molchi xatti-harakatini shakllantiradi.

words.definition: The effect that other people have on an individual’s attitudes, beliefs, or actions.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy ta’sir — boshqa odamlarning shaxsning munosabati, e’tiqodi yoki harakatlariga ko‘rsatadigan ta’siridir.
words.example1: Peer pressure is a common form of social influence among teenagers.
words.example1Translation: Tengdoshlar bosimi o‘smirlar orasida ijtimoiy ta’sirning keng tarqalgan shaklidir.
words.example2: Social influence plays a big role in online shopping decisions.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy ta’sir onlayn xarid qilish qarorlarida katta rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: Leaders often use social influence to motivate their teams.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlar ko‘pincha jamoalarini rag‘batlantirish uchun ijtimoiy ta’sirdan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Celebrities have strong social influence on young people.
Social influence can lead to both positive and negative outcomes.
The experiment demonstrated the power of social influence.
Marketing uses social influence through testimonials and reviews.
Social influence is stronger in collectivist cultures.
She changed her opinion due to social influence from her friends.
Understanding social influence helps in designing public health campaigns.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashhur shaxslar yoshlarga kuchli ijtimoiy ta’sir ko‘rsatadi.
Ijtimoiy ta’sir ham ijobiy, ham salbiy natijalarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Tajriba ijtimoiy ta’sir kuchini ko‘rsatdi.
Marketing guvohliklar va sharhlar orqali ijtimoiy ta’sirdan foydalanadi.
Ijtimoiy ta’sir kollektivist madaniyatlarda kuchliroq bo‘ladi.
U do‘stlarining ijtimoiy ta’siri tufayli fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
Ijtimoiy ta’sirni tushunish jamoat salomatligi kampaniyalarini loyihalashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Advertising that follows moral standards of truth, fairness, and social responsibility.
words.definitionUz: Axloqiy reklama — haqiqat, adolat va ijtimoiy mas’uliyat tamoyillariga rioya qiladigan reklama turidir.
words.example1: The brand is known for its commitment to ethical advertising.
words.example1Translation: Brend axloqiy reklama tamoyillariga sodiqligi bilan mashhur.
words.example2: Ethical advertising avoids making false claims about products.
words.example2Translation: Axloqiy reklama mahsulotlar haqida yolg‘on da’volar qilishdan qochadi.
words.example3: Consumers are increasingly demanding more ethical advertising practices.
words.example3Translation: Iste’molchilar tobora ko‘proq axloqiy reklama amaliyotlarini talab qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Ethical advertising builds long-term trust with customers.
The company faced backlash for not following ethical advertising standards.
Many organizations have codes for ethical advertising.
Ethical advertising considers the impact on vulnerable groups.
Transparency is a key principle of ethical advertising.
Ethical advertising can be more effective in the long run.
Regulators monitor ethical advertising in the industry.
extraExampleTranslations: Axloqiy reklama mijozlar bilan uzoq muddatli ishonchni mustahkamlaydi.
Kompaniya axloqiy reklama standartlariga rioya qilmagani uchun tanqidga uchragan.
Ko‘p tashkilotlar axloqiy reklama bo‘yicha qoidalarga ega.
Axloqiy reklama zaif guruhlarga ta’sirini hisobga oladi.
Shaffoflik axloqiy reklamaning asosiy tamoyillaridan biridir.
Axloqiy reklama uzoq muddatda samaraliroq bo‘lishi mumkin.
Nazoratchilar sanoatdagi axloqiy reklamani kuzatib boradi.

words.definition: Communication channels used to reach a large, anonymous, and diverse audience simultaneously.
words.definitionUz: Ommaviy axborot vositalari — katta, noma’lum va turli xil auditoriyaga bir vaqtda yetib borish uchun ishlatiladigan aloqa kanallaridir.
words.example1: Mass media plays a powerful role in shaping public opinion.
words.example1Translation: Ommaviy axborot vositalari jamoatchilik fikrini shakllantirishda kuchli rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example2: Television is still one of the most important forms of mass media.
words.example2Translation: Televideniye hali ham ommaviy axborot vositalarining eng muhim shakllaridan biridir.
words.example3: The internet has transformed traditional mass media.
words.example3Translation: Internet an’anaviy ommaviy axborot vositalarini o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: Mass media includes newspapers, radio, TV, and the internet.
Governments sometimes use mass media for propaganda.
Mass media can both inform and entertain people.
The influence of mass media on children is a major concern.
Social media is becoming a new form of mass media.
Mass media helps spread important public health messages.
Critics argue that mass media often promotes unrealistic standards.
extraExampleTranslations: Ommaviy axborot vositalariga gazetalar, radio, televideniye va internet kiradi.
Hukumatlar ba’zida ommaviy axborot vositalaridan tashviqot uchun foydalanadi.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari odamlarni ham xabardor qilishi, ham o‘ynatishi mumkin.
Ommaviy axborot vositalarining bolalarga ta’siri katta xavotir uyg‘otadi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar ommaviy axborot vositalarining yangi shakliga aylanmoqda.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari muhim jamoat salomatligi xabarlarini tarqatishga yordam beradi.
Tanqidchilar ommaviy axborot vositalari ko‘pincha haqiqatga to‘g‘ri kelmaydigan standartlarni targ‘ib qilishini aytishadi.

words.definition: A marketing technique where branded goods are subtly embedded within entertainment media like films or TV shows.
words.definitionUz: Mahsulotni joylashtirish — brendlangan tovarlarni filmlar yoki teleko‘rsatuvlar kabi o‘yin-kulgi mediada sezilmaydigan tarzda joylashtirish marketing usulidir.
words.example1: The movie featured obvious product placement for several popular brands.
words.example1Translation: Filmda bir nechta mashhur brendlarning aniq mahsulot joylashtirishi bor edi.
words.example2: Product placement has become a common way for companies to advertise.
words.example2Translation: Mahsulotni joylashtirish kompaniyalar uchun reklama qilishning keng tarqalgan usuliga aylandi.
words.example3: Some viewers find product placement distracting.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi tomoshabinlar mahsulotni joylashtirishni chalg‘ituvchi deb biladi.
extraExamples: Product placement in video games is becoming increasingly popular.
The TV show received funding through strategic product placement.
Effective product placement feels natural to the audience.
Product placement can be more effective than traditional ads.
There are rules about disclosing product placement in some countries.
The actor used the product naturally during the scene.
Product placement helps brands reach audiences subconsciously.
extraExampleTranslations: Video o‘yinlarida mahsulotni joylashtirish tobora ommalashmoqda.
Teleko‘rsatuv strategik mahsulot joylashtirish orqali moliyalashtirildi.
Samarali mahsulot joylashtirish tomoshabinlarga tabiiy tuyuladi.
Mahsulotni joylashtirish an’anaviy reklamalardan samaraliroq bo‘lishi mumkin.
Ba’zi mamlakatlarda mahsulot joylashtirishni ochiq bildirish qoidalari mavjud.
Aktyor sahnada mahsulotdan tabiiy foydalandi.
Mahsulotni joylashtirish brendlarga auditoriyaga ongsiz ravishda yetib borishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Content that spreads rapidly through online sharing, often reaching millions of people quickly.
words.definitionUz: Viral kontent — onlayn ulashish orqali tez tarqaladigan va ko‘pincha millionlab odamlarga tez yetib boradigan kontentdir.
words.example1: The funny video became viral content overnight.
words.example1Translation: Kulguli video bir kechada viral kontentga aylandi.
words.example2: Creating viral content is a major goal for many social media influencers.
words.example2Translation: Viral kontent yaratish ko‘p ijtimoiy tarmoq inflyuenserlari uchun asosiy maqsaddir.
words.example3: Viral content can boost brand visibility dramatically.
words.example3Translation: Viral kontent brend ko‘rinishini keskin oshirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Not all viral content is positive or appropriate.
Companies try to create viral content for marketing.
The challenge went viral content across the platform.
Viral content often relies on emotions like humor or surprise.
She gained thousands of followers thanks to one piece of viral content.
Viral content spreads faster than traditional advertising.
Marketers study what makes content become viral content.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma viral kontent ham ijobiy yoki mos emas.
Kompaniyalar marketing uchun viral kontent yaratishga harakat qiladi.
Chaqqonlik butun platformada viral kontentga aylandi.
Viral kontent ko‘pincha hazil yoki hayrat kabi his-tuyg‘ularga asoslanadi.
U bitta viral kontent tufayli minglab obunachilarga ega bo‘ldi.
Viral kontent an’anaviy reklamadan tezroq tarqaladi.
Marketingchilar kontentning qanday viral bo‘lishini o‘rganadi.

words.definition: A message broadcast for public benefit, usually without commercial gain, to inform or educate people.
words.definitionUz: Jamoat xizmatlari e’loni — odamlarni xabardor qilish yoki o‘qitish uchun tijorat maqsadisiz efirga uzatiladigan foydali xabardir.
words.example1: The TV station aired a public service announcement about road safety.
words.example1Translation: Televideniye stansiyasi yo‘l harakati xavfsizligi haqida jamoat xizmatlari e’lonini efirga berdi.
words.example2: Public service announcements are often used during health crises.
words.example2Translation: Jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlari ko‘pincha sog‘liq inqirozlarida qo‘llaniladi.
words.example3: The celebrity recorded a public service announcement for charity.
words.example3Translation: Mashhur shaxs xayriya uchun jamoat xizmatlari e’lonini yozib oldi.
extraExamples: Many radio stations broadcast public service announcements daily.
The campaign included several powerful public service announcements.
Public service announcements can raise awareness about important issues.
The government funded the public service announcement on vaccination.
Some public service announcements are humorous to attract attention.
Public service announcements helped reduce smoking rates in the past.
She volunteered to write scripts for public service announcements.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p radio stansiyalari har kuni jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlarini uzatadi.
Kampaniya bir nechta kuchli jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlarini o‘z ichiga oldi.
Jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlari muhim masalalar haqida xabardorlikni oshirishi mumkin.
Hukumat emlash haqidagi jamoat xizmatlari e’lonini moliyalashtirdi.
Ba’zi jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlari diqqatni jalb qilish uchun kulguli bo‘ladi.
Jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlari o‘tmishda chekishni kamaytirishga yordam bergan.
U jamoat xizmatlari e’lonlari uchun ssenariylar yozishga ko‘ngilli bo‘ldi.

words.definition: The extent to which consumers are familiar with the qualities or image of a particular brand.
words.definitionUz: Brend xabardorligi — iste’molchilarning ma’lum bir brendning sifatlari yoki imidji bilan qanchalik tanishligini bildiradi.
words.example1: The new campaign greatly increased brand awareness.
words.example1Translation: Yangi kampaniya brend xabardorligini sezilarli oshirdi.
words.example2: High brand awareness usually leads to higher sales.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori brend xabardorligi odatda yuqori savdoga olib keladi.
words.example3: Social media is an effective tool for building brand awareness.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar brend xabardorligini oshirishda samarali vositadir.
extraExamples: Brand awareness is the first step in the customer journey.
The company measured brand awareness through surveys.
Famous logos help maintain strong brand awareness.
Building brand awareness takes time and consistent effort.
Brand awareness can protect a company during crises.
They used influencer marketing to boost brand awareness.
Low brand awareness makes it hard for new companies to compete.
extraExampleTranslations: Brend xabardorligi mijoz sayohatining birinchi bosqichidir.
Kompaniya brend xabardorligini so‘rovlar orqali o‘lchadi.
Mashhur logotiplar kuchli brend xabardorligini saqlashga yordam beradi.
Brend xabardorligini oshirish vaqt va doimiy harakat talab qiladi.
Brend xabardorligi kompaniyani inqiroz paytida himoya qilishi mumkin.
Ular brend xabardorligini oshirish uchun inflyuenser marketingidan foydalandi.
Past brend xabardorligi yangi kompaniyalarga raqobatlashishni qiyinlashtiradi.

words.definition: Information combined with entertainment, often in the form of TV programs or online content that educates while amusing.
words.definitionUz: Axborotli o‘yin-kulgi — ma’lumotni o‘yin-kulgi bilan birlashtirish, ko‘pincha tomosha qilishni qiziqarli qilib, o‘qitadigan teleko‘rsatuvlar yoki onlayn kontent shaklida bo‘ladi.
words.example1: The show is a perfect example of infotainment that teaches history in a fun way.
words.example1Translation: Bu ko‘rsatuv tarixni qiziqarli tarzda o‘rgatadigan axborotli o‘yin-kulgining yaxshi namunasi.
words.example2: Many YouTube channels focus on infotainment rather than pure education.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p YouTube kanallari sof ta’lim o‘rniga axborotli o‘yin-kulgiga e’tibor qaratadi.
words.example3: Infotainment helps make complex topics more accessible to the public.
words.example3Translation: Axborotli o‘yin-kulgi murakkab mavzularni oddiy odamlar uchun tushunarliroq qiladi.
extraExamples: Infotainment programs are very popular among younger audiences.
The documentary series combined facts with humor for better infotainment.
Critics argue that infotainment sometimes sacrifices accuracy for entertainment.
Infotainment is an effective way to raise awareness about social issues.
She prefers infotainment over dry news reports.
Modern news channels are shifting towards more infotainment styles.
The app provides infotainment content about science and technology.
extraExampleTranslations: Axborotli o‘yin-kulgi dasturlari yosh auditoriya orasida juda mashhur.
Hujjatli film seriyasi yaxshiroq axborotli o‘yin-kulgi uchun faktlarni hazil bilan birlashtirdi.
Tanqidchilar axborotli o‘yin-kulgi ba’zida aniqlikni o‘yin-kulgi uchun qurbon qilishini aytishadi.
Axborotli o‘yin-kulgi ijtimoiy masalalar haqida xabardorlikni oshirishning samarali usulidir.
U quruq yangiliklar o‘rniga axborotli o‘yin-kulgini afzal ko‘radi.
Zamonaviy yangiliklar kanallari ko‘proq axborotli o‘yin-kulgi uslubiga o‘tmoqda.
Ilova fan va texnologiya haqida axborotli o‘yin-kulgi kontentini taqdim etadi.

words.definition: The effect that discourages criminal behavior through fear of punishment.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘rqitish — jazodan qo‘rqish orqali jinoyat sodir etishni oldini olish ta’siridir.
words.example1: The presence of police officers on the streets acts as a strong deterrence against theft.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘chalarda politsiya xodimlarining borligi o‘g‘irlikka qarshi kuchli qo‘rqitish vazifasini bajaradi.
words.example2: Harsh penalties are often used as deterrence to prevent people from committing serious crimes.
words.example2Translation: Og‘ir jazo choralarini odamlarning jiddiy jinoyatlar sodir etishini oldini olish uchun qo‘rqitish sifatida ishlatiladi.
words.example3: The idea of deterrence suggests that visible security cameras can reduce vandalism.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘rqitish g‘oyasiga ko‘ra, ko‘zga ko‘rinadigan xavfsizlik kameralari vandalizmni kamaytirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Many governments believe that capital punishment serves as an effective deterrence.
The deterrence effect is stronger when punishments are swift and certain.
Critics argue that deterrence does not always work for impulsive crimes.
Education and awareness can also act as social deterrence against drug use.
The high cost of fines provides deterrence for traffic violations.
Deterrence theory is a key concept in criminal justice studies.
Long prison sentences are intended to create deterrence for potential offenders.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p hukumatlar o‘lim jazosini samarali qo‘rqitish vositasi deb hisoblaydi.
Qo‘rqitish ta’siri jazolar tez va muqarrar bo‘lganda kuchliroq bo‘ladi.
Tanqidchilarning fikricha, qo‘rqitish har doim ham impulsiv jinoyatlarda ishlamaydi.
Ta’lim va xabardorlik ham giyohvandlikka qarshi ijtimoiy qo‘rqitish bo‘lib xizmat qilishi mumkin.
Jarimalarning yuqori miqdori yo‘l qoidabuzarliklari uchun qo‘rqitish beradi.
Qo‘rqitish nazariyasi jinoyat adolati fanida asosiy tushunchadir.
Uzun muddatli qamoq jazolari potensial jinoyatchilar uchun qo‘rqitish yaratishga qaratilgan.

words.definition: The process of helping convicted criminals re-enter society as law-abiding citizens.
words.definitionUz: Reabilitatsiya — mahkum jinoyatchilarga jamiyatga qonunga bo‘ysunuvchi fuqarolar sifatida qaytishga yordam berish jarayonidir.
words.example1: The prison offers rehabilitation programs including education and job training.
words.example1Translation: Qamoqxona ta’lim va kasbiy tayyorgarlikni o‘z ichiga olgan reabilitatsiya dasturlarini taklif qiladi.
words.example2: Successful rehabilitation reduces the chance that former inmates will reoffend.
words.example2Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli reabilitatsiya sobiq mahbuslarning qayta jinoyat sodir etish ehtimolini kamaytiradi.
words.example3: Community service is often part of rehabilitation for young offenders.
words.example3Translation: Jamiyatga foydali ishlar ko‘pincha yosh jinoyatchilar uchun reabilitatsiyaning bir qismidir.
extraExamples: Rehabilitation focuses on addressing the root causes of criminal behavior.
Many experts believe rehabilitation is more effective than pure punishment.
Drug rehabilitation programs help addicts recover and reintegrate into society.
The government increased funding for prisoner rehabilitation initiatives.
Rehabilitation aims to restore the dignity and skills of offenders.
Lack of proper rehabilitation often leads to higher recidivism rates.
Vocational training is a key component of rehabilitation in modern prisons.
extraExampleTranslations: Reabilitatsiya jinoyat xatti-harakatining asosiy sabablarini bartaraf etishga qaratilgan.
Ko‘p mutaxassislar reabilitatsiyani sof jazodan ko‘ra samaraliroq deb hisoblashadi.
Giyohvandlikdan reabilitatsiya dasturlari giyohvandlarga tiklanish va jamiyatga qaytishga yordam beradi.
Hukumat mahbuslarni reabilitatsiya qilish tashabbuslariga mablag‘ni oshirdi.
Reabilitatsiya jinoyatchilarning qadr-qimmatini va ko‘nikmalarini tiklashni maqsad qiladi.
To‘g‘ri reabilitatsiyaning yo‘qligi ko‘pincha recidivizm darajasining oshishiga olib keladi.
Kasbiy tayyorgarlik zamonaviy qamoqxonalarda reabilitatsiyaning muhim qismidir.

words.definition: The tendency of a convicted criminal to reoffend after being released.
words.definitionUz: Qayta jinoyat sodir etish — mahkum jinoyatchining ozodlikka chiqqandan keyin yana jinoyat sodir etishga moyilligidir.
words.example1: High recidivism rates show that current prison systems are not effective.
words.example1Translation: Yuqori qayta jinoyat sodir etish darajalari hozirgi qamoqxona tizimining samarasiz ekanligini ko‘rsatadi.
words.example2: Providing job opportunities after prison can help reduce recidivism.
words.example2Translation: Qamoqdan chiqqandan keyin ish o‘rinlari taklif qilish qayta jinoyat sodir etishni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Studies show that education programs lower recidivism among former inmates.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotlar ta’lim dasturlari sobiq mahbuslar orasida qayta jinoyat sodir etishni pasaytirishini ko‘rsatmoqda.
extraExamples: Recidivism is a major challenge for criminal justice systems worldwide.
Family support plays an important role in preventing recidivism.
The rate of recidivism is higher for those who serve long prison sentences.
Rehabilitation efforts aim to break the cycle of recidivism.
Monitoring released prisoners helps authorities track recidivism trends.
Poverty and lack of skills often contribute to recidivism.
Reducing recidivism requires both punishment and support services.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayta jinoyat sodir etish butun dunyodagi jinoyat adolati tizimlari uchun katta muammodir.
Oila qo‘llab-quvvatlashi qayta jinoyat sodir etishning oldini olishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Qayta jinoyat sodir etish darajasi uzoq muddatli qamoq jazosini o‘taganlarda yuqoriroq bo‘ladi.
Reabilitatsiya harakatlari qayta jinoyat sodir etish aylanasini buzishni maqsad qiladi.
Ozod qilingan mahbuslarni kuzatish hukumat organlariga qayta jinoyat sodir etish tendensiyalarini kuzatishga yordam beradi.
Qashshoqlik va ko‘nikmalar yetishmasligi ko‘pincha qayta jinoyat sodir etishga sabab bo‘ladi.
Qayta jinoyat sodir etishni kamaytirish jazodan tashqari yordam xizmatlarini ham talab qiladi.

words.definition: Non-violent crimes committed for financial gain, often by business professionals.
words.definitionUz: Oq yoqali jinoyat — odatda biznes mutaxassislari tomonidan moliyaviy foyda olish uchun sodir etiladigan zo‘ravonliksiz jinoyatlardir.
words.example1: Embezzlement and fraud are common examples of white-collar crime.
words.example1Translation: Pulni o‘zlashtirish va firibgarlik oq yoqali jinoyatning keng tarqalgan misollaridir.
words.example2: White-collar crime often results in large financial losses for companies.
words.example2Translation: Oq yoqali jinoyat ko‘pincha kompaniyalar uchun katta moliyaviy zararlarga olib keladi.
words.example3: Laws against white-collar crime have become stricter in recent years.
words.example3Translation: Oq yoqali jinoyatlarga qarshi qonunlar so‘nggi yillarda qattiqroq bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Many people think white-collar crime is less serious than street crime.
Detecting white-collar crime requires specialized forensic accountants.
Insider trading is a type of white-collar crime punished by law.
White-collar criminals often have high social status and education.
The government is cracking down on white-collar crime in the banking sector.
Victims of white-collar crime may lose their life savings.
White-collar crime can damage public trust in institutions.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar oq yoqali jinoyatni ko‘cha jinoyatlaridan kamroq jiddiy deb o‘ylashadi.
Oq yoqali jinoyatni aniqlash maxsus sud-buxgalteriya mutaxassislarini talab qiladi.
Ichki savdo qonun bilan jazolanadigan oq yoqali jinoyat turidir.
Oq yoqali jinoyatchilar ko‘pincha yuqori ijtimoiy mavqega va ma’lumotga ega bo‘lishadi.
Hukumat bank sektoridagi oq yoqali jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashni kuchaytirmoqda.
Oq yoqali jinoyat qurbonlari butun umr davomida yig‘gan jamg‘armalarini yo‘qotishi mumkin.
Oq yoqali jinoyat muassasalarga bo‘lgan jamoatchilik ishonchini buzishi mumkin.

words.definition: A practice of mediation between offenders and victims to repair the harm caused by crime.
