words.definitionUz: Tiklovchi adolat — jinoyat natijasida yetkazilgan zararini tuzatish uchun jinoyatchi va qurbon o‘rtasida vositachilik amaliyotidir.
words.example1: Restorative justice allows victims to express how the crime affected them.
words.example1Translation: Tiklovchi adolat qurbonlarga jinoyat ularga qanday ta’sir qilganini ifoda etish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: Many communities are adopting restorative justice instead of traditional punishment.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p jamoalar an’anaviy jazodan ko‘ra tiklovchi adolatni qo‘llamoqda.
words.example3: Restorative justice has helped reduce conflict in schools.
words.example3Translation: Tiklovchi adolat maktablarda mojarolarni kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Restorative justice focuses on healing rather than just punishing the offender.
Offenders in restorative justice programs often show genuine remorse.
The court referred the case to a restorative justice conference.
Restorative justice can lead to better outcomes for both victims and offenders.
This approach is particularly effective for juvenile offenders.
Restorative justice requires willing participation from all parties.
Studies show restorative justice can lower recidivism rates.
extraExampleTranslations: Tiklovchi adolat faqat jinoyatchini jazolashdan ko‘ra shifo berishga e’tibor qaratadi.
Tiklovchi adolat dasturlaridagi jinoyatchilar ko‘pincha chinakam pushaymonlik bildirishadi.
Sud ishni tiklovchi adolat konferensiyasiga yubordi.
Tiklovchi adolat qurbon va jinoyatchi uchun yaxshiroq natijalarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Bu yondashuv ayniqsa yosh jinoyatchilar uchun samaralidir.
Tiklovchi adolat barcha tomonlarning ixtiyoriy ishtirokini talab qiladi.
Tadqiqotlar tiklovchi adolat qayta jinoyat sodir etish darajasini pasaytirishini ko‘rsatmoqda.

words.definition: Criminal or antisocial behavior by young people, typically under 18 years old.
words.definitionUz: Yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilik — odatda 18 yoshgacha bo‘lgan yoshlar tomonidan sodir etiladigan jinoyat yoki ijtimoiy xulq-atvor buzilishidir.
words.example1: Poor family environment is often linked to juvenile delinquency.
words.example1Translation: Oiladagi yomon muhit ko‘pincha yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilik bilan bog‘liq.
words.example2: Schools play a vital role in preventing juvenile delinquency.
words.example2Translation: Maktablar yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikning oldini olishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: Community programs aim to reduce juvenile delinquency through sports and mentoring.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat dasturlari sport va ustozlik orqali yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikni kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.
extraExamples: Juvenile delinquency rates have decreased due to better social support.
Early intervention is key to addressing juvenile delinquency.
Many cases of juvenile delinquency are linked to peer pressure.
The juvenile court system focuses more on rehabilitation than punishment.
Parents need to be involved in preventing juvenile delinquency.
Media violence is sometimes blamed for rising juvenile delinquency.
Education and job opportunities can help steer youth away from delinquency.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi ijtimoiy qo‘llab-quvvatlash tufayli yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilik darajasi pasaydi.
Erta aralashuv yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikni hal qilishning kalitidir.
Yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikning ko‘p holatlari tengdoshlar bosimi bilan bog‘liq.
Yoshlar sud tizimi jazodan ko‘ra reabilitatsiyaga ko‘proq e’tibor beradi.
Ota-onalar yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikning oldini olishda ishtirok etishlari kerak.
Ommaviy axborot vositalaridagi zo‘ravonlik ba’zida yoshlar orasidagi jinoyatchilikning o‘sishida ayblanadi.
Ta’lim va ish imkoniyatlari yoshlarni jinoyatchilikdan uzoqlashtirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Legally authorized killing of a person as punishment for a crime.
words.definitionUz: O‘lim jazosi — jinoyat uchun shaxsni qonuniy ravishda o‘ldirish jazosidir.
words.example1: Capital punishment remains controversial in many countries.
words.example1Translation: O‘lim jazosi ko‘p mamlakatlarda bahsli mavzu bo‘lib qolmoqda.
words.example2: Some argue that capital punishment serves as a strong deterrence.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zilar o‘lim jazosini kuchli qo‘rqitish vositasi deb hisoblashadi.
words.example3: The court sentenced the murderer to capital punishment.
words.example3Translation: Sud qotilni o‘lim jazosiga hukm qildi.
extraExamples: Many human rights groups oppose capital punishment.
Capital punishment has been abolished in most European countries.
There is a risk of executing innocent people under capital punishment.
Supporters believe capital punishment brings justice to victims’ families.
The debate on capital punishment continues in the United States.
Capital punishment is usually reserved for the most serious crimes.
DNA evidence has helped overturn some capital punishment cases.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p inson huquqlari guruhlari o‘lim jazosiga qarshi chiqishadi.
O‘lim jazosi ko‘pchilik Yevropa mamlakatlarida bekor qilingan.
O‘lim jazosi ostida begunoh odamlarni qatl etish xavfi mavjud.
Tarafdorlar o‘lim jazosini qurbonlar oilalariga adolat keltiradi deb hisoblashadi.
AQShda o‘lim jazosi bo‘yicha bahslar davom etmoqda.
O‘lim jazosi odatda eng og‘ir jinoyatlar uchun qo‘llaniladi.
DNK dalillari ba’zi o‘lim jazosi holatlarini bekor qilishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: Organizations and agencies responsible for enforcing laws and maintaining public order.
words.definitionUz: Qonun ijrosi — qonunlarni bajarish va jamoat tartibini saqlash uchun mas’ul tashkilot va idoralardir.
words.example1: Law enforcement officers work hard to keep our communities safe.
words.example1Translation: Qonun ijrosi xodimlari jamoalarimizni xavfsiz saqlash uchun ko‘p mehnat qilishadi.
words.example2: Good cooperation between law enforcement and the public is essential.
words.example2Translation: Qonun ijrosi va jamoatchilik o‘rtasidagi yaxshi hamkorlik juda muhim.
words.example3: Law enforcement agencies use modern technology to fight crime.
words.example3Translation: Qonun ijrosi idoralari jinoyatchilikka qarshi zamonaviy texnologiyadan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Law enforcement training includes conflict resolution and first aid.
Corruption within law enforcement undermines public trust.
International law enforcement cooperation helps combat cross-border crime.
Law enforcement must respect human rights while doing their job.
Community policing is a strategy used by law enforcement to build relationships.
The role of law enforcement has evolved with new types of cybercrime.
Effective law enforcement is key to maintaining social stability.
extraExampleTranslations: Qonun ijrosi o‘quvlari mojarolarni hal qilish va birinchi yordamni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Qonun ijrosidagi korruptsiya jamoatchilik ishonchini buzadi.
Xalqaro qonun ijrosi hamkorligi chegaralararo jinoyatchilikka qarshi kurashishga yordam beradi.
Qonun ijrosi o‘z vazifalarini bajarishda inson huquqlarini hurmat qilishi kerak.
Jamoaviy politsiya qonun ijrosi tomonidan munosabatlarni o‘rnatish strategiyasidir.
Qonun ijrosining roli yangi kiberginoyat turlari bilan birga o‘zgardi.
Samarali qonun ijrosi ijtimoiy barqarorlikni saqlashning kalitidir.

words.definition: Minor crimes such as shoplifting, vandalism, or pickpocketing.
words.definitionUz: Mayda jinoyat — do‘kondan o‘g‘irlash, vandalizm yoki cho‘ntak o‘g‘irlash kabi kichik jinoyatlardir.
words.example1: Petty crime is common in crowded tourist areas.
words.example1Translation: Mayda jinoyat odamlar gavjum sayyohlik hududlarida keng tarqalgan.
words.example2: Many petty crimes are committed by people who need money for drugs.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p mayda jinoyatlar giyohvand moddalar uchun pul kerak bo‘lgan odamlar tomonidan sodir etiladi.
words.example3: Local police focus a lot of attention on reducing petty crime.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy politsiya mayda jinoyatni kamaytirishga katta e’tibor beradi.
extraExamples: Petty crime can make residents feel unsafe in their neighborhoods.
Community programs help steer at-risk youth away from petty crime.
Fines and community service are common punishments for petty crime.
Petty crime often escalates if it is not addressed early.
Tourists are frequently warned about petty crime in big cities.
Reducing poverty can help decrease rates of petty crime.
Many petty crimes go unreported because they seem insignificant.
extraExampleTranslations: Mayda jinoyat mahalliy aholini o‘z uyida xavfsiz his qilmasligiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Jamoat dasturlari xavf ostidagi yoshlarni mayda jinoyatdan uzoqlashtirishga yordam beradi.
Jarima va jamiyatga foydali ishlar mayda jinoyat uchun odatiy jazolar hisoblanadi.
Mayda jinoyat agar erta hal qilinmasa, kuchayib ketishi mumkin.
Sayyohlar katta shaharlarda mayda jinoyat haqida tez-tez ogohlantiriladi.
Qashshoqlikni kamaytirish mayda jinoyat darajasini pasaytirishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p mayda jinoyatlar ahamiyatsiz ko‘ringani uchun qayd etilmaydi.

words.definition: A justice system focused primarily on punishing offenders rather than rehabilitating them.
words.definitionUz: Qasos adolati — jinoyatchilarni reabilitatsiya qilishdan ko‘ra asosan jazolashga qaratilgan adolat tizimidir.
words.example1: Retributive justice emphasizes that criminals deserve punishment for their actions.
words.example1Translation: Qasos adolati jinoyatchilar o‘z harakatlari uchun jazo olishga loyiq ekanligini ta’kidlaydi.
words.example2: Some people prefer retributive justice because they believe it brings closure to victims.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zi odamlar qasos adolatini afzal ko‘rishadi, chunki u qurbonlarga yopilish hissi beradi deb hisoblashadi.
words.example3: Critics say retributive justice does not solve the underlying problems of crime.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar qasos adolati jinoyatning asosiy muammolarini hal qilmaydi deyishadi.
extraExamples: Retributive justice is the traditional “eye for an eye” approach.
Many ancient legal systems were based on retributive justice.
Modern systems try to balance retributive justice with rehabilitation.
Retributive justice aims to restore moral balance in society.
Supporters argue retributive justice deters future crimes.
Retributive justice can sometimes lead to overly harsh punishments.
The debate between retributive and restorative justice continues today.
extraExampleTranslations: Qasos adolati an’anaviy “ko‘z uchun ko‘z” yondashuvidir.
Ko‘p qadimiy huquq tizimlari qasos adolatiga asoslangan edi.
Zamonaviy tizimlar qasos adolatini reabilitatsiya bilan muvozanatlashga harakat qilishadi.
Qasos adolati jamiyatdagi axloqiy muvozanatni tiklashni maqsad qiladi.
Tarafdorlar qasos adolati kelajakdagi jinoyatlarni oldini oladi deb hisoblashadi.
Qasos adolati ba’zan haddan tashqari qattiq jazoga olib kelishi mumkin.
Qasos va tiklovchi adolat o‘rtasidagi bahs bugungi kunda ham davom etmoqda.

words.definition: Dishonest conduct by those in power, often involving bribery or misuse of public funds.
words.definitionUz: Korruptsiya — mansabdor shaxslarning poraxo‘rlik yoki davlat mablag‘larini noto‘g‘ri ishlatish kabi halol bo‘lmagan xatti-harakatlardir.
words.example1: Corruption in government reduces public trust in leaders.
words.example1Translation: Hukumatdagi korruptsiya rahbarlarga bo‘lgan jamoatchilik ishonchini pasaytiradi.
words.example2: Fighting corruption is a top priority for many developing countries.
words.example2Translation: Korruptsiyaga qarshi kurash ko‘p rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar uchun asosiy ustuvorlikdir.
words.example3: The official was arrested on charges of corruption.
words.example3Translation: Mansabdor shaxs korruptsiya ayblovlari bilan hibsga olindi.
extraExamples: Corruption can slow down economic development significantly.
Transparency and accountability help prevent corruption.
Many international organizations work to combat global corruption.
Petty corruption like small bribes is common in some countries.
Corruption scandals often lead to major political changes.
Education about the harms of corruption starts in schools.
Strong anti-corruption laws are necessary but not always enough.
extraExampleTranslations: Korruptsiya iqtisodiy rivojlanishni sezilarli darajada sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
Ochiqlik va hisobdorlik korruptsiyaning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p xalqaro tashkilotlar global korruptsiyaga qarshi kurashadi.
Ba’zi mamlakatlarda kichik pora kabi mayda korruptsiya keng tarqalgan.
Korruptsiya janjallari ko‘pincha katta siyosiy o‘zgarishlarga olib keladi.
Korruptsiyaning zarari haqidagi ta’lim maktablarda boshlanadi.
Kuchli korruptsiyaga qarshi qonunlar zarur, ammo har doim ham yetarli emas.

words.definition: The careful monitoring of behavior, often by authorities using cameras or other technology.
words.definitionUz: Kuzatuv — odatda rasmiy organlar tomonidan kameralar yoki boshqa texnologiyalar yordamida xatti-harakatni ehtiyotkorlik bilan kuzatishdir.
words.example1: Increased surveillance in cities has helped reduce crime rates.
words.example1Translation: Shaharlarida kuzatuvni kuchaytirish jinoyatchilik darajasini pasaytirishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Many people worry that government surveillance invades personal privacy.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar hukumat kuzatuvi shaxsiy hayotga tajovuz qiladi deb xavotirlanishadi.
words.example3: The store uses surveillance cameras to prevent shoplifting.
words.example3Translation: Do‘kon do‘kondan o‘g‘irlashning oldini olish uchun kuzatuv kameralaridan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Digital surveillance has become more sophisticated with new technology.
Surveillance is an important tool for national security.
There are strict laws regulating workplace surveillance.
Public opinion on surveillance is divided between safety and freedom.
The police used surveillance footage to identify the suspect.
Mass surveillance raises serious ethical questions.
Companies use employee surveillance to monitor productivity.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli kuzatuv yangi texnologiyalar bilan yanada murakkab bo‘ldi.
Kuzatuv milliy xavfsizlik uchun muhim vositadir.
Ish joyidagi kuzatuvni tartibga soluvchi qattiq qonunlar mavjud.
Kuzatuv bo‘yicha jamoatchilik fikri xavfsizlik va erkinlik o‘rtasida bo‘lingan.
Politsiya gumonlanuvchini aniqlash uchun kuzatuv tasvirlaridan foydalandi.
Keng ko‘lamli kuzatuv jiddiy axloqiy savollarni tug‘diradi.
Kompaniyalar xodimlarning samaradorligini kuzatish uchun kuzatuvdan foydalanadi.

words.definition: The state of being confined in prison as a punishment.
words.definitionUz: Qamoq jazosi — jazo sifatida qamoqxonada saqlanish holatidir.
words.example1: The judge sentenced him to five years of imprisonment.
words.example1Translation: Sudya unga besh yillik qamoq jazosini berdi.
words.example2: Long periods of imprisonment can have serious psychological effects.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq muddatli qamoq jazosi jiddiy ruhiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Imprisonment is considered a last resort in many justice systems.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p adolat tizimlarida qamoq jazosi oxirgi chora sifatida ko‘riladi.
extraExamples: Alternatives to imprisonment include community service and probation.
The conditions of imprisonment vary greatly between countries.
Imprisonment aims to protect society from dangerous criminals.
Many prisoners struggle to readjust after long imprisonment.
The cost of imprisonment is very high for taxpayers.
Reforms are needed to make imprisonment more humane.
Imprisonment rates are much higher in some countries than others.
extraExampleTranslations: Qamoq jazosiga alternativlar jamiyatga foydali ish va probatsiyani o‘z ichiga oladi.
Qamoq jazosi sharoitlari mamlakatlar o‘rtasida juda farq qiladi.
Qamoq jazosi jamiyatni xavfli jinoyatchilardan himoya qilishni maqsad qiladi.
Ko‘p mahbuslar uzoq qamoqdan keyin qayta moslashishda qiynalishadi.
Qamoq jazosining narxi soliq to‘lovchilar uchun juda yuqori.
Qamoq jazosini insonparvarroq qilish uchun islohotlar kerak.
Ba’zi mamlakatlarda qamoq jazosi darajasi boshqalarga nisbatan ancha yuqori.

words.definition: Social and economic conditions that influence people’s behavior and opportunities.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar — odamlarning xatti-harakati va imkoniyatlariga ta’sir qiladigan ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy sharoitlardir.
words.example1: Socioeconomic factors like poverty often contribute to higher crime rates.
words.example1Translation: Qashshoqlik kabi ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar ko‘pincha yuqori jinoyatchilikka hissa qo‘shadi.
words.example2: Improving education can help address socioeconomic factors behind delinquency.
words.example2Translation: Ta’limni yaxshilash jinoyatchilik ortidagi ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillarni hal qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Researchers study how socioeconomic factors affect health and crime.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotchilar ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar sog‘liq va jinoyatchilikka qanday ta’sir qilishini o‘rganishadi.
extraExamples: Socioeconomic factors play a major role in access to justice.
Unemployment is one of the key socioeconomic factors linked to crime.
Governments try to reduce inequality by tackling socioeconomic factors.
Family background is an important socioeconomic factor in child development.
Socioeconomic factors can influence voting behavior and political views.
Addressing socioeconomic factors is essential for long-term crime prevention.
The report highlighted the impact of socioeconomic factors on urban crime.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar adolatga kirishda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
Ishsizlik jinoyat bilan bog‘liq asosiy ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillardan biridir.
Hukumatlar tengsizlikni kamaytirish uchun ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillarni hal qilishga harakat qiladi.
Oila muhiti bolalar rivojlanishidagi muhim ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omildir.
Ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillar ovoz berish xatti-harakati va siyosiy qarashlarga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillarni hal qilish uzoq muddatli jinoyatchilikning oldini olish uchun zarur.
Hisobot shaharlardagi jinoyatchilikka ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy omillarning ta’sirini ta’kidlagan.

words.definition: A period of supervision as an alternative to imprisonment for convicted offenders.
words.definitionUz: Probatsiya — mahkum jinoyatchilar uchun qamoq jazosiga alternativa sifatida nazorat ostida bo‘lish davridir.
words.example1: The court placed the young offender on probation for two years.
words.example1Translation: Sud yosh jinoyatchini ikki yillik probatsiyaga qo‘ydi.
words.example2: Violating probation conditions can result in imprisonment.
words.example2Translation: Probatsiya shartlarini buzish qamoq jazosiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Probation officers help offenders find jobs and stay out of trouble.
words.example3Translation: Probatsiya xodimlari jinoyatchilarga ish topish va muammolardan uzoq bo‘lishda yordam berishadi.
extraExamples: Probation is often given for first-time or minor offenders.
Successful completion of probation can lead to a clean record.
Probation includes regular meetings with a supervising officer.
Many rehabilitation programs are combined with probation.
Probation helps reduce prison overcrowding.
Strict rules during probation teach responsibility.
The probation system varies significantly between different states.
extraExampleTranslations: Probatsiya ko‘pincha birinchi marta yoki mayda jinoyat sodir etganlarga beriladi.
Probatsiyani muvaffaqiyatli yakunlash toza yozuvga olib kelishi mumkin.
Probatsiya nazorat ostidagi xodim bilan muntazam uchrashuvlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ko‘p reabilitatsiya dasturlari probatsiya bilan birlashtirilgan.
Probatsiya qamoqxonalardagi odamlar sonini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Probatsiya davridagi qattiq qoidalar mas’uliyatni o‘rgatadi.
Probatsiya tizimi turli shtatlarda sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.

words.definition: Unplanned, uncontrolled expansion of urban areas into surrounding rural land.
words.definitionUz: Shaharning rejasiz va nazoaratsiz tarzda qishloq yerlariga qarab kengayib borishi.
words.example1: Urban sprawl has consumed thousands of acres of farmland around the city.
words.example1Translation: Shahar tarqalishi shahar atrofidagi minglab gektar ekin yerlarini yutib yubordi.
words.example2: Urban sprawl makes it harder for people to get around without a car.
words.example2Translation: Shahar tarqalishi tufayli odamlar mashinasiz harakat qilishni qiyinlashadi.
words.example3: The government is trying to limit urban sprawl by protecting green belt areas.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat yashil hududlarni himoya qilib, shahar tarqalishini cheklashga harakat qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Urban sprawl increases traffic congestion and commute times.
Many wildlife habitats have been destroyed by urban sprawl.
Urban sprawl leads to higher infrastructure costs for local governments.
Residents moved to the suburbs, accelerating urban sprawl.
Planners proposed stricter zoning laws to control urban sprawl.
Urban sprawl often results in the loss of agricultural land.
The city's urban sprawl stretched over 50 kilometers from the center.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar tarqalishi yo'liqishlar va yo'l harakatini murakkablashtiradi.
Ko'plab yovvoyi tabiat yashash joylari shahar tarqalishi tufayli yo'q bo'lib ketdi.
Shahar tarqalishi mahalliy hukumatlar uchun infratuzilma xarajatlarini oshiradi.
Aholi chekka hududlarga ko'chib, shahar tarqalishini tezlashtirdi.
Rejalashtiruvchilar shahar tarqalishini nazorat qilish uchun qat'iyroq zonalash qonunlarini taklif qildi.
Shahar tarqalishi ko'pincha qishloq xo'jaligi yerlarining yo'qolishiga olib keladi.
Shaharning tarqalishi markazdan 50 kilometrdan oshib ketdi.

words.definition: The basic physical systems and services of a city or country, such as transport, water supply, and power.
words.definitionUz: Shahar yoki mamlakatning asosiy jismoniy tizimlari: yo'llar, suv ta'minoti, elektr va transport.
words.example1: The city needs to invest in better infrastructure to support its growing population.
words.example1Translation: Shahar o'sib borayotgan aholisini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun yaxshiroq infratuzilmaga sarmoya kiritishi kerak.
words.example2: Poor infrastructure makes it difficult to attract new businesses.
words.example2Translation: Zaif infratuzilma yangi bizneslarni jalb qilishni qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3: After the earthquake, the city's infrastructure was severely damaged.
words.example3Translation: Zilziladan so'ng shahar infratuzilmasi jiddiy shikastlandi.
extraExamples: The government allocated billions to improve road infrastructure.
Good infrastructure is essential for economic development.
Aging infrastructure is a major problem in many old cities.
The new bridge is a key part of the region's transport infrastructure.
Digital infrastructure is becoming as important as physical infrastructure.
Lack of infrastructure makes life difficult in remote areas.
Investors look at a country's infrastructure before starting projects.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat yo'l infratuzilmasini yaxshilash uchun milliardlar ajratdi.
Yaxshi infratuzilma iqtisodiy rivojlanish uchun zaruriy shart.
Eskirgan infratuzilma ko'p qadimiy shaharlarda katta muammodir.
Yangi ko'prik mintaqaning transport infratuzilmasining muhim qismidir.
Raqamli infratuzilma jismoniy infratuzilma kabi muhim bo'lib bormoqda.
Infratuzilmaning yo'qligi uzoq hududlarda hayotni qiyinlashtiradi.
Investorlar loyihalarni boshlashdan oldin mamlakatning infratuzilmasini ko'rib chiqadi.

words.definition: The process by which a poor urban neighborhood becomes wealthier and more desirable, often causing original residents to be displaced.
words.definitionUz: Kambag'al shahar mahallasining boyib, obod bo'lib borishi, lekin shu bilan birga eski aholining ko'chib ketishiga majbur qilinishi.
words.example1: Gentrification has transformed this once-neglected neighborhood into a trendy area.
words.example1Translation: Gentrifikatsiya avval e'tibordan chetda qolgan bu mahallani zamonaviy hududga aylantirdi.
words.example2: Many long-time residents were forced out due to gentrification.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p uzoq yillik aholi gentrifikatsiya tufayli ko'chib ketishga majbur bo'ldi.
words.example3: New cafes and art galleries are signs of gentrification in this area.
words.example3Translation: Yangi kafe va san'at galereylari bu hududda gentrifikatsiya belgilaridir.
extraExamples: Gentrification often leads to rising rents and property prices.
Critics argue that gentrification destroys community identity.
The city tried to slow gentrification by offering affordable housing programs.
Young professionals moving downtown triggered gentrification.
Gentrification can improve safety and services in an area.
Local artists were among the first displaced by gentrification.
Gentrification is a controversial topic in urban planning discussions.
extraExampleTranslations: Gentrifikatsiya ko'pincha ijara va mulk narxlarining oshishiga olib keladi.
Tanqidchilar gentrifikatsiya jamoat identitetini yo'q qilishini ta'kidlaydi.
Shahar arzon uy-joy dasturlarini taklif qilib, gentrifikatsiyani sekinlashtirishga harakat qildi.
Shahar markaziga ko'chib kelgan yosh mutaxassislar gentrifikatsiyani boshladi.
Gentrifikatsiya hududdagi xavfsizlik va xizmatlarni yaxshilashi mumkin.
Mahalliy rassomlar gentrifikatsiya tufayli birinchilar qatorida ko'chib ketishga majbur bo'ldi.
Gentrifikatsiya shahar rejalashtirish muhokamalarida munozarali mavzudir.

words.definition: A situation in which too many people live in an area, putting pressure on available resources and services.
words.definitionUz: Biror hududda odamlar soni shu qadar ko'p bo'lib ketishiki, suv, oziq-ovqat va boshqa resurslar yetishmay qoladi.
words.example1: Overpopulation in the capital city has made housing very expensive.
words.example1Translation: Poytaxtdagi aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi uy-joy narxini juda qimmatlashtirib yubordi.
words.example2: Overpopulation can lead to environmental degradation and resource shortages.
words.example2Translation: Aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi atrof-muhitning yomonlashishi va resurslar tanqisligiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Some experts believe overpopulation is one of the biggest global challenges.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi mutaxassislar aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligini eng katta global muammolardan biri deb hisoblaydi.
extraExamples: Overpopulation puts serious pressure on water and food supplies.
Cities struggling with overpopulation often face poor sanitation.
Education and family planning can help reduce overpopulation.
Overpopulation in rural areas pushes people to migrate to cities.
Traffic jams and pollution are signs of urban overpopulation.
Overpopulation makes it difficult to maintain good public services.
Some regions are more vulnerable to overpopulation than others.
extraExampleTranslations: Aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi suv va oziq-ovqat ta'minotiga jiddiy bosim o'tkazadi.
Aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligidan aziyat chekayotgan shaharlarda sanitariya tizimi ko'pincha yomon bo'ladi.
Ta'lim va oilani rejalashtirish aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Qishloq hududlarida aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi odamlarni shaharlarga ko'chishga undaydi.
Tirbandlik va ifloslanish shahar aholisining haddan tashqari ko'pligining belgilaridir.
Aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligi yaxshi davlat xizmatlarini saqlab turishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Ba'zi mintaqalar aholining haddan tashqari ko'pligiga boshqalarga qaraganda ko'proq moyil.

words.definition: A system of shared transport services available to the general public, such as buses, trains, trams, and subways.
words.definitionUz: Barcha odamlar foydalanishi mumkin bo'lgan umumiy transport: avtobus, metro, tramvay va poezdlar.
words.example1: The city's public transportation system makes it easy to travel without a car.
words.example1Translation: Shaharning jamoat transport tizimi mashina bo'lmasdan ham oson sayohat qilish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: More people are using public transportation to reduce their carbon footprint.
words.example2Translation: Ko'proq odamlar o'zlarining uglerod izini kamaytirish uchun jamoat transportidan foydalanmoqda.
words.example3: Investing in public transportation can reduce traffic congestion significantly.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat transportiga sarmoya kiritish yo'l tirbandligini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Good public transportation is a sign of a well-planned city.
Public transportation is often cheaper than owning a private car.
Many students rely on public transportation to get to school.
The new metro line improved public transportation across the city.
Public transportation reduces air pollution in urban areas.
During rush hour, public transportation can get very crowded.
Expanding public transportation is a key goal of sustainable urban planning.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi jamoat transporti yaxshi rejalashtirilgan shaharning belgisidir.
Jamoat transporti ko'pincha shaxsiy mashina saqlashdan arzonroq.
Ko'plab talabalar maktabga borish uchun jamoat transportiga tayanadi.
Yangi metro liniyasi butun shahar bo'ylab jamoat transportini yaxshiladi.
Jamoat transporti shahar hududlarida havo ifloslanishini kamaytiradi.
Qo'zg'aluvchan soatlarda jamoat transporti juda gavjum bo'lishi mumkin.
Jamoat transportini kengaytirish barqaror shahar rejalashtirish maqsadlaridan biridir.

words.definition: The process of designing and organizing cities in a way that is environmentally responsible, socially inclusive, and economically viable for the long term.
words.definitionUz: Shaharlarni kelajak avlodlar ham yaxshi hayot kechirishi uchun atrof-muhitga zarar bermasdan, odilona va tejamkor qilib loyihalash jarayoni.
words.example1: Sustainable urban planning includes building more bike lanes and green spaces.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish ko'proq velosiped yo'laklari va yashil hududlar qurishni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: The city adopted sustainable urban planning to reduce energy consumption.
words.example2Translation: Shahar energiya sarfini kamaytirish uchun barqaror shahar rejalashtirish usullarini qabul qildi.
words.example3: Sustainable urban planning aims to create cities where people and nature coexist.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish odamlar va tabiat birga yashay oladigan shaharlar yaratishni maqsad qiladi.
extraExamples: Sustainable urban planning considers the needs of future generations.
Mixed-use development is a common strategy in sustainable urban planning.
Sustainable urban planning promotes walkable neighborhoods and public transit.
Many cities are adopting sustainable urban planning to fight climate change.
Green roofs and solar panels are features of sustainable urban planning.
Sustainable urban planning requires cooperation between government and citizens.
Reducing waste and pollution are key goals of sustainable urban planning.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish kelajak avlodlarning ehtiyojlarini hisobga oladi.
Aralash foydalanishni rivojlantirish barqaror shahar rejalashtirish strategiyasidir.
Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish piyoda yuriladigan mahallalar va jamoat transportini rag'batlantiradi.
Ko'p shaharlar iqlim o'zgarishi bilan kurashish uchun barqaror shahar rejalashtirish usullarini qo'llayapti.
Yashil tomlar va quyosh panellari barqaror shahar rejalashtirish xususiyatlaridir.
Barqaror shahar rejalashtirish hukumat va fuqarolar o'rtasida hamkorlikni talab qiladi.
Chiqindilar va ifloslanishni kamaytirish barqaror shahar rejalashtirish maqsadlaridir.

words.definition: The extent to which people can afford to buy or rent housing based on their income.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarning daromadiga qarab uy-joy xarid qilish yoki ijaraga olishga qodir bo'lish darajasi.
words.example1: Housing affordability is a serious issue for young people in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Uy-joy narxining qulayligi katta shaharlardagi yosh odamlar uchun jiddiy muammo.
words.example2: The government launched a program to improve housing affordability for low-income families.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat kam daromadli oilalar uchun uy-joy qulayligini yaxshilash dasturini ishga tushirdi.
words.example3: Rising property prices are hurting housing affordability across the country.
words.example3Translation: Ko'tarilgan mulk narxlari butun mamlakat bo'ylab uy-joy qulayligiga zarar yetkazmoqda.
extraExamples: Housing affordability has become worse in many major cities over the past decade.
Experts say housing affordability is linked to economic inequality.
Building more social housing can improve housing affordability.
Many workers cannot live near their jobs due to housing affordability issues.
Housing affordability affects people's quality of life and wellbeing.
Rent control is one policy used to protect housing affordability.
A lack of housing affordability forces many families into overcrowded conditions.
extraExampleTranslations: Uy-joy qulayligi so'nggi o'n yil ichida ko'plab yirik shaharlarda yomonlashdi.
Mutaxassislar uy-joy qulayligi iqtisodiy tengsizlik bilan bog'liq deyishadi.
Ko'proq ijtimoiy uy-joy qurish uy-joy qulayligini yaxshilashi mumkin.
Ko'p ishchilar uy-joy narxi muammolari tufayli ish joyiga yaqin yashay olmaydi.
Uy-joy qulayligi odamlarning turmush sifati va farovonligiga ta'sir qiladi.
Ijara narxini nazorat qilish uy-joy qulayligini himoya qilish uchun ishlatiladigan siyosatlardan biridir.
Uy-joy qulayligining yo'qligi ko'p oilalarni gavjum sharoitlarda yashashga majbur qiladi.

words.definition: A very large city with a population of over 10 million people.
words.definitionUz: Aholisi 10 million kishidan oshib ketgan juda katta shahar.
words.example1: Tokyo is one of the world's most well-known megacities.
words.example1Translation: Tokio dunyoning eng mashhur megapolislaridan biridir.
words.example2: Living in a megacity offers many opportunities but also challenges.
words.example2Translation: Megapolisda yashash ko'p imkoniyatlar, lekin shu bilan birga qiyinchiliklar ham taqdim etadi.
words.example3: The number of megacities around the world is expected to grow in the coming decades.
words.example3Translation: Dunyo bo'ylab megapolislar soni kelgusi o'n yilliklarda o'sishi kutilmoqda.
extraExamples: Dhaka has rapidly grown into a megacity over the past 30 years.
Megacities often struggle with traffic, pollution, and inequality.
Managing infrastructure in a megacity is extremely complex.
Many megacities are located in developing countries.
A megacity requires advanced planning to function efficiently.
São Paulo is South America's largest megacity.
The migration of rural populations is a major driver of megacity growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Dakka so'nggi 30 yil ichida tez sur'atda megapolisga aylandi.
Megapolislar ko'pincha tirbandlik, ifloslanish va tengsizlik bilan kurashadi.
Megapolisdagi infratuzilmani boshqarish juda murakkab.
Ko'plab megapolislar rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda joylashgan.
Megapolis samarali ishlashi uchun ilg'or rejalashtirish talab qiladi.
San-Paulo Janubiy Amerikaning eng katta megapolisidir.
Qishloq aholisining ko'chishi megapolislarning o'sishiga asosiy omildir.

words.definition: The movement of people from rural (countryside) areas to urban (city) areas, usually in search of better jobs and living conditions.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarning yaxshiroq ish va yashash sharoiti izlab qishloqdan shaharga ko'chib o'tishi.
words.example1: Rural-urban migration has caused rapid population growth in many cities.
words.example1Translation: Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish ko'plab shaharlarda aholining tez o'sishiga sabab bo'ldi.
words.example2: Young people are the main drivers of rural-urban migration.
words.example2Translation: Yosh odamlar qishloqdan shaharga ko'chishning asosiy omilichilari hisoblanadi.
words.example3: Rural-urban migration can leave farming villages understaffed and aging.
words.example3Translation: Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish dehqonchilik qishloqlarini ishchi kuchidan mahrum qilib, keksayishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Rural-urban migration is driven by the search for employment opportunities.
Better schools and hospitals attract people through rural-urban migration.
Rural-urban migration has contributed to the growth of slums in many cities.
Governments try to develop rural areas to slow rural-urban migration.
Rural-urban migration changes family structures and social traditions.
Infrastructure development in cities attracts rural-urban migration.
Rural-urban migration is one of the biggest demographic shifts of the 21st century.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish ish imkoniyatlarini izlash bilan bog'liq.
Yaxshi maktablar va kasalxonalar odamlarni qishloqdan shaharga ko'chishga undaydi.
Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish ko'plab shaharlarda geттolarning o'sishiga hissa qo'shdi.
Hukumatlar qishloqdan shaharga ko'chishni sekinlashtirish uchun qishloq hududlarini rivojlantirishga harakat qiladi.
Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish oila tuzilmasi va ijtimoiy an'analarni o'zgartiradi.
Shaharlardagi infratuzilma rivojlanishi qishloqdan shaharga ko'chishni jalb qiladi.
Qishloqdan shaharga ko'chish 21-asrning eng katta demografik o'zgarishlaridan biridir.

words.definition: Densely populated urban areas characterized by poor housing, inadequate services, and lack of basic infrastructure.
words.definitionUz: Yomon qurilgan, suv, elektr va kanalizatsiya kabi asosiy xizmatlar yetishmovchi, kambag'al shahar hududlari.
words.example1: Millions of people in developing countries live in slums with no clean water.
words.example1Translation: Rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda millionlab odamlar toza suvsiz qashshoq mahallalarda yashaydi.
words.example2: Informal settlements often grow rapidly when people migrate to cities without enough housing.
words.example2Translation: Odamlar yetarli uy-joy bo'lmagan shaharlarga ko'chib kelganda norasmiy aholi punktlari tez o'sib ketadi.
words.example3: The city plans to upgrade slums by providing electricity and paved roads.
words.example3Translation: Shahar elektr energiyasi va asfaltlangan yo'llarni taqdim etish orqali qashshoq mahallalarni yaxshilashni rejalashtirmoqda.
extraExamples: Slums are often the result of rapid urbanization without proper planning.
Children growing up in slums face many health and educational challenges.
Some informal settlements have existed for generations.
NGOs work to improve living conditions in slums around the world.
Slums are often located on land that is vulnerable to floods or landslides.
Improving informal settlements requires strong government commitment.
Dharavi in Mumbai is one of the world's most well-known slums.
extraExampleTranslations: Qashshoq mahallalar ko'pincha to'g'ri rejalashtirmasdan amalga oshirilgan tez urbanizatsiyaning natijasidir.
Qashshoq mahallalarda o'sib kelayotgan bolalar ko'plab sog'liq va ta'lim muammolariga duch keladi.
Ba'zi norasmiy aholi punktlari avlodlar davomida mavjud bo'lgan.
Notijorat tashkilotlar dunyo bo'ylab qashshoq mahallalarda yashash sharoitlarini yaxshilash uchun ishlamoqda.
Qashshoq mahallalar ko'pincha sel yoki ko'chkilarga moyil hududlarda joylashgan.
Norasmiy aholi punktlarini yaxshilash hukumatning kuchli majburiyatini talab qiladi.
Mumbaydagi Dharavi dunyodagi eng mashhur qashshoq mahallalardan biridir.

words.definition: The speed at which a country's urban population grows relative to its total population.
words.definitionUz: Mamlakatda shahar aholisining umumiy aholi soniga nisbatan qancha tez o'sib borayotganini ko'rsatadigan ko'rsatkich.
words.example1: Africa has one of the highest urbanization rates in the world.
words.example1Translation: Afrika dunyo bo'ylab eng yuqori urbanizatsiya sur'atlaridan biriga ega.
words.example2: A high urbanization rate puts pressure on housing and public services.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori urbanizatsiya sur'ati uy-joy va davlat xizmatlariga bosim o'tkazadi.
words.example3: The government monitors the urbanization rate to plan future infrastructure projects.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat kelajakdagi infratuzilma loyihalarini rejalashtirish uchun urbanizatsiya sur'atini kuzatadi.
extraExamples: Countries with high urbanization rates need more urban housing and schools.
The urbanization rate in East Asia has increased dramatically in recent decades.
A rising urbanization rate often signals economic growth.
Environmental stress increases as the urbanization rate climbs.
Planners use urbanization rate data to predict city growth.
Some developed countries have stable urbanization rates.
A high urbanization rate without planning leads to overcrowding.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori urbanizatsiya sur'atiga ega mamlakatlarga ko'proq shahar uy-joylari va maktablar kerak.
Sharqiy Osiyodagi urbanizatsiya sur'ati so'nggi o'n yilliklarda keskin oshdi.
O'sib borayotgan urbanizatsiya sur'ati ko'pincha iqtisodiy o'sishni bildiradi.
Urbanizatsiya sur'ati oshib borishi bilan atrof-muhitga bosim kuchayadi.
Rejalashtiruvchilar shahar o'sishini bashorat qilish uchun urbanizatsiya sur'ati ma'lumotlaridan foydalanadi.
Ba'zi rivojlangan mamlakatlarda urbanizatsiya sur'ati barqaror.
Rejalashtirishsiz yuqori urbanizatsiya sur'ati haddan tashqari aholi to'planishiga olib keladi.

words.definition: Areas of grass, trees, parks, and other vegetation within or around a city, providing recreational and environmental benefits.
words.definitionUz: Shahar ichidagi yoki atrofidagi bog'lar, parklar va o'simliklar bo'lgan joylar, odamlarga dam olish va tabiat bilan aloqada bo'lish imkoniyatini beradi.
words.example1: Green spaces in cities help reduce air pollution and improve mental health.
words.example1Translation: Shaharlardagi yashil hududlar havo ifloslanishini kamaytiradi va ruhiy salomatlikni yaxshilaydi.
words.example2: The city plans to create more green spaces for residents to enjoy.
words.example2Translation: Shahar aholisi uchun ko'proq yashil hududlar yaratishni rejalashtirmoqda.
words.example3: Children who live near green spaces tend to be more physically active.
words.example3Translation: Yashil hududlar yaqinida yashaydigan bolalar ko'proq jismoniy faol bo'lishga moyil.
extraExamples: Green spaces provide a habitat for birds and small animals in cities.
Access to green spaces is often unequal between rich and poor neighborhoods.
Urban green spaces help to lower temperatures during heatwaves.
Running and walking in green spaces is popular among city residents.
Developers are required to preserve green spaces in new building projects.
Green spaces improve the overall quality of life in urban areas.
Community gardens are a form of green space that brings neighbors together.
extraExampleTranslations: Yashil hududlar shaharlardagi qushlar va kichik hayvonlarga yashash joyi beradi.
Yashil hududlarga kirish imkoniyati ko'pincha boy va kambag'al mahallalar o'rtasida teng emas.
Shahar yashil hududlari issiqlik to'lqinlari paytida haroratni pasaytirishga yordam beradi.
Yashil hududlarda yugurish va yurish shahar aholisi orasida mashhur.
Quruvchilar yangi qurilish loyihalarida yashil hududlarni saqlab qolishlari shart.
Yashil hududlar shahar hududlarida hayot sifatini yaxshilaydi.
Jamoat bog'lari qo'shnilarni birlashtiruvchi yashil hudud shaklidir.

words.definition: The regular journey a person makes between their home and workplace, usually done daily.
words.definitionUz: Odamning har kuni uydan ishga va ishdan uyga boradigan muntazam sayohati.
words.example1: My daily commute takes about 45 minutes by train.
words.example1Translation: Mening kundalik ish safarim poyezdda taxminan 45 daqiqa davom etadi.
words.example2: Working from home has eliminated the need for many people to commute.
words.example2Translation: Uydan ishlash ko'p odamlar uchun ish safariga borish zaruriyatini bartaraf etdi.
words.example3: Long commutes can be stressful and reduce time for family and leisure.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq ish safarlar stressli bo'lishi va oila va dam olish uchun vaqtni kamaytirishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She commutes to the city center every morning by bus.
Traffic jams make the daily commute much longer than expected.
A shorter commute is one reason many people want to live closer to work.
The average commute in big cities can exceed one hour each way.
Some companies offer flexible hours to help employees avoid peak commute times.
Cycling to work is an eco-friendly way to commute.
Long commutes have been linked to lower job satisfaction and health problems.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni ertalab avtobusda shahar markaziga boradi.
Tirbandliklar kundalik ish safarini kutilgandan ancha uzun qiladi.
Qisqaroq yo'l ko'p odamlar ishga yaqinroq yashashni xohlashlarining sabablaridan biri.
Katta shaharlardagi o'rtacha ish safari bir tomonlama bir soatdan oshishi mumkin.
Ba'zi kompaniyalar xodimlarga cho'qqili ish safar vaqtlarini oldini olishda yordam berish uchun moslashuvchan soatlar taklif qiladi.
Velosipedda ishga borish ekologik ish safar usulidir.
Uzoq ish safarlari past ish qoniqishi va sog'liq muammolari bilan bog'liq deb topilgan.

words.definition: Local government regulations that control how land in different parts of a city can be used, such as for residential, commercial, or industrial purposes.
words.definitionUz: Shaharning turli qismlarida yerdan qanday maqsadlarda foydalanish mumkinligini belgilaydigan mahalliy hukumat qoidalari — masalan, uy, do'kon yoki zavod qurish.
words.example1: Zoning laws prevent factories from being built in residential areas.
words.example1Translation: Zonalash qonunlari turar-joy hududlarida zavodlar qurilishining oldini oladi.
words.example2: The city changed its zoning laws to allow more apartment buildings downtown.
words.example2Translation: Shahar markazida ko'proq ko'p qavatli uylar qurish uchun zonalash qonunlarini o'zgartirdi.
words.example3: Developers must follow zoning laws before starting any construction project.
words.example3Translation: Quruvchilar har qanday qurilish loyihasini boshlashdan oldin zonalash qonunlariga rioya qilishlari shart.
extraExamples: Zoning laws help to create organized and livable cities.
Some critics argue that strict zoning laws limit housing supply.
Mixed-use zoning allows shops and homes to exist in the same area.
Zoning laws can protect historic buildings and cultural sites.
Violating zoning laws can result in fines or demolition orders.
Environmental zoning laws protect natural areas from development.
Zoning laws vary widely from one city to another.
extraExampleTranslations: Zonalash qonunlari tartibli va qulay shaharlar yaratishga yordam beradi.
Ba'zi tanqidchilar qat'iy zonalash qonunlari uy-joy taklifini cheklashtiradi deb ta'kidlaydi.
Aralash zonalash do'konlar va uylarning bir hududda mavjud bo'lishiga imkon beradi.
Zonalash qonunlari tarixiy binolar va madaniy joylarni himoya qilishi mumkin.
Zonalash qonunlarini buzish jarima yoki buzish buyrug'iga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ekologik zonalash qonunlari tabiiy hududlarni qurilishdan himoya qiladi.
Zonalash qonunlari bir shahardan boshqasiga katta farq qiladi.

words.definition: A city that uses digital technology and data to manage resources efficiently, improve public services, and enhance the quality of life for its residents.
words.definitionUz: Resurslardan tejamkor foydalanish, davlat xizmatlarini yaxshilash va aholining hayot sifatini oshirish uchun raqamli texnologiya va ma'lumotlardan foydalanadigan shahar.
words.example1: Singapore is considered one of the world's leading smart cities.
words.example1Translation: Singapur dunyoning yetakchi aqlli shaharlaridan biri hisoblanadi.
words.example2: Smart city technology can monitor traffic in real time to reduce congestion.
words.example2Translation: Aqlli shahar texnologiyasi tirbandlikni kamaytirish uchun yo'l harakatini real vaqtda kuzatishi mumkin.
words.example3: A smart city uses sensors and data to manage energy use more efficiently.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli shahar energiya sarfini samaraliroq boshqarish uchun sensorlar va ma'lumotlardan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Smart city initiatives include digital payment systems and e-government services.
Smart lighting systems reduce energy consumption in smart cities.
Residents of smart cities can report issues through mobile apps.
Smart waste management systems alert workers when bins are full.
Privacy and data security are major concerns in smart city development.
Smart cities use AI to predict and manage public transportation demand.
Barcelona and Amsterdam are well-known examples of European smart cities.
extraExampleTranslations: Aqlli shahar tashabbuslari raqamli to'lov tizimlari va elektron hukumat xizmatlarini o'z ichiga oladi.
Aqlli yoritish tizimlari aqlli shaharlarda energiya sarfini kamaytiradi.
Aqlli shaharlar aholisi muammolarni mobil ilovalar orqali bildirishlari mumkin.
Aqlli chiqindi boshqarish tizimlari konteynерlar to'lganida ishchilarni xabardor qiladi.
Maxfiylik va ma'lumotlar xavfsizligi aqlli shaharlarni rivojlantirishdagi asosiy tashvishlardir.
Aqlli shaharlar jamoat transportiga talabni bashorat qilish va boshqarish uchun sun'iy intellektdan foydalanadi.
Barselona va Amsterdam Yevropa aqlli shaharlarining taniqli namunalaridir.

words.definition: Efforts to protect and maintain cultural traditions, historical sites, artifacts, and practices for future generations.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy merosni saqlash – bu madaniy an’analar, tarixiy joylar va urf-odatlar kelajak avlodlar uchun himoya qilinishi va saqlab qolinishiga qaratilgan harakatlar.
words.example1: The government invested heavily in cultural preservation of ancient temples.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat qadimiy ibodatxonalarni madaniy meros sifatida saqlashga katta mablag‘ ajratdi.
words.example2: Cultural preservation helps communities maintain their unique identity.
words.example2Translation: Madaniy merosni saqlash jamiyatlarga o‘ziga xosligini saqlab qolishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Local NGOs play a key role in cultural preservation projects.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy nodavlat tashkilotlari madaniy merosni saqlash loyihalarida muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
extraExamples: Cultural preservation includes documenting endangered languages.
Tourism can support cultural preservation when managed responsibly.
UNESCO supports international cultural preservation initiatives.
Cultural preservation requires both funding and community involvement.
Modern technology aids in the cultural preservation of fragile artifacts.
Neglecting cultural preservation leads to the loss of historical knowledge.
Cultural preservation strengthens national pride and unity.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniy merosni saqlash yo‘qolib borayotgan tillarni hujjatlashtirishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Turizm mas’uliyat bilan boshqarilsa, madaniy merosni saqlashga yordam beradi.
YuNESKO xalqaro madaniy merosni saqlash tashabbuslarini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Madaniy merosni saqlash moliyaviy mablag‘ va jamoa ishtirokini talab qiladi.
Zamonaviy texnologiya nozik artefaktlarni madaniy meros sifatida saqlashga yordam beradi.
Madaniy merosni saqlashga e’tiborsizlik tarixiy bilimlarni yo‘qotishga olib keladi.
Madaniy merosni saqlash milliy g‘urur va birlikni mustahkamlaydi.

words.definition: Non-physical aspects of culture such as traditions, language, music, dance, rituals, and knowledge passed down through generations.
words.definitionUz: Nomoddiy meros – bu til, musiqa, raqs, urf-odatlar va avlodlardan-avlodlarga o‘tib kelayotgan bilim kabi madaniyatning jismoniy bo‘lmagan jihatlari.
words.example1: UNESCO protects intangible heritage like traditional storytelling.
words.example1Translation: YuNESKO an’anaviy hikoya aytish kabi nomoddiy merosni himoya qiladi.
words.example2: Intangible heritage is vital for maintaining cultural diversity.
words.example2Translation: Nomoddiy meros madaniy xilma-xillikni saqlash uchun juda muhim.
words.example3: Learning about intangible heritage helps younger generations connect with their roots.
words.example3Translation: Nomoddiy meros haqida o‘rganish yosh avlodlarga o‘z ildizlari bilan bog‘lanishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Intangible heritage includes folk songs and culinary traditions.
Many countries are working to document their intangible heritage.
Intangible heritage is more difficult to preserve than physical sites.
Festivals celebrate the intangible heritage of different communities.
Intangible heritage reflects a community’s way of life.
Globalization poses challenges to intangible heritage preservation.
Intangible heritage enriches our understanding of human creativity.
extraExampleTranslations: Nomoddiy meros xalq qo‘shiqlari va oshpazlik an’analarini o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ko‘plab mamlakatlar o‘z nomoddiy merosini hujjatlashtirish ustida ishlamoqda.
Nomoddiy merosni jismoniy obidalarga qaraganda saqlash qiyinroq.
Bayramlar turli jamoalarning nomoddiy merosini nishonlaydi.
Nomoddiy meros jamiyatning turmush tarzi aksini bildiradi.
Globallashuv nomoddiy merosni saqlashga qiyinchilik tug‘diradi.
Nomoddiy meros inson ijodkorligini chuqurroq tushunishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Tourism that focuses on visiting and experiencing places of historical, cultural, or natural significance.
words.definitionUz: Meros turizmi – tarixiy, madaniy yoki tabiiy ahamiyatga ega joylarga sayohat qilish va ularni tajriba qilishga asoslangan turizm turi.
words.example1: Heritage tourism has boosted the local economy in the old town.
words.example1Translation: Meros turizmi eski shaharchada mahalliy iqtisodiyotni rivojlantirdi.
words.example2: Responsible heritage tourism helps preserve historical sites.
words.example2Translation: Mas’uliyatli meros turizmi tarixiy joylarni saqlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Many travelers now prefer heritage tourism over beach vacations.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab sayyohlar plyaj dam olish o‘rniga meros turizmini afzal ko‘rishmoqda.
extraExamples: Heritage tourism includes visits to museums and ancient ruins.
The city developed a heritage tourism strategy to attract more visitors.
Heritage tourism can sometimes lead to overcrowding at popular sites.
Cultural festivals are an important part of heritage tourism.
Heritage tourism promotes cross-cultural understanding.
Governments invest in infrastructure for heritage tourism.
Sustainable heritage tourism balances visitor access with preservation.
extraExampleTranslations: Meros turizmi muzeylar va qadimiy xarobalarga tashrifni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Shahar ko‘proq mehmonlarni jalb qilish uchun meros turizmi strategiyasini ishlab chiqdi.
Meros turizmi ba’zan mashhur joylarda olomon ko‘payishiga olib keladi.
Madaniy festivallar meros turizmining muhim qismidir.
Meros turizmi turli madaniyatlar o‘rtasidagi tushunishni oshiradi.
Hukumatlar meros turizmi uchun infratuzilmani rivojlantirishga sarmoya kiritadi.
Barqaror meros turizmi mehmonlar kirishini va saqlashni muvozanatlashtiradi.

words.definition: A person’s sense of belonging to a particular culture or group, shaped by shared traditions, values, and experiences.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy o‘zlik – insonning muayyan madaniyat yoki guruhga tegishliligi hissi bo‘lib, umumiy an’analar, qadriyatlar va tajribalar bilan shakllanadi.
words.example1: Living abroad strengthened her cultural identity.
words.example1Translation: Xorijda yashash uning madaniy o‘zligini mustahkamladi.
words.example2: Schools play an important role in developing students’ cultural identity.
words.example2Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarning madaniy o‘zligini shakllantirishda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: Cultural identity can evolve over time through new influences.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy o‘zlik yangi ta’sirlar bilan vaqt o‘tishi bilan o‘zgarishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Food is often central to cultural identity.
Cultural identity gives people a sense of pride and belonging.
Globalization sometimes challenges traditional cultural identity.
Artists frequently explore cultural identity in their work.
Maintaining cultural identity is important for immigrant communities.
Language is a key element of cultural identity.
Cultural identity influences how people view the world.
extraExampleTranslations: Ovqat ko‘pincha madaniy o‘zlikning markazida turadi.
Madaniy o‘zlik odamlarga g‘urur va tegishlilik hissi beradi.
Globallashuv an’anaviy madaniy o‘zlikka ba’zan qiyinchilik tug‘diradi.
Rassomlar o‘z asarlarida madaniy o‘zlikni tez-tez o‘rganishadi.
Immigrant jamiyatlari uchun madaniy o‘zlikni saqlash muhim.
Til madaniy o‘zlikning asosiy elementi hisoblanadi.
Madaniy o‘zlik odamlarning dunyoga qarashiga ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: The process of repairing and returning a historical building, artwork, or site to its original condition.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklash – tarixiy bino, san’at asari yoki joyni asl holatiga keltirish va ta’mirlash jarayoni.
words.example1: The restoration of the old palace took over five years.
words.example1Translation: Eski saroyni qayta tiklash besh yildan ortiq vaqt oldi.
words.example2: Careful restoration preserves the historical value of artifacts.
words.example2Translation: Ehtiyotkorlik bilan qayta tiklash artefaktlarning tarixiy qiymatini saqlaydi.
words.example3: Restoration projects often involve experts from multiple fields.
words.example3Translation: Qayta tiklash loyihalarida ko‘pincha turli soha mutaxassislari ishtirok etadi.
extraExamples: The museum completed the restoration of a famous painting.
Restoration work must respect the original materials and techniques.
Funding is a major challenge for heritage restoration.
Restoration helps bring historical sites back to life.
Community involvement is important in local restoration projects.
Modern technology assists in accurate restoration work.
Successful restoration attracts more tourists.
extraExampleTranslations: Muzey mashhur rasmni qayta tiklashni yakunladi.
Qayta tiklash ishlari asl materiallar va usullarga hurmat bilan amalga oshirilishi kerak.
Moliyalashtirish merosni qayta tiklashdagi asosiy qiyinchilik.
Qayta tiklash tarixiy joylarni qayta jonlantirishga yordam beradi.
Mahalliy qayta tiklash loyihalarida jamoa ishtiroki muhim.
Zamonaviy texnologiya aniq qayta tiklash ishlariga yordam beradi.
Muvaffaqiyatli qayta tiklash ko‘proq sayyohlarni jalb qiladi.

words.definition: The process of repurposing old or historic buildings for new uses while preserving their original character.
words.definitionUz: Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish – eski yoki tarixiy binolarni asl ko‘rinishini saqlab qolgan holda yangi maqsadlarda ishlatish.
words.example1: The old factory underwent adaptive reuse and became a popular art gallery.
words.example1Translation: Eski zavod moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish orqali mashhur san’at galereyasiga aylandi.
words.example2: Adaptive reuse is an environmentally friendly way to develop cities.
words.example2Translation: Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish shaharlarni rivojlantirishning ekologik toza usuli.
words.example3: Many warehouses have been converted through adaptive reuse into modern offices.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab omborxonalar moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish orqali zamonaviy ofislarga aylantirilgan.
extraExamples: Adaptive reuse helps maintain the historical fabric of a city.
Adaptive reuse projects often receive government incentives.
Creative adaptive reuse turns abandoned buildings into community spaces.
Adaptive reuse balances preservation with modern needs.
The trend of adaptive reuse is growing worldwide.
Challenges in adaptive reuse include updating old structures to current standards.
Adaptive reuse contributes to sustainable urban development.
extraExampleTranslations: Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish shaharning tarixiy qiyofasini saqlashga yordam beradi.
Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish loyihalari ko‘pincha davlat rag‘batlarini oladi.
Ijodiy moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish tashlandiq binolarni jamoa joylariga aylantiradi.
Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish saqlash va zamonaviy ehtiyojlarni muvozanatlashtiradi.
Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish tendensiyasi dunyo bo‘ylab o‘sib bormoqda.
Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanishdagi qiyinchiliklardan biri eski inshootlarni hozirgi standartlarga moslashtirishdir.
Moslashtirilgan qayta foydalanish barqaror shahar rivojlanishiga hissa qo‘shadi.

words.definition: The belief that one’s own culture or ethnic group is superior to others and judging other cultures by one’s own standards.
words.definitionUz: Etnosentrizm – o‘z madaniyati yoki etnik guruhini boshqalardan ustun deb hisoblash va boshqa madaniyatlarni o‘z me’yorlari bilan baholash.
words.example1: Ethnocentrism can lead to misunderstandings between different cultures.
words.example1Translation: Etnosentrizm turli madaniyatlar o‘rtasida tushunmovchiliklarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example2: Traveling abroad often helps reduce ethnocentrism.
words.example2Translation: Xorijga sayohat etnosentrizmni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Education can challenge ethnocentrism by promoting cultural awareness.
words.example3Translation: Ta’lim madaniy ongni oshirish orqali etnosentrizmga qarshi chiqishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Ethnocentrism is a common barrier to intercultural communication.
Some forms of nationalism are rooted in ethnocentrism.
Anthropologists study ethnocentrism to understand human behavior.
Overcoming ethnocentrism requires open-mindedness.
Media sometimes reinforces ethnocentrism unintentionally.
Ethnocentrism affects how people perceive global events.
Schools teach students to recognize and avoid ethnocentrism.
extraExampleTranslations: Etnosentrizm madaniyatlararo muloqotdagi keng tarqalgan to‘siq.
Millatchilikning ba’zi shakllari etnosentrizmga asoslanadi.
Antropologlar inson xatti-harakatini tushunish uchun etnosentrizmni o‘rganishadi.
Etnosentrizmdan xalos bo‘lish ochiq fikrlilikni talab qiladi.
OAV ba’zan beixtiyor etnosentrizmni kuchaytiradi.
Etnosentrizm odamlarning global voqealarga qarashiga ta’sir qiladi.
Maktablar o‘quvchilarga etnosentrizmni tanib, undan qochishni o‘rgatadi.

words.definition: The adoption of elements from one culture by members of another culture without proper understanding, respect, or permission.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy o‘zlashtirish – bir madaniyat elementlarini boshqa madaniyat vakillari tomonidan chuqur tushunmasdan, hurmat qilmasdan yoki ruxsatsiz qabul qilish.
words.example1: The fashion industry has been criticized for cultural appropriation.
words.example1Translation: Moda sanoati madaniy o‘zlashtirish uchun tanqid qilinmoqda.
words.example2: Cultural appropriation can offend members of the original culture.
words.example2Translation: Madaniy o‘zlashtirish asl madaniyat vakillarini xafa qilishi mumkin.
words.example3: Understanding the difference between appreciation and appropriation is important.
words.example3Translation: Qadrlash va o‘zlashtirish o‘rtasidagi farqni tushunish muhim.
extraExamples: Wearing traditional clothing as a costume can be seen as cultural appropriation.
Cultural appropriation often involves power imbalances between cultures.
Social media has increased discussions about cultural appropriation.
Artists should be careful to avoid cultural appropriation in their work.
Cultural appropriation differs from cultural exchange.
Many celebrities have faced backlash for cultural appropriation.
Education helps prevent unintentional cultural appropriation.
extraExampleTranslations: An’anaviy kiyimlarni kostyum sifatida kiyish madaniy o‘zlashtirish deb qaralishi mumkin.
Madaniy o‘zlashtirish ko‘pincha madaniyatlar o‘rtasidagi kuch muvozanatsizligi bilan bog‘liq.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar madaniy o‘zlashtirish haqidagi muhokamalarni ko‘paytirdi.
Rassomlar o‘z ishlarida madaniy o‘zlashtirishdan ehtiyot bo‘lishlari kerak.
Madaniy o‘zlashtirish madaniy almashinuvdan farq qiladi.
Ko‘plab mashhurlar madaniy o‘zlashtirish uchun tanqidga uchragan.
Ta’lim beixtiyor madaniy o‘zlashtirishning oldini olishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Something handed down from previous generations, such as traditions, values, buildings, or achievements.
words.definitionUz: Merov – o‘tmish avlodlardan qolgan an’analar, qadriyatlar, binolar yoki yutuqlar kabi narsalar.
words.example1: The ancient library is part of the city’s cultural legacy.
words.example1Translation: Qadimiy kutubxona shaharning madaniy merovining bir qismidir.
words.example2: She wants to leave a positive legacy through her charity work.
words.example2Translation: U xayriya ishlari orqali ijobiy merov qoldirmoqchi.
words.example3: Preserving our legacy is important for future generations.
words.example3Translation: Merovimizni saqlash kelajak avlodlar uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Family legacies often include stories and values passed down.
The scientist’s legacy continues to influence modern research.
Cultural legacy shapes national identity.
Many historical buildings represent the legacy of past civilizations.
Legacy can be both positive and negative.
He established a scholarship as part of his legacy.
Understanding our legacy helps us appreciate history.
extraExampleTranslations: Oilaviy merov ko‘pincha hikoyalar va qadriyatlar shaklida o‘tadi.
Olimga qoldirgan merovi zamonaviy tadqiqotlarga ta’sirini davom ettirmoqda.
Madaniy merov milliy o‘zlikni shakllantiradi.
Ko‘plab tarixiy binolar o‘tmish tsivilizatsiyalarining merovidir.
Merov ham ijobiy, ham salbiy bo‘lishi mumkin.
U o‘z merovi sifatida stipendiya tashkil etdi.
Merovimizni tushunish tarixni qadrlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Efforts to renew, strengthen, and revive a culture that is declining or at risk of disappearing.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy jonlantirish – zaiflashib borayotgan yoki yo‘qolib ketish xavfi ostidagi madaniyatni yangilash va mustahkamlash harakatlari.
words.example1: The community started a cultural revitalization project to teach traditional dances.
words.example1Translation: Jamiyat an’anaviy raqslarni o‘rgatish uchun madaniy jonlantirish loyihasini boshladi.
words.example2: Cultural revitalization has helped preserve endangered languages.
words.example2Translation: Madaniy jonlantirish yo‘qolib borayotgan tillarni saqlab qolishga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Government support is crucial for successful cultural revitalization.
words.example3Translation: Davlat qo‘llab-quvvatlashi madaniy jonlantirishning muvaffaqiyati uchun zarur.
extraExamples: Cultural revitalization often involves young people learning from elders.
Festivals play a big role in cultural revitalization.
Cultural revitalization boosts community pride.
Indigenous groups are leading many cultural revitalization efforts.
Music and art are powerful tools for cultural revitalization.
Challenges in cultural revitalization include lack of funding.
Successful cultural revitalization benefits tourism and education.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniy jonlantirish ko‘pincha yoshlarning kattalardan o‘rganishini o‘z ichiga oladi.
Festivallar madaniy jonlantirishda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
Madaniy jonlantirish jamoa g‘ururini oshiradi.
Mahalliy xalqlar madaniy jonlantirish harakatlarini boshqarmoqda.
Musiqa va san’at madaniy jonlantirishning kuchli vositalari.
Madaniy jonlantirishdagi qiyinchiliklardan biri moliyaviy mablag‘ yetishmasligi.
Muvaffaqiyatli madaniy jonlantirish turizm va ta’limga foyda keltiradi.

words.definition: An object made or used by humans in the past, especially one of historical or cultural interest.
words.definitionUz: Artefakt – o‘tmishda odamlar tomonidan yaratilgan yoki ishlatilgan, ayniqsa tarixiy yoki madaniy ahamiyatga ega buyum.
words.example1: The museum displayed ancient artifacts from Egypt.
words.example1Translation: Muzey Misrdan kelgan qadimiy artefaktlarni namoyish etdi.
words.example2: Archaeologists discovered a valuable artifact at the excavation site.
words.example2Translation: Arxeologlar qazish joyida qimmatli artefakt topdilar.
words.example3: Artifacts provide important clues about past civilizations.
words.example3Translation: Artefaktlar o‘tmish tsivilizatsiyalari haqida muhim ma’lumot beradi.
extraExamples: The artifact was carefully cleaned and preserved.
Many artifacts are displayed in national museums.
Artifacts help historians understand daily life in ancient times.
Illegal trade in cultural artifacts is a serious problem.
Digital scanning helps document fragile artifacts.
Each artifact tells a unique story from history.
Students learned how to analyze artifacts in class.
extraExampleTranslations: Artefakt ehtiyotkorlik bilan tozalandi va saqlandi.
Ko‘plab artefaktlar milliy muzeylarda namoyish etiladi.
Artefaktlar tarixchilarga qadimiy davrlardagi kundalik hayotni tushunishga yordam beradi.
Madaniy artefaktlarning noqonuniy savdosi jiddiy muammo.
Raqamli skanerlash nozik artefaktlarni hujjatlashtirishga yordam beradi.
Har bir artefakt tarixdan o‘ziga xos hikoya aytadi.
Talabalar darsda artefaktlarni tahlil qilishni o‘rgandilar.

words.definition: The process by which a minority group adopts the customs, values, and language of the dominant culture.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy assimilyatsiya – ozchilik guruhi ustun madaniyatning urf-odatlari, qadriyatlari va tilini qabul qilish jarayoni.
words.example1: Many immigrant families experience cultural assimilation over generations.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab immigrant oilalar avlodlar davomida madaniy assimilyatsiyani boshdan kechirishadi.
words.example2: Cultural assimilation can lead to the loss of traditional practices.
words.example2Translation: Madaniy assimilyatsiya an’anaviy amaliyotlarning yo‘qolishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Some communities resist full cultural assimilation to preserve their heritage.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi jamiyatlar o‘z merosini saqlash uchun to‘liq madaniy assimilyatsiyaga qarshilik ko‘rsatadi.
extraExamples: Schools sometimes accelerate cultural assimilation among children.
Cultural assimilation policies were common in the past.
The balance between integration and cultural assimilation is debated.
Language is often the first aspect affected by cultural assimilation.
Cultural assimilation does not always mean losing one’s identity completely.
Globalization has increased the pace of cultural assimilation.
Sociologists study the effects of cultural assimilation on society.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktablar bolalar orasida madaniy assimilyatsiyani tezlashtirishi mumkin.
O‘tmishda madaniy assimilyatsiya siyosati keng tarqalgan edi.
Integratsiya va madaniy assimilyatsiya o‘rtasidagi muvozanat muhokama qilinadi.
Til ko‘pincha madaniy assimilyatsiyaning birinchi ta’sirlanadigan jihati.
Madaniy assimilyatsiya har doim ham o‘z o‘zligini butunlay yo‘qotishni anglatmaydi.
Globallashuv madaniy assimilyatsiya sur’atini oshirdi.
Sotsiologlar madaniy assimilyatsiyaning jamiyatga ta’sirini o‘rganishadi.

words.definition: Customs, beliefs, and practices passed down from ancestors through generations.
words.definitionUz: Ajdodlar an’analari – ota-bobolardan avlodlarga o‘tib kelayotgan urf-odatlar, e’tiqodlar va amaliyotlar.
words.example1: She follows ancestral traditions during important family ceremonies.
words.example1Translation: U oilaviy muhim marosimlarda ajdodlar an’analariga amal qiladi.
words.example2: Ancestral traditions form an important part of cultural identity.
words.example2Translation: Ajdodlar an’analari madaniy o‘zlikning muhim qismidir.
words.example3: Many young people are rediscovering their ancestral traditions.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab yoshlar ajdodlar an’analarini qayta kashf qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Ancestral traditions include storytelling and festivals.
Preserving ancestral traditions strengthens family bonds.
Ancestral traditions vary greatly between different regions.
Modern life sometimes makes it hard to maintain ancestral traditions.
Elders are the keepers of ancestral traditions.
Ancestral traditions often have deep spiritual meaning.
Learning about ancestral traditions helps connect with history.
extraExampleTranslations: Ajdodlar an’analari hikoya aytish va festivallarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ajdodlar an’analarini saqlash oilaviy rishtalarni mustahkamlaydi.
Ajdodlar an’analari turli hududlarda juda farq qiladi.
Zamonaviy hayot ajdodlar an’analarini saqlashni ba’zan qiyinlashtiradi.
Kattalar ajdodlar an’analarining saqlovchilaridir.
Ajdodlar an’analarida ko‘pincha chuqur ruhiy ma’no bo‘ladi.
Ajdodlar an’analari haqida o‘rganish tarix bilan bog‘lanishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A landmark or area designated by UNESCO as having outstanding cultural, historical, or scientific value.
words.definitionUz: Jahon merosi obyekti – YuNESKO tomonidan madaniy, tarixiy yoki ilmiy jihatdan alohida ahamiyatga ega deb tan olingan joy yoki yodgorlik.
words.example1: The Great Wall of China is a famous World Heritage Site.
words.example1Translation: Xitoyning Buyuk devori mashhur Jahon merosi obyekti hisoblanadi.
words.example2: Visiting World Heritage Sites helps people appreciate global history.
words.example2Translation: Jahon merosi obyektlariga tashrif global tarixni qadrlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Countries must protect their World Heritage Sites from damage.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakatlar Jahon merosi obyektlarini zararlanishdan himoya qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: There are over a thousand World Heritage Sites around the world.
Being listed as a World Heritage Site boosts tourism.
World Heritage Sites represent humanity’s shared heritage.
Conservation efforts are essential for World Heritage Sites.
Some World Heritage Sites face threats from climate change.
UNESCO regularly reviews the status of World Heritage Sites.
World Heritage Sites include both natural and cultural locations.
extraExampleTranslations: Dunyo bo‘ylab mingdan ortiq Jahon merosi obyekti mavjud.
Jahon merosi obyekti ro‘yxatiga kiritilish turizmni oshiradi.
Jahon merosi obyekti insoniyatning umumiy merosini ifodalaydi.
Jahon merosi obyektlari uchun saqlash harakatlari zarur.
Ba’zi Jahon merosi obyekti iqlim o‘zgarishi tahdidiga duch kelmoqda.
YuNESKO Jahon merosi obyektlarining holatini muntazam ko‘rib chiqadi.
Jahon merosi obyekti tabiiy va madaniy joylarni o‘z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: The use of cultural exchanges, arts, education, and people-to-people connections to improve relations between countries.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy diplomatiya – mamlakatlar o‘rtasidagi munosabatlarni yaxshilash uchun madaniy almashinuv, san’at, ta’lim va odamlararo aloqalardan foydalanish.
words.example1: The festival was part of a cultural diplomacy initiative between the two nations.
words.example1Translation: Festival ikki davlat o‘rtasidagi madaniy diplomatiya tashabbusining bir qismi edi.
words.example2: Cultural diplomacy helps build trust and understanding across borders.
words.example2Translation: Madaniy diplomatiya chegaralar o‘rtasida ishonch va tushunishni mustahkamlaydi.
words.example3: Many countries use cultural diplomacy through film and music exchanges.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab mamlakatlar kino va musiqa almashinuvi orqali madaniy diplomatiyadan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Cultural diplomacy is a soft power tool in international relations.
Embassies often organize cultural diplomacy events.
Cultural diplomacy can ease political tensions.
Student exchange programs are a form of cultural diplomacy.
The success of cultural diplomacy depends on genuine dialogue.
Cultural diplomacy promotes peace and cooperation.
Governments invest in cultural diplomacy to improve their global image.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniy diplomatiya xalqaro munosabatlardagi yumshoq kuch vositasidir.
Elchixonalar ko‘pincha madaniy diplomatiya tadbirlarini tashkil qiladi.
Madaniy diplomatiya siyosiy keskinliklarni yumshatishi mumkin.
Talabalar almashinuvi dasturlari madaniy diplomatiya shakllaridan biri.
Madaniy diplomatiya muvaffaqiyati chinakam muloqotga bog‘liq.
Madaniy diplomatiya tinchlik va hamkorlikni rag‘batlantiradi.
Hukumatlar global obro‘sini oshirish uchun madaniy diplomatiyaga sarmoya kiritadi.

words.definition: Money spent by the government on public services and infrastructure.
words.definitionUz: Hukumat xalq ehtiyojlari uchun — yo'llar, maktablar, kasalxonalar — sarflaydigan pul.
words.example1: Public expenditure on education has increased this year.
words.example1Translation: Bu yil ta'limga davlat xarajatlari oshdi.
words.example2: The government reviewed its public expenditure to cut unnecessary costs.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat keraksiz xarajatlarni qisqartirish uchun davlat sarflarini ko'rib chiqdi.
words.example3: High public expenditure can lead to a budget deficit if not managed well.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori davlat xarajatlari yaxshi boshqarilmasa byudjet taqchilligiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Public expenditure on healthcare improved life expectancy.
The opposition criticized the rise in public expenditure.
Roads and bridges are funded through public expenditure.
Public expenditure must be balanced with government revenue.
Citizens expect efficient use of public expenditure.
Public expenditure fell during the economic crisis.
The report analyzed trends in public expenditure over a decade.
extraExampleTranslations: Sog'liqni saqlashga sarflangan davlat xarajatlari umr ko'rish darajasini yaxshiladi.
Muxolifat davlat xarajatlarining o'sishini tanqid qildi.
Yo'llar va ko'priklar davlat xarajatlari hisobidan moliyalanadi.
Davlat xarajatlari hukumat daromadlari bilan muvozanatda bo'lishi kerak.
Fuqarolar davlat xarajatlarining samarali ishlatilishini kutadi.
Iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida davlat xarajatlari kamaydi.
Hisobot o'n yil davomidagi davlat xarajatlari tendensiyalarini tahlil qildi.

words.definition: Government use of taxation and spending to manage and influence the economy.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning iqtisodiyotni boshqarish uchun soliqlar va xarajatlardan foydalanish usuli.
words.example1: The government used fiscal policy to reduce unemployment.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat ishsizlikni kamaytirish uchun fiskal siyosatdan foydalandi.
words.example2: Fiscal policy decisions affect every citizen's daily life.
words.example2Translation: Fiskal siyosat qarorlari har bir fuqaroning kundalik hayotiga ta'sir qiladi.
words.example3: During the recession, the government adopted an expansionary fiscal policy.
words.example3Translation: Tanazzul davrida hukumat kengaytiruvchi fiskal siyosatni qabul qildi.
extraExamples: Fiscal policy is one of the main tools for economic management.
The central bank and government coordinated fiscal policy responses.
A tight fiscal policy helps control inflation.
Experts debated the effectiveness of the new fiscal policy.
Fiscal policy changes are often announced in the annual budget.
Poor fiscal policy can lead to economic instability.
The finance minister outlined the country's fiscal policy for the year.
extraExampleTranslations: Fiskal siyosat iqtisodiy boshqaruvning asosiy vositalaridan biridir.
Markaziy bank va hukumat fiskal siyosat choralarini muvofiqlаshtirdi.
Qat'iy fiskal siyosat inflyatsiyani nazorat qilishga yordam beradi.
Mutaxassislar yangi fiskal siyosatning samaradorligini muhokama qilishdi.
Fiskal siyosat o'zgarishlari ko'pincha yillik byudjetda e'lon qilinadi.
Yomon fiskal siyosat iqtisodiy beqarorlikka olib kelishi mumkin.
Moliya vaziri yil uchun mamlakatning fiskal siyosatini bayon qildi.

words.definition: A situation when a government spends more money than it earns through revenue.
words.definitionUz: Hukumat daromaddan ko'proq pul sarflaganda yuzaga keladigan holat.
