words.example1: The country ran a budget deficit for three consecutive years.
words.example1Translation: Mamlakat uch yil ketma-ket byudjet taqchilligida ishladi.
words.example2: Rising healthcare costs contributed to the growing budget deficit.
words.example2Translation: Tibbiy xarajatlarning o'sishi byudjet taqchilligining kengayishiga olib keldi.
words.example3: The government introduced new taxes to reduce the budget deficit.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat byudjet taqchilligini kamaytirish uchun yangi soliqlarni joriy qildi.
extraExamples: A large budget deficit can weaken a country's currency.
The opposition blamed overspending for the budget deficit.
Reducing the budget deficit requires both spending cuts and higher taxes.
The budget deficit widened due to lower tax revenue.
Some economists argue that a small budget deficit is acceptable.
The government borrowed money to cover the budget deficit.
Investors monitor budget deficits when assessing economic risk.
extraExampleTranslations: Katta byudjet taqchilligi mamlakatning valyutasini zaiflаshtirishi mumkin.
Muxolifat haddan tashqari xarajatlarni byudjet taqchilligining sababi deb aytdi.
Byudjet taqchilligini kamaytirish uchun ham xarajatlarni qisqartirish, ham soliqlarni oshirish kerak.
Soliq daromadlarining kamayishi tufayli byudjet taqchilligi kengaydi.
Ba'zi iqtisodchilar kichik byudjet taqchilligi maqbul ekanini ta'kidlaydi.
Hukumat byudjet taqchilligini qoplash uchun qarz oldi.
Investorlar iqtisodiy xavfni baholashda byudjet taqchilliklarini kuzatadi.

words.definition: The system by which a government collects compulsory payments from individuals and businesses.
words.definitionUz: Davlatning odamlar va korxonalardan majburiy tarzda pul yig'ish tizimi.
words.example1: Taxation is the primary source of government revenue.
words.example1Translation: Soliqqa tortish hukumat daromadining asosiy manbai hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The new taxation system was designed to be fairer for low-income families.
words.example2Translation: Yangi soliqqa tortish tizimi kam daromadli oilalar uchun adolatliroq bo'lishi uchun ishlab chiqildi.
words.example3: Many businesses complained about the heavy burden of taxation.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab korxonalar og'ir soliq yuki haqida shikoyat qildi.
extraExamples: Taxation funds public services like schools and hospitals.
Progressive taxation means higher earners pay more tax.
The government reformed its taxation system to attract investors.
Taxation policies differ significantly between countries.
Avoiding taxation illegally is called tax evasion.
Citizens debated whether the level of taxation was too high.
Corporate taxation rates were reduced to encourage business growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Soliqqa tortish maktablar va kasalxonalar kabi davlat xizmatlarini moliyalashtiradi.
Progressiv soliqqa tortish ko'proq topayotganlar ko'proq soliq to'lashini anglatadi.
Hukumat investorlarni jalb qilish uchun soliq tizimini isloh qildi.
Soliq siyosatlari mamlakatlar o'rtasida sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
Soliqlardan noqonuniy ravishda qochish soliq to'lashdan bo'yin tovlash deyiladi.
Fuqarolar soliq darajasi juda yuqori yoki yo'qligini muhokama qilishdi.
Korporativ soliq stavkalari biznes o'sishini rag'batlantirish uchun kamaytitildi.

words.definition: Financial assistance given by the government to support a specific industry, group, or activity.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning biror sohani yoki guruhni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun beradigan moliyaviy yordami.
words.example1: The government provided a subsidy to farmers to help them afford fertilizers.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat fermerlariga o'g'it sotib olishga yordam berish uchun subsidiya ajratdi.
words.example2: Energy subsidies kept electricity prices low for households.
words.example2Translation: Energetika subsidiyalari uy xo'jaliklari uchun elektr energiyasi narxlarini past saqladi.
words.example3: Critics argued that the subsidy was unfairly benefiting large corporations.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar subsidiya nohaqona ravishda yirik korporatsiyalarga foyda keltirayotganini ta'kidlashdi.
extraExamples: The government cut subsidies to reduce public expenditure.
A housing subsidy helped low-income families afford rent.
Agricultural subsidies protect local farmers from foreign competition.
The subsidy program was extended for another two years.
Some economists believe subsidies distort free market competition.
The renewable energy sector received significant government subsidies.
Without the subsidy, many small businesses would have closed.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat davlat xarajatlarini kamaytirish uchun subsidiyalarni qisqartirdi.
Uy-joy subsidiyasi kam daromadli oilalarga ijara to'lashga yordam berdi.
Qishloq xo'jaligi subsidiyalari mahalliy fermerlarni xorijiy raqobatdan himoya qiladi.
Subsidiya dasturi yana ikki yilga uzaytirildi.
Ba'zi iqtisodchilar subsidiyalar erkin bozor raqobatini buzadi deb hisoblaydi.
Qayta tiklanadigan energetika sektori sezilarli hukumat subsidiyalarini oldi.
Subsidiyasiz ko'plab kichik bizneslar yopilgan bo'lardi.

words.definition: The total amount of money that a government owes to lenders, accumulated over time.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning yillar davomida yig'ilgan va kreditorlarga qarzdor bo'lgan umumiy pul miqdori.
words.example1: The national debt grew rapidly during the economic crisis.
words.example1Translation: Milliy qarz iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida tez o'sdi.
words.example2: Reducing the national debt is one of the government's long-term goals.
words.example2Translation: Milliy qarzni kamaytirish hukumatning uzoq muddatli maqsadlaridan biridir.
words.example3: A high national debt can make it harder for a country to borrow in the future.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori milliy qarz mamlakatning kelajakda qarz olishini qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The government published a report on the current national debt level.
Some countries carry a national debt larger than their annual GDP.
Rising interest rates increased the cost of managing the national debt.
Citizens were concerned about the growing national debt burden.
The national debt was partly caused by years of budget deficits.
International investors monitor a country's national debt closely.
Paying off the national debt requires disciplined fiscal management.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat joriy milliy qarz darajasi haqida hisobot e'lon qildi.
Ba'zi mamlakatlarning milliy qarzi yillik YaIM dan kattaroqdir.
Foiz stavkalarining o'sishi milliy qarzni boshqarish xarajatlarini oshirdi.
Fuqarolar o'sib borayotgan milliy qarz yuki haqida xavotirga tushdi.
Milliy qarz qisman ko'p yillik byudjet taqchilligi tufayli yuzaga keldi.
Xalqaro investorlar mamlakatning milliy qarzini diqqat bilan kuzatadi.
Milliy qarzni to'lash intizomli fiskal boshqaruvni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Government spending on foundational physical systems such as roads, bridges, water supply, and internet networks.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning yo'llar, ko'priklar, suv ta'minoti va internet kabi asosiy tizimlarni qurishga sarflaydigan puli.
words.example1: Infrastructure investment created thousands of jobs across the country.
words.example1Translation: Infratuzilmaga investitsiya mamlakat bo'ylab minglab ish o'rinlari yaratdi.
words.example2: The government announced a major infrastructure investment plan for rural areas.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat qishloq hududlari uchun katta infratuzilma investitsiya rejasini e'lon qildi.
words.example3: Poor infrastructure investment leads to slower economic development.
words.example3Translation: Infratuzilmaga yomon investitsiya iqtisodiy rivojlanishning sekinlashishiga olib keladi.
extraExamples: Infrastructure investment in high-speed rail improved regional connectivity.
The city council approved a large infrastructure investment for water systems.
Private companies partnered with the government on infrastructure investment projects.
Infrastructure investment is considered essential for long-term economic growth.
Aging bridges highlighted the need for renewed infrastructure investment.
Digital infrastructure investment expanded broadband access in remote areas.
The report showed that infrastructure investment had declined over the past decade.
extraExampleTranslations: Tezkor temir yo'lga investitsiya mintaqaviy ulanishni yaxshiladi.
Shahar kengashi suv tizimlari uchun katta infratuzilma investitsiyasini tasdiqladi.
Xususiy kompaniyalar infratuzilma investitsiya loyihalarida hukumat bilan hamkorlik qildi.
Infratuzilmaga investitsiya uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy o'sish uchun muhim deb hisoblanadi.
Eskirgan ko'priklar infratuzilmaga yangilangan investitsiya zaruratini ko'rsatdi.
Raqamli infratuzilmaga investitsiya masofaviy hududlarda keng polosali internet kirishini kengaytirdi.
Hisobot o'tgan o'n yil davomida infratuzilmaga investitsiya kamayganini ko'rsatdi.

words.definition: Government programs and systems designed to support the well-being of citizens, especially in areas like healthcare, housing, and unemployment.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning fuqarolar, ayniqsa nochorlar hayotini yaxshilash uchun yaratgan dasturlari va tizimlari.
words.example1: Social welfare programs helped many families survive the economic downturn.
words.example1Translation: Ijtimoiy ta'minot dasturlari ko'plab oilalarga iqtisodiy tanazzuldan omon qolishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: The government increased funding for social welfare to support the unemployed.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat ishsizlarni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun ijtimoiy ta'minot moliyalashtirishini oshirdi.
words.example3: Access to social welfare services varies significantly between regions.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy ta'minot xizmatlariga kirish imkoniyati mintaqalar o'rtasida sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
extraExamples: Social welfare spending is a large part of the national budget.
Children from low-income families benefited from social welfare programs.
The reform aimed to make social welfare more efficient and targeted.
Critics argued that excessive social welfare reduces people's motivation to work.
Social welfare includes pensions, housing support, and disability benefits.
The government expanded social welfare coverage during the pandemic.
Effective social welfare systems reduce inequality in society.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy ta'minot xarajatlari milliy byudjetning katta qismini tashkil qiladi.
Kam daromadli oilalardan bolalar ijtimoiy ta'minot dasturlaridan foyda ko'rdi.
Islohat ijtimoiy ta'minotni samaraliroq va maqsadliroq qilishga qaratilgan edi.
Tanqidchilar haddan ortiq ijtimoiy ta'minot odamlarning ishlash motivatsiyasini kamaytiradi, deb ta'kidlashdi.
Ijtimoiy ta'minot nafaqalar, uy-joy yordami va nogironlik nafaqalarini o'z ichiga oladi.
Hukumat pandemic davrida ijtimoiy ta'minot qamrovini kengaytirdi.
Samarali ijtimoiy ta'minot tizimlari jamiyatdagi tengsizlikni kamaytiradi.

words.definition: Government actions, typically involving increased spending or tax cuts, aimed at boosting economic activity during a slowdown.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning iqtisodiyot sustlashganda uni jonlantirish uchun ko'proq pul sarflash yoki soliqlarni kamaytirish kabi chora-tadbirlari.
words.example1: The government launched an economic stimulus package to fight the recession.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat tanazzulga qarshi kurashish uchun iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish paketini ishga tushirdi.
words.example2: The economic stimulus helped businesses recover after the pandemic.
words.example2Translation: Iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish pandемiyadan keyin bizneslarning tiklanishiga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Critics questioned whether the economic stimulus was large enough to make a difference.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar iqtisodiy rag'batlantirishning farq qilish uchun yetarlicha katta ekanligini shubha ostiga oldi.
extraExamples: The economic stimulus included direct cash payments to citizens.
Low interest rates are a common form of economic stimulus.
The economic stimulus boosted consumer spending significantly.
Governments around the world introduced economic stimulus measures simultaneously.
The long-term effects of the economic stimulus are still being studied.
Infrastructure projects were part of the broader economic stimulus plan.
The economic stimulus reduced unemployment within six months.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish fuqarolarga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri naqd pul to'lovlarini o'z ichiga oldi.
Past foiz stavkalari iqtisodiy rag'batlantirishning keng tarqalgan shakli hisoblanadi.
Iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish iste'molchilarning xarajatlarini sezilarli darajada oshirdi.
Dunyo bo'ylab hukumatlar bir vaqtning o'zida iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish choralarini kiritdi.
Iqtisodiy rag'batlantirishning uzoq muddatli oqibatlari hali ham o'rganilmoqda.
Infratuzilma loyihalari kengroq iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish rejasining bir qismi edi.
Iqtisodiy rag'batlantirish olti oy ichida ishsizlikni kamaytirdi.

words.definition: The careful and disciplined management of government finances to avoid excessive debt and ensure long-term economic stability.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning pullarni ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarishi, ortiqcha qarz to'plamaslik va uzoq muddatli barqarorlikni ta'minlash.
words.example1: Fiscal responsibility requires balancing spending with available revenue.
words.example1Translation: Fiskal mas'uliyat xarajatlarni mavjud daromadlar bilan muvozanatlashtirish talab etadi.
words.example2: Voters rewarded the party for its commitment to fiscal responsibility.
words.example2Translation: Saylovchilar fiskal mas'uliyatga sodiqlik uchun partiyani mukofotladi.
words.example3: Fiscal responsibility becomes especially important during times of economic uncertainty.
words.example3Translation: Fiskal mas'uliyat ayniqsa iqtisodiy noaniqlik davrida muhim ahamiyat kasb etadi.
extraExamples: The finance minister emphasized fiscal responsibility in her annual speech.
Fiscal responsibility means avoiding unnecessary borrowing.
Long-term fiscal responsibility protects future generations from debt.
The government was praised for showing fiscal responsibility during the crisis.
Fiscal responsibility involves transparent reporting of government finances.
Some argue that excessive fiscal responsibility can slow economic growth.
International organizations encouraged the country to practice fiscal responsibility.
extraExampleTranslations: Moliya vaziri yillik nutqida fiskal mas'uliyatni ta'kidladi.
Fiskal mas'uliyat keraksiz qarz olishdan qochishni anglatadi.
Uzoq muddatli fiskal mas'uliyat kelajak avlodlarni qarzdan himoya qiladi.
Hukumat inqiroz davrida fiskal mas'uliyatni ko'rsatgani uchun maqtovga sazovor bo'ldi.
Fiskal mas'uliyat hukumat moliyasini shaffof hisobotini o'z ichiga oladi.
Ba'zilar haddan ortiq fiskal mas'uliyat iqtisodiy o'sishni sekinlashtirishi mumkin deb ta'kidlaydi.
Xalqaro tashkilotlar mamlakatni fiskal mas'uliyatni amalda qo'llashga undadi.

words.definition: Services provided by the government and available to all citizens, such as healthcare, education, and law enforcement.
words.definitionUz: Hukumat barcha fuqarolarga taqdim etadigan xizmatlar, masalan: maktab, kasalxona, politsiya.
words.example1: Access to quality public services is a basic right for all citizens.
words.example1Translation: Sifatli davlat xizmatlariga kirish imkoniyati barcha fuqarolarning asosiy huquqidir.
words.example2: Budget cuts reduced the quality of public services in many areas.
words.example2Translation: Byudjet qisqartirishlari ko'plab joylarda davlat xizmatlari sifatini pasaytirdi.
words.example3: Citizens pay taxes so that the government can fund public services.
words.example3Translation: Fuqarolar hukumat davlat xizmatlarini moliyalashtirishga soliq to'laydi.
extraExamples: Public services include libraries, parks, and public transportation.
The quality of public services often determines citizens' satisfaction with government.
Underfunded public services struggle to meet growing demand.
Privatizing public services can sometimes reduce access for poorer communities.
The new government pledged to improve public services across the country.
Efficient public services contribute to a better quality of life.
Public services in rural areas often lag behind those in cities.
extraExampleTranslations: Davlat xizmatlariga kutubxonalar, bog'lar va jamoat transporti kiradi.
Davlat xizmatlari sifati ko'pincha fuqarolarning hukumatdan mamnuniyatini belgilaydi.
Moliyalashtirish etarli bo'lmagan davlat xizmatlari o'sib borayotgan talabni qondira olmaydi.
Davlat xizmatlarini xususiylashtirish ba'zan kambag'al jamoalar uchun kirishni cheklashi mumkin.
Yangi hukumat mamlakat bo'ylab davlat xizmatlarini yaxshilashga va'da berdi.
Samarali davlat xizmatlari hayot sifatini yaxshilashga hissa qo'shadi.
Qishloq hududlaridagi davlat xizmatlari ko'pincha shaharlardagidan orqada qoladi.

words.definition: Government expenditure allocated to the military, national security, and armed forces.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning harbiy kuchlar va milliy xavfsizlikni ta'minlash uchun sarflaydigan puli.
words.example1: Defense spending accounts for a large portion of the national budget.
words.example1Translation: Mudofaa xarajatlari milliy byudjetning katta qismini tashkil etadi.
words.example2: The government increased defense spending in response to regional tensions.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat mintaqaviy keskinliklarga javob sifatida mudofaa xarajatlarini oshirdi.
words.example3: Some argue that reducing defense spending could free up funds for social programs.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zilar mudofaa xarajatlarini kamaytirish ijtimoiy dasturlar uchun mablag'larni bo'shatishi mumkin, deb ta'kidlaydi.
extraExamples: Defense spending includes salaries, equipment, and research.
NATO members are expected to meet a target for defense spending.
Rising defense spending raised concerns about the national debt.
Critics called for more transparency in how defense spending is used.
Defense spending declined after the end of the Cold War.
The defense spending bill was passed with bipartisan support.
Modern defense spending increasingly focuses on cybersecurity.
extraExampleTranslations: Mudofaa xarajatlari maoshlar, uskunalar va tadqiqotlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
NATO a'zolaridan mudofaa xarajatlari uchun maqsadga erishishlari kutiladi.
Mudofaa xarajatlarining o'sishi milliy qarz haqida tashvishlarni oshirdi.
Tanqidchilar mudofaa xarajatlaridan qanday foydalanilayotganiga ko'proq shaffoflik talab qildi.
Sovuq urush tugaganidan so'ng mudofaa xarajatlari kamaydi.
Mudofaa xarajatlari to'g'risidagi qonun ikki partiyaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash bilan qabul qilindi.
Zamonaviy mudofaa xarajatlari tobora kiber xavfsizlikka e'tibor qaratmoqda.

words.definition: Government policies that reduce public spending and increase taxes in order to decrease budget deficits.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning byudjet taqchilligini kamaytirish uchun xarajatlarni kesish va soliqlarni oshirish siyosati.
words.example1: Austerity measures were introduced to bring the budget deficit under control.
words.example1Translation: Byudjet taqchilligini nazorat ostiga olish uchun tejamkorlik choralari joriy etildi.
words.example2: Citizens protested against the austerity measures that cut public services.
words.example2Translation: Fuqarolar davlat xizmatlarini qisqartirgan tejamkorlik choralariga qarshi norozilik bildirdi.
words.example3: The IMF recommended austerity measures as a condition for financial assistance.
words.example3Translation: XVF moliyaviy yordam sharti sifatida tejamkorlik choralarini tavsiya qildi.
extraExamples: Austerity measures often lead to social unrest and protests.
The government implemented austerity measures to qualify for an international loan.
Healthcare and education were hit hardest by the austerity measures.
Economists disagree on whether austerity measures help or harm recovery.
Austerity measures reduced public sector wages significantly.
The political party lost support after imposing harsh austerity measures.
Years of austerity measures left the public infrastructure in poor condition.
extraExampleTranslations: Tejamkorlik choralari ko'pincha ijtimoiy tartibsizlik va norozilik namoyishlariga olib keladi.
Hukumat xalqaro kredit olish uchun tejamkorlik choralarini amalga oshirdi.
Sog'liqni saqlash va ta'lim tejamkorlik choralaridan eng ko'p zarar ko'rdi.
Iqtisodchilar tejamkorlik choralarining tiklanishga yordam beradimi yoki zarar etiziladimi degan masalada kelisha olmaydi.
Tejamkorlik choralari davlat sektori maoshlarini sezilarli darajada kamaytirdi.
Siyosiy partiya qattiq tejamkorlik choralarini qo'llaganidan so'ng qo'llab-quvvatlashini yo'qotdi.
Ko'p yillik tejamkorlik choralari davlat infratuzilmasini yomon holatda qoldirdi.

words.definition: The income that a government receives, mainly through taxation and other sources such as fees and fines.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning asosan soliqlar va boshqa manbalardan — to'lovlar, jarimalарdan — oladigan puli.
words.example1: Government revenue fell sharply during the economic crisis.
words.example1Translation: Iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida hukumat daromadi keskin kamaydi.
words.example2: Increasing revenue through new taxes helped close the budget deficit.
words.example2Translation: Yangi soliqlar orqali daromadni oshirish byudjet taqchilligini yopishga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Oil exports are the main source of revenue for many Gulf countries.
words.example3Translation: Neft eksporti ko'p Fors ko'rfazi mamlakatlarining asosiy daromad manbaidir.
extraExamples: The government predicted higher revenue following the economic recovery.
Revenue from tourism declined significantly during the pandemic.
Efficient tax collection is essential for maximizing government revenue.
Revenue and expenditure must be balanced for a healthy budget.
The government diversified its revenue sources to reduce dependence on oil.
Lower corporate taxes temporarily reduced government revenue.
Revenue projections for the next fiscal year were revised upward.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat iqtisodiy tiklannishdan so'ng daromadning ko'payishini bashorat qildi.
Pandемiya davrida turizmdan keladigan daromad sezilarli darajada kamaydi.
Samarali soliq yig'ish hukumat daromadlarini maksimal darajada oshirish uchun muhimdir.
Daromad va xarajatlar sog'lom byudjet uchun muvozanatda bo'lishi kerak.
Hukumat neftga bog'liqlikni kamaytirish uchun daromad manbalarini diversifikatsiya qildi.
Past korporativ soliqlar vaqtinchalik hukumat daromadini kamaytirdi.
Keyingi moliya yili uchun daromad prognozlari yuqoriga qarab ko'rib chiqildi.

words.definition: The practice of directing government funds toward the most critical and important areas before others.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatning eng muhim sohalarga boshqalardan oldin mablag' ajratish amaliyoti.
words.example1: Education and healthcare are often considered priority spending areas.
words.example1Translation: Ta'lim va sog'liqni saqlash ko'pincha ustuvor xarajat sohalari hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The government outlined its priority spending ahead of the new fiscal year.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat yangi moliya yili oldidan ustuvor xarajatlarini belgilab berdi.
words.example3: During a crisis, priority spending shifts toward emergency response and welfare.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz davrida ustuvor xarajatlar favqulodda yordam va ijtimoiy ta'minotga o'tadi.
extraExamples: Priority spending decisions reflect the government's core values and goals.
The opposition demanded that housing be added to priority spending.
Priority spending on infrastructure laid the foundation for future growth.
Limited budgets force governments to make difficult priority spending choices.
Public debate influenced the government's priority spending decisions.
Priority spending on digital technology improved public service delivery.
The annual budget clearly defined the government's priority spending categories.
extraExampleTranslations: Ustuvor xarajatlar bo'yicha qarorlar hukumatning asosiy qadriyatlari va maqsadlarini aks ettiradi.
Muxolifat uy-joyni ustuvor xarajatlarga qo'shishni talab qildi.
Infratuzilmaga ustuvor xarajatlar kelajak o'sishining poydevorini yaratdi.
Cheklangan byudjetlar hukumatlarni murakkab ustuvor xarajatlar tanlovini qilishga majbur qiladi.
Jamoat munozarasi hukumatning ustuvor xarajatlar bo'yicha qarorlariga ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
Raqamli texnologiyalarga ustuvor xarajatlar davlat xizmatlarini yetkazib berishni yaxshiladi.
Yillik byudjet hukumatning ustuvor xarajatlar toifalarini aniq belgilab berdi.

words.definition: A diet that includes a variety of foods in the right proportions to provide all essential nutrients the body needs.
words.definitionUz: Tanaga kerakli barcha oziq moddalarni to'g'ri miqdorda ta'minlaydigan, turli xil ovqatlardan iborat ovqatlanish tarzi.
words.example1: A balanced diet includes proteins, carbohydrates, fats, vitamins, and minerals.
words.example1Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish oqsillar, uglevodlar, yog'lar, vitaminlar va minerallarni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: Her doctor advised her to follow a balanced diet to improve her energy levels.
words.example2Translation: Uning shifokori energiya darajasini oshirish uchun muvozanatli ovqatlanishga amal qilishni maslahat berdi.
words.example3: Children who eat a balanced diet tend to perform better at school.
words.example3Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanadigan bolalar maktabda yaxshiroq o'zlashtiradi.
extraExamples: A balanced diet is the foundation of a healthy lifestyle.
He struggled to maintain a balanced diet while traveling for work.
Nutritionists recommend building a balanced diet around whole foods.
A balanced diet doesn't mean you can never enjoy treats.
The school introduced a program to teach kids about a balanced diet.
She replaced fast food with home-cooked meals to achieve a balanced diet.
A balanced diet combined with regular exercise can prevent many diseases.
extraExampleTranslations: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish sog'lom hayot tarzining asosi hisoblanadi.
U ish uchun sayohat qilar ekan, muvozanatli ovqatlanishni saqlashda qiynaldi.
Mutaxassislar muvozanatli ovqatlanishni tabiiy mahsulotlar asosida qurishni tavsiya etadi.
Muvozanatli ovqatlanish hech qachon mazali narsalardan voz kechish degani emas.
Maktab bolalarga muvozanatli ovqatlanishni o'rgatish dasturini joriy etdi.
U muvozanatli ovqatlanishga erishish uchun tez ovqatni uy taomlariga almashtirdi.
Muvozanatli ovqatlanish muntazam jismoniy mashq bilan birgalikda ko'plab kasalliklarning oldini olishi mumkin.

words.definition: Foods that have been altered from their natural state through methods such as canning, freezing, or adding preservatives and artificial ingredients.
words.definitionUz: Tabiiy holatidan o'zgartirilgan, konservalash, muzlatish yoki sun'iy qo'shimchalar qo'shish yo'li bilan tayyorlangan oziq-ovqat mahsulotlari.
words.example1: Processed foods like chips and instant noodles are convenient but low in nutrition.
words.example1Translation: Chips va lahzali noodle kabi qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlar qulay, ammo oziq-ovqat qiymati past.
words.example2: Many processed foods contain high levels of salt, sugar, and artificial additives.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlarda tuz, shakar va sun'iy qo'shimchalar miqdori yuqori bo'ladi.
words.example3: Doctors warn that eating too many processed foods increases the risk of heart disease.
words.example3Translation: Shifokorlar haddan ziyod qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqat iste'mol qilish yurak kasalliklari xavfini oshirishini ogohlantirishadi.
extraExamples: He tried to cut down on processed foods by cooking fresh meals at home.
Processed foods often have a much longer shelf life than natural products.
Reading labels carefully helps you identify how processed a food product is.
Many families rely on processed foods because they are affordable and quick to prepare.
The government launched a campaign to reduce children's consumption of processed foods.
Processed foods may taste good, but they often lack essential vitamins and minerals.
Replacing processed foods with fresh fruits and vegetables improved her health significantly.
extraExampleTranslations: U uyda yangi taomlar pishirish orqali qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlarni kamaytirishga harakat qildi.
Qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlar ko'pincha tabiiy mahsulotlarga qaraganda ancha uzoq saqlanadi.
Etiketlarni diqqat bilan o'qish mahsulotning qanchalik qayta ishlanganligini aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Ko'p oilalar arzon va tez tayyorlanadigan bo'lgani uchun qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlarga tayanadi.
Hukumat bolalar orasida qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqat iste'molini kamaytirish uchun kampaniya boshladi.
Qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlar mazali bo'lishi mumkin, lekin ularda ko'pincha zaruriy vitaminlar va minerallar yetishmaydi.
Qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqatlarni yangi mevalar va sabzavotlar bilan almashtirish uning sog'lig'ini sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.

words.definition: The condition in which all people have consistent access to enough safe and nutritious food to maintain a healthy and active life.
words.definitionUz: Barcha odamlarning sog'lom va faol hayot kechirishi uchun yetarli, xavfsiz va foydali oziq-ovqatga doim erisha olish holati.
words.example1: Food security remains a major challenge in many developing countries.
words.example1Translation: Oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi ko'plab rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda hali ham katta muammo bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example2: Climate change is threatening food security by disrupting crop production worldwide.
words.example2Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi butun dunyo bo'ylab ekin ishlab chiqarishni buzib, oziq-ovqat xavfsizligiga tahdid solmoqda.
words.example3: The government invested in local farming to strengthen national food security.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat milliy oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini mustahkamlash uchun mahalliy dehqonchilikka sarmoya kiritdi.
extraExamples: Conflict and poverty are the leading causes of food insecurity around the world.
Aid organizations work to improve food security in regions affected by drought.
Urban farming projects are helping cities improve their food security.
Food security is not just about quantity — the quality of food matters too.
Women play a crucial role in maintaining food security in rural communities.
The United Nations tracks food security levels across different countries every year.
Improving food security requires cooperation between governments, farmers, and international agencies.
extraExampleTranslations: Mojarolar va qashshoqlik dunyo bo'ylab oziq-ovqat xavfsizligiga tahdidning asosiy sabablari hisoblanadi.
Yordam tashkilotlari qurg'oqchilikdan zararlangan hududlarda oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini yaxshilash uchun ishlaydi.
Shaharlardagi dehqonchilik loyihalari shaharlarning oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini oshirishga yordam bermoqda.
Oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi faqat miqdor haqida emas — oziq-ovqat sifati ham muhim.
Qishloq jamoalarida ayollar oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini ta'minlashda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Birlashgan Millatlar Tashkiloti har yili turli mamlakatlardagi oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi darajasini kuzatib boradi.
Oziq-ovqat xavfsizligini yaxshilash hukumatlar, dehqonlar va xalqaro tashkilotlar o'rtasidagi hamkorlikni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Farming practices that produce food efficiently while preserving the environment and natural resources for future generations.
words.definitionUz: Atrof-muhitni va tabiiy resurslarni kelajak avlodlar uchun saqlab qolgan holda samarali oziq-ovqat ishlab chiqaradigan dehqonchilik usullari.
words.example1: Sustainable agriculture focuses on protecting soil health and water resources.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi tuproq sog'lig'i va suv resurslarini himoya qilishga e'tibor qaratadi.
words.example2: Many farmers are switching to sustainable agriculture to reduce their environmental impact.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab dehqonlar atrof-muhitga ta'sirini kamaytirish uchun barqaror qishloq xo'jaligiga o'tmoqda.
words.example3: Sustainable agriculture techniques include crop rotation and the use of natural fertilizers.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi usullari ekin almashlash va tabiiy o'g'itlar ishlatishni o'z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: Sustainable agriculture helps reduce greenhouse gas emissions from farming activities.
Governments are offering subsidies to farmers who adopt sustainable agriculture methods.
Sustainable agriculture balances the need for food production with environmental responsibility.
Water conservation is a key principle of sustainable agriculture.
Small-scale farmers in rural areas are leading the way in sustainable agriculture.
Sustainable agriculture can help communities become more resilient to climate change.
Research institutions are developing new technologies to support sustainable agriculture.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi dehqonchilik faoliyatidan kelib chiqadigan issiqxona gazlari emissiyasini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Hukumatlar barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi usullarini qo'llagan dehqonlarga subsidiyalar taklif etmoqda.
Barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi oziq-ovqat ishlab chiqarish ehtiyoji bilan atrof-muhitga mas'uliyatni muvozanatlaydi.
Suvni tejash barqaror qishloq xo'jaligining asosiy tamoyili hisoblanadi.
Qishloq hududlaridagi mayda dehqonlar barqaror qishloq xo'jaligida yo'l ochmoqda.
Barqaror qishloq xo'jaligi jamoalarning iqlim o'zgarishiga chidamliroq bo'lishiga yordam berishi mumkin.
Ilmiy muassasalar barqaror qishloq xo'jaligini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun yangi texnologiyalar ishlab chiqmoqda.

words.definition: Foods produced from plants or animals whose genetic material has been artificially altered to introduce new traits such as pest resistance or faster growth.
words.definitionUz: O'simlik yoki hayvonlarning genetik materiali sun'iy ravishda o'zgartirilib, zararkunandaga chidamlilik yoki tezroq o'sish kabi yangi xususiyatlar kiritilgan oziq-ovqat mahsulotlari.
words.example1: GM foods are designed to be more resistant to diseases and environmental stress.
words.example1Translation: GM oziq-ovqatlar kasalliklarga va atrof-muhit ta'siriga chidamliroq bo'lish uchun yaratilgan.
words.example2: The safety of genetically modified foods is still debated among scientists and consumers.
words.example2Translation: Genetik jihatdan o'zgartirilgan oziq-ovqatlarning xavfsizligi hali ham olimlar va iste'molchilar orasida bahsli masala.
words.example3: Some countries require clear labeling on all genetically modified food products.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi mamlakatlar barcha genetik jihatdan o'zgartirilgan oziq-ovqat mahsulotlarida aniq belgilash qo'yishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: GM crops are often engineered to produce higher yields than traditional varieties.
Many people remain skeptical about eating genetically modified foods.
Supporters of GM foods argue they could help solve world hunger.
Critics worry that GM foods may have unknown long-term effects on health.
The first commercially grown GM food was the Flavr Savr tomato in the 1990s.
GM foods have been a topic of intense debate in the European Union for decades.
Some GM crops are modified to contain higher amounts of vitamins and minerals.
extraExampleTranslations: GM ekinlar ko'pincha an'anaviy navlarga qaraganda yuqori hosil berish uchun yaratiladi.
Ko'plab odamlar genetik jihatdan o'zgartirilgan oziq-ovqatlarni iste'mol qilishdan hali ham shubhalanadi.
GM oziq-ovqatlarni qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar ular dunyo ochligini hal qilishga yordam berishi mumkin deb ta'kidlaydi.
Tanqidchilar GM oziq-ovqatlar salomatlikka noma'lum uzoq muddatli ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkinligidan tashvishlanadi.
Tijorat maqsadida yetishtirilgan birinchi GM oziq-ovqat 1990-yillarda Flavr Savr pomidori edi.
GM oziq-ovqatlar o'n yillar davomida Yevropa Ittifoqida katta bahs mavzusi bo'lib kelgan.
Ba'zi GM ekinlar yuqori miqdorda vitaminlar va minerallar o'z ichiga olishi uchun o'zgartiriladi.

words.definition: A method of farming that avoids synthetic chemicals, pesticides, and fertilizers, relying instead on natural processes and materials to grow food.
words.definitionUz: Oziq-ovqat yetishtirish uchun sun'iy kimyoviy moddalar, pestitsidlar va o'g'itlardan qochib, buning o'rniga tabiiy jarayonlar va materiallardan foydalanadigan dehqonchilik usuli.
words.example1: Organic farming relies on compost and crop rotation instead of chemical fertilizers.
words.example1Translation: Organik dehqonchilik kimyoviy o'g'itlar o'rniga kompost va ekin almashtirishga tayanadi.
words.example2: Consumers often pay more for organic farming products because of the higher production costs.
words.example2Translation: Iste'molchilar ko'pincha organik dehqonchilik mahsulotlari uchun yuqori ishlab chiqarish xarajatlari sababli ko'proq to'laydi.
words.example3: Organic farming is considered better for biodiversity and soil health.
words.example3Translation: Organik dehqonchilik biologik xilma-xillik va tuproq salomatligi uchun yaxshiroq deb hisoblanadi.
extraExamples: The demand for organic farming products has grown significantly over the past decade.
Organic farming prohibits the use of genetically modified seeds.
She started an organic farming business after learning about the dangers of pesticides.
Organic farming methods can help protect nearby rivers and streams from chemical runoff.
Many supermarkets now dedicate entire sections to products from organic farming.
Organic farming requires more land and labor than conventional farming methods.
Supporters of organic farming believe it produces healthier and tastier food.
extraExampleTranslations: O'tgan o'n yil ichida organik dehqonchilik mahsulotlariga talab sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Organik dehqonchilik genetik jihatdan o'zgartirilgan urug'lardan foydalanishni taqiqlaydi.
U pestitsidlar xavfi haqida bilib olgach, organik dehqonchilik biznesini boshladi.
Organik dehqonchilik usullari yaqin joylashgan daryo va soylarni kimyoviy oqimdan himoya qilishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Ko'plab supermarketlar endi organik dehqonchilik mahsulotlariga butun bo'limlar ajratmoqda.
Organik dehqonchilik an'anaviy dehqonchilik usullariga qaraganda ko'proq er va mehnat talab qiladi.
Organik dehqonchilikni qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar u yanada sog'lom va mazoroq oziq-ovqat ishlab chiqarishiga ishonadi.

words.definition: A condition resulting from an unbalanced diet — either lacking essential nutrients, consuming too many calories, or having an improper ratio of nutrients.
words.definitionUz: Noto'g'ri ovqatlanish natijasida yuzaga keladigan holat — zarur oziq moddalarning yetishmasligi, haddan ziyod kaloriya iste'mol qilish yoki oziq moddalar nisbatining buzilishi.
words.example1: Malnutrition is a serious health problem affecting millions of children worldwide.
words.example1Translation: Oziqlanish buzilishi dunyo bo'ylab millionlab bolalarga ta'sir qiluvchi jiddiy salomatlik muammosidir.
words.example2: Even people who eat plenty of food can suffer from malnutrition if their diet lacks key nutrients.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p ovqat yeydigan odamlar ham, agar ovqatlanishida asosiy oziq moddalar yetishmasa, oziqlanish buzilishidan aziyat chekishi mumkin.
words.example3: Relief organizations distribute fortified food packages to combat malnutrition in crisis zones.
words.example3Translation: Yordam tashkilotlari inqiroz hududlarida oziqlanish buzilishiga qarshi kurashish uchun boyitilgan oziq-ovqat paketlarini tarqatadi.
extraExamples: Malnutrition during childhood can lead to long-term developmental problems.
The clinic treated dozens of cases of malnutrition caused by extreme poverty.
Malnutrition is not limited to developing countries — it also affects wealthy nations.
Iron deficiency is one of the most common forms of malnutrition globally.
Raising awareness about malnutrition is the first step toward solving it.
Malnutrition weakens the immune system, making people more vulnerable to illness.
The government introduced school feeding programs to address malnutrition among children.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalik davrida oziqlanish buzilishi uzoq muddatli rivojlanish muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Klinika haddan tashqari qashshoqlikdan kelib chiqqan oziqlanish buzilishining o'nlab holatlarini davoladi.
Oziqlanish buzilishi faqat rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar bilan cheklanmagan — u boy davlatlarga ham ta'sir qiladi.
Temir tanqisligi dunyo bo'ylab oziqlanish buzilishining eng keng tarqalgan shakllaridan biri hisoblanadi.
Oziqlanish buzilishi haqida xabardorlikni oshirish uni hal qilishning birinchi qadamidir.
Oziqlanish buzilishi immunitetni zaiflashtirib, odamlarni kasalliklarga ko'proq moyil qiladi.
Hukumat bolalar orasida oziqlanish buzilishini bartaraf etish uchun maktab ovqatlantirish dasturlarini joriy qildi.

words.definition: The distance food travels from where it is produced or grown to where it is finally purchased and consumed by the customer.
words.definitionUz: Oziq-ovqatning ishlab chiqarilgan yoki yetishtirilgan joyidan iste'molchi tomonidan sotib olingan va iste'mol qilingan joyigacha bosib o'tgan masofasi.
words.example1: Buying locally grown produce reduces food miles and lowers carbon emissions.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy yetishtirilgan mahsulotlarni sotib olish oziq-ovqat masofasini kamaytiradi va uglerod emissiyasini pasaytiradi.
words.example2: Some fruits in supermarkets have food miles of thousands of kilometers.
words.example2Translation: Supermarketlardagi ba'zi mevalar ming kilometrlik oziq-ovqat masofasiga ega.
words.example3: Consumers are becoming more aware of food miles when making grocery choices.
words.example3Translation: Iste'molchilar oziq-ovqat xarid qilishda oziq-ovqat masofasidan tobora ko'proq xabardor bo'lmoqda.
extraExamples: High food miles contribute to greater fuel consumption and air pollution.
The concept of food miles encourages people to shop at local farmers' markets.
Reducing food miles is seen as one way to make food systems more sustainable.
Some activists argue that food miles alone don't tell the full environmental story.
Imported tropical fruits naturally come with much higher food miles than local produce.
The restaurant proudly advertises that all its ingredients have low food miles.
Food miles became a popular term in the environmental movement during the 1990s.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori oziq-ovqat masofasi ko'proq yonilg'i sarflanishi va havo ifloslanishiga olib keladi.
Oziq-ovqat masofasi tushunchasi odamlarni mahalliy dehqonlar bozorida xarid qilishga undaydi.
Oziq-ovqat masofasini kamaytirish oziq-ovqat tizimlarini yanada barqaror qilishning bir usuli sifatida ko'riladi.
Ba'zi faollar oziq-ovqat masofasining o'zi to'liq ekologik manzarani ko'rsatmasligini ta'kidlaydi.
Import qilingan tropik mevalar mahalliy mahsulotlarga qaraganda ancha yuqori oziq-ovqat masofasiga ega.
Restoran barcha ingredientlarining past oziq-ovqat masofasiga ega ekanligini maqtanib e'lon qiladi.
Oziq-ovqat masofasi 1990-yillarda ekologik harakat doirasida mashhur atamaga aylandi.

words.definition: The regular patterns and routines a person follows in choosing what, when, and how much to eat over time.
words.definitionUz: Odamning vaqt o'tishi bilan nima, qachon va qancha yeyishni tanlashda amal qiladigan muntazam naqshlar va odatlar.
words.example1: Poor dietary habits formed in childhood can be difficult to change in adulthood.
words.example1Translation: Bolalikda shakllangan yomon ovqatlanish odatlarini kattalikda o'zgartirish qiyin bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example2: Her dietary habits changed significantly after she was diagnosed with diabetes.
words.example2Translation: Uning ovqatlanish odatlari diabet tashxisi qo'yilgandan keyin sezilarli darajada o'zgardi.
words.example3: Cultural traditions strongly influence the dietary habits of people around the world.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy an'analar dunyo bo'ylab odamlarning ovqatlanish odatlariga kuchli ta'sir ko'rsatadi.
extraExamples: Tracking your dietary habits with a food journal can reveal patterns you hadn't noticed.
Busy work schedules often lead to unhealthy dietary habits like skipping breakfast.
His dietary habits improved after he started meal prepping on Sundays.
Researchers studied the dietary habits of people who lived past one hundred years.
Advertising plays a significant role in shaping children's dietary habits.
Improving your dietary habits gradually is more effective than making sudden drastic changes.
Social media trends have begun influencing the dietary habits of younger generations.
extraExampleTranslations: Ovqatlanish jurnali orqali ovqatlanish odatlaringizni kuzatish ilgari sezmagan naqshlaringizni aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Bandlik jadvallari ko'pincha nonushta o'tkazib yuborish kabi noto'g'ri ovqatlanish odatlariga olib keladi.
Uning ovqatlanish odatlari yakshanba kunlari ovqat tayyorlashni boshlaganidan keyin yaxshilandi.
Tadqiqotchilar yuz yoshdan oshib yashagan odamlarning ovqatlanish odatlarini o'rganishdi.
Reklama bolalarning ovqatlanish odatlarini shakllantirishda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Ovqatlanish odatlaringizni asta-sekin yaxshilash keskin o'zgarishlarga qaraganda samaraliroq.
Ijtimoiy media tendensiyalari yosh avlodning ovqatlanish odatlariga ta'sir ko'rsata boshladi.

words.definition: Food that is thrown away, lost, or left uneaten at any stage from production and processing to retail and consumption.
words.definitionUz: Ishlab chiqarish va qayta ishlashdan boshlab savdo va iste'mol bosqichigacha bo'lgan har qanday bosqichda tashlab yuborilgan, yo'qolgan yoki yeylmagan oziq-ovqat.
words.example1: Food waste is a major environmental issue, as rotting food produces greenhouse gases.
words.example1Translation: Oziq-ovqat isrof qilish katta ekologik muammo, chunki chirib ketgan oziq-ovqat issiqxona gazlari chiqaradi.
words.example2: Supermarkets throw away huge amounts of food waste every day due to strict appearance standards.
words.example2Translation: Supermarketlar qat'iy tashqi ko'rinish standartlari sababli har kuni katta miqdorda oziq-ovqatni tashlab yuboradi.
words.example3: Planning meals in advance is one of the simplest ways to reduce household food waste.
words.example3Translation: Ovqatlarni oldindan rejalashtirish uy oziq-ovqat isrofini kamaytirish uchun eng oddiy usullardan biri.
extraExamples: Around one third of all food produced globally ends up as food waste.
Restaurants have started donating leftover food to shelters instead of discarding it.
Reducing food waste could significantly help lower global carbon emissions.
Many people don't realize how much food waste they generate at home each week.
Apps have been developed to connect consumers with discounted food that would otherwise become waste.
Food waste often happens because people buy more than they need at the supermarket.
Composting is an effective way to manage food waste and enrich garden soil.
extraExampleTranslations: Dunyo bo'ylab ishlab chiqarilgan barcha oziq-ovqatlarning taxminan uchdan bir qismi oziq-ovqat chiqindisiga aylanadi.
Restoranlar ortiqcha ovqatlarni yo'q qilish o'rniga boshpanalarga topshirishni boshladi.
Oziq-ovqat isrofini kamaytirish global uglerod emissiyasini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Ko'p odamlar har hafta uyda qancha oziq-ovqat isrof qilishlarini tushunmaydi.
Iste'molchilarni aks holda chiqindiga aylanadigan chegirmali oziq-ovqat bilan bog'lash uchun ilovalar ishlab chiqilgan.
Oziq-ovqat isrofi ko'pincha odamlar supermarketda keragidan ko'proq sotib olganligi sababli yuzaga keladi.
Kompostlash oziq-ovqat chiqindisini boshqarish va bog' tuproqini boyitishning samarali usuli.

words.definition: The measure of how much essential nutrients — such as proteins, vitamins, minerals, and calories — a food contains relative to its portion size.
words.definitionUz: Oziq-ovqatning o'z hajmiga nisbatan oqsillar, vitaminlar, minerallar va kaloriyalar kabi zaruriy oziq moddalarni qancha miqdorda o'z ichiga olishining ko'rsatkichi.
words.example1: Fresh vegetables generally have a higher nutritional value than canned versions.
words.example1Translation: Yangi sabzavotlar odatda konservalangan variantlarga qaraganda yuqori oziqlik qiymatiga ega.
words.example2: The nutritional value of a meal decreases when food is overcooked.
words.example2Translation: Oziq-ovqat haddan ziyod pishirilganda taomning oziqlik qiymati kamayadi.
words.example3: Parents should consider the nutritional value of snacks they give their children.
words.example3Translation: Ota-onalar farzandlariga beradigan gazaklarning oziqlik qiymatini hisobga olishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Food labels list the nutritional value per serving to help consumers make informed choices.
Boiling vegetables for too long can reduce their nutritional value.
Whole grains have a higher nutritional value than refined white flour products.
The nutritional value of fast food is generally considered very low.
Athletes pay close attention to the nutritional value of everything they eat.
Nutritional value alone doesn't determine whether a food is good or bad for you.
She compared the nutritional value of different breakfast cereals before choosing one.
extraExampleTranslations: Oziq-ovqat yorliqlari iste'molchilarga ongli tanlov qilishga yordam berish uchun har bir porsiya oziqlik qiymatini ko'rsatadi.
Sabzavotlarni uzoq vaqt qaynatish ularning oziqlik qiymatini kamaytirishi mumkin.
To'liq donli mahsulotlar tozalangan oq un mahsulotlariga qaraganda yuqori oziqlik qiymatiga ega.
Tez ovqatning oziqlik qiymati odatda juda past deb hisoblanadi.
Sportchilar iste'mol qiladigan har bir narsaning oziqlik qiymatiga katta e'tibor berishadi.
Oziqlik qiymati o'zi oziq-ovqatning siz uchun yaxshi yoki yomonligini aniqlamaydi.
U birini tanlashdan oldin turli nonushta donlarining oziqlik qiymatini taqqosladi.

words.definition: A social movement that encourages people to eat food that is grown, raised, or produced within their local region, typically within a defined radius.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarni o'z mahalliy hududlarida, odatda ma'lum bir masofa doirasida yetishtirilgan, o'stirilgan yoki ishlab chiqarilgan oziq-ovqatlarni iste'mol qilishga undaydigan ijtimoiy harakat.
words.example1: The locavore movement encourages people to shop at farmers' markets and buy seasonal produce.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati odamlarni dehqonlar bozorida xarid qilish va mavsumsabzavotlar sotib olishga undaydi.
words.example2: Followers of the locavore movement believe local food is fresher and more environmentally friendly.
words.example2Translation: Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati tarafdorlari mahalliy oziq-ovqat yangirog'va atrof-muhit uchun maqbulroq deb hisoblaydi.
words.example3: The locavore movement has inspired many restaurants to source their ingredients from nearby farms.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati ko'plab restoranlarni ingredientlarini yaqin atrofdagi fermerlardan olishga ilhomlantirdi.
extraExamples: The locavore movement gained mainstream attention after the term was coined in 2005.
Some participants in the locavore movement only eat food produced within 100 miles of their home.
The locavore movement supports small-scale farmers and strengthens local economies.
Critics of the locavore movement argue it can be expensive and impractical in cities.
The locavore movement has led to a boom in community gardens across urban areas.
Schools joining the locavore movement now serve locally sourced meals in their cafeterias.
The locavore movement connects people more closely to where their food comes from.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati 2005-yilda atama o'ylab topilgandan keyin keng omma e'tiborini qozondi.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakatining ba'zi ishtirokchilari faqat uylaridan 100 mil uzoqlikda ishlab chiqarilgan oziq-ovqatlarni iste'mol qiladi.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati mayda fermerlarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi va mahalliy iqtisodiyotlarni mustahkamlaydi.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakatining tanqidchilari u shaharlarda qimmat va amaliy bo'lmasligi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati shahar hududlarida jamoat bog'lari ko'payishiga olib keldi.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harekatiga qo'shilgan maktablar endi oshxonalarida mahalliy manbali taomlar tortmoqda.
Mahalliy oziq-ovqat harakati odamlarni oziq-ovqatlarining qayerdan kelishiga yaqinroq bog'laydi.

words.definition: The process of providing written information on food packaging about ingredients, nutritional content, allergens, expiry dates, and other relevant details.
words.definitionUz: Oziq-ovqat qadoqlarida tarkib, oziqlik qiymati, allergiya sabobchilari, yaroqlilik muddati va boshqa muhim ma'lumotlarni yozma ravishda taqdim etish jarayoni.
words.example1: Accurate food labeling helps consumers make healthier and more informed choices.
words.example1Translation: To'g'ri oziq-ovqat etiketkalash iste'molchilarga yanada sog'lomroq va ongli tanlovlar qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many countries have strict laws requiring food labeling to include allergen warnings.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab mamlakatlarda oziq-ovqat etiketkalashda allergen ogohlantirishlarini kiritishni talab qiluvchi qat'iy qonunlar mavjud.
words.example3: She always checks food labeling carefully because she has a gluten intolerance.
words.example3Translation: U gluten toqatsizligi borligi uchun har doim oziq-ovqat etiketkalashini diqqat bilan tekshiradi.
extraExamples: Food labeling regulations vary significantly from one country to another.
Some companies use misleading food labeling to make their products appear healthier than they are.
Traffic light food labeling uses colors to show whether a product is high in fat or sugar.
Clear food labeling is especially important for people with serious food allergies.
Campaigners are pushing for mandatory calorie counts in restaurant food labeling.
The introduction of clearer food labeling helped reduce confusion among shoppers.
Food labeling must also include storage instructions and best-before dates.
extraExampleTranslations: Oziq-ovqat etiketkalash qoidalari bir mamlakatdan boshqasiga sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
Ba'zi kompaniyalar mahsulotlarini haqiqatdan ko'ra sog'lomroq ko'rsatish uchun chalg'ituvchi oziq-ovqat etiketkalashidan foydalanadi.
Svetofor oziq-ovqat etiketkalash mahsulotning yog' yoki shakar miqdori yuqori yoki yo'qligini ko'rsatish uchun ranglardan foydalanadi.
Aniq oziq-ovqat etiketkalash ayniqsa jiddiy oziq-ovqat allergiyasi bor odamlar uchun muhim.
Kampaniyachilar restoran oziq-ovqat etiketkalashida majburiy kaloriya miqdori ko'rsatilishini talab qilmoqda.
Yanada aniqroq oziq-ovqat etiketkalash joriy qilinishi xaridorlar orasida chalkashlikni kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
Oziq-ovqat etiketkalash saqlash ko'rsatmalarini va eng yaxshi iste'mol qilish muddatini ham o'z ichiga olishi kerak.

words.definition: A diet that is centered around foods derived from plants, including vegetables, fruits, grains, nuts, and legumes, with little or no animal products.
words.definitionUz: Sabzavotlar, mevalar, don mahsulotlari, yong'oqlar va dukkaklilar kabi o'simliklardan olingan oziq-ovqatlarga asoslangan, ozroq yoki umuman hayvon mahsulotlarisiz ovqatlanish tarzi.
words.example1: A plant-based diet has been linked to a lower risk of heart disease and diabetes.
words.example1Translation: O'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanish yurak kasalliklari va diabet xavfining pastligi bilan bog'liq.
words.example2: She adopted a plant-based diet after watching a documentary about factory farming.
words.example2Translation: U zavodlardagi chorvachilik haqidagi hujjatli filmni ko'rib, o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishga o'tdi.
words.example3: Many athletes are now following a plant-based diet to improve their performance and recovery.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab sportchilar endi o'z natijalarini va tiklanishini yaxshilash uchun o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishga amal qilmoqda.
extraExamples: A well-planned plant-based diet can provide all the nutrients the body needs.
The food industry has responded to the trend by creating more plant-based diet products.
Switching to a plant-based diet can significantly reduce your carbon footprint.
A plant-based diet doesn't necessarily mean you have to be vegetarian or vegan.
Some people find it challenging to get enough protein on a plant-based diet.
Restaurants in major cities now commonly offer plant-based diet menu options.
Research shows that communities following a plant-based diet tend to have longer lifespans.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi rejalashtirilgan o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanish tanaga kerakli barcha oziq moddalarni ta'minlashi mumkin.
Oziq-ovqat sanoati ko'proq o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanish mahsulotlarini yaratish orqali ushbu tendentsiyaga javob berdi.
O'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishga o'tish uglerod izingizni sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
O'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanish vegetarian yoki vegan bo'lishingiz kerak degani emas.
Ba'zi odamlar o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishda yetarlicha oqsil olishni qiyin deb topishadi.
Yirik shaharlardagi restoranlar endi odatda o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanish menyu variantlarini taklif etadi.
Tadqiqotlar o'simlikka asoslangan ovqatlanishga amal qiladigan jamoalar umr ko'rish muddati uzunroq bo'lishga moyilligini ko'rsatmoqda.

words.definition: An illness caused by eating food that has been contaminated with harmful bacteria, viruses, parasites, or toxic substances.
words.definitionUz: Zararli bakteriyalar, viruslar, parazitlar yoki zaharli moddalar bilan ifloslangan oziq-ovqatni iste'mol qilish natijasida kelib chiqadigan kasallik.
words.example1: Salmonella and E. coli are common bacteria responsible for foodborne illness.
words.example1Translation: Salmonella va E. coli oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasalliklarning keng tarqalgan sababchisi bo'lgan bakteriyalar.
words.example2: Proper cooking temperatures are essential for preventing foodborne illness.
words.example2Translation: Oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasalliklarning oldini olish uchun to'g'ri pishirish harorati muhim ahamiyatga ega.
words.example3: Hundreds of guests at the wedding suffered from foodborne illness after eating undercooked chicken.
words.example3Translation: To'yda yuzlab mehmonlar yetarlicha pishirilmagan tovuq yegandan keyin oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasallikdan aziyat chekdi.
extraExamples: Washing hands thoroughly before handling food helps prevent foodborne illness.
Foodborne illness outbreaks can affect entire communities if traced to a shared food source.
Refrigerating perishable foods promptly reduces the risk of foodborne illness.
The health department investigated a foodborne illness outbreak linked to a local restaurant.
Symptoms of foodborne illness often include nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps.
Older adults and young children are especially vulnerable to serious foodborne illness.
Cross-contamination in the kitchen is a leading cause of foodborne illness at home.
extraExampleTranslations: Oziq-ovqatni ishlov berishdan oldin qo'llarni yaxshilab yuvish oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasalliklarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Agar umumiy oziq-ovqat manbaiga bogʻliq bo'lsa, oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasallik butun jamoalarga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Tez buziladigan mahsulotlarni darhol muzlatish oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasalliklar xavfini kamaytiradi.
Sog'liqni saqlash bo'limi mahalliy restoran bilan bog'liq oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasallik tarqalishini tekshirdi.
Oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasallik alomatlari ko'pincha ko'ngil aynishi, qusish va qorin og'rig'ini o'z ichiga oladi.
Keksa yoshdagi odamlar va yosh bolalar oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan jiddiy kasalliklarga ayniqsa moyil.
Oshxonada o'zaro ifloslanish uyda oziq-ovqat orqali yuqadigan kasalliklarning asosiy sabablaridan biri.

words.translation: ona oila (ota-ona va farzandlardan iborat oila)
words.definition: A family consisting of only parents and their children.
words.definitionUz: Faqat ota-ona va ularning farzandlaridan iborat oila turi, boshqa qarindoshlar bilan birga yashamaydigan oila.
words.example1: They live in a typical nuclear family with two kids.
words.example1Translation: Ular ikki farzandli oddiy ona oilada yashashadi.
words.example2: In many Western countries, the nuclear family is the most common household structure.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pgina G'arb davlatlarida ona oila eng keng tarqalgan uy xo'jaligi shaklidir.
words.example3: The nuclear family often relies less on relatives for daily support.
words.example3Translation: Ona oila ko'pincha kundalik yordam uchun qarindoshlarga unchalik tayanmaydi.
extraExamples: Sociologists study how the nuclear family has changed over time.
A nuclear family usually includes a mother, father, and their children.
She grew up in a nuclear family, far from her grandparents.
The nuclear family model became popular after industrialization.
Some cultures prefer extended families over the nuclear family.
Their nuclear family moved to a new city for better job opportunities.
The novel portrays the struggles of a modern nuclear family.
extraExampleTranslations: Sotsiologlar ona oila vaqt o'tishi bilan qanday o'zgarganini o'rganishadi.
Ona oila odatda ona, ota va ularning farzandlaridan iborat bo'ladi.
U bobosi va buvisidan uzoqda, ona oilada o'sib ulg'aydi.
Ona oila modeli sanoatlashuvdan keyin mashhur bo'ldi.
Ba'zi madaniyatlarda ona oiladan ko'ra katta oila afzal ko'riladi.
Ularning ona oilasi yaxshiroq ish imkoniyatlari uchun yangi shaharga ko'chib o'tdi.
Roman zamonaviy ona oilaning qiyinchiliklarini tasvirlaydi.

words.definition: Approaches used in raising children, such as authoritative, permissive, or authoritarian.
words.definitionUz: Ota-onalarning farzandlarini tarbiyalashda qo'llaydigan turli usullari va yondashuvlari.
words.example1: Researchers have identified several different parenting styles.
words.example1Translation: Tadqiqotchilar bir nechta turli tarbiya uslublarini aniqlashgan.
words.example2: Parenting styles can have a big impact on a child's confidence.
words.example2Translation: Tarbiya uslublari bolaning o'ziga ishonchiga katta ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin.
words.example3: Their parenting styles were very different, which sometimes caused conflict.
words.example3Translation: Ularning tarbiya uslublari juda farq qilardi, bu esa ba'zan nizolarga sabab bo'lardi.
extraExamples: The book compares different parenting styles across cultures.
Strict parenting styles can sometimes lead to rebellious behavior.
She read several articles about modern parenting styles.
Permissive parenting styles often give children more freedom.
Teachers notice how parenting styles affect classroom behavior.
They attended a workshop on positive parenting styles.
Parenting styles often change as children grow older.
extraExampleTranslations: Kitobda turli madaniyatlardagi tarbiya uslublari solishtiriladi.
Qattiqqo'l tarbiya uslublari ba'zan isyonkor xulq-atvorga olib kelishi mumkin.
U zamonaviy tarbiya uslublari haqida bir nechta maqola o'qidi.
Erkin tarbiya uslublari ko'pincha bolalarga ko'proq erkinlik beradi.
O'qituvchilar tarbiya uslublari sinfdagi xulq-atvorga qanday ta'sir qilishini sezishadi.
Ular ijobiy tarbiya uslublari bo'yicha seminarda qatnashishdi.
Bolalar kattalashgan sari tarbiya uslublari ko'pincha o'zgaradi.

words.definition: The process of raising and caring for children.
words.definitionUz: Bolani parvarish qilish va katta qilish jarayoni.
words.example1: Child-rearing requires a lot of patience and energy.
words.example1Translation: Bola tarbiyasi ko'p sabr va kuch talab qiladi.
words.example2: Their approach to child-rearing focused on independence and responsibility.
words.example2Translation: Ularning bola tarbiyasiga yondashuvi mustaqillik va mas'uliyatga qaratilgan edi.
words.example3: Grandparents often share their views on child-rearing with younger parents.
words.example3Translation: Bobo-buvilar ko'pincha bola tarbiyasi haqidagi fikrlarini yosh ota-onalar bilan baham ko'rishadi.
extraExamples: Child-rearing practices vary widely from one culture to another.
She wrote a book about modern child-rearing techniques.
Good child-rearing involves both love and discipline.
The cost of child-rearing has increased significantly over the years.
They disagreed about certain aspects of child-rearing.
Child-rearing was traditionally seen as the mother's responsibility.
Experts offer advice on effective child-rearing methods.
extraExampleTranslations: Bola tarbiyasi amaliyotlari madaniyatdan madaniyatga juda farq qiladi.
U zamonaviy bola tarbiyasi usullari haqida kitob yozdi.
Yaxshi bola tarbiyasi ham muhabbat, ham intizomni o'z ichiga oladi.
Bola tarbiyasi xarajati yillar davomida sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Ular bola tarbiyasining ba'zi jihatlari bo'yicha kelisha olishmadi.
An'anaviy ravishda bola tarbiyasi onaning mas'uliyati hisoblangan.
Mutaxassislar samarali bola tarbiyasi usullari bo'yicha maslahat berishadi.

words.definition: Patterns of interaction and relationships within a family.
words.definitionUz: Oila a'zolari o'rtasidagi munosabat va o'zaro ta'sir qiluvchi xatti-harakatlar tizimi.
words.example1: The therapist helped them understand their family dynamics better.
words.example1Translation: Terapevt ularga o'z oilaviy munosabatlarini yaxshiroq tushunishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Family dynamics often change after a new baby is born.
words.example2Translation: Yangi chaqaloq tug'ilgandan so'ng oilaviy munosabatlar ko'pincha o'zgaradi.
words.example3: Healthy family dynamics are built on trust and communication.
words.example3Translation: Sog'lom oilaviy munosabatlar ishonch va muloqotga asoslanadi.
extraExamples: The documentary explores complex family dynamics in immigrant households.
Sibling rivalry can affect overall family dynamics.
A divorce can dramatically alter family dynamics.
Understanding family dynamics helps therapists give better advice.
Their family dynamics improved after they started having weekly talks.
The novel focuses on the family dynamics of three generations.
Cultural background often shapes family dynamics significantly.
extraExampleTranslations: Hujjatli film immigrant oilalardagi murakkab oilaviy munosabatlarni o'rganadi.
Aka-uka, opa-singillar o'rtasidagi raqobat umumiy oilaviy munosabatlarga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Ajralish oilaviy munosabatlarni keskin o'zgartirishi mumkin.
Oilaviy munosabatlarni tushunish terapevtlarga yaxshiroq maslahat berishga yordam beradi.
Ular haftalik suhbatlarni boshlaganlaridan keyin oilaviy munosabatlari yaxshilandi.
Roman uch avlodning oilaviy munosabatlariga e'tibor qaratadi.
Madaniy kelib chiqish ko'pincha oilaviy munosabatlarni sezilarli darajada shakllantiradi.

words.translation: ikki daromadli oila (ikkala ota-ona ham ishlaydigan oila)
words.definition: A family where both parents or partners work to earn money.
words.definitionUz: Ota-onaning ikkalasi ham ishlab pul topadigan oila turi.
words.example1: In a dual-income household, childcare arrangements are essential.
words.example1Translation: Ikki daromadli oilada bolalarni parvarish qilish tartibi juda muhimdir.
words.example2: Dual-income households have become more common in recent decades.
words.example2Translation: So'nggi o'n yilliklarda ikki daromadli oilalar tobora ko'paymoqda.
words.example3: They struggle to balance work and family life in their dual-income household.
words.example3Translation: Ular ikki daromadli oilalarida ish va oilaviy hayot o'rtasida muvozanat saqlashga harakat qilishadi.
extraExamples: Most families in the city are dual-income households today.
A dual-income household often has higher overall earnings.
Time management is crucial for a dual-income household.
Their dual-income household allowed them to buy a bigger house.
Stress levels can be higher in a dual-income household with young children.
Many dual-income households rely on daycare or relatives for childcare.
The survey focused on stress in dual-income households.
extraExampleTranslations: Bugungi kunda shahardagi ko'pchilik oilalar ikki daromadli oilalardir.
Ikki daromadli oilada odatda umumiy daromad yuqoriroq bo'ladi.
Ikki daromadli oila uchun vaqtni boshqarish juda muhim.
Ularning ikki daromadli oilasi kattaroq uy sotib olishga imkon berdi.
Kichik bolali ikki daromadli oilalarda stress darajasi yuqoriroq bo'lishi mumkin.
Ko'plab ikki daromadli oilalar bolalarni parvarish qilish uchun bog'cha yoki qarindoshlarga tayanishadi.
So'rovnoma ikki daromadli oilalardagi stressga qaratilgan edi.

words.definition: Differences in attitudes and values between younger and older generations.
words.definitionUz: Yosh va keksa avlod o'rtasidagi qarash va qadriyatlardagi farqlar.
words.example1: There is a noticeable generation gap between grandparents and grandchildren.
words.example1Translation: Bobo-buvilar va nabiralar o'rtasida sezilarli avlodlar tafovuti mavjud.
words.example2: The generation gap often leads to misunderstandings about technology.
words.example2Translation: Avlodlar tafovuti ko'pincha texnologiya haqida tushunmovchiliklarga olib keladi.
words.example3: They try to bridge the generation gap by talking openly about their views.
words.example3Translation: Ular o'z qarashlari haqida ochiq gaplashish orqali avlodlar tafovutini bartaraf etishga harakat qilishadi.
extraExamples: The generation gap was clear in their different opinions on social media.
Parents and teenagers often experience a generation gap.
The article discusses the generation gap in workplace expectations.
Music tastes can highlight a generation gap within families.
Despite the generation gap, they share a close bond.
The generation gap affects how people view marriage and careers.
Schools sometimes address the generation gap between teachers and students.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar haqidagi turli fikrlarida avlodlar tafovuti aniq ko'rinib turardi.
Ota-onalar va o'smirlar ko'pincha avlodlar tafovutini boshdan kechirishadi.
Maqolada ish joyidagi kutilmalardagi avlodlar tafovuti muhokama qilinadi.
Musiqa didi oilada avlodlar tafovutini namoyon qilishi mumkin.
Avlodlar tafovutiga qaramay, ular yaqin munosabatda.
Avlodlar tafovuti odamlarning nikoh va kasb haqidagi qarashlariga ta'sir qiladi.
Maktablar ba'zan o'qituvchilar va o'quvchilar o'rtasidagi avlodlar tafovutini hal qilishadi.

words.definition: A parenting style with high responsiveness and high demands, combining warmth with clear rules.
words.definitionUz: Bolaga g'amxo'rlik ko'rsatish bilan birga aniq qoidalar va talablarni ham qo'yadigan muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi.
words.example1: Authoritative parenting is often linked to higher self-esteem in children.
words.example1Translation: Muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi bolalarda yuqori o'zini-o'zi qadrlash bilan bog'liq bo'ladi.
words.example2: Unlike strict discipline, authoritative parenting includes open communication.
words.example2Translation: Qattiqqo'l intizomdan farqli o'laroq, muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi ochiq muloqotni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: She tries to practice authoritative parenting with her two sons.
words.example3Translation: U ikki o'g'li bilan muvozanatli tarbiya uslubini qo'llashga harakat qiladi.
extraExamples: Authoritative parenting sets clear rules while still respecting the child's feelings.
Studies show authoritative parenting leads to better academic performance.
Authoritative parenting balances warmth with firm expectations.
The counselor recommended authoritative parenting over strict control.
Authoritative parenting encourages children to express their opinions.
Many psychologists consider authoritative parenting the most effective style.
Authoritative parenting differs from permissive parenting in its use of boundaries.
extraExampleTranslations: Muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi aniq qoidalar o'rnatadi, ammo bolaning his-tuyg'ularini ham hurmat qiladi.
Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi yaxshiroq o'qish natijalariga olib keladi.
Muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi mehribonlik bilan qat'iy talablarni muvozanatlaydi.
Maslahatchi qattiq nazorat o'rniga muvozanatli tarbiya uslubini tavsiya qildi.
Muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi bolalarni o'z fikrlarini bildirishga undaydi.
Ko'pgina psixologlar muvozanatli tarbiya uslubini eng samarali uslub deb hisoblashadi.
Muvozanatli tarbiya uslubi chegaralardan foydalanishi bilan erkin tarbiyadan farq qiladi.

words.definition: Family beyond parents and children, including grandparents, aunts, uncles, and cousins.
words.definitionUz: Ota-ona va farzandlardan tashqari, bobo-buvi, amaki-xola kabi qarindoshlarni ham o'z ichiga olgan oila.
words.example1: They live close to their extended family and visit often.
words.example1Translation: Ular katta oilalariga yaqin yashashadi va tez-tez tashrif buyurishadi.
words.example2: In many cultures, the extended family plays an important role in raising children.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pgina madaniyatlarda katta oila bolalarni tarbiyalashda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
words.example3: Holiday gatherings bring the whole extended family together.
words.example3Translation: Bayram yig'ilishlari butun katta oilani bir joyga to'playdi.
extraExamples: Her extended family includes over twenty cousins.
The extended family helped care for the children during the crisis.
Living with extended family is common in many countries.
Their extended family gathers every summer for a reunion.
He relies on his extended family for emotional support.
The extended family shared the responsibility of caring for the elderly grandmother.
Weddings often bring together the entire extended family.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning katta oilasida yigirmadan ortiq amakivachchalar bor.
Inqiroz davrida katta oila bolalarga g'amxo'rlik qilishda yordam berdi.
Ko'pgina mamlakatlarda katta oila bilan birga yashash odatiy holdir.
Ularning katta oilasi har yozda yig'ilish uchun to'planadi.
U hissiy yordam uchun katta oilasiga tayanadi.
Katta oila keksa buvisiga g'amxo'rlik qilish mas'uliyatini bo'lishib oldi.
To'ylar ko'pincha butun katta oilani bir joyga to'playdi.

words.definition: The equilibrium between professional work and personal or family life.
words.definitionUz: Ish va shaxsiy/oilaviy hayot o'rtasidagi muvozanat, ya'ni ikkalasiga ham yetarli vaqt ajratish.
words.example1: She changed jobs to achieve a better work-life balance.
words.example1Translation: U yaxshiroq ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga erishish uchun ishini o'zgartirdi.
words.example2: Companies are starting to value work-life balance more than before.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyalar avvalgidan ko'ra ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga ko'proq ahamiyat berishni boshladi.
words.example3: Poor work-life balance can lead to stress and burnout.
words.example3Translation: Yomon ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati stress va his-tuyg'u tugashiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Remote work has helped many people improve their work-life balance.
Finding work-life balance is especially hard for new parents.
He sacrificed work-life balance to advance his career.
Flexible hours can support a healthier work-life balance.
The seminar offered tips on maintaining work-life balance.
Her constant overtime disrupted her work-life balance.
Work-life balance is a common topic in employee surveys.
extraExampleTranslations: Masofadan ishlash ko'pchilikka ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashga yordam berdi.
Yangi ota-onalar uchun ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini topish ayniqsa qiyin.
U martabasini rivojlantirish uchun ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatidan voz kechdi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti sog'lomroq ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini qo'llab-quvvatlashi mumkin.
Seminarda ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini saqlash bo'yicha maslahatlar berildi.
Uning doimiy qo'shimcha ish soatlari ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini buzdi.
Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati xodimlar so'rovnomalarida tez-tez uchraydigan mavzudir.

words.definition: A supportive and caring setting for growth and development.
words.definitionUz: Inson, ayniqsa bola, rivojlanishi va o'sishi uchun qulay, g'amxo'rlik va qo'llab-quvvatlashga to'la muhit.
words.example1: Children thrive best in a nurturing environment at home.
words.example1Translation: Bolalar uyda g'amxo'r muhitda eng yaxshi rivojlanadi.
words.example2: The school aims to provide a nurturing environment for all students.
words.example2Translation: Maktab barcha o'quvchilar uchun g'amxo'r muhit yaratishni maqsad qiladi.
words.example3: A nurturing environment helps build a child's confidence and trust.
words.example3Translation: G'amxo'r muhit bolaning o'ziga ishonchi va ishonchini shakllantirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Teachers work hard to create a nurturing environment in the classroom.
A nurturing environment encourages curiosity and creativity in children.
Without a nurturing environment, children may struggle emotionally.
The daycare center is known for its nurturing environment.
Parents try to maintain a nurturing environment despite busy schedules.
A nurturing environment can positively affect a child's mental health.
The foster family provided a safe and nurturing environment.
extraExampleTranslations: O'qituvchilar sinfda g'amxo'r muhit yaratish uchun ko'p mehnat qilishadi.
G'amxo'r muhit bolalarda qiziquvchanlik va ijodkorlikni rag'batlantiradi.
G'amxo'r muhitsiz bolalar hissiy jihatdan qiynalishi mumkin.
Bolalar bog'chasi o'zining g'amxo'r muhiti bilan tanilgan.
Ota-onalar band jadvalga qaramay g'amxo'r muhitni saqlashga harakat qilishadi.
G'amxo'r muhit bolaning ruhiy salomatligiga ijobiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Asrab oluvchi oila xavfsiz va g'amxo'r muhit yaratdi.

words.definition: A family in which one parent raises the children alone.
words.definitionUz: Bolalarni faqat bitta ota yoki ona yolg'iz tarbiyalaydigan oila turi.
words.example1: She raised her three children in a single-parent family.
words.example1Translation: U uchta farzandini yolg'iz ota-onali oilada o'stirdi.
words.example2: Single-parent families often face greater financial challenges.
words.example2Translation: Yolg'iz ota-onali oilalar ko'pincha kattaroq moliyaviy qiyinchiliklarga duch kelishadi.
words.example3: Support groups exist to help single-parent families cope with daily stress.
words.example3Translation: Yolg'iz ota-onali oilalarga kundalik stressni yengishda yordam berish uchun qo'llab-quvvatlash guruhlari mavjud.
extraExamples: Growing up in a single-parent family taught him independence early on.
The number of single-parent families has increased in recent years.
Single-parent families sometimes rely heavily on extended relatives.
The community center offers programs for single-parent families.
Being part of a single-parent family doesn't mean lacking love or support.
Schools try to be sensitive to the needs of single-parent families.
She wrote a memoir about growing up in a single-parent family.
extraExampleTranslations: Yolg'iz ota-onali oilada o'sish unga erta mustaqillikni o'rgatdi.
So'nggi yillarda yolg'iz ota-onali oilalar soni oshdi.
Yolg'iz ota-onali oilalar ba'zan qarindoshlariga ko'p tayanadi.
Jamoat markazi yolg'iz ota-onali oilalar uchun dasturlar taklif qiladi.
Yolg'iz ota-onali oilaning a'zosi bo'lish muhabbat yoki qo'llab-quvvatlash yetishmasligini anglatmaydi.
Maktablar yolg'iz ota-onali oilalarning ehtiyojlariga sezgir bo'lishga harakat qilishadi.
U yolg'iz ota-onali oilada o'sganligi haqida xotira kitobi yozdi.

words.definition: The degree to which parents participate in their child's life and education.
words.definitionUz: Ota-onaning farzandining hayoti va ta'limida qanchalik faol qatnashishi.
words.example1: High parental involvement is linked to better grades in school.
