words.example1Translation: Ota-onaning yuqori ishtiroki maktabda yaxshi baholar bilan bog'liq.
words.example2: The teacher encouraged more parental involvement in classroom activities.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchi sinf faoliyatida ota-onaning ko'proq ishtirok etishini rag'batlantirdi.
words.example3: Parental involvement can make a big difference in a child's motivation.
words.example3Translation: Ota-onaning ishtiroki bolaning motivatsiyasida katta farq yaratishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The school organized events to increase parental involvement.
Parental involvement often decreases as children become teenagers.
Studies show parental involvement improves a child's social skills.
Lack of parental involvement can affect a child's self-esteem.
Parental involvement includes helping with homework and attending school events.
The principal praised the high level of parental involvement this year.
Cultural factors can influence the level of parental involvement.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab ota-onaning ishtirokini oshirish uchun tadbirlar tashkil qildi.
Bolalar o'smir bo'lishi bilan ota-onaning ishtiroki ko'pincha kamayadi.
Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, ota-onaning ishtiroki bolaning ijtimoiy ko'nikmalarini yaxshilaydi.
Ota-onaning ishtiroki yetishmasligi bolaning o'ziga ishonchiga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Ota-onaning ishtiroki uy vazifasida yordam berish va maktab tadbirlarida qatnashishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Direktor bu yilgi ota-onaning yuqori ishtirokini maqtadi.
Madaniy omillar ota-onaning ishtirok darajasiga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: Principles and beliefs traditionally upheld within families.
words.definitionUz: Oila ichida avloddan-avlodga o'tib keladigan an'anaviy printsip va ishonchlar.
words.example1: Honesty and respect are important family values in their household.
words.example1Translation: Halollik va hurmat ularning oilasida muhim oilaviy qadriyatlar hisoblanadi.
words.example2: She was raised with strong family values around education and hard work.
words.example2Translation: U ta'lim va mehnatsevarlik atrofidagi kuchli oilaviy qadriyatlar bilan tarbiyalangan.
words.example3: Family values can differ greatly from one culture to another.
words.example3Translation: Oilaviy qadriyatlar bir madaniyatdan ikkinchisiga juda farq qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Their family values emphasize loyalty and support for one another.
Politicians often talk about protecting traditional family values.
Family values are usually passed down from parents to children.
Different generations sometimes interpret family values differently.
Their family values include respect for elders and community service.
The movie explores conflicts between modern life and family values.
Family values shape how children view relationships later in life.
extraExampleTranslations: Ularning oilaviy qadriyatlari sodiqlik va bir-biriga yordam berishni ta'kidlaydi.
Siyosatchilar ko'pincha an'anaviy oilaviy qadriyatlarni himoya qilish haqida gapirishadi.
Oilaviy qadriyatlar odatda ota-onadan farzandlarga o'tadi.
Turli avlodlar oilaviy qadriyatlarni ba'zan boshqacha talqin qilishadi.
Ularning oilaviy qadriyatlariga keksalarni hurmat qilish va jamiyatga xizmat kiradi.
Film zamonaviy hayot va oilaviy qadriyatlar o'rtasidagi ziddiyatlarni o'rganadi.
Oilaviy qadriyatlar bolalarning kelajakda munosabatlarga qarashini shakllantiradi.

words.definition: Physical, emotional, and psychological growth during teenage years.
words.definitionUz: O'smirlik yillarida sodir bo'ladigan jismoniy, hissiy va ruhiy o'sish jarayoni.
words.example1: Adolescent development involves major changes in the brain and body.
words.example1Translation: O'smirlik davri rivojlanishi miya va tanada katta o'zgarishlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: Understanding adolescent development helps parents communicate better with teens.
words.example2Translation: O'smirlik davri rivojlanishini tushunish ota-onalarga o'smirlar bilan yaxshiroq muloqot qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The course covers key stages of adolescent development.
words.example3Translation: Kurs o'smirlik davri rivojlanishining asosiy bosqichlarini qamrab oladi.
extraExamples: Adolescent development includes the search for personal identity.
Hormonal changes play a major role in adolescent development.
Teachers study adolescent development to better support students.
Peer relationships strongly influence adolescent development.
The psychologist specializes in adolescent development and behavior.
Adolescent development can be a challenging time for both teens and parents.
Sleep patterns often change during adolescent development.
extraExampleTranslations: O'smirlik davri rivojlanishi shaxsiy o'ziga xoslikni izlashni o'z ichiga oladi.
Gormonal o'zgarishlar o'smirlik davri rivojlanishida muhim rol o'ynaydi.
O'qituvchilar o'quvchilarni yaxshiroq qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun o'smirlik davri rivojlanishini o'rganishadi.
Tengdoshlar bilan munosabatlar o'smirlik davri rivojlanishiga kuchli ta'sir qiladi.
Psixolog o'smirlik davri rivojlanishi va xulq-atvori bo'yicha mutaxassis.
O'smirlik davri rivojlanishi ham o'smirlar, ham ota-onalar uchun qiyin davr bo'lishi mumkin.
O'smirlik davri rivojlanishi paytida uyqu rejimi ko'pincha o'zgaradi.

words.definition: Loneliness or sadness parents may feel when children leave home.
words.definitionUz: Farzandlar uydan ketganda ota-onalar his qilishi mumkin bo'lgan yolg'izlik yoki g'amginlik holati.
words.example1: She experienced empty nest syndrome after her youngest son went to college.
words.example1Translation: Eng kichik o'g'li kollejga ketgandan keyin u bo'sh uya sindromini boshdan kechirdi.
words.example2: Empty nest syndrome can affect a parent's sense of purpose.
words.example2Translation: Bo'sh uya sindromi ota-onaning hayot maqsadi tuyg'usiga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many parents find new hobbies to cope with empty nest syndrome.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pgina ota-onalar bo'sh uya sindromini yengish uchun yangi qiziqishlar topishadi.
extraExamples: Empty nest syndrome often hits hardest in the first few months.
Talking openly with their partner helped them manage empty nest syndrome.
Empty nest syndrome isn't officially a medical diagnosis, but it feels very real.
He filled his time with travel to deal with empty nest syndrome.
Empty nest syndrome can bring both sadness and a sense of freedom.
Counselors offer support for parents struggling with empty nest syndrome.
Her empty nest syndrome eased once she started volunteering regularly.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo'sh uya sindromi ko'pincha dastlabki bir necha oyda eng kuchli his qilinadi.
Turmush o'rtog'i bilan ochiq gaplashish ularga bo'sh uya sindromini boshqarishga yordam berdi.
Bo'sh uya sindromi rasmiy tibbiy tashxis emas, lekin u juda haqiqiy his qilinadi.
U bo'sh uya sindromi bilan kurashish uchun vaqtini sayohatlar bilan to'ldirdi.
Bo'sh uya sindromi ham g'amginlik, ham erkinlik tuyg'usini olib kelishi mumkin.
Maslahatchilar bo'sh uya sindromi bilan kurashayotgan ota-onalarga yordam taklif qilishadi.
U muntazam ko'ngillilik qila boshlagach, bo'sh uya sindromi yengillashdi.

words.definition: The ability to perceive, recognize, and enjoy beauty in art, nature, or other forms.
words.definitionUz: Estetik baholash — sanʼat, tabiat yoki boshqa narsalardagi goʻzallikni his qilish, tan olish va undan zavq olish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: Her aesthetic appreciation made her spend hours in art museums.
words.example1Translation: Uning estetik baholashi uni sanʼat muzeylarida soatlab vaqt oʻtkazishga majbur qilardi.
words.example2: Developing aesthetic appreciation helps people enjoy everyday surroundings more.
words.example2Translation: Estetik baholashni rivojlantirish odamlarga kundalik muhitdan koʻproq zavq olishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The course focuses on improving studentsʼ aesthetic appreciation of classical music.
words.example3Translation: Kurs talabalarining klassik musiqaga estetik baholashini yaxshilashga qaratilgan.
extraExamples: Aesthetic appreciation varies greatly between different cultures.
Traveling abroad enhanced his aesthetic appreciation of architecture.
Children naturally show strong aesthetic appreciation through their drawings.
Formal education can deepen oneʼs aesthetic appreciation.
She has a great aesthetic appreciation for minimalist design.
Aesthetic appreciation is an important part of emotional intelligence.
The exhibition aims to spark aesthetic appreciation in young visitors.
extraExampleTranslations: Estetik baholash turli madaniyatlar oʻrtasida juda farq qiladi.
Xorijga sayohat uning arxitekturaga estetik baholashini oshirdi.
Bolalar oʻz rasmlari orqali tabiiy ravishda kuchli estetik baholashni namoyon qilishadi.
Rasmiy taʼlim insonning estetik baholashini chuqurlashtirishi mumkin.
U minimalist dizaynga katta estetik baholashga ega.
Estetik baholash emotsional intellektning muhim qismidir.
Koʻrgazma yosh mehmonlarda estetik baholashni uygʻotishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: The use of creative activities like painting or music to help improve mental and emotional health.
words.definitionUz: Sanʼat terapiyasi — rasm chizish yoki musiqa kabi ijodiy mashgʻulotlar orqali ruhiy va emotsional salomatlikni yaxshilash usulidir.
words.example1: Art therapy helped her express feelings she couldnʼt put into words.
words.example1Translation: Sanʼat terapiyasi unga soʻz bilan ifodalay olmaydigan his-tuygʻularini bildirishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Many hospitals now offer art therapy sessions for patients recovering from trauma.
words.example2Translation: Koʻplab shifoxonalar endi jarohatdan tuzalayotgan bemorlar uchun sanʼat terapiyasi mashgʻulotlarini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: He found art therapy more effective than traditional talking therapy.
words.example3Translation: U sanʼat terapiyasini anʼanaviy suhbat terapiyasidan samaraliroq deb topdi.
extraExamples: Art therapy is especially useful for children who have difficulty communicating.
The school introduced art therapy to support studentsʼ mental health.
Professional art therapists need special training and certification.
Music is often used as part of art therapy programs.
Art therapy can reduce stress and anxiety levels.
She decided to pursue a career in art therapy.
Research shows positive effects of art therapy on depression.
extraExampleTranslations: Sanʼat terapiyasi muloqot qilishda qiyinchilik tugʻdiradigan bolalar uchun ayniqsa foydalidir.
Maktab oʻquvchilarning ruhiy salomatligini qoʻllab-quvvatlash uchun sanʼat terapiyasini joriy qildi.
Professional sanʼat terapevtlari maxsus tayyorgarlik va sertifikatga ega boʻlishlari kerak.
Musiqa koʻpincha sanʼat terapiyasi dasturlarida qoʻllaniladi.
Sanʼat terapiyasi stress va xavotir darajasini pasaytirishi mumkin.
U sanʼat terapiyasi boʻyicha kasb tanlashga qaror qildi.
Tadqiqotlar sanʼat terapiyasining depressiyaga ijobiy taʼsirini koʻrsatmoqda.

words.definition: The quality of an artist staying true to their personal vision and values despite external pressures.
words.definitionUz: Sanʼatkorlik butunligi — tashqi bosimlariga qaramay, sanʼatkorning oʻz shaxsiy qarashlari va qadriyatlariga sodiq qolish sifatidir.
words.example1: The director refused to change the ending to maintain his artistic integrity.
words.example1Translation: Rejissyor oʻz sanʼatkorlik butunligini saqlab qolish uchun oxirgi qismni oʻzgartirishdan bosh tortdi.
words.example2: Artistic integrity is highly respected in the independent film community.
words.example2Translation: Sanʼatkorlik butunligi mustaqil kinematografiya jamiyatida juda hurmat qilinadi.
words.example3: She compromised her artistic integrity by accepting the commercial project.
words.example3Translation: U tijorat loyihasini qabul qilib, oʻz sanʼatkorlik butunligini buzdi.
extraExamples: Maintaining artistic integrity can be challenging in the music industry.
Critics praised the author for her artistic integrity.
Many artists struggle to balance artistic integrity with financial needs.
His artistic integrity is evident in every piece he creates.
The gallery supports artists who value artistic integrity.
Artistic integrity often leads to more meaningful work.
She left the record label to protect her artistic integrity.
extraExampleTranslations: Musiqa sanoatida sanʼatkorlik butunligini saqlab qolish qiyin boʻlishi mumkin.
Tanqidchilar yozuvchining sanʼatkorlik butunligini yuqori baholashdi.
Koʻplab sanʼatkorlar sanʼatkorlik butunligi va moliyaviy ehtiyojlar oʻrtasida muvozanatni topishga qiynalishadi.
Uning sanʼatkorlik butunligi yaratgan har bir asarida yaqqol koʻrinadi.
Galereya sanʼatkorlik butunligini qadrlaydigan sanʼatkorlarni qoʻllab-quvvatlaydi.
Sanʼatkorlik butunligi koʻpincha mazmunliroq asarlarga olib keladi.
U oʻz sanʼatkorlik butunligini himoya qilish uchun yozuvchi kompaniyasini tark etdi.

words.definition: Government financial support provided to artists, cultural institutions, and artistic projects.
words.definitionUz: Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlari — hukumat tomonidan sanʼatkorlar, madaniyat muassasalari va sanʼat loyihalariga beriladigan moliyaviy yordam.
words.example1: Public funding for the arts helps keep museums and theaters open.
words.example1Translation: Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlari muzey va teatrlarning ochiq qolishiga yordam beradi.
words.example2: There is ongoing debate about the amount of public funding for the arts.
words.example2Translation: Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlari miqdori haqida doimiy bahslar mavjud.
words.example3: The new law increased public funding for the arts in rural areas.
words.example3Translation: Yangi qonun qishloq hududlarida sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlarini oshirdi.
extraExamples: Many artists rely on public funding for the arts to create their work.
Cuts in public funding for the arts affected many cultural programs.
Public funding for the arts promotes cultural diversity.
The committee decides how to distribute public funding for the arts.
Some people believe public funding for the arts is a waste of money.
Public funding for the arts supports education programs in schools.
The festival received significant public funding for the arts.
extraExampleTranslations: Koʻplab sanʼatkorlar oʻz asarlarini yaratish uchun sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlariga tayanadi.
Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlarining qisqarishi koʻplab madaniy dasturlarga taʼsir qildi.
Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlari madaniy xilma-xillikni ragʻbatlantiradi.
Qoʻmita sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlarini qanday taqsimlashni hal qiladi.
Baʼzi odamlar sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlarini pulni behuda sarflash deb hisoblashadi.
Sanʼat uchun davlat mablagʻlari maktablardagi taʼlim dasturlarini qoʻllab-quvvatlaydi.
Festival sanʼat uchun katta miqdorda davlat mablagʻlarini oldi.

words.definition: The ability to read, write, and understand musical notation and concepts.
words.definitionUz: Musiqiy savodxonlik — musiqiy yozuvlarni oʻqish, yozish va musiqiy tushunchalarni tushunish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: Musical literacy is essential for anyone wanting to study music seriously.
words.example1Translation: Musiqiy savodxonlik musiqa bilan jiddiy shugʻullanishni xohlovchilar uchun zarur.
words.example2: The school offers classes to improve studentsʼ musical literacy.
words.example2Translation: Maktab talabalarining musiqiy savodxonligini oshirish uchun darslar taklif qiladi.
words.example3: His musical literacy allowed him to play complex pieces by sight.
words.example3Translation: Uning musiqiy savodxonligi unga murakkab asarlarni birinchi koʻrishdayoq ijro etishga imkon berdi.
extraExamples: Basic musical literacy includes understanding rhythm and pitch.
Many self-taught musicians lack formal musical literacy.
Musical literacy opens up more opportunities in professional music.
She developed her musical literacy through years of piano lessons.
Modern apps can help beginners improve their musical literacy.
Musical literacy is taught as part of the national curriculum.
Lack of musical literacy can limit a musicianʼs growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Asosiy musiqiy savodxonlik ritm va balandlikni tushunishni oʻz ichiga oladi.
Koʻplab oʻz-oʻzini oʻrgatgan musiqachilar rasmiy musiqiy savodxonlikka ega emas.
Musiqiy savodxonlik professional musiqada koʻproq imkoniyatlar ochadi.
U pianino darslari orqali yillar davomida musiqiy savodxonligini rivojlantirdi.
Zamonaviy ilovalar yangi boshlovchilarga musiqiy savodxonligini yaxshilashga yordam beradi.
Musiqiy savodxonlik milliy oʻquv dasturining bir qismi sifatida oʻqitiladi.
Musiqiy savodxonlikning yetishmasligi musiqachining oʻsishini cheklashi mumkin.

words.definition: Traditions, practices, and expressions passed down through generations that form part of a cultureʼs identity.
words.definitionUz: Moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy meros — avlodlardan avlodlarga oʻtib kelayotgan anʼanalar, amaliyotlar va ifodalar boʻlib, madaniyatning oʻziga xosligini tashkil etadi.
words.example1: UNESCO protects many examples of intangible cultural heritage worldwide.
words.example1Translation: YuNESKO dunyo boʻylab moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosning koʻplab namunalarni himoya qiladi.
words.example2: Traditional storytelling is an important part of our intangible cultural heritage.
words.example2Translation: Anʼanaviy hikoya aytish bizning moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosimizning muhim qismidir.
words.example3: The festival celebrates the countryʼs intangible cultural heritage.
words.example3Translation: Festival mamlakatning moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosini nishonlaydi.
extraExamples: Intangible cultural heritage includes dances, music, and crafts.
Preserving intangible cultural heritage is vital for cultural diversity.
Many communities are working to document their intangible cultural heritage.
Intangible cultural heritage is passed orally from generation to generation.
The government launched a project to safeguard intangible cultural heritage.
Intangible cultural heritage gives people a sense of identity.
Globalization poses challenges to intangible cultural heritage.
extraExampleTranslations: Moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy meros raqslar, musiqa va hunarmandchilikni oʻz ichiga oladi.
Moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosni saqlash madaniy xilma-xillik uchun juda muhim.
Koʻplab jamoalar oʻz moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosini hujjatlashtirish ustida ishlamoqda.
Moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy meros avloddan avlodga ogʻzaki ravishda oʻtadi.
Hukumat moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosni himoya qilish loyihasini ishga tushirdi.
Moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy meros odamlarga oʻzlik tuygʻusini beradi.
Globallashuv moddiy boʻlmagan madaniy merosga qiyinchiliklar tugʻdiradi.

words.definition: The sector of the economy involving the creation and commercialization of creative products like art, music, design, and film.
words.definitionUz: Ijodiy sanoat — sanʼat, musiqa, dizayn va kinodan iborat ijodiy mahsulotlar yaratish va ularni tijoratlashtirish bilan shugʻullanadigan iqtisodiyot sohasi.
words.example1: The creative industry contributes significantly to the national economy.
words.example1Translation: Ijodiy sanoat milliy iqtisodiyotga katta hissa qoʻshadi.
words.example2: She works in the creative industry as a graphic designer.
words.example2Translation: U ijodiy sanoatda grafik dizayner boʻlib ishlaydi.
words.example3: Government policies support the growth of the creative industry.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat siyosatlari ijodiy sanoatning oʻsishini qoʻllab-quvvatlaydi.
extraExamples: London is a major center for the creative industry.
The creative industry includes advertising, fashion, and publishing.
Digital technology has transformed the creative industry.
Many young people are attracted to careers in the creative industry.
The creative industry generates jobs and innovation.
Challenges in the creative industry include copyright issues.
The festival showcases the best of the local creative industry.
extraExampleTranslations: London ijodiy sanoatning asosiy markazlaridan biridir.
Ijodiy sanoat reklama, moda va nashriyotni oʻz ichiga oladi.
Raqamli texnologiya ijodiy sanoatni oʻzgartirdi.
Koʻplab yoshlar ijodiy sanoatdagi kasblarga qiziqish bildirishadi.
Ijodiy sanoat ish oʻrinlari va innovatsiyalarni yaratadi.
Ijodiy sanoatdagi qiyinchiliklarga mualliflik huquqi masalalari kiradi.
Festival mahalliy ijodiy sanoatning eng yaxshilarini namoyish etadi.

words.definition: The system of written symbols used to represent music so it can be read and performed.
words.definitionUz: Musiqiy yozuv — musiqani oʻqish va ijro etish uchun ishlatiladigan yozma belgilar tizimidir.
words.example1: Learning musical notation takes time and practice.
words.example1Translation: Musiqiy yozuvni oʻrganish vaqt va mashq talab qiladi.
words.example2: The composer wrote the piece using standard musical notation.
words.example2Translation: Kompozitor asarni standart musiqiy yozuv yordamida yozdi.
words.example3: She can play by ear but struggles with musical notation.
words.example3Translation: U quloq bilan chalishi mumkin, lekin musiqiy yozuv bilan qiynaladi.
extraExamples: Different cultures have developed their own forms of musical notation.
Modern software helps musicians create musical notation easily.
Understanding musical notation is key to playing in an orchestra.
The teacher explained the basics of musical notation to the class.
Musical notation includes notes, rests, and dynamic markings.
He transcribed the folk song into musical notation.
Musical notation allows music to be preserved accurately.
extraExampleTranslations: Turli madaniyatlar oʻzlarining musiqiy yozuv shakllarini yaratgan.
Zamonaviy dasturlar musiqachilarga musiqiy yozuvni oson yaratishga yordam beradi.
Musiqiy yozuvni tushunish orkestrda chalishning kalitidir.
Oʻqituvchi sinfga musiqiy yozuv asoslarini tushuntirdi.
Musiqiy yozuv notalar, pauzalar va kuchlilik belgilarni oʻz ichiga oladi.
U xalq qoʻshigʻini musiqiy yozuvga koʻchirdi.
Musiqiy yozuv musiqani aniq saqlab qolishga imkon beradi.

words.definition: The act of creating or performing music, art, or drama spontaneously without prior preparation.
words.definitionUz: Improvizatsiya — oldindan tayyorgarliksiz, bir zumda musiqa, sanʼat yoki dramani yaratish yoki ijro etish harakatidir.
words.example1: Jazz musicians are famous for their skill in improvisation.
words.example1Translation: Jazz musiqachilari improvizatsiya qobiliyatlari bilan mashhur.
words.example2: The actor used improvisation to make the scene more natural.
words.example2Translation: Aktyor sahnani tabiiyroq qilish uchun improvizatsiyadan foydalandi.
words.example3: She practiced improvisation techniques during her music lessons.
words.example3Translation: U musiqa darslarida improvizatsiya usullarini mashq qildi.
extraExamples: Improvisation requires both creativity and technical skill.
The comedy show relied heavily on improvisation.
Learning improvisation helps develop musical confidence.
The painting was created through pure improvisation.
Improvisation is an important element in many art forms.
He is known for his brilliant improvisation on the piano.
Group improvisation can lead to unexpected creative results.
extraExampleTranslations: Improvizatsiya ijodkorlik va texnik mahoratni talab qiladi.
Komediylik shou koʻp jihatdan improvizatsiyaga asoslangan edi.
Improvizatsiyani oʻrganish musiqiy ishonchni rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
Rasm sof improvizatsiya orqali yaratilgan.
Improvizatsiya koʻplab sanʼat turlarida muhim element hisoblanadi.
U pianinoda ajoyib improvizatsiyalari bilan tanilgan.
Guruhli improvizatsiya kutilmagan ijodiy natijalarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: A work of art, music, or literature of outstanding quality and skill.
words.definitionUz: Durdonasi — sanʼat, musiqa yoki adabiyotning juda yuqori sifat va mahorat bilan yaratilgan asaridir.
words.example1: The Mona Lisa is considered one of Leonardo da Vinciʼs greatest masterpieces.
words.example1Translation: Mona Liza Leonardo da Vinchining eng buyuk durdonalari dan biri hisoblanadi.
words.example2: This novel is regarded as a masterpiece of modern literature.
words.example2Translation: Bu roman zamonaviy adabiyotning durdonasi sifatida qabul qilinadi.
words.example3: The symphony is a masterpiece that continues to inspire musicians today.
words.example3Translation: Simfoniya bugungi kunda ham musiqachilarni ilhomlantiruvchi durdonadir.
extraExamples: Creating a masterpiece requires years of dedication and practice.
The film is considered a cinematic masterpiece.
Many masterpieces are housed in famous museums.
Critics hailed his latest album as a masterpiece.
She studied the techniques used in Renaissance masterpieces.
A true masterpiece stands the test of time.
The cathedral is an architectural masterpiece.
extraExampleTranslations: Durdonani yaratish yillar davomidagi sadoqat va mashqni talab qiladi.
Film kinematografiya durdonasi sifatida qaraladi.
Koʻplab durdonalar mashhur muzeylarda saqlanadi.
Tanqidchilar uning soʻnggi albomini durdona deb atashdi.
U Uygʻonish davri durdonalari ishlatilgan usullarni oʻrgandi.
Haqiqiy durdona vaqt sinoviga bardosh beradi.
Sobor arxitektura durdonasidir.

words.definition: Art created using digital technology such as computers, tablets, or software.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli sanʼat — kompyuter, planshet yoki dasturlar yordamida yaratiladigan sanʼat turi.
words.example1: Digital art has become very popular with the rise of social media.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli sanʼat ijtimoiy tarmoqlarning rivojlanishi bilan juda ommalashdi.
words.example2: She sells her digital art as NFTs on online platforms.
words.example2Translation: U oʻz raqamli sanʼatini onlayn platformalarda NFT sifatida sotadi.
words.example3: The exhibition featured both traditional and digital art.
words.example3Translation: Koʻrgazmada anʼanaviy va raqamli sanʼat namoyish etildi.
extraExamples: Digital art allows artists to experiment with new styles easily.
Many graphic designers work primarily in digital art.
Learning digital art requires knowledge of specific software.
Digital art can be easily shared and edited.
The museum has a collection of important digital art pieces.
Digital art is often used in video games and animations.
He started his career creating digital art for advertisements.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli sanʼat sanʼatkorlarga yangi uslublar bilan tajriba oʻtkazishni osonlashtiradi.
Koʻplab grafik dizaynerlar asosan raqamli sanʼat bilan ishlaydi.
Raqamli sanʼatni oʻrganish maxsus dasturlarni bilishni talab qiladi.
Raqamli sanʼatni osongina baham koʻrish va tahrirlash mumkin.
Muzeyda muhim raqamli sanʼat asarlari toʻplami mavjud.
Raqamli sanʼat koʻpincha video oʻyinlar va animatsiyalarda qoʻllaniladi.
U karerasini reklama uchun raqamli sanʼat yaratishdan boshlagan.

words.definition: The act of protecting and maintaining cultural traditions, artifacts, and heritage for future generations.
words.definitionUz: Madaniy merosni saqlash — madaniy anʼanalar, buyumlar va merosni kelajak avlodlar uchun himoya qilish va saqlab qolish harakatidir.
words.example1: Cultural preservation is important to maintain national identity.
words.example1Translation: Madaniy merosni saqlash milliy oʻzlikni saqlab qolish uchun muhim.
words.example2: The organization works on cultural preservation projects around the world.
words.example2Translation: Tashkilot dunyo boʻylab madaniy merosni saqlash loyihalari ustida ishlaydi.
words.example3: Language revitalization is a key part of cultural preservation.
words.example3Translation: Tilni tiklash madaniy merosni saqlashning muhim qismidir.
extraExamples: Cultural preservation efforts include restoring historic buildings.
Indigenous communities are fighting for cultural preservation.
Museums play a vital role in cultural preservation.
Cultural preservation helps maintain diversity in a globalized world.
The festival promotes cultural preservation through performances.
Government funding supports cultural preservation initiatives.
Digital archives aid in cultural preservation.
extraExampleTranslations: Madaniy merosni saqlash harakatlari tarixiy binolarni tiklashni oʻz ichiga oladi.
Mahalliy jamoalar madaniy merosni saqlash uchun kurashmoqda.
Muzeylar madaniy merosni saqlashda muhim rol oʻynaydi.
Madaniy merosni saqlash globallashgan dunyoda xilma-xillikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
Festival tomoshalar orqali madaniy merosni saqlashni targʻib qiladi.
Davlat mablagʻlari madaniy merosni saqlash tashabbuslarini qoʻllab-quvvatlaydi.
Raqamli arxivlar madaniy merosni saqlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A person or organization that supports artists and artistic projects financially or through other means.
words.definitionUz: Sanʼat homiysi — sanʼatkorlar va sanʼat loyihalarini moliyaviy yoki boshqa yoʻllar bilan qoʻllab-quvvatlaydigan shaxs yoki tashkilot.
words.example1: The wealthy businessman was a well-known patron of the arts.
words.example1Translation: Boy ishbilarmon mashhur sanʼat homiysi edi.
words.example2: Many famous artists found success thanks to their patrons of the arts.
words.example2Translation: Koʻplab mashhur sanʼatkorlar oʻzlarining sanʼat homiylari tufayli muvaffaqiyat qozongan.
words.example3: The foundation acts as a patron of the arts in the local community.
words.example3Translation: Jamgʻarma mahalliy jamiyatda sanʼat homiysi sifatida ishlaydi.
extraExamples: She became a patron of the arts after inheriting a large fortune.
Patrons of the arts often attend exclusive gallery events.
The king was a great patron of the arts during his reign.
Modern patrons of the arts include corporations and technology companies.
Being a patron of the arts brings both prestige and responsibility.
The museum thanks all its patrons of the arts for their support.
He is a generous patron of the arts who funds young talents.
extraExampleTranslations: U katta boylikni meros qilib olgach, sanʼat homiysiga aylandi.
Sanʼat homiylari koʻpincha eksklyuziv galereya tadbirlarida qatnashadi.
Qirol oʻz hukmronligi davrida buyuk sanʼat homiysi edi.
Zamonaviy sanʼat homiylari korporatsiyalar va texnologiya kompaniyalarini oʻz ichiga oladi.
Sanʼat homiysi boʻlish ham obroʻ ham masʼuliyat keltiradi.
Muzey barcha sanʼat homiylariga qoʻllab-quvvatlashlari uchun minnatdorchilik bildiradi.
U yosh isteʼdodlarni moliyalashtiradigan saxiy sanʼat homiysi.

words.definition: A style or trend in art followed by a group of artists who share similar ideas and goals during a specific period.
words.definitionUz: Sanʼat harakati — maʼlum bir davrda bir xil gʻoyalar va maqsadlarga ega boʻlgan sanʼatkorlar guruhi tomonidan kuzatiladigan sanʼat uslubi yoki yoʻnalishi.
words.example1: Impressionism was an important artistic movement in the 19th century.
words.example1Translation: Impressionizm 19-asrning muhim sanʼat harakatlaridan biri edi.
words.example2: The artistic movement influenced many painters and writers.
words.example2Translation: Sanʼat harakati koʻplab rassomlar va yozuvchilarga taʼsir qildi.
words.example3: She studies different artistic movements in her art history class.
words.example3Translation: U sanʼat tarixi darsida turli sanʼat harakatlarini oʻrganadi.
extraExamples: Surrealism is a famous artistic movement known for dream-like images.
Artistic movements often react against previous styles.
The Bauhaus was both an artistic movement and a school.
Many artistic movements began in Europe.
Understanding artistic movements helps appreciate modern art.
The movement lasted for only a short period.
Cubism was a revolutionary artistic movement.
extraExampleTranslations: Syurrealizm tushga oʻxshash tasvirlari bilan mashhur sanʼat harakatidir.
Sanʼat harakatlari koʻpincha oldingi uslublarga qarshi chiqadi.
Bauhaus ham sanʼat harakati ham maktab edi.
Koʻplab sanʼat harakatlari Yevropada boshlangan.
Sanʼat harakatlarini tushunish zamonaviy sanʼatni qadrlashga yordam beradi.
Harakat qisqa muddat davom etdi.
Kubizm inqilobiy sanʼat harakati edi.

words.definition: The ability of art or music to deeply connect with and evoke strong personal feelings in the audience.
words.definitionUz: Emotsional aks-sado — sanʼat yoki musiqaning tomoshabinlarda chuqur shaxsiy his-tuygʻularni uygʻotish va ularga kuchli bogʻlanish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: The song has a powerful emotional resonance with listeners of all ages.
words.example1Translation: Bu qoʻshiq barcha yoshdagi tinglovchilarda kuchli emotsional aks-sado uygʻotadi.
words.example2: The filmʼs emotional resonance made it a huge success.
words.example2Translation: Filmning emotsional aks-sadosi uni katta muvaffaqiyatga olib keldi.
words.example3: Her performance created strong emotional resonance in the audience.
words.example3Translation: Uning ijrosi tomoshabinlarda kuchli emotsional aks-sado yaratdi.
extraExamples: Great art often has deep emotional resonance.
The paintingʼs emotional resonance comes from its use of color.
Emotional resonance is what makes a story memorable.
Musicians aim to create emotional resonance through their lyrics.
The speech had strong emotional resonance with the crowd.
Different cultures may experience emotional resonance differently.
The book lacks the emotional resonance of her previous works.
extraExampleTranslations: Buyuk sanʼat koʻpincha chuqur emotsional aks-sadoga ega boʻladi.
Rasmning emotsional aks-sadosi ranglardan kelib chiqadi.
Emotsional aks-sado hikoyani esda qolarli qiladi.
Musiqachilar matnlari orqali emotsional aks-sado yaratishga intilishadi.
Nutq olomonda kuchli emotsional aks-sado uygʻotdi.
Turli madaniyatlar emotsional aks-sadoni har xil his qilishi mumkin.
Kitob uning oldingi asarlaridagi emotsional aks-sadoga ega emas.

words.definition: Data or information acquired through observation or experimentation rather than theory.
words.definitionUz: Nazariya emas, balki kuzatuv yoki tajriba orqali olingan ma'lumot yoki dalil.
words.example1: The scientists collected empirical evidence by running hundreds of lab tests.
words.example1Translation: Olimlar yuzlab laboratoriya sinovlari o'tkazib, empirik dalillar to'plashdi.
words.example2: Without empirical evidence, a claim remains just an opinion.
words.example2Translation: Empirik dalilsiz, har qanday da'vo shunchaki fikr bo'lib qoladi.
words.example3: The study provided strong empirical evidence linking sleep deprivation to poor memory.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot uyqusizlik va yomon xotira o'rtasidagi bog'liqlikni ko'rsatuvchi kuchli empirik dalil keltirdi.
extraExamples: Doctors rely on empirical evidence when choosing the best treatment for patients.
The team gathered empirical evidence through years of fieldwork in the Amazon.
Empirical evidence showed that the new drug reduced symptoms by 40 percent.
Policy makers need empirical evidence before introducing major changes to the education system.
The researcher presented empirical evidence at the international science conference.
Anecdotal stories are not the same as empirical evidence.
Empirical evidence from multiple studies confirmed the theory about climate change.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokorlar bemorlar uchun eng yaxshi davolash usulini tanlashda empirik dalillarga tayanadi.
Jamoa Amazonda yillar davomida olib borgan dala ishlari orqali empirik dalillar to'pladi.
Empirik dalillar yangi dori alomatlarni 40 foizga kamaytirganini ko'rsatdi.
Siyosatchilar ta'lim tizimiga katta o'zgartirishlar kiritishdan oldin empirik dalillarga muhtoj.
Tadqiqotchi xalqaro ilmiy konferensiyada empirik dalillarni taqdim etdi.
Og'zaki hikoyalar empirik dalil bilan bir xil emas.
Bir nechta tadqiqotlardan olingan empirik dalillar iqlim o'zgarishi haqidagi nazariyani tasdiqladi.

words.definition: Pioneering scientific study that produces major new discoveries and significantly advances a field.
words.definitionUz: Yangi kashfiyotlar qiladigan va ilm-fanning biror sohasini katta oldinga olib boradigan tadqiqot.
words.example1: Their groundbreaking research on gene editing opened new possibilities in medicine.
words.example1Translation: Gen tahrirlash bo'yicha inqilobiy tadqiqotlari tibbiyotda yangi imkoniyatlar ochdi.
words.example2: The university was recognized globally for its groundbreaking research on renewable energy.
words.example2Translation: Universitet qayta tiklanadigan energiya bo'yicha inqilobiy tadqiqotlari uchun butun dunyoda tan olindi.
words.example3: Groundbreaking research in neuroscience is helping us understand how memory works.
words.example3Translation: Nevrologiyadagi inqilobiy tadqiqotlar xotiraning qanday ishlashini tushunishimizga yordam bermoqda.
extraExamples: The Nobel Prize was awarded for groundbreaking research into quantum mechanics.
Funding for groundbreaking research has increased significantly over the past decade.
Her groundbreaking research changed how scientists think about the human immune system.
The lab published groundbreaking research that challenged decades of accepted science.
Groundbreaking research often takes years of hard work before results appear.
Students were inspired by the professor's groundbreaking research on artificial intelligence.
The company invested millions in groundbreaking research to develop a new cancer vaccine.
extraExampleTranslations: Nobel mukofoti kvant mexanikasi bo'yicha inqilobiy tadqiqotlar uchun berildi.
Inqilobiy tadqiqotlar uchun moliyalashtirish so'nggi o'n yil ichida sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Uning inqilobiy tadqiqotlari olimlarning inson immunitet tizimi haqidagi fikrlarini o'zgartirdi.
Laboratoriya o'nlab yillar davomida qabul qilingan ilmiy qarashlarni rad etuvchi inqilobiy tadqiqot e'lon qildi.
Inqilobiy tadqiqotlar ko'pincha natijalar paydo bo'lishidan oldin yillab qiyin mehnatni talab qiladi.
Talabalar professorning sun'iy intellekt bo'yicha inqilobiy tadqiqotidan ilhom olishdi.
Kompaniya yangi saraton vaksinasini ishlab chiqish uchun inqilobiy tadqiqotlarga millionlar sarmoya kiritdi.

words.definition: The evaluation of scientific or academic work by other experts in the same field before publication.
words.definitionUz: Ilmiy ish nashr etilishidan oldin shu sohaning boshqa mutaxassislari tomonidan tekshirilishi va baholanishi.
words.example1: The research paper passed peer review and was published in a leading journal.
words.example1Translation: Ilmiy maqola hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqishdan o'tdi va yetakchi jurnalda nashr etildi.
words.example2: Peer review helps ensure that published studies are accurate and reliable.
words.example2Translation: Hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqish nashr etilgan tadqiqotlarning aniq va ishonchli bo'lishini ta'minlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The scientist submitted her findings to peer review before making any public announcement.
words.example3Translation: Olima hech qanday jamoat e'lonini qilishdan oldin o'z topilmalarini hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqishga topshirdi.
extraExamples: Peer review is a cornerstone of the modern scientific publishing process.
The journal requires all submissions to go through a rigorous peer review process.
Critics argued that the study had not undergone proper peer review.
Peer review can sometimes delay publication by several months.
Anonymous peer review helps reduce bias in evaluating scientific work.
The professor encouraged her students to read only peer-reviewed articles for their assignments.
Without peer review, it would be much harder to trust scientific claims.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqish zamonaviy ilmiy nashr jarayonining asosiy toshi hisoblanadi.
Jurnal barcha topshiriqlar qat'iy hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqish jarayonidan o'tishini talab qiladi.
Tanqidchilar tadqiqot to'g'ri hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqishdan o'tmaganini ta'kidlashdi.
Hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqish ba'zida nashrni bir necha oy kechiktirishi mumkin.
Anonim ko'rib chiqish ilmiy ishlarni baholashda xolislikni oshirishga yordam beradi.
Professor talabalarini topshiriqlar uchun faqat hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqilgan maqolalarni o'qishga undadi.
Hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqishsiz, ilmiy da'volarga ishonish ancha qiyinroq bo'lar edi.

words.definition: The development and successful application of new technologies that create significant change or improvement.
words.definitionUz: Yangi texnologiyalarni yaratish va ularni muvaffaqiyatli qo'llash orqali katta o'zgarish yoki taraqqiyot qilish.
words.example1: Technological innovation has transformed the way people communicate across the world.
words.example1Translation: Texnologik innovatsiya butun dunyo bo'ylab odamlarning muloqot qilish usulini o'zgartirdi.
words.example2: The company's focus on technological innovation helped it stay ahead of competitors.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyaning texnologik innovatsiyaga e'tibori unga raqiblardan oldinda turish imkonini berdi.
words.example3: Government investment in technological innovation is key to long-term economic growth.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik innovatsiyaga davlat sarmoyasi uzoq muddatli iqtisodiy o'sishning kalitidir.
extraExamples: Technological innovation in agriculture has helped farmers produce more food with less water.
The smartphone was one of the most significant examples of technological innovation in recent history.
Small startups often drive technological innovation faster than large corporations.
Technological innovation must be balanced with ethical responsibility.
Schools need to prepare students for a future shaped by rapid technological innovation.
The hospital adopted technological innovations that improved patient care significantly.
Technological innovation in clean energy is critical to fighting climate change.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloq xo'jaligidagi texnologik innovatsiya dehqonlarga kam suv bilan ko'proq oziq-ovqat yetishtirish imkonini berdi.
Smartfon yaqin tarix davomida texnologik innovatsiyaning eng muhim namunalaridan biri edi.
Kichik startaplar ko'pincha texnologik innovatsiyani yirik korporatsiyalarga qaraganda tezroq ilgari suradi.
Texnologik innovatsiya axloqiy mas'uliyat bilan muvozanatda bo'lishi kerak.
Maktablar talabalarni tezkor texnologik innovatsiya tomonidan shakllantirilgan kelajakka tayyorlashi kerak.
Kasalxona bemor parvarishini sezilarli darajada yaxshilagan texnologik innovatsiyalarni qabul qildi.
Toza energiyadagi texnologik innovatsiya iqlim o'zgarishi bilan kurashda muhim ahamiyatga ega.

words.definition: The moral principles and guidelines that govern how scientific research is planned, conducted, and reported.
words.definitionUz: Ilmiy tadqiqotning qanday rejalashtirilishi, o'tkazilishi va hisoblanishini boshqaruvchi axloqiy tamoyillar va qoidalar.
words.example1: Research ethics require that all participants give informed consent before joining a study.
words.example1Translation: Tadqiqot axloqi barcha ishtirokchilar tadqiqotga qo'shilishdan oldin ma'lumotli rozilik berishini talab qiladi.
words.example2: The university has a strict code of research ethics that all scientists must follow.
words.example2Translation: Universitetda barcha olimlar rioya qilishi shart bo'lgan qat'iy tadqiqot axloqi kodeksi mavjud.
words.example3: Violating research ethics can result in a scientist losing their career and reputation.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqot axloqini buzish olimning martaba va obro'sini yo'qotishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Research ethics committees review all studies involving human participants.
The scientist was accused of breaching research ethics by falsifying data.
Good research ethics means being honest about your methods and results.
Students learn about research ethics in the first year of their graduate programs.
Research ethics also apply to studies involving animals in laboratories.
Publishing fabricated results is one of the most serious violations of research ethics.
International guidelines help standardize research ethics across different countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Tadqiqot axloqi qo'mitalari insonlar ishtirok etadigan barcha tadqiqotlarni ko'rib chiqadi.
Olim ma'lumotlarni soxtalashtirish orqali tadqiqot axloqini buzganlikda ayblandi.
Yaxshi tadqiqot axloqi o'z usullari va natijalari haqida halol bo'lishni anglatadi.
Talabalar magistratura dasturlarining birinchi yilida tadqiqot axloqi haqida o'rganishadi.
Tadqiqot axloqi laboratoriyalardagi hayvonlarni o'z ichiga olgan tadqiqotlarga ham taalluqlidir.
To'qib chiqarilgan natijalarni nashr etish tadqiqot axloqining eng jiddiy buzilishlaridan biridir.
Xalqaro ko'rsatmalar turli mamlakatlar bo'ylab tadqiqot axloqini standartlashtirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The ability to understand, evaluate, and apply scientific concepts, methods, and information in everyday life.
words.definitionUz: Ilmiy tushunchalar, usullar va ma'lumotlarni kundalik hayotda tushunish, baholash va qo'llash qobiliyati.
words.example1: Scientific literacy helps people make informed decisions about vaccines and medicine.
words.example1Translation: Ilmiy savodxonlik odamlarga vaktsinalar va dori-darmonlar haqida to'g'ri qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Schools should do more to improve scientific literacy among young students.
words.example2Translation: Maktablar yosh o'quvchilar o'rtasida ilmiy savodxonlikni oshirish uchun ko'proq ish qilishi kerak.
words.example3: A society with high scientific literacy is better equipped to handle public health crises.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori ilmiy savodxonlikka ega jamiyat jamoat salomatligi inqirozlarini boshqarishga yaxshiroq tayyor.
extraExamples: Scientific literacy includes knowing how to read and evaluate research studies.
Low scientific literacy can make people vulnerable to misinformation and conspiracy theories.
The campaign aimed to improve scientific literacy by making science more accessible to the public.
Scientific literacy is increasingly important in a world driven by technology and data.
Many adults lack basic scientific literacy about climate change and its causes.
Improving scientific literacy starts with curiosity and asking good questions.
Scientific literacy does not mean memorizing facts but understanding how science works.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilmiy savodxonlik tadqiqot ishlarini o'qish va baholashni bilishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Past ilmiy savodxonlik odamlarni noto'g'ri ma'lumot va fitna nazariyalariga nisbatan zaif qilishi mumkin.
Kampaniya ilm-fanni keng jamoatchilikka qulayroq qilib, ilmiy savodxonlikni oshirishga qaratilgan edi.
Ilmiy savodxonlik texnologiya va ma'lumotlar boshqaradigan dunyoda tobora muhim ahamiyat kasb etmoqda.
Ko'p kattalar iqlim o'zgarishi va uning sabablari haqida asosiy ilmiy savodxonlikdan mahrum.
Ilmiy savodxonlikni oshirish qiziqish va yaxshi savollar berishdan boshlanadi.
Ilmiy savodxonlik faktlarni yod olish emas, balki ilm-fan qanday ishlashini tushunishni anglatadi.

words.definition: The process of inspecting, cleaning, and modeling data to discover useful information and draw conclusions.
words.definitionUz: Foydali ma'lumotlarni topish va xulosalar chiqarish uchun ma'lumotlarni tekshirish, tozalash va modellash jarayoni.
words.example1: Data analysis revealed that sales were highest during the holiday season.
words.example1Translation: Ma'lumotlar tahlili bayram mavsumida sotuvlar eng yuqori darajada bo'lganini ko'rsatdi.
words.example2: The research team used data analysis to identify patterns in patient recovery rates.
words.example2Translation: Tadqiqot guruhi bemorlarning tuzalish sur'atlaridagi naqshlarni aniqlash uchun ma'lumotlar tahlilidan foydalandi.
words.example3: Effective data analysis requires both strong technical skills and clear thinking.
words.example3Translation: Samarali ma'lumotlar tahlili ham kuchli texnik ko'nikmalar, ham aniq fikrlashni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The company hired a team of experts to perform data analysis on customer behavior.
Data analysis tools like Python and Excel are widely used in research and business.
Without proper data analysis, it is difficult to make sense of large amounts of information.
Data analysis helped the government understand where to direct healthcare funding.
The scientist spent months doing data analysis before writing her final report.
Data analysis is a core skill for anyone working in science, business, or technology.
Advanced data analysis techniques can reveal trends that are invisible to the human eye.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya mijozlar xatti-harakatlarini tahlil qilish uchun mutaxassislar guruhini yolladi.
Python va Excel kabi ma'lumotlar tahlili vositalari tadqiqot va biznesda keng qo'llaniladi.
To'g'ri ma'lumotlar tahlilisiz katta hajmdagi ma'lumotlarni tushunish qiyin.
Ma'lumotlar tahlili hukumatga sog'liqni saqlash moliyalashtirishini qayerga yo'naltirish kerakligini tushunishga yordam berdi.
Olima yakuniy hisobotini yozishdan oldin oylar davomida ma'lumotlar tahlili bilan shug'ullandi.
Ma'lumotlar tahlili fan, biznes yoki texnologiya sohasida ishlaydigan har bir kishi uchun asosiy ko'nikmalardan biridir.
Ilg'or ma'lumotlar tahlili usullari inson ko'ziga ko'rinmaydigan tendentsiyalarni aniqlashi mumkin.

words.definition: A proposed explanation for an observation, used as a starting point for further investigation and testing.
words.definitionUz: Kuzatuvga asoslangan taxminiy tushuntirish bo'lib, u keyingi tekshirish va sinovlar uchun boshlang'ich nuqta sifatida ishlatiladi.
words.example1: The scientist formed a hypothesis that plants grow faster when exposed to music.
words.example1Translation: Olim o'simliklar musiqa ta'sirida tezroq o'sadi degan gipoteza tuzdi.
words.example2: Their hypothesis was tested through a series of carefully designed experiments.
words.example2Translation: Ularning gipotezasi bir qator puxta ishlab chiqilgan tajribalar orqali sinovdan o'tkazildi.
words.example3: If the results do not support the hypothesis, scientists must revise their thinking.
words.example3Translation: Agar natijalar gipotezani tasdiqlamasa, olimlar o'z fikrlarini qayta ko'rib chiqishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Every scientific study begins with a clear hypothesis that can be tested.
The team developed a hypothesis about why certain bacteria are resistant to antibiotics.
A hypothesis is not a fact — it is an educated guess that requires proof.
After months of testing, the hypothesis was confirmed by the experimental data.
Students were asked to write a hypothesis before starting their science fair project.
The original hypothesis turned out to be wrong, but it led to an unexpected discovery.
A good hypothesis should be specific, measurable, and based on existing knowledge.
extraExampleTranslations: Har qanday ilmiy tadqiqot sinovdan o'tkazilishi mumkin bo'lgan aniq gipoteza bilan boshlanadi.
Guruh nima uchun ba'zi bakteriyalar antibiotiklarga chidamli bo'lganligi haqida gipoteza ishlab chiqdi.
Gipoteza fakt emas — bu isbot talab qiladigan asosli taxmin.
Oylab sinash natijasida gipoteza tajriba ma'lumotlari tomonidan tasdiqlandi.
Talabalardan fan ko'rgazmasi loyihasini boshlashdan oldin gipoteza yozishlari so'raldi.
Dastlabki gipoteza noto'g'ri bo'lib chiqdi, lekin bu kutilmagan kashfiyotga olib keldi.
Yaxshi gipoteza aniq, o'lchanadigan va mavjud bilimlarga asoslangan bo'lishi kerak.

words.definition: A type of experiment where neither the participants nor the researchers know who is receiving the actual treatment, reducing bias.
words.definitionUz: Ishtirokchilar ham, tadqiqotchilar ham kim haqiqiy davolashni olayotganini bilmaydigan tajriba turi bo'lib, bu xolislikni ta'minlaydi.
words.example1: A double-blind study was used to test whether the new painkiller was more effective than a placebo.
words.example1Translation: Yangi og'riq qoldiruvchi platseboga qaraganda samaraliroq ekanligini sinash uchun ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotdan foydalanildi.
words.example2: Double-blind studies are considered the gold standard in clinical research.
words.example2Translation: Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotlar klinik tadqiqotda oltin standart deb hisoblanadi.
words.example3: In a double-blind study, even the doctors giving the treatment do not know who gets the real drug.
words.example3Translation: Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotda davolashni amalga oshirayotgan shifokorlar ham kim haqiqiy dori olayotganini bilmaydi.
extraExamples: The pharmaceutical company ran a double-blind study to evaluate the safety of their new vaccine.
Participants in the double-blind study were randomly assigned to either the treatment or control group.
A double-blind study removes the possibility of researchers unconsciously influencing the results.
The results of the double-blind study were reviewed by an independent scientific committee.
Double-blind studies are difficult to design but produce the most reliable evidence.
The team published the findings of their double-blind study in a peer-reviewed journal.
Without a double-blind study, it is hard to tell if improvements are due to the drug or the placebo effect.
extraExampleTranslations: Farmatsevtika kompaniyasi yangi vaktsinaning xavfsizligini baholash uchun ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqot o'tkazdi.
Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotdagi ishtirokchilar tasodifiy ravishda davolash yoki nazorat guruhiga taqsimlandi.
Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqot tadqiqotchilarning natijalarga ongsiz ta'sir ko'rsatish imkoniyatini yo'q qiladi.
Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqot natijalari mustaqil ilmiy qo'mita tomonidan ko'rib chiqildi.
Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotlarni loyihalash qiyin, lekin ular eng ishonchli dalillarni beradi.
Guruh ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqot topilmalarini hamkorlar tomonidan ko'rib chiqiladigan jurnalda nashr etdi.
Ikki tomonlama ko'r tadqiqotsiz yaxshilanishlar dori tufaylimi yoki platsebo ta'sirimi ekanligini aytish qiyin.

words.definition: The process of distributing financial resources to different research projects, departments, or programs.
words.definitionUz: Moliyaviy resurslarni turli tadqiqot loyihalari, bo'limlar yoki dasturlarga taqsimlash jarayoni.
words.example1: The committee reviewed funding allocation to ensure the most important projects received support.
words.example1Translation: Qo'mita eng muhim loyihalar qo'llab-quvvatlanishini ta'minlash uchun moliyalashtirish taqsimotini ko'rib chiqdi.
words.example2: Funding allocation decisions should be based on the potential impact of the research.
words.example2Translation: Moliyalashtirish taqsimoti bo'yicha qarorlar tadqiqotning potentsial ta'siriga asoslanishi kerak.
words.example3: Scientists often compete for limited funding allocation from government agencies.
words.example3Translation: Olimlar ko'pincha davlat idoralaridan cheklangan moliyalashtirish taqsimoti uchun raqobatlashadi.
extraExamples: The new funding allocation plan prioritized research on infectious diseases.
Transparent funding allocation helps build public trust in scientific institutions.
The university's funding allocation was criticized for favoring engineering over arts.
Changes in funding allocation can significantly affect which areas of science advance quickly.
Researchers submitted detailed proposals to justify their funding allocation requests.
Funding allocation for climate research has increased in recent years due to global concern.
Efficient funding allocation ensures that money is not wasted on duplicated research efforts.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi moliyalashtirish taqsimoti rejasi yuqumli kasalliklar bo'yicha tadqiqotni ustuvor qo'ydi.
Shaffof moliyalashtirish taqsimoti ilmiy muassasalarga jamoat ishonchini mustahkamlashga yordam beradi.
Universitetning moliyalashtirish taqsimoti muhandislikni san'atga qaraganda afzal ko'rgani uchun tanqid qilindi.
Moliyalashtirish taqsimotidagi o'zgarishlar ilmning qaysi sohalarining tez rivojlanishiga sezilarli ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin.
Tadqiqotchilar moliyalashtirish taqsimoti so'rovlarini asoslash uchun batafsil takliflar taqdim etishdi.
Iqlim tadqiqotlari uchun moliyalashtirish taqsimoti so'nggi yillarda global muammo tufayli oshdi.
Samarali moliyalashtirish taqsimoti pulning takroriy tadqiqot harakatlariga sarflanmasligini ta'minlaydi.

words.definition: A set of concepts, theories, and assumptions used to structure and guide understanding of a research problem.
words.definitionUz: Tadqiqot muammosini tushunishni yo'naltirish uchun foydalaniladigan tushunchalar, nazariyalar va taxminlar to'plami.
words.example1: The researcher chose a social learning theoretical framework to guide her study on behavior.
words.example1Translation: Tadqiqotchi xatti-harakat bo'yicha tadqiqotini yo'naltirish uchun ijtimoiy o'rganish nazariy asosini tanladi.
words.example2: Without a solid theoretical framework, research can lack direction and clarity.
words.example2Translation: Mustahkam nazariy asossiz tadqiqot yo'nalish va aniqlikdan mahrum bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3: The paper explained the theoretical framework before presenting the experimental results.
words.example3Translation: Maqola tajriba natijalarini taqdim etishdan oldin nazariy asosni tushuntirdi.
extraExamples: A strong theoretical framework helps connect your research to existing scientific knowledge.
The team debated which theoretical framework best suited their study on consumer habits.
Students must understand the theoretical framework behind any method they use in their thesis.
The theoretical framework of the study was drawn from both psychology and sociology.
Choosing the right theoretical framework is one of the first steps in designing good research.
The new findings challenged the dominant theoretical framework in the field of linguistics.
A well-chosen theoretical framework makes it easier to interpret results and draw conclusions.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli nazariy asos tadqiqotingizni mavjud ilmiy bilimlar bilan bog'lashga yordam beradi.
Guruh iste'molchi odatlari bo'yicha tadqiqotlariga qaysi nazariy asos eng mos kelishini muhokama qildi.
Talabalar dissertatsiyalarida foydalangan har qanday usulning ortidagi nazariy asosni tushunishlari kerak.
Tadqiqotning nazariy asosi ham psixologiya, ham sotsiologiyadan olingan.
To'g'ri nazariy asosni tanlash yaxshi tadqiqotni loyihalashning birinchi qadamlaridan biridir.
Yangi topilmalar tilshunoslik sohasidagi hukmron nazariy asosga shubha uyg'otdi.
Yaxshi tanlangan nazariy asos natijalarni talqin qilish va xulosalar chiqarishni osonlashtiradi.

words.definition: A widespread problem in science where the results of many published studies cannot be reliably replicated by other researchers.
words.definitionUz: Nashr etilgan ko'plab tadqiqotlar natijalarini boshqa tadqiqotchilar ishonchli tarzda takrorlay olmaydigan, ilmda keng tarqalgan muammo.
words.example1: The reproducibility crisis raised serious doubts about the reliability of some popular psychology studies.
words.example1Translation: Takrorlanish inqirozi ba'zi mashhur psixologiya tadqiqotlarining ishonchliligiga jiddiy shubhalar uyg'otdi.
words.example2: Scientists are developing new standards to address the reproducibility crisis in medical research.
words.example2Translation: Olimlar tibbiy tadqiqotlardagi takrorlanish inqirozini hal qilish uchun yangi standartlar ishlab chiqmoqda.
words.example3: The reproducibility crisis has pushed journals to require researchers to share their raw data.
words.example3Translation: Takrorlanish inqirozi jurnallarni tadqiqotchilardan xom ma'lumotlarini baham ko'rishni talab qilishga majbur qildi.
extraExamples: Many scientists argue that the reproducibility crisis is partly caused by pressure to publish positive results.
The reproducibility crisis has affected fields ranging from psychology to cancer research.
Addressing the reproducibility crisis requires greater transparency in research methods.
The reproducibility crisis highlighted how some studies were based on too-small sample sizes.
Funding agencies are now requiring replication studies to combat the reproducibility crisis.
The reproducibility crisis reminded scientists that even published findings must be questioned.
Open-access data sharing has become a key tool in resolving the reproducibility crisis.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p olimlar takrorlanish inqirozi qisman ijobiy natijalarni nashr etish bosimi tufayli yuzaga kelgan deb hisoblaydi.
Takrorlanish inqirozi psixologiyadan saraton tadqiqotlarigacha bo'lgan sohalarga ta'sir qildi.
Takrorlanish inqirozini hal qilish tadqiqot usullarida katta shaffoflikni talab qiladi.
Takrorlanish inqirozi ba'zi tadqiqotlar juda kichik namunaviy o'lchamlarga asoslanganligini ko'rsatdi.
Moliyalashtirish idoralari takrorlanish inqirozi bilan kurashish uchun endi takrorlash tadqiqotlarini talab qilmoqda.
Takrorlanish inqirozi olimlarni hatto nashr etilgan topilmalar ham shubha ostiga olinishi kerakligini eslatdi.
Ochiq kirish ma'lumotlarini almashish takrorlanish inqirozini hal qilishda asosiy vosita bo'lib qoldi.

words.definition: Research that combines methods, concepts, and insights from two or more academic disciplines to address complex problems.
words.definitionUz: Murakkab muammolarni hal qilish uchun ikki yoki undan ortiq akademik sohalarning usullar, tushunchalar va g'oyalarini birlashtirgan tadqiqot.
words.example1: Interdisciplinary research combining biology and computer science has advanced the study of genetics.
words.example1Translation: Biologiya va informatikani birlashtirib olib borilgan fanlararo tadqiqot genetika o'rganishini ilgari surdik.
words.example2: The university created a new center to promote interdisciplinary research across departments.
words.example2Translation: Universitet bo'limlar bo'ylab fanlararo tadqiqotni rag'batlantirish uchun yangi markaz tashkil etdi.
words.example3: Many of today's biggest challenges, like climate change, require interdisciplinary research to solve.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi kunda iqlim o'zgarishi kabi eng katta muammolarning ko'pi hal etish uchun fanlararo tadqiqotni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Interdisciplinary research teams often produce more creative and effective solutions.
The project brought together economists, engineers, and sociologists for interdisciplinary research.
Interdisciplinary research can be challenging because experts from different fields use different methods.
Funding for interdisciplinary research has grown as institutions recognize its value.
Her interdisciplinary research on mental health and urban design attracted international attention.
Interdisciplinary research breaks down the walls between academic subjects.
The success of interdisciplinary research depends on good communication between team members.
extraExampleTranslations: Fanlararo tadqiqot guruhlari ko'pincha ijodiyroq va samaraliroq yechimlar ishlab chiqadi.
Loyiha fanlararo tadqiqot uchun iqtisodchilar, muhandislar va sotsiologlarni bir araya keltirdi.
Fanlararo tadqiqot qiyin bo'lishi mumkin, chunki turli soha mutaxassislari turli usullardan foydalanadi.
Muassasalar uning qiymatini tan olishi bilan fanlararo tadqiqotlarga moliyalashtirish o'sdi.
Uning aqliy salomatlik va shahar dizayni bo'yicha fanlararo tadqiqoti xalqaro e'tiborni tortdi.
Fanlararo tadqiqot akademik fanlar o'rtasidagi devorlarni yo'q qiladi.
Fanlararo tadqiqotning muvaffaqiyati jamoa a'zolari o'rtasidagi yaxshi muloqotga bog'liq.

words.definition: Policy decisions that are developed and evaluated based on objective, empirical research evidence rather than opinion or tradition.
words.definitionUz: Fikr yoki an'anaga emas, balki ob'ektiv, empirik tadqiqot dalillariga asoslanib ishlab chiqiladigan va baholanadiigan siyosat qarorlari.
words.example1: Evidence-based policy has improved outcomes in public health by replacing guesswork with data.
words.example1Translation: Dalilga asoslangan siyosat taxminni ma'lumotlar bilan almashtirish orqali jamoat sog'lig'i natijalarini yaxshiladi.
words.example2: The government used evidence-based policy to reform the country's criminal justice system.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat mamlakatning jinoyat-huquq tizimini isloh qilish uchun dalilga asoslangan siyosatdan foydalandi.
words.example3: Critics argued that the new education law was not based on evidence-based policy principles.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar yangi ta'lim qonuni dalilga asoslangan siyosat tamoyillariga asoslanmaganligini ta'kidlashdi.
extraExamples: Evidence-based policy requires governments to invest in quality research and data collection.
Many health organizations advocate for evidence-based policy to reduce smoking rates.
Evidence-based policy is more likely to succeed because it is grounded in what actually works.
Politicians sometimes resist evidence-based policy when the findings conflict with their beliefs.
The shift toward evidence-based policy has transformed how social programs are designed.
Evidence-based policy ensures that taxpayer money is spent on programs that deliver results.
International organizations encourage developing countries to adopt evidence-based policy frameworks.
extraExampleTranslations: Dalilga asoslangan siyosat hukumatlardan sifatli tadqiqot va ma'lumot yig'ishga sarmoya kiritishni talab qiladi.
Ko'p sog'liqni saqlash tashkilotlari chekish darajasini kamaytirish uchun dalilga asoslangan siyosatni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Dalilga asoslangan siyosat muvaffaqiyatga ko'proq erishadi, chunki u aslida nima ishlashiga asoslangan.
Siyosatchilar ba'zida topilmalar o'z e'tiqodlari bilan ziddiyatga kirsa, dalilga asoslangan siyosatga qarshilik ko'rsatadi.
Dalilga asoslangan siyosatga o'tish ijtimoiy dasturlarni qanday loyihalashtirishni o'zgartirdi.
Dalilga asoslangan siyosat soliq to'lovchilar pulining natijalarga erishuvchi dasturlarga sarflanishini ta'minlaydi.
Xalqaro tashkilotlar rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarni dalilga asoslangan siyosat asoslarini qabul qilishga undaydi.

words.definition: Research conducted purely out of intellectual curiosity to expand knowledge, without a specific practical application in mind.
words.definitionUz: Aniq amaliy maqsadsiz, bilimni kengaytirish istagi asosida faqat intellektual qiziqish tufayli olib boriladigan tadqiqot.
words.example1: Curiosity-driven research into how stars form has expanded our understanding of the universe.
words.example1Translation: Yulduzlarning qanday hosil bo'lishi haqidagi qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot koinot haqidagi tushunchalarimizni kengaytirdi.
words.example2: Many of the greatest scientific discoveries started as curiosity-driven research with no obvious use.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab eng buyuk ilmiy kashfiyotlar aniq foydasi bo'lmagan qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot sifatida boshlangan.
words.example3: Curiosity-driven research is often underfunded because its benefits are not immediately clear.
words.example3Translation: Qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot ko'pincha uning afzalliklari darhol aniq bo'lmaganligi sababli kam moliyalashtiriladi.
extraExamples: The scientist pursued curiosity-driven research on black holes simply because she found them fascinating.
Curiosity-driven research often leads to unexpected breakthroughs that no one could have predicted.
Some of the most important inventions came from curiosity-driven research done decades earlier.
Universities play a vital role in supporting curiosity-driven research through academic freedom.
Curiosity-driven research into basic chemistry led to the discovery of new materials used in electronics.
Governments are encouraged to fund curiosity-driven research alongside applied science programs.
Without curiosity-driven research, science would only solve today's problems and miss tomorrow's opportunities.
extraExampleTranslations: Olima qora tuynuklar unga qiziqarli bo'lgani uchun shunchaki ularga oid qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot olib bordi.
Qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot ko'pincha hech kim oldindan ayta olmagan kutilmagan kashfiyotlarga olib keladi.
Eng muhim ixtirolarning bir qismi o'nlab yillar oldin olib borilgan qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqotdan kelib chiqqan.
Universitetlar akademik erkinlik orqali qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqotni qo'llab-quvvatlashda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Asosiy kimyo bo'yicha qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqot elektronikada qo'llaniladigan yangi materiallarning kashf etilishiga olib keldi.
Hukumatlar amaliy fan dasturlari bilan bir qatorda qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqotlarni moliyalashtirishga undamoqda.
Qiziqishga asoslangan tadqiqotsiz, fan faqat bugungi muammolarni hal qilar va ertangi imkoniyatlarni qo'ldan boy berar edi.

words.definition: Transport services available to the general public such as buses, trains, and subways.
words.definitionUz: Jamoat transporti — avtobus, poyezd va metro kabi barcha odamlar foydalana oladigan transport xizmatlaridir.
words.example1: Public transportation is essential for reducing traffic in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Jamoat transporti katta shaharlarda tirbandlikni kamaytirish uchun juda muhim.
words.example2: Many people rely on public transportation to commute to work every day.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar har kuni ishga borish uchun jamoat transportiga tayanadi.
words.example3: The government is investing more in public transportation to make it faster and cleaner.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat jamoat transportini tezroq va toza qilish uchun ko‘proq mablag‘ ajratmoqda.
extraExamples: Using public transportation helps lower air pollution in urban areas.
Public transportation is usually more affordable than owning a car.
Some cities offer free public transportation to encourage its use.
Reliable public transportation improves quality of life for residents.
During rush hour, public transportation can become very crowded.
Many tourists prefer public transportation to explore the city.
Expanding public transportation networks is a key urban planning goal.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoat transportidan foydalanish shaharlarda havo ifloslanishini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Jamoat transporti odatda shaxsiy avtomobilga qaraganda arzonroq.
Ba’zi shaharlar undan foydalanishni rag‘batlantirish uchun bepul jamoat transportini taklif qiladi.
Ishonchli jamoat transporti aholining hayot sifatini yaxshilaydi.
Qatnov vaqtida jamoat transporti juda gavjum bo‘lib qolishi mumkin.
Ko‘p sayyohlar shaharni kashf qilish uchun jamoat transportini afzal ko‘radi.
Jamoat transporti tarmoqlarini kengaytirish shaharsozlikning asosiy maqsadlaridan biridir.

words.definition: A condition where excessive traffic causes slow movement and long queues of vehicles.
words.definitionUz: Tirbandlik — haddan tashqari ko‘p transport vositalari tufayli harakat sekinlashib, uzun navbatlar paydo bo‘ladigan holatdir.
words.example1: Traffic congestion wastes a lot of people’s time every morning.
words.example1Translation: Tirbandlik har kuni ertalab odamlarning vaqtini behuda sarflaydi.
words.example2: The city is building new roads to reduce traffic congestion.
words.example2Translation: Shahar tirbandlikni kamaytirish uchun yangi yo‘llar qurmoqda.
words.example3: Working from home has helped many people avoid traffic congestion.
words.example3Translation: Uydan ishlash ko‘p odamlarga tirbandlikdan qochishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Traffic congestion increases air pollution and fuel consumption.
Smart traffic lights can help ease traffic congestion in busy areas.
Traffic congestion is a major problem in rapidly growing cities.
Public transportation can significantly reduce traffic congestion.
Rush hour traffic congestion is especially bad on highways.
Cities are using apps to inform drivers about traffic congestion.
Reducing traffic congestion improves the overall quality of urban life.
extraExampleTranslations: Tirbandlik havo ifloslanishi va yonilg‘i sarfini oshiradi.
Aqlli svetoforlar gavjum hududlarda tirbandlikni yumshatishga yordam beradi.
Tirbandlik tez o‘sib borayotgan shaharlar uchun katta muammodir.
Jamoat transporti tirbandlikni sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
Qatnov soatlaridagi tirbandlik ayniqsa magistral yo‘llarda kuchli bo‘ladi.
Shaharlar haydovchilarni tirbandlik haqida xabardor qilish uchun ilovalardan foydalanmoqda.
Tirbandlikni kamaytirish shahar hayotining umumiy sifatini yaxshilaydi.

words.definition: Transport methods that have a low impact on the environment, such as walking, cycling, and electric vehicles.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror transport — yurish, velosiped va elektr transport vositalari kabi atrof-muhitga kam zararli transport usullaridir.
words.example1: Many cities are promoting sustainable transport to fight climate change.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p shaharlar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kurashish uchun barqaror transportni rag‘batlantirmoqda.
words.example2: Cycling is one of the most sustainable transport options in urban areas.
words.example2Translation: Velosiped shahar hududlarida eng barqaror transport variantlaridan biridir.
words.example3: Governments offer incentives for people who choose sustainable transport.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar barqaror transportni tanlagan odamlarga imtiyozlar beradi.
extraExamples: Sustainable transport reduces carbon emissions and improves air quality.
Electric buses are an important part of sustainable transport systems.
Urban planning should prioritize sustainable transport solutions.
Sustainable transport can save money on fuel and maintenance.
Many countries are investing in sustainable transport infrastructure.
Promoting sustainable transport helps create healthier cities.
Sustainable transport includes both individual and public options.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror transport uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytiradi va havo sifatini yaxshilaydi.
Elektr avtobuslar barqaror transport tizimlarining muhim qismidir.
Shaharsozlik barqaror transport yechimlariga ustunlik berishi kerak.
Barqaror transport yonilg‘i va texnik xizmat xarajatlarini tejashga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p mamlakatlar barqaror transport infratuzilmasiga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Barqaror transportni rag‘batlantirish sog‘lomroq shaharlar yaratishga yordam beradi.
Barqaror transport ham shaxsiy, ham jamoat variantlarini o‘z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: The planning and improvement of basic systems like roads, railways, bridges, and airports.
words.definitionUz: Infratuzilma rivoji — yo‘llar, temir yo‘llar, ko‘priklar va aeroportlar kabi asosiy tizimlarning rejalashtirish va yaxshilash jarayonidir.
words.example1: Infrastructure development is crucial for economic growth.
words.example1Translation: Infratuzilma rivoji iqtisodiy o‘sish uchun juda muhim.
words.example2: The government announced a new plan for infrastructure development.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat infratuzilma rivoji bo‘yicha yangi rejani e’lon qildi.
words.example3: Infrastructure development creates many jobs in construction and engineering.
words.example3Translation: Infratuzilma rivoji qurilish va muhandislik sohasida ko‘p ish o‘rinlarini yaratadi.
extraExamples: Good infrastructure development improves transportation and communication.
Infrastructure development in rural areas helps reduce urban migration.
Sustainable infrastructure development considers environmental impact.
International funding often supports infrastructure development in developing countries.
Modern infrastructure development includes smart technology integration.
Poor infrastructure development can slow down a country’s progress.
The project focuses on long-term infrastructure development.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi infratuzilma rivoji transport va aloqani yaxshilaydi.
Qishloq joylarda infratuzilma rivoji shaharlarga ko‘chib ketishni kamaytiradi.
Barqaror infratuzilma rivoji atrof-muhit ta’sirini hisobga oladi.
Xalqaro moliyalashtirish ko‘pincha rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda infratuzilma rivojini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Zamonaviy infratuzilma rivoji aqlli texnologiyalarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Yomon infratuzilma rivoji mamlakat taraqqiyotini sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
Loyiha uzoq muddatli infratuzilma rivojiga qaratilgan.

words.definition: A person who travels regularly between home and work or school.
words.definitionUz: Yo‘lovchi — uy va ish yoki o‘quv joyi o‘rtasida muntazam qatnov qiladigan shaxsdir.
words.example1: Many commuters spend hours traveling to work every day.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p yo‘lovchilar har kuni ishga borishga soatlab vaqt sarflashadi.
words.example2: Commuters prefer trains because they are faster than driving.
words.example2Translation: Yo‘lovchilar poyezdlarni afzal ko‘rishadi, chunki ular haydashdan tezroq.
words.example3: Special lanes for commuters help reduce morning traffic.
words.example3Translation: Yo‘lovchilar uchun maxsus yo‘laklar ertalabki tirbandlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Commuter trains are often crowded during peak hours.
The city provides parking facilities for commuters.
Many commuters listen to podcasts during their daily journey.
Rising fuel prices affect commuters who drive to work.
Remote work has reduced the number of daily commuters.
Commuters face stress from traffic delays and crowded transport.
Bicycle commuters are increasing in many European cities.
extraExampleTranslations: Yo‘lovchi poyezdlari eng yuqori soatlarda gavjum bo‘ladi.
Shahar yo‘lovchilar uchun avtoturargohlar taqdim etadi.
Ko‘p yo‘lovchilar kundalik sayohat paytida podkast tinglashadi.
Yoqilg‘i narxlarining o‘sishi ishga mashinada boradigan yo‘lovchilarga ta’sir qiladi.
Masofaviy ish kundalik yo‘lovchilar sonini kamaytirdi.
Yo‘lovchilar tirbandlik kechikishlari va gavjum transportdan stress oladi.
Velosipedda qatnovchi yo‘lovchilar ko‘p Yevropa shaharlarida ko‘paymoqda.

words.definition: The release of carbon dioxide (CO₂) and other greenhouse gases into the atmosphere.
words.definitionUz: Uglerod chiqindilari — atmosfera ga uglerod dioksidi (CO₂) va boshqa issiqxona gazlarining chiqarilishidir.
words.example1: Transportation is one of the largest sources of carbon emissions.
words.example1Translation: Transport uglerod chiqindilarining eng katta manbalaridan biridir.
words.example2: Electric vehicles help reduce carbon emissions from road transport.
words.example2Translation: Elektr transport vositalari yo‘l transportidagi uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Countries are setting targets to cut carbon emissions by 2030.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakatlar 2030 yilgacha uglerod chiqindilarini qisqartirish bo‘yicha maqsadlar qo‘ymoqda.
extraExamples: Reducing carbon emissions is essential to slow down global warming.
Carbon emissions from aviation have increased significantly.
Governments use taxes to discourage high carbon emissions.
Planting trees helps absorb some carbon emissions.
Companies are investing in technologies to lower their carbon emissions.
Tracking carbon emissions is important for environmental policies.
Switching to renewable energy reduces carbon emissions from transport.
extraExampleTranslations: Uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish global isishni sekinlashtirish uchun zarur.
Aviatsiyadan chiqadigan uglerod chiqindilari sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Hukumatlar yuqori uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish uchun soliqlar qo‘llaydi.
Daraxt ekish ba’zi uglerod chiqindilarini o‘zlashtirishga yordam beradi.
Kompaniyalar uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish uchun texnologiyalarga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Uglerod chiqindilarini kuzatish ekologik siyosatlar uchun muhim.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga o‘tish transportdagi uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytiradi.

words.definition: Designed to be safe, convenient, and pleasant for people who are walking.
words.definitionUz: Piyodalar uchun qulay — yuruvchi odamlar uchun xavfsiz, qulay va yoqimli qilib loyihalashtirilgan.
words.example1: The downtown area has become more pedestrian-friendly with wide sidewalks.
words.example1Translation: Shahar markazi keng piyoda yo‘laklari bilan piyodalar uchun qulayroq bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: A pedestrian-friendly city encourages people to walk instead of driving.
