words.example2Translation: Piyodalar uchun qulay shahar odamlarni mashina haydash o‘rniga yurishga undaydi.
words.example3: New parks and pedestrian-friendly zones improve the living environment.
words.example3Translation: Yangi bog‘lar va piyodalar uchun qulay zonalari yashash muhitini yaxshilaydi.
extraExamples: Pedestrian-friendly streets often have benches and trees.
Many European cities are known for being highly pedestrian-friendly.
Making neighborhoods pedestrian-friendly reduces traffic accidents.
Pedestrian-friendly design includes safe crossings and good lighting.
Tourist areas benefit greatly from pedestrian-friendly infrastructure.
Cities are converting car lanes into pedestrian-friendly spaces.
A pedestrian-friendly environment promotes healthier lifestyles.
extraExampleTranslations: Piyodalar uchun qulay ko‘chalar ko‘pincha skameykalar va daraxtlarga ega.
Ko‘p Yevropa shaharlari piyodalar uchun juda qulayligi bilan mashhur.
Mahallalarni piyodalar uchun qulay qilish transport hodisalarini kamaytiradi.
Piyodalar uchun qulay dizayn xavfsiz o‘tish joylari va yaxshi yoritishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Sayyohlik hududlari piyodalar uchun qulay infratuzilmadan katta foyda ko‘radi.
Shaharlar avtomobil yo‘laklarini piyodalar uchun qulay joylarga aylantirmoqda.
Piyodalar uchun qulay muhit sog‘lom turmush tarzini rag‘batlantiradi.

words.definition: A transportation system designed to carry large numbers of passengers efficiently.
words.definitionUz: Keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimi — katta sonli yo‘lovchilarni samarali tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan transport tizimidir.
words.example1: The city’s mass transit system includes buses, trains, and a subway.
words.example1Translation: Shahar keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimi avtobus, poyezd va metrodan iborat.
words.example2: A reliable mass transit system reduces the number of private cars on the road.
words.example2Translation: Ishonchli keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimi yo‘llardagi shaxsiy avtomobillar sonini kamaytiradi.
words.example3: Investing in mass transit systems is key to solving urban mobility problems.
words.example3Translation: Keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlariga sarmoya kiritish shahar harakatlanish muammolarini hal qilishning kalitidir.
extraExamples: Mass transit systems are more environmentally friendly than individual cars.
Many Asian cities have excellent mass transit systems.
The expansion of the mass transit system will serve more neighborhoods.
Mass transit systems help lower traffic congestion during peak hours.
Modern mass transit systems use smart cards for easy payment.
Efficient mass transit systems support economic development.
The government plans to modernize the entire mass transit system.
extraExampleTranslations: Keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlari shaxsiy avtomobillarga qaraganda atrof-muhit uchun zararsizroq.
Ko‘p Osiyo shaharlarida ajoyib keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlari mavjud.
Keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimini kengaytirish ko‘proq mahallalarga xizmat qiladi.
Keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlari yuqori soatlarda tirbandlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Zamonaviy keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlari qulay to‘lov uchun smart kartalardan foydalanadi.
Samarali keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimlari iqtisodiy rivojlanishni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Hukumat butun keng ko‘lamli jamoat transporti tizimini modernizatsiya qilishni rejalashtirmoqda.

words.definition: An arrangement where passengers share a vehicle for a trip, usually arranged through mobile apps.
words.definitionUz: Birgalikda sayohat qilish — odatda mobil ilovalar orqali tartibga solinadigan, yo‘lovchilar bir transport vositasini birgalikda ishlatib sayohat qilish tartibidir.
words.example1: Ride-sharing services like Uber have changed how people travel in cities.
words.example1Translation: Uber kabi birgalikda sayohat xizmatlari shaharlarda odamlarning sayohat usulini o‘zgartirdi.
words.example2: Ride-sharing can reduce the number of cars on the road.
words.example2Translation: Birgalikda sayohat yo‘llardagi avtomobillar sonini kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many young people prefer ride-sharing over owning their own car.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p yoshlar o‘z mashinasiga ega bo‘lish o‘rniga birgalikda sayohatni afzal ko‘radi.
extraExamples: Ride-sharing is convenient but can sometimes increase traffic in busy areas.
Safety features are important in ride-sharing platforms.
Ride-sharing helps people who don’t have access to public transportation.
The rise of ride-sharing has affected traditional taxi businesses.
Ride-sharing apps use GPS to match drivers with passengers.
Shared rides are often cheaper than taking a taxi alone.
Cities are creating regulations for ride-sharing services.
extraExampleTranslations: Birgalikda sayohat qulay, ammo gavjum hududlarda tirbandlikni oshirishi mumkin.
Xavfsizlik xususiyatlari birgalikda sayohat platformalarida muhim.
Birgalikda sayohat jamoat transportiga ega bo‘lmagan odamlarga yordam beradi.
Birgalikda sayohatning o‘sishi an’anaviy taksi biznesiga ta’sir qildi.
Birgalikda sayohat ilovalari haydovchilarni yo‘lovchilar bilan moslashtirish uchun GPSdan foydalanadi.
Birgalikdagi sayohatlar odatda yolg‘iz taksiga qaraganda arzonroq.
Shaharlar birgalikda sayohat xizmatlari uchun qoidalarni ishlab chiqmoqda.

words.definition: The detailed organization and implementation of complex operations, especially in freight transport and supply chains.
words.definitionUz: Logistika — murakkab operatsiyalarni, ayniqsa yuk tashish va ta’minot zanjirlarini batafsil tashkil etish va amalga oshirishdir.
words.example1: Good logistics is essential for timely delivery of goods.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi logistika tovarlarni o‘z vaqtida yetkazib berish uchun zarur.
words.example2: The company improved its logistics to reduce shipping costs.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya yuk tashish xarajatlarini kamaytirish uchun logistikasini yaxshiladi.
words.example3: Modern logistics uses advanced technology and data analysis.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy logistika ilg‘or texnologiya va ma’lumotlar tahlilidan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Logistics plays a critical role in global trade.
E-commerce growth has increased demand for efficient logistics.
Logistics companies are adopting electric vehicles for greener operations.
Poor logistics can lead to delays and increased costs.
Supply chain logistics was severely affected during the pandemic.
Careful logistics planning helps avoid warehouse overcrowding.
The logistics sector employs millions of people worldwide.
extraExampleTranslations: Logistika xalqaro savdoda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
Elektron tijoratning o‘sishi samarali logistika talabini oshirdi.
Logistika kompaniyalari ekologikroq ishlash uchun elektr transport vositalarini qo‘llamoqda.
Yomon logistika kechikishlar va xarajatlarning oshishiga olib keladi.
Ta’minot zanjiri logistikasi pandemiya davrida jiddiy zarar ko‘rdi.
Ehtiyotkorlik bilan logistika rejalashtirish omborxonalarning gavjum bo‘lishini oldini oladi.
Logistika sektori butun dunyoda millionlab odamlarni ish bilan ta’minlaydi.

words.definition: Self-driving cars or trucks that operate without direct human control.
words.definitionUz: Avtonom transport vositalari — insonning to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri boshqaruvsiz ishlaydigan o‘zini o‘zi boshqaradigan avtomobillar yoki yuk mashinalaridir.
words.example1: Autonomous vehicles could revolutionize the future of transportation.
words.example1Translation: Avtonom transport vositalari transport kelajagini tubdan o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
words.example2: Many companies are testing autonomous vehicles on public roads.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p kompaniyalar avtonom transport vositalarini jamoat yo‘llarida sinab ko‘rmoqda.
words.example3: Safety concerns remain the biggest challenge for autonomous vehicles.
words.example3Translation: Xavfsizlik masalalari avtonom transport vositalari uchun eng katta muammo bo‘lib qolmoqda.
extraExamples: Autonomous vehicles can reduce traffic accidents caused by human error.
The development of autonomous vehicles requires advanced artificial intelligence.
Many cities are preparing regulations for autonomous vehicles.
Autonomous vehicles may change the need for traditional drivers.
Electric autonomous vehicles combine sustainability and technology.
Public trust in autonomous vehicles is still developing.
Autonomous vehicles are expected to transform logistics and delivery services.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtonom transport vositalari inson xatolaridan kelib chiqadigan transport hodisalarini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Avtonom transport vositalarini rivojlantirish ilg‘or sun’iy intellektni talab qiladi.
Ko‘p shaharlar avtonom transport vositalari uchun qoidalarni tayyorlamoqda.
Avtonom transport vositalari an’anaviy haydovchilarga bo‘lgan ehtiyojni o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
Elektr avtonom transport vositalari barqarorlik va texnologiyani birlashtiradi.
Avtonom transport vositalariga bo‘lgan jamoatchilik ishonchi hali shakllanmoqda.
Avtonom transport vositalari logistika va yetkazib berish xizmatlarini o‘zgartirishi kutilmoqda.

words.definition: The final leg of a journey that connects a transportation hub to the final destination.
words.definitionUz: Oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi — transport markazidan yakuniy manzilgacha bo‘lgan sayohatning so‘nggi qismidir.
words.example1: Improving last-mile connectivity makes public transport more convenient.
words.example1Translation: Oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishini yaxshilash jamoat transportini qulayroq qiladi.
words.example2: Bike-sharing and e-scooters help solve last-mile connectivity problems.
words.example2Translation: Velosiped va elektr skuterlar birgalikda oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi muammolarini hal qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Good last-mile connectivity encourages more people to use mass transit.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi ko‘proq odamlarni keng ko‘lamli jamoat transportidan foydalanishga undaydi.
extraExamples: Last-mile connectivity is often the most challenging part of urban commuting.
Companies are developing apps to improve last-mile connectivity.
Efficient last-mile connectivity reduces overall travel time.
Rural areas often lack proper last-mile connectivity.
Last-mile connectivity solutions include walking paths and micro-mobility.
Investments in last-mile connectivity boost public transport usage.
Technology plays a big role in solving last-mile connectivity issues.
extraExampleTranslations: Oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi shahar qatnovlarining eng qiyin qismi hisoblanadi.
Kompaniyalar oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishini yaxshilash uchun ilovalar ishlab chiqmoqda.
Samarali oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi umumiy sayohat vaqtini qisqartiradi.
Qishloq hududlarida ko‘pincha yaxshi oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi yetishmaydi.
Oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi yechimlari piyoda yo‘laklari va mikromobillikni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishiga sarmoyalar jamoat transportidan foydalanishni oshiradi.
Texnologiya oxirgi kilometr bog‘lanishi muammolarini hal qilishda katta rol o‘ynaydi.

words.definition: Urban planning that concentrates housing, jobs, and services near public transport hubs.
words.definitionUz: Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish — uy-joy, ish o‘rinlari va xizmatlarni jamoat transporti markazlari yaqinida joylashtirishga asoslangan shaharsozlik rejalashtirishdir.
words.example1: Transit-oriented development helps reduce reliance on private cars.
words.example1Translation: Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish shaxsiy avtomobillarga qaramlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many new neighborhoods are designed using transit-oriented development principles.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p yangi mahallalar transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish tamoyillariga asosan loyihalashtirilmoqda.
words.example3: Transit-oriented development creates more walkable and livable communities.
words.example3Translation: Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish piyoda yurish mumkin bo‘lgan va yashashga qulay jamoalarni yaratadi.
extraExamples: Transit-oriented development supports sustainable urban growth.
This approach increases public transport ridership.
Transit-oriented development mixes residential and commercial spaces.
Cities around the world are adopting transit-oriented development.
Good transit-oriented development reduces traffic congestion.
Transit-oriented development promotes healthier lifestyles.
Planning laws are being updated to encourage transit-oriented development.
extraExampleTranslations: Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish barqaror shahar o‘sishini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Bu yondashuv jamoat transportidan foydalanishni oshiradi.
Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish turar-joy va tijorat maydonlarini aralashtiradi.
Dunyo bo‘ylab shaharlar transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanishni qo‘llamoqda.
Yaxshi transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish tirbandlikni kamaytiradi.
Transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanish sog‘lom turmush tarzini rag‘batlantiradi.
Rejalashtirish qonunlari transportga yo‘naltirilgan rivojlanishni rag‘batlantirish uchun yangilanmoqda.

words.definition: The relationship between the distance traveled and the amount of fuel consumed.
words.definitionUz: Yoqilg‘i samaradorligi — bosib o‘tilgan masofa va sarflangan yoqilg‘i miqdori o‘rtasidagi nisbatdir.
words.example1: Modern cars have much better fuel efficiency than older models.
words.example1Translation: Zamonaviy avtomobillar eski modellariga qaraganda yoqilg‘i samaradorligi ancha yaxshi.
words.example2: Improving fuel efficiency helps reduce carbon emissions.
words.example2Translation: Yoqilg‘i samaradorligini oshirish uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Drivers are looking for vehicles with high fuel efficiency to save money.
words.example3Translation: Haydovchilar pul tejash uchun yuqori yoqilg‘i samaradorligiga ega transport vositalarini qidirmoqda.
extraExamples: Hybrid cars offer excellent fuel efficiency.
Fuel efficiency standards are becoming stricter worldwide.
Maintaining proper tire pressure improves fuel efficiency.
Fuel efficiency is an important factor when buying a new car.
Electric vehicles have superior fuel efficiency compared to gasoline cars.
Government incentives promote fuel-efficient vehicles.
Better fuel efficiency reduces dependence on fossil fuels.
extraExampleTranslations: Gibrid avtomobillar yoqilg‘i samaradorligi bo‘yicha ajoyib natija ko‘rsatadi.
Yoqilg‘i samaradorligi standartlari butun dunyoda qattiqroq bo‘lmoqda.
Shinalar bosimini to‘g‘ri saqlash yoqilg‘i samaradorligini oshiradi.
Yangi mashina sotib olayotganda yoqilg‘i samaradorligi muhim omil hisoblanadi.
Elektr transport vositalari benzinli avtomobillarga nisbatan yuqori yoqilg‘i samaradorligiga ega.
Hukumat rag‘batlari yoqilg‘i tejamkor transport vositalarini rag‘batlantiradi.
Yaxshi yoqilg‘i samaradorligi qazilma yoqilg‘ilarga qaramlikni kamaytiradi.

words.definition: The seamless linking of different transport modes such as train, bus, and bicycle.
words.definitionUz: Intermodal bog‘lanish — poyezd, avtobus va velosiped kabi turli transport turlarining uzluksiz bog‘lanishidir.
words.example1: Good intermodal connectivity makes traveling between cities easier.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi intermodal bog‘lanish shaharlar orasidagi sayohatni osonlashtiradi.
words.example2: The new station improves intermodal connectivity for passengers.
words.example2Translation: Yangi bekat yo‘lovchilar uchun intermodal bog‘lanishni yaxshilaydi.
words.example3: Intermodal connectivity reduces the need to own multiple vehicles.
words.example3Translation: Intermodal bog‘lanish bir nechta transport vositasiga ega bo‘lish zaruratini kamaytiradi.
extraExamples: Intermodal connectivity is a key feature of modern transportation hubs.
Apps help passengers plan journeys with good intermodal connectivity.
Improving intermodal connectivity supports sustainable transport goals.
The airport has excellent intermodal connectivity with trains and buses.
Cities are investing in better intermodal connectivity to ease congestion.
Intermodal connectivity allows for smoother door-to-door travel.
Lack of intermodal connectivity causes inconvenience for travelers.
extraExampleTranslations: Intermodal bog‘lanish zamonaviy transport markazlarining asosiy xususiyatlaridan biridir.
Ilovalar yo‘lovchilarga yaxshi intermodal bog‘lanish bilan sayohatni rejalashtirishga yordam beradi.
Intermodal bog‘lanishni yaxshilash barqaror transport maqsadlarini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Aeroport poyezd va avtobuslar bilan ajoyib intermodal bog‘lanishga ega.
Shaharlar tirbandlikni yumshatish uchun intermodal bog‘lanishni yaxshilashga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Intermodal bog‘lanish eshikdan eshikgacha silliq sayohatni ta’minlaydi.
Intermodal bog‘lanishning yetishmasligi sayohatchilar uchun noqulaylik tug‘diradi.

words.definition: The trail of data a person leaves behind through their online activities, such as browsing, posting, and shopping.
words.definitionUz: Odamning internetda amalga oshirgan harakatlari — saytlarga kirish, post yozish, xarid qilish — natijasida qoldiradigan ma'lumotlar izi.
words.example1: Everything you post online becomes part of your digital footprint.
words.example1Translation: Internetda joylashtiradigan har narsa sizning raqamli izingizning bir qismiga aylanadi.
words.example2: Employers often check a candidate's digital footprint before making a hiring decision.
words.example2Translation: Ish beruvchilar ko'pincha ishga olish qarorini qabul qilishdan oldin nomzodning raqamli izini tekshiradi.
words.example3: Being careful about what you share online helps protect your digital footprint.
words.example3Translation: Internetda nima ulashishingizga ehtiyot bo'lish raqamli izingizni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Your digital footprint can reveal a lot about your interests and habits.
Deleting an account does not always erase your digital footprint.
Children are building a digital footprint from a very young age.
Companies use your digital footprint to target you with advertisements.
A negative digital footprint can affect your reputation for years.
Using private browsing can reduce but not eliminate your digital footprint.
Schools now teach students how to manage their digital footprint responsibly.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli izingiz qiziqishlaringiz va odatlaringiz haqida ko'p narsa aytib berishi mumkin.
Hisobni o'chirish har doim ham raqamli izingizni yo'q qilmaydi.
Bolalar juda yosh yoshdan raqamli iz qoldira boshlaydi.
Kompaniyalar sizning raqamli izingizdan reklamalar bilan maqsad qilib foydalanadi.
Salbiy raqamli iz yillar davomida obro'yingizga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Maxfiy ko'rishdan foydalanish raqamli izingizni kamaytirishi mumkin, ammo butunlay yo'q qilmaydi.
Maktablar endi o'quvchilarga raqamli izlarini mas'uliyat bilan boshqarishni o'rgatadi.

words.definition: The existence and visibility of a person or brand on the internet, including their social media profiles, websites, and content.
words.definitionUz: Shaxs yoki brendning ijtimoiy tarmoqlardagi profillari, veb-saytlari va kontentlari orqali internetda ko'rinish darajasi.
words.example1: Building a strong online presence is essential for modern businesses.
words.example1Translation: Kuchli onlayn mavjudlikni shakllantirish zamonaviy biznes uchun muhim.
words.example2: She improved her online presence by regularly posting professional content.
words.example2Translation: U muntazam ravishda professional kontent joylashtirib, onlayn mavjudligini yaxshiladi.
words.example3: A consistent online presence helps people and brands stay relevant.
words.example3Translation: Izchil onlayn mavjudlik odamlar va brendlarga dolzarb bo'lib qolishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Many freelancers build their careers through a strong online presence.
A poorly managed online presence can damage a brand's reputation.
Having an online presence makes it easier for clients to find you.
Social media is one of the most powerful tools for building an online presence.
Job seekers are advised to maintain a professional online presence.
Even small businesses need an online presence to compete today.
A personal website is a great way to strengthen your online presence.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab frilanserlar kuchli onlayn mavjudlik orqali o'z karerasini quradilar.
Yomon boshqarilgan onlayn mavjudlik brendning obro'siga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Onlayn mavjudlikka ega bo'lish mijozlarga sizni topishni osonlashtiradi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar onlayn mavjudlikni shakllantirish uchun eng kuchli vositalardan biridir.
Ish qidiruvchilarga professional onlayn mavjudlikni saqlash tavsiya etiladi.
Hatto kichik bizneslar ham bugun raqobat qilish uchun onlayn mavjudlikka muhtoj.
Shaxsiy veb-sayt onlayn mavjudligingizni mustahkamlashning ajoyib usuli.

words.definition: The use of digital technology to repeatedly harass, threaten, or intimidate someone, especially on social media.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishini internet yoki ijtimoiy tarmoqlar orqali qayta-qayta haqorat qilish, qo'rqitish yoki ezish.
words.example1: Cyberbullying can cause serious emotional harm to its victims.
words.example1Translation: Kiberxo'jayinlik qurbonlariga jiddiy hissiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example2: Many schools now have policies in place to deal with cyberbullying.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab maktablar endi kiberxo'jayinlik bilan kurashish uchun siyosat joriy etgan.
words.example3: She reported the cyberbullying to the platform and blocked the user.
words.example3Translation: U kiberxo'jayinlik haqida platformaga xabar berdi va foydalanuvchini blokladi.
extraExamples: Cyberbullying often happens anonymously, which makes it harder to stop.
Teenagers are among the most common victims of cyberbullying.
Parents should talk to their children about the dangers of cyberbullying.
Cyberbullying can lead to anxiety, depression, and low self-esteem.
Some countries have introduced laws specifically against cyberbullying.
Social media platforms are working to detect and remove cyberbullying content.
Unlike traditional bullying, cyberbullying can follow a person home.
extraExampleTranslations: Kiberxo'jayinlik ko'pincha anonimlik bilan amalga oshiriladi, bu esa uni to'xtatishni qiyinlashtiradi.
O'smirlar kiberxo'jayinlikning eng ko'p uchraydigan qurbonlari orasida.
Ota-onalar farzandlari bilan kiberxo'jayinlik xatarlari haqida gaplashishlari kerak.
Kiberxo'jayinlik tashvish, depressiya va past o'z-o'ziga ishonchga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ba'zi mamlakatlar kiberxo'jayinlikka qarshi maxsus qonunlar kiritdi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoq platformalari kiberxo'jayinlik kontentini aniqlash va o'chirishga harakat qilmoqda.
An'anaviy xo'jayinlikdan farqli o'laroq, kiberxo'jayinlik odamni uyida ham ta'qib qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: Online content that spreads rapidly and widely as large numbers of people share it across social media and other platforms.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p odamlar tomonidan tez tarqatiladigan va qisqa vaqt ichida millionlab kishilarga yetib boradigan internet kontenti.
words.example1: The funny video became viral content overnight and got millions of views.
words.example1Translation: Qiziqarli video bir kechada viral kontentga aylandi va millionlab ko'rishga ega bo'ldi.
words.example2: Brands often try to create viral content to reach a wider audience.
words.example2Translation: Brendlar ko'pincha keng auditoriyaga yetib borish uchun viral kontent yaratishga harakat qiladi.
words.example3: Viral content can spread both accurate information and dangerous misinformation.
words.example3Translation: Viral kontent ham to'g'ri ma'lumotlarni, ham xavfli noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarni tarqatishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Nobody can fully predict what will become viral content.
Emotional stories are more likely to become viral content.
The viral content drew attention to an important social issue.
Going viral can bring overnight fame to an unknown creator.
Viral content often sparks public debate and discussion.
Some companies pay influencers to help their content go viral.
Viral content can spread across borders within hours.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech kim nima viral kontentga aylanishini to'liq bashorat qila olmaydi.
Hissiy hikoyalar viral kontentga aylanish ehtimoli ko'proq.
Viral kontent muhim ijtimoiy muammoga e'tiborni tortdi.
Viral bo'lish noma'lum yaratuvchiga bir kechada shuhrat keltirishi mumkin.
Viral kontent ko'pincha jamoat munozarasi va muhokamalarini qo'zg'atadi.
Ba'zi kompaniyalar kontentlarini viral qilishga yordam berishlari uchun influenserlarga pul to'laydi.
Viral kontent soatlar ichida chegaralardan o'tib tarqalishi mumkin.

words.definition: An online environment where a person is only exposed to information and opinions that match their own existing beliefs.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda odamning faqat o'zining mavjud fikrlarini tasdiqlaydi gun ma'lumotlarga duch keladigan holat — boshqacha qarashlardan mahrum bo'lish.
words.example1: Social media algorithms can create an echo chamber by showing you content you already agree with.
words.example1Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoq algoritmlari sizga allaqachon rozi bo'lgan kontentni ko'rsatib, aks-sado kamerasi yaratishi mumkin.
words.example2: Living in an echo chamber makes it hard to understand different perspectives.
words.example2Translation: Aks-sado kamerasida yashash turli nuqtai nazarlarni tushunishni qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3: He realized he was in an echo chamber when he couldn't find any opposing views in his feed.
words.example3Translation: U o'z lentasida hech qanday qarama-qarshi fikr topa olmay, aks-sado kamerasida ekanini anglab yetdi.
extraExamples: Echo chambers can reinforce extreme views and make them seem normal.
Breaking out of an echo chamber requires seeking out different sources of information.
Political echo chambers are a major concern for democracy.
Following people with different opinions can help you escape an echo chamber.
Echo chambers contribute to the spread of misinformation.
Many people don't realize they are trapped in an echo chamber.
Echo chambers make online debates more aggressive and less productive.
extraExampleTranslations: Aks-sado kameralari haddan tashqari qarashlarni mustahkamlab, ularni normal ko'rinishga keltirishi mumkin.
Aks-sado kamerasidan chiqish uchun turli ma'lumot manbalarini izlash kerak.
Siyosiy aks-sado kameralari demokratiya uchun katta tashvish.
Turli fikrga ega odamlarni kuzatish aks-sado kamerasidan qochishga yordam beradi.
Aks-sado kameralari noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarning tarqalishiga hissa qo'shadi.
Ko'p odamlar aks-sado kamerasida ekanliklarini anglamaydi.
Aks-sado kameralari onlayn munozaralarni yanada tajovuzkor va samarasiz qiladi.

words.definition: A form of marketing where brands collaborate with influential social media personalities to promote their products or services to a large audience.
words.definitionUz: Brendlarning ko'p obunachiga ega ijtimoiy tarmoq shaxslari bilan hamkorlik qilib, mahsulot yoki xizmatlarini targ'ib qilish usuli.
words.example1: Many beauty brands rely heavily on influencer marketing to reach younger consumers.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab go'zallik brendlari yosh iste'molchilarga yetib borish uchun influenser marketingga katta tayanadi.
words.example2: Influencer marketing can be more effective than traditional advertising for some products.
words.example2Translation: Influenser marketing ba'zi mahsulotlar uchun an'anaviy reklamadan samaraliroq bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3: The company's influencer marketing campaign resulted in a huge spike in sales.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyaning influenser marketing kampaniyasi savdoning keskin o'sishiga olib keldi.
extraExamples: Micro-influencers often have more loyal audiences than celebrities.
Influencer marketing works best when the influencer genuinely uses the product.
Brands must disclose paid partnerships in influencer marketing campaigns.
The influencer marketing industry is worth billions of dollars globally.
Influencer marketing has become a major career path for content creators.
Choosing the right influencer is critical to a successful marketing campaign.
Influencer marketing on short video platforms has grown dramatically.
extraExampleTranslations: Mikro-influenserlar ko'pincha mashhur odamlarga qaraganda ko'proq sadoqatli auditoriyaga ega.
Influenser marketing influenser mahsulotdan haqiqatdan foydalanganida eng yaxshi ishlaydi.
Brendlar influenser marketing kampaniyalarida pullik hamkorliklarni oshkor qilishlari shart.
Influenser marketing sanoati dunyo bo'ylab milliardlab dollarga teng.
Influenser marketing kontent yaratuvchilar uchun katta martaba yo'liga aylandi.
To'g'ri influenserni tanlash muvaffaqiyatli marketing kampaniyasi uchun muhim.
Qisqa video platformalardagi influenser marketing keskin o'sdi.

words.definition: A period during which a person voluntarily stops using digital devices such as smartphones and social media to reduce stress and reconnect with the real world.
words.definitionUz: Odamning stress kamaytirish va haqiqiy hayotga qaytish uchun ixtiyoriy ravishda smartfon va ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan vaqtincha voz kechishi.
words.example1: She went on a digital detox during her vacation and felt much more relaxed.
words.example1Translation: U ta'til davomida raqamli detoks o'tkazdi va o'zini ancha xotirjam his qildi.
words.example2: A digital detox can help improve sleep quality and reduce anxiety.
words.example2Translation: Raqamli detoks uyqu sifatini yaxshilash va tashvishni kamaytirga yordam berishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many people try a digital detox for a weekend to reset their relationship with technology.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odamlar texnologiyalar bilan munosabatlarini qayta tiklash uchun bir hafta oxirida raqamli detoks o'tkazishga harakat qiladi.
extraExamples: A digital detox doesn't have to mean completely giving up all devices.
Some camps and resorts offer digital detox programs for guests.
Parents often encourage a digital detox for children during school breaks.
A short digital detox can improve focus and productivity.
Many people struggle to maintain a digital detox for more than a few days.
A digital detox can help people be more present in conversations.
Taking a digital detox once a week can have long-term mental health benefits.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli detoks barcha qurilmalardan butunlay voz kechishni anglatmasligi kerak.
Ba'zi lager va kurortlar mehmonlar uchun raqamli detoks dasturlari taklif qiladi.
Ota-onalar ko'pincha maktab ta'tillari davomida bolalar uchun raqamli detoksni rag'batlantiradi.
Qisqa raqamli detoks diqqat va unumdorlikni yaxshilashi mumkin.
Ko'p odamlar bir necha kundan ortiq raqamli detoksni saqlashga qiynaladi.
Raqamli detoks odamlarga suhbatda ko'proq ishtirok etishga yordam beradi.
Haftada bir marta raqamli detoks uzoq muddatli ruhiy salomatlik foydalariga ega bo'lishi mumkin.

words.definition: Any content such as videos, photos, reviews, or posts created and shared by users of an online platform rather than by the platform itself.
words.definitionUz: Platformaning o'zi emas, balki oddiy foydalanuvchilar tomonidan yaratilgan va ulashilgan video, rasm, sharh yoki postlar.
words.example1: YouTube is built almost entirely on user-generated content.
words.example1Translation: YouTube deyarli butunlay foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentga asoslangan.
words.example2: Brands often repost user-generated content to build trust with potential customers.
words.example2Translation: Brendlar ko'pincha potentsial mijozlar bilan ishonch o'rnatish uchun foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentni qayta joylashtiradi.
words.example3: User-generated content gives ordinary people a voice on a global platform.
words.example3Translation: Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontent oddiy odamlarga global platformada ovoz beradi.
extraExamples: Product reviews are a popular form of user-generated content.
User-generated content is often more relatable than professional advertising.
Platforms must moderate user-generated content to prevent harmful posts.
Travel brands use user-generated content to inspire potential visitors.
User-generated content has disrupted traditional media industries.
Encouraging user-generated content is a cost-effective marketing strategy.
The quality of user-generated content varies greatly from creator to creator.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahsulot sharhlari foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentning mashhur shaklidir.
Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontent ko'pincha professional reklamadan ko'ra yaqinroq.
Platformalar zararli postlarning oldini olish uchun foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentni moderatsiya qilishlari kerak.
Sayohat brendlari potentsial tashrif buyuruvchilarni ilhomlantirish uchun foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentdan foydalanadi.
Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontent an'anaviy ommaviy axborot vositalar sanoatini buzdi.
Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentni rag'batlantirish tejamkor marketing strategiyasidir.
Foydalanuvchi tomonidan yaratilgan kontentning sifati yaratuvchidan yaratuvchiga katta farq qiladi.

words.definition: False or inaccurate information that is spread, regardless of whether there is an intent to deceive.
words.definitionUz: Odatda aldash niyatisiz ham tarqatiladigan noto'g'ri yoki aniq bo'lmagan ma'lumot.
words.example1: Misinformation about health treatments spread rapidly during the pandemic.
words.example1Translation: Davolash usullari haqidagi noto'g'ri ma'lumotlar pandemiya davrida tez tarqaldi.
words.example2: It is important to verify information before sharing it to avoid spreading misinformation.
words.example2Translation: Noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarni tarqatmaslik uchun ulashishdan oldin ma'lumotlarni tekshirish muhim.
words.example3: Social media platforms are under pressure to stop the spread of misinformation.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoq platformalari noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarning tarqalishini to'xtatish borasida bosim ostida.
extraExamples: Misinformation can cause real harm when people act on false information.
Even well-meaning people can accidentally spread misinformation.
Fact-checking websites help users identify misinformation.
Misinformation often spreads faster than corrections or facts.
Political misinformation can influence election outcomes.
Teaching digital literacy is one way to combat misinformation.
Misinformation about climate change has slowed public action.
extraExampleTranslations: Noto'g'ri ma'lumotlar odamlar yolg'on ma'lumotga asoslanib harakat qilganda haqiqiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Hatto yaxshi niyatli odamlar ham tasodifan noto'g'ri ma'lumot tarqatishi mumkin.
Faktlarni tekshirish veb-saytlari foydalanuvchilarga noto'g'ri ma'lumotni aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Noto'g'ri ma'lumotlar ko'pincha tuzatishlar yoki faktlardan tezroq tarqaladi.
Siyosiy noto'g'ri ma'lumotlar saylov natijalariga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Raqamli savodxonlikni o'rgatish noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarga qarshi kurashning usullaridan biri.
Iqlim o'zgarishi haqidagi noto'g'ri ma'lumotlar jamoat harakatini sekinlashtirdi.

words.definition: A feeling of anxiety or insecurity that others are having exciting experiences or opportunities that you are not part of, often triggered by social media.
words.definitionUz: Boshqalar qiziqarli narsalarni boshdan kechirayotgani, siz esa chetda qolayotganingiz haqidagi tashvish hissi — ko'pincha ijtimoiy tarmoqlar qo'zg'atadi.
words.example1: Scrolling through social media can trigger FOMO when you see friends having fun.
words.example1Translation: Do'stlaringiz dam olayotganini ko'rganingizda ijtimoiy tarmoqlarni ko'rib chiqish FOMO ni qo'zg'ashi mumkin.
words.example2: She deleted the app to reduce the FOMO she felt every evening.
words.example2Translation: U har kechasi sezgan FOMOsini kamaytirish uchun ilovani o'chirdi.
words.example3: FOMO can push people to spend money they don't have just to keep up with others.
words.example3Translation: FOMO odamlarni boshqalarga xarajatlarini ushlab turish uchun yo'q pullarini sarflashga undashi mumkin.
extraExamples: FOMO is especially common among teenagers who use social media heavily.
Recognizing FOMO is the first step to managing it.
FOMO has been linked to lower self-esteem and increased anxiety.
Travel influencers often unintentionally trigger FOMO in their followers.
FOMO can lead people to say yes to plans even when they need rest.
Limiting social media use is one way to reduce feelings of FOMO.
FOMO is not new, but social media has made it much more intense.
extraExampleTranslations: FOMO, ayniqsa, ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan ko'p foydalanadigan o'smirlar orasida keng tarqalgan.
FOMOni tan olish uni boshqarishning birinchi qadami.
FOMO past o'z-o'ziga ishonch va kuchaygan tashvish bilan bog'liq.
Sayohat influenserlari ko'pincha bilmasdan izdoshlarida FOMO ni uyg'otadi.
FOMO odamlarni dam olishlari kerak bo'lganda ham rejalarga rozi bo'lishga undashi mumkin.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan foydalanishni cheklash FOMO hissiyotini kamaytirish usullaridan biri.
FOMO yangi narsa emas, lekin ijtimoiy tarmoqlar uni ancha kuchaytirdi.

words.definition: Systematic and repeated errors in a computer algorithm that produce unfair or discriminatory outcomes against certain groups of people.
words.definitionUz: Kompyuter algoritmidagi muntazam xatolar bo'lib, ba'zi guruhlar uchun adolatsiz yoki kamsituvchi natijalarga olib keladi.
words.example1: Algorithmic bias in hiring software has been shown to disadvantage female applicants.
words.example1Translation: Yollash dasturidagi algoritmik noto'g'rilik ayol nomzodlariga zarar yetkazishi isbotlandi.
words.example2: Social media algorithms can show algorithmic bias by promoting certain viewpoints over others.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoq algoritmlari ba'zi nuqtai nazarlarni boshqalardan ustun qo'yib, algoritmik noto'g'rilik namoyish qilishi mumkin.
words.example3: Researchers are working to identify and reduce algorithmic bias in AI systems.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotchilar sun'iy intellekt tizimlarida algoritmik noto'g'rilikni aniqlash va kamaytirish ustida ishlayapti.
extraExamples: Algorithmic bias can reflect the prejudices of those who design the system.
Facial recognition software has shown significant algorithmic bias against darker skin tones.
Algorithmic bias in loan approval systems has harmed minority communities.
Diverse development teams are one way to reduce algorithmic bias.
Algorithmic bias is difficult to detect without proper auditing.
Legal frameworks are being developed to hold companies accountable for algorithmic bias.
Consumers are often unaware of the algorithmic bias affecting their online experiences.
extraExampleTranslations: Algoritmik noto'g'rilik tizimni ishlab chiqaganlarning xurofotlarini aks ettirishi mumkin.
Yuz tanish dasturi to'qroq teri ranglariga nisbatan sezilarli algoritmik noto'g'rilik ko'rsatdi.
Kredit tasdiqlash tizimlaridagi algoritmik noto'g'rilik ozchilik jamoalariga zarar yetkazdi.
Xilma-xil ishlab chiqish guruhlari algoritmik noto'g'rilikni kamaytirish usullaridan biridir.
Algoritmik noto'g'rilikni to'g'ri audit o'tkazmasdan aniqlash qiyin.
Kompaniyalarni algoritmik noto'g'rilik uchun javobgar saqlash uchun huquqiy asoslar ishlab chiqilmoqda.
Iste'molchilar ko'pincha onlayn tajribalariga ta'sir qilayotgan algoritmik noto'g'rilikdan bexabar.

words.definition: The state of being connected to others or to the internet, especially through digital technology.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli texnologiyalar orqali boshqalar yoki internet bilan bog'liqlik holati — odamlarning bir-biri va dunyo bilan onlayn muloqotda bo'lish imkoniyati.
words.example1: Good internet connectivity is essential for remote workers.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi internet ulanishi uzoqdan ishlaydigan ishchilar uchun zaruriy shart.
words.example2: Connectivity has made it possible to communicate instantly with people across the world.
words.example2Translation: Ulanganlik dunyo bo'ylab odamlar bilan bir lahzada muloqot qilish imkonini berdi.
words.example3: Many rural communities still lack basic connectivity to the internet.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab qishloq jamoalari hali ham internetga asosiy ulanishdan mahrum.
extraExamples: Strong connectivity allows businesses to operate globally without physical offices.
Connectivity gaps between rich and poor countries are a major global issue.
Mobile connectivity has transformed daily life in developing nations.
Improved connectivity in schools helps students access educational resources.
High connectivity increases the speed at which information and trends spread.
Connectivity is a key driver of economic growth in the digital age.
During the outage, the lack of connectivity disrupted daily routines for millions.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli ulanganlik biznesga jismoniy ofislarsiz global miqyosda ishlash imkonini beradi.
Boy va kambag'al mamlakatlar o'rtasidagi ulanganlik bo'shliqlari katta global muammo.
Mobil ulanganlik rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlardagi kundalik hayotni o'zgartirdi.
Maktablardagi yaxshilangan ulanganlik o'quvchilarga ta'lim resurslariga kirishga yordam beradi.
Yuqori ulanganlik ma'lumotlar va tendentsiyalarning tarqalish tezligini oshiradi.
Ulanganlik raqamli asrda iqtisodiy o'sishning asosiy harakatlantiruvchisi.
Uzilish davrida ulanganlikning yo'qligi millionlar uchun kundalik tartibni buzdi.

words.definition: The practice of reviewing, monitoring, and enforcing rules on content submitted by users to an online platform to ensure it meets community guidelines.
words.definitionUz: Foydalanuvchilar tomonidan joylashtirilgan kontentni tekshirish, kuzatish va qoidalarga muvofiqligi uchun nazorat qilish jarayoni.
words.example1: Content moderation helps remove harmful posts before they spread widely.
words.example1Translation: Kontentni moderatsiya qilish zararli postlarni keng tarqalishidan oldin olib tashlashga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many platforms use a combination of AI and human reviewers for content moderation.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab platformalar kontentni moderatsiya qilish uchun sun'iy intellekt va inson ko'rib chiquvchilarining kombinatsiyasidan foydalanadi.
words.example3: Effective content moderation is one of the biggest challenges for social media companies.
words.example3Translation: Samarali kontentni moderatsiya qilish ijtimoiy tarmoq kompaniyalari uchun eng katta muammolardan biri.
extraExamples: Content moderation decisions are not always consistent or fair.
Billions of posts require content moderation every single day.
Content moderation workers often face mental health challenges from reviewing disturbing material.
Critics argue that content moderation can suppress free speech.
Automated content moderation sometimes removes posts incorrectly.
Smaller platforms often struggle to fund adequate content moderation teams.
Governments are pushing for stricter content moderation laws.
extraExampleTranslations: Kontentni moderatsiya qilish qarorlari har doim ham izchil yoki adolatli bo'lmaydi.
Har kuni milliardlab postlar kontentni moderatsiya qilishni talab qiladi.
Kontentni moderatsiya qiluvchi ishchilar ko'pincha bezovta qiluvchi materiallarni ko'rib chiqishdan ruhiy salomatlik muammolariga duch keladi.
Tanqidchilar kontentni moderatsiya qilish erkin so'zni cheklashi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
Avtomatlashtirilgan kontentni moderatsiya qilish ba'zan postlarni noto'g'ri olib tashlaydi.
Kichikroq platformalar ko'pincha etarli kontentni moderatsiya qilish guruhlarini moliyalashtirisha qiynaladi.
Hukumatlar qat'iyroq kontentni moderatsiya qilish qonunlarini joriy etishni talab qilmoqda.

words.definition: The ability to find, evaluate, use, and create information using digital technology in a safe and responsible way.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli texnologiyalardan foydalanib ma'lumot topish, baholash, ishlatish va yaratish, hamda internetda xavfsiz va mas'uliyatli harakat qilish ko'nikmasi.
words.example1: Digital literacy is now considered as important as reading and writing.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli savodxonlik endi o'qish va yozish kabi muhim deb hisoblanadi.
words.example2: Students with strong digital literacy skills are better equipped to spot misinformation.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli raqamli savodxonlik ko'nikmalariga ega talabalar noto'g'ri ma'lumotni aniqlay olish uchun yaxshiroq tayyorlangan.
words.example3: Digital literacy programs are helping older adults use technology more confidently.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli savodxonlik dasturlari katta yoshli odamlarga texnologiyadan ishonchli foydalanishga yordam bermoqda.
extraExamples: Digital literacy includes knowing how to protect your personal data online.
Schools are integrating digital literacy into their core curriculum.
Low digital literacy leaves people vulnerable to online scams.
Digital literacy is essential for participating fully in modern society.
Teaching digital literacy can help reduce the spread of misinformation.
Digital literacy skills vary greatly across different generations.
Governments are investing in digital literacy training to prepare workers for the future.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli savodxonlik onlayn shaxsiy ma'lumotlaringizni qanday himoya qilishni bilishni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
Maktablar raqamli savodxonlikni asosiy o'quv dasturiga kiritmoqda.
Past raqamli savodxonlik odamlarni onlayn firibgarlikka moyil qiladi.
Raqamli savodxonlik zamonaviy jamiyatda to'liq ishtirok etish uchun muhim.
Raqamli savodxonlikni o'rgatish noto'g'ri ma'lumotlarning tarqalishini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Raqamli savodxonlik ko'nikmalari turli avlodlarda katta farq qiladi.
Hukumatlar ishchilarni kelajakka tayyorlash uchun raqamli savodxonlik treningiga sarmoya kiritmoqda.

words.definition: The carefully chosen and controlled version of oneself that a person presents online, selecting what to share and what to hide.
words.definitionUz: Odamning ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda qanday ko'rinishini nazorat qilib, ko'rsatmoqchi bo'lgan narsalarini tanlab, yashirmoqchi bo'lgan narsalarini chetda qoldirib shakllantirgan sun'iy obraz.
words.example1: Many social media users craft a self-curated identity that only shows the best parts of their life.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab ijtimoiy tarmoq foydalanuvchilari hayotlarining faqat eng yaxshi tomonlarini ko'rsatadigan o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan onlayn obraz yaratadi.
words.example2: Her self-curated identity online was very different from who she was in real life.
words.example2Translation: Uning onlayndagi o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan obrazi haqiqiy hayotdagi o'zidan juda farq qilardi.
words.example3: A self-curated identity can create unrealistic pressure to appear perfect online.
words.example3Translation: O'z-o'zini shakllantirgan onlayn obraz onlaynda mukammal ko'rinish uchun real bo'lmagan bosim yaratishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Everyone manages their self-curated identity to some degree on social media.
A self-curated identity can boost confidence but also increase anxiety.
The gap between someone's self-curated identity and real life can cause stress.
Young people often feel pressure to maintain a perfect self-curated identity.
Influencers are highly skilled at building a self-curated identity.
A self-curated identity may not reflect a person's true values or feelings.
Being authentic online means reducing the gap between your self-curated identity and reality.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda ma'lum darajada o'z onlayn obrazini boshqaradi.
O'z-o'zini shakllantirgan onlayn obraz ishonchni oshirishi, lekin tashvishni ham kuchaytirishi mumkin.
Kishining o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan obrazi va haqiqiy hayoti o'rtasidagi bo'shliq stressga olib kelishi mumkin.
Yosh odamlar ko'pincha mukammal o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan obrazni saqlash bosimini his qiladi.
Influenserlar o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan obraz qurishda juda mohir.
O'z-o'zini shakllantirgan onlayn obraz odamning haqiqiy qadriyatlari yoki hissiyotlarini aks ettirmasligi mumkin.
Onlaynda haqiqiy bo'lish o'z-o'zini shakllantirgan obraz va haqiqat o'rtasidagi bo'shliqni kamaytirishni anglatadi.

words.definition: The ability to speak two languages fluently.
words.definitionUz: Ikki tillilik – ikki tilni ravon va erkin gaplasha olish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Bilingualism gives children a significant cognitive advantage.
words.example1Translation: Ikki tillilik bolalarga katta aqliy ustunlik beradi.
words.example2: Her bilingualism helped her get a job at an international company.
words.example2Translation: Uning ikki tilliligi xalqaro kompaniyada ishga kirishiga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Bilingualism is becoming more common in globalized societies.
words.example3Translation: Globallashgan jamiyatlarda ikki tillilik tobora keng tarqalmoqda.
extraExamples: Growing up in a bilingual family naturally promotes bilingualism.
Bilingualism can improve problem-solving skills.
Many schools encourage bilingualism through dual-language programs.
Bilingualism requires regular practice to maintain fluency.
The benefits of bilingualism extend to better multitasking abilities.
Bilingualism is an asset in the modern job market.
Some countries have official policies supporting bilingualism.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikki tilli oilada o'sgan bola tabiiy ravishda ikki tillilikka ega bo'ladi.
Ikki tillilik muammolarni yechish ko'nikmalarini yaxshilashi mumkin.
Ko'plab maktablar ikki tilli dasturlar orqali ikki tillilikni rag'batlantiradi.
Ikki tillilikni saqlab qolish uchun doimiy mashq kerak.
Ikki tillilikning foydalari ko'p vazifalarni bajarish qobiliyatini ham oshiradi.
Zamonaviy ish bozorida ikki tillilik katta afzallik hisoblanadi.
Ba'zi mamlakatlarda ikki tillilikni qo'llab-quvvatlovchi rasmiy siyosat mavjud.

words.definition: The natural process by which humans, especially children, learn and develop language skills.
words.definitionUz: Tilni egallash – odamlar, ayniqsa bolalar tilni tabiiy yo'l bilan o'rganish va rivojlantirish jarayoni.
words.example1: Language acquisition happens most effectively during early childhood.
words.example1Translation: Tilni egallash erta bolalik davrida eng samarali bo'ladi.
words.example2: Researchers study language acquisition to understand how the brain processes language.
words.example2Translation: Tadqiqotchilar miya tilni qanday qayta ishlashini tushunish uchun tilni egallashni o'rganishadi.
words.example3: Second language acquisition differs from first language acquisition.
words.example3Translation: Ikkinchi tilni egallash birinchi tilni egallashdan farq qiladi.
extraExamples: Language acquisition occurs naturally without formal instruction.
Theories of language acquisition have evolved over decades.
Immersion greatly accelerates language acquisition.
Language acquisition continues throughout life but slows with age.
Parents play a crucial role in early language acquisition.
Technology is changing how we approach language acquisition.
Errors are a normal part of the language acquisition process.
extraExampleTranslations: Tilni egallash rasmiy o'qitishsiz tabiiy ravishda sodir bo'ladi.
Tilni egallash nazariyalari o'n yilliklar davomida rivojlandi.
Atrof-muhit tilni egallashni sezilarli darajada tezlashtiradi.
Tilni egallash butun hayot davomida davom etadi, lekin yosh o'tgach sekinlashadi.
Ota-onalar erta tilni egallashda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Texnologiya tilni egallashga yondashuvni o'zgartirmoqda.
Xatolar tilni egallash jarayonining normal qismidir.

words.definition: The level of skill and competence a person has in using a language effectively.
words.definitionUz: Tilni puxta bilish – biror tilda samarali foydalana olish darajasi va malakasi.
words.example1: His linguistic proficiency in English helped him study abroad.
words.example1Translation: Ingliz tilini puxta bilishi unga chet elda o'qishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Linguistic proficiency is often measured through standardized tests.
words.example2Translation: Tilni puxta bilish ko'pincha standart testlar orqali o'lchanadi.
words.example3: Improving linguistic proficiency requires consistent practice.
words.example3Translation: Tilni puxta bilishni oshirish doimiy mashqni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Linguistic proficiency includes listening, speaking, reading, and writing.
Job applications often require proof of linguistic proficiency.
Advanced linguistic proficiency opens many career opportunities.
Teachers assess students' linguistic proficiency regularly.
Linguistic proficiency develops gradually over time.
Immigrants often work hard to achieve high linguistic proficiency.
CEFR is a common framework for measuring linguistic proficiency.
extraExampleTranslations: Tilni puxta bilish tinglash, gapirish, o'qish va yozishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Ishga ariza berishda ko'pincha tilni puxta bilishni tasdiqlovchi hujjat talab qilinadi.
Yuqori darajadagi tilni puxta bilish ko'plab karyera imkoniyatlarini ochadi.
O'qituvchilar o'quvchilarning tilni puxta bilishini muntazam baholaydilar.
Tilni puxta bilish vaqt o'tishi bilan asta-sekin rivojlanadi.
Immigrantlar yuqori tilni puxta bilishga erishish uchun ko'p mehnat qilishadi.
CEFR tilni puxta bilishni o'lchashning keng tarqalgan tizimi.

words.definition: A teaching method where students are surrounded by the target language in all aspects of learning.
words.definitionUz: Immersiya dasturi – o'quvchilar maqsad tilida to'liq muhitda o'qitiladigan usul.
words.example1: She improved her Spanish quickly through an immersion program.
words.example1Translation: U ispan tilini immersiya dasturi orqali tez yaxshiladi.
words.example2: Immersion programs are very effective for young learners.
words.example2Translation: Immersiya dasturlari yosh o'quvchilar uchun juda samarali.
words.example3: Many international schools offer immersion programs.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab xalqaro maktablar immersiya dasturlarini taklif qiladi.
extraExamples: Immersion programs help develop natural language intuition.
The school launched a French immersion program this year.
Students in immersion programs often become bilingual.
Immersion programs can be challenging at the beginning.
Research supports the effectiveness of immersion programs.
Parents are increasingly choosing immersion programs for their children.
Immersion programs combine language learning with cultural exposure.
extraExampleTranslations: Immersiya dasturlari tabiiy til tuyg'usini rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
Maktab bu yili fransuz tilidagi immersiya dasturini ishga tushirdi.
Immersiya dasturlaridagi o'quvchilar ko'pincha ikki tilli bo'lib qolishadi.
Immersiya dasturlari boshida qiyin bo'lishi mumkin.
Tadqiqotlar immersiya dasturlarining samaradorligini tasdiqlaydi.
Ota-onalar farzandlari uchun tobora ko'proq immersiya dasturlarini tanlamoqda.
Immersiya dasturlari til o'rganishni madaniyat bilan birlashtiradi.

words.definition: The study and classification of the sounds of human speech.
words.definitionUz: Fonetika – inson nutqidagi tovushlarni o'rganish va tasniflash fani.
words.example1: Understanding phonetics helps with correct pronunciation.
words.example1Translation: Fonetikani tushunish to'g'ri talaffuz qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: The course includes both theoretical and practical phonetics.
words.example2Translation: Kurs nazariy va amaliy fonetikani o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: Phonetics is essential for language teachers and speech therapists.
words.example3Translation: Fonetika til o'qituvchilari va nutq terapevtlari uchun zarur.
extraExamples: Phonetics focuses on how sounds are produced and perceived.
International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) is used in phonetics.
Students practice phonetics to improve their accent.
Phonetics differs from phonology, which studies sound patterns.
Good phonetic knowledge aids in learning new languages.
The book provides a detailed introduction to English phonetics.
Phonetics training is part of many acting programs.
extraExampleTranslations: Fonetika tovushlar qanday chiqarilishi va qabul qilinishini o'rganadi.
Xalqaro fonetik alifbo (IPA) fonetikada qo'llaniladi.
Talabalar talaffuzni yaxshilash uchun fonetikani mashq qilishadi.
Fonetika tovush naqshlarini o'rganadigan fonologiyadan farq qiladi.
Yaxshi fonetik bilim yangi tillarni o'rganishga yordam beradi.
Kitob ingliz tilining fonetikasiga batafsil kirish beradi.
Fonetika mashqlari ko'plab aktyorlik dasturlarining bir qismidir.

words.definition: The rules that govern the structure and order of words and phrases in a sentence.
words.definitionUz: Sintaksis – jumlada so'z va iboralarning tartibi va tuzilishini belgilovchi qoidalar.
words.example1: English syntax differs greatly from Uzbek syntax.
words.example1Translation: Ingliz tilining sintaksisi o'zbek tilidan juda farq qiladi.
words.example2: Understanding syntax is crucial for writing correct sentences.
words.example2Translation: Sintaksisni tushunish to'g'ri jumlalar yozish uchun muhim.
words.example3: The teacher explained the basic rules of syntax.
words.example3Translation: O'qituvchi sintaksisning asosiy qoidalarini tushuntirdi.
extraExamples: Syntax errors can make sentences difficult to understand.
Advanced syntax helps express complex ideas clearly.
Children naturally acquire syntax as they learn to speak.
Syntax varies between formal and informal language.
Linguists study syntax across different languages.
Good syntax improves the flow of writing.
The app provides exercises to practice English syntax.
extraExampleTranslations: Sintaksis xatolari jumlalarni tushunishni qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
Murakkab sintaksis murakkab fikrlarni aniq ifodalashga yordam beradi.
Bolalar gapirishni o'rganish jarayonida sintaksisni tabiiy ravishda egallashadi.
Sintaksis rasmiy va norasmiy til o'rtasida farq qiladi.
Tilshunoslar turli tillardagi sintaksisni o'rganishadi.
Yaxshi sintaksis yozuv oqimini yaxshilaydi.
Ilova ingliz tilining sintaksisini mashq qilish uchun mashqlarni taklif qiladi.

words.definition: The process of learning and remembering new words and their meanings.
words.definitionUz: Lug'at boyligini oshirish – yangi so'zlar va ularning ma'nolarini o'rganish va eslab qolish jarayoni.
words.example1: Reading books is one of the best ways for vocabulary acquisition.
words.example1Translation: Kitob o'qish lug'at boyligini oshirishning eng yaxshi usullaridan biri.
words.example2: Vocabulary acquisition becomes easier with regular exposure.
words.example2Translation: Doimiy mashq bilan lug'at boyligini oshirish osonlashadi.
words.example3: The app uses spaced repetition for effective vocabulary acquisition.
words.example3Translation: Ilova lug'at boyligini samarali oshirish uchun takrorlash oralig'ini qo'llaydi.
extraExamples: Context helps with vocabulary acquisition.
Vocabulary acquisition is faster when words are learned in meaningful sentences.
Students need strategies for vocabulary acquisition.
Multimedia resources support vocabulary acquisition.
Vocabulary acquisition continues even at advanced levels.
Teachers use games to make vocabulary acquisition fun.
Consistent practice is key to successful vocabulary acquisition.
extraExampleTranslations: Kontekst lug'at boyligini oshirishga yordam beradi.
So'zlarni mazmunli jumlalarda o'rganish lug'at boyligini tezlashtiradi.
O'quvchilar lug'at boyligini oshirish strategiyalariga muhtoj.
Multimedia resurslari lug'at boyligini oshirishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Lug'at boyligini oshirish yuqori darajalarda ham davom etadi.
O'qituvchilar lug'at boyligini oshirishni qiziqarli qilish uchun o'yinlardan foydalanadi.
Doimiy mashq lug'at boyligini muvaffaqiyatli oshirishning kaliti.

words.definition: Difficulties in communication caused by not sharing a common language.
words.definitionUz: Til to'siqlari – umumiy tilning yo'qligi sababli yuzaga keladigan muloqotdagi qiyinchiliklar.
words.example1: The language barrier made it hard for the tourists to ask for directions.
words.example1Translation: Til to'siqlari sayyohlar uchun yo'l so'rashni qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example2: Technology is helping to overcome language barriers.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya til to'siqlarini bartaraf etishga yordam bermoqda.
words.example3: Language barriers can lead to misunderstandings in business.
words.example3Translation: Til to'siqlari biznesda tushunmovchiliklarga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Many immigrants face language barriers when they first arrive.
Learning basic phrases can help break the language barrier.
Language barriers affect access to healthcare and education.
Translation apps reduce language barriers during travel.
Cultural differences often accompany language barriers.
The company provides interpreters to remove language barriers.
Overcoming language barriers takes time and patience.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab immigrantlar birinchi kelganlarida til to'siqlariga duch kelishadi.
Asosiy iboralarni o'rganish til to'siqlarini yengishga yordam beradi.
Til to'siqlari sog'liqni saqlash va ta'limga kirishga ta'sir qiladi.
Tarjima ilovalari sayohat paytida til to'siqlarini kamaytiradi.
Madaniy farqlar ko'pincha til to'siqlari bilan birga keladi.
Kompaniya til to'siqlarini bartaraf etish uchun tarjimonlarni taqdim etadi.
Til to'siqlarini yengish vaqt va sabr talab qiladi.

words.definition: The process of modifying or reducing a foreign accent to sound more like a native speaker.
words.definitionUz: Akcentni kamaytirish – chet tilidagi akcentni kamaytirib, mahalliy aholi kabi gapirishga yaqinlashtirish jarayoni.
words.example1: She took accent reduction classes to improve her job prospects.
words.example1Translation: U ish imkoniyatlarini oshirish uchun akcentni kamaytirish kurslariga qatnashdi.
words.example2: Accent reduction focuses on pronunciation, intonation, and rhythm.
words.example2Translation: Akcentni kamaytirish talaffuz, intonatsiya va ritmga e'tibor qaratadi.
words.example3: Complete accent reduction is not always necessary or possible.
words.example3Translation: To'liq akcentni kamaytirish har doim ham zarur yoki mumkin emas.
extraExamples: Accent reduction can boost confidence in speaking.
Many actors undergo accent reduction training.
Accent reduction apps are becoming popular.
Effective accent reduction requires regular practice.
Accent reduction should not erase cultural identity.
Professionals often seek accent reduction for clearer communication.
Accent reduction techniques vary depending on the target language.
extraExampleTranslations: Akcentni kamaytirish gapirishda o'ziga bo'lgan ishonchni oshirishi mumkin.
Ko'plab aktyorlar akcentni kamaytirish mashqlaridan o'tishadi.
Akcentni kamaytirish ilovalari mashhurlashmoqda.
Samarali akcentni kamaytirish doimiy mashqni talab qiladi.
Akcentni kamaytirish madaniy o'zlikni yo'qotmasligi kerak.
Mutaxassislar aniqroq muloqot uchun ko'pincha akcentni kamaytirishga murojaat qilishadi.
Akcentni kamaytirish usullari maqsad tiliga qarab farq qiladi.

words.definition: The ability to speak and understand several languages.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p tillilik – bir necha tilni gapirish va tushunish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Multilingualism is highly valued in the European job market.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p tillilik Yevropa ish bozorida juda qadrlanadi.
words.example2: Growing up in a multilingual environment promotes cognitive flexibility.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p tilli muhitda o'sish aqliy moslashuvchanlikni rivojlantiradi.
words.example3: Multilingualism enriches cultural understanding.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p tillilik madaniy tushunishni boyitadi.
extraExamples: Multilingualism is common in many Asian and African countries.
Schools are promoting multilingualism from an early age.
Multilingualism can delay the onset of dementia.
The benefits of multilingualism go beyond communication.
Maintaining multilingualism requires continuous use of all languages.
Multilingualism is an important skill in diplomacy and business.
Technology supports multilingualism through translation tools.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p tillilik ko'plab Osiyo va Afrika mamlakatlarida keng tarqalgan.
Maktablar erta yoshdan ko'p tillilikni rag'batlantirmoqda.
Ko'p tillilik demansning boshlanishini kechiktirishi mumkin.
Ko'p tillilikning foydalari muloqotdan ham oshib ketadi.
Ko'p tillilikni saqlab qolish barcha tillardan doimiy foydalanishni talab qiladi.
Ko'p tillilik diplomatiya va biznesda muhim ko'nikma.
Texnologiya tarjima vositalari orqali ko'p tillilikni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.

words.definition: The gradual loss of a language or language skills due to lack of use.
words.definitionUz: Tilni yo'qotish – tilni ishlatmaslik natijasida til yoki til ko'nikmalarining asta-sekin yo'qolishi.
words.example1: Many immigrants experience language attrition in their mother tongue.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab immigrantlar ona tilida tilni yo'qotishni boshdan kechirishadi.
words.example2: Regular practice can prevent language attrition.
words.example2Translation: Doimiy mashq tilni yo'qotishning oldini olishi mumkin.
words.example3: Language attrition is more common in the second generation of immigrants.
words.example3Translation: Tilni yo'qotish immigrantlarning ikkinchi avlodida ko'proq uchraydi.
extraExamples: Language attrition can affect grammar and vocabulary.
Returning to the home country can reverse language attrition.
Language attrition is a natural phenomenon.
Children are particularly vulnerable to language attrition.
Maintaining contact with native speakers helps prevent language attrition.
Researchers study language attrition in heritage speakers.
Language attrition is different from language forgetting.
extraExampleTranslations: Tilni yo'qotish grammatika va lug'atga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Vataniga qaytish tilni yo'qotishni teskari yo'naltirishi mumkin.
Tilni yo'qotish tabiiy hodisa hisoblanadi.
Bolalar tilni yo'qotishga ayniqsa moyil.
Mahalliy so'zlashuvchilar bilan aloqani saqlash tilni yo'qotishning oldini oladi.
Tadqiqotchilar meros tillarida tilni yo'qotishni o'rganishadi.
Tilni yo'qotish tilni unutishdan farq qiladi.

words.definition: The ability to use language effectively and appropriately in various social situations.
words.definitionUz: Muloqot kompetensiyasi – turli ijtimoiy vaziyatlarda tilni samarali va mos ravishda ishlatish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Communicative competence is more than just knowing grammar.
words.example1Translation: Muloqot kompetensiyasi faqat grammatikani bilishdan ko'proq narsani anglatadi.
words.example2: The course focuses on developing communicative competence.
words.example2Translation: Kurs muloqot kompetensiyasini rivojlantirishga qaratilgan.
words.example3: Communicative competence includes cultural awareness.
words.example3Translation: Muloqot kompetensiyasi madaniy ongni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: Communicative competence involves strategic and social skills.
Role-playing activities help build communicative competence.
Communicative competence is a key goal of modern language teaching.
Assessing communicative competence is more practical than testing grammar alone.
Immersion programs are effective for developing communicative competence.
Communicative competence improves with real-life practice.
Teachers encourage communicative competence through group discussions.
extraExampleTranslations: Muloqot kompetensiyasi strategik va ijtimoiy ko'nikmalarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Rol o'ynash mashqlari muloqot kompetensiyasini rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
Muloqot kompetensiyasi zamonaviy til o'qitishning asosiy maqsadlaridan biri.
Muloqot kompetensiyasini baholash faqat grammatikani sinovdan o'tkazishdan amaliyroq.
Immersiya dasturlari muloqot kompetensiyasini rivojlantirishda samarali.
Muloqot kompetensiyasi haqiqiy hayotdagi mashq bilan yaxshilanadi.
O'qituvchilar guruh muhokamalari orqali muloqot kompetensiyasini rag'batlantiradi.

words.definition: The language that a learner is trying to learn or acquire.
words.definitionUz: Maqsad tili – o'quvchi o'rganmoqchi bo'lgan til.
words.example1: In this class, English is the target language.
words.example1Translation: Bu darsda ingliz tili maqsad tili hisoblanadi.
words.example2: Teachers should use the target language as much as possible.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchilar imkon qadar maqsad tilidan foydalanishlari kerak.
words.example3: Motivation plays a big role in mastering the target language.
words.example3Translation: Motivatsiya maqsad tilini puxta egallashda katta rol o'ynaydi.
extraExamples: Exposure to the target language outside the classroom is beneficial.
The target language should be used for real communication.
Learners often compare their native language with the target language.
Achieving fluency in the target language takes dedication.
Materials should be authentic in the target language.
The curriculum is designed around the target language.
Progress in the target language boosts learner confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: Sinf tashqarisida maqsad tiliga duch kelish foydalidir.
Maqsad tili haqiqiy muloqot uchun ishlatilishi kerak.
O'quvchilar ko'pincha ona tilini maqsad tili bilan solishtirishadi.
Maqsad tilida ravonlikka erishish sadoqatni talab qiladi.
Materiallar maqsad tilida haqiqiy bo'lishi kerak.
O'quv dasturi maqsad tiliga asoslangan.
Maqsad tilidagi yutuq o'quvchilarning ishonchini oshiradi.

words.definition: The methods, principles, and practices of teaching and learning languages.
words.definitionUz: Til pedagogikasi – tillarni o'qitish va o'rganish usullari, tamoyillari va amaliyotlari.
words.example1: Modern language pedagogy emphasizes communication over rote learning.
words.example1Translation: Zamonaviy til pedagogikasi mexanik o'qishdan ko'ra muloqotga urg'u beradi.
words.example2: She studied language pedagogy at university.
words.example2Translation: U universitetda til pedagogikasini o'rgangan.
words.example3: Effective language pedagogy adapts to different learner needs.
words.example3Translation: Samarali til pedagogikasi turli o'quvchilar ehtiyojlariga moslashadi.
extraExamples: Language pedagogy has shifted toward student-centered approaches.
Technology is transforming language pedagogy.
Good language pedagogy includes cultural elements.
Research in language pedagogy informs teaching practices.
Language pedagogy differs for children and adults.
Teacher training programs focus heavily on language pedagogy.
The book is a classic in the field of language pedagogy.
extraExampleTranslations: Til pedagogikasi o'quvchiga yo'naltirilgan yondashuvlarga o'tmoqda.
Texnologiya til pedagogikasini o'zgartirmoqda.
Yaxshi til pedagogikasi madaniy elementlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Til pedagogikasidagi tadqiqotlar o'qitish amaliyotlarini shakllantiradi.
Til pedagogikasi bolalar va kattalar uchun farq qiladi.
O'qituvchilarni tayyorlash dasturlari til pedagogikasiga katta e'tibor beradi.
Bu kitob til pedagogikasi sohasidagi klassik hisoblanadi.

words.definition: A particular form of a language spoken in a specific region or by a particular social group.
words.definitionUz: Sheva – muayyan hududda yoki ijtimoiy guruhda gapiriladigan tilning o'ziga xos shakli.
words.example1: She speaks with a strong southern dialect.
words.example1Translation: U kuchli janubiy shevada gapiradi.
words.example2: Dialects can differ in pronunciation, vocabulary, and grammar.
words.example2Translation: Shevalar talaffuz, lug'at va grammatikada farq qilishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many dialects are disappearing due to globalization.
words.example3Translation: Globallashuv tufayli ko'plab shevalar yo'qolib bormoqda.
extraExamples: Understanding local dialects is important for travelers.
Some dialects have unique expressions not found in standard language.
Linguists document and study various dialects.
Dialect differences can sometimes cause communication challenges.
Standard language is often based on one particular dialect.
Children may learn both the standard language and the local dialect.
Preserving dialects is part of cultural heritage.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahalliy shevalarni tushunish sayyohlar uchun muhim.
Ba'zi shevalarda standart tilda uchramaydigan o'ziga xos ifodalar bor.
Tilshunoslar turli shevalarni hujjatlashtiradi va o'rganadi.
Sheva farqlari ba'zan muloqotda qiyinchilik tug'dirishi mumkin.
Standart til ko'pincha bitta shevaga asoslanadi.
Bolalar ham standart tilni, ham mahalliy shevani o'rganishlari mumkin.
Shevalarni saqlash madaniy merosning bir qismidir.

words.definition: A significant change in the composition or structure of a population, particularly in age distribution.
words.definitionUz: Aholining tarkibida, ayniqsa yosh tuzilmasida yuz beradigan muhim o'zgarish.
words.example1: A demographic shift toward an older population is happening in most developed countries.
words.example1Translation: Ko'pgina rivojlangan mamlakatlarda aholi keksayishiga qarab demografik o'zgarish yuz bermoqda.
words.example2: The demographic shift has put pressure on pension and healthcare systems.
words.example2Translation: Demografik o'zgarish nafaqa va sog'liqni saqlash tizimlariga bosim o'tkazmoqda.
words.example3: Government policies must adapt to the ongoing demographic shift.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat siyosati davom etayotgan demografik o'zgarishga moslashishi kerak.
extraExamples: The demographic shift was driven by falling birth rates and longer life spans.
Urban areas experienced a demographic shift as young people moved to cities.
The demographic shift created new demands for elderly care services.
Researchers studied the long-term effects of the demographic shift on the economy.
Immigration can slow or reverse a demographic shift toward an older population.
The demographic shift affected school enrolment and workforce size simultaneously.
Policymakers were slow to respond to early signs of the demographic shift.
extraExampleTranslations: Demografik o'zgarish tug'ilish darajasining pasayishi va umr ko'rish davomiyligining uzayishi tufayli yuzaga keldi.
Yosh odamlar shaharlarga ko'chib o'tishi bilan shaharlarda demografik o'zgarish kuzatildi.
Demografik o'zgarish keksa fuqarolarga g'amxo'rlik xizmatlariga yangi talablar yaratdi.
Tadqiqotchilar demografik o'zgarishning iqtisodiyotga uzoq muddatli ta'sirini o'rganishdi.
Immigratsiya keksayib borayotgan aholining demografik o'zgarishini sekinlashtirishi yoki teskari yo'naltirishи mumkin.
Demografik o'zgarish bir vaqtning o'zida maktab o'quvchilari soniga va mehnat kuchi hajmiga ta'sir qildi.
Siyosatchilar demografik o'zgarishning dastlabki belgilariga sekin munosabat bildirdi.

words.definition: A structured government or organizational plan that provides regular income to people after they retire from work.
words.definitionUz: Odamlar ishdan chiqqanidan keyin muntazam pul olishini ta'minlaydigan davlat yoki tashkilot rejasi.
words.example1: The pension system is under pressure as the number of retirees grows.
words.example1Translation: Nafaqaxo'rlar soni ko'payishi bilan nafaqa tizimi bosim ostida qolmoqda.
words.example2: Many workers are concerned about whether the pension system will be sustainable in the future.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab ishchilar nafaqa tizimi kelajakda barqaror bo'lishi yoki yo'qligidan xavotirda.
words.example3: The government reformed the pension system to ensure it could support future retirees.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat kelajakdagi nafaqaxo'rlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashga qodir bo'lishi uchun nafaqa tizimini isloh qildi.
extraExamples: The pension system relies on contributions from working-age citizens.
Private pension systems offer an alternative to state-funded pensions.
The pension system faced a funding gap due to an ageing population.
Younger workers questioned whether the pension system would still exist when they retired.
The pension system was redesigned to encourage later retirement.
A strong pension system reduces poverty among the elderly.
Countries with ageing populations are urgently reviewing their pension systems.
extraExampleTranslations: Nafaqa tizimi mehnat yoshidagi fuqarolarning badallari hisobidan ishlaydi.
Xususiy nafaqa tizimlari davlat tomonidan moliyalashtirilgan nafaqalarga muqobil taklif qiladi.
Nafaqa tizimi keksayib borayotgan aholi tufayli moliyalashtirish taqchilligiga duch keldi.
Yoshroq ishchilar nafaqa tizimi ular nafaqaga chiqadigan paytda hali mavjud bo'ladimi deb savol qo'ydi.
Nafaqa tizimi keyinroq nafaqaga chiqishni rag'batlantirish uchun qayta ishlab chiqildi.
Kuchli nafaqa tizimi keksalar orasidagi qashshoqlikni kamaytiradi.
Keksayib borayotgan aholisi bo'lgan mamlakatlar nafaqa tizimlarini shoshilinch ravishda ko'rib chiqmoqda.

words.definition: The average number of years a person in a given population is statistically expected to live.
words.definitionUz: Ma'lum bir aholida odamlar o'rtacha necha yil yashashi kutilayotganini ko'rsatuvchi raqam.
words.example1: Life expectancy has risen significantly over the past century.
words.example1Translation: Umr ko'rish davomiyligi o'tgan asrda sezilarli darajada oshdi.
words.example2: Better healthcare and nutrition have increased life expectancy worldwide.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshiroq sog'liqni saqlash va oziqlanish butun dunyo bo'ylab umr ko'rish davomiyligini oshirdi.
words.example3: Countries with high life expectancy face growing challenges with elderly care.
words.example3Translation: Umr ko'rish davomiyligi yuqori bo'lgan mamlakatlar keksalarga g'amxo'rlik qilishda tobora ko'proq muammolarga duch kelmoqda.
extraExamples: Life expectancy at birth is a key indicator of a country's development.
Lifestyle choices such as diet and exercise strongly influence life expectancy.
Life expectancy varies widely between rich and poor countries.
Advances in medicine have extended life expectancy for cancer patients.
A longer life expectancy means governments must fund pensions for more years.
Life expectancy declined in some countries during the pandemic.
Women generally have a higher life expectancy than men in most countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Tug'ilishda kutilayotgan umr ko'rish davomiyligi mamlakatning rivojlanishini ko'rsatuvchi asosiy ko'rsatkichdir.
Ovqatlanish va mashq qilish kabi turmush tarzini tanlash umr ko'rish davomiyligiga kuchli ta'sir qiladi.
Umr ko'rish davomiyligi boy va kambag'al mamlakatlar o'rtasida sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
Tibbiyotdagi yutuqlar saraton bemorlarining umr ko'rish davomiyligini uzaytirdi.
Uzoqroq umr ko'rish davomiyligi hukumatlar nafaqalarni ko'proq yillar davomida moliyalashtirishini anglatadi.
Pandемiya davrida ba'zi mamlakatlarda umr ko'rish davomiyligi qisqardi.
Ko'pgina mamlakatlarda ayollarning umr ko'rish davomiyligi erkaklarga qaraganda yuqori.

words.definition: Specialized medical and personal care focused on the health and well-being of elderly people.
words.definitionUz: Keksa odamlarning sog'lig'i va farovonligiga qaratilgan maxsus tibbiy va shaxsiy g'amxo'rlik.
words.example1: Geriatric care includes managing chronic diseases common in older adults.
words.example1Translation: Geriatrik yordam keksa odamlarda keng tarqalgan surunkali kasalliklarni boshqarishni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: The hospital opened a new geriatric care unit to meet rising demand.
words.example2Translation: Kasalxona o'sib borayotgan talabni qondirish uchun yangi geriatrik yordam bo'limini ochdi.
words.example3: Trained professionals in geriatric care are increasingly in demand.
words.example3Translation: Geriatrik yordam sohasidagi malakali mutaxassislarga talab tobora ortib bormoqda.
extraExamples: Geriatric care focuses on maintaining dignity and independence for older patients.
The shortage of geriatric care workers is a growing concern in many countries.
Geriatric care often involves collaboration between doctors, nurses, and social workers.
