Families sometimes struggle to afford professional geriatric care.
Government investment in geriatric care is expected to increase in coming years.
Geriatric care facilities need to be designed with safety and comfort in mind.
Technology is playing a growing role in improving geriatric care.
extraExampleTranslations: Geriatrik yordam keksa bemorlar uchun qadr-qimmat va mustaqillikni saqlashga qaratilgan.
Geriatrik yordam xodimlari yetishmasligi ko'p mamlakatlarda tobora kuchayib borayotgan muammo.
Geriatrik yordam ko'pincha shifokorlar, hamshiralar va ijtimoiy xodimlar o'rtasidagi hamkorlikni o'z ichiga oladi.
Oilalar ba'zan professional geriatrik yordamni moliyalashtirish bilan qiynaladi.
Geriatrik yordamga davlat investitsiyalari kelgusi yillarda oshishi kutilmoqda.
Geriatrik yordam muassasalari xavfsizlik va qulaylik inobatga olingan holda loyihalanishi kerak.
Texnologiya geriatrik yordamni yaxshilashda tobora muhim rol o'ynamoqda.

words.definition: The ratio of people who are not of working age — such as children and the elderly — to those who are of working age.
words.definitionUz: Ishlamaydigan odamlar — bolalar va keksalar — sonining ishlaydigan odamlar soniga nisbati.
words.example1: An ageing population causes the dependency ratio to rise.
words.example1Translation: Aholining keksayishi qaramlik koeffitsienti oshishiga olib keladi.
words.example2: A high dependency ratio puts strain on the working population and public finances.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori qaramlik koeffitsienti mehnat aholisiga va davlat moliyasiga og'irlik soladi.
words.example3: Countries with a high dependency ratio often struggle to fund social welfare programs.
words.example3Translation: Qaramlik koeffitsienti yuqori bo'lgan mamlakatlar ko'pincha ijtimoiy ta'minot dasturlarini moliyalashtirishda qiynaladi.
extraExamples: The dependency ratio is an important measure for planning government budgets.
Immigration of young workers can help lower the dependency ratio.
A rising dependency ratio means fewer taxpayers support more retirees.
The dependency ratio has worsened in Japan over the past two decades.
Economists use the dependency ratio to forecast future economic challenges.
A low dependency ratio is associated with strong economic growth.
Policymakers aim to keep the dependency ratio at a manageable level.
extraExampleTranslations: Qaramlik koeffitsienti davlat byudjetlarini rejalashtirish uchun muhim o'lchovdir.
Yosh ishchilarning immigratsiyasi qaramlik koeffitsienti pasayishiga yordam berishi mumkin.
O'sib borayotgan qaramlik koeffitsienti kamroq soliq to'lovchilar ko'proq nafaqaxo'rlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashini anglatadi.
Qaramlik koeffitsienti so'nggi yigirma yil ichida Yaponiyada yomonlashdi.
Iqtisodchilar kelajakdagi iqtisodiy muammolarni bashorat qilish uchun qaramlik koeffitsientidan foydalanadi.
Past qaramlik koeffitsienti kuchli iqtisodiy o'sish bilan bog'liq.
Siyosatchilar qaramlik koeffitsienti boshqariladigan darajada bo'lishini maqsad qiladilar.

words.definition: A situation in which the average age of employed people in an economy is increasing due to demographic changes.
words.definitionUz: Iqtisodiyotda ishlaydigan odamlarning o'rtacha yoshi demografik o'zgarishlar tufayli ko'tarilishi hodisasi.
words.example1: Companies are adapting their workplaces to accommodate an ageing workforce.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniyalar keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchini qabul qilish uchun ish joylarini moslashtiryapti.
words.example2: The ageing workforce has led to a shortage of skilled workers in some industries.
words.example2Translation: Keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchi ba'zi sohalarda malakali ishchilar tanqisligiga olib keldi.
words.example3: Employers need strategies to retain and support an ageing workforce.
words.example3Translation: Ish beruvchilar keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchini saqlab qolish va qo'llab-quvvatlash strategiyalariga muhtoj.
extraExamples: The ageing workforce is a direct result of the declining birth rate.
Retraining programs can help an ageing workforce stay competitive.
An ageing workforce brings experience but may resist new technologies.
Healthcare costs for an ageing workforce are a concern for employers.
The government introduced incentives to help integrate the ageing workforce.
An ageing workforce can reduce overall productivity if not managed carefully.
Younger employees and an ageing workforce must collaborate effectively.
extraExampleTranslations: Keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchi tug'ilish darajasining pasayishining bevosita natijasidir.
Qayta tayyorlash dasturlari keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchiga raqobatbardosh bo'lib qolishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchi tajriba olib keladi, lekin yangi texnologiyalarga qarshilik ko'rsatishi mumkin.
Keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchining sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlari ish beruvchilar uchun muammo hisoblanadi.
Hukumat keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchini integratsiya qilishga yordam beradigan imtiyozlar joriy etdi.
Keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchi ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarilmasa umumiy samaradorlikni pasaytirishi mumkin.
Yoshroq xodimlar va keksayib borayotgan mehnat kuchi samarali hamkorlik qilishi kerak.

words.definition: The economic opportunities and activities generated by the spending power and needs of older people.
words.definitionUz: Keksa odamlarning xarid qobiliyati va ehtiyojlaridan kelib chiqadigan iqtisodiy imkoniyatlar va faoliyat.
words.example1: The silver economy is growing rapidly as the population ages.
words.example1Translation: Aholi keksayishi bilan kumush iqtisodiyot tez sur'atlar bilan rivojlanmoqda.
words.example2: Businesses are developing new products and services to tap into the silver economy.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyalar kumush iqtisodiyotdan foydalanish uchun yangi mahsulotlar va xizmatlar ishlab chiqmoqda.
words.example3: The silver economy represents a significant and often overlooked market opportunity.
words.example3Translation: Kumush iqtisodiyot ko'pincha e'tibordan chetda qolgan muhim bozor imkoniyatini ifodalaydi.
extraExamples: The silver economy includes healthcare products, travel, and leisure services for the elderly.
Investors are increasingly interested in opportunities within the silver economy.
Technology companies are designing devices specifically for the silver economy.
The silver economy could help offset some of the costs of an ageing population.
Governments are beginning to recognize the potential of the silver economy.
The silver economy is estimated to be worth trillions of dollars globally.
Tourism companies have introduced special packages aimed at the silver economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Kumush iqtisodiyot keksalar uchun tibbiy mahsulotlar, sayohat va dam olish xizmatlarini o'z ichiga oladi.
Investorlar tobora ko'proq kumush iqtisodiyot doirasidagi imkoniyatlarga qiziqmoqda.
Texnologiya kompaniyalari kumush iqtisodiyot uchun maxsus qurilmalar loyihalamokda.
Kumush iqtisodiyot keksayib borayotgan aholining ba'zi xarajatlarini qoplashga yordam berishi mumkin.
Hukumatlar kumush iqtisodiyotning salohiyatini tan olishni boshladi.
Kumush iqtisodiyotning global qiymati trillionlab dollar deb baholanmoqda.
Turizm kompaniyalari kumush iqtisodiyotga qaratilgan maxsus paketlar taqdim etdi.

words.definition: Mutual support, cooperation, and respect between different age groups in society.
words.definitionUz: Jamiyatdagi turli yosh guruhlari o'rtasidagi o'zaro yordam, hamkorlik va hurmat.
words.example1: Intergenerational solidarity is essential for a fair and stable society.
words.example1Translation: Avlodlararo hamjihatlik adolatli va barqaror jamiyat uchun muhim ahamiyatga ega.
words.example2: Programs that bring young and elderly people together promote intergenerational solidarity.
words.example2Translation: Yosh va keksa odamlarni bir araya keltiradigan dasturlar avlodlararo hamjihatlikni rag'batlantiradi.
words.example3: Intergenerational solidarity means that working people support retirees through taxes.
words.example3Translation: Avlodlararo hamjihatlik ishlaydigan odamlarning soliqlar orqali nafaqaxo'rlarni qo'llab-quvvatlashini anglatadi.
extraExamples: Schools introduced programs to strengthen intergenerational solidarity in communities.
Intergenerational solidarity is often expressed through family support systems.
The debate on pension reform raised questions about intergenerational solidarity.
Intergenerational solidarity can reduce social isolation among elderly people.
Cultural traditions in many societies reinforce intergenerational solidarity.
Technology has created new ways for generations to express intergenerational solidarity.
Politicians called for greater intergenerational solidarity when discussing climate policy.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktablar jamoalarda avlodlararo hamjihatlikni mustahkamlash uchun dasturlar kiritdi.
Avlodlararo hamjihatlik ko'pincha oilaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlari orqali namoyon bo'ladi.
Nafaqa islohoti bo'yicha munozara avlodlararo hamjihatlik haqida savollar tug'dirdi.
Avlodlararo hamjihatlik keksa odamlar orasidagi ijtimoiy yolg'izlikni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ko'p jamiyatlardagi madaniy an'analar avlodlararo hamjihatlikni mustahkamlaydi.
Texnologiya avlodlar uchun avlodlararo hamjihatlikni ifodalashning yangi usullarini yaratdi.
Siyosatchilar iqlim siyosatini muhokama qilishda avlodlararo hamjihatlikni kuchaytirishga chaqirdi.

words.definition: Ongoing assistance and support provided to people who have chronic illnesses, disabilities, or conditions that require help with daily activities over an extended period.
words.definitionUz: Surunkali kasalliklar yoki nogironlik tufayli kundalik faoliyatda uzoq muddat davomida yordamga muhtoj bo'lgan odamlarga ko'rsatiladigan muntazam yordam.
words.example1: Long-term care facilities provide around-the-clock support for elderly residents.
words.example1Translation: Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash muassasalari keksa yashlovchilarga kecha-kunduz qo'llab-quvvatlash ko'rsatadi.
words.example2: The cost of long-term care can be a serious financial burden for families.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash xarajatlari oilalar uchun jiddiy moliyaviy og'irlik bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many governments are expanding long-term care programs to meet growing demand.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab hukumatlar o'sib borayotgan talabni qondirish uchun uzoq muddatli parvarishlash dasturlarini kengaytirmoqda.
extraExamples: Long-term care includes help with bathing, eating, and mobility for older adults.
Insurance plans that cover long-term care are becoming increasingly popular.
The quality of long-term care varies widely between facilities.
Long-term care workers are among the most underpaid in the health sector.
Families often combine professional and informal long-term care for their relatives.
Planning for long-term care needs should begin before a health crisis occurs.
Government funding for long-term care remains insufficient in many countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash keksa odamlar uchun cho'milish, ovqatlanish va harakatlanishda yordam berishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Uzoq muddatli parvarishlashni qoplaydigan sug'urta rejalari tobora ommalashib bormoqda.
Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash sifati muassasalar o'rtasida sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash xodimlari sog'liqni saqlash sektorida eng kam maosh oladiganlar qatoriga kiradi.
Oilalar ko'pincha qarindoshlari uchun professional va norasmiy uzoq muddatli parvarishlashni birlashtiradi.
Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash ehtiyojlarini rejalashtirish sog'liq inqirozi boshlanishidan oldin amalga oshirilishi kerak.
Uzoq muddatli parvarishlash uchun davlat moliyalashtirishi ko'p mamlakatlarda yetarli emas.

words.definition: The process of optimizing opportunities for health, participation, and security in order to enhance quality of life as people age.
words.definitionUz: Odamlar keksayganida hayot sifatini oshirish uchun sog'liq, ijtimoiy ishtirok va xavfsizlik imkoniyatlarini maksimal darajada qo'llash jarayoni.
words.example1: Active ageing encourages older people to remain physically and socially engaged.
words.example1Translation: Faol keksalik keksa odamlarni jismoniy va ijtimoiy jihatdan faol bo'lishga undaydi.
words.example2: The government launched a campaign promoting active ageing among citizens over 60.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat 60 yoshdan oshgan fuqarolar orasida faol keksalikni rag'batlantiradigan kampaniya boshladi.
words.example3: Active ageing can reduce healthcare costs and improve mental well-being.
words.example3Translation: Faol keksalik sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlarini kamaytirishi va ruhiy salomatlikni yaxshilashi mumkin.
extraExamples: Active ageing includes staying mentally sharp through learning and social activities.
Community centers play a key role in supporting active ageing programs.
Active ageing policies aim to extend the years people can live independently.
Employers who support flexible retirement contribute to active ageing.
Research shows that active ageing leads to better health outcomes.
Active ageing is promoted through sports, volunteering, and lifelong learning.
The World Health Organization advocates active ageing as a global health priority.
extraExampleTranslations: Faol keksalik o'qish va ijtimoiy faoliyatlar orqali aqliy tetiklikni saqlab qolishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Jamoat markazlari faol keksalik dasturlarini qo'llab-quvvatlashda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Faol keksalik siyosatlari odamlar mustaqil yashay oladigan yillarni uzaytirishga qaratilgan.
Moslashuvchan nafaqaga chiqishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan ish beruvchilar faol keksalikka hissa qo'shadi.
Tadqiqotlar faol keksalik yaxshiroq sog'liq natijalariga olib kelishini ko'rsatadi.
Faol keksalik sport, ko'ngillilik va umrbod o'qish orqali rag'batlantiriladi.
Jahon sog'liqni saqlash tashkiloti faol keksalikni global sog'liqni saqlash ustuvorligi sifatida targ'ib qiladi.

words.definition: A graphical representation showing the age and sex distribution of a population, typically displayed as a double bar chart.
words.definitionUz: Aholining yosh va jinsi taqsimotini ko'rsatadigan grafik tasvir, odatda ikki tomonlama diagramma shaklida ifodalanadi.
words.example1: A population pyramid with a wide base indicates a young, growing population.
words.example1Translation: Keng asosga ega aholi piramidasi yosh, o'sib borayotgan aholini ko'rsatadi.
words.example2: The population pyramid of Japan shows a top-heavy structure due to its ageing population.
words.example2Translation: Yaponiyaning aholi piramidasi keksayib borayotgan aholisi tufayli yuqori qismi keng tuzilmani ko'rsatadi.
words.example3: Demographers use the population pyramid to predict future social and economic trends.
words.example3Translation: Demograflar aholi piramidasidan kelajakdagi ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy tendensiyalarni bashorat qilish uchun foydalanadi.
extraExamples: The population pyramid revealed a sharp decline in birth rates over two decades.
A narrow-based population pyramid suggests an ageing and shrinking population.
Students studied the population pyramid to understand demographic change.
The population pyramid helped planners estimate future healthcare needs.
Comparing population pyramids from different years shows how societies evolve.
The population pyramid is a standard tool in geography and economics education.
Countries with inverted population pyramids face significant pension funding challenges.
extraExampleTranslations: Aholi piramidasi yigirma yil davomida tug'ilish darajasining keskin pasayishini ochib berdi.
Tor asosga ega aholi piramidasi keksayib va qisqarib borayotgan aholini bildiradi.
Talabalar demografik o'zgarishlarni tushunish uchun aholi piramidasini o'rganishdi.
Aholi piramidasi rejalashtiruvchilarga kelajakdagi sog'liqni saqlash ehtiyojlarini baholashga yordam berdi.
Turli yillarning aholi piramidalarini solishtirish jamiyatlar qanday rivojlanishini ko'rsatadi.
Aholi piramidasi geografiya va iqtisodiyot ta'limida standart vositadir.
Teskari aholi piramidasiga ega mamlakatlar nafaqalarni moliyalashtirish bo'yicha jiddiy muammolarga duch keladi.

words.definition: The age at which a person is eligible to stop working and begin receiving pension benefits.
words.definitionUz: Bir odamning ishdan to'xtash va nafaqa olishga haqli bo'lgan yoshi.
words.example1: Many governments are raising the retirement age due to longer life expectancy.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p hukumatlar umr ko'rish davomiyligining uzayishi tufayli nafaqa yoshini ko'tarmoqda.
words.example2: The retirement age varies between countries and between men and women in some places.
words.example2Translation: Nafaqa yoshi mamlakatlar o'rtasida va ba'zi joylarda erkaklar va ayollar o'rtasida farq qiladi.
words.example3: Workers protested against the government's plan to raise the retirement age.
words.example3Translation: Ishchilar hukumatning nafaqa yoshini ko'tarish rejasiga qarshi norozilik bildirdi.
extraExamples: The retirement age was increased from 65 to 67 to reduce pension costs.
Some workers choose to continue working beyond the official retirement age.
A flexible retirement age allows people to leave work when they feel ready.
Raising the retirement age is a controversial political issue in many countries.
The retirement age for physically demanding jobs may be set lower.
Early retirement before the official retirement age often results in reduced pension payments.
Discussions about the retirement age are closely tied to life expectancy trends.
extraExampleTranslations: Nafaqa xarajatlarini kamaytirish uchun nafaqa yoshi 65 dan 67 ga ko'tarildi.
Ba'zi ishchilar rasmiy nafaqa yoshidan keyin ham ishlashni davom ettirishni tanlaydi.
Moslashuvchan nafaqa yoshi odamlarga o'zlarini tayyor his qilganida ishdan chiqishga imkon beradi.
Nafaqa yoshini ko'tarish ko'p mamlakatlarda munozarali siyosiy masaladir.
Jismoniy og'ir mehnat talab qiladigan ishlar uchun nafaqa yoshi pastroq belgilanishi mumkin.
Rasmiy nafaqa yoshigacha erta nafaqaga chiqish ko'pincha kamroq nafaqa to'lovlariga olib keladi.
Nafaqa yoshi haqidagi muhokamalar umr ko'rish davomiyligi tendensiyalari bilan chambarchas bog'liq.

words.definition: Designed, adapted, or suitable to meet the needs and preferences of older people.
words.definitionUz: Keksa odamlarning ehtiyojlari va afzalliklariga moslashtirilgan yoki ular uchun qulay bo'lgan.
words.example1: The city was redesigned to be more age-friendly for its growing elderly population.
words.example1Translation: Shahar o'sib borayotgan keksa aholisi uchun yanada keksalarga qulay bo'lishi uchun qayta loyihalandi.
words.example2: Age-friendly workplaces help retain experienced older employees.
words.example2Translation: Keksalarga qulay ish joylari tajribali keksa xodimlarni saqlab qolishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: An age-friendly public transport system makes it easier for elderly people to stay independent.
words.example3Translation: Keksalarga qulay jamoat transporti tizimi keksa odamlarga mustaqil bo'lib qolishni osonlashtiradi.
extraExamples: Age-friendly housing includes features like ramps, grab bars, and wide doorways.
The government introduced guidelines for building age-friendly communities.
Age-friendly technology is designed with larger text and simpler interfaces.
Hospitals are adopting age-friendly practices to improve care for older patients.
Age-friendly parks and public spaces encourage older adults to stay active.
Businesses that become age-friendly benefit from access to a loyal customer base.
The WHO's age-friendly cities program has been adopted in over 1,000 cities worldwide.
extraExampleTranslations: Keksalarga qulay uy-joy pandus, tutqich va keng eshiklar kabi xususiyatlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Hukumat keksalarga qulay jamoatchiliklar qurish uchun ko'rsatmalar kiritdi.
Keksalarga qulay texnologiya kattaroq matn va soddaroq interfeyslar bilan ishlab chiqilgan.
Kasalxonalar keksa bemorlarga g'amxo'rlikni yaxshilash uchun keksalarga qulay amaliyotlarni qabul qilmoqda.
Keksalarga qulay parklar va jamoat joylari keksa kattalarning faol bo'lib qolishini rag'batlantiradi.
Keksalarga qulay bo'lgan korxonalar sodiq mijozlar bazasiga kirish imkoniyatidan foyda ko'radi.
JSSTning keksalarga qulay shaharlar dasturi butun dunyo bo'ylab 1000 dan ortiq shaharda qabul qilingan.

words.definition: The physical, emotional, and financial pressure placed on families or the state as a result of having to provide care for an increasing number of elderly people.
words.definitionUz: Ko'payib borayotgan keksa odamlarga g'amxo'rlik qilish zaruriyati tufayli oilalar yoki davlat zimmasiga tushadigan jismoniy, hissiy va moliyaviy og'irlik.
words.example1: The elderly care burden is increasing as the population ages.
words.example1Translation: Aholi keksayishi bilan keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yuki ortib bormoqda.
words.example2: Many adult children struggle with the elderly care burden while managing their own careers.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p voyaga yetgan bolalar o'z karerasini boshqarish bilan birga keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yukini ko'tarish bilan kurashmoqda.
words.example3: Governments are seeking solutions to ease the growing elderly care burden.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar o'sib borayotgan keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yukini yengillashtirish uchun yechimlar izlamoqda.
extraExamples: The elderly care burden falls disproportionately on women in many cultures.
Financial support from the government can help reduce the elderly care burden on families.
The elderly care burden has increased demand for professional care workers.
Without social support, the elderly care burden can lead to caregiver burnout.
The elderly care burden is a key driver of healthcare spending in ageing societies.
Community care programs aim to share the elderly care burden more widely.
Technology-based solutions are being developed to reduce the elderly care burden.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p madaniyatlarda keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yuki mutanosib ravishda ayollar zimmasiga tushadi.
Hukumatdan moliyaviy yordam oilalardagi keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yukini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yuki professional parvarishchi xodimlarga talabni oshirdi.
Ijtimoiy qo'llab-quvvatlashsiz keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yuki parvarishchining charchashiga olib kelishi mumkin.
Keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yuki keksayib borayotgan jamiyatlarda sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlarining asosiy sababi hisoblanadi.
Jamoat g'amxo'rlik dasturlari keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yukini kengroq taqsimlashga qaratilgan.
Keksalarga g'amxo'rlik yukini kamaytirish uchun texnologiyaga asoslangan yechimlar ishlab chiqilmoqda.

words.definition: The economic growth potential that arises when a country has a large proportion of working-age people relative to dependents.
words.definitionUz: Bir mamlakatda qaramlik yoshidagilarga nisbatan ko'p sonli mehnat yoshidagi odamlar bo'lganda yuzaga keladigan iqtisodiy o'sish imkoniyati.
words.example1: Countries in sub-Saharan Africa could benefit from a demographic dividend in coming decades.
words.example1Translation: Sahara janubidagi Afrika mamlakatlari kelgusi o'n yilliklarda demografik dividenddan foyda ko'rishi mumkin.
words.example2: East Asian countries successfully converted their demographic dividend into rapid economic growth.
words.example2Translation: Sharqiy Osiyo mamlakatlari demografik dividendlarini muvaffaqiyatli ravishda tez iqtisodiy o'sishga aylantirdi.
words.example3: To benefit from a demographic dividend, countries need to invest in education and job creation.
words.example3Translation: Demografik dividenddan foyda ko'rish uchun mamlakatlar ta'lim va ish o'rinlari yaratishga investitsiya qilishi kerak.
extraExamples: The demographic dividend is a one-time opportunity that lasts for a limited period.
India is currently at a stage where it can harness its demographic dividend.
Without good governance, a demographic dividend can be wasted.
The demographic dividend helped fuel the rapid growth of economies in Asia.
Investing in youth health and education is essential to realizing the demographic dividend.
The demographic dividend diminishes as the population begins to age.
Economists see the demographic dividend as one of the biggest drivers of development.
extraExampleTranslations: Demografik dividend cheklangan muddat davom etadigan bir martalik imkoniyatdir.
Hindiston hozirda demografik dividendidan foydalana oladigan bosqichda.
Yaxshi boshqaruvsizchalik demografik dividend behuda sarflanishi mumkin.
Demografik dividend Osiyodagi iqtisodiyotlarning tez o'sishini qo'zg'altirishga yordam berdi.
Yoshlar sog'lig'i va ta'limiga investitsiya qilish demografik dividendni amalga oshirish uchun muhimdir.
Demografik dividend aholi keksaya boshlagan sari kamayib boradi.
Iqtisodchilar demografik dividendni rivojlanishning eng katta harakatlantiruvchi kuchlaridan biri sifatida ko'radi.

words.definition: The average difference in earnings between men and women in the workplace, often expressed as a percentage.
words.definitionUz: Ish joyida erkaklar va ayollar o'rtasidagi o'rtacha ish haqi farqi, ko'pincha foiz sifatida ifodalanadi.
words.example1: The gender pay gap means women often earn less than men for doing the same job.
words.example1Translation: Genderdagi ish haqi farqi ayollar ko'pincha bir xil ish uchun erkaklar kabi kamroq maosh olishini anglatadi.
words.example2: Many companies are now required to publish data on their gender pay gap.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab kompaniyalar endi genderdagi ish haqi farqi bo'yicha ma'lumotlarni e'lon qilishi shart.
words.example3: Closing the gender pay gap requires changes in hiring, promotion, and wage policies.
words.example3Translation: Genderdagi ish haqi farqini yo'q qilish yollash, lavozimga ko'tarish va ish haqi siyosatidagi o'zgarishlarni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The gender pay gap tends to widen significantly after women have children.
Studies show the gender pay gap varies considerably between different industries.
Transparency in salaries is seen as one way to help reduce the gender pay gap.
The gender pay gap affects women's retirement savings and long-term financial security.
Some countries have introduced legislation specifically aimed at closing the gender pay gap.
The gender pay gap is often larger for women from minority ethnic backgrounds.
Advocates argue that flexible working arrangements can help narrow the gender pay gap.
extraExampleTranslations: Genderdagi ish haqi farqi ayollar farzand ko'rganidan keyin sezilarli darajada kengayishga moyil.
Tadqiqotlar genderdagi ish haqi farqi turli sohalar o'rtasida ancha farq qilishini ko'rsatadi.
Ish haqlari bo'yicha shaffoflik genderdagi ish haqi farqini kamaytirishga yordam berishning bir usuli sifatida ko'riladi.
Genderdagi ish haqi farqi ayollarning pensiya jamg'armasiga va uzoq muddatli moliyaviy xavfsizligiga ta'sir qiladi.
Ba'zi mamlakatlar genderdagi ish haqi farqini yo'q qilishga qaratilgan maxsus qonunlar joriy qildi.
Genderdagi ish haqi farqi ko'pincha etnik ozchilik guruhlaridagi ayollar uchun kattaroq bo'ladi.
Himoyachilar moslashuvchan ish sharoitlari genderdagi ish haqi farqini toraytirishga yordam berishi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.

words.definition: An invisible but real barrier that prevents women and minorities from rising beyond a certain level in a professional hierarchy, despite their qualifications.
words.definitionUz: Malakasidan qat'iy nazar, ayollar va ozchilik vakillarining kasbiy ierarxiyada ma'lum bir darajadan yuqoriga ko'tarilishiga to'sqinlik qiluvchi ko'rinmas, ammo haqiqiy to'siq.
words.example1: Despite her outstanding performance, she felt the glass ceiling every time she was passed over for promotion.
words.example1Translation: Ajoyib natijalarga qaramay, u har safar lavozimga o'tmay qolganida shisha shiftchani his qildi.
words.example2: Breaking the glass ceiling remains a challenge for women in many male-dominated industries.
words.example2Translation: Shisha shiftchani sindirish ko'plab erkaklar hukmronlik qiladigan sohalarda ayollar uchun hali ham qiyinlik bo'lib qolmoqda.
words.example3: When she became CEO, many saw it as proof that the glass ceiling could be broken.
words.example3Translation: U bosh direktor bo'lganida, ko'pchilik buni shisha shiftchani sindirish mumkinligining isboti sifatida ko'rdi.
extraExamples: The glass ceiling is not a formal rule but an unwritten social and organizational barrier.
Research shows that women who reach senior roles often face a glass ceiling in boardrooms.
Some argue that the glass ceiling has shifted but not fully disappeared in modern workplaces.
Mentorship programs are designed to help women navigate and break through the glass ceiling.
The glass ceiling affects not only women but also people from minority backgrounds.
Her appointment as prime minister was widely celebrated as a crack in the glass ceiling.
Addressing the glass ceiling requires changing both company culture and recruitment practices.
extraExampleTranslations: Shisha shiftcha rasmiy qoida emas, balki yozilmagan ijtimoiy va tashkiliy to'siqdir.
Tadqiqotlar yuqori lavozimlarga erishgan ayollar ko'pincha boshqaruv kengashlarida shisha shiftchaga duch kelishini ko'rsatadi.
Ba'zilar zamonaviy ish joylarida shisha shiftcha o'zgardi, lekin to'liq yo'qolmadi, deb ta'kidlaydi.
Mentorlik dasturlari ayollarga shisha shiftchani engib o'tishda yordam berish uchun mo'ljallangan.
Shisha shiftcha nafaqat ayollarga, balki ozchilik guruhlaridagi odamlarga ham ta'sir qiladi.
Uning bosh vazir etib tayinlanishi shisha shiftchadagi yoriq sifatida keng nishonlandi.
Shisha shiftchani bartaraf etish kompaniya madaniyati ham, yollash amaliyotini ham o'zgartirishni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Oversimplified and widely held fixed beliefs about how men and women should behave, what roles they should play, and what traits they naturally possess.
words.definitionUz: Erkaklar va ayollar qanday muomala qilishlari, qanday rollarda bo'lishlari va qanday xususiyatlarga ega bo'lishlari haqida soddalashtirilgan va keng tarqalgan qat'iy e'tiqodlar.
words.example1: Gender stereotypes often lead people to assume that men are better leaders than women.
words.example1Translation: Gender stereotiplari ko'pincha odamlarni erkaklar ayollarga qaraganda yaxshiroq rahbar deb taxmin qilishga undaydi.
words.example2: Children can internalize gender stereotypes from a very early age through toys and media.
words.example2Translation: Bolalar o'yinchoqlar va ommaviy axborot vositalari orqali juda erta yoshdan gender stereotiplarini o'zlashtirib olishi mumkin.
words.example3: Challenging gender stereotypes in advertising has become a growing social movement.
words.example3Translation: Reklamadagi gender stereotiplariga qarshi chiqish tobora kuchayib borayotgan ijtimoiy harakatga aylandi.
extraExamples: Gender stereotypes can limit the career choices that young people feel are available to them.
Many schools are working to challenge gender stereotypes in the classroom.
Gender stereotypes harm both men and women by setting unrealistic expectations.
The film industry has been criticized for reinforcing gender stereotypes in its storytelling.
Breaking gender stereotypes often requires ongoing education and awareness campaigns.
Gender stereotypes can discourage boys from pursuing careers in nursing or teaching.
Parents play a key role in either reinforcing or challenging gender stereotypes at home.
extraExampleTranslations: Gender stereotiplari yoshlarning o'zlari uchun mavjud deb his qiladigan martaba tanlovlarini cheklashi mumkin.
Ko'plab maktablar sinf xonalarida gender stereotiplariga qarshi kurashish ustida ishlayapti.
Gender stereotiplari norealistik umidlar qo'yib, ham erkaklar, ham ayollarga zarar yetkazadi.
Kino sanoati o'zining hikoya aytish tarzida gender stereotiplarini mustahkamlashda tanqid qilingan.
Gender stereotiplarini sindirish ko'pincha doimiy ta'lim va xabardorlik kampaniyalarini talab qiladi.
Gender stereotiplari o'g'il bolalarni hamshiralik yoki o'qituvchilik sohalarida martaba qurishdan qaytarishi mumkin.
Ota-onalar uyda gender stereotiplarini mustahkamlash yoki ularga qarshi kurashishda muhim rol o'ynaydi.

words.definition: Automatic and unintentional mental associations or prejudices about certain groups of people that influence decisions and behavior without the person being aware of it.
words.definitionUz: Odamning o'zi bilmagan holda qarorlar va xatti-harakatlariga ta'sir qiluvchi ma'lum guruhlar haqidagi avtomatik va ixtiyorsiz ruhiy bog'lanishlar yoki oldindan muhokama.
words.example1: Unconscious bias in hiring can lead employers to favor candidates who look or sound like them.
words.example1Translation: Yollashdagi ongsiz tarafkashlik ish beruvchilarni o'zlariga o'xshab ko'rinadigan yoki gaplashadigan nomzodlarga ustunlik berishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example2: Many organizations now offer unconscious bias training to improve workplace fairness.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab tashkilotlar ish joyidagi adolatni yaxshilash uchun endi ongsiz tarafkashlik bo'yicha treninglar taklif etmoqda.
words.example3: Unconscious bias can affect how teachers grade and interact with their students.
words.example3Translation: Ongsiz tarafkashlik o'qituvchilarning o'quvchilarni baholash va ular bilan muloqot qilishiga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Even people with strong beliefs in equality can be influenced by unconscious bias.
Unconscious bias often affects decisions about who gets promoted in the workplace.
Structured interviews can help reduce the influence of unconscious bias in recruitment.
Unconscious bias can cause doctors to underestimate pain levels in female patients.
Recognizing unconscious bias in yourself is the first step toward overcoming it.
Unconscious bias research has grown significantly as a field over the past two decades.
Diverse hiring panels are recommended as a way to reduce the effects of unconscious bias.
extraExampleTranslations: Tenglikka qattiq ishongan odamlar ham ongsiz tarafkashlik ta'sirida bo'lishi mumkin.
Ongsiz tarafkashlik ko'pincha ish joyida kim lavozimga ko'tarilishiga oid qarorlarga ta'sir qiladi.
Tuzilmali intervyular yollashda ongsiz tarafkashlik ta'sirini kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Ongsiz tarafkashlik shifokorlarning ayol bemorlardagi og'riq darajasini kambaholashiga sabab bo'lishi mumkin.
O'zingizda ongsiz tarafkashlikni tan olish uni engishning birinchi qadamidir.
Ongsiz tarafkashlik bo'yicha tadqiqotlar so'nggi yigirma yil ichida soha sifatida sezilarli darajada o'sdi.
Xilma-xil yollash guruhlari ongsiz tarafkashlik ta'sirini kamaytirish usuli sifatida tavsiya etiladi.

words.definition: A period of authorized absence from work that is granted to a father following the birth or adoption of a child.
words.definitionUz: Farzand tug'ilishi yoki farzandlikka olish munosabati bilan otaga beriladigan ishdan qonuniy bo'shatilish davri.
words.example1: Many countries have introduced paid paternal leave to encourage fathers to be more involved in childcare.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab mamlakatlar otalarni bolalar parvarishiga ko'proq jalb qilish uchun pullik otalik ta'tilini joriy qildi.
words.example2: He took two weeks of paternal leave after his daughter was born.
words.example2Translation: U qizi tug'ilgandan keyin ikki hafta otalik ta'tiliga chiqdi.
words.example3: Longer paternal leave is associated with greater gender equality both at home and in the workplace.
words.example3Translation: Uzunroq otalik ta'tili uyda ham, ish joyida ham katta gender tengligiga bog'liq.
extraExamples: Some employers offer paternal leave that goes beyond the legal minimum requirement.
Uptake of paternal leave remains low in countries where it is unpaid.
Paternal leave allows fathers to bond with their newborns during the critical early weeks.
Scandinavian countries are often cited as leaders in generous paternal leave policies.
Many men feel social pressure that discourages them from taking their full paternal leave.
Paternal leave policies differ widely in length and pay levels across different countries.
Research shows that children benefit emotionally when their fathers take paternal leave.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zi ish beruvchilar qonuniy minimal talabdan oshib ketadigan otalik ta'tilini taklif etadi.
To'lanmaydigan mamlakatlarda otalik ta'tilidan foydalanish past bo'lib qolmoqda.
Otalik ta'tili otalarga muhim ilk haftalar davomida chaqaloqlari bilan munosabat o'rnatishga imkon beradi.
Skandinaviya mamlakatlari ko'pincha saxovatli otalik ta'tili siyosatida yetakchi sifatida tilga olinadi.
Ko'plab erkaklar to'liq otalik ta'tiliga chiqishdan qaytaruvchi ijtimoiy bosimni his qilishadi.
Otalik ta'tili siyosati turli mamlakatlarda muddati va ish haqi darajasi bo'yicha keng farq qiladi.
Tadqiqotlar otalar otalik ta'tiliga chiqqanda bolalar hissiy jihatdan foyda ko'rishini ko'rsatadi.

words.definition: The process of increasing women's access to opportunities, resources, and decision-making power so they can take control of their own lives.
words.definitionUz: Ayollarning o'z hayotlarini nazorat qila olishlari uchun imkoniyatlar, resurslar va qaror qabul qilish huquqiga kirishini kengaytirish jarayoni.
words.example1: Women's empowerment includes access to education, healthcare, and economic independence.
words.example1Translation: Ayollarni kuchaytirish ta'lim, sog'liqni saqlash va iqtisodiy mustaqillikka kirishni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: Microfinance programs have played a significant role in women's empowerment in rural communities.
words.example2Translation: Mikromoliya dasturlari qishloq jamoalarida ayollarni kuchaytirishda muhim rol o'ynadi.
words.example3: Women's empowerment benefits not just individuals but entire families and communities.
words.example3Translation: Ayollarni kuchaytirish nafaqat shaxslarga, balki butun oilalar va jamoalarga foyda keltiradi.
extraExamples: Women's empowerment is recognized as a key goal in the UN's Sustainable Development Goals.
Education is widely considered the most powerful tool for women's empowerment.
Women's empowerment requires dismantling legal and cultural barriers that hold women back.
NGOs working on women's empowerment focus on building confidence and leadership skills.
Economic women's empowerment helps reduce poverty at the household level.
Women's empowerment movements have historically faced significant resistance from traditional institutions.
Technology has opened new pathways for women's empowerment through remote work and digital education.
extraExampleTranslations: Ayollarni kuchaytirish BMTning Barqaror Rivojlanish Maqsadlarida asosiy maqsad sifatida tan olingan.
Ta'lim ayollarni kuchaytirish uchun eng kuchli vosita sifatida keng tan olinadi.
Ayollarni kuchaytirish ayollarni orqada ushlab turadigan huquqiy va madaniy to'siqlarni bartaraf etishni talab qiladi.
Ayollarni kuchaytirish ustida ishlaydigan NNTlar ishonch va etakchilik ko'nikmalarini shakllantirishga e'tibor qaratadi.
Ayollarni iqtisodiy kuchaytirish uy xo'jaligi darajasida qashshoqlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Ayollarni kuchaytirish harakatlari tarixan an'anaviy institutlarning sezilarli qarshiligiga duch kelgan.
Texnologiya masofaviy ish va raqamli ta'lim orqali ayollarni kuchaytirish uchun yangi yo'llar ochdi.

words.definition: The strategy of incorporating a gender equality perspective into all policies, programs, and decision-making processes at every level of government and institutions.
words.definitionUz: Gender tengligini hukumat va muassasalarning barcha darajalarida barcha siyosat, dasturlar va qaror qabul qilish jarayonlariga kiritish strategiyasi.
words.example1: Gender mainstreaming ensures that policies consider the different needs of men and women.
words.example1Translation: Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish siyosatlar erkaklar va ayollarning turli ehtiyojlarini hisobga olishini ta'minlaydi.
words.example2: The United Nations has promoted gender mainstreaming as a global strategy since the 1990s.
words.example2Translation: Birlashgan Millatlar Tashkiloti 1990-yillardan beri genderni asosiy oqimga kiritishni global strategiya sifatida ilgari surmoqda.
words.example3: Gender mainstreaming requires training all staff to think about gender impact in their work.
words.example3Translation: Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish barcha xodimlarni ishlarida gender ta'sirini o'ylashga o'rgatishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Gender mainstreaming goes beyond simply hiring more women — it changes how decisions are made.
Budget planning that applies gender mainstreaming allocates resources more fairly.
Critics argue that gender mainstreaming sometimes lacks practical implementation on the ground.
Gender mainstreaming has been adopted as official policy by many international organizations.
Healthcare systems that apply gender mainstreaming provide better outcomes for all patients.
Gender mainstreaming requires collecting data that is broken down by gender at every stage.
Without political commitment, gender mainstreaming remains an aspiration rather than a reality.
extraExampleTranslations: Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish shunchaki ko'proq ayollarni yollashdan oshib, qarorlar qabul qilinish usulini o'zgartiradi.
Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritishni qo'llaydigan byudjet rejalashtirish resurslarni adolatliroq taqsimlaydi.
Tanqidchilar genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish ba'zan joyda amaliy tatbiqdan mahrum bo'lishini ta'kidlaydi.
Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish ko'plab xalqaro tashkilotlar tomonidan rasmiy siyosat sifatida qabul qilingan.
Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritishni qo'llaydigan sog'liqni saqlash tizimlari barcha bemorlar uchun yaxshiroq natijalar beradi.
Genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish har bir bosqichda gender bo'yicha taqsimlangan ma'lumotlarni to'plashni talab qiladi.
Siyosiy majburiyatsiz genderni asosiy oqimga kiritish haqiqatga emas, maqsadga aylanib qoladi.

words.definition: A noticeable and often significant difference between men and women in their access to opportunities, resources, rights, or the treatment they receive.
words.definitionUz: Erkaklar va ayollarning imkoniyatlarga, resurslarga, huquqlarga kirishi yoki ular oladigan muomalada ko'zga ko'rinadigan va ko'pincha muhim farq.
words.example1: Gender disparity in education persists in many parts of the world, with girls less likely to attend school.
words.example1Translation: Ta'limdagi gender tengsizligi dunyo'ning ko'p qismida davom etmoqda, qizlar maktabga kamroq borishi ehtimoli yuqori.
words.example2: The report highlighted a significant gender disparity in the number of senior executives.
words.example2Translation: Hisobotda yuqori rahbarlar sonidagi sezilarli gender tengsizligi ta'kidlandi.
words.example3: Addressing gender disparity in healthcare access is a priority for many governments.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqni saqlashga kirishdagi gender tengsizligini bartaraf etish ko'plab hukumatlar uchun ustuvor vazifa.
extraExamples: Gender disparity in political representation remains a challenge in most democracies.
The study revealed a worrying gender disparity in science and technology graduation rates.
Gender disparity in household chores can add to women's overall workload and stress.
Reducing gender disparity in wages requires transparency and enforceable equal pay legislation.
Gender disparity in access to land rights affects women's economic independence in rural areas.
Closing gender disparity in digital access is important for women's participation in the modern economy.
Gender disparity often intersects with other inequalities such as race and socioeconomic class.
extraExampleTranslations: Siyosiy vakillikdagi gender tengsizligi ko'pchilik demokratiyalarda qiyinlik bo'lib qolmoqda.
Tadqiqot fan va texnologiya bitiruvchilik darajalarida tashvishli gender tengsizligini aniqladi.
Uy ishlari bo'yicha gender tengsizligi ayollarning umumiy ish hajmi va stress darajasini oshirishi mumkin.
Ish haqidagi gender tengsizligini kamaytirish shaffoflik va ijro etiladigan teng ish haqi qonunchiligini talab qiladi.
Yer huquqiga kirishdagi gender tengsizligi qishloq hududlaridagi ayollarning iqtisodiy mustaqilligiga ta'sir qiladi.
Raqamli kirishdagi gender tengsizligini bartaraf etish ayollarning zamonaviy iqtisodiyotda ishtirok etishi uchun muhim.
Gender tengsizligi ko'pincha irq va ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy sinf kabi boshqa tengsizliklar bilan kesishadi.

words.definition: The proportion or presence of women in positions of authority, leadership, media, politics, or other influential spaces in society.
words.definitionUz: Jamiyatdagi hokimiyat, etakchilik, ommaviy axborot vositalari, siyosat yoki boshqa ta'sirli sohalardagi lavozimlarda ayollarning ulushi yoki mavjudligi.
words.example1: Female representation in parliament has increased in many countries over the past two decades.
words.example1Translation: Parlamentdagi ayollar vakilligi so'nggi yigirma yil ichida ko'plab mamlakatlarda ortdi.
words.example2: Low female representation in tech leadership is a problem the industry is trying to address.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya etakchiligida ayollar vakilligining pastligi sanoat hal qilishga harakat qilayotgan muammo.
words.example3: Films with strong female representation tend to perform well at the box office.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli ayollar vakilligi bo'lgan filmlar kassa daromadlarida yaxshi natija ko'rsatishga moyil.
extraExamples: Female representation on corporate boards has improved but still falls short of equality.
Researchers found that greater female representation in government leads to better policy outcomes.
Female representation in sports media coverage remains disproportionately low worldwide.
Role models are important for encouraging girls to pursue careers with historically low female representation.
Female representation in medical research has increased, leading to better healthcare for women.
Quotas are sometimes introduced as a temporary measure to boost female representation.
Greater female representation in the classroom has been linked to improved outcomes for all students.
extraExampleTranslations: Korporativ kengashlarda ayollar vakilligi yaxshilandi, ammo hali ham tenglik darajasiga yetmaydi.
Tadqiqotchilar hukumatda ayollar vakilligining ko'payishi siyosatning yaxshiroq natijalariga olib kelishini aniqladi.
Sport ommaviy axborot vositalarida ayollar vakilligi butun dunyo bo'ylab nomutanosib ravishda past bo'lib qolmoqda.
Ibrat namunalari qizlarni tarixan ayollar vakilligi past bo'lgan sohalarda martaba qilishga undash uchun muhim.
Tibbiy tadqiqotlarda ayollar vakilligining ko'payishi ayollar uchun yaxshiroq sog'liqni saqlashga olib keldi.
Kvotalar ba'zan ayollar vakilligini oshirish uchun vaqtinchalik chora sifatida joriy qilinadi.
Sinf xonasida ayollar vakilligining ko'payishi barcha o'quvchilar uchun yaxshilangan natijalar bilan bog'liq.

words.definition: A set of cultural norms and expectations that define masculinity through dominance, emotional suppression, aggression, and the rejection of traits seen as feminine.
words.definitionUz: Erkaklikni hukmronlik, his-tuyg'ularni bosib o'tish, tajovuzkorlik va ayollik belgisi deb hisoblangan xususiyatlarni rad etish orqali belgilaydigan madaniy me'yorlar va umidlar to'plami.
words.example1: Toxic masculinity teaches boys that showing vulnerability or emotion is a sign of weakness.
words.example1Translation: Zararli erkaklik madaniyati o'g'il bolalarga zaiflik yoki his-tuyg'ularni ko'rsatish kuchsizlik belgisi ekanligini o'rgatadi.
words.example2: Experts link toxic masculinity to higher rates of violence and mental health problems among men.
words.example2Translation: Mutaxassislar zararli erkaklik madaniyatini erkaklar orasida yuqori zo'ravonlik va ruhiy salomatlik muammolari bilan bog'laydi.
words.example3: Challenging toxic masculinity means redefining strength to include empathy and emotional openness.
words.example3Translation: Zararli erkaklik madaniyatiga qarshi chiqish kuchni empatiya va hissiy ochiqlikni ham o'z ichiga olgan tarzda qayta ta'riflashni anglatadi.
extraExamples: Toxic masculinity harms men by discouraging them from seeking help for mental health struggles.
The phrase "man up" is often cited as a cultural expression of toxic masculinity.
Toxic masculinity can create hostile environments for women in workplaces and public spaces.
Many campaigns now focus on helping young men recognize and reject toxic masculinity.
Toxic masculinity is not about criticizing men — it targets harmful cultural expectations.
Research links toxic masculinity to risky behaviors such as reckless driving and substance abuse.
Films and video games have been criticized for normalizing toxic masculinity in their content.
extraExampleTranslations: Zararli erkaklik madaniyati erkaklar ruhiy salomatlik muammolari uchun yordam so'rashdan qaytarish orqali ularga zarar yetkazadi.
"Erkakdek bo'l" iborasi ko'pincha zararli erkaklik madaniyatining madaniy ifodasiga misol sifatida keltiriladi.
Zararli erkaklik madaniyati ish joylari va jamoat joylarida ayollar uchun dushmanona muhit yaratishi mumkin.
Ko'plab kampaniyalar endi yosh erkaklar zararli erkaklik madaniyatini tanib, rad etishiga yordam berishga qaratilgan.
Zararli erkaklik madaniyati erkaklikni tanqid qilish emas — u zararli madaniy umidlarga qaratilgan.
Tadqiqotlar zararli erkaklik madaniyatini beparvo haydash va giyohvandlik kabi xavfli xatti-harakatlar bilan bog'laydi.
Filmlar va video o'yinlar zararli erkaklik madaniyatini o'z kontentida normallashtirgani uchun tanqid qilingan.

words.definition: A policy that sets a minimum required number or percentage of positions that must be filled by a specific gender, usually to increase women's representation.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha ayollar vakilligini oshirish uchun ma'lum bir jins tomonidan to'ldirilishi kerak bo'lgan lavozimlar uchun minimal talab qilinadigan son yoki foizni belgilaydigan siyosat.
words.example1: Several European countries have introduced a gender quota for seats on corporate boards.
words.example1Translation: Bir necha Yevropa mamlakatlari korporativ kengash o'rinlari uchun gender kvotasini joriy qildi.
words.example2: Supporters of the gender quota system argue it accelerates progress toward equality.
words.example2Translation: Gender kvotasi tizimini qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar u tenglikka erishishni tezlashtiradi deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3: Critics of the gender quota say it undermines the principle of selecting candidates purely on merit.
words.example3Translation: Gender kvotasini tanqid qiluvchilar u nomzodlarni faqat layoqat asosida tanlash tamoyilini zaiflashtiradi deydi.
extraExamples: Rwanda has one of the highest female representation rates in the world partly due to its gender quota.
The gender quota debate often divides opinion between those who prioritize fairness and those who prioritize diversity.
Some political parties voluntarily adopt a gender quota for their candidate lists.
Without a gender quota, progress toward equal representation has historically been very slow.
A gender quota in parliament does not guarantee that women's interests will automatically be prioritized.
The effectiveness of a gender quota depends heavily on how well it is enforced.
Some critics argue that a gender quota can create a stigma around women who benefit from it.
extraExampleTranslations: Ruanda qisman o'zining gender kvotasi tufayli dunyoda ayollar vakilligining eng yuqori darajasiga ega.
Gender kvotasi bahsi ko'pincha adolatni ustuvor qo'yganlar va xilma-xillikni ustuvor qo'yganlar o'rtasida fikrni bo'ladi.
Ba'zi siyosiy partiyalar nomzodlar ro'yxati uchun ixtiyoriy ravishda gender kvotasini qabul qiladi.
Gender kvotasisiz teng vakillikka erishish tarixan juda sekin bo'lgan.
Parlamentdagi gender kvotasi ayollar manfaatlarining avtomatik ravishda ustuvor qo'yilishini kafolatlamaydi.
Gender kvotasining samaradorligi uning qanchalik yaxshi amalga oshirilishiga bog'liq.
Ba'zi tanqidchilar gender kvotasi undan foyda ko'rgan ayollar atrofida tamg'a yaratiши mumkin deb ta'kidlaydi.

words.definition: The equilibrium between the time and energy a person dedicates to their professional work and the time and energy they give to their personal life, family, and wellbeing.
words.definitionUz: Odamning kasbiy ishiga va shaxsiy hayoti, oilasi va farovonligiga sarflaydigan vaqt va energiya o'rtasidagi muvozanat.
words.example1: Many employees cite poor work-life balance as a major reason for leaving their jobs.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab xodimlar ishdan ketishining asosiy sababi sifatida yomon ish va hayot muvozanatini ko'rsatadi.
words.example2: Remote working has helped some people achieve a better work-life balance.
words.example2Translation: Masofaviy ishlash ba'zi odamlarga yaxshiroq ish va hayot muvozanatiga erishishga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Achieving work-life balance often requires setting clear boundaries between work and personal time.
words.example3Translation: Ish va hayot muvozanatiga erishish ko'pincha ish va shaxsiy vaqt o'rtasida aniq chegaralar qo'yishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Work-life balance is particularly challenging for parents with young children.
Some companies promote work-life balance by offering flexible hours and remote work options.
Poor work-life balance has been linked to burnout, anxiety, and reduced productivity.
The concept of work-life balance has become a central concern in modern career discussions.
Gender inequality at home can make it harder for women to achieve a healthy work-life balance.
Younger generations tend to prioritize work-life balance more than previous generations did.
Work-life balance looks different for everyone and depends on personal values and circumstances.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish va hayot muvozanati ayniqsa yosh bolali ota-onalar uchun qiyin.
Ba'zi kompaniyalar moslashuvchan ish vaqti va masofaviy ish imkoniyatlarini taklif qilish orqali ish va hayot muvozanatini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Yomon ish va hayot muvozanati charchash, tashvish va samaradorlikning pasayishi bilan bog'liq.
Ish va hayot muvozanati tushunchasi zamonaviy martaba muhokamalarida markaziy muammoga aylandi.
Uyda gender tengsizligi ayollar uchun sog'lom ish va hayot muvozanatiga erishishni qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
Yosh avlodlar ish va hayot muvozanatini avvalgi avlodlarga qaraganda ko'proq ustuvor qo'yishga moyil.
Ish va hayot muvozanati hamma uchun boshqacha ko'rinadi va shaxsiy qadriyatlar hamda sharoitlarga bog'liq.

words.definition: Not specific to or associated with any particular gender; designed or intended to be applicable to or inclusive of all genders.
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday muayyan jinsga xos yoki bog'liq bo'lmagan; barcha jinslarga tatbiq qilish yoki ularni qamrab olish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example1: Many parents are choosing gender-neutral names for their children to avoid early stereotyping.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab ota-onalar erta stereotiplashdan qochish uchun farzandlari uchun gender-neytral ismlarni tanlashmoqda.
words.example2: The company updated its dress code policy to be gender-neutral and more inclusive.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya kiyim-kechak siyosatini gender-neytral va yanada qamrovli qilish uchun yangiladi.
words.example3: Gender-neutral language avoids terms that assume the gender of a person being referred to.
words.example3Translation: Gender-neytral til murojaat qilinayotgan shaxsning jinsini taxmin qiladigan atamalardan qochadi.
extraExamples: Some schools have introduced gender-neutral uniforms to make all students feel equally comfortable.
Gender-neutral toilets are becoming more common in public buildings and workplaces.
Using gender-neutral job titles like "firefighter" instead of "fireman" promotes inclusivity.
Several countries now allow a gender-neutral option on official identity documents.
Gender-neutral toys are designed to encourage creativity in all children regardless of gender.
The movement toward gender-neutral language reflects broader changes in social attitudes.
Critics of gender-neutral policies argue they go too far, while supporters say they are overdue.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zi maktablar barcha o'quvchilarni teng darajada qulay his qilishiga yordam berish uchun gender-neytral forma joriy qildi.
Gender-neytral hojatxonalar jamoat binolari va ish joylarida tobora ko'proq uchramoqda.
"Fireman" o'rniga "firefighter" kabi gender-neytral ish unvonlaridan foydalanish qamrovlilikni targ'ib qiladi.
Bir necha mamlakat endi rasmiy shaxsini tasdiqlovchi hujjatlarda gender-neytral variantga ruxsat beradi.
Gender-neytral o'yinchoqlar jinsidan qat'iy nazar barcha bolalarda ijodkorlikni rag'batlantirish uchun mo'ljallangan.
Gender-neytral tilga o'tish harakati ijtimoiy munosabatlardagi keng o'zgarishlarni aks ettiradi.
Gender-neytral siyosatni tanqid qiluvchilar u haddan oshib ketadi deydi, qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar esa bu allaqachon kechiktirilgan deydi.

words.definition: Social rules, traditions, and attitudes that uphold a system in which men hold primary power and authority over women in family, social, and political life.
words.definitionUz: Erkaklar oila, ijtimoiy va siyosiy hayotda ayollar ustidan asosiy hokimiyat va vakolatga ega bo'ladigan tizimni qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan ijtimoiy qoidalar, an'analar va munosabatlar.
words.example1: Patriarchal norms often pressure women to prioritize family responsibilities over their careers.
words.example1Translation: Patriarxal me'yorlar ko'pincha ayollarni martabalaridan ko'ra oila mas'uliyatlarini ustuvor qo'yishga majbur qiladi.
words.example2: Many feminist movements aim to dismantle patriarchal norms embedded in law and culture.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab feminist harakatlar qonun va madaniyatga singib ketgan patriarxal me'yorlarni yo'q qilishga intiladi.
words.example3: Patriarchal norms can discourage men from taking on caregiving roles at home.
words.example3Translation: Patriarxal me'yorlar erkaklarni uyda parvarishlovchi rollarni o'z zimmasiga olishdan qaytarishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Patriarchal norms are often so deeply rooted that they are difficult to recognize as social constructs.
Education is seen as one of the most effective tools for challenging patriarchal norms.
Patriarchal norms vary in intensity across different cultures and regions of the world.
Young people are increasingly pushing back against patriarchal norms in both public and private life.
Patriarchal norms in legal systems have historically denied women property and inheritance rights.
Media and religion have both played a role in reinforcing patriarchal norms across generations.
Changing patriarchal norms requires engagement from men as well as women.
extraExampleTranslations: Patriarxal me'yorlar ko'pincha shu qadar chuqur ildiz otganki, ularni ijtimoiy konstruktsiyalar sifatida tan olish qiyin.
Ta'lim patriarxal me'yorlarga qarshi kurashishdagi eng samarali vositalardan biri sifatida ko'riladi.
Patriarxal me'yorlar dunyoning turli madaniyatlari va hududlarida intensivligi bo'yicha farq qiladi.
Yoshlar tobora ko'proq ham jamoat, ham shaxsiy hayotda patriarxal me'yorlarga qarshi chiqmoqda.
Huquqiy tizimlardagi patriarxal me'yorlar tarixan ayollarni mulk va meros huquqlaridan mahrum qilgan.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari va din avlodlar bo'ylab patriarxal me'yorlarni mustahkamlashda rol o'ynagan.
Patriarxal me'yorlarni o'zgartirish nafaqat ayollar, balki erkaklar ishtirokini ham talab qiladi.

words.definition: A framework for understanding how different aspects of a person's social identity — such as race, gender, class, and sexuality — overlap and interact to create unique experiences of discrimination or privilege.
words.definitionUz: Odamning ijtimoiy o'zligining turli jihatlarini — irq, jins, sinf va jinsiy yo'nalish kabi — qanday qilib mos kelishi va o'zaro ta'siri kamsitish yoki imtiyozning o'ziga xos tajribalarini yaratishini tushunish uchun asos.
words.example1: Intersectionality helps explain why a Black woman's experience of discrimination can differ from a white woman's.
words.example1Translation: Kesishuvchilik qora tanli ayolning kamsitish tajribasi nega oq tanli ayolnikidan farq qilishi mumkinligini tushuntirishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: The concept of intersectionality was developed by legal scholar Kimberlé Crenshaw in 1989.
words.example2Translation: Kesishuvchilik tushunchasi 1989-yilda huquq olimasi Kimberlé Crenshaw tomonidan ishlab chiqilgan.
words.example3: Gender equality policies that ignore intersectionality may fail to address the needs of the most marginalized women.
words.example3Translation: Kesishuvchilikni e'tiborsiz qoldiradigan gender tenglik siyosatlari eng chetga surilgan ayollar ehtiyojlarini qondira olmasligi mumkin.
extraExamples: Intersectionality reminds us that no single aspect of identity tells the whole story.
Disability combined with gender creates a unique experience that intersectionality helps to analyze.
Social workers use intersectionality to better understand the complex challenges their clients face.
Intersectionality has become an important concept in sociology, law, and political science.
Critics of intersectionality argue it can overcomplicate policy discussions, while supporters call it essential.
Understanding intersectionality allows campaigns to address the specific experiences of diverse groups.
Intersectionality shows that achieving gender equality requires tackling racial and economic inequality at the same time.
extraExampleTranslations: Kesishuvchilik bizga o'zlikning hech bir jihatining to'liq manzarani ko'rsatmasligini eslatadi.
Nogironlik va jinsning birikishi kesishuvchilik tahlil qilishga yordam beradigan noyob tajriba yaratadi.
Ijtimoiy ishchilar mijozlari duch keladigan murakkab muammolarni yaxshiroq tushunish uchun kesishuvchilikdan foydalanadi.
Kesishuvchilik sotsiologiya, huquq va siyosatshunoslikda muhim tushunchaga aylandi.
Kesishuvchilikni tanqid qiluvchilar u siyosiy muhokamalarni ortiqcha murakkablashtirishi mumkin deydi, qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar esa uni zaruriy deb ataydi.
Kesishuvchilikni tushunish kampaniyalarga xilma-xil guruhlarning o'ziga xos tajribalarini hal qilishga imkon beradi.
Kesishuvchilik gender tengligiga erishish irqiy va iqtisodiy tengsizlikka bir vaqtda muvofiqlik qilishni talab qilishini ko'rsatadi.

words.definition: The shift from fossil fuels to renewable energy sources.
words.definitionUz: Neft, gaz, ko'mir kabi qazilma yoqilg'ilardan qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalariga o'tish jarayoni.
words.example1: Many countries are investing heavily in the energy transition.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab davlatlar energetika o'tishiga katta sarmoya kiritmoqda.
words.example2: The energy transition requires major changes in infrastructure.
words.example2Translation: Energetika o'tishi infratuzilmada katta o'zgarishlarni talab qiladi.
words.example3: Government policies can speed up or slow down the energy transition.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat siyosati energetika o'tishini tezlashtirishi yoki sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The energy transition is creating new jobs in clean technology sectors.
Critics argue the energy transition is happening too slowly.
Europe has set ambitious goals for its energy transition.
The energy transition involves both technological and social challenges.
Investors are funding startups focused on the energy transition.
A successful energy transition depends on public support.
The company shifted its strategy to support the energy transition.
extraExampleTranslations: Energetika o'tishi toza texnologiya sohalarida yangi ish o'rinlari yaratmoqda.
Tanqidchilar energetika o'tishi juda sekin sodir bo'layotganini ta'kidlashadi.
Yevropa o'zining energetika o'tishi uchun jasur maqsadlar belgiladi.
Energetika o'tishi ham texnologik, ham ijtimoiy qiyinchiliklarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Investorlar energetika o'tishiga qaratilgan startaplarni moliyalashtirmoqda.
Muvaffaqiyatli energetika o'tishi jamoatchilik qo'llab-quvvatlashiga bog'liq.
Kompaniya energetika o'tishini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun strategiyasini o'zgartirdi.

words.definition: Achieving net-zero carbon emissions by balancing emissions with removal.
words.definitionUz: Chiqarilgan uglerod miqdorini boshqa usullar bilan muvozanatlab, sof natijada nolga tenglashtirish holati.
words.example1: The company pledged to become carbon-neutral by 2030.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya 2030-yilga qadar uglerod neytral bo'lishga va'da berdi.
words.example2: Planting trees is one way to offset emissions and become carbon-neutral.
words.example2Translation: Daraxt ekish chiqindilarni muvozanatlash va uglerod neytral bo'lishning bir usulidir.
words.example3: Several cities aim to be carbon-neutral within the next two decades.
words.example3Translation: Bir nechta shaharlar keyingi yigirma yil ichida uglerod neytral bo'lishni maqsad qilgan.
extraExamples: The festival organizers made the event carbon-neutral this year.
Achieving a carbon-neutral economy requires major investment in clean energy.
The airline introduced a carbon-neutral flight program.
Their new factory is designed to be carbon-neutral.
A carbon-neutral lifestyle includes reducing waste and energy use.
The university committed to becoming carbon-neutral by 2040.
Carbon-neutral products often cost more to produce.
extraExampleTranslations: Festival tashkilotchilari bu yil tadbirni uglerod neytral qilishdi.
Uglerod neytral iqtisodiyotga erishish toza energiyaga katta sarmoya talab qiladi.
Aviakompaniya uglerod neytral parvoz dasturini joriy qildi.
Ularning yangi zavodi uglerod neytral bo'lishi uchun loyihalashtirilgan.
Uglerod neytral turmush tarzi chiqindi va energiya sarfini kamaytirishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Universitet 2040-yilga qadar uglerod neytral bo'lishga va'da berdi.
Uglerod neytral mahsulotlarni ishlab chiqarish ko'pincha qimmatroqqa tushadi.

words.definition: Technology that converts sunlight directly into electricity.
words.definitionUz: Quyosh nurini to'g'ridan-to'g'ri elektr energiyasiga aylantiradigan texnologiya.
words.example1: Solar photovoltaic panels are now common on residential rooftops.
words.example1Translation: Quyosh fotovoltaik panellari hozirda turar-joy tomlarida keng tarqalgan.
words.example2: The cost of solar photovoltaic technology has dropped significantly.
words.example2Translation: Quyosh fotovoltaik texnologiyasining narxi sezilarli darajada arzonlashdi.
words.example3: Solar photovoltaic systems generate electricity without producing emissions.
words.example3Translation: Quyosh fotovoltaik tizimlari chiqindi ishlab chiqarmasdan elektr energiya hosil qiladi.
extraExamples: The farm installed a large solar photovoltaic array last year.
Solar photovoltaic efficiency has improved a lot over the past decade.
Many governments offer incentives for solar photovoltaic installation.
Solar photovoltaic technology relies on semiconductor materials like silicon.
The new building uses solar photovoltaic glass on its facade.
Solar photovoltaic capacity has grown rapidly worldwide.
Engineers are researching ways to make solar photovoltaic cells cheaper.
extraExampleTranslations: Ferma o'tgan yili katta quyosh fotovoltaik panellari to'plamini o'rnatdi.
So'nggi o'n yil ichida quyosh fotovoltaik samaradorligi ancha yaxshilandi.
Ko'plab hukumatlar quyosh fotovoltaik o'rnatish uchun rag'batlar taklif qiladi.
Quyosh fotovoltaik texnologiyasi kremniy kabi yarimo'tkazgich materiallariga tayanadi.
Yangi bino o'z peshtoqida quyosh fotovoltaik oynalardan foydalanadi.
Quyosh fotovoltaik quvvati butun dunyoda tez sur'atlarda o'sdi.
Muhandislar quyosh fotovoltaik elementlarini arzonlashtirish usullarini izlamoqda.

words.definition: Methods of storing energy for later use, such as in batteries.
words.definitionUz: Energiyani keyinroq ishlatish uchun, masalan batareyalarda, saqlash usullari.
words.example1: Energy storage is essential for making renewable energy reliable.
words.example1Translation: Energiya saqlash qayta tiklanadigan energiyani ishonchli qilish uchun zarurdir.
words.example2: Battery technology is a key part of modern energy storage.
words.example2Translation: Batareya texnologiyasi zamonaviy energiya saqlashning asosiy qismidir.
words.example3: The city built a large energy storage facility near the solar farm.
words.example3Translation: Shahar quyosh fermasi yaqinida katta energiya saqlash inshootini qurdi.
extraExamples: Energy storage helps balance supply and demand on the grid.
New energy storage solutions are being tested around the world.
Without energy storage, solar power can't be used at night.
The startup raised funds to develop cheaper energy storage technology.
Energy storage systems can provide backup power during outages.
Researchers are exploring alternatives to lithium for energy storage.
Improved energy storage could make wind power more dependable.
extraExampleTranslations: Energiya saqlash tarmoqdagi taklif va talabni muvozanatlashga yordam beradi.
Butun dunyoda yangi energiya saqlash yechimlari sinovdan o'tkazilmoqda.
Energiya saqlashsiz quyosh energiyasidan kechasi foydalanib bo'lmaydi.
Startap arzonroq energiya saqlash texnologiyasini ishlab chiqish uchun mablag' yig'di.
Energiya saqlash tizimlari uzilishlar paytida zaxira quvvat ta'minlashi mumkin.
Tadqiqotchilar energiya saqlash uchun litiyga muqobil variantlarni o'rganmoqda.
Yaxshilangan energiya saqlash shamol energiyasini yanada ishonchli qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: Heat energy generated and stored within the Earth.
words.definitionUz: Yer ostida hosil bo'ladigan va saqlanadigan issiqlik energiyasi.
words.example1: Iceland relies heavily on geothermal energy for heating and electricity.
words.example1Translation: Islandiya isitish va elektr energiya uchun asosan geotermal energiyaga tayanadi.
words.example2: Geothermal energy is considered a reliable and consistent power source.
words.example2Translation: Geotermal energiya ishonchli va barqaror energiya manbai hisoblanadi.
words.example3: The plant uses geothermal energy to generate electricity around the clock.
words.example3Translation: Bu zavod kun bo'yi elektr energiya ishlab chiqarish uchun geotermal energiyadan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Geothermal energy comes from heat deep beneath the Earth's surface.
Some homes use geothermal energy systems to heat and cool efficiently.
Geothermal energy production doesn't depend on weather conditions.
Engineers are exploring new regions for geothermal energy development.
Geothermal energy has a small environmental footprint compared to fossil fuels.
The country invested in geothermal energy to diversify its power sources.
Geothermal energy plants can operate continuously, unlike solar or wind.
extraExampleTranslations: Geotermal energiya Yer yuzasi ostidagi chuqur issiqlikdan kelib chiqadi.
Ba'zi uylar samarali isitish va sovutish uchun geotermal energiya tizimlaridan foydalanadi.
Geotermal energiya ishlab chiqarish ob-havo sharoitiga bog'liq emas.
Muhandislar geotermal energiyani rivojlantirish uchun yangi hududlarni o'rganmoqda.
Geotermal energiya qazilma yoqilg'ilarga nisbatan kichik ekologik izga ega.
Mamlakat energiya manbalarini diversifikatsiya qilish uchun geotermal energiyaga sarmoya kiritdi.
Quyosh yoki shamoldan farqli o'laroq, geotermal energiya zavodlari uzluksiz ishlashi mumkin.

words.definition: The reduction or elimination of carbon dioxide emissions.
words.definitionUz: Uglerod dioksidi chiqindilarini kamaytirish yoki butunlay yo'q qilish jarayoni.
words.example1: Decarbonization is a key goal for industries fighting climate change.
words.example1Translation: Uglerodsizlantirish iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi kurashayotgan tarmoqlar uchun asosiy maqsaddir.
words.example2: The government announced a new plan for the decarbonization of transport.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat transport sohasini uglerodsizlantirish uchun yangi rejani e'lon qildi.
words.example3: Decarbonization requires shifting away from coal and oil.
words.example3Translation: Uglerodsizlantirish ko'mir va neftdan voz kechishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The steel industry faces major challenges in decarbonization.
Decarbonization efforts often focus on energy, transport, and agriculture.
Many companies have set targets for decarbonization by 2050.
Decarbonization could slow global warming if implemented widely.
The report outlines steps needed for full decarbonization.
Investors are increasingly funding decarbonization projects.
Decarbonization of the power sector is happening faster than other industries.
extraExampleTranslations: Po'lat sanoati uglerodsizlantirishda katta qiyinchiliklarga duch kelmoqda.
Uglerodsizlantirish bo'yicha sa'y-harakatlar ko'pincha energiya, transport va qishloq xo'jaligiga qaratiladi.
Ko'plab kompaniyalar 2050-yilga qadar uglerodsizlantirish bo'yicha maqsadlar belgilashdi.
Keng qo'llanilsa, uglerodsizlantirish global isishni sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
Hisobotda to'liq uglerodsizlantirish uchun zarur qadamlar ko'rsatilgan.
Investorlar tobora ko'proq uglerodsizlantirish loyihalarini moliyalashtirmoqda.
Energetika sektorini uglerodsizlantirish boshqa tarmoqlarga qaraganda tezroq sodir bo'lmoqda.

words.definition: A device that converts wind energy into electricity.
words.definitionUz: Shamol energiyasini elektr energiyasiga aylantiradigan qurilma.
words.example1: The wind turbine spun rapidly in the strong coastal winds.
words.example1Translation: Shamol turbinasi qirg'oq bo'yidagi kuchli shamolda tez aylanardi.
words.example2: They built a wind turbine farm on the hills outside the city.
words.example2Translation: Ular shahar tashqarisidagi tepaliklarda shamol turbinalari fermasini qurishdi.
words.example3: A single wind turbine can power hundreds of homes.
words.example3Translation: Bitta shamol turbinasi yuzlab uylarni energiya bilan ta'minlashi mumkin.
extraExamples: Engineers inspect each wind turbine regularly for maintenance.
Offshore wind turbines can generate more power than onshore ones.
The wind turbine blades are designed to withstand strong storms.
Local residents had mixed opinions about the new wind turbine project.
A modern wind turbine can be taller than a 20-story building.
The wind turbine industry has grown rapidly over the past decade.
Birds occasionally collide with wind turbine blades, raising environmental concerns.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhandislar texnik xizmat ko'rsatish uchun har bir shamol turbinasini muntazam tekshiradi.
Dengizdagi shamol turbinalari quruqlikdagilarga qaraganda ko'proq quvvat ishlab chiqarishi mumkin.
Shamol turbinasi pichoqlari kuchli bo'ronlarga bardosh berish uchun loyihalashtirilgan.
Mahalliy aholi yangi shamol turbinasi loyihasi haqida turlicha fikrda edi.
Zamonaviy shamol turbinasi 20 qavatli binodan ham balandroq bo'lishi mumkin.
So'nggi o'n yil ichida shamol turbinasi sanoati tez sur'atlarda o'sdi.
Qushlar ba'zan shamol turbinasi pichoqlariga to'qnashib, ekologik tashvish uyg'otadi.

words.definition: Fuel derived directly from living matter, such as ethanol or biodiesel.
words.definitionUz: O'simlik yoki boshqa tirik organizmlardan to'g'ridan-to'g'ri olinadigan yoqilg'i.
words.example1: Biofuel is often made from crops like corn or sugarcane.
words.example1Translation: Biotoplivo ko'pincha makkajo'xori yoki shakarqamish kabi ekinlardan tayyorlanadi.
words.example2: Some airlines are testing biofuel as an alternative to jet fuel.
words.example2Translation: Ba'zi aviakompaniyalar reaktiv yoqilg'iga muqobil sifatida biotoplivoni sinovdan o'tkazmoqda.
words.example3: Biofuel production can compete with food crops for farmland.
words.example3Translation: Biotoplivo ishlab chiqarish qishloq xo'jaligi yerlari uchun oziq-ovqat ekinlari bilan raqobatlashishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Biofuel burns cleaner than traditional gasoline in many engines.
Researchers are developing biofuel from algae and waste materials.
The government offers subsidies to encourage biofuel production.
Biofuel can reduce a country's dependence on imported oil.
Some critics question whether biofuel is truly environmentally friendly.
Biofuel blends are commonly used in many countries' fuel supplies.
The factory converts used cooking oil into biofuel.
extraExampleTranslations: Biotoplivo ko'plab dvigatellarda an'anaviy benzinga qaraganda tozaroq yonadi.
Tadqiqotchilar suv o'tlari va chiqindi materiallaridan biotoplivo ishlab chiqishmoqda.
Hukumat biotoplivo ishlab chiqarishni rag'batlantirish uchun subsidiyalar taklif qiladi.
Biotoplivo mamlakatning import qilinadigan neftga bog'liqligini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ba'zi tanqidchilar biotoplivo haqiqatan ham ekologik toza ekanligiga shubha bildirishadi.
Biotoplivo aralashmalari ko'plab mamlakatlarning yoqilg'i zaxiralarida keng qo'llaniladi.
Zavod ishlatilgan pishirish moyini biotoplivoga aylantiradi.

words.definition: The inconsistent availability of renewable sources like sun and wind.
words.definitionUz: Quyosh va shamol kabi qayta tiklanadigan manbalarning doimiy emasligi, ya'ni ba'zan mavjud, ba'zan mavjud bo'lmasligi.
words.example1: Intermittency is one of the biggest challenges facing solar and wind power.
words.example1Translation: Beqarorlik quyosh va shamol energiyasi oldida turgan eng katta muammolardan biridir.
words.example2: Energy storage helps solve the problem of intermittency.
words.example2Translation: Energiya saqlash beqarorlik muammosini hal qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Grid operators must plan carefully for the intermittency of renewable sources.
words.example3Translation: Tarmoq operatorlari qayta tiklanadigan manbalarning beqarorligini hisobga olib ehtiyotkorlik bilan rejalashtirishi kerak.
extraExamples: The intermittency of wind power means output can change quickly.
Researchers are working on ways to reduce the impact of intermittency.
Combining different energy sources can help balance intermittency.
Intermittency makes it harder to rely solely on renewable energy.
Smart grids are designed to manage the intermittency of clean power.
Battery storage is one solution to the intermittency problem.
Intermittency requires backup power sources to keep the grid stable.
extraExampleTranslations: Shamol energiyasining beqarorligi uning hosildorligi tez o'zgarishi mumkinligini anglatadi.
Tadqiqotchilar beqarorlikning ta'sirini kamaytirish usullari ustida ishlamoqda.
Turli energiya manbalarini birlashtirish beqarorlikni muvozanatlashga yordam berishi mumkin.
Beqarorlik faqat qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga tayanishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Aqlli tarmoqlar toza energiyaning beqarorligini boshqarish uchun loyihalashtirilgan.
Batareyada saqlash beqarorlik muammosining bir yechimidir.
Beqarorlik tarmoqni barqaror saqlash uchun zaxira energiya manbalarini talab qiladi.

words.definition: An electricity network that uses digital technology to manage supply and demand.
words.definitionUz: Elektr ta'minoti va talabni boshqarish uchun raqamli texnologiyalardan foydalanadigan elektr tarmog'i.
words.example1: A smart grid can automatically adjust electricity flow based on demand.
words.example1Translation: Aqlli elektr tarmog'i talabga qarab elektr oqimini avtomatik ravishda moslashtira oladi.
words.example2: The city is upgrading its infrastructure to support a smart grid.
words.example2Translation: Shahar aqlli elektr tarmog'ini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun infratuzilmasini yangilamoqda.
words.example3: Smart grids help integrate renewable energy more efficiently into the system.
words.example3Translation: Aqlli elektr tarmoqlari qayta tiklanadigan energiyani tizimga yanada samaraliroq integratsiya qilishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: A smart grid uses sensors to detect power outages quickly.
Smart grids allow consumers to monitor their energy use in real time.
The smart grid project received funding from the government.
