Smart grids can reduce energy waste across the network.
Utility companies are investing in smart grid technology.
A smart grid can reroute power automatically during emergencies.
Smart grids make it easier to balance supply from multiple energy sources.
extraExampleTranslations: Aqlli elektr tarmog'i quvvat uzilishlarini tezda aniqlash uchun sensorlardan foydalanadi.
Aqlli elektr tarmoqlari iste'molchilarga energiya sarfini real vaqtda kuzatish imkonini beradi.
Aqlli elektr tarmog'i loyihasi hukumatdan moliyalashtirish oldi.
Aqlli elektr tarmoqlari butun tarmoq bo'ylab energiya isrofini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Kommunal kompaniyalar aqlli elektr tarmog'i texnologiyasiga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Aqlli elektr tarmog'i favqulodda vaziyatlarda quvvatni avtomatik qayta yo'naltirishi mumkin.
Aqlli elektr tarmoqlari turli energiya manbalaridan kelgan ta'minotni muvozanatlashni osonlashtiradi.

words.definition: Electricity generated by harnessing the energy of flowing water.
words.definitionUz: Oqayotgan suv energiyasidan foydalanib ishlab chiqariladigan elektr energiyasi.
words.example1: Hydropower is one of the oldest forms of renewable energy.
words.example1Translation: Gidroenergiya qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning eng qadimiy turlaridan biridir.
words.example2: The dam generates hydropower for thousands of homes in the region.
words.example2Translation: To'g'on mintaqadagi minglab uylar uchun gidroenergiya ishlab chiqaradi.
words.example3: Hydropower depends heavily on rainfall and river water levels.
words.example3Translation: Gidroenergiya yog'ingarchilik va daryo suv darajasiga juda bog'liq.
extraExamples: Norway gets most of its electricity from hydropower.
Hydropower plants can quickly adjust output to meet demand.
Building large hydropower dams can disrupt local ecosystems.
Small-scale hydropower systems are used in rural communities.
Hydropower remains a major source of clean electricity worldwide.
The country plans to expand its hydropower capacity next decade.
Hydropower has a long history compared to solar and wind energy.
extraExampleTranslations: Norvegiya elektr energiyasining ko'p qismini gidroenergiyadan oladi.
Gidroenergiya stansiyalari talabga moslashish uchun ishlab chiqarishni tezda o'zgartira oladi.
Katta gidroenergiya to'g'onlarini qurish mahalliy ekotizimlarni izdan chiqarishi mumkin.
Kichik gidroenergiya tizimlari qishloq joylarida qo'llaniladi.
Gidroenergiya butun dunyoda toza elektr energiyaning asosiy manbai bo'lib qolmoqda.
Mamlakat keyingi o'n yillikda gidroenergiya quvvatini kengaytirishni rejalashtirmoqda.
Gidroenergiya quyosh va shamol energiyasiga nisbatan uzoq tarixga ega.

words.definition: Using less energy to provide the same service.
words.definitionUz: Bir xil natijaga erishish uchun kamroq energiya sarflash.
words.example1: Improving energy efficiency can lower household electricity bills.
words.example1Translation: Energiya samaradorligini oshirish uy elektr to'lovlarini kamaytirishi mumkin.
words.example2: The new appliances meet strict energy efficiency standards.
words.example2Translation: Yangi maishiy texnika qattiq energiya samaradorligi standartlariga javob beradi.
words.example3: Energy efficiency is often the cheapest way to reduce emissions.
words.example3Translation: Energiya samaradorligi ko'pincha chiqindilarni kamaytirishning eng arzon usulidir.
extraExamples: The government offers rebates for upgrading home energy efficiency.
Energy efficiency improvements can pay for themselves over time.
Better insulation increases a building's energy efficiency.
Companies are investing in energy efficiency to cut costs.
LED lights are known for their high energy efficiency.
Energy efficiency programs help reduce overall electricity demand.
The factory upgraded its machinery to improve energy efficiency.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat uy energiya samaradorligini yaxshilash uchun chegirmalar taklif qiladi.
Energiya samaradorligini yaxshilash vaqt o'tishi bilan o'z xarajatlarini qoplaydi.
Yaxshiroq izolyatsiya binoning energiya samaradorligini oshiradi.
Kompaniyalar xarajatlarni kamaytirish uchun energiya samaradorligiga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
LED chiroqlari yuqori energiya samaradorligi bilan tanilgan.
Energiya samaradorligi dasturlari umumiy elektr talabini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Zavod energiya samaradorligini yaxshilash uchun jihozlarini yangiladi.

words.definition: Hydrogen fuel produced using renewable energy.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya yordamida ishlab chiqariladigan vodorod yoqilg'isi.
words.example1: Green hydrogen is seen as a promising fuel for heavy industry.
words.example1Translation: Yashil vodorod og'ir sanoat uchun istiqbolli yoqilg'i sifatida ko'rilmoqda.
words.example2: The company plans to build a green hydrogen production facility.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya yashil vodorod ishlab chiqarish inshootini qurishni rejalashtirmoqda.
words.example3: Green hydrogen produces no carbon emissions when burned.
words.example3Translation: Yashil vodorod yonganda hech qanday uglerod chiqindisi hosil qilmaydi.
extraExamples: Green hydrogen is created by splitting water using renewable electricity.
Several countries are racing to develop green hydrogen technology.
Green hydrogen could help decarbonize shipping and aviation.
The cost of producing green hydrogen remains relatively high.
Green hydrogen can be stored and transported like natural gas.
Investment in green hydrogen has grown significantly in recent years.
Green hydrogen plants require large amounts of clean electricity.
extraExampleTranslations: Yashil vodorod qayta tiklanadigan elektr energiyasi yordamida suvni ajratish orqali hosil qilinadi.
Bir nechta davlatlar yashil vodorod texnologiyasini rivojlantirishda raqobatlashmoqda.
Yashil vodorod dengiz va havo transportini uglerodsizlantirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Yashil vodorod ishlab chiqarish xarajati hali ham nisbatan yuqori.
Yashil vodorodni tabiiy gaz kabi saqlash va tashish mumkin.
So'nggi yillarda yashil vodorodga sarmoya sezilarli darajada o'sdi.
Yashil vodorod zavodlari katta miqdordagi toza elektr energiyani talab qiladi.

words.definition: A policy guaranteeing renewable energy producers a fixed price for their power.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya ishlab chiqaruvchilarga ularning elektr energiyasi uchun belgilangan narxni kafolatlaydigan siyosat.
words.example1: The feed-in tariff encouraged many homeowners to install solar panels.
words.example1Translation: Kafolatlangan xarid narxi ko'plab uy egalarini quyosh panellarini o'rnatishga undadi.
words.example2: Germany was one of the first countries to adopt a feed-in tariff system.
words.example2Translation: Germaniya kafolatlangan xarid narxi tizimini qabul qilgan birinchi davlatlardan biri edi.
words.example3: The government reduced the feed-in tariff as solar costs fell.
words.example3Translation: Quyosh energiyasi narxi tushishi bilan hukumat kafolatlangan xarid narxini kamaytirdi.
extraExamples: A feed-in tariff guarantees a stable income for renewable energy producers.
Critics argue that feed-in tariffs can be costly for taxpayers.
The feed-in tariff was designed to boost early investment in wind power.
Some countries have phased out feed-in tariffs in favor of auctions.
The feed-in tariff helped accelerate the growth of rooftop solar.
Feed-in tariffs vary widely between different countries and regions.
Investors relied on the feed-in tariff to calculate their expected returns.
extraExampleTranslations: Kafolatlangan xarid narxi qayta tiklanadigan energiya ishlab chiqaruvchilarga barqaror daromadni kafolatlaydi.
Tanqidchilar kafolatlangan xarid narxi soliq to'lovchilar uchun qimmatga tushishi mumkinligini ta'kidlashadi.
Kafolatlangan xarid narxi shamol energiyasiga dastlabki sarmoyani rag'batlantirish uchun ishlab chiqilgan edi.
Ba'zi davlatlar kafolatlangan xarid narxidan auksionlar foydasiga voz kechishdi.
Kafolatlangan xarid narxi tom usti quyosh panellarining o'sishini tezlashtirishga yordam berdi.
Kafolatlangan xarid narxi turli davlat va mintaqalarda juda farq qiladi.
Investorlar kutilayotgan daromadlarini hisoblash uchun kafolatlangan xarid narxiga tayanishdi.

words.definition: When renewable energy costs the same as or less than traditional grid power.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya narxi an'anaviy tarmoq energiyasi narxiga teng yoki undan arzon bo'lgan holat.
words.example1: Solar power reached grid parity in many regions over the past decade.
words.example1Translation: So'nggi o'n yil ichida quyosh energiyasi ko'p mintaqalarda tarmoq tengligiga erishdi.
words.example2: Once wind energy hits grid parity, it no longer needs subsidies to compete.
words.example2Translation: Shamol energiyasi tarmoq tengligiga erishganidan keyin raqobatlashish uchun subsidiyaga muhtoj bo'lmaydi.
words.example3: Grid parity marks an important milestone for renewable energy adoption.
words.example3Translation: Tarmoq tengligi qayta tiklanadigan energiyani qabul qilishda muhim bosqichni anglatadi.
extraExamples: Falling technology costs have helped renewables reach grid parity faster.
Grid parity varies depending on local electricity prices and resources.
Reaching grid parity makes solar more attractive to investors.
Some emerging markets achieved grid parity earlier than expected.
Grid parity reduces the need for government financial support.
Analysts track grid parity trends to predict renewable energy growth.
Battery storage costs must also fall to fully support grid parity.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiya narxining tushishi qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning tarmoq tengligiga tezroq erishishiga yordam berdi.
Tarmoq tengligi mahalliy elektr narxlari va resurslarga qarab farq qiladi.
Tarmoq tengligiga erishish quyosh energiyasini investorlar uchun yanada jozibador qiladi.
Ba'zi rivojlanayotgan bozorlar kutilganidan oldinroq tarmoq tengligiga erishdi.
Tarmoq tengligi davlat moliyaviy yordamiga bo'lgan ehtiyojni kamaytiradi.
Tahlilchilar qayta tiklanadigan energiya o'sishini bashorat qilish uchun tarmoq tengligi tendentsiyalarini kuzatadilar.
Tarmoq tengligini to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun batareyada saqlash xarajatlari ham pasayishi kerak.

words.definition: The process of establishing permanent human settlements on other planets or in space.
words.definitionUz: Koinotni mustamlaka qilish — boshqa sayyoralarda yoki koinotda insoniyatning doimiy yashash joylarini barpo etish jarayonidir.
words.example1: Space colonization on Mars is a long-term goal for many scientists.
words.example1Translation: Marsda koinotni mustamlaka qilish koʻplab olimlarning uzoq muddatli maqsadidir.
words.example2: Challenges like radiation make space colonization extremely difficult.
words.example2Translation: Nurlanish kabi qiyinchiliklar koinotni mustamlaka qilishni juda qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3: Space colonization could help ensure humanityʼs survival if Earth faces disaster.
words.example3Translation: Agar Yerdagi falokat yuz bersa, koinotni mustamlaka qilish insoniyatning omon qolishini taʼminlashi mumkin.
extraExamples: Elon Musk is a strong advocate for space colonization on Mars.
Space colonization requires advanced life support systems.
Ethical questions arise around space colonization of other planets.
International cooperation is important for successful space colonization.
Space colonization might begin with small research bases.
The idea of space colonization has inspired many science fiction stories.
Funding remains one of the biggest obstacles to space colonization.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilon Mask Marsda koinotni mustamlaka qilishning kuchli tarafdori.
Koinotni mustamlaka qilish ilgʻor hayotni qoʻllab-quvvatlash tizimlarini talab qiladi.
Boshqa sayyoralarni koinotni mustamlaka qilish atrofida axloqiy savollar paydo boʻladi.
Muvaffaqiyatli koinotni mustamlaka qilish uchun xalqaro hamkorlik muhim.
Koinotni mustamlaka qilish kichik tadqiqot bazalaridan boshlanishi mumkin.
Koinotni mustamlaka qilish gʻoyasi koʻplab ilmiy fantastika hikoyalarini ilhomlantirdi.
Moliyalashtirish koinotni mustamlaka qilishdagi eng katta toʻsiqlardan biri boʻlib qolmoqda.

words.definition: Scientific investigation of stars, planets, galaxies, and other celestial phenomena.
words.definitionUz: Astronomik tadqiqotlar — yulduzlar, sayyoralar, galaktikalar va boshqa osmon jismlari haqidagi ilmiy tadqiqotlar.
words.example1: Astronomical research using telescopes has discovered thousands of exoplanets.
words.example1Translation: Teleskoplar yordamida olib borilgan astronomik tadqiqotlar minglab ekzoplanetalarni kashf etdi.
words.example2: Modern astronomical research relies heavily on space-based observatories.
words.example2Translation: Zamonaviy astronomik tadqiqotlar kosmik observatoriyalarga juda bogʻliq.
words.example3: She decided to pursue a career in astronomical research.
words.example3Translation: U astronomik tadqiqotlar sohasida kasb tanlashga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: Astronomical research helps us understand the origins of the universe.
International teams often collaborate on large astronomical research projects.
Budget cuts have affected many astronomical research programs.
Astronomical research contributes to advances in physics and technology.
New discoveries in astronomical research are announced regularly.
Astronomical research requires powerful computers for data analysis.
The university offers degrees in astronomical research.
extraExampleTranslations: Astronomik tadqiqotlar bizga koinotning kelib chiqishini tushunishga yordam beradi.
Xalqaro jamoalar katta astronomik tadqiqot loyihalarida hamkorlik qilishadi.
Byudjetni qisqartirish koʻplab astronomik tadqiqot dasturlariga taʼsir qildi.
Astronomik tadqiqotlar fizika va texnologiyadagi yutuqlarga hissa qoʻshadi.
Astronomik tadqiqotlardagi yangi kashfiyotlar muntazam eʼlon qilinadi.
Astronomik tadqiqotlar uchun maʼlumotlar tahlili kuchli kompyuterlarni talab qiladi.
Universitet astronomik tadqiqotlar boʻyicha mutaxassisliklarni taklif qiladi.

words.definition: Life that exists or may exist outside of Earth, on other planets or moons.
words.definitionUz: Yerdan tashqari hayot — Yerdan tashqarida, boshqa sayyoralar yoki oylarda mavjud boʻlishi mumkin boʻlgan hayot.
words.example1: Scientists are searching for signs of extraterrestrial life on Mars.
words.example1Translation: Olimlar Marsda yerdan tashqari hayot belgilarini qidirmoqda.
words.example2: The discovery of extraterrestrial life would change our understanding of the universe.
words.example2Translation: Yerdan tashqari hayotning kashf etilishi koinot haqidagi tushunchamizni oʻzgartiradi.
words.example3: Many movies explore the possibility of extraterrestrial life visiting Earth.
words.example3Translation: Koʻplab filmlar yerdan tashqari hayotning Yerga kelish ehtimolini tasvirlaydi.
extraExamples: No conclusive evidence of extraterrestrial life has been found yet.
Astronomers look for habitable planets that might support extraterrestrial life.
The search for extraterrestrial life includes listening for radio signals.
Finding extraterrestrial life is one of the biggest goals in space exploration.
Microbial extraterrestrial life is considered more likely than intelligent life.
Belief in extraterrestrial life is common among the general public.
Extraterrestrial life could exist in extreme environments.
extraExampleTranslations: Yerdan tashqari hayotning aniq dalillari hali topilmagan.
Astronomlar yerdan tashqari hayotni qoʻllab-quvvatlashi mumkin boʻlgan yashashga yaroqli sayyoralarni qidirishadi.
Yerdan tashqari hayotni qidirish radio signallarini tinglashni ham oʻz ichiga oladi.
Yerdan tashqari hayotni topish kosmik tadqiqotlarning eng katta maqsadlaridan biridir.
Mikrobial yerdan tashqari hayot aqlli hayotdan koʻra ehtimolroq deb hisoblanadi.
Yerdan tashqari hayotga ishonish oddiy odamlar orasida keng tarqalgan.
Yerdan tashqari hayot ekstremal muhitlarda mavjud boʻlishi mumkin.

words.definition: Technology used to design, build, and operate artificial satellites for communication, navigation, and observation.
words.definitionUz: Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi — aloqa, navigatsiya va kuzatish uchun sunʼiy yoʻldoshlarni loyihalash, qurish va boshqarish texnologiyasidir.
words.example1: Satellite technology enables global internet access in remote areas.
words.example1Translation: Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi uzoq hududlarda global internetga kirish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: Advances in satellite technology have improved weather forecasting.
words.example2Translation: Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasidagi yutuqlar ob-havo prognozini yaxshiladi.
words.example3: Many countries are investing heavily in satellite technology.
words.example3Translation: Koʻplab mamlakatlar sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasiga katta sarmoya kiritmoqda.
extraExamples: Satellite technology is essential for GPS navigation.
Military applications also use advanced satellite technology.
The company specializes in small satellite technology.
Environmental monitoring relies on satellite technology.
Satellite technology helps in disaster response and management.
New satellite technology aims to reduce space debris.
Satellite technology has revolutionized television broadcasting.
extraExampleTranslations: Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi GPS navigatsiyasi uchun zarur.
Harbiy ilovalar ham ilgʻor sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasidan foydalanadi.
Kompaniya kichik sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasiga ixtisoslashgan.
Atrof-muhit monitoringi sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasiga asoslanadi.
Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi falokatlarga javob berish va boshqarishda yordam beradi.
Yangi sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi kosmik chiqindilarni kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.
Sunʼiy yoʻldosh texnologiyasi televideniye eshittirishlarini inqilob qildi.

words.definition: Defunct human-made objects in orbit around Earth, such as old satellites and rocket fragments.
words.definitionUz: Kosmik chiqindilar — Yerni aylanib chiqayotgan eski sunʼiy yoʻldoshlar va raketa parchalari kabi inson yaratgan ishlamay qolgan obʼektlar.
words.example1: Space debris poses a serious risk to active satellites and the ISS.
words.example1Translation: Kosmik chiqindilar faol sunʼiy yoʻldoshlar va XKS uchun jiddiy xavf tugʻdiradi.
words.example2: International efforts are underway to reduce space debris.
words.example2Translation: Kosmik chiqindilarni kamaytirish boʻyicha xalqaro harakatlar davom etmoqda.
words.example3: Even small pieces of space debris can cause significant damage at high speeds.
words.example3Translation: Kichik kosmik chiqindi boʻlaklari ham yuqori tezlikda katta zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Space debris is becoming a growing problem as more satellites are launched.
Scientists track thousands of pieces of space debris daily.
Cleaning up space debris is technically very challenging.
New satellites are designed to minimize space debris.
Collisions can create even more space debris.
Space debris affects future space missions.
There are proposals for active space debris removal missions.
extraExampleTranslations: Koʻproq sunʼiy yoʻldoshlar uchirilishi bilan kosmik chiqindilar muammosi ortib bormoqda.
Olimlar har kuni minglab kosmik chiqindi boʻlaklarini kuzatib borishadi.
Kosmik chiqindilarni tozalash texnik jihatdan juda qiyin.
Yangi sunʼiy yoʻldoshlar kosmik chiqindilarni minimallashtirish uchun ishlab chiqilmoqda.
Toʻqnashuvlar yanada koʻproq kosmik chiqindilarni hosil qilishi mumkin.
Kosmik chiqindilar kelajakdagi kosmik missiyalarga taʼsir qiladi.
Kosmik chiqindilarni faol ravishda olib tashlash missiyalari boʻyicha takliflar mavjud.

words.definition: The hypothetical process of changing a planetʼs atmosphere and environment to make it suitable for human life.
words.definitionUz: Terraformatsiya — sayyoraning atmosferasi va muhitini inson hayoti uchun moslashtirishning taxminiy jarayonidir.
words.example1: Terraforming Mars would take centuries to complete.
words.example1Translation: Marsni terraformatsiya qilish asrlar davom etishi mumkin.
words.example2: Scientists debate the ethics of terraforming other planets.
words.example2Translation: Olimlar boshqa sayyoralarni terraformatsiya qilishning axloqiy jihatlarini muhokama qilishadi.
words.example3: Terraforming requires advanced technology we do not yet possess.
words.example3Translation: Terraformatsiya biz hali ega boʻlmagan ilgʻor texnologiyalarni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Terraforming Venus is considered even more difficult than Mars.
The concept of terraforming appears in many science fiction novels.
Terraforming could make distant planets habitable for future generations.
Environmental concerns exist regarding large-scale terraforming.
Terraforming projects would need massive resources.
Some experts believe terraforming is not realistic in the near future.
Terraforming techniques include releasing greenhouse gases.
extraExampleTranslations: Venerani terraformatsiya qilish Marsnikidan ham qiyinroq deb hisoblanadi.
Terraformatsiya gʻoyasi koʻplab ilmiy fantastika romanlarida uchraydi.
Terraformatsiya uzoq sayyoralarni kelajak avlodlar uchun yashashga yaroqli qilishi mumkin.
Katta miqyosli terraformatsiyaga nisbatan ekologik xavotirlar mavjud.
Terraformatsiya loyihalari ulkan resurslarni talab qiladi.
Baʼzi mutaxassislar terraformatsiyani yaqin kelajakda real emas deb hisoblashadi.
Terraformatsiya usullari issiqxona gazlarini chiqarishni oʻz ichiga oladi.

words.definition: A condition in which the effects of gravity are not felt, creating weightlessness.
words.definitionUz: Nol tortishish kuchi — tortishish kuchi taʼsiri sezilmaydigan, vaznsizlik holati.
words.example1: Astronauts experience zero-gravity while orbiting Earth.
words.example1Translation: Astronavtlar Yerni aylanib chiqayotganda nol tortishish kuchini his qilishadi.
words.example2: Living in zero-gravity for long periods affects the human body.
words.example2Translation: Nol tortishish kuchida uzoq vaqt yashash inson tanasiga taʼsir qiladi.
words.example3: Zero-gravity makes simple tasks like eating and sleeping different.
words.example3Translation: Nol tortishish kuchi ovqatlanish va uxlash kabi oddiy ishlarning boshqacha boʻlishiga olib keladi.
extraExamples: Many people dream of experiencing zero-gravity on a spaceflight.
Experiments in zero-gravity help develop new materials.
Zero-gravity causes muscle loss and bone weakening.
The aircraft creates short periods of zero-gravity for training.
Zero-gravity environments are used for scientific research.
Adapting to zero-gravity requires special training.
Space tourism companies plan to offer zero-gravity experiences.
extraExampleTranslations: Koʻplab odamlar kosmik parvozda nol tortishish kuchini his qilishni orzu qilishadi.
Nol tortishish kuchidagi tajribalar yangi materiallarni ishlab chiqishga yordam beradi.
Nol tortishish kuchi mushaklarning yoʻqolishiga va suyaklarning zaiflashishiga olib keladi.
Samolyot mashgʻulotlar uchun qisqa muddatli nol tortishish kuchini yaratadi.
Nol tortishish kuchi muhitlari ilmiy tadqiqotlar uchun ishlatiladi.
Nol tortishish kuchiga moslashish maxsus tayyorgarlikni talab qiladi.
Kosmik turizm kompaniyalari nol tortishish kuchi tajribalarini taklif qilishni rejalashtirmoqda.

words.definition: A way of understanding humanityʼs small place within the immense scale of the universe.
words.definitionUz: Kosmik nuqtai nazar — insoniyatning ulkan koinotdagi kichik oʻrnini tushunish usulidir.
words.example1: Looking at Earth from space gives astronauts a profound cosmic perspective.
words.example1Translation: Koinotdan Yerni koʻrish astronavtlarga chuqur kosmik nuqtai nazar beradi.
words.example2: A cosmic perspective helps us appreciate the fragility of our planet.
words.example2Translation: Kosmik nuqtai nazar sayyoramizning nozikligini qadrlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Carl Sagan was famous for promoting a cosmic perspective.
words.example3Translation: Karl Sagan kosmik nuqtai nazarni targʻib qilish bilan mashhur edi.
extraExamples: The cosmic perspective makes our daily problems seem insignificant.
Education should include teaching the cosmic perspective.
Art and literature often explore the cosmic perspective.
A cosmic perspective can inspire environmental protection.
Scientists encourage people to adopt a cosmic perspective.
The cosmic perspective changes how we view humanityʼs future.
Space exploration deepens our cosmic perspective.
extraExampleTranslations: Kosmik nuqtai nazar kundalik muammolarimizni ahamiyatsiz koʻrsatadi.
Taʼlim kosmik nuqtai nazarni oʻrgatishni oʻz ichiga olishi kerak.
Sanʼat va adabiyot koʻpincha kosmik nuqtai nazarni oʻrganadi.
Kosmik nuqtai nazar atrof-muhitni himoya qilishga ilhomlantirishi mumkin.
Olimlar odamlarni kosmik nuqtai nazarga ega boʻlishga undashadi.
Kosmik nuqtai nazar insoniyatning kelajagiga qarashni oʻzgartiradi.
Kosmik tadqiqotlar bizning kosmik nuqtai nazarimizni chuqurlashtiradi.

words.definition: Travel between different planets within our solar system.
words.definitionUz: Sayyoralararo sayohat — quyosh sistemamizdagi turli sayyoralar oʻrtasidagi sayohat.
words.example1: Interplanetary travel to Mars will likely happen in the coming decades.
words.example1Translation: Marsga sayyoralararo sayohat kelgusi oʻn yilliklarda amalga oshishi mumkin.
words.example2: Radiation protection is a major challenge for interplanetary travel.
words.example2Translation: Nurlanishdan himoya sayyoralararo sayohatdagi asosiy qiyinchiliklardan biri.
words.example3: Interplanetary travel requires much more advanced technology than current spaceflight.
words.example3Translation: Sayyoralararo sayohat hozirgi kosmik parvozlardan ancha ilgʻor texnologiyani talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Interplanetary travel could become a reality within our lifetime.
Fuel efficiency is crucial for successful interplanetary travel.
Psychological effects of long interplanetary travel need study.
NASA is developing technologies for future interplanetary travel.
Interplanetary travel would open new possibilities for scientific research.
The cost of interplanetary travel remains extremely high.
Private companies are also interested in interplanetary travel.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayyoralararo sayohat bizning umrimizda haqiqatga aylanishi mumkin.
Yoqilgʻi samaradorligi muvaffaqiyatli sayyoralararo sayohat uchun juda muhim.
Sayyoralararo sayohatning uzoq muddatli psixologik taʼsirlari oʻrganilishi kerak.
NASA kelajakdagi sayyoralararo sayohat uchun texnologiyalarni ishlab chiqmoqda.
Sayyoralararo sayohat ilmiy tadqiqotlar uchun yangi imkoniyatlar ochadi.
Sayyoralararo sayohatning narxi hali ham juda yuqori.
Xususiy kompaniyalar ham sayyoralararo sayohatga qiziqish bildirishmoqda.

words.definition: A government organization responsible for space programs, research, and exploration.
words.definitionUz: Kosmik agentlik — kosmik dasturlar, tadqiqotlar va tadqiqotlar uchun masʼul boʻlgan davlat tashkiloti.
words.example1: NASA is the leading space agency in the United States.
words.example1Translation: NASA AQShdagi yetakchi kosmik agentlikdir.
words.example2: The European Space Agency collaborates with many countries.
words.example2Translation: Yevropa Kosmik Agentligi koʻplab mamlakatlar bilan hamkorlik qiladi.
words.example3: Many new space agencies have been established in Asia.
words.example3Translation: Osiyoda koʻplab yangi kosmik agentliklar tashkil etilgan.
extraExamples: Space agencies around the world are planning future missions.
The space agency announced a new satellite launch.
Funding is always a key issue for national space agencies.
Space agencies play a vital role in scientific advancement.
International space agencies often work together on projects.
She dreams of working for a major space agency.
Space agencies are increasingly partnering with private companies.
extraExampleTranslations: Dunyo boʻylab kosmik agentliklar kelajakdagi missiyalarni rejalashtirmoqda.
Kosmik agentlik yangi sunʼiy yoʻldosh uchirilishini eʼlon qildi.
Moliyalashtirish milliy kosmik agentliklar uchun doimiy muammo.
Kosmik agentliklar ilmiy taraqqiyotda muhim rol oʻynaydi.
Xalqaro kosmik agentliklar loyihalarda birgalikda ishlaydi.
U yirik kosmik agentlikda ishlashni orzu qiladi.
Kosmik agentliklar xususiy kompaniyalar bilan tobora koʻproq hamkorlik qilmoqda.

words.definition: The scientific study of the origin, evolution, and distribution of life in the universe.
words.definitionUz: Astrobiologiya — koinotdagi hayotning kelib chiqishi, evolyutsiyasi va tarqalishini oʻrganuvchi ilmiy fan.
words.example1: Astrobiology combines biology, astronomy, and geology.
words.example1Translation: Astrobiologiya biologiya, astronomiya va geologiyani birlashtiradi.
words.example2: Researchers in astrobiology search for habitable environments beyond Earth.
words.example2Translation: Astrobiologiya olimlari Yerdan tashqaridagi yashashga yaroqli muhitlarni qidirishadi.
words.example3: Astrobiology is a growing field with exciting discoveries ahead.
words.example3Translation: Astrobiologiya oldinda qiziqarli kashfiyotlar bilan rivojlanayotgan sohadir.
extraExamples: Astrobiology investigates whether life exists on other planets.
The Mars rover contributes to astrobiology research.
Universities now offer courses in astrobiology.
Astrobiology helps us understand the conditions necessary for life.
International conferences bring astrobiology experts together.
Astrobiology raises philosophical questions about our place in the universe.
Funding for astrobiology has increased in recent years.
extraExampleTranslations: Astrobiologiya boshqa sayyoralarda hayot mavjudligini tadqiq qiladi.
Mars roveri astrobiologiya tadqiqotlariga hissa qoʻshadi.
Universitetlar endi astrobiologiya boʻyicha kurslarni taklif qilishadi.
Astrobiologiya hayot uchun zarur shart-sharoitlarni tushunishga yordam beradi.
Xalqaro konferensiyalar astrobiologiya mutaxassislarini birlashtiradi.
Astrobiologiya koinotdagi oʻrnimiz haqida falsafiy savollar tugʻdiradi.
Soʻnggi yillarda astrobiologiyaga moliyalashtirish oshdi.

words.definition: The system and technology used to launch and propel rockets into space.
words.definitionUz: Raketa dvigateli — raketalarni kosmosga uchirish va harakatlantirish uchun ishlatiladigan tizim va texnologiya.
words.example1: Advances in rocket propulsion have made space travel more affordable.
words.example1Translation: Raketa dvigateli sohasidagi yutuqlar kosmik sayohatni arzonlashtirdi.
words.example2: Chemical rocket propulsion is currently the most common method.
words.example2Translation: Kimyoviy raketa dvigateli hozirda eng keng tarqalgan usuldir.
words.example3: New types of rocket propulsion are being developed for deep space missions.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur kosmik missiyalar uchun raketa dvigateli yangi turlari ishlab chiqilmoqda.
extraExamples: Rocket propulsion requires enormous amounts of energy.
Engineers are improving rocket propulsion efficiency.
Reusable rocket propulsion technology has reduced costs.
Rocket propulsion systems must withstand extreme temperatures.
The company specializes in innovative rocket propulsion.
Understanding rocket propulsion is essential for aerospace engineering.
Future rocket propulsion may use nuclear technology.
extraExampleTranslations: Raketa dvigateli ulkan miqdordagi energiyani talab qiladi.
Muhandislar raketa dvigateli samaradorligini yaxshilamoqda.
Qayta ishlatiladigan raketa dvigateli texnologiyasi xarajatlarni kamaytirdi.
Raketa dvigateli tizimlari ekstremal haroratlarga bardosh berishi kerak.
Kompaniya innovatsion raketa dvigateli texnologiyasiga ixtisoslashgan.
Raketa dvigateli tushunchasi aerokosmik muhandislik uchun zarur.
Kelajakdagi raketa dvigatellari yadroviy texnologiyadan foydalanishi mumkin.

words.definition: Travel to space for recreational purposes by private individuals.
words.definitionUz: Kosmik turizm — xususiy shaxslarning dam olish maqsadida kosmosga sayohati.
words.example1: Space tourism is becoming more accessible thanks to private companies.
words.example1Translation: Xususiy kompaniyalar tufayli kosmik turizm tobora qulaylashmoqda.
words.example2: The first space tourists paid millions of dollars for their trip.
words.example2Translation: Birinchi kosmik sayyohlar sayohati uchun millionlab dollar toʻlagan.
words.example3: Space tourism offers a unique view of Earth from orbit.
words.example3Translation: Kosmik turizm orbitadan Yerni noyob koʻrish imkonini beradi.
extraExamples: Space tourism companies are planning regular flights.
Training is required before participating in space tourism.
The future of space tourism looks very promising.
Space tourism could help fund further space exploration.
Environmental concerns exist about the impact of space tourism.
Many celebrities have expressed interest in space tourism.
Space tourism experiences usually last a few days.
extraExampleTranslations: Kosmik turizm kompaniyalari muntazam parvozlarni rejalashtirmoqda.
Kosmik turizmda ishtirok etishdan oldin mashgʻulot oʻtkaziladi.
Kosmik turizmning kelajagi juda istiqbolli koʻrinadi.
Kosmik turizm keyingi kosmik tadqiqotlarni moliyalashtirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Kosmik turizmning atrof-muhitga taʼsiri haqida xavotirlar mavjud.
Koʻplab mashhurlar kosmik turizmga qiziqish bildirgan.
Kosmik turizm tajribalari odatda bir necha kun davom etadi.

words.definition: Policies and practices to prevent contamination of other planets by Earth microbes and vice versa.
words.definitionUz: Sayyoralarni himoya qilish — Yerdagi mikroblarning boshqa sayyoralarga va aksincha ifloslanishining oldini olish siyosati va amaliyotlari.
words.example1: Planetary protection is crucial for the search for extraterrestrial life.
words.example1Translation: Sayyoralarni himoya qilish yerdan tashqari hayotni qidirish uchun juda muhim.
words.example2: All Mars missions must follow strict planetary protection protocols.
words.example2Translation: Barcha Mars missiyalari qatʼiy sayyoralarni himoya qilish protokollariga rioya qilishlari kerak.
words.example3: Planetary protection guidelines are set by international space organizations.
words.example3Translation: Sayyoralarni himoya qilish yoʻriqnomalari xalqaro kosmik tashkilotlar tomonidan belgilanadi.
extraExamples: Planetary protection prevents forward and backward contamination.
Scientists take planetary protection very seriously.
Planetary protection becomes more important as we explore more worlds.
New technologies help improve planetary protection measures.
Violating planetary protection rules could compromise scientific results.
Planetary protection is a key consideration for sample return missions.
The concept of planetary protection has evolved over decades.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayyoralarni himoya qilish oldinga va orqaga ifloslanishning oldini oladi.
Olimlar sayyoralarni himoya qilishga juda jiddiy yondashishadi.
Koʻproq olamlarni oʻrganar ekanmiz, sayyoralarni himoya qilish muhimroq boʻladi.
Yangi texnologiyalar sayyoralarni himoya qilish choralarini yaxshilashga yordam beradi.
Sayyoralarni himoya qilish qoidalarini buzish ilmiy natijalarni xavf ostiga qoʻyishi mumkin.
Sayyoralarni himoya qilish namuna qaytarish missiyalari uchun asosiy masaladir.
Sayyoralarni himoya qilish tushunchasi oʻn yilliklar davomida rivojlandi.

words.definition: A large spacecraft designed to remain in orbit around Earth for long periods, serving as a home and laboratory in space.
words.definitionUz: Orbital stansiya — Yerni uzoq muddat aylanib chiqish uchun moʻljallangan, kosmosdagi uy va laboratoriya vazifasini bajaradigan katta kosmik apparat.
words.example1: The International Space Station is the largest orbital station ever built.
words.example1Translation: Xalqaro kosmik stansiya qurilgan eng katta orbital stansiyadir.
words.example2: Astronauts live and work on the orbital station for months at a time.
words.example2Translation: Astronavtlar orbital stansiyada bir necha oy davomida yashab ishlaydi.
words.example3: China has its own orbital station in operation.
words.example3Translation: Xitoyning oʻz orbital stansiyasi ishlamoqda.
extraExamples: Life on an orbital station requires careful planning.
Orbital stations conduct important scientific experiments.
The orbital station orbits Earth every 90 minutes.
Future orbital stations may be much larger.
Supply missions regularly visit the orbital station.
Living in an orbital station presents unique challenges.
The orbital station serves as a stepping stone for deeper space exploration.
extraExampleTranslations: Orbital stansiyadagi hayot puxta rejalashtirishni talab qiladi.
Orbital stansiyalar muhim ilmiy tajribalarni oʻtkazadi.
Orbital stansiya Yerni har 90 daqiqada aylanib chiqadi.
Kelajakdagi orbital stansiyalar ancha katta boʻlishi mumkin.
Taʼminot missiyalari orbital stansiyaga muntazam tashrif buyuradi.
Orbital stansiyada yashash oʻziga xos qiyinchiliklarni keltirib chiqaradi.
Orbital stansiya chuqurroq kosmik tadqiqotlar uchun asos boʻlib xizmat qiladi.

words.definition: Cheaply and rapidly produced clothing that follows the latest trends, designed to be worn briefly and replaced quickly.
words.definitionUz: So'nggi modaga ergashib, arzon va tezda ishlab chiqariladigan kiyimlar bo'lib, ular qisqa muddat kiyib, tez almashtirish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example1: Fast fashion brands release new collections every few weeks to keep up with changing trends.
words.example1Translation: Tez moda brendlari o'zgarib borayotgan tendentsiyalarga mos ravishda har bir necha haftada yangi kolleksiyalar chiqaradi.
words.example2: Many young shoppers are drawn to fast fashion because of its low prices and trendy styles.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p yosh xaridorlar past narxlari va zamonaviy uslublari tufayli tez modaga jalb qilinadi.
words.example3: Critics argue that fast fashion contributes heavily to environmental pollution and waste.
words.example3Translation: Tanqidchilar tez moda atrof-muhit ifloslanishi va chiqindilarga katta hissa qo'shadi deb ta'kidlaydi.
extraExamples: Fast fashion garments are often made from low-quality materials that wear out quickly.
The rise of fast fashion has made it difficult for local tailors and small designers to compete.
Many consumers are unaware of the working conditions behind fast fashion production.
Fast fashion encourages a throwaway culture where clothes are treated as disposable.
Some shoppers are switching away from fast fashion after learning about its environmental impact.
Fast fashion brands produce billions of garments each year, far more than people can consume.
Documentary films have helped raise awareness about the dark side of the fast fashion industry.
extraExampleTranslations: Tez moda kiyimlari ko'pincha tez eskiradigan past sifatli materiallardan tayyorlanadi.
Tez modaning yuksalishi mahalliy tikuvchilar va kichik dizaynerlar uchun raqobatni qiyinlashtirdi.
Ko'p iste'molchilar tez moda ishlab chiqarish ortidagi mehnat sharoitlaridan bexabar.
Tez moda kiyimlar bir martalik deb qaraladigan isrof madaniyatini rag'batlantiradi.
Ba'zi xaridorlar atrof-muhitga ta'sirini bilib, tez modadan voz kechmoqda.
Tez moda brendlari har yili milliardlab kiyim ishlab chiqaradi, odamlar iste'mol qilishi mumkin bo'lganidan ancha ko'p.
Hujjatli filmlar tez moda sanoatining qorong'u tomoni haqida xabardorlikni oshirishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: Clothing that is produced and consumed in ways that are environmentally friendly and ethically responsible throughout its entire lifecycle.
words.definitionUz: Butun hayot davri mobaynida atrof-muhitga zarar bermaydigan va axloqiy jihatdan mas'uliyatli tarzda ishlab chiqariladigan va iste'mol qilinadigan kiyimlar.
words.example1: Sustainable fashion brands use organic materials and pay workers fair wages.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror moda brendlari organik materiallardan foydalanadi va ishchilarga adolatli ish haqi to'laydi.
words.example2: The demand for sustainable fashion has grown as consumers become more environmentally conscious.
words.example2Translation: Iste'molchilar atrof-muhit haqida ko'proq o'ylay boshlashi bilan barqaror modaga talab oshdi.
words.example3: Buying second-hand clothing is one of the simplest ways to support sustainable fashion.
words.example3Translation: Ikkinchi qo'l kiyim sotib olish barqaror modani qo'llab-quvvatlashning eng oddiy usullaridan biridir.
extraExamples: Sustainable fashion encourages consumers to buy fewer but higher-quality garments.
Many luxury brands are now incorporating sustainable fashion practices into their supply chains.
Sustainable fashion is not just about materials but also about fair treatment of factory workers.
The sustainable fashion movement challenges the idea that new clothes are always better.
Shopping at vintage stores is a popular way to participate in sustainable fashion.
Sustainable fashion labels often display information about where and how their clothes are made.
Governments are introducing policies to support the growth of sustainable fashion industries.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror moda iste'molchilarni kamroq, lekin yuqori sifatli kiyimlar sotib olishga undaydi.
Ko'p hashamatli brendlar endi barqaror moda amaliyotlarini o'z ta'minot zanjirlariga kiritmoqda.
Barqaror moda faqat materiallar haqida emas, balki zavod ishchilariga adolatli muomala qilish haqida ham.
Barqaror moda harakati yangi kiyimlar har doim yaxshiroq degan fikrga shubha uyg'otadi.
Vintage do'konlarda xarid qilish barqaror modaga qo'shilishning mashhur usuli.
Barqaror moda yorliqlari ko'pincha kiyimlar qayerda va qanday tayyorlanganiga oid ma'lumotlarni ko'rsatadi.
Hukumatlar barqaror moda sanoatining o'sishini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun siyosatlar joriy etmoqda.

words.definition: A social and economic system that encourages people to buy and own goods in ever-increasing amounts as a path to happiness or status.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarni baxt yoki mavqe yo'lida tobora ko'proq tovarlar sotib olish va egallashga undaydigan ijtimoiy va iqtisodiy tizim.
words.example1: Modern advertising fuels consumerism by convincing people they always need something new.
words.example1Translation: Zamonaviy reklama odamlarga doimo yangi narsa kerak deb ishontirib, iste'molchilikni kuchaytiradi.
words.example2: Consumerism has led to overflowing landfills and a growing waste crisis around the world.
words.example2Translation: Iste'molchilik butun dunyo bo'ylab ko'chib qolgan axlat poligonlari va o'sib borayotgan chiqindi inqiroziga olib keldi.
words.example3: Some philosophers argue that consumerism prevents people from finding deeper meaning in life.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi faylasuflar iste'molchilik odamlarning hayotda chuqurroq ma'no topishiga to'sqinlik qiladi deb ta'kidlaydi.
extraExamples: Consumerism encourages people to define their identity through the brands they buy.
The holiday season is often criticized as the peak of consumerism in many cultures.
Anti-consumerism movements promote living with less and valuing experiences over objects.
Consumerism has made it easy to confuse wanting something with actually needing it.
Unchecked consumerism puts enormous pressure on the planet's natural resources.
Social media has accelerated consumerism by constantly exposing users to new products.
Minimalism is often seen as a direct reaction against the excesses of consumerism.
extraExampleTranslations: Iste'molchilik odamlarni o'z shaxsiyatini sotib oladigan brendlar orqali belgilashga undaydi.
Bayram mavsumi ko'p madaniyatlarda iste'molchilikning cho'qqisi sifatida ko'pincha tanqid qilinadi.
Iste'molchilikka qarshi harakatlar kamroq narsalar bilan yashashni va ob'ektlar o'rniga tajribalarni qadrliashni targ'ib qiladi.
Iste'molchilik biror narsani istashni uni chindan ham kerakligidan farqlashni qiyinlashtirdi.
Nazorat qilinmagan iste'molchilik sayyoramizning tabiiy resurslariga ulkan bosim ko'rsatadi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar foydalanuvchilarni doimiy yangi mahsulotlarga duchor qilish orqali iste'molchilikni tezlashtirdi.
Minimalizm ko'pincha iste'molchilikning haddan tashqari ko'payishiga bevosita reaktsiya sifatida qaraladi.

words.definition: The distinctive image a company creates through its logo, design, messaging, and customer experience to differentiate itself from competitors.
words.definitionUz: Kompaniyaning raqiblardan ajralib turish uchun logotipi, dizayni, xabarlari va mijozlarga munosabati orqali yaratadigan o'ziga xos qiyofasi.
words.example1: Nike's strong brand identity is built around the values of performance, inspiration, and winning.
words.example1Translation: Nike'ning kuchli brend qiyofasi unumdorlik, ilhom va g'alaba qozonish qadriyatlari asosiga qurilgan.
words.example2: A consistent brand identity helps customers recognize and trust a company instantly.
words.example2Translation: Izchil brend qiyofasi mijozlarga kompaniyani darhol tanib, unga ishonishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The startup invested heavily in developing a clear brand identity before launching its products.
words.example3Translation: Startap mahsulotlarini ishga tushirishdan oldin aniq brend qiyofasini ishlab chiqishga katta sarmoya kiritdi.
extraExamples: A strong brand identity goes beyond a logo — it includes tone, values, and visual style.
The company redesigned its brand identity to appeal to a younger generation of consumers.
Brand identity is shaped by every interaction a customer has with a business.
Luxury brands protect their brand identity carefully to maintain an image of exclusivity.
A weak brand identity can make it difficult for a business to stand out in a crowded market.
Social media plays a major role in shaping and communicating brand identity today.
The fashion house spent months refining its brand identity before its global relaunch.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli brend qiyofasi logotipdan tashqarida — u ohang, qadriyatlar va vizual uslubni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
Kompaniya yosh iste'molchilar avlodini jalb qilish uchun brend qiyofasini qayta loyihaladi.
Brend qiyofasi mijozning biznes bilan har bir muloqoti orqali shakllanadi.
Hashamatli brendlar eksklyuzivlik qiyofasini saqlash uchun o'z brend qiyofasini ehtiyotkorlik bilan himoya qiladi.
Zaif brend qiyofasi biznesga gavjum bozorda ajralib turishni qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar bugungi kunda brend qiyofasini shakllantirishda va tarqatishda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Moda uyi global qayta ishga tushirishdan oldin brend qiyofasini takomillashtirishga oylar sarfladi.

words.definition: High-end, custom-made fashion clothing crafted to the exact measurements of an individual client, representing the pinnacle of the fashion world.
words.definitionUz: Moda dunyosining eng yuqori cho'qqisini ifodalovchi, individual mijozning aniq o'lchamlariga ko'ra qo'l bilan yasalgan yuqori darajadagi maxsus kiyimlar.
words.example1: Haute couture gowns can take hundreds of hours of skilled handwork to complete.
words.example1Translation: Yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati ko'ylakları bajarilishi uchun yuzlab soat malakali qo'l ishi talab qilishi mumkin.
words.example2: Only a few fashion houses in Paris are officially recognized as haute couture designers.
words.example2Translation: Parij moda uylari orasida faqat bir nechtasi rasman yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati dizaynerlari sifatida tan olingan.
words.example3: A single haute couture dress can cost tens of thousands of dollars due to the craftsmanship involved.
words.example3Translation: Bitta yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati ko'ylagi unda ishlatilgan hunarmandchilik tufayli o'n minglab dollarga tushishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Haute couture collections are shown twice a year at Paris Fashion Week.
The actress wore a stunning haute couture gown to the international film awards ceremony.
Haute couture represents the artistic and technical pinnacle of the fashion industry.
Unlike ready-to-wear clothing, haute couture is fitted to the body of one specific client.
Learning haute couture techniques takes years of training at specialized fashion schools.
Many haute couture pieces are considered works of art rather than everyday clothing.
Younger designers often dream of joining the exclusive world of haute couture.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati kolleksiyalari yilda ikki marta Parij moda haftasida namoyish etiladi.
Aktris xalqaro kino mukofotlari marosimiga ajoyib yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati ko'ylagida keldi.
Yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati moda sanoatining badiiy va texnik cho'qqisini ifodalaydi.
Tayyor kiyimlardan farqli o'laroq, yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati bitta aniq mijozning tanasiga moslanadi.
Yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati usullarini o'rganish ixtisoslashtirilgan moda maktablarida yillab mashq qilishni talab qiladi.
Ko'p yuksak tikuvchilik san'ati buyumlari kundalik kiyim emas, balki san'at asarlari deb hisoblanadi.
Yosh dizaynerlar ko'pincha yuksak tikuvchilik san'atining eksklyuziv olamiga qo'shilishni orziqib kutishadi.

words.definition: Clothing designed to be used for a very short time and then discarded, reflecting a throwaway attitude toward garments.
words.definitionUz: Kiyimlarga nisbatan isrof munosabatini aks ettiruvchi, juda qisqa muddat foydalanish uchun mo'ljallangan va keyin tashlaniladigan kiyimlar.
words.example1: Disposable fashion has made it common for people to wear an outfit just once before throwing it away.
words.example1Translation: Bir martalik moda odamlar kiyimni bir marta kiyib, keyin tashlab yuborish odatini keng tarqatdi.
words.example2: The environmental cost of disposable fashion is enormous, with millions of tons going to landfill each year.
words.example2Translation: Bir martalik modaning atrof-muhitga ta'siri juda katta bo'lib, har yili millionlab tonna chiqindi ko'miladi.
words.example3: Social media culture has encouraged disposable fashion by making people feel pressure to wear new outfits constantly.
words.example3Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoq madaniyati odamlarga doimo yangi kiyim kiyish bosimini sezdirib, bir martalik modani rag'batlantirdi.
extraExamples: Disposable fashion is the opposite of building a thoughtful, lasting wardrobe.
The rise of influencer culture has accelerated disposable fashion among young consumers.
Textile waste from disposable fashion is one of the largest contributors to global pollution.
Some brands openly market disposable fashion by pricing garments as cheaply as a cup of coffee.
Disposable fashion normalizes the idea that clothing has no lasting value.
Educating consumers about disposable fashion is key to changing buying habits.
Governments are considering taxes on disposable fashion to discourage waste.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir martalik moda o'ylangan, uzoq davomli gardirob qurishning aksidir.
Influencer madaniyatining yuksalishi yosh iste'molchilar orasida bir martalik modani tezlashtirdi.
Bir martalik modadan kelib chiqadigan to'qimachilik chiqindilari global ifloslanishga eng katta hissa qo'shuvchilardan biridir.
Ba'zi brendlar kiyimlarni qahva kabi arzon narxlarda sotib, bir martalik modani ochiqchasiga targ'ib qiladi.
Bir martalik moda kiyimning doimiy qadr-qimmati yo'q degan fikrni odatiy holga aylantiradi.
Iste'molchilarni bir martalik moda haqida o'qitish xarid odatlarini o'zgartirishning kalitidir.
Hukumatlar isrofgarchilikni oldini olish uchun bir martalik modaga soliq kiritishni ko'rib chiqmoqda.

words.definition: The adoption of cultural elements from a minority group by members of a more dominant culture, often without proper understanding, permission, or respect.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha to'g'ri tushunish, ruxsat yoki hurmat ko'rsatmasdan, hukmron madaniyat vakillari tomonidan ozchilik guruhining madaniy elementlarini o'zlashtirish.
words.example1: Wearing traditional clothing from another culture as a costume is widely criticized as cultural appropriation.
words.example1Translation: Boshqa madaniyatning an'anaviy kiyimlarini kostyum sifatida kiyish madaniy o'zlashtirish sifatida keng tanqid qilinadi.
words.example2: The fashion industry has faced accusations of cultural appropriation for using indigenous designs without credit.
words.example2Translation: Moda sanoati mahalliy aholining dizaynlarini e'tibofsiz ishlatgani uchun madaniy o'zlashtirish ayblovlariga duch keldi.
words.example3: The debate around cultural appropriation often raises questions about respect, power, and representation.
words.example3Translation: Madaniy o'zlashtirish atrofidagi munozara ko'pincha hurmat, kuch va vakillik haqida savollar tug'diradi.
extraExamples: Some argue that cultural appropriation is harmful because it strips meaning from sacred traditions.
The line between cultural appropriation and cultural appreciation is often debated.
Fashion brands have been called out for cultural appropriation when borrowing from African or Asian traditions.
Cultural appropriation can reinforce harmful stereotypes about minority communities.
Critics say cultural appropriation profits from a culture without giving anything back to its people.
Understanding cultural context is essential to avoid unintentional cultural appropriation.
Some communities welcome the sharing of their cultural symbols while others strongly oppose it.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zilar madaniy o'zlashtirish muqaddas an'analardan ma'noni olib tashlashi sababli zararli deb hisoblaydi.
Madaniy o'zlashtirish va madaniy qadriyatlash o'rtasidagi chegara ko'pincha munozara qilinadi.
Moda brendlari Afrika yoki Osiyo an'analaridan qarzga olinganda madaniy o'zlashtirish uchun tanqidga uchradi.
Madaniy o'zlashtirish ozchilik jamoalari haqidagi zararli stereotiplarni mustahkamlashi mumkin.
Tanqidchilar madaniy o'zlashtirish uning odamlariga hech narsa qaytarmasdan madaniyatdan foyda ko'radi deydi.
Madaniy kontekstni tushunish ixtiyorsiz madaniy o'zlashtirishdan qochish uchun muhimdir.
Ba'zi jamoalar o'z madaniy ramzlarini ulashishni xush ko'radi, boshqalar esa bunga qat'iyan qarshi chiqadi.

words.definition: A strategy where products are deliberately designed with a limited lifespan to encourage consumers to buy replacements more frequently.
words.definitionUz: Iste'molchilarni tez-tez yangi mahsulot sotib olishga majbur qilish uchun mahsulotlarni ataylab cheklangan xizmat muddati bilan loyihalash strategiyasi.
words.example1: Critics accuse smartphone companies of planned obsolescence when they stop supporting older devices.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar smartfon kompaniyalarini eski qurilmalarni qo'llab-quvvatlashni to'xtatganida rejalashtirilgan eskirishda ayblamoqda.
words.example2: Planned obsolescence in fashion means clothes go out of style quickly, pushing people to shop more.
words.example2Translation: Modadagi rejalashtirilgan eskirish kiyimlar tezda eskirib, odamlarni ko'proq xarid qilishga undashini anglatadi.
words.example3: Planned obsolescence is profitable for companies but wasteful and costly for consumers and the environment.
words.example3Translation: Rejalashtirilgan eskirish kompaniyalar uchun foydali, lekin iste'molchilar va atrof-muhit uchun isrofli va qimmat.
extraExamples: Some electronics are designed to slow down over time, a common form of planned obsolescence.
Planned obsolescence drives constant consumption, which benefits manufacturers but harms the planet.
Consumer advocacy groups have called for laws to ban planned obsolescence in electronics.
Planned obsolescence means products are built to break, not to last.
The fashion industry relies on planned obsolescence by declaring last season's styles outdated.
Repair culture is a growing movement that directly challenges planned obsolescence.
Planned obsolescence is a key reason why electronic waste is one of the fastest-growing waste streams globally.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zi elektronika qurilmalari vaqt o'tishi bilan sekinlashishga mo'ljallab yasaladi — bu rejalashtirilgan eskirishning keng tarqalgan shakli.
Rejalashtirilgan eskirish doimiy iste'molni harakatga keltiradi, bu ishlab chiqaruvchilarga foyda keltiradi, lekin sayyoraga zarar yetkazadi.
Iste'molchilarni himoya qilish guruhlari elektronikada rejalashtirilgan eskirishni taqiqlovchi qonunlar qabul qilinishini talab qildi.
Rejalashtirilgan eskirish mahsulotlar uzoq xizmat qilish uchun emas, sinish uchun qurilganligini anglatadi.
Moda sanoati o'tgan mavsum uslublarini eskirgan deb e'lon qilish orqali rejalashtirilgan eskirishga tayanadi.
Ta'mirlash madaniyati rejalashtirilgan eskirishga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri qarshi chiqadigan o'sib borayotgan harakatdir.
Rejalashtirilgan eskirish elektron chiqindilar dunyo bo'ylab eng tez o'sayotgan chiqindi oqimlaridan biriga aylanishining asosiy sababidir.

words.definition: A classic, versatile clothing item that can be mixed and matched with many outfits and never goes out of style.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p kiyimlar bilan uyg'unlashtiriladigan va hech qachon eskirmaydigan klassik, ko'p qirrali kiyim buyumi.
words.example1: A crisp white shirt is considered a wardrobe essential that works for both casual and formal occasions.
words.example1Translation: Oq ko'ylak ham kundalik, ham rasmiy tadbirlar uchun mos keladigan gardirob asosi hisoblanadi.
words.example2: Investing in wardrobe essentials saves money in the long run because they never go out of fashion.
words.example2Translation: Gardirob asoslariga sarmoya kiritish uzoq muddatda pul tejaydi, chunki ular hech qachon eskirmaydi.
words.example3: Fashion experts recommend building your wardrobe around essentials before adding trend pieces.
words.example3Translation: Moda mutaxassislari gardirobingizni trend buyumlar qo'shishdan oldin asoslar atrofida qurishni maslahat beradi.
extraExamples: A well-fitted blazer is a wardrobe essential that can elevate almost any outfit.
Dark denim jeans are a wardrobe essential found in closets around the world.
Building a capsule wardrobe means focusing on high-quality essentials rather than trendy items.
Wardrobe essentials tend to be simple in design but excellent in quality and fit.
Stylists often tell clients to invest in wardrobe essentials and rent statement pieces for special events.
A classic trench coat is a wardrobe essential that suits almost every climate and occasion.
Wardrobe essentials reduce the stress of getting dressed because they always work together.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi o'lchamda blazer deyarli har qanday kiyimni ko'taradigan gardirob asosi hisoblanadi.
To'q rangli denim shim butun dunyodagi shkaf va garderoblardan topiladi.
Kapsula garderob qurilishi trend buyumlar o'rniga yuqori sifatli asoslarga e'tibor qaratishni anglatadi.
Gardirob asoslari odatda dizayn jihatidan oddiy, lekin sifat va o'lcham jihatidan a'lo bo'ladi.
Stilistlar ko'pincha mijozlarga gardirob asoslariga sarmoya kiritish va maxsus tadbirlar uchun ko'zga tashlanadigan buyumlar ijarasini olishni maslahat beradi.
Klassik trench palto deyarli har qanday iqlim va tadbirga mos keladigan gardirob asosi hisoblanadi.
Gardirob asoslari bir-biri bilan har doim uyg'un bo'lganligi sababli kiyinish stressini kamaytiradi.

words.definition: Work carried out in factories with extremely poor conditions, very low wages, and excessively long working hours, often in developing countries.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda juda yomon sharoitlarda, juda past ish haqi va haddan tashqari uzun ish soatlari bilan zavodlarda bajariladigan mehnat.
words.example1: Many fast fashion brands have been exposed for relying on sweatshop labor to keep their costs low.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p tez moda brendlari xarajatlarini past ushlab turish uchun ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnatga tayanib ishlashi fosh qilindi.
words.example2: Sweatshop labor conditions often involve dangerous environments, with workers risking their health daily.
words.example2Translation: Ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat sharoitlari ko'pincha xavfli muhitni o'z ichiga oladi, ishchilar har kuni salomatliklarini xavf ostiga qo'yadi.
words.example3: Activists are pushing for international laws that would eliminate sweatshop labor in global supply chains.
words.example3Translation: Faollar global ta'minot zanjirlarida ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnatni yo'q qiladigan xalqaro qonunlarni qabul qilishni talab qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Sweatshop labor is often used to produce cheap clothing sold in wealthy countries.
Workers in sweatshop labor conditions are frequently denied breaks, overtime pay, and basic rights.
Investigative journalists have uncovered sweatshop labor practices at several well-known clothing brands.
Consumers can help fight sweatshop labor by choosing brands that are transparent about their supply chains.
Sweatshop labor disproportionately affects women and children in low-income countries.
Some companies have cut ties with suppliers found to be using sweatshop labor after public pressure.
Sweatshop labor persists because global demand for cheap clothing remains extremely high.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat ko'pincha boy mamlakatlarda sotiladigan arzon kiyimlar ishlab chiqarish uchun ishlatiladi.
Ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat sharoitlarida ishlaydigan ishchilarga ko'pincha tanaffus, qo'shimcha ish haqi va asosiy huquqlar inkor etiladi.
Tergov jurnalistlari bir nechta mashhur kiyim brendlarida ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat amaliyotlarini fosh qildi.
Iste'molchilar ta'minot zanjirlari haqida shaffof bo'lgan brendlarni tanlab, ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat bilan kurashishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat past daromadli mamlakatlardagi ayollar va bolalarga nisbatan ko'proq ta'sir qiladi.
Ba'zi kompaniyalar jamoat bosimi ostida ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnatdan foydalanayotgani aniqlangan yetkazib beruvchilar bilan aloqani uzdi.
Ekspluatatsiya qilinadigan mehnat davom etmoqda, chunki arzon kiyimlarga bo'lgan global talab nihoyatda yuqori bo'lib qolmoqda.

words.definition: A social movement that promotes acceptance and respect for all body types, challenging unrealistic beauty standards set by media and the fashion industry.
words.definitionUz: Media va moda sanoati tomonidan o'rnatilgan haqiqiy bo'lmagan go'zallik standartlariga qarshi chiqib, barcha tana turlarini qabul qilish va hurmat qilishni targ'ib qiluvchi ijtimoiy harakat.
words.example1: The body positivity movement encourages people to love and accept themselves regardless of size or shape.
words.example1Translation: Tana ijobiylik harakati odamlarni o'lcham yoki shaklidan qat'i nazar, o'zlarini sevish va qabul qilishga undaydi.
words.example2: Fashion brands are increasingly featuring diverse models as a result of the body positivity movement.
words.example2Translation: Moda brendlari tana ijobiylik harakati natijasida tobora ko'proq xilma-xil modellarni namoyish etmoqda.
words.example3: Body positivity challenges the idea that only one type of body is attractive or worthy of representation.
words.example3Translation: Tana ijobiylik faqat bitta tana turi jozibador yoki vakillikka loyiq degan fikrga qarshi chiqadi.
extraExamples: The body positivity movement has roots in the fat acceptance activism of the 1960s.
Many influencers use social media to spread body positivity messages to millions of followers.
Body positivity has pushed fashion magazines to include models of different sizes and ethnicities.
Critics argue that body positivity must also address the health concerns associated with certain body types.
Body positivity helps reduce the shame and anxiety many people feel about their appearance.
Schools are beginning to incorporate body positivity into health and wellness education programs.
The body positivity movement has challenged the fashion industry to rethink its standard sizing models.
extraExampleTranslations: Tana ijobiylik harakatining ildizlari 1960-yillardagi semizlikni qabul qilish faolligida mavjud.
Ko'p influencerlar ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan millions o'quvchilarga tana ijobiylik xabarlarini tarqatish uchun foydalanadi.
Tana ijobiylik moda jurnallarini turli o'lcham va millat vakillari modellarni kiritishga majbur qildi.
Tanqidchilar tana ijobiylik muayyan tana turlari bilan bog'liq sog'liq muammolarini ham hal qilishi kerak deb ta'kidlaydi.
Tana ijobiylik ko'p odamlarning o'z ko'rinishi haqida his qiladigan uyat va tashvishni kamaytiradi.
Maktablar tana ijobiylikni sog'liqni saqlash va sog'lom yashash ta'lim dasturlariga kirita boshladi.
Tana ijobiylik harakati moda sanoatini standart o'lchamlar modellarini qayta ko'rib chiqishga undadi.

words.definition: A system in which clothing is designed to be reused, repaired, recycled, or repurposed, eliminating textile waste and maximizing the life of garments.
words.definitionUz: Kiyimlar qayta foydalanish, ta'mirlash, qayta ishlash yoki boshqa maqsadda ishlatish uchun mo'ljallanadigan, to'qimachilik chiqindisini yo'q qiluvchi va kiyimlar muddatini maksimal darajada uzaytiradigan tizim.
words.example1: Circular fashion aims to keep clothing in use for as long as possible rather than sending it to landfill.
words.example1Translation: Aylanma moda kiyimlarni ko'milishiga yuborish o'rniga, imkon qadar uzoqroq foydalanishda ushlab turishga qaratilgan.
words.example2: Several major brands have launched take-back programs as part of their circular fashion strategy.
words.example2Translation: Bir nechta yirik brendlar aylanma moda strategiyasining bir qismi sifatida qaytarish dasturlarini ishga tushirdi.
words.example3: Circular fashion requires a complete rethinking of how clothes are designed, sold, and disposed of.
words.example3Translation: Aylanma moda kiyimlar qanday loyihalanishi, sotilishi va yo'q qilinishi haqida to'liq qayta ko'rib chiqishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Circular fashion supports the idea that there is no such thing as waste — only misplaced resources.
Consumers can participate in circular fashion by swapping, donating, or repairing their clothes.
The circular fashion model reduces the need for new raw materials in clothing production.
Designers working in circular fashion create garments that are easy to disassemble and recycle.
Rental fashion services are an important part of the circular fashion ecosystem.
Circular fashion is gaining traction among environmentally conscious consumers worldwide.
Transitioning to circular fashion would significantly reduce the textile industry's carbon footprint.
extraExampleTranslations: Aylanma moda chiqindi yo'q — faqat noto'g'ri joylashtirilgan resurslar bor degan g'oyani qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Iste'molchilar kiyimlarini almashish, xayriya qilish yoki ta'mirlash orqali aylanma modaga qo'shilishi mumkin.
Aylanma moda modeli kiyim ishlab chiqarishda yangi xom ashyoga bo'lgan ehtiyojni kamaytiradi.
Aylanma modada ishlaydigan dizaynerlar osongina qismlarga bo'linishi va qayta ishlanishi mumkin bo'lgan kiyimlar yaratadi.
Ijaraga moda xizmatlari aylanma moda ekotizimining muhim qismidir.
Aylanma moda butun dunyo bo'ylab atrof-muhitni anglagan iste'molchilar orasida ommalashib bormoqda.
Aylanma modaga o'tish to'qimachilik sanoatining uglerod izini sezilarli darajada kamaytiradi.

words.definition: The total environmental impact of a garment, including its carbon emissions, water usage, and waste generation throughout its entire lifecycle.
words.definitionUz: Kiyimning butun hayot davri mobaynida uglerod chiqindilari, suv sarfi va chiqindi hosil qilishni o'z ichiga olgan umumiy atrof-muhitga ta'siri.
words.example1: Understanding your fashion footprint can motivate you to make more responsible clothing choices.
words.example1Translation: Moda izingizni tushunish sizni kiyim tanlashda mas'uliyatliroq bo'lishga undashi mumkin.
words.example2: The fashion footprint of a single pair of jeans includes hundreds of liters of water used in cotton farming.
words.example2Translation: Bitta shim juftining moda izi paxta yetishtirish uchun sarflangan yuzlab litr suvni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: Brands are being pressured to measure and reduce their fashion footprint as part of sustainability goals.
words.example3Translation: Brendlar barqarorlik maqsadlari doirasida moda izlarini o'lchash va kamaytirish uchun bosim ostida.
extraExamples: Your fashion footprint is affected by how often you buy new clothes and how long you keep them.
Choosing natural fabrics over synthetics can help reduce your personal fashion footprint.
The global fashion industry's total fashion footprint rivals that of aviation and shipping combined.
Apps are being developed to help consumers calculate the fashion footprint of their purchases.
Washing clothes less often and at lower temperatures can noticeably reduce your fashion footprint.
Fashion footprint calculators are becoming popular tools for environmentally conscious shoppers.
Reducing the fashion footprint of the industry will require changes at every stage of production.
extraExampleTranslations: Moda izingizga yangi kiyim qanchalik tez-tez sotib olishingiz va ularni qanchalik uzoq saqlashingiz ta'sir qiladi.
Sintetik matolar o'rniga tabiiy matolarni tanlash shaxsiy moda izingizni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Global moda sanoatining umumiy moda izi aviatsiya va dengiz transporti birgalikdagi izga tenglashadi.
Iste'molchilarga o'z xaridlarining moda izini hisoblashda yordam berish uchun ilovalar ishlab chiqilmoqda.
Kiyimlarni kamroq va past haroratda yuvish moda izingizni sezilari darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
Moda izi kalkulyatorlari atrof-muhitni anglagan xaridorlar uchun mashhur vositaga aylanib bormoqda.
Sanoatning moda izini kamaytirish ishlab chiqarishning har bir bosqichida o'zgarishlarni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A fashion trend characterized by the excessive and prominent display of brand logos on clothing and accessories.
words.definitionUz: Kiyim va aksessuarlarda brendning logotipi haddan tashqari ko'zga tashlanib turishi bilan ajralib turadigan moda tendentsiyasi.
words.example1: Logo mania returned strongly in the 2010s, with major luxury brands printing their logos across entire garments.
words.example1Translation: Logotip maniasi 2010-yillarda kuchli qaytdi, yirik hashamatli brendlar logotiplarini butun kiyimlarda chop etdi.
words.example2: Streetwear culture played a big role in the rise of logo mania around the world.
words.example2Translation: Ko'cha kiyim madaniyati butun dunyo bo'ylab logotip maniasining yuksalishida katta rol o'ynadi.
words.example3: Critics of logo mania argue that it reduces fashion to a status symbol rather than an art form.
words.example3Translation: Logotip maniasi tanqidchilari buning modani san'at shakli emas, balki maqom ramziga aylantirishini ta'kidlaydi.
extraExamples: Logo mania allows brands to turn their customers into walking advertisements.
Some fashion purists reject logo mania, preferring subtle design over bold branding.
Logo mania is often associated with conspicuous consumption and the desire to signal wealth.
Affordable fashion brands have capitalized on logo mania by releasing logo-heavy collections.
Logo mania tends to rise and fall in cycles, reflecting broader shifts in fashion culture.
Young consumers in many cities are drawn to logo mania as a way to express brand loyalty.
High-end designers have mixed feelings about logo mania — it sells well but can dilute prestige.
extraExampleTranslations: Logotip maniasi brendlarga o'z mijozlarini yuradigan reklama taxtachalariga aylantirishga imkon beradi.
Ba'zi moda sof saqlari logotip maniyasini rad etadi, yaqqol brendlash o'rniga nozik dizaynni afzal ko'radi.
Logotip maniasi ko'pincha ko'zga tashlanadigan iste'mol va boylikni namoyish qilish istagi bilan bog'liq.
Arzon moda brendlari logotip elementlari ko'p bo'lgan kolleksiyalar chiqarish orqali logotip maniyasidan foydalandi.
Logotip maniasi moda madaniyatidagi keng ko'lamli o'zgarishlarni aks ettirib, tsiklik ravishda ko'tarilish va pasayish tendentsiyasiga ega.
Ko'p shaharlardagi yosh iste'molchilar brend sadoqatini ifodalash usuli sifatida logotip maniyasiga moyil.
Yuqori darajali dizaynerlar logotip maniyasi haqida ikkilancha munosabatda — u yaxshi sotiladi, lekin obro'ni zaiflashtirishi mumkin.

words.definition: A manufacturing approach that ensures fair wages, safe working conditions, and full respect for the rights and dignity of workers throughout the supply chain.
words.definitionUz: Ta'minot zanjiri bo'ylab ishchilarga adolatli ish haqi, xavfsiz mehnat sharoiti va huquq hamda qadr-qimmatga to'liq rioya qilishni ta'minlaydigan ishlab chiqarish yondashuvi.
words.example1: Consumers are increasingly willing to pay more for products made through ethical production.
words.example1Translation: Iste'molchilar tobora axloqiy ishlab chiqarish orqali yaratilgan mahsulotlar uchun ko'proq to'lashga tayyor.
words.example2: Ethical production standards require brands to audit their factories and verify worker conditions.
words.example2Translation: Axloqiy ishlab chiqarish standartlari brendlarga zavodlarini tekshirish va ishchilar sharoitlarini tasdiqlashni talab qiladi.
words.example3: The brand earned certification for ethical production after years of improving its supply chain.
words.example3Translation: Brend ta'minot zanjirini yillar davomida takomillashtirganidan so'ng axloqiy ishlab chiqarish sertifikatini oldi.
extraExamples: Ethical production includes ensuring that workers are not subjected to discrimination or harassment.
Small fashion brands often find it easier to maintain ethical production because of their smaller supply chains.
Third-party audits are used to verify that companies are meeting ethical production standards.
Ethical production is not just about wages — it also covers working hours and environmental practices.
The rise of conscious consumerism has made ethical production a competitive advantage for many brands.
Fashion activists campaign for laws requiring all brands to meet minimum ethical production standards.
Ethical production helps build long-term trust between a brand and its customers.
extraExampleTranslations: Axloqiy ishlab chiqarish ishchilarga kamsitish yoki ta'qibga duchor bo'lmasliklarini ta'minlashni o'z ichiga oladi.
Kichik moda brendlari ko'pincha kichikroq ta'minot zanjirlari tufayli axloqiy ishlab chiqarishni osonroq saqlaydi.
Uchinchi tomon tekshiruvlari kompaniyalar axloqiy ishlab chiqarish standartlarini bajarayotganligini tasdiqlash uchun ishlatiladi.
Axloqiy ishlab chiqarish faqat ish haqi haqida emas — u ish soatlari va atrof-muhit amaliyotlarini ham qamrab oladi.
Ongli iste'molchilikning yuksalishi axloqiy ishlab chiqarishni ko'p brendlar uchun raqobatdosh ustunlikka aylantirdi.
Moda faollari barcha brendlarga minimal axloqiy ishlab chiqarish standartlarini bajarishni talab qiladigan qonunlar uchun kampaniya olib boradi.
Axloqiy ishlab chiqarish brend va uning mijozlari o'rtasida uzoq muddatli ishonchni mustahkamlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The state in which a person can cope with normal life stresses, work productively, and contribute to their community.
words.definitionUz: Ruhiy salomatlik — odamning kundalik hayotdagi stresslarni boshqarishi, samarali ishlashi va jamiyatga hissa qo‘shishi mumkin bo‘lgan holatidir.
words.example1: Regular exercise and good sleep are important for mental well-being.
words.example1Translation: Muntazam jismoniy mashq va yaxshi uyqu ruhiy salomatlik uchun juda muhim.
words.example2: Schools are now teaching students ways to improve their mental well-being.
words.example2Translation: Maktablar endi o‘quvchilarga ruhiy salomatlikni yaxshilash usullarini o‘rgatmoqda.
words.example3: Taking breaks at work helps maintain mental well-being.
words.example3Translation: Ishda tanaffus qilish ruhiy salomatlikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Mental well-being is just as important as physical health.
Strong social relationships support mental well-being.
Many workplaces now offer programs to promote employee mental well-being.
Financial worries can negatively affect mental well-being.
Mindfulness practices are popular for improving mental well-being.
Governments are investing more in mental well-being initiatives.
A balanced lifestyle contributes greatly to mental well-being.
extraExampleTranslations: Ruhiy salomatlik jismoniy salomatlik kabi muhimdir.
Kuchli ijtimoiy munosabatlar ruhiy salomatlikni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Ko‘p ish joylarida xodimlarning ruhiy salomatligini yaxshilash dasturlari mavjud.
Moliyaviy muammolar ruhiy salomatlikka salbiy ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Onglilik mashqlari ruhiy salomatlikni yaxshilash uchun mashhur.
Hukumatlar ruhiy salomatlik tashabbuslariga ko‘proq mablag‘ ajratmoqda.
Muvozanatli turmush tarzi ruhiy salomatlikka katta hissa qo‘shadi.

words.definition: A mark of shame or disgrace attached to a particular situation, quality, or person.
words.definitionUz: Stigma — muayyan holat, xususiyat yoki shaxsga yopishtiriladigan uyat yoki badnomlik belgisi.
words.example1: There is still a lot of stigma around mental health issues.
words.example1Translation: Ruhiy salomatlik muammolari atrofida hali ham ko‘p stigma mavjud.
words.example2: Education can help reduce the stigma associated with seeking therapy.
words.example2Translation: Ta’lim terapiyaga murojaat qilish bilan bog‘liq stigmani kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She overcame the stigma and openly talked about her anxiety.
words.example3Translation: U stigmani yengib, o‘z xavotir holati haqida ochiq gapirdi.
extraExamples: Fighting stigma is an important part of mental health awareness.
The stigma of unemployment can affect people’s self-confidence.
Social media sometimes helps break the stigma around mental illness.
Cultural differences influence how stigma is experienced.
Many people avoid treatment because of stigma.
Public figures speaking out can reduce mental health stigma.
Reducing stigma encourages more people to seek help.
extraExampleTranslations: Stigmaga qarshi kurash ruhiy salomatlikni oshirishning muhim qismidir.
Ishsizlik stigmasi odamlarning o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonchini pasaytirishi mumkin.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar ba’zida ruhiy kasallik atrofidagi stigmani buzishga yordam beradi.
Madaniy farqlar stigma qanday boshdan kechirilishiga ta’sir qiladi.
Ko‘p odamlar stigma tufayli davolanishdan qochishadi.
Ommaviy shaxslarning ochiq gapirishi ruhiy salomatlik stigmasini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Stigmani kamaytirish ko‘proq odamlarni yordam so‘rashga undaydi.

words.definition: A mental health condition involving excessive fear, worry, and related behavioral changes.
words.definitionUz: Xavotir buzilishi — haddan tashqari qo‘rquv, tashvish va shu bilan bog‘liq xulq-atvor o‘zgarishlari bilan kechadigan ruhiy salomatlik holatidir.
words.example1: She was diagnosed with an anxiety disorder last year.
words.example1Translation: Unga o‘tgan yili xavotir buzilishi tashxisi qo‘yildi.
words.example2: Therapy and medication can help manage anxiety disorders.
words.example2Translation: Terapiya va dori-darmon xavotir buzilishlarini boshqarishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Anxiety disorders are among the most common mental health conditions.
words.example3Translation: Xavotir buzilishlari eng keng tarqalgan ruhiy salomatlik holatlaridan biridir.
extraExamples: Panic attacks are a common symptom of anxiety disorders.
Social anxiety disorder makes it difficult to interact with others.
Early treatment is important for anxiety disorders.
Lifestyle changes can sometimes reduce symptoms of anxiety disorders.
Many students suffer from anxiety disorders during exam periods.
Anxiety disorders can affect sleep and daily functioning.
Support groups help people living with anxiety disorders.
extraExampleTranslations: Vahima hujumlari xavotir buzilishining keng tarqalgan belgilaridan biridir.
Ijtimoiy xavotir buzilishi boshqalar bilan muloqot qilishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Xavotir buzilishlarini erta davolash muhimdir.
Turmush tarzi o‘zgarishlari ba’zan xavotir buzilishlari alomatlarini kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ko‘p talabalar imtihon davrida xavotir buzilishlaridan aziyat chekishadi.
