Xavotir buzilishlari uyqu va kundalik faoliyatga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Qo‘llab-quvvatlash guruhlari xavotir buzilishi bilan yashayotgan odamlarga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Treatment intended to relieve or heal a psychological disorder, often through talking with a professional.
words.definitionUz: Terapiya — ko‘pincha mutaxassis bilan suhbat orqali ruhiy buzilishlarni yengillashtirish yoki davolash usuli.
words.example1: She attends therapy sessions every week to manage her stress.
words.example1Translation: U stressni boshqarish uchun har hafta terapiya seanslariga qatnaydi.
words.example2: Cognitive behavioral therapy is very effective for many mental health issues.
words.example2Translation: Kognitiv-xulqiy terapiya ko‘p ruhiy salomatlik muammolari uchun samaralidir.
words.example3: There is no shame in seeking therapy when you need support.
words.example3Translation: Yordam kerak bo‘lganda terapiyaga murojaat qilishda hech qanday uyat yo‘q.
extraExamples: Therapy can help people process difficult emotions.
Online therapy has become more popular after the pandemic.
Family therapy involves working with parents and children together.
Many different types of therapy exist for different needs.
Regular therapy improves emotional awareness and coping skills.
Therapy is an important tool in treating depression and anxiety.
Finding the right therapist is key to successful therapy.
extraExampleTranslations: Terapiya odamlarga qiyin his-tuyg‘ularni ishlashga yordam beradi.
Onlayn terapiya pandemiyadan keyin yanada ommalashdi.
Oila terapiyasi ota-onalar va bolalar bilan birgalikda ishlaydi.
Turli ehtiyojlar uchun turli xil terapiya turlari mavjud.
Muntazam terapiya his-tuyg‘ularni anglash va stressni boshqarish ko‘nikmalarini yaxshilaydi.
Terapiya depressiya va xavotirni davolashda muhim vositadir.
To‘g‘ri terapevt topish terapiyaning muvaffaqiyati uchun kalitdir.

words.definition: A state of physical, emotional, and mental exhaustion caused by prolonged stress, especially from work.
words.definitionUz: Ishdan charchash — uzoq muddatli stress, ayniqsa ish tufayli yuzaga keladigan jismoniy, his-tuyg‘u va ruhiy charchoq holati.
words.example1: After working 12-hour days for months, he experienced burnout.
words.example1Translation: Bir necha oy davomida 12 soatlik ish kunlaridan keyin u ishdan charchash holatini boshdan kechirdi.
words.example2: Taking a vacation helped her recover from burnout.
words.example2Translation: Ta’til unga ishdan charchashdan tiklanishga yordam berdi.
words.example3: Many teachers suffer from burnout due to heavy workloads.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p o‘qituvchilar katta ish yuki tufayli ishdan charchashdan aziyat chekishadi.
extraExamples: Burnout can lead to decreased productivity and health problems.
Setting boundaries at work helps prevent burnout.
Recognizing early signs of burnout is very important.
Burnout is increasingly common in high-pressure jobs.
Companies are creating wellness programs to reduce employee burnout.
Rest and hobbies are good ways to recover from burnout.
Burnout affects both mental and physical health.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishdan charchash samaradorlikning pasayishi va sog‘liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ishda chegaralarni belgilash ishdan charchashning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Ishdan charchashning dastlabki belgilarini tan olish juda muhim.
Yuqori bosimli ishlarda ishdan charchash tobora ko‘proq uchramoqda.
Kompaniyalar xodimlarning ishdan charchashini kamaytirish uchun salomatlik dasturlarini yaratmoqda.
Dam olish va sevimli mashg‘ulotlar ishdan charchashdan tiklanishning yaxshi usullaridir.
Ishdan charchash ruhiy va jismoniy salomatlikka ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: The practice of paying attention to the present moment without judgment.
words.definitionUz: Onglilik — hozirgi lahzaga hukm qilmasdan diqqatni qaratish mashqidir.
words.example1: Practicing mindfulness every morning helps reduce anxiety.
words.example1Translation: Har kuni ertalab onglilik mashqini bajarish xavotirni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many apps offer guided mindfulness exercises for beginners.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p ilovalar yangi boshlovchilar uchun yo‘riqnoma bilan onglilik mashqlarini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: Mindfulness is taught in some schools to help students focus better.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi maktablarda o‘quvchilarning diqqatini yaxshilash uchun onglilik o‘rgatiladi.
extraExamples: Mindfulness can improve emotional regulation and well-being.
Deep breathing is a simple mindfulness technique.
Regular mindfulness practice helps with stress management.
Many athletes use mindfulness to improve performance.
Mindfulness meditation is becoming more popular worldwide.
It takes time and patience to develop a mindfulness habit.
Mindfulness helps people respond thoughtfully instead of reacting emotionally.
extraExampleTranslations: Onglilik his-tuyg‘ularni boshqarish va farovonlikni yaxshilashi mumkin.
Chuqur nafas olish — oddiy onglilik usuli.
Muntazam onglilik mashqlari stressni boshqarishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p sportchilar natijani yaxshilash uchun onglilikdan foydalanadi.
Onglilik meditatsiyasi butun dunyoda mashhurlashmoqda.
Onglilik odatini shakllantirish vaqt va sabr talab qiladi.
Onglilik odamlarga his-tuyg‘uga berilmasdan o‘ylangan javob berishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A deeply distressing or disturbing experience that can have long-lasting psychological effects.
words.definitionUz: Travma — chuqur iztirob yoki bezovta qiluvchi voqea bo‘lib, uzoq muddatli ruhiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example1: Many soldiers experience trauma after returning from war.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p askarlar urushdan qaytgandan keyin travmani boshdan kechirishadi.
words.example2: Therapy can help people heal from childhood trauma.
words.example2Translation: Terapiya bolalikdagi travmadan shifo topishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: It is important to seek support after experiencing trauma.
words.example3Translation: Travmani boshdan kechirgandan keyin yordam so‘rash muhimdir.
extraExamples: Trauma can affect a person’s ability to trust others.
Not everyone who experiences trauma develops PTSD.
Supportive friends and family help with trauma recovery.
Trauma-informed care is becoming standard in mental health services.
Art therapy is sometimes used to process trauma.
Unresolved trauma can lead to anxiety and depression.
Society is becoming more aware of the effects of trauma.
extraExampleTranslations: Travma odamning boshqalarga ishonish qobiliyatiga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Travmani boshdan kechirgan har bir insonda PTSD rivojlanmaydi.
Qo‘llab-quvvatlovchi do‘stlar va oila travmadan tiklanishga yordam beradi.
Travmaga asoslangan yordam ruhiy salomatlik xizmatlarida standart bo‘lib bormoqda.
San’at terapiyasi ba’zida travmani ishlash uchun ishlatiladi.
Hal qilinmagan travma xavotir va depressiyaga olib kelishi mumkin.
Jamiyat travma ta’sirlarini tobora ko‘proq anglamoqda.

words.definition: A strategy or behavior that a person uses to deal with stress or difficult emotions.
words.definitionUz: Moslashish mexanizmi — odam stress yoki qiyin his-tuyg‘ularni boshqarish uchun qo‘llaydigan strategiya yoki xatti-harakati.
words.example1: Exercise is a healthy coping mechanism for many people.
words.example1Translation: Jismoniy mashq ko‘p odamlar uchun sog‘lom moslashish mexanizmidir.
words.example2: Some people use humor as a coping mechanism during tough times.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zi odamlar qiyin paytlarda hazildan moslashish mexanizmi sifatida foydalanadi.
words.example3: Therapy helps people develop better coping mechanisms.
words.example3Translation: Terapiya odamlarga yaxshiroq moslashish mexanizmlarini shakllantirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Avoidance is not always the best coping mechanism.
Healthy coping mechanisms improve long-term well-being.
Journaling can be an effective coping mechanism.
Unhealthy coping mechanisms include excessive drinking or overeating.
Children learn coping mechanisms from their parents.
Developing positive coping mechanisms takes practice.
Coping mechanisms vary from person to person.
extraExampleTranslations: Qochish har doim ham eng yaxshi moslashish mexanizmi emas.
Sog‘lom moslashish mexanizmlari uzoq muddatli farovonlikni yaxshilaydi.
Kundalik yuritish samarali moslashish mexanizmi bo‘lishi mumkin.
Nosog‘lom moslashish mexanizmlariga haddan tashqari spirt ichish yoki ortiqcha ovqatlanish kiradi.
Bolalar moslashish mexanizmlarini ota-onalaridan o‘rganishadi.
Ijobiy moslashish mexanizmlarini rivojlantirish mashq talab qiladi.
Moslashish mexanizmlari odamdan odamga farq qiladi.

words.definition: A mental health condition characterized by persistent feelings of sadness, loss of interest, and low energy.
words.definitionUz: Depressiya — doimiy qayg‘u, qiziqishni yo‘qotish va past energiya bilan kechadigan ruhiy salomatlik holatidir.
words.example1: Depression can affect anyone regardless of age or background.
words.example1Translation: Depressiya har qanday yosh va ijtimoiy kelib chiqishdagi odamga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example2: Seeking professional help is important when experiencing depression.
words.example2Translation: Depressiyani boshdan kechirayotganda mutaxassis yordamiga murojaat qilish muhim.
words.example3: Regular physical activity can help reduce symptoms of depression.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam jismoniy faollik depressiya alomatlarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Depression is different from feeling sad for a short time.
Many people with depression also experience anxiety.
Treatment for depression often includes therapy and medication.
Social support plays a big role in recovering from depression.
Depression can affect sleep, appetite, and concentration.
It’s important to talk openly about depression to reduce stigma.
Postpartum depression affects many new mothers.
extraExampleTranslations: Depressiya qisqa vaqt qayg‘urishdan farq qiladi.
Depressiyasi bor ko‘p odamlar xavotirni ham boshdan kechirishadi.
Depressiyani davolash ko‘pincha terapiya va dori-darmondan iborat.
Ijtimoiy qo‘llab-quvvatlash depressiyadan tiklanishda katta rol o‘ynaydi.
Depressiya uyqu, ishtaha va diqqatni jamlashga ta’sir qiladi.
Depressiya haqida ochiq gapirish stigmani kamaytirish uchun muhim.
Tug‘ruqdan keyingi depressiya ko‘p yangi onalarga ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: The ability to recover quickly from difficulties and adapt to challenges.
words.definitionUz: Chidamlilik — qiyinchiliklardan tez tiklanish va o‘zgarishlarga moslashish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: Building resilience helps people handle life’s ups and downs.
words.example1Translation: Chidamlilikni rivojlantirish odamlarga hayotning yuqori-pastlarini boshqarishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Support from family increases a child’s resilience.
words.example2Translation: Oila qo‘llab-quvvatlashi bolaning chidamliligini oshiradi.
words.example3: Resilience is a skill that can be learned and strengthened over time.
words.example3Translation: Chidamlilik vaqt o‘tishi bilan o‘rganiladigan va mustahkamlanadigan ko‘nikmadir.
extraExamples: Resilience is important for mental health and success.
Stories of resilience can inspire others facing difficulties.
Schools teach resilience through social-emotional learning.
Resilience helps people bounce back from failure.
Physical health and good sleep contribute to resilience.
Community support builds collective resilience.
Developing resilience takes practice and patience.
extraExampleTranslations: Chidamlilik ruhiy salomatlik va muvaffaqiyat uchun muhim.
Chidamlilik haqidagi hikoyalar qiyinchiliklarga duch kelayotgan boshqalarni ilhomlantirishi mumkin.
Maktablar ijtimoiy-hissiy ta’lim orqali chidamlilikni o‘rgatadi.
Chidamlilik odamlarga muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan tez tiklanishga yordam beradi.
Jismoniy salomatlik va yaxshi uyqu chidamlilikka hissa qo‘shadi.
Jamiyat qo‘llab-quvvatlashi umumiy chidamlilikni oshiradi.
Chidamlilikni rivojlantirish mashq va sabr talab qiladi.

words.definition: The practice of taking deliberate actions to preserve or improve one’s physical, mental, and emotional health.
words.definitionUz: O‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik — o‘zining jismoniy, ruhiy va hissiy salomatligini saqlash yoki yaxshilash uchun ataylab qilinadigan harakatlar amaliyotidir.
words.example1: Setting boundaries is an important part of self-care.
words.example1Translation: Chegaralarni belgilash o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlikning muhim qismidir.
words.example2: She practices self-care by reading books and taking walks in nature.
words.example2Translation: U kitob o‘qish va tabiatda sayr qilish orqali o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik qiladi.
words.example3: Self-care is not selfish; it helps you support others better.
words.example3Translation: O‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik o‘zboshimchalik emas, u boshqalarga yaxshiroq yordam berishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Self-care includes eating healthy and getting enough rest.
Many people neglect self-care due to busy schedules.
Self-care looks different for every individual.
Taking mental health days is a form of self-care.
Journaling is a popular self-care activity.
Self-care helps prevent burnout and exhaustion.
Companies are encouraging self-care among employees.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik sog‘lom ovqatlanish va yetarlicha dam olishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ko‘p odamlar band jadval tufayli o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlikni e’tiborsiz qoldirishadi.
O‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik har bir inson uchun har xil ko‘rinishda bo‘ladi.
Ruhiy salomatlik kunlarini olish o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlikning bir shaklidir.
Kundalik yuritish mashhur o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik mashg‘ulotidir.
O‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlik ishdan charchash va charchoqning oldini oladi.
Kompaniyalar xodimlar orasida o‘z-o‘ziga g‘amxo‘rlikni rag‘batlantirmoqda.

words.definition: A lack of social connections and contact with other people.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy izolyatsiya — boshqa odamlar bilan ijtimoiy aloqa va munosabatlarning yetishmasligi.
words.example1: Social isolation increased during the pandemic lockdowns.
words.example1Translation: Pandemiya karantinlari davrida ijtimoiy izolyatsiya kuchaydi.
words.example2: Social isolation can lead to feelings of loneliness and depression.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy izolyatsiya yolg‘izlik va depressiya hislariga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Community activities help reduce social isolation among the elderly.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat tadbirlari keksa odamlar orasidagi ijtimoiy izolyatsiyani kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Prolonged social isolation affects mental and physical health.
Technology can both reduce and increase social isolation.
Young people are also at risk of social isolation.
Social isolation is different from choosing to be alone.
Strong family ties can protect against social isolation.
Many organizations work to combat social isolation.
Regular social contact is essential to prevent isolation.
extraExampleTranslations: Uzoq muddatli ijtimoiy izolyatsiya ruhiy va jismoniy salomatlikka ta’sir qiladi.
Texnologiya ijtimoiy izolyatsiyani ham kamaytirishi, ham kuchaytirishi mumkin.
Yoshlar ham ijtimoiy izolyatsiya xavfiga duch kelishadi.
Ijtimoiy izolyatsiya yolg‘iz qolishni tanlashdan farq qiladi.
Kuchli oilaviy rishtalar ijtimoiy izolyatsiyadan himoya qilishi mumkin.
Ko‘p tashkilotlar ijtimoiy izolyatsiyaga qarshi kurashadi.
Muntazam ijtimoiy aloqa izolyatsiyaning oldini olish uchun zarur.

words.definition: Providing education and information about mental health conditions to patients and their families.
words.definitionUz: Psixo-ta’lim — bemorlar va ularning oilalariga ruhiy salomatlik holatlari haqida ma’lumot va ta’lim berishdir.
words.example1: Psychoeducation helps families better understand and support loved ones with mental illness.
words.example1Translation: Psixo-ta’lim oilalarga ruhiy kasalligi bor yaqinlarini yaxshiroq tushunish va qo‘llab-quvvatlashga yordam beradi.
words.example2: The clinic offers psychoeducation sessions for people with anxiety disorders.
words.example2Translation: Klinika xavotir buzilishlari bo‘lgan odamlar uchun psixo-ta’lim seanslarini o‘tkazadi.
words.example3: Psychoeducation is an important part of mental health treatment.
words.example3Translation: Psixo-ta’lim ruhiy salomatlikni davolashning muhim qismidir.
extraExamples: Psychoeducation reduces stigma by increasing understanding.
Schools sometimes provide psychoeducation for students and parents.
Psychoeducation teaches practical skills for managing symptoms.
Online resources make psychoeducation more accessible.
Psychoeducation empowers people to take an active role in their recovery.
Family psychoeducation improves treatment outcomes.
Psychoeducation covers topics like symptoms, causes, and treatments.
extraExampleTranslations: Psixo-ta’lim tushunchani oshirish orqali stigmani kamaytiradi.
Maktablar ba’zida o‘quvchilar va ota-onalar uchun psixo-ta’lim beradi.
Psixo-ta’lim alomatlarni boshqarish uchun amaliy ko‘nikmalarni o‘rgatadi.
Onlayn resurslar psixo-ta’limni yanada qulay qiladi.
Psixo-ta’lim odamlarga tiklanish jarayonida faol ishtirok etish imkonini beradi.
Oila psixo-ta’limi davolash natijalarini yaxshilaydi.
Psixo-ta’lim alomatlar, sabablar va davolash usullari haqida ma’lumot beradi.

words.definition: The ability to understand, use, and manage one’s own emotions in positive ways.
words.definitionUz: Hissiy intellekt — o‘z his-tuyg‘ularini tushunish, ulardan foydalanish va ijobiy tarzda boshqarish qobiliyatidir.
words.example1: High emotional intelligence helps in building strong relationships.
words.example1Translation: Yuqori hissiy intellekt kuchli munosabatlarni o‘rnatishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Emotional intelligence is as important as academic intelligence in the workplace.
words.example2Translation: Hissiy intellekt ish joyida akademik intellekt kabi muhimdir.
words.example3: Schools are increasingly teaching emotional intelligence to students.
words.example3Translation: Maktablar o‘quvchilarga tobora ko‘proq hissiy intellektni o‘rgatmoqda.
extraExamples: Emotional intelligence includes self-awareness and empathy.
Leaders with high emotional intelligence motivate their teams better.
Emotional intelligence can be developed through practice.
Good emotional intelligence helps in resolving conflicts.
Parents can help children develop emotional intelligence from a young age.
Emotional intelligence improves mental well-being and success.
Many companies test emotional intelligence during hiring.
extraExampleTranslations: Hissiy intellekt o‘zini anglash va hamdardlikni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Yuqori hissiy intellektga ega rahbarlar jamoalarini yaxshiroq ilhomlantiradi.
Hissiy intellektni mashq qilish orqali rivojlantirish mumkin.
Yaxshi hissiy intellekt mojarolarni hal qilishga yordam beradi.
Ota-onalar bolalarga yoshligidan hissiy intellektni rivojlantirishga yordam berishlari mumkin.
Hissiy intellekt ruhiy salomatlik va muvaffaqiyatni yaxshilaydi.
Ko‘p kompaniyalar ishga olish jarayonida hissiy intellektni tekshiradi.

words.definition: Relating to physical symptoms that are caused or worsened by mental factors such as stress.
words.definitionUz: Psixosomatik — stress kabi ruhiy omillar tufayli yuzaga keladigan yoki kuchayadigan jismoniy alomatlarga oid.
words.example1: Her headaches were psychosomatic and linked to work stress.
words.example1Translation: Uning bosh og‘rig‘i psixosomatik bo‘lib, ish stressi bilan bog‘liq edi.
words.example2: Psychosomatic symptoms often improve when stress is reduced.
words.example2Translation: Psixosomatik alomatlar stress kamayganda ko‘pincha yaxshilanadi.
words.example3: Doctors sometimes need to address both physical and psychosomatic causes.
words.example3Translation: Shifokorlar ba’zan ham jismoniy, ham psixosomatik sabablarni hal qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Psychosomatic disorders show how mind and body are connected.
Stress can cause psychosomatic chest pain.
Understanding psychosomatic symptoms helps in effective treatment.
Psychosomatic effects are real and should be taken seriously.
Relaxation techniques can help relieve psychosomatic symptoms.
Many chronic conditions have a psychosomatic component.
Psychosomatic medicine studies the interaction between mind and body.
extraExampleTranslations: Psixosomatik buzilishlar ong va tananing qanday bog‘langanligini ko‘rsatadi.
Stress psixosomatik ko‘krak og‘rig‘iga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Psixosomatik alomatlarni tushunish samarali davolashga yordam beradi.
Psixosomatik ta’sirlar haqiqiy va jiddiy qabul qilinishi kerak.
Dam olish usullari psixosomatik alomatlarni yengillashtirishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p surunkali kasalliklarda psixosomatik omil mavjud.
Psixosomatik tibbiyot ong va tana o‘rtasidagi o‘zaro ta’sirni o‘rganadi.

words.definition: The quality of being fair, respectful, and gracious toward opponents, teammates, and officials during a sports competition.
words.definitionUz: Sport musobaqasida raqiblarga, jamoa a'zolariga va hakkamlarga nisbatan adolatli, hurmatli va munosib muomala qilish fazilati.
words.example1: Shaking hands with your opponent after a match is a sign of good sportsmanship.
words.example1Translation: O'yindan keyin raqib bilan qo'l berishib ko'rishish yaxshi sport odibining belgisi.
words.example2: The coach emphasized sportsmanship as much as winning during every training session.
words.example2Translation: Murabbiy har bir mashg'ulotda g'alaba qozonish kabi sport odibini ham ta'kidladi.
words.example3: The player was praised for his sportsmanship after helping an injured opponent off the field.
words.example3Translation: O'yinchi jarohat olgan raqibga maydondan chiqishga yordam bergani uchun sport odobi namunasi sifatida maqtaldi.
extraExamples: True sportsmanship means accepting defeat gracefully and congratulating the winner.
Poor sportsmanship, such as arguing with referees, can result in penalties.
Sportsmanship teaches children values that go beyond the playing field.
The crowd applauded the athlete for her remarkable sportsmanship.
Sportsmanship is considered one of the most important values in the Olympic Games.
A team known for good sportsmanship earns respect even when they lose.
Teaching sportsmanship early helps young players develop character and integrity.
extraExampleTranslations: Haqiqiy sport odobi mag'lubiyatni munosib qabul qilish va g'olibni tabriqlashni anglatadi.
Hakamlar bilan bahslashish kabi yomon sport odobi jazolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Sport odobi bolalarga maydondan tashqarida ham muhim bo'lgan qadriyatlarni o'rgatadi.
Tomoshabinlar sportchining ajoyib sport odibiga qoyil qolib qarsak chalishdi.
Sport odobi Olimpiya o'yinlarida eng muhim qadriyatlardan biri hisoblanadi.
Yaxshi sport odobi bilan tanilgan jamoa mag'lub bo'lsa ham hurmat qozonadi.
Sport odibini erta o'rgatish yosh o'yinchilarning xarakter va halollik rivojlanishiga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Exceptional physical skill, ability, and talent displayed in sports or athletic activities.
words.definitionUz: Sport yoki jismoniy faoliyatda namoyon bo'ladigan g'ayritabiiy mahorat, qobiliyat va iste'dod.
words.example1: Her athletic prowess was evident from the moment she stepped onto the track.
words.example1Translation: Uning sportchilik mahorati trenga qadam qo'ygan daqiqasidanoq ko'rinib turardi.
words.example2: His athletic prowess earned him a scholarship to one of the top universities.
words.example2Translation: Uning sportchilik mahorati unga eng yaxshi universitetlardan birida stipendiya qozonib berdi.
words.example3: Athletic prowess alone is not enough; mental toughness is equally important.
words.example3Translation: Sportchilik mahoratining o'zi yetarli emas; ruhiy bardoshlilik ham xuddi shunday muhim.
extraExamples: The young gymnast showed remarkable athletic prowess at just twelve years old.
Athletic prowess can be developed through years of dedicated training.
Scouts traveled across the country to find players with exceptional athletic prowess.
His athletic prowess made him one of the most feared competitors in the league.
Athletic prowess must be supported by proper nutrition and recovery.
She combined athletic prowess with strategic thinking to dominate her opponents.
Many fans admire athletic prowess, but coaches also value discipline and teamwork.
extraExampleTranslations: Yosh gimnastka atigi o'n ikki yoshida ajoyib sportchilik mahoratini ko'rsatdi.
Sportchilik mahorati yillar davomida bag'ishlangan mashg'ulotlar orqali rivojlantirilishi mumkin.
Kuzatuvchilar g'ayrioddiy sportchilik mahoratiga ega o'yinchilarni topish uchun mamlakat bo'ylab sayohat qildi.
Uning sportchilik mahorati uni ligadagi eng xavfli raqobatchilardan biriga aylantirdi.
Sportchilik mahoratin to'g'ri oziqlanish va tiklanish bilan qo'llab-quvvatlash kerak.
U raqiblarini yengish uchun sportchilik mahoratini strategik fikrlash bilan uyg'unlashtirdi.
Ko'p muxlislar sportchilik mahoratiga qoyil qolsa ham, murabbiylar intizom va jamoaviy ishni ham qadrlaidi.

words.definition: The degree to which team members are bonded together, trust each other, and work collectively toward shared goals.
words.definitionUz: Jamoa a'zolarining bir-biriga ishonishi, umumiy maqsad sari birgalikda harakat qilishi va bir butun bo'lib ishlash darajasi.
words.example1: Strong team cohesion helped them win matches even when individual players were underperforming.
words.example1Translation: Kuchli jamoa birligi ularga individual o'yinchilar yaxshi ko'rsatmayotganda ham o'yinlarni yutishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: The team's coach organized bonding activities to improve team cohesion.
words.example2Translation: Jamoaning murabbiyi jamoa birligini yaxshilash uchun birlashish tadbirlarini tashkil qildi.
words.example3: Team cohesion is often what separates good teams from great teams.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa birligi ko'pincha yaxshi jamoalarni ajoyib jamoalardan ajratib turadigan narsadir.
extraExamples: Team cohesion develops over time through shared experiences and trust.
A new player can disrupt team cohesion if not properly integrated.
Research shows that high team cohesion leads to better athletic performance.
Conflicts between players can seriously damage team cohesion.
Team cohesion is just as important in individual sports like relay racing.
The coach spent the pre-season building team cohesion through communication exercises.
Teams with strong cohesion perform better under pressure in high-stakes matches.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa birligi umumiy tajribalar va ishonch orqali vaqt o'tishi bilan rivojlanadi.
Yangi o'yinchi to'g'ri moslashtirilmasa jamoa birligini buzishi mumkin.
Tadqiqotlar yuqori jamoa birligining yaxshiroq sportchilik natijalariga olib kelishini ko'rsatadi.
O'yinchilar o'rtasidagi nizolar jamoa birligiga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Jamoa birligi estafeta yugurishga o'xshash individual sporlarda ham xuddi shuncha muhim.
Murabbiy mavsumdan oldingi davrni muloqot mashqlari orqali jamoa birligini mustahkamlashga sarfladi.
Kuchli hamjihatlikka ega jamoalar muhim o'yinlarda bosim ostida yaxshiroq ko'rsatadi.

words.definition: The use of banned performance-enhancing substances or methods by athletes to gain an unfair competitive advantage.
words.definitionUz: Sportchilarning adolatsiz ustunlik qozonish uchun taqiqlangan dorilar yoki usullardan foydalanishi.
words.example1: The cyclist was stripped of his medals after testing positive for doping.
words.example1Translation: Velosipedchi dopping uchun ijobiy natija bergandan so'ng medallaridan mahrum qilindi.
words.example2: Anti-doping agencies test athletes regularly to ensure fair competition.
words.example2Translation: Dopping qarshi tashkilotlar adolatli raqobatni ta'minlash uchun sportchilarni muntazam ravishda tekshiradi.
words.example3: Doping scandals have damaged the reputation of many professional sports.
words.example3Translation: Dopping janjanllari ko'plab professional sportlarning obro'siga zarar yetkazdi.
extraExamples: Doping gives athletes an unfair advantage over those who compete cleanly.
The consequences of doping include bans, stripped titles, and public shame.
Some athletes claim they were given substances without knowing they were banned.
Advances in testing technology have made it harder to hide doping.
Doping not only breaks the rules but also poses serious health risks.
Young athletes are sometimes pressured by coaches or teams to use doping.
The fight against doping in sport requires international cooperation.
extraExampleTranslations: Dopping sportchilarga toza musobaqa qilayotganlar ustidan adolatsiz ustunlik beradi.
Doppingning oqibatlari taqiqlar, unvonlarni yo'qotish va jamoat uyatini o'z ichiga oladi.
Ba'zi sportchilar ularga taqiqlangan ekanligini bilmasdan moddalar berilganini da'vo qilishadi.
Test texnologiyasining rivojlanishi doppingni yashirishni qiyinlashtirdi.
Dopping nafaqat qoidalarni buzadi, balki jiddiy sog'liq xavflarini ham keltirib chiqaradi.
Yosh sportchilar ba'zan murabbiylar yoki jamoalar tomonidan dopping ishlatishga majburlanadi.
Sportda dopping bilan kurash xalqaro hamkorlikni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A specific quality, skill, or advantage that allows a competitor or team to outperform others in a contest.
words.definitionUz: Musobaqada raqobatchiga yoki jamoaga boshqalardan ustun bo'lish imkonini beruvchi maxsus sifat, ko'nikma yoki imtiyoz.
words.example1: Advanced sports technology gives some teams a competitive edge over their rivals.
words.example1Translation: Ilg'or sport texnologiyasi ba'zi jamoalarga raqiblari ustidan raqobat ustunligini beradi.
words.example2: Her speed and agility gave her a clear competitive edge in sprint events.
words.example2Translation: Uning tezligi va chaqqonligi unga sprint musobaqalarida aniq raqobat ustunligini berdi.
words.example3: Years of experience can be a significant competitive edge in high-pressure competitions.
words.example3Translation: Yillar davomida orttirgan tajriba yuqori bosimli musobaqalarda muhim raqobat ustunligi bo'lishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Mental toughness is often a sportsperson's greatest competitive edge.
Access to better coaching and facilities can provide a competitive edge.
Teams look for any legal competitive edge they can find before a major tournament.
Data analysis is increasingly used to identify a competitive edge in modern sports.
A competitive edge can come from something as simple as superior teamwork.
She worked on her weaknesses to sharpen her competitive edge.
Even a small competitive edge can make the difference between winning and losing.
extraExampleTranslations: Ruhiy bardoshlilik ko'pincha sportchining eng katta raqobat ustunligidir.
Yaxshiroq murabbiylik va inshootlarga kirish raqobat ustunligini ta'minlashi mumkin.
Jamoalar yirik turnirdan oldin topa oladigan har qanday qonuniy raqobat ustunligini izlaydi.
Ma'lumotlar tahlili zamonaviy sportda raqobat ustunligini aniqlash uchun tobora ko'proq ishlatilmoqda.
Raqobat ustunligi yuqori darajadagi jamoaviy ish kabi oddiy narsadan kelib chiqishi mumkin.
U raqobat ustunligini o'tkir qilish uchun zaif tomonlari ustida ishladi.
Hatto kichik raqobat ustunligi ham g'alaba va mag'lubiyat o'rtasidagi farqni keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.

words.definition: Sports participation at the local, amateur, or community level, typically involving children or non-professional players.
words.definitionUz: Mahalliy, havaskorlik yoki jamoat darajasida sport bilan shug'ullanish — odatda bolalar yoki professional bo'lmagan o'yinchilarni qamrab oladi.
words.example1: Grassroots sports programs give children the opportunity to stay active and learn teamwork.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy sport dasturlari bolalarga faol bo'lish va jamoaviy ishni o'rganish imkoniyatini beradi.
words.example2: Many professional athletes got their start through grassroots sports clubs in their neighborhood.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab professional sportchilar o'z mahallasidagi grassroots sport klublar orqali boshlaganlar.
words.example3: Investing in grassroots sports is essential for building a strong sporting culture.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy sportga sarmoya kiritish kuchli sport madaniyatini shakllantirish uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Grassroots sports help children develop physical fitness and social skills from an early age.
Without funding, many grassroots sports clubs struggle to survive.
The national federation launched a campaign to promote grassroots sports across the country.
Grassroots sports make physical activity accessible to people of all backgrounds.
Volunteers play a huge role in keeping grassroots sports running.
A strong grassroots sports system is the foundation of any successful national team.
Grassroots sports events bring local communities together and build lasting bonds.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahalliy sport bolalarga yoshligidan jismoniy chiniqish va ijtimoiy ko'nikmalarni rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
Moliyasiz ko'plab mahalliy sport klublari omon qolishga qiynaladi.
Milliy federatsiya butun mamlakat bo'ylab mahalliy sportni targ'ib qilish uchun kampaniya boshladi.
Mahalliy sport jismoniy faollikni barcha tabaqa odamlariga ochiq qiladi.
Ko'ngillilar mahalliy sportni davom ettirishda katta rol o'ynaydi.
Kuchli mahalliy sport tizimi har qanday muvaffaqiyatli milliy jamoaning asosi.
Mahalliy sport tadbirlari mahalliy jamoalarni birlashtiradi va uzoq muddatli aloqalar o'rnatadi.

words.definition: The ability to sustain prolonged physical or mental effort over a long period of time.
words.definitionUz: Uzoq vaqt davomida jismoniy yoki ruhiy zo'riqishni davom ettira olish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Marathon runners need incredible endurance to complete a 42-kilometer race.
words.example1Translation: Marafon yuguruvchilari 42 kilometrlik poyga bosib o'tish uchun ajoyib chidamlilikka muhtoj.
words.example2: She trained hard all winter to build the endurance she needed for the championship.
words.example2Translation: U chempionat uchun zarur chidamlilikni shakllantirish uchun butun qish davomida qattiq mashq qildi.
words.example3: Endurance is not just physical; athletes must also have the mental strength to keep going.
words.example3Translation: Chidamlilik faqat jismoniy emas; sportchilar davom etish uchun ruhiy kuchga ham ega bo'lishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Building endurance takes months of consistent training and discipline.
Endurance sports like cycling and swimming test the limits of the human body.
The team's endurance in the final minutes of the game secured their victory.
Proper hydration and nutrition are key to maintaining endurance during competition.
His endurance allowed him to outlast stronger but less fit opponents.
Mental endurance is as important as physical endurance in long competitions.
Endurance training improves heart health and overall fitness levels.
extraExampleTranslations: Chidamlilikni shakllantirish izchil mashg'ulotlar va intizomning oylarini talab qiladi.
Velosiped va suzish kabi chidamlilik sporlari inson tanasining chegaralarini sinab ko'radi.
O'yinning so'nggi daqiqalarida jamoaning chidamliligi g'alabalarini ta'minladi.
To'g'ri gidratatsiya va oziqlanish musobaqa davomida chidamlilikni saqlash uchun muhim.
Uning chidamliligi kuchliroq lekin kamroq sport qiladigan raqiblardan ustun turish imkonini berdi.
Ruhiy chidamlilik uzoq musobaqalarda jismoniy chidamlilik kabi muhim.
Chidamlilik mashg'ulotlari yurak salomatligi va umumiy jismoniy holatni yaxshilaydi.

words.definition: The process of managing or developing something, such as sport, primarily to generate profit rather than for its original social or recreational purpose.
words.definitionUz: Sport kabi narsalarni asl ijtimoiy yoki dam olish maqsadidan ko'ra asosan foyda olish uchun boshqarish yoki rivojlantirish jarayoni.
words.example1: The commercialisation of football has turned it into a multi-billion dollar industry.
words.example1Translation: Futbolning tijoratizatsiyasi uni milliard dollarlik sanoatga aylantirdi.
words.example2: Critics argue that the commercialisation of sport has put money above the spirit of competition.
words.example2Translation: Tanqidchilar sportning tijoratizatsiyasi pulni musobaqa ruhidan ustun qo'yganini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3: The commercialisation of the Olympics has brought in massive sponsorship deals.
words.example3Translation: Olimpiadaning tijoratizatsiyasi katta homiylik bitimlarini olib keldi.
extraExamples: Commercialisation has made sports stars into global celebrities and brand ambassadors.
Some fans feel that commercialisation has ruined the authenticity of their favourite sport.
Commercialisation has brought more resources to sport but also more pressure on players.
Ticket prices have risen sharply as a result of the commercialisation of top-level sport.
Grassroots sport has benefited little from the commercialisation of professional leagues.
The commercialisation of youth sports puts unhealthy pressure on young athletes.
Despite commercialisation, many athletes say they still play for the love of the game.
extraExampleTranslations: Tijoratlashtirish sport yulduzlarini global mashhurlar va brend elchilariga aylantirdi.
Ba'zi muxlislar tijoratlashtirish sevimli sportlarining haqiqiyligini yo'q qilganini his qiladi.
Tijoratlashtirish sportga ko'proq resurslar olib keldi, lekin o'yinchilar ustidan ham ko'proq bosim.
Chipta narxlari yuqori darajali sportning tijoratizatsiyasi natijasida keskin oshdi.
Mahalliy sport professional ligalarning tijoratizatsiyasidan kam foyda ko'rdi.
Yoshlar sportining tijoratizatsiyasi yosh sportchilar ustiga nomaqbul bosim o'tkazadi.
Tijoratizatsiyaga qaramay, ko'plab sportchilar o'yinni sevganlari uchun hali ham o'ynashlarini aytadilar.

words.definition: A highly trained sportsperson who competes at the highest professional or international level in their sport.
words.definitionUz: O'z sportida eng yuqori professional yoki xalqaro darajada musobaqa qiladigan yuqori darajada tayyorlangan sportchi.
words.example1: Elite athletes dedicate years of their lives to training, recovery, and perfecting their performance.
words.example1Translation: Elit sportchilar hayotlarining yillarini mashg'ulot, tiklnish va natijalarini mukammallashtirish uchun bag'ishlaydi.
words.example2: Being an elite athlete requires not just talent but extraordinary levels of discipline.
words.example2Translation: Elit sportchi bo'lish nafaqat iste'dod, balki g'ayrioddiy intizom darajasini ham talab qiladi.
words.example3: The government provides financial support to elite athletes preparing for the Olympic Games.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat Olimpiya o'yinlariga tayyorlanayotgan elit sportchilarga moliyaviy qo'llab-quvvatlash ko'rsatadi.
extraExamples: Elite athletes often work with nutritionists, physiotherapists, and sports psychologists.
The pressure on elite athletes to perform consistently at the highest level is immense.
Many elite athletes retire early due to injuries sustained during their career.
Elite athletes serve as role models for young people aspiring to reach the top.
The lifestyle of an elite athlete involves strict routines and many personal sacrifices.
Sponsorships allow elite athletes to focus fully on their sport without financial concerns.
Not every talented athlete has the opportunity to become an elite athlete due to limited resources.
extraExampleTranslations: Elit sportchilar ko'pincha dietologlar, fizioterapevtlar va sport psixologlari bilan ishlaydi.
Elit sportchilarga yuqori darajada izchil ko'rsatish bosimi juda katta.
Ko'plab elit sportchilar martabalari davomida olgan jarohatlar tufayli erta nafaqaga chiqadi.
Elit sportchilar tepaga intilayotgan yosh odamlar uchun namuna bo'lib xizmat qiladi.
Elit sportchining hayoti qat'iy tartiblar va ko'plab shaxsiy qurbonliklarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Homiyliklar elit sportchilarga moliyaviy tashvishsiz sportiga to'liq e'tibor qaratish imkonini beradi.
Har bir iste'dodli sportchi cheklangan resurslar tufayli elit sportchi bo'lish imkoniyatiga ega emas.

words.definition: The equal representation, treatment, and opportunity for men and women in sports, including equal pay, media coverage, and access to facilities.
words.definitionUz: Erkaklar va ayollarning sportda teng vakillik qilinishi, teng muomala ko'rishi va teng imkoniyatlarga ega bo'lishi — shu jumladan teng haq, media e'tibori va inshootlarga kirish.
words.example1: Gender parity in sport means ensuring women receive the same opportunities as men.
words.example1Translation: Sportda jinsiy tenglik ayollar erkaklar bilan bir xil imkoniyatlarni olishini ta'minlashni anglatadi.
words.example2: The gap in prize money between men and women players is still a major gender parity issue.
words.example2Translation: Erkaklar va ayollar o'yinchilari o'rtasidagi mukofot puli farqi hali ham katta jinsiy tenglik muammosi.
words.example3: Progress toward gender parity in sport has been slow but continues to improve.
words.example3Translation: Sportda jinsiy tenglikka erishish sekin amalga oshdi, lekin yaxshilanishda davom etmoqda.
extraExamples: Gender parity requires equal media coverage for women's sports events.
Many countries have passed laws to promote gender parity in sport.
The 2024 Olympics achieved gender parity in the number of male and female athletes.
Lack of funding is one of the biggest barriers to achieving gender parity in sport.
Gender parity in coaching and leadership roles is still far from being achieved.
Female athletes continue to advocate for greater gender parity in prize money.
Schools play a key role in promoting gender parity by offering equal sporting opportunities to all students.
extraExampleTranslations: Jinsiy tenglik ayollar sport tadbirlari uchun teng media yoritishni talab qiladi.
Ko'plab mamlakatlar sportda jinsiy tenglikni rag'batlantirish uchun qonunlar qabul qildi.
2024 Olimpiyadasi erkak va ayol sportchilar sonida jinsiy tenglikka erishdi.
Moliyalashtirish etishmasligi sportda jinsiy tenglikka erishishning eng katta to'siqllaridan biri.
Murabbiylik va rahbarlik rollarida jinsiy tenglik hali ham amalga oshirishdan uzoqda.
Ayol sportchilar mukofot pulida ko'proq jinsiy tenglik uchun himoya qilishda davom etmoqda.
Maktablar barcha o'quvchilarga teng sport imkoniyatlarini taqdim etish orqali jinsiy tenglikni rag'batlantirishda asosiy rol o'ynaydi.

words.definition: A feeling of pride, loyalty, and emotional connection to one's country, often intensified by success in international sports events.
words.definitionUz: Xalqaro sport musobaqalarida g'alaba qozonish orqali ko'pincha kuchayib boradigan, o'z mamlakatiga bo'lgan faxr va sadoqat hissi.
words.example1: Winning the World Cup filled the entire country with national pride.
words.example1Translation: Jahon Kubogini qozonish butun mamlakatni milliy g'urur bilan to'ldirdi.
words.example2: International sporting events are one of the most powerful ways to evoke national pride.
words.example2Translation: Xalqaro sport musobaqalari milliy g'ururni uyg'otishning eng kuchli usullaridan biri.
words.example3: The athlete's gold medal sparked an outpouring of national pride across the country.
words.example3Translation: Sportchining oltin medali butun mamlakat bo'ylab milliy g'ururning portlashiga sabab bo'ldi.
extraExamples: National pride can unite people from different backgrounds around a common goal.
Hosting a major sporting event often boosts national pride among citizens.
Athletes feel a deep responsibility to represent their country with national pride.
National pride can sometimes tip into rivalry or conflict between nations.
The national anthem is played at sporting events to celebrate national pride.
A shock defeat can dampen national pride just as quickly as a victory lifts it.
National pride in sport motivates governments to invest more in athletic programs.
extraExampleTranslations: Milliy g'urur turli tabaqa odamlarini umumiy maqsad atrofida birlashtirishi mumkin.
Yirik sport tadbirini o'tkazish ko'pincha fuqarolar orasida milliy g'ururni oshiradi.
Sportchilar o'z mamlakatlarini milliy g'urur bilan ifodalash uchun chuqur mas'uliyat his qiladi.
Milliy g'urur ba'zan millatlar o'rtasidagi raqobat yoki mojaroga aylanishi mumkin.
Milliy g'ururni nishonlash uchun sport tadbirlarida milliy madhiya ijro etiladi.
Kutilmagan mag'lubiyat milliy g'ururni g'alaba ko'targanidek tez pasaytirishi mumkin.
Sportdagi milliy g'urur hukumatlarni sport dasturlariga ko'proq sarmoya kiritishga undaydi.

words.definition: A way of living that involves very little physical activity, often characterized by sitting for long hours at work, watching screens, and avoiding exercise.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p vaqtni o'tirib o'tkazish, ekran ko'rish va jismoniy mashqlardan qochish bilan xarakterlanadigan jismoniy faollik deyarli bo'lmagan hayot tarzi.
words.example1: A sedentary lifestyle increases the risk of heart disease and obesity.
words.example1Translation: Harakatsiz hayot tarzi yurak kasalligi va semirish xavfini oshiradi.
words.example2: Many office workers struggle to avoid a sedentary lifestyle due to long hours at a desk.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab ofis xodimlari stolda ko'p vaqt o'tkazish tufayli harakatsiz hayot tarzidan qochishga qiynaladi.
words.example3: Health experts recommend breaking up a sedentary lifestyle with short activity breaks throughout the day.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liqni saqlash mutaxassislari harakatsiz hayot tarzini kun davomida qisqa faollik tanaffuslari bilan buzishni tavsiya qiladi.
extraExamples: Children are increasingly adopting a sedentary lifestyle due to screen time and online gaming.
A sedentary lifestyle has been linked to depression and poor mental health.
Even light physical activity can significantly offset the effects of a sedentary lifestyle.
Urban environments can unintentionally encourage a sedentary lifestyle through car dependency.
Regular walking is one of the simplest ways to break a sedentary lifestyle.
A sedentary lifestyle combined with poor diet greatly increases health risks.
Employers are introducing standing desks to help workers avoid a sedentary lifestyle.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar ekran vaqti va onlayn o'yinlar tufayli tobora harakatsiz hayot tarzini qabul qilmoqda.
Harakatsiz hayot tarzi depressiya va yomon ruhiy salomatlik bilan bog'liq.
Hatto engil jismoniy faollik ham harakatsiz hayot tarzining ta'sirini sezilarli darajada qoplashi mumkin.
Shahar muhiti avtomobilga qaramlik orqali bilmasdan harakatsiz hayot tarzini rag'batlantirishi mumkin.
Muntazam yurish harakatsiz hayot tarzini buzishning eng oddiy usullaridan biri.
Harakatsiz hayot tarzi va yomon ovqatlanishning kombinatsiyasi sog'liq xavflarini katta oshiradi.
Ish beruvchilar xodimlarning harakatsiz hayot tarzidan qochishiga yordam berish uchun tik turish stollarini joriy etmoqda.

words.definition: The ability, confidence, and motivation to be physically active across a wide range of activities and environments throughout one's life.
words.definitionUz: Hayot davomida turli jismoniy faoliyatlarda qatnashish uchun ko'nikma, ishonch va istakning mavjudligi.
words.example1: Developing physical literacy in early childhood sets the foundation for an active life.
words.example1Translation: Bolalikda jismoniy savodxonlikni rivojlantirish faol hayot uchun poydevor qo'yadi.
words.example2: Physical literacy goes beyond sport — it includes basic movement skills like balance and coordination.
words.example2Translation: Jismoniy savodxonlik sportdan tashqariga chiqadi — u muvozanat va muvofiqlashuvni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: Schools play a vital role in building physical literacy through quality physical education programs.
words.example3Translation: Maktablar sifatli jismoniy tarbiya dasturlari orqali jismoniy savodxonlikni shakllantirishda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
extraExamples: Children with high physical literacy are more likely to stay active into adulthood.
Physical literacy is about finding joy in movement, not just athletic performance.
A lack of physical literacy can make people feel uncomfortable or embarrassed exercising.
Coaches and teachers can work together to develop physical literacy in young people.
Physical literacy helps individuals adapt to different sports and activities throughout life.
Investment in physical literacy programs reduces long-term healthcare costs.
Physical literacy gives people the tools to make healthy and active lifestyle choices.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori jismoniy savodxonlikka ega bolalar kattalikda ham faol bo'lib qolish ehtimoli ko'proq.
Jismoniy savodxonlik faqat sportchilik natijalari emas, harakatda quvonch topish haqida.
Jismoniy savodxonlikning etishmasligi odamlarni mashq qilishda noqulay yoki uyalingan his qilishi mumkin.
Murabbiylar va o'qituvchilar yosh odamlarda jismoniy savodxonlikni rivojlantirish uchun birgalikda ishlashi mumkin.
Jismoniy savodxonlik shaxslarga hayot davomida turli sport va faoliyatlarga moslashish imkonini beradi.
Jismoniy savodxonlik dasturlariga investitsiya uzoq muddatli sog'liqni saqlash xarajatlarini kamaytiradi.
Jismoniy savodxonlik odamlarga sog'lom va faol hayot tarzi tanlovlari qilish uchun vositalar beradi.

words.definition: The shared behaviors, rituals, traditions, and collective identity that sports fans develop around their team or sport.
words.definitionUz: Sport muxlislarining o'z jamoalari atrofida rivojlantiradigan umumiy xulq-atvor, udumlar, an'analar va jamoaviy kimlik.
words.example1: Fan culture creates a powerful sense of belonging and community among supporters.
words.example1Translation: Muxlislar madaniyati qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar orasida kuchli tegishlilik va jamoatchilik hissini yaratadi.
words.example2: Stadium chants and fan scarves are important parts of football fan culture.
words.example2Translation: Stadion qo'shiqlari va muxlislar sharpilari futbol muxlislar madaniyatining muhim qismlari.
words.example3: Fan culture has expanded online, with supporters connecting through forums and social media.
words.example3Translation: Muxlislar madaniyati onlaynda kengaydi, muxlislar forumlar va ijtimoiy tarmoqlar orqali ulanmoqda.
extraExamples: Fan culture can be a positive force that brings diverse people together.
Some aspects of fan culture, like hooliganism, can become dangerous and destructive.
Merchandise, shirts, and flags are all part of fan culture.
Social media has transformed fan culture by allowing fans to interact directly with athletes.
Fan culture often passes from parents to children across generations.
Clubs actively nurture fan culture to build loyalty and match-day atmosphere.
Fan culture can cross borders, with international supporters following their teams worldwide.
extraExampleTranslations: Muxlislar madaniyati turli odamlarni birlashtiruvchi ijobiy kuch bo'lishi mumkin.
Muxlislar madaniyatining ba'zi jihatlari, masalan xuliqonlik, xavfli va halokatli bo'lib ketishi mumkin.
Tovarlar, futbolkalar va bayroqlar muxlislar madaniyatining bir qismi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar muxlislarga sportchilar bilan bevosita muloqot qilish imkonini berish orqali muxlislar madaniyatini o'zgartirdi.
Muxlislar madaniyati ko'pincha avlodlar bo'ylab ota-onalardan bolalarga o'tib boradi.
Klublar sodiqlik va o'yin kuni muhitini yaratish uchun muxlislar madaniyatini faol ravishda tarbiyalaydi.
Muxlislar madaniyati chegaralarni kesib o'tishi mumkin, xalqaro muxlislar o'z jamoalarini dunyo bo'ylab kuzatib boradi.

words.translation: Natija ko'rsatish tashvishi / Sahnaga chiqish qo'rquvi
words.definition: Excessive nervousness, fear, or worry about performing poorly in a competitive or public situation, often affecting athletes before or during competition.
words.definitionUz: Musobaqa yoki jamoat oldida yomon ko'rsatish qo'rquvidan kelib chiqqan haddan tashqari asabiylik, qo'rquv yoki tashvish hissi — ko'pincha sportchilarda musobaqadan oldin yoki davomida kuzatiladi.
words.example1: Performance anxiety caused the young swimmer to freeze at the starting block.
words.example1Translation: Natija ko'rsatish tashvishi yosh suzuvchini start blokida qotib qolishiga sabab bo'ldi.
words.example2: Many elite athletes work with sports psychologists to manage performance anxiety.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab elit sportchilar natija ko'rsatish tashvishini boshqarish uchun sport psixologlari bilan ishlaydi.
words.example3: Performance anxiety can affect even the most experienced and talented athletes.
words.example3Translation: Natija ko'rsatish tashvishi hatto eng tajribali va iste'dodli sportchilarga ham ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Breathing exercises and visualization techniques can help reduce performance anxiety.
Performance anxiety is not a sign of weakness — it affects almost every competitor.
The pressure of a home crowd sometimes increases performance anxiety.
Performance anxiety before a big match can actually sharpen focus if managed well.
Young athletes are particularly vulnerable to performance anxiety in high-stakes events.
Coaches can help reduce performance anxiety by creating a supportive team environment.
Acknowledging performance anxiety rather than ignoring it is the first step toward overcoming it.
extraExampleTranslations: Nafas mashqlari va vizualizatsiya texnikasi natija ko'rsatish tashvishini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Natija ko'rsatish tashvishi zaiflik belgisi emas — u deyarli har bir raqobatchiga ta'sir qiladi.
Mahalliy jamoatchilik bosimi ba'zan natija ko'rsatish tashvishini oshiradi.
Yirik o'yin oldidan natija ko'rsatish tashvishi yaxshi boshqarilsa e'tiborni o'tkir qilishi mumkin.
Yosh sportchilar muhim tadbirlarda natija ko'rsatish tashvishiga ayniqsa moyil.
Murabbiylar qo'llab-quvvatlash jamoasi muhitini yaratish orqali natija ko'rsatish tashvishini kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Natija ko'rsatish tashvishini e'tiborsiz qoldirish o'rniga tan olish uni yengishning birinchi qadami.

words.definition: A species facing a rapid decrease in population or loss of habitat, putting it at risk of extinction.
words.definitionUz: Yo‘qolib borayotgan turlar – soni tez kamayib borayotgan yoki yashash joyini yo‘qotayotgan, yo‘q bo‘lib ketish xavfi ostidagi hayvon yoki o‘simlik turlari.
words.example1: The giant panda is one of the most well-known endangered species.
words.example1Translation: Dev panda eng mashhur yo‘qolib borayotgan turlardan biri.
words.example2: Governments are creating laws to protect endangered species.
words.example2Translation: Hukumatlar yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarni himoya qilish uchun qonunlar chiqarmoqda.
words.example3: Climate change is pushing many species toward becoming endangered.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi ko‘plab turlarni yo‘qolib borayotgan holatga olib kelmoqda.
extraExamples: Habitat loss is the main reason many animals become endangered species.
Conservation organizations work hard to save endangered species.
The list of endangered species is updated regularly.
Breeding programs help increase the numbers of endangered species.
Tourism can both help and harm endangered species.
Raising awareness is key to protecting endangered species.
Some endangered species have successfully recovered thanks to conservation.
extraExampleTranslations: Yashash joyining yo‘qolishi ko‘plab hayvonlarning yo‘qolib borayotgan turga aylanishining asosiy sababi.
Muhofaza tashkilotlari yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarni saqlab qolish uchun ko‘p mehnat qiladi.
Yo‘qolib borayotgan turlar ro‘yxati muntazam yangilanadi.
Ko‘paytirish dasturlari yo‘qolib borayotgan turlar sonini oshirishga yordam beradi.
Turizm yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarga ham yordam, ham zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Jamoatchilik ongini oshirish yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarni himoya qilishning kaliti.
Ba’zi yo‘qolib borayotgan turlar muhofaza choralari tufayli tiklanishga muvaffaq bo‘ldi.

words.definition: The decline in the variety of plant and animal life in a particular habitat or on Earth as a whole.
words.definitionUz: Biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi – muayyan hudud yoki butun sayyorada o‘simlik va hayvon turlarining xilma-xilligi kamayishi.
words.example1: Biodiversity loss threatens the balance of entire ecosystems.
words.example1Translation: Biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi butun ekotizimlar muvozanatini buzadi.
words.example2: Deforestation is a major cause of biodiversity loss.
words.example2Translation: O‘rmonlarni kesish biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishining asosiy sabablaridan biri.
words.example3: Scientists warn that biodiversity loss is happening faster than ever.
words.example3Translation: Olimlar biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi har qachongidan ham tezroq sodir bo‘layotganini ogohlantirmoqda.
extraExamples: Biodiversity loss affects food security and human health.
Protecting rainforests is crucial to slowing biodiversity loss.
Biodiversity loss can lead to the collapse of ecosystems.
Governments are making plans to reduce biodiversity loss.
Education helps people understand the importance of preventing biodiversity loss.
Climate change accelerates biodiversity loss.
International agreements aim to stop biodiversity loss.
extraExampleTranslations: Biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi va inson salomatligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Yomg‘irli o‘rmonlarni himoya qilish biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishini sekinlashtirish uchun juda muhim.
Biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi ekotizimlarning qulashiga olib kelishi mumkin.
Hukumatlar biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishini kamaytirish bo‘yicha rejalarni ishlab chiqmoqda.
Ta’lim odamlarga biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishiga yo‘l qo‘ymaslik muhimligini tushunishga yordam beradi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishini tezlashtiradi.
Xalqaro kelishuvlar biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishini to‘xtatishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: The process by which natural habitats are damaged or destroyed, making them unable to support the species that live there.
words.definitionUz: Yashash joyining vayron bo‘lishi – tabiiy yashash muhitining shikastlanishi yoki yo‘q qilinishi natijasida u yerda yashovchi turlarni saqlab qolish imkonsiz bo‘lib qolishi.
words.example1: Habitat destruction is the biggest threat to many endangered animals.
words.example1Translation: Yashash joyining vayron bo‘lishi ko‘plab yo‘qolib borayotgan hayvonlar uchun eng katta tahdid.
words.example2: Urban expansion often leads to habitat destruction.
words.example2Translation: Shaharlarning kengayishi ko‘pincha yashash joylarining vayron bo‘lishiga olib keladi.
words.example3: Reforestation projects help reverse habitat destruction.
words.example3Translation: O‘rmonlarni qayta tiklash loyihalari yashash joylarining vayron bo‘lishini teskari yo‘naltirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Mining and agriculture are major causes of habitat destruction.
Habitat destruction leads to loss of biodiversity.
Protecting habitats is more effective than rescuing individual animals.
Habitat destruction affects both animals and plants.
Laws are being passed to limit habitat destruction.
Indigenous communities often suffer from habitat destruction.
Habitat destruction contributes to climate change.
extraExampleTranslations: Konchilik va qishloq xo‘jaligi yashash joylarining vayron bo‘lishining asosiy sabablari.
Yashash joyining vayron bo‘lishi biologik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishiga olib keladi.
Yashash joylarini himoya qilish alohida hayvonlarni qutqarishdan samaraliroq.
Yashash joyining vayron bo‘lishi ham hayvonlar, ham o‘simliklarga ta’sir qiladi.
Yashash joylarining vayron bo‘lishini cheklash uchun qonunlar qabul qilinmoqda.
Mahalliy xalqlar ko‘pincha yashash joylarining vayron bo‘lishidan aziyat chekadi.
Yashash joyining vayron bo‘lishi iqlim o‘zgarishiga hissa qo‘shadi.

words.definition: The illegal hunting, capturing, or killing of wild animals, often for their body parts or for profit.
words.definitionUz: Brahinchi ov – yovvoyi hayvonlarni noqonuniy ovlash, qo‘lga olish yoki o‘ldirish, ko‘pincha ularning qismlari yoki daromad uchun.
words.example1: Poaching has drastically reduced the elephant population.
words.example1Translation: Brahinchi ov fil populyatsiyasini keskin kamaytirdi.
words.example2: Anti-poaching patrols help protect wildlife in national parks.
words.example2Translation: Brahinchilarga qarshi patrullar milliy bog‘larda yovvoyi hayvonlarni himoya qiladi.
words.example3: The government is cracking down on poaching with stricter penalties.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat qattiqroq jazolar bilan brahinchi ovga qarshi kurashmoqda.
extraExamples: Poaching is driven by demand for ivory, skins, and traditional medicine.
Poaching threatens the survival of many endangered species.
Local communities sometimes participate in poaching due to poverty.
Technology like camera traps is used to fight poaching.
International cooperation is needed to stop wildlife poaching.
Poaching can disrupt the balance of ecosystems.
Raising awareness is important to reduce poaching.
extraExampleTranslations: Brahinchi ov fil suyagi, teri va an’anaviy tibbiyot talabi tufayli kuchaymoqda.
Brahinchi ov ko‘plab yo‘qolib borayotgan turlar hayotini xavf ostiga qo‘yadi.
Mahalliy aholi ba’zan qashshoqlik sabab brahinchi ovga qo‘shiladi.
Kamera tuzoqlari kabi texnologiyalar brahinchi ovga qarshi kurashda ishlatiladi.
Brahinchi ovni to‘xtatish uchun xalqaro hamkorlik zarur.
Brahinchi ov ekotizimlar muvozanatini buzishi mumkin.
Jamoatchilik ongini oshirish brahinchi ovni kamaytirish uchun muhim.

words.definition: Actions taken to protect and preserve natural resources, wildlife, and ecosystems.
words.definitionUz: Muhofaza choralari – tabiiy boyliklar, yovvoyi hayvonlar va ekotizimlarni himoya qilish va saqlash uchun amalga oshiriladigan harakatlar.
words.example1: Conservation efforts have helped increase the number of tigers in the wild.
words.example1Translation: Muhofaza choralari yovvoyi tabiatdagi yo‘lbarslar sonini oshirishga yordam berdi.
words.example2: International conservation efforts are essential for protecting migratory species.
words.example2Translation: Xalqaro muhofaza choralari ko‘chib yuruvchi turlarni himoya qilish uchun zarur.
words.example3: Local communities play a vital role in successful conservation efforts.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy jamiyatlar muvaffaqiyatli muhofaza choralari uchun muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
extraExamples: Conservation efforts include creating protected areas.
Funding is often a challenge for conservation efforts.
Education is an important part of conservation efforts.
Many NGOs lead conservation efforts worldwide.
Conservation efforts must balance human needs with nature protection.
Modern technology supports conservation efforts.
Long-term conservation efforts show positive results.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhofaza choralari qo‘riqlanadigan hududlar yaratishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Moliyalashtirish muhofaza choralari uchun ko‘pincha qiyinchilik tug‘diradi.
Ta’lim muhofaza choralari muhim qismidir.
Ko‘plab nodavlat tashkilotlari dunyo bo‘ylab muhofaza choralarini boshqaradi.
Muhofaza choralari inson ehtiyojlari va tabiatni himoya qilish o‘rtasida muvozanatni saqlashi kerak.
Zamonaviy texnologiya muhofaza choralarini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Uzoq muddatli muhofaza choralari ijobiy natijalarni ko‘rsatmoqda.

words.definition: Breeding animals in controlled environments like zoos or breeding centers to help increase their population.
words.definitionUz: Qafasda ko‘paytirish – hayvonlarni hayvonot bog‘lari yoki maxsus markazlarda boshqariladigan sharoitda ko‘paytirish orqali ularning sonini oshirish usuli.
words.example1: Captive breeding programs have saved several species from extinction.
words.example1Translation: Qafasda ko‘paytirish dasturlari bir necha turni yo‘q bo‘lib ketishdan saqlab qoldi.
words.example2: Animals from captive breeding are sometimes reintroduced to the wild.
words.example2Translation: Qafasda ko‘paytirilgan hayvonlar ba’zan yovvoyi tabiatga qayta kiritiladi.
words.example3: Captive breeding requires careful genetic management.
words.example3Translation: Qafasda ko‘paytirish genetik jihatdan ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarilishi kerak.
extraExamples: Captive breeding is used for species that are difficult to breed in the wild.
Success in captive breeding depends on proper animal care.
Many zoos participate in captive breeding programs.
Captive breeding is one tool among many in conservation.
Releasing captive-bred animals needs careful planning.
Captive breeding helps maintain genetic diversity.
Public support is important for funding captive breeding.
extraExampleTranslations: Qafasda ko‘paytirish yovvoyi tabiatda ko‘payishi qiyin bo‘lgan turlar uchun ishlatiladi.
Qafasda ko‘paytirish muvaffaqiyati to‘g‘ri parvarishga bog‘liq.
Ko‘plab hayvonot bog‘lari qafasda ko‘paytirish dasturlarida ishtirok etadi.
Qafasda ko‘paytirish muhofazadagi ko‘plab vositalardan biri.
Qafasda ko‘paytirilgan hayvonlarni qo‘yib yuborish puxta rejalashtirishni talab qiladi.
Qafasda ko‘paytirish genetik xilma-xillikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
Jamoatchilik qo‘llab-quvvatlashi qafasda ko‘paytirishni moliyalashtirish uchun muhim.

words.definition: The illegal trade of wild animals and their parts, such as ivory, skins, and live animals.
words.definitionUz: Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosi – yovvoyi hayvonlar va ularning qismlari (fil suyagi, teri, tirik hayvonlar) noqonuniy savdosi.
words.example1: Wildlife trafficking is a multi-billion dollar illegal industry.
words.example1Translation: Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosi milliardlab dollarlik noqonuniy sanoat.
words.example2: Efforts to stop wildlife trafficking include stronger border controls.
words.example2Translation: Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosini to‘xtatish choralari chegara nazoratini kuchaytirishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: Wildlife trafficking threatens many endangered species.
words.example3Translation: Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosi ko‘plab yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarni xavf ostiga qo‘yadi.
extraExamples: Wildlife trafficking fuels poaching activities.
Social media is sometimes used to facilitate wildlife trafficking.
International laws aim to combat wildlife trafficking.
Raising public awareness helps reduce demand for wildlife trafficking.
Wildlife trafficking affects ecosystems and local economies.
Specialized police units fight wildlife trafficking.
The pangolin is one of the most trafficked animals in the world.
extraExampleTranslations: Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosi brahinchi ovni rag‘batlantiradi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar ba’zan yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosini osonlashtirish uchun ishlatiladi.
Xalqaro qonunlar yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosiga qarshi kurashni maqsad qilgan.
Jamoatchilik ongini oshirish yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosiga talabni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosi ekotizimlar va mahalliy iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qiladi.
Maxsus politsiya bo‘linmalari yovvoyi hayvonlar savdosiga qarshi kurashadi.
Pangolin dunyodagi eng ko‘p savdo qilinadigan hayvonlardan biri.

words.definition: A species that has a disproportionately large effect on its environment relative to its abundance.
words.definitionUz: Asosiy tur – o‘z soniga nisbatan atrof-muhitga juda katta ta’sir ko‘rsatadigan tur; uni olib tashlasa, ekotizim keskin o‘zgaradi.
words.example1: Bees are a keystone species because they pollinate many plants.
words.example1Translation: Asalarilar ko‘plab o‘simliklarni changlatgani uchun asosiy tur hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The loss of a keystone species can cause an ecosystem to collapse.
words.example2Translation: Asosiy turning yo‘qolishi ekotizimning qulashiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Sea otters are a keystone species in kelp forest ecosystems.
words.example3Translation: Dengiz suv sichqonlari suv o‘tlari o‘rmonlari ekotizimida asosiy turdir.
extraExamples: Keystone species help maintain the structure of an ecosystem.
Identifying keystone species is important for conservation planning.
Wolves are a keystone species in many North American forests.
Protecting keystone species benefits many other species.
The concept of keystone species was introduced by Robert Paine.
Human activities often threaten keystone species.
Restoring keystone species can help repair damaged ecosystems.
extraExampleTranslations: Asosiy turlar ekotizim tuzilishini saqlashga yordam beradi.
Asosiy turlarni aniqlash muhofaza rejalashtirish uchun muhim.
Bo‘rilar Shimoliy Amerika o‘rmonlarida ko‘pincha asosiy tur hisoblanadi.
Asosiy turlarni himoya qilish boshqa ko‘plab turlarga foyda keltiradi.
Asosiy tur tushunchasini Robert Peyn taklif qilgan.
Inson faoliyati ko‘pincha asosiy turlarga tahdid soladi.
Asosiy turlarni tiklash shikastlangan ekotizimlarni tiklashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The benefits that humans obtain from properly functioning ecosystems, such as clean water, pollination, and climate regulation.
words.definitionUz: Ekotizim xizmatlari – sog‘lom ishlayotgan ekotizimlardan insoniyat oladigan foydalar: toza suv, changlatish, iqlimni tartibga solish va boshqalar.
words.example1: Forests provide important ecosystem services like oxygen production.
words.example1Translation: O‘rmonlar kislorod ishlab chiqarish kabi muhim ekotizim xizmatlarini taqdim etadi.
words.example2: Understanding ecosystem services helps us value nature better.
words.example2Translation: Ekotizim xizmatlarini tushunish tabiatni yaxshiroq qadrlashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Damage to ecosystems reduces the services they provide to humans.
words.example3Translation: Ekotizimlarning shikastlanishi ular insonlarga ko‘rsatadigan xizmatlarni kamaytiradi.
extraExamples: Pollination is one of the most valuable ecosystem services.
Wetlands provide ecosystem services such as flood control.
Economic studies try to calculate the value of ecosystem services.
Conserving nature protects ecosystem services for future generations.
Human activities often disrupt ecosystem services.
Ecosystem services include cultural and recreational benefits.
Governments are increasingly recognizing ecosystem services in policy.
extraExampleTranslations: Changlatish eng qimmatli ekotizim xizmatlaridan biri.
Botqoqliklar suv toshqinlarini boshqarish kabi ekotizim xizmatlarini beradi.
Iqtisodiy tadqiqotlar ekotizim xizmatlarining qiymatini hisoblashga harakat qiladi.
Tabiatni saqlash kelajak avlodlar uchun ekotizim xizmatlarini himoya qiladi.
Inson faoliyati ko‘pincha ekotizim xizmatlarini buzadi.
Ekotizim xizmatlari madaniy va dam olish foydalarini ham o‘z ichiga oladi.
Hukumatlar siyosatda ekotizim xizmatlarini tobora ko‘proq tan olmoqda.

words.definition: Non-native species that spread rapidly and cause harm to the local ecosystem, economy, or human health.
words.definitionUz: Kirib kelgan turlar – o‘ziga xos bo‘lmagan hududga kirib, tez tarqalib, mahalliy ekotizim, iqtisodiyot yoki inson salomatligiga zarar yetkazadigan turlar.
words.example1: The introduction of invasive species can destroy local biodiversity.
words.example1Translation: Kirib kelgan turlarning paydo bo‘lishi mahalliy biologik xilma-xillikni yo‘q qilishi mumkin.
words.example2: Controlling invasive species is expensive and difficult.
words.example2Translation: Kirib kelgan turlarni nazorat qilish qimmat va qiyin ish.
words.example3: Many invasive species are brought in accidentally through trade.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab kirib kelgan turlar savdo orqali tasodifan olib kelinadi.
extraExamples: Invasive species often lack natural predators in new environments.
The zebra mussel is a famous invasive species in many lakes.
Early detection helps manage invasive species effectively.
Invasive species can alter entire habitats.
Laws regulate the import of potential invasive species.
Restoration projects sometimes include removing invasive species.
Climate change may help more invasive species spread.
extraExampleTranslations: Kirib kelgan turlar yangi muhitda ko‘pincha tabiiy dushmanlarga ega bo‘lmaydi.
Zebra midiya ko‘plab ko‘llardagi mashhur kirib kelgan tur.
Erta aniqlash kirib kelgan turlarni samarali boshqarishga yordam beradi.
Kirib kelgan turlar butun yashash joylarini o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
Qonunlar potentsial kirib keladigan turlarni import qilishni tartibga soladi.
Qayta tiklash loyihalari ba’zan kirib kelgan turlarni olib tashlashni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi ko‘proq kirib kelgan turlarning tarqalishiga yordam berishi mumkin.

words.definition: Ocean areas where human activities are restricted to protect marine life, habitats, and ecosystems.
words.definitionUz: Dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlari – dengiz hayoti, yashash joylari va ekotizimlarini himoya qilish uchun inson faoliyati cheklangan okean hududlari.
words.example1: Marine protected areas help fish populations recover.
words.example1Translation: Dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlari baliq populyatsiyalarining tiklanishiga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many countries are expanding their marine protected areas.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab mamlakatlar dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarini kengaytirmoqda.
words.example3: Tourism in marine protected areas must be carefully managed.
words.example3Translation: Dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlardagi turizmni ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarish kerak.
extraExamples: Marine protected areas support biodiversity in the ocean.
No-take zones are a strict type of marine protected areas.
Effective management is essential for marine protected areas to work.
Marine protected areas also benefit local fishing communities.
Climate change poses new challenges for marine protected areas.
International cooperation helps create large marine protected areas.
Research shows positive results from well-managed marine protected areas.
extraExampleTranslations: Dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlari okeandagi biologik xilma-xillikni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Baliq ovlanmaydigan zonalari dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarining qattiq turi.
Samarali boshqaruv dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarining ishlashi uchun zarur.
Dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlari mahalliy baliqchilik jamiyatlariga ham foyda keltiradi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlari uchun yangi qiyinchiliklar yaratadi.
Xalqaro hamkorlik katta dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarini yaratishga yordam beradi.
Tadqiqotlar yaxshi boshqariladigan dengiz qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarining ijobiy natijalarini ko‘rsatmoqda.

words.definition: An effort to return a species to an area where it once lived but has become extinct or very rare.
words.definitionUz: Qayta kiritish dasturi – biror tur o‘sha hududda ilgari yashagan, lekin keyin yo‘q bo‘lib ketgan yoki juda kamaygan joyga qayta joylashtirish harakati.
words.example1: The reintroduction program successfully brought wolves back to the national park.
words.example1Translation: Qayta kiritish dasturi bo‘rilarni milliy bog‘ga muvaffaqiyatli qaytardi.
words.example2: Reintroduction programs require careful planning and monitoring.
words.example2Translation: Qayta kiritish dasturlari puxta rejalashtirish va kuzatuvni talab qiladi.
words.example3: Many reintroduction programs focus on endangered species.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab qayta kiritish dasturlari yo‘qolib borayotgan turlarga qaratilgan.
extraExamples: Reintroduction programs help restore natural balance.
Captive-bred animals are often used in reintroduction programs.
Local community support is important for reintroduction programs.
Some reintroduction programs have faced challenges and failures.
Monitoring is crucial after animals are released in reintroduction programs.
Reintroduction programs are part of broader conservation strategies.
The California condor is a famous success story of a reintroduction program.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayta kiritish dasturlari tabiiy muvozanatni tiklashga yordam beradi.
Qafasda ko‘paytirilgan hayvonlar ko‘pincha qayta kiritish dasturlarida ishlatiladi.
Mahalliy jamoa qo‘llab-quvvatlashi qayta kiritish dasturlari uchun muhim.
Ba’zi qayta kiritish dasturlari qiyinchilik va muvaffaqiyatsizlikka duch kelgan.
Hayvonlar qo‘yib yuborilgandan keyin kuzatuv qayta kiritish dasturlarida juda zarur.
Qayta kiritish dasturlari kengroq muhofaza strategiyalarining bir qismi.
Kaliforniya kondori qayta kiritish dasturining mashhur muvaffaqiyat hikoyasi.

words.definition: Hunting practices that do not lead to long-term decline of animal populations and respect ecological balance.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror ovchilik – hayvonlar populyatsiyasining uzoq muddatli kamayishiga olib kelmaydigan va ekotizim muvozanatini hurmat qiladigan ov usullari.
words.example1: Sustainable hunting can provide income while protecting wildlife.
words.example1Translation: Barqaror ovchilik yovvoyi hayvonlarni himoya qilgan holda daromad olish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: Regulations ensure that hunting remains sustainable.
words.example2Translation: Qoidalar ovchilikning barqaror bo‘lishini ta’minlaydi.
words.example3: Sustainable hunting is allowed in some protected areas under strict rules.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror ovchilik ba’zi qo‘riqlanadigan hududlarda qattiq qoidalar bilan ruxsat etiladi.
extraExamples: Sustainable hunting is based on scientific population data.
Indigenous communities often practice sustainable hunting.
Sustainable hunting helps control overpopulated species.
Education promotes sustainable hunting practices.
Illegal hunting is very different from sustainable hunting.
Sustainable hunting can support local economies.
Monitoring is essential for sustainable hunting programs.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqaror ovchilik ilmiy populyatsiya ma’lumotlariga asoslanadi.
Mahalliy xalqlar ko‘pincha barqaror ovchilik bilan shug‘ullanadi.
Barqaror ovchilik haddan tashqari ko‘paygan turlarni nazorat qilishga yordam beradi.
Ta’lim barqaror ovchilik amaliyotlarini rag‘batlantiradi.
Noqonuniy ov barqaror ovchilikdan butunlay farq qiladi.
Barqaror ovchilik mahalliy iqtisodiyotni qo‘llab-quvvatlashi mumkin.
Kuzatuv barqaror ovchilik dasturlari uchun zarur.

words.definition: The variety of genetic characteristics within a species that helps it adapt and survive.
words.definitionUz: Genetik xilma-xillik – bir tur ichidagi genetika jihatidan farqli xususiyatlarning xilma-xilligi bo‘lib, turning moslashishi va omon qolishiga yordam beradi.
words.example1: Low genetic diversity makes species more vulnerable to diseases.
words.example1Translation: Genetik xilma-xillikning pastligi turlarni kasalliklarga nisbatan zaifroq qiladi.
words.example2: Conservationists try to maintain genetic diversity in captive populations.
words.example2Translation: Muhofaza mutaxassislari qafasdagi populyatsiyalarda genetik xilma-xillikni saqlashga harakat qilishadi.
words.example3: Genetic diversity is important for long-term species survival.
words.example3Translation: Genetik xilma-xillik turning uzoq muddatli omon qolishi uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Habitat fragmentation reduces genetic diversity.
Breeding programs aim to increase genetic diversity.
Genetic diversity helps species adapt to climate change.
Loss of genetic diversity can lead to inbreeding problems.
Scientists measure genetic diversity using DNA analysis.
Maintaining genetic diversity is a key goal of conservation.
Crop genetic diversity is vital for food security.
extraExampleTranslations: Yashash joylarining parchalanishi genetik xilma-xillikni kamaytiradi.
Ko‘paytirish dasturlari genetik xilma-xillikni oshirishni maqsad qiladi.
Genetik xilma-xillik turlarga iqlim o‘zgarishiga moslashishga yordam beradi.
Genetik xilma-xillikning yo‘qolishi yaqin qarindoshlar o‘rtasidagi juftlashish muammolariga olib keladi.
Olimlar DNK tahlili yordamida genetik xilma-xillikni o‘lchashadi.
Genetik xilma-xillikni saqlash muhofaza maqsadlaridan biri.
Ekinlarning genetik xilma-xilligi oziq-ovqat xavfsizligi uchun juda muhim.

words.definition: A species chosen for conservation whose protection automatically helps many other species in the same ecosystem.
