words.definitionUz: Soyabon tur – muhofaza qilish uchun tanlangan tur bo‘lib, uni himoya qilish o‘sha ekotizimdagi boshqa ko‘plab turlarga ham bilvosita foyda keltiradi.
words.example1: The tiger is often used as an umbrella species for forest conservation.
words.example1Translation: Yo‘lbars o‘rmonlarni muhofaza qilishda soyabon tur sifatida tez-tez tanlanadi.
words.example2: Protecting umbrella species is an efficient conservation strategy.
words.example2Translation: Soyabon turlarni himoya qilish samarali muhofaza strategiyasidir.
words.example3: Umbrella species help conserve large areas of habitat.
words.example3Translation: Soyabon turlar katta maydonlardagi yashash joylarini saqlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Umbrella species are usually large, charismatic animals.
The giant panda serves as an umbrella species in China.
Using umbrella species simplifies conservation planning.
Not all species benefit equally from umbrella species protection.
Umbrella species approach is popular in landscape-level conservation.
Elephants are an important umbrella species in African savannas.
Conservation of umbrella species often gains strong public support.
extraExampleTranslations: Soyabon turlar odatda katta va jozibali hayvonlar bo‘ladi.
Dev panda Xitoyda soyabon tur sifatida xizmat qiladi.
Soyabon turlardan foydalanish muhofaza rejalashtirishni soddalashtiradi.
Barcha turlar soyabon turning himoyasidan bir xil darajada foyda ko‘rmaydi.
Soyabon turlar yondashuvi keng hududlarni muhofaza qilishda mashhur.
Fillar Afrika savannalarida muhim soyabon tur hisoblanadi.
Soyabon turlarni muhofaza qilish ko‘pincha jamoatchilikning kuchli qo‘llab-quvvatlashini oladi.

words.definition: A branch of AI in which systems automatically learn and improve from experience using data, without being explicitly programmed.
words.definitionUz: Kompyuter tizimlarining maxsus dasturlanmasdan turib, ma'lumotlardan o'z-o'zidan o'rganib, yaxshilanib borishi.
words.example1: Machine learning allows email filters to detect spam more accurately over time.
words.example1Translation: Mashinali o'rganish elektron pochta filtrlariga vaqt o'tishi bilan spamni aniqroq aniqlash imkonini beradi.
words.example2: Many streaming platforms use machine learning to recommend content to users.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab striminig platformalari foydalanuvchilarga kontent tavsiya qilish uchun mashinali o'rganishdan foydalanadi.
words.example3: Machine learning models require large amounts of data to perform well.
words.example3Translation: Mashinali o'rganish modellari yaxshi ishlashi uchun katta hajmdagi ma'lumotlarni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Machine learning is used in healthcare to predict patient diagnoses.
The company invested heavily in machine learning to improve its search engine.
Machine learning algorithms can detect fraud in financial transactions.
Self-driving cars rely on machine learning to navigate roads safely.
Machine learning has transformed how businesses analyze customer behavior.
Without quality data, machine learning systems produce unreliable results.
Machine learning is now a core skill demanded by many technology employers.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashinali o'rganish sog'liqni saqlash sohasida bemorlar tashxisini bashorat qilish uchun ishlatiladi.
Kompaniya qidiruv tizimini yaxshilash uchun mashinali o'rganishga katta mablag' sarfladi.
Mashinali o'rganish algoritmlari moliyaviy operatsiyalardagi firibgarlikni aniqlay oladi.
Avtonom avtomobillar yo'llarda xavfsiz harakatlanish uchun mashinali o'rganishga tayanadi.
Mashinali o'rganish korxonalarning mijozlar xatti-harakatini tahlil qilish usulini o'zgartirdi.
Sifatli ma'lumotlarsiz mashinali o'rganish tizimlari ishonchsiz natijalar beradi.
Mashinali o'rganish hozir ko'plab texnologiya ish beruvchilari talab qiladigan asosiy ko'nikmaga aylandi.

words.definition: Systematic and unfair errors in AI or automated systems caused by biased or unrepresentative training data.
words.definitionUz: Sun'iy intellekt tizimlarida noto'g'ri yoki bir yoqlama ma'lumotlar ishlatilishi natijasida kelib chiqadigan tizimli va adolatsiz xatolar.
words.example1: Algorithmic bias in hiring software led to fewer women being shortlisted for jobs.
words.example1Translation: Ishga qabul qilish dasturidagi algoritmik noxolislik ish uchun tanlangan ayollar sonining kamayishiga olib keldi.
words.example2: Researchers discovered algorithmic bias in a facial recognition system used by police.
words.example2Translation: Tadqiqotchilar politsiya ishlatgan yuz tanish tizimida algoritmik noxolislikni aniqladilar.
words.example3: Addressing algorithmic bias requires diverse and representative training datasets.
words.example3Translation: Algoritmik noxolislikni bartaraf etish xilma-xil va vakillik qiladigan o'quv ma'lumotlar to'plamlarini talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Algorithmic bias can reinforce existing social inequalities if left unchecked.
The company was criticized for algorithmic bias in its loan approval system.
Algorithmic bias is harder to detect than human bias because it is hidden in code.
Regulators are calling for audits to identify and reduce algorithmic bias.
Algorithmic bias in criminal justice systems has raised serious ethical concerns.
Developers must test their models carefully to reduce the risk of algorithmic bias.
Algorithmic bias often reflects the prejudices present in historical data.
extraExampleTranslations: Algoritmik noxolislik nazorat qilinmasa mavjud ijtimoiy tengsizliklarni kuchaytirishi mumkin.
Kompaniya kredit berish tizimidagi algoritmik noxolislik uchun tanqidga uchradi.
Algoritmik noxolislikni aniqlash insoniy noxolislikdan qiyinroq, chunki u kodda yashiringan.
Tartibga soluvchilar algoritmik noxolislikni aniqlash va kamaytirish uchun tekshiruvlar o'tkazishni talab qilmoqda.
Jinoiy adolat tizimlaridagi algoritmik noxolislik jiddiy axloqiy tashvishlarni yuzaga keltirdi.
Dasturchilar algoritmik noxolislik xavfini kamaytirish uchun modellarini ehtiyotkorlik bilan sinab ko'rishlari kerak.
Algoritmik noxolislik ko'pincha tarixiy ma'lumotlarda mavjud bo'lgan xurofotlarni aks ettiradi.

words.definition: The use of technology and machines to perform tasks that previously required human input, with minimal ongoing human involvement.
words.definitionUz: Avval inson bajargan ishlarni texnologiya va mashinalar yordamida minimal insoniy ishtirok bilan bajarish.
words.example1: Automation has dramatically increased production speed in manufacturing factories.
words.example1Translation: Avtomatlashtirish ishlab chiqarish zavodlarida ishlab chiqarish tezligini keskin oshirdi.
words.example2: Many routine office tasks, such as data entry, are being replaced by automation.
words.example2Translation: Ma'lumotlarni kiritish kabi ko'plab oddiy ofis vazifalari avtomatlashtirish bilan almashtirilmoqda.
words.example3: Automation can improve efficiency but raises concerns about job losses.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish samaradorlikni oshirishi mumkin, lekin ish o'rinlari yo'qolishi haqida tashvishlarni yuzaga keltiradi.
extraExamples: Automation in agriculture allows farmers to manage larger areas with fewer workers.
The banking sector has embraced automation to process transactions faster.
Automation is reshaping entire industries, from retail to logistics.
Small businesses are using automation tools to reduce administrative workload.
Governments are debating how to support workers displaced by automation.
Automation increases consistency and reduces the risk of human error.
The pace of automation is accelerating due to advances in AI.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloq xo'jaligidagi avtomatlashtirish fermerlarga kamroq ishchilar bilan kattaroq maydonlarni boshqarish imkonini beradi.
Bank sektori tranzaksiyalarni tezroq qayta ishlash uchun avtomatlashtirishni qabul qildi.
Avtomatlashtirish chakana savdodan logistikagacha bo'lgan butun tarmoqlarni qayta shakllantirmoqda.
Kichik korxonalar ma'muriy ish yukini kamaytirish uchun avtomatlashtirish vositalaridan foydalanmoqda.
Hukumatlar avtomatlashtirish tufayli ishsiz qolgan ishchilarga qanday qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida munozara qilmoqda.
Avtomatlashtirish izchillikni oshiradi va inson xatosi xavfini kamaytiradi.
Avtomatlashtirishning sur'ati sun'iy intellekt sohasidagi yutuqlar tufayli tezlashmoqda.

words.definition: A hypothetical future point at which artificial intelligence surpasses human intelligence, triggering rapid and unpredictable changes in civilization.
words.definitionUz: Sun'iy intellekt insoniy aqldan o'tib ketishi va bu natijada sivilizatsiyada tez va bashorat qilib bo'lmaydigan o'zgarishlar yuzaga kelishi mumkin deb taxmin qilinayotgan kelajak nuqtasi.
words.example1: Some scientists believe the technological singularity could occur within this century.
words.example1Translation: Ba'zi olimlar texnologik yagona nuqta shu asrda yuz berishi mumkin deb hisoblaydi.
words.example2: The concept of the technological singularity raises deep philosophical and ethical questions.
words.example2Translation: Texnologik yagona nuqta tushunchasi chuqur falsafiy va axloqiy savollarni yuzaga keltiradi.
words.example3: Not all experts agree that the technological singularity is inevitable or even possible.
words.example3Translation: Barcha mutaxassislar texnologik yagona nuqta muqarrar yoki hatto mumkin ekanligiga qo'shilmaydi.
extraExamples: The technological singularity is a popular topic in science fiction and futurist circles.
Preparing for the technological singularity requires rethinking education and governance.
Elon Musk has publicly expressed concerns about the risks of the technological singularity.
The technological singularity assumes AI will eventually be able to improve itself.
Critics argue the technological singularity is more speculative than scientific.
If the technological singularity occurs, human society could change beyond recognition.
Interest in the technological singularity has grown alongside rapid AI development.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologik yagona nuqta ilmiy fantastika va futuristlar doirasida mashhur mavzudir.
Texnologik yagona nuqtaga tayyorlanish ta'lim va boshqaruvni qayta ko'rib chiqishni talab qiladi.
Elon Musk texnologik yagona nuqtaning xavflari haqida ochiq tashvishini bildirgan.
Texnologik yagona nuqta sun'iy intellekt oxir-oqibat o'zini takomillashtira olishini taxmin qiladi.
Tanqidchilar texnologik yagona nuqta ilmiydan ko'ra ko'proq taxminiy ekanini ta'kidlaydi.
Agar texnologik yagona nuqta yuz bersa, insoniyat jamiyati tanib bo'lmas darajada o'zgarishi mumkin.
Texnologik yagona nuqtaga qiziqish tez rivojlanayotgan sun'iy intellekt bilan birga ortdi.

words.definition: AI systems that are designed and deployed to be fair, transparent, accountable, and aligned with human values.
words.definitionUz: Adolatli, shaffof, javobgar va insoniy qadriyatlarga mos bo'lishi uchun ishlab chiqilgan va qo'llanilgan sun'iy intellekt tizimlari.
words.example1: Ethical AI ensures that automated decisions do not unfairly disadvantage any group.
words.example1Translation: Axloqiy sun'iy intellekt avtomatlashtirilgan qarorlar hech bir guruhga adolatsiz zarar yetkazmasligini ta'minlaydi.
words.example2: Tech companies are developing ethical AI guidelines to govern how their systems behave.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya kompaniyalari tizimlarining qanday harakat qilishini boshqarish uchun axloqiy sun'iy intellekt ko'rsatmalarini ishlab chiqmoqda.
words.example3: Governments are calling for legislation to enforce ethical AI standards across industries.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar tarmoqlar bo'ylab axloqiy sun'iy intellekt standartlarini ta'minlash uchun qonunchilikni talab qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Ethical AI requires that users understand how decisions affecting them are made.
Designing ethical AI is challenging because values differ across cultures and societies.
The healthcare industry relies on ethical AI to protect patient rights and safety.
Ethical AI prohibits the use of personal data without informed consent.
Investors are increasingly interested in companies that commit to ethical AI principles.
Ethical AI frameworks must evolve as technology becomes more powerful.
Without ethical AI, automated systems risk causing harm at scale.
extraExampleTranslations: Axloqiy sun'iy intellekt foydalanuvchilar ularga ta'sir qiluvchi qarorlar qanday qabul qilinishini tushunishini talab qiladi.
Axloqiy sun'iy intellektni loyihalash murakkab, chunki qadriyatlar madaniyatlar va jamiyatlar bo'ylab farq qiladi.
Sog'liqni saqlash sohasi bemor huquqlari va xavfsizligini himoya qilish uchun axloqiy sun'iy intellektga tayanadi.
Axloqiy sun'iy intellekt shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni rozilik olmay ishlatishni taqiqlaydi.
Investorlar tobora ko'proq axloqiy sun'iy intellekt tamoyillariga sodiq bo'lgan kompaniyalarga qiziqmoqda.
Axloqiy sun'iy intellekt tizimlari texnologiya kuchliroq bo'lishi bilan rivojlanib borishi kerak.
Axloqiy sun'iy intellektsiz avtomatlashtirilgan tizimlar keng miqyosda zarar yetkazish xavfini tug'diradi.

words.definition: A subset of machine learning that uses layered neural networks to process data and simulate complex human decision-making.
words.definitionUz: Ma'lumotlarni qayta ishlash va murakkab insoniy qaror qabul qilishni simulyatsiya qilish uchun ko'p qatlamli neyron tarmoqlardan foydalanadigan mashinali o'rganishning bir turi.
words.example1: Deep learning powers the voice recognition technology in smartphones.
words.example1Translation: Chuqur o'rganish smartfonlardagi ovozni tanish texnologiyasini ta'minlaydi.
words.example2: Deep learning has achieved remarkable accuracy in image classification tasks.
words.example2Translation: Chuqur o'rganish tasvirlarni tasniflash vazifalarida ajoyib aniqlikka erishdi.
words.example3: Training a deep learning model requires significant computing power and data.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur o'rganish modelini o'qitish sezilarli hisoblash quvvati va ma'lumotlarni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Deep learning is used in medical imaging to detect diseases like cancer early.
Language translation apps rely on deep learning to produce accurate results.
Deep learning models improve their performance the more data they are exposed to.
Researchers used deep learning to predict protein structures in biology.
Deep learning has pushed the boundaries of what AI systems can achieve.
One challenge of deep learning is that its decision process is often hard to explain.
Deep learning breakthroughs have accelerated innovation in nearly every tech field.
extraExampleTranslations: Chuqur o'rganish tibbiy tasvirlashda saraton kabi kasalliklarni erta aniqlash uchun ishlatiladi.
Til tarjimasi ilovalari aniq natijalar berish uchun chuqur o'rganishga tayanadi.
Chuqur o'rganish modellari qanchalik ko'p ma'lumotga duch kelsa, shunchalik yaxshi ishlaydi.
Tadqiqotchilar biologiyada oqsil tuzilmalarini bashorat qilish uchun chuqur o'rganishdan foydalandilar.
Chuqur o'rganish sun'iy intellekt tizimlarining erishishi mumkin bo'lgan chegaralarini kengaytirdi.
Chuqur o'rganishning bir muammosi shundaki, uning qaror qabul qilish jarayonini tushuntirish ko'pincha qiyin.
Chuqur o'rganishdagi yutuqlar deyarli barcha texnologiya sohalarida innovatsiyani tezlashtirdi.

words.definition: The right of individuals to control how their personal information is collected, stored, and used by digital systems and organizations.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarning shaxsiy ma'lumotlari raqamli tizimlar va tashkilotlar tomonidan qanday to'planishi, saqlanishi va ishlatilishini nazorat qilish huquqi.
words.example1: Data privacy laws require companies to inform users about how their data is used.
words.example1Translation: Ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi qonunlari kompaniyalarga foydalanuvchilarni ma'lumotlaridan qanday foydalanilayotgani haqida xabardor qilishni talab qiladi.
words.example2: Many users are concerned about data privacy when using social media platforms.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p foydalanuvchilar ijtimoiy media platformalaridan foydalanishda ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi haqida tashvishda.
words.example3: Strong data privacy regulations help build trust between consumers and technology companies.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi qoidalari iste'molchilar va texnologiya kompaniyalari o'rtasida ishonch o'rnatishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Data privacy is a fundamental right recognized in many countries' constitutions.
A major data breach exposed millions of customers' personal information.
Apps must request permission before accessing personal data on your phone.
Data privacy concerns have led to stricter regulations like the GDPR in Europe.
Companies that mishandle data privacy face heavy fines and reputational damage.
Children's data privacy requires extra legal protection online.
As AI systems collect more data, data privacy challenges continue to grow.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi ko'p mamlakatlarning konstitutsiyalarida tan olingan asosiy huquqdir.
Katta ma'lumotlar buzilishi millionlab mijozlarning shaxsiy ma'lumotlarini oshkor qildi.
Ilovalar telefondagi shaxsiy ma'lumotlarga kirish oldidan ruxsat so'rashi kerak.
Ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi tashvishlari Yevropadagi GDPR kabi qat'iyroq qoidalarga olib keldi.
Ma'lumotlar maxfiyligini noto'g'ri boshqaradigan kompaniyalar katta jarimalarga va obro'ga zarar ko'rishga duch keladi.
Bolalarning ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi onlayn qo'shimcha huquqiy himoyani talab qiladi.
Sun'iy intellekt tizimlari ko'proq ma'lumot to'plashi bilan ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi muammolari o'sishda davom etmoqda.

words.definition: A working relationship in which humans and AI systems complement each other's strengths to achieve better outcomes than either could alone.
words.definitionUz: Inson va sun'iy intellekt tizimlarining bir-birining kuchli tomonlarini to'ldirishi orqali alohida erishishidan yaxshiroq natijalarga erishish uchun birgalikda ishlash munosabati.
words.example1: Human-AI collaboration in medicine allows doctors to make more accurate diagnoses.
words.example1Translation: Tibbiyotda inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi shifokorlarga aniqroq tashxis qo'yish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: Creative industries are exploring human-AI collaboration to produce new forms of art.
words.example2Translation: Ijodiy sohalar san'atning yangi shakllarini yaratish uchun inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligini o'rganmoqda.
words.example3: Effective human-AI collaboration requires trust, clear roles, and good communication.
words.example3Translation: Samarali inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi ishonch, aniq rollar va yaxshi muloqotni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Human-AI collaboration in customer service improves response speed and quality.
Scientists use human-AI collaboration to analyze vast amounts of research data.
Human-AI collaboration does not replace humans but enhances their capabilities.
Educators are exploring human-AI collaboration to personalize learning experiences.
Human-AI collaboration in cybersecurity helps detect threats faster.
The key to successful human-AI collaboration is knowing when to rely on each.
Human-AI collaboration is expected to become standard practice in most industries.
extraExampleTranslations: Mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatishda inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi javob tezligi va sifatini yaxshilaydi.
Olimlar katta hajmdagi tadqiqot ma'lumotlarini tahlil qilish uchun inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligidan foydalanadi.
Inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi insonlarni almashtirmaydi, balki ularning imkoniyatlarini kengaytiradi.
O'qituvchilar o'quv tajribalarini shaxsiylashtirish uchun inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligini o'rganmoqda.
Kiberxavfsizlikda inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi tahdidlarni tezroq aniqlashga yordam beradi.
Muvaffaqiyatli inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligining kaliti har biriga qachon tayanishni bilishdir.
Inson va sun'iy intellekt hamkorligi ko'pgina sohalarda standart amaliyotga aylanishi kutilmoqda.

words.definition: The use of historical data, statistical models, and machine learning to forecast future events or behaviors.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakdagi hodisalar yoki xatti-harakatlarni bashorat qilish uchun tarixiy ma'lumotlar, statistik modellar va mashinali o'rganishdan foydalanish.
words.example1: Retailers use predictive analytics to forecast which products will sell best next season.
words.example1Translation: Chakana savdo kompaniyalari keyingi mavsumda qaysi mahsulotlar eng yaxshi sотилишини bashorat qilish uchun bashoratli tahlildan foydalanadi.
words.example2: Predictive analytics helps hospitals anticipate patient admission rates.
words.example2Translation: Bashoratli tahlil kasalxonalarga bemorlarni qabul qilish darajasini oldindan bilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Insurance companies rely on predictive analytics to assess risk and set premiums.
words.example3Translation: Sug'urta kompaniyalari xavfni baholash va mukofotlarni belgilash uchun bashoratli tahlilga tayanadi.
extraExamples: Predictive analytics can identify customers who are likely to stop using a service.
Sports teams use predictive analytics to evaluate player performance and injury risk.
Predictive analytics is helping cities plan traffic management more effectively.
Banks use predictive analytics to identify potentially fraudulent transactions.
Predictive analytics models become more accurate as more data becomes available.
Marketing teams use predictive analytics to target the right audience at the right time.
Predictive analytics in education can identify students at risk of falling behind.
extraExampleTranslations: Bashoratli tahlil xizmatdan foydalanishni to'xtatishi mumkin bo'lgan mijozlarni aniqlay oladi.
Sport jamoalari o'yinchi faoliyati va jarohat xavfini baholash uchun bashoratli tahlildan foydalanadi.
Bashoratli tahlil shaharlarga transport boshqaruvini samaraliroq rejalashtirshiga yordam bermoqda.
Banklar potentsial firibgar tranzaksiyalarni aniqlash uchun bashoratli tahlildan foydalanadi.
Bashoratli tahlil modellari ko'proq ma'lumot mavjud bo'lishi bilan aniqroq bo'ladi.
Marketing jamoalari to'g'ri auditoriyani to'g'ri vaqtda nishonga olish uchun bashoratli tahlildan foydalanadi.
Ta'limdagi bashoratli tahlil orqada qolish xavfi bo'lgan o'quvchilarni aniqlash mumkin.

words.definition: Technology systems capable of performing tasks and making decisions independently without direct human control.
words.definitionUz: Bevosita inson nazoratisiz mustaqil ravishda vazifalarni bajaradigan va qarorlar qabul qiladigan texnologiya tizimlari.
words.example1: Autonomous systems in warehouses sort and move goods without human workers.
words.example1Translation: Omborlardagi avtonom tizimlar inson ishchilarsiz tovarlarni saralaydi va ko'chiradi.
words.example2: Autonomous systems in aviation can land planes safely in poor weather conditions.
words.example2Translation: Aviatsiyada avtonom tizimlar yomon ob-havo sharoitida samolyotlarni xavfsiz qo'ndirishi mumkin.
words.example3: The development of autonomous systems raises important questions about accountability.
words.example3Translation: Avtonom tizimlarni rivojlantirish javobgarlik haqida muhim savollarni ko'taradi.
extraExamples: Self-driving vehicles are among the most discussed examples of autonomous systems.
Autonomous systems in agriculture use sensors to monitor crops and apply fertilizers.
Military forces are increasingly deploying autonomous systems for surveillance.
The reliability of autonomous systems must be thoroughly tested before public use.
Autonomous systems can operate in environments too dangerous for humans.
Legal frameworks for autonomous systems are still being developed in most countries.
Autonomous systems reduce the need for human intervention in repetitive operations.
extraExampleTranslations: Haydovchisiz avtomobillar avtonom tizimlarning eng ko'p muhokama qilingan namunalari qatoriga kiradi.
Qishloq xo'jaligidagi avtonom tizimlar ekinlarni kuzatish va o'g'it qo'llash uchun sensorlardan foydalanadi.
Harbiy kuchlar tobora ko'proq kuzatish uchun avtonom tizimlarni qo'llamoqda.
Avtonom tizimlarning ishonchliligi ommaviy foydalanishdan oldin puxta sinab ko'rilishi kerak.
Avtonom tizimlar insonlar uchun juda xavfli muhitlarda ishlashi mumkin.
Ko'pgina mamlakatlarda avtonom tizimlar uchun huquqiy mexanizmlar hali ishlab chiqilmoqda.
Avtonom tizimlar takroriy operatsiyalarda inson aralashuviga bo'lgan ehtiyojni kamaytiradi.

words.definition: The framework of laws, regulations, ethical guidelines, and institutional oversight that guides the responsible development and use of AI.
words.definitionUz: Sun'iy intellektning mas'uliyatli rivojlanishi va qo'llanilishini boshqaradigan qonunlar, qoidalar, axloqiy ko'rsatmalar va instituttsional nazorat tizimi.
words.example1: AI governance frameworks help ensure that AI is developed safely and responsibly.
words.example1Translation: Sun'iy intellektni boshqarish tizimlari sun'iy intellektning xavfsiz va mas'uliyatli rivojlanishini ta'minlashga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Many countries are working to establish national AI governance strategies.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p mamlakatlar milliy sun'iy intellektni boshqarish strategiyalarini ishlab chiqish ustida ishlayapti.
words.example3: Weak AI governance can allow harmful or biased AI systems to cause widespread damage.
words.example3Translation: Zaif sun'iy intellektni boshqarish zararli yoki noxolis sun'iy intellekt tizimlariga keng ko'lamli zarar yetkazish imkonini berishi mumkin.
extraExamples: AI governance includes setting standards for transparency and accountability.
The European Union has taken a leading role in developing AI governance regulations.
AI governance must balance innovation with the protection of public interests.
Companies are appointing AI ethics officers as part of their governance structures.
International cooperation is essential for effective global AI governance.
AI governance frameworks need to be updated regularly as technology evolves.
Without strong AI governance, public trust in AI systems will be difficult to build.
extraExampleTranslations: Sun'iy intellektni boshqarish shaffoflik va javobgarlik uchun standartlarni belgilashni o'z ichiga oladi.
Yevropa Ittifoqi sun'iy intellektni boshqarish qoidalarini ishlab chiqishda yetakchi rol o'ynamoqda.
Sun'iy intellektni boshqarish innovatsiyani jamoat manfaatlarini himoya qilish bilan muvozanatlashi kerak.
Kompaniyalar boshqaruv tuzilmalarining bir qismi sifatida sun'iy intellekt etika bo'yicha mansabdor shaxslarni tayinlamoqda.
Samarali global sun'iy intellektni boshqarish uchun xalqaro hamkorlik muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Sun'iy intellektni boshqarish tizimlari texnologiya rivojlanishi bilan muntazam yangilanib turishi kerak.
Kuchli sun'iy intellektni boshqaruvchilikisiz sun'iy intellekt tizimlariga jamoat ishonchinī shakllantirish qiyin bo'ladi.

words.definition: AI systems that simulate human thought processes such as reasoning, learning, and problem-solving to assist in complex decision-making.
words.definitionUz: Murakkab qaror qabul qilishda yordam berish uchun mantiqiy fikrlash, o'rganish va muammolarni hal qilish kabi insoniy fikrlash jarayonlarini simulyatsiya qiladigan sun'iy intellekt tizimlari.
words.example1: Cognitive computing systems can understand natural language and respond intelligently.
words.example1Translation: Kognitiv hisoblash tizimlari tabiiy tilni tushunishi va aqlli ravishda javob berishi mumkin.
words.example2: Doctors use cognitive computing tools to explore treatment options for complex cases.
words.example2Translation: Shifokorlar murakkab holatlar uchun davolash variantlarini o'rganish uchun kognitiv hisoblash vositalaridan foydalanadi.
words.example3: Cognitive computing goes beyond simple data processing to understand context and meaning.
words.example3Translation: Kognitiv hisoblash kontekst va ma'noni tushunish uchun oddiy ma'lumotlarni qayta ishlashdan tashqariga chiqadi.
extraExamples: Cognitive computing is used in financial services to assess investment risks.
IBM's Watson is one of the most well-known examples of cognitive computing.
Cognitive computing systems learn from interactions and improve over time.
Customer service chatbots powered by cognitive computing handle complex queries.
Cognitive computing helps legal teams analyze large volumes of case documents.
The education sector is exploring cognitive computing to adapt learning to individual students.
Cognitive computing bridges the gap between human intuition and data-driven analysis.
extraExampleTranslations: Kognitiv hisoblash moliyaviy xizmatlarda investitsiya xavflarini baholash uchun ishlatiladi.
IBM'ning Watson kognitiv hisoblashning eng mashhur namunalaridan biridir.
Kognitiv hisoblash tizimlari o'zaro muloqotdan o'rganadi va vaqt o'tishi bilan yaxshilanadi.
Kognitiv hisoblash bilan ishlaydigan mijozlarga xizmat chatbotlari murakkab so'rovlarni ko'rib chiqadi.
Kognitiv hisoblash huquqiy jamoalarga ko'p miqdordagi ish hujjatlarini tahlil qilishda yordam beradi.
Ta'lim sektori o'qishni individual o'quvchilarga moslash uchun kognitiv hisoblashni o'rganmoqda.
Kognitiv hisoblash insoniy intuitsiya va ma'lumotlarga asoslangan tahlil o'rtasidagi bo'shliqni to'ldiradi.

words.definition: The loss of employment that occurs when machines, software, or AI systems replace tasks previously performed by human workers.
words.definitionUz: Avval inson ishchilari bajargan vazifalarni mashinalar, dasturiy ta'minot yoki sun'iy intellekt tizimlari o'z zimmasiga olganda yuzaga keladigan ish o'rinlari yo'qolishi.
words.example1: Job displacement in manufacturing has been driven by the rise of industrial robots.
words.example1Translation: Ishlab chiqarishdagi ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish sanoat robotlarining paydo bo'lishi tufayli yuzaga keldi.
words.example2: Governments are developing retraining programs to help workers affected by job displacement.
words.example2Translation: Hukumatlar ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish ta'sirida qolgan ishchilarga yordam berish uchun qayta tayyorlash dasturlarini ishlab chiqmoqda.
words.example3: Job displacement does not always lead to higher unemployment if new industries emerge.
words.example3Translation: Yangi sohalar paydo bo'lsa, ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish har doim ham yuqori ishsizlikka olib kelmaydi.
extraExamples: Job displacement is a major concern as AI becomes more capable.
The transport industry faces significant job displacement due to autonomous vehicles.
Historical examples show that job displacement often leads to new types of employment.
Job displacement affects lower-skilled workers more than higher-skilled professionals.
Social safety nets are critical for workers experiencing job displacement.
Job displacement in retail has accelerated due to the rise of online shopping.
Economists disagree about the long-term scale of AI-driven job displacement.
extraExampleTranslations: Sun'iy intellekt imkoniyatlari ortishi bilan ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish katta tashvishga aylanmoqda.
Transport sohasi avtonom avtomobillar tufayli sezilarli ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarishga duch kelmoqda.
Tarixiy misollar ko'rsatadiki, ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish ko'pincha yangi turdagi ish o'rinlariga olib keladi.
Ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish malakali mutaxassislarga qaraganda past malakali ishchilarga ko'proq ta'sir qiladi.
Ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarishga duch kelgan ishchilar uchun ijtimoiy himoya muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Chakana savdoda ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarish onlayn xarid qilishning o'sishi tufayli tezlashdi.
Iqtisodchilar sun'iy intellekt tufayli yuzaga keladigan ish o'rinlarini siqib chiqarishning uzoq muddatli ko'lami haqida kelisha olmaydi.

words.definition: AI that is designed and trained to perform one specific task or a limited set of tasks, without general understanding or reasoning.
words.definitionUz: Umumiy tushunish yoki mantiqiy fikrlashsiz bitta yoki cheklangan miqdordagi vazifalarni bajarish uchun ishlab chiqilgan va o'qitilgan sun'iy intellekt.
words.example1: A spam filter is a simple example of narrow AI designed for one specific purpose.
words.example1Translation: Spam filtri bitta maqsad uchun mo'ljallangan tor sun'iy intellektning oddiy namunasidir.
words.example2: Narrow AI systems can outperform humans within their specific domain.
words.example2Translation: Tor sun'iy intellekt tizimlari o'zlarining muayyan sohasida insonlardan ustun kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Most AI tools in use today are forms of narrow AI rather than general intelligence.
words.example3Translation: Bugun foydalanilayotgan ko'pgina sun'iy intellekt vositalari umumiy intellektdan ko'ra tor sun'iy intellekt shakllaridir.
extraExamples: Facial recognition software is a well-known application of narrow AI.
Narrow AI cannot apply its skills to tasks outside its trained area.
Chess-playing programs like Deep Blue are classic examples of narrow AI.
Voice assistants such as Siri operate as narrow AI focused on language tasks.
Narrow AI has transformed industries without achieving human-like general intelligence.
Researchers debate how to move from narrow AI toward more general AI capabilities.
Despite its limitations, narrow AI delivers enormous practical value in daily life.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuz tanish dasturiy ta'minoti tor sun'iy intellektning taniqli ilovasidir.
Tor sun'iy intellekt o'z ko'nikmalarini o'qitilgan sohadan tashqaridagi vazifalarga qo'llay olmaydi.
Deep Blue kabi shaxmat o'ynaydigan dasturlar tor sun'iy intellektning klassik namunasidir.
Siri kabi ovozli yordamchilar til vazifalariga yo'naltirilgan tor sun'iy intellekt sifatida ishlaydi.
Tor sun'iy intellekt insoniy umumiy intellektga erishmasdan turib tarmoqlarni o'zgartirdi.
Tadqiqotchilar tor sun'iy intellektdan yanada umumiy sun'iy intellekt imkoniyatlariga qanday o'tish haqida munozara qiladilar.
Cheklovlariga qaramay, tor sun'iy intellekt kundalik hayotda juda katta amaliy qiymat taqdim etadi.

words.definition: The quality of being open and clear about how an AI system works, how it makes decisions, and what data it uses.
words.definitionUz: Sun'iy intellekt tizimining qanday ishlashi, qarorlarni qanday qabul qilishi va qanday ma'lumotlardan foydalanishi haqida ochiq va aniq bo'lish xususiyati.
words.example1: Transparency in AI helps users understand why a system made a particular decision.
words.example1Translation: Sun'iy intellektdagi shaffoflik foydalanuvchilarga tizim nima uchun ma'lum bir qaror qabul qilganini tushunishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: Regulators are demanding greater transparency from companies that use AI in hiring.
words.example2Translation: Tartibga soluvchilar ishga qabul qilishda sun'iy intellektdan foydalanadigan kompaniyalardan ko'proq shaffoflik talab qilmoqda.
words.example3: Without transparency, it is difficult to identify and correct errors in AI systems.
words.example3Translation: Shaffofliksiz sun'iy intellekt tizimlaridagi xatolarni aniqlash va tuzatish qiyin.
extraExamples: Transparency is a core principle of ethical AI development.
AI transparency builds public confidence in automated systems.
Some AI models are described as "black boxes" because of their lack of transparency.
Transparency requirements vary between countries and industries.
Companies are developing explainable AI tools to improve transparency.
Transparency in algorithmic decision-making is especially important in healthcare and law.
Without transparency, AI systems can make consequential decisions that no one can justify.
extraExampleTranslations: Shaffoflik axloqiy sun'iy intellektni rivojlantirishning asosiy tamoyilidir.
Sun'iy intellekt shaffofligi avtomatlashtirilgan tizimlarga jamoat ishonchini mustahkamlaydi.
Ba'zi sun'iy intellekt modellari shaffofligi yo'qligi uchun "qora quti" deb ta'riflanadi.
Shaffoflik talablari mamlakatlar va sohalar o'rtasida farq qiladi.
Kompaniyalar shaffoflikni yaxshilash uchun tushuntirib bo'ladigan sun'iy intellekt vositalarini ishlab chiqmoqda.
Algoritmik qaror qabul qilishdagi shaffoflik sog'liqni saqlash va huquq sohasida ayniqsa muhim.
Shaffofliksiz sun'iy intellekt tizimlari hech kim asoslab bera olmaydigan muhim qarorlar qabul qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: A security incident in which sensitive, confidential, or personal information is accessed, stolen, or exposed by an unauthorized individual or system.
words.definitionUz: Maxfiy yoki shaxsiy ma'lumotlarga ruxsatsiz shaxs yoki tizim tomonidan kirish, o'g'irlash yoki oshkor qilish bilan bog'liq xavfsizlik hodisasi.
words.example1: The data breach exposed the personal details of over 50 million customers.
words.example1Translation: Ma'lumotlar buzilishi 50 milliondan ortiq mijozning shaxsiy ma'lumotlarini fosh qildi.
words.example2: Companies are legally required to notify users within 72 hours of discovering a data breach.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyalar ma'lumotlar buzilishini aniqlaganidan keyin 72 soat ichida foydalanuvchilarni xabardor qilishi qonuniy jihatdan majburiy.
words.example3: The data breach was caused by an employee clicking on a phishing email.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlar buzilishi xodimning fishing elektron pochta xabarini bosishi natijasida yuzaga keldi.
extraExamples: After the data breach, the company offered affected customers free credit monitoring services.
A data breach can severely damage a company's reputation and customer trust.
Hackers exploited a software vulnerability to carry out the data breach.
The data breach resulted in millions of dollars in fines for the tech firm.
Strong password policies can reduce the risk of a data breach significantly.
The healthcare provider suffered a data breach that exposed patients' medical records.
Cybersecurity experts were called in immediately after the data breach was discovered.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma'lumotlar buzilishidan so'ng kompaniya ta'sirlangan mijozlarga bepul kredit monitoringi xizmatlarini taklif qildi.
Ma'lumotlar buzilishi kompaniyaning obro'si va mijozlar ishonchiga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Xakerlar ma'lumotlar buzilishini amalga oshirish uchun dasturiy zaiflikdan foydalanishdi.
Ma'lumotlar buzilishi texnologiya firmasi uchun millionlab dollar jarimalarga olib keldi.
Kuchli parol siyosatlari ma'lumotlar buzilishi xavfini sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi mumkin.
Sog'liqni saqlash provayderi bemorlarning tibbiy yozuvlarini fosh qilgan ma'lumotlar buzilishiga uchradi.
Kiberhavfsizlik mutaxassislari ma'lumotlar buzilishi aniqlangandan so'ng darhol chaqirildi.

words.definition: A government or political system that extensively monitors and collects data on its citizens' communications, movements, and activities, often with little legal oversight or regard for civil liberties.
words.definitionUz: Fuqarolarining muloqoti, harakati va faoliyatini ko'pincha huquqiy nazorat yoki fuqarolik erkinliklarini hurmat qilmasdan keng kuzatib, ma'lumot to'playdigan hukumat yoki siyosiy tizim.
words.example1: Critics argue that mass CCTV networks and phone tapping are signs of a surveillance state.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar keng ko'lamli videokuzatuv tarmoqlari va telefon tinglash nazorat davlatining belgilari ekanligini ta'kidlaydi.
words.example2: Citizens in a surveillance state often self-censor out of fear of being monitored.
words.example2Translation: Nazorat davlatidagi fuqarolar ko'pincha kuzatilish qo'rquvi sababli o'z-o'zini tsenzura qiladi.
words.example3: Edward Snowden's revelations sparked a global debate about whether democratic nations were becoming surveillance states.
words.example3Translation: Edward Snowdenning oshkor qilishlari demokratik davlatlar nazorat davlatiga aylanib borayotgani haqida global bahsni qo'zg'atdi.
extraExamples: A surveillance state can use technology to track dissidents and suppress political opposition.
The expansion of facial recognition technology has raised fears about the rise of the surveillance state.
Journalists and activists are often the first targets of a surveillance state's monitoring apparatus.
Some governments justify surveillance state practices in the name of national security and counterterrorism.
Civil liberties organizations campaign against laws that would expand surveillance state powers.
The surveillance state raises fundamental questions about the balance between security and freedom.
In a surveillance state, even private conversations may not be truly private.
extraExampleTranslations: Nazorat davlati muxolifatchilarni kuzatish va siyosiy qarama-qarshilikni bostirishdan texnologiyadan foydalanishi mumkin.
Yuz tanish texnologiyasining kengayishi nazorat davlatining yuksalishi haqidagi qo'rquvlarni oshirdi.
Jurnalistlar va faollar ko'pincha nazorat davlatining kuzatuv apparatining birinchi nishonlari bo'ladi.
Ba'zi hukumatlar nazorat davlati amaliyotlarini milliy xavfsizlik va terrorizmga qarshi kurash nomi bilan oqlaydi.
Fuqarolik erkinliklari tashkilotlari nazorat davlati vakolatlarini kengaytiruvchi qonunlarga qarshi kampaniya olib boradi.
Nazorat davlati xavfsizlik va ozodlik o'rtasidagi muvozanat haqida fundamental savollar tug'diradi.
Nazorat davlatida hatto shaxsiy suhbatlar ham chindan ham maxfiy bo'lmasligi mumkin.

words.definition: The process of converting readable data into an unreadable coded format so that only authorized parties with the correct key can access and understand it.
words.definitionUz: O'qilishi mumkin bo'lgan ma'lumotlarni to'g'ri kalitga ega bo'lgan vakolatli tomonlargina unga kirish va tushunishi uchun o'qib bo'lmaydigan kodlangan formatga aylantirish jarayoni.
words.example1: End-to-end encryption ensures that only the sender and receiver can read the messages.
words.example1Translation: Uchdan uchgacha shifrlash faqat jo'natuvchi va qabul qiluvchi xabarlarni o'qiy olishini ta'minlaydi.
words.example2: Banks use encryption to protect customers' financial data during online transactions.
words.example2Translation: Banklar onlayn tranzaktsiyalar paytida mijozlarning moliyaviy ma'lumotlarini himoya qilish uchun shifrlashdan foydalanadi.
words.example3: Without encryption, your personal data sent over public Wi-Fi could easily be intercepted.
words.example3Translation: Shifrlashsiz ommaviy Wi-Fi orqali yuborilgan shaxsiy ma'lumotlaringiz osongina ushlanib qolinishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Encryption is one of the most effective tools for protecting sensitive information online.
Law enforcement agencies have debated whether encryption should have backdoors for government access.
Many messaging apps now offer encryption as a default security feature.
Encryption protects not just individuals but also businesses from industrial espionage.
Losing your encryption key means permanently losing access to the encrypted data.
Military and intelligence services rely heavily on encryption to secure communications.
Stronger encryption standards are regularly developed to stay ahead of increasingly powerful hacking tools.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifrlash onlayn maxfiy ma'lumotlarni himoya qilishning eng samarali vositalaridan biri.
Huquqni muhofaza qilish organlari shifrlashda hukumat kirishi uchun orqa eshiklar bo'lishi kerakmi deb bahslashdi.
Ko'plab xabar almashish ilovalari endi shifrlashni standart xavfsizlik funksiyasi sifatida taklif etadi.
Shifrlash nafaqat shaxslarni, balki korxonalarni ham sanoat josusligidan himoya qiladi.
Shifrlash kalitini yo'qotish shifrlangan ma'lumotlarga kirishni abadiy yo'qotish demakdir.
Harbiy va razvedka xizmatlari aloqalarni himoya qilish uchun shifrlashga katta tayanadi.
Kuchliroq shifrlash standartlari tobora kuchayib borayotgan xakerlik vositalaridan oldinda turish uchun muntazam ishlab chiqiladi.

words.definition: A crime in which someone fraudulently obtains and uses another person's private identifying information — such as their name, social security number, or bank details — without their consent, typically for financial gain.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishining roziligisiz uning ismi, ijtimoiy ta'minot raqami yoki bank ma'lumotlari kabi shaxsiy identifikatsiya ma'lumotlarini firibgarlik yo'li bilan olish va ishlatish jinoyati, odatda moliyaviy maqsadda.
words.example1: Identity theft can destroy a victim's credit score and take years to fully resolve.
words.example1Translation: Shaxsni o'g'irlash jabrlanuvchining kredit ballini yo'q qilishi va to'liq hal qilish uchun yillar talab qilishi mumkin.
words.example2: She discovered she had been a victim of identity theft when unfamiliar charges appeared on her bank statement.
words.example2Translation: U bank hisobida noma'lum to'lovlar paydo bo'lganida shaxsini o'g'irlanganini aniqladi.
words.example3: Using strong and unique passwords for every account helps protect against identity theft.
words.example3Translation: Har bir hisob uchun kuchli va noyob parollardan foydalanish shaxsni o'g'irlashdan himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Identity theft often begins with a phishing scam or a data breach.
Criminals can use stolen identity information to open credit cards and take out loans.
Older adults are frequently targeted by identity theft scammers due to perceived vulnerability.
Shredding documents with personal information reduces the risk of physical identity theft.
Identity theft victims often face months of bureaucratic processes to reclaim their identity.
Monitoring your credit report regularly is one way to catch identity theft early.
Social media oversharing can inadvertently provide thieves with the information needed for identity theft.
extraExampleTranslations: Shaxsni o'g'irlash ko'pincha fishing firibgarligi yoki ma'lumotlar buzilishi bilan boshlanadi.
Jinoyatchilar o'g'irlangan shaxs ma'lumotlarini kredit kartalari ochish va kredit olish uchun ishlatishi mumkin.
Keksa yoshdagi odamlar ko'pincha zaiflik hissi sababli shaxsni o'g'irlash firibgarlari tomonidan nishonga olinadi.
Shaxsiy ma'lumotlar bo'lgan hujjatlarni maydalash jismoniy shaxsni o'g'irlash xavfini kamaytiradi.
Shaxsi o'g'irlangan jabrlanuvchilar ko'pincha shaxsini qaytarib olish uchun oylab byurokratik jarayonlarga duch keladi.
Kredit hisobingizni muntazam kuzatish shaxsni o'g'irlashni erta aniqlashning bir usuli.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda ortiqcha ma'lumot ulashish tasodifan o'g'irlarga shaxsni o'g'irlash uchun kerakli ma'lumotlarni berishi mumkin.

words.definition: The right and ability of individuals to control how their personal information and online activities are collected, stored, shared, and used by others.
words.definitionUz: Shaxslarning o'zlarining shaxsiy ma'lumotlari va onlayn faoliyatlari boshqalar tomonidan qanday to'planishi, saqlanishi, ulashilishi va ishlatilishini nazorat qilish huquqi va qobiliyati.
words.example1: Digital privacy is increasingly difficult to maintain in an age of constant data collection.
words.example1Translation: Raqamli maxfiylikni doimiy ma'lumot to'plash davrida saqlash tobora qiyinlashmoqda.
words.example2: Reading the terms and conditions of apps is important for understanding your digital privacy rights.
words.example2Translation: Ilovalar shartlari va shartlarini o'qish raqamli maxfiylik huquqlaringizni tushunish uchun muhim.
words.example3: Many people use VPNs to improve their digital privacy when browsing the internet.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odamlar internetda ko'rayotganlarida raqamli maxfiyliklarini yaxshilash uchun VPNdan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: Social media platforms have faced criticism for their poor handling of users' digital privacy.
Digital privacy laws differ significantly between the European Union and the United States.
Children's digital privacy requires extra protection due to their vulnerability online.
Advertisers often collect browsing data in ways that compromise users' digital privacy.
Many people are unaware of how much of their digital privacy they give up when using free apps.
Digital privacy advocates push for stricter regulations on how companies use personal data.
Turning off location tracking on your phone is a simple step toward better digital privacy.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy media platformalari foydalanuvchilarning raqamli maxfiyligini yomon boshqargani uchun tanqidga uchradi.
Raqamli maxfiylik qonunlari Yevropa Ittifoqi va Qo'shma Shtatlar o'rtasida sezilarli darajada farq qiladi.
Bolalarning raqamli maxfiyligini onlayn zaiflik sababli qo'shimcha himoya talab qiladi.
Reklamchilar ko'pincha foydalanuvchilarning raqamli maxfiyligini buzadigan usullarda ko'rish ma'lumotlarini to'playdi.
Ko'p odamlar bepul ilovalardan foydalanganda raqamli maxfiyliklaridan qanchalikni voz kechishlaridan bexabar.
Raqamli maxfiylik himoyachilari kompaniyalar shaxsiy ma'lumotlardan foydalanish bo'yicha qattiqroq qoidalarni talab qiladi.
Telefonıngizdagi joylashuv kuzatuvini o'chirish yaxshiroq raqamli maxfiylik sari oddiy qadam.

words.definition: The practice of protecting computers, servers, mobile devices, electronic systems, networks, and data from digital attacks, damage, or unauthorized access.
words.definitionUz: Kompyuterlar, serverlar, mobil qurilmalar, elektron tizimlar, tarmoqlar va ma'lumotlarni raqamli hujumlar, zarar yoki ruxsatsiz kirishdan himoya qilish amaliyoti.
words.example1: Cybersecurity experts warn that many businesses are underprepared for a serious cyberattack.
words.example1Translation: Kiberhavfsizlik mutaxassislari ko'plab korxonalar jiddiy kiberhujumga yetarlicha tayyorlanmaganligidan ogohlantirishadi.
words.example2: Good cybersecurity practices include regular software updates and using strong passwords.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi kiberhavfsizlik amaliyotlariga muntazam dasturiy ta'minot yangilanishlari va kuchli parollardan foydalanish kiradi.
words.example3: Governments are investing heavily in cybersecurity to protect critical national infrastructure.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar muhim milliy infratuzilmani himoya qilish uchun kiberhavfsizlikka katta sarmoya kiritmoqda.
extraExamples: The demand for cybersecurity professionals has grown rapidly as cyber threats have increased.
A weak cybersecurity policy can leave even large organizations exposed to attacks.
Cybersecurity training for all employees is essential, not just for the IT department.
Small businesses are often targeted by hackers because of weaker cybersecurity measures.
Cybersecurity threats include malware, ransomware, phishing, and denial-of-service attacks.
International cooperation is increasingly important for tackling cross-border cybersecurity threats.
Cybersecurity is now considered a matter of national security in most developed countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Kiber tahdidlar ortishi bilan kiberhavfsizlik mutaxassislariga talab tezda o'sdi.
Zaif kiberhavfsizlik siyosati hatto yirik tashkilotlarni ham hujumlarga ochiq qoldirishi mumkin.
Barcha xodimlar uchun kiberhavfsizlik bo'yicha trening faqat IT bo'limi uchun emas, balki muhim.
Kichik korxonalar ko'pincha zaifroq kiberhavfsizlik choralari sababli xakerlar tomonidan nishonga olinadi.
Kiberhavfsizlik tahdidlariga zararli dasturlar, to'lov dasturlari, fishing va xizmatni rad etish hujumlari kiradi.
Xalqaro hamkorlik chegaralararo kiberhavfsizlik tahdidlarini hal qilish uchun tobora muhim bo'lib bormoqda.
Kiberhavfsizlik ko'pgina rivojlangan mamlakatlarda milliy xavfsizlik masalasi sifatida ko'riladi.

words.definition: Unique physical or behavioral characteristics of an individual — such as fingerprints, facial features, iris patterns, or voice — that are used to verify or identify that person.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsni tekshirish yoki identifikatsiya qilish uchun ishlatiladigan, barmoq izlari, yuz xususiyatlari, ko'z pardasi naqshlari yoki ovoz kabi shaxsning noyob jismoniy yoki xulq-atvor xususiyatlari.
words.example1: Biometric data like fingerprints is now commonly used to unlock smartphones.
words.example1Translation: Barmoq izlari kabi biometrik ma'lumotlar endi smartfonlarni qulfdan chiqarish uchun keng qo'llaniladi.
words.example2: Airports use biometric data such as facial recognition to speed up passport checks.
words.example2Translation: Aeroportlar pasport tekshiruvlarini tezlashtirish uchun yuz tanish kabi biometrik ma'lumotlardan foydalanadi.
words.example3: Unlike passwords, biometric data cannot easily be changed if it is compromised.
words.example3Translation: Parollardan farqli o'laroq, biometrik ma'lumotlar buzilgan taqdirda osongina o'zgartirib bo'lmaydi.
extraExamples: The collection of biometric data by governments raises serious civil liberties concerns.
Biometric data is considered especially sensitive because it is permanently linked to a person's identity.
Banks are increasingly using biometric data to verify customers during online transactions.
The storage of biometric data in large databases creates significant security risks.
Some countries restrict the use of biometric data by private companies without explicit consent.
Biometric data collected by employers to track attendance has sparked privacy debates.
Children's biometric data is subject to stricter legal protections in many jurisdictions.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumatlar tomonidan biometrik ma'lumotlar to'plash jiddiy fuqarolik erkinliklari muammolarini tug'diradi.
Biometrik ma'lumotlar ayniqsa nozik hisoblanadi, chunki u doimiy ravishda shaxs identifikatsiyasi bilan bog'liq.
Banklar onlayn tranzaktsiyalar paytida mijozlarni tekshirish uchun tobora ko'proq biometrik ma'lumotlardan foydalanmoqda.
Katta ma'lumotlar bazalarida biometrik ma'lumotlarni saqlash sezilarli xavfsizlik xavflarini yaratadi.
Ba'zi mamlakatlar aniq rozilikisiz xususiy kompaniyalar tomonidan biometrik ma'lumotlardan foydalanishni cheklaydi.
Ish beruvchilar tomonidan davomiylikni kuzatish uchun to'plangan biometrik ma'lumotlar maxfiylik bahslarini qo'zg'atdi.
Bolalarning biometrik ma'lumotlari ko'plab yurisdiktsiyalarda qattiqroq huquqiy himoyaga ega.

words.definition: The large-scale, systematic monitoring of an entire population or a large segment of it by governments or other powerful entities, often through digital means.
words.definitionUz: Hukumatlar yoki boshqa kuchli tashkilotlar tomonidan ko'pincha raqamli vositalar orqali butun aholini yoki uning katta qismini keng ko'lamli, tizimli ravishda kuzatish.
words.example1: Mass surveillance programs often collect phone calls, emails, and internet browsing data.
words.example1Translation: Ommaviy kuzatuv dasturlari ko'pincha telefon qo'ng'iroqlari, elektron pochta xabarlari va internet ko'rish ma'lumotlarini to'playdi.
words.example2: Civil liberties groups argue that mass surveillance violates fundamental rights to privacy and free expression.
words.example2Translation: Fuqarolik erkinliklari guruhlari ommaviy kuzatuv maxfiylik va erkin ifoda huquqlarini buzadi deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3: The revelations about mass surveillance by intelligence agencies shocked the world in 2013.
words.example3Translation: Razvedka idoralari tomonidan ommaviy kuzatuv haqidagi oshkor qilishlar 2013-yilda dunyo bo'ylab hayratga soldi.
extraExamples: Mass surveillance technology is increasingly affordable and accessible to governments worldwide.
Critics warn that mass surveillance can easily be turned against political opponents and journalists.
Some governments justify mass surveillance as essential for preventing terrorism.
Mass surveillance programs have been found to be ineffective at stopping most criminal activity.
Public cameras with facial recognition capabilities are a visible form of mass surveillance.
Mass surveillance erodes trust between citizens and the state over time.
Court rulings in several countries have declared certain mass surveillance practices unlawful.
extraExampleTranslations: Ommaviy kuzatuv texnologiyasi butun dunyo bo'ylab hukumatlar uchun tobora arzonroq va qulayroq bo'lmoqda.
Tanqidchilar ommaviy kuzatuv osongina siyosiy raqiblar va jurnalistlarga qarshi ishlatilishi mumkinligidan ogohlantirishadi.
Ba'zi hukumatlar ommaviy kuzatuvni terrorizmni oldini olish uchun zaruriy deb oqlaydi.
Ommaviy kuzatuv dasturlari ko'pchilik jinoiy faoliyatni to'xtatishda samarasiz ekani aniqlandi.
Yuz tanish imkoniyatli jamoat kameralari ommaviy kuzatuvning ko'rinadigan shakli.
Ommaviy kuzatuv vaqt o'tishi bilan fuqarolar va davlat o'rtasidagi ishonchni susaytiradi.
Bir necha mamlakatlardagi sud qarorlari ma'lum ommaviy kuzatuv amaliyotlarini noqonuniy deb topdi.

words.definition: Legal regulations that govern how organizations collect, store, process, and share individuals' personal data, and that give individuals rights over their own information.
words.definitionUz: Tashkilotlar shaxslarning shaxsiy ma'lumotlarini qanday to'plashi, saqlashi, qayta ishlashi va ulashishini tartibga soladigan va shaxslarga o'z ma'lumotlari ustidan huquqlar beradigan huquqiy qoidalar.
words.example1: The EU's General Data Protection Regulation is one of the strictest data protection laws in the world.
words.example1Translation: Yevropа Ittifoqining Umumiy ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qoidalari dunyodagi eng qat'iy ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlaridan biri.
words.example2: Under data protection laws, companies must obtain clear consent before collecting personal information.
words.example2Translation: Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlari bo'yicha kompaniyalar shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni to'plashdan oldin aniq rozilik olishlari shart.
words.example3: Violations of data protection laws can result in substantial financial penalties for businesses.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlarini buzish korxonalar uchun katta moliyaviy jarimalaarga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Data protection laws require companies to inform users about how their data is being used.
Many countries are updating their data protection laws to keep pace with rapid technological change.
Data protection laws give individuals the right to access and correct the data held about them.
Technology companies have lobbied extensively against stricter data protection laws.
Data protection laws place special restrictions on the handling of sensitive categories of data.
Cross-border data transfers must comply with both countries' data protection laws.
The introduction of stronger data protection laws has forced companies to review their privacy practices.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlari kompaniyalardan foydalanuvchilarni ma'lumotlari qanday ishlatilayotgani haqida xabardor qilishni talab qiladi.
Ko'plab mamlakatlar tez texnologik o'zgarishlar bilan uyg'unlashish uchun ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlarini yangilamoqda.
Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlari shaxslarga o'zlari haqida saqlanadigan ma'lumotlarga kirish va ularni to'g'rilash huquqini beradi.
Texnologiya kompaniyalari qattiqroq ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlariga qarshi faol lobbi qildi.
Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlari nozik ma'lumotlar toifalarini ko'rib chiqishga maxsus cheklovlar qo'yadi.
Chegaralararo ma'lumotlarni o'tkazish ikkala mamlakatning ham ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlariga muvofiq bo'lishi kerak.
Kuchliroq ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qonunlarining joriy etilishi kompaniyalarni maxfiylik amaliyotlarini ko'rib chiqishga majbur qildi.

words.definition: Any action or practice that violates an individual's right to privacy by accessing, revealing, or misusing their personal information without their knowledge or consent.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsning roziligisiz yoki xabarsiz holda uning shaxsiy ma'lumotlariga kirish, oshkor qilish yoki suiiste'mol qilish yo'li bilan maxfiylik huquqini buzadigan har qanday harakat yoki amaliyot.
words.example1: Publishing someone's home address online without their consent is a serious privacy infringement.
words.example1Translation: Birovning uy manzilini roziligisiz onlayn nashr qilish jiddiy maxfiylikni buzish hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The employee sued the company for privacy infringement after it monitored their personal emails.
words.example2Translation: Xodim shaxsiy elektron pochta xabarlarini kuzatgani uchun kompaniyaga maxfiylikni buzish bo'yicha da'vo qildi.
words.example3: Installing hidden cameras in private spaces is both a criminal offense and a privacy infringement.
words.example3Translation: Xususiy joylarga yashirin kamera o'rnatish ham jinoiy huquqbuzarlik, ham maxfiylikni buzish.
extraExamples: Sharing private photographs of someone without their permission is considered a privacy infringement.
Privacy infringement by corporations often goes unnoticed because users don't read terms of service.
The new law was introduced specifically to address privacy infringement on social media platforms.
Many victims of privacy infringement feel a lasting sense of violation and anxiety.
Data brokers have been accused of systematic privacy infringement by selling personal information.
Privacy infringement cases have become increasingly common as more personal data moves online.
Employers who monitor staff outside of work hours may be committing a privacy infringement.
extraExampleTranslations: Birovning shaxsiy fotosuratlarini ruxsatisiz ulashish maxfiylikni buzish deb hisoblanadi.
Korporatsiyalar tomonidan maxfiylikni buzish ko'pincha foydalanuvchilar xizmat shartlarini o'qimagani sababli e'tibordan chetda qoladi.
Yangi qonun maxsus ravishda ijtimoiy media platformalarida maxfiylikni buzishni hal qilish uchun joriy qilindi.
Maxfiyligini buzilgan ko'p qurbonlar doimiy buzilganlik va tashvish hissini his qiladi.
Ma'lumotlar brokerlari shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni sotish yo'li bilan tizimli maxfiylikni buzishda ayblandi.
Ko'proq shaxsiy ma'lumotlar onlayn o'tishi bilan maxfiylikni buzish holatlari tobora ko'paymoqda.
Ish vaqtidan tashqarida xodimlarni kuzatadigan ish beruvchilar maxfiylikni buzishda aybdor bo'lishi mumkin.

words.definition: The record of all data traces a person leaves behind through their online activities, including websites visited, social media posts, emails sent, and purchases made.
words.definitionUz: Odamning onlayn faoliyati orqali qoldirgan barcha ma'lumot izlari yozuvi, shu jumladan tashrif buyurilgan veb-saytlar, ijtimoiy media postlari, yuborilgan elektron pochta xabarlari va amalga oshirilgan xaridlar.
words.example1: Everything you post online contributes to your digital footprint and can last indefinitely.
words.example1Translation: Onlaynda joylashtiradigan har bir narsa raqamli izingizga hissa qo'shadi va cheksiz davom etishi mumkin.
words.example2: Employers often search candidates' digital footprint before making hiring decisions.
words.example2Translation: Ish beruvchilar ko'pincha yollash qarorlarini qabul qilishdan oldin nomzodlarning raqamli izini qidiradi.
words.example3: Using private browsing mode reduces but does not completely eliminate your digital footprint.
words.example3Translation: Xususiy ko'rish rejimidan foydalanish raqamli izingizni kamaytiradi, ammo uni to'liq yo'q qilmaydi.
extraExamples: Your digital footprint includes both the information you share and the data collected without your knowledge.
Children should be taught early about the long-term implications of their digital footprint.
Advertisers use your digital footprint to target you with personalized content and products.
Reducing your digital footprint involves regularly deleting old accounts and limiting data sharing.
A large digital footprint can make individuals more vulnerable to identity theft and hacking.
Many people are unaware of how extensive their digital footprint has become over the years.
Governments and corporations can build detailed profiles of individuals using their digital footprint.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli izingiz siz ulashgan ma'lumotlar ham, sizning xabarsizligingizda to'plangan ma'lumotlarni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
Bolalarga raqamli izlarining uzoq muddatli oqibatlari haqida erta o'rgatilishi kerak.
Reklamchilar sizni maqsadli kontent va mahsulotlar bilan nishonga olish uchun raqamli izingizdan foydalanadi.
Raqamli izingizni kamaytirish eski hisoblarni muntazam o'chirish va ma'lumot almashishni cheklashni o'z ichiga oladi.
Katta raqamli iz shaxslarni shaxsini o'g'irlash va xakerlikka ko'proq moyil qilishi mumkin.
Ko'p odamlar yillar davomida raqamli izlari qanchalik keng bo'lib ketganini bilishmaydi.
Hukumatlar va korporatsiyalar raqamli izidan foydalanib shaxslarning batafsil profillarini tuzishi mumkin.

words.definition: The use of hacking techniques and unauthorized access to computer systems as a form of protest or activism to promote a political, social, or ideological cause.
words.definitionUz: Siyosiy, ijtimoiy yoki mafkuraviy maqsadni targ'ib qilish uchun e'tiroz yoki faollik shakli sifatida xakerlik usullari va kompyuter tizimlariga ruxsatsiz kirishdan foydalanish.
words.example1: The hacker group used hacktivism to expose corruption in the government by leaking confidential files.
words.example1Translation: Xakerlar guruhi maxfiy fayllarni oshkor qilib, hukumattagi korruptsiyani fosh qilish uchun xaktivizmdan foydalandi.
words.example2: Supporters of hacktivism argue that it gives a voice to those without power against large institutions.
words.example2Translation: Xaktivizmni qo'llab-quvvatlovchilar u kuchsiz odamlarga yirik institutlarga qarshi ovoz beradi deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example3: Anonymous is one of the most well-known groups associated with hacktivism worldwide.
words.example3Translation: Anonymous butun dunyo bo'ylab xaktivizm bilan bog'liq eng taniqli guruhlardan biri.
extraExamples: Hacktivism raises difficult ethical questions about when breaking the law is justified for a cause.
Governments have prosecuted hacktivists under cybercrime laws, sparking debates about free speech.
Some hacktivism campaigns have successfully exposed human rights abuses by authoritarian regimes.
Critics argue that hacktivism can harm innocent people who have no connection to the targeted organization.
The line between hacktivism and criminal hacking is often blurred and legally contested.
Hacktivism has been used to protest against corporations, governments, and extremist groups.
The rise of hacktivism has forced organizations to improve their cybersecurity measures significantly.
extraExampleTranslations: Xaktivizm qonunni qachon buzish maqsad uchun oqlanishi haqida qiyin axloqiy savollarni tug'diradi.
Hukumatlar xaktivistlarni kiberjinoyat qonunlari bo'yicha jinoiy javobgarlilkka tortdi va bu erkin so'z haqidagi bahslarni qo'zg'atdi.
Ba'zi xaktivizm kampaniyalari muvaffaqiyatli ravishda avtoritar rejimlar tomonidan sodir etilgan inson huquqlari buzilishlarini fosh qildi.
Tanqidchilar xaktivizm nishonga olingan tashkilot bilan hech qanday aloqasi bo'lmagan begunoh odamlarga zarar yetkazishi mumkinligini ta'kidlaydi.
Xaktivizm va jinoiy xakerlik o'rtasidagi chegara ko'pincha xiralashgan va huquqiy jihatdan bahsli.
Xaktivizm korporatsiyalar, hukumatlar va ekstremist guruhlariga e'tiroz bildirish uchun ishlatilgan.
Xaktivizmning yuksalishi tashkilotlarni kiberhavfsizlik choralarini sezilarli darajada yaxshilashga majbur qildi.

words.definition: A security process that requires a user to verify their identity using two different and independent methods before being granted access to an account or system.
words.definitionUz: Foydalanuvchidan hisob yoki tizimga kirishdan oldin ikkita turli va mustaqil usul yordamida o'z shaxsini tasdiqlashni talab qiladigan xavfsizlik jarayoni.
words.example1: Enabling two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your online accounts.
words.example1Translation: Ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyani yoqish onlayn hisoblaringizga qo'shimcha xavfsizlik qatlami qo'shadi.
words.example2: Even if someone steals your password, two-factor authentication can still block unauthorized access.
words.example2Translation: Kimdir parolingizni o'g'irlab olsa ham, ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiya ruxsatsiz kirishni bloklashi mumkin.
words.example3: Many banks now require two-factor authentication for all online transactions.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab banklar endi barcha onlayn tranzaktsiyalar uchun ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyani talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Two-factor authentication typically combines something you know with something you have or are.
Security experts strongly recommend enabling two-factor authentication on email and social media accounts.
A common form of two-factor authentication sends a verification code to your mobile phone.
Some two-factor authentication systems use biometric data like fingerprints as the second factor.
Two-factor authentication significantly reduces the success rate of phishing and hacking attempts.
Many people avoid two-factor authentication because they find it inconvenient, despite its security benefits.
Hardware security keys represent one of the strongest forms of two-factor authentication available.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiya odatda siz biladigan narsani siz ega bo'lgan yoki siz bo'lgan narsa bilan birlashtiradi.
Xavfsizlik mutaxassislari elektron pochta va ijtimoiy media hisoblarida ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyani yoqishni qat'iy tavsiya etadi.
Ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyaning keng tarqalgan shakli mobil telefoningizga tasdiqlash kodi yuboradi.
Ba'zi ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiya tizimlari ikkinchi omil sifatida barmoq izlari kabi biometrik ma'lumotlardan foydalanadi.
Ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiya fishing va xakerlik urinishlarining muvaffaqiyat darajasini sezilarli darajada kamaytiradi.
Ko'p odamlar xavfsizlik afzalliklariga qaramay, noqulay deb topganliklari sababli ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyadan qochadi.
Apparatli xavfsizlik kalitlari mavjud ikki bosqichli autentifikatsiyaning eng kuchli shakllaridan birini ifodalaydi.

words.definition: A person who exposes information about illegal, unethical, or harmful activities within an organization — such as a company or government — often at significant personal risk.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha katta shaxsiy xavf ostida tashkilot — kompaniya yoki hukumat — ichidagi noqonuniy, axloqsiz yoki zararli faoliyat haqida ma'lumotlarni oshkor qiluvchi shaxs.
words.example1: The whistleblower risked their career to reveal how the company had been dumping toxic waste illegally.
words.example1Translation: Fosh qiluvchi kompaniya zaharli chiqindilarni noqonuniy ravishda tashlayotganini oshkor qilish uchun o'z martabasini xavf ostiga qo'ydi.
words.example2: Edward Snowden is one of the most famous whistleblowers in modern history.
words.example2Translation: Edward Snowden zamonaviy tarixdagi eng mashhur fosh qiluvchilardan biri.
words.example3: Many countries have introduced laws to protect whistleblowers from retaliation by their employers.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab mamlakatlar fosh qiluvchilarni ish beruvchilari tomonidan qasos olishdan himoya qilish uchun qonunlar joriy qildi.
extraExamples: Without whistleblowers, many cases of corporate fraud and government corruption would go undetected.
A whistleblower may face job loss, legal prosecution, and social stigma for speaking out.
The whistleblower reported the safety violations to regulators after internal complaints were ignored.
Some whistleblowers choose to remain anonymous to protect themselves from retaliation.
Whistleblower protection laws vary greatly in their strength and scope across different countries.
Journalists often rely on whistleblowers to uncover stories that organizations want to keep secret.
The public debate about whether a whistleblower is a hero or a traitor often depends on political viewpoint.
extraExampleTranslations: Fosh qiluvchilarsiz, korporativ firibgarlik va hukumat korruptsiyasining ko'plab holatlari aniqlanmay qolardi.
Fosh qiluvchi gapirganlik uchun ish yo'qotish, jinoiy javobgarlik va ijtimoiy tamg'aga duch kelishi mumkin.
Fosh qiluvchi ichki shikoyatlar e'tiborga olinmaganidan keyin xavfsizlik qoidabuzarliklarini nazorat organlariga xabar qildi.
Ba'zi fosh qiluvchilar o'zlarini qasosdansaqlab qolish uchun anonim bo'lib qolishni tanlaydi.
Fosh qiluvchilarni himoya qilish qonunlari turli mamlakatlarda kuch va ko'lam jihatidan juda farq qiladi.
Jurnalistlar ko'pincha tashkilotlar sir saqlamoqchi bo'lgan xabarlarni aniqlash uchun fosh qiluvchilarga tayanadi.
Fosh qiluvchi qahramon yoki xoinmi degan jamoat bahsi ko'pincha siyosiy nuqtai nazarga bog'liq.

words.definition: The legal right of individuals to request that search engines and websites remove outdated, irrelevant, or harmful personal information about them from their results and databases.
words.definitionUz: Shaxslarning qidiruv tizimlari va veb-saytlardan o'zlari haqidagi eskirgan, tegishsiz yoki zararli shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni natijalar va ma'lumotlar bazalaridan olib tashlashni so'rash huquqi.
words.example1: The right to be forgotten allows people to request the removal of embarrassing or damaging old news articles about them.
words.example1Translation: Unutilish huquqi odamlarga o'zlari haqidagi uyatli yoki zararli eski yangilik maqolalarini olib tashlashni so'rash imkonini beradi.
words.example2: The European Court of Justice recognized the right to be forgotten in a landmark 2014 ruling.
words.example2Translation: Yevropa Adliya Sudi 2014-yilgi muhim qarorida unutilish huquqini tan oldi.
words.example3: Google receives millions of right to be forgotten requests each year from individuals across Europe.
words.example3Translation: Google har yili Yevropadan shaxslarning millionlab unutilish huquqi so'rovlarini qabul qiladi.
extraExamples: The right to be forgotten must be balanced carefully against freedom of the press and public interest.
Not all right to be forgotten requests are granted — requests must meet specific legal criteria.
The right to be forgotten is particularly relevant for people who made mistakes in their youth.
Critics argue that the right to be forgotten amounts to a form of online censorship.
The right to be forgotten does not apply to information that is in the public interest to remain accessible.
Some journalists worry that the right to be forgotten could be misused to erase legitimate reporting.
The right to be forgotten is much more limited in the United States than in the European Union.
extraExampleTranslations: Unutilish huquqi matbuot erkinligi va jamoat manfaatlari bilan ehtiyotkorlik bilan muvozanatlashtirilishi kerak.
Barcha unutilish huquqi so'rovlari qabul qilinmaydi — so'rovlar ma'lum huquqiy mezonlarga javob berishi kerak.
Unutilish huquqi ayniqsa yoshligida xato qilgan odamlar uchun muhim.
Tanqidchilar unutilish huquqi onlayn tsenzuraning bir shakli ekanligini ta'kidlaydi.
Unutilish huquqi jamoat manfaatlari uchun ochiq bo'lib qolishi kerak bo'lgan ma'lumotlarga tatbiq etilmaydi.
Ba'zi jurnalistlar unutilish huquqi qonuniy hisobotlarni o'chirish uchun suiiste'mol qilinishi mumkinligidan tashvishlanadi.
Unutilish huquqi Qo'shma Shtatlarda Yevropa Ittifoqiga qaraganda ancha cheklangan.

words.definition: A person's own assessment of their life satisfaction and emotional health.
words.definitionUz: Insonning o'z hayoti va his-tuyg'ulari haqidagi shaxsiy baholashi, ya'ni qanchalik mamnun va baxtli ekanligi.
words.example1: Researchers measure subjective well-being through surveys about life satisfaction.
words.example1Translation: Tadqiqotchilar hayotdan mamnunlik haqidagi so'rovnomalar orqali shaxsiy farovonlikni o'lchashadi.
words.example2: Higher income doesn't always lead to greater subjective well-being.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori daromad har doim ham kattaroq shaxsiy farovonlikka olib kelmaydi.
words.example3: Strong relationships are closely linked to subjective well-being.
words.example3Translation: Mustahkam munosabatlar shaxsiy farovonlik bilan chambarchas bog'liqdir.
extraExamples: Subjective well-being can change depending on daily experiences.
Psychologists study how culture influences subjective well-being.
Her subjective well-being improved after she started exercising regularly.
Subjective well-being includes both emotional and cognitive evaluations of life.
Countries are now ranked partly based on citizens' subjective well-being.
Sleep quality has a noticeable effect on subjective well-being.
Subjective well-being tends to be higher among people with strong social ties.
extraExampleTranslations: Shaxsiy farovonlik kundalik tajribalarga qarab o'zgarishi mumkin.
Psixologlar madaniyat shaxsiy farovonlikka qanday ta'sir qilishini o'rganishadi.
U muntazam mashq qila boshlagach, uning shaxsiy farovonligi yaxshilandi.
Shaxsiy farovonlik hayotning hissiy va bilim jihatlarini baholashni o'z ichiga oladi.
Davlatlar endi qisman fuqarolarning shaxsiy farovonligiga asoslanib reytingga kiritilmoqda.
Uyqu sifati shaxsiy farovonlikka sezilarli ta'sir ko'rsatadi.
Kuchli ijtimoiy aloqalarga ega odamlarda shaxsiy farovonlik odatda yuqoriroq bo'ladi.

words.definition: The equilibrium between professional responsibilities and personal life.
words.definitionUz: Ish majburiyatlari va shaxsiy hayot o'rtasidagi muvozanat, ikkalasiga ham yetarli vaqt ajratish.
words.example1: She left her job to focus on improving her work-life balance.
words.example1Translation: U ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashga e'tibor qaratish uchun ishidan ketdi.
words.example2: A poor work-life balance can lead to burnout over time.
words.example2Translation: Yomon ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati vaqt o'tishi bilan his-tuyg'u tugashiga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Many companies now offer flexible hours to support work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Ko'plab kompaniyalar endi ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif qilishadi.
extraExamples: Finding a good work-life balance is harder in demanding careers.
He prioritizes work-life balance over a higher salary.
Remote work has changed how people think about work-life balance.
Their company culture strongly supports work-life balance.
Lack of work-life balance is a common reason for job dissatisfaction.
She set strict boundaries to protect her work-life balance.
Work-life balance looks different for everyone depending on their priorities.
extraExampleTranslations: Talabchan kasblarda yaxshi ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini topish qiyinroq.
U yuqori maoshdan ko'ra ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga ustuvorlik beradi.
Masofadan ishlash odamlarning ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati haqidagi fikrini o'zgartirdi.
Ularning kompaniya madaniyati ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini qattiq qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatining yetishmasligi ishdan norozilikning keng tarqalgan sababidir.
U o'z ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini himoya qilish uchun qat'iy chegaralar o'rnatdi.
Ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati har bir kishi uchun ustuvorliklarga qarab boshqacha ko'rinadi.

words.definition: A mental practice of focusing one's awareness on the present moment.
words.definitionUz: Diqqatni hozirgi lahzaga qaratish va his-tuyg'ularni baholamasdan kuzatish amaliyoti.
words.example1: She practices mindfulness every morning to reduce stress.
words.example1Translation: U stressni kamaytirish uchun har kuni ertalab ongli mavjudlikni mashq qiladi.
words.example2: Mindfulness has become a popular technique in modern therapy.
words.example2Translation: Ongli mavjudlik zamonaviy terapiyada mashhur usulga aylandi.
words.example3: Practicing mindfulness can help you stay calm during difficult situations.
words.example3Translation: Ongli mavjudlikni mashq qilish qiyin vaziyatlarda xotirjam qolishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Many schools now teach mindfulness to help students manage anxiety.
Mindfulness involves paying attention to your thoughts without judgment.
He uses mindfulness exercises before important meetings.
Mindfulness apps have grown in popularity over the past few years.
Studies show mindfulness can improve focus and emotional regulation.
She learned mindfulness through a meditation course.
