Mindfulness encourages people to notice small details in everyday life.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab maktablar endi o'quvchilarga tashvishni boshqarishga yordam berish uchun ongli mavjudlikni o'rgatishadi.
Ongli mavjudlik o'z fikrlaringizga baho bermasdan e'tibor berishni o'z ichiga oladi.
U muhim uchrashuvlardan oldin ongli mavjudlik mashqlaridan foydalanadi.
So'nggi bir necha yil ichida ongli mavjudlik ilovalari mashhurlikka ega bo'ldi.
Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, ongli mavjudlik diqqat va hissiy boshqaruvni yaxshilashi mumkin.
U ongli mavjudlikni meditatsiya kursi orqali o'rgandi.
Ongli mavjudlik odamlarni kundalik hayotdagi kichik tafsilotlarga e'tibor berishga undaydi.

words.definition: A social and economic order that encourages the constant acquisition of goods.
words.definitionUz: Doimiy ravishda yangi narsalarni sotib olishni rag'batlantiradigan ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy tartib.
words.example1: Critics argue that consumerism contributes to environmental damage.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar iste'molchilik atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazishga hissa qo'shishini ta'kidlashadi.
words.example2: Consumerism is fueled by advertising and the desire for new products.
words.example2Translation: Iste'molchilik reklama va yangi mahsulotlarga bo'lgan istak orqali rivojlanadi.
words.example3: She decided to reject consumerism and live a simpler life.
words.example3Translation: U iste'molchilikni rad etib, soddaroq hayot kechirishga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: Consumerism encourages people to define happiness through material goods.
The documentary criticizes the effects of consumerism on society.
Black Friday is often seen as a symbol of modern consumerism.
Consumerism has increased significantly with the rise of online shopping.
Some movements promote alternatives to consumerism, like sustainable living.
Consumerism can lead to excessive debt and financial stress.
Children are exposed to consumerism through advertising from a young age.
extraExampleTranslations: Iste'molchilik odamlarni baxtni moddiy narsalar orqali aniqlashga undaydi.
Hujjatli film iste'molchilikning jamiyatga ta'sirini tanqid qiladi.
Qora juma ko'pincha zamonaviy iste'molchilikning ramzi sifatida qaraladi.
Onlayn xarid qilishning o'sishi bilan iste'molchilik sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Ba'zi harakatlar barqaror turmush tarzi kabi iste'molchilikka muqobillarni targ'ib qiladi.
Iste'molchilik haddan tashqari qarz va moliyaviy stressga olib kelishi mumkin.
Bolalar yoshligidan boshlab reklama orqali iste'molchilikka duch kelishadi.

words.definition: The tendency to return to a stable level of happiness after positive or negative events.
words.definitionUz: Ijobiy yoki salbiy voqealardan keyin insonning baxt darajasi asta-sekin avvalgi holatga qaytish hodisasi.
words.example1: Hedonic adaptation explains why a new car eventually stops feeling exciting.
words.example1Translation: Hissiy moslashish nima uchun yangi mashina oxir-oqibat hayajonli his qilinmay qolishini tushuntiradi.
words.example2: Despite winning the lottery, many people experience hedonic adaptation within months.
words.example2Translation: Loteriyada yutib olishlariga qaramay, ko'plab odamlar bir necha oy ichida hissiy moslashishni boshdan kechirishadi.
words.example3: Hedonic adaptation suggests that lasting happiness comes from more than material gains.
words.example3Translation: Hissiy moslashish doimiy baxt moddiy yutuqlardan ko'proq narsadan kelib chiqishini ko'rsatadi.
extraExamples: Researchers studied hedonic adaptation in people after major life changes.
Hedonic adaptation can make it hard to stay satisfied with possessions.
Understanding hedonic adaptation helps explain consumer behavior.
Even painful events are subject to hedonic adaptation over time.
Hedonic adaptation is one reason why people constantly seek new experiences.
Psychologists use hedonic adaptation to explain why happiness levels often stay stable.
Hedonic adaptation challenges the idea that buying more leads to lasting joy.
extraExampleTranslations: Tadqiqotchilar katta hayotiy o'zgarishlardan keyin odamlardagi hissiy moslashishni o'rganishdi.
Hissiy moslashish narsalardan doimiy mamnun bo'lib qolishni qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
Hissiy moslashishni tushunish iste'molchi xulq-atvorini tushuntirishga yordam beradi.
Hatto og'riqli voqealar ham vaqt o'tishi bilan hissiy moslashishga uchraydi.
Hissiy moslashish odamlarning doimiy yangi tajribalarni izlashining sabablaridan biridir.
Psixologlar nima uchun baxt darajasi ko'pincha barqaror qolishini tushuntirish uchun hissiy moslashishdan foydalanishadi.
Hissiy moslashish ko'proq narsa sotib olish doimiy quvonchga olib keladi degan fikrga qarshi chiqadi.

words.definition: A lifestyle that emphasizes living with fewer possessions and greater intentionality.
words.definitionUz: Kamroq narsaga ega bo'lib, ongli va maqsadli yashashni ustuvor qo'yadigan turmush tarzi.
words.example1: She adopted minimalism after feeling overwhelmed by clutter in her home.
words.example1Translation: Uyidagi tartibsizlikdan charchaganidan keyin u minimalizmni qabul qildi.
words.example2: Minimalism encourages people to keep only what truly adds value to their lives.
words.example2Translation: Minimalizm odamlarni hayotlariga haqiqatan ham qiymat qo'shadigan narsalarnigina saqlab qolishga undaydi.
words.example3: Their apartment reflects a clean, minimalism-inspired design.
words.example3Translation: Ularning kvartirasi toza, minimalizmdan ilhomlangan dizaynni aks ettiradi.
extraExamples: Minimalism has become popular as a way to reduce stress and clutter.
He practices minimalism by owning only essential items.
Minimalism isn't just about fewer things, but also fewer distractions.
Many minimalism advocates focus on experiences instead of possessions.
Minimalism can also apply to digital habits, like reducing screen time.
The couple embraced minimalism to save money and live more simply.
Minimalism encourages mindful spending and intentional living.
extraExampleTranslations: Minimalizm stress va tartibsizlikni kamaytirish usuli sifatida mashhur bo'ldi.
U faqat zarur narsalarga ega bo'lish orqali minimalizmni amalga oshiradi.
Minimalizm faqat kamroq narsaga ega bo'lish emas, balki kamroq chalg'ishni ham anglatadi.
Ko'plab minimalizm tarafdorlari narsalar o'rniga tajribalarga e'tibor qaratishadi.
Minimalizm ekran vaqtini kamaytirish kabi raqamli odatlarga ham qo'llanilishi mumkin.
Er-xotin pul tejash va soddaroq yashash uchun minimalizmni qabul qilishdi.
Minimalizm ongli xarajat va maqsadli yashashni rag'batlantiradi.

words.definition: The relationships and sense of belonging with other people.
words.definitionUz: Boshqa odamlar bilan o'zaro munosabat va ularga tegishlilik tuyg'usi.
words.example1: Strong social connection is one of the key factors in long-term happiness.
words.example1Translation: Kuchli ijtimoiy aloqa uzoq muddatli baxtning asosiy omillaridan biridir.
words.example2: The pandemic highlighted how important social connection is for mental health.
words.example2Translation: Pandemiya ijtimoiy aloqaning ruhiy salomatlik uchun naqadar muhim ekanligini ko'rsatdi.
words.example3: Joining a club is a great way to build social connection.
words.example3Translation: Klubga qo'shilish ijtimoiy aloqani mustahkamlashning ajoyib usulidir.
extraExamples: Lack of social connection is linked to higher rates of loneliness.
Social connection can be maintained through both in-person and online interactions.
Volunteering helps people build new social connections.
Older adults often face challenges in maintaining social connection.
Social connection plays a major role in workplace satisfaction.
They moved to a new city and struggled to find social connection at first.
Strong social connection has been shown to boost physical health as well.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy aloqaning yetishmasligi yolg'izlik darajasining yuqoriligi bilan bog'liq.
Ijtimoiy aloqani ham shaxsiy, ham onlayn muloqot orqali saqlab qolish mumkin.
Ko'ngillilik odamlarga yangi ijtimoiy aloqalar o'rnatishga yordam beradi.
Keksa yoshdagi odamlar ko'pincha ijtimoiy aloqani saqlashda qiyinchiliklarga duch kelishadi.
Ijtimoiy aloqa ish joyidagi mamnunlikda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Ular yangi shaharga ko'chib o'tishdi va dastlab ijtimoiy aloqa topishda qiynalishdi.
Kuchli ijtimoiy aloqa jismoniy salomatlikni ham yaxshilashi isbotlangan.

words.definition: The habit of regularly reflecting on and appreciating the positive aspects of life.
words.definitionUz: Hayotning ijobiy jihatlarini muntazam ravishda eslab, ularga minnatdor bo'lish odati.
words.example1: She started a gratitude practice by writing three things she's thankful for each day.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni minnatdor bo'lgan uchta narsani yozish orqali minnatdorchilik amaliyotini boshladi.
words.example2: Gratitude practice has been shown to improve overall mental well-being.
words.example2Translation: Minnatdorchilik amaliyoti umumiy ruhiy farovonlikni yaxshilashi isbotlangan.
words.example3: A simple gratitude practice can shift your focus toward positive experiences.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy minnatdorchilik amaliyoti e'tiboringizni ijobiy tajribalarga qaratishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Many therapists recommend gratitude practice as a tool for managing stress.
He keeps a gratitude journal as part of his daily gratitude practice.
Gratitude practice doesn't have to take more than a few minutes a day.
Schools are introducing gratitude practice to help students build resilience.
Gratitude practice can strengthen relationships when shared with others.
Studies suggest gratitude practice improves sleep quality.
Practicing gratitude regularly can reduce feelings of envy and resentment.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab terapevtlar stressni boshqarish vositasi sifatida minnatdorchilik amaliyotini tavsiya qilishadi.
U kundalik minnatdorchilik amaliyotining bir qismi sifatida minnatdorchilik kundaligini yuritadi.
Minnatdorchilik amaliyoti kuniga bir necha daqiqadan ortiq vaqt talab qilmasligi mumkin.
Maktablar o'quvchilarda chidamlilikni shakllantirishga yordam berish uchun minnatdorchilik amaliyotini joriy qilmoqda.
Minnatdorchilik amaliyoti boshqalar bilan baham ko'rilganda munosabatlarni mustahkamlashi mumkin.
Tadqiqotlar minnatdorchilik amaliyoti uyqu sifatini yaxshilashini ko'rsatadi.
Muntazam minnatdorchilikni mashq qilish hasad va xafagarchilik tuyg'ularini kamaytirishi mumkin.

words.definition: A life lived with clear goals and a sense of meaning beyond oneself.
words.definitionUz: Aniq maqsadlar va o'zidan kattaroq ma'no tuyg'usi bilan yashaladigan hayot.
words.example1: He found a purpose-driven life through volunteering and community work.
words.example1Translation: U ko'ngillilik va jamoat ishlari orqali maqsadli hayot topdi.
words.example2: Living a purpose-driven life often leads to greater long-term satisfaction.
words.example2Translation: Maqsadli hayot kechirish ko'pincha uzoq muddatli kattaroq mamnuniyatga olib keladi.
words.example3: She left her corporate job to pursue a more purpose-driven life.
words.example3Translation: U yanada maqsadli hayot kechirish uchun korporativ ishidan ketdi.
extraExamples: A purpose-driven life doesn't require a perfect career, just meaningful action.
Many people discover a purpose-driven life later in adulthood.
Books about a purpose-driven life often encourage reflecting on personal values.
A purpose-driven life can provide motivation during difficult times.
He mentors young people who are searching for a purpose-driven life.
A purpose-driven life is often connected to helping others or a larger cause.
Researchers link a purpose-driven life to lower stress and better health.
extraExampleTranslations: Maqsadli hayot mukammal kasbni talab qilmaydi, faqat mazmunli harakatni talab qiladi.
Ko'pgina odamlar kattalik davrining keyingi bosqichlarida maqsadli hayotni kashf qilishadi.
Maqsadli hayot haqidagi kitoblar ko'pincha shaxsiy qadriyatlar haqida o'ylashga undaydi.
Maqsadli hayot qiyin paytlarda motivatsiya berishi mumkin.
U maqsadli hayot izlayotgan yoshlarga murabbiylik qiladi.
Maqsadli hayot ko'pincha boshqalarga yordam berish yoki kattaroq maqsad bilan bog'liq bo'ladi.
Tadqiqotchilar maqsadli hayotni pastroq stress va yaxshiroq sog'liq bilan bog'lashadi.

words.translation: raqamli dam olish (texnologiyadan vaqtincha voz kechish)
words.definition: A period of time when a person refrains from using electronic devices to reduce stress.
words.definitionUz: Stressni kamaytirish uchun bir muddat telefon, kompyuter kabi elektron qurilmalardan foydalanishni to'xtatib turish.
words.example1: She went on a digital detox during her vacation last summer.
words.example1Translation: U o'tgan yoz ta'tilida raqamli dam olishni amalga oshirdi.
words.example2: A digital detox can help reduce anxiety caused by constant notifications.
words.example2Translation: Raqamli dam olish doimiy bildirishnomalardan kelib chiqadigan tashvishni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: They planned a weekend digital detox with no phones or laptops.
words.example3Translation: Ular telefon va noutbuksiz dam olish kunlari raqamli dam olishni rejalashtirishdi.
extraExamples: Many people try a digital detox to improve their focus and sleep.
A digital detox doesn't mean giving up technology forever, just taking a break.
He started a digital detox after noticing how much time he spent on his phone.
Some retreats are specifically designed for digital detox experiences.
A digital detox can help strengthen real-life relationships.
Experts recommend a digital detox before bedtime for better sleep.
Her digital detox helped her feel more present during conversations.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pgina odamlar diqqat va uyqusini yaxshilash uchun raqamli dam olishni sinab ko'rishadi.
Raqamli dam olish texnologiyadan butunlay voz kechish emas, balki vaqtincha tanaffus olishni anglatadi.
U telefonida qancha vaqt sarflayotganini sezgandan keyin raqamli dam olishni boshladi.
Ba'zi dam olish maskanlari maxsus raqamli dam olish tajribalari uchun mo'ljallangan.
Raqamli dam olish haqiqiy hayotdagi munosabatlarni mustahkamlashga yordam berishi mumkin.
Mutaxassislar yaxshiroq uyqu uchun uxlashdan oldin raqamli dam olishni tavsiya qilishadi.
Uning raqamli dam olishi suhbatlar paytida o'zini ko'proq mavjud his qilishiga yordam berdi.

words.definition: The general well-being of individuals and societies, encompassing mental, physical, and social factors.
words.definitionUz: Insonlar va jamiyatning umumiy farovonligi, jumladan ruhiy, jismoniy va ijtimoiy holatlar.
words.example1: Access to clean water greatly improves the quality of life in many communities.
words.example1Translation: Toza suvga ega bo'lish ko'plab jamoalarda hayot sifatini sezilarli darajada yaxshilaydi.
words.example2: The new medical treatment significantly improved her quality of life.
words.example2Translation: Yangi tibbiy davolash uning hayot sifatini sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.
words.example3: City planners aim to improve residents' quality of life through better public spaces.
words.example3Translation: Shahar rejalashtiruvchilari yaxshiroq jamoat joylari orqali aholining hayot sifatini yaxshilashni maqsad qilishadi.
extraExamples: Quality of life can be measured by factors like health, income, and happiness.
Reducing pollution can improve the quality of life in urban areas.
Quality of life often declines without access to proper healthcare.
They moved to the countryside in search of a better quality of life.
A short commute can significantly boost daily quality of life.
Quality of life surveys often include questions about stress and social support.
Improving quality of life is a major goal of public health policy.
extraExampleTranslations: Hayot sifatini sog'liq, daromad va baxt kabi omillar orqali o'lchash mumkin.
Ifloslanishni kamaytirish shahar hududlarida hayot sifatini yaxshilashi mumkin.
Tegishli tibbiy yordamga ega bo'lmasdan hayot sifati ko'pincha pasayadi.
Ular yaxshiroq hayot sifatini izlab qishloqqa ko'chib o'tishdi.
Qisqa yo'l yurish kundalik hayot sifatini sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.
Hayot sifati so'rovnomalari ko'pincha stress va ijtimoiy yordam haqidagi savollarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Hayot sifatini yaxshilash jamoat sog'liqni saqlash siyosatining asosiy maqsadidir.

words.definition: The realization or fulfillment of one's talents and potential.
words.definitionUz: Insonning o'z qobiliyati va imkoniyatlarini to'liq amalga oshirishi va rivojlantirishi.
words.example1: According to Maslow, self-actualization is at the top of the hierarchy of needs.
words.example1Translation: Maslou bo'yicha, o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish ehtiyojlar ierarxiyasining eng yuqori bosqichida turadi.
words.example2: She pursued self-actualization by finally becoming a professional artist.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat professional rassom bo'lib, o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarishga erishdi.
words.example3: True self-actualization involves continuous growth and self-discovery.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish doimiy o'sish va o'z-o'zini kashf qilishni o'z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: Self-actualization often comes after basic needs like safety and belonging are met.
He felt a strong sense of self-actualization after completing his first novel.
Self-actualization looks different for every individual.
Some people achieve self-actualization through creative work, others through service.
Therapists sometimes help clients work toward self-actualization.
Self-actualization requires self-awareness and a willingness to grow.
Her career change was a step toward greater self-actualization.
extraExampleTranslations: O'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish odatda xavfsizlik va tegishlilik kabi asosiy ehtiyojlar qondirilgandan keyin sodir bo'ladi.
U birinchi romanini tugatgandan keyin kuchli o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish tuyg'usini his qildi.
O'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish har bir inson uchun boshqacha ko'rinadi.
Ba'zi odamlar ijodiy ish orqali, boshqalari esa xizmat orqali o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarishga erishadi.
Terapevtlar ba'zan mijozlarga o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish sari harakat qilishda yordam berishadi.
O'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish o'z-o'zini anglash va o'sishga tayyorlikni talab qiladi.
Uning kasb o'zgartirishi kattaroq o'z-o'zini ro'yobga chiqarish sari qadam edi.

words.definition: A tendency to consider material possessions and physical comfort more important than values or spiritual goals.
words.definitionUz: Moddiy narsalar va jismoniy qulaylikni qadriyatlar yoki ma'naviy maqsadlardan ko'ra muhimroq deb hisoblash.
words.example1: Critics argue that materialism leads to less genuine happiness.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar moddiyparastlik haqiqiy baxtning kamayishiga olib kelishini ta'kidlashadi.
words.example2: He grew up in a household that valued materialism over experiences.
words.example2Translation: U tajribalardan ko'ra moddiyparastlikni qadrlovchi oilada o'sdi.
words.example3: Materialism is often linked to higher levels of anxiety and stress.
words.example3Translation: Moddiyparastlik ko'pincha yuqori darajadagi tashvish va stress bilan bog'liq bo'ladi.
extraExamples: Advertising often encourages materialism by promoting constant consumption.
She tried to shift away from materialism by focusing on relationships instead.
Studies suggest materialism can negatively affect life satisfaction.
Materialism is sometimes confused with simply enjoying nice things.
Rejecting materialism, he chose to live a simple and minimal lifestyle.
Materialism can create a cycle of wanting more without feeling satisfied.
Some philosophers warn against materialism as a path to true fulfillment.
extraExampleTranslations: Reklama ko'pincha doimiy iste'molni targ'ib qilish orqali moddiyparastlikni rag'batlantiradi.
U munosabatlarga e'tibor qaratib, moddiyparastlikdan uzoqlashishga harakat qildi.
Tadqiqotlar moddiyparastlik hayotdan mamnunlikka salbiy ta'sir qilishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi.
Moddiyparastlik ba'zan oddiygina yaxshi narsalardan zavqlanish bilan adashtiriladi.
Moddiyparastlikni rad etib, u sodda va minimal turmush tarzini tanladi.
Moddiyparastlik mamnun bo'lmasdan ko'proq narsani xohlash aylanasini yaratishi mumkin.
Ba'zi faylasuflar moddiyparastlikni haqiqiy mamnuniyatga yo'l sifatida ogohlantirishadi.

words.definition: The ability to recover quickly from difficulties; mental toughness.
words.definitionUz: Qiyinchilik va muammolardan tezda tiklanish, ruhiy bardoshlilik qobiliyati.
words.example1: Her resilience helped her overcome many personal challenges.
words.example1Translation: Uning chidamliligi ko'plab shaxsiy qiyinchiliklarni yengib o'tishiga yordam berdi.
words.example2: Building resilience takes time and often comes through facing adversity.
words.example2Translation: Chidamlilikni shakllantirish vaqt talab qiladi va ko'pincha qiyinchiliklarga duch kelish orqali rivojlanadi.
words.example3: Resilience allows people to bounce back after setbacks.
words.example3Translation: Chidamlilik odamlarga muvaffaqiyatsizliklardan keyin yana tiklanishga imkon beradi.
extraExamples: Parents try to teach their children resilience from a young age.
Resilience is often developed through supportive relationships and experience.
The community showed great resilience after the natural disaster.
Resilience doesn't mean avoiding pain, but learning to cope with it.
Therapists often help clients build emotional resilience.
His resilience during the economic downturn impressed his colleagues.
Resilience training is becoming common in schools and workplaces.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar farzandlariga yoshlikdan chidamlilikni o'rgatishga harakat qilishadi.
Chidamlilik ko'pincha qo'llab-quvvatlovchi munosabatlar va tajriba orqali rivojlanadi.
Jamoa tabiiy ofatdan keyin katta chidamlilik ko'rsatdi.
Chidamlilik og'riqdan qochishni emas, balki u bilan kurashishni o'rganishni anglatadi.
Terapevtlar ko'pincha mijozlarga hissiy chidamlilikni shakllantirishda yordam berishadi.
Uning iqtisodiy tanazzul davridagi chidamliligi hamkasblarini hayratga soldi.
Chidamlilik bo'yicha treninglar maktab va ish joylarida keng tarqalmoqda.

words.definition: An approach to health that considers the whole person — physical, mental, emotional, and social.
words.definitionUz: Insonning jismoniy, ruhiy, hissiy va ijtimoiy holatini birgalikda hisobga oladigan farovonlik yondashuvi.
words.example1: The wellness center focuses on holistic well-being rather than just physical fitness.
words.example1Translation: Sog'lomlashtirish markazi faqat jismoniy shakl emas, balki kompleks farovonlikka e'tibor qaratadi.
words.example2: Holistic well-being includes nutrition, exercise, relationships, and mental health.
words.example2Translation: Kompleks farovonlik ovqatlanish, mashqlar, munosabatlar va ruhiy salomatlikni o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: She made changes to her routine to support her holistic well-being.
words.example3Translation: U o'zining kompleks farovonligini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun kundalik tartibiga o'zgartirishlar kiritdi.
extraExamples: Companies are starting to prioritize employees' holistic well-being.
Holistic well-being recognizes the connection between mind and body.
A holistic well-being approach might include therapy, exercise, and social support.
Doctors are increasingly focusing on holistic well-being, not just symptoms.
Schools are adopting programs that promote students' holistic well-being.
Holistic well-being emphasizes balance across all areas of life.
Her coach designed a plan focused on holistic well-being, not just performance.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniyalar xodimlarning kompleks farovonligiga ustuvorlik berishni boshlamoqda.
Kompleks farovonlik aql va tana o'rtasidagi bog'liqlikni tan oladi.
Kompleks farovonlik yondashuvi terapiya, mashqlar va ijtimoiy yordamni o'z ichiga olishi mumkin.
Shifokorlar tobora ko'proq faqat alomatlarga emas, balki kompleks farovonlikka e'tibor qaratmoqda.
Maktablar o'quvchilarning kompleks farovonligini targ'ib qiluvchi dasturlarni qabul qilmoqda.
Kompleks farovonlik hayotning barcha sohalaridagi muvozanatni ta'kidlaydi.
Uning murabbiyi faqat natija emas, balki kompleks farovonlikka qaratilgan reja ishlab chiqdi.

name: 24 Vocabulary Challenge
description: Master idioms and phrases used by fluent English speakers

words.definition: To eventually do something after a process of change, reflection, or development.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni qilishga yetib borish — o‘zgarish, o‘ylash yoki rivojlanish jarayonidan keyin oxir-oqibat biror ishni bajarishni bildiradi.
words.example1: After years of hard work, she came to appreciate the value of patience.
words.example1Translation: Yillar davomidagi mashaqqatli mehnatdan keyin u sabrning qadrini anglab yetdi.
words.example2: I never thought I would come to enjoy living in a small town.
words.example2Translation: Men hech qachon kichik shaharchada yashashni yoqtirib qolaman deb o‘ylamaganman.
words.example3: Over time, he came to realize his mistake.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt o‘tishi bilan u o‘z xatosini anglab yetdi.
extraExamples: Many people come to understand the importance of health only after getting sick.
She came to love classical music after attending several concerts.
They came to accept the new situation after a long discussion.
He came to respect his teacher more as he grew older.
We eventually came to see the benefits of the change.
It took her years to come to forgive her friend.
The team came to work well together after months of practice.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab odamlar kasal bo‘lgandan keyingina salomatlikning ahamiyatini tushunishadi.
Bir necha kontsertda qatnashgandan keyin u klassik musiqani yaxshi ko‘rib qoldi.
Uzoq muhokamadan keyin ular yangi vaziyatni qabul qilishdi.
U yoshi ulg‘aygani sari o‘qituvchisiga hurmatini oshirdi.
Oxir-oqibat biz o‘zgarishning foydasini ko‘rdik.
Do‘stini kechirish uchun unga yillar kerak bo‘ldi.
Bir necha oy mashq qilgandan keyin jamoa yaxshi hamkorlik qila boshladi.

words.definition: A strong warning used to prohibit someone from doing something, often with a threat of consequences.
words.definitionUz: Jur’at qilib ko‘rma — kimdir biror ishni qilishini qat’iy taqiqlash uchun ishlatiladigan kuchli ogohlantirish.
words.example1: Don’t you dare touch my phone without permission!
words.example1Translation: Ruxsatisiz telefonimga teginishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma!
words.example2: Don’t you dare speak to your mother like that.
words.example2Translation: Onang bilan shunday gaplashishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
words.example3: Don’t you dare tell anyone about this secret.
words.example3Translation: Bu sir haqida hech kimga aytishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
extraExamples: Don’t you dare come home late again!
Don’t you dare lie to me.
Don’t you dare skip your homework.
Don’t you dare laugh at her mistake.
Don’t you dare drive so fast in the rain.
Don’t you dare forget her birthday.
Don’t you dare blame me for your problems.
extraExampleTranslations: Yana kech qaytishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma!
Menga yolg‘on gapirishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
Uy vazifangni o‘tkazib yuborishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
Uning xatosiga kulishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
Yomg‘irda bunchalik tez haydashga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
Uning tug‘ilgan kunini unutishga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.
Muammolaring uchun meni ayblashga jur’at qilib ko‘rma.

words.definition: To suddenly lose emotional control and become angry or upset.
words.definitionUz: O‘zini yo‘qotib qo‘yish — to‘satdan emotsional nazoratni yo‘qotib, g‘azablanish yoki xafa bo‘lish.
words.example1: He lost his cool when the other driver cut him off.
words.example1Translation: Boshqa haydovchi oldidan kesib o‘tganda u o‘zini yo‘qotib qo‘ydi.
words.example2: Try not to lose your cool during the meeting.
words.example2Translation: Yig‘ilishda o‘zingizni yo‘qotib qo‘ymaslikka harakat qiling.
words.example3: She rarely loses her cool, even in difficult situations.
words.example3Translation: U qiyin vaziyatlarda ham kamdan-kam o‘zini yo‘qotadi.
extraExamples: Don’t lose your cool just because of a small mistake.
The coach lost his cool after the team missed an easy shot.
I almost lost my cool when the computer crashed again.
Parents sometimes lose their cool with noisy children.
He managed not to lose his cool during the argument.
Losing your cool can make the situation worse.
She learned to stay calm and not lose her cool under pressure.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichik xato uchun o‘zingizni yo‘qotib qo‘ymang.
Jamoa oson golni o‘tkazib yuborgach, murabbiy o‘zini yo‘qotib qo‘ydi.
Kompyuter yana ishdan chiqqanda men zo‘rg‘a o‘zimni ushlab qoldim.
Ota-onalar shovqinli bolalar bilan ba’zan o‘zlarini yo‘qotib qo‘yishadi.
U bahslashayotganda o‘zini yo‘qotmaslikka muvaffaq bo‘ldi.
O‘zingizni yo‘qotib qo‘yish vaziyatni yanada yomonlashtirishi mumkin.
U bosim ostida tinch qolishni va o‘zini yo‘qotmaslikni o‘rgandi.

words.definition: Lacking information or knowledge about a situation.
words.definitionUz: Xabarsiz bo‘lish — biror holat haqida ma’lumot yoki bilimning yo‘qligi.
words.example1: I’m completely in the dark about the new project.
words.example1Translation: Men yangi loyiha haqida butunlay xabarsizman.
words.example2: They kept us in the dark about the company’s plans.
words.example2Translation: Ular kompaniya rejalari haqida bizni xabarsiz qoldirishdi.
words.example3: She felt in the dark about what was happening at work.
words.example3Translation: U ishda nima bo‘layotgani haqida xabarsiz ekanligini his qildi.
extraExamples: Don’t leave me in the dark — tell me what happened.
Many employees are still in the dark about the merger.
He was kept in the dark about his surprise party.
I hate being in the dark when important decisions are made.
The public remains in the dark regarding the investigation.
She prefers to stay in the dark about office gossip.
We were all in the dark until the announcement.
extraExampleTranslations: Meni xabarsiz qoldirma — nima bo‘lganini ayt.
Ko‘plab xodimlar birlashuv haqida hali ham xabarsiz.
U o‘ziga syurpriz ziyofat haqida xabarsiz qoldirilgan edi.
Muhim qarorlar qabul qilinayotganda xabarsiz qolishni yoqtirmayman.
Jamoatchilik tergov haqida hali ham xabarsiz qolmoqda.
U ofisdagi g‘iybatlar haqida xabarsiz qolishni afzal ko‘radi.
E’lon qilinmaguncha hammamiz xabarsiz edik.

words.definition: To break into pieces or fall apart, either physically or emotionally.
words.definitionUz: Parchalanish — jismonan yoki ruhiy jihatdan parcha-parcha bo‘lib ketish yoki yemirilish.
words.example1: The old book came apart in my hands.
words.example1Translation: Eski kitob qo‘limda parcha-parcha bo‘lib ketdi.
words.example2: She came apart when she heard the bad news.
words.example2Translation: Yomon xabarni eshitgach, u o‘zini yo‘qotdi.
words.example3: The team came apart after losing several key players.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha muhim o‘yinchilarni yo‘qotgandan keyin jamoa parchalanib ketdi.
extraExamples: The cheap shoes came apart after just one month.
He felt like his life was coming apart.
The relationship came apart due to lack of trust.
Don’t let stress make you come apart.
The old chair finally came apart.
The plan came apart at the last minute.
She managed not to come apart during the crisis.
extraExampleTranslations: Arzon tuflar bir oydan keyin parchalana boshladi.
U o‘z hayoti parchalanib ketayotgandek his qildi.
Ishonchsizlik tufayli munosabatlar buzildi.
Stress sizni parchalab yubormasligiga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
Eski stul nihoyat parcha-parcha bo‘ldi.
Reja oxirgi daqiqada barbod bo‘ldi.
U inqiroz paytida o‘zini yo‘qotmaslikka muvaffaq bo‘ldi.

words.definition: To no longer know how many things there are because the number is very large or you have been counting for too long.
words.definitionUz: Hisobni yo‘qotish — son juda ko‘p bo‘lgani yoki uzoq vaqt sanab turgani uchun qancha ekanligini bilmay qolish.
words.example1: I lost count of how many times he apologized.
words.example1Translation: U necha marta kechirim so‘raganini hisobimni yo‘qotdim.
words.example2: She lost count of the stars while lying on the grass.
words.example2Translation: U o‘t ustida yotib yulduzlar sonini hisobini yo‘qotdi.
words.example3: We lost count of the goals in the exciting match.
words.example3Translation: Qiziqarli o‘yinda gollar sonini hisobdan chiqardik.
extraExamples: I’ve lost count of how many cups of coffee I’ve had today.
He lost count of the books he has read this year.
Don’t lose count while measuring the ingredients.
She lost count of the number of times she tried.
We lost count during the long meeting.
Tourists often lose count of all the beautiful sights.
I lost count of the days while on vacation.
extraExampleTranslations: Bugun necha chashka kofe ichganimni hisobdan chiqardim.
U bu yil o‘qigan kitoblar sonini hisobini yo‘qotdi.
Ingredientlarni o‘lchayotganda hisobni yo‘qotmang.
U necha marta urinib ko‘rganini hisobini yo‘qotdi.
Uzoq yig‘ilishda hisobdan chiqdik.
Sayyohlar ko‘pincha barcha go‘zal manzaralarni sanashda hisobini yo‘qotishadi.
Ta’tilda kunlarni hisobdan chiqardim.

words.definition: A large underwater structure formed by coral polyps that supports incredible marine biodiversity.
words.definitionUz: Marjon rifi — marjon poliplari tomonidan hosil qilingan, suv ostidagi ulkan tuzilma bo‘lib, dengiz hayotining boy xilma-xilligini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
words.example1: The Great Barrier Reef is the largest coral reef in the world.
words.example1Translation: Buyuk to‘siq rifi dunyodagi eng katta marjon rifidir.
words.example2: Many fish species live in the coral reef ecosystem.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab baliq turlari marjon rifi ekotizimida yashaydi.
words.example3: Climate change is threatening coral reefs worldwide.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi butun dunyodagi marjon riflariga tahdid solmoqda.
extraExamples: Snorkeling around a coral reef is an unforgettable experience.
Coral reefs protect coastlines from strong waves.
Scientists study coral reefs to understand ocean health.
Tourism brings both benefits and risks to coral reefs.
Pollution is damaging many coral reefs.
Diving in a healthy coral reef feels like entering another world.
Protecting coral reefs is important for future generations.
extraExampleTranslations: Marjon rifi atrofida snorkeling qilish unutilmas tajriba.
Marjon riflari qirg‘oqlarni kuchli to‘lqinlardan himoya qiladi.
Olimlar okean salomatligini tushunish uchun marjon riflarini o‘rganishadi.
Turizm marjon riflariga ham foyda ham xavf keltiradi.
If loslanish ko‘plab marjon riflarini zararlamoqda.
Sog‘lom marjon rifida suv ostida suzish boshqa dunyoga kirgandek tuyuladi.
Marjon riflarini himoya qilish kelajak avlodlar uchun muhim.

words.definition: Very early in the morning, at the first light of day.
words.definitionUz: Tong saharlab — ertalab juda erta, kun yorisha boshlagan paytda.
words.example1: We woke up at the crack of dawn to watch the sunrise.
words.example1Translation: Quyosh chiqishini tomosha qilish uchun tong saharlab uyg‘ondik.
words.example2: Farmers often start working at the crack of dawn.
words.example2Translation: Dehqonlar ko‘pincha tong saharlab ish boshlashadi.
words.example3: She left for the airport at the crack of dawn.
words.example3Translation: U aeroportga tong saharlab jo‘nab ketdi.
extraExamples: The fishermen set out at the crack of dawn.
We arrived at the crack of dawn and still had to wait.
He practices piano at the crack of dawn every day.
The hikers began their climb at the crack of dawn.
The market opens at the crack of dawn.
She loves the peaceful feeling at the crack of dawn.
They started the long drive at the crack of dawn.
extraExampleTranslations: Baliqchilar tong saharlab jo‘nab ketishdi.
Biz tong saharlab yetib keldik, ammo hali ham kutishga to‘g‘ri keldi.
U har kuni tong saharlab pianino chalishni mashq qiladi.
Sayyohlar tog‘ga chiqishni tong saharlab boshlashdi.
Bozor tong saharlab ochiladi.
U tong saharlabgi tinchlik tuyg‘usini yaxshi ko‘radi.
Ular uzoq safarni tong saharlab boshlashdi.

words.definition: Very near in distance or time; about to happen soon.
words.definitionUz: Yaqin orada — masofa yoki vaqt jihatdan juda yaqin; tez orada sodir bo‘ladigan.
words.example1: Summer vacation is just around the corner.
words.example1Translation: Yozgi ta’til yaqin qoldi.
words.example2: There’s a nice café just around the corner.
words.example2Translation: Bir oz narida yoqimli kafe bor.
words.example3: Big changes are around the corner for the company.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya uchun katta o‘zgarishlar yaqin qoldi.
extraExamples: Help is just around the corner.
The holidays are right around the corner.
A new shopping center is being built around the corner.
Success could be just around the corner.
There’s a pharmacy around the corner.
Don’t worry, better days are around the corner.
The restaurant is just around the corner from the hotel.
extraExampleTranslations: Yordam yaqin orada.
Bayramlar yaqin qoldi.
Yangi savdo markazi yaqin atrofda qurilmoqda.
Muvaffaqiyat yaqin qolgan bo‘lishi mumkin.
Dorixona bir oz narida bor.
Xavotir olmang, yaxshi kunlar yaqin qoldi.
Restoran mehmonxonadan bir oz narida joylashgan.

words.definition: To begin to exist or be created.
words.definitionUz: Yuzaga kelish — mavjud bo‘la boshlash yoki yaratilish.
words.example1: The new company came into being last year.
words.example1Translation: Yangi kompaniya o‘tgan yili tashkil topdi.
words.example2: This tradition came into being many centuries ago.
words.example2Translation: Bu an’ana ko‘p asrlar oldin paydo bo‘lgan.
words.example3: The internet came into being in the late 20th century.
words.example3Translation: Internet 20-asr oxirida yuzaga keldi.
extraExamples: Many great ideas come into being by accident.
The organization came into being to help refugees.
New laws came into being after the election.
The band came into being while they were still students.
This custom came into being during the 1800s.
The modern Olympic Games came into being in 1896.
A beautiful friendship came into being during the trip.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab ajoyib g‘oyalar tasodifan yuzaga keladi.
Tashkilot qochqinlarga yordam berish uchun tashkil topdi.
Saylovdan keyin yangi qonunlar paydo bo‘ldi.
Guruh ular hali talaba bo‘lganlarida tashkil topgan.
Bu odat 1800-yillarda paydo bo‘lgan.
Zamonaviy Olimpiya o‘yinlari 1896-yilda boshlangan.
Sayohat davomida go‘zal do‘stlik paydo bo‘ldi.

words.definition: To suddenly realize or understand something clearly.
words.definitionUz: To‘satdan anglab yetdim — biror narsani birdaniga aniq tushunib yetish.
words.example1: It suddenly dawned on me that I had forgotten my keys.
words.example1Translation: To‘satdan kalitlarimni unutganimni anglab yetdim.
words.example2: It suddenly dawned on her why he was acting strangely.
words.example2Translation: Unga uning nega g‘alati harakat qilayotgani to‘satdan tushundi.
words.example3: It suddenly dawned on me how much I missed my family.
words.example3Translation: Oilamni qanchalik sog‘inganimni to‘satdan anglab yetdim.
extraExamples: It suddenly dawned on him that he had made a big mistake.
It suddenly dawned on us that we were lost.
It suddenly dawned on me what she really meant.
It suddenly dawned on the teacher why the student was quiet.
It suddenly dawned on me that today was her birthday.
It suddenly dawned on them how dangerous the situation was.
It suddenly dawned on her that she had been wrong all along.
extraExampleTranslations: U katta xato qilganini to‘satdan anglab yetdi.
Biz adashganimizni to‘satdan tushundik.
U nima demoqchi bo‘lganini to‘satdan anglab yetdim.
O‘qituvchiga talaba nega jim bo‘lganini to‘satdan tushundi.
Bugun uning tug‘ilgan kuni ekanligini to‘satdan anglab yetdim.
Ular vaziyat qanchalik xavfli ekanligini to‘satdan anglab yetishdi.
U butun vaqt davomida noto‘g‘ri bo‘lganini to‘satdan tushundi.

words.definition: Rural areas as opposed to cities or urban regions.
words.definitionUz: Qishloq joyi — shahar yoki shahar atroflaridan farqli o‘laroq qishloq hududlari.
words.example1: Many people move to the country to escape city noise.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab odamlar shahar shovqinidan qochib qishloqqa ko‘chib o‘tishadi.
words.example2: Life in the country is slower and more peaceful.
words.example2Translation: Qishloq hayoti sekinroq va tinchroq.
words.example3: We spent the weekend in the country at my grandparents’ house.
words.example3Translation: Dam olish kunlarini qishloqda bobom va buvimning uyida o‘tkazdik.
extraExamples: She prefers the country to the busy city.
Farming is still common in the country.
The country air feels fresh and clean.
They built a small house in the country.
Traffic is much less of a problem in the country.
Many artists find inspiration in the country.
Living in the country can be quite lonely sometimes.
extraExampleTranslations: U gavjum shahardan ko‘ra qishloqni afzal ko‘radi.
Dehqonchilik qishloqda hali ham keng tarqalgan.
Qishloq havosi yangi va toza tuyuladi.
Ular qishloqda kichik uy qurishdi.
Qishloqda tirbandlik muammosi ancha kam.
Ko‘plab san’atkorlar qishloqda ilhom topishadi.
Qishloqda yashash ba’zan ancha yolg‘iz qoldirishi mumkin.

words.word: Pluck up the courage to do sth
words.definition: To gather enough bravery to do something difficult or frightening.
words.definitionUz: Jasorat to‘plash — qiyin yoki qo‘rqinchli ishni bajarish uchun yetarli jasoratni yig‘ish.
words.example1: She finally plucked up the courage to speak in public.
words.example1Translation: U nihoyat omma oldida gapirishga jasorat to‘pladi.
words.example2: He plucked up the courage to ask her out on a date.
words.example2Translation: U unga uchrashuvga chiqishni taklif qilishga jasorat to‘pladi.
words.example3: I need to pluck up the courage to tell him the truth.
words.example3Translation: Unga haqiqatni aytish uchun jasorat to‘plashim kerak.
extraExamples: It took her months to pluck up the courage to quit her job.
He plucked up the courage to apologize after the argument.
She plucked up the courage to perform on stage.
They finally plucked up the courage to start their own business.
I’m trying to pluck up the courage to talk to my boss.
Plucking up the courage was the hardest part.
She plucked up the courage to move to another country.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishdan bo‘shashga jasorat to‘plashiga bir necha oy kerak bo‘ldi.
Bahsdan keyin u kechirim so‘rashga jasorat to‘pladi.
U sahnada chiqish qilishga jasorat to‘pladi.
Ular nihoyat o‘z bizneslarini boshlashga jasorat to‘plashdi.
Rahbarim bilan gaplashish uchun jasorat to‘plashga harakat qilyapman.
Jasorat to‘plash eng qiyin qism edi.
U boshqa mamlakatga ko‘chib o‘tishga jasorat to‘pladi.

words.definition: To stop working or doing an activity for the day, usually because enough has been done.
words.definitionUz: Ishni tugatish — kun davomida ish yoki faoliyatni to‘xtatish, odatda yetarli darajada ish bajarilgani uchun.
words.example1: We’ve worked hard all day — let’s call it a day.
words.example1Translation: Butun kun qattiq ishladik — bugunga yetarli.
words.example2: The builders decided to call it a day because of the rain.
words.example2Translation: Quruvchilar yomg‘ir tufayli ishni tugatishga qaror qilishdi.
words.example3: After ten hours of studying, I decided to call it a day.
words.example3Translation: O‘n soat o‘qigandan keyin ishni tugatishga qaror qildim.
extraExamples: It’s getting late — time to call it a day.
The team called it a day after a long practice.
Let’s call it a day and continue tomorrow.
She called it a day when she started making mistakes.
The chef called it a day after serving the last customer.
We called it a day early due to exhaustion.
The meeting went on for hours before they finally called it a day.
extraExampleTranslations: Kech bo‘lyapti — bugunga yetarli.
Jamoa uzoq mashg‘ulotdan keyin ishni tugatdi.
Bugunga yetarli, ertaga davom ettiramiz.
Xatolar qila boshlagach, u ishni tugatdi.
Oxirgi mijozga xizmat ko‘rsatgandan keyin oshpaz ishni tugatdi.
Charchaganimiz uchun erta ishni tugatdik.
Yig‘ilish soatlab davom etgandan keyin ular nihoyat ishni tugatishdi.

words.definition: A direct and often hostile meeting or disagreement between opposing people or groups.
words.definitionUz: To‘qnashuv — qarama-qarshi tomonlar o‘rtasidagi to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri va ko‘pincha dushmanona uchrashuv yoki nizo.
words.example1: There was a heated confrontation between the two teams.
words.example1Translation: Ikki jamoa o‘rtasida qizg‘in to‘qnashuv bo‘ldi.
words.example2: She avoided confrontation by staying calm.
words.example2Translation: U tinch qolish orqali to‘qnashuvdan qochdi.
words.example3: The confrontation with his boss was difficult but necessary.
words.example3Translation: Rahbari bilan to‘qnashuv qiyin, ammo zarur edi.
extraExamples: Confrontation is sometimes necessary to solve problems.
The meeting turned into a confrontation.
Many people fear confrontation.
The police tried to prevent a confrontation.
There was a serious confrontation at the border.
She learned to handle confrontation better over time.
The confrontation led to a better understanding between them.
extraExampleTranslations: Muammolarni hal qilish uchun to‘qnashuv ba’zan zarur bo‘ladi.
Yig‘ilish to‘qnashuvga aylandi.
Ko‘plab odamlar to‘qnashuvdan qo‘rqishadi.
Politsiya to‘qnashuvning oldini olishga harakat qildi.
Chegarada jiddiy to‘qnashuv bo‘ldi.
U vaqt o‘tishi bilan to‘qnashuvlarni yaxshiroq boshqarishni o‘rgandi.
To‘qnashuv ular o‘rtasida yaxshiroq tushunishga olib keldi.

words.definition: To be in a difficult situation with few or no good options.
words.definitionUz: Qiyin ahvolda qolish — juda oz yoki umuman yaxshi variantlarsiz qiyin vaziyatga tushib qolish.
words.example1: The company was in a tight corner after losing its biggest client.
words.example1Translation: Eng katta mijozini yo‘qotgandan keyin kompaniya qiyin ahvolda qoldi.
words.example2: He found himself in a tight corner when asked for an explanation.
words.example2Translation: Tushuntirish talab qilinganda u qiyin ahvolda qoldi.
words.example3: We’re in a tight corner, but we’ll find a way out.
words.example3Translation: Biz qiyin ahvoldamiz, lekin chiqish yo‘lini topamiz.
extraExamples: The team was in a tight corner during the final minutes.
She is in a tight corner financially.
Being in a tight corner taught him valuable lessons.
The government found itself in a tight corner over the scandal.
He always manages to escape when in a tight corner.
The negotiations left both sides in a tight corner.
Getting into a tight corner is easy; getting out is hard.
extraExampleTranslations: Final daqiqalarda jamoa qiyin ahvolda qoldi.
U moliyaviy jihatdan qiyin ahvolda.
Qiyin ahvolga tushib qolish unga qimmatli saboqlar berdi.
Hukumat janjal tufayli qiyin ahvolga tushib qoldi.
U har doim qiyin ahvoldan chiqib ketishga muvaffaq bo‘ladi.
Muzokaralar ikki tomonni ham qiyin ahvolga solib qo‘ydi.
Qiyin ahvolga tushib qolish oson, undan chiqish esa qiyin.

words.definition: To become known or revealed, especially after being hidden.
words.definitionUz: Oshkor bo‘lish — ayniqsa yashirin bo‘lgan narsaning ma’lum bo‘lib qolishi.
words.example1: New evidence came to light during the investigation.
words.example1Translation: Tergov davomida yangi dalillar oshkor bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The truth finally came to light after many years.
words.example2Translation: Haqiqat nihoyat ko‘p yillardan keyin oshkor bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Several problems came to light after the new system was introduced.
words.example3Translation: Yangi tizim joriy etilgandan keyin bir necha muammo oshkor bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Important facts came to light during the meeting.
The scandal came to light through social media.
Nothing new came to light in the latest report.
Her talent came to light when she performed.
The mistake only came to light later.
More details are expected to come to light soon.
The hidden documents finally came to light.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhim faktlar yig‘ilishda oshkor bo‘ldi.
Janjal ijtimoiy tarmoqlar orqali oshkor bo‘ldi.
Oxirgi hisobotda yangi hech narsa oshkor bo‘lmadi.
Uning iste’dodi chiqish qilganda oshkor bo‘ldi.
Xato faqat keyinroq ma’lum bo‘ldi.
Tez orada yana tafsilotlar oshkor bo‘lishi kutilmoqda.
Yashirin hujjatlar nihoyat oshkor bo‘ldi.

words.definition: Polite behaviour that shows respect and consideration for other people.
words.definitionUz: Xushmuomalalik — boshqalarga hurmat va e’tibor ko‘rsatadigan odobli xulq-atvor.
words.example1: He showed great courtesy by holding the door open.
words.example1Translation: U eshikni ochib turish orqali katta xushmuomalalik ko‘rsatdi.
words.example2: Basic courtesy costs nothing but means a lot.
words.example2Translation: Oddiy xushmuomalalik hech narsaga tushmaydi, lekin juda ko‘p narsani anglatadi.
words.example3: She treated everyone with courtesy and kindness.
words.example3Translation: U hammaga xushmuomalalik va mehribonlik bilan munosabatda bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Courtesy is important in professional environments.
Thank you for your courtesy and help.
Common courtesy includes saying please and thank you.
He replied with perfect courtesy.
The hotel staff showed excellent courtesy.
Courtesy should be shown to people of all ages.
She is known for her old-fashioned courtesy.
extraExampleTranslations: Xushmuomalalik professional muhitda muhim.
Xushmuomalaligingiz va yordamingiz uchun rahmat.
Oddiy xushmuomalalik “iltimos” va “rahmat” deyishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
U mukammal xushmuomalalik bilan javob berdi.
Mehmonxona xodimlari ajoyib xushmuomalalik ko‘rsatishdi.
Barcha yoshdagi odamlarga xushmuomalalik ko‘rsatish kerak.
U eski uslubdagi xushmuomalaligi bilan tanilgan.

words.definition: To be strongly criticized or attacked.
words.definitionUz: Tanqidga uchramoq — kuchli tanqid yoki hujumga duch kelish.
words.example1: The government came under fire for its handling of the crisis.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat inqirozni boshqarishi uchun tanqidga uchradi.
words.example2: The new policy came under fire from opposition parties.
words.example2Translation: Yangi siyosat muxolif partiyalardan tanqidga uchradi.
words.example3: The company came under fire after the data leak.
words.example3Translation: Ma’lumotlar sizdirilgandan keyin kompaniya tanqidga uchradi.
extraExamples: The decision came under fire from experts.
She came under fire for her controversial comments.
The movie came under fire for its portrayal of history.
The manager came under fire from angry customers.
The plan is likely to come under fire.
He came under fire during the interview.
Environmental policies often come under fire.
extraExampleTranslations: Qaror mutaxassislar tomonidan tanqidga uchradi.
U bahsli izohlari uchun tanqidga uchradi.
Film tarixni tasvirlashi uchun tanqidga uchradi.
Rahbar g‘azablangan mijozlardan tanqidga uchradi.
Reja tanqidga uchraydi.
U intervyu davomida tanqidga uchradi.
Atrof-muhit siyosatlari ko‘pincha tanqidga uchraydi.

words.definition: To deal with events or situations as they happen, without worrying too much or making detailed plans.
words.definitionUz: Bo‘lgancha qabul qilish — voqealar yoki vaziyatlarni bo‘lgancha qabul qilib, ortiqcha tashvishlanmasdan yoki batafsil reja tuzmasdan muomala qilish.
words.example1: I try to take life as it comes.
words.example1Translation: Men hayotni bo‘lgancha qabul qilishga harakat qilaman.
words.example2: We’ll take the weather as it comes and decide later.
words.example2Translation: Ob-havoni bo‘lgancha qabul qilib, keyinroq qaror qilamiz.
words.example3: He prefers to take things as they come rather than plan everything.
words.example3Translation: U hamma narsani rejalashtirishdan ko‘ra voqealarni bo‘lgancha qabul qilishni afzal ko‘radi.
extraExamples: Take each day as it comes.
She learned to take criticism as it comes.
Let’s take the meeting as it comes.
I’ve learned to take opportunities as they come.
They decided to take the trip as it comes.
Taking things as they come reduces stress.
He takes bad news as it comes without getting upset.
extraExampleTranslations: Har bir kunni bo‘lgancha qabul qiling.
U tanqidni bo‘lgancha qabul qilishni o‘rgandi.
Yig‘ilishni bo‘lgancha qabul qilamiz.
Men imkoniyatlarni paydo bo‘lishi bilan qo‘lga kiritishni o‘rgandim.
Ular sayohatni bo‘lgancha qabul qilishga qaror qilishdi.
Voqealarni bo‘lgancha qabul qilish stressni kamaytiradi.
U yomon xabarlarni xafa bo‘lmasdan bo‘lgancha qabul qiladi.

words.definition: A dead human body, especially before burial or cremation.
words.definitionUz: Murda — dafn etilish yoki kuydirilishdan oldingi o‘lik inson tanasi.
words.example1: The police examined the corpse carefully.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya murdani sinchkovlik bilan ko‘zdan kechirdi.
words.example2: The corpse was discovered early in the morning.
words.example2Translation: Murda ertalab erta topildi.
words.example3: They treated the corpse with great respect.
words.example3Translation: Ular murdaga katta hurmat bilan munosabatda bo‘lishdi.
extraExamples: The corpse was identified by family members.
Detectives arrived at the scene where the corpse was found.
The corpse showed signs of violence.
Handling a corpse requires special procedures.
The corpse was transported to the morgue.
No one claimed the unknown corpse.
The discovery of the corpse shocked the community.
extraExampleTranslations: Murda oila a’zolari tomonidan aniqlandi.
Tergovchilar murda topilgan joyga yetib kelishdi.
Murdada zo‘ravonlik alomatlari bor edi.
Murdani boshqarish maxsus tartib-taomillarni talab qiladi.
Murda morgga olib ketildi.
Hech kim noma’lum murdani talab qilmadi.
Murdaning topilishi jamoani hayratda qoldirdi.

words.definition: To accept a difficult or unpleasant situation or reality after struggling emotionally.
words.definitionUz: Qabul qilish — qiyin yoki yoqimsiz vaziyat yoki haqiqatni emotsional kurashdan keyin qabul qilish.
words.example1: It took her a long time to come to terms with the loss.
words.example1Translation: Yo‘qotishni qabul qilish uchun unga uzoq vaqt kerak bo‘ldi.
words.example2: He finally came to terms with his illness.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat kasalligini qabul qildi.
words.example3: We need to come to terms with the new reality.
words.example3Translation: Biz yangi haqiqatni qabul qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: She is still trying to come to terms with the divorce.
It’s hard to come to terms with failure.
He came to terms with his past mistakes.
The family came to terms with the tragic news.
Coming to terms with change takes time.
I’ve come to terms with living alone.
They came to terms with the fact that the project failed.
extraExampleTranslations: U hali ham ajralishni qabul qilishga harakat qilmoqda.
Muvaffaqiyatsizlikni qabul qilish qiyin.
U o‘tmishdagi xatolarini qabul qildi.
Oila fojiali xabarni qabul qildi.
O‘zgarishni qabul qilish vaqt talab qiladi.
Men yolg‘iz yashashni qabul qildim.
Ular loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz tugaganini qabul qilishdi.

words.definition: To become successful, popular, or important again after a period of decline.
words.definitionUz: Qaytish — pasayish davridan keyin yana muvaffaqiyatli, mashhur yoki muhim bo‘lib qolish.
words.example1: The singer made a successful comeback with her new album.
words.example1Translation: Qo‘shiqchi yangi albomi bilan muvaffaqiyatli qaytdi.
words.example2: The team made a comeback in the second half.
words.example2Translation: Jamoa ikkinchi bo‘limda qaytdi.
words.example3: Vintage fashion is making a comeback this season.
words.example3Translation: Eski uslubdagi moda bu mavsumda qaytmoqda.
extraExamples: The actor made a comeback after many years.
The company is trying to make a comeback.
Old technology sometimes makes a comeback.
She made a dramatic comeback in the final round.
The brand made a comeback with a new design.
Making a comeback is never easy.
The city is making a comeback as a tourist destination.
extraExampleTranslations: Aktyor ko‘p yillardan keyin qaytdi.
Kompaniya qaytishga harakat qilmoqda.
Eski texnologiyalar ba’zan qaytib keladi.
U final raundida dramatik tarzda qaytdi.
Brend yangi dizayn bilan qaytdi.
Qaytish hech qachon oson bo‘lmaydi.
Shahar sayyohlik maskani sifatida qaytmoqda.

words.definition: To provide emotional or physical relief and support to someone.
words.definitionUz: Tasalli berish — kimdirga emotsional yoki jismoniy yengillik va yordam ko‘rsatish.
words.example1: Her kind words brought comfort to the grieving family.
words.example1Translation: Uning mehribon so‘zlari qayg‘uli oilaga tasalli berdi.
words.example2: The warm blanket brought comfort on the cold night.
words.example2Translation: Issiq adyol sovuq kechada tasalli berdi.
words.example3: Music can bring comfort during difficult times.
words.example3Translation: Musiqa qiyin paytlarda tasalli berishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The doctor’s reassurance brought comfort to the patient.
Knowing she was safe brought comfort to her parents.
Simple gestures can bring great comfort.
The news brought little comfort.
Prayer brought comfort to many people.
His presence brought comfort to the team.
The gift brought comfort and joy.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokorning tinchlantirishi bemorga tasalli berdi.
U xavfsiz ekanligini bilish ota-onasiga tasalli berdi.
Oddiy imo-ishoralar katta tasalli berishi mumkin.
Xabar unchalik tasalli bermadi.
Namoz ko‘plab odamlarga tasalli berdi.
Uning borligi jamoaga tasalli berdi.
Sovg‘a tasalli va quvonch berdi.

words.definition: A retirement period supported by enough money and stability to live without financial worries.
words.definitionUz: Farog‘atli pensiya — moliyaviy tashvishlarsiz yashash uchun yetarli mablag‘ va barqarorlikka ega bo‘lgan pensiya davri.
words.example1: He saved enough for a comfortable retirement.
words.example1Translation: U farog‘atli pensiya uchun yetarli mablag‘ jamg‘argan.
words.example2: A comfortable retirement is the goal of many workers.
words.example2Translation: Farog‘atli pensiya ko‘plab ishchilarning maqsadidir.
words.example3: They moved to the countryside for a comfortable retirement.
words.example3Translation: Ular farog‘atli pensiya uchun qishloqqa ko‘chib o‘tishdi.
extraExamples: Planning early helps ensure a comfortable retirement.
Many people worry about having a comfortable retirement.
She enjoys her comfortable retirement traveling.
A comfortable retirement includes good healthcare.
Investing wisely leads to a comfortable retirement.
The couple is looking forward to their comfortable retirement.
Government policies affect comfortable retirement options.
extraExampleTranslations: Erta rejalashtirish farog‘atli pensiyani ta’minlashga yordam beradi.
Ko‘plab odamlar farog‘atli pensiyaga ega bo‘lishdan xavotirlanishadi.
U farog‘atli pensiyasidan sayohat qilib zavqlanmoqda.
Farog‘atli pensiyaga yaxshi tibbiy xizmat kiradi.
Aqlli sarmoya qilish farog‘atli pensiyaga olib keladi.
Er-xotin farog‘atli pensiyalarini intizorlik bilan kutishmoqda.
Davlat siyosatlari farog‘atli pensiya imkoniyatlariga ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: To make someone very happy or improve their day significantly.
words.definitionUz: Kunini yorqin qilish — kimningdir kunini juda baxtli qilish yoki sezilarli darajada yaxshilash.
words.example1: Your kind message really made my day.
words.example1Translation: Sizning mehribon xabaringiz kunimni yorqin qildi.
words.example2: Helping the old lady made her day.
words.example2Translation: Keksa ayolga yordam berish uning kunini yorqin qildi.
words.example3: The surprise visit from his children made his day.
words.example3Translation: Bolalarining kutilmagan tashrifi uning kunini yorqin qildi.
extraExamples: A simple compliment can make someone’s day.
Winning the prize made her day.
The gift made my daughter’s day.
Seeing her smile made his day.
Small acts of kindness make people’s day.
The good news made everyone’s day.
Your support really made my day.
extraExampleTranslations: Oddiy iltifot kimningdir kunini yorqin qilishi mumkin.
Mukofotni yutish uning kunini yorqin qildi.
Sovg‘a qizimning kunini yorqin qildi.
Uning tabassumini ko‘rish uning kunini yorqin qildi.
Kichik mehribonlik harakatlari odamlarning kunini yorqin qiladi.
Yaxshi xabar hammaning kunini yorqin qildi.
Sizning qo‘llab-quvvatlashingiz kunimni haqiqatan ham yorqin qildi.

words.definition: Expressions intended to reassure or emotionally support someone who is upset.
words.definitionUz: Tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar — xafa bo‘lgan odamni tinchlantirish yoki emotsional jihatdan qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun aytiladigan iboralar.
words.example1: She offered comforting words to her friend after the breakup.
words.example1Translation: U do‘stiga ajralishdan keyin tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar aytdi.
words.example2: His comforting words helped reduce her anxiety.
words.example2Translation: Uning tasalli beruvchi so‘zlari uning xavotirini kamaytirdi.
words.example3: Sometimes comforting words are more powerful than actions.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar harakatlardan kuchliroq bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: The teacher spoke comforting words to the nervous student.
Comforting words can heal emotional wounds.
She couldn’t find the right comforting words.
His comforting words brought tears of relief.
Comforting words are important in difficult times.
The doctor’s comforting words reassured the family.
She always knows the perfect comforting words.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi asabiy talabaga tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar aytdi.
Tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar emotsional yaralarni davolashi mumkin.
U to‘g‘ri tasalli beruvchi so‘zlarni topa olmadi.
Uning tasalli beruvchi so‘zlari yengillik ko‘z yoshlarini keltirdi.
Tasalli beruvchi so‘zlar qiyin paytlarda muhim.
Shifokorning tasalli beruvchi so‘zlari oilani tinchlantirdi.
U har doim mukammal tasalli beruvchi so‘zlarni biladi.

words.definition: Physical attractiveness, especially of the face and overall appearance.
words.definitionUz: Chiroyli ko‘rinish — jismoniy jozibadorlik, ayniqsa yuz va umumiy tashqi ko‘rinish.
words.example1: He was known for his good looks and charm.
words.example1Translation: U chiroyli ko‘rinishi va jozibasi bilan mashhur edi.
words.example2: Good looks can open many doors, but talent is more important.
words.example2Translation: Chiroyli ko‘rinish ko‘p eshiklarni ochishi mumkin, ammo iste’dod muhimroq.
words.example3: She inherited her good looks from her mother.
words.example3Translation: U chiroyli ko‘rinishini onasidan meros qilib olgan.
extraExamples: Good looks are not everything in life.
The actor relies heavily on his good looks.
She maintained her good looks even in old age.
Good looks helped him get the job.
Society often overvalues good looks.
His good looks attracted a lot of attention.
Beauty is more than just good looks.
extraExampleTranslations: Chiroyli ko‘rinish hayotdagi hamma narsa emas.
Aktyor asosan chiroyli ko‘rinishiga tayanadi.
U hatto keksa yoshida ham chiroyli ko‘rinishini saqlab qoldi.
Chiroyli ko‘rinish unga ish topishga yordam berdi.
Jamiyat ko‘pincha chiroyli ko‘rinishni haddan tashqari qadrlaydi.
Uning chiroyli ko‘rinishi ko‘p e’tiborni tortdi.
Go‘zallik faqat chiroyli ko‘rinishdan iborat emas.

words.definition: To honor the memory of a person or event, usually with a ceremony or monument.
words.definitionUz: Xotirlash — shaxs yoki voqeani odatda marosim yoki yodgorlik orqali hurmat qilish.
words.example1: They built a statue to commemorate the soldiers.
words.example1Translation: Ular askarlarni xotirlash uchun haykal qurishdi.
words.example2: The festival commemorates the country’s independence.
words.example2Translation: Festival mamlakat mustaqilligini xotirlaydi.
words.example3: We gathered to commemorate the anniversary of her death.
words.example3Translation: Biz uning o‘limining yilligini xotirlash uchun yig‘ildik.
extraExamples: The museum commemorates important historical events.
A special ceremony will commemorate the victims.
They planted trees to commemorate the occasion.
The day is commemorated every year.
The plaque commemorates a famous writer.
How do you plan to commemorate this achievement?
The event commemorates peace and unity.
extraExampleTranslations: Muzey muhim tarixiy voqealarni xotirlaydi.
Maxsus marosim qurbonlarni xotirlaydi.
Ular bu voqeani xotirlash uchun daraxt ekishdi.
Bu kun har yili xotirlanadi.
Yodgorlik lavhasi mashhur yozuvchini xotirlaydi.
Bu yutuqni qanday xotirlamoqchisiz?
Tadbir tinchlik va birlikni xotirlaydi.

words.definition: To take strict action to stop or control illegal or undesirable behavior.
words.definitionUz: Qattiq choralar ko‘rish — noqonuniy yoki istalmagan xatti-harakatlarning oldini olish uchun qattiq choralar ko‘rish.
words.example1: The government is cracking down on tax evasion.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat soliqdan qochishga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rmoqda.
words.example2: Police are cracking down on street crime.
words.example2Translation: Politsiya ko‘cha jinoyatlariga qarshi qattiq kurashmoqda.
words.example3: The school is cracking down on bullying.
words.example3Translation: Maktab zo‘ravonlikka qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rmoqda.
extraExamples: The authorities cracked down on illegal immigration.
New laws will crack down on corruption.
The coach is cracking down on tardiness.
The company cracked down on social media use during work hours.
They are cracking down on fake news.
The mayor promised to crack down on littering.
Parents are cracking down on screen time.
extraExampleTranslations: Hokimiyat noqonuniy immigratsiyaga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rdi.
Yangi qonunlar korruptsiyaga qarshi qattiq kurash olib boradi.
Murabbiy kechikishlarga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rmoqda.
Kompaniya ish vaqtida ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan foydalanishga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rdi.
Ular soxta yangiliklarga qarshi kurashmoqda.
Merosi axlat tashlashga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rishga va’da berdi.
Ota-onalar ekran oldida o‘tkaziladigan vaqtni cheklash bo‘yicha qattiq choralar ko‘rmoqda.

words.definition: to begin formally or officially
words.definitionUz: Rasmiy yoki tantanali ravishda biror ishni boshlash
words.example1: The ceremony will commence at 10 o'clock sharp.
words.example1Translation: Marosim soat 10 da aniq boshlanadi.
words.example2: Work on the new project will commence next month.
words.example2Translation: Yangi loyiha ustidagi ish keyingi oy boshlanadi.
words.example3: The meeting commenced with a welcome speech.
words.example3Translation: Yig‘ilish tabrik nutqi bilan boshlandi.
extraExamples: The court proceedings will commence tomorrow.
Construction is set to commence in spring.
The festival commences with a grand parade.
Classes commence at the beginning of September.
The training program will commence shortly.
The official visit commenced with a formal dinner.
Filming is expected to commence next week.
extraExampleTranslations: Sud jarayoni ertaga boshlanadi.
Qurilish bahorda boshlanishi rejalashtirilgan.
Festival katta parad bilan boshlanadi.
Darslar sentyabr boshida boshlanadi.
Trening dasturi yaqin orada boshlanadi.
Rasmiy tashrif rasmiy kechki ovqat bilan boshlandi.
Suratga olish keyingi hafta boshlanishi kutilmoqda.

words.definition: an exceptionally impressive display of skill or talent
words.definitionUz: Mahorat yoki qobiliyatning juda hayratlanarli va ajoyib namoyon bo‘lishi
words.example1: The singer gave a dazzling performance at the concert.
words.example1Translation: Qo‘shiqchi konsertda ajoyib chiqish qildi.
words.example2: Her dazzling performance won her the first prize.
words.example2Translation: Uning ajoyib chiqishi unga birinchi mukofotni olib keldi.
words.example3: The team delivered a dazzling performance in the final.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa finalda ajoyib o‘yin ko‘rsatdi.
extraExamples: The dancer’s dazzling performance left the audience speechless.
He gave a dazzling performance in the championship.
The orchestra’s dazzling performance received a standing ovation.
Her dazzling performance in the movie made her a star.
The young pianist gave a dazzling performance.
The fireworks show was a dazzling performance.
The athlete’s dazzling performance broke the record.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqqosaning ajoyib chiqishi tomoshabinlarni soqov qoldirdi.
U chempionatda ajoyib o‘yin ko‘rsatdi.
Orkestrning ajoyib chiqishi tik turib olqishlandi.
Filmda uning ajoyib chiqishi uni yulduzga aylantirdi.
Yosh pianinochi ajoyib chiqish qildi.
Otashinlar shousi ajoyib tomosha edi.
Sportchining ajoyib chiqishi rekordni yangiladi.

words.definition: to devote oneself fully to a course of action or responsibility
words.definitionUz: Biror ish yoki mas’uliyatga butunlay berilib, o‘z kuchini sarflash
words.example1: She committed herself to helping the poor.
words.example1Translation: U kambag‘allarga yordam berishga o‘zini butunlay bag‘ishladi.
words.example2: You need to commit yourself to studying harder.
words.example2Translation: Siz o‘qishga qattiqroq berilishga o‘zingizni majburlashingiz kerak.
words.example3: He committed himself to finishing the project on time.
words.example3Translation: U loyihani vaqtida tugatishga o‘zini bag‘ishladi.
extraExamples: They committed themselves to environmental protection.
I am fully committed to this cause.
She committed herself to daily exercise.
The company committed itself to improving quality.
He committed himself to learning a new language.
We must commit ourselves to success.
The team committed themselves to winning the match.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular atrof-muhitni himoya qilishga o‘zlarini bag‘ishladilar.
Men bu ishga to‘liq bag‘ishlanganman.
U har kuni sport bilan shug‘ullanishga o‘zini bag‘ishladi.
Kompaniya sifatni yaxshilashga o‘zini bag‘ishladi.
U yangi til o‘rganishga o‘zini bag‘ishladi.
Biz muvaffaqiyatga o‘zimizni bag‘ishlashimiz kerak.
Jamoa o‘yinni yutishga o‘zlarini bag‘ishladilar.

words.definition: to identify shared views or interests in order to reach agreement
words.definitionUz: Kelishuvga erishish uchun umumiy fikr yoki manfaatlarni topish
words.example1: We need to find common ground in the negotiations.
words.example1Translation: Muzokaralarda umumiy til topishimiz kerak.
words.example2: It was easy to find common ground with her.
words.example2Translation: U bilan umumiy til topish oson bo‘ldi.
words.example3: They finally found common ground on the issue.
words.example3Translation: Ular masala bo‘yicha nihoyat umumiy fikrga keldilar.
extraExamples: Politicians often struggle to find common ground.
Parents and teenagers sometimes find common ground.
We found common ground in our love for music.
Finding common ground is key to resolving conflicts.
The two sides are trying to find common ground.
It’s important to find common ground in a team.
They found common ground during the discussion.
extraExampleTranslations: Siyosatchilar ko‘pincha umumiy til topishda qiynaladi.
Ota-onalar va o‘smirlar ba’zida umumiy til topadilar.
Biz musiqaga bo‘lgan muhabbatimiz orqali umumiy til topdik.
Umumiy til topish mojarolarni hal qilishning kaliti.
Ikkala tomon ham umumiy til topishga harakat qilmoqda.
Jamoada umumiy til topish muhim.
Ular muhokama davomida umumiy til topdilar.

words.definition: able to exist or function together without conflict
words.definitionUz: Bir-biri bilan ziddiyatsiz birga yashashi yoki ishlashi mumkin bo‘lgan
words.example1: This software is compatible with Windows.
words.example1Translation: Bu dastur Windows bilan mos keladi.
words.example2: They are a very compatible couple.
words.example2Translation: Ular juda mos keladigan juftlik.
words.example3: Make sure the parts are compatible before buying.
words.example3Translation: Sotib olishdan oldin qismlar mos kelishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
extraExamples: The two systems are not compatible.
Her personality is compatible with mine.
These colors are compatible with each other.
Is this phone compatible with the new charger?
They found they were highly compatible.
The new printer is compatible with all devices.
Compatible partners make a strong relationship.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu ikki tizim mos kelmaydi.
Uning xarakteri menikiga mos keladi.
Bu ranglar bir-biriga mos keladi.
Bu telefon yangi zaryadlovchi bilan mos keladimi?
Ular o‘zlarini juda mos deb topdilar.
Yangi printer barcha qurilmalar bilan mos keladi.
Mos keladigan juftlik kuchli munosabatlarni yaratadi.

words.definition: an extremely offensive expression telling someone to die; also used literally to mean die suddenly
words.definitionUz: Juda qattiq haqorat sifatida “o‘l” degan ma’noni bildiradi; shuningdek, birdaniga o‘lish ma’nosida ham ishlatiladi
words.example1: He told her to drop dead after the argument.
words.example1Translation: Janjaldan keyin u unga “o‘l” deb haqorat qildi.
words.example2: The old man dropped dead from a heart attack.
words.example2Translation: Chol yurak xurujidan birdaniga o‘lib qoldi.
words.example3: "Drop dead!" he shouted angrily.
words.example3Translation: “O‘l!” deb u g‘azab bilan baqirdi.
extraExamples: She was so angry she told him to drop dead.
Many people drop dead from overwork.
I can't believe he just dropped dead.
He dropped dead on the street.
The phrase "drop dead" is very rude.
Don't ever say "drop dead" to anyone.
The actor dropped dead during the performance.
extraExampleTranslations: U juda g‘azablangan edi, shuning uchun unga “o‘l” dedi.
Ko‘p odamlar haddan tashqari ishlashdan birdan o‘ladi.
U shunchaki birdan o‘lib qolgani ishonmayman.
U ko‘chada birdan o‘lib qoldi.
“Drop dead” iborasi juda qo‘pol.
Hech kimga “o‘l” deb aytmang.
Aktyor tomosha vaqtida birdan o‘lib qoldi.

words.definition: to counterbalance a loss or disadvantage by providing an equivalent benefit
words.definitionUz: Yo‘qotish yoki kamchilikni teng darajada foyda berish orqali qoplash
words.example1: The company will compensate for the damage caused.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya yetkazilgan zararni qoplaydi.
words.example2: Extra pay compensates for working late nights.
words.example2Translation: Qo‘shimcha maosh kechasi ishlashni qoplaydi.
words.example3: She tried to compensate for her mistake.
words.example3Translation: U xatosini qoplashga harakat qildi.
extraExamples: Nothing can compensate for the loss of a loved one.
The hotel compensated us for the poor service.
He works hard to compensate for his lack of experience.
The bonus will compensate for the extra hours.
They offered to compensate for the delay.
Good food compensated for the bad weather.
She compensated for her height with confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaqin odamni yo‘qotishni hech narsa qoplay olmaydi.
Mehmonxona yomon xizmat uchun bizga kompensatsiya berdi.
U tajribasi yo‘qligini qoplash uchun qattiq ishlaydi.
Bonus qo‘shimcha soatlarni qoplaydi.
Ular kechikishni qoplashni taklif qildilar.
Yaxshi ovqat yomon ob-havoni qopladi.
U o‘zining bo‘yini ishonch bilan qopladi.

words.definition: a persistent belief in one’s own inadequacy compared to others
words.definitionUz: O‘zini boshqalarga nisbatan doimiy ravishda yetarli emas deb his qilish
words.example1: He suffers from an inferiority complex.
words.example1Translation: U pastlik kompleksidan aziyat chekadi.
words.example2: Her inferiority complex makes her avoid social events.
words.example2Translation: Pastlik kompleksi uni ijtimoiy tadbirlardan qochishga majbur qiladi.
words.example3: An inferiority complex can affect your confidence.
words.example3Translation: Pastlik kompleksi o‘zingizga bo‘lgan ishonchni pasaytiradi.
extraExamples: Many teenagers develop an inferiority complex.
Overcoming an inferiority complex takes time.
His inferiority complex affects his relationships.
She has an inferiority complex about her education.
An inferiority complex often comes from childhood.
He hides his inferiority complex behind arrogance.
Therapy helped him deal with his inferiority complex.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p o‘smirlar pastlik kompleksini rivojlantiradi.
Pastlik kompleksidan qutulish vaqt talab qiladi.
Pastlik kompleksi uning munosabatlariga ta’sir qiladi.
U o‘z ta’limi haqida pastlik kompleksiga ega.
Pastlik kompleksi ko‘pincha bolalikdan keladi.
U pastlik kompleksini mag‘rurlik orqali yashiradi.
Terapiya unga pastlik kompleksini yengishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: the natural colour and condition of a person’s skin, especially the face
words.definitionUz: Odamning terisi, ayniqsa yuzining tabiiy rangi va holati
words.example1: She has a fair complexion.
words.example1Translation: Uning terisi oqish rangda.
words.example2: A healthy diet improves your complexion.
words.example2Translation: Sog‘lom ovqatlanish teri holatini yaxshilaydi.
words.example3: His complexion became pale after the illness.
words.example3Translation: Kasallikdan keyin uning yuz rangi oqarib qoldi.
extraExamples: She takes good care of her complexion.
Dark complexion is common in this region.
Stress can affect your complexion.
He has a clear, smooth complexion.
Sunscreen helps protect your complexion.
Her complexion glowed after the facial treatment.
People with sensitive complexion should be careful.
extraExampleTranslations: U terisini yaxshi parvarish qiladi.
Bu mintaqada qora teri odatiy hol.
Stress teri holatiga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Uning terisi toza va silliq.
Quyoshdan himoya kremlari terini saqlaydi.
Yuz parvarishidan keyin uning terisi porlab turardi.
Nozik teriga ega odamlar ehtiyot bo‘lishlari kerak.

words.definition: to be ignored or receive no response
words.definitionUz: Maslahat yoki iltimosning e’tiborga olinmasligi, eshitilmasligi
words.example1: My warnings fell on deaf ears.
words.example1Translation: Mening ogohlantirishlarimga hech kim quloq solmadi.
words.example2: Their complaints fell on deaf ears.
words.example2Translation: Ularning shikoyatlariga e’tibor berilmadi.
words.example3: His advice always falls on deaf ears.
words.example3Translation: Uning maslahatlari doim eshitilmaydi.
extraExamples: The teacher’s words fell on deaf ears.
All our requests fell on deaf ears.
Her suggestions fell on deaf ears again.
The plea for help fell on deaf ears.
My parents’ warnings fell on deaf ears.
The appeal fell on deaf ears.
Their demands fell on deaf ears.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchining so‘zlari eshitilmadi.
Barcha iltimoslarimiz e’tiborga olinmadi.
Uning takliflari yana eshitilmadi.
Yordam so‘rovi eshitilmadi.
Ota-onamning ogohlantirishlari eshitilmadi.
Murojaat eshitilmadi.
Ularning talablari e’tiborga olinmadi.

words.definition: an additional difficulty that makes a situation more complex or problematic
words.definitionUz: Vaziyatni yanada murakkab va muammoli qiladigan qo‘shimcha qiyinchilik
words.example1: The surgery had no complications.
words.example1Translation: Operatsiya hech qanday asoratsiz o‘tdi.
words.example2: There was an unexpected complication in the plan.
words.example2Translation: Rejada kutilmagan murakkablik yuz berdi.
words.example3: Financial complications delayed the project.
words.example3Translation: Moliyaviy muammolar loyihani kechiktirdi.
extraExamples: The situation became full of complications.
We need to avoid any complications.
A new complication arose yesterday.
Legal complications made it difficult.
The complication was quickly resolved.
Health complications can be serious.
There were several complications during the trip.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaziyat murakkabliklarga to‘la bo‘lib qoldi.
Har qanday murakkablikdan qochishimiz kerak.
Kecha yangi murakkablik paydo bo‘ldi.
Yuridik muammolar ishni qiyinlashtirdi.
Murakkablik tez hal qilindi.
Sog‘liq bilan bog‘liq asoratlar jiddiy bo‘lishi mumkin.
Sayohat davomida bir nechta muammolar bo‘ldi.

words.definition: dead; a formal or legal term for someone who has died
words.definitionUz: O‘lgan; rasmiy yoki huquqiy tilida vafot etgan shaxs
words.example1: The deceased was buried yesterday.
words.example1Translation: Marhum kecha dafn qilindi.
