words.example2: Please send flowers to the family of the deceased.
words.example2Translation: Marhumning oilasiga gullar yuboring.
words.example3: The lawyer read the will of the deceased.
words.example3Translation: Advokat marhumning vasiyatnomasini o‘qib berdi.
extraExamples: The names of the deceased are listed here.
She is the widow of the deceased.
The deceased left behind a large fortune.
Respect for the deceased is important.
The cause of death of the deceased is unknown.
The deceased passed away peacefully.
A memorial service was held for the deceased.
extraExampleTranslations: Marhumlarning ismlari shu yerda keltirilgan.
U marhumning bevasi.
Marhum katta boylik qoldirdi.
Marhumni hurmat qilish muhim.
Marhumning o‘lim sababi noma’lum.
Marhum tinch o‘tdi.
Marhum uchun xotira marosimi o‘tkazildi.

words.definition: a settlement in which each side gives up part of its demands
words.definitionUz: Har ikki tomon ham talablarining bir qismini qurbon qilib, kelishuvga erishish
words.example1: They reached a compromise after long talks.
words.example1Translation: Uzoq suhbatlardan keyin ular murosaga keldilar.
words.example2: Compromise is necessary in any relationship.
words.example2Translation: Har qanday munosabatlarda murosa kerak.
words.example3: We had to make a compromise on the price.
words.example3Translation: Narx bo‘yicha murosaga kelishga majbur bo‘ldik.
extraExamples: Both sides refused to compromise.
A good compromise satisfies everyone.
Finding a compromise took hours.
She is willing to compromise.
The agreement was a fair compromise.
They compromised on the meeting time.
Political compromise is often difficult.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikkala tomon ham murosaga kelishdan bosh tortdi.
Yaxshi murosa hammani qoniqtiradi.
Murosaga kelish uchun soatlab vaqt ketdi.
U murosaga kelishga tayyor.
Kelishuv adolatli murosa edi.
Ular uchrashuv vaqti bo‘yicha murosaga keldilar.
Siyosiy murosa ko‘pincha qiyin bo‘ladi.

words.definition: to deteriorate gradually due to neglect or age
words.definitionUz: E’tiborsizlik yoki vaqt o‘tishi bilan asta-sekin yomonlashib, vayron bo‘lish
words.example1: The old house fell into decay.
words.example1Translation: Eski uy parokanda bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: The city center is falling into decay.
words.example2Translation: Shahar markazi asta-sekin vayron bo‘lmoqda.
words.example3: Without care, the garden will fall into decay.
words.example3Translation: Parvarishsiz bog‘ parokanda bo‘lib qoladi.
extraExamples: Many historical buildings have fallen into decay.
The relationship fell into decay over time.
The abandoned factory fell into decay.
Neglect caused the village to fall into decay.
The tradition is starting to fall into decay.
The economy fell into decay after the crisis.
The painting fell into decay due to humidity.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p tarixiy binolar parokanda holatga kelgan.
Munosabatlar vaqt o‘tishi bilan yomonlashdi.
Tashlandiq zavod vayron bo‘lib qoldi.
E’tiborsizlik qishloqning parokanda bo‘lishiga sabab bo‘ldi.
An’ana asta-sekin yo‘qolmoqda.
Inqirozdan keyin iqtisodiyot tushkunlikka tushdi.
Namlik tufayli rasm yomonlashdi.

words.definition: a psychological condition characterized by uncontrollable eating behaviours
words.definitionUz: O‘zini tuta olmay ovqat yeyish bilan tavsiflanadigan ruhiy holat
words.example1: She is seeking help for her compulsive eating disorder.
words.example1Translation: U majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishidan davolanishga harakat qilmoqda.
words.example2: Compulsive eating disorder can lead to obesity.
words.example2Translation: Majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishi semirishga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: Therapy is important for treating compulsive eating disorder.
words.example3Translation: Majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishini davolashda terapiya muhim.
extraExamples: Compulsive eating disorder affects many people.
He struggles with compulsive eating disorder.
Stress can trigger compulsive eating disorder.
Support groups help those with compulsive eating disorder.
She overcame her compulsive eating disorder.
Compulsive eating disorder is a serious condition.
Doctors are researching compulsive eating disorder.
extraExampleTranslations: Majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishi ko‘p odamlarga ta’sir qiladi.
U majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishi bilan kurashmoqda.
Stress majburiy ovqatlanishni kuchaytirishi mumkin.
Qo‘llab-quvvatlash guruhlari bunday muammosi borlarga yordam beradi.
U majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishidan qutuldi.
Majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishi jiddiy holat.
Shifokorlar majburiy ovqatlanish buzilishini o‘rganmoqdalar.

words.definition: the element that ultimately determines an outcome
words.definitionUz: Natijani oxirida belgilab beradigan eng muhim omil
words.example1: Price was the deciding factor in our choice.
words.example1Translation: Narx bizning tanlovimizdagi hal qiluvchi omil bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Her experience was the deciding factor for the job.
words.example2Translation: Uning tajribasi ishga qabul qilishda hal qiluvchi omil bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Team spirit was the deciding factor in their victory.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa ruhi ularning g‘alabasidagi hal qiluvchi omil edi.
extraExamples: Weather was the deciding factor for the event.
The deciding factor was his dedication.
Customer reviews became the deciding factor.
Location is often the deciding factor.
What was the deciding factor in your decision?
The last goal was the deciding factor.
Trust was the deciding factor in the partnership.
extraExampleTranslations: Ob-havo tadbir uchun hal qiluvchi omil bo‘ldi.
Hal qiluvchi omil uning fidoyiligi edi.
Mijozlar sharhlari hal qiluvchi omilga aylandi.
Joylashuv ko‘pincha hal qiluvchi omil hisoblanadi.
Sizning qaroringizdagi hal qiluvchi omil nima edi?
Oxirgi gol hal qiluvchi bo‘ldi.
Ishonch hamkorlikdagi hal qiluvchi omil edi.

words.definition: habitual and uncontrollable consumption of visual content, often media
words.definitionUz: Odat tusiga kirgan va o‘zini tuta olmay serial yoki videolarni tomosha qilish
words.example1: Her compulsive viewing of TV shows affects her sleep.
words.example1Translation: Seriallarni majburiy tomosha qilishi uning uyqusiga ta’sir qiladi.
words.example2: Compulsive viewing is becoming a common problem.
words.example2Translation: Majburiy tomosha qilish keng tarqalgan muammoga aylandi.
words.example3: He struggles with compulsive viewing on his phone.
words.example3Translation: U telefonda majburiy tomosha qilish bilan kurashmoqda.
extraExamples: Compulsive viewing can be addictive.
Many people suffer from compulsive viewing habits.
She is trying to overcome compulsive viewing.
Compulsive viewing wastes a lot of time.
Parents worry about their children’s compulsive viewing.
Social media encourages compulsive viewing.
Breaking compulsive viewing requires discipline.
extraExampleTranslations: Majburiy tomosha qilish odat tusiga kirishi mumkin.
Ko‘p odamlar majburiy tomosha odatidan aziyat chekadi.
U majburiy tomosha qilishdan qutulishga harakat qilmoqda.
Majburiy tomosha ko‘p vaqtni behuda sarflaydi.
Ota-onalar farzandlarining majburiy tomosha qilishidan xavotirda.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar majburiy tomoshani kuchaytiradi.
Majburiy tomoshadan voz kechish intizomni talab qiladi.

words.definition: to hide deliberately from view or knowledge
words.definitionUz: Ataylab biror narsani ko‘zdan yoki bilimdan yashirish
words.example1: He tried to conceal his disappointment.
words.example1Translation: U hafsalasini yashirishga harakat qildi.
words.example2: She couldn’t conceal her excitement.
words.example2Translation: U o‘z hayajonini yashira olmadi.
words.example3: The thief concealed the stolen goods.
words.example3Translation: O‘g‘ri o‘g‘irlangan narsalarni yashirdi.
extraExamples: Don’t try to conceal the truth.
The spy concealed important documents.
She concealed her identity.
He concealed his emotions well.
They concealed the plan from everyone.
The makeup helped conceal her scars.
It’s hard to conceal such a big secret.
extraExampleTranslations: Haqiqatni yashirishga urinmang.
Ayg‘oqchi muhim hujjatlarni yashirdi.
U o‘z shaxsiyatini yashirdi.
U his-tuyg‘ularini yaxshi yashirdi.
Ular rejani hammadan yashirdilar.
Makiyaj uning chandiqlarini yashirishga yordam berdi.
Bunday katta sirni yashirish qiyin.

words.definition: judged or considered to violate accepted moral standards
words.definitionUz: Qabul qilingan axloq normalariga zid deb hisoblangan
words.example1: The practice was deemed immoral by society.
words.example1Translation: Bu amaliyot jamiyat tomonidan axloqsiz deb topildi.
words.example2: His behavior was deemed immoral.
words.example2Translation: Uning xatti-harakati axloqsiz deb hisoblandi.
words.example3: Some actions are deemed immoral in all cultures.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi harakatlar barcha madaniyatlarda axloqsiz hisoblanadi.
extraExamples: The decision was deemed immoral.
Her choice was deemed immoral by her family.
Many consider gambling to be immoral.
The film was deemed immoral and banned.
He was criticized for actions deemed immoral.
What is deemed immoral changes over time.
The contract was deemed immoral and void.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu qaror axloqsiz deb topildi.
Uning tanlovi oilasi tomonidan axloqsiz deb hisoblandi.
Ko‘pchilik qimor o‘yinlarini axloqsiz deb biladi.
Film axloqsiz deb topilib, taqiqlangan.
U axloqsiz deb topilgan harakatlari uchun tanqid qilindi.
Axloqsiz deb hisoblanadigan narsa vaqt o‘tishi bilan o‘zgaradi.
Shartnoma axloqsiz deb topilib, bekor qilindi.

words.definition: excessively proud of oneself; vain
words.definitionUz: O‘zini haddan tashqari yuqori baholaydigan, mag‘rur odam
words.example1: He is so conceited that no one likes him.
words.example1Translation: U shunchalik takabburki, hech kim uni yoqtirmaydi.
words.example2: She became conceited after winning the award.
words.example2Translation: Mukofotni yutgandan keyin u takabbur bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example3: Don’t be so conceited about your achievements.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatlaring bilan bunchalik takabbur bo‘lma.
extraExamples: The conceited actor refused to listen to others.
His conceited attitude annoyed everyone.
She is beautiful but not conceited.
Conceited people often have few friends.
He sounded very conceited in the interview.
Try not to appear conceited.
The conceited student always bragged about his grades.
extraExampleTranslations: Takabbur aktyor boshqalarning gapini eshitishni istamasdi.
Uning takabbur munosabati hammani bezdirdi.
U go‘zal, lekin takabbur emas.
Takabbur odamlarning do‘stlari kam bo‘ladi.
U intervyuda juda takabbur gapirdi.
Takabbur ko‘rinmaslikka harakat qiling.
Takabbur talaba har doim baholari bilan maqtanardi.

words.definition: a large proportion or intensity of a particular substance or element
words.definitionUz: Biror modda yoki elementning yuqori miqdorda yig‘ilishi
words.example1: There is a high concentration of salt in this water.
words.example1Translation: Bu suvda tuzning yuqori konsentratsiyasi bor.
words.example2: The city has a high concentration of pollution.
words.example2Translation: Shaharda ifloslanishning yuqori konsentratsiyasi mavjud.
words.example3: High concentration of students in one area causes problems.
words.example3Translation: Bitta hududda talabalar sonining yuqori konsentratsiyasi muammolarga olib keladi.
extraExamples: High concentration of chemicals can be dangerous.
There is a high concentration of tourists here.
The high concentration of wealth is concerning.
A high concentration of sugar is bad for health.
The lab measured a high concentration of the substance.
High concentration of traffic causes delays.
Plants grow well in areas with high concentration of nutrients.
extraExampleTranslations: Kimyoviy moddalarning yuqori konsentratsiyasi xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Bu yerda sayyohlarning yuqori konsentratsiyasi bor.
Boylikning yuqori konsentratsiyasi tashvish uyg‘otadi.
Shakarning yuqori konsentratsiyasi sog‘liq uchun zararli.
Laboratoriya moddaning yuqori konsentratsiyasini o‘lchadi.
Transportning yuqori konsentratsiyasi kechikishlarga sabab bo‘ladi.
O‘simliklar ozuqa moddalarining yuqori konsentratsiyasi bo‘lgan joylarda yaxshi o‘sadi.

words.definition: to accept something less than originally demanded, often to reach agreement
words.definitionUz: Kelishuvga erishish uchun talab qilinganidan kamroq narsaga rozi bo‘lish
words.example1: They made a concession on the price.
words.example1Translation: Ular narx bo‘yicha murosaga bordilar.
words.example2: The company made several concessions to the workers.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya ishchilarga bir necha murosa qildi.
words.example3: Sometimes you have to make a concession.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida murosaga borish kerak bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: The government made a concession to the protesters.
He refused to make any concessions.
We made a small concession to reach an agreement.
Making concessions is part of negotiation.
She made a concession regarding the deadline.
Both sides made concessions.
The union demanded more concessions.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat namoyishchilarga murosa qildi.
U hech qanday murosaga borishni istamadi.
Kelishuvga erishish uchun biz kichik murosaga bordik.
Murosaga borish muzokaralarning bir qismi.
U muddat bo‘yicha murosaga bordi.
Ikkala tomon ham murosaga bordi.
Kasaba uyushmasi ko‘proq murosa talab qildi.

words.definition: to make a judgement without sufficient evidence
words.definitionUz: Yetarli dalil bo‘lmasdan tezda noto‘g‘ri xulosa chiqarish
words.example1: Don’t jump to conclusions before hearing the full story.
words.example1Translation: To‘liq voqeani eshitmasdan shoshilib xulosa qilmang.
words.example2: She jumped to the conclusion that he was guilty.
words.example2Translation: U uni aybdor deb shoshilib xulosa qildi.
words.example3: He tends to jump to conclusions easily.
words.example3Translation: U osongina shoshilib xulosa chiqaradi.
extraExamples: It’s easy to jump to conclusions.
Stop jumping to conclusions about people.
I jumped to the wrong conclusion.
Don’t jump to conclusions based on rumors.
She always jumps to conclusions.
Jumping to conclusions can cause misunderstandings.
He jumped to conclusions too quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Shoshilib xulosa qilish oson.
Odamlar haqida shoshilib xulosa qilishni to‘xtating.
Men noto‘g‘ri xulosaga keldim.
Mish-mishlarga asoslanib xulosa qilmang.
U har doim shoshilib xulosa chiqaradi.
Shoshilib xulosa chiqarish tushunmovchiliklarga olib keladi.
U juda tez xulosa qildi.

words.definition: to express strong disapproval of; to officially declare as unacceptable
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qattiq qoralash yoki rasman qabul qilib bo‘lmaydigan deb e’lon qilish
words.example1: The government condemned the attack.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat hujumni qoraladi.
words.example2: We strongly condemn violence.
words.example2Translation: Biz zo‘ravonlikni qattiq qoralaymiz.
words.example3: The teacher condemned cheating in the exam.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchi imtihonda aldashni qoraladi.
extraExamples: Many countries condemned the decision.
She condemned his rude behavior.
The UN condemned the human rights violations.
He was condemned for his actions.
We must condemn such behavior.
The mayor condemned the vandalism.
Religious leaders condemned the act.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p mamlakatlar bu qarorni qoraladi.
U uning qo‘pol xatti-harakatini qoraladi.
BMT inson huquqlarini buzishni qoraladi.
U harakatlari uchun qoralandi.
Biz bunday xatti-harakatni qoralashimiz kerak.
Merosiy vandalizmni qoraladi.
Diniy rahbarlar bu harakatni qoraladilar.

words.definition: to be trained or psychologically shaped to respond in a particular way
words.definitionUz: Muayyan tarzda javob berishga o‘rgatilgan yoki ruhiy jihatdan shakllangan
words.example1: We are conditioned to wake up early.
words.example1Translation: Biz erta turishga o‘rgatilganmiz.
words.example2: Children are conditioned to obey their parents.
words.example2Translation: Bolalar ota-onalariga bo‘ysunishga o‘rgatiladi.
words.example3: People are conditioned by society.
words.example3Translation: Odamlar jamiyat tomonidan shakllantiriladi.
extraExamples: He is conditioned to react quickly.
We are conditioned to fear failure.
Animals can be conditioned to respond to sounds.
She was conditioned from childhood.
Society conditions us to value money.
I am conditioned to check my phone often.
The dogs were conditioned to salivate at the bell.
extraExampleTranslations: U tez reaksiya berishga o‘rgatilgan.
Biz muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan qo‘rqishga o‘rgatilganmiz.
Hayvonlarni tovushlarga reaksiya berishga o‘rgatish mumkin.
U bolaligidan shunday o‘rgatilgan.
Jamiyat bizni pulni qadrlashga o‘rgatadi.
Men tez-tez telefonni tekshirishga o‘rgatilganman.
Itlar qo‘ng‘iroq ovozida tupurik ajratishga o‘rgatilgan edi.

words.definition: to behave in a particular manner, especially in public or formal situations
words.definitionUz: Ayniqsa jamoat yoki rasmiy holatlarda ma’lum bir tarzda o‘zini tutish
words.example1: You must conduct yourself professionally at work.
words.example1Translation: Ishda o‘zingizni professional tarzda tutishingiz kerak.
words.example2: She conducted herself with dignity.
words.example2Translation: U o‘zini hurmat bilan tutdi.
words.example3: How should I conduct myself at the interview?
words.example3Translation: Intervyuda o‘zimni qanday tutishim kerak?
extraExamples: He conducted himself well during the meeting.
Children should learn how to conduct themselves.
She always conducts herself politely.
Conduct yourself properly in class.
The ambassador conducted himself with grace.
You need to conduct yourself calmly.
They conducted themselves like professionals.
extraExampleTranslations: U yig‘ilishda o‘zini yaxshi tutdi.
Bolalar o‘zlarini qanday tutishni o‘rganishlari kerak.
U har doim muloyim bo‘ladi.
Sinfda o‘zingizni to‘g‘ri tuting.
Elchi o‘zini nafis tutdi.
O‘zingizni tinch tutishingiz kerak.
Ular professional kabi o‘zlarini tutdilar.

words.definition: shared privately with the expectation it will not be disclosed
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarga aytmaslik sharti bilan maxfiy tarzda baham ko‘rish
words.example1: I am telling you this in confidence.
words.example1Translation: Buni sizga maxfiy ravishda aytayapman.
words.example2: She shared the information in confidence.
words.example2Translation: U ma’lumotni maxfiy tarzda aytib berdi.
words.example3: Can I speak to you in confidence?
words.example3Translation: Siz bilan maxfiy gaplashsam bo‘ladimi?
extraExamples: He told me in confidence about his plans.
The meeting was held in confidence.
Please keep this in confidence.
She spoke in confidence about her problems.
The document was shared in confidence.
I was told this in strict confidence.
They discussed the matter in confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: U menga o‘z rejalarini maxfiy aytib berdi.
Yig‘ilish maxfiy tarzda o‘tkazildi.
Iltimos, buni sir saqlang.
U o‘z muammolari haqida maxfiy gapirdi.
Hujjat maxfiy tarzda baham ko‘rilgan.
Buni qattiq maxfiylikda aytishdi.
Ular masalani maxfiy muhokama qildilar.

words.definition: to be restricted or limited to a particular place or condition
words.definitionUz: Muayyan joy yoki holat bilan cheklangan bo‘lish
words.example1: She was confined to bed for a week.
words.example1Translation: U bir hafta davomida yotoqda yotishga majbur bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The fighting was confined to the border area.
words.example2Translation: Janglar faqat chegara hududida bo‘ldi.
words.example3: His work is confined to the laboratory.
words.example3Translation: Uning ishi faqat laboratoriya bilan cheklangan.
extraExamples: The damage was confined to one room.
Access is confined to authorized personnel.
The disease is confined to certain regions.
She is confined to a wheelchair.
Discussion was confined to the main issues.
His interests are not confined to sports.
The problem is confined to older models.
extraExampleTranslations: Zarar faqat bitta xonaga cheklangan edi.
Kirish faqat ruxsat etilgan shaxslarga cheklangan.
Kasallik faqat ma’lum hududlarda tarqalgan.
U nogironlar aravachasiga bog‘langan.
Muhokama faqat asosiy masalalar bilan cheklangan edi.
Uning qiziqishlari faqat sport bilan cheklanmagan.
Muammo faqat eski modellar bilan cheklangan.

words.definition: a situation where personal interests interfere with professional duties
words.definitionUz: Shaxsiy manfaatlar professional majburiyatlarga xalaqit beradigan holat
words.example1: There is a clear conflict of interest here.
words.example1Translation: Bu yerda aniq manfaatlar to‘qnashuvi bor.
words.example2: He resigned due to a conflict of interest.
words.example2Translation: U manfaatlar to‘qnashuvi tufayli iste’foga chiqdi.
words.example3: The judge declared a conflict of interest.
words.example3Translation: Sudya manfaatlar to‘qnashuvini e’lon qildi.
extraExamples: This creates a conflict of interest.
We must avoid any conflict of interest.
She reported the potential conflict of interest.
Conflict of interest rules are strict.
There was no conflict of interest in the case.
The company has strict policies on conflict of interest.
He was accused of a conflict of interest.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu manfaatlar to‘qnashuvini keltirib chiqaradi.
Har qanday manfaatlar to‘qnashuvidan qochishimiz kerak.
U potentsial manfaatlar to‘qnashuvini bildirib o‘tdi.
Manfaatlar to‘qnashuvi qoidalari qattiq.
Ishda manfaatlar to‘qnashuvi yo‘q edi.
Kompaniyada manfaatlar to‘qnashuvi bo‘yicha qat’iy siyosat mavjud.
U manfaatlar to‘qnashuvida ayblandi.

words.definition: to face a difficult situation or person directly
words.definitionUz: Qiyin vaziyat yoki odam bilan to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri yuzma-yuz bo‘lish
words.example1: I need to confront my fears.
words.example1Translation: Men qo‘rquvlarim bilan yuzma-yuz kelishim kerak.
words.example2: She confronted him about his lies.
words.example2Translation: U uning yolg‘onlari haqida unga to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri aytdi.
words.example3: The country must confront the problem of climate change.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakat iqlim o‘zgarishi muammosiga yuzma-yuz kelishi kerak.
extraExamples: He finally confronted his boss.
It’s hard to confront the truth.
They confronted the thief.
We must confront these challenges.
She confronted the issue head-on.
Don’t avoid confronting your problems.
The team confronted their rivals.
extraExampleTranslations: U nihoyat rahbariga to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri gapirdi.
Haqiqat bilan yuzma-yuz kelish qiyin.
Ular o‘g‘rini qo‘lga oldilar.
Biz bu qiyinchiliklarga yuzma-yuz kelishimiz kerak.
U muammoni to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri hal qildi.
Muammolaringizdan qochmang.
Jamoa raqiblariga qarshi chiqdi.

words.definition: To achieve general agreement among all parties involved.
words.definitionUz: Umumiy kelishuvga erishmoq — barcha ishtirokchilar o‘rtasida umumiy fikrga kelishni bildiradi.
words.example1: After several hours of discussion, the team finally reached a consensus.
words.example1Translation: Bir necha soatlik muhokamadan so‘ng jamoa nihoyat umumiy kelishuvga erishdi.
words.example2: It was difficult to reach a consensus on the new policy.
words.example2Translation: Yangi siyosat bo‘yicha umumiy kelishuvga erishish qiyin bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Leaders need to listen carefully to reach a consensus.
words.example3Translation: Rahbarlar umumiy kelishuvga erishish uchun diqqat bilan tingashlari kerak.
extraExamples: The committee worked hard to reach a consensus before the deadline.
Reaching a consensus often requires compromise from all sides.
They couldn’t reach a consensus, so they postponed the decision.
In negotiations, reaching a consensus builds trust.
The family reached a consensus about moving to a new city.
Reaching a consensus is important in democratic processes.
It took time, but we managed to reach a consensus on the budget.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo‘mita muddatdan oldin umumiy kelishuvga erishish uchun ko‘p mehnat qildi.
Umumiy kelishuvga erishish ko‘pincha barcha tomonlardan murosa talab qiladi.
Ular umumiy kelishuvga erisha olmaganlari uchun qarorni kechiktirdilar.
Muzokaralarda umumiy kelishuvga erishish ishonchni mustahkamlaydi.
Oila yangi shaharga ko‘chish haqida umumiy kelishuvga erishdi.
Demokratik jarayonlarda umumiy kelishuvga erishish muhimdir.
Vaqt talab qildi, lekin biz byudjet bo‘yicha umumiy kelishuvga erishdik.

words.definition: Voluntary permission or agreement given by someone.
words.definitionUz: Rozilik — biror kishining ixtiyoriy ravishda bergan ruxsati yoki kelishuvidir.
words.example1: You need parental consent to join the school trip.
words.example1Translation: Maktab sayohatiga chiqish uchun ota-ona roziligi kerak.
words.example2: She gave her full consent to the marriage.
words.example2Translation: U turmushga chiqishga to‘liq rozilik berdi.
words.example3: Informed consent is essential before any medical procedure.
words.example3Translation: Har qanday tibbiy muolajadan oldin xabardor qilingan rozilik juda muhim.
extraExamples: Without consent, the action is considered unethical.
The company cannot use your data without your consent.
Mutual consent is required for a peaceful divorce.
He withdrew his consent at the last moment.
Consent must be given freely and without pressure.
Teachers explained the rules and asked for student consent.
Legal consent is required for contracts and agreements.
extraExampleTranslations: Roziliksiz harakat axloqsiz hisoblanadi.
Kompaniya sizning roziligingizsiz ma’lumotlaringizdan foydalana olmaydi.
Tinch ajralish uchun o‘zaro rozilik talab qilinadi.
U so‘nggi daqiqada roziligini qaytarib oldi.
Rozilik erkin va bosimsiz berilishi kerak.
O‘qituvchilar qoidalarni tushuntirib, o‘quvchilarning roziligini so‘radilar.
Shartnomalar va kelishuvlar uchun qonuniy rozilik talab etiladi.

words.definition: To be fully engaged in an intense or meaningful discussion.
words.definitionUz: Chuqur suhbatda bo‘lmoq — jiddiy yoki mazmunli suhbatga butunlay berilib qolishni anglatadi.
words.example1: They were so deep in conversation that they didn’t notice the time.
words.example1Translation: Ular suhbatga shunchalik berilib qolgandiki, vaqtni sezishmadi.
words.example2: I didn’t want to interrupt them while they were deep in conversation.
words.example2Translation: Ular chuqur suhbatda bo‘lganda ularni bezovta qilishni xohlamadim.
words.example3: The two friends were deep in conversation about their future plans.
words.example3Translation: Ikki do‘st kelajak rejalarini muhokama qilib, chuqur suhbatda edi.
extraExamples: She was deep in conversation with her professor after class.
Being deep in conversation helps build strong relationships.
They remained deep in conversation even during dinner.
It’s hard to get their attention when they are deep in conversation.
The team was deep in conversation trying to solve the problem.
We found them deep in conversation in the garden.
Deep in conversation, they forgot about their surroundings.
extraExampleTranslations: U darsdan keyin professori bilan chuqur suhbatda edi.
Chuqur suhbatda bo‘lish kuchli munosabatlarni o‘rnatishga yordam beradi.
Ular hatto kechki ovqat paytida ham chuqur suhbatda qolishdi.
Ular chuqur suhbatda bo‘lganda diqqatlarini jalb qilish qiyin.
Jamoa muammoni hal qilish uchun chuqur suhbatda edi.
Biz ularni bog‘da chuqur suhbatda topdik.
Chuqur suhbatda ular atrofni unutib qo‘yishdi.

words.definition: Sustained and regular application of effort over a period of time.
words.definitionUz: Doimiy harakat — ma’lum vaqt davomida muntazam va uzluksiz kuch sarflashdir.
words.example1: Consistent effort is the key to achieving long-term goals.
words.example1Translation: Doimiy harakat uzoq muddatli maqsadlarga erishishning kalitidir.
words.example2: Her consistent effort in studying paid off with excellent results.
words.example2Translation: Uning o‘qishdagi doimiy harakati a’lo natijalar bilan o‘z samarasini berdi.
words.example3: Success requires consistent effort rather than occasional hard work.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyat vaqti-vaqti bilan qattiq mehnat emas, balki doimiy harakatni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Consistent effort builds strong habits over time.
Athletes need consistent effort to improve their performance.
Teachers appreciate students who show consistent effort.
Consistent effort leads to gradual but steady progress.
Without consistent effort, even talented people may fail.
Parents encourage consistent effort in their children’s education.
The project succeeded thanks to the team’s consistent effort.
extraExampleTranslations: Doimiy harakat vaqt o‘tishi bilan kuchli odatlarni shakllantiradi.
Sportchilar natijalarini yaxshilash uchun doimiy harakat qilishlari kerak.
O‘qituvchilar doimiy harakat ko‘rsatadigan o‘quvchilarni qadrlashadi.
Doimiy harakat asta-sekin, lekin barqaror taraqqiyotga olib keladi.
Doimiy harakatsiz hatto qobiliyatli odamlar ham muvaffaqiyatsizlikka uchraydi.
Ota-onalar farzandlarining ta’limida doimiy harakatni rag‘batlantirishadi.
Loyiha jamoaning doimiy harakati tufayli muvaffaqiyatli yakunlandi.

words.definition: A person’s overall physical resilience or susceptibility to illness.
words.definitionUz: Kuchli / zaif konstitutsiya — odamning jismoniy chidamliligi yoki kasalliklarga moyilligini bildiradi.
words.example1: Despite his weak constitution, he rarely gets sick.
words.example1Translation: Zaif konstitutsiyasiga qaramay, u kamdan-kam kasal bo‘ladi.
words.example2: People with a strong constitution recover faster from illnesses.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli konstitutsiyaga ega odamlar kasallikdan tezroq tiklanishadi.
words.example3: Her strong constitution helped her survive the harsh winter.
words.example3Translation: Uning kuchli konstitutsiyasi qattiq qishdan omon qolishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: A strong constitution is often inherited from parents.
Regular exercise can strengthen a weak constitution.
His weak constitution makes him sensitive to cold weather.
Good nutrition supports a strong constitution.
Even with a strong constitution, rest is important.
The doctor said she has a naturally strong constitution.
Living in the mountains improved his constitution.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli konstitutsiya ko‘pincha ota-onadan meros bo‘lib o‘tadi.
Muntazam mashqlar zaif konstitutsiyani mustahkamlashi mumkin.
Zaif konstitutsiyasi sovuq ob-havoga sezgir qiladi.
Yaxshi ovqatlanish kuchli konstitutsiyani qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.
Kuchli konstitutsiyaga ega bo‘lsa ham dam olish muhim.
Shifokor uning tabiatan kuchli konstitutsiyaga ega ekanligini aytdi.
Tog‘larda yashash uning konstitutsiyasini yaxshiladi.

words.definition: Limitations caused by insufficient money or financial resources.
words.definitionUz: Moliyaviy cheklovlar — yetarli mablag‘ yoki moliyaviy resurslarning yetishmasligidan kelib chiqadigan cheklovlar.
words.example1: Due to financial constraints, we had to cancel the trip.
words.example1Translation: Moliyaviy cheklovlar tufayli sayohatni bekor qilishga majbur bo‘ldik.
words.example2: Financial constraints often prevent students from studying abroad.
words.example2Translation: Moliyaviy cheklovlar ko‘pincha talabalarning chet elda o‘qishiga to‘sqinlik qiladi.
words.example3: The project faced several financial constraints during development.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha ishlab chiqish jarayonida bir necha moliyaviy cheklovlarga duch keldi.
extraExamples: Many families struggle with financial constraints.
Governments try to help small businesses facing financial constraints.
Financial constraints forced the company to reduce staff.
Creative solutions can sometimes overcome financial constraints.
Financial constraints should not stop you from dreaming big.
She managed to study despite severe financial constraints.
Financial constraints are a common challenge for startups.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p oilalar moliyaviy cheklovlar bilan kurashadi.
Hukumatlar moliyaviy cheklovlarga duch kelayotgan kichik bizneslarga yordam berishga harakat qiladi.
Moliyaviy cheklovlar kompaniyani xodimlar sonini qisqartirishga majbur qildi.
Ijodiy yechimlar ba’zan moliyaviy cheklovlarni yengishga yordam beradi.
Moliyaviy cheklovlar katta orzularingizdan voz kechishingizga sabab bo‘lmasligi kerak.
U qattiq moliyaviy cheklovlarga qaramay o‘qishga muvaffaq bo‘ldi.
Moliyaviy cheklovlar startaplar uchun keng tarqalgan muammodir.

words.definition: To be strongly felt or deeply rooted emotionally or culturally.
words.definitionUz: Chuqur ildiz otgan — his-tuyg‘ular yoki madaniyatda chuqur joylashgan, kuchli his qilinadigan holatni bildiradi.
words.example1: Their friendship runs deep after so many years together.
words.example1Translation: Ularning do‘stligi birga o‘tkazgan ko‘p yillardan keyin chuqur ildiz otgan.
words.example2: The cultural traditions in this village run very deep.
words.example2Translation: Bu qishloqdagi madaniy an’analar juda chuqur ildiz otgan.
words.example3: The pain from his childhood trauma still runs deep.
words.example3Translation: Bolalikdagi travmadan qolgan og‘riq hali ham chuqur ildiz otgan.
extraExamples: Family loyalties often run deep in many cultures.
The distrust between the two groups runs deep.
Her love for music runs deep.
Historical conflicts can run deep for generations.
Respect for elders runs deep in Asian societies.
The emotions in his paintings run deep.
Political divisions in the country run very deep.
extraExampleTranslations: Oilaviy sadoqat ko‘p madaniyatlarda chuqur ildiz otgan.
Ikki guruh o‘rtasidagi ishonchsizlik chuqur ildiz otgan.
Uning musiqaga bo‘lgan muhabbati chuqur ildiz otgan.
Tarixiy mojarolar avlodlar davomida chuqur ildiz otishi mumkin.
Ota-onalarga hurmat Osiyo jamiyatlarida chuqur ildiz otgan.
Uning rasmlaridagi his-tuyg‘ular chuqur ildiz otgan.
Mamlakatdagi siyosiy bo‘linishlar juda chuqur ildiz otgan.

words.definition: To be overwhelmed by strong feelings of remorse or guilt.
words.definitionUz: Aybdorlik hissi bilan yonmoq — kuchli pushaymonlik yoki aybdorlik hissi bilan butunlay qamrab olinishni anglatadi.
words.example1: He was consumed by guilt after lying to his best friend.
words.example1Translation: Eng yaqin do‘stiga yolg‘on gapirgandan keyin u aybdorlik hissi bilan yondi.
words.example2: She was consumed by guilt for missing her mother’s last moments.
words.example2Translation: Onasining so‘nggi lahzalarini o‘tkazib yuborgani uchun u aybdorlik hissi bilan yondi.
words.example3: Being consumed by guilt can affect your mental health.
words.example3Translation: Aybdorlik hissi bilan yonish ruhiy salomatlikka ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: He couldn’t sleep because he was consumed by guilt.
Being consumed by guilt prevents people from moving forward.
Therapy helped her stop being consumed by guilt.
Survivors of accidents are often consumed by guilt.
Parents sometimes feel consumed by guilt when working long hours.
She tried to make amends after being consumed by guilt.
It’s important not to let guilt consume you completely.
extraExampleTranslations: U aybdorlik hissi bilan yongani uchun uxlay olmadi.
Aybdorlik hissi bilan yonish odamlarga oldinga siljishga to‘sqinlik qiladi.
Terapiya unga aybdorlik hissi bilan yonishni to‘xtatishga yordam berdi.
Baxtsiz hodisalardan omon qolganlar ko‘pincha aybdorlik hissi bilan yonishadi.
Ota-onalar ba’zan uzoq ish vaqti tufayli aybdorlik hissi bilan yonishadi.
U aybdorlik hissi bilan yongach, kechirim so‘rab tuzatishga harakat qildi.
Aybdorlik hissingiz sizni butunlay yondirib yubormasligi muhim.

words.definition: To restrain or control angry emotions.
words.definitionUz: G‘azabingizni tiymoq — g‘azab his-tuyg‘ularini boshqarish yoki tiyishni bildiradi.
words.example1: It’s important to contain your anger during arguments.
words.example1Translation: Bahslashayotganda g‘azabingizni tiyish juda muhim.
words.example2: He struggled to contain his anger when he heard the news.
words.example2Translation: U xabarni eshitgach, g‘azabini tiyishga qiynaldi.
words.example3: Learning to contain your anger can improve relationships.
words.example3Translation: G‘azabingizni tiyishni o‘rganish munosabatlarni yaxshilashi mumkin.
extraExamples: She took a deep breath to contain her anger.
It’s better to contain your anger than say something you regret.
Parents teach children how to contain their anger.
He couldn’t contain his anger and shouted loudly.
Meditation helps many people contain their anger.
Professional athletes must learn to contain their anger.
Containing your anger shows emotional maturity.
extraExampleTranslations: U g‘azabini tiyish uchun chuqur nafas oldi.
Pushaymon bo‘ladigan gap aytishdan ko‘ra g‘azabingizni tiygan ma’qul.
Ota-onalar bolalarga g‘azablarini tiyishni o‘rgatishadi.
U g‘azabini tiya olmadi va baland ovozda baqirdi.
Meditatsiya ko‘p odamlarga g‘azabini tiyishga yordam beradi.
Professional sportchilar g‘azablarini tiyishni o‘rganishlari kerak.
G‘azabingizni tiyish his-tuyg‘u yetukligini ko‘rsatadi.

words.definition: A large amount of sugar present in a food or drink.
words.definitionUz: Yuqori shakar miqdori — oziq-ovqat yoki ichimlikda katta miqdorda shakar mavjudligini bildiradi.
words.example1: This drink has a high sugar content and is not healthy.
words.example1Translation: Bu ichimlikda yuqori shakar miqdori bor va u sog‘lom emas.
words.example2: Many processed foods contain a high sugar content.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p qayta ishlangan oziq-ovqat mahsulotlarida yuqori shakar miqdori mavjud.
words.example3: Check the label for high sugar content before buying.
words.example3Translation: Sotib olishdan oldin yorliqdagi yuqori shakar miqdorini tekshiring.
extraExamples: A high sugar content can lead to health problems like diabetes.
Parents should avoid snacks with high sugar content.
The cereal has surprisingly high sugar content.
Reducing high sugar content in diets improves energy levels.
Many drinks marketed as healthy have high sugar content.
Governments are taxing products with high sugar content.
Reading ingredients helps identify high sugar content.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori shakar miqdori diabet kabi sog‘liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ota-onalar yuqori shakar miqdori bo‘lgan gazaklardan qochishlari kerak.
Bu yormalarda ajablanarli darajada yuqori shakar miqdori bor.
Ovqatlanishdagi yuqori shakar miqdorini kamaytirish energiya darajasini yaxshilaydi.
Sog‘lom deb reklama qilinadigan ko‘p ichimliklarda yuqori shakar miqdori mavjud.
Hukumatlar yuqori shakar miqdori bo‘lgan mahsulotlarga soliq qo‘ymoqda.
Tarkibni o‘qish yuqori shakar miqdorini aniqlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Firmly held beliefs about what is right and wrong.
words.definitionUz: Axloqiy e’tiqodlar — nima to‘g‘ri va nima noto‘g‘ri ekanligi haqidagi mustahkam fikrlar.
words.example1: She acted according to her strong moral convictions.
words.example1Translation: U o‘zining kuchli axloqiy e’tiqodlariga ko‘ra harakat qildi.
words.example2: His moral convictions prevented him from accepting the bribe.
words.example2Translation: Axloqiy e’tiqodlari uni porani qabul qilishdan saqladi.
words.example3: People with strong moral convictions often stand up for justice.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli axloqiy e’tiqodlarga ega odamlar ko‘pincha adolat uchun kurashadi.
extraExamples: Moral convictions guide our daily decisions.
It’s important to respect other people’s moral convictions.
His moral convictions come from his religious beliefs.
Changing moral convictions can be difficult.
Leaders should act according to their moral convictions.
Moral convictions can sometimes cause conflicts.
She never compromises her moral convictions.
extraExampleTranslations: Axloqiy e’tiqodlar kundalik qarorlarimizni boshqaradi.
Boshqa odamlarning axloqiy e’tiqodlarini hurmat qilish muhim.
Uning axloqiy e’tiqodlari diniy qarashlaridan kelib chiqadi.
Axloqiy e’tiqodlarni o‘zgartirish qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
Rahbarlar o‘z axloqiy e’tiqodlariga ko‘ra harakat qilishlari kerak.
Axloqiy e’tiqodlar ba’zan mojarolarga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
U hech qachon axloqiy e’tiqodlaridan voz kechmaydi.

words.definition: To remain calm and rational in stressful or difficult situations.
words.definitionUz: Sovuq bosh saqlamoq — qiyin yoki stressli vaziyatlarda tinch va aql bilan harakat qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: You need to keep a cool head during emergencies.
words.example1Translation: Favqulodda holatlarda sovuq bosh saqlashingiz kerak.
words.example2: He managed to keep a cool head and solve the problem.
words.example2Translation: U sovuq bosh saqlab, muammoni hal qildi.
words.example3: Keeping a cool head helps in making better decisions.
words.example3Translation: Sovuq bosh saqlash yaxshiroq qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Leaders must keep a cool head in times of crisis.
It’s difficult to keep a cool head when you are angry.
She always keeps a cool head under pressure.
Keeping a cool head can prevent arguments from escalating.
Training helps soldiers keep a cool head in dangerous situations.
Parents try to keep a cool head when disciplining children.
Keeping a cool head is a valuable life skill.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbarlar inqiroz paytida sovuq bosh saqlashlari kerak.
G‘azablanganingizda sovuq bosh saqlash qiyin.
U bosim ostida hamisha sovuq bosh saqlaydi.
Sovuq bosh saqlash mojarolarning kuchayib ketishini oldini oladi.
Mashqlar askarlarga xavfli vaziyatlarda sovuq bosh saqlashga yordam beradi.
Ota-onalar bolalarni tarbiyalayotganda sovuq bosh saqlashga harakat qilishadi.
Sovuq bosh saqlash — qimmatli hayotiy ko‘nikma.

words.definition: To suffer a mental breakdown or suddenly burst into laughter (depending on context).
words.definitionUz: Yemirilmoq / qattiq kulmoq — kontekstga qarab, ruhiy jihatdan yemirilish yoki birdaniga qattiq kulishni bildiradi.
words.example1: The stress finally made him crack up.
words.example1Translation: Stress nihoyat uni yemirishiga olib keldi.
words.example2: We all cracked up when he told the funny story.
words.example2Translation: U kulgili hikoyani aytganda hammamiz qattiq kuldik.
words.example3: Don’t make me laugh or I’ll crack up!
words.example3Translation: Meni kuldirma, bo‘lmasa qattiq kulaman!
extraExamples: She cracked up after working nonstop for months.
The whole class cracked up at the teacher’s joke.
He was afraid he might crack up under the pressure.
The comedian made everyone crack up.
Trying to contain laughter only makes you crack up more.
Mental health support can prevent people from cracking up.
They cracked up laughing at the silly video.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir necha oy to‘xtovsiz ishlagandan keyin u yemirildi.
O‘qituvchining haziliga butun sinf qattiq kuldik.
U bosim ostida yemirilishidan qo‘rqardi.
Komediyachi hammasini qattiq kuldirib yubordi.
Kulgini tiyishga urinish faqat yanada qattiq kuldiradi.
Ruhiy salomatlik yordami odamlarning yemirilishini oldini olishi mumkin.
Ular ahmoqona videoni ko‘rib qattiq kuldilar.

words.definition: To have an intense and often uncontrollable desire for something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani juda xohlamoq — kuchli va ko‘pincha boshqarib bo‘lmaydigan istakni bildiradi.
words.example1: Pregnant women often crave sweet or salty foods.
words.example1Translation: Homilador ayollar ko‘pincha shirin yoki sho‘r taomlarni juda xohlashadi.
words.example2: After the diet, I really craved chocolate.
words.example2Translation: Diyetdan keyin men shokoladni juda xohladim.
words.example3: Many people crave success and recognition.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p odamlar muvaffaqiyat va e’tirofni juda xohlashadi.
extraExamples: He craves adventure and new experiences.
Children often crave attention from their parents.
After quitting smoking, she still craved cigarettes.
In winter, people crave warm and comforting food.
Artists crave freedom of expression.
Humans naturally crave connection with others.
She craves quiet time after a busy day.
extraExampleTranslations: U sarguzasht va yangi tajribalarni juda xohlaydi.
Bolalar ko‘pincha ota-onalarining e’tiborini juda xohlashadi.
Chekishni tashlagandan keyin u hali ham sigaretani juda xohlardi.
Qishda odamlar issiq va tasalli beradigan taomlarni xohlashadi.
San’atkorlar ifoda erkinligini juda xohlashadi.
Odamlar tabiatan boshqalar bilan aloqani xohlashadi.
U band kunidan keyin tinch vaqtni juda xohlaydi.

words.definition: A clear, typical, and outstanding example of something.
words.definitionUz: Eng yorqin misol — biror narsaning aniq, odatiy va ajoyib namunasi.
words.example1: This building is a prime example of modern architecture.
words.example1Translation: Bu bino zamonaviy arxitekturaning eng yorqin misolidir.
words.example2: Her success is a prime example of hard work paying off.
words.example2Translation: Uning muvaffaqiyati mehnatning o‘z samarasini berishining eng yorqin misolidir.
words.example3: The company is a prime example of innovation in technology.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya texnologiyadagi innovatsiyaning eng yorqin misolidir.
extraExamples: This case is a prime example of why rules are important.
The garden is a prime example of beautiful landscaping.
He is a prime example of a dedicated teacher.
The report provides a prime example of poor planning.
This painting is a prime example of Renaissance art.
Her kindness is a prime example for everyone to follow.
The accident was a prime example of careless driving.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu holat qoidalarning nega muhimligining eng yorqin misolidir.
Bu bog‘ go‘zal landshaft dizaynining eng yorqin misolidir.
U fidoyi o‘qituvchining eng yorqin misolidir.
Hisobot yomon rejalashtirishning eng yorqin misolini keltiradi.
Bu rasm Uyg‘onish davri san’atining eng yorqin misolidir.
Uning mehribonligi hammaga o‘rnak bo‘ladigan eng yorqin misoldir.
Hodisa beparvo haydashning eng yorqin misoli edi.

words.definition: To settle disagreements through discussion or negotiation.
words.definitionUz: Farqlarni hal qilmoq — muhokama yoki muzokaralar orqali kelishmovchiliklarni bartaraf etishdir.
words.example1: The two countries met to resolve their differences.
words.example1Translation: Ikki mamlakat farqlarini hal qilish uchun uchrashdi.
words.example2: They managed to resolve their differences peacefully.
words.example2Translation: Ular farqlarini tinch yo‘l bilan hal qilishga muvaffaq bo‘ldilar.
words.example3: A mediator helped the team resolve their differences.
words.example3Translation: Vositachi jamoaga farqlarini hal qilishda yordam berdi.
extraExamples: It’s important to resolve differences before they become bigger problems.
The couple went to counseling to resolve their differences.
Leaders must be willing to resolve differences through dialogue.
They resolved their differences and became friends again.
Resolving differences requires patience and understanding.
The meeting was held to resolve differences in opinion.
Good communication helps resolve differences effectively.
extraExampleTranslations: Farqlarni kattaroq muammolarga aylanishidan oldin hal qilish muhim.
Er-xotin farqlarini hal qilish uchun maslahatxonaga borishdi.
Rahbarlar farqlarni muloqot orqali hal qilishga tayyor bo‘lishlari kerak.
Ular farqlarini hal qilib, yana do‘st bo‘lib qolishdi.
Farqlarni hal qilish sabr va tushunishni talab qiladi.
Yig‘ilish fikr farqlarini hal qilish uchun o‘tkazildi.
Yaxshi aloqa farqlarni samarali hal qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: To react protectively or with sensitivity when criticized or questioned.
words.definitionUz: Himoyaga o‘tmoq — tanqid qilinganda yoki savol berilganda o‘zini himoya qilishga o‘tishni bildiradi.
words.example1: He always gets defensive about his work when someone gives feedback.
words.example1Translation: Kimdir fikr bildirganda u har doim o‘z ishi haqida himoyaga o‘tadi.
words.example2: Don’t be defensive about your mistakes; learn from them.
words.example2Translation: Xatolaringiz haqida himoyaga o‘tmang, ulardan saboq oling.
words.example3: She became defensive when asked about her late arrival.
words.example3Translation: U kechikib kelgani haqida so‘ralganda himoyaga o‘tdi.
extraExamples: Being defensive about criticism prevents personal growth.
Some people are naturally defensive about their family.
Try not to be defensive when receiving constructive feedback.
He is very defensive about his political views.
Her defensive attitude made the conversation difficult.
Parents can be defensive about their parenting style.
Learning to listen instead of being defensive improves relationships.
extraExampleTranslations: Tanqid haqida himoyaga o‘tish shaxsiy rivojlanishga to‘sqinlik qiladi.
Ba’zi odamlar oilasi haqida tabiatan himoyaga o‘tishadi.
Konstruktiv fikr olganda himoyaga o‘tmaslikka harakat qiling.
U o‘z siyosiy qarashlari haqida juda himoyaga o‘tadi.
Uning himoyaviy munosabati suhbatni qiyinlashtirdi.
Ota-onalar tarbiya uslublari haqida himoyaga o‘tishlari mumkin.
Himoyaga o‘tish o‘rniga tinglashni o‘rganish munosabatlarni yaxshilaydi.

words.definition: To remain emotionally uninvolved and objective.
words.definitionUz: Masofada turmoq — his-tuyg‘ularga berilmasdan, obyektiv bo‘lib turishni anglatadi.
words.example1: As a judge, you must stay detached from personal feelings.
words.example1Translation: Sudya sifatida shaxsiy his-tuyg‘ulardan masofada turishingiz kerak.
words.example2: It’s hard to stay detached when helping a close friend.
words.example2Translation: Yaqin do‘stga yordam berganda masofada turish qiyin.
words.example3: She tried to stay detached while listening to the argument.
words.example3Translation: U bahsni tinglayotganda masofada turishga harakat qildi.
extraExamples: Good journalists stay detached from the stories they report.
Staying detached helps make fair decisions.
It’s important for therapists to stay detached.
He stayed detached during the family conflict.
Staying detached prevents emotional exhaustion.
Managers sometimes need to stay detached from team drama.
Learning to stay detached is a useful life skill.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi jurnalistlar o‘zlari yoritayotgan voqealardan masofada turishadi.
Masofada turish adolatli qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradi.
Terapevtlar uchun masofada turish muhimdir.
U oilaviy mojaroda masofada turdi.
Masofada turish his-tuyg‘u charchoqning oldini oladi.
Rahbarlar ba’zan jamoa dramalaridan masofada turishlari kerak.
Masofada turishni o‘rganish foydali hayotiy ko‘nikma.

words.definition: To feel a strong, persistent desire for something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga kuchli ishtiyoq sezmoq — biror narsaga nisbatan kuchli va doimiy istakni his qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I have a craving for ice cream on hot days.
words.example1Translation: Issiq kunlarda menga muzqaymoqqa kuchli ishtiyoq paydo bo‘ladi.
words.example2: She has a craving for adventure and travel.
words.example2Translation: U sarguzasht va sayohatga kuchli ishtiyoq sezadi.
words.example3: Pregnant women often have a craving for unusual foods.
words.example3Translation: Homilador ayollar ko‘pincha g‘ayrioddiy taomlarga kuchli ishtiyoq sezishadi.
extraExamples: Many people have a craving for chocolate in the evening.
After quitting, he still had a craving for cigarettes.
I have a strong craving for success in my career.
Children have a natural craving for attention.
During winter, we have a craving for warm soup.
She has a craving for knowledge and reads constantly.
Having a craving for something doesn’t mean you should indulge it.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar kechqurun shokoladga kuchli ishtiyoq sezishadi.
Tashlagandan keyin ham u sigaretaga kuchli ishtiyoq sezardi.
Men kar’yeramda muvaffaqiyatga kuchli ishtiyoq sezaman.
Bolalarda tabiatan e’tiborga kuchli ishtiyoq bo‘ladi.
Qishda biz issiq sho‘rvaga kuchli ishtiyoq sezamiz.
U bilimlarga kuchli ishtiyoq sezib, doimiy o‘qiydi.
Biror narsaga ishtiyoq sezish uni qondirish kerak degani emas.

words.definition: To surpass your previous achievements or performance.
words.definitionUz: O‘zingizdan o‘tmoq — oldingi yutuqlaringiz yoki natijalaringizdan ustunroq natija ko‘rsatishni bildiradi.
words.example1: She really excelled herself in this year’s competition.
words.example1Translation: U bu yilgi musobaqada o‘zidan o‘tdi.
words.example2: Try to excel yourself in every project you do.
words.example2Translation: Har bir loyihada o‘zingizdan o‘tishga harakat qiling.
words.example3: The team excelled themselves and won the championship.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa o‘zidan o‘tib, chempion bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: He excelled himself with his latest painting.
Students should always try to excel themselves.
The chef excelled himself with the new menu.
It’s inspiring when people excel themselves.
She excelled herself in her final exam.
The band excelled themselves at the concert.
Keep working hard and you will excel yourself.
extraExampleTranslations: U so‘nggi rasmi bilan o‘zidan o‘tdi.
O‘quvchilar har doim o‘zlaridan o‘tishga harakat qilishlari kerak.
Oshpaz yangi menyusi bilan o‘zidan o‘tdi.
Odamlar o‘zlaridan o‘tganda bu ilhomlantiradi.
U yakuniy imtihonda o‘zidan o‘tdi.
Guruh kontsertda o‘zlaridan o‘tishdi.
Qattiq mehnat qiling va o‘zingizdan o‘tasiz.

words.definition: A lack of essential vitamins required for normal bodily function.
words.definitionUz: Vitamin yetishmovchiligi — organizmning normal ishlashi uchun zarur bo‘lgan vitaminlarning yetishmasligi.
words.example1: Vitamin D deficiency is common in people who don’t get enough sunlight.
words.example1Translation: Quyosh nuri yetarli bo‘lmagan odamlarda D vitamini yetishmovchiligi keng tarqalgan.
words.example2: A balanced diet helps prevent vitamin deficiency.
words.example2Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish vitamin yetishmovchiligining oldini oladi.
words.example3: She took supplements to treat her vitamin deficiency.
words.example3Translation: U vitamin yetishmovchiligini davolash uchun qo‘shimcha vositalar ichdi.
extraExamples: Vitamin deficiency can cause fatigue and weakness.
Iron deficiency is a common type of vitamin deficiency.
Doctors can test for vitamin deficiency through blood work.
Children with vitamin deficiency may have growth problems.
Eating fruits and vegetables prevents vitamin deficiency.
Severe vitamin deficiency can lead to serious diseases.
Vitamin deficiency is more common in developing countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Vitamin yetishmovchiligi charchoq va zaiflikka olib kelishi mumkin.
Temir yetishmovchiligi vitamin yetishmovchiligining keng tarqalgan turidir.
Shifokorlar qon tahlili orqali vitamin yetishmovchiligini aniqlashi mumkin.
Vitamin yetishmovchiligi bo‘lgan bolalarda o‘sish muammolari bo‘lishi mumkin.
Meva va sabzavotlar iste’mol qilish vitamin yetishmovchiligining oldini oladi.
Og‘ir vitamin yetishmovchiligi jiddiy kasalliklarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Vitamin yetishmovchiligi rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlarda ko‘proq uchraydi.

words.definition: Serving to discourage or prevent an action through fear of consequences.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘rqitish sifatida — oqibatlardan qo‘rqish orqali biror harakatni oldini olish yoki to‘xtatish uchun xizmat qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: The heavy fine serves as a deterrent against speeding.
words.example1Translation: Og‘ir jarima tezlikni oshirishga qarshi qo‘rqitish sifatida xizmat qiladi.
words.example2: Security cameras are installed as a deterrent to theft.
words.example2Translation: Xavfsizlik kameralari o‘g‘irlikka qarshi qo‘rqitish sifatida o‘rnatilgan.
words.example3: Capital punishment is used in some countries as a deterrent.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi mamlakatlarda o‘lim jazosi qo‘rqitish sifatida qo‘llaniladi.
extraExamples: The presence of police acts as a deterrent in crowded areas.
High prices can serve as a deterrent to smoking.
Strict rules act as a deterrent for bad behavior.
The company uses audits as a deterrent against fraud.
Visible punishments serve as a deterrent to others.
Education can be more effective than punishment as a deterrent.
The threat of losing a job is a strong deterrent.
extraExampleTranslations: Politsiyaning mavjudligi gavjum joylarda qo‘rqitish vazifasini bajaradi.
Yuqori narxlar chekishga qarshi qo‘rqitish bo‘lib xizmat qilishi mumkin.
Qattiq qoidalar yomon xulq-atvorga qarshi qo‘rqitish sifatida ishlaydi.
Kompaniya firibgarlikka qarshi auditlarni qo‘rqitish sifatida ishlatadi.
Ko‘zga ko‘rinadigan jazolar boshqalarga qo‘rqitish bo‘lib xizmat qiladi.
Ta’lim jazodan ko‘ra qo‘rqitish sifatida samaraliroq bo‘lishi mumkin.
Ishni yo‘qotish tahdidi kuchli qo‘rqitishdir.

words.definition: A sense of self-respect and personal worth expressed through behavior.
words.definitionUz: Qadr-qimmat — o‘zini hurmat qilish va shaxsiy qadr tuyg‘usi, xatti-harakat orqali namoyon bo‘ladi.
words.example1: He faced the difficult situation with great dignity.
words.example1Translation: U qiyin vaziyatni katta qadr-qimmat bilan qabul qildi.
words.example2: Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity.
words.example2Translation: Har bir inson qadr-qimmat bilan muomala qilinishga loyiq.
words.example3: She retired with dignity after many years of service.
words.example3Translation: U ko‘p yillik xizmatidan keyin qadr-qimmat bilan nafaqaga chiqdi.
extraExamples: Maintaining dignity in defeat is important.
The elderly should be cared for with dignity.
Dignity is a fundamental human right.
He spoke with calm dignity during the interview.
Poverty should not take away a person’s dignity.
She handled the criticism with dignity.
Dignity gives strength in difficult times.
extraExampleTranslations: Mag‘lubiyatda qadr-qimmatni saqlab qolish muhim.
Keksa odamlarga qadr-qimmat bilan g‘amxo‘rlik qilish kerak.
Qadr-qimmat asosiy inson huquqidir.
U intervyuda tinch va qadr-qimmat bilan gapirdi.
Qashshoqlik odamning qadr-qimmatini tortib olmasligi kerak.
U tanqidni qadr-qimmat bilan qabul qildi.
Qadr-qimmat qiyin paytlarda kuch beradi.

words.definition: Deserving praise for a positive action or quality.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishining hisobiga — ijobiy harakat yoki sifat uchun maqtovga loyiq ekanligini bildiradi.
words.example1: To her credit, she admitted her mistake immediately.
words.example1Translation: Uning hisobiga, u xatosini darhol tan oldi.
words.example2: To his credit, he worked hard despite many difficulties.
words.example2Translation: Uning hisobiga, u ko‘p qiyinchiliklarga qaramay qattiq mehnat qildi.
words.example3: To their credit, the team completed the project on time.
words.example3Translation: Ularning hisobiga, jamoa loyihani o‘z vaqtida yakunladi.
extraExamples: To his credit, he never gave up on his dreams.
To her credit, she helped many people in need.
To their credit, they apologized sincerely.
To the company’s credit, they improved working conditions.
To his credit, he remained honest throughout.
To her credit, she raised the children alone.
To their credit, they accepted responsibility.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning hisobiga, u orzularidan hech qachon voz kechmadi.
Uning hisobiga, u muhtoj odamlarga ko‘p yordam berdi.
Ularning hisobiga, ular chin dildan kechirim so‘radilar.
Kompaniyaning hisobiga, ular ish sharoitlarini yaxshiladilar.
Uning hisobiga, u butun vaqt davomida halol bo‘ldi.
Uning hisobiga, u bolalarni yolg‘iz o‘zi tarbiyaladi.
Ularning hisobiga, ular mas’uliyatni o‘z zimmalariga oldilar.

words.definition: Something that exists independently, especially an organization or institution.
words.definitionUz: Birlik / Tashkilot — mustaqil ravishda mavjud bo‘lgan narsa, ayniqsa tashkilot yoki muassasa.
words.example1: The company is a separate legal entity.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya alohida yuridik birlikdir.
words.example2: Each department operates as an independent entity.
words.example2Translation: Har bir bo‘lim mustaqil birlik sifatida ishlaydi.
words.example3: The charity is a non-profit entity.
words.example3Translation: Bu xayriya notijorat tashkilotdir.
extraExamples: Governments are complex political entities.
The university is an educational entity.
Each subsidiary is a separate business entity.
International organizations are important global entities.
The bank functions as a financial entity.
Social media platforms are powerful digital entities.
The team worked as a single entity.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumatlar murakkab siyosiy birliklardir.
Universitet ta’lim birligidir.
Har bir sho‘ba korxona alohida biznes birligidir.
Xalqaro tashkilotlar muhim global birliklardir.
Bank moliyaviy birlik sifatida ishlaydi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoq platformalari kuchli raqamli birliklardir.
Jamoa yagona birlik sifatida ishladi.

words.definition: To leave quietly and cautiously, often to avoid attention.
words.definitionUz: Xonadan sekin chiqib ketmoq — odatda e’tiborni tortmaslik uchun jimgina va ehtiyotkorlik bilan chiqib ketish.
words.example1: He crept out of the room so he wouldn’t wake the baby.
words.example1Translation: U chaqaloqni uyg‘otmaslik uchun xonadan sekin chiqib ketdi.
words.example2: She crept out of the meeting when it became too boring.
words.example2Translation: Yig‘ilish juda zerikarli bo‘lgach, u sekin chiqib ketdi.
words.example3: The cat crept out of the room without making a sound.
words.example3Translation: Mushuk hech qanday tovush chiqarmasdan xonadan sekin chiqib ketdi.
extraExamples: He crept out of the room early in the morning.
She tried to creep out of the room unnoticed.
The children crept out of the room to surprise their parents.
I crept out of the lecture when I felt unwell.
The thief crept out of the room with the stolen goods.
He crept out of the room after the argument.
They crept out of the room quietly during the movie.
extraExampleTranslations: U erta tongda xonadan sekin chiqib ketdi.
U sekin chiqib ketishga harakat qildi, hech kim sezmasin deb.
Bolalar ota-onalarini ajablantirish uchun xonadan sekin chiqib ketishdi.
O‘zimni yomon his qilganimda ma’ruzadan sekin chiqib ketdim.
O‘g‘ri o‘g‘irlangan buyumlar bilan xonadan sekin chiqib ketdi.
Janjaldan keyin u xonadan sekin chiqib ketdi.
Ular film paytida xonadan jimgina chiqib ketishdi.

words.definition: Extremely jealous of someone else’s success or possessions.
words.definitionUz: Hasad bilan yashil bo‘lmoq — birovning muvaffaqiyati yoki boyligiga haddan tashqari hasad qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: She was green with envy when she saw her friend’s new car.
words.example1Translation: Do‘stining yangi mashinasini ko‘rgach, u hasad bilan yashil bo‘ldi.
words.example2: His colleagues were green with envy at his promotion.
words.example2Translation: Hamkasblari uning lavozim oshishidan hasad bilan yashil bo‘lishdi.
words.example3: Don’t be green with envy; celebrate others’ success.
words.example3Translation: Hasad bilan yashil bo‘lmang, boshqalarning muvaffaqiyatini nishonlang.
extraExamples: The children were green with envy when they saw the presents.
She turned green with envy at her sister’s wedding dress.
He was green with envy after losing the competition.
People often feel green with envy on social media.
Instead of being green with envy, work harder.
Her new hairstyle made all her friends green with envy.
Being green with envy is not a healthy emotion.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar sovg‘alarni ko‘rib hasad bilan yashil bo‘lishdi.
U opasining to‘y ko‘ylagini ko‘rib hasad bilan yashil bo‘ldi.
Musobaqada yutqazgach, u hasad bilan yashil bo‘ldi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda odamlar ko‘pincha hasad bilan yashil bo‘lishadi.
Hasad qilish o‘rniga ko‘proq mehnat qiling.
Uning yangi soch turmagi barcha do‘stlarini hasad bilan yashil qildi.
Hasad bilan yashil bo‘lish sog‘lom his-tuyg‘u emas.

words.definition: To feel offended or strongly object to something.
words.definitionUz: Norozilik bildirmoq — biror narsadan xafa bo‘lish yoki keskin qarshilik bildirishni anglatadi.
words.example1: She took exception to his rude comment.
words.example1Translation: U uning qo‘pollik bilan aytgan gapidan norozilik bildirdi.
words.example2: Many people took exception to the new policy.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar yangi siyosatdan norozilik bildirdilar.
words.example3: I take exception to being treated like a child.
words.example3Translation: Menga bola kabi muomala qilinishidan noroziman.
extraExamples: He took exception to the criticism of his work.
The audience took exception to the comedian’s joke.
She does not usually take exception to small things.
The community took exception to the noisy construction.
I take exception to unfair treatment.
They took exception to the changes in the rules.
It’s rare for him to take exception to anything.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘z ishining tanqid qilinishidan norozilik bildirdi.
Tomoshabinlar komediyachining hazilidan norozilik bildirdilar.
U odatda mayda narsalardan norozilik bildirmaydi.
Jamoa shovqinli qurilishdan norozilik bildirdi.
Adolatsiz muomaladan noroziman.
Ular qoidalardagi o‘zgarishlardan norozilik bildirdilar.
U odatda hech narsadan norozilik bildirmaydi.

words.definition: A final and authoritative response that leaves no doubt.
words.definitionUz: Aniq javob — hech qanday shubha qoldirmaydigan yakuniy va ishonchli javob.
words.example1: We are still waiting for a definitive answer from the manager.
words.example1Translation: Biz hali ham rahbarning aniq javobini kutmoqdamiz.
words.example2: The scientist gave a definitive answer based on the research.
words.example2Translation: Olima tadqiqotga asoslanib aniq javob berdi.
words.example3: I need a definitive answer by tomorrow.
words.example3Translation: Menga ertagacha aniq javob kerak.
extraExamples: The court has not yet given a definitive answer.
Experts are expected to provide a definitive answer soon.
There is no definitive answer to this complex question.
She gave a definitive answer during the interview.
We require a definitive answer before proceeding.
The book provides definitive answers to many questions.
A definitive answer will help us make the right decision.
extraExampleTranslations: Sud hali aniq javob bermadi.
Mutaxassislar yaqin orada aniq javob berishlari kutilmoqda.
Bu murakkab savolga aniq javob yo‘q.
U intervyuda aniq javob berdi.
Davom ettirishdan oldin aniq javob talab qilamiz.
Kitob ko‘p savollarga aniq javob beradi.
Aniq javob to‘g‘ri qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Pleasantly cool, fresh, and clear atmospheric conditions.
words.definitionUz: Sovuq va toza havo — yoqimli sovuq, yangi va tiniq ob-havo sharoitini bildiradi.
words.example1: I love going for walks in crisp autumn weather.
words.example1Translation: Kuzning sovuq va toza havosida sayr qilishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
words.example2: The crisp weather made the morning run very refreshing.
words.example2Translation: Sovuq va toza havo ertalabki yugurishni juda tetiklantiruvchi qildi.
words.example3: Crisp weather is perfect for outdoor activities.
words.example3Translation: Sovuq va toza havo ochiq havoda mashg‘ulotlar uchun juda mos.
extraExamples: The crisp weather in the mountains was invigorating.
She wore a warm coat because of the crisp weather.
Crisp weather is typical for early spring mornings.
We enjoyed a picnic in the crisp weather.
The crisp weather helped clear my mind.
Many people prefer crisp weather over hot summers.
The city looks beautiful in crisp winter weather.
extraExampleTranslations: Tog‘lardagi sovuq va toza havo tetiklantiruvchi edi.
Sovuq va toza havo tufayli u issiq palto kiydi.
Sovuq va toza havo erta bahor tonglariga xos.
Biz sovuq va toza havoda piknik qildik.
Sovuq va toza havo miyamni tozalashga yordam berdi.
Ko‘p odamlar issiq yozdan ko‘ra sovuq va toza havoni afzal ko‘rishadi.
Shahar sovuq qish havosida go‘zal ko‘rinadi.

words.definition: to hope strongly for a positive outcome
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning yaxshi natija berishini qattiq umid qilish, omad tilash
words.example1: I have an important exam tomorrow, so keep your fingers crossed for me.
words.example1Translation: Ertaga muhim imtihonim bor, shuning uchun men uchun barmoqlaringizni bog‘lab turing.
words.example2: She is waiting for the job offer — we’re all keeping our fingers crossed.
words.example2Translation: U ish taklifini kutmoqda — hammamiz barmoqlarimizni bog‘lab turibmiz.
words.example3: Keep your fingers crossed that the weather stays good for the picnic.
words.example3Translation: Piknik uchun ob-havo yaxshi bo‘lishini umid qilib, barmoqlaringizni bog‘lab turing.
extraExamples: The team is in the final, keep your fingers crossed for them.
I hope the flight isn’t delayed — fingers crossed!
She’s applying to university, so we’re keeping our fingers crossed.
Keep your fingers crossed that I pass my driving test.
Everyone is keeping their fingers crossed for a peaceful resolution.
Fingers crossed the package arrives on time.
We’re keeping our fingers crossed for good news from the doctor.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa finalda, ular uchun barmoqlaringizni bog‘lab turing.
Umid qilamanki, parvoz kechiktirilmaydi — barmoqlar bog‘langan!
U universitetga hujjat topshirmoqda, shuning uchun biz barmoqlarimizni bog‘lab turibmiz.
Haydovchilik imtihonimdan o‘tishimni umid qilib barmoqlaringizni bog‘lab turing.
Hamma tinch yechim bo‘lishini umid qilib barmoqlarini bog‘lab turibdi.
Posilka vaqtida yetib kelishini umid qilamiz — barmoqlar bog‘langan.
Doktorning yaxshi xabari bo‘lishini umid qilib barmoqlarimizni bog‘lab turibmiz.

words.definition: unusual conditions that justify a deviation from normal rules
words.definitionUz: Oddiy qoidalardan chetga chiqishga asos bo‘ladigan noodatiy sharoitlar
words.example1: In exceptional circumstances, the university may extend the deadline.
words.example1Translation: Istisno holatlarda universitet muddatni uzaytirishi mumkin.
words.example2: The flight was cancelled due to exceptional circumstances.
words.example2Translation: Parvoz istisno holatlar tufayli bekor qilindi.
words.example3: Only under exceptional circumstances will refunds be issued.
words.example3Translation: Faqat istisno holatlarda qaytarib berish amalga oshiriladi.
extraExamples: The policy can be changed in exceptional circumstances.
She was allowed to leave early due to exceptional circumstances.
Exceptional circumstances require special approval.
The court may consider exceptional circumstances.
We don’t usually do this, but these are exceptional circumstances.
Applications are reviewed only in exceptional circumstances.
Exceptional circumstances led to the postponement of the event.
extraExampleTranslations: Siyosatni istisno holatlarda o‘zgartirish mumkin.
U istisno holatlar sababli erta ketishga ruxsat oldi.
Istisno holatlar maxsus tasdiq talab qiladi.
Sud istisno holatlarni ko‘rib chiqishi mumkin.
Biz buni odatda qilmaymiz, lekin bu istisno holatlar.
Arizalar faqat istisno holatlarda ko‘rib chiqiladi.
Istisno holatlar tadbirni kechiktirishga olib keldi.

words.definition: inappropriate or unworthy of one’s self-respect
words.definitionUz: O‘z hurmat va qadr-qimmatingizga mos kelmaydigan, past ish
words.example1: Accepting such a low salary would be beneath his dignity.
words.example1Translation: Bunday past maoshni qabul qilish uning qadr-qimmatiga yarashmaydi.
words.example2: She refused the job because she felt it was beneath her dignity.
words.example2Translation: U ishni rad etdi, chunki bu uning qadr-qimmatiga yarashmaydi deb his qildi.
words.example3: Don’t do anything beneath your dignity just to please others.
words.example3Translation: Boshqalarni rozi qilish uchun qadr-qimmatingizga yarashmaydigan ish qilmang.
extraExamples: He considered manual labor beneath his dignity.
Asking for help is not beneath your dignity.
Some tasks feel beneath her dignity.
It’s beneath your dignity to argue with him.
She would never do anything beneath her dignity.
Taking bribes is definitely beneath his dignity.
He thinks gossiping is beneath his dignity.
extraExampleTranslations: U jismoniy mehnatni o‘z qadr-qimmatiga yarashmaydi deb hisobladi.
Yordam so‘rash sizning qadr-qimmatingizga yarashmaydi emas.
Ba’zi vazifalar uning qadr-qimmatiga yarashmayotgandek tuyuladi.
U bilan janjal qilish sizning qadr-qimmatingizga yarashmaydi.
U hech qachon qadr-qimmatiga yarashmaydigan ish qilmaydi.
Poraxo‘rlik uning qadr-qimmatiga mutlaqo yarashmaydi.
U g‘iybat qilishni o‘z qadr-qimmatiga yarashmaydi deb o‘ylaydi.

words.definition: a harmful or damaging impact
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga zarar yetkazadigan, salbiy ta’sir
words.example1: Smoking has a detrimental effect on your health.
words.example1Translation: Chekish sog‘lig‘ingizga zararli ta’sir ko‘rsatadi.
words.example2: The new policy had a detrimental effect on small businesses.
words.example2Translation: Yangi siyosat kichik bizneslarga zararli ta’sir qildi.
words.example3: Too much screen time can have a detrimental effect on children’s eyes.
words.example3Translation: Ekran oldida ko‘p vaqt o‘tkazish bolalar ko‘zlariga zararli ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The decision had a detrimental effect on team morale.
Pollution has a detrimental effect on the environment.
Lack of sleep has a detrimental effect on concentration.
This medicine may have detrimental effects if overused.
Economic sanctions had a detrimental effect on the country.
Stress can have a detrimental effect on relationships.
The noise had a detrimental effect on my ability to study.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu qaror jamoa ruhiyatiga zararli ta’sir qildi.
Ifloslanish atrof-muhitga zararli ta’sir ko‘rsatadi.
Uyqu yetishmasligi diqqatni jamlaganga zararli ta’sir qiladi.
Bu dori haddan tashqari ishlatilsa zararli ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin.
Iqtisodiy sanksiyalar mamlakatga zararli ta’sir qildi.
Stress munosabatlarga zararli ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Shovqin o‘qish qobiliyatimga zararli ta’sir qildi.

words.definition: to eliminate corrupt practices completely
words.definitionUz: Poraxo‘rlik va korruptsiya kabi yomon holatlarni butunlay bartaraf etish
words.example1: The government promised to eradicate corruption in the public sector.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat davlat sektoridagi poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilishga va’da berdi.
words.example2: It will take years to eradicate corruption from the system.
words.example2Translation: Tizimdan poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilish uchun yillar kerak bo‘ladi.
words.example3: International organizations are helping to eradicate corruption.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro tashkilotlar poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilishga yordam bermoqda.
extraExamples: We must work together to eradicate corruption.
New laws were introduced to eradicate corruption.
Eradicating corruption is essential for economic growth.
The president made eradicating corruption his top priority.
Education can help eradicate corruption in society.
It’s difficult to eradicate corruption completely.
The campaign aims to eradicate corruption in local government.
extraExampleTranslations: Poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilish uchun birgalikda harakat qilishimiz kerak.
Poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilish uchun yangi qonunlar joriy etildi.
Poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilish iqtisodiy o‘sish uchun muhim.
Prezident poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilishni birinchi ustuvor vazifa qildi.
Ta’lim jamiyatdagi poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilishga yordam beradi.
Poraxo‘rlikni butunlay yo‘q qilish qiyin.
Kampaniya mahalliy hukumatdagi poraxo‘rlikni yo‘q qilishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: to do something beyond reasonable or healthy limits
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni me’yoridan ortiq, zararli darajada qilish
words.example1: Eating sweets to excess can cause health problems.
words.example1Translation: Shirinliklarni haddan tashqari yeyish sog‘liq muammolariga olib keladi.
words.example2: He works to excess and rarely takes time off.
words.example2Translation: U haddan tashqari ishlaydi va deyarli dam olmaydi.
words.example3: Drinking alcohol to excess is dangerous.
words.example3Translation: Spirtli ichimliklarni haddan tashqari ichish xavfli.
extraExamples: She exercises to excess and has injured herself.
Don’t spend money to excess.
He talks to excess when he is nervous.
Gaming to excess affects your studies.
Many people eat to excess during holidays.
Avoid using your phone to excess.
Working to excess can lead to burnout.
extraExampleTranslations: U haddan tashqari sport bilan shug‘ullanib, o‘zini jarohatlagan.
Pulingizni haddan tashqari sarflamang.
U asabiylashganda haddan tashqari gapiradi.
Haddan tashqari o‘yin o‘ynash o‘qishingizga ta’sir qiladi.
Ko‘p odamlar bayramlarda haddan tashqari ovqat yeydi.
Telefoningizdan haddan tashqari foydalanmang.
Haddan tashqari ishlash charchoqqa olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: to meet someone unexpectedly or briefly
words.definitionUz: Kimdir bilan tasodifan yoki qisqa vaqt ichida uchrashib qolish
words.example1: I crossed his path at the airport last week.
words.example1Translation: O‘tgan hafta aeroportda uning yo‘lini kesib o‘tdim.
words.example2: Our paths crossed several times during the conference.
words.example2Translation: Konferensiya davomida yo‘llarimiz bir necha marta kesishdi.
words.example3: If you ever cross her path again, be polite.
words.example3Translation: Agar yana uning yo‘liga tushsangiz, muloyim bo‘ling.
extraExamples: Our paths first crossed ten years ago in university.
I hope I never cross his path again.
She was surprised when we crossed paths in the city.
Fate made our paths cross once more.
We occasionally cross paths at the gym.
It’s funny how our paths keep crossing.
I hadn’t seen her in years until our paths crossed yesterday.
extraExampleTranslations: Yo‘llarimiz birinchi marta o‘n yil oldin universitetda kesishgan.
Umid qilamanki, uning yo‘liga boshqa tushmayman.
Shaharda yo‘llarimiz kesishganida u hayron qoldi.
Taqdir yo‘llarimizni yana kesishishiga sabab bo‘ldi.
Biz sport zalida vaqti-vaqti bilan yo‘lni kesib o‘tamiz.
Yo‘llarimizning doimiy kesishishi qiziq.
Uni yillar davomida ko‘rmagandim, kecha yo‘llarimiz kesishdi.

words.definition: a gradual loss of trust or self-belief
words.definitionUz: Odamning o‘ziga yoki boshqalarga bo‘lgan ishonchining asta-sekin yo‘qolishi
words.example1: There has been a serious erosion of confidence in the government.
words.example1Translation: Hukumatga bo‘lgan ishonch jiddiy pasaydi.
words.example2: The scandal caused an erosion of confidence among investors.
words.example2Translation: Janjal investorlar orasida ishonch pasayishiga olib keldi.
words.example3: Constant criticism can lead to erosion of confidence in young people.
words.example3Translation: Doimiy tanqid yoshlarda o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonch pasayishiga sabab bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: Economic problems led to an erosion of public confidence.
The erosion of confidence is difficult to reverse.
We must stop the erosion of confidence in our institutions.
Repeated failures caused an erosion of his confidence.
The company is suffering from erosion of customer confidence.
This event accelerated the erosion of confidence.
Erosion of confidence can affect the entire economy.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy muammolar aholining ishonchini pasaytirdi.
Ishonch pasayishini qaytarish qiyin.
Muassasalarimizga bo‘lgan ishonch pasayishini to‘xtatishimiz kerak.
Takroriy muvaffaqiyatsizliklar uning o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonchini pasaytirdi.
Kompaniya mijozlar ishonchining pasayishidan aziyat chekmoqda.
Bu voqea ishonch pasayishini tezlashtirdi.
Ishonch pasayishi butun iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: a vague or unclear memory of something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani aniq emas, xira eslab qolish
words.example1: I have only a dim recollection of my childhood home.
words.example1Translation: Bolalikdagi uyimni faqat xira eslayman.
words.example2: She had a dim recollection of meeting him before.
words.example2Translation: U avval u bilan uchrashganini xira eslab qoldi.
words.example3: His dim recollection of the accident made the report difficult.
words.example3Translation: Avtohalokatni xira eslab qolgani hisobotni qiyinlashtirdi.
extraExamples: I have a dim recollection of the old story.
