He has only a dim recollection of what happened that night.
My dim recollection is that it was in summer.
She shared her dim recollection of the event.
With a dim recollection, it’s hard to be accurate.
I have a dim recollection of learning this in school.
His dim recollection turned out to be incorrect.
extraExampleTranslations: Eski voqeani faqat xira eslayman.
U o‘sha kechada nima bo‘lganini faqat xira eslaydi.
Xira eslashimga ko‘ra, bu yozda bo‘lgan.
U voqeani xira eslab qolganini aytib berdi.
Xira xotira bilan aniq bo‘lish qiyin.
Buni maktabda o‘rganganimga xira eslayman.
Uning xira eslagani noto‘g‘ri bo‘lib chiqdi.

words.definition: to be so extraordinary that it seems impossible to accept
words.definitionUz: Shunchalik aql bovar qilmaydigan darajada bo‘lishi ki, uni qabul qilish qiyin
words.example1: The team’s comeback defied belief.
words.example1Translation: Jamoaning qaytishi aql bovar qilmas edi.
words.example2: Her courage in the face of danger defies belief.
words.example2Translation: Xavf oldida uning jasorati aql bovar qilmaydi.
words.example3: The price of the house defies belief.
words.example3Translation: Uy narxi aql bovar qilmaydi.
extraExamples: The magician’s trick defied belief.
His generosity defies belief.
The speed of the car defies belief.
What happened next defies belief.
Their dedication to the project defies belief.
The beauty of the landscape defies belief.
The size of the crowd defied belief.
extraExampleTranslations: Sehrgarning nayrangi aql bovar qilmas edi.
Uning saxovatli bo‘lishi aql bovar qilmaydi.
Mashinaning tezligi aql bovar qilmaydi.
Keyin nima bo‘lgani aql bovar qilmaydi.
Ularning loyihaga bag‘ishlanishi aql bovar qilmaydi.
Manzaraning go‘zalligi aql bovar qilmaydi.
Olomonning ko‘pligi aql bovar qilmas edi.

words.definition: a poorly developed or unsophisticated strategy
words.definitionUz: Yaxshi ishlab chiqilmagan, sodda va yetarli darajada puxta bo‘lmagan reja
words.example1: Their crude plan failed within the first hour.
words.example1Translation: Ularning oddiy rejasi birinchi soatdayoq barbod bo‘ldi.
words.example2: He came up with a crude plan to solve the problem.
words.example2Translation: U muammoni hal qilish uchun oddiy reja tuzdi.
words.example3: The crude plan needed a lot of improvement.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy reja ko‘p takomillashtirishni talab qilardi.
extraExamples: We rejected the crude plan immediately.
Her crude plan actually worked surprisingly well.
A crude plan is better than no plan at all.
The boss was not impressed by the crude plan.
They made a crude plan on the back of a napkin.
The crude plan lacked important details.
He presented a very crude plan to the team.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz oddiy rejani darhol rad etdik.
Uning oddiy rejasi hayratlanarli darajada yaxshi ishladi.
Oddiy reja umuman reja bo‘lmaganidan yaxshiroq.
Rahbar oddiy rejadan taassurotlanmadi.
Ular oddiy rejani salfetka orqasida tuzishdi.
Oddiy rejada muhim tafsilotlar yetishmas edi.
U jamoaga juda oddiy reja taqdim etdi.

words.definition: to feel a strong but often short-lived romantic attraction
words.definitionUz: Biror kishiga kuchli, odatda qisqa muddatli romantik qiziqish his qilish
words.example1: I think she has a crush on the new classmate.
words.example1Translation: Menimcha, u yangi sinfdoshiga oshiq bo‘lib qolgan.
words.example2: He had a crush on her for two years in high school.
words.example2Translation: U o‘rta maktabda unga ikki yil davomida oshiq edi.
words.example3: Having a crush on someone can make you nervous.
words.example3Translation: Biror kishiga oshiq bo‘lish sizni asabiylashtirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Many teenagers have a crush on celebrities.
I used to have a crush on my neighbor.
She still has a crush on him after all these years.
Having a crush on your teacher is quite common.
He tried to hide that he had a crush on her.
Do you have a crush on anyone right now?
Having a crush makes everything more exciting.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p o‘smirlar mashhurlarga oshiq bo‘lishadi.
Men ilgari qo‘shnimga oshiq edim.
U shuncha yildan keyin ham unga oshiq.
O‘qituvchiga oshiq bo‘lish odatiy hol.
U unga oshiq ekanligini yashirishga harakat qildi.
Hozir biror kishiga oshiqmisiz?
Oshiq bo‘lish hamma narsani yanada qiziqarli qiladi.

words.definition: a person or company that builds or creates property, software, or projects
words.definitionUz: Uy-joy, dastur yoki loyihalarni yaratuvchi yoki quruvchi shaxs yoki kompaniya
words.example1: The developer released a new version of the app.
words.example1Translation: Dasturchi ilovaning yangi versiyasini chiqardi.
words.example2: The property developer is building a new shopping center.
words.example2Translation: Quruvchi yangi savdo markazini qurmoqda.
words.example3: Software developers are in high demand nowadays.
words.example3Translation: Dasturchilar hozirgi kunda juda talabgir.
extraExamples: He works as a game developer.
The developer fixed several bugs in the system.
Real estate developers are investing in the area.
She is a talented web developer.
The company hired more developers for the project.
Developers often work in teams.
The developer presented the new housing project.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘yin dasturchisi bo‘lib ishlaydi.
Dasturchi tizimdagi bir nechta xatolarni tuzatdi.
Ko‘chmas mulk quruvchilari bu hududga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
U iste’dodli veb-dasturchi.
Kompaniya loyiha uchun ko‘proq dasturchi oldi.
Dasturchilar odatda jamoa bo‘lib ishlaydi.
Quruvchi yangi uy-joy loyihasini taqdim etdi.

words.definition: to carry out a plan effectively and systematically
words.definitionUz: Rejani samarali va tartibli ravishda bajarish
words.example1: The team successfully executed the plan.
words.example1Translation: Jamoa rejani muvaffaqiyatli amalga oshirdi.
words.example2: We need to execute this plan carefully.
words.example2Translation: Bu rejani ehtiyotkorlik bilan amalga oshirishimiz kerak.
words.example3: He was responsible for executing the marketing plan.
words.example3Translation: U marketing rejasini amalga oshirish uchun mas’ul edi.
extraExamples: The soldiers executed the plan perfectly.
It’s time to execute the plan we discussed.
She helped execute the surprise party.
Executing the plan required coordination.
They failed to execute the plan on time.
The manager will execute the new strategy.
We must execute the plan without delay.
extraExampleTranslations: Askarlar rejani mukammal amalga oshirdi.
Muhokama qilgan rejamizni amalga oshirish vaqti keldi.
U kutilmagan ziyofatni o‘tkazishga yordam berdi.
Rejani amalga oshirish muvofiqlashtirishni talab qildi.
Ular rejani vaqtida amalga oshira olmadilar.
Rahbar yangi strategiyani amalga oshiradi.
Rejani kechiktirmasdan amalga oshirishimiz kerak.

words.definition: the degree of uncertainty or possible inaccuracy in a measurement or calculation
words.definitionUz: O‘lchov yoki hisob-kitobdagi noaniqlik yoki xato darajasi
words.example1: The poll has a margin of error of 3%.
words.example1Translation: So‘rovnomaning xatolik chegarasi 3% ni tashkil qiladi.
words.example2: We must consider the margin of error in our calculations.
words.example2Translation: Hisoblarimizda xatolik chegarasini hisobga olishimiz kerak.
words.example3: The results are accurate within a small margin of error.
words.example3Translation: Natijalar kichik xatolik chegarasi ichida aniq.
extraExamples: There is always a margin of error in predictions.
The margin of error was too large to be useful.
Scientists account for the margin of error.
The survey’s margin of error affects its reliability.
We need to reduce the margin of error.
The machine has a very small margin of error.
Don’t ignore the margin of error in the data.
extraExampleTranslations: Bashoratlarda har doim xatolik chegarasi bo‘ladi.
Xatolik chegarasi juda katta bo‘lgani uchun foydali emas edi.
Olimlar xatolik chegarasini hisobga oladilar.
So‘rovning xatolik chegarasi uning ishonchliligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Xatolik chegarasini kamaytirishimiz kerak.
Mashinada juda kichik xatolik chegarasi bor.
Ma’lumotlardagi xatolik chegarasini e’tiborsiz qoldirmang.

words.definition: to reduce the brightness of lighting, often to create atmosphere
words.definitionUz: Yorug‘likni pasaytirish, odatda muhit yaratish uchun
words.example1: Dim the lights to create a romantic atmosphere.
words.example1Translation: Romantik muhit yaratish uchun chiroqlarni xiralashtiring.
words.example2: The host dimmed the lights before the movie started.
words.example2Translation: Uy egasi film boshlanishidan oldin chiroqlarni xiralashtirdi.
words.example3: Please dim the lights a little bit.
words.example3Translation: Iltimos, chiroqlarni biroz xiralashtiring.
extraExamples: They dimmed the lights for the presentation.
Dim the lights when the baby is sleeping.
The lights were dimmed during the concert.
She likes to dim the lights in the evening.
Can you dim the lights from the switch?
The stage lights were slowly dimmed.
We dim the lights to save electricity.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular taqdimot uchun chiroqlarni xiralashtirdilar.
Chaqaloq uxlayotganda chiroqlarni xiralashtiring.
Konsert vaqtida chiroqlar xiralashtirildi.
U kechqurun chiroqlarni xiralashtirishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Chiroqlarni kalitdan xiralashtira olasizmi?
Sahnadagi chiroqlar asta-sekin xiralashtirildi.
Biz elektrni tejash uchun chiroqlarni xiralashtiramiz.

words.definition: to assign responsibilities or duties to others
words.definitionUz: Mas’uliyat yoki vazifalarni boshqa odamlarga berish
words.example1: Good managers know how to delegate tasks effectively.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi rahbarlar vazifalarni samarali topshirishni biladilar.
words.example2: She delegated the tasks to her assistant.
words.example2Translation: U vazifalarni yordamchisiga topshirdi.
words.example3: You should delegate more tasks to free up your time.
words.example3Translation: Vaqtni bo‘shatish uchun ko‘proq vazifalarni topshirishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: He delegated the report writing to his team.
Delegating tasks helps improve team skills.
Don’t be afraid to delegate important tasks.
The leader delegated tasks before going on vacation.
She is learning to delegate tasks better.
Delegating tasks can reduce stress.
They delegated the preparation work to juniors.
extraExampleTranslations: U hisobot yozishni jamoasiga topshirdi.
Vazifalarni topshirish jamoa malakasini oshirishga yordam beradi.
Muhim vazifalarni topshirishdan qo‘rqmang.
Rahbar ta’tilga chiqishdan oldin vazifalarni topshirdi.
U vazifalarni yaxshiroq topshirishni o‘rganmoqda.
Vazifalarni topshirish stressni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ular tayyorgarlik ishlarini kichik xodimlarga topshirdilar.

words.definition: through repeated attempts and adjustments based on mistakes
words.definitionUz: Xatolar asosida qayta-qayta urinish va tuzatish orqali o‘rganish
words.example1: I learned to cook by trial and error.
words.example1Translation: Men ovqat pishirishni sinov va xato orqali o‘rgandim.
words.example2: They developed the product by trial and error.
words.example2Translation: Ular mahsulotni sinov va xato orqali ishlab chiqdilar.
words.example3: Programming often involves a lot of trial and error.
words.example3Translation: Dasturlash ko‘pincha ko‘p sinov va xato bilan bog‘liq.
extraExamples: We found the solution by trial and error.
Children learn language by trial and error.
The best way is sometimes by trial and error.
He fixed the bike by trial and error.
Trial and error is a common learning method.
She mastered the game by trial and error.
Many inventions were created by trial and error.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz yechimni sinov va xato orqali topdik.
Bolalar tilni sinov va xato orqali o‘rganadilar.
Eng yaxshi yo‘l ba’zan sinov va xato orqali bo‘ladi.
U velosipedni sinov va xato bilan tuzatdi.
Sinov va xato — keng tarqalgan o‘rganish usuli.
U o‘yinni sinov va xato orqali mukammal o‘rgandi.
Ko‘p ixtirolar sinov va xato orqali yaratilgan.

words.definition: to use authority or legal right to do something
words.definitionUz: O‘z vakolati yoki qonuniy huquqidan foydalanib biror ishni amalga oshirish
words.example1: The president exercised his power to declare a state of emergency.
words.example1Translation: Prezident favqulodda holat e’lon qilish uchun vakolatidan foydalandi.
words.example2: You should exercise your power to make positive changes.
words.example2Translation: Ijobiy o‘zgarishlar kiritish uchun vakolatingizdan foydalaning.
words.example3: The committee exercised its power to reject the proposal.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘mita taklifni rad etish uchun vakolatidan foydalandi.
extraExamples: She exercised her power to help the employees.
Leaders must exercise their power wisely.
The court exercised its power to review the case.
He rarely exercises his power to make decisions.
Governments exercise their power through laws.
Exercise your power to vote responsibly.
The manager exercised his power to promote her.
extraExampleTranslations: U xodimlarga yordam berish uchun vakolatidan foydalandi.
Rahbarlar vakolatlaridan oqilona foydalanishlari kerak.
Sud ishni ko‘rib chiqish uchun vakolatidan foydalandi.
U qaror qabul qilish uchun vakolatidan kamdan-kam foydalanadi.
Hukumatlar qonunlar orqali vakolatlaridan foydalanadilar.
Mas’uliyat bilan ovoz berish huquqingizdan foydalaning.
Rahbar uni lavozimiga ko‘tarish uchun vakolatidan foydalandi.

words.definition: to weep uncontrollably for an extended period
words.definitionUz: Uzun vaqt davomida tinmay yig‘lash, juda qattiq yig‘lamoq
words.example1: She cried her eyes out when she heard the bad news.
words.example1Translation: Yomon xabarni eshitgach, u ko‘z yoshlarini to‘kdi.
words.example2: The movie was so sad that I cried my eyes out.
words.example2Translation: Film juda achinarli edi, shuning uchun ko‘z yoshlarimni to‘kdim.
words.example3: He cried his eyes out after losing the match.
words.example3Translation: O‘yinda yutqazgandan keyin u juda qattiq yig‘ladi.
extraExamples: I cried my eyes out at the funeral.
She cried her eyes out for hours.
Don’t cry your eyes out over him.
The child cried his eyes out when his toy broke.
Many people cried their eyes out during the farewell.
I almost cried my eyes out watching that scene.
He cried his eyes out alone in his room.
extraExampleTranslations: Dafn marosimida ko‘z yoshlarimni to‘kdim.
U soatlab yig‘ladi.
U uchun ko‘z yoshlaringizni to‘kmang.
O‘yinchoq sinib qolgach, bola juda qattiq yig‘ladi.
Xayrlashuvda ko‘p odamlar ko‘z yoshlarini to‘kishdi.
O‘sha sahnani ko‘rib deyarli yig‘lab yubordim.
U xonasida yolg‘iz ko‘z yoshlarini to‘kdi.

words.word: Leave someone to their own devices
words.definition: to allow someone to act independently without interference
words.definitionUz: Kimnidir o‘z mustaqil harakatlariga qoldirish, aralashmaslik
words.example1: I left the kids to their own devices for the afternoon.
words.example1Translation: Bolalarni tushdan keyin o‘z holiga qo‘yib yubordim.
words.example2: She prefers to be left to her own devices when working.
words.example2Translation: U ishlayotganda o‘z holiga qo‘yilishini afzal ko‘radi.
words.example3: Sometimes it’s best to leave teenagers to their own devices.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida o‘smirlarni o‘z holiga qo‘yib yuborish yaxshiroq.
extraExamples: The teacher left the students to their own devices.
He left his employees to their own devices.
Leave me to my own devices and I’ll finish it.
Parents should sometimes leave children to their own devices.
I like being left to my own devices.
She was left to her own devices after the meeting.
Don’t interfere — leave him to his own devices.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi o‘quvchilarni o‘z holiga qo‘yib yubordi.
U xodimlarini o‘z holiga qo‘yib yubordi.
Meni o‘z holimga qo‘yib yuboring, tugataman.
Ota-onalar ba’zida bolalarni o‘z holiga qo‘yishlari kerak.
O‘z holimga qoldirilishini yaxshi ko‘raman.
Uchrashuvdan keyin uni o‘z holiga qoldirdilar.
Aralashmang — uni o‘z holiga qo‘yib yuboring.

words.definition: a person who offers emotional support in times of distress
words.definitionUz: Qiyin paytlarda hissiy qo‘llab-quvvatlashni taklif qiladigan odam
words.example1: Thanks for being a shoulder to cry on.
words.example1Translation: Yig‘lash uchun yelkangizni qo‘yganingiz uchun rahmat.
words.example2: She’s always been a shoulder to cry on for her friends.
words.example2Translation: U do‘stlariga har doim yig‘lash uchun yelkador bo‘lib kelgan.
words.example3: I need a shoulder to cry on right now.
words.example3Translation: Hozir menga yig‘lash uchun yelkador kerak.
extraExamples: Everyone needs a shoulder to cry on sometimes.
He was my shoulder to cry on during the breakup.
Thank you for offering a shoulder to cry on.
She found a shoulder to cry on in her sister.
A good friend is a shoulder to cry on.
I don’t want to be a burden, but I need a shoulder to cry on.
He provided a shoulder to cry on for many people.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma vaqti-vaqti bilan yig‘lash uchun yelkaga muhtoj bo‘ladi.
U xayrlashuv paytida mening yig‘lash uchun yelkamdorim edi.
Yig‘lash uchun yelkangizni taklif qilganingiz uchun rahmat.
U opasidan yig‘lash uchun yelkador topdi.
Yaxshi do‘st — yig‘lash uchun yelkador.
Yuk bo‘lishni xohlamayman, lekin yig‘lash uchun yelkador kerak.
U ko‘p odamlarga yig‘lash uchun yelkador bo‘ldi.

words.definition: perfectly obvious and easy to understand
words.definitionUz: Juda aniq va tushunarli, hech qanday shubha yo‘q
words.example1: Her instructions were crystal clear.
words.example1Translation: Uning ko‘rsatmalari juda aniq edi.
words.example2: It was crystal clear that he was lying.
words.example2Translation: U yolg‘on gapirayotgani toza-tiniq ko‘rinib turardi.
words.example3: The message needs to be crystal clear to everyone.
words.example3Translation: Xabar hammaning tushunishi uchun juda aniq bo‘lishi kerak.
extraExamples: The rules are crystal clear.
His intentions were crystal clear.
Make sure your answer is crystal clear.
The difference between the two is crystal clear.
She made her position crystal clear.
The water in the lake was crystal clear.
The explanation was crystal clear.
extraExampleTranslations: Qoidalar juda aniq.
Uning niyatlari toza-tiniq edi.
Javobingiz juda aniq bo‘lishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
Ikki orasidagi farq juda aniq.
U o‘z pozitsiyasini juda aniq qilib ko‘rsatdi.
Ko‘ldagi suv toza-tiniq edi.
Tushuntirish juda aniq edi.

words.definition: the most important or fundamental aspect of an issue
words.definitionUz: Masalaning eng muhim yoki asosiy tomoni
words.example1: The essential point is that we need more time.
words.example1Translation: Eng muhim nuqta shuki, bizga ko‘proq vaqt kerak.
words.example2: Let’s focus on the essential points of the discussion.
words.example2Translation: Muhokamaning muhim nuqtalariga e’tibor qarataylik.
words.example3: You missed the essential point of the argument.
words.example3Translation: Siz bahsning asosiy nuqtasini o‘tkazib yubordingiz.
extraExamples: The essential point is teamwork.
She explained the essential points clearly.
What is the essential point of your presentation?
The essential point was completely ignored.
Understanding the essential point is crucial.
He always gets to the essential point quickly.
The essential point of the story is forgiveness.
extraExampleTranslations: Eng muhim nuqta — jamoaviy ish.
U muhim nuqtalarni aniq tushuntirdi.
Taqdimotingizning asosiy nuqtasi nima?
Eng muhim nuqta butunlay e’tibordan chetda qoldi.
Muhim nuqtani tushunish juda muhim.
U har doim muhim nuqtaga tez yetadi.
Hikoyaning asosiy nuqtasi — kechirim.

words.definition: hands that are soft, fine, or easily damaged, often implying careful handling
words.definitionUz: Yumshoq, nozik va oson shikastlanadigan qo‘llar, ehtiyotkorlikni bildiradi
words.example1: She has delicate hands, so she wears gloves when gardening.
words.example1Translation: Uning qo‘llari nozik, shuning uchun bog‘da ishlaganda qo‘lqop kiyadi.
words.example2: The delicate hands of the pianist amazed everyone.
words.example2Translation: Pianistning nozik qo‘llari hammani hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example3: Handle the fragile items with your delicate hands carefully.
words.example3Translation: Mo‘rt narsalarni nozik qo‘llaringiz bilan ehtiyotkorlik bilan ushlang.
extraExamples: Her delicate hands were perfect for the artwork.
He has surprisingly delicate hands for a builder.
Protect your delicate hands with cream.
The surgeon’s delicate hands performed the operation.
She hid her delicate hands in her pockets.
Delicate hands require gentle care.
The model has long, delicate hands.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning nozik qo‘llari san’at asari uchun juda mos edi.
U quruvchi bo‘lsa ham, qo‘llari ajablanarli darajada nozik.
Nozik qo‘llaringizni krem bilan himoyalang.
Jarrohning nozik qo‘llari operatsiyani o‘tkazdi.
U nozik qo‘llarini cho‘ntagiga yashirdi.
Nozik qo‘llar muloyim parvarish talab qiladi.
Modelning uzun, nozik qo‘llari bor.

words.definition: suffering from prolonged economic decline and limited opportunities
words.definitionUz: Uzoq vaqt davom etgan iqtisodiy pasayish va cheklangan imkoniyatlardan aziyat chekayotgan
words.example1: The town has been economically depressed for decades.
words.example1Translation: Shaharcha o‘nlab yillar davomida iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun holatda.
words.example2: Many people left the economically depressed region.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun mintaqadan ketishdi.
words.example3: The government is trying to help economically depressed areas.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun hududlarga yordam berishga harakat qilmoqda.
extraExamples: Economically depressed communities need support.
The area became economically depressed after the factory closed.
People in economically depressed zones struggle to find jobs.
Investment can help revive economically depressed towns.
She grew up in an economically depressed neighborhood.
The country has several economically depressed regions.
Economically depressed areas often have higher crime rates.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun jamoalar qo‘llab-quvvatlashga muhtoj.
Zavod yopilgandan keyin hudud iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun bo‘lib qoldi.
Iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun zonalarda odamlar ish topishda qiynaladi.
Sarmoya iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun shaharchalarni jonlantirishga yordam beradi.
U iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun mahallada o‘sgan.
Mamlakatda bir nechta iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun mintaqalar bor.
Iqtisodiy jihatdan tushkun hududlarda jinoyatchilik ko‘proq bo‘ladi.

words.definition: to have control or authority over people or situations
words.definitionUz: Odamlar yoki vaziyatlar ustidan nazorat va vakolatga ega bo‘lish
words.example1: Who is in charge of this project?
words.example1Translation: Bu loyihaga kim mas’ul?
words.example2: She is in charge of the entire department.
words.example2Translation: U butun bo‘limni boshqaradi.
words.example3: I was in charge while the manager was away.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar yo‘q paytda men mas’ul edim.
extraExamples: He likes to be in charge of everything.
The captain is in charge of the ship.
Parents are in charge of their children.
She is in charge of organizing the event.
Who will be in charge after the director leaves?
I don’t want to be in charge this time.
The teacher is in charge of the classroom.
extraExampleTranslations: U hamma narsani o‘zi boshqarishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Kapitan kemaga mas’ul.
Ota-onalar farzandlari uchun mas’uldirlar.
U tadbirni tashkil etishga mas’ul.
Direktor ketgandan keyin kim mas’ul bo‘ladi?
Bu safar mas’ul bo‘lishni xohlamayman.
O‘qituvchi sinf xonasiga mas’ul.

words.definition: to design or invent a plan carefully and strategically
words.definitionUz: Rejani puxta va strategik jihatdan o‘ylab chiqarish
words.example1: We need to devise a plan to solve this issue.
words.example1Translation: Bu muammoni hal qilish uchun reja tuzishimiz kerak.
words.example2: She devised a clever plan to surprise her friends.
words.example2Translation: U do‘stlarini hayratda qoldirish uchun aqlli reja tuzdi.
words.example3: The scientists devised a plan for the experiment.
words.example3Translation: Olimlar tajriba uchun reja ishlab chiqdilar.
extraExamples: He devised a plan to escape from the room.
They devised a new marketing plan.
It took weeks to devise a suitable plan.
The team is devising a plan for next season.
She devised a plan to save money.
Leaders must devise effective plans.
We devised a plan together.
extraExampleTranslations: U xonadan qochish uchun reja tuzdi.
Ular yangi marketing rejasini ishlab chiqdilar.
Mos reja tuzish uchun haftalar kerak bo‘ldi.
Jamoa keyingi mavsum uchun reja tuzmoqda.
U pul tejash uchun reja tuzdi.
Rahbarlar samarali rejalar tuzishlari kerak.
Biz birgalikda reja tuzdik.

words.definition: to limit or reduce criminal activity
words.definitionUz: Jinoyatchilikni kamaytirish yoki cheklash
words.example1: The new measures aim to curb crime in the city.
words.example1Translation: Yangi choralar shahardagi jinoyatchilikni cheklashni maqsad qilgan.
words.example2: Better education can help curb crime.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi ta’lim jinoyatchilikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The police are working hard to curb crime.
words.example3Translation: Politsiya jinoyatchilikni cheklash uchun qattiq ishlamoqda.
extraExamples: The government introduced laws to curb crime.
Community programs can curb crime effectively.
We need strategies to curb crime in this area.
Increased patrols helped curb crime.
Poverty is one factor that makes it hard to curb crime.
The campaign successfully curbed crime rates.
Parents play a role in curbing youth crime.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat jinoyatchilikni cheklash uchun qonunlar chiqardi.
Jamoaviy dasturlar jinoyatchilikni samarali cheklashi mumkin.
Bu hududda jinoyatchilikni cheklash uchun strategiyalar kerak.
Ko‘paytirilgan patrullar jinoyatchilikni kamaytirdi.
Qashshoqlik jinoyatchilikni cheklashni qiyinlashtiruvchi omillardan biri.
Kampaniya jinoyatchilik darajasini muvaffaqiyatli pasaytirdi.
Ota-onalar yoshlar jinoyatchiligini cheklashda rol o‘ynaydi.

words.definition: the condition of not getting enough sleep over time
words.definitionUz: Uzoq vaqt davomida yetarli darajada uxlamaslik holati
words.example1: Sleep deprivation can affect your concentration.
words.example1Translation: Uyqu yetishmasligi diqqatni jamlaganga ta’sir qiladi.
words.example2: Many students suffer from sleep deprivation during exams.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p talabalar imtihon paytida uyqu yetishmasligidan aziyat chekadi.
words.example3: Chronic sleep deprivation is bad for your health.
words.example3Translation: Surunkali uyqu yetishmasligi sog‘lig‘ingiz uchun zararli.
extraExamples: Sleep deprivation makes you irritable.
He is suffering from severe sleep deprivation.
Avoid sleep deprivation by maintaining a schedule.
Sleep deprivation affects decision-making.
The doctor warned about the dangers of sleep deprivation.
Shift workers often experience sleep deprivation.
Sleep deprivation can lead to serious mistakes.
extraExampleTranslations: Uyqu yetishmasligi sizni asabiylashtiradi.
U kuchli uyqu yetishmasligidan aziyat chekmoqda.
Kun tartibiga rioya qilib, uyqu yetishmasligidan saqlaning.
Uyqu yetishmasligi qaror qabul qilishga ta’sir qiladi.
Doktor uyqu yetishmasligi xavfini ogohlantirdi.
Smenali ishchilar ko‘pincha uyqu yetishmasligini boshdan kechiradilar.
Uyqu yetishmasligi jiddiy xatolarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: To compel someone to leave their country, usually for political reasons.
words.definitionUz: Surgun qilish – odatda siyosiy sabablarga ko‘ra biror kishini o‘z mamlakatidan majburan chiqib ketishga majburlash.
words.example1: The opposition leader was forced into exile after the military coup.
words.example1Translation: Harbiy to‘ntarishdan keyin muxolifat yetakchisi surgun qilindi.
words.example2: Many intellectuals were forced into exile during the dictatorship.
words.example2Translation: Diktatura davrida ko‘plab ziyolilar majburan surgun qilindi.
words.example3: He chose to go into exile rather than face imprisonment.
words.example3Translation: U qamoqqa tushgandan ko‘ra surgunga ketishni afzal ko‘rdi.
extraExamples: The journalist was forced into exile to escape persecution.
Forcing dissidents into exile is a common tactic in authoritarian regimes.
She lived in forced exile for over twenty years.
The government denied forcing anyone into exile.
Artists and writers were often forced into exile during turbulent times.
Returning from exile is sometimes more difficult than leaving.
International organizations help people forced into exile.
extraExampleTranslations: Jurnalist ta’qibdan qochish uchun surgun qilindi.
Muxoliflarni surgun qilish avtoritar rejimlarda keng tarqalgan usul.
U yigirma yildan ortiq majburiy surgunda yashadi.
Hukumat hech kimni majburan surgun qilmaganini rad etdi.
Rassomlar va yozuvchilar notinch davrlarda tez-tez surgun qilinardi.
Surgundan qaytish ba’zan ketishdan ham qiyinroq bo‘ladi.
Xalqaro tashkilotlar majburiy surgun qilingan odamlarga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Relating to moral principles and standards of right and wrong conduct.
words.definitionUz: Axloqiy – to‘g‘ri va noto‘g‘ri xatti-harakatlarning axloqiy printsiplari va me’yorlariga oid.
words.example1: The company follows strict ethical guidelines in its business practices.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya o‘z faoliyatida qat’iy axloqiy qoidalarga amal qiladi.
words.example2: It is not ethical to share confidential patient information.
words.example2Translation: Bemorni maxfiy ma’lumotlarini baham ko‘rish axloqiy emas.
words.example3: Ethical dilemmas often arise in medical research.
words.example3Translation: Tibbiy tadqiqotlarda axloqiy dilemmalar tez-tez uchraydi.
extraExamples: Ethical behavior builds trust in society.
The university has an ethical review board for research projects.
He made an ethical choice even though it cost him money.
Journalists must follow ethical standards.
Ethical investing avoids companies that harm the environment.
Teaching children ethical values is very important.
The decision raised serious ethical concerns.
extraExampleTranslations: Axloqiy xatti-harakat jamiyatda ishonchni mustahkamlaydi.
Universitetda tadqiqot loyihalari uchun axloqiy ko‘rib chiqish kengashi mavjud.
U pul yo‘qotgan bo‘lsa ham axloqiy tanlov qildi.
Jurnalistlar axloqiy standartlarga rioya qilishlari kerak.
Axloqiy investitsiyalar atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazuvchi kompaniyalardan qochadi.
Bolalarga axloqiy qadriyatlarni o‘rgatish juda muhim.
Bu qaror jiddiy axloqiy xavotirlarni uyg‘otdi.

words.definition: To reduce the negative impact of something adverse or difficult.
words.definitionUz: Xavfdan himoya qilish – qiyin yoki salbiy holatning zararli ta’sirini yumshatish yoki kamaytirish.
words.example1: Savings can provide a cushion against unexpected medical bills.
words.example1Translation: Jamg‘arma kutilmagan tibbiy xarajatlardan himoya qilishi mumkin.
words.example2: Good insurance provides a cushion against financial loss.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi sug‘urta moliyaviy yo‘qotishlarni yumshatadi.
words.example3: The emergency fund provides a cushion against job loss.
words.example3Translation: Favqulodda jamg‘arma ishni yo‘qotishdan himoya beradi.
extraExamples: Experience provides a cushion against making big mistakes.
Strong family support can provide a cushion against life’s hardships.
Diversifying investments provides a cushion against market crashes.
The policy aims to provide a cushion against economic downturns.
Preparation provides a cushion against stress.
Government aid provided a cushion against the effects of the pandemic.
A flexible schedule provides a cushion against burnout.
extraExampleTranslations: Tajriba katta xatolardan himoya qiladi.
Kuchli oilaviy qo‘llab-quvvatlash hayot qiyinchiliklaridan himoya beradi.
Investitsiyalarni xilma-xil qilish bozor inqirozlaridan himoya qiladi.
Siyosat iqtisodiy pasayishlardan himoya qilishni maqsad qilgan.
Tayyorgarlik stressdan himoya beradi.
Davlat yordami pandemiya ta’sirini yumshatdi.
Moslashuvchan ish jadvali charchoqdan himoya qiladi.

words.definition: Lacking the knowledge or ability to cope with a situation; feeling overwhelmed.
words.definitionUz: Qobiliyatingdan tashqari – biror ish yoki vaziyatni hal qilish uchun bilim yoki qobiliyat yetishmasligi, o‘zini haddan tashqari og‘ir his qilish.
words.example1: When the discussion turned to advanced physics, I was completely out of my depth.
words.example1Translation: Muhokama ilg‘or fizikaga o‘tganda men butunlay qobiliyatimdan tashqarida qoldim.
words.example2: She felt out of her depth on her first day as a manager.
words.example2Translation: U rahbarlikdagi birinchi kunida o‘zini haddan tashqari og‘ir ahvolda his qildi.
words.example3: Don’t take on projects that are way out of your depth.
words.example3Translation: Qobiliyatingdan ancha tashqaridagi loyihalarga qo‘l urmang.
extraExamples: He realized he was out of his depth after the first lecture.
Starting a business without experience left him out of his depth.
It’s okay to admit when you’re out of your depth.
The advanced course left most students feeling out of their depth.
She quickly got out of her depth in the technical discussion.
Being out of your depth can be a great learning opportunity.
The new employee was clearly out of his depth.
extraExampleTranslations: Birinchi ma’ruzadan keyin u o‘z qobiliyatidan tashqarida ekanini angladi.
Tajribasiz biznes boshlash uni qiyin ahvolga solib qo‘ydi.
Qobiliyatingdan tashqarida ekaningni tan olish normal holat.
Ilg‘or kurs ko‘pchilik talabalarni o‘z qobiliyatidan tashqarida his qildirdi.
U texnik suhbatda tezda qobiliyatidan tashqarida qoldi.
Qobiliyatingdan tashqarida bo‘lish katta o‘rganish imkoniyati bo‘lishi mumkin.
Yangi xodim aniq o‘z qobiliyatidan tashqarida edi.

words.definition: Officially identified by a doctor as having a particular medical condition.
words.definitionUz: Tashxis qo‘yilgan – shifokor tomonidan muayyan kasallik borligi rasman aniqlangan.
words.example1: She was diagnosed with diabetes last year.
words.example1Translation: Unga o‘tgan yili diabet tashxisi qo‘yildi.
words.example2: The child was diagnosed with autism at age three.
words.example2Translation: Bolaga uch yoshida autizm tashxisi qo‘yildi.
words.example3: He was recently diagnosed with high blood pressure.
words.example3Translation: Unga yaqinda yuqori qon bosimi tashxisi qo‘yildi.
extraExamples: Early diagnosis can greatly improve treatment outcomes.
Many people are diagnosed with cancer each year.
She felt relieved after being properly diagnosed with the condition.
The doctor diagnosed him with pneumonia.
Getting diagnosed with a chronic illness changes your life.
Children are increasingly being diagnosed with anxiety disorders.
Being diagnosed with something serious requires strong support.
extraExampleTranslations: Erta tashxis davolash natijasini sezilarli yaxshilashi mumkin.
Har yili ko‘p odamlarga saraton tashxisi qo‘yiladi.
To‘g‘ri tashxis qo‘yilgandan keyin u yengil tortdi.
Shifokor unga pnevmoniya tashxisini qo‘ydi.
Surunkali kasallikka tashxis qo‘yilishi hayotingizni o‘zgartiradi.
Bolalarda tashvish buzilishlari tobora ko‘proq aniqlanmoqda.
Jiddiy kasallikka tashxis qo‘yilganda kuchli qo‘llab-quvvatlash kerak.

words.definition: An unexpected development leading to serious harm, loss, or misfortune.
words.definitionUz: Fojiali voqealar rivoji – kutilmagan tarzda jiddiy zarar, yo‘qotish yoki baxtsizlikka olib keladigan holat.
words.example1: The game took a tragic turn of events when the star player got injured.
words.example1Translation: O‘yinning fojiali rivoji yulduz o‘yinchining jarohat olishi bilan boshlandi.
words.example2: A tragic turn of events left the family without a home.
words.example2Translation: Fojiali voqealar rivoji oilani uysiz qoldirdi.
words.example3: No one expected such a tragic turn of events.
words.example3Translation: Hech kim bunday fojiali rivojni kutmagan edi.
extraExamples: The expedition ended in a tragic turn of events.
A simple argument led to a tragic turn of events.
The story has a tragic turn of events at the end.
Life is full of unexpected and sometimes tragic turns of events.
The company suffered a tragic turn of events due to the scandal.
She handled the tragic turn of events with remarkable strength.
Investigators are looking into the tragic turn of events.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekspeditsiya fojiali voqealar bilan yakunlandi.
Oddiy bahs fojiali rivojga olib keldi.
Hikoya oxirida fojiali burilish bor.
Hayot kutilmagan va ba’zan fojiali burilishlarga boy.
Kompaniya janjal tufayli fojiali ahvolga tushib qoldi.
U fojiali voqeani ajoyib kuch bilan boshdan kechirdi.
Tergovchilar fojiali voqealar rivojini o‘rganmoqda.

words.definition: A day filled with significant, exciting, or memorable occurrences.
words.definitionUz: Voqealarga boy kun – muhim, hayajonli yoki esda qolarli voqealar bilan to‘la kun.
words.example1: It was a very eventful day – we won the match and celebrated all night.
words.example1Translation: Bu juda voqealarga boy kun edi – biz g‘alaba qozondik va tun bo‘yi nishonladik.
words.example2: Her wedding was an incredibly eventful day.
words.example2Translation: Uning to‘yi nihoyatda voqealarga boy kun bo‘ldi.
words.example3: After such an eventful day, I just want to rest.
words.example3Translation: Bunday voqealarga boy kundan keyin faqat dam olmoqchiman.
extraExamples: The conference was an eventful day full of inspiring talks.
What an eventful day – we missed the train but made new friends!
Every day is eventful when you have small children.
The protest turned into a very eventful day for the city.
She described her first day at university as extremely eventful.
Despite the eventful day, everything ended well.
An eventful day can be both exhausting and rewarding.
extraExampleTranslations: Konferensiya ilhomlantiruvchi nutqlar bilan voqealarga boy kun bo‘ldi.
Qanday voqealarga boy kun – poyezdni o‘tkazib yubordik, lekin yangi do‘stlar orttirdik!
Kichik bolalari bo‘lsa har kun voqealarga boy o‘tadi.
Namoyish shahar uchun juda voqealarga boy kun bo‘lib chiqdi.
U universitetdagi birinchi kunini nihoyatda voqealarga boy deb ta’rifladi.
Voqealarga boy kun bo‘lishiga qaramay hammasi yaxshi yakunlandi.
Voqealarga boy kun ham charchatadi, ham quvonch bag‘ishlaydi.

words.definition: To detain someone legally, typically by the police.
words.definitionUz: Hibsga olish – odatda politsiya tomonidan biror shaxsni qonuniy ravishda ushlab turish.
words.example1: The suspect was taken into custody early this morning.
words.example1Translation: Gumonlanuvchi bugun ertalab erta hibsga olindi.
words.example2: Police took the man into custody after the fight.
words.example2Translation: Politsiya janjaldan keyin erkakni hibsga oldi.
words.example3: She was taken into custody on suspicion of fraud.
words.example3Translation: U firibgarlikda gumon qilinib hibsga olindi.
extraExamples: The authorities took several protesters into custody.
He was taken into custody without resistance.
Being taken into custody can be a frightening experience.
The thief was taken into custody at the airport.
Police have the right to take someone into custody if necessary.
After questioning, he was released from custody.
High-profile cases often involve taking suspects into custody quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Rasmiylar bir necha namoyishchini hibsga oldi.
U qarshilik ko‘rsatmasdan hibsga olindi.
Hibsga olinish qo‘rqinchli tajriba bo‘lishi mumkin.
O‘g‘ri aeroportda hibsga olindi.
Politsiya zarur bo‘lsa odamni hibsga olish huquqiga ega.
So‘roqdan keyin u hibsdan ozod qilindi.
Mashhur ishlar ko‘pincha gumonlanuvchilarni tez hibsga olish bilan bog‘liq.

words.definition: Knives, forks, and spoons used for eating or serving food.
words.definitionUz: Stoloviy asboblar – ovqat yeyish yoki berish uchun ishlatiladigan pichoq, vilka va qoshiqlar.
words.example1: Please set the table with clean cutlery.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, stolni toza stoloviy asboblar bilan yozing.
words.example2: The restaurant provides high-quality stainless steel cutlery.
words.example2Translation: Restoran yuqori sifatli zanglamaydigan po‘latdan yasalgan stoloviy asboblarni taqdim etadi.
words.example3: She forgot to bring cutlery for the picnic.
words.example3Translation: U piknik uchun stoloviy asboblarni olib kelishni unutibdi.
extraExamples: Modern cutlery sets often include different sizes of knives and forks.
Plastic cutlery is convenient but not environmentally friendly.
The hotel replaced all the old cutlery.
Learning to use cutlery properly is part of good table manners.
Silver cutlery is considered more elegant for formal dinners.
The cutlery drawer was completely disorganized.
Many airlines now use wooden cutlery to reduce plastic waste.
extraExampleTranslations: Zamonaviy stoloviy asboblar to‘plamlari turli o‘lchamdagi pichoq va vilkalarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Plastik stoloviy asboblar qulay, lekin ekologik jihatdan zararli.
Mehmonxona eski stoloviy asboblarni almashtirdi.
Stoloviy asboblardan to‘g‘ri foydalanishni o‘rganish yaxshi stol odobining bir qismi.
Kumush stoloviy asboblar rasmiy kechki ovqatlar uchun o‘ta nafis hisoblanadi.
Stoloviy asboblar tortmasi butunlay tartibsiz edi.
Ko‘plab aviakompaniyalar plastik chiqindilarni kamaytirish uchun yog‘och stoloviy asboblardan foydalanmoqda.

words.definition: To gain enjoyment or satisfaction from something.
words.definitionUz: Zavq olish – biror narsadan zavq yoki mamnunlik his qilish.
words.example1: She derives great pleasure from reading classic literature.
words.example1Translation: U klassik adabiyotni o‘qishdan katta zavq oladi.
words.example2: Many people derive pleasure from helping others.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p odamlar boshqalarga yordam berishdan zavq topadi.
words.example3: He derives pleasure from gardening in his free time.
words.example3Translation: U bo‘sh vaqtida bog‘dorchilik qilishdan rohatlanadi.
extraExamples: Children derive pleasure from simple things.
Some derive pleasure from extreme sports.
Musicians derive pleasure from creating new songs.
It’s healthy to derive pleasure from your work.
She no longer derives pleasure from shopping.
People derive different levels of pleasure from the same activity.
Deriving pleasure from small daily moments leads to greater happiness.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar oddiy narsalardan zavq oladi.
Ba’zilar ekstremal sportdan zavq topadi.
Musiqachilar yangi qo‘shiqlar yaratishdan zavqlanadi.
Ishingizdan zavq olish sog‘lom holat.
U endi xarid qilishdan zavq olmaydi.
Odamlar bir xil faoliyatdan turli darajada zavq olishadi.
Kundalik kichik lahzalardan zavq olish kattaroq baxtga olib keladi.

words.definition: To take a risk, leaving the outcome to chance.
words.definitionUz: Zar tashlash – natijani omadga qoldirib, tavakkal qilish.
words.example1: Starting your own business is like rolling the dice.
words.example1Translation: O‘z biznesingizni boshlash zar tashlashga o‘xshaydi.
words.example2: He decided to roll the dice and move to a new country.
words.example2Translation: U yangi mamlakatga ko‘chib o‘tishga qaror qilib, tavakkal qildi.
words.example3: Sometimes you have to roll the dice to succeed.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida muvaffaqiyatga erishish uchun tavakkal qilish kerak.
extraExamples: Investing in stocks is rolling the dice.
She rolled the dice by quitting her job without a backup plan.
Rolling the dice can lead to great rewards or big losses.
Don’t roll the dice with your health.
The team rolled the dice with an unconventional strategy.
Life often requires us to roll the dice.
He rolled the dice one last time and it paid off.
extraExampleTranslations: Aktsiyalarga sarmoya kiritish – zar tashlash.
U zaxira rejasiz ishdan bo‘shab, tavakkal qildi.
Tavakkal qilish katta yutuq yoki katta yo‘qotishlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Salomatligingiz bilan tavakkal qilmang.
Jamoa g‘ayrioddiy strategiya bilan tavakkal qildi.
Hayot ko‘pincha bizdan tavakkal qilishni talab qiladi.
U oxirgi marta zar tashladi va omad kulib boqdi.

words.definition: To reveal information that was previously confidential or secret.
words.definitionUz: Tafsilotlarni ochib berish – ilgari maxfiy bo‘lgan ma’lumotlarni oshkor qilish.
words.example1: The company refused to disclose the details of the agreement.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya shartnomaning tafsilotlarini ochib berishdan bosh tortdi.
words.example2: He finally agreed to disclose the details of the incident.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat voqea tafsilotlarini ochib berishga rozi bo‘ldi.
words.example3: The lawyer cannot disclose the details due to client confidentiality.
words.example3Translation: Advokat mijoz maxfiyligi tufayli tafsilotlarni ochib bera olmaydi.
extraExamples: The government was pressured to disclose the details of the investigation.
She decided not to disclose the details to the media.
It is important to disclose all relevant details in a contract.
Witnesses are often reluctant to disclose the details.
The report discloses the details of the financial scandal.
Disclosing the details too early could harm the project.
He disclosed the details only after signing the NDA.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat tergov tafsilotlarini ochib berishga bosim ostida edi.
U tafsilotlarni ommaviy axborot vositalariga ochib bermay qaror qildi.
Shartnomada barcha tegishli tafsilotlarni ochib berish muhim.
Guvohlar ko‘pincha tafsilotlarni ochib berishni istamaydilar.
Hisobot moliyaviy janjal tafsilotlarini ochib beradi.
Tafsilotlarni erta ochib berish loyihaga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
U faqat maxfiylik shartnomasini imzolagandan keyin tafsilotlarni ochib berdi.

words.definition: A constantly evolving global environment.
words.definitionUz: Doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyo – doimiy ravishda o‘zgarib turadigan global muhit.
words.example1: In this ever-changing world, adaptability is crucial.
words.example1Translation: Bu doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyoda moslashuvchanlik juda muhim.
words.example2: Technology is transforming our ever-changing world at a rapid pace.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyomizni tez sur’atlar bilan o‘zgartirmoqda.
words.example3: We must prepare our children for the ever-changing world.
words.example3Translation: Biz bolalarimizni doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyoga tayyorlashimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The ever-changing world of fashion surprises us every season.
Staying informed is important in an ever-changing world.
The ever-changing world of work requires lifelong learning.
Climate change is one of the biggest challenges in our ever-changing world.
Businesses must innovate to survive in the ever-changing world.
The ever-changing world brings both opportunities and challenges.
Education systems need to evolve with the ever-changing world.
extraExampleTranslations: Doimiy o‘zgaruvchan moda dunyosi har mavsumda bizni hayratda qoldiradi.
Doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyoda xabardor bo‘lib turish muhim.
Doimiy o‘zgaruvchan ish dunyosi umr bo‘yi o‘qishni talab qiladi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyomizdagi eng katta muammolardan biri.
Bizneslar doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyoda omon qolish uchun innovatsiya qilishlari kerak.
Doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyo ham imkoniyatlar, ham qiyinchiliklar keltiradi.
Ta’lim tizimlari doimiy o‘zgaruvchan dunyoga moslashishi kerak.

words.definition: Distrustful of others’ motives, believing that people act only out of self-interest.
words.definitionUz: Kinik – odamlarning harakatlarini faqat o‘z manfaati uchun deb hisoblab, boshqalarning niyatlariga ishonmaydigan.
words.example1: His cynical attitude made it hard for him to make friends.
words.example1Translation: Uning kinik munosabati do‘st orttirishni qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example2: She became cynical after years of broken promises.
words.example2Translation: Yillar davomida bajarilmagan va’dalardan keyin u kinik bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example3: The journalist had a cynical view of politicians.
words.example3Translation: Jurnalist siyosatchilarga nisbatan kinik qarashga ega edi.
extraExamples: Cynical people often miss out on positive experiences.
His cynical remarks offended many colleagues.
It’s easy to become cynical in today’s world.
Despite being cynical, he still helped others.
The teacher tried to discourage cynical thinking in students.
Cynical humor is popular in some comedies.
She refused to let her cynical nature stop her from trying.
extraExampleTranslations: Kinik odamlar ko‘pincha ijobiy tajribalardan mahrum bo‘lishadi.
Uning kinik izohlari ko‘plab hamkasblarini xafa qildi.
Bugungi dunyoda kinik bo‘lib qolish oson.
Kinik bo‘lishiga qaramay, u boshqalarga yordam berardi.
O‘qituvchi talabalarda kinik fikrlashni oldini olishga harakat qildi.
Kinik hazil ba’zi komediyalarda mashhur.
U kinik tabiatining o‘ziga xalaqit berishiga yo‘l qo‘ymadi.

words.definition: A critical or extremely difficult condition that requires immediate action.
words.definitionUz: Umidsiz holat – darhol harakat talab qiladigan juda og‘ir yoki tanqidiy vaziyat.
words.example1: The family was in a desperate situation after losing everything in the fire.
words.example1Translation: Oilaviy uy yong‘anda hamma narsani yo‘qotib, umidsiz holatga tushib qoldi.
words.example2: In a desperate situation, people sometimes make poor decisions.
words.example2Translation: Umidsiz holatda odamlar ba’zan noto‘g‘ri qaror qabul qilishadi.
words.example3: The government is taking steps to help people in desperate situations.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat umidsiz holatdagi odamlarga yordam berish choralarini ko‘rmoqda.
extraExamples: The refugees were in a desperate situation.
A desperate situation can bring out the best or worst in people.
She found herself in a desperate situation with no money and no job.
Medical teams work in desperate situations during disasters.
He made a desperate attempt to escape the desperate situation.
International aid is crucial in desperate situations.
Avoid making decisions when you are in a desperate situation.
extraExampleTranslations: Qochqinlar umidsiz holatda edi.
Umidsiz holat odamlarda eng yaxshi yoki eng yomon tomonlarni ochib berishi mumkin.
U na pul, na ish bilan umidsiz ahvolga tushib qoldi.
Tibbiyot xodimlari falokat paytida umidsiz holatlarda ishlaydi.
U umidsiz holatdan qochish uchun umidsiz harakat qildi.
Xalqaro yordam umidsiz holatlarda juda muhim.
Umidsiz holatda qaror qabul qilishdan qoching.

words.definition: Onions cut into small, evenly sized cubes.
words.definitionUz: Maydalangan piyoz – piyozni mayda, bir xil o‘lchamdagi kub shaklida to‘g‘ralgan holati.
words.example1: Add the diced onions to the pan and fry until golden.
words.example1Translation: Maydalangan piyozni skovorodkaga soling va oltin ranggacha qovuring.
words.example2: The recipe calls for two cups of diced onions.
words.example2Translation: Retseptda ikki stakan maydalangan piyoz talab qilinadi.
words.example3: She prefers finely diced onions in her salad.
words.example3Translation: U salatiga mayda to‘g‘ralgan piyozni afzal ko‘radi.
extraExamples: Diced onions are a basic ingredient in many dishes.
Make sure the diced onions are uniform in size.
Frozen diced onions save time in the kitchen.
The smell of diced onions frying always makes me hungry.
Diced onions can be caramelized for extra flavor.
Chop the vegetables including diced onions.
Pre-packaged diced onions are convenient for busy cooks.
extraExampleTranslations: Maydalangan piyoz ko‘plab taomlarning asosiy ingredientidir.
Maydalangan piyoz bo‘laklari bir xil o‘lchamda bo‘lishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
Muzlatilgan maydalangan piyoz oshxonada vaqtni tejaydi.
Qovurilayotgan maydalangan piyoz hidi doim och qoldiradi.
Maydalangan piyozni karamellash mumkin – ta’mini yanada yaxshilaydi.
Sabzavotlarni, shu jumladan maydalangan piyozni to‘g‘rang.
Oldindan qadoqlangan maydalangan piyoz band odamlar uchun qulay.

words.definition: Occasionally; at irregular intervals.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt-vaqt bilan – vaqti-vaqti bilan, tartibsiz oralarda.
words.example1: Every so often, we go camping in the mountains.
words.example1Translation: Vaqt-vaqt bilan biz tog‘larga lager qilishga boramiz.
words.example2: She visits her grandparents every so often.
words.example2Translation: U bobosi va buvisini vaqt-vaqt bilan ko‘rib turadi.
words.example3: Every so often, I like to try a new recipe.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt-vaqt bilan yangi retseptni sinab ko‘rishni yoqtiraman.
extraExamples: Every so often, life surprises us with good news.
The old man tells stories every so often.
Every so often, it’s good to disconnect from technology.
We meet for coffee every so often.
Every so often, she sends me a letter.
Every so often, the team reviews its progress.
Every so often, you need to take a break.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqt-vaqt bilan hayot bizni yaxshi xabarlar bilan ajablantiradi.
Keksa odam vaqt-vaqt bilan hikoyalar aytib beradi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan texnologiyadan uzilish yaxshi.
Biz vaqt-vaqt bilan kofe ichish uchun uchrashamiz.
U vaqt-vaqt bilan menga xat yuboradi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan jamoa o‘z natijalarini ko‘rib chiqadi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan dam olish kerak.

words.definition: The amount of money spent on something.
words.definitionUz: Xarajatlar – biror narsaga sarflangan pul miqdori.
words.example1: The government increased expenditure on education.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat ta’limga sarflanadigan xarajatlarni oshirdi.
words.example2: Household expenditure on food has risen this year.
words.example2Translation: Oila byudjetida ovqatga sarflanadigan xarajatlar bu yil oshdi.
words.example3: We need to reduce our expenditure on luxury items.
words.example3Translation: Biz hashamatli buyumlarga sarflanadigan xarajatlarni kamaytirishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Expenditure on healthcare is a major part of the national budget.
Tracking expenditure on subscriptions helps save money.
There was high expenditure on the new infrastructure project.
Companies are cutting expenditure on advertising.
Personal expenditure on travel has increased after the pandemic.
The report analyzes expenditure on research and development.
Careful planning can control expenditure on household bills.
extraExampleTranslations: Sog‘liqni saqlashga sarflanadigan xarajatlar milliy byudjetning katta qismini tashkil qiladi.
Obuna xarajatlarini kuzatish pulni tejashga yordam beradi.
Yangi infratuzilma loyihasiga katta xarajat qilindi.
Kompaniyalar reklama xarajatlarini qisqartirmoqda.
Pandemiyadan keyin sayohatga sarflanadigan shaxsiy xarajatlar oshdi.
Hisobot tadqiqot va rivojlanishga sarflanadigan xarajatlarni tahlil qiladi.
Ehtiyotkor rejalashtirish uy xo‘jaligi hisoblaridagi xarajatlarni nazorat qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Clearly stated and leaving no room for misunderstanding or doubt.
words.definitionUz: Aniq – hech qanday tushunmovchilik yoki shubhaga o‘rin qoldirmaydigan darajada ochiq va ravshan ifodalangan.
words.example1: The instructions were explicit and easy to follow.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘rsatmalar aniq va tushunish oson edi.
words.example2: She gave an explicit warning about the dangers.
words.example2Translation: U xavf-xatarlar haqida aniq ogohlantirdi.
words.example3: The contract contains explicit terms regarding payment.
words.example3Translation: Shartnomada to‘lovlar bo‘yicha aniq shartlar mavjud.
extraExamples: He was very explicit about his expectations.
Explicit content is not suitable for children.
The teacher gave explicit examples to clarify the concept.
Make your requests explicit to avoid confusion.
The law is explicit on this matter.
She made her refusal explicit.
Explicit feedback helps improve performance.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘z kutganlarini juda aniq ifodaladi.
Ochiq-oydin kontent bolalar uchun mos emas.
O‘qituvchi tushunchani aniqlashtirish uchun aniq misollar keltirdi.
chalkashliklarga yo‘l qo‘ymaslik uchun talablaringizni aniq qiling.
Qonun bu masalada aniq.
U rad javobini aniq aytdi.
Aniq fikr-mulohaza ishlashni yaxshilashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A strong feeling of revulsion or intense disapproval.
words.definitionUz: Jirkanish – kuchli nafrat yoki qattiq norozilik hissi.
words.example1: The smell of rotten food filled him with disgust.
words.example1Translation: Chirigan ovqat hidi unda jirkanish uyg‘otdi.
words.example2: She expressed her disgust at the corruption in politics.
words.example2Translation: U siyosatdagi korruptsiyaga nisbatan jirkanishini bildirdi.
words.example3: The graphic images caused widespread disgust.
words.example3Translation: Dahshatli tasvirlar keng jirkanish uyg‘otdi.
extraExamples: He couldn’t hide his disgust when he saw the mess.
Disgust is a natural reaction to unethical behavior.
The film was criticized for its scenes of disgust.
She turned away in disgust.
Public disgust led to changes in the law.
His face showed clear disgust.
Disgust can sometimes motivate people to take action.
extraExampleTranslations: U tartibsizlikni ko‘rganda jirkanishini yashira olmadi.
Jirkanish axloqsiz xatti-harakatga tabiiy reaktsiya.
Film jirkanish sahnasi uchun tanqid qilindi.
U jirkanib yuzini o‘girdi.
Jamoatchilik jirkanishi qonunga o‘zgartirish kiritishga olib keldi.
Uning yuzida aniq jirkanish aks etgan edi.
Jirkanish ba’zan odamlarni harakatga undashi mumkin.

words.definition: To begin to make sense or work properly after a period of confusion.
words.definitionUz: Joy-joyiga tushish – chalkashlikdan keyin hamma narsa tushunarli bo‘lib, o‘z o‘rniga tushishi.
words.example1: After weeks of hard work, everything finally fell into place.
words.example1Translation: Bir necha hafta qattiq mehnatdan keyin hammasi joy-joyiga tushdi.
words.example2: Once I understood the main idea, the details fell into place.
words.example2Translation: Asosiy fikrni tushunganimdan keyin tafsilotlar joy-joyiga tushdi.
words.example3: When the right people came together, the project fell into place.
words.example3Translation: To‘g‘ri odamlar birlashgach, loyiha o‘z-o‘zidan joy-joyiga tushdi.
extraExamples: Things have a way of falling into place at the right time.
Her career plans finally fell into place after graduation.
It took time, but the puzzle pieces fell into place.
Once you relax, solutions often fall into place.
The missing information made everything fall into place.
Our travel arrangements fell into place at the last minute.
Sometimes you just have to wait for things to fall into place.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma narsa o‘z vaqtida joy-joyiga tushadi.
Bitirgandan keyin uning karyera rejalari nihoyat joy-joyiga tushdi.
Vaqt talab qildi, lekin boshqotirma bo‘laklari joy-joyiga tushdi.
Bo‘shashganingizda yechimlar ko‘pincha o‘z-o‘zidan joylashadi.
Yetishmayotgan ma’lumot hammasini joy-joyiga tushirdi.
Sayohat rejalari oxirgi daqiqada joy-joyiga tushdi.
Ba’zida shunchaki hamma narsaning joy-joyiga tushishini kutish kerak.

words.definition: A weapon or mechanism designed to detonate and cause destruction.
words.definitionUz: Portlovchi qurilma – portlash va vayronagarchilik keltirib chiqarish uchun mo‘ljallangan qurol yoki mexanizm.
words.example1: The police found an explosive device hidden in the car.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya mashinada yashirin portlovchi qurilmani topdi.
words.example2: Explosive devices are strictly regulated by international law.
words.example2Translation: Portlovchi qurilmalar xalqaro qonunlar bilan qattiq tartibga solingan.
words.example3: The bomb squad safely defused the explosive device.
words.example3Translation: Bomba xizmati portlovchi qurilmani xavfsiz zararsizlantirdi.
extraExamples: Terrorists sometimes use homemade explosive devices.
Detecting explosive devices is a key part of airport security.
The military uses controlled explosive devices for demolition.
Any suspicious explosive device should be reported immediately.
Explosive devices can cause massive damage.
Training is required to handle explosive devices safely.
The discovery of an explosive device caused panic in the area.
extraExampleTranslations: Terrorchilar ba’zan uy sharoitida yasalgan portlovchi qurilmalardan foydalanadi.
Portlovchi qurilmalarni aniqlash aeroport xavfsizligining muhim qismi.
Harbiy kuchlar nazorat ostidagi portlovchi qurilmalardan vayron qilish uchun foydalanadi.
Har qanday shubhali portlovchi qurilma darhol xabar qilinishi kerak.
Portlovchi qurilmalar katta zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Portlovchi qurilmalarni xavfsiz ishlatish uchun o‘qitish talab qilinadi.
Portlovchi qurilma topilishi hududda vahimaga sabab bo‘ldi.

words.definition: An action or method used solely to achieve a desired outcome, not valuable in itself.
words.definitionUz: Maqsadga erishish vositasi – o‘z-o‘zidan qimmatga ega bo‘lmagan, faqat maqsadga yetish uchun ishlatiladigan harakat yoki usul.
words.example1: For him, the job was just a means to an end.
words.example1Translation: U uchun bu ish faqat maqsadga erishish vositasi edi.
words.example2: Money is often seen as a means to an end rather than a goal itself.
words.example2Translation: Pul ko‘pincha o‘z-o‘zidan maqsad emas, balki maqsadga erishish vositasi sifatida qaraladi.
words.example3: She viewed studying as a means to an end – getting a good career.
words.example3Translation: U o‘qishni yaxshi karyeraga erishish vositasi deb bilardi.
extraExamples: Many people treat exercise as a means to an end.
The negotiations were simply a means to an end.
Don’t forget that technology is a means to an end.
For some, fame is a means to an end.
Education should not be viewed only as a means to an end.
The team saw the current project as a means to an end.
Happiness should not be treated as a means to an end.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar sportni faqat maqsadga erishish vositasi deb biladi.
Muzokaralar faqat maqsadga erishish vositasi edi.
Texnologiyani faqat vosita deb unutmaslik kerak.
Ba’zilar uchun shuhrat maqsadga erishish vositasi.
Ta’limni faqat maqsadga erishish vositasi deb qarash kerak emas.
Jamoa joriy loyihani maqsadga erishish vositasi sifatida ko‘rdi.
Baxtni faqat vosita sifatida qarash kerak emas.

words.definition: To decide how to act as a situation develops rather than planning everything in advance.
words.definitionUz: Vaziyatga qarab harakat qilish – oldindan hamma narsani rejalashtirmasdan, vaziyat rivojiga qarab qaror qabul qilish.
words.example1: We don’t have a fixed plan – we’ll just play it by ear.
words.example1Translation: Bizda qat’iy reja yo‘q – vaziyatga qarab harakat qilamiz.
words.example2: She decided to play the meeting by ear.
words.example2Translation: U uchrashuvni vaziyatga qarab o‘tkazishga qaror qildi.
words.example3: When traveling, it’s often best to play it by ear.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat qilganda ko‘pincha vaziyatga qarab harakat qilish yaxshiroq.
extraExamples: The band played it by ear during the concert.
I usually play job interviews by ear.
Let’s play it by ear and see how things go.
Playing it by ear requires flexibility and quick thinking.
They had to play the negotiations by ear.
Playing it by ear can sometimes lead to better outcomes.
I’m not sure what to wear – I’ll play it by ear.
extraExampleTranslations: Guruh kontsert vaqtida vaziyatga qarab o‘ynadi.
Men odatda ish suhbatlarini vaziyatga qarab o‘tkazaman.
Keling, vaziyatga qarab ko‘ramiz.
Vaziyatga qarab harakat qilish moslashuvchanlik va tez fikrlashni talab qiladi.
Ular muzokaralarni vaziyatga qarab olib borishga majbur bo‘ldi.
Vaziyatga qarab harakat qilish ba’zan yaxshiroq natijaga olib keladi.
Nima kiyishni bilmayman – vaziyatga qarab qaror qilaman.

words.definition: The degree or level at which something occurs or is true.
words.definitionUz: Qanchalik darajada – biror narsa qanchalik darajada sodir bo‘lishi yoki haqiqat ekanligi.
words.example1: The extent to which climate change affects us is still being studied.
words.example1Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi bizga qanchalik darajada ta’sir qilishi hali ham o‘rganilmoqda.
words.example2: It depends on the extent to which you are willing to help.
words.example2Translation: Bu siz qanchalik yordam berishga tayyor ekanligingizga bog‘liq.
words.example3: We were surprised by the extent to which prices had risen.
words.example3Translation: Narxlar qanchalik darajada oshganiga hayron qoldik.
extraExamples: The extent to which technology has changed our lives is enormous.
Success depends on the extent to which you work hard.
We need to understand the extent to which this problem exists.
The extent to which she helped was truly remarkable.
It’s difficult to measure the extent to which stress affects health.
The report discusses the extent to which education influences earnings.
The extent to which people trust the media varies greatly.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiya hayotimizni qanchalik darajada o‘zgartirgani juda katta.
Muvaffaqiyat siz qanchalik qattiq mehnat qilishingizga bog‘liq.
Bu muammo qanchalik darajada mavjudligini tushunishimiz kerak.
Uning yordami qanchalik darajada bo‘lgani haqiqatan ham ajoyib edi.
Stress salomatlikka qanchalik ta’sir qilishini o‘lchash qiyin.
Hisobot ta’lim daromadga qanchalik ta’sir qilishini muhokama qiladi.
Odamlarning ommaviy axborot vositalariga ishonishi qanchalik darajada ekanligi juda farq qiladi.

words.definition: To become a victim of something harmful or deceptive.
words.definitionUz: Qurbon bo‘lmoq – zararli yoki aldovchi narsaning qurboniga aylanish.
words.example1: Many tourists fall prey to scams in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab sayyohlar katta shaharlarda aldovlar qurboni bo‘lishadi.
words.example2: Don’t fall prey to fake news on social media.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlardagi soxta yangiliklarning qurboni bo‘lmang.
words.example3: Elderly people sometimes fall prey to financial fraud.
words.example3Translation: Keksa odamlar ba’zan moliyaviy firibgarlikning qurboni bo‘lishadi.
extraExamples: Small businesses can fall prey to economic downturns.
He fell prey to a clever marketing trick.
Wild animals often fall prey to larger predators.
Don’t fall prey to peer pressure.
The village fell prey to a terrible storm.
Many investors fell prey to the fraudulent scheme.
She refused to fall prey to despair.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichik bizneslar iqtisodiy pasayishning qurboni bo‘lishi mumkin.
U aqlli marketing nayrangining qurboni bo‘ldi.
Yovvoyi hayvonlar ko‘pincha kattaroq yirtqichlarning qurboni bo‘ladi.
Tengdoshlar bosimining qurboni bo‘lmang.
Qishloq dahshatli bo‘ronga qurbon bo‘ldi.
Ko‘plab investorlar firibgarlik sxemasining qurboni bo‘ldi.
U umidsizlikka qurbon bo‘lishdan bosh tortdi.

words.definition: Extremely happy or joyful, often due to good news or success.
words.definitionUz: Xursand – yaxshi xabar yoki muvaffaqiyat tufayli juda quvongan, baxtli holat.
words.example1: She was elated when she received the acceptance letter.
words.example1Translation: Qabul qilingani haqidagi xatni olgach, u juda xursand bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The team was elated after winning the championship.
words.example2Translation: Chempionlikni qo‘lga kiritgach, jamoa juda quvondi.
words.example3: He felt elated after completing the marathon.
words.example3Translation: Marafonni tugatgach, u o‘zini juda xursand his qildi.
extraExamples: The children were elated to see the snow.
An elated expression spread across her face.
Winning the prize left him elated for days.
She was elated by the positive feedback.
The news made the whole family elated.
He tried to hide how elated he was.
Elated fans celebrated in the streets.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar qorni ko‘rib juda xursand bo‘lishdi.
Uning yuzida xursandlik ifodasi tarqaldi.
Mukofotni yutgach, u bir necha kun xursand yurdi.
Ijobiy fikr-mulohazalar uni xursand qildi.
Bu xabar butun oilani xursand qildi.
U qanchalik xursand ekanini yashirishga harakat qildi.
Xursand muxlislar ko‘chalarda bayram qilishdi.

words.definition: To feel depressed or in low spirits.
words.definitionUz: Tushkunlikka tushmoq – ruhiy tushkunlikka tushish, kayfiyati past bo‘lish.
words.example1: He’s been down in the dumps since he lost his job.
words.example1Translation: Ishini yo‘qotgandan beri u tushkunlikka tushib qoldi.
words.example2: Try not to stay down in the dumps for too long.
words.example2Translation: Juda uzoq vaqt tushkunlikda bo‘lmaslikka harakat qiling.
words.example3: A walk in the park helped lift her out of the dumps.
words.example3Translation: Bog‘da sayr qilish uning tushkunligini yengishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: She felt down in the dumps after the argument.
Being down in the dumps is normal sometimes.
Music can help when you’re down in the dumps.
He tried to cheer up his friend who was down in the dumps.
Don’t let one failure keep you down in the dumps.
Talking to someone can help when you’re down in the dumps.
After a good night’s sleep, she was no longer down in the dumps.
extraExampleTranslations: Janjaldan keyin u tushkunlikka tushdi.
Ba’zida tushkunlikka tushish normal holat.
Musiqa tushkunlik paytida yordam berishi mumkin.
U tushkunlikka tushgan do‘stini ko‘tarishga harakat qildi.
Bitta muvaffaqiyatsizlik sizni uzoq vaqt tushkunlikda ushlab turmasin.
Kimdir bilan gaplashish tushkunlikda yordam beradi.
Yaxshi uxlagach, uning tushkunligi o‘tdi.

words.definition: To fail to reach a required or expected standard or goal.
words.definitionUz: Yetmaslik – talab qilinadigan yoki kutilgan darajaga yetolmaslik.
words.example1: The team fell short of their target this quarter.
words.example1Translation: Jamoa bu chorakda o‘z maqsadiga yetolmadi.
words.example2: The movie fell short of expectations.
words.example2Translation: Film kutilgan darajada bo‘lmadi.
words.example3: Her performance fell short of the required level.
words.example3Translation: Uning natijasi talab qilinadigan darajadan past bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: The product fell short of industry standards.
We must not fall short of our responsibilities.
The budget fell short of what was needed.
His explanation fell short of convincing the audience.
Efforts to reduce pollution have fallen short of goals.
The restaurant fell short of our expectations.
Don’t be discouraged if you fall short of perfection.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahsulot sanoat standartlariga yetmadi.
Biz o‘z majburiyatlarimizdan chetga chiqmasligimiz kerak.
Byudjet kerakli miqdordan kam bo‘ldi.
Uning tushuntirishi tomoshabinlarni ishontira olmadi.
If losni kamaytirish bo‘yicha harakatlar maqsadlarga yetmadi.
Restoran bizning kutganlarimizga yetmadi.
Mukammallikka yetolmasangiz ham tushkunlikka tushmang.

words.definition: Unquestionably true or accepted; not open to argument.
words.definitionUz: Muhokamasiz – hech qanday shubha yoki bahsga o‘rin qoldirmaydigan darajada haqiqat yoki qabul qilingan.
words.example1: Her talent is beyond dispute.
words.example1Translation: Uning iste’dodi muhokamasiz.
words.example2: The facts of the case are beyond dispute.
words.example2Translation: Ishning faktlari shubhasiz.
words.example3: It is beyond dispute that education improves opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Ta’lim imkoniyatlarni oshirishi muhokamasiz haqiqat.
extraExamples: His honesty is beyond dispute.
The victory was beyond dispute.
These results are beyond dispute.
Her dedication to the project is beyond dispute.
The evidence presented is beyond dispute.
It is beyond dispute that climate change is happening.
The team’s superiority was beyond dispute.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning halolligi muhokamasiz.
G‘alaba shubhasiz edi.
Bu natijalar muhokamasiz.
Uning loyihaga sadoqati muhokamasiz.
Taqdim etilgan dalillar shubhasiz.
Iqlim o‘zgarayotgani muhokamasiz haqiqat.
Jamoaning ustunligi muhokamasiz edi.

words.definition: Spending or using much more than is necessary or reasonable; excessively lavish.
words.definitionUz: Keragidan ortiq pul sarflaydigan yoki haddan ziyod hashamatli turmush kechiradiganlarni tavsiflash uchun ishlatiladigan so'z.
words.example1: She threw an extravagant birthday party that cost thousands of dollars.
words.example1Translation: U minglab dollarga tushgan isrofgarchilikka yo'l qo'yilgan tug'ilgan kun ziyofati uyushtirdi.
words.example2: His extravagant lifestyle left him with serious debt.
words.example2Translation: Uning isrofgarchilikka moyil turmush tarzi uni jiddiy qarzga botirdi.
words.example3: The company was criticized for its extravagant spending on executive bonuses.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya rahbarlar mukofotiga ortiqcha pul sarflagani uchun tanqidga uchradi.
extraExamples: Buying three sports cars at once seemed extravagant even to his wealthy friends.
The wedding decorations were so extravagant that guests could not stop talking about them.
She made extravagant promises during the campaign that she could never keep.
He had extravagant taste in clothing and rarely wore the same outfit twice.
The government was accused of making extravagant use of public funds.
Their extravagant holiday to a private island surprised everyone in the office.
Even on a high salary, his extravagant habits meant he never saved anything.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir vaqtning o'zida uchta sport avtomobil sotib olish hatto uning boy do'stlariga ham isrofgarchilik bo'lib tuyuldi.
To'y bezaklari shunchalik dabdabali ediki, mehmonlar ular haqida gaplashishdan to'xtay olmadilar.
U saylov kampaniyasida hech qachon bajara olmaydigan haddan ortiq va'dalar berdi.
Uning kiyim-kechakda isrofgarchilikka moyil didi bor edi va u bir xil kiyimni ikki marta kiyishi kamdan-kam hollarda bo'lardi.
Hukumat jamoat mablag'laridan haddan ziyod foydalanishda ayblandi.
Ularning xususiy orolga bo'lgan dabdabali ta'tillari ofistagi hamma kishini hayratga soldi.
Yuqori maosh olishiga qaramay, uning isrofgarchilikka moyil odatlari tufayli u hech narsa tejamaydigan edi.

words.definition: To learn about or gain thorough knowledge of something so that it becomes well known or comfortable to you.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqida yetarlicha bilim olish yoki u bilan shunchalik tanishib chiqish natijasida uni yaxshi bilib olmoq.
words.example1: Before the exam, make sure you familiarize yourself with the key topics.
words.example1Translation: Imtihondan oldin asosiy mavzular bilan yaxshilab tanishib chiqganingizga ishonch hosil qiling.
words.example2: New employees are given a week to familiarize themselves with company procedures.
words.example2Translation: Yangi xodimlarga kompaniya tartib-qoidalari bilan tanishib chiqish uchun bir hafta vaqt beriladi.
words.example3: You should familiarize yourself with local traffic laws before driving abroad.
words.example3Translation: Xorijda haydashdan oldin mahalliy yo'l harakati qonunlari bilan tanishib chiqishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: Take some time to familiarize yourself with the new software before the meeting.
She familiarized herself with the neighborhood by taking long walks every morning.
Athletes familiarize themselves with the stadium before a major competition.
It is worth familiarizing yourself with your rights as a consumer.
He quickly familiarized himself with the new system and started helping his colleagues.
Doctors must familiarize themselves with updated treatment guidelines regularly.
Familiarize yourself with the contract terms before you sign anything.
extraExampleTranslations: Yig'ilishdan oldin yangi dasturiy ta'minot bilan tanishib chiqish uchun biroz vaqt ajrating.
U har ertalab uzoq sayr qilib, mahalla bilan tanishib chiqdi.
Sportchilar muhim musobaqadan oldin stadion bilan tanishib chiqadilar.
Iste'molchi sifatidagi huquqlaringiz bilan tanishib chiqish foydali.
U yangi tizim bilan tezda tanishib chiqdi va hamkasblariga yordam bera boshladi.
Shifokorlar yangilangan davolash ko'rsatmalari bilan muntazam tanishib turishlari kerak.
Hech narsaga imzo qo'yishdan oldin shartnoma shartlari bilan tanishib chiqing.

words.definition: To change or conceal the true nature, identity, or appearance of someone or something so that it is not recognized.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi yoki narsaning haqiqiy mohiyati, shaxsi yoki ko'rinishini o'zgartirish yoki yashirish, shunda u tanib bo'lmaydigan bo'ladi.
words.example1: The spy wore a disguise to avoid being recognized at the airport.
words.example1Translation: Josus aeroportda tanib qolinmaslik uchun niqob kiydi.
words.example2: He tried to disguise his nervousness by smiling and speaking calmly.
words.example2Translation: U tabassum qilib va xotirjam gapirish orqali asabiyligini yashirishga urindi.
words.example3: The company tried to disguise the product's flaws with clever marketing.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya aqlli marketing yordamida mahsulotning kamchiliklarini yashirishga urindi.
extraExamples: She wore glasses and a hat as a disguise to walk through the crowd unnoticed.
It is hard to disguise the smell of smoke in a small room.
The villain disguised himself as a doctor to gain access to the building.
His cheerful tone was just a disguise for the deep sadness he was feeling.
The report was a thinly disguised attempt to shift blame onto others.
Children love dressing up in disguise during Halloween.
Good acting requires the ability to disguise your true emotions convincingly.
extraExampleTranslations: U olomon orasida sezilmay yurib o'tish uchun ko'zoynak va shlyapa kiydi.
Kichik xonada tamaki hidini yashirish qiyin.
Yovuz qahramonlar binoga kirish uchun o'zini shifokorga o'xshatib ko'rsatdi.
Uning quvnoq ohangdagi gapi his qilayotgan chuqur qayg'usi uchun niqob xolos edi.
Hisobot aybni boshqalarga yuklab o'tishga qilingan yashirib bo'lmaydigan urinish edi.
Bolalar Xellouin bayramida niqob kiyib o'ynashni yaxshi ko'rishadi.
Yaxshi aktyorlik chinakam his-tuyg'ularingizni ishonchli tarzda yashira bilishni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A person who is extremely and often unreasonably enthusiastic or devoted to something, often to the point of ignoring criticism or reason.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki g'oyaga haddan tashqari va ko'pincha asossiz ravishda berilib ketgan, tanqid yoki mantiqni inkor etadigan darajada ishtiyoqli bo'lgan odam.
words.example1: He is a football fanatic who watches every match without exception.
words.example1Translation: U istisnoisiz har bir o'yinni ko'radigan futbol fanatikidir.
words.example2: The political fanatic refused to listen to any opposing viewpoints.
words.example2Translation: Siyosiy mutaassib hech qanday qarshi nuqtai nazarni tinglarishdan bosh tortdi.
words.example3: She is a fitness fanatic who goes to the gym twice every single day.
words.example3Translation: U har kuni ikki marta sport zalga boradigan jismoniy tarbiya fanatikidir.
extraExamples: The religious fanatic believed that anyone who disagreed with him was wrong.
As a music fanatic, he owns over two thousand vinyl records.
Fanatics can sometimes make rational debate very difficult.
The team's fanatics painted their faces and sang throughout the entire match.
Being passionate about something is healthy, but becoming a fanatic can be harmful.
The health fanatic refused to eat anything that was not organic.
His friends joked that he was a coffee fanatic because he drank six cups a day.
extraExampleTranslations: Diniy mutaassib u bilan kelishmaydigan har kimni noto'g'ri deb hisobladi.
Musiqa fanatigi sifatida u ikki mingdan ortiq vinyl plastinkaga ega.
Fanatiklar ba'zan mantiqiy munozarani juda qiyinlashtirishi mumkin.
Jamoaning fanatiklari yuzlarini bo'yab, butun o'yin davomida qo'shiq aytishdi.
Biror narsaga ishtiyoqli bo'lish sog'lom, lekin fanatikka aylanish zararli bo'lishi mumkin.
Sog'liq fanatigi organik bo'lmagan hech narsani yeyishdan bosh tortdi.
Do'stlari hazil qilib, uni kofe fanatigi deb atashardi, chunki u kuniga olti piyola ichardi.
