The whole family was on edge waiting to hear whether they had been approved for the mortgage.
Even small unexpected noises kept him on edge after the stressful incident.
extraExampleTranslations: U shifokoridan kutilmagan qo'ng'iroq olgach asabiylashgan holda bo'ldi.
Noaniq iqtisodiy vaziyat ko'plab tadbirkorlarni oylarca asabiylashgan holda ushlab turdi.
U katta olomon ichida asabiylashishga moyil, shu sababli gavjum joylardan qochadi.
Binodagi to'satdan jimlik hammani asabiylashgan holda qoldirdi — biror narsa noto'g'ri tuyuldi.
Doimiy asabiylashgan holda bo'lish charchatadi va ruhiy sog'lig'ingizga jiddiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Butun oila ipoteka uchun ruxsat olganlarini eshitishini kutib asabiylashgan holda edi.
Hatto kichik kutilmagan shovqinlar ham stressli voqeadan keyin uni asabiylashgan holda ushlab turdi.

words.translation: Biror narsaga munosib bo'lmoq / Adolatli ifodalash
words.definition: To represent, describe, or handle something in a way that is fully worthy of its true quality, importance, or complexity.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani uning haqiqiy sifati, ahamiyati yoki murakkabligiga to'liq loyiq tarzda ifodalash, tasvirlash yoki ko'rib chiqish.
words.example1: No photograph could do justice to the breathtaking beauty of the mountain at sunrise.
words.example1Translation: Hech qanday fotosurvat quyosh chiqayotganda tog'ning nafas oldiradigan go'zalligini munosib ifodalay olmasdi.
words.example2: The film adaptation didn't really do justice to the depth and complexity of the original novel.
words.example2Translation: Filmga moslashtirish asl romanning chuqurligi va murakkabligini haqiqatan munosib ifodalay olmadi.
words.example3: She was so nervous that her performance didn't do justice to the months of hard practice she had put in.
words.example3Translation: U shunchalik asabiy ediki, uning ijrosi kiritilgan oylik qattiq mashqni munosib ifodalay olmadi.
extraExamples: Words alone can't do justice to the extraordinary kindness they showed us.
The documentary does real justice to the complexity of the issue by presenting multiple perspectives.
His summary was too brief to do justice to the richness of the research findings.
I want to do justice to this dish — let me take my time and cook it properly.
A short article can never fully do justice to the life and legacy of such an important figure.
She felt that the painting finally did justice to the emotion she had been trying to capture for years.
The report doesn't do justice to how hard the team worked under such difficult conditions.
extraExampleTranslations: Faqat so'zlar ular bizga ko'rsatgan g'ayrioddiy mehribonlikni munosib ifodalay olmaydi.
Hujjatli film bir nechta nuqtai nazarlarni taqdim etish orqali masalaning murakkabligini haqiqatan adolatli ifodalaydi.
Uning xulasasi tadqiqot natijalarining boyligini munosib ifodalash uchun juda qisqa edi.
Men bu taomni munosib ko'rsatmoqchiman — vaqt ajratib, uni to'g'ri pishiray.
Qisqa maqola bunday muhim shaxsning hayoti va merosini hech qachon to'liq munosib ifodalay olmaydi.
U rasm nihoyat yillar davomida ifodalashga harakat qilayotgan hissiyotini adolatli ifodaladi deb his qildi.
Hisobot jamoaning shunday og'ir sharoitlarda qanchalik qattiq ishlashini munosib ifodalamaydi.

words.definition: To manage or cope with something that is less than ideal, insufficient, or not exactly what is needed, because nothing better is available.
words.definitionUz: Yaxshiroq narsa mavjud bo'lmagani uchun idealdan past, yetarli bo'lmagan yoki aynan kerakli bo'lmagan narsa bilan boshqarish yoki bardosh berish.
words.example1: We ran out of butter, so we had to make do with olive oil for the recipe.
words.example1Translation: Sariyog'imiz tugadi, shuning uchun retsept uchun zaytun moyi bilan qanoatlanishimiz kerak bo'ldi.
words.example2: During the power cut, we made do with candles and torches to light the house.
words.example2Translation: Elektr uzilishi paytida uyni yoritish uchun sham va fonarlar bilan qanoatlandik.
words.example3: The budget was tight, but the team found creative ways to make do with what they had.
words.example3Translation: Byudjet qisqa edi, lekin jamoa boridan foydalanishning ijodiy usullarini topdi.
extraExamples: The hospital had to make do with outdated equipment due to a lack of funding.
She didn't have proper hiking boots, so she had to make do with her everyday trainers.
In times of hardship, people have always found ways to make do with less.
We didn't have a meeting room, so we made do with a quiet corner of the café.
He made do with a basic phone after his smartphone broke and he couldn't afford a replacement.
The chef had to make do with the ingredients available and improvised a creative dish.
Children in the past often had to make do with very few toys, yet they were remarkably imaginative.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasalxona moliya etishmasligi sababli eskirgan uskunalar bilan qanoatlanishga majbur bo'ldi.
Uning to'g'ri piyoda yurish etigi yo'q edi, shuning uchun kundalik krossovkalari bilan qanoatlanishga majbur bo'ldi.
Qiyinchilik davrlarida odamlar har doim kamroq bilan qanoatlanish yo'llarini topgan.
Bizda yig'ilish xonasi yo'q edi, shuning uchun kafeningqulay burchagi bilan qanoatlandik.
U smartfoni singanidan va almashtira olmaganidan keyin oddiy telefon bilan qanoatlandi.
Oshpaz mavjud ingredientlar bilan qanoatlanib, ijodiy taom tayyorladi.
O'tmishdagi bolalar ko'pincha juda kam o'yinchoqlar bilan qanoatlanishga majbur bo'lgan, shunga qaramay ular ajoyib darajada ijodkor edilar.

words.definition: An action, decision, or remark that feels like a shocking and humiliating insult or rejection, especially when it is unexpected.
words.definitionUz: Ayniqsa kutilmagan bo'lsa, hayratlanarli va tahqirlovchi haqorat yoki rad etish kabi his ettiradigan harakat, qaror yoki izoh.
words.example1: Being passed over for the promotion after ten years of loyalty felt like a slap in the face.
words.example1Translation: O'n yillik sadoqatdan so'ng lavozimga o'tkazib yuborilish yuzga shapaloq urganday his qildirdi.
words.example2: The company offered such a low salary that the candidate saw it as a slap in the face.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya shunchalik past maosh taklif qildiki, nomzod buni yuzga shapaloq sifatida qabul qildi.
words.example3: After working overtime for months, receiving a pay cut was a real slap in the face.
words.example3Translation: Oylarca qo'shimcha vaqt ishlaganidan keyin ish haqini qisqartirish haqiqiy yuzga shapaloq edi.
extraExamples: Being publicly criticized by the boss in front of the whole team felt like a slap in the face.
The decision to cancel the project after all their hard work was a slap in the face for the team.
His dismissive comment about her idea was a real slap in the face given how much effort she had put in.
Not being invited to the meeting when it directly concerned her work was a slap in the face.
The lukewarm review of her performance felt like a slap in the face after her best show yet.
Receiving no acknowledgment for saving the deal was a slap in the face for the entire sales team.
Cutting the education budget further, after years of underfunding, was seen as a slap in the face by teachers.
extraExampleTranslations: Butun jamoa oldida ommaviy ravishda boss tomonidan tanqid qilinish yuzga shapaloq urganday his qildirdi.
Barcha qattiq mehnatidan keyin loyihani bekor qilish qarori jamoa uchun yuzga shapaloq bo'ldi.
Uning g'oyasiga befarq munosabat bildirishi u sarflagan harakat hisobga olingan holda haqiqiy yuzga shapaloq edi.
Ishiga bevosita aloqador yig'ilishga taklif etilmaslik yuzga shapaloq edi.
Ishlashini iliq baholash uning hali eng yaxshi ko'rsatuvidan keyin yuzga shapaloq kabi tuyuldi.
Shartnomani saqlab qolganlik uchun e'tirof olmaslik butun savdo jamoasi uchun yuzga shapaloq edi.
Yillar davomida yetarli moliya ajratilmaganidan keyin ta'lim byudjetini yanada qisqartirish o'qituvchilar tomonidan yuzga shapaloq sifatida qabul qilindi.

words.definition: Continuing to the very end of something, regardless of how difficult, painful, or hopeless the situation becomes.
words.definitionUz: Vaziyat qanchalik qiyin, og'riqli yoki umidsiz bo'lishidan qat'iy nazar, biror narsaning oxirigacha davom etish.
words.example1: The soldiers fought until the bitter end, refusing to surrender despite overwhelming odds.
words.example1Translation: Askarlar qo'ldan-qo'lga o'tishiga qaramay taslim bo'lishdan bosh tortib, qiyinchilikka qaramay oxirigacha kurashdi.
words.example2: She stayed at the failing company until the bitter end out of loyalty to her colleagues.
words.example2Translation: U hamkasblariga sadoqati sababli muvaffaqiyatsiz kompaniyada oxirigacha qoldi.
words.example3: Even when it was clear the team would lose, the fans cheered until the bitter end.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa yutqazishi aniq bo'lganida ham, muxlislar oxirigacha quvvatlab qichqirdi.
extraExamples: He defended his position until the bitter end, even though most people disagreed with him.
The negotiators worked until the bitter end to reach an agreement before the deadline.
She read the book until the bitter end, hoping the story would improve — it didn't.
The retiring employee stayed until the bitter end of her last shift, saying goodbye to everyone.
They argued until the bitter end of the meeting without reaching any agreement.
The underdog team played until the bitter end and earned respect even in defeat.
He pursued his dream until the bitter end, never giving up despite years of rejection.
extraExampleTranslations: U ko'pchilik u bilan rozi bo'lmagan bo'lsa ham, oxirigacha o'z pozitsiyasini himoya qildi.
Muzokarachilar muddatdan oldin kelishuvga erishish uchun oxirigacha ishladi.
U hikoya yaxshilanishiga umid qilib kitobni oxirigacha o'qidi — yaxshilanmadi.
Nafaqaga chiqayotgan xodim oxirgi navbatining oxirigacha qolib, hammaga xayrlashdi.
Ular hech qanday kelishuvga erishmay yig'ilishning oxirigacha bahslashdi.
Zaif hisoblangan jamoa oxirigacha o'ynadi va mag'lubiyatda ham hurmat qozondi.
U yillab rad etilishiga qaramay hech qachon orqaga qaytmay, oxirigacha orzusini quvdi.

words.definition: To produce the desired or required result, often in a simple or unexpected way.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha oddiy yoki kutilmagan usulda kerakli yoki talab qilingan natijani bermoq.
words.example1: I had a headache, but a glass of water and some rest did the trick.
words.example1Translation: Boshim og'riyotgan edi, lekin bir stakan suv va biroz dam olish kutilgan natijani berdi.
words.example2: The presentation was missing something, but adding a strong opening story did the trick.
words.example2Translation: Taqdimotda biror narsa yetishmayotgan edi, lekin kuchli boshlang'ich hikoya qo'shish kutilgan natijani berdi.
words.example3: The engine was making a strange noise, but tightening a loose bolt did the trick.
words.example3Translation: Dvigatel g'alati shovqin chiqarardi, lekin bo'shashgan boltni mahkamlash kutilgan natijani berdi.
extraExamples: A warm cup of tea usually does the trick when I'm feeling anxious.
We tried several solutions, but in the end, restarting the router did the trick.
Adding a pinch of salt to the batter did the trick — the cake tasted much better.
A heartfelt apology did the trick and repaired their friendship almost immediately.
The coach made one tactical change at halftime and it did the trick — they won the game.
Sometimes a short walk outside is all it takes to do the trick when you're feeling stuck.
The extra layer of insulation did the trick and the house finally felt warm in winter.
extraExampleTranslations: Xavotir olayotganimda odatda issiq bir piyola choy kutilgan natijani beradi.
Biz bir nechta yechimlarni sinab ko'rdik, lekin oxir-oqibat routerni qayta ishga tushirish kutilgan natijani berdi.
Xamirga bir chimdim tuz qo'shish kutilgan natijani berdi — tort ancha yaxshiroq tadi.
Samimiy uzr so'rash kutilgan natijani berib, ularning do'stligini deyarli darhol tikladi.
Murabbiy yarim vaqtda bitta taktik o'zgarish qildi va u kutilgan natijani berdi — ular o'yinni yutdi.
Ba'zan tashqarida qisqa sayr qilish to'sib qolganingizda kutilgan natijani berish uchun yetarli.
Qo'shimcha issiqlik shtukaturka kutilgan natijani berdi va uy nihoyat qishda iliq his qilindi.

words.definition: A phrase used to introduce an honest and often uncomfortable truth that people may be reluctant to acknowledge.
words.definitionUz: Odamlar tan olishdan bo'yin tovlaydigan halol va ko'pincha noqulay haqiqatni kiritish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: Let's face it — nobody actually reads the terms and conditions before clicking agree.
words.example1Translation: Rost gapni aytsak — hech kim rozilik bosishdan oldin shartlar va qoidalarni aslida o'qimaydi.
words.example2: Let's face it, the project is behind schedule and we need to be honest with the client.
words.example2Translation: Tan olaylik, loyiha jadvali orqada va biz mijoz bilan samimiy bo'lishimiz kerak.
words.example3: Let's face it — changing deeply ingrained habits is one of the hardest things a person can do.
words.example3Translation: Rost gapni aytsak — chuqur singib ketgan odatlarni o'zgartirish odam qila oladigan eng qiyin ishlardan biri.
extraExamples: Let's face it, he was never going to finish that project on his own.
Let's face it — social media has changed the way we communicate forever.
Let's face it, some days you just don't feel motivated, and that's perfectly normal.
Let's face it — the old system wasn't working, and everyone knew it.
Let's face it, we've all made mistakes we wish we could take back.
Let's face it — being truly fluent in a language takes years of consistent effort.
Let's face it, money does matter in life, even if it isn't everything.
extraExampleTranslations: Tan olaylik, u bu loyihani hech qachon o'zi yakunlamaydi.
Rost gapni aytsak — ijtimoiy tarmoq biz muloqot qilish usulimizni abadiy o'zgartirdi.
Tan olaylik, ba'zi kunlarda shunchaki motivatsiyangiz bo'lmaydi va bu mutlaqo normal.
Rost gapni aytsak — eski tizim ishlamayotgan edi va hamma buni bilardi.
Tan olaylik, biz hammamiz qaytarib olishni istagan xatolar qilganmiz.
Rost gapni aytsak — tilda chinakam ravon so'zlashish yillar davomida izchil harakat talab etadi.
Tan olaylik, hayotda pul muhim, hatto hamma narsa bo'lmasa ham.

words.definition: An estimate or judgment made without complete certainty but based on relevant knowledge, experience, or available evidence, making it more reliable than a random guess.
words.definitionUz: To'liq aniqliksiz, ammo tegishli bilim, tajriba yoki mavjud dalillarga asoslanib chiqarilgan taxmin yoki hukm, bu uni tasodifiy taxmindan ishonchli qiladi.
words.example1: I haven't seen the data, but based on last year's results, my educated guess is around 15% growth.
words.example1Translation: Ma'lumotlarni ko'rganim yo'q, lekin o'tgan yilgi natijalarga ko'ra, mening asosli taxminim taxminan 15% o'sish.
words.example2: The doctor made an educated guess about the diagnosis before the test results came back.
words.example2Translation: Shifokor sinov natijalari qaytib kelgunga qadar tashxis haqida asosli taxmin qildi.
words.example3: If I had to make an educated guess, I'd say the meeting will last about two hours.
words.example3Translation: Asosli taxmin qilishim kerak bo'lsa, yig'ilish taxminan ikki soat davom etadi derdim.
extraExamples: Even an educated guess needs to be based on some form of reliable evidence or experience.
She made an educated guess at the answer and it turned out to be correct.
The archaeologist made an educated guess about the age of the artifact based on its style.
I can't say for certain, but my educated guess is that the product will sell well in summer.
An educated guess is far more useful than no answer at all in fast-moving situations.
He made an educated guess about the cost of the repairs and was very close to the actual figure.
When forecasting trends, analysts often rely on educated guesses informed by past data.
extraExampleTranslations: Asosli taxmin ham biror ishonchli dalil yoki tajribaga asoslanishi kerak.
U javob haqida asosli taxmin qildi va u to'g'ri bo'lib chiqdi.
Arxeolog artefaktning uslubiga asoslanib uning yoshi haqida asosli taxmin qildi.
Aniq ayta olmayman, lekin asosli taxminim mahsulot yozda yaxshi sotiladi.
Asosli taxmin tez rivojlanayotgan vaziyatlarda hech qanday javobdan ancha foydali.
U ta'mirlash narxi haqida asosli taxmin qildi va haqiqiy raqamga juda yaqin chiqdi.
Tendentsiyalarni prognozlashda tahlilchilar ko'pincha o'tgan ma'lumotlardan ilhom olgan asosli taxminlarga tayanadi.

words.definition: A general attitude or atmosphere of extreme pessimism, hopelessness, and negativity about the present or future situation.
words.definitionUz: Hozirgi yoki kelajak vaziyat haqida haddan ziyod pessimizm, umidsizlik va salbiylikning umumiy munosabati yoki muhiti.
words.example1: Despite all the doom and gloom in the news, there are many positive developments happening in the world.
words.example1Translation: Yangiliklarida barcha umidsizlik va qayg'uga qaramay, dunyoda ko'plab ijobiy rivojlanishlar ro'y bermoqda.
words.example2: Stop spreading doom and gloom — there are real solutions to these problems if we work together.
words.example2Translation: Umidsizlik va qayg'u tarqatishni to'xtating — agar biz birgalikda ishlasak, bu muammolarga haqiqiy yechimlar bor.
words.example3: He's always full of doom and gloom, predicting disaster around every corner.
words.example3Translation: U har bir burchakda ofat bashorat qilib, doim umidsizlik va qayg'uga to'liq bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The economic report was full of doom and gloom, predicting a long period of difficulty ahead.
She refused to let the doom and gloom of others affect her optimism about the future.
Constant doom and gloom in the media can seriously affect people's mental wellbeing.
Not everything is doom and gloom — there have been huge advances in medicine and technology.
The meeting started with doom and gloom but ended on a surprisingly positive note.
Despite the initial doom and gloom, the team pulled together and turned things around.
Prophets of doom and gloom rarely account for human ingenuity and resilience.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy hisobot oldinda uzoq qiyinchilik davrini bashorat qilib, umidsizlik va qayg'uga to'la edi.
U boshqalarning umidsizlik va qayg'usiga kelajak haqidagi optimizmine ta'sir qilishiga yo'l qo'ymadi.
Ommaviy axborot vositalarida doimiy umidsizlik va qayg'u odamlarning ruhiy farovonligiga jiddiy ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
Hammasi umidsizlik va qayg'u emas — tibbiyot va texnologiyada katta yutuqlar bo'ldi.
Yig'ilish umidsizlik va qayg'u bilan boshlandi, lekin kutilmagan ijobiy nota bilan yakunlandi.
Dastlabki umidsizlik va qayg'uga qaramay, jamoa birlashib vaziyatni o'zgartirib yubordi.
Umidsizlik va qayg'u bashoratchilar inson ziyrakligini va chidamliligini kamdan-kam hisobga oladi.

words.word: Not the end of the world
words.definition: A phrase used to reassure someone that a problem, failure, or setback is not as serious or catastrophic as it might feel in the moment.
words.definitionUz: Birovni muammo, muvaffaqiyatsizlik yoki to'siqning hozir his qilganday jiddiy yoki halokatli emasligiga ishontirish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: You didn't get the job this time, but it's not the end of the world — keep applying.
words.example1Translation: Bu safar ishni olmadiingiz, lekin bu dunyoning oxiri emas — ariza berishda davom eting.
words.example2: Failing one exam is not the end of the world — you can resit it next month.
words.example2Translation: Bitta imtihonda muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lish dunyoning oxiri emas — keyingi oyda qayta topshirishingiz mumkin.
words.example3: It's disappointing that the event was cancelled, but honestly, it's not the end of the world.
words.example3Translation: Tadbir bekor qilinishi umidsizlik tug'diradi, lekin rostini aytsak, bu dunyoning oxiri emas.
extraExamples: Missing one deadline is not the end of the world as long as you communicate and catch up quickly.
She burned the dinner, but her partner reminded her it was not the end of the world.
Losing a game is not the end of the world — it's an opportunity to learn and improve.
Not the end of the world if plans change — sometimes the best experiences are unplanned.
He failed his driving test twice, but his mother reassured him it was not the end of the world.
It's not the end of the world if you change career directions — many successful people do.
Getting a bad review is not the end of the world — use the feedback to grow.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir muddatni o'tkazib yuborish, agar tez muloqot qilsangiz va yetib olsangiz, dunyoning oxiri emas.
U kechki ovqatni kuydirib yubordi, lekin uning hamkori bu dunyoning oxiri emasligini eslatdi.
O'yinda yutqazish dunyoning oxiri emas — bu o'rganish va yaxshilash uchun imkoniyat.
Rejalar o'zgarse dunyoning oxiri emas — ba'zan eng yaxshi tajribalar rejasiz bo'ladi.
U haydovchilik testini ikki marta topshira olmadi, lekin onasi bu dunyoning oxiri emasligiga ishontirdi.
Martaba yo'nalishini o'zgartirish dunyoning oxiri emas — ko'plab muvaffaqiyatli odamlar shuni qiladi.
Yomon sharh olish dunyoning oxiri emas — fikr-mulohazalarni o'sish uchun ishlating.

words.translation: Hushdan ketay deb turmoq / Boshdan aylanmoq
words.definition: To feel a sudden sensation of weakness, dizziness, and lightheadedness that may signal that a person is close to losing consciousness.
words.definitionUz: Odamning hushini yo'qotishiga yaqin ekanligini ko'rsatishi mumkin bo'lgan to'satdan zaiflik, bosh aylanish va yengillik hissini his qilmoq.
words.example1: She began to feel faint after standing in the hot sun for too long without water.
words.example1Translation: U suvsiz quyoshning issig'ida uzoq vaqt turgandan keyin hushdan ketay deb turdi.
words.example2: He felt faint when the doctor told him the diagnosis — he had to sit down immediately.
words.example2Translation: Shifokor tashxisni aytganida u hushdan ketay deb turdi — darhol o'tirishiga to'g'ri keldi.
words.example3: If you start to feel faint during exercise, stop immediately and drink some water.
words.example3Translation: Jismoniy mashq paytida boshdan aylanayotganday his qilsangiz, darhol to'xtang va bir oz suv iching.
extraExamples: She started to feel faint at the sight of blood, so she looked away quickly.
He felt faint after forgetting to eat all day and had to find somewhere to sit.
Passengers on the crowded train began to feel faint due to the heat and lack of air.
The nurse asked if the patient had been feeling faint or dizzy recently.
Feeling faint during pregnancy is common and usually linked to low blood pressure.
After the long hike with no food or water, I started to feel faint on the descent.
Standing up too quickly can cause some people to feel faint due to a sudden drop in blood pressure.
extraExampleTranslations: U qon ko'rishi bilan hushdan ketay deb turdi, shuning uchun tezda boshqa tomonga qaradi.
U butun kun ovqat yeyishni unutgach hushdan ketay deb turdi va o'tirish uchun joy topishi kerak bo'ldi.
Gavjum poezdda yo'lovchilar issiqlik va havo etishmasligi sababli hushdan ketay deb turdi.
Hamshira bemordan yaqinda boshdan aylanish yoki hushdan ketay deb turgan-turganligi haqida so'radi.
Homiladorlik davrida boshdan aylanish keng tarqalgan va odatda past qon bosimi bilan bog'liq.
Oziq-ovqat va suvsiz uzoq sayohatdan so'ng tushish paytida boshdan aylanay dedim.
Juda tez turib ketish ba'zi odamlarda qon bosimining to'satdan pasayishi sababli boshdan aylanishiga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: In private, away from public view or scrutiny, often suggesting that something is being kept secret or hidden from others.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsiy ravishda, jamoat ko'zidan yoki tekshiruvdan chetda, ko'pincha biror narsa boshqalardan sir saqlanayotgani yoki yashirilayotganini anglatadi.
words.example1: The two leaders met behind closed doors to discuss the sensitive diplomatic issues.
words.example1Translation: Ikki rahbar nozik diplomatik masalalarni muhokama qilish uchun yopiq eshiklar ortida uchrashdi.
words.example2: What really happens behind closed doors in that company has always been a mystery.
words.example2Translation: O'sha kompaniyada yopiq eshiklar ortida nima sodir bo'lishi har doim sirlicha bo'lib kelgan.
words.example3: The deal was agreed behind closed doors before any public announcement was made.
words.example3Translation: Shartnoma har qanday ommaviy e'lon qilinishidan oldin yopiq eshiklar ortida kelishildi.
extraExamples: Behind closed doors, the couple argued frequently despite presenting a happy image in public.
Major policy decisions are often made behind closed doors without public consultation.
The negotiations happened behind closed doors and the outcome surprised everyone.
Many people believe that what goes on behind closed doors in politics is very different from public statements.
She admitted that behind closed doors, the working environment was far more stressful than it appeared.
The tribunal heard the evidence behind closed doors to protect the identities of witnesses.
Significant business deals are still often struck behind closed doors at private dinners.
extraExampleTranslations: Yopiq eshiklar ortida er-xotin ommada baxtli tasvir ko'rsatishlariga qaramay, tez-tez bahslashardi.
Asosiy siyosat qarorlari ko'pincha jamoat maslahatiсиз yopiq eshiklar ortida qabul qilinadi.
Muzokaralar yopiq eshiklar ortida kechdi va natija hammani hayratga soldi.
Ko'p odamlar siyosatda yopiq eshiklar ortida sodir bo'layotgan narsa ommaviy bayonotlardan juda farq qiladi deb hisoblaydi.
U yopiq eshiklar ortida ish muhiti ko'ringanidan ancha stressli ekanini tan oldi.
Tribunal guvohlarning kimligini himoya qilish uchun dalillarni yopiq eshiklar ortida eshitdi.
Muhim biznes bitimlar hali ham ko'pincha xususiy kechki ovqatlarda yopiq eshiklar ortida tuziladi.

words.definition: To stop talking about a particular topic, often because it is sensitive, uncomfortable, unresolvable, or because someone has requested it.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha u nozik, noqulay, hal qilib bo'lmaydigan bo'lgani yoki kimdir so'ragani uchun ma'lum bir mavzu haqida gapirmeхани.
words.example1: Can we please just drop the subject? Every time we bring it up, we end up arguing.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, mavzuni tashlab qo'ya olamizmi? Har safar gapga kiritganimizda bahslashib ketamiz.
words.example2: He realized the conversation was going nowhere, so he decided to drop the subject entirely.
words.example2Translation: U suhbat hech qayoqqa borayotganini anglab, mavzuni butunlay tashlab qo'yishga qaror qildi.
words.example3: She asked her family to drop the subject of her relationship after the breakup.
words.example3Translation: U ajralishdan keyin oilasidan munosabati mavzusini tashlab qo'yishini so'radi.
extraExamples: I knew he was upset, so I decided to drop the subject before things escalated.
They argued for an hour before both agreed to drop the subject and move on.
Drop the subject — it's clear we're not going to agree on this one.
His tone made it obvious that he wanted me to drop the subject immediately.
The teacher dropped the subject when she noticed the student becoming visibly distressed.
Some conversations are better left unfinished — sometimes it's wiser to drop the subject.
She kept trying to drop the subject, but he wouldn't let it go.
extraExampleTranslations: Men uning xafa bo'lganini bildim, shuning uchun vaziyat yomonlashishidan oldin mavzuni tashlab qo'yishga qaror qildim.
Ular bir soat bahslashganidan keyin ikkalasi ham mavzuni tashlab qo'yib, oldinga siljishga kelishdi.
Mavzuni tashlab qo'ying — bu masalada kelisha olmaymiz.
Uning ohangidan u darhol mavzuni tashlab qo'yishimni xohlayotganini tushunib oldim.
O'qituvchi o'quvchining qattiq xavotirlanayotganini ko'rganida mavzuni tashlab qo'ydi.
Ba'zi suhbatlarni yakunlamaslik yaxshiroq — ba'zan mavzuni tashlab qo'yish oqilroq.
U mavzuni tashlab qo'yishga harakat qildi, lekin u uni qo'yib yubormasdi.

words.translation: Bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay / Aniq vaqtida
words.definition: Exactly at the specified time, with perfect punctuality and without any delay.
words.definitionUz: Belgilangan vaqtda aniq, mukammal o'z vaqtida va hech qanday kechikmasdan.
words.example1: The train departed on the dot at nine o'clock, just as the schedule promised.
words.example1Translation: Poyezd jadval va'da qilganidek to'qqiz soatda bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay jo'nab ketdi.
words.example2: She arrived at the interview on the dot, making a great first impression.
words.example2Translation: U intervyuga bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay keldi va ajoyib birinchi taassurot qoldirdi.
words.example3: The ceremony started on the dot at midday, with no delays whatsoever.
words.example3Translation: Marosim bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay tushda boshlandi, hech qanday kechikishsiz.
extraExamples: He is always on the dot — never early, never late, always precisely on time.
The fireworks display began on the dot at midnight to welcome the new year.
Please be ready on the dot at eight — we cannot afford to miss the connecting flight.
The delivery arrived on the dot, exactly when the confirmation email had promised.
Her boss was known for starting all meetings on the dot and finishing them early.
The surgery was scheduled for two o'clock, and the medical team was ready on the dot.
Being on the dot for appointments shows respect for other people's time.
extraExampleTranslations: U har doim bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay — hech qachon erta emas, hech qachon kech emas, doimo aniq vaqtida.
Yangi yilni kutib olish uchun o'n ikki soatda bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay ot-u'chlar boshlanди.
Sakkizda bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay tayyor bo'ling — biz ulanuvchi reysni o'tkazib yubora olmaymiz.
Yetkazib berish tasdiqlash elektron pochta xabari va'da qilganidek bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay keldi.
Uning boshlig'i barcha yig'ilishlarni bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay boshlab, erta yakunlashi bilan tanilgan.
Jarrohlik ikki soatga rejalashtirilgan edi va tibbiy guruh bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay tayyor edi.
Uchrashuvlarda bir daqiqa ham qoldirmay kelish boshqa odamlarning vaqtini hurmat qilishni ko'rsatadi.

words.definition: To begin to apply, operate, or be enforced officially, typically referring to laws, rules, policies, or agreements.
words.definitionUz: Odatda qonunlar, qoidalar, siyosatlar yoki kelishuvlarga nisbatan rasman tatbiq qilina boshlash, ishlash yoki ijro etilmoq.
words.example1: The new traffic regulations will come into effect from the first of January.
words.example1Translation: Yangi yo'l harakati qoidalari yanvar oyining birinchisidan kuchga kiradi.
words.example2: The trade agreement officially came into effect after being signed by both governments.
words.example2Translation: Savdo shartnomasi ikki hukumat tomonidan imzolangandan so'ng rasmiy ravishda kuchga kirdi.
words.example3: Once the new policy comes into effect, all employees will need to complete additional training.
words.example3Translation: Yangi siyosat kuchga kirgach, barcha xodimlar qo'shimcha treningni yakunlashlari kerak bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The stricter emission standards will come into effect for all new vehicles sold after this year.
Many people rushed to make changes before the new tax law came into effect.
The ceasefire agreement was supposed to come into effect at midnight but was delayed.
The safety rules came into effect immediately following the industrial accident.
Parents were informed about the new school policy before it came into effect.
The data protection regulation came into effect across the European Union in 2018.
When does the new minimum wage order officially come into effect?
extraExampleTranslations: Qat'iyroq chiqindi standartlari bu yildan keyin sotilgan barcha yangi avtomobillarga kuchga kiradi.
Ko'p odamlar yangi soliq qonuni kuchga kirmasidan oldin o'zgarishlar kiritishga shoshildi.
Ateşkəs kelishuvi yarim kechada kuchga kirishi kerak edi, lekin kechiktirildi.
Xavfsizlik qoidalari sanoat avariyasidan so'ng darhol kuchga kirdi.
Ota-onalar yangi maktab siyosati kuchga kirmasidan oldin xabardor qilindi.
Ma'lumotlarni himoya qilish qoidalari 2018-yilda Yevropa Ittifoqi bo'ylab kuchga kirdi.
Yangi minimal ish haqi tartibi rasmiy ravishda qachon kuchga kiradi?

words.definition: To cause people to question or be uncertain about the truth, reliability, validity, or accuracy of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning haqiqati, ishonchliligi, asosdorligi yoki aniqligi haqida odamlarni shubhalantirib qo'ymoq yoki noaniqlikka solgani.
words.example1: New evidence cast doubt on the defendant's alibi and the trial took a new direction.
words.example1Translation: Yangi dalillar da'vogarning alibi ustiga shubha uyg'otdi va sud jarayoni yangi yo'nalish oldi.
words.example2: The contradictory witness statements cast doubt on the accuracy of the official report.
words.example2Translation: Qarama-qarshi guvohlik bayonotlari rasmiy hisobotning aniqligi ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
words.example3: The leaked documents cast serious doubt on the company's claims about its environmental record.
words.example3Translation: Sizib chiqqan hujjatlar kompaniyaning o'z ekologik yozuvi haqidagi da'volari ustiga jiddiy shubha uyg'otdi.
extraExamples: The scientist's findings cast doubt on a theory that had been accepted for decades.
His sudden change of story cast doubt on everything he had said before.
The audit results cast doubt on whether the funds had been properly managed.
Recent studies have cast doubt on the effectiveness of some widely prescribed medications.
The politician's past behavior cast doubt on his sincerity when he promised reform.
The competing research cast doubt on the original study's methodology.
Casting doubt on someone's credibility without solid evidence can be deeply unfair.
extraExampleTranslations: Olimning kashfiyotlari o'n yillar davomida qabul qilingan nazariya ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
Uning to'satdan hikoyasini o'zgartirishi avval aytgan hamma narsa ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
Audit natijalari mablag'lar to'g'ri boshqarilganmi degan savol ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
So'nggi tadqiqotlar keng buyuriladigan ba'zi dori-darmonlarning samaradorligi ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
Siyosatchining o'tmishdagi xatti-harakati islohot va'da qilganida uning samimiyati ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
Raqib tadqiqot asl tadqiqotning metodologiyasi ustiga shubha uyg'otdi.
Qattiq dalillarsiz birovning ishonchliligiga shubha uyg'otish juda adolatsiz bo'lishi mumkin.

words.word: Without a shadow of a doubt
words.translation: Hech qanday shubhasiz / Mutlaq aniqlik bilan
words.definition: With complete and total certainty, leaving absolutely no room for uncertainty or questioning.
words.definitionUz: To'liq va mutlaq aniqlik bilan, noaniqlik yoki savolga mutlaqo joy qoldirmagan holda.
words.example1: She is, without a shadow of a doubt, the most talented person I have ever worked with.
words.example1Translation: U hech qanday shubhasiz, men hech qachon birga ishlaganim eng iste'dodli inson.
words.example2: Without a shadow of a doubt, this is the best meal I have eaten in years.
words.example2Translation: Hech qanday shubhasiz, bu yillar ichida yegan eng yaxshi taomim.
words.example3: The jury found the defendant guilty without a shadow of a doubt.
words.example3Translation: Hakamlar hay'ati da'vogарни hech qanday shubhasiz aybdor deb topdi.
extraExamples: Without a shadow of a doubt, the decision to move abroad changed her life for the better.
He knew, without a shadow of a doubt, that he had made the right choice.
This is without a shadow of a doubt the most challenging project we have ever taken on.
Without a shadow of a doubt, early education has a lasting impact on a child's development.
The forensic evidence proved, without a shadow of a doubt, that he was innocent.
Without a shadow of a doubt, teamwork was the key to the company's remarkable success.
I can say, without a shadow of a doubt, that I have never regretted that decision.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech qanday shubhasiz, chet elga ko'chish qarori uning hayotini yaxshi tomonga o'zgartirdi.
U hech qanday shubhasiz to'g'ri tanlov qilganini bilardi.
Bu hech qanday shubhasiz biz hech qachon qilgan eng qiyin loyiha.
Hech qanday shubhasiz, erta ta'lim bolaning rivojlanishiga doimiy ta'sir qiladi.
Sud-tibbiy dalillar hech qanday shubhasiz uning begunohligini isbotladi.
Hech qanday shubhasiz, jamoaviy ish kompaniyaning ajoyib muvaffaqiyatining kaliti edi.
Men hech qanday shubhasiz aytishim mumkinki, men hech qachon bu qarorga pushaymon bo'lmadim.

words.word: Not have the faintest idea about
words.definition: To have absolutely no knowledge, understanding, or information about something whatsoever.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqida mutlaqo hech qanday bilim, tushuncha yoki ma'lumotga ega bo'lmaslik.
words.example1: I don't have the faintest idea about how quantum physics actually works.
words.example1Translation: Kvant fizikasi aslida qanday ishlashi haqida hech qanday tasavvurim yo'q.
words.example2: She didn't have the faintest idea about what had caused the argument between her friends.
words.example2Translation: Uning do'stlari o'rtasida bahsni nima sabab qilgani haqida hech qanday tasavvuri yo'q edi.
words.example3: The new recruit didn't have the faintest idea about the company's internal processes.
words.example3Translation: Yangi xodim kompaniyaning ichki jarayonlari haqida hech qanday tasavvurga ega emas edi.
extraExamples: I didn't have the faintest idea about cooking before I moved out and had to fend for myself.
He admitted he didn't have the faintest idea about what the contract actually said.
The tourists didn't have the faintest idea about the local customs, which caused some awkward moments.
She joined the debate without having the faintest idea about the topic being discussed.
Most people don't have the faintest idea about how their food is produced.
I didn't have the faintest idea about what to expect when I arrived in a completely new country.
Without proper training, new staff often don't have the faintest idea about emergency procedures.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'chib chiqib, o'zim g'amxo'rlik qilishim kerak bo'lishidan oldin oshpazlik haqida hech qanday tasavvurim yo'q edi.
U shartnomada aslida nima yozilgani haqida hech qanday tasavvuri yo'qligini tan oldi.
Sayyohlar mahalliy urf-odatlar haqida hech qanday tasavvurga ega emas edilar, bu bir nechta noqulay daqiqalarni keltirib chiqardi.
U muhokama qilinayotgan mavzu haqida hech qanday tasavvursiz bahsga qo'shildi.
Ko'pchilik odamlar oziq-ovqatlarining qanday ishlab chiqarilishi haqida hech qanday tasavvurga ega emas.
Butunlay yangi mamlakatga kelganimda nima kutish kerakligi haqida hech qanday tasavvurim yo'q edi.
Tegishli treningsiz, yangi xodimlar ko'pincha favqulodda protseduralar haqida hech qanday tasavvurga ega bo'lmaydi.

words.definition: An informal and affectionate term used to refer to Australia and sometimes New Zealand, referring to their location in the Southern Hemisphere.
words.definitionUz: Janubiy yarim sharda joylashganliklariga ishora qilib, Avstraliya va ba'zan Yangi Zelandiyani bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan norasmiy va mehribon atama.
words.example1: She packed up her life and moved down under to start fresh in Sydney.
words.example1Translation: U hayotini yig'ishtirib, Sidneyde yangi boshlanish uchun Avstrailyaga ko'chib ketdi.
words.example2: He's spent the last three years working down under as an engineer on large infrastructure projects.
words.example2Translation: U so'nggi uch yilni katta infratuzilma loyihalarida muhandis sifatida Avstraliyada ishlashda o'tkazdi.
words.example3: Down under, the seasons are the opposite of what we experience here — Christmas falls in summer.
words.example3Translation: Avstraliyada fasllar biz bu yerda boshdan kechiradigan narsadan teskari — Rojdestvo yozda to'g'ri keladi.
extraExamples: Tourists flock down under every year to experience the Great Barrier Reef and the Outback.
She developed a real love for wildlife after spending six months traveling down under.
Down under, people drive on the left side of the road, just like in the United Kingdom.
The rugby team toured down under and won three of their four matches.
Life down under is often described as relaxed, outdoorsy, and community-oriented.
His accent changed noticeably after just one year of living down under.
Many young Europeans take gap years traveling down under before starting their careers.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayyohlar Buyuk To'siq rifi va Outbackni boshdan kechirish uchun har yili Avstrаliyaga to'planadi.
U olti oy Avstraliyada sayohat qilgandan keyin yovvoyi tabiatga chinakam muhabbat tuydirdi.
Avstraliyada, Buyuk Britaniyada bo'lgani kabi, odamlar yo'lning chap tomonida haydashadi.
Regbi jamoasi Avstraliyaga gastrol qildi va to'rttadan uch o'yinni yutdi.
Avstraliyadagi hayot ko'pincha erkin, tashqarida va jamoat yo'naltirilgan deb ta'riflanadi.
Uning aksenti Avstraliyada atigi bir yil yashagandan keyin sezilarli darajada o'zgardi.
Ko'plab yosh yevropa yoshlari martabalarini boshlashdan oldin Avstraliyada sayohat qilishda uzilish yillarini o'tkazishadi.

words.word: money will go down the drain
words.definition: Money will be wasted with no benefit.
words.definitionUz: Pul foydasiz sarflanib, hech qanday natija bermasligini bildiradi.
words.example1: If we don't fix the leak now, all that money will go down the drain.
words.example1Translation: Agar oqimni hozir tuzatmasak, o'sha pulning hammasi shamolga uchadi.
words.example2: Investing in that failing business means your money will go down the drain.
words.example2Translation: O'sha muvaffaqiyatsiz biznesga sarmoya kiritish pulingiz shamolga uchishini anglatadi.
words.example3: Without proper planning, the entire budget will go down the drain.
words.example3Translation: To'g'ri rejalashtirmasdan butun byudjet behuda sarflanib ketadi.
extraExamples: He realized too late that his savings had gone down the drain.
Don't let this opportunity go down the drain by being careless.
All our hard work and money went down the drain after the project failed.
If you cancel now, the deposit will simply go down the drain.
They watched years of investment go down the drain during the crisis.
Skipping maintenance means your money will eventually go down the drain.
The marketing budget went down the drain with no increase in sales.
extraExampleTranslations: U jamg'armasi shamolga uchganini juda kech angladi.
Beparvolik qilib bu imkoniyatni behuda boy bermang.
Loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz tugagandan keyin barcha mehnat va pulimiz shamolga uchdi.
Agar hozir bekor qilsangiz, depozit oddiygina behuda ketadi.
Ular inqiroz davrida yillar davomidagi sarmoyaning behuda ketishini kuzatishdi.
Texnik xizmatni o'tkazib yuborish pulingiz oxir-oqibat behuda ketishini anglatadi.
Sotuvlar oshmagani uchun marketing byudjeti behuda sarflandi.

words.definition: Expected or scheduled to happen; owed.
words.definitionUz: Sodir bo'lishi rejalashtirilgan yoki kutilayotgan, yoki to'lanishi shart bo'lgan narsa.
words.example1: The report is due by Friday afternoon.
words.example1Translation: Hisobot juma kuni tushdan keyin topshirilishi kerak.
words.example2: The rent is due on the first of every month.
words.example2Translation: Ijara haqi har oyning birinchi kunida to'lanishi kerak.
words.example3: Her flight is due to arrive at six in the evening.
words.example3Translation: Uning reysi kechqurun soat oltida kelishi kutilmoqda.
extraExamples: The baby is due in early September.
Payment is due within thirty days of the invoice date.
The train is due at the station any minute now.
Our next meeting is due to take place next Tuesday.
The book was due back at the library last week.
A decision is due from the committee by the end of the month.
The new policy is due to take effect in January.
extraExampleTranslations: Chaqaloq sentyabr boshida tug'ilishi kutilmoqda.
To'lov hisob-faktura sanasidan o'ttiz kun ichida amalga oshirilishi kerak.
Poyezd har daqiqada bekatga kelishi kutilmoqda.
Keyingi uchrashuvimiz seshanba kuni bo'lib o'tishi rejalashtirilgan.
Kitob o'tgan hafta kutubxonaga qaytarilishi kerak edi.
Komissiyadan oy oxirigacha qaror kutilmoqda.
Yangi siyosat yanvar oyida kuchga kirishi kutilmoqda.

words.definition: Honest and respectful behaviour, especially in competition.
words.definitionUz: Ayniqsa raqobatda halol va hurmatli xulq-atvor.
words.example1: The coach always emphasizes fair play over winning at any cost.
words.example1Translation: Murabbiy har qanday narx evaziga g'alaba qozonishdan ko'ra halol o'yinni doimo ta'kidlaydi.
words.example2: Fair play is one of the core values taught in youth sports.
words.example2Translation: Halol o'yin yoshlar sportida o'rgatiladigan asosiy qadriyatlardan biridir.
words.example3: The referee praised both teams for their fair play during the match.
words.example3Translation: Hakam o'yin davomida ikkala jamoaning halol o'yini uchun ularni maqtadi.
extraExamples: In business, fair play means treating competitors and customers honestly.
The award recognized the player's commitment to fair play.
Cheating in exams clearly violates the principle of fair play.
Fair play requires respecting the rules even when no one is watching.
The organization promotes fair play in international competitions.
She believes fair play is more important than winning.
Fair play creates trust between players and organizers.
extraExampleTranslations: Biznesda halol o'yin raqobatchilar va mijozlarga halollik bilan munosabatda bo'lishni anglatadi.
Mukofot o'yinchining halol o'yinga sodiqligini e'tirof etdi.
Imtihonlarda aldash halol o'yin tamoyilini aniq buzadi.
Halol o'yin hech kim kuzatmayotgan paytda ham qoidalarga hurmat ko'rsatishni talab qiladi.
Tashkilot xalqaro musobaqalarda halol o'yinni targ'ib qiladi.
U halol o'yin g'alabadan ko'ra muhimroq deb hisoblaydi.
Halol o'yin o'yinchilar va tashkilotchilar o'rtasida ishonch yaratadi.

words.definition: Savings set aside for future security.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakdagi xavfsizlik uchun yig'ib qo'yilgan pul yoki jamg'arma.
words.example1: They built a nest egg over twenty years of careful saving.
words.example1Translation: Ular yigirma yillik ehtiyotkorlik bilan tejash orqali jamg'arma yaratishdi.
words.example2: She uses part of her salary every month to grow her nest egg.
words.example2Translation: U jamg'armasini oshirish uchun har oy maoshining bir qismidan foydalanadi.
words.example3: A small nest egg can make a big difference during retirement.
words.example3Translation: Kichik jamg'arma pensiya davrida katta farq yaratishi mumkin.
extraExamples: He dipped into his nest egg to cover unexpected medical expenses.
Financial advisors recommend starting a nest egg as early as possible.
Their nest egg gave them the freedom to start a small business.
Without a nest egg, emergencies can quickly become financial crises.
She refused to touch her nest egg, even during tough times.
A college fund is essentially a nest egg for a child's education.
Building a nest egg requires discipline and patience.
extraExampleTranslations: U kutilmagan tibbiy xarajatlarni qoplash uchun jamg'armasidan foydalandi.
Moliyaviy maslahatchilar imkon qadar erta jamg'arma boshlashni tavsiya qilishadi.
Ularning jamg'armasi kichik biznes boshlash erkinligini berdi.
Jamg'armasiz favqulodda vaziyatlar tezda moliyaviy inqirozga aylanishi mumkin.
U qiyin paytlarda ham jamg'armasiga tegishni rad etdi.
Kollej fondi aslida bolaning ta'limi uchun jamg'armadir.
Jamg'arma yaratish intizom va sabr-toqat talab qiladi.

words.definition: To pass, especially of time.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt o'tib ketishi, ayniqsa muddat tugashi haqida ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Several months elapsed before they heard back from the company.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniyadan javob kelguncha bir necha oy o'tib ketdi.
words.example2: Two years had elapsed since their last meeting.
words.example2Translation: Ularning oxirgi uchrashuvidan beri ikki yil o'tib ketgan edi.
words.example3: The warranty expires once twelve months have elapsed.
words.example3Translation: O'n ikki oy o'tib ketganidan keyin kafolat muddati tugaydi.
extraExamples: A long time elapsed before the truth finally came out.
Only a few minutes had elapsed when the alarm went off again.
The contract becomes void if the deadline has elapsed.
Years elapsed before the city rebuilt after the disaster.
A decade had elapsed since he last visited his hometown.
The system logs how much time has elapsed since the last update.
Hours elapsed without any sign of improvement.
extraExampleTranslations: Haqiqat nihoyat oshkor bo'lguncha uzoq vaqt o'tib ketdi.
Signal yana ishlaganda atigi bir necha daqiqa o'tgan edi.
Muddat o'tib ketsa, shartnoma kuchini yo'qotadi.
Falokatdan keyin shahar qayta qurilguncha yillar o'tib ketdi.
U so'nggi marta tug'ilgan shahriga tashrif buyurganidan beri o'n yil o'tib ketgan edi.
Tizim so'nggi yangilanishdan beri qancha vaqt o'tganini qayd qiladi.
Hech qanday yaxshilanish belgisi bo'lmagan holda soatlar o'tib ketdi.

words.definition: Not at all close to doing something; quite the opposite.
words.definitionUz: Bir narsadan mutlaqo uzoq, aksincha holatda bo'lishni bildiradi.
words.example1: Far from solving the problem, the new policy made things worse.
words.example1Translation: Yangi siyosat muammoni hal qilishdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, vaziyatni yanada yomonlashtirdi.
words.example2: He is far from finishing the project; he's only just begun.
words.example2Translation: U loyihani tugatishdan aslo uzoq, u hali endigina boshlagan.
words.example3: Far from being upset, she seemed genuinely happy about the news.
words.example3Translation: U xafa bo'lishdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, xabardan haqiqatan ham xursand ko'rinardi.
extraExamples: Far from improving, the situation has actually gotten worse.
He's far from ready to take on such responsibility.
Far from apologizing, she blamed everyone else for the mistake.
The team is far from achieving its sales targets this quarter.
Far from being a quick fix, the solution requires years of work.
He is far from understanding the seriousness of the issue.
Far from giving up, she worked even harder after the setback.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshilanishdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, vaziyat aslida yanada yomonlashdi.
U bunday mas'uliyatni o'z zimmasiga olishga tayyor bo'lishdan aslo uzoq.
Kechirim so'rashdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, u xatoda hammani aybladi.
Jamoa bu chorakda sotuv maqsadlariga erishishdan aslo uzoq.
Yechim tezkor chora bo'lishdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, yillar davomida ish talab qiladi.
U muammoning jiddiyligini tushunishdan aslo uzoq.
Taslim bo'lishdan aslo uzoq bo'lib, u muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin yanada ko'proq ishladi.

words.definition: Occurring very rarely and at long intervals.
words.definitionUz: Juda kam va uzoq oraliqlarda sodir bo'ladigan narsa.
words.example1: Good job opportunities in this field are few and far between.
words.example1Translation: Bu sohada yaxshi ish imkoniyatlari juda kam uchraydi.
words.example2: Honest politicians, some say, are few and far between.
words.example2Translation: Ba'zilar halol siyosatchilar juda kam uchraydi deyishadi.
words.example3: Rainy days are few and far between in this desert region.
words.example3Translation: Bu cho'l hududida yomg'irli kunlar juda kam uchraydi.
extraExamples: Reliable mechanics like him are few and far between these days.
Customers like that are few and far between, so we appreciate them.
In small towns, good restaurants can be few and far between.
Truly original ideas are few and far between in this industry.
Visits from her relatives are few and far between since they moved abroad.
Quiet moments are few and far between when you have young children.
Affordable apartments downtown are few and far between right now.
extraExampleTranslations: Bugungi kunda u kabi ishonchli mexaniklar juda kam uchraydi.
Shunday mijozlar juda kam uchraydi, shuning uchun biz ularni qadrlaymiz.
Kichik shaharchalarda yaxshi restoranlar kamdan-kam uchrashi mumkin.
Bu sohada haqiqiy original g'oyalar juda kam uchraydi.
Qarindoshlari chet elga ko'chib o'tganlaridan beri uning tashriflari juda kam.
Kichik bolalaringiz bo'lganda tinch lahzalar juda kam uchraydi.
Hozir shahar markazidagi arzon kvartiralar juda kam uchraydi.

words.definition: An inferior copy lacking the quality or authenticity of the original.
words.definitionUz: Asl nusxaning sifati va haqiqiyligiga ega bo'lmagan past sifatli nusxa.
words.example1: The bag turned out to be a cheap imitation of the designer brand.
words.example1Translation: Sumka dizayner brendning arzon taqlidi bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example2: Critics called the movie a cheap imitation of the original classic.
words.example2Translation: Tanqidchilar filmni asl klassik asarning arzon taqlidi deb atashdi.
words.example3: Don't buy that watch; it's just a cheap imitation.
words.example3Translation: O'sha soatni sotib olmang, u shunchaki arzon taqlid.
extraExamples: The market was full of cheap imitations of famous perfumes.
His painting was dismissed as a cheap imitation of a master's work.
The new restaurant feels like a cheap imitation of the original.
She refused to settle for a cheap imitation when she wanted the real thing.
The product broke after a week, proving it was a cheap imitation.
Many tourists are fooled into buying cheap imitations of luxury goods.
The remake felt like a cheap imitation of the beloved original film.
extraExampleTranslations: Bozor mashhur atirlarning arzon taqlidlari bilan to'la edi.
Uning rasmi ustoz ishining arzon taqlidi sifatida rad etildi.
Yangi restoran asl nusxaning arzon taqlididek tuyuladi.
U haqiqiy narsani xohlaganida arzon taqlid bilan kelishishni rad etdi.
Mahsulot bir haftadan keyin buzilib, uning arzon taqlid ekanligini isbotladi.
Ko'plab sayyohlar hashamatli mahsulotlarning arzon taqlidlarini sotib olishga aldanishadi.
Qaytadan suratga olingan film sevimli asl filmning arzon taqlididek tuyuldi.

words.definition: To sound insincere, unconvincing, or lacking genuine meaning.
words.definitionUz: Samimiy bo'lmagan, ishonarsiz yoki ma'nosiz eshitilishini bildiradi.
words.example1: His apology rang hollow after he repeated the same mistake.
words.example1Translation: U xuddi shu xatoni takrorlagandan keyin uning kechirim so'rashi ishonarsiz eshitildi.
words.example2: The company's promises about sustainability ring hollow given its track record.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyaning barqarorlik haqidagi va'dalari uning o'tmishini hisobga olganda ishonarsiz eshitiladi.
words.example3: Her congratulations rang hollow, since everyone knew she was jealous.
words.example3Translation: Uning tabriklari ishonarsiz eshitildi, chunki hamma uning hasad qilayotganini bilardi.
extraExamples: Political promises often ring hollow when nothing actually changes.
His excuse rang hollow after the truth came out.
The CEO's statement of regret rang hollow to the laid-off employees.
Without real action, the company's mission statement rings hollow.
Her praise rang hollow because she never meant a word of it.
The slogan rings hollow when compared to the company's actual practices.
His thanks rang hollow, lacking any real warmth.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech narsa o'zgarmaganda siyosiy va'dalar ko'pincha ishonarsiz eshitiladi.
Haqiqat oshkor bo'lgandan keyin uning bahonasi ishonarsiz eshitildi.
Bosh direktorning afsuslanish bayonoti ishdan bo'shatilgan xodimlarga ishonarsiz eshitildi.
Haqiqiy harakatlarsiz kompaniyaning missiya bayonoti ishonarsiz eshitiladi.
Uning maqtovi ishonarsiz eshitildi, chunki u hech qachon chin dildan aytmagan edi.
Shior kompaniyaning haqiqiy amaliyoti bilan solishtirganda ishonarsiz eshitiladi.
Uning minnatdorchiligi haqiqiy iliqlikka ega bo'lmasdan ishonarsiz eshitildi.

words.definition: Lacking emotional or intellectual development appropriate to one's age.
words.definitionUz: Yoshiga mos hissiy yoki aqliy yetuklikka ega bo'lmagan xulq-atvor.
words.example1: His immature behavior at the meeting embarrassed the whole team.
words.example1Translation: Uning yig'ilishdagi bolalarcha xatti-harakati butun jamoani uyaltirdi.
words.example2: She thought his jokes about the accident were immature and unkind.
words.example2Translation: U uning baxtsiz hodisa haqidagi hazillarini bolalarcha va beodob deb hisobladi.
words.example3: It's immature to ignore someone just because you disagree with them.
words.example3Translation: Kimsa bilan kelishmasligingiz sababli uni e'tiborsiz qoldirish bolalarchalikdir.
extraExamples: He acted immature when he refused to apologize for his mistake.
Their immature attitude toward responsibility frustrated their manager.
It seemed immature to argue over something so trivial.
She used to be quite immature, but she's grown a lot since then.
His immature reaction surprised everyone, given his age.
Name-calling is an immature way to handle disagreements.
The teacher addressed the students' immature behavior in class.
extraExampleTranslations: U xatosi uchun kechirim so'rashdan bosh tortganda bolalarcha harakat qildi.
Ularning mas'uliyatga bolalarcha munosabati menejerlarini xafa qildi.
Bunchalik mayda narsa haqida bahslashish bolalarchalikdek tuyuldi.
U avval ancha bolalarcha edi, lekin o'shandan beri ancha o'sdi.
Uning yoshini hisobga olganda, bolalarcha reaksiyasi hammani hayratga soldi.
Haqorat qilish kelishmovchiliklarni hal qilishning bolalarcha usulidir.
O'qituvchi sinfdagi o'quvchilarning bolalarcha xulq-atvoriga e'tibor qaratdi.

words.definition: Progress requires taking risks; without risk, there is no reward.
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatga erishish uchun xavf-xatarga borish kerakligini, xavfsiz hech qanday yutuq bo'lmasligini bildiradi.
words.example1: She decided to apply for the job anyway — nothing ventured, nothing gained.
words.example1Translation: U baribir ishga ariza topshirishga qaror qildi — xavf qilmasang, yutuqqa erisha olmaysan.
words.example2: He invested his savings in the startup, believing nothing ventured, nothing gained.
words.example2Translation: U jamg'armasini startapga sarmoya qildi, xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmaysan deb ishonib.
words.example3: Nothing ventured, nothing gained, so I signed up for the competition.
words.example3Translation: Xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmaysan, shuning uchun men musobaqaga yozildim.
extraExamples: Remembering nothing ventured, nothing gained, she finally asked for a raise.
He told his daughter, "Nothing ventured, nothing gained," before her audition.
Nothing ventured, nothing gained — that's how he approaches every new opportunity.
They took the risky deal, knowing nothing ventured, nothing gained.
With the motto nothing ventured, nothing gained, she launched her own company.
Nothing ventured, nothing gained, so go ahead and pitch your idea.
He reminded the team that nothing ventured, nothing gained when facing tough decisions.
extraExampleTranslations: Xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmaysan, degan fikrni eslab, u nihoyat maosh oshirishni so'radi.
U qiziga audisiyadan oldin "Xavf qilmasang, yutuqqa erisha olmaysan" dedi.
Xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmaysan — u har bir yangi imkoniyatga shunday yondashadi.
Ular xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmasligini bilib, xavfli bitimni qabul qilishdi.
"Xavf qilmasang, yutuqqa erisha olmaysan" shiori bilan u o'z kompaniyasini ochdi.
Xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmaysan, shuning uchun davom eting va g'oyangizni taklif qiling.
U jamoaga qiyin qarorlar qabul qilishda xavf qilmasang yutuqqa erisha olmasligini eslatdi.

words.definition: An immediate and impending threat.
words.definitionUz: Tez orada sodir bo'lishi kutilayotgan zudlik bilan e'tibor talab qiladigan xavf.
words.example1: The hikers were warned of imminent danger as the storm approached.
words.example1Translation: Bo'ron yaqinlashib kelayotganida sayohatchilarga yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavf haqida ogohlantirildi.
words.example2: Firefighters evacuated the building due to imminent danger of collapse.
words.example2Translation: O't o'chiruvchilar binoning qulashi yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavfi tufayli binoni bo'shatishdi.
words.example3: The doctor said the patient was in imminent danger without immediate surgery.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor zudlik bilan jarrohliksiz bemorning yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavfda ekanini aytdi.
extraExamples: Residents were told to leave immediately due to imminent danger from the wildfire.
The captain recognized the imminent danger and changed course at once.
Police acted quickly to remove civilians from imminent danger.
Scientists warned of imminent danger to the local ecosystem.
The bridge was closed because engineers identified imminent danger of collapse.
She sensed imminent danger and quickly locked the doors.
The report highlighted the imminent danger posed by rising sea levels.
extraExampleTranslations: Yovvoyi yong'in tufayli yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavf sababli aholiga darhol ketish aytildi.
Kapitan yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavfni tan olib, darhol yo'nalishni o'zgartirdi.
Politsiya fuqarolarni yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavfdan olib chiqish uchun tezda harakat qildi.
Olimlar mahalliy ekotizimga yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavf haqida ogohlantirishdi.
Muhandislar qulash xavfini aniqlashlari sababli ko'prik yopildi.
U yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavfni sezib, tezda eshiklarni qulflab qo'ydi.
Hisobotda dengiz sathining ko'tarilishi tufayli yaqinlashib kelayotgan xavf ta'kidlangan.

words.definition: A family environment disrupted by separation, divorce, or dysfunction.
words.definitionUz: Ajralish, talaq yoki nizolar tufayli buzilgan oilaviy muhit.
words.example1: He grew up in a broken home after his parents divorced.
words.example1Translation: Ota-onasi ajrashgandan keyin u buzilgan oilada o'sdi.
words.example2: Children from a broken home sometimes struggle with trust issues.
words.example2Translation: Buzilgan oiladan kelgan bolalar ba'zan ishonch muammolariga duch kelishadi.
words.example3: Coming from a broken home didn't stop her from building a happy family of her own.
words.example3Translation: Buzilgan oiladan kelishi unga o'zining baxtli oilasini qurishiga to'sqinlik qilmadi.
extraExamples: The counselor specializes in helping children from broken homes.
A broken home doesn't always mean a difficult childhood.
He often blamed his struggles in life on coming from a broken home.
Researchers studied the effects of a broken home on academic performance.
She found stability with her grandparents after leaving a broken home.
The novel follows a boy growing up in a broken home in the 1980s.
Support systems can help children cope with life in a broken home.
extraExampleTranslations: Maslahatchi buzilgan oiladan kelgan bolalarga yordam berishga ixtisoslashgan.
Buzilgan oila har doim ham qiyin bolalikni anglatmaydi.
U ko'pincha hayotdagi qiyinchiliklarini buzilgan oiladan kelganligi bilan izohlardi.
Tadqiqotchilar buzilgan oilaning o'qish natijalariga ta'sirini o'rganishdi.
Buzilgan oilani tark etgandan keyin u bobosi va buvisi bilan barqarorlik topdi.
Roman 1980-yillarda buzilgan oilada o'sgan o'g'il bola hayotini hikoya qiladi.
Qo'llab-quvvatlash tizimlari bolalarga buzilgan oiladagi hayot bilan kurashishga yordam berishi mumkin.

words.definition: Used to introduce the first reason in a list of arguments.
words.definitionUz: Dalillar ro'yxatidagi birinchi sababni keltirish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: I don't want to go; for one thing, I'm exhausted.
words.example1Translation: Men borishni xohlamayman; birinchidan, men juda charchaganman.
words.example2: For one thing, the apartment is too expensive, and for another, it's too small.
words.example2Translation: Birinchidan, kvartira juda qimmat, ikkinchidan, u juda kichik.
words.example3: We can't accept the offer; for one thing, the terms are unfair.
words.example3Translation: Biz taklifni qabul qila olmaymiz; birinchidan, shartlar adolatsiz.
extraExamples: For one thing, I don't have the time, and for another, I don't have the money.
This plan won't work; for one thing, it's far too expensive.
For one thing, the weather looks bad, so let's postpone the trip.
I disagree with the proposal; for one thing, it ignores key data.
For one thing, he never replies to emails, which makes communication difficult.
For one thing, the house needs major repairs before we can move in.
She refused the job offer; for one thing, the commute was too long.
extraExampleTranslations: Birinchidan, mening vaqtim yo'q, ikkinchidan, pulim yo'q.
Bu reja ishlamaydi; birinchidan, u juda qimmatga tushadi.
Birinchidan, ob-havo yomon ko'rinmoqda, shuning uchun sayohatni kechiktiraylik.
Men taklif bilan rozi emasman; birinchidan, u asosiy ma'lumotlarni e'tiborsiz qoldiradi.
Birinchidan, u hech qachon elektron pochtalarga javob bermaydi, bu muloqotni qiyinlashtiradi.
Birinchidan, biz ko'chib o'tishimizdan oldin uyga jiddiy ta'mirlash kerak.
U ish taklifini rad etdi; birinchidan, yo'lga ketadigan vaqt juda uzoq edi.

words.definition: To say a phrase that becomes famous or memorable over time.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt o'tishi bilan mashhur va eslab qolinadigan iborani aytish.
words.example1: The actor uttered an immortal line that fans still quote today.
words.example1Translation: Aktyor mangu gap aytdi, muxlislar uni hozirgacha keltirib qo'llashadi.
words.example2: In the film's final scene, the hero utters an immortal line about courage.
words.example2Translation: Filmning yakuniy sahnasida qahramon jasorat haqida mangu gap aytadi.
words.example3: The speech is remembered mainly for the immortal line he uttered at the end.
words.example3Translation: Nutq asosan u oxirida aytgan mangu gap tufayli eslab qolingan.
extraExamples: Few writers manage to utter an immortal line that lasts for generations.
The president uttered an immortal line during his inaugural address.
She uttered an immortal line in her acceptance speech that went viral.
The playwright is known for having his characters utter immortal lines.
He uttered an immortal line that perfectly captured the moment.
The coach uttered an immortal line that motivated the team for years.
Some movies are remembered for a single immortal line uttered by the lead actor.
extraExampleTranslations: Kam yozuvchilar avlodlar davomida yashaydigan mangu gap aytishga muvaffaq bo'lishadi.
Prezident o'zining inauguratsiya nutqida mangu gap aytdi.
U o'z qabul nutqida internetda mashhur bo'lgan mangu gap aytdi.
Dramaturg o'z qahramonlariga mangu gaplar aytdirishi bilan tanilgan.
U lahzani mukammal aks ettiruvchi mangu gap aytdi.
Murabbiy jamoani yillar davomida ilhomlantirgan mangu gap aytdi.
Ba'zi filmlar bosh aktyor aytgan bitta mangu gap bilan eslab qolinadi.

words.definition: Used to emphasize sincerity and truthfulness.
words.definitionUz: Samimiylik va to'g'rilikni ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: In all honesty, I don't think the plan will work.
words.example1Translation: Rostini aytganda, men bu reja ishlaydi deb o'ylamayman.
words.example2: In all honesty, she didn't deserve to lose her job.
words.example2Translation: Rostini aytganda, u ishini yo'qotishga loyiq emas edi.
words.example3: In all honesty, I was nervous about the presentation.
words.example3Translation: Rostini aytganda, men taqdimot haqida asabiy edim.
extraExamples: In all honesty, I haven't finished reading the report yet.
In all honesty, the food wasn't as good as I expected.
In all honesty, we made a mistake and we need to fix it.
In all honesty, I never thought we'd win the competition.
In all honesty, he's the best candidate for the job.
In all honesty, the movie was a disappointment.
In all honesty, I think we should reconsider our strategy.
extraExampleTranslations: Rostini aytganda, men hisobotni hali o'qib tugatmaganman.
Rostini aytganda, ovqat men kutganchalik yaxshi emas edi.
Rostini aytganda, biz xato qildik va uni tuzatishimiz kerak.
Rostini aytganda, men musobaqada g'alaba qozonamiz deb hech o'ylamagandim.
Rostini aytganda, u bu lavozim uchun eng yaxshi nomzod.
Rostini aytganda, film ko'ngilsiz chiqdi.
Rostini aytganda, men strategiyamizni qayta ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak deb o'ylayman.

words.definition: To risk one's accumulated money on an uncertain outcome.
words.definitionUz: To'plangan pulni noaniq natija uchun xavf ostiga qo'yish.
words.example1: He decided to gamble his savings on a risky stock investment.
words.example1Translation: U jamg'armasini xavfli aksiyalar sarmoyasiga tavakkal qilishga qaror qildi.
words.example2: Don't gamble your savings on a business idea you haven't fully researched.
words.example2Translation: To'liq o'rganmagan biznes g'oyasi uchun jamg'armangizni tavakkal qilmang.
words.example3: She refused to gamble her savings on the lottery, no matter how tempting.
words.example3Translation: Qanchalik jozibali bo'lmasin, u loteriya uchun jamg'armasini tavakkal qilishni rad etdi.
extraExamples: Many people gamble their savings hoping for quick financial freedom.
He gambled his savings on cryptocurrency and lost almost everything.
Financial advisors warn against gambling your savings without research.
They gambled their savings to open a small café in the city center.
It's risky to gamble your savings without a backup plan.
She gambled her savings on a degree that didn't lead to a stable career.
He regretted gambling his savings on a friend's failed business venture.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pgina odamlar tez moliyaviy erkinlikka umid qilib jamg'armasini tavakkal qiladi.
U jamg'armasini kriptovalyutaga tavakkal qilib, deyarli hamma narsasini yo'qotdi.
Moliyaviy maslahatchilar tadqiqotsiz jamg'armani tavakkal qilishdan ogohlantirishadi.
Ular shahar markazida kichik kafe ochish uchun jamg'armalarini tavakkal qilishdi.
Zaxira rejasiz jamg'armani tavakkal qilish xavflidir.
U barqaror kasbga olib kelmagan diplom uchun jamg'armasini tavakkal qildi.
U do'stining muvaffaqiyatsiz biznes loyihasiga jamg'armasini tavakkal qilganidan afsuslandi.

words.definition: Unaffected or resistant to something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsadan ta'sirlanmaydigan yoki unga qarshi turadigan holat.
words.example1: She seems immune to criticism and never lets it bother her.
words.example1Translation: U tanqidga immunitetli ko'rinadi va hech qachon undan xafa bo'lmaydi.
words.example2: No company is completely immune to economic downturns.
words.example2Translation: Hech qanday kompaniya iqtisodiy pasayishlarga to'liq immunitetli emas.
words.example3: After years in the industry, he became immune to stress.
words.example3Translation: Sohada yillar davomida ishlagandan keyin u stressga immunitetli bo'lib qoldi.
extraExamples: Children are not immune to the pressures of social media.
He became immune to her constant complaints over time.
Even experienced investors aren't immune to making mistakes.
The vaccine helps make people immune to the disease.
She seemed immune to flattery, no matter how often it was tried.
No system is completely immune to cyberattacks.
He grew immune to the noise after living near the airport for years.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar ijtimoiy tarmoqlar bosimiga immunitetli emas.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan u uning doimiy shikoyatlariga immunitetli bo'lib qoldi.
Hatto tajribali investorlar ham xato qilishdan immunitetli emas.
Vaksina odamlarni kasallikka qarshi immunitetli qilishga yordam beradi.
U qanchalik ko'p urinilmasin, xushomadga immunitetli ko'rinardi.
Hech qanday tizim kiberhujumlarga to'liq immunitetli emas.
Aeroportga yaqin yillar davomida yashagandan keyin u shovqinga immunitetli bo'lib qoldi.

words.word: keep your finger on the pulse
words.definition: To remain fully aware of current developments or trends.
words.definitionUz: Joriy voqealar yoki tendentsiyalardan doimo xabardor bo'lib turish.
words.example1: A good manager always keeps their finger on the pulse of the team.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi menejer doimo jamoa voqealaridan xabardor bo'lib turadi.
words.example2: She keeps her finger on the pulse of the fashion industry through social media.
words.example2Translation: U ijtimoiy tarmoqlar orqali moda sanoati voqealaridan xabardor bo'lib turadi.
words.example3: To succeed in tech, you need to keep your finger on the pulse of innovation.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya sohasida muvaffaqiyat qozonish uchun innovatsiya voqealaridan xabardor bo'lib turish kerak.
extraExamples: Investors keep their finger on the pulse by following market trends closely.
The journalist keeps her finger on the pulse by talking to people every day.
He keeps his finger on the pulse of customer feedback to improve the product.
Politicians try to keep their finger on the pulse of public opinion.
Staying online helps her keep her finger on the pulse of current events.
A good editor keeps their finger on the pulse of what readers want.
The CEO keeps his finger on the pulse of the competition.
extraExampleTranslations: Investorlar bozor tendentsiyalarini diqqat bilan kuzatib, voqealardan xabardor bo'lishadi.
Jurnalist har kuni odamlar bilan gaplashib, voqealardan xabardor bo'lib turadi.
U mahsulotni yaxshilash uchun mijozlar fikr-mulohazalaridan xabardor bo'lib turadi.
Siyosatchilar jamoatchilik fikridan xabardor bo'lib turishga harakat qilishadi.
Onlaynda bo'lish unga joriy voqealardan xabardor bo'lishga yordam beradi.
Yaxshi muharrir o'quvchilar nimani xohlashidan xabardor bo'lib turadi.
Bosh direktor raqobatchilardan xabardor bo'lib turadi.

words.definition: It is absolutely necessary or essential that.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning mutlaqo zarur va shart ekanligini ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: It is imperative that we finish the report before the deadline.
words.example1Translation: Muddat tugashidan oldin hisobotni tugatishimiz shart.
words.example2: It is imperative that all employees follow the new safety guidelines.
words.example2Translation: Barcha xodimlar yangi xavfsizlik qoidalariga rioya qilishi shart.
words.example3: It is imperative that you arrive on time for the interview.
words.example3Translation: Suhbatga o'z vaqtida kelishingiz shart.
extraExamples: It is imperative that the government acts quickly to address the crisis.
It is imperative that students submit their applications before the deadline.
It is imperative that we maintain honesty in all our business dealings.
It is imperative that the bridge be repaired before winter.
It is imperative that everyone wears protective equipment on site.
It is imperative that we understand the risks before proceeding.
It is imperative that the team communicates clearly during the project.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat inqirozni hal qilish uchun tezda harakat qilishi shart.
Talabalar arizalarini muddat tugashidan oldin topshirishlari shart.
Barcha biznes munosabatlarimizda halollikni saqlashimiz shart.
Ko'prik qishdan oldin ta'mirlanishi shart.
Hamma ob'ektda himoya vositalarini kiyishi shart.
Davom etishdan oldin xavflarni tushunishimiz shart.
Jamoa loyiha davomida aniq muloqot qilishi shart.

words.definition: To organize, receive, or provide a venue for an event or activity.
words.definitionUz: Tadbir yoki faoliyat uchun joy taqdim etish, uni tashkil qilish yoki mehmonlarni qabul qilish.
words.example1: The city will host the international conference next year.
words.example1Translation: Shahar kelasi yili xalqaro konferensiyaga mezbonlik qiladi.
words.example2: They hosted a small dinner party for their closest friends.
words.example2Translation: Ular eng yaqin do'stlari uchun kichik kechki ovqat tashkil qilishdi.
words.example3: The university hosts several academic events throughout the year.
words.example3Translation: Universitet yil davomida bir nechta ilmiy tadbirlarga mezbonlik qiladi.
extraExamples: The streaming platform will host the live event this weekend.
Our company is hosting a workshop on digital marketing next month.
The hotel often hosts weddings and corporate meetings.
She hosted the podcast for over five years before stepping down.
The stadium will host the championship final this summer.
They hosted an exchange student from Japan for a semester.
The website hosts thousands of articles on various topics.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar kelasi yili xalqaro konferensiyaga mezbonlik qiladi.
Kompaniyamiz kelasi oy raqamli marketing bo'yicha seminar tashkil qilmoqda.
Mehmonxona ko'pincha to'ylar va korporativ uchrashuvlarga mezbonlik qiladi.
U beshyildan ortiq vaqt davomida podkastga mezbonlik qildi, keyin esa tark etdi.
Stadion bu yoz chempionat finaliga mezbonlik qiladi.
Ular bir semestr davomida Yaponiyadan kelgan almashinuv talabasini qabul qilishdi.
Veb-sayt turli mavzularda minglab maqolalarni joylashtiradi.

words.definition: The process of putting a plan or decision into effect.
words.definitionUz: Reja yoki qarorni amalda qo'llash, hayotga tatbiq etish jarayoni.
words.example1: The implementation of the new policy will begin next month.
words.example1Translation: Yangi siyosatni amalga oshirish kelasi oy boshlanadi.
words.example2: Successful implementation requires careful planning and clear communication.
words.example2Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli amalga oshirish ehtiyotkorlik bilan rejalashtirish va aniq muloqotni talab qiladi.
words.example3: The team is responsible for the implementation of the software update.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa dasturiy ta'minot yangilanishini amalga oshirish uchun javobgardir.
extraExamples: The implementation of the project faced several delays due to budget issues.
Proper implementation of safety procedures can prevent workplace accidents.
The implementation phase usually takes longer than the planning stage.
They hired consultants to oversee the implementation of the new system.
Implementation of the reforms has been slower than expected.
The committee reviewed the implementation timeline for the new curriculum.
Strong leadership is key to the smooth implementation of any strategy.
extraExampleTranslations: Loyihani amalga oshirish byudjet muammolari tufayli bir necha marta kechikdi.
Xavfsizlik qoidalarini to'g'ri amalga oshirish ish joyidagi baxtsiz hodisalarning oldini olishi mumkin.
Amalga oshirish bosqichi odatda rejalashtirish bosqichidan ko'ra ko'proq vaqt oladi.
Ular yangi tizimni amalga oshirishni nazorat qilish uchun maslahatchilarni yollashdi.
Islohotlarni amalga oshirish kutilganidan sekinroq bo'lmoqda.
Komissiya yangi o'quv dasturini amalga oshirish jadvalini ko'rib chiqdi.
Kuchli rahbarlik har qanday strategiyani muvaffaqiyatli amalga oshirishning kalitidir.

words.definition: To behave dishonestly or manipulatively rather than directly.
words.definitionUz: To'g'ridan-to'g'ri emas, balki noaniq va manipulyativ tarzda harakat qilish.
words.example1: Stop playing games and tell me what's really going on.
words.example1Translation: O'ynashni bas qiling va menga haqiqatda nima bo'layotganini ayting.
words.example2: He accused his partner of playing games instead of being honest about their relationship.
words.example2Translation: U sherigini munosabatlari haqida halol bo'lish o'rniga o'ynashmoqdalikda ayblardi.
words.example3: In negotiations, it's best not to play games and just state your position clearly.
words.example3Translation: Muzokaralarda o'ynashmaslik va o'z pozitsiyangizni aniq bayon qilish eng yaxshisidir.
extraExamples: She's tired of him playing games with her feelings.
I don't have time to play games — just give me a straight answer.
They suspected the company was playing games with the contract terms.
Stop playing games and commit to a decision already.
He plays games at work to avoid taking responsibility for mistakes.
She refuses to play games when it comes to important decisions.
Playing games in a relationship usually leads to mistrust.
extraExampleTranslations: U uning his-tuyg'ulari bilan o'ynashishidan charchadi.
Mening o'ynashga vaqtim yo'q — menga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri javob bering.
