Ular kompaniya shartnoma shartlari bilan o'ynashayotganidan shubhalanishdi.
O'ynashni bas qiling va nihoyat qarorga keling.
U xatolar uchun mas'uliyatdan qochish uchun ishda o'ynashadi.
Muhim qarorlar masalasida u o'ynashishni rad etadi.
Munosabatlarda o'ynashish odatda ishonchsizlikka olib keladi.

words.definition: Strong animosity or opposition directed at someone or something.
words.definitionUz: Kimsa yoki biror narsaga qaratilgan kuchli dushmanlik yoki qarshilik hissi.
words.example1: There was visible hostility towards the new policy among the staff.
words.example1Translation: Xodimlar orasida yangi siyosatga nisbatan ko'rinarli dushmanlik bor edi.
words.example2: She faced hostility towards her ideas from more traditional colleagues.
words.example2Translation: U an'anaviyroq hamkasblaridan o'z g'oyalariga nisbatan dushmanlikka duch keldi.
words.example3: The community showed hostility towards the proposed construction project.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa taklif qilingan qurilish loyihasiga nisbatan dushmanlik ko'rsatdi.
extraExamples: His hostility towards criticism made it difficult to give him feedback.
There has been growing hostility towards immigration in some regions.
The new manager faced hostility towards his proposed changes.
Their hostility towards each other made teamwork nearly impossible.
The article examined public hostility towards certain government policies.
She tried to ease the hostility towards the merger among employees.
His hostility towards technology made adapting to new tools difficult.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning tanqidga nisbatan dushmanligi unga fikr-mulohaza berishni qiyinlashtirdi.
Ba'zi mintaqalarda immigratsiyaga nisbatan dushmanlik kuchaymoqda.
Yangi menejer o'zining taklif qilingan o'zgarishlariga nisbatan dushmanlikka duch keldi.
Ularning bir-biriga nisbatan dushmanligi jamoaviy ishni deyarli imkonsiz qildi.
Maqolada ba'zi davlat siyosatlariga nisbatan jamoatchilik dushmanligi o'rganildi.
U xodimlar orasida birlashishga nisbatan dushmanlikni yumshatishga harakat qildi.
Uning texnologiyaga nisbatan dushmanligi yangi vositalarga moslashishni qiyinlashtirdi.

words.definition: A possible consequence or meaning suggested rather than stated directly.
words.definitionUz: To'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytilmagan, lekin nazarda tutilgan oqibat yoki ma'no.
words.example1: The implication of his statement was that the project would be delayed.
words.example1Translation: Uning bayonotidagi ishora loyiha kechiktirilishini anglatardi.
words.example2: The new law has serious implications for small businesses.
words.example2Translation: Yangi qonun kichik bizneslar uchun jiddiy oqibatlarga ega.
words.example3: She didn't fully understand the implications of signing the contract.
words.example3Translation: U shartnomani imzolashning oqibatlarini to'liq tushunmadi.
extraExamples: The implications of climate change are far-reaching and complex.
His silence carried an implication of disapproval.
The study explores the implications of social media on teenage mental health.
There are legal implications to consider before making this decision.
The implication that she was lying upset her deeply.
They discussed the ethical implications of the new technology.
The economic implications of the policy will take years to fully understand.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o'zgarishining oqibatlari keng qamrovli va murakkabdir.
Uning sukunati rozi emasligiga ishora qildi.
Tadqiqot ijtimoiy tarmoqlarning o'smirlar ruhiy salomatligiga ta'siri oqibatlarini o'rganadi.
Bu qarorni qabul qilishdan oldin huquqiy oqibatlarni hisobga olish kerak.
Uning yolg'on gapirayotganiga ishora uni juda xafa qildi.
Ular yangi texnologiyaning axloqiy oqibatlarini muhokama qilishdi.
Siyosatning iqtisodiy oqibatlarini to'liq tushunish uchun yillar kerak bo'ladi.

words.definition: To devise a carefully structured strategy.
words.definitionUz: Ehtiyotkorlik bilan tuzilgan strategiya yoki rejani ishlab chiqish.
words.example1: The team met to formulate a plan for the upcoming product launch.
words.example1Translation: Jamoa kelgusi mahsulot taqdimoti uchun reja tuzish maqsadida uchrashdi.
words.example2: She took time to formulate a plan before approaching her boss about the raise.
words.example2Translation: U boshlig'iga maosh oshirish haqida murojaat qilishdan oldin reja tuzishga vaqt ajratdi.
words.example3: They formulated a plan to address the company's declining sales.
words.example3Translation: Ular kompaniyaning kamayib borayotgan sotuvlari muammosini hal qilish uchun reja ishlab chiqishdi.
extraExamples: It took several meetings to formulate a plan everyone agreed on.
The government formulated a plan to reduce unemployment over five years.
He formulated a plan to pay off his debt within two years.
The committee formulated a plan to improve public transportation.
She formulated a plan for studying that helped her pass the exam.
Engineers formulated a plan to fix the structural issues in the building.
The coach formulated a plan to improve the team's defense.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma rozi bo'lgan rejani tuzish uchun bir necha marta uchrashish kerak bo'ldi.
Hukumat besh yil ichida ishsizlikni kamaytirish uchun reja ishlab chiqdi.
U ikki yil ichida qarzini to'lash uchun reja tuzdi.
Komissiya jamoat transportini yaxshilash uchun reja ishlab chiqdi.
U imtihondan o'tishga yordam bergan o'qish rejasini tuzdi.
Muhandislar binodagi konstruktiv muammolarni tuzatish uchun reja ishlab chiqishdi.
Murabbiy jamoaning himoyasini yaxshilash uchun reja tuzdi.

words.definition: To do something spontaneously without forethought.
words.definitionUz: Oldindan o'ylab ko'rmasdan, to'satdan harakat qilish.
words.example1: She acted on impulse and bought the dress without checking the price.
words.example1Translation: U to'satdan harakat qilib, narxini tekshirmasdan ko'ylakni sotib oldi.
words.example2: He often acts on impulse, which sometimes gets him into trouble.
words.example2Translation: U ko'pincha o'ylamasdan harakat qiladi, bu esa ba'zan uni muammoga olib keladi.
words.example3: Try not to act on impulse when you're angry; take time to calm down first.
words.example3Translation: G'azablangan paytda o'ylamasdan harakat qilmaslikka harakat qiling; avval tinchlanish uchun vaqt ajrating.
extraExamples: They acted on impulse and booked a last-minute trip to the coast.
Acting on impulse, she quit her job without a backup plan.
He regretted acting on impulse and sending that angry email.
Investors who act on impulse often lose money in volatile markets.
She acted on impulse and signed up for the marathon the next day.
It's easy to act on impulse during an argument, but it rarely helps.
He acted on impulse and adopted a puppy from the shelter.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular to'satdan harakat qilib, qirg'oqqa oxirgi daqiqada sayohatni bron qilishdi.
O'ylamasdan harakat qilib, u zaxira rejasiz ishidan ketdi.
U o'sha g'azabli xatni yuborib, o'ylamasdan harakat qilganidan afsuslandi.
O'ylamasdan harakat qiladigan investorlar ko'pincha beqaror bozorlarda pul yo'qotishadi.
U to'satdan harakat qilib, ertasi kuni marafonga yozildi.
Bahs paytida o'ylamasdan harakat qilish oson, lekin bu kamdan-kam yordam beradi.
U to'satdan harakat qilib, boqimxonadan kuchukcha asrab oldi.

words.definition: Regardless of perspective or interpretation.
words.definitionUz: Qanday nuqtai nazardan qaralmasin, natija o'zgarmasligini bildiradi.
words.example1: However you look at it, the project was a failure.
words.example1Translation: Qanday qaramang ham, loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi.
words.example2: However you look at it, she made the right decision in the end.
words.example2Translation: Qanday qaramang ham, u oxir-oqibat to'g'ri qaror qabul qildi.
words.example3: However you look at it, the situation needs to change.
words.example3Translation: Qanday qaramang ham, vaziyat o'zgarishi kerak.
extraExamples: However you look at it, the team performed better than expected.
However you look at it, lying to your friends is never a good idea.
However you look at it, the company needs to cut costs somewhere.
However you look at it, he made a huge sacrifice for his family.
However you look at it, the results speak for themselves.
However you look at it, the new policy will affect everyone differently.
However you look at it, change is never easy.
extraExampleTranslations: Qanday qaramang ham, jamoa kutilganidan yaxshi natija ko'rsatdi.
Qanday qaramang ham, do'stlaringizga yolg'on gapirish hech qachon yaxshi fikr emas.
Qanday qaramang ham, kompaniya qayerdandir xarajatlarni kamaytirishi kerak.
Qanday qaramang ham, u oilasi uchun katta qurbonlik qildi.
Qanday qaramang ham, natijalar o'z-o'zidan gapiradi.
Qanday qaramang ham, yangi siyosat hammaga turlicha ta'sir qiladi.
Qanday qaramang ham, o'zgarish hech qachon oson emas.

words.definition: An unmet consumer need presenting a business opportunity.
words.definitionUz: Bozorda hali qondirilmagan ehtiyoj, bu esa biznes uchun imkoniyat yaratadi.
words.example1: She noticed a gap in the market for affordable organic skincare.
words.example1Translation: U arzon organik teri parvarishi mahsulotlari uchun bozordagi bo'shliqni payqab qoldi.
words.example2: Their startup found a gap in the market and quickly became successful.
words.example2Translation: Ularning startapi bozordagi bo'shliqni topib, tezda muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
words.example3: Identifying a gap in the market is the first step to launching a successful business.
words.example3Translation: Bozordagi bo'shliqni aniqlash muvaffaqiyatli biznes boshlashning birinchi qadamidir.
extraExamples: They spotted a gap in the market for plant-based fast food.
Entrepreneurs are always looking for a gap in the market to exploit.
The new app filled a gap in the market for budget travel planning.
Researching the industry helped them find a gap in the market.
There's a clear gap in the market for affordable childcare services.
The company grew rapidly after discovering a gap in the market for eco-friendly packaging.
A good business idea often starts with finding a gap in the market.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular o'simlik asosidagi fast-fud uchun bozordagi bo'shliqni payqab qolishdi.
Tadbirkorlar har doim foydalanish uchun bozordagi bo'shliqni qidirishadi.
Yangi ilova arzon sayohat rejalashtirish uchun bozordagi bo'shliqni to'ldirdi.
Sohani o'rganish ularga bozordagi bo'shliqni topishga yordam berdi.
Arzon bolalar parvarishi xizmatlari uchun bozorda aniq bo'shliq mavjud.
Kompaniya ekologik toza qadoqlash uchun bozordagi bo'shliqni topgandan keyin tez o'sdi.
Yaxshi biznes g'oyasi ko'pincha bozordagi bo'shliqni topishdan boshlanadi.

words.definition: Actions driven by sudden urges rather than rational consideration.
words.definitionUz: Aql bilan o'ylab ko'rilmagan, balki to'satdan paydo bo'lgan istak asosida qilingan xatti-harakat.
words.example1: His impulsive behaviour often led to regret later on.
words.example1Translation: Uning shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilishi ko'pincha keyinroq afsuslanishga olib kelardi.
words.example2: Therapists help clients understand the root causes of impulsive behaviour.
words.example2Translation: Terapevtlar mijozlarga shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilishning asosiy sabablarini tushunishga yordam berishadi.
words.example3: Impulsive behaviour in children can sometimes be a sign of underlying stress.
words.example3Translation: Bolalardagi shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilish ba'zan yashirin stressning belgisi bo'lishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Impulsive behaviour can damage relationships if left unchecked.
Her impulsive behaviour at work raised concerns among her colleagues.
Reducing impulsive behaviour often requires learning to pause before reacting.
Impulsive behaviour in spending can quickly lead to financial trouble.
The study examined impulsive behaviour among teenagers and risk-taking.
He worked on managing his impulsive behaviour after several mistakes at work.
Impulsive behaviour is sometimes linked to certain mental health conditions.
extraExampleTranslations: Nazoratsiz qoldirilsa, shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilish munosabatlarga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Uning ishdagi shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilishi hamkasblarini tashvishga soldi.
Shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilishni kamaytirish ko'pincha reaksiya bildirishdan oldin to'xtab o'ylashni o'rganishni talab qiladi.
Xarajatlardagi shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilish tezda moliyaviy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Tadqiqot o'smirlar orasidagi shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilish va xavf qabul qilishni o'rgandi.
Ishda bir necha xatodan keyin u shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilishini boshqarish ustida ishladi.
Shoshqaloqlik bilan harakat qilish ba'zan ma'lum ruhiy salomatlik holatlari bilan bog'liq bo'ladi.

words.definition: To appear lost in thought or mentally detached from the surroundings.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘zi olisga qaramoq — odamning o‘z fikrlariga berilib, atrofidagilardan ajralib qolgandek ko‘rinishidir.
words.example1: She had a faraway look in her eyes during the meeting.
words.example1Translation: U yig‘ilish paytida ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek edi.
words.example2: He sat by the window with a faraway look, thinking about his future.
words.example2Translation: U deraza yonida o‘tirib, kelajagi haqida o‘ylab ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek edi.
words.example3: The old man had a faraway look as he remembered his youth.
words.example3Translation: Chol yoshligini eslaganida ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: During the lecture, many students had a faraway look.
She often has a faraway look when she is composing music.
His faraway look made me wonder what he was thinking about.
The child had a faraway look while watching the clouds.
Even in a crowd, she sometimes has a faraway look.
A faraway look can mean someone is daydreaming.
He tried to hide his faraway look during the conversation.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma’ruzada ko‘p talabalar ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek edi.
U musiqa yozayotganda ko‘pincha ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek bo‘ladi.
Uning ko‘zlari olisga qarashi meni nima haqida o‘ylayotganini o‘ylantirdi.
Bola bulutlarga qarab ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek edi.
Gavjum joyda ham u ba’zida ko‘zlari olisga qaragandek bo‘ladi.
Ko‘zlar olisga qarashi odamning xayol surayotganini bildirishi mumkin.
U suhbat paytida ko‘zlari olisga qarashini yashirishga harakat qildi.

words.definition: Sharing the same difficult situation or problem as others.
words.definitionUz: Bir qayiqda — boshqalar bilan bir xil qiyin vaziyat yoki muammoni baham ko‘rishni bildiradi.
words.example1: We’re all in the same boat, so let’s work together.
words.example1Translation: Hammamiz bir qayiqdamiz, shuning uchun birgalikda ishlaylik.
words.example2: Students facing exams are all in the same boat.
words.example2Translation: Imtihonlarga tayyorlanayotgan talabalar hammasi bir qayiqda.
words.example3: During the economic crisis, many families were in the same boat.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodiy inqiroz paytida ko‘p oilalar bir qayiqda edi.
extraExamples: Don’t complain — we’re all in the same boat.
The two teams are in the same boat regarding budget cuts.
Being in the same boat creates a sense of solidarity.
Employees realized they were all in the same boat.
In tough times, it helps to remember we’re in the same boat.
Neighbors in the flooded area were all in the same boat.
We’re in the same boat, so let’s support each other.
extraExampleTranslations: Shikoyat qilma — hammamiz bir qayiqdamiz.
Ikki jamoa ham byudjet qisqartirilishi bo‘yicha bir qayiqda.
Bir qayiqda bo‘lish birdamlik tuyg‘usini yaratadi.
Xodimlar hammasi bir qayiqda ekanligini angladilar.
Qiyin paytlarda hammamiz bir qayiqda ekanligimizni eslash yordam beradi.
Suv bosgan hududda yashovchi qo‘shnilar hammasi bir qayiqda edi.
Biz bir qayiqdamiz, shuning uchun bir-birimizni qo‘llab-quvvatlaylik.

words.definition: To struggle to breathe, often due to shock, exhaustion, or intense emotion.
words.definitionUz: Nafas ololmay qiynalmoq — zarba, charchoq yoki kuchli his-tuyg‘u tufayli nafas olishda qiynalishni bildiradi.
words.example1: After running up the stairs, he was gasping for breath.
words.example1Translation: Zinadan yugurib chiqqach, u nafas ololmay qiynalardi.
words.example2: She gasped for breath when she heard the shocking news.
words.example2Translation: U dahshatli xabarni eshitgach, nafas ololmay qiynaldi.
words.example3: The swimmer was gasping for breath at the end of the race.
words.example3Translation: Suvchi musobaqa oxirida nafas ololmay qiynalardi.
extraExamples: He gasped for breath after laughing too hard.
The patient started gasping for breath suddenly.
She gasped for breath in the cold mountain air.
After the long hike, everyone was gasping for breath.
The news left her gasping for breath.
He tried to speak while gasping for breath.
Gasping for breath can be a sign of a serious problem.
extraExampleTranslations: U haddan tashqari qattiq kulgandan keyin nafas ololmay qiynaldi.
Bemorda birdan nafas ololmay qiyinchilik boshlandi.
U sovuq tog‘ havosida nafas ololmay qiynaldi.
Uzun sayohatdan keyin hammasi nafas ololmay qiynalardi.
Xabar uni nafas ololmay qoldirdi.
U nafas ololmay qiynalib gapirishga harakat qildi.
Nafas ololmay qiynalish jiddiy muammoning belgisi bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To sing a tune softly with closed lips, without words.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘shiqni xirillamoq — og‘izni yumib, so‘zsiz ohangni sekin kuylashdir.
words.example1: She was humming a song while cooking dinner.
words.example1Translation: U kechki ovqatni tayyorlayotib qo‘shiqni xirillardi.
words.example2: He often hums a song when he is happy.
words.example2Translation: U baxtli bo‘lganda ko‘pincha qo‘shiq xirillaydi.
words.example3: The child hummed a song to himself while playing.
words.example3Translation: Bola o‘ynab yurganida o‘zicha qo‘shiq xirillardi.
extraExamples: I caught myself humming a song from my childhood.
People hum songs when they are in a good mood.
She hummed a song under her breath during the meeting.
He hummed a tune while working on his project.
Humming a song can help reduce stress.
The old man sat on the bench humming a song.
It’s nice to hum a song while walking.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘zimni bolaligimdagi qo‘shiqni xirillayotganimni payqadim.
Odamlar yaxshi kayfiyatda bo‘lganda qo‘shiq xirillashadi.
U yig‘ilish paytida ovozini chiqarmay qo‘shiq xirillardi.
U loyihasi ustida ishlayotib ohang xirillardi.
Qo‘shiq xirillash stressni kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Chol skameykada o‘tirib qo‘shiq xirillardi.
Yurib ketayotib qo‘shiq xirillash juda yoqimli.

words.definition: To share private information with someone expecting it to be kept secret.
words.definitionUz: Maxfiy aytmoq — biror maxfiy ma’lumotni boshqa birovga aytish va uni sir saqlashini kutishdir.
words.example1: She told me the news in confidence.
words.example1Translation: U menga yangilikni maxfiy aytib berdi.
words.example2: He told his best friend the secret in confidence.
words.example2Translation: U eng yaqin do‘stiga sirni maxfiy aytib berdi.
words.example3: Please keep what I told you in confidence.
words.example3Translation: Iltimos, men aytgan narsani maxfiy saqla.
extraExamples: I told her my plans in confidence.
He shared his worries in confidence with his brother.
Never break someone’s confidence after they tell you something.
She told the story in confidence to her close friends.
Telling something in confidence shows trust.
The manager spoke to the employee in confidence.
I hope you will treat this information in confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: Men unga rejalarimni maxfiy aytib berdim.
U xavotirlarini ukasiga maxfiy aytib berdi.
Birov sizga biror narsani maxfiy aytgan bo‘lsa, hech qachon sirni oshkor qilmang.
U hikoyani yaqin do‘stlariga maxfiy aytib berdi.
Biror narsani maxfiy aytish ishonchni bildiradi.
Rahbar xodim bilan maxfiy gaplashdi.
Umid qilamanki, bu ma’lumotni maxfiy saqlaysiz.

words.definition: A route or program that allows quicker advancement or progress.
words.definitionUz: Tez yo‘l — tezroq oldinga siljish yoki taraqqiyotga imkon beradigan yo‘l yoki dastur.
words.example1: She was put on the fast track to promotion.
words.example1Translation: Uni lavozim oshishiga tez yo‘lga qo‘yishdi.
words.example2: The company offers a fast track program for talented graduates.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya qobiliyatli bitiruvchilar uchun tez yo‘l dasturini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: He took the fast track to success through hard work.
words.example3Translation: U qattiq mehnat orqali muvaffaqiyatga tez yo‘l bilan erishdi.
extraExamples: The fast track to university is through excellent grades.
Many young athletes are on the fast track to fame.
This course is a fast track to learning programming.
Being on the fast track comes with high pressure.
The government created a fast track for important projects.
She chose the fast track career path.
Fast track programs help accelerate professional growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Universitetga tez yo‘l — a’lo baholar orqali.
Ko‘p yosh sportchilar shuhratga tez yo‘lda.
Bu kurs dasturlashni tez o‘rganishning tez yo‘lidir.
Tez yo‘lda bo‘lish yuqori bosim bilan birga keladi.
Hukumat muhim loyihalar uchun tez yo‘l yaratdi.
U tez rivojlanadigan kar’yera yo‘lini tanladi.
Tez yo‘l dasturlari professional o‘sishni tezlashtiradi.

words.definition: Near or close to a particular place, amount, or time.
words.definitionUz: Yaqinida — muayyan joy, miqdor yoki vaqtga yaqin bo‘lishni bildiradi.
words.example1: The hotel is in the vicinity of the airport.
words.example1Translation: Mehmonxona aeroport yaqinida joylashgan.
words.example2: The price is in the vicinity of 500 dollars.
words.example2Translation: Narxi 500 dollarga yaqin.
words.example3: They live in the vicinity of the city center.
words.example3Translation: Ular shahar markazi yaqinida yashashadi.
extraExamples: There are several parks in the vicinity of the school.
The temperature was in the vicinity of 30 degrees.
The new factory is in the vicinity of the river.
We found a good restaurant in the vicinity.
The event will take place in the vicinity of March.
Housing prices in the vicinity have increased.
Search in the vicinity of the accident site.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab yaqinida bir nechta bog‘lar bor.
Harorat 30 darajaga yaqin edi.
Yangi zavod daryo yaqinida joylashgan.
Biz yaqin atrofda yaxshi restoran topdik.
Tadbir mart oyiga yaqin o‘tkaziladi.
Yaqin atrofda uy-joy narxlari oshdi.
Hodisa sodir bo‘lgan joy yaqinida qidiruv o‘tkazing.

words.definition: An admission that one has natural limitations, makes mistakes, or has weaknesses.
words.definitionUz: Men faqat insomman — odamning tabiiy cheklovlari, xatolari yoki zaif tomonlari borligini tan olishdir.
words.example1: I forgot your birthday — I am only human.
words.example1Translation: Tug‘ilgan kuningni unutibman — men faqat insomman.
words.example2: She apologized saying, “I am only human.”
words.example2Translation: U “Men faqat insomman” deb kechirim so‘radi.
words.example3: We all make mistakes; after all, we are only human.
words.example3Translation: Hammamiz xato qilamiz, chunki biz faqat insomiz.
extraExamples: I am only human and sometimes get tired.
He said “I am only human” after losing his temper.
We can’t be perfect — we are only human.
I am only human, so I need rest too.
She reminded herself, “I am only human.”
Even experts say “I am only human” sometimes.
Being only human means we need understanding.
extraExampleTranslations: Men faqat insomman va ba’zida charchayman.
U g‘azablanganidan keyin “Men faqat insomman” dedi.
Biz mukammal bo‘la olmaymiz — biz faqat insomiz.
Men ham faqat insomman, shuning uchun dam olishim kerak.
U o‘ziga “Men faqat insomman” deb eslatdi.
Hatto mutaxassislar ham ba’zida “Men faqat insomman” deyishadi.
Faqat inson bo‘lish tushunishni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Careful and attentive observation or looking.
words.definitionUz: Ehtiyotkor nigoh — diqqatli va ehtiyotkorlik bilan kuzatish yoki qarash.
words.example1: The teacher kept a watchful gaze on the students during the exam.
words.example1Translation: O‘qituvchi imtihon paytida o‘quvchilarni ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatib turdi.
words.example2: Under the watchful gaze of her parents, she felt safe.
words.example2Translation: Ota-onasining ehtiyotkor nigohi ostida u o‘zini xavfsiz his qildi.
words.example3: The security guard maintained a watchful gaze over the area.
words.example3Translation: Xavfsizlik qo‘riqchisi hududni ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatib turardi.
extraExamples: The mother had a watchful gaze on her young child.
A watchful gaze is important in dangerous situations.
He felt uncomfortable under her watchful gaze.
The coach kept a watchful gaze during training.
Animals in the wild have a watchful gaze for predators.
The detective observed with a watchful gaze.
A watchful gaze helps prevent accidents.
extraExampleTranslations: Ona kichik bolasini ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatardi.
Xavfli vaziyatlarda ehtiyotkor nigoh muhim.
Uning ehtiyotkor nigohi ostida u o‘zini noqulay his qildi.
Murabbiy mashg‘ulot paytida ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatib turardi.
Yovvoyi tabiatdagi hayvonlar yirtqichlarni ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatishadi.
Tergovchi ehtiyotkor nigoh bilan kuzatdi.
Ehtiyotkor nigoh baxtsiz hodisalarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: To mark an occasion with great enthusiasm, scale, and celebration.
words.definitionUz: Katta miqyosda nishonlamoq — biror voqeani katta shodiyonalar, katta miqyos va zavq bilan nishonlashdir.
words.example1: They celebrated their wedding in a big way.
words.example1Translation: Ular to‘ylarini katta miqyosda nishonladilar.
words.example2: The company celebrated its anniversary in a big way.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya yubileyini katta miqyosda nishonladi.
words.example3: We should celebrate this success in a big way!
words.example3Translation: Bu muvaffaqiyatni katta miqyosda nishonlashimiz kerak!
extraExamples: The town celebrated the festival in a big way.
She celebrated her promotion in a big way with friends.
They always celebrate birthdays in a big way.
The country celebrated independence in a big way.
The team celebrated their victory in a big way.
Let’s celebrate this achievement in a big way.
The family celebrated the new baby in a big way.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar bayramni katta miqyosda nishonladi.
U ko‘tarilishini do‘stlari bilan katta miqyosda nishonladi.
Ular tug‘ilgan kunlarni har doim katta miqyosda nishonlashadi.
Mamlakat mustaqillikni katta miqyosda nishonladi.
Jamoa g‘alabasini katta miqyosda nishonladi.
Keling, bu yutuqni katta miqyosda nishonlaylik.
Oila yangi chaqaloqni katta miqyosda nishonladi.

words.definition: Extremely quickly or suddenly.
words.definitionUz: Bir zumda — juda tez yoki birdaniga sodir bo‘lishni bildiradi.
words.example1: The thief disappeared in a flash.
words.example1Translation: O‘g‘ri bir zumda g‘oyib bo‘ldi.
words.example2: She solved the problem in a flash.
words.example2Translation: U muammoni bir zumda hal qildi.
words.example3: The summer vacation passed in a flash.
words.example3Translation: Yozgi ta’til bir zumda o‘tib ketdi.
extraExamples: He changed his mind in a flash.
The accident happened in a flash.
She replied in a flash to the email.
Everything can change in a flash.
The lights went out in a flash.
He finished the race in a flash.
Memories came back in a flash.
extraExampleTranslations: U fikrini bir zumda o‘zgartirdi.
Hodisa bir zumda sodir bo‘ldi.
U emailga bir zumda javob berdi.
Hamma narsa bir zumda o‘zgarishi mumkin.
Chiroqlar bir zumda o‘chdi.
U musobaqani bir zumda yakunladi.
Xotiralar bir zumda qaytdi.

words.definition: The initial and undeveloped form of a thought or concept.
words.definitionUz: G‘oyaning urug‘i — fikr yoki tushunchaning dastlabki, hali rivojlanmagan shakli.
words.example1: The germ of an idea came to him while walking in the park.
words.example1Translation: G‘oyaning urug‘i unga parkda yurayotganda keldi.
words.example2: That conversation planted the germ of an idea in her mind.
words.example2Translation: O‘sha suhbat uning ongida g‘oyaning urug‘ini ekdi.
words.example3: From the germ of an idea, a successful business grew.
words.example3Translation: G‘oyaning urug‘idan muvaffaqiyatli biznes o‘sib chiqdi.
extraExamples: The germ of an idea is often the most important part.
He developed the germ of an idea into a full plan.
The germ of an idea sparked a major innovation.
Many great inventions start with the germ of an idea.
She recognized the germ of an idea in his words.
The germ of an idea needs nurturing to grow.
That meeting gave us the germ of an idea.
extraExampleTranslations: G‘oyaning urug‘i ko‘pincha eng muhim qismdir.
U g‘oyaning urug‘ini to‘liq rejaga aylantirdi.
G‘oyaning urug‘i katta innovatsiyaga sabab bo‘ldi.
Ko‘p buyuk ixtirolar g‘oyaning urug‘idan boshlanadi.
U uning so‘zlarida g‘oyaning urug‘ini payqadi.
G‘oyaning urug‘ini o‘stirish uchun parvarish kerak.
O‘sha yig‘ilish bizga g‘oyaning urug‘ini berdi.

words.word: A force to be reckoned with
words.definition: A person, team, or entity with significant power, influence, or ability.
words.definitionUz: Hisobga olinadigan kuch — katta kuch, ta’sir yoki qobiliyatga ega shaxs, jamoa yoki tashkilot.
words.example1: The new player is a force to be reckoned with.
words.example1Translation: Yangi o‘yinchi hisobga olinadigan kuch.
words.example2: This company has become a force to be reckoned with in the industry.
words.example2Translation: Bu kompaniya sanoatda hisobga olinadigan kuchga aylandi.
words.example3: She is a force to be reckoned with in politics.
words.example3Translation: U siyosatda hisobga olinadigan kuch.
extraExamples: The team proved they are a force to be reckoned with.
His intelligence makes him a force to be reckoned with.
This technology is a force to be reckoned with.
Don’t underestimate her — she is a force to be reckoned with.
The small country became a force to be reckoned with economically.
The new startup is quickly becoming a force to be reckoned with.
In sports, he is definitely a force to be reckoned with.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa o‘zlarini hisobga olinadigan kuch ekanligini isbotladi.
Uning aqliy qobiliyati uni hisobga olinadigan kuchga aylantiradi.
Bu texnologiya hisobga olinadigan kuchdir.
Uni kamsitmang — u hisobga olinadigan kuch.
Kichik mamlakat iqtisodiy jihatdan hisobga olinadigan kuchga aylandi.
Yangi startap tezda hisobga olinadigan kuchga aylanmoqda.
Sportda u aniq hisobga olinadigan kuch.

words.definition: Assistance provided to relieve human suffering, especially in crises or disasters.
words.definitionUz: Insonparvarlik yordami — inqiroz yoki falokat paytida inson azobini yengillashtirish uchun ko‘rsatiladigan yordam.
words.example1: Many countries sent humanitarian aid to the earthquake victims.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p mamlakatlar zilzila qurbonlariga insonparvarlik yordamini yubordi.
words.example2: Humanitarian aid includes food, medicine, and shelter.
words.example2Translation: Insonparvarlik yordami oziq-ovqat, dori-darmon va boshpana o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: The organization provides humanitarian aid to refugees.
words.example3Translation: Tashkilot qochqinlarga insonparvarlik yordamini ko‘rsatadi.
extraExamples: Humanitarian aid is crucial in war zones.
The government increased humanitarian aid to the affected region.
Delivering humanitarian aid can be dangerous.
Humanitarian aid helps save lives during natural disasters.
International humanitarian aid reached the flood victims.
They volunteer to distribute humanitarian aid.
Humanitarian aid should be given without political conditions.
extraExampleTranslations: Urush zonalarida insonparvarlik yordami juda muhim.
Hukumat zarar ko‘rgan hududga insonparvarlik yordamini oshirdi.
Insonparvarlik yordamini yetkazish xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Insonparvarlik yordami tabiiy ofatlar paytida hayotlarni saqlab qoladi.
Xalqaro insonparvarlik yordami suv bosgan hudud qurbonlariga yetib bordi.
Ular insonparvarlik yordamini tarqatishda ko‘ngilli bo‘lishadi.
Insonparvarlik yordami siyosiy shartlarsiz berilishi kerak.

words.definition: To integrate something as part of a larger whole.
words.definitionUz: Ichiga kiritmoq / qo‘shmoq — biror narsani kattaroq butunning bir qismi sifatida birlashtirish.
words.example1: The new ideas were incorporated into the project plan.
words.example1Translation: Yangi g‘oyalar loyiha rejasiga kiritildi.
words.example2: We need to incorporate feedback into the next version.
words.example2Translation: Keyingi versiyaga fikr-mulohazalarni kiritishimiz kerak.
words.example3: Traditional elements were incorporated into the modern design.
words.example3Translation: An’anaviy elementlar zamonaviy dizaynga kiritildi.
extraExamples: The company will incorporate new technology into its products.
She incorporated healthy habits into her daily routine.
The curriculum incorporates both theory and practice.
They incorporated sustainability into their business model.
The story incorporated real historical events.
Please incorporate these changes into the document.
The team incorporated everyone’s suggestions.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya o‘z mahsulotlariga yangi texnologiyani kiritadi.
U sog‘lom odatlarni kundalik tartibiga kiritdi.
Dastur nazariya va amaliyotni birlashtiradi.
Ular barqarorlikni biznes modeliga kiritdilar.
Hikoya haqiqiy tarixiy voqealarni o‘z ichiga oldi.
Iltimos, bu o‘zgarishlarni hujjatga kiriting.
Jamoa har bir insonning takliflarini kiritdi.

words.definition: To be consistent with rules, expectations, or standards.
words.definitionUz: Mos kelmoq — qoidalar, kutishlar yoki standartlarga mos kelishni bildiradi.
words.example1: Your actions should be in line with company policy.
words.example1Translation: Sizning harakatlaringiz kompaniya siyosatiga mos bo‘lishi kerak.
words.example2: The decision is in line with our previous agreement.
words.example2Translation: Bu qaror oldingi kelishuvimizga mos keladi.
words.example3: The results are in line with our expectations.
words.example3Translation: Natijalar bizning kutganlarimizga mos keladi.
extraExamples: The new law is in line with international standards.
Her behavior was not in line with school rules.
We made changes to be in line with customer demands.
The design is in line with current trends.
His views are in line with modern thinking.
Everything must be in line with safety regulations.
The budget is in line with last year’s figures.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi qonun xalqaro standartlarga mos keladi.
Uning xatti-harakati maktab qoidalariga mos emas edi.
Biz mijozlar talablariga mos kelishi uchun o‘zgarishlar kiritdik.
Dizayn hozirgi trendlarga mos keladi.
Uning qarashlari zamonaviy fikrlashga mos keladi.
Hamma narsa xavfsizlik qoidalariga mos bo‘lishi kerak.
Byudjet o‘tgan yilgi ko‘rsatkichlarga mos keladi.

words.definition: To become organized, focused, and act responsibly.
words.definitionUz: O‘zingizni tartibga solmoq — tartibli, diqqatli bo‘lib, mas’uliyat bilan harakat qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: You need to get your act together before the exams.
words.example1Translation: Imtihonlardan oldin o‘zingni tartibga solishing kerak.
words.example2: It’s time to get your act together and find a job.
words.example2Translation: O‘zingni tartibga solib, ish topish vaqti keldi.
words.example3: The team needs to get their act together to win the match.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa o‘yinda g‘alaba qozonish uchun o‘zlarini tartibga solishi kerak.
extraExamples: Stop wasting time and get your act together.
She finally got her act together and finished the project.
He needs to get his act together before it’s too late.
The company must get its act together to survive.
Getting your act together improves productivity.
Parents often tell teenagers to get their act together.
It took him months to get his act together after the breakup.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqtni behuda sarflamang va o‘zingizni tartibga soling.
U nihoyat o‘zini tartibga solib, loyihani yakunladi.
U kech bo‘lmasdan oldin o‘zini tartibga solishi kerak.
Kompaniya omon qolish uchun o‘zini tartibga solishi kerak.
O‘zingizni tartibga solish samaradorlikni oshiradi.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha o‘smirlarga o‘zlarini tartibga solishni aytishadi.
Ajralishdan keyin u o‘zini tartibga solishga bir necha oy sarfladi.

words.definition: Modest and not arrogant, despite achievements or success.
words.definitionUz: Kamtarin — yutuqlari bo‘lsa ham mag‘rurlanmaydigan, oddiy va sodda.
words.example1: Despite his success, he remained humble.
words.example1Translation: Muvaffaqiyatlariga qaramay, u kamtarin bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: She is a humble person who helps others quietly.
words.example2Translation: U boshqalarga jimgina yordam beradigan kamtarin odam.
words.example3: He gave a humble speech after winning the award.
words.example3Translation: Mukofotni olgandan keyin u kamtarin nutq so‘zladi.
extraExamples: Humble people are often more respected.
She comes from a humble background.
It is important to stay humble in success.
His humble attitude won everyone’s heart.
The humble meal was delicious and satisfying.
He lives a humble life despite being wealthy.
Being humble is a great virtue.
extraExampleTranslations: Kamtarin odamlar ko‘pincha ko‘proq hurmatga sazovor bo‘lishadi.
U oddiy oiladan chiqqan.
Muvaffaqiyatda kamtarin bo‘lib qolish muhim.
Uning kamtarin munosabati hammanning qalbini zabt etdi.
Oddiy ovqat mazali va to‘ydiruvchi edi.
Boy bo‘lishiga qaramay, u oddiy hayot kechiradi.
Kamtarinlik — buyuk fazilat.

words.definition: Despite the presence of difficulty, danger, or opposition.
words.definitionUz: Qarshisida — qiyinchilik, xavf yoki qarshilikka qaramay harakat qilishni bildiradi.
words.example1: She remained calm in the face of danger.
words.example1Translation: U xavf qarshisida ham tinch qoldi.
words.example2: They continued working in the face of many challenges.
words.example2Translation: Ular ko‘p qiyinchiliklar qarshisida ham ishlashni davom ettirdilar.
words.example3: In the face of criticism, he stood by his beliefs.
words.example3Translation: Tanqid qarshisida u o‘z e’tiqodlaridan voz kechmadi.
extraExamples: In the face of adversity, true character is revealed.
The team showed courage in the face of defeat.
She smiled in the face of hardship.
In the face of uncertainty, we must stay united.
He fought for justice in the face of opposition.
In the face of failure, he tried again.
The country stood strong in the face of crisis.
extraExampleTranslations: Qiyinchilik qarshisida haqiqiy xarakter namoyon bo‘ladi.
Jamoa mag‘lubiyat qarshisida jasorat ko‘rsatdi.
U qiyinchilik qarshisida ham tabassum qildi.
Noaniqlik qarshisida biz birlashib turishimiz kerak.
U qarshilikka qaramay adolat uchun kurashdi.
Muvaffaqiyatsizlik qarshisida u yana urinib ko‘rdi.
Mamlakat inqiroz qarshisida mustahkam turdi.

words.definition: A fast-paced, ambitious, and often stressful lifestyle.
words.definitionUz: Tez yo‘l — tez sur’atda, shuhratparast va ko‘pincha stressli turmush tarzi.
words.example1: He left the fast lane of city life for a quieter village.
words.example1Translation: U shahar hayotining tez yo‘lidan voz kechib, tinchroq qishloqqa ko‘chdi.
words.example2: Working in finance puts you in the fast lane.
words.example2Translation: Moliyaviy sohada ishlash sizni tez yo‘lga chiqaradi.
words.example3: She enjoys the excitement of the fast lane.
words.example3Translation: U tez yo‘lning hayajonini yoqtiradi.
extraExamples: The fast lane is not for everyone.
Living in the fast lane can lead to burnout.
He thrived in the fast lane of the tech industry.
Many young professionals want to be in the fast lane.
The fast lane comes with high rewards and high risks.
She decided to slow down from the fast lane.
Success in the fast lane requires dedication.
extraExampleTranslations: Tez yo‘l har kim uchun emas.
Tez yo‘lda yashash ishdan charchashga olib kelishi mumkin.
U texnologiya sanoatining tez yo‘lida muvaffaqiyat qozondi.
Ko‘p yosh mutaxassislar tez yo‘lda bo‘lishni xohlashadi.
Tez yo‘l katta mukofotlar va katta xavflar bilan birga keladi.
U tez yo‘ldan sekinlashishga qaror qildi.
Tez yo‘lda muvaffaqiyat sadoqatni talab qiladi.

words.definition: To suffer substantial financial damage or loss.
words.definitionUz: Katta zarar ko‘rmoq — katta miqdorda moliyaviy zarar yoki yo‘qotishga duch kelish.
words.example1: The company incurred huge losses during the pandemic.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya pandemiya davrida katta zarar ko‘rdi.
words.example2: Investors incurred huge losses when the stock market crashed.
words.example2Translation: Birja qulaganda investorlar katta zarar ko‘rishdi.
words.example3: The restaurant incurred huge losses due to bad management.
words.example3Translation: Restoran yomon boshqaruv tufayli katta zarar ko‘rdi.
extraExamples: Farmers incurred huge losses because of the drought.
The airline incurred huge losses last year.
Avoid investments that might incur huge losses.
The project incurred huge losses due to delays.
Many businesses incurred huge losses during the crisis.
He incurred huge losses from poor financial decisions.
The team incurred huge losses in the final match.
extraExampleTranslations: Fermerlar qurg‘oqchilik tufayli katta zarar ko‘rishdi.
Aviakompaniya o‘tgan yili katta zarar ko‘rdi.
Katta zarar keltirishi mumkin bo‘lgan investitsiyalardan qoching.
Loyiha kechikishlar tufayli katta zarar ko‘rdi.
Ko‘p korxonalar inqiroz paytida katta zarar ko‘rdi.
U yomon moliyaviy qarorlar tufayli katta zarar ko‘rdi.
Jamoa final o‘yinida katta mag‘lubiyatga uchradi.

words.definition: To criticize by identifying flaws or mistakes.
words.definitionUz: Ayblamoq / kamchilik topmoq — biror kishi yoki narsada nuqson yoki xatoni topib tanqid qilish.
words.example1: He always finds fault with my work.
words.example1Translation: U har doim mening ishimdan kamchilik topadi.
words.example2: Try not to find fault with everything.
words.example2Translation: Hamma narsadan kamchilik topishga urinmang.
words.example3: She found fault with the hotel service.
words.example3Translation: U mehmonxona xizmatidan kamchilik topdi.
extraExamples: It’s easy to find fault with others.
The boss found fault with every small detail.
Don’t find fault with her efforts.
He found fault with the new policy.
Some people constantly find fault with everything.
Finding fault with small things wastes time.
She never finds fault with her children’s attempts.
extraExampleTranslations: Boshqalardan kamchilik topish oson.
Rahbar har bir mayda detallardan kamchilik topardi.
Uning harakatlaridan kamchilik topmang.
U yangi siyosatdan kamchilik topdi.
Ba’zi odamlar hamma narsadan doimiy kamchilik topishadi.
Mayda narsalardan kamchilik topish vaqtni behuda sarflaydi.
U bolalarining urinishi uchun hech qachon kamchilik topmaydi.

words.definition: At an early stage of development.
words.definitionUz: Boshlang‘ich bosqichida — rivojlanishning dastlabki bosqichida bo‘lish.
words.example1: The technology is still in its infancy.
words.example1Translation: Texnologiya hali boshlang‘ich bosqichida.
words.example2: The project is in its infancy, so we need more time.
words.example2Translation: Loyiha boshlang‘ich bosqichida, shuning uchun ko‘proq vaqt kerak.
words.example3: Artificial intelligence was in its infancy 20 years ago.
words.example3Translation: 20 yil oldin sun’iy intellekt boshlang‘ich bosqichida edi.
extraExamples: The company is in its infancy but growing fast.
Renewable energy was in its infancy a decade ago.
The idea is still in its infancy.
Education reform is in its infancy in this country.
The research is in its infancy and needs more funding.
Social media was in its infancy when it first started.
The movement is in its infancy but gaining momentum.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya hali boshlang‘ich bosqichida, lekin tez o‘smoqda.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiya o‘n yil oldin boshlang‘ich bosqichida edi.
G‘oya hali boshlang‘ich bosqichida.
Ta’lim islohoti bu mamlakatda boshlang‘ich bosqichida.
Tadqiqot hali boshlang‘ich bosqichida va ko‘proq mablag‘ talab qiladi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar paydo bo‘lganda boshlang‘ich bosqichida edi.
Harakat hali boshlang‘ich bosqichida, lekin kuchaymoqda.

words.definition: To achieve success despite starting from a poor or ordinary background.
words.definitionUz: Oddiy boshlanishdan ko‘tarilmoq — oddiy yoki kambag‘al oiladan boshlab muvaffaqiyatga erishish.
words.example1: She rose from humble beginnings to become a famous singer.
words.example1Translation: U oddiy oiladan boshlab mashhur qo‘shiqchi bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Many successful entrepreneurs rose from humble beginnings.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p muvaffaqiyatli tadbirkorlar oddiy boshlanishdan ko‘tarilgan.
words.example3: He rose from humble beginnings through hard work and determination.
words.example3Translation: U qattiq mehnat va qat’iyat orqali oddiy boshlanishdan ko‘tarildi.
extraExamples: The president rose from humble beginnings.
Stories of people who rise from humble beginnings inspire us.
She rose from humble beginnings to lead the company.
Rising from humble beginnings requires great effort.
His journey from humble beginnings is remarkable.
Many athletes rose from humble beginnings.
The book tells the story of rising from humble beginnings.
extraExampleTranslations: Prezident oddiy oiladan ko‘tarilgan.
Oddiy oiladan ko‘tarilgan odamlar haqidagi hikoyalar bizni ilhomlantiradi.
U oddiy oiladan boshlab kompaniyani boshqarish darajasiga ko‘tarildi.
Oddiy oiladan ko‘tarilish katta mehnatni talab qiladi.
Uning oddiy oiladan boshlangan yo‘li hayratlanarli.
Ko‘p sportchilar oddiy oiladan ko‘tarilgan.
Kitob oddiy oiladan ko‘tarilish haqida hikoya qiladi.

words.definition: An illness that cannot be cured by current medical treatments.
words.definitionUz: Davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasallik — hozirgi tibbiyot bilan butunlay davolanmaydigan kasallik.
words.example1: He was diagnosed with an incurable disease.
words.example1Translation: Unga davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasallik tashxisi qo‘yildi.
words.example2: Research is ongoing to find cures for incurable diseases.
words.example2Translation: Davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalliklarni davolash uchun tadqiqotlar davom etmoqda.
words.example3: Living with an incurable disease requires strength and support.
words.example3Translation: Davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasallik bilan yashash kuch va qo‘llab-quvvatlashni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Some cancers are still considered incurable.
She faces her incurable disease with courage.
Advances in medicine may one day cure currently incurable diseases.
Patients with incurable diseases need special care.
The doctor explained that it was an incurable disease.
Hope remains even with incurable diseases.
Many people live long lives despite incurable diseases.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba’zi saraton turlari hali ham davolab bo‘lmaydigan hisoblanadi.
U davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalligiga jasorat bilan qarshi turadi.
Tibbiyotdagi yutuqlar bir kun kelib hozirgi davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalliklarni davolashi mumkin.
Davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalligi bor bemorlar maxsus parvarishga muhtoj.
Shifokor bu davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasallik ekanligini tushuntirdi.
Davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalliklarda ham umid saqlanadi.
Ko‘p odamlar davolab bo‘lmaydigan kasalliklarga qaramay uzoq umr ko‘rishadi.

words.definition: To demonstrate modesty and lack of arrogance.
words.definitionUz: Kamtarlik ko‘rsatmoq — mag‘rurlanmasdan, oddiy va kamtar bo‘lishni namoyon etish.
words.example1: Even after winning, he showed humility.
words.example1Translation: G‘alaba qozongandan keyin ham u kamtarlik ko‘rsatdi.
words.example2: She always shows humility when receiving praise.
words.example2Translation: U maqtov eshitganda har doim kamtarlik ko‘rsatadi.
words.example3: Showing humility earns respect from others.
words.example3Translation: Kamtarlik ko‘rsatish boshqalarning hurmatini qozonadi.
extraExamples: Leaders should show humility.
He showed great humility in accepting the award.
Showing humility is a sign of strength.
The teacher showed humility by admitting her mistake.
Successful people often show humility.
It is important to show humility in victory.
She showed humility despite her achievements.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbarlar kamtarlik ko‘rsatishlari kerak.
U mukofotni qabul qilayotganda katta kamtarlik ko‘rsatdi.
Kamtarlik ko‘rsatish kuch belgisi.
O‘qituvchi xatosini tan olish orqali kamtarlik ko‘rsatdi.
Muvaffaqiyatli odamlar ko‘pincha kamtarlik ko‘rsatishadi.
G‘alabada kamtarlik ko‘rsatish muhim.
U yutuqlariga qaramay kamtarlik ko‘rsatdi.

words.definition: To express suppressed feelings or worries for emotional relief.
words.definitionUz: Ichingizdagi og‘rinchni aytib tashlamoq — uzoq vaqt ichingizda saqlab yurgan his-tuyg‘u yoki tashvishlarni aytib, yengillashish.
words.example1: I felt better after getting my worries off my chest.
words.example1Translation: Tashvishlarimni aytib tashlagach, o‘zimni yengil his qildim.
words.example2: She needed to get something off her chest about the argument.
words.example2Translation: U janjal haqida ichidagi og‘rinchni aytib tashlashi kerak edi.
words.example3: Talking to a friend helps get things off your chest.
words.example3Translation: Do‘st bilan gaplashish ichingizdagilarni aytib tashlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: He finally got the truth off his chest.
Getting it off your chest can relieve stress.
She got her feelings off her chest during the conversation.
It’s healthy to get things off your chest.
I need to get something off my chest.
After getting it off his chest, he felt much lighter.
Don’t keep it inside — get it off your chest.
extraExampleTranslations: U nihoyat haqiqatni aytib tashladi.
Ichingizdagilarni aytib tashlash stressni yengillashtirishi mumkin.
U suhbat davomida his-tuyg‘ularini aytib tashladi.
Ichingizdagilarni aytib tashlash sog‘lomdir.
Men ichimdagi bir narsani aytib tashlashim kerak.
Ichidagini aytib tashlagach, u o‘zini ancha yengil his qildi.
Ichingizda saqlamang — aytib tashlang.

words.definition: An outward appearance of not caring or being uninterested.
words.definitionUz: Loqaydlik havosi — biror narsaga qiziqmaslik yoki parvo qilmaslikni ko‘rsatuvchi tashqi ko‘rinish.
words.example1: He responded with an air of indifference.
words.example1Translation: U loqaydlik havosi bilan javob berdi.
words.example2: She faced the criticism with an air of indifference.
words.example2Translation: U tanqidni loqaydlik havosi bilan qabul qildi.
words.example3: His air of indifference hid his true feelings.
words.example3Translation: Uning loqaydlik havosi haqiqiy his-tuyg‘ularini yashirardi.
extraExamples: The teacher spoke with an air of indifference.
She maintained an air of indifference during the argument.
His air of indifference annoyed his friends.
An air of indifference can be a defense mechanism.
She listened with an air of indifference.
The boss listened to the complaint with an air of indifference.
Beneath her air of indifference, she was deeply hurt.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi loqaydlik havosi bilan gapirdi.
U bahs paytida loqaydlik havosini saqlab qoldi.
Uning loqaydlik havosi do‘stlarini bezovta qildi.
Loqaydlik havosi himoya mexanizmi bo‘lishi mumkin.
U loqaydlik havosi bilan tingladi.
Rahbar shikoyatni loqaydlik havosi bilan tingladi.
Loqaydlik havosi ostida u chuqur xafa edi.

words.definition: To have a strong desire or ambition for success, knowledge, or achievement.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga chanqoq bo‘lmoq — muvaffaqiyat, bilim yoki yutuqqa kuchli intilish va ishtiyoqni bildiradi.
words.example1: She is hungry for success in her career.
words.example1Translation: U kar’yerasida muvaffaqiyatga chanqoq.
words.example2: The young team is hungry for victory.
words.example2Translation: Yosh jamoa g‘alabaga chanqoq.
words.example3: Students who are hungry for knowledge learn faster.
words.example3Translation: Bilimga chanqoq talabalar tezroq o‘rganishadi.
extraExamples: He is hungry for new challenges.
The players are hungry for the championship title.
Be hungry for improvement every day.
She is hungry for recognition of her work.
Entrepreneurs are often hungry for innovation.
The team showed they were hungry for success.
Stay hungry for learning throughout life.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi sinovlarga chanqoq.
O‘yinchilar chempionlik unvoniga chanqoq.
Har kuni o‘sishga chanqoq bo‘ling.
U o‘z ishining e’tirof etilishiga chanqoq.
Tadbirkorlar ko‘pincha innovatsiyaga chanqoq bo‘lishadi.
Jamoa muvaffaqiyatga chanqoqligini ko‘rsatdi.
Butun umr davomida o‘rganishga chanqoq bo‘ling.

words.definition: Separately or without interaction with others.
words.definitionUz: Yolg‘izlikda / Alohida — boshqalar bilan aloqasiz, yolg‘iz yoki alohida holatda.
words.example1: The patient was kept in isolation for two weeks.
words.example1Translation: Bemorni ikki hafta yolg‘izlikda saqlashdi.
words.example2: These issues cannot be solved in isolation.
words.example2Translation: Bu muammolarni yolg‘izlikda hal qilib bo‘lmaydi.
words.example3: The researcher studied the phenomenon in isolation.
words.example3Translation: Tadqiqotchi hodisani alohida o‘rgandi.
extraExamples: Living in isolation can affect mental health.
The decision was made in isolation from the team.
Problems should not be considered in isolation.
She spent the weekend in isolation to focus.
In isolation, the numbers look different.
The country developed the vaccine in isolation.
Working in isolation can reduce creativity.
extraExampleTranslations: Yolg‘izlikda yashash ruhiy salomatlikka ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Qaror jamoasiz yolg‘izlikda qabul qilindi.
Muammolarni alohida ko‘rib chiqmaslik kerak.
U diqqatni jamlash uchun dam olish kunlarini yolg‘izlikda o‘tkazdi.
Yolg‘izlikda raqamlar boshqacha ko‘rinadi.
Mamlakat vaksinani alohida ishlab chiqdi.
Yolg‘izlikda ishlash ijodkorlikni pasaytirishi mumkin.

words.definition: Supporting or approving of something.
words.definitionUz: Tarafdor bo‘lish — biror narsani qo‘llab-quvvatlash yoki ma’qullashni bildiradi.
words.example1: Most people are in favour of the new park.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘pchilik yangi park tarafdori.
words.example2: I’m not in favour of changing the rules now.
words.example2Translation: Men hozir qoidalarni o‘zgartirish tarafdori emasman.
words.example3: She spoke strongly in favour of the proposal.
words.example3Translation: U taklifni qattiq qo‘llab-quvvatladi.
extraExamples: Are you in favour of early elections?
The committee is in favour of the project.
Public opinion is clearly in favour of reform.
I’m in favour of trying something new.
Parents are mostly in favour of longer holidays.
He declared himself in favour of the decision.
The vote was in favour of the motion.
extraExampleTranslations: Erta saylovlar tarafdorimisiz?
Qo‘mita loyiha tarafdori.
Jamoatchilik fikri islohotni aniq qo‘llab-quvvatlamoqda.
Men yangi narsani sinab ko‘rish tarafdoriman.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha ta’tilni uzaytirish tarafdori.
U qarorni qo‘llab-quvvatlaganini bildirdi.
Ovoz berish harakatni qo‘llab-quvvatladi.

words.definition: Showing no interest, concern, or enthusiasm.
words.definitionUz: Befarq — biror narsaga qiziqish, tashvish yoki ishtiyoq bildirmaslik.
words.example1: He seemed indifferent to the news.
words.example1Translation: U yangiliklarga befarq ko‘rinardi.
words.example2: She was indifferent about which restaurant we chose.
words.example2Translation: Qaysi restoranga borishimiz unga farqi yo‘q edi.
words.example3: The teacher was indifferent to his excuses.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchi uning bahonalariga befarq edi.
extraExamples: Many young people are indifferent to politics.
His indifferent attitude annoyed his friends.
She remained indifferent throughout the meeting.
The audience was surprisingly indifferent.
He is indifferent to money and fame.
Don’t be indifferent to other people’s feelings.
The government cannot remain indifferent to this problem.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab yoshlar siyosatga befarq.
Uning befarq munosabati do‘stlarini bezdirdi.
U yig‘ilish davomida befarq qoldi.
Tomoshabinlar hayratlanarli darajada befarq edi.
U pul va shuhratga befarq.
Boshqalarning his-tuyg‘ulariga befarq bo‘lmang.
Hukumat bu muammoga befarq qola olmaydi.

words.definition: Behaving in a way that contradicts one’s stated beliefs or values.
words.definitionUz: Ikkiyuzlamachi — o‘zi aytgan e’tiqod yoki qadriyatlariga zid tarzda harakat qilish.
words.example1: It’s hypocritical to criticize others for doing what you do yourself.
words.example1Translation: O‘zing qilayotgan ishni boshqalarni tanqid qilish ikkiyuzlamachilikdir.
words.example2: His hypocritical behavior was quickly noticed.
words.example2Translation: Uning ikkiyuzlamachi xatti-harakati tezda sezildi.
words.example3: She called out the company’s hypocritical advertising.
words.example3Translation: U kompaniyaning ikkiyuzlamachi reklamasini fosh qildi.
extraExamples: The politician’s hypocritical statements upset voters.
It feels hypocritical to preach about saving money while spending freely.
Don’t be so hypocritical.
The teacher’s hypocritical rules annoyed the students.
Hypocritical people often lose trust easily.
She refused to be part of the hypocritical system.
His concern for the environment seemed hypocritical.
extraExampleTranslations: Siyosatchining ikkiyuzlamachi bayonotlari saylovchilarni g‘azablantirdi.
Pul tejash haqida va’z qilib, o‘zi erkin sarflash ikkiyuzlamachilikdek tuyuladi.
Bunchalik ikkiyuzlamachi bo‘lma.
O‘qituvchining ikkiyuzlamachi qoidalari talabalarni bezdirdi.
Ikkiyuzlamachi odamlar ishonchni tez yo‘qotadi.
U ikkiyuzlamachi tizimning bir qismi bo‘lishni rad etdi.
Uning atrof-muhitga qiziqishi ikkiyuzlamachidek tuyulardi.

words.definition: Absolutely necessary and impossible to replace.
words.definitionUz: Ajralmas — mutlaqo zarur va o‘rnini bosib bo‘lmaydigan.
words.example1: A good assistant is indispensable in this job.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi yordamchi bu ishda ajralmas.
words.example2: Water is indispensable for life.
words.example2Translation: Suv hayot uchun ajralmas.
words.example3: Her experience makes her indispensable to the team.
words.example3Translation: Uning tajribasi uni jamoa uchun ajralmas qiladi.
extraExamples: Smartphones have become indispensable in daily life.
Trust is indispensable in any relationship.
This tool is indispensable for the repair.
She quickly became indispensable at work.
Good communication is indispensable for success.
The internet is now indispensable for students.
His knowledge of the market is indispensable.
extraExampleTranslations: Smartfonlar kundalik hayotda ajralmas bo‘lib qoldi.
Har qanday munosabatlarda ishonch ajralmas.
Bu asbob ta’mirlash uchun ajralmas.
U ishda tezda ajralmas bo‘lib qoldi.
Yaxshi muloqot muvaffaqiyat uchun ajralmas.
Internet endi talabalar uchun ajralmas.
Uning bozor haqidagi bilimi ajralmas.

words.definition: A beverage that has lost its carbonation and bubbles.
words.definitionUz: Gazsiz ichimlik — gazlanganligini yo‘qotgan, pufakchalari chiqib ketgan ichimlik.
words.example1: This soda has gone flat.
words.example1Translation: Bu gazlangan suv gazsiz bo‘lib qolgan.
words.example2: I hate drinking flat drinks.
words.example2Translation: Gazsiz ichimlik ichishni yoqtirmayman.
words.example3: The beer was flat and tasted bad.
words.example3Translation: Pivo gazsiz va ta’mi yomon edi.
extraExamples: Leave the bottle open and it will become a flat drink.
She poured the flat drink down the sink.
Flat drinks are disappointing.
The party had only warm and flat drinks left.
He complained about the flat drink.
Flat cola is not refreshing.
Make sure to finish the drink before it goes flat.
extraExampleTranslations: Shishani ochiq qoldirsangiz, ichimlik gazsiz bo‘lib qoladi.
U gazsiz ichimlikni lavaboga to‘kdi.
Gazsiz ichimliklar umidsizlikka soladi.
Ziyofatda faqat iliq va gazsiz ichimliklar qolgan edi.
U gazsiz ichimlikdan shikoyat qildi.
Gazsiz kola tetiklantirmaydi.
Ichimlik gazsiz bo‘lib qolmasdan ichib tugating.

words.word: Be the tip of the iceberg
words.definition: A small visible part of a much larger hidden problem.
words.definitionUz: Muz tog‘ining uchi bo‘lish — katta muammoning faqat ko‘rinadigan kichik qismi.
words.example1: This complaint is just the tip of the iceberg.
words.example1Translation: Bu shikoyat muz tog‘ining faqat uchi.
words.example2: The scandal is the tip of the iceberg of corruption.
words.example2Translation: Janjal korruptsiyaning muz tog‘ining uchi.
words.example3: What we know now is only the tip of the iceberg.
words.example3Translation: Hozir bilganimiz muz tog‘ining faqat uchi.
extraExamples: The financial problems are just the tip of the iceberg.
This error is the tip of the iceberg.
The reported cases are the tip of the iceberg.
We’ve only seen the tip of the iceberg so far.
Her anger was the tip of the iceberg.
The environmental damage is the tip of the iceberg.
The investigation revealed that it was just the tip of the iceberg.
extraExampleTranslations: Moliyaviy muammolar muz tog‘ining faqat uchi.
Bu xato muz tog‘ining uchi.
Xabar qilingan holatlar muz tog‘ining uchi.
Hozirgacha biz faqat muz tog‘ining uchini ko‘rdik.
Uning g‘azabi muz tog‘ining uchi edi.
Atrof-muhitga yetkazilgan zarar muz tog‘ining uchi.
Tergov bu faqat muz tog‘ining uchi ekanligini ko‘rsatdi.

words.word: In the process of doing something
words.definition: Currently engaged in doing or completing something.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni bajarish jarayonida — hozirda biror ishni bajarayotgan yoki tugatayotgan holat.
words.example1: We are in the process of moving to a new house.
words.example1Translation: Biz yangi uyga ko‘chish jarayonidamiz.
words.example2: The company is in the process of hiring new staff.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya yangi xodimlar yollash jarayonida.
words.example3: She is in the process of writing her second book.
words.example3Translation: U ikkinchi kitobini yozish jarayonida.
extraExamples: The government is in the process of changing the law.
I’m in the process of learning a new language.
They are in the process of renovating the kitchen.
The project is in the process of being reviewed.
We are still in the process of deciding.
The team is in the process of training for the match.
She is in the process of recovering from illness.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat qonunni o‘zgartirish jarayonida.
Men yangi til o‘rganish jarayonidaman.
Ular oshxonani ta’mirlash jarayonida.
Loyiha ko‘rib chiqilish jarayonida.
Biz hali ham qaror qabul qilish jarayonidamiz.
Jamoa o‘yinga tayyorgarlik ko‘rish jarayonida.
U kasallikdan tuzalish jarayonida.

words.definition: To fail to produce any useful result or progress.
words.definitionUz: Hech narsaga olib kelmaslik — foydali natija yoki taraqqiyotga erishmaslik.
words.example1: Complaining will get you nowhere.
words.example1Translation: Shikoyat qilish hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
words.example2: Arguing with him gets you nowhere.
words.example2Translation: U bilan bahslashish hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
words.example3: That attitude will get you nowhere in life.
words.example3Translation: Bu munosabat hayotda hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
extraExamples: Lying will get you nowhere.
This strategy is getting us nowhere.
Being rude gets you nowhere.
Waiting around will get you nowhere.
His old methods are getting him nowhere.
Trying to cheat will get you nowhere.
Negative thinking gets you nowhere.
extraExampleTranslations: Yolg‘on gapirish hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
Bu strategiya bizni hech narsaga olib kelmayapti.
Qo‘pollik hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
Kutib o‘tirish hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
Uning eski usullari uni hech narsaga olib kelmayapti.
Aldashga urinishing hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.
Salbiy fikrlash hech narsaga olib kelmaydi.

words.definition: To allow oneself to enjoy something, often in large amounts or excessively.
words.definitionUz: O‘zini erkalash — biror narsadan zavqlanishga o‘ziga ruxsat berish, ko‘pincha ortiqcha miqdorda.
words.example1: I like to indulge in chocolate after a long day.
words.example1Translation: Uzun kunlik mehnatdan keyin shokoladdan zavqlanishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
words.example2: She indulged in a long hot bath.
words.example2Translation: U uzun issiq vanna qabul qilib o‘zini erkaladi.
words.example3: On weekends, he indulges in video games.
words.example3Translation: Dam olish kunlarida u video o‘yinlardan zavqlanadi.
extraExamples: Don’t indulge in too much junk food.
They indulged in luxury for one night.
She occasionally indulges in expensive perfume.
He indulged in memories of his childhood.
We indulged in a fancy dinner.
Try not to indulge in self-pity.
Tourists love to indulge in local cuisine.
extraExampleTranslations: Junk ovqatdan ortiqcha zavqlanmang.
Ular bir kecha hashamatdan zavqlanishdi.
U ba’zida qimmat atirga o‘zini erkalaydi.
U bolaligining xotiralaridan zavqlanardi.
Biz hashamatli kechki ovqatdan zavqlanib oldik.
O‘z-o‘ziga achinishdan o‘zini tiyishga harakat qiling.
Sayyohlar mahalliy taomlardan zavqlanishni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.

words.definition: Extremely lazy and unwilling to work.
words.definitionUz: Juda dangasa — ishlamaslikka mutlaqo moyil bo‘lgan juda yalqov odam.
words.example1: He’s bone idle and never helps around the house.
words.example1Translation: U juda dangasa va uy ishlarida hech qachon yordam bermaydi.
words.example2: Stop being bone idle and do your homework.
words.example2Translation: Juda dangasa bo‘lishni bas qil va uy vazifangni bajargin.
words.example3: My brother is bone idle when it comes to studying.
words.example3Translation: Akam o‘qishga kelganda juda dangasa.
extraExamples: She called her son bone idle.
Bone idle people rarely succeed.
He’s too bone idle to even make his bed.
The bone idle worker was fired.
Don’t be bone idle all day.
His bone idle attitude annoys everyone.
Bone idle teenagers frustrate their parents.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘g‘lini juda dangasa deb atadi.
Juda dangasa odamlar kamdan-kam muvaffaqiyatga erishadi.
U hatto to‘shagini yig‘ishga ham juda dangasa.
Juda dangasa ishchi ishdan bo‘shatildi.
Butun kun dangasa bo‘lib yurmang.
Uning juda dangasa munosabati hammani bezdiradi.
Juda dangasa o‘smirlar ota-onalarini g‘azablantiradi.

words.definition: To work together with others for a common goal.
words.definitionUz: Kuchlarni birlashtirish — umumiy maqsad uchun boshqalar bilan birgalikda ishlash.
words.example1: The two companies joined forces to develop the new product.
words.example1Translation: Ikki kompaniya yangi mahsulotni ishlab chiqish uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
words.example2: We should join forces to solve this problem.
words.example2Translation: Bu muammoni hal qilish uchun kuchlarimizni birlashtiraylik.
words.example3: Local organizations joined forces to help the victims.
words.example3Translation: Mahalliy tashkilotlar qurbonlarga yordam berish uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
extraExamples: The teams joined forces for the charity event.
Scientists joined forces to find a cure.
Neighbors joined forces to clean the park.
They decided to join forces against the common enemy.
Countries joined forces to fight climate change.
The schools joined forces for the sports festival.
Joining forces made the project successful.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoalar xayriya tadbiri uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
Olimlar davo topish uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
Qo‘shnilar bog‘ni tozalash uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
Ular umumiy dushmanga qarshi kuchlarini birlashtirishga qaror qilishdi.
Mamlakatlar iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
Maktablar sport festivali uchun kuchlarini birlashtirdi.
Kuchlarni birlashtirish loyihani muvaffaqiyatli qildi.

words.definition: A very young child or baby, usually under one year old.
words.definitionUz: Chaqaloq — juda yosh bola, odatda bir yoshgacha.
words.example1: The infant slept peacefully in the crib.
words.example1Translation: Chaqaloq beshikda tinch uxlab yotardi.
words.example2: Special care is needed for premature infants.
words.example2Translation: Muddatidan oldin tug‘ilgan chaqaloqlarga maxsus parvarish kerak.
words.example3: She works in an infant school.
words.example3Translation: U chaqaloqlar maktabida ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The infant smiled at her mother.
Infant mortality rates have decreased.
They bought new clothes for their infant.
The doctor examined the infant carefully.
Infant development is very rapid.
Many toys are designed for infants.
The infant cried when it was hungry.
extraExampleTranslations: Chaqaloq onasiga qarab tabassum qildi.
Chaqaloqlar o‘lim darajasi pasaydi.
Ular chaqalog‘i uchun yangi kiyimlar sotib olishdi.
Shifokor chaqaloqni sinchkovlik bilan ko‘zdan kechirdi.
Chaqaloqning rivojlanishi juda tez.
Ko‘plab o‘yinchoqlar chaqaloqlar uchun ishlab chiqarilgan.
Chaqaloq och qolganda yig‘ladi.

words.definition: Used before clarifying a point to avoid misunderstanding.
words.definitionUz: Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang — biror fikrni aniqlashtirishdan oldin noto‘g‘ri tushunilmasligi uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Don’t get me wrong, I like the idea, but it needs improvement.
words.example1Translation: Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, g‘oyani yoqtiraman, lekin uni takomillashtirish kerak.
words.example2: Don’t get me wrong, she’s a good person.
words.example2Translation: Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, u yaxshi odam.
words.example3: Don’t get me wrong, the movie was entertaining.
words.example3Translation: Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, film qiziqarli edi.
extraExamples: Don’t get me wrong, I support the team.
Don’t get me wrong, it’s a beautiful city.
Don’t get me wrong, he works hard.
Don’t get me wrong, the food was delicious.
Don’t get me wrong, I enjoy my job.
Don’t get me wrong, she’s very talented.
Don’t get me wrong, the plan is good.
extraExampleTranslations: Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, men jamoani qo‘llab-quvvatlayman.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, bu go‘zal shahar.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, u qattiq ishlaydi.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, ovqat juda mazali edi.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, men ishimni yoqtiraman.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, u juda iste’dodli.
Meni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang, reja yaxshi.

words.definition: Lack of knowledge, awareness, or education about something.
words.definitionUz: Jaholat — biror narsa haqida bilim, ong yoki ta’limning yetishmasligi.
words.example1: His ignorance of the law surprised everyone.
words.example1Translation: Uning qonun haqidagi jaholati hammni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example2: Ignorance is not an excuse for bad behavior.
words.example2Translation: Jaholat yomon xulq uchun bahona bo‘lolmaydi.
words.example3: We must fight ignorance through education.
words.example3Translation: Biz jaholatga ta’lim orqali qarshi kurashishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Her ignorance about history was shocking.
Ignorance can lead to dangerous mistakes.
He admitted his ignorance on the subject.
The book aims to reduce public ignorance.
Ignorance breeds fear.
She was surprised by his complete ignorance.
Overcoming ignorance takes time and effort.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning tarix haqidagi jaholati hayratlanarli edi.
Jaholat xavfli xatolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U mavzu bo‘yicha o‘z jaholatini tan oldi.
Kitob jamoatchilik jaholatini kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.
Jaholat qo‘rquvni keltirib chiqaradi.
U uning to‘liq jaholatidan hayratda qoldi.
Jaholatni yengish vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.

words.definition: The matter or thing currently being discussed or considered.
words.definitionUz: Muhokama qilinayotgan narsa — hozirda muhokama qilinayotgan yoki ko‘rib chiqilayotgan masala yoki narsa.
words.example1: The evidence in question was very important.
words.example1Translation: Muhokama qilinayotgan dalil juda muhim edi.
words.example2: The person in question has not arrived yet.
words.example2Translation: Muhokama qilinayotgan shaxs hali kelmagan.
words.example3: The method in question proved to be effective.
words.example3Translation: Muhokama qilinayotgan usul samarali ekanligini isbotladi.
extraExamples: The data in question needs further analysis.
The rules in question are very strict.
The building in question is quite old.
The decision in question was controversial.
The document in question was lost.
The event in question happened last year.
The product in question is very popular.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhokama qilinayotgan ma’lumotlar qo‘shimcha tahlilni talab qiladi.
Muhokama qilinayotgan qoidalar juda qattiq.
Muhokama qilinayotgan bino ancha eski.
Muhokama qilinayotgan qaror bahsli edi.
Muhokama qilinayotgan hujjat yo‘qolgan.
Muhokama qilinayotgan voqea o‘tgan yili sodir bo‘lgan.
Muhokama qilinayotgan mahsulot juda mashhur.

words.definition: To draw a conclusion based on evidence or reasoning.
words.definitionUz: Xulosa qilish — dalillar yoki mantiqiy fikrlash asosida xulosa chiqarish.
words.example1: I inferred from his tone that he was angry.
words.example1Translation: Uning ohangidan g‘azablanganini xulosa qildim.
words.example2: We can infer from the data that sales are increasing.
words.example2Translation: Ma’lumotlardan savdo o‘sib borayotganini xulosa qilish mumkin.
words.example3: She inferred from his silence that something was wrong.
words.example3Translation: Uning jimligidan biror narsa noto‘g‘ri ekanligini xulosa qildi.
extraExamples: What can we infer from these results?
He inferred from her smile that she was happy.
Don’t infer too much from a single comment.
Scientists infer the age of rocks from their composition.
I inferred from the email that the meeting was cancelled.
We inferred from the weather report that it would rain.
She inferred the answer from the clues.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu natijalardan nima xulosa qilish mumkin?
Uning tabassumidan baxtli ekanligini xulosa qildi.
Bitta izohdan ortiqcha xulosa chiqarmang.
Olimlar toshlarning yoshini tarkibidan xulosa qilishadi.
Elektron pochtadan yig‘ilish bekor qilinganini xulosa qildim.
Ob-havo hisobotidan yomg‘ir yog‘ishini xulosa qildik.
U maslahatlardan javobni xulosa qildi.

words.definition: Flowers that have a strong and pleasant smell.
words.definitionUz: Xushbo‘y gullari — kuchli va yoqimli hidga ega gullari.
words.example1: The garden was full of fragrant flowers.
words.example1Translation: Bog‘ xushbo‘y gullarga to‘la edi.
words.example2: She received a bouquet of fragrant flowers.
words.example2Translation: U xushbo‘y gullardan iborat guldasta oldi.
words.example3: Fragrant flowers filled the room with sweet scent.
words.example3Translation: Xushbo‘y gullar xonani yoqimli hid bilan to‘ldirdi.
extraExamples: Jasmine is known for its fragrant flowers.
Fragrant flowers attract many bees and butterflies.
She loves planting fragrant flowers in her yard.
The air was heavy with the scent of fragrant flowers.
Fragrant flowers make excellent gifts.
These fragrant flowers bloom only at night.
The market sells many types of fragrant flowers.
extraExampleTranslations: Yasemin o‘zining xushbo‘y gullari bilan mashhur.
Xushbo‘y gullar ko‘plab asalarilar va kapalaklarni o‘ziga tortadi.
U hovlisida xushbo‘y gullar ekishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Havo xushbo‘y gullarning hidiga to‘la edi.
Xushbo‘y gullar ajoyib sovg‘a bo‘ladi.
Bu xushbo‘y gullar faqat kechasi ochiladi.
Bozorda ko‘p turdagi xushbo‘y gullar sotiladi.

words.definition: A large and sudden arrival of people or things.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘p miqdorda kelishi — odamlar yoki narsalarning katta va to‘satdan kelishi.
words.example1: There was a sudden influx of tourists in the summer.
words.example1Translation: Yozda sayyohlarning to‘satdan ko‘payishi kuzatildi.
words.example2: The city saw an influx of new residents.
words.example2Translation: Shahar yangi aholi oqimini ko‘rdi.
words.example3: The company experienced an influx of orders.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya buyurtmalar oqimini boshdan kechirdi.
extraExamples: The school had an influx of new students.
There is a constant influx of information online.
The hospital prepared for an influx of patients.
The country dealt with an influx of refugees.
An influx of investment boosted the economy.
The market had an influx of cheap goods.
The team managed the influx of work well.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktabga yangi o‘quvchilar oqimi keldi.
Internetda doimiy ma’lumot oqimi mavjud.
Shifoxona bemorlar oqimiga tayyorgarlik ko‘rdi.
Mamlakat qochqinlar oqimi bilan muomala qildi.
Sarmoyalar oqimi iqtisodiyotni kuchaytirdi.
Bozorga arzon tovarlar oqimi kirdi.
Jamoa ish oqimini yaxshi boshqardi.

words.definition: To be in debt or operating at a financial loss.
words.definitionUz: Qizil zonada bo‘lish — qarzda bo‘lish yoki moliyaviy zarar bilan ish yuritish.
words.example1: The company has been in the red for two years.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya ikki yildan beri zarar ko‘rmoqda.
words.example2: My bank account is in the red again.
words.example2Translation: Mening bank hisobim yana minusda.
words.example3: Many small businesses are in the red after the pandemic.
words.example3Translation: Pandemiyadan keyin ko‘plab kichik bizneslar zarar ko‘rmoqda.
extraExamples: The project is currently in the red.
We need to avoid being in the red.
His finances are deep in the red.
The store was in the red last month.
Being in the red is stressful.
They managed to get out of the red.
The budget is in the red due to unexpected costs.
extraExampleTranslations: Loyiha hozir zarar ko‘rmoqda.
Zarar ko‘rmaslikka harakat qilishimiz kerak.
Uning moliyaviy ahvoli juda yomon.
Do‘kon o‘tgan oy zarar ko‘rdi.
Qizil zonada bo‘lish stressli.
Ular zarardan chiqib ketishga muvaffaq bo‘lishdi.
Kutilmagan xarajatlar tufayli byudjet zarar ko‘rmoqda.

words.definition: Psychological restraints that prevent someone from behaving freely.
words.definitionUz: Ichki to‘siqlar — odamning erkin harakat qilishiga to‘sqinlik qiladigan ruhiy cheklovlar.
words.example1: Alcohol often lowers people’s inhibitions.
words.example1Translation: Alkogol odamlarning ichki to‘siqlarini pasaytiradi.
words.example2: She danced without any inhibitions.
words.example2Translation: U hech qanday ichki to‘siqlarsiz raqsga tushdi.
words.example3: His inhibitions disappeared after a few drinks.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha qadahdan keyin uning ichki to‘siqlari yo‘qoldi.
extraExamples: Social inhibitions can prevent people from speaking up.
Children usually have fewer inhibitions.
Overcoming inhibitions takes time.
The workshop helped reduce her inhibitions.
He has no inhibitions about expressing his opinion.
Inhibitions often come from fear of judgment.
The party atmosphere reduced everyone’s inhibitions.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy ichki to‘siqlar odamlarni gapirishga xalaqit berishi mumkin.
Bolalarda odatda ichki to‘siqlar kamroq bo‘ladi.
Ichki to‘siqlarni yengish vaqt talab qiladi.
Trening uning ichki to‘siqlarini kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
U o‘z fikrini bildirishda hech qanday ichki to‘siqlarga ega emas.
Ichki to‘siqlar ko‘pincha hukm qilinish qo‘rquvidan kelib chiqadi.
Ziyofat muhiti hammaning ichki to‘siqlarini pasaytirdi.

words.definition: To make something appear real or true when it is not.
words.definitionUz: Illyuziya yaratish — biror narsani haqiqatdek ko‘rsatish, aslida bo‘lmasa ham.
words.example1: The painting creates the illusion of depth.
words.example1Translation: Rasm chuqurlik illyuziyasini yaratadi.
words.example2: Special effects create the illusion of flying.
words.example2Translation: Maxsus effektlar uchish illyuziyasini yaratadi.
words.example3: The mirrors create the illusion of a larger room.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘zgular xonani kattaroqdek ko‘rsatadi.
extraExamples: The magician created the illusion of disappearing.
Lighting can create the illusion of warmth.
The app creates the illusion of real conversation.
