They tried to create the illusion of success.
The design creates the illusion of movement.
Makeup can create the illusion of perfect skin.
The stage set created the illusion of a forest.
extraExampleTranslations: Sehrgar g‘oyib bo‘lish illyuziyasini yaratdi.
Yoritish iliqlik illyuziyasini yaratishi mumkin.
Ilova haqiqiy suhbat illyuziyasini yaratadi.
Ular muvaffaqiyat illyuziyasini yaratishga harakat qilishdi.
Dizayn harakat illyuziyasini yaratadi.
Makiyaj mukammal teri illyuziyasini yaratishi mumkin.
Sahna dekoratsiyasi o‘rmon illyuziyasini yaratdi.

words.definition: Cruel or lacking normal human qualities of compassion.
words.definitionUz: Insoniy bo‘lmagan — shafqatsiz yoki odamga xos mehribonlik sifatlaridan mahrum.
words.example1: The conditions in the prison were inhuman.
words.example1Translation: Qamoqxonadagi sharoitlar insoniy bo‘lmagan edi.
words.example2: Treating people like that is inhuman.
words.example2Translation: Odamlar bilan shunday muomala qilish insoniy emas.
words.example3: The inhuman experiment shocked the world.
words.example3Translation: Insoniy bo‘lmagan tajriba butun dunyoni hayratda qoldirdi.
extraExamples: The inhuman treatment of prisoners caused outrage.
It was an inhuman act of violence.
Working such long hours is inhuman.
The dictator’s inhuman policies led to suffering.
She described the scene as inhuman.
Inhuman conditions exist in some factories.
The story highlighted the inhuman side of war.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahbuslarga nisbatan insoniy bo‘lmagan muomala g‘azabga sabab bo‘ldi.
Bu insoniy bo‘lmagan zo‘ravonlik harakati edi.
Bunday uzoq soatlab ishlash insoniy emas.
Diktatorning insoniy bo‘lmagan siyosati azob-uqubatlarga olib keldi.
U voqeani insoniy bo‘lmagan deb ta’rifladi.
Ba’zi zavodlarda insoniy bo‘lmagan sharoitlar mavjud.
Hikoya urushning insoniy bo‘lmagan tomonini yoritdi.

words.definition: To become difficult to control.
words.definitionUz: Nazordan chiqib ketish — boshqarib bo‘lmaydigan darajaga yetish.
words.example1: The party got out of hand after midnight.
words.example1Translation: Ziyofat yarim tundan keyin nazordan chiqib ketdi.
words.example2: The situation is getting out of hand.
words.example2Translation: Vaziyat nazordan chiqib ketmoqda.
words.example3: Don’t let the argument get out of hand.
words.example3Translation: Bahsning nazordan chiqib ketishiga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
extraExamples: The fire got out of hand quickly.
The meeting got out of hand when everyone started shouting.
His drinking problem is getting out of hand.
The protest got out of hand.
We need to act before things get out of hand.
The children’s game got out of hand.
The budget has got out of hand.
extraExampleTranslations: Yong‘in tez nazordan chiqib ketdi.
Hamma baqira boshlagach, yig‘ilish nazordan chiqib ketdi.
Uning ichkilik muammosi nazordan chiqib ketmoqda.
Norozilik namoyishi nazordan chiqib ketdi.
Ishlar nazordan chiqmasdan oldin choralar ko‘rishimiz kerak.
Bolalarning o‘yini nazordan chiqib ketdi.
Byudjet nazordan chiqib ketdi.

words.definition: Looking back on a past event with the benefit of hindsight.
words.definitionUz: Orqaga nazar tashlab — o‘tgan voqeaga keyingi bilim bilan qayta qarash.
words.example1: In retrospect, I should have studied harder.
words.example1Translation: Orqaga nazar tashlab, ko‘proq o‘qishim kerak edi.
words.example2: In retrospect, the decision was a mistake.
words.example2Translation: Orqaga nazar tashlab, bu qaror xato edi.
words.example3: In retrospect, everything makes sense now.
words.example3Translation: Orqaga nazar tashlab, endi hammasi mantiqiy.
extraExamples: In retrospect, quitting my job was the best decision.
In retrospect, I wish I had listened to her.
In retrospect, the signs were obvious.
In retrospect, we could have done things differently.
In retrospect, it was a valuable experience.
In retrospect, his advice was correct.
In retrospect, the trip was worth all the trouble.
extraExampleTranslations: Orqaga nazar tashlab, ishdan bo‘shash eng yaxshi qaror edi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, uning gaplarini tinglaganimda bo‘lardi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, belgilar ochiq-oydin edi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, ishni boshqacha qilishimiz mumkin edi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, bu qimmatli tajriba edi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, uning maslahati to‘g‘ri edi.
Orqaga nazar tashlab, sayohat barcha qiyinchiliklarga arzigandi.

words.definition: Completely unfamiliar or outside one’s experience or values.
words.definitionUz: Bu menga begona — mutlaqo notanish yoki o‘z tajribasi yoki qadriyatlaridan tashqari.
words.example1: The concept of cheating is foreign to me.
words.example1Translation: Aldash tushunchasi menga begona.
words.example2: Violence is foreign to her nature.
words.example2Translation: Zo‘ravonlik uning tabiatiga begona.
words.example3: Living in a big city is still foreign to me.
words.example3Translation: Katta shaharda yashash hali ham menga begona.
extraExamples: Betrayal is foreign to true friendship.
Such luxury is foreign to me.
The idea of giving up is foreign to him.
Their customs are completely foreign to us.
This technology is still foreign to many older people.
Dishonesty is foreign to her character.
The culture felt foreign to the visitors.
extraExampleTranslations: Xiyonat haqiqiy do‘stlikka begona.
Bunday hashamat menga begona.
Taslim bo‘lish g‘oyasi unga begona.
Ularning urf-odatlari biz uchun mutlaqo begona.
Bu texnologiya ko‘plab keksa odamlar uchun hali begona.
Yolg‘onchilik uning xarakteriga begona.
Madaniyat mehmonlar uchun begona tuyulardi.

words.definition: To formally begin or set a process in motion.
words.definitionUz: Boshlab berish — biror jarayonni rasmiy ravishda boshlash yoki harakatga kiritish.
words.example1: The government will initiate a new program next month.
words.example1Translation: Hukumat keyingi oy yangi dasturni boshlab beradi.
words.example2: She initiated the conversation about the problem.
words.example2Translation: U muammo haqida suhbatni boshlab berdi.
words.example3: The company initiated legal action.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya sud jarayonini boshlab berdi.
extraExamples: The teacher initiated a discussion on climate change.
We need to initiate change immediately.
He initiated contact with the other team.
The project was initiated last year.
She initiated the charity event.
The leader initiated peace talks.
They initiated an investigation into the incident.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi iqlim o‘zgarishi haqida muhokamani boshlab berdi.
O‘zgarishni darhol boshlab berishimiz kerak.
U boshqa jamoa bilan aloqani boshlab berdi.
Loyiha o‘tgan yili boshlangan.
U xayriya tadbirini boshlab berdi.
Rahbar tinchlik muzokaralarini boshlab berdi.
Ular voqea bo‘yicha tergovni boshlab berishdi.

words.definition: The world as a whole; the Earth.
words.definitionUz: Butun dunyo — butun Yer sayyorasi.
words.example1: The news spread across the globe.
words.example1Translation: Yangilik butun dunyoga tarqaldi.
words.example2: Musicians from around the globe performed at the festival.
words.example2Translation: Butun dunyodan musiqachilar festivalda chiqish qilishdi.
words.example3: Climate change affects the entire globe.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi butun dunyoga ta’sir qiladi.
extraExamples: The internet connects people across the globe.
Products are shipped around the globe.
She has traveled to many places on the globe.
Peace is a goal for the whole globe.
The event was watched by millions around the globe.
Diseases can spread rapidly across the globe.
The globe faces many environmental challenges.
extraExampleTranslations: Internet odamlarni butun dunyo bo‘ylab bog‘laydi.
Mahsulotlar butun dunyoga yetkazib beriladi.
U dunyoning ko‘p joylarida sayohat qilgan.
Tinchlik butun dunyo uchun maqsaddir.
Tadbirni butun dunyodan millionlab odamlar tomosha qildi.
Kasalliklar butun dunyo bo‘ylab tez tarqalishi mumkin.
Butun dunyo ko‘plab ekologik muammolarga duch kelmoqda.

words.definition: To make a bad situation even worse by doing or saying something unpleasant.
words.definitionUz: Yaraga tuz sepish — allaqachon yomon vaziyatni yoqimsiz so‘z yoki harakat bilan yanada yomonlashtirish.
words.example1: Not only did they lose the match, but the coach added insult to injury by criticizing them publicly.
words.example1Translation: Ular nafaqat o‘yinda yutqazishdi, murabbiy ularni ochiqdan-ochiq tanqid qilib yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Being fired was bad enough, but adding insult to injury, they didn’t pay his last salary.
words.example2Translation: Ishdan bo‘shatilishning o‘zi yetarli edi, ustiga-ustak oxirgi maoshini bermay yaraga tuz sepdilar.
words.example3: She added insult to injury by laughing at his mistake.
words.example3Translation: U uning xatosiga kulib yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: The company added insult to injury by blaming the customers.
Losing the money was bad; the rude comment added insult to injury.
Don’t add insult to injury by arguing now.
The late delivery added insult to injury.
He added insult to injury by ignoring her completely.
The poor service added insult to injury after the long wait.
The boss added insult to injury with a sarcastic email.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya mijozlarni ayblab yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
Pulni yo‘qotishning o‘zi yetarli edi, qo‘pollik bilan aytgan gap yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
Hozir bahslashib yaraga tuz sepma.
Kech yetkazib berish yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
U uni butunlay e’tiborsiz qoldirib yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
Uzoq kutishdan keyin yomon xizmat yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.
Rahbar kinoyali elektron pochta bilan yaraga tuz sepgan bo‘ldi.

words.definition: To learn how to do something competently through practice.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘lini olish — mashq qilish orqali biror ishni yaxshi bajarishni o‘rganish.
words.example1: It took me a while to get the hang of driving.
words.example1Translation: Mashina haydashning qo‘lini olishimga biroz vaqt ketdi.
words.example2: Once you get the hang of it, cooking becomes easy.
words.example2Translation: Bir marta qo‘lini olsangiz, pazandalik osonlashadi.
words.example3: She’s starting to get the hang of the new software.
words.example3Translation: U yangi dasturning qo‘lini olishni boshladi.
extraExamples: It’s not hard once you get the hang of it.
He finally got the hang of playing the guitar.
Give yourself time to get the hang of the job.
I’m slowly getting the hang of public speaking.
She got the hang of riding a bike quickly.
Getting the hang of a new language takes practice.
You’ll get the hang of it soon.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo‘lini olganingizdan keyin qiyin emas.
U nihoyat gitara chalishning qo‘lini oldi.
Ishning qo‘lini olish uchun o‘zingizga vaqt bering.
Men omma oldida gapirishning qo‘lini asta-sekin olyapman.
U velosiped haydashning qo‘lini tez oldi.
Yangi tilning qo‘lini olish mashq talab qiladi.
Tez orada qo‘lini olasiz.

words.definition: Trapped in a monotonous, boring, or unproductive routine.
words.definitionUz: Bir xil hayotga tushib qolish — bir xil, zerikarli yoki samarasiz kundalik tartibga qamalib qolish.
words.example1: I feel stuck in a rut in my job.
words.example1Translation: Ishimda bir xil hayotga tushib qolgandekman.
words.example2: She decided to travel to get out of her rut.
words.example2Translation: U bir xil hayotdan chiqish uchun sayohat qilishga qaror qildi.
words.example3: We need a change; we’re stuck in a rut.
words.example3Translation: Bizga o‘zgarish kerak, bir xil hayotga tushib qoldik.
extraExamples: Many people get stuck in a rut after university.
He’s been stuck in a rut for years.
Trying new things helps when you’re stuck in a rut.
The team was stuck in a rut and needed fresh ideas.
Don’t get stuck in a rut.
Moving to a new city helped her escape the rut.
Routine can sometimes leave you stuck in a rut.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab odamlar universitetdan keyin bir xil hayotga tushib qolishadi.
U yillar davomida bir xil hayotda qolib ketgan.
Yangi narsalarni sinash bir xil hayotdan chiqishga yordam beradi.
Jamoa bir xil holatga tushib qolgan edi va yangi g‘oyalar kerak edi.
Bir xil hayotga tushib qolmang.
Yangi shaharga ko‘chish unga bir xil hayotdan chiqishga yordam berdi.
Kun tartibi ba’zida sizni bir xil hayotga tushirib qo‘yishi mumkin.

words.definition: A natural ability present from birth rather than acquired through learning.
words.definitionUz: Tabiiy qobiliyat — tug‘ilishdan mavjud bo‘lgan, o‘rganish orqali emas, balki tabiatan berilgan qobiliyat.
words.example1: She has an innate talent for music.
words.example1Translation: U musiqaga tabiiy qobiliyatga ega.
words.example2: Innate talent needs to be developed through practice.
words.example2Translation: Tabiiy qobiliyat mashq orqali rivojlantirilishi kerak.
words.example3: Some people believe leadership is an innate talent.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zilar rahbarlik tabiiy qobiliyat deb hisoblashadi.
extraExamples: His innate talent for languages amazed everyone.
Innate talent alone is not enough for success.
The coach spotted her innate talent immediately.
Innate talent can be a great advantage in sports.
She discovered her innate talent for painting at a young age.
Scientists are still studying what causes innate talent.
Even with innate talent, hard work is essential.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning tillarga tabiiy qobiliyati hammasini hayratda qoldirdi.
Faqat tabiiy qobiliyat muvaffaqiyat uchun yetarli emas.
Murabbiy uning tabiiy qobiliyatini darhol payqadi.
Tabiiy qobiliyat sportda katta ustunlik berishi mumkin.
U rasm chizishga tabiiy qobiliyatini yoshligida kashf qildi.
Olimlar tabiiy qobiliyatning sabablarini hali ham o‘rganmoqda.
Tabiiy qobiliyatga ega bo‘lsa ham qattiq mehnat zarur.

words.definition: Considered the most likely person or team to achieve victory.
words.definitionUz: G‘alaba qozonish favoriti — g‘alaba qozonishi eng ehtimoliy deb hisoblanadigan shaxs yoki jamoa.
words.example1: The Brazilian team is the favourite to win the championship.
words.example1Translation: Braziliya jamoasi chempionlikning favoriti hisoblanadi.
words.example2: She is the favourite to win the gold medal.
words.example2Translation: U oltin medalning favoriti.
words.example3: Even the favourite to win can sometimes lose.
words.example3Translation: Hatto g‘alaba favoriti ham ba’zida yutqazishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The young player is the favourite to win the tournament.
Who is your favourite to win the election?
Being the favourite to win puts extra pressure on the team.
The horse was the clear favourite to win the race.
She became the favourite to win after her strong performance.
Never underestimate the favourite to win.
The favourite to win often faces the toughest opponents.
extraExampleTranslations: Yosh o‘yinchi turnirning favoriti.
Siz uchun saylovning favoriti kim?
G‘alaba favoriti bo‘lish jamoaga qo‘shimcha bosim yaratadi.
Ot poyganing aniq favoriti edi.
Kuchli natija ko‘rsatgandan keyin u g‘alaba favoriti bo‘lib qoldi.
G‘alaba favoritini hech qachon kamsitmang.
G‘alaba favoriti ko‘pincha eng qiyin raqiblarga duch keladi.

words.definition: For the reason that; because.
words.definitionUz: Chunki — biror sabab yoki asosni bildiruvchi bog‘lovchi.
words.example1: She succeeded in that she worked very hard.
words.example1Translation: U muvaffaqiyat qozondi, chunki juda qattiq mehnat qildi.
words.example2: The plan failed in that it lacked proper funding.
words.example2Translation: Reja muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi, chunki unda yetarli mablag‘ yo‘q edi.
words.example3: He is respected in that he always tells the truth.
words.example3Translation: U hurmatga sazovor, chunki har doim haqiqatni gapiradi.
extraExamples: The event was successful in that many people attended.
She was promoted in that she showed great leadership.
The book is valuable in that it contains new research.
He was punished in that he broke the rules.
The team improved in that they trained harder.
It is important in that it affects everyone.
The law was changed in that it was outdated.
extraExampleTranslations: Tadbir muvaffaqiyatli o‘tdi, chunki ko‘p odam qatnashdi.
U lavozim oshirdi, chunki kuchli rahbarlik qobiliyatini ko‘rsatdi.
Kitob qimmatli, chunki unda yangi tadqiqotlar bor.
U jazoga tortildi, chunki qoidalarni buzdi.
Jamoa yaxshilandi, chunki ular qattiqroq mashq qilishdi.
Bu muhim, chunki u hammaga ta’sir qiladi.
Qonun o‘zgartirildi, chunki u eskirgan edi.

words.definition: To understand a situation clearly, often after an explanation.
words.definitionUz: Tushunib yetmoq — vaziyatni, ko‘pincha tushuntirishdan keyin aniq anglab yetish.
words.example1: I explained it twice and he finally got the picture.
words.example1Translation: Men ikki marta tushuntirdim va u nihoyat tushundi.
words.example2: She got the picture after seeing the report.
words.example2Translation: U hisobotni ko‘rgach, vaziyatni tushundi.
words.example3: Do you get the picture now?
words.example3Translation: Endi tushundingizmi?
extraExamples: It took him a while to get the picture.
Once you get the picture, it’s easy to solve.
I think I get the picture now.
He didn’t get the picture until I showed him examples.
She quickly got the picture of what was happening.
Getting the picture is the first step to solving the problem.
The students got the picture after the teacher’s demonstration.
extraExampleTranslations: Unga tushunish uchun biroz vaqt kerak bo‘ldi.
Vaziyatni tushunganingizdan keyin uni hal qilish oson.
Endi men tushundim deb o‘ylayman.
Misollar ko‘rsatmagunimcha u tushunmadi.
U nima bo‘layotganini tez tushundi.
Vaziyatni tushunish muammoni hal qilishning birinchi bosqichi.
O‘qituvchining namoyishidan keyin talabalar tushunib yetdilar.

words.definition: Within a time frame that can reasonably be expected or predicted.
words.definitionUz: Yaqin kelajakda — oqilona bashorat qilish mumkin bo‘lgan vaqt oralig‘ida.
words.example1: We don’t expect any major changes in the foreseeable future.
words.example1Translation: Yaqin kelajakda katta o‘zgarishlarni kutmmoqdamiz.
words.example2: The project will be completed in the foreseeable future.
words.example2Translation: Loyiha yaqin kelajakda yakunlanadi.
words.example3: Peace in the region is unlikely in the foreseeable future.
words.example3Translation: Mintaqada tinchlik yaqin kelajakda ehtimoldan yiroq.
extraExamples: Technological advances will continue in the foreseeable future.
No new jobs will be created in the foreseeable future.
We plan to expand the business in the foreseeable future.
Climate change will remain a major issue in the foreseeable future.
Prices are expected to rise in the foreseeable future.
A solution is not expected in the foreseeable future.
Travel restrictions may continue in the foreseeable future.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologik yutuqlar yaqin kelajakda ham davom etadi.
Yaqin kelajakda yangi ish o‘rinlari yaratilmaydi.
Biz biznesni yaqin kelajakda kengaytirishni rejalashtirmoqdamiz.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi yaqin kelajakda ham asosiy muammo bo‘lib qoladi.
Narxlar yaqin kelajakda oshishi kutilmoqda.
Yaqin kelajakda yechim kutilmayapti.
Sayohat cheklovlari yaqin kelajakda ham davom etishi mumkin.

words.word: The ins and outs of something
words.definition: All the details and complexities of a subject or situation.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning barcha nozik tomonlari — mavzu yoki vaziyatning barcha tafsilotlari va murakkabliklari.
words.example1: She knows all the ins and outs of the legal system.
words.example1Translation: U huquq tizimining barcha nozik tomonlarini biladi.
words.example2: It takes time to learn the ins and outs of a new job.
words.example2Translation: Yangi ishning barcha nozik tomonlarini o‘rganish vaqt talab qiladi.
words.example3: He explained the ins and outs of the project to the team.
words.example3Translation: U loyihaning barcha nozik tomonlarini jamoaga tushuntirdi.
extraExamples: I need to understand the ins and outs before deciding.
The book covers all the ins and outs of starting a business.
Knowing the ins and outs helps avoid mistakes.
She is an expert on the ins and outs of marketing.
Learning the ins and outs of the software took weeks.
He taught me the ins and outs of cooking traditional food.
The ins and outs of politics can be very complicated.
extraExampleTranslations: Qaror qabul qilishdan oldin barcha nozik tomonlarni tushunishim kerak.
Kitob biznes ochishning barcha nozik tomonlarini yoritadi.
Barcha nozik tomonlarni bilish xatolardan saqlaydi.
U marketingning barcha nozik tomonlarini yaxshi biladi.
Dasturning barcha nozik tomonlarini o‘rganish bir necha hafta davom etdi.
U menga an’anaviy taomlarni tayyorlashning barcha nozik tomonlarini o‘rgatdi.
Siyosatning nozik tomonlari juda murakkab bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To laugh lightly and repeatedly, often in a nervous or playful way.
words.definitionUz: Kulgilamoq — ko‘pincha asabiy yoki o‘ynoqi tarzda yengil va takror-takror kulish.
words.example1: The children giggled when they saw the funny clown.
words.example1Translation: Bolalar kulgili palyaçoni ko‘rib kulgiladilar.
words.example2: She giggled nervously during the interview.
words.example2Translation: U intervyu paytida asabiy kulgiladi.
words.example3: They couldn’t stop giggling at the silly joke.
words.example3Translation: Ular ahmoqona hazildan kulgilashni to‘xtata olmadilar.
extraExamples: The girls giggled together in the corner.
He giggled when he realized his mistake.
Stop giggling and pay attention!
She giggled at the cute puppy video.
The audience giggled at the comedian’s jokes.
Children often giggle when they are excited.
Her giggle is very contagious.
extraExampleTranslations: Qizlar burchakda birga kulgilashdi.
U xatosini anglab yetgach, kulgiladi.
Kulgilashni to‘xtating va diqqat qiling!
U yoqimli kuchukcha videosini ko‘rib kulgiladi.
Tomoshabinlar komediyachining hazillaridan kulgiladilar.
Bolalar hayajonlanganda ko‘pincha kulgilashadi.
Uning kulgilashi juda yuqumli.

words.definition: A formal request for information or an official investigation.
words.definitionUz: So‘rov — ma’lumot olish uchun rasmiy murojaat yoki rasmiy tergov.
words.example1: I made an enquiry about the flight schedule.
words.example1Translation: Men parvoz jadvali haqida so‘rov yubordim.
words.example2: The police launched an enquiry into the incident.
words.example2Translation: Politsiya voqea bo‘yicha tergov boshladi.
words.example3: All enquiries should be sent by email.
words.example3Translation: Barcha so‘rovlar email orqali yuborilishi kerak.
extraExamples: She made an enquiry at the reception desk.
The government set up an independent enquiry.
Customer enquiries increased after the advertisement.
Please direct all enquiries to the main office.
The enquiry revealed important new evidence.
I have an enquiry regarding the course fees.
Enquiries about the product can be made online.
extraExampleTranslations: U qabulxonada so‘rov qildi.
Hukumat mustaqil tergov tashkil etdi.
Reklamadan keyin mijozlar so‘rovlari ko‘paydi.
Iltimos, barcha so‘rovlarni asosiy ofisga yo‘naltiring.
Tergov muhim yangi dalillarni ochib berdi.
Kurs haqi haqida so‘rovim bor.
Mahsulot haqidagi so‘rovlarni onlayn qilish mumkin.

words.definition: Countless difficulties that are too many to count individually.
words.definitionUz: Son-sanoqsiz muammolar — sanab bo‘lmaydigan darajada ko‘p qiyinchiliklar.
words.example1: The project faced innumerable problems during development.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha ishlab chiqish jarayonida son-sanoqsiz muammolarga duch keldi.
words.example2: Innumerable problems arise when planning large events.
words.example2Translation: Katta tadbirlarni rejalashtirganda son-sanoqsiz muammolar paydo bo‘ladi.
words.example3: She overcame innumerable problems to achieve her dream.
words.example3Translation: U orzusiga erishish uchun son-sanoqsiz muammolarni yengdi.
extraExamples: Innumerable problems can be solved with patience.
The country faces innumerable problems after the disaster.
There are innumerable problems with the current system.
Innumerable problems delayed the construction.
He listed innumerable problems with the proposal.
Innumerable problems taught her valuable lessons.
Despite innumerable problems, the team succeeded.
extraExampleTranslations: Son-sanoqsiz muammolarni sabr bilan hal qilish mumkin.
Falokatdan keyin mamlakat son-sanoqsiz muammolarga duch kelmoqda.
Hozirgi tizimda son-sanoqsiz muammolar mavjud.
Son-sanoqsiz muammolar qurilishni kechiktirdi.
U taklifdagi son-sanoqsiz muammolarni sanab o‘tdi.
Son-sanoqsiz muammolar unga qimmatli saboqlar berdi.
Son-sanoqsiz muammolarga qaramay jamoa muvaffaqiyat qozondi.

words.definition: Legally judged to be mentally ill and therefore not fully responsible for criminal actions.
words.definitionUz: Jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan — qonun bo‘yicha ruhiy kasal deb topilib, jinoyati uchun to‘liq javobgar bo‘lmagan shaxs.
words.example1: The court found him criminally insane.
words.example1Translation: Sud uni jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan deb topdi.
words.example2: Criminally insane individuals are usually sent to psychiatric hospitals.
words.example2Translation: Jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan shaxslar odatda ruhiy kasalxonaga yuboriladi.
words.example3: Determining if someone is criminally insane is a complex process.
words.example3Translation: Biror kishi jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozganmi yoki yo‘qmi, degan savolni hal qilish murakkab jarayon.
extraExamples: The defense argued that the defendant was criminally insane.
Criminally insane patients require special treatment.
The judge ruled the man was not criminally insane.
Criminally insane is a legal term, not a medical diagnosis.
He was found criminally insane and committed to a mental institution.
The case raised questions about the criminally insane defense.
Society must balance justice and care for the criminally insane.
extraExampleTranslations: Himoya tarafi ayblanuvchi jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan deb da’vo qildi.
Jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan bemorlar maxsus davolanishga muhtoj.
Sudya erkakni jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan emas deb hukm qildi.
Jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan — huquqiy atama, tibbiy tashxis emas.
U jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan deb topilib, ruhiy muassasaga yuborildi.
Ish jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozgan himoyasi haqida savollar tug‘dirdi.
Jamiyat adolat va jinoyat sodir etgan aqldan ozganlarga g‘amxo‘rlik o‘rtasida muvozanatni saqlashi kerak.

words.definition: To motivate someone through rewards, encouragement, or benefits.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishini rag‘batlantirmoq — mukofot, rag‘bat yoki foyda orqali odamni harakatga undash.
words.example1: The company provides incentive for employees who meet targets.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya maqsadlarga erishgan xodimlarni rag‘batlantiradi.
words.example2: Good teachers provide incentive for students to learn.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi o‘qituvchilar o‘quvchilarni o‘qishga rag‘batlantirishadi.
words.example3: Financial bonuses provide incentive for hard work.
words.example3Translation: Moliyaviy bonuslar qattiq mehnatni rag‘batlantiradi.
extraExamples: The government provides incentive for green energy projects.
Praise can provide incentive for children to try harder.
We need to provide incentive for people to recycle.
The scholarship provides incentive for academic excellence.
Incentives provided motivation for the whole team.
What incentive can we provide for better performance?
The program provides incentive for small businesses to grow.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat yashil energiya loyihalarini rag‘batlantiradi.
Maqtov bolalarni ko‘proq harakat qilishga rag‘batlantirishi mumkin.
Odamlar chiqindilarni qayta ishlashga rag‘bat kerak.
Stipendiya akademik muvaffaqiyatni rag‘batlantiradi.
Rag‘batlar butun jamoani ilhomlantirdi.
Yaxshi natija uchun qanday rag‘bat bera olamiz?
Dastur kichik bizneslarni rivojlantirishga rag‘bat beradi.

words.definition: A lack of confidence or emotional stability.
words.definitionUz: O‘ziga ishonchsizlik — o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonchning yetishmasligi yoki his-tuyg‘u jihatdan beqarorlik.
words.example1: Her insecurity made her doubt her own abilities.
words.example1Translation: O‘ziga ishonchsizlik uning o‘z qobiliyatlariga shubha qilishiga sabab bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Financial insecurity is a major concern for many families.
words.example2Translation: Moliyaviy beqarorlik ko‘p oilalar uchun katta tashvish.
words.example3: Overcoming insecurity takes time and support.
words.example3Translation: O‘ziga ishonchsizlikni yengish vaqt va qo‘llab-quvvatlash talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Insecurity can affect relationships and career growth.
Many teenagers experience feelings of insecurity.
His insecurity showed when he avoided speaking in public.
Building self-confidence helps reduce insecurity.
Job insecurity causes stress for employees.
Insecurity often stems from past experiences.
She learned to manage her insecurity through therapy.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘ziga ishonchsizlik munosabatlar va kar’yera o‘sishiga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Ko‘p o‘smirlar o‘ziga ishonchsizlikni boshdan kechirishadi.
Uning o‘ziga ishonchsizligi ommaviy chiqishdan qochganida namoyon bo‘ldi.
O‘ziga ishonchni mustahkamlash o‘ziga ishonchsizlikni kamaytiradi.
Ish o‘rnining beqarorligi xodimlarda stress keltirib chiqaradi.
O‘ziga ishonchsizlik ko‘pincha o‘tmish tajribalaridan kelib chiqadi.
U terapiya orqali o‘ziga ishonchsizlikni boshqarishni o‘rgandi.

words.definition: Vivid, distressing memories that resurface uncontrollably.
words.definitionUz: O‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari — nazorat qilib bo‘lmaydigan tarzda qayta-qayta paydo bo‘ladigan jonli va iztirobli xotiralar.
words.example1: Frantic images of the past haunted him at night.
words.example1Translation: O‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari uni tunda qiynardi.
words.example2: She tried to forget the frantic images of the accident.
words.example2Translation: U baxtsiz hodisaning vahimali tasvirlarini unutishga harakat qildi.
words.example3: Therapy helped him deal with frantic images of the past.
words.example3Translation: Terapiya unga o‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari bilan kurashishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Frantic images of the past can trigger anxiety.
The veteran was troubled by frantic images of war.
She pushed away the frantic images of her childhood.
Frantic images of the past often appear in dreams.
He learned techniques to manage frantic images of the past.
Frantic images of the past can affect daily life.
Time and support help reduce frantic images of the past.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari xavotirni kuchaytirishi mumkin.
Faxriyni urushning vahimali tasvirlari bezovta qilardi.
U bolaligining vahimali tasvirlarini o‘zidan uzoqlashtirdi.
O‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari ko‘pincha tushlarda paydo bo‘ladi.
U o‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlarini boshqarish usullarini o‘rgandi.
O‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlari kundalik hayotga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Vaqt va qo‘llab-quvvatlash o‘tmishning vahimali tasvirlarini kamaytiradi.

words.definition: Confidential or privileged information not available to the general public.
words.definitionUz: Ichki ma’lumot — oddiy odamlar uchun ochiq bo‘lmagan maxfiy yoki maxsus ma’lumot.
words.example1: He has inside knowledge about the company’s plans.
words.example1Translation: U kompaniya rejalar haqida ichki ma’lumotga ega.
words.example2: The journalist used inside knowledge for the report.
words.example2Translation: Jurnalist maqola uchun ichki ma’lumotdan foydalandi.
words.example3: Inside knowledge can give a big advantage in business.
words.example3Translation: Ichki ma’lumot biznesda katta ustunlik berishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She shared some inside knowledge with her team.
Inside knowledge helped them win the contract.
It is illegal to use inside knowledge for personal gain.
He gained inside knowledge while working there.
The book reveals inside knowledge of the industry.
Inside knowledge is valuable but must be used ethically.
They acted on inside knowledge of the market.
extraExampleTranslations: U jamoasi bilan ba’zi ichki ma’lumotlarni baham ko‘rdi.
Ichki ma’lumot ularga shartnomani yutishga yordam berdi.
Ichki ma’lumotdan shaxsiy manfaat uchun foydalanish noqonuniy.
U u yerda ishlaganida ichki ma’lumotga ega bo‘ldi.
Kitob sanoatning ichki ma’lumotlarini ochib beradi.
Ichki ma’lumot qimmatli, lekin uni axloqiy ishlatish kerak.
Ular bozor haqidagi ichki ma’lumot asosida harakat qilishdi.

words.definition: To cause or lead to the emergence of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga sabab bo‘lmoq — biror voqea, holat yoki natijani keltirib chiqarish.
words.example1: Poor planning can give rise to many problems.
words.example1Translation: Yomon rejalashtirish ko‘p muammolarga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
words.example2: The new law gave rise to heated debates.
words.example2Translation: Yangi qonun qizg‘in bahslarga sabab bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Technological advances give rise to new opportunities.
words.example3Translation: Texnologik yutuqlar yangi imkoniyatlarga sabab bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: Stress can give rise to health issues.
The discovery gave rise to further research.
Social media has given rise to new forms of communication.
Economic changes often give rise to political shifts.
Her words gave rise to misunderstanding.
Innovation gives rise to economic growth.
The incident gave rise to public concern.
extraExampleTranslations: Stress sog‘liq muammolariga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Kashfiyot keyingi tadqiqotlarga sabab bo‘ldi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar aloqa qilishning yangi shakllariga sabab bo‘ldi.
Iqtisodiy o‘zgarishlar ko‘pincha siyosiy siljishlarga sabab bo‘ladi.
Uning so‘zlari tushunmovchilikka sabab bo‘ldi.
Innovatsiya iqtisodiy o‘sishga sabab bo‘ladi.
Voqea jamoatchilik xavotiriga sabab bo‘ldi.

words.definition: After examining something more carefully.
words.definitionUz: Diqqat bilan qaraganda — biror narsani chuqurroq va ehtiyotkorlik bilan ko‘rib chiqqandan keyin.
words.example1: On closer inspection, the painting was revealed to be a fake.
words.example1Translation: Diqqat bilan qaraganda, rasm soxta ekanligi ma’lum bo‘ldi.
words.example2: On closer inspection, the plan had several flaws.
words.example2Translation: Diqqat bilan qaraganda, rejada bir necha nuqson bor edi.
words.example3: The document seemed fine, but on closer inspection it was outdated.
words.example3Translation: Hujjat yaxshi ko‘rinardi, lekin diqqat bilan qaraganda eskirgan edi.
extraExamples: On closer inspection, the difference became clear.
On closer inspection, we found hidden costs.
The evidence looked convincing until closer inspection.
On closer inspection, her story had inconsistencies.
The product seemed high quality on closer inspection.
On closer inspection, the agreement had unfair terms.
Closer inspection revealed the true cause of the problem.
extraExampleTranslations: Diqqat bilan qaraganda farq aniq bo‘ldi.
Diqqat bilan qaraganda yashirin xarajatlar topildi.
Dalillar ishonchli ko‘rinardi, lekin chuqurroq qaraganda...
Diqqat bilan qaraganda uning hikoyasida nomuvofiqliklar bor edi.
Diqqat bilan qaraganda mahsulot yuqori sifatli edi.
Diqqat bilan qaraganda kelishuvda adolatsiz shartlar bor edi.
Diqqat bilan qarash muammoning haqiqiy sababini ochib berdi.

words.definition: To display minimal willingness or desire to do something.
words.definitionUz: Kam moyillik ko‘rsatmoq — biror ishni qilishga kam xohish yoki moyillik bildirish.
words.example1: He showed little inclination to help with the housework.
words.example1Translation: U uy ishlariga yordam berishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatdi.
words.example2: The government shows little inclination to change the policy.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat siyosatni o‘zgartirishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatmoqda.
words.example3: She showed little inclination to continue the conversation.
words.example3Translation: U suhbatni davom ettirishga kam moyillik bildirdi.
extraExamples: The students showed little inclination to study for the test.
Management showed little inclination to listen to workers.
He shows little inclination to take responsibility.
The company shows little inclination to invest in training.
They showed little inclination to compromise.
She has shown little inclination to move to a new city.
The team showed little inclination to follow the new rules.
extraExampleTranslations: Talabalar testga tayyorgarlik ko‘rishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatdilar.
Rahbariyat ishchilarning gapini tinglashga kam moyillik ko‘rsatdi.
U mas’uliyatni o‘z zimmasiga olishga kam moyillik bildiradi.
Kompaniya o‘quv mashg‘ulotlariga sarmoya kiritishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatmoqda.
Ular murosa qilishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatdilar.
U yangi shaharga ko‘chib o‘tishga kam moyillik bildirdi.
Jamoa yangi qoidalarga rioya qilishga kam moyillik ko‘rsatdi.

words.definition: Undamaged and complete; not broken or impaired.
words.definitionUz: Butun / zarar ko‘rmagan — buzilmagan, to‘liq va zarar ko‘rmagan holatda.
words.example1: Amazingly, the ancient vase remained intact.
words.example1Translation: Ajablanarlisi, qadimiy vaza butun qoldi.
words.example2: The package arrived intact despite the long journey.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq yo‘lga qaramay, posilka butun yetib keldi.
words.example3: Most of the building survived the earthquake intact.
words.example3Translation: Binoning ko‘p qismi zilziladan keyin butun qoldi.
extraExamples: The documents were found intact after many years.
His reputation remained intact throughout the scandal.
The tradition has survived intact for centuries.
Please keep the seal intact until use.
The car was damaged but the engine was intact.
Her confidence stayed intact despite the criticism.
The evidence was kept intact for the trial.
extraExampleTranslations: Hujjatlar ko‘p yillardan keyin butun holatda topildi.
Janjal davomida uning obro‘si butun qoldi.
An’ana asrlar davomida butun saqlanib qolgan.
Iltimos, foydalangunigacha muhrni butun saqlang.
Mashina shikastlangan, lekin dvigateli butun edi.
Tanqidga qaramay uning o‘ziga ishonchi butun qoldi.
Dalillar sud jarayoni uchun butun saqlangan.

words.definition: To become legally valid or start to be applied.
words.definitionUz: Kuchga kirmoq — qonuniy kuchga ega bo‘lish yoki amalga kirish.
words.example1: The new law will come into force next month.
words.example1Translation: Yangi qonun kelasi oy kuchga kiradi.
words.example2: The agreement comes into force upon signing.
words.example2Translation: Kelishuv imzolanganidan keyin kuchga kiradi.
words.example3: The new regulations came into force yesterday.
words.example3Translation: Yangi qoidalar kecha kuchga kirdi.
extraExamples: The treaty comes into force after ratification.
When does the new policy come into force?
The changes will come into force immediately.
The ban on plastic bags comes into force next year.
The constitution came into force in 1992.
All rules come into force on January 1st.
The decision comes into force after approval.
extraExampleTranslations: Shartnoma ratifikatsiyadan keyin kuchga kiradi.
Yangi siyosat qachon kuchga kiradi?
O‘zgarishlar darhol kuchga kiradi.
Plastik sumkalarga taqiq kelasi yil kuchga kiradi.
Konstitutsiya 1992 yilda kuchga kirdi.
Barcha qoidalar 1-yanvarda kuchga kiradi.
Qaror tasdiqlangandan keyin kuchga kiradi.

words.definition: To express strong emotions openly and freely.
words.definitionUz: His-tuyg‘ularini bo‘shatmoq — kuchli his-tuyg‘ularni ochiq va erkin ifoda etish.
words.example1: She gave vent to her anger during the argument.
words.example1Translation: U bahs paytida g‘azabini bo‘shatdi.
words.example2: He finally gave vent to his frustrations.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat o‘z noroziliklarini bo‘shatdi.
words.example3: It’s healthy to give vent to your feelings sometimes.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida his-tuyg‘ularingizni bo‘shatish sog‘lomdir.
extraExamples: The crowd gave vent to their excitement.
She gave vent to her grief at the funeral.
He gave vent to his disappointment after the match.
Giving vent to emotions can relieve stress.
The protesters gave vent to their demands.
Don’t be afraid to give vent to your opinions.
The article gave vent to public concerns.
extraExampleTranslations: Olomon o‘z hayajonini bo‘shatdi.
U dafn marosimida qayg‘usini bo‘shatdi.
U o‘yindan keyin umidsizliklarini bo‘shatdi.
His-tuyg‘ularni bo‘shatish stressni yengillashtirishi mumkin.
Namoyishchilar o‘z talablarini bo‘shatdilar.
Fikrlaringizni bo‘shatishdan qo‘rqmang.
Maqola jamoatchilik tashvishlarini bo‘shatdi.

words.definition: Moral uprightness and adherence to strong ethical principles.
words.definitionUz: Halollik — axloqiy to‘g‘rilik va kuchli axloqiy tamoyillarga rioya qilish.
words.example1: He is a man of great integrity.
words.example1Translation: U juda halol odam.
words.example2: Integrity is essential in any leadership position.
words.example2Translation: Har qanday rahbarlik lavozimida halollik juda muhim.
words.example3: She acted with integrity throughout the difficult situation.
words.example3Translation: U qiyin vaziyatda ham halollik bilan harakat qildi.
extraExamples: Business integrity builds long-term trust.
The judge is known for his integrity.
Personal integrity should never be compromised.
Integrity means doing the right thing even when no one is watching.
Her integrity earned her respect from colleagues.
The company prides itself on its integrity.
Teaching integrity is important in education.
extraExampleTranslations: Biznesdagi halollik uzoq muddatli ishonchni yaratadi.
Sudya o‘z halolligi bilan mashhur.
Shaxsiy halollik hech qachon buzilmasligi kerak.
Halollik — hech kim ko‘rmasa ham to‘g‘ri ish qilishni bildiradi.
Uning halolligi hamkasblarining hurmatini qozondi.
Kompaniya o‘z halolligi bilan faxrlanadi.
Ta’limda halollikni o‘rgatish muhim.

words.definition: To have a natural tendency or ability towards artistic activities.
words.definitionUz: San’atga moyil bo‘lmoq — san’at bilan shug‘ullanishga tabiiy moyillik yoki qobiliyatga ega bo‘lish.
words.example1: She has always been artistically inclined.
words.example1Translation: U har doim san’atga moyil bo‘lgan.
words.example2: The child is artistically inclined and loves drawing.
words.example2Translation: Bola san’atga moyil va rasm chizishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
words.example3: Being artistically inclined helped him in his design career.
words.example3Translation: San’atga moyilligi uning dizayn kar’erasida yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Many in the family are artistically inclined.
He is artistically inclined but chose a scientific path.
Artistically inclined students often excel in creative subjects.
Her artistically inclined nature is evident in her home decor.
Schools should support artistically inclined children.
Being artistically inclined is a valuable trait.
She discovered she was artistically inclined later in life.
extraExampleTranslations: Oilada ko‘pchilik san’atga moyil.
U san’atga moyil, lekin ilmiy yo‘lni tanladi.
San’atga moyil talabalar ko‘pincha ijodiy fanlarda muvaffaqiyat qozonishadi.
Uning san’atga moyilligi uy bezagida yaqqol ko‘rinadi.
Maktablar san’atga moyil bolalarni qo‘llab-quvvatlashi kerak.
San’atga moyil bo‘lish qimmatli xususiyat.
U san’atga moyilligini hayotining keyingi bosqichida kashf qildi.

words.definition: Legally protected creations of the mind, such as inventions, literary and artistic works.
words.definitionUz: Intellektual mulk — ong mahsuli bo‘lgan, qonun bilan himoyalangan ixtirolar, adabiy va badiiy asarlar.
words.example1: Protecting intellectual property is important for innovation.
words.example1Translation: Intellektual mulkni himoya qilish innovatsiya uchun muhim.
words.example2: The company owns several patents as intellectual property.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya bir necha patentlarga intellektual mulk sifatida egalik qiladi.
words.example3: Intellectual property laws vary from country to country.
words.example3Translation: Intellektual mulk qonunlari mamlakatdan mamlakatga farq qiladi.
extraExamples: Copyright is a form of intellectual property.
Stealing intellectual property is illegal.
The artist fought to protect her intellectual property.
Intellectual property rights encourage creativity.
Universities help students protect their intellectual property.
Software is a major part of modern intellectual property.
Respect for intellectual property is essential in business.
extraExampleTranslations: Mualliflik huquqi intellektual mulkning bir turidir.
Intellektual mulkni o‘g‘irlash noqonuniy.
Rassom o‘z intellektual mulkini himoya qilish uchun kurashdi.
Intellektual mulk huquqlari ijodkorlikni rag‘batlantiradi.
Universitetlar talabalarga intellektual mulklarini himoya qilishda yordam berishadi.
Dasturiy ta’minot zamonaviy intellektual mulkning asosiy qismidir.
Biznesda intellektual mulkni hurmat qilish zarur.

words.definition: A sudden and powerful creative idea or insight.
words.definitionUz: Ilhom chaqnashi — birdaniga paydo bo‘ladigan kuchli ijodiy g‘oya yoki tushuncha.
words.example1: She got a flash of inspiration while walking in the rain.
words.example1Translation: Yomg‘irda yurayotganda unga ilhom chaqnashi keldi.
words.example2: The inventor had a flash of inspiration that changed everything.
words.example2Translation: Ixtirochi hamma narsani o‘zgartirgan ilhom chaqnashini oldi.
words.example3: A flash of inspiration can come at any moment.
words.example3Translation: Ilhom chaqnashi istalgan vaqtda kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Writers often wait for a flash of inspiration.
The solution came in a flash of inspiration.
That flash of inspiration led to a bestselling novel.
He had a flash of inspiration during the meeting.
A flash of inspiration solved the difficult puzzle.
Moments of flash of inspiration are precious.
She captured her flash of inspiration in her notebook.
extraExampleTranslations: Yozuvchilar ko‘pincha ilhom chaqnashini kutishadi.
Yechim ilhom chaqnashi bilan keldi.
O‘sha ilhom chaqnashi bestsellerga aylangan romanga sabab bo‘ldi.
U yig‘ilish paytida ilhom chaqnashini oldi.
Ilhom chaqnashi qiyin jumboqni hal qildi.
Ilhom chaqnashi lahzalari qimmatli.
U ilhom chaqnashini daftariga yozib oldi.

words.definition: For the benefit, advantage, or sake of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa manfaati uchun — biror narsaning foydasi, manfaati yoki sababiga ko‘ra.
words.example1: In the interest of safety, we canceled the event.
words.example1Translation: Xavfsizlik manfaati uchun biz tadbirni bekor qildik.
words.example2: In the interest of fairness, everyone should have a chance.
words.example2Translation: Adolat manfaati uchun har kim imkoniyatga ega bo‘lishi kerak.
words.example3: We made the decision in the interest of the company.
words.example3Translation: Biz qarorni kompaniya manfaati uchun qildik.
extraExamples: In the interest of time, let’s move to the next topic.
The law was changed in the interest of public health.
In the interest of peace, both sides agreed to talk.
She stayed silent in the interest of the team.
In the interest of transparency, we published the report.
The project was stopped in the interest of the environment.
In the interest of education, more funding is needed.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqt manfaati uchun keyingi mavzuga o‘tamiz.
Qonun jamoat salomatligi manfaati uchun o‘zgartirildi.
Tinchlik manfaati uchun ikki tomon ham gaplashishga rozi bo‘ldi.
U jamoa manfaati uchun jim turdi.
Ochiqlik manfaati uchun biz hisobotni e’lon qildik.
Loyiha atrof-muhit manfaati uchun to‘xtatildi.
Ta’lim manfaati uchun ko‘proq mablag‘ kerak.

words.definition: To deliberately cause difficulty, trouble, or emotional distress to someone.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishiga qiyin payt keltirmoq — ataylab biror kishiga qiyinchilik, muammo yoki ruhiy iztirob yetkazish.
words.example1: The boss gave him a hard time for being late.
words.example1Translation: Rahbar uni kechikgani uchun qiyin payt keltirdi.
words.example2: Don’t give your sister a hard time about her mistake.
words.example2Translation: Opangni xatosi uchun qiyin payt keltirma.
words.example3: The media gave the politician a hard time during the scandal.
words.example3Translation: Ommaviy axborot vositalari siyosatchiga janjal paytida qiyin payt keltirdi.
extraExamples: The teacher sometimes gives students a hard time.
His friends gave him a hard time about his new haircut.
Stop giving me a hard time and help me instead.
The coach gave the team a hard time after the loss.
She gave herself a hard time for forgetting the appointment.
Customers can give staff a hard time.
Parents often give teenagers a hard time about homework.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi ba’zida o‘quvchilarga qiyin payt keltiradi.
Do‘stlari uning yangi soch turmagi haqida unga qiyin payt keltirishdi.
Menga qiyin payt keltirishni to‘xtat va o‘rniga yordam ber.
Murabbiy mag‘lubiyatdan keyin jamoaga qiyin payt keltirdi.
U uchrashuvni unutgani uchun o‘ziga qiyin payt keltirdi.
Mijozlar xodimlarga qiyin payt keltirishi mumkin.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha o‘smirlarga uy vazifasi haqida qiyin payt keltirishadi.

words.definition: Impossible to imagine or believe; extremely unlikely.
words.definitionUz: Tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigan — tasavvur qilish yoki ishonish qiyin bo‘lgan, juda kam ehtimoliy.
words.example1: It seemed inconceivable that she would win the prize.
words.example1Translation: Uning mukofotni yutishi tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigandek edi.
words.example2: The idea of humans living on Mars was once inconceivable.
words.example2Translation: Odamlarning Marsda yashashi bir paytlar tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigan edi.
words.example3: It is inconceivable that no one noticed the mistake.
words.example3Translation: Hech kim xatoni payqamagani tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydi.
extraExamples: The scale of the disaster was inconceivable.
It is inconceivable that such a talented artist is unknown.
The speed of technological change is almost inconceivable.
His success story seemed inconceivable at first.
Inconceivable as it may seem, miracles do happen.
The amount of waste produced daily is inconceivable.
It was inconceivable to her that he would lie.
extraExampleTranslations: Falokatning ko‘lami tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigan darajada edi.
Bunday qobiliyatli rassomning noma’lum bo‘lishi tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydi.
Texnologik o‘zgarishlarning tezligi deyarli tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydi.
Uning muvaffaqiyat hikoyasi avvaliga tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigandek edi.
Qanchalik tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigan bo‘lsa ham, mo‘jizalar sodir bo‘ladi.
Har kuni ishlab chiqariladigan chiqindilar miqdori tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydi.
Uning yolg‘on gapirishi unga tasavvur qilib bo‘lmaydigan edi.

words.definition: To regard as the greatest source of anxiety or dread.
words.definitionUz: Eng ko‘p qo‘rqmoq — biror narsani eng katta qo‘rquv yoki tashvish manbai deb bilish.
words.example1: What people fear the most is often failure.
words.example1Translation: Odamlar eng ko‘p qo‘rqadigan narsa ko‘pincha muvaffaqiyatsizlikdir.
words.example2: She fears the most losing her family.
words.example2Translation: U oilasini yo‘qotishdan eng ko‘p qo‘rqadi.
words.example3: The thing I fear the most is public speaking.
words.example3Translation: Men eng ko‘p qo‘rqadigan narsa — ommaviy chiqish.
extraExamples: Many children fear the most being alone in the dark.
What do you fear the most in life?
He fears the most disappointing his parents.
The team feared the most losing the final match.
She fears the most making the wrong decision.
People fear the most things they don’t understand.
The greatest fear the most is often fear itself.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p bolalar qorong‘ida yolg‘iz qolishdan eng ko‘p qo‘rqishadi.
Hayotda eng ko‘p nimadan qo‘rqasiz?
U ota-onasini xafa qilishdan eng ko‘p qo‘rqadi.
Jamoa final o‘yinini yutqazishdan eng ko‘p qo‘rqardi.
U noto‘g‘ri qaror qabul qilishdan eng ko‘p qo‘rqadi.
Odamlar tushunmaydigan narsalardan eng ko‘p qo‘rqishadi.
Eng katta qo‘rquv ko‘pincha qo‘rquvning o‘zi.

words.definition: A temporary measure used until a permanent solution is found.
words.definitionUz: Vaqtinchalik yechim — doimiy yechim topilmaguncha ishlatiladigan vaqtinchalik choradir.
words.example1: We need an interim solution while we develop the full plan.
words.example1Translation: To‘liq rejani ishlab chiqayotganimizda vaqtinchalik yechim kerak.
words.example2: The interim solution worked well for several months.
words.example2Translation: Vaqtinchalik yechim bir necha oy yaxshi ishlagan.
words.example3: This is only an interim solution, not a permanent fix.
words.example3Translation: Bu faqat vaqtinchalik yechim, doimiy yechim emas.
extraExamples: The government introduced an interim solution for the crisis.
An interim solution was put in place until repairs were completed.
Interim solutions can sometimes become permanent.
We are looking for a better interim solution.
The interim solution reduced the problem significantly.
Finding an interim solution bought us some time.
The doctor suggested an interim solution for the pain.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat inqiroz uchun vaqtinchalik yechim joriy etdi.
Ta’mir tugaguncha vaqtinchalik yechim qo‘llandi.
Vaqtinchalik yechimlar ba’zan doimiy bo‘lib qolishi mumkin.
Biz yaxshiroq vaqtinchalik yechim izlamoqdamiz.
Vaqtinchalik yechim muammoni sezilarli darajada kamaytirdi.
Vaqtinchalik yechim topish bizga biroz vaqt berdi.
Shifokor og‘riq uchun vaqtinchalik yechim taklif qildi.

words.word: Go out of your way to do something
words.pronunciation: /ɡəʊ aʊt əv jɔːr weɪ tuː duː ˈsʌmθɪŋ/
words.definition: To make a special effort beyond what is normally required.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘shimcha harakat qilmoq — odatdagidan ortiqcha kuch sarflab, maxsus harakat qilish.
words.example1: She went out of her way to help her neighbor.
words.example1Translation: U qo‘shnisiga yordam berish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qildi.
words.example2: The staff went out of their way to make the guests feel welcome.
words.example2Translation: Xodimlar mehmonlarni xush kelibsiz his qilishlari uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qilishdi.
words.example3: He went out of his way to find the perfect gift.
words.example3Translation: U mukammal sovg‘a topish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qildi.
extraExamples: Thank you for going out of your way to assist me.
The teacher went out of her way to support struggling students.
Companies that go out of their way for customers succeed.
She always goes out of her way to be kind.
He went out of his way to attend the meeting.
Don’t go out of your way if it’s too much trouble.
The guide went out of his way to show us hidden spots.
extraExampleTranslations: Menga yordam berish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qilganingiz uchun rahmat.
O‘qituvchi qiynalayotgan o‘quvchilarni qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qildi.
Mijozlar uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qiladigan kompaniyalar muvaffaqiyat qozonadi.
U har doim mehribon bo‘lish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qiladi.
U yig‘ilishga kelish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qildi.
Agar juda qiyin bo‘lsa, qo‘shimcha harakat qilmang.
Yo‘lboshchi bizga yashirin joylarni ko‘rsatish uchun qo‘shimcha harakat qildi.

words.definition: Showing little concern for other people’s feelings or needs.
words.definitionUz: Beparvo — boshqalarning his-tuyg‘ulari yoki ehtiyojlariga unchalik ahamiyat bermaslik.
words.example1: It was inconsiderate of him to play loud music late at night.
words.example1Translation: Kechasi baland musiqa chalishi uning beparvoligi edi.
words.example2: She felt her friend was being inconsiderate by canceling at the last minute.
words.example2Translation: Do‘sti oxirgi daqiqada bekor qilgani uchun u o‘zini beparvo his qildi.
words.example3: Inconsiderate drivers cause a lot of accidents.
words.example3Translation: Beparvo haydovchilar ko‘plab baxtsiz hodisalarga sabab bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: It’s inconsiderate to talk loudly on your phone in public.
He apologized for his inconsiderate behavior.
Inconsiderate people often damage relationships.
She tries not to be inconsiderate of her neighbors.
Leaving the kitchen messy is inconsiderate.
The boss was criticized for his inconsiderate comments.
Being inconsiderate can make you unpopular.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoat joyida telefonda baland gapirish beparvolikdir.
U o‘zining beparvo xatti-harakati uchun kechirim so‘radi.
Beparvo odamlar ko‘pincha munosabatlarni buzadi.
U qo‘shnilariga beparvo bo‘lmaslikka harakat qiladi.
Oshxonani iflos qoldirish beparvolikdir.
Rahbar o‘zining beparvo izohlari uchun tanqid qilindi.
Beparvo bo‘lish sizni mashhur bo‘lmasligingizga olib keladi.

words.definition: To experience sudden, involuntary memories of traumatic past events.
words.definitionUz: Ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanish — o‘tmishdagi travmatik voqealarning to‘satdan, ixtiyorsiz ravishda esga tushishi.
words.example1: Many soldiers suffer from flashbacks after returning from war.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘plab askarlar urushdan qaytgach, ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanishadi.
words.example2: She suffers from flashbacks of the accident.
words.example2Translation: U avtohalokatning ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanadi.
words.example3: Therapy helps people who suffer from flashbacks.
words.example3Translation: Terapiya ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanadigan odamlarga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: He suffers from flashbacks at night.
Flashbacks can be very distressing.
Victims of crime often suffer from flashbacks.
Learning to manage flashbacks is important.
The movie triggered her flashbacks.
She avoids places that cause flashbacks.
PTSD patients commonly suffer from flashbacks.
extraExampleTranslations: U tunda ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanadi.
Ortga qaytish xotiralari juda og‘ir bo‘lishi mumkin.
Jinoyat qurbonlari ko‘pincha ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanishadi.
Ortga qaytish xotiralarini boshqarishni o‘rganish muhim.
Film uning ortga qaytish xotiralarini uyg‘otdi.
U ortga qaytish xotiralarini keltirib chiqaradigan joylardan qochadi.
PSSB bemorlari ko‘pincha ortga qaytish xotiralari bilan azoblanishadi.

words.definition: Treatment or action by medical professionals to improve or save a patient’s health.
words.definitionUz: Tibbiy aralashuv — bemorning sog‘lig‘ini yaxshilash yoki saqlab qolish uchun tibbiy mutaxassislar tomonidan amalga oshiriladigan davolash yoki harakat.
words.example1: The patient needed immediate medical intervention.
words.example1Translation: Bemorga darhol tibbiy aralashuv kerak edi.
words.example2: Early medical intervention can save lives.
words.example2Translation: Erta tibbiy aralashuv hayotlarni saqlab qolishi mumkin.
words.example3: Doctors decided against further medical intervention.
words.example3Translation: Shifokorlar qo‘shimcha tibbiy aralashuvdan voz kechishga qaror qilishdi.
extraExamples: Modern medical intervention has improved survival rates.
She required surgical medical intervention.
Medical intervention is not always necessary.
The government provides free medical intervention in emergencies.
Timely medical intervention prevented complications.
He refused medical intervention.
Medical intervention helped control the disease.
extraExampleTranslations: Zamonaviy tibbiy aralashuv omon qolish darajasini oshirdi.
U jarrohlik tibbiy aralashuviga muhtoj edi.
Tibbiy aralashuv har doim ham zarur bo‘lmaydi.
Hukumat favqulodda holatlarda bepul tibbiy aralashuvni ta’minlaydi.
O‘z vaqtida tibbiy aralashuv asoratlarni oldini oldi.
U tibbiy aralashuvdan voz kechdi.
Tibbiy aralashuv kasallikni nazorat qilishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: To do something mechanically without real interest or effort.
words.definitionUz: Rasmiyatchilik bilan bajarish — chinakam qiziqish yoki kuch sarflamasdan, mexanik tarzda ish qilish.
words.example1: He was just going through the motions at work.
words.example1Translation: U ishda faqat rasmiyatchilik bilan ishlayotgan edi.
words.example2: She went through the motions of studying but learned nothing.
words.example2Translation: U o‘qishni rasmiyatchilik bilan bajardi, lekin hech narsa o‘rganmadi.
words.example3: The team was going through the motions and lost the match.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa rasmiyatchilik bilan o‘ynab, o‘yinda mag‘lub bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Don’t just go through the motions — put in real effort.
Many employees go through the motions every day.
He went through the motions of apologizing.
Going through the motions won’t help you improve.
The singer seemed to be going through the motions.
She’s tired of going through the motions in her marriage.
Teachers can tell when students are just going through the motions.
extraExampleTranslations: Faqat rasmiyatchilik bilan emas — chinakam kuch sarflang.
Ko‘plab xodimlar har kuni rasmiyatchilik bilan ishlaydi.
U kechirim so‘rashni rasmiyatchilik bilan bajardi.
Rasmiyatchilik bilan bajarish sizga yaxshilanishga yordam bermaydi.
Qo‘shiqchi rasmiyatchilik bilan kuylayotgandek edi.
U oilaviy hayotida rasmiyatchilik bilan yashashdan charchagan.
O‘qituvchilar talabalar faqat rasmiyatchilik bilan o‘qiyotganini sezib turishadi.

words.definition: Involving deception or dishonesty for personal gain.
words.definitionUz: Soxta — shaxsiy manfaat uchun aldash yoki yolg‘on gapirish bilan bog‘liq.
words.example1: The company was involved in fraudulent activities.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya soxta faoliyat bilan shug‘ullangan.
words.example2: He was arrested for fraudulent use of credit cards.
words.example2Translation: U kredit kartalarini soxta ishlatgani uchun hibsga olingan.
words.example3: The fraudulent website tricked many people.
words.example3Translation: Soxta veb-sayt ko‘plab odamlarni aldab qo‘ygan.
extraExamples: Fraudulent claims are common in insurance.
The document was proven to be fraudulent.
She lost money in a fraudulent investment scheme.
Fraudulent behavior can lead to serious legal consequences.
The seller was accused of fraudulent advertising.
They discovered fraudulent transactions in the account.
Fighting fraudulent practices is important.
extraExampleTranslations: Sug‘urtada soxta da’volar tez-tez uchraydi.
Hujjat soxta ekanligi isbotlandi.
U soxta investitsiya sxemasida pulini yo‘qotdi.
Soxta xatti-harakatlar jiddiy huquqiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Sotuvchi soxta reklama uchun ayblandi.
Ular hisobda soxta operatsiyalarni aniqlashdi.
Soxta amaliyotlar bilan kurashish muhim.

words.definition: Highly personal or private information about someone’s life.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsiy tafsilotlar — kimningdir hayoti haqidagi juda shaxsiy yoki maxfiy ma’lumotlar.
words.example1: She shared intimate details about her childhood.
words.example1Translation: U bolaligi haqidagi shaxsiy tafsilotlarni aytib berdi.
words.example2: The book reveals intimate details of the singer’s life.
words.example2Translation: Kitob qo‘shiqchining hayotining shaxsiy tafsilotlarini ochib beradi.
words.example3: It’s not appropriate to discuss intimate details in public.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat joyida shaxsiy tafsilotlarni muhokama qilish o‘rinli emas.
extraExamples: He knows too many intimate details about me.
The interview included intimate details of her marriage.
Sharing intimate details builds trust.
Some intimate details should remain private.
The diary contained intimate details.
She regretted revealing intimate details.
Journalists often seek intimate details.
extraExampleTranslations: U men haqimda juda ko‘p shaxsiy tafsilotlarni biladi.
Intervyuda uning oilaviy hayotining shaxsiy tafsilotlari bor edi.
Shaxsiy tafsilotlarni baham ko‘rish ishonchni mustahkamlaydi.
Ba’zi shaxsiy tafsilotlar maxfiy qolishi kerak.
Kundalikda shaxsiy tafsilotlar bor edi.
U shaxsiy tafsilotlarni ochib berganiga pushaymon bo‘ldi.
Jurnalistlar ko‘pincha shaxsiy tafsilotlarni izlashadi.

words.word: Go so far as to do something
words.pronunciation: /ɡəʊ səʊ fɑːr æz tə duː ˈsʌm.θɪŋ/
words.definition: To take an extreme or surprising action.
words.definitionUz: Hatto shunchalik borish — juda ekstremal yoki kutilmagan harakat qilish.
words.example1: She went so far as to quit her job to pursue her dream.
words.example1Translation: U orzusini amalga oshirish uchun hatto ishdan bo‘shashgacha bordi.
words.example2: He went so far as to lie to his parents.
words.example2Translation: U ota-onasiga yolg‘on gapirishgacha bordi.
words.example3: They went so far as to sue the company.
words.example3Translation: Ular kompaniyani sudga berishgacha borishdi.
extraExamples: I wouldn’t go so far as to call him a liar.
The manager went so far as to fire the entire team.
She went so far as to change her name.
He went so far as to apologize publicly.
They went so far as to cancel the wedding.
Don’t go so far as to break the law.
The artist went so far as to destroy his own painting.
extraExampleTranslations: Men uni yolg‘onchi deb atashgacha bormayman.
Rahbar butun jamoani ishdan bo‘shatishgacha bordi.
U hatto ismini o‘zgartirishgacha bordi.
U ochiqdan-ochiq kechirim so‘rashgacha bordi.
Ular to‘yni bekor qilishgacha borishdi.
Qonunni buzishgacha bormang.
Rassom o‘z rasmini yo‘q qilishgacha bordi.

words.definition: Feeling very irritable, angry, or in a bad temper.
words.definitionUz: Yomon kayfiyatda — juda asabiy, g‘azablangan yoki yomon kayfiyatda bo‘lish.
words.example1: Dad is in a foul mood today, so be careful.
words.example1Translation: Otang bugun yomon kayfiyatda, ehtiyot bo‘l.
words.example2: She woke up in a foul mood.
words.example2Translation: U yomon kayfiyatda uyg‘ondi.
words.example3: Don’t talk to him when he’s in a foul mood.
words.example3Translation: U yomon kayfiyatda bo‘lganda u bilan gaplashma.
extraExamples: The boss has been in a foul mood all week.
I’m in a foul mood because of the bad weather.
She gets in a foul mood when she’s hungry.
His foul mood affected the whole team.
Try not to let a foul mood ruin your day.
He came home in a foul mood after losing the game.
Being in a foul mood is normal sometimes.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbar butun hafta yomon kayfiyatda.
Yomon ob-havo tufayli yomon kayfiyatdaman.
U och qolganda yomon kayfiyatga tushadi.
Uning yomon kayfiyati butun jamoaga ta’sir qildi.
Yomon kayfiyat kuningizni buzishiga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
U o‘yinda yutqazgandan keyin yomon kayfiyatda uyga keldi.
Ba’zida yomon kayfiyatda bo‘lish normal holat.

words.word: It goes against the grain to do something
words.definition: To do something that conflicts with one’s natural character, beliefs, or principles.
words.definitionUz: Tabiatiga zid — o‘z tabiatiga, e’tiqodiga yoki printsiplariga zid bo‘lgan ish qilish.
words.example1: It goes against the grain for her to lie.
words.example1Translation: Yolg‘on gapirish uning tabiatiga zid.
words.example2: It went against the grain for him to ask for help.
words.example2Translation: Yordam so‘rash uning tabiatiga zid edi.
words.example3: Cheating goes against the grain for most honest people.
words.example3Translation: Aldash ko‘pchilik halol odamlarning tabiatiga zid.
extraExamples: It goes against the grain for me to criticize others.
Firing employees goes against the grain for the kind boss.
It went against the grain to sell the family home.
Accepting defeat goes against the grain for competitive players.
She finds it goes against the grain to waste food.
It goes against the grain for him to be rude.
Compromising on principles goes against the grain.
extraExampleTranslations: Boshqalarni tanqid qilish mening tabiatimga zid.
Xodimlarni ishdan bo‘shatish mehribon rahbarning tabiatiga zid.
Oilaviy uyni sotish uning tabiatiga zid edi.
Mag‘lubiyatni qabul qilish raqobatbardosh o‘yinchilarning tabiatiga zid.
Ovqatni behuda sarflash uning tabiatiga zid.
Qo‘pollik qilish uning tabiatiga zid.
Printsiplardan voz kechish tabiatiga zid.

words.definition: In addition to something already mentioned; as an extra.
words.definitionUz: Ustiga-ustak — allaqachon aytib o‘tilgan narsaga qo‘shimcha ravishda.
words.example1: The car is fast and, into the bargain, very economical.
words.example1Translation: Mashina tez va ustiga-ustak juda tejamkor.
words.example2: She’s beautiful and intelligent into the bargain.
words.example2Translation: U go‘zal va ustiga-ustak aqlli.
words.example3: The job pays well and offers free training into the bargain.
words.example3Translation: Ish yaxshi maosh to‘laydi va ustiga-ustak bepul o‘qitishni taklif qiladi.
extraExamples: It’s cheap and good quality into the bargain.
He’s talented and hardworking into the bargain.
The hotel is luxurious and has a great view into the bargain.
She got a promotion and a raise into the bargain.
The phone is new and comes with a warranty into the bargain.
It’s healthy and delicious into the bargain.
He’s funny and kind into the bargain.
extraExampleTranslations: Arzon va ustiga-ustak sifatli.
U iste’dodli va ustiga-ustak mehnatkash.
Mehmonxona hashamatli va ustiga-ustak ajoyib manzaraga ega.
U lavozim oshirdi va ustiga-ustak maoshini oshirdi.
Telefon yangi va ustiga-ustak kafolat bilan keladi.
Sog‘lom va ustiga-ustak mazali.
U kulgili va ustiga-ustak mehribon.

words.definition: To do the same job or follow the same path as someone else, especially a parent or role model.
words.definitionUz: Oyoq izidan borish — ayniqsa ota-ona yoki namunaviy shaxsning kasbini tanlash yoki yo‘lidan borish.
words.example1: He followed in his father’s footsteps and became a doctor.
words.example1Translation: U otasining oyoq izidan borib, shifokor bo‘ldi.
words.example2: She decided not to follow in her sister’s footsteps.
words.example2Translation: U singlisining oyoq izidan bormaslikka qaror qildi.
words.example3: Many children follow in their parents’ footsteps.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab bolalar ota-onalarining oyoq izidan borishadi.
extraExamples: She followed in her mother’s footsteps as a teacher.
He didn’t want to follow in his brother’s footsteps.
Following in someone’s footsteps can be challenging.
The young politician is following in his mentor’s footsteps.
She proudly followed in her grandmother’s footsteps.
Not everyone wants to follow in their parents’ footsteps.
He followed in the footsteps of great scientists.
extraExampleTranslations: U onasining oyoq izidan borib o‘qituvchi bo‘ldi.
U akasining oyoq izidan bormoqchi emas edi.
Kimdirning oyoq izidan borish qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
Yosh siyosatchi ustozining oyoq izidan bormoqda.
U buvisining oyoq izidan borishdan faxrlanardi.
Hamma ham ota-onasining oyoq izidan bormoqchi emas.
U buyuk olimlarning oyoq izidan bordi.

words.definition: Unwillingness to accept or respect different religious beliefs.
words.definitionUz: Diniy murosasizlik — turli diniy e’tiqodlarni qabul qilmaslik yoki hurmat qilmaslik.
words.example1: Religious intolerance can lead to conflict.
words.example1Translation: Diniy murosasizlik mojarolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example2: We must fight against religious intolerance.
words.example2Translation: Diniy murosasizlikka qarshi kurashishimiz kerak.
words.example3: The country promotes religious tolerance and fights intolerance.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakat diniy bag‘rikenglikni targ‘ib qiladi va murosasizlikka qarshi kurashadi.
extraExamples: Religious intolerance is a serious social problem.
Education helps reduce religious intolerance.
Acts of religious intolerance are condemned worldwide.
Religious intolerance harms community harmony.
She spoke out against religious intolerance.
Religious intolerance has no place in modern society.
The law protects against religious intolerance.
extraExampleTranslations: Diniy murosasizlik jiddiy ijtimoiy muammo.
Ta’lim diniy murosasizlikni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Diniy murosasizlik harakatlari butun dunyoda qoralanadi.
Diniy murosasizlik jamiyat birdamligiga zarar yetkazadi.
U diniy murosasizlikka qarshi chiqdi.
Diniy murosasizlik zamonaviy jamiyatda o‘rin topmaydi.
Qonun diniy murosasizlikdan himoya qiladi.

words.definition: To increase suddenly and dramatically, or to become extremely angry.
words.definitionUz: Osmon parcha bo‘lmoq — narx yoki ko‘rsatkich birdaniga keskin o‘sish yoki juda qattiq g‘azablanish.
words.example1: Prices went through the roof after the storm.
words.example1Translation: Bo‘rondan keyin narxlar osmon parcha bo‘ldi.
words.example2: When he heard the news, he went through the roof.
words.example2Translation: Yangilikni eshitgach, u juda g‘azablandi.
words.example3: Sales have gone through the roof since the new launch.
words.example3Translation: Yangi mahsulot chiqqandan keyin savdo osmon parcha bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Temperatures went through the roof last summer.
Her blood pressure went through the roof.
The cost of living has gone through the roof.
He went through the roof when he saw the mess.
Interest in the game has gone through the roof.
Property prices are going through the roof.
Don’t go through the roof — it’s not that bad.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘tgan yozda harorat osmon parcha bo‘ldi.
Qon bosimi keskin ko‘tarildi.
Yashash narxi osmon parcha bo‘ldi.
U tartibsizlikni ko‘rib, juda g‘azablandi.
O‘yinga qiziqish keskin oshdi.
Ko‘chmas mulk narxlari osmon parcha bo‘lmoqda.
Juda g‘azablanma — bunchalik yomon emas.

words.definition: To deliberately start a fire on something.
words.definitionUz: Yoqib yuborish — biror narsani ataylab yondirish.
words.example1: Someone set the car on fire.
words.example1Translation: Kimdir mashinani yoqib yuborgan.
words.example2: The protesters set buildings on fire.
words.example2Translation: Namoyishchilar binolarni yoqib yuborishdi.
words.example3: Don’t set the forest on fire!
words.example3Translation: O‘rmonni yoqib yubormang!
extraExamples: He accidentally set the kitchen on fire.
The criminal set the evidence on fire.
Setting trash on fire is dangerous.
They set the old house on fire.
Never set fireworks on fire near dry grass.
The rebels set the government building on fire.
She set her old letters on fire.
extraExampleTranslations: U tasodifan oshxonani yoqib yubordi.
Jinoyatchi dalillarni yoqib yubordi.
Chiqindilarni yoqish xavfli.
Ular eski uyni yoqib yuborishdi.
Quruq o‘t yaqinida feserverklarni yoqmang.
Isyonchilar hukumat binosini yoqib yuborishdi.
U eski xatlarini yoqib yubordi.

words.definition: A story that strongly captures attention and arouses curiosity.
words.definitionUz: Qiziqarli hikoya — diqqatni kuchli tortadigan va qiziqish uyg‘otadigan hikoya.
words.example1: The movie tells an intriguing story about lost love.
words.example1Translation: Film yo‘qolgan muhabbat haqida qiziqarli hikoya hikoya qiladi.
words.example2: She wrote an intriguing story that kept readers hooked.
words.example2Translation: U o‘quvchilarni o‘ziga tortadigan qiziqarli hikoya yozdi.
words.example3: The book has an intriguing story full of twists.
words.example3Translation: Kitobda burilishlarga boy qiziqarli hikoya bor.
extraExamples: He told us an intriguing story from his travels.
The intriguing story made the documentary popular.
Children love intriguing stories before bedtime.
The novel begins with an intriguing story.
An intriguing story can change how you see the world.
The journalist uncovered an intriguing story.
She is working on a new intriguing story.
extraExampleTranslations: U sayohatlari haqida qiziqarli hikoya aytib berdi.
Qiziqarli hikoya hujjatli filmni mashhur qildi.
Bolalar uxlashdan oldin qiziqarli hikoyalarni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
Roman qiziqarli hikoya bilan boshlanadi.
Qiziqarli hikoya dunyoga qarashingizni o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
Jurnalist qiziqarli hikoyani ochib berdi.
U yangi qiziqarli hikoya ustida ishlamoqda.

words.definition: The outcome or result is very uncertain and could go either way.
words.definitionUz: Noaniq holat — natija juda noaniq va ikki tomonga ketishi mumkin.
words.example1: The patient’s condition is touch and go.
words.example1Translation: Bemorni ahvoli noaniq.
words.example2: It was touch and go whether we would finish on time.
words.example2Translation: Vaqtida tugatishimiz noaniq edi.
words.example3: The match was touch and go until the last minute.
words.example3Translation: O‘yin oxirgi daqiqagacha noaniq edi.
extraExamples: The surgery is touch and go.
It’s touch and go with the weather for the picnic.
Her job is touch and go at the moment.
The negotiations are touch and go.
It was touch and go, but we made it.
The election results are still touch and go.
The business is in a touch and go situation.
extraExampleTranslations: Jarrohlik operatsiyasi noaniq.
Piknik uchun ob-havo noaniq.
Hozir uning ishi noaniq holatda.
Muzokaralar noaniq.
Noaniq edi, lekin uddasidan chiqdik.
Saylov natijalari hali ham noaniq.
Biznes noaniq holatda.

words.definition: To eat something with great enjoyment or to take great pleasure in something.
words.definitionUz: Zavq bilan yemoq — biror narsadan katta zavq bilan foydalanish yoki zavqlanish.
words.example1: We feasted on fresh seafood by the beach.
words.example1Translation: Biz plyajda yangi dengiz mahsulotlaridan zavq bilan yedik.
words.example2: The children feasted on ice cream.
words.example2Translation: Bolalar muzqaymoqdan zavq bilan yeyishdi.
words.example3: Tourists feast on the beautiful scenery.
words.example3Translation: Sayyohlar go‘zal manzaradan zavqlanishadi.
extraExamples: She feasted on the delicious cake.
Birds feasted on the ripe fruit.
We feasted on stories from his travels.
The readers feasted on the new book.
He feasted on the compliments he received.
The team feasted on their victory.
Cats love to feast on fresh fish.
extraExampleTranslations: U mazali tortdan zavq bilan yedi.
Qushlar pishgan mevalardan zavq bilan yeyishdi.
Biz uning sayohat hikoyalaridan zavqlanib tingladik.
O‘quvchilar yangi kitobdan zavq olishdi.
U olgan iltifotlardan zavqlanardi.
Jamoa g‘alabasidan zavqlanardi.
Mushuklar yangi baliqdan zavq bilan yeyishadi.

words.word: Do someone the world of good
words.definition: To have a very positive effect on someone’s health, happiness, or well-being.
words.definitionUz: Juda foydali bo‘lmoq — kimningdir sog‘lig‘i, baxti yoki farovonligiga juda ijobiy ta’sir ko‘rsatish.
words.example1: A holiday would do you the world of good.
words.example1Translation: Dam olish sizga juda foydali bo‘lardi.
words.example2: Talking to a friend did her the world of good.
words.example2Translation: Do‘sti bilan gaplashish unga juda foydali bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Fresh air and exercise will do you the world of good.
words.example3Translation: Toza havo va sport sizga juda foydali bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: Some rest will do you the world of good.
The medicine did him the world of good.
A smile can do someone the world of good.
The trip did the children the world of good.
Listening to music does me the world of good.
Kind words do everyone the world of good.
Changing jobs did her the world of good.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir oz dam olish sizga juda foydali bo‘ladi.
Dori unga juda foydali bo‘ldi.
Tabassum kimdirga juda foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.
Sayohat bolalarga juda foydali bo‘ldi.
Musiqa tinglash menga juda foydali.
Mehribon so‘zlar hammaga juda foydali.
Ishni o‘zgartirish unga juda foydali bo‘ldi.

words.definition: An essential and natural part of something.
words.definitionUz: Ajralmas qismi — biror narsaning muhim va tabiiy qismi.
words.example1: Teamwork is an intrinsic part of the job.
words.example1Translation: Jamoaviy ish bu kasbning ajralmas qismidir.
words.example2: Creativity is intrinsic part of art.
words.example2Translation: Ijodkorlik san’atning ajralmas qismidir.
words.example3: Honesty is an intrinsic part of a good relationship.
words.example3Translation: Halollik yaxshi munosabatlarning ajralmas qismidir.
extraExamples: Language is an intrinsic part of culture.
Risk is an intrinsic part of business.
Music is an intrinsic part of her life.
Curiosity is intrinsic part of learning.
Respect is an intrinsic part of leadership.
Change is an intrinsic part of growth.
Emotions are an intrinsic part of being human.
extraExampleTranslations: Til madaniyatning ajralmas qismidir.
