Unga ish takliflari bilan to‘lib ketdi.
Bozor arzon mahsulotlar bilan to‘lib ketdi.
Yangilikdan keyin studiya so‘rovlar bilan to‘lib ketdi.
Festival paytida shahar sayyohlar bilan to‘lib ketdi.

words.definition: To express genuine emotions openly and honestly.
words.definitionUz: Yuragingizni ochmoq – chin dildan his-tuyg‘ularingizni ochiq va samimiy ifodalash.
words.example1: She finally opened her heart and shared her feelings.
words.example1Translation: U nihoyat yuragini ochib, his-tuyg‘ularini baham ko‘rdi.
words.example2: It’s hard to open your heart after being hurt.
words.example2Translation: Og‘riq ko‘rgandan keyin yuragingizni ochish qiyin.
words.example3: He opened his heart to his best friend.
words.example3Translation: U eng yaqin do‘stiga yuragini ochdi.
extraExamples: Opening your heart can strengthen relationships.
The song helped her open her heart.
Don’t be afraid to open your heart.
She opened her heart during the therapy session.
Opening your heart takes courage.
He rarely opens his heart to anyone.
The story encouraged people to open their hearts.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuragingizni ochish munosabatlarni mustahkamlaydi.
Qo‘shiq unga yuragini ochishga yordam berdi.
Yuragingizni ochishdan qo‘rqmang.
U terapiya seansida yuragini ochdi.
Yuragingizni ochish jasorat talab qiladi.
U kamdan-kam kimgadir yuragini ochadi.
Hikoya odamlarni yuraklarini ochishga undadi.

words.definition: To grow or develop successfully and strongly.
words.definitionUz: Gullab-yashnamoq – muvaffaqiyatli va kuchli rivojlanish, o‘sish.
words.example1: The business flourished after the new investment.
words.example1Translation: Yangi investitsiyadan keyin biznes gullab-yashnadi.
words.example2: Plants flourish in this sunny climate.
words.example2Translation: Bu quyoshli iqlimda o‘simliklar gullab-yashnaydi.
words.example3: The arts scene is flourishing in the city.
words.example3Translation: Shaharda san’at gullab-yashnamoqda.
extraExamples: Children flourish in a supportive environment.
The company continues to flourish.
Her talent flourished under the right teacher.
Tourism is flourishing this year.
The garden is flourishing beautifully.
Democracy can only flourish with freedom.
New ideas flourish in open discussions.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar qo‘llab-quvvatlovchi muhitda gullab-yashnaydi.
Kompaniya gullab-yashnashda davom etmoqda.
Uning iste’dodi to‘g‘ri o‘qituvchi qo‘lida gullab-yashnadi.
Turizm bu yil gullab-yashnamoqda.
Bog‘ chiroyli gullab-yashnamoqda.
Demokratiya faqat erkinlik bilan gullab-yashnashi mumkin.
Yangi g‘oyalar ochiq muhokamalarda gullab-yashnaydi.

words.definition: To adapt easily to circumstances without resistance.
words.definitionUz: Oqimga qo‘shilmoq – vaziyatga qarshilik ko‘rsatmasdan, osongina moslashish va oqimga ergashish.
words.example1: I don’t have a plan – I’ll just go with the flow.
words.example1Translation: Menda reja yo‘q – shunchaki oqimga qo‘shilaman.
words.example2: It’s better to go with the flow sometimes.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zida oqimga qo‘shilish yaxshiroq.
words.example3: She learned to go with the flow during her travels.
words.example3Translation: U sayohatlari davomida oqimga qo‘shilishni o‘rgandi.
extraExamples: Go with the flow and see what happens.
He is good at going with the flow.
Sometimes you need to go with the flow instead of fighting it.
The team decided to go with the flow.
Going with the flow reduces stress.
She doesn’t like going with the flow – she prefers planning.
In new situations, it’s often best to go with the flow.
extraExampleTranslations: Oqimga qo‘shiling va nima bo‘lishini ko‘ring.
U oqimga qo‘shilishda yaxshi.
Ba’zida qarshilik ko‘rsatish o‘rniga oqimga qo‘shilish kerak.
Jamoa oqimga qo‘shilishga qaror qildi.
Oqimga qo‘shilish stressni kamaytiradi.
U oqimga qo‘shilishni yoqtirmaydi – reja tuzishni afzal ko‘radi.
Yangi vaziyatlarda ko‘pincha oqimga qo‘shilish yaxshiroq.

words.definition: To be deeply affected emotionally by something.
words.definitionUz: Yurakka olmoq – biror narsani chuqur his qilib, o‘ziga qattiq ta’sir qildirish.
words.example1: Don’t take the criticism to heart.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidni yurakka olmang.
words.example2: She took his words to heart and changed her behavior.
words.example2Translation: U uning so‘zlarini yurakka olib, xatti-harakatini o‘zgartirdi.
words.example3: He took the failure to heart and worked harder.
words.example3Translation: U muvaffaqiyatsizlikni yurakka olib, yanada qattiqroq ishladi.
extraExamples: Try not to take negative comments to heart.
She tends to take things too much to heart.
He took the rejection to heart.
Taking things to heart can be harmful to your health.
The teacher told the students not to take the test results to heart.
I took his advice to heart.
Don’t take it to heart – it was just a joke.
extraExampleTranslations: Salbiy izohlarni yurakka olmaslikka harakat qiling.
U narsalarni haddan tashqari yurakka oladi.
U rad javobini yurakka oldi.
Narsalarni yurakka olish salomatlikka zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
O‘qituvchi talabalarga test natijalarini yurakka olmaslikni aytdi.
Men uning maslahatini yurakka oldim.
Buni yurakka olmang – bu shunchaki hazil edi.

words.definition: For the advantage or welfare of someone.
words.definitionUz: … foydasi uchun – biror kishining manfaati yoki farovonligi uchun.
words.example1: The changes were made for the students’ benefit.
words.example1Translation: O‘zgarishlar talabalar foydasi uchun amalga oshirildi.
words.example2: She sacrificed a lot for her children’s benefit.
words.example2Translation: U farzandlari foydasi uchun ko‘p narsadan voz kechdi.
words.example3: The information is provided for your benefit.
words.example3Translation: Ma’lumot sizning foydangiz uchun berilmoqda.
extraExamples: The new law was introduced for everyone’s benefit.
He worked hard for the benefit of his family.
This training is for the benefit of new employees.
The decision was made for the greater benefit of society.
She explained the rules for the benefit of the audience.
The event was organized for the benefit of charity.
All these efforts are for your benefit.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi qonun hamma foydasi uchun joriy etildi.
U oilasi foydasi uchun qattiq mehnat qildi.
Bu o‘quv yangi xodimlar foydasi uchun.
Qaror jamiyatning kattaroq manfaati uchun qabul qilindi.
U qoidalarni tomoshabinlar foydasi uchun tushuntirdi.
Tadbir xayriya foydasi uchun tashkil etildi.
Barcha harakatlar sizning foydangiz uchun.

words.definition: Time seems to pass very quickly.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt tez o‘tadi – vaqt juda tez o‘tib ketayotgandek tuyulishi.
words.example1: Time flies when you’re having fun.
words.example1Translation: Qiziqarli bo‘lsa, vaqt tez o‘tadi.
words.example2: It’s hard to believe how time flies.
words.example2Translation: Vaqtning qanchalik tez o‘tganiga ishonish qiyin.
words.example3: Time flies – the children have grown up so fast.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt tez o‘tadi – bolalar juda tez katta bo‘lib qolishdi.
extraExamples: Time flies when you’re busy.
Looking back, time really flies.
Time flies – another year is almost over.
The older you get, the faster time flies.
Time flies during the holidays.
We must make the most of it because time flies.
Time flies but memories last forever.
extraExampleTranslations: Band bo‘lsangiz, vaqt tez o‘tadi.
Orqaga qarab, vaqt haqiqatan ham tez o‘tganini ko‘rasiz.
Vaqt tez o‘tadi – yana bir yil tugayapti.
Qanchalik katta bo‘lsangiz, vaqt shunchalik tez o‘tadi.
Dam olish kunlarida vaqt tez o‘tadi.
Vaqt tez o‘tgani uchun undan unumli foydalanishimiz kerak.
Vaqt tez o‘tadi, lekin xotiralar abadiy qoladi.

words.definition: To imitate someone’s actions or behaviour.
words.definitionUz: …ga ergashmoq – birovning harakatlari yoki xatti-harakatlarini o‘rnak qilib, takrorlash.
words.example1: The younger students follow their teacher’s example.
words.example1Translation: Kichik sinf o‘quvchilari o‘qituvchilariga ergashishadi.
words.example2: He always follows his father’s example.
words.example2Translation: U har doim otasiga ergashadi.
words.example3: Follow the example of successful people.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatli odamlarning o‘rnagiga ergashing.
extraExamples: Children often follow their parents’ example.
She set a good example for others to follow.
Don’t follow bad examples.
The team followed the captain’s example.
Following someone’s example can lead to success.
He followed the example of his mentor.
It’s important to follow positive examples.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar ko‘pincha ota-onalariga ergashishadi.
U boshqalarga ergashish uchun yaxshi o‘rnak bo‘ldi.
Yomon o‘rnaklarga ergashmang.
Jamoa sardoriga ergashdi.
Birovning o‘rnagiga ergashish muvaffaqiyatga olib kelishi mumkin.
U ustozining o‘rnagiga ergashdi.
Ijobiy o‘rnaklarga ergashish muhim.

words.definition: To change one’s opinion or feelings about something.
words.definitionUz: Fikrini o‘zgartirmoq – biror narsaga bo‘lgan munosabati yoki fikrini o‘zgartirish.
words.example1: She had a change of heart and decided to help.
words.example1Translation: U fikrini o‘zgartirib, yordam berishga qaror qildi.
words.example2: He had a change of heart about moving abroad.
words.example2Translation: U chet elga ko‘chib o‘tish haqidagi fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
words.example3: The manager had a change of heart and approved the project.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar fikrini o‘zgartirib, loyihani tasdiqladi.
extraExamples: Many people have a change of heart after seeing the truth.
She had a sudden change of heart.
He showed no signs of having a change of heart.
A change of heart can improve relationships.
The politician had a change of heart on the issue.
It’s never too late to have a change of heart.
The jury had a change of heart during the trial.
extraExampleTranslations: Haqiqatni ko‘rgach, ko‘p odamlar fikrini o‘zgartiradi.
U to‘satdan fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
U fikrini o‘zgartirish alomatlarini ko‘rsatmadi.
Fikrni o‘zgartirish munosabatlarni yaxshilashi mumkin.
Siyosatchi bu masala bo‘yicha fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
Fikrni o‘zgartirish uchun hech qachon kech emas.
Sud hay’ati sud jarayonida fikrini o‘zgartirdi.

words.definition: To be performing particularly well or in a positive state.
words.definitionUz: Yaxshi holatda bo‘lmoq – ayniqsa yaxshi natija ko‘rsatish yoki ijobiy holatda bo‘lish.
words.example1: The team was on good form and won easily.
words.example1Translation: Jamoa yaxshi holatda edi va oson g‘alaba qozondi.
words.example2: She’s on good form today – full of energy.
words.example2Translation: U bugun yaxshi holatda – energiyaga to‘la.
words.example3: The singer was on good form during the concert.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘shiqchi kontsertda yaxshi holatda edi.
extraExamples: The player is on good form this season.
He’s been on good form since his holiday.
The company is on good form financially.
When she’s on good form, she’s unstoppable.
The orchestra was on good form last night.
I hope you’re on good form for the meeting.
The restaurant is on good form with its new menu.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘yinchi bu mavsumda yaxshi holatda.
Dam olishdan keyin u yaxshi holatda bo‘lib qoldi.
Kompaniya moliyaviy jihatdan yaxshi holatda.
U yaxshi holatda bo‘lsa, to‘xtatib bo‘lmaydi.
Orkestr kecha yaxshi holatda edi.
Uchrashuvga yaxshi holatda bo‘lishingizga umid qilaman.
Restoran yangi menyusi bilan yaxshi holatda.

words.definition: To develop a personal judgement or view about something.
words.definitionUz: Fikr bildirmoq / fikr shakllantirmoq – biror narsa haqida shaxsiy fikr yoki baho shakllantirish.
words.example1: It’s important to form your own opinion.
words.example1Translation: O‘z fikringizni shakllantirish muhim.
words.example2: I haven’t formed an opinion yet.
words.example2Translation: Men hali fikr bildirmadim.
words.example3: After reading the book, she formed a strong opinion.
words.example3Translation: Kitobni o‘qib bo‘lgach, u kuchli fikr bildirdi.
extraExamples: Don’t form an opinion too quickly.
He formed a negative opinion after the meeting.
Students are encouraged to form their own opinions.
It took time to form an opinion on the matter.
She formed a positive opinion of the new teacher.
Forming an opinion based on facts is better.
Everyone is entitled to form their own opinion.
extraExampleTranslations: Fikrni juda tez bildirmang.
U uchrashuvdan keyin salbiy fikr bildirdi.
Talabalarga o‘z fikrlarini shakllantirishga undaladi.
Bu masala bo‘yicha fikr bildirish uchun vaqt kerak bo‘ldi.
U yangi o‘qituvchi haqida ijobiy fikr bildirdi.
Faktlarga asoslanib fikr bildirish yaxshiroq.
Har kim o‘z fikrini bildirish huquqiga ega.

words.definition: organised in levels of authority or rank
words.definitionUz: Hokimiyat yoki daraja bo‘yicha qatlamlarga bo‘lingan tizim
words.example1: The company has a very hierarchical structure.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya juda ierarxik tuzilishga ega.
words.example2: Many traditional societies are hierarchical.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p an’anaviy jamiyatlar ierarxik bo‘ladi.
words.example3: The military is a hierarchical organization.
words.example3Translation: Harbiy kuchlar ierarxik tashkilotdir.
extraExamples: The school has a hierarchical ranking system.
Hierarchical management can slow down decisions.
She dislikes hierarchical workplaces.
The database uses a hierarchical model.
Modern companies are becoming less hierarchical.
In a hierarchical society, status matters a lot.
The church maintains a hierarchical order.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktabda ierarxik daraja tizimi mavjud.
Ierarxik boshqaruv qarorlarni sekinlashtirishi mumkin.
U ierarxik ish joylarini yoqtirmaydi.
Ma’lumotlar bazasi ierarxik modeldan foydalanadi.
Zamonaviy kompaniyalar kamroq ierarxik bo‘lib bormoqda.
Ierarxik jamiyatda mavqe juda muhim.
Cherkov ierarxik tartibni saqlab qoladi.

words.definition: an extremely difficult or demanding undertaking
words.definitionUz: Bajarij juda qiyin va katta kuch talab qiladigan ish
words.example1: Climbing Mount Everest is a formidable task.
words.example1Translation: Everest tog‘iga chiqish juda qiyin vazifadir.
words.example2: Rebuilding the city after the earthquake was a formidable task.
words.example2Translation: Zilzila dan keyin shaharni qayta qurish juda qiyin ish edi.
words.example3: Learning a new language as an adult is a formidable task.
words.example3Translation: Kattalarda yangi til o‘rganish juda qiyin vazifa.
extraExamples: Raising twins alone is a formidable task.
The team faced a formidable task in the final.
Writing a 500-page book is a formidable task.
They accomplished this formidable task successfully.
Modernizing the old system was a formidable task.
She took on the formidable task without hesitation.
Overcoming poverty remains a formidable task.
extraExampleTranslations: Yolg‘iz egizaklarni tarbiyalash juda qiyin ish.
Jamoa finalda juda qiyin vazifaga duch keldi.
500 sahifalik kitob yozish juda qiyin vazifa.
Ular bu qiyin vazifani muvaffaqiyatli bajardilar.
Eski tizimni zamonaviy qilish juda qiyin edi.
U bu qiyin vazifani ikkilanmasdan oldi.
Qashshoqlikni yengish hali ham juda qiyin vazifa.

words.definition: to lack evidence or justification
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday dalil yoki asosga ega bo‘lmaslik
words.example1: These rumors have no foundation.
words.example1Translation: Bu mish-mishlar hech qanday asosga ega emas.
words.example2: His accusations have no foundation in reality.
words.example2Translation: Uning ayblovlari haqiqatda hech qanday asosga ega emas.
words.example3: The theory has no scientific foundation.
words.example3Translation: Bu nazariya ilmiy asosga ega emas.
extraExamples: Don't worry, these claims have no foundation.
The criticism had no foundation.
Her fears have no foundation.
The story turned out to have no foundation.
Such beliefs have no foundation in facts.
The argument has no logical foundation.
These worries have no real foundation.
extraExampleTranslations: Xavotirlanmang, bu da'volar asossiz.
Tanqid hech qanday asosga ega emas edi.
Uning qo'rquvlari asossiz.
Voqea asossiz bo'lib chiqdi.
Bunday e'tiqodlar faktlarga asoslanmagan.
Bu dalil mantiqiy asosga ega emas.
Bu xavotirlarning haqiqiy asosi yo'q.

words.definition: an economic system vulnerable to disruption
words.definitionUz: Har qanday muammo yoki o‘zgarishga osongina zarar ko‘radigan iqtisodiy tizim
words.example1: The country has a fragile economy.
words.example1Translation: Mamlakatda mo‘rt iqtisodiyot mavjud.
words.example2: A fragile economy can collapse easily.
words.example2Translation: Mo‘rt iqtisodiyot osongina qulashi mumkin.
words.example3: Investors are worried about the fragile economy.
words.example3Translation: Investorlar mo‘rt iqtisodiyotdan xavotirda.
extraExamples: The fragile economy needs careful management.
Natural disasters can damage a fragile economy.
Political instability weakens a fragile economy.
We must protect our fragile economy.
The fragile economy showed signs of recovery.
Tourism is vital for this fragile economy.
A fragile economy is sensitive to global changes.
extraExampleTranslations: Mo‘rt iqtisodiyotni ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarish kerak.
Tabiiy ofatlar mo‘rt iqtisodiyotga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Siyosiy beqarorlik mo‘rt iqtisodiyotni zaiflashtiradi.
Mo‘rt iqtisodiyotimizni himoya qilishimiz kerak.
Mo‘rt iqtisodiyot tiklanish belgilarini ko‘rsatdi.
Turizm bu mo‘rt iqtisodiyot uchun juda muhim.
Mo‘rt iqtisodiyot global o‘zgarishlarga sezgir.

words.definition: a light, subtle, and pleasant scent
words.definitionUz: Yengil, nozik va yoqimli hid
words.example1: The delicate fragrance of roses filled the room.
words.example1Translation: Atirgullar nozik hidi xonani to‘ldirdi.
words.example2: She wore a perfume with a delicate fragrance.
words.example2Translation: U nozik hidli atir sepgan edi.
words.example3: The delicate fragrance reminded her of spring.
words.example3Translation: Bu nozik hid unga bahorni eslatdi.
extraExamples: The soap has a delicate fragrance of lavender.
I love the delicate fragrance of fresh flowers.
The delicate fragrance lingered in the air.
This candle has a very delicate fragrance.
The delicate fragrance was barely noticeable.
She prefers delicate fragrances over strong ones.
The garden was full of delicate fragrances.
extraExampleTranslations: Sovun lavanda nozik hidiga ega.
Men yangi gullarning nozik hidini yaxshi ko‘raman.
Nozik hid havoda saqlanib qoldi.
Bu sham juda nozik hidga ega.
Nozik hid deyarli sezilmasdi.
U kuchli hidlardan ko‘ra nozik hidlarni afzal ko‘radi.
Bog‘ nozik hidlarga to‘la edi.

words.definition: to escape from restrictions or control
words.definitionUz: Cheklovlar yoki nazoratdan qutulib, erkin bo‘lish
words.example1: She finally broke free from her old job.
words.example1Translation: U nihoyat eski ishidan ozod bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The bird broke free from the cage.
words.example2Translation: Qush qafasdan ozod bo‘ldi.
words.example3: He wants to break free from his family's expectations.
words.example3Translation: U oilasining kutganlaridan ozod bo‘lishni xohlaydi.
extraExamples: The country broke free from colonial rule.
It took years to break free from bad habits.
She broke free and started her own business.
The prisoner broke free during transport.
Young people often want to break free.
The horse broke free from its reins.
He broke free from the crowd.
extraExampleTranslations: Mamlakat mustamlaka hukmronligidan ozod bo‘ldi.
Yomon odatlardan qutulish uchun yillar ketdi.
U ozod bo‘lib, o‘z biznesini ochdi.
Mahbus tashish vaqtida qochib ketdi.
Yoshlar ko‘pincha ozod bo‘lishni xohlaydi.
Ot jilovdan ozod bo‘ldi.
U olomondan chiqib ketdi.

words.definition: a marginal or peripheral group or area
words.definitionUz: Asosiy qismdan uzoqroq, chekka yoki qo‘shimcha guruh yoki hudud
words.example1: They live on the fringe of the city.
words.example1Translation: Ular shahar chekkasida yashaydi.
words.example2: The fringe group had radical ideas.
words.example2Translation: Chekka guruh radikal g‘oyalarga ega edi.
words.example3: Fringe benefits are extra advantages of a job.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘shimcha imtiyozlar — ishning qo‘shimcha afzalliklari.
extraExamples: She belongs to the artistic fringe.
The festival includes many fringe events.
Fringe areas often lack services.
He works on the fringe of politics.
The fringe theatre is very experimental.
They live on the social fringe.
Fringe science is not widely accepted.
extraExampleTranslations: U san'atning chekka qismiga tegishli.
Festivalda ko‘plab qo‘shimcha tadbirlar bor.
Chekka hududlarda ko‘pincha xizmatlar yetishmaydi.
U siyosatning chetki qismida ishlaydi.
Chekka teatr juda eksperimental.
Ular ijtimoiy chekkada yashaydi.
Chetki fan keng qabul qilinmaydi.

words.definition: a system of ranking or organisation by levels
words.definitionUz: Darajalar bo‘yicha tartiblangan tizim
words.example1: The company has a clear hierarchy.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniyada aniq ierarxiya mavjud.
words.example2: Social hierarchy exists in many animal groups.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p hayvonlar guruhlarida ijtimoiy ierarxiya bor.
words.example3: She climbed the corporate hierarchy quickly.
words.example3Translation: U korporativ ierarxiyada tez ko‘tarildi.
extraExamples: The military hierarchy is very strict.
We need to reduce hierarchy in the team.
Hierarchy helps maintain order.
There is a hierarchy of needs in psychology.
The church has a complex hierarchy.
Flat organizations have less hierarchy.
Respect for hierarchy is important in some cultures.
extraExampleTranslations: Harbiy ierarxiya juda qattiq.
Jamoada ierarxiyani kamaytirishimiz kerak.
Ierarxiya tartibni saqlashga yordam beradi.
Psixologiyada ehtiyojlar ierarxiyasi mavjud.
Cherkovda murakkab ierarxiya bor.
Yassi tashkilotlarda ierarxiya kamroq.
Ba’zi madaniyatlarda ierarxiyani hurmat qilish muhim.

words.definition: the most advanced or unexplored limits of a field
words.definitionUz: Biror sohaning eng ilg‘or yoki hali o‘rganilmagan chegaralari
words.example1: He works at the frontiers of medical research.
words.example1Translation: U tibbiy tadqiqotlarning oldingi chegaralarida ishlaydi.
words.example2: Space exploration is at the frontiers of science.
words.example2Translation: Koinotni o‘rganish fan oldingi chegaralarida.
words.example3: This discovery is on the frontiers of technology.
words.example3Translation: Bu kashfiyot texnologiya oldingi chegaralarida.
extraExamples: They are pushing the frontiers of knowledge.
AI is expanding the frontiers of computing.
She is exploring the frontiers of psychology.
The frontiers of physics continue to advance.
This book is at the frontiers of literature.
Researchers work on the frontiers of genetics.
Innovation happens at the frontiers of industry.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular bilim chegaralarini kengaytirmoqda.
Sun’iy intellekt hisoblash chegaralarini kengaytirmoqda.
U psixologiya oldingi chegaralarini o‘rganmoqda.
Fizika chegaralari doimiy ravishda rivojlanmoqda.
Bu kitob adabiyot oldingi chegaralarida.
Tadqiqotchilar genetika chegaralarida ishlaydi.
Innovatsiyalar sanoat oldingi chegaralarida yuz beradi.

words.definition: to furrow the brow as an expression of concern or displeasure
words.definitionUz: Xavotir yoki norozilik bildirish uchun qoshlarini chimirish
words.example1: She frowned when she heard the bad news.
words.example1Translation: Yomon xabarni eshitgach, u qovog‘ini soldi.
words.example2: He frowned in concentration.
words.example2Translation: U diqqat bilan qovog‘ini chimirdi.
words.example3: The teacher frowned at the noisy students.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchi shovqinli o‘quvchilarga qovog‘ini soldi.
extraExamples: Why are you frowning?
He gave a disapproving frown.
She frowned at the sight of the mess.
A frown appeared on his face.
Don't frown, everything will be fine.
The boss frowned upon the idea.
Her frown turned into a smile.
extraExampleTranslations: Nega qovog‘ingni solyapsan?
U norozilik bilan qovog‘ini soldi.
U tartibsizlikni ko‘rib qovog‘ini soldi.
Uning yuzida norozilik paydo bo‘ldi.
Qovog‘ingni solma, hamma narsa yaxshi bo‘ladi.
Rahbar bu g‘oyani yoqtirmay qovog‘ini soldi.
Uning qovog‘i solingan holati tabassumga aylandi.

words.definition: under the influence of narcotic substances
words.definitionUz: Narkotik moddalar ta’sirida bo‘lish
words.example1: He was high on drugs and couldn't think clearly.
words.example1Translation: U giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida edi va aniq o‘ylay olmasdi.
words.example2: The driver was high on drugs at the time of the accident.
words.example2Translation: Avtohalokat paytida haydovchi giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida edi.
words.example3: She realized he was high on drugs.
words.example3Translation: U uning giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida ekanligini tushundi.
extraExamples: Many young people get high on drugs at parties.
He spent the night high on drugs.
Being high on drugs is very dangerous.
The police arrested him while he was high on drugs.
She doesn't remember anything because she was high on drugs.
Getting high on drugs can ruin your life.
He looked high on drugs.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p yoshlar ziyofatlarda giyohvand moddalar ta’siriga tushadi.
U tunni giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida o‘tkazdi.
Giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida bo‘lish juda xavfli.
Politsiya uni giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida bo‘lganida qo‘lga oldi.
U hech narsani eslay olmaydi, chunki giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida edi.
Giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida bo‘lish hayotingizni vayron qilishi mumkin.
U giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida ko‘rinardi.

words.definition: to produce positive results
words.definitionUz: Ijobiy natijalar berish, muvaffaqiyatli bo‘lish
words.example1: Our hard work is finally bearing fruit.
words.example1Translation: Bizning mashaqqatli mehnatimiz nihoyat natija bermoqda.
words.example2: The new policy is beginning to bear fruit.
words.example2Translation: Yangi siyosat natija bera boshladi.
words.example3: Patience will eventually bear fruit.
words.example3Translation: Sabr-toqat oxir-oqibat natija beradi.
extraExamples: The investment is starting to bear fruit.
Their efforts bore fruit after many years.
This idea will bear fruit in the future.
The peace talks are bearing fruit.
Long-term planning will bear fruit.
The research is beginning to bear fruit.
His training finally bore fruit in the competition.
extraExampleTranslations: Sarmoya natija bera boshladi.
Ularning harakatlari ko‘p yillardan keyin natija berdi.
Bu g‘oya kelajakda natija beradi.
Tinchlik muzokaralari natija bermoqda.
Uzoq muddatli rejalashtirish natija beradi.
Tadqiqot natija bera boshladi.
Uning mashqlari musobaqada nihoyat natija berdi.

words.definition: to praise or express strong approval of someone
words.definitionUz: Biror kishini maqtash yoki unga yuqori baho berish
words.example1: Everyone speaks highly of her teaching skills.
words.example1Translation: Hamma uning o‘qitish mahoratini yuqori baholaydi.
words.example2: The manager speaks highly of your work.
words.example2Translation: Rahbar sizning ishingizni yuqori baholaydi.
words.example3: I have always spoken highly of him.
words.example3Translation: Men uni har doim yaxshi gapirganman.
extraExamples: His teachers speak highly of him.
She speaks very highly of her colleagues.
The critics spoke highly of the new movie.
People speak highly of this restaurant.
He speaks highly of his mentor.
The coach spoke highly of the team's effort.
Everyone who knows her speaks highly of her.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchilari uni yuqori baholaydi.
U hamkasblarini juda yaxshi gapiradi.
Tanqidchilar yangi filmni yuqori baholadilar.
Odamlar bu restoranni yuqori baholaydi.
U o‘z ustozini yaxshi gapiradi.
Murabbiy jamoa harakatini yuqori baholadi.
Uni tanigan har bir kishi uni yaxshi gapiradi.

words.definition: work that provides personal satisfaction and purpose
words.definitionUz: Odamga shaxsiy qoniqish va hayotiy ma’no beradigan ish
words.example1: Teaching is a very fulfilling job.
words.example1Translation: O‘qituvchilik juda ma’no beradigan ish.
words.example2: She found a fulfilling job in healthcare.
words.example2Translation: U sog‘liqni saqlash sohasida ma’no beradigan ish topdi.
words.example3: A fulfilling job makes you happy to wake up every day.
words.example3Translation: Ma’no beradigan ish har kuni uyg‘onishni quvontiradi.
extraExamples: Volunteering can be a fulfilling job.
He left his high-paying job for something more fulfilling.
Nursing is often described as a fulfilling job.
Finding a fulfilling job is important for happiness.
The project gave her a fulfilling job experience.
Many people seek fulfilling jobs rather than just money.
This career has been extremely fulfilling.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘ngillilik ma’no beradigan ish bo‘lishi mumkin.
U yuqori maoshli ishni yanada ma’noliroq ishga almashtirdi.
Hamshiralik ko‘pincha ma’no beradigan ish deb ataladi.
Ma’no beradigan ish topish baxt uchun muhim.
Loyiha unga ma’no beradigan ish tajribasini berdi.
Ko‘p odamlar faqat pul emas, ma’no beradigan ish izlaydi.
Bu kasb juda ma’no beradigan bo‘ldi.

words.definition: attracting significant public attention
words.definitionUz: Katta jamoatchilik e’tiborini tortadigan, mashhur
words.example1: The high-profile case was all over the news.
words.example1Translation: Bu ko‘zga ko‘ringan ish barcha yangiliklarda edi.
words.example2: She is a high-profile celebrity.
words.example2Translation: U mashhur shaxs.
words.example3: The company signed a high-profile athlete.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya mashhur sportchi bilan shartnoma imzoladi.
extraExamples: The high-profile event attracted many guests.
He has a high-profile position in government.
High-profile trials are closely watched.
The scandal involved several high-profile figures.
She landed a high-profile job in New York.
High-profile projects require careful management.
The meeting was attended by high-profile leaders.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashhur tadbir ko‘p mehmonlarni jalb qildi.
U hukumatda yuqori lavozimda.
Mashhur sud jarayonlari diqqat bilan kuzatiladi.
Janjal bir necha mashhur shaxslarni o‘z ichiga oldi.
U Nyu-Yorkda mashhur ish topdi.
Mashhur loyihalar ehtiyotkor boshqaruvni talab qiladi.
Uchrashuvda mashhur rahbarlar ishtirok etdi.

words.definition: to be extremely busy or burdened
words.definitionUz: Juda band bo‘lish, ko‘p ish bilan ovora bo‘lish
words.example1: With three children, she always has her hands full.
words.example1Translation: Uch farzandi bilan uning qo‘llari doim band.
words.example2: I have my hands full with this big project.
words.example2Translation: Bu katta loyiha bilan qo‘llarim band.
words.example3: The doctor has his hands full today.
words.example3Translation: Shifokorning bugun qo‘llari band.
extraExamples: Don't disturb her, she has her hands full.
During the holidays, the staff had their hands full.
He has his hands full running two companies.
With exams coming, students have their hands full.
The manager has her hands full with complaints.
I can't help you now — I have my hands full.
Parents of young children always have their hands full.
extraExampleTranslations: Uni bezovta qilmang, qo‘llari band.
Bayramlarda xodimlarning qo‘llari band edi.
U ikkita kompaniyani boshqarish bilan band.
Imtihonlar yaqinlashgani uchun talabalar band.
Rahbar shikoyatlar bilan band.
Hozir yordam bera olmayman — qo‘llarim band.
Yosh bolali ota-onalar doim band bo‘ladi.

words.definition: lacking logical reasoning
words.definitionUz: Mantiqiy fikrlashga asoslanmagan, aqldan tashqari
words.example1: His fear of flying is completely irrational.
words.example1Translation: Uning parvozdan qo‘rqishi mutlaqo mantiqsiz.
words.example2: Making that decision was irrational.
words.example2Translation: Bunday qaror qabul qilish mantiqsiz edi.
words.example3: She had an irrational dislike of spiders.
words.example3Translation: U o‘rgimchaklarni mantiqsiz yoqtirmasdi.
extraExamples: Irrational behavior can cause problems.
Don't be irrational about this.
His anger seems irrational.
The market sometimes behaves in irrational ways.
She felt irrational guilt.
Irrational beliefs can be hard to change.
The panic was irrational but very real to her.
extraExampleTranslations: Mantiqsiz xatti-harakat muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Bu haqda mantiqsiz bo‘lma.
Uning g‘azabi mantiqsiz ko‘rinadi.
Bozor ba’zida mantiqsiz harakat qiladi.
U mantiqsiz aybdorlik hissi his qildi.
Mantiqsiz e’tiqodlarni o‘zgartirish qiyin.
Bu vahima mantiqsiz edi, lekin unga juda haqiqiy tuyulardi.

words.definition: to restrain intense anger
words.definitionUz: Kuchli g‘azabni o‘zini tutib qolish, boshqarish
words.example1: It was hard to control his fury.
words.example1Translation: G‘azabini boshqarish qiyin edi.
words.example2: She took a deep breath to control her fury.
words.example2Translation: U g‘azabini boshqarish uchun chuqur nafas oldi.
words.example3: You need to learn to control your fury.
words.example3Translation: G‘azabingizni boshqarishni o‘rganishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: He struggled to control his fury.
The coach told the player to control his fury.
It's important to control your fury in public.
She couldn't control her fury any longer.
Learning meditation helps control fury.
He managed to control his fury and respond calmly.
Controlling fury prevents many conflicts.
extraExampleTranslations: U g‘azabini boshqarishga qiynaldi.
Murabbiy o‘yinchiga g‘azabini boshqarishni aytdi.
Jamoat oldida g‘azabingizni boshqarish muhim.
U endi g‘azabini boshqara olmadi.
Meditatsiya o‘rganish g‘azabni boshqarishga yordam beradi.
U g‘azabini boshqarib, tinch javob berdi.
G‘azabni boshqarish ko‘p mojarolarni oldini oladi.

words.definition: to obstruct or delay progress
words.definitionUz: Biror ishning oldini to‘sish yoki kechiktirish
words.example1: Bad weather hindered our progress.
words.example1Translation: Yomon ob-havo bizning oldinga siljishimizga to‘sqinlik qildi.
words.example2: Lack of money hindered the project.
words.example2Translation: Pul yetishmasligi loyihaga to‘sqinlik qildi.
words.example3: Don't let fear hinder your success.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘rquv muvaffaqiyatingizga to‘sqinlik qilishiga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
extraExamples: The strike hindered production.
Poor health hindered his studies.
Bureaucracy often hinders development.
Nothing will hinder us from achieving our goal.
The heavy traffic hindered our arrival.
Language barriers can hinder communication.
These problems hindered economic growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish tashlash ishlab chiqarishga to‘sqinlik qildi.
Sog‘lig‘i yomonligi o‘qishiga to‘sqinlik qildi.
Byurokratiya ko‘pincha rivojlanishga to‘sqinlik qiladi.
Hech narsa bizni maqsadimizga erishishga to‘sqinlik qila olmaydi.
Og‘ir tirbandlik yetib kelishimizga to‘sqinlik qildi.
Til to‘siqlari aloqaga to‘sqinlik qilishi mumkin.
Bu muammolar iqtisodiy o‘sishga to‘sqinlik qildi.

words.definition: someone who is very selective about food
words.definitionUz: Ovqat tanlashda juda injiq va qiyin bo‘lgan odam
words.example1: My son is a fussy eater.
words.example1Translation: Mening o‘g‘lim injiq ovqatxo‘r.
words.example2: Fussy eaters can be difficult to cook for.
words.example2Translation: Injiq ovqatxo‘rlar uchun ovqat pishirish qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
words.example3: She was a fussy eater as a child.
words.example3Translation: U bolaligida injiq ovqatxo‘r edi.
extraExamples: Dealing with a fussy eater requires patience.
He's not a fussy eater at all.
Parents often worry about fussy eaters.
The restaurant has options for fussy eaters.
Being a fussy eater limited her food choices.
Many toddlers go through a fussy eater phase.
She slowly stopped being a fussy eater.
extraExampleTranslations: Injiq ovqatxo‘r bilan muomala qilish sabr talab qiladi.
U umuman injiq ovqatxo‘r emas.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha injiq ovqatxo‘rlar haqida xavotirlanadi.
Restoranda injiq ovqatxo‘rlar uchun variantlar bor.
Injiq ovqatxo‘r bo‘lish uning ovqat tanlovini cheklardi.
Ko‘p yosh bolalar injiq ovqatxo‘r bosqichidan o‘tadi.
U asta-sekin injiq ovqatxo‘rlikdan voz kechdi.

words.definition: a smile that is highly attractive and charming
words.definitionUz: Juda jozibali va odamni o‘ziga tortadigan tabassum
words.example1: She greeted us with an irresistible smile.
words.example1Translation: U bizni qaytarib bo‘lmaydigan tabassum bilan kutib oldi.
words.example2: His irresistible smile won everyone's heart.
words.example2Translation: Uning jozibali tabassumi hammaning yuragini zabt etdi.
words.example3: The baby has an irresistible smile.
words.example3Translation: Chaqaloqning tabassumi juda jozibali.
extraExamples: She flashed an irresistible smile.
His irresistible smile made her blush.
The advertisement featured an irresistible smile.
No one can resist her irresistible smile.
The child's irresistible smile melted our hearts.
She used her irresistible smile to get what she wanted.
An irresistible smile can brighten someone's day.
extraExampleTranslations: U qaytarib bo‘lmaydigan tabassum bilan yondi.
Uning jozibali tabassumi uni qizarishga majbur qildi.
Reklamada jozibali tabassum bor edi.
Hech kim uning jozibali tabassumiga qarshilik qila olmaydi.
Bolani jozibali tabassumi yuragimizni eritdi.
U xohlagan narsasini olish uchun jozibali tabassumidan foydalandi.
Jozibali tabassum birovning kunini yoritib yuborishi mumkin.

words.definition: a small or barely noticeable amount
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning oz miqdori yoki sezilmaydigan darajasi
words.example1: There was a hint of sadness in her voice.
words.example1Translation: Uning ovozida bir oz qayg‘u ishorasi bor edi.
words.example2: The soup has a hint of garlic.
words.example2Translation: Sho‘rvada bir oz sarimsoq hidi bor.
words.example3: She gave a hint of a smile.
words.example3Translation: U bir oz tabassum qildi.
extraExamples: There was a hint of anger in his reply.
The sky had a hint of pink at sunset.
I detected a hint of jealousy.
The coffee had a hint of chocolate.
There was just a hint of suspicion.
She added a hint of lemon to the dish.
His accent had a hint of British English.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning javobida bir oz g‘azab ishorasi bor edi.
Quyosh botishida osmon pushti rangda edi.
Men bir oz hasad sezdim.
Kofeda bir oz shokolad ta’mi bor edi.
Bir oz shubha bor edi.
U ovqatga bir oz limon qo‘shdi.
Uning talaffuzida bir oz inglizcha urg‘u bor edi.

words.definition: without regard to; regardless of
words.definitionUz: Hech narsaga qaramay, hisobga olmasdan
words.example1: Everyone is welcome, irrespective of age.
words.example1Translation: Hamma xush kelibsiz, yoshidan qat’iy nazar.
words.example2: The rules apply to all, irrespective of status.
words.example2Translation: Qoidalar hamma uchun bir xil, mavqeidan qat’iy nazar.
words.example3: Irrespective of the weather, the event will go ahead.
words.example3Translation: Ob-havoga qaramay, tadbir o‘tkaziladi.
extraExamples: Irrespective of cost, we must do it.
She treats everyone equally, irrespective of background.
The law is the same irrespective of gender.
Irrespective of what people say, I will continue.
Payment is required irrespective of usage.
Irrespective of the outcome, we tried our best.
All students are assessed irrespective of nationality.
extraExampleTranslations: Narxiga qaramay, biz buni qilishimiz kerak.
U har kimni teng tutadi, kelib chiqishidan qat’iy nazar.
Qonun jinsidan qat’iy nazar bir xil.
Odamlar nima desa ham, men davom ettiraman.
Foydalanishdan qat’iy nazar to‘lov talab qilinadi.
Natijasi qanday bo‘lishidan qat’iy nazar, biz qo‘limizdan kelganini qildik.
Barcha talabalar millatidan qat’iy nazar baholanadi.

words.definition: to become extremely angry
words.definitionUz: Juda qattiq g‘azablanish, portlash
words.example1: When he saw the broken vase, he hit the roof.
words.example1Translation: Singan vazani ko‘rgach, u g‘azabdan portladi.
words.example2: My parents hit the roof when I came home late.
words.example2Translation: Uyga kech kelganimda ota-onam g‘azabdan portlashdi.
words.example3: The boss hit the roof when he heard the news.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar xabarni eshitgach, g‘azablandi.
extraExamples: She hit the roof when she found out.
He hit the roof over the small mistake.
The customers hit the roof about the delay.
Don't tell him or he will hit the roof.
The coach hit the roof after the loss.
Her father hit the roof when he saw the report.
The manager hit the roof during the meeting.
extraExampleTranslations: U bilib qolgach, g‘azabdan portladi.
U kichik xato uchun g‘azablandi.
Mijozlar kechikishdan g‘azablanishdi.
Unga aytma, aks holda g‘azablanadi.
Murabbiy mag‘lubiyatdan keyin g‘azablandi.
Otasi hisobotni ko‘rib g‘azablandi.
Rahbar yig‘ilishda g‘azablandi.

words.definition: harm that cannot be undone or repaired
words.definitionUz: Tuzatib bo‘lmaydigan, qaytarib bo‘lmaydigan zarar
words.example1: The accident caused irreversible damage to his spine.
words.example1Translation: Avtohalokat uning umurtqasiga qaytmas zarar yetkazdi.
words.example2: Pollution has caused irreversible damage to the environment.
words.example2Translation: Ifloslanish atrof-muhitga qaytmas zarar yetkazdi.
words.example3: The scandal did irreversible damage to his reputation.
words.example3Translation: Janjal uning obro‘siga qaytmas zarar yetkazdi.
extraExamples: Irreversible damage can result from neglect.
The fire caused irreversible damage to the building.
Smoking causes irreversible damage to the lungs.
We must prevent irreversible damage.
The relationship suffered irreversible damage.
Climate change is causing irreversible damage.
The error led to irreversible damage.
extraExampleTranslations: E’tiborsizlik qaytmas zarar keltirishi mumkin.
Yong‘in binoga qaytmas zarar yetkazdi.
Chekish o‘pkaga qaytmas zarar yetkazadi.
Qaytmas zararni oldini olishimiz kerak.
Munosabatlar qaytmas zarar ko‘rdi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi qaytmas zarar yetkazmoqda.
Xato qaytmas zarar keltirdi.

words.definition: to be logically sound or credible
words.definitionUz: Mantiqiy jihatdan to‘g‘ri va ishonchli bo‘lish
words.example1: His excuse doesn't hold water.
words.example1Translation: Uning bahonasi mantiqiy emas.
words.example2: The theory holds water.
words.example2Translation: Bu nazariya mantiqiy.
words.example3: Her argument simply doesn't hold water.
words.example3Translation: Uning dalili umuman mantiqiy emas.
extraExamples: The evidence doesn't hold water.
This plan holds water.
His story didn't hold water under questioning.
The proposal holds water if we adjust it slightly.
None of his reasons hold water.
The alibi holds water.
This explanation holds water.
extraExampleTranslations: Dalillar mantiqiy emas.
Bu reja mantiqiy.
So‘roq paytida uning hikoyasi mantiqiy bo‘lmadi.
Taklifni biroz o‘zgartirsak, mantiqiy bo‘ladi.
Uning hech bir sababi mantiqiy emas.
Alibi mantiqiy.
Bu tushuntirish mantiqiy.

words.definition: easily annoyed or impatient
words.definitionUz: Osongina asabiylashadigan, sabrsiz
words.example1: Lack of sleep makes me irritable.
words.example1Translation: Uyqu yetishmasligi meni tez asabiylashtiradi.
words.example2: He has been very irritable lately.
words.example2Translation: So‘nggi paytlarda u juda tez asabiylashmoqda.
words.example3: The irritable customer complained loudly.
words.example3Translation: Tez asabiylashadigan mijoz baland ovozda shikoyat qildi.
extraExamples: Irritable people can be difficult to work with.
She felt tired and irritable.
Avoid him when he is irritable.
Hunger can make children irritable.
The boss was in an irritable mood.
Irritable bowel syndrome is a medical condition.
Try not to get irritable in traffic.
extraExampleTranslations: Tez asabiylashadigan odamlar bilan ishlash qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
U charchagan va asabiylashgan edi.
U asabiylashganda undan uzoqroq turing.
Ochlik bolalarni asabiylashtirishi mumkin.
Rahbar asabiylashgan kayfiyatda edi.
Ichakning asabiylashishi — tibbiy holat.
Tirbandlikda asabiylashmaslikka harakat qiling.

words.definition: a single occurrence not part of a wider pattern
words.definitionUz: Umumiy qonuniyatning bir qismi bo‘lmagan alohida, yagona voqea
words.example1: The police believe it was an isolated case.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya buni yagona holat deb hisoblamoqda.
words.example2: This mistake is an isolated case.
words.example2Translation: Bu xato yagona holat.
words.example3: Fortunately, it was just an isolated case.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshiyamki, bu faqat yagona holat edi.
extraExamples: The problem appears to be an isolated case.
Don't worry, it's an isolated case.
Health officials say it's an isolated case.
We hope this remains an isolated case.
The incident was treated as an isolated case.
It turned out to be an isolated case.
Isolated cases still need attention.
extraExampleTranslations: Muammo yagona holatga o‘xshaydi.
Xavotirlanmang, bu yagona holat.
Sog‘liqni saqlash mutaxassislari buni yagona holat deb aytishdi.
Umid qilamizki, bu yagona holat bo‘lib qoladi.
Voqea yagona holat sifatida ko‘rib chiqildi.
Bu yagona holat bo‘lib chiqdi.
Yagona holatlar ham e’tiborga olinishi kerak.

words.definition: to make sound, well-reasoned decisions based on insight and experience
words.definitionUz: Tajriba va chuqur tushunish asosida to‘g‘ri va oqilona qarorlar qabul qilish
words.example1: She has good judgement in difficult situations.
words.example1Translation: U qiyin vaziyatlarda yaxshi mulohaza yuritadi.
words.example2: You need to have good judgement when investing.
words.example2Translation: Sarmoya kiritishda yaxshi mulohaza yuritish kerak.
words.example3: His good judgement saved the company.
words.example3Translation: Uning yaxshi mulohazasi kompaniyani saqlab qoldi.
extraExamples: Parents should teach children good judgement.
He is known for his good judgement.
Good judgement comes with experience.
She showed good judgement by staying calm.
Having good judgement is important in leadership.
The lawyer has excellent judgement.
Trust her — she has good judgement.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar bolalarga yaxshi mulohaza yuritishni o‘rgatishlari kerak.
U yaxshi mulohazasi bilan mashhur.
Yaxshi mulohaza tajriba bilan keladi.
U tinch qolish orqali yaxshi mulohaza ko‘rsatdi.
Rahbarlikda yaxshi mulohaza yuritish muhim.
Advokatning mulohazasi juda yaxshi.
Unga ishon — u yaxshi mulohaza yuritadi.

words.definition: to suffer negative consequences for one’s actions
words.definitionUz: Qilgan harakatlari uchun salbiy oqibatlarini ko‘rish
words.example1: If you break the law, you will pay the price.
words.example1Translation: Agar qonunni buzsaŋiz, narxini to‘laysiz.
words.example2: He didn't study and paid the price in the exam.
words.example2Translation: U o‘qimadi va imtihonda narxini to‘ladi.
words.example3: Smoking makes you pay the price later.
words.example3Translation: Chekish keyinchalik narxini to‘latadi.
extraExamples: She paid the price for being careless.
The team paid the price for poor preparation.
You always pay the price for lying.
He is paying the price for his mistakes.
Don't ignore health or you'll pay the price.
The company paid the price for bad decisions.
We all pay the price for environmental damage.
extraExampleTranslations: U ehtiyotsizligi uchun narxini to‘ladi.
Jamoa yomon tayyorgarlik uchun narxini to‘ladi.
Yolg‘on gapirganingiz uchun har doim narxini to‘laysiz.
U xatolari uchun narxini to‘lamoqda.
Sog‘lig‘ingizni e’tiborsiz qoldirmang, aks holda narxini to‘laysiz.
Kompaniya noto‘g‘ri qarorlar uchun narxini to‘ladi.
Biz hammamiz atrof-muhitga yetkazilgan zarar uchun narxini to‘laymiz.

words.definition: To create loud, disruptive noise.
words.definitionUz: Shovqin ko‘tarmoq — qattiq va bezovta qiluvchi shovqin chiqarish.
words.example1: The children were making a racket upstairs.
words.example1Translation: Bolalar yuqorida shovqin ko‘tarishayotgan edi.
words.example2: Please stop making a racket — I’m trying to work.
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, shovqin ko‘tarmang — ishlayapman.
words.example3: The fans made a racket when their team scored.
words.example3Translation: Muxlislar jamoasi gol urganida shovqin ko‘tarishdi.
extraExamples: The builders next door are making a terrible racket.
Don’t make a racket in the library.
The party made a racket until late.
He told the kids not to make a racket.
The machines make a constant racket.
They were making a racket in the street.
Making a racket disturbs the neighbors.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo‘shnidagi quruvchilar dahshatli shovqin ko‘tarmoqda.
Kutubxonada shovqin ko‘tarmang.
Ziyofat kechgacha shovqin ko‘tardi.
U bolalarga shovqin ko‘tarmaslikni aytdi.
Mashinalar doimiy shovqin chiqaradi.
Ular ko‘chada shovqin ko‘tarishayotgan edi.
Shovqin ko‘tarish qo‘shnilarni bezovta qiladi.

words.definition: With extremely thorough and precise attention to small elements.
words.definitionUz: Eng mayda detallargacha — juda chuqur va aniq tarzda mayda detallarga e’tibor berish.
words.example1: She described the event in minute detail.
words.example1Translation: U voqeani eng mayda detallargacha tasvirlab berdi.
words.example2: The report explained the process in minute detail.
words.example2Translation: Hisobot jarayonni eng mayda detallargacha tushuntirdi.
words.example3: He planned the trip in minute detail.
words.example3Translation: U sayohatni eng mayda detallargacha rejalashtirdi.
extraExamples: The artist painted the portrait in minute detail.
She remembers everything in minute detail.
The instructions were given in minute detail.
He explained the rules in minute detail.
The book describes the city in minute detail.
The investigation examined the evidence in minute detail.
She checked the contract in minute detail.
extraExampleTranslations: Rassom portretni eng mayda detallargacha chizdi.
U hamma narsani eng mayda detallargacha eslaydi.
Ko‘rsatmalar eng mayda detallargacha berildi.
U qoidalarni eng mayda detallargacha tushuntirdi.
Kitob shaharni eng mayda detallargacha tasvirlaydi.
Tergov dalillarni eng mayda detallargacha ko‘rib chiqdi.
U shartnomani eng mayda detallargacha tekshirdi.

words.definition: Closeness in space, time, or relationship.
words.definitionUz: Yaqinlik — masofa, vaqt yoki munosabat jihatidan yaqin bo‘lish.
words.example1: The hotel’s proximity to the beach is its main advantage.
words.example1Translation: Mehmonxonaning plyajga yaqinligi uning asosiy afzalligi.
words.example2: Living in proximity to family is important for her.
words.example2Translation: Oilaga yaqin yashash uning uchun muhim.
words.example3: The proximity of the airport makes travel easy.
words.example3Translation: Aeroportning yaqinligi sayohatni osonlashtiradi.
extraExamples: The two houses are in close proximity.
Proximity to public transport is convenient.
Emotional proximity is as important as physical.
The proximity of danger made them nervous.
Schools benefit from proximity to libraries.
The map shows the proximity of the towns.
Proximity to nature improves well-being.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikki uy bir-biriga juda yaqin.
Jamoat transportiga yaqinlik qulay.
Emotsional yaqinlik jismoniy yaqinlik kabi muhim.
Xavfning yaqinligi ularni asabiylashtirdi.
Maktablar kutubxonalarga yaqinlikdan foyda ko‘radi.
Xarita shaharlarning yaqinligini ko‘rsatadi.
Tabiatga yaqinlik farovonlikni oshiradi.

words.definition: To classify or assign a descriptive term, often simplistically or unfairly.
words.definitionUz: Yorliqlamoq / atamoq — biror narsani tasniflash yoki tavsiflovchi atama berish, ko‘pincha soddalashtirib yoki adolatsiz.
words.example1: Don’t label people without knowing them.
words.example1Translation: Odamlar haqida ularni bilmasdan yorliq qo‘ymang.
words.example2: The media labeled him as a troublemaker.
words.example2Translation: Ommaviy axborot vositalari uni muammochi deb atadi.
words.example3: She was labeled as shy by her classmates.
words.example3Translation: Sinfdoshlari uni uyatchan deb atashdi.
extraExamples: Society often labels successful women as aggressive.
The doctor labeled the condition as mild.
It’s unfair to label the whole group.
He hates being labeled as lazy.
The product was labeled as organic.
Don’t label the book by its cover.
The teacher labeled the folders clearly.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamiyat ko‘pincha muvaffaqiyatli ayollarni tajovuzkor deb ataydi.
Shifokor holatni yengil deb atadi.
Butun guruhni yorliqlash adolatsiz.
U dangasa deb atalishni yoqtirmaydi.
Mahsulot organik deb yorliqlangan.
Kitobni muqovasiga qarab baholamang.
O‘qituvchi papkalarni aniq yorliqladi.

words.definition: To formally express admiration or respect for someone.
words.definitionUz: Hurmat bajo keltirmoq — kimdirga rasmiy ravishda hurmat yoki hayrat bildirish.
words.example1: The ceremony paid tribute to the fallen soldiers.
words.example1Translation: Marosim halok bo‘lgan askarlarga hurmat bajo keltirdi.
words.example2: We paid tribute to her achievements.
words.example2Translation: Biz uning yutuqlariga hurmat bajo keltirdik.
words.example3: The song pays tribute to his late mother.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘shiq uning marhum onasiga hurmat bajo keltiradi.
extraExamples: The statue was built to pay tribute to the leader.
Speakers paid tribute to her lifelong work.
The event paid tribute to local heroes.
He paid tribute to his teachers in his speech.
The film pays tribute to classic cinema.
They paid tribute with a minute of silence.
The award pays tribute to outstanding contributions.
extraExampleTranslations: Haykal rahbarga hurmat bajo keltirish uchun qurilgan.
Notiqlar uning umr bo‘yi mehnatiga hurmat bajo keltirishdi.
Tadbir mahalliy qahramonlarga hurmat bajo keltirdi.
U nutqida o‘qituvchilariga hurmat bajo keltirdi.
Film klassik kinoga hurmat bajo keltiradi.
Ular bir daqiqa sukut saqlab hurmat bajo keltirishdi.
Mukofot ajoyib hissalar uchun hurmat bajo keltiradi.

words.definition: A plan advocating fundamental or far-reaching change.
words.definitionUz: Radikal taklif — asosiy yoki keng ko‘lamli o‘zgarishlarni taklif qiluvchi reja.
words.example1: The radical proposal aims to reform the education system.
words.example1Translation: Radikal taklif ta’lim tizimini isloh qilishni maqsad qilgan.
words.example2: His radical proposal surprised everyone.
words.example2Translation: Uning radikal taklifi hammni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example3: The government rejected the radical proposal.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat radikal taklifni rad etdi.
extraExamples: The radical proposal would change society completely.
She made a radical proposal during the meeting.
Radical proposals often face strong opposition.
The radical proposal was debated for hours.
His ideas are too radical for most people.
The radical proposal includes free healthcare for all.
Implementing the radical proposal will take years.
extraExampleTranslations: Radikal taklif jamiyatni butunlay o‘zgartiradi.
U yig‘ilishda radikal taklif bilan chiqdi.
Radikal takliflar ko‘pincha kuchli qarshilikka duch keladi.
Radikal taklif soatlab muhokama qilindi.
Uning g‘oyalari ko‘pchilik uchun juda radikal.
Radikal taklif hammaga bepul tibbiy yordamni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Radikal taklifni amalga oshirish yillar talab qiladi.

words.definition: To survive on very limited means or resources.
words.definitionUz: Jon saqlamoq — juda oz mablag‘ yoki resurslar bilan yashab qolish.
words.example1: She works two jobs just to keep body and soul together.
words.example1Translation: U jon saqlash uchun ikki ishda ishlaydi.
words.example2: In those difficult years, they barely kept body and soul together.
words.example2Translation: O‘sha qiyin yillarda ular zo‘rg‘a jon saqlashdi.
words.example3: Many families are struggling to keep body and soul together.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab oilalar jon saqlash uchun qiynalmoqda.
extraExamples: He does whatever it takes to keep body and soul together.
Keeping body and soul together was their only goal.
The small income helps keep body and soul together.
During the war, people struggled to keep body and soul together.
She saved every penny to keep body and soul together.
It’s hard to keep body and soul together on minimum wage.
They managed to keep body and soul together through hard work.
extraExampleTranslations: U jon saqlash uchun nima kerak bo‘lsa shuni qiladi.
Jon saqlash ularning yagona maqsadi edi.
Kichik daromad jon saqlashga yordam beradi.
Urush paytida odamlar jon saqlash uchun qiynalishgan.
U har bir tiyinni tejab jon saqlardi.
Minimal ish haqi bilan jon saqlash qiyin.
Ular qattiq mehnat bilan jon saqlashga muvaffaq bo‘lishdi.

words.definition: From a short distance.
words.definitionUz: Yaqin masofadan — qisqa masofadan.
words.example1: He shot the target at close range.
words.example1Translation: U nishonni yaqin masofadan otdi.
words.example2: You can see the details better at close range.
words.example2Translation: Mayda detallarni yaqin masofadan yaxshiroq ko‘rish mumkin.
words.example3: The animals were observed at close range.
words.example3Translation: Hayvonlarni yaqin masofadan kuzatishdi.
extraExamples: She spoke to him at close range.
The photo was taken at close range.
At close range, the painting looks different.
He examined the evidence at close range.
The player scored from close range.
Viewing the stars at close range is impossible.
The detective studied the suspect at close range.
extraExampleTranslations: U unga yaqin masofadan gapirdi.
Foto yaqin masofadan olingan.
Yaqin masofadan rasm boshqacha ko‘rinadi.
U dalillarni yaqin masofadan ko‘rib chiqdi.
O‘yinchi yaqin masofadan gol urdi.
Yulduzlarni yaqin masofadan ko‘rish imkonsiz.
Tergovchi gumondorni yaqin masofadan o‘rgandi.

words.definition: To contribute a fair share of effort or work.
words.definitionUz: O‘z ulushingizni qo‘shmoq — mehnat yoki ishda adolatli ulush qo‘shish.
words.example1: Everyone needs to pull their weight on this project.
words.example1Translation: Bu loyihada hamma o‘z ulushini qo‘shishi kerak.
words.example2: He’s not pulling his weight in the team.
words.example2Translation: U jamoada o‘z ulushini qo‘shmayapti.
words.example3: She always pulls her weight and more.
words.example3Translation: U har doim o‘z ulushini va undan ham ko‘proq qo‘shadi.
extraExamples: If everyone pulls their weight, we’ll finish on time.
Stop complaining and start pulling your weight.
The new employee is pulling his weight well.
Pulling your weight is important in any team.
She pulled her weight during the busy period.
He needs to pull his weight more.
The whole family pulls their weight at home.
extraExampleTranslations: Agar hamma o‘z ulushini qo‘shsa, vaqtida tugatamiz.
Shikoyat qilishni bas qiling va o‘z ulushingizni qo‘shing.
Yangi xodim o‘z ulushini yaxshi qo‘shmoqda.
Har qanday jamoada o‘z ulushingizni qo‘shish muhim.
U band paytda o‘z ulushini qo‘shdi.
U o‘z ulushini ko‘proq qo‘shishi kerak.
Butun oila uyda o‘z ulushini qo‘shadi.

words.definition: To encourage expectations of a positive outcome.
words.definitionUz: Umid uyg‘otmoq — ijobiy natija bo‘lishi haqida umid uyg‘otish.
words.example1: The good news raised hopes for a quick recovery.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi xabar tez tuzalish haqida umid uyg‘otdi.
words.example2: Don’t raise hopes too high.
words.example2Translation: Umidni haddan tashqari oshirmang.
words.example3: The announcement raised hopes among the workers.
words.example3Translation: E’lon ishchilar orasida umid uyg‘otdi.
extraExamples: The victory raised hopes for the championship.
Early results raised hopes of success.
The doctor’s words raised hopes.
New research has raised hopes for a cure.
The meeting raised hopes for a peaceful solution.
False promises raise false hopes.
The rescue raised hopes for the missing climbers.
extraExampleTranslations: G‘alaba chempionlik haqida umid uyg‘otdi.
Dastlabki natijalar muvaffaqiyat haqida umid uyg‘otdi.
Shifokorning so‘zlari umid uyg‘otdi.
Yangi tadqiqot davo topish haqida umid uyg‘otdi.
Yig‘ilish tinch yechim haqida umid uyg‘otdi.
Yolg‘on va’dalar yolg‘on umid uyg‘otadi.
Qutqaruv topilmagan alpinistlar haqida umid uyg‘otdi.

words.definition: A goal pursued over one’s entire life.
words.definitionUz: Umr bo‘yi orzu — butun umr davomida amalga oshirishga intiladigan maqsad.
words.example1: Becoming a pilot was her lifelong ambition.
words.example1Translation: Uchuvchi bo‘lish uning umr bo‘yi orzusi edi.
words.example2: He finally achieved his lifelong ambition.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat umr bo‘yi orzusiga erishdi.
words.example3: Writing a book was his lifelong ambition.
words.example3Translation: Kitob yozish uning umr bo‘yi orzusi edi.
extraExamples: Her lifelong ambition is to help others.
He pursued his lifelong ambition with determination.
Achieving a lifelong ambition brings great satisfaction.
Traveling the world is her lifelong ambition.
Many people never fulfill their lifelong ambitions.
The medal was the fulfillment of his lifelong ambition.
Starting a family was their lifelong ambition.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning umr bo‘yi orzusi boshqalarga yordam berishdir.
U umr bo‘yi orzusini qat’iyat bilan ta’qib qildi.
Umr bo‘yi orzusiga erishish katta qoniqish beradi.
Dunyoni sayohat qilish uning umr bo‘yi orzusi.
Ko‘plab odamlar umr bo‘yi orzularini amalga oshirmaydi.
Medal uning umr bo‘yi orzusining ro‘yobga chiqishi edi.
Oila qurish ularning umr bo‘yi orzusi edi.

words.definition: A state of mental calm and freedom from anxiety or worry.
words.definitionUz: Ruhi tinchlik — aqliy tinchlik va tashvish yoki xavotirdan xoli holat.
words.example1: Having savings gives me peace of mind.
words.example1Translation: Jamg‘arma borligi menga ruhi tinchlik beradi.
words.example2: She needs some peace of mind after the stressful week.
words.example2Translation: Stressli haftadan keyin unga ruhi tinchlik kerak.
words.example3: Knowing the truth brought her peace of mind.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqatni bilish unga ruhi tinchlik berdi.
extraExamples: Meditation helps achieve peace of mind.
Security gives peace of mind.
He finally found peace of mind.
Peace of mind is more important than money.
The agreement brought peace of mind to both sides.
A clear conscience gives peace of mind.
She moved to the countryside for peace of mind.
extraExampleTranslations: Meditatsiya ruhi tinchlikka erishishga yordam beradi.
Xavfsizlik ruhi tinchlik beradi.
U nihoyat ruhi tinchlik topdi.
Ruhi tinchlik puldan muhimroq.
Kelishuv ikki tomonni ham ruhi tinchlik bilan ta’minladi.
Toza vijdon ruhi tinchlik beradi.
U ruhi tinchlik uchun qishloqqa ko‘chib o‘tdi.

words.definition: A skin irritation that causes discomfort and itching.
words.definitionUz: Qichishadigan toshma — noqulaylik va qichishishga sabab bo‘ladigan teri yallig‘lanishi.
words.example1: The new soap gave her an itchy rash.
words.example1Translation: Yangi sovun unga qichishadigan toshma chiqardi.
words.example2: He has an itchy rash on his arms.
words.example2Translation: Uning qo‘llarida qichishadigan toshma bor.
words.example3: The doctor prescribed cream for the itchy rash.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor qichishadigan toshmaga krem yozib berdi.
extraExamples: An itchy rash can be very uncomfortable.
She developed an itchy rash after eating nuts.
The baby has an itchy rash from the diaper.
An itchy rash appeared after using the new detergent.
He scratched the itchy rash.
Avoid scratching an itchy rash.
The medicine helped clear up the itchy rash.
extraExampleTranslations: Qichishadigan toshma juda noqulay bo‘lishi mumkin.
U yong‘oq yegandan keyin qichishadigan toshma chiqardi.
Chaqaloqda taglikdan qichishadigan toshma paydo bo‘ldi.
Yangi yuvish vositasidan keyin qichishadigan toshma chiqdi.
U qichishadigan toshmani tirnadi.
Qichishadigan toshmani tirnamang.
Dori qichishadigan toshmani bartaraf etishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: Work done for personal satisfaction or love rather than for money or reward.
words.definitionUz: Muhabbat mehnati — pul yoki mukofot uchun emas, balki shaxsiy qoniqish yoki sevgi uchun bajariladigan ish.
words.example1: Restoring the old car was a labour of love for him.
words.example1Translation: Eski mashinani tiklash uning uchun muhabbat mehnati edi.
words.example2: Writing the book was a real labour of love.
words.example2Translation: Kitob yozish chinakam muhabbat mehnati edi.
words.example3: The garden is her labour of love.
words.example3Translation: Bog‘ uning muhabbat mehnati.
extraExamples: The handmade quilt was a labour of love.
Teaching is a labour of love for many educators.
He built the house as a labour of love.
Her blog is a labour of love.
Volunteering is often a labour of love.
The painting was a labour of love that took years.
Cooking for family is a labour of love.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo‘lda tikilgan ko‘rpa uning muhabbat mehnati edi.
Ko‘plab o‘qituvchilar uchun o‘qitish muhabbat mehnati.
U uy qurishni muhabbat mehnati sifatida bajardi.
Uning blogi muhabbat mehnati.
Ko‘ngillilik ko‘pincha muhabbat mehnati hisoblanadi.
Rasm yillar davom etgan muhabbat mehnati edi.
Oilaga ovqat pishirish muhabbat mehnati.

words.definition: To infer a hidden or implied meaning that is not explicitly stated.
words.definitionUz: Satirlar orasini o‘qimoq — ochiq aytilmagan yashirin yoki nazarda tutilgan ma’noni tushunish.
words.example1: If you read between the lines, you can see she’s unhappy.
words.example1Translation: Agar satirlar orasini o‘qisangiz, uning baxtsiz ekanligini ko‘rasiz.
words.example2: The letter seemed polite, but reading between the lines, it was a warning.
words.example2Translation: Xat muloyim tuyulardi, lekin satirlar orasini o‘qisangiz, bu ogohlantirish edi.
words.example3: Politicians often require you to read between the lines.
words.example3Translation: Siyosatchilar ko‘pincha satirlar orasini o‘qishni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: I read between the lines and understood the real message.
Reading between the lines, the email was negative.
You have to read between the lines in legal documents.
She learned to read between the lines in conversations.
The report requires careful reading between the lines.
Reading between the lines revealed his true feelings.
It’s important to read between the lines sometimes.
extraExampleTranslations: Men satirlar orasini o‘qib, haqiqiy ma’noni tushundim.
Satirlar orasini o‘qisangiz, elektron pochta salbiy edi.
Huquqiy hujjatlarda satirlar orasini o‘qish kerak.
U suhbatlarda satirlar orasini o‘qishni o‘rgandi.
Hisobot satirlar orasini sinchkovlik bilan o‘qishni talab qiladi.
Satirlar orasini o‘qish uning haqiqiy his-tuyg‘ularini ochib berdi.
Ba’zida satirlar orasini o‘qish muhim.

words.definition: To use personal influence or connections to achieve a desired result.
words.definitionUz: Tanish-bilishdan foydalanmoq — kerakli natijaga erishish uchun shaxsiy ta’sir yoki aloqalardan foydalanish.
words.example1: He pulled some strings to get the job.
words.example1Translation: U ishga kirish uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalandi.
words.example2: She had to pull some strings to get tickets.
words.example2Translation: U chiptalar olish uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalanishga majbur bo‘ldi.
words.example3: Pulling some strings is sometimes necessary.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida tanish-bilishdan foydalanish zarur bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: My uncle pulled some strings for me.
He pulled some strings to avoid the fine.
She pulled some strings to get her son into the school.
Pulling some strings helped him get promoted.
I don’t like pulling strings, but I had no choice.
They pulled some strings to make the event happen.
He knows how to pull strings in the industry.
extraExampleTranslations: Amakim men uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalandi.
U jarimadan qochish uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalandi.
U o‘g‘lini maktabga kiritish uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalandi.
Tanish-bilishdan foydalanish unga lavozim oshirishga yordam berdi.
Tanish-bilishdan foydalanishni yoqtirmayman, lekin ilojim yo‘q edi.
Ular tadbirni o‘tkazish uchun tanish-bilishdan foydalanishdi.
U sanoatda tanish-bilishdan qanday foydalanishni biladi.

words.definition: To manage professional and domestic responsibilities at the same time.
words.definitionUz: Ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirmoq — professional va oilaviy mas’uliyatlarni bir vaqtda boshqarish.
words.example1: It’s challenging to juggle work and family.
words.example1Translation: Ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirish qiyin.
words.example2: She juggles work and family with great skill.
words.example2Translation: U ish va oilani katta mahorat bilan muvozanatlashtiradi.
words.example3: Many parents struggle to juggle work and family.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab ota-onalar ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirishda qiynalishadi.
extraExamples: He learned to juggle work and family after becoming a father.
Juggling work and family requires good time management.
She’s exhausted from juggling work and family.
The course helps parents juggle work and family.
Finding balance when juggling work and family is key.
Many women juggle work and family successfully.
Juggling work and family can be rewarding.
extraExampleTranslations: U ota bo‘lgandan keyin ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirishni o‘rgandi.
Ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirish yaxshi vaqtni boshqarishni talab qiladi.
U ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirishdan charchagan.
Kurs ota-onalarga ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirishga yordam beradi.
Ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirganda muvozanatni topish kalitdir.
Ko‘plab ayollar ish va oilani muvaffaqiyatli muvozanatlashtirishadi.
Ish va oilani muvozanatlashtirish foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To achieve high audience approval or popularity in rankings.
words.definitionUz: Reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoq — tomoshabinlar orasida yuqori baho yoki mashhurlikka erishish.
words.example1: The new show is doing well in the ratings.
words.example1Translation: Yangi shou reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
words.example2: Her album is doing well in the ratings this week.
words.example2Translation: Uning albomi bu hafta reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
words.example3: The movie did well in the ratings.
words.example3Translation: Film reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatdi.
extraExamples: The series continues to do well in the ratings.
This product is doing well in the ratings.
The team is doing well in the ratings this season.
The app is doing well in the ratings.
Her latest book is doing well in the ratings.
The channel is doing well in the ratings thanks to the new program.
Doing well in the ratings helps attract advertisers.
extraExampleTranslations: Serial reytingda yaxshi natijani davom ettirmoqda.
Bu mahsulot reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
Jamoa bu mavsumda reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
Ilova reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
Uning so‘nggi kitobi reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
Kanal yangi dastur tufayli reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatmoqda.
Reytingda yaxshi natija ko‘rsatish reklama beruvchilarni jalb qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Physical pain experienced during childbirth.
words.definitionUz: Tug‘ish og‘riqlari — bola tug‘ish paytida his qilinadigan jismoniy og‘riq.
words.example1: She endured labour pains for several hours.
words.example1Translation: U bir necha soat tug‘ish og‘riqlariga chidadi.
words.example2: Labour pains can vary in intensity.
words.example2Translation: Tug‘ish og‘riqlari kuch jihatdan farq qilishi mumkin.
words.example3: The doctor helped her through the labour pains.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor unga tug‘ish og‘riqlarida yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Labour pains began in the middle of the night.
She breathed through the labour pains.
Labour pains are a natural part of childbirth.
The labour pains became stronger.
Many women fear labour pains.
The midwife supported her during labour pains.
After the labour pains, the baby was born.
extraExampleTranslations: Tug‘ish og‘riqlari yarim tunda boshlandi.
U tug‘ish og‘riqlarini nafas chiqarib boshqardi.
Tug‘ish og‘riqlari tug‘ruqning tabiiy qismidir.
Tug‘ish og‘riqlari kuchaydi.
Ko‘plab ayollar tug‘ish og‘riqlaridan qo‘rqishadi.
Akusherka tug‘ish og‘riqlari paytida uni qo‘llab-quvvatladi.
Tug‘ish og‘riqlaridan keyin bola tug‘ildi.

words.definition: To look closely or with difficulty into something.
words.definitionUz: Sinchkovlik bilan qaramoq — biror narsaga diqqat bilan yoki qiyinchilik bilan qarash.
words.example1: She peered into the dark room.
words.example1Translation: U qorong‘i xonaga sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
words.example2: He peered into the microscope.
words.example2Translation: U mikroskopga sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
words.example3: The detective peered into the abandoned house.
words.example3Translation: Tergovchi tashlandiq uyga sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
extraExamples: She peered into the distance.
He peered into the box curiously.
The child peered into the hole.
The doctor peered into her eyes.
We peered into the cave.
She peered into the mirror.
He peered into the future with hope.
extraExampleTranslations: U uzoqlikka sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
U qutiga qiziqib sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
Bola teshikka sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
Shifokor uning ko‘zlariga sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
Biz g‘orga sinchkovlik bilan qaradik.
U ko‘zguga sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.
U umid bilan kelajakka sinchkovlik bilan qaradi.

words.definition: To remain alert in order to notice something.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting — biror narsani payqash uchun hushyor bo‘lish.
words.example1: Keep your eyes peeled for any suspicious activity.
words.example1Translation: Har qanday shubhali harakatni payqash uchun ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
words.example2: Keep your eyes peeled for a parking space.
words.example2Translation: Mashina to‘xtash joyini payqash uchun ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
words.example3: Keep your eyes peeled for the street sign.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘cha belgisini payqash uchun ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
extraExamples: Keep your eyes peeled for bargains.
Keep your eyes peeled when walking at night.
Keep your eyes peeled for the right opportunity.
She kept her eyes peeled for her lost dog.
Keep your eyes peeled during the hike.
He kept his eyes peeled for police cars.
Keep your eyes peeled — the answer is hidden.
extraExampleTranslations: Arzon narxlarni payqash uchun ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
Kechasi yurayotganda ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
To‘g‘ri imkoniyatni payqash uchun ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
U yo‘qolgan itini payqash uchun ko‘zini ochiq tutdi.
Sayr paytida ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting.
U politsiya mashinalarini payqash uchun ko‘zini ochiq tutdi.
Ko‘zingizni ochiq tuting — javob yashirin.

words.definition: The general public’s understanding or opinion about something.
words.definitionUz: Jamoatchilik fikri — biror narsa haqidagi umumiy jamoatchilik tushunchasi yoki fikri.
words.example1: Public perception of the company has improved.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya haqidagi jamoatchilik fikri yaxshilandi.
words.example2: The scandal changed public perception.
words.example2Translation: Janjal jamoatchilik fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
words.example3: Politicians care about public perception.
words.example3Translation: Siyosatchilar jamoatchilik fikriga ahamiyat berishadi.
extraExamples: Public perception is important for brands.
The campaign aims to change public perception.
Public perception can be misleading.
Improving public perception takes time.
The media influences public perception.
Public perception of climate change is growing.
Her actions affected public perception negatively.
extraExampleTranslations: Brendlar uchun jamoatchilik fikri muhim.
Kampaniya jamoatchilik fikrini o‘zgartirishni maqsad qilgan.
Jamoatchilik fikri chalg‘ituvchi bo‘lishi mumkin.
Jamoatchilik fikrini yaxshilash vaqt talab qiladi.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari jamoatchilik fikriga ta’sir qiladi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi haqidagi jamoatchilik fikri o‘sib bormoqda.
Uning harakatlari jamoatchilik fikriga salbiy ta’sir qildi.

words.definition: Achievable or accessible.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘lingiz yetadigan — erishish mumkin bo‘lgan yoki qo‘l yetadigan.
words.example1: Success is within your reach if you work hard.
words.example1Translation: Qattiq mehnat qilsangiz, muvaffaqiyat qo‘lingiz yetadi.
words.example2: The goal is within your reach.
words.example2Translation: Maqsad qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
words.example3: Help is within your reach — just ask.
words.example3Translation: Yordam qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda — shunchaki so‘rang.
extraExamples: A better life is within your reach.
The prize is within your reach.
Happiness is within your reach.
The solution is within your reach.
Opportunities are within your reach.
Peace is within your reach.
The dream is within your reach.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshiroq hayot qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Mukofot qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Baxt qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Yechim qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Imkoniyatlar qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Tinchlik qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.
Orzu qo‘lingiz yetadigan joyda.

words.definition: An informal term for a young man or boy.
words.definitionUz: Yigit — yosh yigit yoki bola uchun norasmiy atama.
words.example1: He’s a good lad.
words.example1Translation: U yaxshi yigit.
words.example2: The lads are playing football.
words.example2Translation: Yigitlar futbol o‘ynamoqda.
words.example3: Come here, lad!
words.example3Translation: Bu yerga kel, yigit!
extraExamples: The young lad helped the old woman.
He’s just a lad — give him time.
The lads went out for a drink.
What a clever lad!
The lad worked hard on the farm.
She has a son who’s a fine lad.
The local lads are friendly.
extraExampleTranslations: Yosh yigit keksa ayolga yordam berdi.
U hali yigit — unga vaqt bering.
Yigitlar ichishga chiqishdi.
Qanday aqlli yigit!
Yigit fermada qattiq ishladi.
Uning yaxshi yigit bo‘lgan o‘g‘li bor.
Mahalliy yigitlar do‘stona.

words.definition: One’s general attitude or philosophy about living.
words.definitionUz: Hayotga qarash — yashash haqidagi umumiy munosabat yoki falsafa.
words.example1: She has a positive outlook on life.
words.example1Translation: Uning hayotga ijobiy qarashi bor.
words.example2: His outlook on life changed after the accident.
words.example2Translation: Avtohalokatdan keyin uning hayotga qarashi o‘zgardi.
words.example3: A healthy outlook on life is important.
words.example3Translation: Sog‘lom hayotga qarash muhim.
extraExamples: His optimistic outlook on life inspires others.
She has a realistic outlook on life.
A negative outlook on life can be harmful.
Traveling changed her outlook on life.
His outlook on life is shaped by experience.
They share a similar outlook on life.
A grateful outlook on life brings happiness.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning optimistik hayotga qarashi boshqalarni ilhomlantiradi.
Uning hayotga real qarashi bor.
Salbiy hayotga qarash zararli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Sayohat uning hayotga qarashini o‘zgartirdi.
Uning hayotga qarashi tajribaga asoslangan.
Ular hayotga o‘xshash qarashga ega.
Shukrona bilan hayotga qarash baxt keltiradi.

words.definition: To be completely logical or understandable.
words.definitionUz: To‘liq mantiqiy bo‘lmoq — butunlay mantiqiy yoki tushunarli bo‘lish.
words.example1: His explanation makes perfect sense.
words.example1Translation: Uning tushuntirishi to‘liq mantiqiy.
words.example2: The decision makes perfect sense now.
words.example2Translation: Qaror endi to‘liq mantiqiy.
words.example3: The instructions make perfect sense.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘rsatmalar to‘liq mantiqiy.
extraExamples: It makes perfect sense to save money.
Her choice makes perfect sense.
The theory makes perfect sense.
The plan makes perfect sense on paper.
Everything suddenly makes perfect sense.
The rule makes perfect sense.
His behavior makes perfect sense now.
extraExampleTranslations: Pul tejash to‘liq mantiqiy.
Uning tanlovi to‘liq mantiqiy.
Nazariya to‘liq mantiqiy.
Reja qog‘ozda to‘liq mantiqiy.
Hamma narsa birdan to‘liq mantiqiy bo‘lib qoldi.
Qoida to‘liq mantiqiy.
