Uning xatti-harakati endi to‘liq mantiqiy.

words.definition: Especially interesting or scandalous rumours.
words.definitionUz: Shirin g‘iybat — ayniqsa qiziqarli yoki janjalli mish-mishlar.
words.example1: She loves sharing juicy gossip.
words.example1Translation: U shirin g‘iybatni baham ko‘rishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
words.example2: The juicy gossip spread quickly.
words.example2Translation: Shirin g‘iybat tez tarqaldi.
words.example3: There’s some juicy gossip about the boss.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar haqida shirin g‘iybat bor.
extraExamples: The magazine is full of juicy gossip.
Avoid spreading juicy gossip.
Juicy gossip can hurt people.
She heard some juicy gossip at the party.
The juicy gossip turned out to be false.
People enjoy juicy gossip.
The juicy gossip made headlines.
extraExampleTranslations: Jurnal shirin g‘iybatlarga to‘la.
Shirin g‘iybat tarqatishdan qoching.
Shirin g‘iybat odamlarga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
U ziyofatda shirin g‘iybat eshitdi.
Shirin g‘iybat yolg‘on bo‘lib chiqdi.
Odamlar shirin g‘iybatni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
Shirin g‘iybat sarlavhalarga chiqdi.

words.word: To be no match for something
words.definition: To be clearly inferior or unable to compete with something.
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday raqobatchi bo‘lmaslik — biror narsaga nisbatan aniq zaifroq yoki raqobatlasha olmaslik.
words.example1: The local team was no match for the champions.
words.example1Translation: Mahalliy jamoa chempionlarga hech qanday raqobatchi bo‘lmadi.
words.example2: Her skills are no match for his experience.
words.example2Translation: Uning ko‘nikmalari uning tajribasiga hech qanday raqobatchi emas.
words.example3: The old phone is no match for the new model.
words.example3Translation: Eski telefon yangi modelga hech qanday raqobatchi emas.
extraExamples: The small company was no match for the giant corporation.
His argument was no match for her logic.
The storm was no match for the strong building.
She realized her preparation was no match for the difficulty.
The toy is no match for the real thing.
Their defense was no match for the attack.
His speed is no match for the champion’s.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichik kompaniya gigant korporatsiyaga hech qanday raqobatchi bo‘lmadi.
Uning dalili uning mantig‘iga hech qanday raqobatchi emas edi.
Bo‘ron kuchli binoga hech qanday raqobatchi bo‘lmadi.
U tayyorgarligi qiyinchilikka hech qanday raqobatchi emasligini angladi.
O‘yinchoq haqiqiy narsaga hech qanday raqobatchi emas.
Ularning himoyasi hujumga hech qanday raqobatchi emas edi.
Uning tezligi chempionning tezligiga hech qanday raqobatchi emas.

words.definition: Relaxed and unconcerned about stress or pressure.
words.definitionUz: Tinch va osoyishta — stress yoki bosimdan xavotirlanmaydigan, tinch holat.
words.example1: He has a laid-back attitude to life.
words.example1Translation: Uning hayotga tinch va osoyishta munosabati bor.
words.example2: She is very laid-back and easy to get along with.
words.example2Translation: U juda tinch va osoyishta, u bilan til topish oson.
words.example3: The town has a laid-back atmosphere.
words.example3Translation: Shaharchada tinch va osoyishta muhit bor.
extraExamples: The laid-back lifestyle suits him.
A laid-back approach can reduce stress.
She’s laid-back about most things.
The party had a laid-back vibe.
He’s too laid-back for such a demanding job.
Laid-back people are often happier.
The restaurant has a laid-back feel.
extraExampleTranslations: Tinch va osoyishta turmush tarzi unga mos keladi.
Tinch va osoyishta yondashuv stressni kamaytirishi mumkin.
U ko‘p narsalarga tinch va osoyishta qaraydi.
Ziyofatda tinch va osoyishta muhit bor edi.
U bunchalik talabchan ish uchun juda tinch va osoyishta.
Tinch va osoyishta odamlar ko‘pincha baxtliroq bo‘lishadi.
Restoranda tinch va osoyishta muhit bor.

words.definition: To ignite a match to produce fire.
words.definitionUz: Gugurt chaqmoq — olov chiqarish uchun gugurtni yoqish.
words.example1: He struck a match to light the candle.
words.example1Translation: U shamni yoqish uchun gugurt chaqdi.
words.example2: She struck a match and started the fire.
words.example2Translation: U gugurt chaqib, olov yoqdi.
words.example3: Striking a match in the dark helped them see.
words.example3Translation: Qorong‘ida gugurt chaqish ularga ko‘rishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: He struck a match and lit his cigarette.
Be careful when striking a match.
She struck a match to see the map.
Striking a match requires practice sometimes.
The wind made it hard to strike a match.
He struck a match and the room brightened.
Never strike a match near gasoline.
extraExampleTranslations: U gugurt chaqib, sigaretini yoqdi.
Gugurt chaqayotganda ehtiyot bo‘ling.
U xaritani ko‘rish uchun gugurt chaqdi.
Gugurt chaqish ba’zida mashq talab qiladi.
Shamol gugurt chaqishni qiyinlashtirdi.
U gugurt chaqib, xona yorishdi.
Hech qachon benzin yaqinida gugurt chaqmang.

words.definition: a book or text that is enjoyable and engaging
words.definitionUz: O‘qishdan zavq oladigan, qiziqarli kitob yoki matn
words.example1: This novel is a really good read.
words.example1Translation: Bu roman juda yaxshi o‘qiladigan kitob.
words.example2: I’m looking for a good read for my vacation.
words.example2Translation: Ta’tilim uchun yaxshi o‘qiladigan kitob izlayapman.
words.example3: Her latest book is a good read for teenagers.
words.example3Translation: Uning so‘nggi kitobi o‘smirlar uchun yaxshi o‘qiladigan asar.
extraExamples: That biography was a surprisingly good read.
I need something light — a good read before bed.
This magazine is always a good read.
The report turned out to be a good read.
It’s not great literature, but it’s a good read.
She recommended a good read for the weekend.
His articles are always a good read.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu biografiya kutilmaganda qiziqarli bo‘ldi.
Yengilroq narsa kerak — uxlaguncha yaxshi o‘qiladigan kitob.
Bu jurnal har doim qiziqarli o‘qiladi.
Hisobot kutilmaganda qiziqarli bo‘lib chiqdi.
Bu buyuk adabiyot emas, lekin yaxshi o‘qiladi.
U dam olish kunlari uchun yaxshi kitob tavsiya qildi.
Uning maqolalari har doim qiziqarli o‘qiladi.

words.definition: excessive emphasis on material possessions or wealth
words.definitionUz: Boylik va moddiy narsalarga haddan tashqari ahamiyat berish
words.example1: Modern society is often criticized for its materialism.
words.example1Translation: Zamonaviy jamiyat ko‘pincha materializmi uchun tanqid qilinadi.
words.example2: His materialism made him unhappy.
words.example2Translation: Materializm uni baxtsiz qildi.
words.example3: Materialism can lead to a shallow life.
words.example3Translation: Materializm sayoz hayotga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Consumerism and materialism go hand in hand.
She rejected the materialism of her family.
Materialism is rising among young people.
The book criticizes Western materialism.
His life is driven by materialism.
Materialism affects our values.
Fighting materialism is difficult in today’s world.
extraExampleTranslations: Iste’molchilik va materializm birga yuradi.
U oilasining materializmini rad etdi.
Yoshlar orasida materializm kuchaymoqda.
Kitob G‘arb materializmini tanqid qiladi.
Uning hayoti materializm bilan boshqariladi.
Materializm bizning qadriyatlarimizga ta’sir qiladi.
Bugungi dunyoda materializmga qarshi kurashish qiyin.

words.definition: to enjoy positive results from previous effort
words.definitionUz: Oldin qilingan mehnatning ijobiy natijalaridan foydalanish
words.example1: After years of hard work, she is finally reaping the benefits.
words.example1Translation: Yillab qilgan mashaqqatli mehnatdan keyin u nihoyat mevasini ko‘rmoqda.
words.example2: Investing early helps you reap the benefits later.
words.example2Translation: Erta sarmoya kiritish keyinchalik mevasini ko‘rishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: The team is reaping the benefits of their training.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa mashg‘ulotlarining mevasini ko‘rmoqda.
extraExamples: You will reap the benefits of studying hard.
The company is reaping the benefits of new technology.
Patience allows you to reap the benefits.
Farmers reap the benefits of good weather.
She reaped the benefits of her honesty.
We are now reaping the benefits of past reforms.
Consistent effort helps you reap the benefits.
extraExampleTranslations: Qattiq o‘qisangiz, mevasini ko‘rasiz.
Kompaniya yangi texnologiya mevasini ko‘rmoqda.
Sabr-toqat meva beradi.
Dehqonlar yaxshi ob-havo mevasini ko‘rishadi.
U halolligi mevasini ko‘rdi.
Biz hozir o‘tgan islohotlar mevasini ko‘rmoqdamiz.
Doimiy harakat meva beradi.

words.definition: to successfully obtain employment
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatli ravishda yangi ishga kirish
words.example1: He finally landed a new job after months of searching.
words.example1Translation: Bir necha oy izlagandan keyin u nihoyat yangi ish topdi.
words.example2: She landed a new job at a big tech company.
words.example2Translation: U katta texnologiya kompaniyasida yangi ish topdi.
words.example3: It’s not easy to land a new job these days.
words.example3Translation: Hozirgi kunda yangi ish topish oson emas.
extraExamples: He landed a new job with a higher salary.
Congratulations on landing a new job!
She used her network to land a new job.
Landing a new job in this market is competitive.
I hope you land a new job soon.
He landed a new job abroad.
It took her six months to land a new job.
extraExampleTranslations: U yuqoriroq maoshli yangi ish topdi.
Yangi ish topganingiz bilan tabriklayman!
U o‘z aloqalaridan foydalanib yangi ish topdi.
Bu bozorda yangi ish topish raqobatbardosh.
Umid qilamanki, tez orada yangi ish topasiz.
U xorijda yangi ish topdi.
Unga yangi ish topish uchun olti oy kerak bo‘ldi.

words.definition: to have a useful or meaningful function
words.definitionUz: Foydali yoki ma’noli vazifani bajarish
words.example1: This old phone still serves a purpose.
words.example1Translation: Bu eski telefon hali ham foydali ish bajaradi.
words.example2: The meeting served a purpose.
words.example2Translation: Yig‘ilish maqsadga xizmat qildi.
words.example3: Every experience serves a purpose.
words.example3Translation: Har bir tajriba maqsadga xizmat qiladi.
extraExamples: The tool serves a purpose in our daily work.
Her advice served a purpose.
This rule no longer serves a purpose.
Everything in life serves a purpose.
The extra money served a good purpose.
The experiment served its purpose.
Old furniture can still serve a purpose.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu asbob kundalik ishimizda foydali.
Uning maslahati maqsadga xizmat qildi.
Bu qoida endi foyda bermaydi.
Hayotdagi hamma narsa maqsadga xizmat qiladi.
Qo‘shimcha pul yaxshi maqsadga sarflandi.
Tajriba o‘z maqsadini bajardi.
Eski mebellar hali ham foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: to continue despite difficulty or opposition
words.definitionUz: Qiyinchiliklarga qaramay harakatni to‘xtatmasdan davom ettirish
words.example1: You must persist if you want to succeed.
words.example1Translation: Muvaffaqiyatga erishmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, davom ettirishingiz kerak.
words.example2: She persisted in her studies despite challenges.
words.example2Translation: U qiyinchiliklarga qaramay o‘qishini davom ettirdi.
words.example3: The rain persisted all day.
words.example3Translation: Yomg‘ir kun bo‘yi davom etdi.
extraExamples: He persisted with his idea.
Persistence is key to learning a language.
She persisted until she found the answer.
The problem persisted for months.
They persisted despite criticism.
Never give up — always persist.
The symptoms persisted for weeks.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘z g‘oyasini davom ettirdi.
Til o‘rganishda qat’iyatlilik muhim.
U javob topguncha davom ettirdi.
Muammo bir necha oy davom etdi.
Ular tanqidlarga qaramay davom ettirdilar.
Hech qachon taslim bo‘lmang — doim davom ettiring.
Alomatlar bir necha hafta davom etdi.

words.definition: regular expenses or expenditures
words.definitionUz: Doimiy chiqimlar yoki xarajatlar
words.example1: We need to reduce our outgoings.
words.example1Translation: Xarajatlarimizni kamaytirishimiz kerak.
words.example2: Her outgoings are higher than her income.
words.example2Translation: Uning xarajatlari daromadidan yuqori.
words.example3: Monthly outgoings include rent and bills.
words.example3Translation: Oylik xarajatlar ijar va hisob-kitoblarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: Keeping track of outgoings is important.
Their outgoings have increased this year.
We listed all our outgoings.
High outgoings make saving difficult.
She cut down on unnecessary outgoings.
Business outgoings must be controlled.
Outgoings and income should be balanced.
extraExampleTranslations: Xarajatlarni kuzatib borish muhim.
Ularning xarajatlari bu yil oshdi.
Biz barcha xarajatlarimizni ro‘yxatga oldik.
Yuqori xarajatlar tejashni qiyinlashtiradi.
U keraksiz xarajatlarni qisqartirdi.
Biznes xarajatlarini nazorat qilish kerak.
Xarajat va daromad muvozanatda bo‘lishi kerak.

words.definition: an event or object of historical, cultural, or symbolic significance
words.definitionUz: Tarixiy, madaniy yoki ramziy ahamiyatga ega voqea yoki ob’ekt
words.example1: The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark.
words.example1Translation: Eiffel minorasi mashhur diqqatga sazovor joy.
words.example2: This discovery was a landmark in science.
words.example2Translation: Bu kashfiyot fan tarixida muhim voqea bo‘ldi.
words.example3: The agreement was a landmark achievement.
words.example3Translation: Bu kelishuv muhim yutuq edi.
extraExamples: Big Ben is a London landmark.
The year 1991 was a landmark in history.
This book is considered a landmark work.
The court decision was a landmark ruling.
They visited many historical landmarks.
The invention was a landmark moment.
The city has several cultural landmarks.
extraExampleTranslations: Big Ben Londonning diqqatga sazovor joyi.
1991 yil tarixda muhim yil bo‘ldi.
Bu kitob muhim asar hisoblanadi.
Sud qarori muhim qaror edi.
Ular ko‘plab tarixiy ob’ektlarni ziyorat qildilar.
Ixtiro muhim lahza edi.
Shaharda bir nechta madaniy diqqatga sazovor joylar bor.

words.definition: it is logically obvious or expected
words.definitionUz: Mantiqiy jihatdan aniq va kutiladigan holat
words.example1: It stands to reason that hard work leads to success.
words.example1Translation: Qattiq mehnat muvaffaqiyatga olib kelishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
words.example2: If it’s cheaper, it stands to reason more people will buy it.
words.example2Translation: Agar arzonroq bo‘lsa, ko‘proq odam sotib olishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
words.example3: It stands to reason that you need rest after working hard.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq ishlagandan keyin dam olish kerakligi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
extraExamples: It stands to reason that practice improves skill.
It stands to reason she’s tired after the trip.
It stands to reason that prices will rise.
It stands to reason we should prepare in advance.
It stands to reason that teamwork is better.
It stands to reason that honesty is important.
It stands to reason the project will take time.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashq qilish mahoratni oshirishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Sayohatdan keyin charchashi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Narxlar oshishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Oldindan tayyorgarlik ko‘rishimiz mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Jamoaviy ish yaxshiroq bo‘lishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Halollik muhimligi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.
Loyiha vaqt talab qilishi mantiqan to‘g‘ri.

words.definition: unattainable or inaccessible
words.definitionUz: Erishib bo‘lmaydigan yoki qo‘l yetmaydigan
words.example1: That car is beyond my reach right now.
words.example1Translation: Hozircha o‘sha mashina mening qo‘lim yetmaydi.
words.example2: Fame and fortune seemed beyond his reach.
words.example2Translation: Shuhrat va boylik unga yetib bo‘lmaydigandek tuyulardi.
words.example3: Some dreams feel beyond your reach.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zi orzular qo‘lingiz yetmaydigandek tuyuladi.
extraExamples: The goal seemed beyond their reach.
This opportunity is not beyond your reach.
Luxury items are often beyond our reach.
Success is not beyond your reach if you try.
The top position felt beyond her reach.
Nothing is beyond your reach with hard work.
The price was beyond the reach of most people.
extraExampleTranslations: Maqsad ularga yetib bo‘lmaydigandek edi.
Bu imkoniyat sizning qo‘lingizdan keladi.
Hashamatli narsalar ko‘pincha bizning qo‘limizdan kelmaydi.
Qattiq harakat qilsangiz, muvaffaqiyat qo‘lingizdan keladi.
Eng yuqori lavozim unga yetib bo‘lmaydigandek tuyulardi.
Qattiq mehnat bilan hech narsa qo‘lingizdan kelmay qolmaydi.
Narx ko‘pchilik uchun qo‘l yetmaydigan edi.

words.definition: a society driven primarily by wealth and consumption
words.definitionUz: Boylik va iste’molga asoslangan jamiyat
words.example1: We live in a materialist society.
words.example1Translation: Biz materialistik jamiyatda yashaymiz.
words.example2: Materialist society values money above all.
words.example2Translation: Materialistik jamiyatda pul hamma narsadan ustun qo‘yiladi.
words.example3: The rise of a materialist society has changed our values.
words.example3Translation: Materialistik jamiyatning kuchayishi qadriyatlarimizni o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: Materialist society encourages competition.
Many people criticize materialist society.
In a materialist society, happiness is often linked to possessions.
The media promotes a materialist society.
She rejects the values of materialist society.
Materialist society can lead to emptiness.
We need to balance materialist society with spirituality.
extraExampleTranslations: Materialistik jamiyat raqobatni rag‘batlantiradi.
Ko‘p odamlar materialistik jamiyatni tanqid qiladi.
Materialistik jamiyatda baxt ko‘pincha narsalar bilan bog‘lanadi.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari materialistik jamiyatni targ‘ib qiladi.
U materialistik jamiyat qadriyatlarini rad etadi.
Materialistik jamiyat bo‘shliqqa olib kelishi mumkin.
Materialistik jamiyatni ma’naviyat bilan muvozanatlashtirishimiz kerak.

words.definition: subtle and non-forceful encouragement
words.definitionUz: Bosimsiz, muloyim va nozik tarzda ishontirish
words.example1: She used gentle persuasion to convince him.
words.example1Translation: U uni ishontirish uchun muloyim usuldan foydalandi.
words.example2: Gentle persuasion works better than force.
words.example2Translation: Muloyim ishontirish kuch ishlatishdan yaxshiroq natija beradi.
words.example3: Through gentle persuasion, the teacher changed their minds.
words.example3Translation: Muloyim ishontirish orqali o‘qituvchi ularning fikrini o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: Gentle persuasion is an art.
He succeeded with gentle persuasion.

The diplomat used gentle persuasion.
Gentle persuasion can be very effective.
She is skilled in gentle persuasion.
Gentle persuasion helped resolve the conflict.
extraExampleTranslations: Muloyim ishontirish — san’at.
U muloyim ishontirish bilan muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
Ota-onalar ko‘pincha muloyim ishontirishdan foydalanadilar.
Diplomat muloyim ishontirish usulini qo‘lladi.
Muloyim ishontirish juda samarali bo‘lishi mumkin.
U muloyim ishontirishda usta.
Muloyim ishontirish mojaroni hal qilishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: to remain calm and avoid anger
words.definitionUz: Tinch bo‘lib, g‘azablanmaslik
words.example1: It was difficult to keep my temper.
words.example1Translation: O‘zimni tutishim qiyin bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Try to keep your temper during the meeting.
words.example2Translation: Yig‘ilishda o‘zingizni tutishga harakat qiling.
words.example3: He couldn’t keep his temper and shouted.
words.example3Translation: U o‘zini tuta olmadi va baqirdi.
extraExamples: Learning to keep your temper is important.
She always keeps her temper.
It’s hard to keep your temper when provoked.
Keep your temper and think clearly.
The coach told the players to keep their temper.
He managed to keep his temper.
Keeping your temper helps in difficult situations.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘zini tutishni o‘rganish muhim.
U har doim o‘zini tutadi.
Provokatsiya qilinganda o‘zini tutish qiyin.
O‘zingizni tuting va aniq o‘ylang.
Murabbiy o‘yinchilarga o‘zlarini tutishni aytdi.
U o‘zini tutishga muvaffaq bo‘ldi.
O‘zini tutish qiyin vaziyatlarda yordam beradi.

words.definition: the logical explanation or justification for an action or belief
words.definitionUz: Biror harakat yoki fikrning mantiqiy sababi yoki asosi
words.example1: What is the reasoning behind this decision?
words.example1Translation: Bu qarorning sababi nima?
words.example2: I don’t understand the reasoning behind his behavior.
words.example2Translation: Uning xatti-harakatining sababini tushunmayapman.
words.example3: The reasoning behind the rule is safety.
words.example3Translation: Qoidaning sababi — xavfsizlik.
extraExamples: She explained the reasoning behind her choice.
The reasoning behind the policy is clear.
There is strong reasoning behind this theory.
I agree with the reasoning behind it.
The reasoning behind his refusal was personal.
What’s the reasoning behind changing the plan?
The reasoning behind the law needs updating.
extraExampleTranslations: U tanlovining sababini tushuntirdi.
Siyosatning sababi aniq.
Bu nazariyaning kuchli asosi bor.
Men uning sababi bilan roziman.
Rad etishining sababi shaxsiy edi.
Rejani o‘zgartirishning sababi nima?
Qonunning sababi yangilanishi kerak.

words.definition: minor criminal offences, such as theft or vandalism, causing limited harm
words.definitionUz: O‘g‘rilik, vandalizm kabi kichik zarar yetkazadigan mayda jinoyatlar
words.example1: Petty crime is common in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Katta shaharlarda mayda jinoyatlar ko‘p uchraydi.
words.example2: The police focus on reducing petty crime.
words.example2Translation: Politsiya mayda jinoyatlarni kamaytirishga e’tibor qaratmoqda.
words.example3: He was arrested for petty crime.
words.example3Translation: U mayda jinoyat uchun qo‘lga olindi.
extraExamples: Petty crime affects the quality of life.

The area has a problem with petty crime.

Efforts to prevent petty crime are increasing.
She was a victim of petty crime.
Petty crime can lead to more serious offences.
extraExampleTranslations: Mayda jinoyatlar hayot sifatiga ta’sir qiladi.
Ko‘p yoshlar mayda jinoyatlarga aralashib qoladi.
Bu hududda mayda jinoyatlar muammosi bor.
Mayda jinoyatlar do‘kon o‘g‘irlash va devor yozuvlarini o‘z ichiga oladi.
Mayda jinoyatlarning oldini olish choralari kuchaymoqda.
U mayda jinoyat qurboni bo‘ldi.
Mayda jinoyatlar jiddiyroq jinoyatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: the sudden start and rapid spread of something undesirable, especially disease or violence
words.definitionUz: Kasallik yoki zo‘ravonlik kabi yomon holatning birdaniga boshlanishi va tez tarqalishi
words.example1: The outbreak of the disease was unexpected.
words.example1Translation: Kasallikning avj olishi kutilmagan edi.
words.example2: There was an outbreak of violence in the city.
words.example2Translation: Shaharda zo‘ravonlik avj oldi.
words.example3: The government is trying to control the outbreak.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat avj olishni nazorat qilishga harakat qilmoqda.
extraExamples: The flu outbreak affected many schools.
An outbreak of fighting occurred near the border.
Health officials are monitoring the outbreak.
The outbreak was contained quickly.
There has been an outbreak of food poisoning.
The country is prepared for any outbreak.
The media reported on the latest outbreak.
extraExampleTranslations: Gripp avj olishi ko‘p maktablarga ta’sir qildi.
Chegaraga yaqin joyda janglar avj oldi.
Sog‘liqni saqlash mutaxassislari avj olishni kuzatmoqda.
Avj olish tez bartaraf etildi.
Oziq-ovqat zaharlanishi avj oldi.
Mamlakat har qanday avj olishga tayyor.
Ommaviy axborot vositalari so‘nggi avj olish haqida xabar berdi.

words.definition: something dependent primarily on self-belief rather than skill or knowledge
words.definitionUz: Ko‘proq o‘ziga ishonchga bog‘liq bo‘lgan narsa, malaka emas
words.example1: Public speaking is a matter of confidence.
words.example1Translation: Ommaviy nutq so‘zlash — ishonch masalasi.
words.example2: Winning the game is a matter of confidence.
words.example2Translation: O‘yinni yutish ishonch masalasi.
words.example3: For many people, dating is a matter of confidence.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p odamlar uchun tanishuv ishonch masalasidir.
extraExamples: Leadership is often a matter of confidence.
It’s not about talent — it’s a matter of confidence.
Passing the interview is a matter of confidence.
Success in sales is a matter of confidence.
Performing on stage is a matter of confidence.
Don’t worry, it’s just a matter of confidence.
Building confidence turns it into a strength.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbarlik ko‘pincha ishonch masalasi.
Bu qobiliyat haqida emas — ishonch masalasi.
Intervyudan o‘tish ishonch masalasi.
Savdoda muvaffaqiyat ishonch masalasi.
Sahnada chiqish ishonch masalasi.
Xavotirlanmang, bu faqat ishonch masalasi.
O‘ziga ishonchni rivojlantirish uni kuchga aylantiradi.

words.definition: salespeople who are overly aggressive or persistent in persuading customers
words.definitionUz: Mijozlarni haddan tashqari bosim bilan ishontirishga urinadigan savdogarlar
words.example1: I hate dealing with pushy salesmen.
words.example1Translation: Bosqichli savdo agentlari bilan muomala qilishni yoqtirmayman.
words.example2: The pushy salesman wouldn’t take no for an answer.
words.example2Translation: Bosqichli savdogar “yo‘q” javobini qabul qilishni istamasdi.
words.example3: Pushy salesmen often make customers uncomfortable.
words.example3Translation: Bosqichli savdogarlar mijozlarni bezovta qiladi.
extraExamples: Avoid pushy salesmen at the market.
She complained about the pushy salesman.
Pushy salesmen use high-pressure tactics.
Not all salesmen are pushy.
The pushy salesman followed her around the store.
I walked away from the pushy salesman.
Pushy salesmen can damage a company’s reputation.
extraExampleTranslations: Bozorda bosqichli savdogarlardan qoching.
U bosqichli savdogar haqida shikoyat qildi.
Bosqichli savdogarlar kuchli bosim usullaridan foydalanadilar.
Hamma savdogarlar bosqichli emas.
Bosqichli savdogar uni do‘kon bo‘ylab kuzatib bordi.
Men bosqichli savdogardan uzoqlashdim.
Bosqichli savdogarlar kompaniya obro‘siga putur yetkazishi mumkin.

words.definition: there is no definitive conclusion or consensus yet
words.definitionUz: Hali yakuniy xulosa yoki umumiy fikr yo‘q
words.example1: The jury is out on whether this new method works.
words.example1Translation: Bu yangi usulning samarali ekanligi hali aniq emas.
words.example2: The jury is still out on the best diet.
words.example2Translation: Eng yaxshi parhez haqida hali yakuniy fikr yo‘q.
words.example3: The jury is out on the new manager’s performance.
words.example3Translation: Yangi rahbarning ishlashi haqida hali aniq fikr yo‘q.
extraExamples: The jury is out on climate change solutions.
The jury is still out on this theory.
The jury is out on the effectiveness of the vaccine.
The jury is out on remote working.
The jury is out on the new law.
The jury is out on which team will win.
The jury is still out on the matter.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi yechimlar haqida hali aniq fikr yo‘q.
Bu nazariya haqida hali yakuniy fikr yo‘q.
Vaksinaning samaradorligi haqida hali aniq emas.
Masofaviy ishlash haqida hali yakuniy fikr yo‘q.
Yangi qonun haqida hali aniq emas.
Qaysi jamoa g‘alaba qozonishi hali noma’lum.
Bu masala hali ochiq.

words.definition: showing no growth, movement, or development
words.definitionUz: O‘sish, harakat yoki rivojlanish ko‘rsatmaydigan
words.example1: The economy has been stagnant for years.
words.example1Translation: Iqtisodiyot bir necha yildan beri to‘xtab qolgan.
words.example2: The water in the pond is stagnant.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘ldagi suv to‘xtab qolgan.
words.example3: The company is stuck in a stagnant period.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya to‘xtab qolgan davrda qolib ketgan.
extraExamples: Stagnant air makes the room feel stuffy.
His career has become stagnant.
We need to avoid a stagnant economy.
The market is stagnant at the moment.
Stagnant water can breed mosquitoes.
The project is stagnant due to lack of funds.
She felt her life was stagnant.
extraExampleTranslations: To‘xtab qolgan havo xonani dim qiladi.
Uning karyerasi to‘xtab qoldi.
To‘xtab qolgan iqtisodiyotdan qochishimiz kerak.
Bozor hozircha to‘xtab qolgan.
To‘xtab qolgan suv chivin ko‘paytirishi mumkin.
Mablag‘ yetishmasligi tufayli loyiha to‘xtab qoldi.
U o‘z hayoti to‘xtab qolgandek his qildi.

words.definition: to recall or revisit past experiences nostalgically
words.definitionUz: O‘tmishdagi voqealarni sog‘inch bilan eslash
words.example1: Looking at old photos is like walking down memory lane.
words.example1Translation: Eski fotosuratlarni ko‘rish xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr qilishga o‘xshaydi.
words.example2: We walked down memory lane during the reunion.
words.example2Translation: Uchrashuvda biz xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr qildik.
words.example3: The song made me walk down memory lane.
words.example3Translation: Bu qo‘shiq meni xotiralar ko‘chasiga olib ketdi.
extraExamples: Visiting my old school was a walk down memory lane.
Let’s walk down memory lane together.
The movie took us down memory lane.
She enjoys walking down memory lane.
It was a pleasant walk down memory lane.
Old letters are perfect for walking down memory lane.
The trip was a nostalgic walk down memory lane.
extraExampleTranslations: Eski maktabimga borish xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr edi.
Keling, birgalikda xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr qilaylik.
Film bizni xotiralar ko‘chasiga olib ketdi.
U xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr qilishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Bu yoqimli xotiralar sayri edi.
Eski xatlar xotiralar ko‘chasiga sayr uchun juda mos.
Sayohat sog‘inchli xotiralar sayri bo‘ldi.

words.definition: to identify something precisely
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani aniq topib, ifodalab berish
words.example1: I can’t quite put my finger on what’s wrong.
words.example1Translation: Nima noto‘g‘ri ekanligini aniq aytolmayapman.
words.example2: She put her finger on the problem immediately.
words.example2Translation: U muammoni darhol aniqladi.
words.example3: Can you put your finger on the reason?
words.example3Translation: Sababni aniq aytib bera olasizmi?
extraExamples: I can’t put my finger on it, but something feels different.
He quickly put his finger on the mistake.
She put her finger on the main issue.
It’s hard to put your finger on the exact cause.
The expert put his finger on the solution.
I think I can put my finger on the problem now.
No one could put their finger on what was missing.
extraExampleTranslations: Aniq aytolmayman, lekin biror narsa boshqacha tuyulmoqda.
U xatoni tezda aniqladi.
U asosiy muammoni aniqladi.
Aniq sababni topish qiyin.
Mutaxassis yechimni aniqladi.
Endi muammoni aniqlay olaman deb o‘ylayman.
Hech kim nima yetishmayotganini aniqlay olmadi.

words.definition: to make someone remain alert or prepared
words.definitionUz: Kimnidir doimiy hushyor va tayyor holatda saqlash
words.example1: The teacher keeps the students on their toes.
words.example1Translation: O‘qituvchi o‘quvchilarni doim diqqatli tutadi.
words.example2: This job keeps me on my toes.
words.example2Translation: Bu ish meni doim hushyor tutadi.
words.example3: The competition keeps everyone on their toes.
words.example3Translation: Raqobat hammani diqqatli qiladi.
extraExamples: A good manager keeps the team on their toes.
The unpredictable weather keeps us on our toes.
The coach keeps the players on their toes.
New challenges keep me on my toes.
She likes jobs that keep her on her toes.
The boss keeps everyone on their toes.
Variety keeps life on your toes.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi rahbar jamoani hushyor tutadi.
Bashorat qilib bo‘lmaydigan ob-havo bizni hushyor tutadi.
Murabbiy o‘yinchilarni diqqatli tutadi.
Yangi qiyinchiliklar meni hushyor tutadi.
U o‘zini doim faol tutadigan ishlarni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Rahbar hammani diqqatli tutadi.
Xilma-xillik hayotni qiziqarli qiladi.

words.definition: exceptionally impressive or extraordinary
words.definitionUz: Oddiy doiradan tashqarida, juda ajoyib va noyob
words.example1: The food at that restaurant is out of this world.
words.example1Translation: O‘sha restorandagi ovqat ajoyib darajada mazali.
words.example2: Her performance was out of this world.
words.example2Translation: Uning chiqishi ajoyib darajada edi.
words.example3: The view from the mountain is out of this world.
words.example3Translation: Tog‘dan ochiladigan manzara ajoyib.
extraExamples: The cake was out of this world.
His new song is out of this world.
The hotel service was out of this world.
She has an out-of-this-world talent.
The special effects in the movie were out of this world.
Their hospitality was out of this world.
The experience was truly out of this world.
extraExampleTranslations: Tort ajoyib darajada mazali edi.
Uning yangi qo‘shig‘i ajoyib.
Mehmonxonada xizmat ajoyib darajada edi.
U ajoyib qobiliyatga ega.
Filmdagi maxsus effektlar ajoyib edi.
Ularning mehmondo‘stligi ajoyib edi.
Bu tajriba haqiqatan ham noyob edi.

words.definition: anger that is reasonable and morally warranted
words.definitionUz: Mantiqiy va axloqiy jihatdan asosli bo‘lgan g‘azab
words.example1: His anger was justifiable after what happened.
words.example1Translation: Bo‘lib o‘tgan voqeadan keyin uning g‘azabi o‘rinli edi.
words.example2: She expressed justifiable anger at the injustice.
words.example2Translation: U adolatsizlikka nisbatan o‘rinli g‘azabini bildirdi.
words.example3: There is justifiable anger among the workers.
words.example3Translation: Ishchilar orasida o‘rinli g‘azab bor.
extraExamples: The customers showed justifiable anger.
Justifiable anger can lead to positive change.
He felt justifiable anger towards the system.
Her reaction was justifiable anger.
Justifiable anger should be expressed calmly.
The protest was fueled by justifiable anger.
There is justifiable anger over the decision.
extraExampleTranslations: Mijozlar o‘rinli g‘azab bildirishdi.
O‘rinli g‘azab ijobiy o‘zgarishlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U tizimga nisbatan o‘rinli g‘azab his qildi.
Uning reaktsiyasi o‘rinli g‘azab edi.
O‘rinli g‘azabni tinch tarzda ifodalash kerak.
Namoyish o‘rinli g‘azab bilan yoqildi.
Bu qarorga nisbatan o‘rinli g‘azab bor.

words.definition: to increase financial gain to the highest possible level
words.definitionUz: Foydani iloji boricha yuqori darajaga yetkazish
words.example1: The company aims to maximize profits.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya foydani maksimal darajaga chiqarishni maqsad qilgan.
words.example2: They changed strategy to maximize profits.
words.example2Translation: Ular foydani oshirish uchun strategiyani o‘zgartirdilar.
words.example3: Cutting costs helps maximize profits.
words.example3Translation: Xarajatlarni qisqartirish foydani oshirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Businesses always try to maximize profits.
The goal is to maximize profits while maintaining quality.
New technology helps maximize profits.
They maximized profits by expanding overseas.
Maximizing profits should not harm the environment.
The manager focused on maximizing profits.
This decision will help maximize profits next year.
extraExampleTranslations: Bizneslar har doim foydani maksimal darajaga chiqarishga harakat qiladi.
Maqsad — sifatni saqlab, foydani maksimal qilish.
Yangi texnologiya foydani oshirishga yordam beradi.
Ular xorijga chiqib foydani oshirdilar.
Foydani maksimal qilish atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazmasligi kerak.
Rahbar foydani oshirishga e’tibor qaratdi.
Bu qaror kelasi yil foydani oshirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: a medical condition in which the kidneys lose their ability to function properly
words.definitionUz: Buyraklarning to‘g‘ri ishlay olmasligi bilan bog‘liq kasallik
words.example1: He is suffering from kidney failure.
words.example1Translation: U buyrak yetishmovchiligidan aziyat chekmoqda.
words.example2: Kidney failure requires regular dialysis.
words.example2Translation: Buyrak yetishmovchiligi muntazam dializni talab qiladi.
words.example3: Diabetes can lead to kidney failure.
words.example3Translation: Qandli diabet buyrak yetishmovchiligiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Kidney failure is a serious condition.
She was diagnosed with acute kidney failure.
Preventing kidney failure is important.
He needs a kidney transplant due to kidney failure.
Chronic kidney failure develops slowly.
Medication can sometimes cause kidney failure.
Early detection of kidney failure saves lives.
extraExampleTranslations: Buyrak yetishmovchiligi jiddiy kasallik.
Unga o‘tkir buyrak yetishmovchiligi tashxisi qo‘yildi.
Buyrak yetishmovchiligining oldini olish muhim.
U buyrak yetishmovchiligi tufayli buyrak ko‘chirib o‘tkazishga muhtoj.
Surunkali buyrak yetishmovchiligi asta-sekin rivojlanadi.
Ba’zi dorilar buyrak yetishmovchiligiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Buyrak yetishmovchiligini erta aniqlash hayotni saqlab qoladi.

words.definition: words or actions intended to restore confidence or reduce anxiety
words.definitionUz: Odamning o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonchini tiklash yoki xavotirini kamaytirish uchun aytiladigan so‘zlar yoki qilingan harakatlar
words.example1: She needed some reassurance from her friends.
words.example1Translation: U do‘stlarining ishontirishiga muhtoj edi.
words.example2: The doctor gave her reassurance about her health.
words.example2Translation: Shifokor uning sog‘lig‘i haqida ishontirdi.
words.example3: A hug can provide reassurance.
words.example3Translation: Quchoqlash ishontirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: He offered words of reassurance.
The government provided reassurance to the public.
Children often need reassurance at night.
Her smile was a source of reassurance.
We need reassurance that everything will be okay.
The manager gave reassurance to the team.
Reassurance helped reduce her anxiety.
extraExampleTranslations: U ishontirish so‘zlarini aytdi.
Hukumat aholini ishontirdi.
Bolalar ko‘pincha kechasi ishontirishga muhtoj bo‘ladi.
Uning tabassumi ishontirish manbai edi.
Hamma narsa yaxshi bo‘lishiga ishontirishimiz kerak.
Rahbar jamoani ishontirdi.
Ishontirish uning xavotirini kamaytirdi.

words.definition: not confined, captured, or controlled
words.definitionUz: Qo‘lga olinmagan, nazorat ostida bo‘lmagan, ozodda yurayotgan
words.example1: The criminal is still at large.
words.example1Translation: Jinoyatchi hali ham ozodda yuribdi.
words.example2: There is a dangerous animal at large in the area.
words.example2Translation: Bu hududda xavfli hayvon ozodda yuribdi.
words.example3: The virus is still at large.
words.example3Translation: Virus hali ham tarqalmoqda.
extraExamples: The suspect remains at large.
A lion escaped and is at large.
The killer is still at large.
We must catch the thief who is at large.
The disease is at large in the population.
The escaped prisoner is at large.
Rumors are at large in the office.
extraExampleTranslations: Gumonlanuvchi hali ham ozodda.
Sher qochib ketib, ozodda yuribdi.
Qotil hali ham ozodda yuribdi.
Ozodda yurgan o‘g‘rini ushlashimiz kerak.
Kasallik aholida tarqalmoqda.
Qochgan mahbus ozodda.
Ofisda mish-mishlar tarqalmoqda.

words.definition: a person recently accepted into an organisation or group
words.definitionUz: Tashkilot yoki guruhga yaqinda qabul qilingan yangi odam
words.example1: We have a new recruit in the team.
words.example1Translation: Jamoamizda yangi xodim bor.
words.example2: The new recruit is learning quickly.
words.example2Translation: Yangi xodim tez o‘rganmoqda.
words.example3: Training is provided for every new recruit.
words.example3Translation: Har bir yangi xodimga o‘qitish o‘tkaziladi.
extraExamples: The army welcomed new recruits.
She is a new recruit in the sales department.
New recruits need guidance.
The company hired ten new recruits.
He feels nervous as a new recruit.
The coach is training the new recruits.
Every new recruit must attend orientation.
extraExampleTranslations: Armiya yangi askarlarni kutib oldi.
U savdo bo‘limidagi yangi xodim.
Yangi xodimlar rahbarlikka muhtoj.
Kompaniya o‘n nafar yangi xodim oldi.
U yangi xodim sifatida asabiylashmoqda.
Murabbiy yangi o‘yinchilarni mashq qildirmoqda.
Har bir yangi xodim yo‘naltirish mashg‘ulotida qatnashishi kerak.

words.word: To be meant to do something
words.translation: Biror ishni qilish uchun mo‘ljallangan bo‘lmoq
words.definition: To be intended or destined to do something.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni qilish uchun mo‘ljallangan bo‘lmoq — biror narsani bajarish uchun qismat yoki maqsad qilingan bo‘lish.
words.example1: They were meant to meet and fall in love.
words.example1Translation: Ular uchrashib, sevib qolishlari uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.
words.example2: This tool is meant to make the job easier.
words.example2Translation: Bu asbob ishni osonlashtirish uchun mo‘ljallangan.
words.example3: I was never meant to be a singer.
words.example3Translation: Men hech qachon qo‘shiqchi bo‘lish uchun mo‘ljallangan emasman.
extraExamples: The book was meant to inspire young readers.
We were meant to arrive earlier.
This meeting was meant to solve the problem.
She was meant to become a doctor.
The gift was meant to cheer her up.
Everything happens as it is meant to.
The trip was meant to be relaxing.
extraExampleTranslations: Kitob yosh o‘quvchilarni ilhomlantirish uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.
Biz ertaroq yetib kelishimiz kerak edi.
Bu yig‘ilish muammoni hal qilish uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.
U shifokor bo‘lishi uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.
Sovg‘a uni ko‘tarish uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.
Hamma narsa mo‘ljallanganidek sodir bo‘ladi.
Sayohat dam olish uchun mo‘ljallangan edi.

words.definition: To recover and rebuild one’s life after a failure, loss, or disaster.
words.definitionUz: Parchalarni yig‘ishtirmoq — muvaffaqiyatsizlik, yo‘qotish yoki falokatdan keyin hayotni tiklash va qayta qurish.
words.example1: After the divorce, she had to pick up the pieces.
words.example1Translation: Ajralishdan keyin u parchalarni yig‘ishtirishga majbur bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The team is trying to pick up the pieces after the loss.
words.example2Translation: Jamoa mag‘lubiyatdan keyin parchalarni yig‘ishtirishga harakat qilmoqda.
words.example3: It took him years to pick up the pieces after the bankruptcy.
words.example3Translation: Bankrotlikdan keyin parchalarni yig‘ishtirish uchun unga yillar kerak bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: After the accident, the family had to pick up the pieces.
She picked up the pieces and started a new life.
The country is slowly picking up the pieces after the war.
It’s hard to pick up the pieces when you lose everything.
He helped her pick up the pieces.
Picking up the pieces takes time and courage.
The company is picking up the pieces after the scandal.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtohalokatdan keyin oila parchalarni yig‘ishtirishga majbur bo‘ldi.
U parchalarni yig‘ishtirib, yangi hayot boshladi.
Mamlakat urushdan keyin asta-sekin parchalarni yig‘ishtirmoqda.
Hamma narsani yo‘qotganda parchalarni yig‘ishtirish qiyin.
U unga parchalarni yig‘ishtirishda yordam berdi.
Parchalarni yig‘ishtirish vaqt va jasoratni talab qiladi.
Kompaniya janjaldan keyin parchalarni yig‘ishtirmoqda.

words.definition: Excessive bureaucratic rules and procedures that slow down or prevent action.
words.definitionUz: Qizil lenta — harakatni sekinlashtiradigan yoki to‘sqinlik qiladigan haddan tashqari byurokratik qoidalar va tartiblar.
words.example1: Too much red tape makes it hard to start a business.
words.example1Translation: Juda ko‘p qizil lenta biznes ochishni qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example2: We had to cut through a lot of red tape to get approval.
words.example2Translation: Ruxsat olish uchun ko‘p qizil lentani yengishga majbur bo‘ldik.
words.example3: The new law aims to reduce red tape.
words.example3Translation: Yangi qonun qizil lentani kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.
extraExamples: Government agencies are full of red tape.
Red tape delays many important projects.
She hates dealing with red tape.
The company is trying to avoid unnecessary red tape.
Red tape is a major problem for small businesses.
They simplified the process to cut red tape.
Bureaucratic red tape frustrated the applicants.
extraExampleTranslations: Davlat idoralari qizil lentaga to‘la.
Qizil lenta ko‘plab muhim loyihalarni kechiktiradi.
U qizil lenta bilan ishlashni yoqtirmaydi.
Kompaniya keraksiz qizil lentadan qochishga harakat qilmoqda.
Qizil lenta kichik bizneslar uchun katta muammo.
Ular jarayonni soddalashtirib, qizil lentani qisqartirdilar.
Byurokratik qizil lenta arizachilarni bezdirdi.

words.definition: Unique; unlike anything or anyone else.
words.definitionUz: Yagona — boshqa hech narsa yoki hech kim bilan o‘xshashi bo‘lmagan.
words.example1: She is truly one of a kind.
words.example1Translation: U chinakam yagona.
words.example2: This painting is one of a kind.
words.example2Translation: Bu rasm yagona.
words.example3: He has a one of a kind sense of humor.
words.example3Translation: Uning hazil tuyg‘usi yagona.
extraExamples: The ancient artifact is one of a kind.
Their friendship is one of a kind.
This experience was one of a kind.
She designed a one of a kind dress.
He is one of a kind in his field.
The view from the mountain is one of a kind.
The book offers a one of a kind perspective.
extraExampleTranslations: Qadimiy artefakt yagona.
Ularning do‘stligi yagona.
Bu tajriba yagona edi.
U yagona ko‘ylakni yaratdi.
U o‘z sohasida yagona.
Tog‘dan ochiladigan manzara yagona.
Kitob yagona nuqtai nazarni taklif qiladi.

words.definition: To appear important, significant, or threatening in one’s thoughts.
words.definitionUz: Katta bo‘lib ko‘rinmoq — fikrlarda muhim, katta yoki tahdidli bo‘lib tuyulish.
words.example1: The upcoming exam loomed large in her mind.
words.example1Translation: Yaqinlashayotgan imtihon uning ongida katta bo‘lib ko‘rinardi.
words.example2: Financial problems loomed large over the family.
words.example2Translation: Moliyaviy muammolar oila ustida katta bo‘lib turardi.
words.example3: Climate change looms large as a global issue.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi global muammo sifatida katta bo‘lib turibdi.
extraExamples: The deadline loomed large.
His past mistakes loomed large in the interview.
Uncertainty about the future loomed large.
The threat of illness loomed large.
Success loomed large after years of effort.
The mountain loomed large in the distance.
The problem continues to loom large.
extraExampleTranslations: Muddat katta bo‘lib turardi.
O‘tmishdagi xatolari intervyuda katta bo‘lib ko‘rindi.
Kelajak haqidagi noaniqlik katta bo‘lib turardi.
Kasallik tahdidi katta bo‘lib turardi.
Yillar davomidagi mehnatdan keyin muvaffaqiyat katta bo‘lib ko‘rindi.
Tog‘ uzoqdan katta bo‘lib ko‘rinardi.
Muammo hali ham katta bo‘lib turibdi.

words.word: To be out of the question
words.translation: Hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas
words.definition: Completely impossible or unacceptable.
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas — mutlaqo imkonsiz yoki qabul qilib bo‘lmaydigan.
words.example1: Going out tonight is out of the question.
words.example1Translation: Bugun kechqurun chiqish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
words.example2: Quitting now is out of the question.
words.example2Translation: Hozir tashlab ketish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
words.example3: Asking for more money is out of the question.
words.example3Translation: Yana pul so‘rash hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
extraExamples: Traveling abroad is out of the question this year.
Changing the rules now is out of the question.
Giving up is out of the question.
The idea is completely out of the question.
Staying up late is out of the question on a school night.
A pay rise is out of the question at the moment.
Compromising on safety is out of the question.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu yil chet elga sayohat hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Hozir qoidalarni o‘zgartirish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Taslim bo‘lish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Bu g‘oya mutlaqo hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Maktab kechasida kechgacha o‘tirish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Hozir maoshni oshirish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.
Xavfsizlikdan voz kechish hech qanday gap bo‘lishi mumkin emas.

words.definition: To reallocate financial resources more evenly within society.
words.definitionUz: Boylikni qayta taqsimlash — jamiyat ichida moliyaviy resurslarni tengroq taqsimlash.
words.example1: The policy aims to redistribute wealth more fairly.
words.example1Translation: Siyosat boylikni adolatliroq taqsimlashni maqsad qilgan.
words.example2: Economists debate how to redistribute wealth.
words.example2Translation: Iqtisodchilar boylikni qanday qayta taqsimlash haqida bahslashadi.
words.example3: Taxes are one way to redistribute wealth.
words.example3Translation: Soliqlar boylikni qayta taqsimlashning bir usuli.
extraExamples: The government plans to redistribute wealth through social programs.
Redistributing wealth can reduce inequality.
Some believe in redistributing wealth from rich to poor.
The proposal to redistribute wealth was controversial.
Effective ways to redistribute wealth are needed.
The revolution sought to redistribute wealth.
Redistributing wealth is a complex issue.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat ijtimoiy dasturlar orqali boylikni qayta taqsimlashni rejalashtirmoqda.
Boylikni qayta taqsimlash tengsizlikni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ba’zilar boylikni boylardan kambag‘allarga qayta taqsimlash tarafdori.
Boylikni qayta taqsimlash taklifi bahsli edi.
Boylikni samarali qayta taqsimlash usullari kerak.
Inqilob boylikni qayta taqsimlashni maqsad qilgan.
Boylikni qayta taqsimlash murakkab masala.

words.definition: To be a significant and difficult achievement.
words.definitionUz: Oson ish emas — muhim va qiyin yutuq bo‘lish.
words.example1: Climbing the mountain was no mean feat.
words.example1Translation: Tog‘ga chiqish oson ish emas edi.
words.example2: Raising five children is no mean feat.
words.example2Translation: Besh bola tarbiyalash oson ish emas.
words.example3: Completing the marathon in that time was no mean feat.
words.example3Translation: Marafonni shu vaqtda tugatish oson ish emas edi.
extraExamples: Learning a new language is no mean feat.
Building the bridge was no mean feat.
Her recovery was no mean feat.
Winning the award is no mean feat.
Managing the company through the crisis was no mean feat.
Raising awareness about the issue was no mean feat.
The performance was no mean feat.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi til o‘rganish oson ish emas.
Ko‘prik qurish oson ish emas edi.
Uning tuzalishi oson ish emas edi.
Mukofotni yutish oson ish emas.
Inqiroz paytida kompaniyani boshqarish oson ish emas edi.
Muammo haqida xabardorlikni oshirish oson ish emas edi.
Ijro oson ish emas edi.

words.definition: To get married.
words.definitionUz: Uylanish / turmushga chiqmoq — oila qurmoq.
words.example1: They decided to tie the knot next summer.
words.example1Translation: Ular kelasi yozda uylanishga qaror qilishdi.
words.example2: After ten years together, they finally tied the knot.
words.example2Translation: O‘n yil birga bo‘lgandan keyin ular nihoyat turmush qurishdi.
words.example3: She is excited to tie the knot.
words.example3Translation: U turmushga chiqishdan xursand.
extraExamples: They tied the knot in a small ceremony.
When are you going to tie the knot?
Tying the knot is a big step.
The couple tied the knot after a long engagement.
Many celebrities tied the knot this year.
He asked her to tie the knot.
Tying the knot changed their lives.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular kichik marosimda turmush qurishdi.
Qachon uylanasiz?
Turmush qurish katta qadam.
Er-xotin uzoq unashtiruvdan keyin turmush qurishdi.
Bu yil ko‘plab mashhurlar turmush qurishdi.
U unga turmushga chiqishni taklif qildi.
Turmush qurish ularning hayotini o‘zgartirdi.

words.definition: Destitute, exhausted, or socially marginalised.
words.definitionUz: Yordamsiz va umidsiz — pulsiz, charchagan yoki jamiyat chetida qolgan holat.
words.example1: He was down and out after losing his job.
words.example1Translation: Ishini yo‘qotgandan keyin u yordamsiz va umidsiz edi.
words.example2: Many people end up down and out during economic crises.
words.example2Translation: Iqtisodiy inqiroz paytida ko‘plab odamlar yordamsiz va umidsiz qolishadi.
words.example3: The charity helps those who are down and out.
words.example3Translation: Xayriya tashkiloti yordamsiz va umidsiz odamlarga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: She felt down and out after the breakup.
He was down and out but never gave up.
The book tells stories of people who were down and out.
Being down and out is difficult.
The shelter provides help for the down and out.
He rose from being down and out to success.
Many athletes have been down and out at some point.
extraExampleTranslations: Ajralishdan keyin u yordamsiz va umidsiz his qildi.
U yordamsiz va umidsiz edi, lekin hech qachon taslim bo‘lmadi.
Kitob yordamsiz va umidsiz bo‘lgan odamlarning hikoyalarini aytadi.
Yordamsiz va umidsiz bo‘lish qiyin.
Boshpana yordamsiz va umidsiz odamlarga yordam beradi.
U yordamsiz va umidsiz holatdan muvaffaqiyatga ko‘tarildi.
Ko‘plab sportchilar bir paytlar yordamsiz va umidsiz bo‘lishgan.

words.definition: To rest and regain energy and enthusiasm.
words.definitionUz: Kuch to‘plash — dam olib, kuch va ishtiyoqni tiklash.
words.example1: I need a holiday to recharge my batteries.
words.example1Translation: Kuch to‘plash uchun ta’til kerak.
words.example2: A good night’s sleep helps recharge your batteries.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi uxlab olish kuch to‘plashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She went to the countryside to recharge her batteries.
words.example3Translation: U kuch to‘plash uchun qishloqqa bordi.
extraExamples: Take a break to recharge your batteries.
Traveling helps me recharge my batteries.
Spending time with family recharges my batteries.
After the busy week, I need to recharge my batteries.
Exercise can help recharge your batteries.
Reading a book is a good way to recharge your batteries.
He took a short vacation to recharge his batteries.
extraExampleTranslations: Dam oling va kuch to‘plang.
Sayohat menga kuch to‘plashga yordam beradi.
Oilaviy vaqt o‘tkazish menga kuch to‘playdi.
Band haftadan keyin kuch to‘plashim kerak.
Sport kuch to‘plashga yordam berishi mumkin.
Kitob o‘qish kuch to‘plashning yaxshi usuli.
U qisqa ta’tilga chiqib kuch to‘pladi.

words.word: I was reduced to doing something
words.definition: To be forced by circumstances to take an undesirable or humiliating action.
words.definitionUz: Shunchalik ahvolga tushib qolmoq — vaziyat taqozosi bilan yoqimsiz yoki tahqirlanadigan ishni bajarishga majbur bo‘lish.
words.example1: I was reduced to borrowing money from friends.
words.example1Translation: Do‘stlarimdan pul qarz olishga majbur bo‘ldim.
words.example2: She was reduced to living in a shelter.
words.example2Translation: U boshpanada yashashga majbur bo‘ldi.
words.example3: He was reduced to begging on the streets.
words.example3Translation: U ko‘chada tilanchilik qilishga majbur bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: They were reduced to selling their belongings.
I was reduced to tears by the sad news.
She was reduced to working two jobs.
The family was reduced to eating very little.
He was reduced to sleeping in his car.
After the fire, they were reduced to living with relatives.
The company was reduced to laying off workers.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular o‘z buyumlarini sotishga majbur bo‘lishdi.
Yomon xabardan ko‘z yoshlarimga qoldim.
U ikki ishda ishlashga majbur bo‘ldi.
Oila juda oz ovqat yeyishga majbur bo‘ldi.
U mashinasida uxlab qolishga majbur bo‘ldi.
Yong‘indan keyin ular qarindoshlarida yashashga majbur bo‘lishdi.
Kompaniya xodimlarni ishdan bo‘shatishga majbur bo‘ldi.

words.definition: A respectful reference to one’s deceased father.
words.definitionUz: Marhum otam — o‘tgan otaga hurmat bilan murojaat.
words.example1: My late father taught me many valuable lessons.
words.example1Translation: Marhum otam menga ko‘p qimmatli saboqlar bergan.
words.example2: She often speaks about her late father.
words.example2Translation: U tez-tez marhum otasi haqida gapiradi.
words.example3: In memory of my late father.
words.example3Translation: Marhum otam xotirasiga.
extraExamples: My late father was a kind man.
The late father left a great legacy.
She inherited the house from her late father.
He looks just like his late father.
Stories about her late father always make her smile.
The late father would be proud of his son.
We visited the grave of my late father.
extraExampleTranslations: Marhum otam mehribon odam edi.
Marhum ota katta meros qoldirdi.
U marhum otasidan uy meros qilib oldi.
U marhum otasiga juda o‘xshaydi.
Marhum otasi haqidagi hikoyalar uni har doim tabassum qildiradi.
Marhum ota o‘g‘li bilan faxrlanardi.
Biz marhum otamning qabrini ziyorat qildik.

words.definition: On alternate days; every second day.
words.definitionUz: Kun o‘rtasida — har ikkinchi kuni.
words.example1: I exercise every other day.
words.example1Translation: Men har ikkinchi kuni sport bilan shug‘ullanaman.
words.example2: The bus runs every other day.
words.example2Translation: Avtobus har ikkinchi kuni qatnaydi.
words.example3: She visits her grandparents every other day.
words.example3Translation: U bobosi va buvisini har ikkinchi kuni ko‘rib turadi.
extraExamples: Take the medicine every other day.
We meet every other day.
The class is held every other day.
Water the plants every other day.
He calls his mother every other day.
Training happens every other day.
She changes the sheets every other day.
extraExampleTranslations: Dorini har ikkinchi kuni iching.
Biz har ikkinchi kuni uchrashamiz.
Dars har ikkinchi kuni o‘tkaziladi.
O‘simliklarni har ikkinchi kuni sug‘oring.
U onasiga har ikkinchi kuni qo‘ng‘iroq qiladi.
Mashg‘ulot har ikkinchi kuni bo‘ladi.
U choyshabni har ikkinchi kuni almashtiradi.

words.definition: Used to describe a sudden, unexpected development.
words.definitionUz: Keyingisi shuki — to‘satdan, kutilmagan voqea sodir bo‘lishini tasvirlash uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I was walking home and the next thing I know, it started raining.
words.example1Translation: Uyga ketayotgan edim, keyingisi shuki, yomg‘ir yog‘a boshladi.
words.example2: We were talking and the next thing I know, he was gone.
words.example2Translation: Gaplashayotgan edik, keyingisi shuki, u yo‘q bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example3: I closed my eyes for a moment and the next thing I know, it was morning.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘zlarimni bir zum yumdim, keyingisi shuki, tong otgan edi.
extraExamples: I was driving and the next thing I know, I had an accident.
She was fine and the next thing I know, she was in hospital.
We were laughing and the next thing I know, we were arguing.
The next thing I know, the police arrived.
I sat down and the next thing I know, I fell asleep.
He was healthy and the next thing I know, he was ill.
The next thing I know, the party was over.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashina haydab ketayotgan edim, keyingisi shuki, avtohalokatga uchrab qoldim.
U yaxshi edi, keyingisi shuki, shifoxonada yotardi.
Kulayotgan edik, keyingisi shuki, bahslashib qoldik.
Keyingisi shuki, politsiya yetib keldi.
O‘tirdim, keyingisi shuki, uxlab qoldim.
U sog‘ edi, keyingisi shuki, kasal bo‘lib qoldi.
Keyingisi shuki, ziyofat tugadi.

words.definition: To be highly knowledgeable or competent in a subject.
words.definitionUz: Ishni bilmoq — biror sohada juda yaxshi bilimga ega yoki malakali bo‘lish.
words.example1: She really knows her stuff when it comes to marketing.
words.example1Translation: Marketingga kelganda u ishni juda yaxshi biladi.
words.example2: The mechanic knows his stuff.
words.example2Translation: Mexanik ishni biladi.
words.example3: He knows his stuff about history.
words.example3Translation: U tarixni yaxshi biladi.
extraExamples: The teacher knows her stuff.
You can trust him — he knows his stuff.
She knows her stuff in the kitchen.
The lawyer knows his stuff very well.
He really knows his stuff about computers.
Knowing your stuff is important for success.
The guide knows his stuff about the city.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi ishni yaxshi biladi.
Unga ishonishingiz mumkin — u ishni biladi.
U oshxonada ishni biladi.
Advokat ishni juda yaxshi biladi.
U kompyuterlarni juda yaxshi biladi.
Ishni bilish muvaffaqiyat uchun muhim.
Gid shahar haqida ishni biladi.

words.definition: No later than a specified time.
words.definitionUz: Eng kechida — belgilangan vaqtdan kechiktirmasdan.
words.example1: Please finish the report by Friday at the latest.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, hisobotni eng kechida juma kunigacha tugating.
words.example2: The package should arrive by tomorrow at the latest.
words.example2Translation: Posilka eng kechida ertaga yetib kelishi kerak.
words.example3: We need to leave by 8 o’clock at the latest.
words.example3Translation: Biz eng kechida soat 8 da jo‘nab ketishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The deadline is next week at the latest.
Call me back by evening at the latest.
The work must be completed by Monday at the latest.
I’ll be there by 10 at the latest.
Pay the bill by the end of the month at the latest.
The decision will be made by tomorrow at the latest.
Submit your application by Friday at the latest.
extraExampleTranslations: Muddat eng kechida keyingi hafta.
Eng kechida kechqurun qayta qo‘ng‘iroq qiling.
Ish eng kechida dushanbagacha tugatilishi kerak.
Eng kechida soat 10 da yetib boraman.
Hisobni eng kechida oyning oxirida to‘lang.
Qaror eng kechida ertaga qabul qilinadi.
Arizangizni eng kechida jumagacha topshiring.

words.definition: No longer needed or useful, often due to change or efficiency.
words.definitionUz: Ortiqcha — o‘zgarish yoki samaradorlik tufayli endi kerak bo‘lmay qolgan yoki foydasi yo‘q.
words.example1: Many workers became redundant after the merger.
words.example1Translation: Birlashuvdan keyin ko‘plab ishchilar ortiqcha bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: The old equipment is now redundant.
words.example2Translation: Eski jihozlar endi ortiqcha.
words.example3: Some skills have become redundant in the modern world.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy dunyoda ba’zi ko‘nikmalar ortiqcha bo‘lib qoldi.
extraExamples: The position was made redundant.
Redundant information was removed from the report.
He felt redundant in his job.
The company offered redundancy pay.
Old laws have become redundant.
The system made many manual jobs redundant.
She was made redundant last month.
extraExampleTranslations: Lavozim ortiqcha bo‘lib qoldi.
Hisobotdan ortiqcha ma’lumotlar olib tashlandi.
U o‘z ishida ortiqcha his qildi.
Kompaniya ishdan bo‘shatish nafaqasini taklif qildi.
Eski qonunlar ortiqcha bo‘lib qoldi.
Tizim ko‘plab qo‘l mehnati ishlarini ortiqcha qildi.
U o‘tgan oy ishdan bo‘shatildi.

words.definition: A course of action likely to lead to serious failure or trouble.
words.definitionUz: Falokat retsepti — jiddiy muvaffaqiyatsizlik yoki muammoga olib keladigan harakat yo‘nalishi.
words.example1: Ignoring safety rules is a recipe for disaster.
words.example1Translation: Xavfsizlik qoidalarini e’tiborsiz qoldirish falokat retsepti.
words.example2: Mixing alcohol and driving is a recipe for disaster.
words.example2Translation: Spirtli ichimlik va haydash falokat retsepti.
words.example3: Poor planning is a recipe for disaster.
words.example3Translation: Yomon rejalashtirish falokat retsepti.
extraExamples: Not preparing for the exam is a recipe for disaster.
The decision was a recipe for disaster.
Cutting corners is a recipe for disaster.
Ignoring warnings is a recipe for disaster.
Overworking without rest is a recipe for disaster.
The combination proved to be a recipe for disaster.
Rushing the project was a recipe for disaster.
extraExampleTranslations: Imtihonga tayyorlanmaslik falokat retsepti.
Qaror falokat retsepti edi.
Tez va sifatsiz ishlash falokat retsepti.
Ogohlantirishlarni e’tiborsiz qoldirish falokat retsepti.
Dam olmasdan ortiqcha ishlash falokat retsepti.
Bu birikma falokat retsepti bo‘lib chiqdi.
Loyihani shoshiltirish falokat retsepti edi.

words.definition: Certainly; used to give enthusiastic permission or agreement.
words.definitionUz: Albatta — ishtiyoq bilan ruxsat berish yoki rozi bo‘lish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: By all means, come over for dinner.
words.example1Translation: Albatta, kechki ovqatga keling.
words.example2: “Can I borrow your book?” “By all means.”
words.example2Translation: “Kitobingizni olsam bo‘ladimi?” “Albatta.”
words.example3: By all means, take as much time as you need.
words.example3Translation: Albatta, kerakli vaqtni oling.
extraExamples: By all means, help yourself to some food.
You can use my car by all means.
By all means, let me know if you need anything.
“May I join you?” “By all means.”
By all means, try the new recipe.
Feel free to ask questions by all means.
By all means, go ahead with your plan.
extraExampleTranslations: Albatta, o‘zingizga ovqat oling.
Mening mashinamdan foydalanishingiz mumkin, albatta.
Agar biror narsa kerak bo‘lsa, albatta xabar bering.
“Sizga qo‘shilsam bo‘ladimi?” “Albatta.”
Albatta, yangi retseptni sinab ko‘ring.
Savollar bersangiz, albatta erkin so‘rang.
Albatta, rejangizni davom ettiring.

words.definition: To lose emotional control or stop functioning effectively.
words.definitionUz: Parchalanib ketmoq — emotsional nazoratni yo‘qotish yoki samarali ishlashni to‘xtatish.
words.example1: She fell to pieces when she heard the bad news.
words.example1Translation: Yomon xabarni eshitgach, u parchalanib ketdi.
words.example2: The old car finally fell to pieces.
words.example2Translation: Eski mashina nihoyat parchalanib ketdi.
words.example3: After the divorce, he fell to pieces.
words.example3Translation: Ajralishdan keyin u parchalanib ketdi.
extraExamples: The plan fell to pieces at the last minute.
Don’t fall to pieces under pressure.
The team fell to pieces after the captain left.
She fell to pieces during the funeral.
The relationship fell to pieces.
The economy fell to pieces after the crisis.
He tried not to fall to pieces in front of everyone.
extraExampleTranslations: Reja oxirgi daqiqada parchalanib ketdi.
Bosim ostida parchalanib ketmang.
Kapitan ketgandan keyin jamoa parchalanib ketdi.
U dafn marosimida parchalanib ketdi.
Munosabatlar parchalanib ketdi.
Inqirozdan keyin iqtisodiyot parchalanib ketdi.
U hammning oldida parchalanib ketmaslikka harakat qildi.

words.definition: A situation that must be taken seriously.
words.definitionUz: Bu hazil emas — jiddiy qabul qilinishi kerak bo‘lgan vaziyat.
words.example1: Losing your job is no laughing matter.
words.example1Translation: Ishni yo‘qotish hazil emas.
words.example2: The accident was no laughing matter.
words.example2Translation: Avtohalokat hazil emas edi.
words.example3: Health problems are no laughing matter.
words.example3Translation: Salomatlik muammolari hazil emas.
extraExamples: Climate change is no laughing matter.
Financial difficulties are no laughing matter.
The teacher said cheating was no laughing matter.
Safety violations are no laughing matter.
The news was no laughing matter.
Being late every day is no laughing matter.
The warning was no laughing matter.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishi hazil emas.
Moliyaviy qiyinchiliklar hazil emas.
O‘qituvchi aldash hazil emasligini aytdi.
Xavfsizlik qoidalarini buzish hazil emas.
Xabar hazil emas edi.
Har kuni kechikish hazil emas.
Ogohlantirish hazil emas edi.

words.definition: Conventional, scientifically accepted medical treatment.
words.definitionUz: An’anaviy tibbiyot — ilmiy jihatdan qabul qilingan odatiy tibbiy davolash.
words.example1: She prefers orthodox medicine over alternative treatments.
words.example1Translation: U muqobil davolash usullaridan ko‘ra an’anaviy tibbiyotni afzal ko‘radi.
words.example2: Orthodox medicine has made great advances.
words.example2Translation: An’anaviy tibbiyot katta yutuqlarga erishdi.
words.example3: The doctor recommended orthodox medicine.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor an’anaviy tibbiyotni tavsiya qildi.
extraExamples: Orthodox medicine relies on scientific evidence.
Many people combine orthodox medicine with traditional remedies.
Orthodox medicine saved his life.
The hospital provides orthodox medicine.
Debates between orthodox medicine and alternative therapies continue.
She studied orthodox medicine at university.
Orthodox medicine is widely practiced around the world.
extraExampleTranslations: An’anaviy tibbiyot ilmiy dalillarga asoslanadi.
Ko‘plab odamlar an’anaviy tibbiyotni an’anaviy dori-darmonlar bilan birlashtirishadi.
An’anaviy tibbiyot uning hayotini saqlab qoldi.
Shifoxona an’anaviy tibbiyotni ta’minlaydi.
An’anaviy tibbiyot va muqobil terapiyalar o‘rtasidagi bahslar davom etmoqda.
U universitetda an’anaviy tibbiyotni o‘qidi.
An’anaviy tibbiyot dunyo bo‘ylab keng qo‘llaniladi.

words.definition: An extravagant and costly celebration.
words.definitionUz: Hashamatli ziyofat — haddan tashqari dabdabali va qimmat bayram.
words.example1: They threw a lavish party for their anniversary.
words.example1Translation: Ular yubileyi uchun hashamatli ziyofat uyushtirishdi.
words.example2: The lavish party included live music and fireworks.
words.example2Translation: Hashamatli ziyofatda jonli musiqa va otashinlar bor edi.
words.example3: A lavish party was held at the palace.
words.example3Translation: Saroyda hashamatli ziyofat o‘tkazildi.
extraExamples: The wedding was a lavish party.
He hosted a lavish party for his friends.
The company threw a lavish party for its employees.
Lavish parties are common among the wealthy.
She dreamed of having a lavish party.
The lavish party lasted until dawn.
Organizing a lavish party requires a big budget.
extraExampleTranslations: To‘y hashamatli ziyofat edi.
U do‘stlari uchun hashamatli ziyofat uyushtirdi.
Kompaniya xodimlari uchun hashamatli ziyofat uyushtirdi.
Hashamatli ziyofatlar boylar orasida keng tarqalgan.
U hashamatli ziyofat o‘tkazishni orzu qilardi.
Hashamatli ziyofat tong otguncha davom etdi.
Hashamatli ziyofatni tashkil qilish katta byudjet talab qiladi.

words.definition: Collapse of legal authority and public safety.
words.definitionUz: Qonun va tartib buzilishi — huquqiy hokimiyat va jamoat xavfsizligining parchalanishi.
words.example1: There was a breakdown in law and order after the protests.
words.example1Translation: Norozilik namoyishlaridan keyin qonun va tartib buzildi.
words.example2: The government acted to prevent a breakdown in law and order.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat qonun va tartib buzilishining oldini olish uchun harakat qildi.
words.example3: A breakdown in law and order led to chaos.
words.example3Translation: Qonun va tartib buzilishi tartibsizlikka olib keldi.
extraExamples: The country experienced a breakdown in law and order.
A breakdown in law and order can cause panic.
The police worked to restore law and order.
Economic crisis often leads to breakdown in law and order.
The film depicts a breakdown in law and order.
Leaders must prevent breakdown in law and order.
The city suffered from a temporary breakdown in law and order.
extraExampleTranslations: Mamlakatda qonun va tartib buzilishi kuzatildi.
Qonun va tartib buzilishi vahimaga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Politsiya qonun va tartibni tiklash uchun ishladi.
Iqtisodiy inqiroz ko‘pincha qonun va tartib buzilishiga olib keladi.
Film qonun va tartib buzilishini tasvirlaydi.
Rahbarlar qonun va tartib buzilishining oldini olishlari kerak.
Shahar vaqtinchalik qonun va tartib buzilishidan aziyat chekdi.

words.definition: To deliberately avoid doing something.
words.definitionUz: O‘zini tiymoq — biror ishni ataylab qilmaslik.
words.example1: Please refrain from smoking in this area.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, bu hududda chekishdan o‘zingizni tiying.
words.example2: He refrained from commenting on the matter.
words.example2Translation: U masala bo‘yicha izoh berishdan o‘zini tiydi.
words.example3: She refrained from eating sweets during the diet.
words.example3Translation: U parhez paytida shirinlik yeyishdan o‘zini tiydi.
extraExamples: Refrain from using your phone during the meeting.
The doctor advised him to refrain from alcohol.
Please refrain from running in the corridors.
She refrained from arguing with her boss.
They refrained from making any promises.
Refrain from touching the exhibits.
He refrained from laughing at the mistake.
extraExampleTranslations: Yig‘ilish paytida telefondan foydalanishdan o‘zingizni tiying.
Shifokor unga spirtli ichimlikdan tiyilishni maslahat berdi.
Iltimos, koridorlarda yugurishdan o‘zingizni tiying.
U rahbari bilan bahslashishdan o‘zini tiydi.
Ular hech qanday va’da berishdan o‘zlarini tiydilar.
Ko‘rgazma buyumlariga teginishdan o‘zingizni tiying.
U xatoga kulishdan o‘zini tiydi.

words.definition: To possess sufficient financial resources to purchase something.
words.definitionUz: Sotib olishga qurbi yetmoq — biror narsani sotib olish uchun yetarli moliyaviy imkoniyatga ega bo‘lish.
words.example1: I don’t have the means to buy a new car right now.
words.example1Translation: Hozir yangi mashina sotib olishga qurbim yetmaydi.
words.example2: She finally has the means to buy her dream house.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat orzu qilgan uyini sotib olishga qurbi yetdi.
words.example3: Only a few people have the means to buy such expensive jewelry.
words.example3Translation: Faqat bir necha odamning bunchalik qimmat taqinchoqlarni sotib olishga qurbi yetadi.
extraExamples: Do you have the means to buy a ticket?
He doesn’t have the means to support a big family.
With this salary, I have the means to buy what I need.
Many families don’t have the means to buy healthy food.
She worked hard to have the means to buy the shop.
They have the means to buy luxury goods.
Having the means to buy a house is a big achievement.
extraExampleTranslations: Chipta sotib olishga qurbingiz yetadimi?
U katta oilani boqishga qurbi yetmaydi.
Bu maosh bilan kerakli narsalarni sotib olishga qurbim yetadi.
Ko‘plab oilalarning sog‘lom ovqat sotib olishga qurbi yetmaydi.
U do‘konni sotib olishga qurbi yetishi uchun qattiq mehnat qildi.
Ularning hashamatli buyumlarni sotib olishga qurbi yetadi.
Uy sotib olishga qurbi yetishi katta yutuq.

words.definition: To do something with great enjoyment or enthusiasm.
words.definitionUz: Zavq bilan qilmoq — biror ishni katta zavq yoki ishtiyoq bilan bajarish.
words.example1: He ate the meal with relish.
words.example1Translation: U ovqatni zavq bilan yedi.
words.example2: She spoke about her travels with relish.
words.example2Translation: U sayohatlari haqida zavq bilan gapirdi.
words.example3: The children played with relish.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar zavq bilan o‘ynashdi.
extraExamples: He tackled the project with relish.
She reads books with relish.
The team worked with relish.
He described the victory with relish.
Do your work with relish.
The chef prepared the dish with relish.
They listened to the story with relish.
extraExampleTranslations: U loyihani zavq bilan bajardi.
U kitoblarni zavq bilan o‘qiydi.
Jamoa zavq bilan ishladi.
U g‘alabani zavq bilan tasvirlab berdi.
Ishingizni zavq bilan bajaring.
Oshpaz taomni zavq bilan tayyorladi.
Ular hikoyani zavq bilan tinglashdi.

words.definition: To guide someone logically towards a particular belief or judgement.
words.definitionUz: Xulosaga olib kelmoq — kimnidir mantiqiy tarzda ma’lum bir fikr yoki hukmga yetaklash.
words.example1: The evidence led the detective to a conclusion.
words.example1Translation: Dalillar tergovchini xulosaga olib keldi.
words.example2: His words led me to a conclusion about his honesty.
words.example2Translation: Uning so‘zlari meni uning halolligi haqida xulosaga olib keldi.
words.example3: The data leads us to the conclusion that sales are increasing.
words.example3Translation: Ma’lumotlar savdo o‘sib borayotgani haqida xulosaga olib keladi.
extraExamples: The facts lead to one clear conclusion.
Her behavior led me to a conclusion.
The teacher led the students to a conclusion.
What conclusion does this lead you to?
The experiment led scientists to a surprising conclusion.
His silence led her to a conclusion.
The report leads to the conclusion that more funding is needed.
extraExampleTranslations: Faktlar bitta aniq xulosaga olib keladi.
Uning xatti-harakati meni xulosaga olib keldi.
O‘qituvchi talabalarni xulosaga yetakladi.
Bu sizni qanday xulosaga olib keladi?
Tajriba olimlarni kutilmagan xulosaga olib keldi.
Uning jimligi uni xulosaga olib keldi.
Hisobot ko‘proq mablag‘ kerakligi haqida xulosaga olib keladi.

words.definition: Physically healthy enough to perform required tasks.
words.definitionUz: Tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ — talab qilinadigan vazifalarni bajarish uchun yetarli darajada jismonan sog‘ bo‘lish.
words.example1: The pilot was declared medically fit.
words.example1Translation: Uchuvchi tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ deb topildi.
words.example2: You need to be medically fit to join the army.
words.example2Translation: Armiyaga qo‘shilish uchun tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ bo‘lishingiz kerak.
words.example3: After the check-up, he was found medically fit.
words.example3Translation: Tekshiruvdan keyin u tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ deb topildi.
extraExamples: The athlete is medically fit to compete.
She was certified medically fit for the job.
All drivers must be medically fit.
He is not medically fit for heavy work.
The doctor confirmed she is medically fit.
Medically fit workers are required for the project.
Being medically fit is important for safety.
extraExampleTranslations: Sportchi musobaqaga tibbiy jihatdan sog‘.
U ish uchun tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ deb sertifikat oldi.
Barcha haydovchilar tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ bo‘lishlari kerak.
U og‘ir ish uchun tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ emas.
Shifokor uning tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ ekanligini tasdiqladi.
Loyiha uchun tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ ishchilar kerak.
Tibbiy jihatdan sog‘ bo‘lish xavfsizlik uchun muhim.

words.definition: Made private information publicly known, often without authorisation.
words.definitionUz: Matbuotga sizdirilmoq — maxfiy ma’lumotni ko‘pincha ruxsatsiz ravishda ommaga oshkor qilish.
words.example1: The confidential report was leaked to the press.
words.example1Translation: Maxfiy hisobot matbuotga sizdirilgan.
words.example2: Someone leaked the news to the press before the official announcement.
words.example2Translation: Rasmiy e’longa qadar kimdir yangilikni matbuotga sizdirgan.
words.example3: The leaked information caused a big scandal.
words.example3Translation: Sizdirilgan ma’lumot katta janjalga sabab bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: The company is investigating who leaked the documents to the press.
Sensitive details were leaked to the press by an insider.
Leaking to the press can damage reputations.
The government tried to stop the information from being leaked to the press.
She was accused of leaking secrets to the press.
The story was leaked to the press intentionally.
Leaks to the press often happen during political campaigns.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya hujjatlarni matbuotga kim sizdirganini tergov qilmoqda.
Nozik tafsilotlar ichki xodim tomonidan matbuotga sizdirilgan.
Matbuotga sizdirish obro‘ga putur yetkazishi mumkin.
Hukumat ma’lumotning matbuotga sizdirilishini to‘xtatishga harakat qildi.
U maxfiy ma’lumotlarni matbuotga sizdirishda ayblandi.
Hikoya ataylab matbuotga sizdirilgan.
Matbuotga sizdirishlar ko‘pincha siyosiy kampaniyalar paytida sodir bo‘ladi.

words.definition: To be taking prescribed drugs to treat a medical condition.
words.definitionUz: Dori ichmoqda bo‘lmoq — tibbiy holatni davolash uchun shifokor buyurgan dorilarni qabul qilish.
