words.example1: He has been on medication for high blood pressure for years.
words.example1Translation: U bir necha yildan beri yuqori qon bosimi uchun dori ichmoqda.
words.example2: She is on medication after the surgery.
words.example2Translation: U operatsiyadan keyin dori ichmoqda.
words.example3: Patients on medication must follow the doctor’s instructions.
words.example3Translation: Dori ichayotgan bemorlar shifokor ko‘rsatmalariga rioya qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Many people with diabetes are on medication.
He doesn’t like being on medication.
She stopped being on medication too early.
Being on medication helps control the symptoms.
The doctor put him on medication for anxiety.
Children on medication need careful monitoring.
Long-term medication can have side effects.
extraExampleTranslations: Qandli diabet bilan og‘rigan ko‘plab odamlar dori ichishadi.
U dori ichishni yoqtirmaydi.
U dorini juda erta to‘xtatgan.
Dori ichish alomatlarni nazorat qilishga yordam beradi.
Shifokor unga xavotir uchun dori buyurdi.
Dori ichayotgan bolalarni sinchkov kuzatish kerak.
Uzoq muddatli dori yon ta’sirlarga ega bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To cause to become, provide, or perform a service; to make something in a particular state.
words.definitionUz: Sabab bo‘lmoq / bajarish — biror holatga keltirish, xizmat ko‘rsatish yoki biror narsani ma’lum bir holatga keltirish.
words.example1: The injury rendered him unable to walk.
words.example1Translation: Jarohat uni yurishga qodir bo‘lmasligiga sabab bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The new software renders the old version useless.
words.example2Translation: Yangi dastur eski versiyani foydasiz qilib qo‘ydi.
words.example3: They rendered excellent service to their clients.
words.example3Translation: Ular mijozlariga ajoyib xizmat ko‘rsatishdi.
extraExamples: The storm rendered the roads impassable.
Her efforts rendered the project a success.
The translator rendered the speech into English.
The accident rendered the car unusable.
The law renders certain actions illegal.
The painting was rendered in great detail.
Fatigue rendered him unable to concentrate.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo‘ron yo‘llarni o‘tib bo‘lmaydigan qilib qo‘ydi.
Uning harakatlari loyihani muvaffaqiyatli qildi.
Tarjimon nutqni ingliz tiliga tarjima qildi.
Avtohalokat mashinani ishlatib bo‘lmaydigan qilib qo‘ydi.
Qonun ba’zi harakatlarni noqonuniy qiladi.
Rasm katta detallarda chizilgan.
Charchoq uni diqqatni jamlay olmasligiga sabab bo‘ldi.

words.definition: To jump suddenly from a vehicle, usually in haste or urgency.
words.definitionUz: Mashinadan sakrab tushmoq — odatda shoshilinch yoki zarurat tufayli transportdan to‘satdan sakrab tushish.
words.example1: She leaped out of the car when she saw her friend.
words.example1Translation: Do‘stini ko‘rib, u mashinadan sakrab tushdi.
words.example2: The passengers leaped out of the burning car.
words.example2Translation: Yo‘lovchilar yonayotgan mashinadan sakrab tushishdi.
words.example3: He leaped out of the car and ran into the building.
words.example3Translation: U mashinadan sakrab tushib, binoga yugurdi.
extraExamples: The children leaped out of the car as soon as it stopped.
She leaped out of the taxi in a hurry.
He leaped out of the car to help the injured man.
They leaped out of the car when they heard the explosion.
The dog leaped out of the car excitedly.
Don’t leap out of the car while it’s still moving.
The police officer leaped out of the car to chase the suspect.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashina to‘xtagach bolalar darhol sakrab tushishdi.
U shoshilib taksidan sakrab tushdi.
U jarohatlangan odamga yordam berish uchun mashinadan sakrab tushdi.
Portlash ovozini eshitgach ular mashinadan sakrab tushishdi.
It hayajon bilan mashinadan sakrab tushdi.
Mashina harakatda bo‘lganida sakrab tushmang.
Politsiya xodimi gumonlanuvchini quvish uchun mashinadan sakrab tushdi.

words.definition: Progressing very rapidly or dramatically.
words.definitionUz: Tez sur’atlar bilan — juda tez yoki keskin ravishda rivojlanish.
words.example1: Her English has improved in leaps and bounds.
words.example1Translation: Uning ingliz tili tez sur’atlar bilan yaxshilandi.
words.example2: The company is growing in leaps and bounds.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya tez sur’atlar bilan o‘smoqda.
words.example3: Technology advances in leaps and bounds.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya tez sur’atlar bilan rivojlanmoqda.
extraExamples: The city is developing in leaps and bounds.
His skills have improved in leaps and bounds.
The project is progressing in leaps and bounds.
The population grew in leaps and bounds.
Her confidence increased in leaps and bounds.
The team improved in leaps and bounds this season.
Medical science is advancing in leaps and bounds.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar tez sur’atlar bilan rivojlanmoqda.
Uning ko‘nikmalari tez sur’atlar bilan yaxshilandi.
Loyiha tez sur’atlar bilan oldinga siljimoqda.
Aholisi tez sur’atlar bilan o‘sdi.
Uning ishonchi tez sur’atlar bilan oshdi.
Jamoa bu mavsumda tez sur’atlar bilan yaxshilandi.
Tibbiyot fani tez sur’atlar bilan rivojlanmoqda.

words.definition: Operating a vehicle in a dangerously careless manner.
words.definitionUz: Ehtiyotsiz haydash — transport vositasini xavfli darajada beparvo boshqarish.
words.example1: Reckless driving causes many accidents.
words.example1Translation: Ehtiyotsiz haydash ko‘plab avtohalokatlarga sabab bo‘ladi.
words.example2: He was fined for reckless driving.
words.example2Translation: U ehtiyotsiz haydagani uchun jarimaga tortildi.
words.example3: Reckless driving is a serious offence.
words.example3Translation: Ehtiyotsiz haydash jiddiy huquqbuzarlikdir.
extraExamples: Reckless driving endangers everyone on the road.
The police cracked down on reckless driving.
Reckless driving under the influence is especially dangerous.
She was involved in an accident due to reckless driving.
Reckless driving can result in license suspension.
Parents should teach children about the dangers of reckless driving.
The new law aims to reduce reckless driving.
extraExampleTranslations: Ehtiyotsiz haydash yo‘ldagi hammani xavf ostiga qo‘yadi.
Politsiya ehtiyotsiz haydashga qarshi qattiq choralar ko‘rdi.
Spirtli ichimlik ta’sirida ehtiyotsiz haydash ayniqsa xavfli.
U ehtiyotsiz haydash tufayli avtohalokatga uchradi.
Ehtiyotsiz haydash haydovchilik guvohnomasini bekor qilishga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ota-onalar bolalarga ehtiyotsiz haydash xavfini o‘rgatishlari kerak.
Yangi qonun ehtiyotsiz haydashni kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.

words.definition: Especially due to; significantly influenced by.
words.definitionUz: Ayniqsa ... tufayli — biror narsa sababli, ayniqsa shu sababdan.
words.example1: The project succeeded, not least because of her hard work.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha muvaffaqiyatli bo‘ldi, ayniqsa uning qattiq mehnati tufayli.
words.example2: He was promoted, not least because of his dedication.
words.example2Translation: U lavozim oshirdi, ayniqsa o‘z sadoqati tufayli.
words.example3: The event was a success, not least because of the excellent organization.
words.example3Translation: Tadbir muvaffaqiyatli o‘tdi, ayniqsa ajoyib tashkil etilgani tufayli.
extraExamples: The team won, not least because of their strong defense.
She is respected, not least because of her honesty.
The book is popular, not least because of its relatable characters.
He succeeded, not least because of his mentor’s guidance.
The city is beautiful, not least because of its historic buildings.
The plan worked, not least because of careful preparation.
The movie was a hit, not least because of the famous actors.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa g‘alaba qozondi, ayniqsa kuchli himoyasi tufayli.
U hurmatga sazovor, ayniqsa halolligi tufayli.
Kitob mashhur, ayniqsa qahramonlarining hayotga yaqinligi tufayli.
U muvaffaqiyatga erishdi, ayniqsa ustozining yo‘l-yo‘rig‘i tufayli.
Shahar go‘zal, ayniqsa tarixiy binolari tufayli.
Reja ish berdi, ayniqsa puxta tayyorgarlik tufayli.
Film muvaffaqiyatli bo‘ldi, ayniqsa mashhur aktyorlar tufayli.

words.definition: To make every possible effort to achieve a result.
words.definitionUz: Hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmaslik — natijaga erishish uchun barcha imkoniyatlarni ishga solish.
words.example1: The police left no stone unturned in the investigation.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya tergovda hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
words.example2: She left no stone unturned to find her lost dog.
words.example2Translation: U yo‘qolgan itini topish uchun hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
words.example3: We will leave no stone unturned to solve the problem.
words.example3Translation: Muammoni hal qilish uchun hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmaymiz.
extraExamples: The search team left no stone unturned.
He left no stone unturned in his quest for knowledge.
Leave no stone unturned when preparing for the exam.
The company left no stone unturned to win the contract.
She left no stone unturned to make the event perfect.
Investigators left no stone unturned.
We must leave no stone unturned to find a solution.
extraExampleTranslations: Qidiruv guruhi hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
U bilim izlashda hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
Imtihonga tayyorgarlik ko‘rayotganda hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmang.
Kompaniya shartnomani yutish uchun hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
U tadbirni mukammal o‘tkazish uchun hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadi.
Tergovchilar hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmadilar.
Yechim topish uchun hech narsani e’tiborsiz qoldirmasligimiz kerak.

words.definition: A period of authorised absence from work with remuneration.
words.definitionUz: Maoshli ta’til — ish joyidan ruxsatli ravishda maosh saqlangan holda bo‘sh vaqt.
words.example1: She took paid leave to look after her sick child.
words.example1Translation: U kasal bolasiga qarash uchun maoshli ta’til oldi.
words.example2: Employees are entitled to paid leave.
words.example2Translation: Xodimlar maoshli ta’til olish huquqiga ega.
words.example3: He used his paid leave for a family vacation.
words.example3Translation: U oilaviy ta’til uchun maoshli ta’tilidan foydalandi.
extraExamples: Paid leave is an important employee benefit.
The company offers generous paid leave.
She is on paid leave for two weeks.
Paid leave helps employees manage personal matters.
He saved his paid leave for a long trip.
Paid leave is provided for illness or holidays.
Taking paid leave is a right for workers.
extraExampleTranslations: Maoshli ta’til muhim xodim imtiyozidir.
Kompaniya saxiy maoshli ta’til taklif qiladi.
U ikki hafta maoshli ta’tilda.
Maoshli ta’til xodimlarga shaxsiy masalalarni hal qilishga yordam beradi.
U uzoq sayohat uchun maoshli ta’tilini tejab qo‘ygan.
Maoshli ta’til kasallik yoki bayramlar uchun beriladi.
Maoshli ta’til olish ishchilarning huquqidir.

words.definition: To be similar in appearance or character to someone or something.
words.definitionUz: O‘xshashlik ko‘rsatmoq — tashqi ko‘rinish yoki xarakter jihatidan kimdir yoki biror narsaga o‘xshash bo‘lish.
words.example1: The child bears a strong resemblance to his father.
words.example1Translation: Bola otasiga juda o‘xshaydi.
words.example2: The painting bears resemblance to the style of Picasso.
words.example2Translation: Rasm Pikasso uslubiga o‘xshaydi.
words.example3: Her story bears resemblance to real events.
words.example3Translation: Uning hikoyasi haqiqiy voqealarga o‘xshaydi.
extraExamples: The new building bears resemblance to an ancient temple.
He bears a striking resemblance to his grandfather.
The situation bears resemblance to what happened last year.
The melody bears resemblance to a famous song.
The character bears resemblance to a historical figure.
This town bears resemblance to my hometown.
The evidence bears little resemblance to the claims.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi bino qadimiy ibodatxonaga o‘xshaydi.
U bobosiga juda kuchli o‘xshaydi.
Vaziyat o‘tgan yili sodir bo‘lgan voqeaga o‘xshaydi.
Ohang mashhur qo‘shiqqa o‘xshaydi.
Qahramon tarixiy shaxsga o‘xshaydi.
Bu shaharcha mening tug‘ilgan shahrimga o‘xshaydi.
Dalillar da’volarga unchalik o‘xshamaydi.

words.definition: Of only moderate quality; not outstanding.
words.definitionUz: O‘rtacha — faqat o‘rtacha sifatli; ajoyib emas.
words.example1: The movie was mediocre and quickly forgotten.
words.example1Translation: Film o‘rtacha edi va tez unutildi.
words.example2: His performance was mediocre at best.
words.example2Translation: Uning ijrosi eng yaxshi holatda o‘rtacha edi.
words.example3: The food was mediocre but the service was excellent.
words.example3Translation: Ovqat o‘rtacha edi, lekin xizmat ajoyib.
extraExamples: She received a mediocre grade on the test.
The team gave a mediocre performance.
Mediocre work is not acceptable.
He has a mediocre singing voice.
The hotel was mediocre for the price.
Avoid settling for mediocre results.
The book was mediocre compared to her previous works.
extraExampleTranslations: U imtihonda o‘rtacha baho oldi.
Jamoa o‘rtacha ijro ko‘rsatdi.
O‘rtacha ish qabul qilinmaydi.
Uning ovozi o‘rtacha.
Mehmonxona narxiga nisbatan o‘rtacha edi.
O‘rtacha natijalar bilan kifoyalanmang.
Kitob uning oldingi asarlariga nisbatan o‘rtacha edi.

words.definition: To legally take responsibility for a child without parents.
words.definitionUz: Yetim bolani asrab olish — ota-onasi yo‘q bolani qonuniy ravishda o‘z farzandi qilib olish.
words.example1: The couple decided to adopt an orphan.
words.example1Translation: Er-xotin yetim bolani asrab olishga qaror qilishdi.
words.example2: Many families choose to adopt an orphan.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab oilalar yetim bolani asrab olishni tanlashadi.
words.example3: Adopting an orphan changed their lives.
words.example3Translation: Yetim bolani asrab olish ularning hayotini o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: She adopted an orphan from the orphanage.
Adopting an orphan requires patience and love.
The government encourages families to adopt an orphan.
They adopted an orphan after years of trying to have children.
Adopting an orphan is a noble act.
The child was happy to be adopted.
Many celebrities have adopted an orphan.
extraExampleTranslations: U bolalar uyidan yetim bolani asrab oldi.
Yetim bolani asrab olish sabr va mehr talab qiladi.
Hukumat oilalarni yetim bolani asrab olishga undaydi.
Ular bolali bo‘lishga yillar urinib, nihoyat yetim bolani asrab olishdi.
Yetim bolani asrab olish ezgu ishdir.
Bola asrab olinganidan xursand edi.
Ko‘plab mashhurlar yetim bolani asrab olishgan.

words.definition: To take authorised absence from work or duty.
words.definitionUz: Ta’tilga chiqmoq — ish yoki xizmatdan ruxsatli ravishda bo‘sh vaqt olish.
words.example1: She is going on leave next week.
words.example1Translation: U kelasi hafta ta’tilga chiqmoqda.
words.example2: He went on leave for two months.
words.example2Translation: U ikki oy ta’tilga chiqdi.
words.example3: The soldier went on leave to visit his family.
words.example3Translation: Askar oilasini ko‘rish uchun ta’tilga chiqdi.
extraExamples: I’m going on leave tomorrow.
Employees can go on leave after six months.
She went on leave due to illness.
He is planning to go on leave soon.
Going on leave helps reduce stress.
The manager approved her request to go on leave.
Many teachers go on leave during summer.
extraExampleTranslations: Men ertaga ta’tilga chiqaman.
Xodimlar olti oydan keyin ta’tilga chiqishlari mumkin.
U kasallik tufayli ta’tilga chiqdi.
U tez orada ta’tilga chiqishni rejalashtirmoqda.
Ta’tilga chiqish stressni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Rahbar uning ta’tilga chiqish iltimosini tasdiqladi.
Ko‘plab o‘qituvchilar yozda ta’tilga chiqishadi.

words.definition: To have a source, beginning, or cause in a particular place or context.
words.definitionUz: Kelib chiqmoq — ma’lum bir joy yoki kontekstdan boshlanish yoki kelib chiqish.
words.example1: The custom originates from ancient times.
words.example1Translation: Bu odat qadim zamonlardan kelib chiqqan.
words.example2: Many English words originate from Latin.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘plab ingliz so‘zlari lotin tilidan kelib chiqqan.
words.example3: The idea originated from a casual conversation.
words.example3Translation: G‘oya oddiy suhbatdan kelib chiqqan.
extraExamples: The tradition originates from India.
This plant originates from South America.
The conflict originated from a misunderstanding.
The company originated from a small garage.
Many festivals originate from religious events.
The word “coffee” originates from Arabic.
The movement originated from a small group of activists.
extraExampleTranslations: An’ana Hindistondan kelib chiqqan.
Bu o‘simlik Janubiy Amerikadan kelib chiqqan.
Mojaro tushunmovchilikdan kelib chiqqan.
Kompaniya kichik garajdan kelib chiqqan.
Ko‘plab festivallar diniy voqealardan kelib chiqqan.
“Coffee” so‘zi arab tilidan kelib chiqqan.
Harakat faollarning kichik guruhi tomonidan boshlangan.

words.definition: A channel, method, or means of conveying something.
words.definitionUz: Vosita sifatida — biror narsani yetkazish uchun kanal, usul yoki vosita.
words.example1: The internet is a powerful medium for communication.
words.example1Translation: Internet aloqa uchun kuchli vosita.
words.example2: Art is a medium for expressing emotions.
words.example2Translation: San’at his-tuyg‘ularni ifodalash vositasidir.
words.example3: Television is a popular medium for advertising.
words.example3Translation: Televideniye reklama uchun mashhur vosita.
extraExamples: Social media is an effective medium for spreading information.
Music is a universal medium for connecting people.
Language is the primary medium for human thought.
The newspaper serves as a medium for public debate.
Film is a powerful medium for storytelling.
Education is a medium for social change.
Painting is her preferred medium for creativity.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar ma’lumot tarqatish uchun samarali vosita.
Musiqa odamlarni bog‘lash uchun universal vosita.
Til inson tafakkurining asosiy vositasidir.
Gazeta jamoaviy bahs uchun vosita bo‘lib xizmat qiladi.
Film hikoya aytish uchun kuchli vosita.
Ta’lim ijtimoiy o‘zgarish uchun vosita.
Rasm chizish uning ijod uchun afzal ko‘rgan vositasi.

words.definition: Minimal financial remuneration for work or services rendered.
words.definitionUz: Past ish haqi — bajarilgan ish yoki xizmat uchun minimal moliyaviy to‘lov.
words.example1: The workers complained about low compensation.
words.example1Translation: Ishchilar past ish haqidan shikoyat qilishdi.
words.example2: Low compensation makes it hard to attract talent.
words.example2Translation: Past ish haqi iste’dodlarni jalb qilishni qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example3: She left the job due to low compensation.
words.example3Translation: U past ish haqi tufayli ishdan ketdi.
extraExamples: Low compensation leads to high turnover.
The company offers low compensation for entry-level positions.
Many teachers work despite low compensation.
Low compensation affects employee morale.
The government raised the minimum compensation.
Low compensation is common in some industries.
Negotiating for better compensation is important.
extraExampleTranslations: Past ish haqi yuqori kadr almashinuviga olib keladi.
Kompaniya boshlang‘ich lavozimlar uchun past ish haqi taklif qiladi.
Ko‘plab o‘qituvchilar past ish haqiga qaramay ishlaydi.
Past ish haqi xodimlar kayfiyatiga ta’sir qiladi.
Hukumat minimal ish haqini oshirdi.
Past ish haqi ba’zi sohalarda keng tarqalgan.
Yaxshiroq ish haqi uchun muzokara olib borish muhim.

words.definition: To formally submit notice of leaving one’s employment.
words.definitionUz: Ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirmoq — ish joyidan ketish haqida rasmiy bildirishnoma topshirish.
words.example1: She handed in her resignation last week.
words.example1Translation: U o‘tgan hafta ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirdi.
words.example2: He decided to hand in his resignation after the argument.
words.example2Translation: Bahsdan keyin u ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirishga qaror qildi.
words.example3: Handing in your resignation requires careful thought.
words.example3Translation: Ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirish puxta o‘ylashni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The manager handed in his resignation unexpectedly.
She handed in her resignation due to health reasons.
Handing in your resignation is a big decision.
He handed in his resignation after ten years.
The employee handed in her resignation in writing.
Handing in your resignation can lead to new opportunities.
They asked him to hand in his resignation.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahbar kutilmaganda ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirdi.
U sog‘liq sababli ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirdi.
Ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirish katta qaror.
U o‘n yildan keyin ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirdi.
Xodim ishdan bo‘shash arizasini yozma ravishda topshirdi.
Ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirish yangi imkoniyatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ular undan ishdan bo‘shash arizasini topshirishni so‘rashdi.

words.definition: To remember or call to mind.
words.definitionUz: Eslamoq — xotiraga keltirish yoki esga tushirish.
words.example1: I recollect meeting you last year.
words.example1Translation: O‘tgan yili siz bilan uchrashganimni eslayman.
words.example2: She recollected the happy days of her childhood.
words.example2Translation: U bolaligining baxtli kunlarini eslab o‘tdi.
words.example3: He tried to recollect where he had put the keys.
words.example3Translation: U kalitlarni qayerga qo‘yganini eslashga harakat qildi.
extraExamples: I can’t recollect his name.
She recollected the events clearly.
He recollected the advice his father gave him.
Do you recollect what happened that day?
Recollecting old memories can be emotional.
The witness recollected the details of the accident.
I vaguely recollect seeing that movie.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning ismini eslay olmayapman.
U voqealarni aniq eslab o‘tdi.
U otasining bergan maslahatini eslab o‘tdi.
O‘sha kuni nima bo‘lganini eslaysizmi?
Eski xotiralarni eslash emotsional bo‘lishi mumkin.
Guvoh avtohalokat tafsilotlarini eslab o‘tdi.
Men o‘sha filmni ko‘rganimni biroz eslayman.

words.definition: Laws collectively or the process of making laws.
words.definitionUz: Qonunchilik — qonunlar yig‘indisi yoki qonun chiqarish jarayoni.
words.example1: New legislation was passed to protect the environment.
words.example1Translation: Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun yangi qonunchilik qabul qilindi.
words.example2: The government is working on new legislation.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat yangi qonunchilik ustida ishlamoqda.
words.example3: Legislation plays a key role in society.
words.example3Translation: Qonunchilik jamiyatda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
extraExamples: The new legislation will come into effect next year.
Parliament is responsible for legislation.
Changes in legislation affect businesses.
The legislation aims to reduce crime.
Public opinion influences legislation.
The legislation was controversial.
Understanding legislation is important for citizens.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi qonunchilik kelasi yilda kuchga kiradi.
Parlament qonunchilik uchun mas’ul.
Qonunchilikdagi o‘zgarishlar biznesga ta’sir qiladi.
Qonunchilik jinoyatchilikni kamaytirishni maqsad qilgan.
Jamoatchilik fikri qonunchilikka ta’sir qiladi.
Qonunchilik bahsli edi.
Fuqarolar uchun qonunchilikni tushunish muhim.

words.definition: It is obvious or evident.
words.definitionUz: Bu aniq — ravshan yoki ochiq-oydin.
words.example1: It is quite plain that he is lying.
words.example1Translation: U yolg‘on gapirayotgani aniq.
words.example2: It is quite plain that the team needs more practice.
words.example2Translation: Jamoaga ko‘proq mashq kerakligi aniq.
words.example3: It is quite plain to see who is responsible.
words.example3Translation: Kim mas’ul ekanligi aniq ko‘rinib turibdi.
extraExamples: It is quite plain that she is unhappy.
It is quite plain that the plan won’t work.
It is quite plain from the evidence.
It is quite plain that changes are needed.
It is quite plain to anyone with common sense.
It is quite plain that he doesn’t understand.
It is quite plain that the company is struggling.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning baxtsiz ekanligi aniq.
Reja ishlamasligi aniq.
Dalillardan aniq ko‘rinib turibdi.
O‘zgarishlar kerakligi aniq.
Oddiy aqlga ega har kim uchun aniq.
U tushunmayotgani aniq.
Kompaniya qiynalayotgani aniq.

words.definition: A justification that is reasonable, lawful, or morally acceptable.
words.definitionUz: Qonuniy sabab — oqilona, qonuniy yoki axloqiy jihatdan qabul qilinadigan asos.
words.example1: She had a legitimate reason for being late.
words.example1Translation: Uning kechikishi uchun qonuniy sababi bor edi.
words.example2: The company had legitimate reasons for the decision.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyaning qarori uchun qonuniy sabablar bor edi.
words.example3: There is no legitimate reason to break the law.
words.example3Translation: Qonunni buzish uchun qonuniy sabab yo‘q.
extraExamples: He provided a legitimate reason for his absence.
Legitimate reasons must be documented.
The judge accepted her legitimate reason.
There are legitimate reasons to change the policy.
She questioned whether it was a legitimate reason.
Legitimate reasons include illness or family emergencies.
The request was denied due to lack of legitimate reason.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘z yo‘qligiga qonuniy sabab keltirdi.
Qonuniy sabablar hujjatlashtirilishi kerak.
Sudya uning qonuniy sababini qabul qildi.
Siyosatni o‘zgartirish uchun qonuniy sabablar bor.
U bu qonuniy sababmi deb shubhalandi.
Qonuniy sabablarga kasallik yoki oilaviy favqulodda holatlar kiradi.
Iltimos sababning qonuniyligi yetishmasligi tufayli rad etildi.

words.definition: To successfully achieve all intended objectives.
words.definitionUz: Barcha maqsadlarni bajarish — barcha mo‘ljallangan maqsadlarga muvaffaqiyatli erishish.
words.example1: The team met every goal for the season.
words.example1Translation: Jamoa mavsumdagi barcha maqsadlarni bajardi.
words.example2: She worked hard and met every goal.
words.example2Translation: U qattiq mehnat qilib, barcha maqsadlarni bajardi.
words.example3: The project met every goal on time.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha barcha maqsadlarni vaqtida bajardi.
extraExamples: The company met every goal for the year.
It is challenging to meet every goal.
He set ambitious goals and met every one.
The school met every goal in the improvement plan.
Meeting every goal requires dedication.
The athlete met every goal for the Olympics.
We are confident we will meet every goal.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya yil davomidagi barcha maqsadlarni bajardi.
Barcha maqsadlarni bajarish qiyin.
U ulug‘vor maqsadlar qo‘ydi va hammasini bajardi.
Maktab takomillashtirish rejasidagi barcha maqsadlarni bajardi.
Barcha maqsadlarni bajarish sadoqatni talab qiladi.
Sportchi Olimpiya o‘yinlari uchun barcha maqsadlarni bajardi.
Biz barcha maqsadlarni bajarishga ishonchimiz komil.

words.definition: Throughout the entirety of a space, area, or concept.
words.definitionUz: Butun hudud bo‘ylab — makon, hudud yoki tushunchaning butun qismida.
words.example1: She has traveled the length and breadth of the country.
words.example1Translation: U mamlakatning butun hududini aylanib chiqqan.
words.example2: The news spread the length and breadth of the city.
words.example2Translation: Yangilik shaharning butun hududiga tarqaldi.
words.example3: He knows the length and breadth of the subject.
words.example3Translation: U mavzuning butun mohiyatini biladi.
extraExamples: They searched the length and breadth of the forest.
The festival is celebrated the length and breadth of the nation.
She explored the length and breadth of the island.
The problem exists the length and breadth of the industry.
He has experience the length and breadth of the field.
The culture is known the length and breadth of Europe.
The team competed the length and breadth of the league.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular o‘rmonning butun hududini qidirishdi.
Festival mamlakatning butun hududida nishonlanadi.
U orolning butun hududini o‘rgandi.
Muammo sanoatning butun hududida mavjud.
U sohaning butun tajribasiga ega.
Madaniyat Yevropaning butun hududida mashhur.
Jamoa liganing butun hududida musobaqalashdi.

words.definition: To talk about something extensively or in detail.
words.definitionUz: Batafsil muhokama qilmoq — biror narsani keng yoki batafsil tarzda gapirmoq.
words.example1: They discussed the issue at length.
words.example1Translation: Ular masalani batafsil muhokama qilishdi.
words.example2: The committee discussed the proposal at length.
words.example2Translation: Qo‘mita taklifni batafsil muhokama qildi.
words.example3: We need to discuss this matter at length.
words.example3Translation: Bu masalani batafsil muhokama qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The experts discussed the topic at length.
They discussed their future plans at length.
The book discusses the subject at length.
We discussed the problem at length but couldn’t agree.
The teacher discussed the lesson at length.
The meeting discussed the budget at length.
She discussed her concerns at length.
extraExampleTranslations: Mutaxassislar mavzuni batafsil muhokama qilishdi.
Ular kelajak rejalarni batafsil muhokama qilishdi.
Kitob mavzuni batafsil yoritadi.
Biz muammoni batafsil muhokama qildik, lekin kelisha olmadik.
O‘qituvchi darsni batafsil tushuntirdi.
Yig‘ilish byudjetni batafsil muhokama qildi.
U o‘z tashvishlarini batafsil bayon qildi.

words.definition: To maintain emotional or physical distance from someone.
words.definitionUz: Uzoqroq tutmoq — kimdandir emotsional yoki jismoniy masofani saqlash.
words.example1: She kept him at arm’s length after the argument.
words.example1Translation: Bahsdan keyin u uni uzoqroq tutdi.
words.example2: It’s wise to keep certain people at arm’s length.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zi odamlarni uzoqroq tutish oqilona.
words.example3: He kept his competitors at arm’s length.
words.example3Translation: U raqiblarini uzoqroq tutdi.
extraExamples: She tends to keep everyone at arm’s length.
Keeping colleagues at arm’s length can be professional.
He kept his emotions at arm’s length.
It’s difficult to keep family at arm’s length.
She learned to keep toxic people at arm’s length.
The leader kept the media at arm’s length.
Keeping strangers at arm’s length is a safety measure.
extraExampleTranslations: U odatda hammadan uzoqroq turadi.
Hamkasblarni uzoqroq tutish professional bo‘lishi mumkin.
U his-tuyg‘ularini uzoqroq tutdi.
Oilani uzoqroq tutish qiyin.
U zaharli odamlarni uzoqroq tutishni o‘rgandi.
Rahbar ommaviy axborot vositalarini uzoqroq tutdi.
Begonalarni uzoqroq tutish xavfsizlik chorasidir.

words.definition: To successfully achieve a set objective or goal.
words.definitionUz: Maqsadni bajarish — belgilangan maqsad yoki vazifaga muvaffaqiyatli erishish.
words.example1: The sales team met the target this month.
words.example1Translation: Savdo jamoasi bu oy maqsadni bajardi.
words.example2: She worked hard to meet the target.
words.example2Translation: U maqsadni bajarish uchun qattiq mehnat qildi.
words.example3: The company barely met the target.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya maqsadni zo‘rg‘a bajardi.
extraExamples: We need to meet the target by the end of the quarter.
The athlete met the target time.
Meeting the target requires teamwork.
They exceeded the target.
The department met the target ahead of schedule.
It’s important to meet the target consistently.
The project met the target successfully.
extraExampleTranslations: Chorak oxirigacha maqsadni bajarishimiz kerak.
Sportchi belgilangan vaqtni bajardi.
Maqsadni bajarish jamoaviy ishni talab qiladi.
Ular maqsaddan oshib ketishdi.
Bo‘lim maqsadni muddatidan oldin bajardi.
Maqsadni doimiy ravishda bajarish muhim.
Loyiha maqsadni muvaffaqiyatli bajardi.

words.definition: A final option used only when all others have failed.
words.definitionUz: Oxirgi chora — boshqa barcha variantlar muvaffaqiyatsiz bo‘lgandagina qo‘llaniladigan yakuniy variant.
words.example1: Going to court is a last resort.
words.example1Translation: Sudga murojaat qilish oxirgi chora.
words.example2: We will try everything before using this as a last resort.
words.example2Translation: Buni oxirgi chora sifatida ishlatishdan oldin hamma narsani sinab ko‘ramiz.
words.example3: Borrowing money was a last resort for her.
words.example3Translation: Pul qarz olish uning uchun oxirgi chora edi.
extraExamples: War should be a last resort.
The medicine is a last resort for severe cases.
Firing the employee was a last resort.
Negotiation is better than a last resort.
Using force is a last resort.
The doctor prescribed surgery as a last resort.
Calling the police was their last resort.
extraExampleTranslations: Urush oxirgi chora bo‘lishi kerak.
Dori og‘ir holatlar uchun oxirgi chora.
Xodimni ishdan bo‘shatish oxirgi chora edi.
Muzokara oxirgi choradan yaxshiroq.
Kuch ishlatish oxirgi chora.
Shifokor jarrohlikni oxirgi chora sifatida buyurdi.
Politsiyaga qo‘ng‘iroq qilish ularning oxirgi chorasi edi.

words.definition: Unusual or exceptional.
words.definitionUz: Oddiy holatdan tashqari — g‘ayrioddiy yoki alohida.
words.example1: The event was out of the ordinary.
words.example1Translation: Voqea oddiy holatdan tashqari edi.
words.example2: Her reaction was out of the ordinary.
words.example2Translation: Uning reaktsiyasi oddiy holatdan tashqari edi.
words.example3: Nothing out of the ordinary happened today.
words.example3Translation: Bugun oddiy holatdan tashqari hech narsa bo‘lmadi.
extraExamples: The weather today is out of the ordinary.
His behavior was out of the ordinary.
It was an out of the ordinary experience.
Out of the ordinary things can be exciting.
The gift was out of the ordinary.
She has an out of the ordinary talent.
The situation was definitely out of the ordinary.
extraExampleTranslations: Bugungi ob-havo oddiy holatdan tashqari.
Uning xatti-harakati oddiy holatdan tashqari edi.
Bu oddiy holatdan tashqari tajriba edi.
Oddiy holatdan tashqari narsalar qiziqarli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Sovg‘a oddiy holatdan tashqari edi.
Uning iste’dodi oddiy holatdan tashqari.
Vaziyat aniq oddiy holatdan tashqari edi.

words.definition: To cause someone to begin questioning or distrusting something.
words.definitionUz: Shubha uyg‘otmoq — kimdandir biror narsaga nisbatan savol tug‘dirish yoki ishonchsizlik uyg‘otish.
words.example1: His words planted doubts in my mind.
words.example1Translation: Uning so‘zlari mening ongimda shubha uyg‘otdi.
words.example2: The article planted doubts in the public’s mind.
words.example2Translation: Maqola jamoatchilik ongida shubha uyg‘otdi.
words.example3: Don’t let anyone plant doubts in your mind.
words.example3Translation: Hech kimga ong‘ingizda shubha uyg‘otishiga yo‘l qo‘ymang.
extraExamples: The rumor planted doubts in her mind.
His strange behavior planted doubts in my mind.
The evidence planted doubts about his innocence.
She tried to plant doubts in the jury’s mind.
Planting doubts can damage trust.
The conflicting reports planted doubts.
Don’t plant doubts in the children’s minds.
extraExampleTranslations: Mish-mish uning ongida shubha uyg‘otdi.
Uning g‘alati xatti-harakati mening ongimda shubha uyg‘otdi.
Dalillar uning aybsizligi haqida shubha uyg‘otdi.
U hakamlar hay’atining ongida shubha uyg‘otishga harakat qildi.
Shubha uyg‘otish ishonchni buzishi mumkin.
Qarama-qarshi hisobotlar shubha uyg‘otdi.
Bolalarning ongida shubha uyg‘otmang.

words.definition: A punishment that is relatively mild or merciful.
words.definitionUz: Yengil jazo — nisbatan yumshoq yoki rahmdil jazo.
words.example1: The judge gave him a lenient sentence.
words.example1Translation: Sudya unga yengil jazo berdi.
words.example2: Considering his age, the court issued a lenient sentence.
words.example2Translation: Yoshini hisobga olib, sud yengil jazo chiqardi.
words.example3: Many felt the lenient sentence was unfair.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘pchilik yengil jazoni adolatsiz deb hisobladi.
extraExamples: The lenient sentence surprised the victims.
He received a lenient sentence due to good behavior.
A lenient sentence may not deter crime.
The lawyer asked for a lenient sentence.
The lenient sentence was appealed.
Judges sometimes give lenient sentences for first offenses.
The lenient sentence caused public outrage.
extraExampleTranslations: Yengil jazo qurbonlarni hayratda qoldirdi.
U yaxshi xulqi tufayli yengil jazo oldi.
Yengil jazo jinoyatni oldini olmasligi mumkin.
Advokat yengil jazo so‘radi.
Yengil jazo apellyatsiya qilindi.
Sudya ba’zida birinchi marta jinoyat uchun yengil jazo beradi.
Yengil jazo jamoatchilik g‘azabini uyg‘otdi.

words.definition: To cause someone to learn through consequences or correction.
words.definitionUz: Saboq bermoq — kimdirga oqibatlar yoki tuzatish orqali saboq berish.
words.example1: The fine taught him a lesson about speeding.
words.example1Translation: Jarima unga tez haydash haqida saboq berdi.
words.example2: Losing the game taught the team a lesson.
words.example2Translation: O‘yinni yutqazish jamoaga saboq berdi.
words.example3: She taught her brother a lesson by not helping him.
words.example3Translation: U akasiga yordam bermay saboq berdi.
extraExamples: The accident taught her a lesson about safety.
Failing the exam taught him a lesson.
Parents sometimes teach children a lesson.
The experience taught me a valuable lesson.
Getting caught taught him a lesson.
The coach taught the players a lesson.
Life teaches us lessons every day.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtohalokat unga xavfsizlik haqida saboq berdi.
Imtihondan o‘tolmaslik unga saboq berdi.
Ota-onalar ba’zida bolalarga saboq berishadi.
Tajriba menga qimmatli saboq berdi.
Qo‘lga tushish unga saboq berdi.
Murabbiy o‘yinchilarga saboq berdi.
Hayot har kuni bizga saboq beradi.

words.definition: To release physically, emotionally, or metaphorically; to relinquish.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘yib yubormoq — jismonan, ruhiy jihatdan yoki majoziy ma’noda biror narsadan voz kechish.
words.example1: It’s time to let go of the past.
words.example1Translation: O‘tmishni qo‘yib yuborish vaqti keldi.
words.example2: She finally let go of her anger.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat g‘azabini qo‘yib yubordi.
words.example3: Let go of the rope!
words.example3Translation: Arqonni qo‘yib yubor!
extraExamples: He needs to let go of his fears.
Let go of old habits that no longer serve you.
She let go of the opportunity.
Letting go of resentment brings peace.
Don’t let go of your dreams.
The company let go of several employees.
He let go of the handle and fell.
extraExampleTranslations: U qo‘rquvlarini qo‘yib yuborishi kerak.
Sizga endi foyda bermaydigan eski odatlarni qo‘yib yuboring.
U imkoniyatni qo‘yib yubordi.
G‘azabni qo‘yib yuborish tinchlik beradi.
Orzularingizni qo‘yib yubormang.
Kompaniya bir necha xodimni ishdan bo‘shatdi.
U tutqichni qo‘yib yubordi va yiqildi.

words.definition: Showing compassion or leniency, especially in judgement.
words.definitionUz: Rahmdil — ayniqsa hukm chiqarishda mehr-shafqat yoki yumshoqlik ko‘rsatish.
words.example1: The judge was merciful in his sentencing.
words.example1Translation: Sudya hukm chiqarishda rahmdil bo‘ldi.
words.example2: She is a merciful and kind person.
words.example2Translation: U rahmdil va mehribon odam.
words.example3: Be merciful to those who make mistakes.
words.example3Translation: Xato qilganlarga rahmdil bo‘ling.
extraExamples: The merciful king pardoned the prisoners.
Merciful treatment can change lives.
He asked for merciful consideration.
A merciful God is often mentioned in prayers.
The doctor was merciful with the bad news.
Merciful actions show true character.
The storm passed quickly, which was merciful.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahmdil qirol mahbuslarni avf etdi.
Rahmdil muomala hayotni o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
U rahmdil ko‘rib chiqishni so‘radi.
Rahmdil Xudo haqida ibodatlarda tez-tez gapiriladi.
Shifokor yomon xabarni rahmdil tarzda aytdi.
Rahmdil harakatlar haqiqiy xarakterni ko‘rsatadi.
Bo‘ron tez o‘tib ketdi, bu rahmdil edi.

words.definition: To combine two or more entities into one.
words.definitionUz: Birlashtirmoq — ikki yoki undan ortiq narsani bitta butunga birlashtirish.
words.example1: The two companies decided to merge.
words.example1Translation: Ikki kompaniya birlashishga qaror qildi.
words.example2: The rivers merge at this point.
words.example2Translation: Daryolar shu joyda birlashadi.
words.example3: We need to merge the files into one document.
words.example3Translation: Fayllarni bitta hujjatga birlashtirishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The lanes merge ahead.
They merged their ideas into a single plan.
The schools merged to save costs.
Colors merge beautifully in the painting.
The teams will merge for the final project.
Merging databases can be complicated.
The cultures gradually merged over time.
extraExampleTranslations: Yo‘laklar oldinda birlashadi.
Ular g‘oyalarini bitta rejaga birlashtirdilar.
Maktablar xarajatlarni tejash uchun birlashdi.
Ranglar rasmda go‘zal birlashadi.
Jamoalar final loyihasi uchun birlashadi.
Ma’lumotlar bazalarini birlashtirish murakkab bo‘lishi mumkin.
Madaniyatlar vaqt o‘tishi bilan asta-sekin birlashdi.

words.definition: A reasonable or credible account or justification.
words.definitionUz: Ishonarli tushuntirish — oqilona yoki ishonchli hisob yoki asos.
words.example1: He gave a plausible explanation for being late.
words.example1Translation: U kechikishi uchun ishonarli tushuntirish berdi.
words.example2: The scientist offered a plausible explanation for the phenomenon.
words.example2Translation: Olim hodisa uchun ishonarli tushuntirish taklif qildi.
words.example3: Her story sounds like a plausible explanation.
words.example3Translation: Uning hikoyasi ishonarli tushuntirishga o‘xshaydi.
extraExamples: The detective searched for a plausible explanation.
There is no plausible explanation for the missing money.
She provided a plausible explanation to the teacher.
A plausible explanation calmed the crowd.
The report offers several plausible explanations.
Finding a plausible explanation took time.
His excuse was not very plausible.
extraExampleTranslations: Tergovchi ishonarli tushuntirishni qidirdi.
Yo‘qolgan pul uchun ishonarli tushuntirish yo‘q.
U o‘qituvchiga ishonarli tushuntirish berdi.
Ishonarli tushuntirish olomonni tinchlantirdi.
Hisobot bir necha ishonarli tushuntirishni taklif qiladi.
Ishonarli tushuntirish topish vaqt talab qildi.
Uning bahonasi unchalik ishonarli emas edi.

words.definition: To be unable to remember.
words.definitionUz: Hech narsani eslamaslik — biror narsani xotiraga keltira olmaslik.
words.example1: I have no recollection of the event.
words.example1Translation: Men voqeani hech eslay olmayman.
words.example2: She has no recollection of what happened that night.
words.example2Translation: U o‘sha kechada nima bo‘lganini hech eslay olmaydi.
words.example3: He claims to have no recollection of the accident.
words.example3Translation: U avtohalokatni hech eslamasligini da’vo qilmoqda.
extraExamples: The witness has no recollection of the suspect’s face.
I have no recollection of signing that document.
She has no recollection of her early childhood.
He has no recollection of the conversation.
The patient has no recollection of the surgery.
Do you have no recollection at all?
Many people have no recollection of their dreams.
extraExampleTranslations: Guvoh gumonlanuvchining yuzini hech eslay olmaydi.
Men o‘sha hujjatga imzo chekkanimni hech eslay olmayman.
U bolaligining dastlabki davrini hech eslay olmaydi.
U suhbatni hech eslay olmaydi.
Bemor operatsiyani hech eslay olmaydi.
Siz hech narsani eslay olmaysizmi?
Ko‘plab odamlar tushlarini hech eslay olmaydilar.

words.definition: Able to find quick and clever ways to overcome difficulties.
words.definitionUz: Topqir — qiyinchiliklarni tez va aqlli usullar bilan yengishga qodir.
words.example1: She is very resourceful and always finds a solution.
words.example1Translation: U juda topqir va har doim yechim topadi.
words.example2: The resourceful student fixed the broken machine.
words.example2Translation: Topqir talaba buzilgan mashinani tuzatdi.
words.example3: Being resourceful helps in emergencies.
words.example3Translation: Topqir bo‘lish favqulodda holatlarda yordam beradi.
extraExamples: The resourceful team completed the project despite challenges.
He is known for being resourceful.
Resourceful people rarely give up.
She used resourceful methods to save money.
The explorer was extremely resourceful.
Resourceful thinking leads to innovation.
The children were resourceful in finding games.
extraExampleTranslations: Topqir jamoa qiyinchiliklarga qaramay loyihani tugatdi.
U topqirligi bilan mashhur.
Topqir odamlar kamdan-kam taslim bo‘lishadi.
U pul tejash uchun topqir usullardan foydalandi.
Sarguzashtchi juda topqir edi.
Topqir fikrlash innovatsiyalarga olib keladi.
Bolalar o‘yin topishda topqir edilar.

words.definition: To work late into the night.
words.definitionUz: Kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazmoq — kechasi uzoq vaqt ishlash yoki o‘qish.
words.example1: I had to burn the midnight oil to finish the report.
words.example1Translation: Hisobotni tugatish uchun kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazishimga to‘g‘ri keldi.
words.example2: Students often burn the midnight oil before exams.
words.example2Translation: Talabalar imtihon oldidan tez-tez kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazishadi.
words.example3: She burned the midnight oil preparing for the presentation.
words.example3Translation: U taqdimotga tayyorgarlik ko‘rib kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazdi.
extraExamples: Burning the midnight oil is common during deadlines.
He burned the midnight oil studying for the test.
Don’t burn the midnight oil too often — it’s unhealthy.
The team burned the midnight oil to meet the target.
She burned the midnight oil writing her book.
Burning the midnight oil helped him pass the course.
We burned the midnight oil finishing the project.
extraExampleTranslations: Muddat yaqinlashganda kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazish odatiy hol.
U imtihonga tayyorgarlik ko‘rib kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazdi.
Kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazishni tez-tez qilmang — bu sog‘liqqa zararli.
Jamoa maqsadni bajarish uchun kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazdi.
U kitob yozib kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazdi.
Kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazish unga kursdan o‘tishga yordam berdi.
Biz loyihani tugatish uchun kechani o‘qish bilan o‘tkazdik.

words.definition: To maintain authority, power, or management over something.
words.definitionUz: Nazoratni saqlab qolmoq — biror narsa ustidan hokimiyat, kuch yoki boshqaruvni saqlab qolish.
words.example1: The company wants to retain control of the project.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya loyiha ustidan nazoratni saqlab qolmoqchi.
words.example2: She retained control of the family business.
words.example2Translation: U oilaviy biznes ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldi.
words.example3: It is important to retain control in difficult situations.
words.example3Translation: Qiyin vaziyatlarda nazoratni saqlab qolish muhim.
extraExamples: The government retained control of the situation.
He retained control over the decision-making.
The board retained control of the company.
Retaining control requires careful planning.
She struggled to retain control of her emotions.
The team retained control of the ball.
Retaining control is key to leadership.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat vaziyat ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldi.
U qaror qabul qilish ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldi.
Boshqaruv kengashi kompaniya ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldi.
Nazoratni saqlab qolish puxta rejalashtirishni talab qiladi.
U his-tuyg‘ulari ustidan nazoratni saqlab qolishga qiynaldi.
Jamoa to‘p ustidan nazoratni saqlab qoldi.
Nazoratni saqlab qolish rahbarlikning kalitidir.

words.definition: It astonished or overwhelmed me.
words.definitionUz: Aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi — meni hayratda qoldirish yoki hayratlantirish.
words.example1: The special effects in the movie blew my mind.
words.example1Translation: Filmdagi maxsus effektlar aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example2: Her talent blew my mind.
words.example2Translation: Uning iste’dodi aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example3: The view from the mountain blew my mind.
words.example3Translation: Tog‘dan ochiladigan manzara aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
extraExamples: The news blew my mind.
The technology blew my mind.
His performance blew my mind.
The book blew my mind.
The concert blew my mind.
The discovery blew my mind.
The surprise party blew my mind.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangilik aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Texnologiya aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Uning ijrosi aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Kitob aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Konsert aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Kashfiyot aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.
Syurpriz ziyofat aqlimni hayratda qoldirdi.

words.definition: Showing no pity, compassion, or leniency.
words.definitionUz: Shafqatsiz — mehr-shafqat, rahmdillik yoki yumshoqlik ko‘rsatmaslik.
words.example1: The merciless storm destroyed everything.
words.example1Translation: Shafqatsiz bo‘ron hamma narsani vayron qildi.
words.example2: The critic was merciless in his review.
words.example2Translation: Tanqidchi sharhida shafqatsiz edi.
words.example3: The competition was merciless.
words.example3Translation: Raqobat shafqatsiz edi.
extraExamples: The merciless sun beat down on them.
He faced merciless criticism.
The dictator was merciless to his enemies.
Merciless conditions made survival difficult.
The boss was merciless with deadlines.
Merciless attacks continued throughout the night.
The virus spread with merciless speed.
extraExampleTranslations: Shafqatsiz quyosh ularni kuydirdi.
U shafqatsiz tanqidga duch keldi.
Diktator dushmanlariga shafqatsiz edi.
Shafqatsiz sharoitlar omon qolishni qiyinlashtirdi.
Rahbar muddatlarga nisbatan shafqatsiz edi.
Shafqatsiz hujumlar tun bo‘yi davom etdi.
Virus shafqatsiz tezlikda tarqaldi.

words.definition: To release pent-up energy, emotion, or stress.
words.definitionUz: G‘azabni chiqarib yubormoq — to‘planib qolgan energiya, his-tuyg‘u yoki stressni bo‘shatish.
words.example1: After a long day, he let off steam by exercising.
words.example1Translation: Uzun kundan keyin u sport bilan shug‘ullanib g‘azabini chiqarib yubordi.
words.example2: She let off steam by talking to her friend.
words.example2Translation: U do‘sti bilan gaplashib g‘azabini chiqarib yubordi.
words.example3: It’s healthy to let off steam occasionally.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida g‘azabni chiqarib yuborish sog‘lom holat.
extraExamples: The players let off steam after the match.
Letting off steam helps reduce stress.
He let off steam by shouting in the car.
She lets off steam through painting.
Letting off steam is better than keeping it inside.
The children let off steam in the playground.
He let off steam by going for a run.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘yinchilar o‘yindan keyin g‘azablarini chiqarib yuborishdi.
G‘azabni chiqarib yuborish stressni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
U mashinada baqirib g‘azabini chiqarib yubordi.
U rasm chizish orqali g‘azabini chiqarib yuboradi.
G‘azabni chiqarib yuborish uni ichida saqlashdan yaxshiroq.
Bolalar maydonchada g‘azablarini chiqarib yuborishdi.
U yugurib g‘azabini chiqarib yubordi.

words.definition: To be preoccupied with a thought or concern.
words.definitionUz: Boshida biror narsa bo‘lmoq — biror fikr yoki tashvish bilan band bo‘lish.
words.example1: You look like you have something on your mind.
words.example1Translation: Sizning boshinqizda biror narsa borga o‘xshaydi.
words.example2: I have a lot on my mind these days.
words.example2Translation: So‘nggi paytlarda boshimda ko‘p narsa bor.
words.example3: She has something on her mind but won’t say what it is.
words.example3Translation: Uning boshida biror narsa bor, lekin nima ekanligini aytmaydi.
extraExamples: He has been having something on his mind lately.
If you have something on your mind, talk to me.
I can tell you have something on your mind.
Having something on your mind can affect your sleep.
She always has something on her mind.
Don’t keep it if you have something on your mind.
The boss could see he had something on his mind.
extraExampleTranslations: So‘nggi paytlarda uning boshida biror narsa bor edi.
Agar boshinqizda biror narsa bo‘lsa, menga ayting.
Sizning boshinqizda biror narsa borligini ko‘rib turibman.
Boshda biror narsa bo‘lishi uyquni buzishi mumkin.
Uning har doim boshida biror narsa bo‘ladi.
Agar boshinqizda biror narsa bo‘lsa, ichingizda saqlamang.
Rahbar uning boshida biror narsa borligini ko‘rib turardi.

words.definition: A method of execution or euthanasia involving poisonous injection.
words.definitionUz: O‘ldiruvchi ukol — zaharli ukol orqali qatl yoki o‘ldirish usuli.
words.example1: The prisoner was executed by lethal injection.
words.example1Translation: Mahbus o‘ldiruvchi ukol bilan qatl etildi.
words.example2: Lethal injection is used in some countries for capital punishment.
words.example2Translation: O‘ldiruvchi ukol ba’zi mamlakatlarda o‘lim jazosi uchun qo‘llaniladi.
words.example3: The debate about lethal injection continues.
words.example3Translation: O‘ldiruvchi ukol haqidagi bahs davom etmoqda.
extraExamples: Lethal injection is considered more humane by some.
The use of lethal injection has been controversial.
Doctors sometimes refuse to administer lethal injection.
Lethal injection is one method of euthanasia.
The drug used in lethal injection is powerful.
Laws regarding lethal injection vary by state.
The process of lethal injection takes several minutes.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba’zilar o‘ldiruvchi ukolni insonparvarroq deb hisoblashadi.
O‘ldiruvchi ukoldan foydalanish bahsli bo‘lib qolmoqda.
Shifokorlar ba’zida o‘ldiruvchi ukolni kiritishdan bosh tortishadi.
O‘ldiruvchi ukol o‘ldirishning bir usuli.
O‘ldiruvchi ukolda ishlatiladigan dori kuchli.
O‘ldiruvchi ukol bo‘yicha qonunlar shtat bo‘yicha farq qiladi.
O‘ldiruvchi ukol jarayoni bir necha daqiqa davom etadi.

words.definition: The established system of governance and social structure within a state.
words.definitionUz: Siyosiy tartib — davlatdagi boshqaruv tizimi va ijtimoiy tuzilma.
words.example1: The country is struggling to maintain political order.
words.example1Translation: Mamlakat siyosiy tartibni saqlab qolishda qiynalmoqda.
words.example2: Political order is essential for stability.
words.example2Translation: Siyosiy tartib barqarorlik uchun zarur.
words.example3: Changes in political order can affect the economy.
words.example3Translation: Siyosiy tartibdagi o‘zgarishlar iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The revolution changed the political order.
Political order requires strong institutions.
Maintaining political order is a challenge.
The constitution defines the political order.
Political order can break down during crises.
Citizens play a role in political order.
The new leader promised to restore political order.
extraExampleTranslations: Inqilob siyosiy tartibni o‘zgartirdi.
Siyosiy tartib kuchli muassasalarni talab qiladi.
Siyosiy tartibni saqlab qolish qiyin masala.
Konstitutsiya siyosiy tartibni belgilaydi.
Siyosiy tartib inqiroz paytida buzilishi mumkin.
Fuqarolar siyosiy tartibda rol o‘ynashadi.
Yangi rahbar siyosiy tartibni tiklashga va’da berdi.

words.definition: Long life or duration; the length of time something lasts.
words.definitionUz: Uzoq umr ko‘rish — uzoq umr yoki davomiylik; biror narsaning qancha vaqt davom etishi.
words.example1: Good diet contributes to longevity.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi ovqatlanish uzoq umr ko‘rishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: The longevity of the company is impressive.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyaning uzoq umr ko‘rishi hayratlanarli.
words.example3: Longevity in politics is rare.
words.example3Translation: Siyosatda uzoq umr ko‘rish kam uchraydi.
extraExamples: Genetics play a role in longevity.
The longevity of the bridge is 100 years.
She studies the longevity of ancient civilizations.
Longevity requires healthy habits.
The product’s longevity surprised everyone.
Longevity in marriage takes effort.
Medical advances have increased human longevity.
extraExampleTranslations: Genetika uzoq umr ko‘rishda rol o‘ynaydi.
Ko‘prikning uzoq umr ko‘rishi 100 yil.
U qadimiy tsivilizatsiyalarning uzoq umr ko‘rishini o‘rganadi.
Uzoq umr ko‘rish sog‘lom odatlarni talab qiladi.
Mahsulotning uzoq umr ko‘rishi hammni hayratda qoldirdi.
Oilaviy hayotda uzoq umr ko‘rish kuch talab qiladi.
Tibbiy yutuqlar insonning uzoq umr ko‘rishini oshirdi.

words.definition: To move aside or create space for someone or something.
words.definitionUz: Yo‘l ochmoq — kimdir yoki biror narsa uchun yo‘l berish yoki joy ochish.
words.example1: Make way for the ambulance!
words.example1Translation: Tez yordam mashinasiga yo‘l oching!
words.example2: The old building was demolished to make way for a new park.
words.example2Translation: Eski bino yangi park uchun buzib tashlandi.
words.example3: She made way for the elderly woman.
words.example3Translation: U keksa ayolga yo‘l ochdi.
extraExamples: Make way for the king!
The road was widened to make way for more traffic.
Old traditions sometimes make way for new ones.
Please make way for the guests.
The company made way for younger leaders.
Make way for progress.
They moved aside to make way for the procession.
extraExampleTranslations: Qirolga yo‘l oching!
Yo‘l ko‘proq transport uchun kengaytirildi.
Eski an’analar ba’zida yangilariga yo‘l ochadi.
Iltimos, mehmonlarga yo‘l oching.
Kompaniya yosh rahbarlarga yo‘l ochdi.
Taraqqiyotga yo‘l oching.
Ular marosimga yo‘l ochish uchun chetga chiqishdi.

words.definition: To expose oneself to the possibility of harm or loss.
words.definitionUz: Xavf ostiga qo‘ymoq — zarar yoki yo‘qotish ehtimoli ostiga tushish.
words.example1: If you drive too fast, you run the risk of an accident.
words.example1Translation: Agar juda tez haydasangiz, avtohalokat xavfi ostiga tushasiz.
words.example2: She ran the risk of losing her job by speaking out.
words.example2Translation: U gapirib chiqib ishdan bo‘shash xavfi ostiga tushdi.
words.example3: Investing in stocks runs the risk of losing money.
words.example3Translation: Aksiyalarga sarmoya qilish pul yo‘qotish xavfi ostiga qo‘yadi.
extraExamples: Don’t run the risk of getting sick.
He ran the risk of being caught.
Running the risk is sometimes necessary.
She ran the risk of failure.
They ran the risk of offending their clients.
Running the risk of injury is part of the sport.
I don’t want to run the risk of missing the flight.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasal bo‘lish xavfiga tushmang.
U qo‘lga tushish xavfiga tushdi.
Xavf ostiga tushish ba’zida zarur.
U muvaffaqiyatsizlik xavfiga tushdi.
Ular mijozlarini xafa qilish xavfiga tushishdi.
Jarohat olish xavfi sportning bir qismi.
Parvozga kechikish xavfiga tushishni xohlamayman.

words.definition: Someone candid, transparent, and willing to share thoughts or feelings.
words.definitionUz: Ochiq odam — fikr va his-tuyg‘ularini ochiq va shaffof tarzda baham ko‘rishga tayyor shaxs.
words.example1: She is a very open person and easy to talk to.
words.example1Translation: U juda ochiq odam va u bilan gaplashish oson.
words.example2: An open person builds strong relationships.
words.example2Translation: Ochiq odam kuchli munosabatlarni quradi.
words.example3: He is known as an open person in the community.
words.example3Translation: U jamiyatda ochiq odam sifatida tanilgan.
extraExamples: Being an open person helps in teamwork.
She is open and honest about her feelings.
Open people are often more approachable.
He became more open as he grew older.
An open person rarely hides secrets.
The leader is an open person who listens to everyone.
It’s refreshing to meet such an open person.
extraExampleTranslations: Ochiq odam bo‘lish jamoaviy ishda yordam beradi.
U his-tuyg‘ulari haqida ochiq va halol.
Ochiq odamlar ko‘pincha yaqinroq bo‘lishadi.
U yoshi ulg‘aygani sari ochiqroq bo‘ldi.
Ochiq odam kamdan-kam sir saqlaydi.
Rahbar hammadan eshitadigan ochiq odam.
Bunday ochiq odamni uchratish yoqimli.

words.definition: To continue or move forward, often after a pause or interruption.
words.definitionUz: Davom ettirmoq — ko‘pincha pauza yoki to‘xtashdan keyin oldinga siljish yoki davom ettirish.
words.example1: Please proceed with the meeting.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, yig‘ilishni davom ettiring.
words.example2: The project will proceed as planned.
words.example2Translation: Loyiha reja bo‘yicha davom etadi.
words.example3: After a short break, we proceeded with the discussion.
words.example3Translation: Qisqa tanaffusdan keyin muhokamani davom ettirdik.
extraExamples: The plane is cleared to proceed to the runway.
We cannot proceed without more information.
The court proceedings will proceed tomorrow.
Proceed with caution in this area.
She proceeded to explain the rules.
The event will proceed despite the rain.
He proceeded with his speech.
extraExampleTranslations: Samolyot uchish yo‘lagiga chiqishga ruxsat oldi.
Ko‘proq ma’lumotsiz davom eta olmaymiz.
Sud jarayoni ertaga davom etadi.
Bu hududda ehtiyotkorlik bilan harakatlaning.
U qoidalarni tushuntirishni davom ettirdi.
Yomg‘irga qaramay tadbir davom etadi.
U nutqini davom ettirdi.

words.definition: A strong desire or yearning for something.
words.definitionUz: Intizorlik — biror narsaga kuchli istak yoki sog‘inch.
words.example1: She has a longing for her hometown.
words.example1Translation: U tug‘ilgan shahriga intizor.
words.example2: His longing for adventure led him to travel.
words.example2Translation: Sarguzashtga intizorligi uni sayohatga undadi.
words.example3: There is a universal longing for peace.
words.example3Translation: Tinchlikka universal intizorlik mavjud.
extraExamples: The child has a longing for his mother.
A longing for freedom drove the revolution.
She felt a deep longing for home.
His longing for success motivated him.
There is a longing for change in the country.
The longing for love is common to all.
He suppressed his longing for revenge.
extraExampleTranslations: Bola onasiga intizor.
Ozodlikka intizorlik inqilobni boshladi.
U uyiga chuqur sog‘inch his qildi.
Muvaffaqiyatga intizorligi uni undadi.
Mamlakatda o‘zgarishga intizorlik bor.
Sevgi sog‘inchi hammaga xos.
U qasos olishga intizorligini bostirdi.

words.definition: To laugh loudly and uncontrollably.
words.definitionUz: Qattiq kulmoq — baland ovozda va o‘zini tutolmay kulish.
words.example1: The audience roared with laughter at the joke.
words.example1Translation: Tomoshabinlar hazilga qattiq kulishdi.
words.example2: We roared with laughter during the comedy show.
words.example2Translation: Komediylik shouda qattiq kulishdik.
words.example3: He roared with laughter when he heard the story.
words.example3Translation: U hikoyani eshitgach qattiq kuldi.
extraExamples: The children roared with laughter at the clown.
The whole room roared with laughter.
She roared with laughter at his funny face.
The friends roared with laughter remembering old times.
The comedian made the crowd roar with laughter.
We couldn’t stop roaring with laughter.
His joke made everyone roar with laughter.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar masxarabozga qattiq kulishdi.
Butun xona qattiq kuldi.
U uning kulgili yuziga qattiq kuldi.
Do‘stlar eski kunlarni eslab qattiq kulishdi.
Komediyachi olomonni qattiq kuldirdi.
Biz qattiq kulishdan to‘xtay olmadik.
Uning hazili hammani qattiq kuldirdi.

words.definition: To establish a standard or example for future actions.
words.definitionUz: Namuna bo‘lmoq — kelajakdagi harakatlar uchun standart yoki namunani o‘rnatish.
words.example1: This decision will set a precedent for future cases.
words.example1Translation: Bu qaror kelajakdagi ishlar uchun namuna bo‘ladi.
words.example2: Her success set a precedent for other women.
words.example2Translation: Uning muvaffaqiyati boshqa ayollar uchun namuna bo‘ldi.
words.example3: The ruling set a precedent for similar disputes.
words.example3Translation: Qaror shunga o‘xshash bahslarga namuna bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: The award set a precedent for excellence.
This law sets a precedent for future legislation.
His action set a dangerous precedent.
The treaty set a precedent for peace talks.
Setting a precedent can influence many people.
The innovation set a precedent in the industry.
The victory set a precedent for the team.
extraExampleTranslations: Mukofot mukammallik uchun namuna bo‘ldi.
Bu qonun kelajakdagi qonunchilikka namuna bo‘ladi.
Uning harakati xavfli namuna o‘rnatdi.
Shartnoma tinchlik muzokaralariga namuna bo‘ldi.
Namuna o‘rnatish ko‘plab odamlarga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
Innovatsiya sanoatda namuna bo‘ldi.
G‘alaba jamoa uchun namuna bo‘ldi.

words.definition: Starting at a particular point in time and continuing thereafter.
words.definitionUz: … dan boshlab — ma’lum bir vaqtdan boshlab va keyin davom etadigan.
words.example1: From tomorrow onwards, the new schedule will apply.
words.example1Translation: Ertadan boshlab yangi jadval kuchga kiradi.
words.example2: From 2025 onwards, the law will change.
words.example2Translation: 2025 yildan boshlab qonun o‘zgaradi.
words.example3: From that day onwards, everything changed.
words.example3Translation: O‘sha kundan boshlab hamma narsa o‘zgardi.
extraExamples: From Monday onwards, classes start earlier.
From now onwards, I will be more careful.
From the 18th century onwards, the city grew rapidly.
From childhood onwards, she loved music.
From next week onwards, the office will be closed on Fridays.
From that moment onwards, he never looked back.
From 2020 onwards, remote work became common.
extraExampleTranslations: Dushanbadan boshlab darslar ertaroq boshlanadi.
Hozirdan boshlab ehtiyotkorroq bo‘laman.
18-asrdan boshlab shahar tez o‘sdi.
Bolaligidan boshlab u musiqani yaxshi ko‘rardi.
Kelasi haftadan boshlab ofis juma kunlari yopiq bo‘ladi.
O‘sha paytdan boshlab u ortiga qaramadi.
2020 yildan boshlab masofaviy ish keng tarqaldi.

words.definition: Enduring; continuing for a significant period.
words.definitionUz: Uzoq muddatli — uzoq vaqt davom etadigan; muhim muddat saqlanadigan.
words.example1: The treaty created a long-lasting peace.
words.example1Translation: Shartnoma uzoq muddatli tinchlikni yaratdi.
words.example2: She has a long-lasting friendship with her best friend.
words.example2Translation: Uning eng yaqin do‘sti bilan uzoq muddatli do‘stligi bor.
words.example3: The effects of the medicine are long-lasting.
words.example3Translation: Dorining ta’siri uzoq muddatli.
extraExamples: The company built a long-lasting relationship with clients.
Long-lasting batteries are very useful.
The paint provides long-lasting protection.
They hope for a long-lasting solution.
Long-lasting traditions are important in culture.
The investment offers long-lasting benefits.
She wants a long-lasting marriage.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya mijozlar bilan uzoq muddatli munosabatlarni qurdi.
Uzoq muddatli batareyalar juda foydali.
Bo‘yoq uzoq muddatli himoyani ta’minlaydi.
Ular uzoq muddatli yechimni umid qilishadi.
Uzoq muddatli an’analar madaniyatda muhim.
Sarmoya uzoq muddatli foyda beradi.
U uzoq muddatli oilaviy hayotni xohlaydi.

words.definition: To progress or move toward a destination or goal.
words.definitionUz: Yo‘l olmoq — biror maqsad yoki manzil tomon siljish yoki harakat qilish.
words.example1: Make your way to the exit calmly.
words.example1Translation: Chiqish yo‘lagiga tinchlik bilan yo‘l oling.
words.example2: She made her way through the crowd.
words.example2Translation: U olomon orasidan yo‘l oldi.
words.example3: He is making his way in the music industry.
words.example3Translation: U musiqa sanoatida yo‘l olmoqda.
extraExamples: Make your way home before it gets dark.
The team is making its way to the finals.
She made her way up the company ladder.
Make your way carefully on the icy road.
He made his way to the front of the stage.
We made our way through the forest.
The student is making his way in academia.
extraExampleTranslations: Qorong‘i tushmasdan uyga yo‘l oling.
Jamoa finalga yo‘l olmoqda.
U kompaniya pog‘onasida yuqoriga ko‘tarildi.
Muzli yo‘lda ehtiyotkorlik bilan yo‘l oling.
U sahnaning old tomoniga yo‘l oldi.
Biz o‘rmon orasidan yo‘l oldik.
Talaba ilmiy sohada yo‘l olmoqda.

words.word: To be looking to do something
words.definition: To be intending, planning, or seeking to take a particular action.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni qilmoqchi bo‘lmoq — biror harakatni niyat qilish, rejalashtirish yoki izlash.
words.example1: I am looking to buy a new house.
words.example1Translation: Men yangi uy sotib olmoqchiman.
words.example2: The company is looking to expand its business.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya biznesini kengaytirmoqchi.
words.example3: She is looking to change her career.
words.example3Translation: U kasbini o‘zgartirmoqchi.
extraExamples: He is looking to invest in stocks.
We are looking to hire new staff.
The team is looking to win the championship.
She is looking to improve her skills.
They are looking to launch a new product.
I am looking to travel next year.
The government is looking to reduce taxes.
extraExampleTranslations: U aksiyalarga sarmoya kiritmoqchi.
Biz yangi xodimlar yollamoqchimiz.
Jamoa chempionlikni yutmoqchi.
U ko‘nikmalarini yaxshilamoqchi.
Ular yangi mahsulot chiqarmoqchi.
Men kelasi yil sayohat qilmoqchiman.
Hukumat soliqni kamaytirmoqchi.

words.definition: A person’s physical appearance, often their facial features or attractiveness.
words.definitionUz: Tashqi ko‘rinish — odamning jismoniy ko‘rinishi, ko‘pincha yuz xususiyatlari yoki jozibasi.
words.example1: She is admired for her looks.
words.example1Translation: U tashqi ko‘rinishi uchun hayratga sazovor.
words.example2: His looks don’t matter as much as his personality.
words.example2Translation: Uning tashqi ko‘rinishi xarakteridan ko‘ra muhim emas.
words.example3: Good looks can open doors, but talent is key.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi tashqi ko‘rinish eshiklarni ochishi mumkin, lekin iste’dod asosiy.
extraExamples: Her looks have not changed over the years.
He relies too much on his looks.
Looks can be deceiving.
The actor is known for his striking looks.
She takes care of her looks.
His looks helped him get the modeling job.
Inner beauty is more important than looks.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning tashqi ko‘rinishi yillar davomida o‘zgarmagan.
U tashqi ko‘rinishiga haddan tashqari tayanadi.
Tashqi ko‘rinish aldovchi bo‘lishi mumkin.
Aktyor o‘zining ajoyib tashqi ko‘rinishi bilan mashhur.
U tashqi ko‘rinishiga e’tibor beradi.
Tashqi ko‘rinishi unga model bo‘lish ishini topishga yordam berdi.
Ichki go‘zallik tashqi ko‘rinishdan muhimroq.

words.definition: To make less tight, restrictive, or rigid.
words.definitionUz: Bo‘shatmoq — qattiqlik, cheklov yoki qattiqqo‘llikni kamaytirish.
words.example1: Loosen your tie — it’s too tight.
words.example1Translation: Galstukni bo‘shating — juda qattiq.
words.example2: The government plans to loosen the restrictions.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat cheklovlarni bo‘shatishni rejalashtirmoqda.
words.example3: Loosen the screws a little.
words.example3Translation: Vintlarni biroz bo‘shating.
extraExamples: Loosen your grip on the handle.
Exercise helps loosen tight muscles.
The new law will loosen controls on trade.
She loosened her hair after work.
Loosening the rules made the game more fun.
He loosened his collar in the heat.
The coach told the players to loosen up.
extraExampleTranslations: Tutqichni bo‘shating.
Sport qattiq mushaklarni bo‘shatishga yordam beradi.
Yangi qonun savdo ustidagi nazoratni bo‘shatadi.
U ishdan keyin sochlarini bo‘shatdi.
Qoidalarni bo‘shatish o‘yinni qiziqarliroq qildi.
U issiqda yoqasini bo‘shatdi.
Murabbiy o‘yinchilarga bo‘shashishni aytdi.

words.definition: Finally; decisively; leaving no possibility for repetition.
words.definitionUz: Bir marta va butunlay — nihoyat; qat’iy ravishda; takrorlanish imkoniyatini qoldirmasdan.
words.example1: Let’s settle this argument once and for all.
words.example1Translation: Keling, bu bahsni bir marta va butunlay hal qilaylik.
words.example2: She decided to quit smoking once and for all.
words.example2Translation: U chekishni bir marta va butunlay tashlashga qaror qildi.
words.example3: The matter was resolved once and for all.
words.example3Translation: Masala bir marta va butunlay hal bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: I want to end this once and for all.
He promised to stop complaining once and for all.
The issue needs to be addressed once and for all.
She broke up with him once and for all.
Let’s finish the project once and for all.
The law was changed once and for all.
I’m closing this chapter once and for all.
extraExampleTranslations: Men buni bir marta va butunlay tugatmoqchiman.
U shikoyat qilishni bir marta va butunlay to‘xtatishga va’da berdi.
Masalani bir marta va butunlay hal qilish kerak.
U u bilan bir marta va butunlay ajrashdi.
Keling, loyihani bir marta va butunlay tugataylik.
Qonun bir marta va butunlay o‘zgartirildi.
Men bu bobni bir marta va butunlay yopaman.

words.definition: A relationship characterised by frequent difficulties, tension, or conflict.
words.definitionUz: Qiyin munosabatlar — tez-tez qiyinchiliklar, taranglik yoki nizolar bilan tavsiflanadigan munosabatlar.
words.example1: They have had a rocky relationship for years.
words.example1Translation: Ularning munosabatlari yillar davomida qiyin bo‘lib kelgan.
words.example2: The rocky relationship between the two countries affects trade.
words.example2Translation: Ikki mamlakat o‘rtasidagi qiyin munosabatlar savdoga ta’sir qiladi.
words.example3: After many arguments, their rocky relationship improved.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p bahslardan keyin ularning qiyin munosabatlari yaxshilandi.
extraExamples: The couple’s rocky relationship worries their friends.
A rocky relationship can be saved with effort.
The team has a rocky relationship with their coach.
Her rocky relationship with her boss affects her work.
Rocky relationships often require counseling.
They decided to end their rocky relationship.
The rocky relationship started from the beginning.
extraExampleTranslations: Er-xotinning qiyin munosabatlari do‘stlarini tashvishga solmoqda.
Qiyin munosabatlarni mehnat bilan saqlab qolish mumkin.
Jamoaning murabbiy bilan munosabatlari qiyin.
Rahbari bilan qiyin munosabatlari ishiga ta’sir qiladi.
Qiyin munosabatlar ko‘pincha maslahat talab qiladi.
Ular qiyin munosabatlarini tugatishga qaror qilishdi.
Qiyin munosabatlar boshidanoq boshlangan.

words.definition: Most common, powerful, or influential in a particular context.
words.definitionUz: Asosiy / ustun — ma’lum bir kontekstda eng keng tarqalgan, kuchli yoki ta’sirchan.
words.example1: The predominant color in the painting is blue.
words.example1Translation: Rasmda asosiy rang ko‘k.
words.example2: English is the predominant language in international business.
words.example2Translation: Ingliz tili xalqaro biznesda asosiy til.
words.example3: The predominant view is that change is needed.
words.example3Translation: O‘zgarish kerak degan ustun fikr mavjud.
extraExamples: The predominant religion in the country is Islam.
Her predominant emotion was sadness.
The predominant style in fashion changes every year.
Predominant factors include cost and quality.
The predominant culture influences daily life.
Predominant winds come from the north.
The predominant opinion among experts is positive.
extraExampleTranslations: Mamlakatdagi asosiy din islom.
Uning asosiy his-tuyg‘usi qayg‘u edi.
Modadagi asosiy uslub har yili o‘zgaradi.
Asosiy omillar orasida narx va sifat bor.
Asosiy madaniyat kundalik hayotga ta’sir qiladi.
Asosiy shamollar shimoldan esadi.
Mutaxassislar orasidagi ustun fikr ijobiy.

words.definition: To cause a noticeable disturbance, attract attention, or provoke change.
words.definitionUz: Shovqin ko‘tarmoq — sezilarli bezovtalik keltirib chiqarish, e’tiborni tortish yoki o‘zgarishga sabab bo‘lish.
words.example1: The new policy is making waves in the industry.
words.example1Translation: Yangi siyosat sanoatda shovqin ko‘tarmoqda.
words.example2: She made waves by speaking out against injustice.
words.example2Translation: U adolatsizlikka qarshi chiqib shovqin ko‘tardi.
words.example3: The young artist is already making waves.
words.example3Translation: Yosh rassom allaqachon shovqin ko‘tarmoqda.
extraExamples: The scandal made waves across the country.
Don’t be afraid to make waves if it’s for a good cause.
His book made waves in literary circles.
The decision made waves among the staff.
She made waves with her innovative ideas.
Making waves can lead to both praise and criticism.
The team made waves by winning against stronger opponents.
extraExampleTranslations: Janjal butun mamlakat bo‘ylab shovqin ko‘tardi.
Agar yaxshi ish uchun bo‘lsa, shovqin ko‘tarishdan qo‘rqmang.
Uning kitobi adabiy doiralarda shovqin ko‘tardi.
Qaror xodimlar orasida shovqin ko‘tardi.
U innovatsion g‘oyalari bilan shovqin ko‘tardi.
Shovqin ko‘tarish ham maqtov ham tanqidga olib kelishi mumkin.
Jamoa kuchliroq raqiblarni yengib shovqin ko‘tardi.

words.definition: To achieve recognition or establish a reputation.
words.definitionUz: O‘zingizga nom chiqarmoq — tan olinishga erishish yoki obro‘ egallash.
words.example1: She made a name for herself as a talented singer.
words.example1Translation: U iste’dodli qo‘shiqchi sifatida o‘ziga nom chiqardi.
words.example2: He is trying to make a name for himself in business.
words.example2Translation: U biznesda o‘ziga nom chiqarishga harakat qilmoqda.
words.example3: Making a name for yourself takes time and effort.
words.example3Translation: O‘zingizga nom chiqarish vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The young chef is making a name for himself.
She made a name for herself through hard work.
It’s not easy to make a name for yourself in this field.
He made a name for himself by helping others.
The artist made a name for herself internationally.
Making a name for yourself requires consistency.
The athlete made a name for himself after the Olympics.
extraExampleTranslations: Yosh oshpaz o‘ziga nom chiqarmoqda.
U qattiq mehnat orqali o‘ziga nom chiqardi.
Bu sohada o‘zingizga nom chiqarish oson emas.
U boshqalarga yordam berib o‘ziga nom chiqardi.
Rassom xalqaro miqyosda o‘ziga nom chiqardi.
O‘zingizga nom chiqarish doimiylikni talab qiladi.
Sportchi Olimpiya o‘yinlaridan keyin o‘ziga nom chiqardi.

words.definition: To fail to maintain awareness or consideration of something important.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘zdan qochirmoq — muhim narsani nazardan qochirish yoki e’tibordan chetda qoldirish.
words.example1: Don’t lose sight of your goals.
words.example1Translation: Maqsadlaringizni ko‘zdan qochirmang.
words.example2: In the argument, they lost sight of the main issue.
words.example2Translation: Bahslashayotganda ular asosiy masalani ko‘zdan qochirishdi.
words.example3: We must not lose sight of the bigger picture.
words.example3Translation: Biz katta rasmni ko‘zdan qochirmasligimiz kerak.
extraExamples: She lost sight of what really matters.
Don’t lose sight of your values.
The team lost sight of the strategy.
He lost sight of the time and arrived late.
We should not lose sight of the risks.
Losing sight of priorities can cause problems.
She never loses sight of her dreams.
extraExampleTranslations: U haqiqatan ham muhim narsani ko‘zdan qochirdi.
Qadriyatlaringizni ko‘zdan qochirmang.
Jamoa strategiyani ko‘zdan qochirdi.
U vaqtni ko‘zdan qochirib kech qoldi.
Xavflarni ko‘zdan qochirmasligimiz kerak.
Ustuvorliklarni ko‘zdan qochirish muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U orzularini hech qachon ko‘zdan qochirmaydi.

words.definition: Immediately; in a particular place; under direct pressure or scrutiny.
