words.definitionUz: Darhol / joyida — shu zahoti; ma’lum bir joyda; to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri bosim yoki nazorat ostida.
words.example1: The police arrested him on the spot.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya uni joyida hibsga oldi.
words.example2: She answered the question on the spot.
words.example2Translation: U savolga darhol javob berdi.
words.example3: I was put on the spot during the interview.
words.example3Translation: Intervyuda meni joyimda qiyin ahvolga qo‘yishdi.
extraExamples: He was fired on the spot.
The decision was made on the spot.
She fixed the problem on the spot.
On the spot fines are common for traffic violations.
I can’t decide on the spot.
The singer performed on the spot.
He was asked to speak on the spot.
extraExampleTranslations: U joyida ishdan bo‘shatildi.
Qaror darhol qabul qilindi.
U muammoni joyida hal qildi.
Yo‘l harakati qoidalarini buzganlik uchun joyida jarima odatiy hol.
Men joyida qaror qila olmayman.
Qo‘shiqchi joyida chiqish qildi.
Undan joyida gapirishni so‘rashdi.

words.definition: To be anxious or worried about something.
words.definitionUz: Tinchlikni buzmoq — biror narsa haqida tashvishlanish yoki xavotirga tushish.
words.example1: Don’t lose sleep over small problems.
words.example1Translation: Kichik muammolar uchun tinchlikni buzma.
words.example2: She lost sleep over the upcoming exam.
words.example2Translation: U yaqinlashayotgan imtihon uchun tinchlikni buzdi.
words.example3: He doesn’t lose sleep over what others think.
words.example3Translation: U boshqalar nima deb o‘ylashi haqida tinchlikni buzmaydi.
extraExamples: I lost sleep over the decision.
Don’t lose sleep over things you can’t control.
She lost sleep worrying about her children.
He rarely loses sleep over work.
Losing sleep over stress is common.
The team lost sleep before the big match.
I’ve lost sleep thinking about the future.
extraExampleTranslations: Men qaror haqida tinchlikni buzdim.
Boshqara olmaydigan narsalar uchun tinchlikni buzma.
U bolalari haqida tashvishlanib tinchlikni buzdi.
U ish haqida kamdan-kam tinchlikni buzadi.
Stress tufayli tinchlikni buzish odatiy hol.
Jamoa katta o‘yin oldidan tinchlikni buzdi.
Men kelajak haqida o‘ylab tinchlikni buzaman.

words.definition: To frighten or shock someone intensely.
words.definitionUz: Qoningizni muzlatmoq — kimnidir kuchli qo‘rqitish yoki hayratda qoldirish.
words.example1: The horror movie made my blood run cold.
words.example1Translation: Dahshatli film qonimni muzlatdi.
words.example2: His words made her blood run cold.
words.example2Translation: Uning so‘zlari uning qonini muzlatdi.
words.example3: The news made everyone’s blood run cold.
words.example3Translation: Yangilik hammaning qonini muzlatdi.
extraExamples: The scream in the dark made my blood run cold.
The thought of losing her made his blood run cold.
The accident scene made my blood run cold.
Her story made everyone’s blood run cold.
The threat made his blood run cold.
The ghost story made the children’s blood run cold.
Seeing the damage made my blood run cold.
extraExampleTranslations: Qorong‘idagi qichqiriq qonimni muzlatdi.
Uni yo‘qotish fikri uning qonini muzlatdi.
Avtohalokat manzarasi qonimni muzlatdi.
Uning hikoyasi hammaning qonini muzlatdi.
Tahdid uning qonini muzlatdi.
Arvoh hikoyasi bolalarning qonini muzlatdi.
Zararni ko‘rish qonimni muzlatdi.

words.definition: To acquire the basic skills and procedures of a task or role.
words.definitionUz: Ishni o‘rganmoq — vazifa yoki rolning asosiy ko‘nikmalari va tartiblarini egallash.
words.example1: It took her a few weeks to learn the ropes.
words.example1Translation: Ishni o‘rganish uchun unga bir necha hafta kerak bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The new employee is learning the ropes quickly.
words.example2Translation: Yangi xodim ishni tez o‘rganmoqda.
words.example3: He is still learning the ropes in his new job.
words.example3Translation: U yangi ishida hali ishni o‘rganmoqda.
extraExamples: Learning the ropes takes time.
She helped him learn the ropes.
The training program helps new staff learn the ropes.
It’s normal to take time to learn the ropes.
He learned the ropes from his mentor.
Learning the ropes is the first step.
Once you learn the ropes, the job becomes easier.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishni o‘rganish vaqt talab qiladi.
U unga ishni o‘rganishda yordam berdi.
Tayyorgarlik dasturi yangi xodimlarga ishni o‘rganishga yordam beradi.
Ishni o‘rganish uchun vaqt ketishi normal holat.
U ishni ustozidan o‘rgandi.
Ishni o‘rganish birinchi qadam.
Ishni o‘rganganingizdan keyin ish osonlashadi.

words.word: A stroke of luck / A stroke of love
words.pronunciation: /ə strəʊk əv lʌk / ə strəʊk əv lʌv/
words.definition: A sudden fortunate or positive event; in context, “stroke of love” can indicate a sudden romantic or compassionate gesture.
words.definitionUz: Omad / Sevgi zarbasi — to‘satdan sodir bo‘lgan omadli yoki ijobiy voqea; “sevgi zarbasi” romantik yoki mehr-muhabbat bilan bog‘liq to‘satdan harakatni bildirishi mumkin.
words.example1: Winning the lottery was a stroke of luck.
words.example1Translation: Loteriyada yutish omad zarbasi edi.
words.example2: Meeting her was a stroke of luck.
words.example2Translation: U bilan uchrashish omad zarbasi edi.
words.example3: His kind words were a stroke of love.
words.example3Translation: Uning mehribon so‘zlari sevgi zarbasi edi.
extraExamples: It was a stroke of luck that I found my keys.
The job offer was a real stroke of luck.
A stroke of love can change everything.
He received a stroke of love from his family.
Finding the solution was a stroke of luck.
The unexpected help was a stroke of love.
Her smile was a stroke of love.
extraExampleTranslations: Kalitlarimni topishim omad zarbasi edi.
Ish taklifi haqiqiy omad zarbasi edi.
Sevgi zarbasi hamma narsani o‘zgartirishi mumkin.
U oilasidan sevgi zarbasini oldi.
Yechimni topish omad zarbasi edi.
Kutilmagan yordam sevgi zarbasi edi.
Uning tabassumi sevgi zarbasi edi.

words.definition: To take someone’s circumstances or limitations into consideration.
words.definitionUz: Kimdir uchun imtiyoz qilmoq — kimningdir holati yoki cheklovlarini hisobga olish.
words.example1: We should make allowances for her age.
words.example1Translation: Biz uning yoshini hisobga olib imtiyoz qilishimiz kerak.
words.example2: The teacher made allowances for the student’s difficulties.
words.example2Translation: O‘qituvchi talabaning qiyinchiliklarini hisobga olib imtiyoz qildi.
words.example3: Make allowances for his lack of experience.
words.example3Translation: Uning tajribasi yo‘qligini hisobga olib imtiyoz qiling.
extraExamples: Parents make allowances for their children.
The company makes allowances for personal problems.
We need to make allowances for cultural differences.
She made allowances for his busy schedule.
The judge made allowances for his youth.
Make allowances for mistakes when learning.
The team made allowances for the injured player.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar bolalari uchun imtiyoz qilishadi.
Kompaniya shaxsiy muammolar uchun imtiyoz qiladi.
Madaniy farqlarni hisobga olib imtiyoz qilishimiz kerak.
U uning band jadvalini hisobga olib imtiyoz qildi.
Sudya uning yoshini hisobga olib imtiyoz qildi.
O‘rganayotganda xatolarga imtiyoz qiling.
Jamoa jarohatlangan o‘yinchiga imtiyoz qildi.

words.definition: Mainly; primarily.
words.definitionUz: Asosan — asosan; birinchi navbatda.
words.example1: The audience was predominantly young people.
words.example1Translation: Tomoshabinlar asosan yoshlar edi.
words.example2: The region is predominantly agricultural.
words.example2Translation: Mintaqa asosan qishloq xo‘jaligi bilan shug‘ullanadi.
words.example3: She speaks predominantly English.
words.example3Translation: U asosan ingliz tilida gapiradi.
extraExamples: The population is predominantly urban.
The book is predominantly about history.
Predominantly positive feedback was received.
The industry is predominantly male.
The weather is predominantly sunny in summer.
Predominantly Muslim countries celebrate Eid.
The team is predominantly made up of locals.
extraExampleTranslations: Aholining asosiy qismi shaharliklar.
Kitob asosan tarix haqida.
Asosan ijobiy fikr-mulohazalar olindi.
Sanoat asosan erkaklar bilan band.
Yozda ob-havo asosan ochiq bo‘ladi.
Asosan musulmon mamlakatlar Eidni nishonlashadi.
Jamoa asosan mahalliy aholidan iborat.

words.definition: Employment that yields high financial reward.
words.definitionUz: Foydali ish — yuqori moliyaviy daromad keltiradigan ish.
words.example1: She found a lucrative job in finance.
words.example1Translation: U moliya sohasida foydali ish topdi.
words.example2: Lucrative jobs are highly competitive.
words.example2Translation: Foydali ishlar juda raqobatbardosh.
words.example3: The lucrative job allowed him to travel often.
words.example3Translation: Foydali ish unga tez-tez sayohat qilish imkonini berdi.
extraExamples: Many people seek lucrative jobs.
A lucrative job often requires special skills.
The offer was for a very lucrative job.
Lucrative jobs can come with high stress.
He turned down a lucrative job for family reasons.
The industry offers many lucrative jobs.
Finding a lucrative job takes time and effort.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘plab odamlar foydali ish izlaydi.
Foydali ish ko‘pincha maxsus ko‘nikmalarni talab qiladi.
Taklif juda foydali ish edi.
Foydali ishlar ko‘pincha yuqori stress bilan birga keladi.
U oilaviy sabablarga ko‘ra foydali ishni rad etdi.
Sanoat ko‘plab foydali ishlarni taklif qiladi.
Foydali ish topish vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.

words.definition: The deliberate and violent killing of many people.
words.definitionUz: Qirg‘in — ko‘p odamni ataylab va zo‘ravonlik bilan o‘ldirish.
words.example1: The massacre shocked the world.
words.example1Translation: Qirg‘in butun dunyoni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example2: Many innocent people died in the massacre.
words.example2Translation: Qirg‘inda ko‘plab begunoh odamlar halok bo‘ldi.
words.example3: The historical massacre is remembered every year.
words.example3Translation: Tarixiy qirg‘in har yili esga olinadi.
extraExamples: The village suffered a terrible massacre.
The massacre was condemned internationally.
Survivors of the massacre told their stories.
The event is known as the massacre of 1915.
Massacres have happened throughout history.
The army prevented a potential massacre.
The news of the massacre spread quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloq dahshatli qirg‘inni boshdan kechirdi.
Qirg‘in xalqaro miqyosda qoralandi.
Qirg‘in omon qolganlar o‘z hikoyalarini aytib berishdi.
Voqea 1915 yilgi qirg‘in sifatida tanilgan.
Qirg‘inlar tarix davomida sodir bo‘lgan.
Armiya potentsial qirg‘inning oldini oldi.
Qirg‘in haqidagi xabar tez tarqaldi.

words.definition: Additionally or secretly, often alongside a primary occupation.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘shimcha ravishda — asosiy ish bilan birga qo‘shimcha yoki yashirin tarzda.
words.example1: He works as a teacher but sells cars on the side.
words.example1Translation: U o‘qituvchi bo‘lib ishlaydi, lekin qo‘shimcha ravishda mashina sotadi.
words.example2: She earns extra money on the side by tutoring.
words.example2Translation: U repetitorlik qilib qo‘shimcha pul topadi.
words.example3: Many people have side jobs on the side.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘plab odamlar qo‘shimcha ravishda qo‘shimcha ish bilan shug‘ullanishadi.
extraExamples: He has a small business on the side.
She writes articles on the side.
The chef cooks for parties on the side.
He repairs phones on the side.
Many students work on the side.
She designs clothes on the side.
He invests in stocks on the side.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning kichik biznesi bor qo‘shimcha ravishda.
U qo‘shimcha ravishda maqolalar yozadi.
Oshpaz ziyofatlar uchun qo‘shimcha ravishda ovqat pishiradi.
U telefonlarni ta’mirlaydi qo‘shimcha ravishda.
Ko‘plab talabalar qo‘shimcha ish bilan shug‘ullanishadi.
U qo‘shimcha ravishda kiyimlar dizayn qiladi.
U qo‘shimcha ravishda aksiyalarga sarmoya kiritadi.

words.word: Bring a lump to your throat
words.definition: To cause a strong feeling of emotion, typically sadness or awe.
words.definitionUz: Tomog‘ingizni tiqmoq — kuchli his-tuyg‘u, odatda qayg‘u yoki hayrat uyg‘otish.
words.example1: The speech brought a lump to my throat.
words.example1Translation: Nutq tomog‘imni tiqdi.
words.example2: The ending of the movie brought a lump to her throat.
words.example2Translation: Filmning oxiri uning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
words.example3: Hearing the national anthem brought a lump to his throat.
words.example3Translation: Davlat madhiyasini eshitish uning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
extraExamples: The story brought a lump to everyone’s throat.
Her kind words brought a lump to my throat.
The reunion brought a lump to his throat.
The beautiful music brought a lump to her throat.
The farewell brought a lump to their throats.
Seeing the children succeed brought a lump to her throat.
The memorial brought a lump to my throat.
extraExampleTranslations: Hikoya hammaning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
Uning mehribon so‘zlari tomog‘imni tiqdi.
Uchrashuv uning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
Go‘zal musiqa uning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
Xayrlashuv ularning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
Bolalarning muvaffaqiyatini ko‘rish uning tomog‘ini tiqdi.
Yodgorlik tomog‘imni tiqdi.

words.definition: To reconcile or come to terms with someone; to reach an understanding.
words.definitionUz: Kelishmoq — kimdir bilan yarashish yoki tushunishga erishish.
words.example1: They made so with each other after the argument.
words.example1Translation: Ular bahsdan keyin bir-birlari bilan kelishdilar.
words.example2: It took time to make so with the situation.
words.example2Translation: Vaziyat bilan kelishish uchun vaqt kerak bo‘ldi.
words.example3: He made so with his past mistakes.
words.example3Translation: U o‘tmishdagi xatolari bilan kelishdi.
extraExamples: The two sides made so with a compromise.
She made so with her difficult neighbor.
Making so with change is important.
They made so with the new rules.
He made so with losing the game.
The family made so with the loss.
It’s hard to make so with failure.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikki tomon murosa bilan kelishdi.
U qiyin qo‘shnisi bilan kelishdi.
O‘zgarish bilan kelishish muhim.
Ular yangi qoidalar bilan kelishdilar.
U o‘yinni yutqazish bilan kelishdi.
Oila yo‘qotish bilan kelishdi.
Muvaffaqiyatsizlik bilan kelishish qiyin.

words.definition: To be scarce, highly valued, or in great demand.
words.definitionUz: Juda qimmat / kam uchraydigan — kam uchraydigan, yuqori baholangan yoki katta talabda bo‘lish.
words.example1: Good teachers are at a premium these days.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi o‘qituvchilar hozir juda kam uchraydi.
words.example2: Space in the city center is at a premium.
words.example2Translation: Shahar markazidagi joy juda qimmat.
words.example3: Time is at a premium when you have deadlines.
words.example3Translation: Muddat bo‘lganda vaqt juda qimmat.
extraExamples: Skilled workers are at a premium.
Parking spaces are at a premium near the station.
Fresh water is at a premium in the desert.
Patience is at a premium in stressful situations.
Tickets for the concert are at a premium.
Good health is at a premium as you get older.
Quiet places are at a premium in big cities.
extraExampleTranslations: Malakali ishchilar juda kam uchraydi.
Vokzal yaqinida mashina to‘xtash joylari juda qimmat.
Cho‘lda toza suv juda qimmat.
Stressli vaziyatlarda sabr juda qimmat.
Konsertga chiptalar juda qimmat.
Yoshi ulg‘aygan sari sog‘liq juda qimmat.
Katta shaharlarda tinch joylar juda kam uchraydi.

words.definition: To have a lasting influence or noticeable impact.
words.definitionUz: Nom qoldirmoq — uzoq muddatli ta’sir yoki sezilarli iz qoldirish.
words.example1: The artist left his mark on the world of painting.
words.example1Translation: Rassom rasm san’atida nom qoldirdi.
words.example2: She left her mark as a great leader.
words.example2Translation: U buyuk rahbar sifatida nom qoldirdi.
words.example3: His invention left a mark on history.
words.example3Translation: Uning ixtirosi tarixda nom qoldirdi.
extraExamples: The teacher left her mark on many students.
The company left its mark in the industry.
He wants to leave his mark before retiring.
The event left a mark on everyone who attended.
She left her mark through her charitable work.
The book left a mark on literature.
Leaders should aim to leave their mark positively.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchi ko‘plab talabalarda nom qoldirdi.
Kompaniya sanoatda nom qoldirdi.
U nafaqaga chiqishdan oldin nom qoldirmoqchi.
Tadbir unda qatnashganlarning hammasida iz qoldirdi.
U xayriya ishlari orqali nom qoldirdi.
Kitob adabiyotda nom qoldirdi.
Rahbarlar ijobiy nom qoldirishga intilishlari kerak.

words.definition: The attractive appeal or temptation of wealth or renown.
words.definitionUz: Shuhrat / pul jozibasi — boylik yoki shuhratning jozibali va vasvasali tomoni.
words.example1: The lure of fame made him move to Hollywood.
words.example1Translation: Shuhrat jozibasi uni Gollivudga ko‘chishga undadi.
words.example2: Many are drawn by the lure of money.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘pchilikni pul jozibasi o‘ziga tortadi.
words.example3: The lure of fame can be dangerous.
words.example3Translation: Shuhrat jozibasi xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The lure of money led him to take risks.
She resisted the lure of fame.
The lure of money often blinds people.
The lure of fame brought many to the city.
He fell for the lure of quick money.
The lure of fame is strong in the entertainment industry.
The lure of money motivated his decision.
extraExampleTranslations: Pul jozibasi uni xavf ostiga qo‘yishga undadi.
U shuhrat jozibasiga qarshilik ko‘rsatdi.
Pul jozibasi ko‘pincha odamlarni ko‘r qiladi.
Shuhrat jozibasi ko‘plab odamlarni shaharga olib keldi.
U tez pul topish jozibasiga tushdi.
Shuhrat jozibasi ko‘ngilochar sanoatida kuchli.
Pul jozibasi uning qaroriga turtki bo‘ldi.

words.definition: Used to emphasise a point or introduce a cautionary remark.
words.definitionUz: Eslatib o‘tamanki — biror fikrni ta’kidlash yoki ehtiyotkorlik bilan izoh kiritish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: It’s expensive, mind you, but worth it.
words.example1Translation: Qimmat, eslatib o‘tamanki, lekin arziydi.
words.example2: Mind you, he is very talented.
words.example2Translation: Eslatib o‘tamanki, u juda iste’dodli.
words.example3: The food is good, mind you, but the service is slow.
words.example3Translation: Ovqat yaxshi, eslatib o‘tamanki, lekin xizmat sekin.
extraExamples: It’s cold outside, mind you.
Mind you, she worked very hard.
The movie is long, mind you, but interesting.
He is young, mind you, but very mature.
Mind you, prices have gone up.
It’s a small room, mind you, but comfortable.
Mind you, this is just my opinion.
extraExampleTranslations: Tashqarida sovuq, eslatib o‘tamanki.
Eslatib o‘tamanki, u juda qattiq mehnat qildi.
Film uzun, eslatib o‘tamanki, lekin qiziqarli.
U yosh, eslatib o‘tamanki, lekin juda yetuk.
Eslatib o‘tamanki, narxlar oshdi.
Xona kichik, eslatib o‘tamanki, lekin qulay.
Eslatib o‘tamanki, bu faqat mening fikrim.

words.definition: To focus on your own affairs rather than interfering with others.
words.definitionUz: O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l — boshqalarning ishlariga aralashmasdan o‘z ishlaring bilan shug‘ullanish.
words.example1: Mind your own business and stop asking questions.
words.example1Translation: O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l va savollar berishni to‘xtat.
words.example2: She told him to mind his own business.
words.example2Translation: U unga o‘z ishi bilan band bo‘lishni aytdi.
words.example3: It’s best to mind your own business sometimes.
words.example3Translation: Ba’zida o‘z ishing bilan band bo‘lgan yaxshi.
extraExamples: Mind your own business!
He should learn to mind his own business.
She doesn’t like people who don’t mind their own business.
Mind your own business and let me handle it.
It’s rude to not mind your own business.
He always minds his own business.
Mind your own business unless asked for help.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l!
U o‘z ishi bilan band bo‘lishni o‘rganishi kerak.
U o‘z ishi bilan band bo‘lmagan odamlarni yoqtirmaydi.
O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l va buni menga qoldir.
O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘lmaslik qo‘pollik.
U har doim o‘z ishi bilan band.
Yordam so‘ralmasa, o‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l.

words.definition: Acting spontaneously without forethought.
words.definitionUz: Bir zumda — oldindan o‘ylamasdan, to‘satdan harakat qilish.
words.example1: She bought the dress on impulse.
words.example1Translation: U ko‘ylakni bir zumda sotib oldi.
words.example2: He decided on impulse to travel.
words.example2Translation: U sayohat qilishga bir zumda qaror qildi.
words.example3: Many regrets come from acting on impulse.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p pushaymonliklar bir zumda harakat qilishdan kelib chiqadi.
extraExamples: He kissed her on impulse.
Don’t make decisions on impulse.
She quit her job on impulse.
Buying on impulse can be expensive.
He spoke on impulse and regretted it.
Acting on impulse led to an adventure.
The gift was bought on impulse.
extraExampleTranslations: U uni bir zumda o‘pdi.
Qarorlarni bir zumda qabul qilmang.
U bir zumda ishdan bo‘shadi.
Bir zumda sotib olish qimmatga tushishi mumkin.
U bir zumda gapirdi va pushaymon bo‘ldi.
Bir zumda harakat qilish sarguzashtga olib keldi.
Sovg‘a bir zumda sotib olingan edi.

words.definition: To mix socially with others.
words.definitionUz: Aralashmoq — boshqalar bilan ijtimoiy tarzda aralashish.
words.example1: At the party, she mingled with the guests.
words.example1Translation: Ziyofatda u mehmonlar bilan aralashdi.
words.example2: It’s good to mingle with people from different cultures.
words.example2Translation: Turli madaniyatlardan odamlar bilan aralashish yaxshi.
words.example3: He doesn’t like to mingle with strangers.
words.example3Translation: U begonalarga aralashishni yoqtirmaydi.
extraExamples: Mingle with the crowd and enjoy the event.
She mingled with celebrities at the award ceremony.
Mingle with your colleagues at the office party.
It’s important to mingle with new people.
He mingled with the locals during his trip.
Mingle with the team to build relationships.
The host encouraged everyone to mingle.
extraExampleTranslations: Olomonga aralashing va tadbirdan zavqlaning.
U mukofot marosimida mashhurlar bilan aralashdi.
Ofis ziyofatida hamkasblaringiz bilan aralashing.
Yangi odamlar bilan aralashish muhim.
U sayohati davomida mahalliy aholi bilan aralashdi.
Jamoa bilan aralashib munosabatlarni mustahkamlang.
Uy egasi hammaga aralashishni maslahat berdi.

words.definition: As soon as; immediately upon a particular event or moment.
words.definitionUz: … zahoti — ma’lum bir voqea yoki lahzada darhol.
words.example1: The minute that I saw her, I knew she was the one.
words.example1Translation: Uni ko‘rgan zahotim u mening taqdirim ekanligini angladim.
words.example2: Call me the minute that you arrive.
words.example2Translation: Yetib kelgan zahotingiz menga qo‘ng‘iroq qiling.
words.example3: The minute that the bell rang, the students left.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘ng‘iroq chalgan zahoti talabalar chiqib ketishdi.
extraExamples: The minute that it started raining, we went inside.
She smiled the minute that she saw the gift.
The minute that the news broke, everyone reacted.
Call the doctor the minute that you feel worse.
The minute that he walked in, the room went quiet.
The minute that the plane landed, she felt relieved.
The minute that I heard the song, I remembered.
extraExampleTranslations: Yomg‘ir yog‘a boshlagan zahoti ichkariga kirdik.
U sovg‘ani ko‘rgan zahoti tabassum qildi.
Yangilik tarqalgan zahoti hamma reaksiya bildirdi.
O‘zingizni yomon his qilgan zahotingiz shifokorga qo‘ng‘iroq qiling.
U kirgan zahoti xona jim bo‘lib qoldi.
Samolyot qo‘ngan zahoti u yengillik his qildi.
Qo‘shiqni eshitgan zahotim esimga tushdi.

words.definition: An extremely small or insignificant quantity.
words.definitionUz: Juda oz miqdor — nihoyatda kichik yoki ahamiyatsiz miqdor.
words.example1: There was only a minute amount of sugar left.
words.example1Translation: Faqat juda oz miqdorda shakar qolgan edi.
words.example2: The medicine contains only a minute amount of the active ingredient.
words.example2Translation: Dori faol moddaning juda oz miqdorini o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: A minute amount of poison can be deadly.
words.example3Translation: Zaharning juda oz miqdori ham o‘limli bo‘lishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Add a minute amount of salt.
The test detected a minute amount of the substance.
Even a minute amount of radiation is dangerous.
She used a minute amount of paint for the details.
The recipe calls for a minute amount of spice.
A minute amount of effort can make a difference.
The error was caused by a minute amount of miscalculation.
extraExampleTranslations: Juda oz miqdorda tuz qo‘shing.
Test moddaning juda oz miqdorini aniqladi.
Hatto radiatsiyaning juda oz miqdori ham xavfli.
U detallar uchun juda oz miqdorda bo‘yoq ishlatdi.
Retsept ziravorning juda oz miqdorini talab qiladi.
Juda oz miqdorda mehnat farq qilishi mumkin.
Xato hisob-kitobning juda oz miqdoridagi xatosidan kelib chiqqan.

words.definition: To authoritatively recommend or set out (usually medicine, rules, or treatment).
words.definitionUz: Buyurmoq — odatda dori, qoida yoki davolashni rasmiy ravishda tavsiya qilish yoki belgilash.
words.example1: The doctor prescribed antibiotics for the infection.
words.example1Translation: Shifokor infeksiya uchun antibiotiklarni buyurdi.
words.example2: The law prescribes strict penalties.
words.example2Translation: Qonun qattiq jazolarni belgilaydi.
words.example3: The teacher prescribed extra homework.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchi qo‘shimcha uy vazifasini buyurdi.
extraExamples: The doctor prescribed rest and fluids.
The rules prescribe how to behave.
She was prescribed painkillers.
The constitution prescribes the rights of citizens.
The vet prescribed medicine for the dog.
The guidelines prescribe safety measures.
The judge prescribed community service.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor dam olish va suyuqlik ichishni buyurdi.
Qoidalar qanday harakat qilishni belgilaydi.
Unga og‘riq qoldiruvchi dorilar buyurildi.
Konstitutsiya fuqarolar huquqlarini belgilaydi.
Veterinar it uchun dori buyurdi.
Yo‘riqnoma xavfsizlik choralarini belgilaydi.
Sudya jamoat ishlari bilan band bo‘lishni buyurdi.

words.definition: An unsatisfactorily small or inadequate quantity.
words.definitionUz: Juda oz miqdor — qoniqarsiz darajada kichik yoki yetarli bo‘lmagan miqdor.
words.example1: He received a miserable amount of money for his work.
words.example1Translation: U ishi uchun juda oz miqdorda pul oldi.
words.example2: The miserable amount of food was not enough.
words.example2Translation: Juda oz miqdordagi ovqat yetarli emas edi.
words.example3: A miserable amount of rain fell this year.
words.example3Translation: Bu yil juda oz miqdorda yomg‘ir yog‘di.
extraExamples: The salary is a miserable amount.
They survived on a miserable amount of rice.
The donation was a miserable amount.
She earned a miserable amount last month.
A miserable amount of support was given.
The prize was a miserable amount.
The budget allocated a miserable amount for education.
extraExampleTranslations: Maosh juda oz miqdorda.
Ular juda oz miqdordagi guruch bilan omon qolishdi.
Xayriya juda oz miqdorda edi.
U o‘tgan oy juda oz miqdorda daromad oldi.
Juda oz miqdorda yordam berildi.
Mukofot juda oz miqdorda edi.
Byudjet ta’limga juda oz miqdorda mablag‘ ajratdi.

words.definition: An unfortunate event resulting in serious consequences.
words.definitionUz: Fojiali baxtsiz hodisa — jiddiy oqibatlarga olib keladigan baxtsiz voqea.
words.example1: The tragic mishap claimed many lives.
words.example1Translation: Fojiali baxtsiz hodisa ko‘p odamning hayotiga zomin bo‘ldi.
words.example2: It was a tragic mishap that could have been prevented.
words.example2Translation: Bu oldini olish mumkin bo‘lgan fojiali baxtsiz hodisa edi.
words.example3: The family is still recovering from the tragic mishap.
words.example3Translation: Oila hali ham fojiali baxtsiz hodisadan tuzalmoqda.
extraExamples: The plane crash was a tragic mishap.
A tragic mishap occurred during the construction.
The tragic mishap left the community in shock.
Investigators are looking into the tragic mishap.
The tragic mishap was caused by human error.
She wrote a book about the tragic mishap.
The tragic mishap changed their lives forever.
extraExampleTranslations: Samolyot halokati fojiali baxtsiz hodisa edi.
Qurilish paytida fojiali baxtsiz hodisa sodir bo‘ldi.
Fojiali baxtsiz hodisa jamoatni hayratda qoldirdi.
Tergovchilar fojiali baxtsiz hodisani o‘rganishmoqda.
Fojiali baxtsiz hodisa insoniy xatodan kelib chiqqan.
U fojiali baxtsiz hodisa haqida kitob yozdi.
Fojiali baxtsiz hodisa ularning hayotini butunlay o‘zgartirdi.

words.definition: Multiple unfortunate events occurring consecutively or repeatedly.
words.definitionUz: Bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar — ketma-ket yoki takroran sodir bo‘ladigan bir necha baxtsiz voqealar.
words.example1: A series of mishaps delayed the project.
words.example1Translation: Bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar loyihani kechiktirdi.
words.example2: The trip was ruined by a series of mishaps.
words.example2Translation: Sayohat bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar tufayli buzildi.
words.example3: A series of mishaps led to the accident.
words.example3Translation: Bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar avtohalokatga olib keldi.
extraExamples: The day started with a series of mishaps.
A series of mishaps affected the production.
She faced a series of mishaps in her career.
The team overcame a series of mishaps.
A series of mishaps made the journey difficult.
The play was disrupted by a series of mishaps.
He laughed about the series of mishaps.
extraExampleTranslations: Kun bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar bilan boshlandi.
Bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar ishlab chiqarishga ta’sir qildi.
U karerasida bir qator baxtsiz hodisalarga duch keldi.
Jamoa bir qator baxtsiz hodisalarni yengdi.
Bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar sayohatni qiyinlashtirdi.
Spektakl bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar tufayli to‘xtab qoldi.
U bir qator baxtsiz hodisalar haqida kuldi.

words.definition: To understand incorrectly; to give a wrong meaning to something.
words.definitionUz: Noto‘g‘ri tushunmoq — biror narsani xato tushunish yoki noto‘g‘ri ma’no berish.
words.example1: Don’t misinterpret what I said.
words.example1Translation: Mening aytganlarimni noto‘g‘ri tushunmang.
words.example2: She misinterpreted his friendly smile as flirting.
words.example2Translation: U uning do‘stona tabassumini noz-karashma deb noto‘g‘ri tushundi.
words.example3: The instructions were misinterpreted by the team.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘rsatmalar jamoa tomonidan noto‘g‘ri tushunildi.
extraExamples: He often misinterprets jokes as insults.
The critic misinterpreted the artist’s intention.
Try not to misinterpret her silence.
The data was misinterpreted by the analyst.
She misinterpreted the email and got upset.
Misinterpreting cultural signals can cause problems.
The teacher helped him not to misinterpret the poem.
extraExampleTranslations: U hazillarni ko‘pincha haqorat deb noto‘g‘ri tushunadi.
Tanqidchi rassomning niyatini noto‘g‘ri tushundi.
Uning jimligini noto‘g‘ri tushunmaslikka harakat qiling.
Ma’lumotlar tahlilchi tomonidan noto‘g‘ri tushunildi.
U xatni noto‘g‘ri tushunib, xafa bo‘ldi.
Madaniy signallarni noto‘g‘ri tushunish muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
O‘qituvchi unga she’rni noto‘g‘ri tushunmaslikka yordam berdi.

words.word: Your job is on the line
words.definition: Your employment is at risk; your position depends on current performance.
words.definitionUz: Ish joyingiz xavf ostida — ish o‘rningiz xavf ostida; lavozimingiz hozirgi natijalarga bog‘liq.
words.example1: Your job is on the line if you miss another deadline.
words.example1Translation: Yana bir muddatni o‘tkazib yuborsangiz, ishingiz xavf ostida.
words.example2: With poor sales, his job is on the line.
words.example2Translation: Sotuv past bo‘lgani uchun uning ishi xavf ostida.
words.example3: The manager said my job is on the line.
words.example3Translation: Rahbar mening ishim xavf ostida ekanligini aytdi.
extraExamples: Your job is on the line after that mistake.
Don’t let your job be on the line.
Her job is on the line due to low performance.
The whole department’s jobs are on the line.
He knows his job is on the line.
Your job is on the line if you don’t improve.
The CEO said several jobs are on the line.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘sha xatodan keyin ishingiz xavf ostida.
Ish joyingizni xavf ostiga qo‘ymang.
Past natijalar tufayli uning ishi xavf ostida.
Butun bo‘limning ish o‘rinlari xavf ostida.
U o‘z ishining xavf ostida ekanligini biladi.
Agar yaxshilanmasangiz, ishingiz xavf ostida.
Bosh direktor bir necha ish o‘rni xavf ostida ekanligini aytdi.

words.definition: To fail to take advantage of an opportunity.
words.definitionUz: Imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy bermoq — imkoniyatdan foydalana olmaslik.
words.example1: If you don’t apply now, you’ll miss the boat.
words.example1Translation: Agar hozir ariza bermasan, imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berasan.
words.example2: He missed the boat on the stock investment.
words.example2Translation: U aksiya sarmoyasidagi imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berdi.
words.example3: Don’t miss the boat on this great offer.
words.example3Translation: Bu ajoyib taklifni qo‘ldan boy bermang.
extraExamples: She missed the boat by not studying abroad.
The company missed the boat on digital transformation.
We almost missed the boat with that deal.
Don’t miss the boat on learning new skills.
He missed the boat when the market was booming.
Many people missed the boat during the tech boom.
Missing the boat can be very costly.
extraExampleTranslations: U chet elda o‘qimasdan imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berdi.
Kompaniya raqamli transformatsiya imkoniyatini qo‘ldan boy berdi.
Biz o‘sha bitimda imkoniyatni deyarli qo‘ldan boy berdik.
Yangi ko‘nikmalar o‘rganish imkoniyatini qo‘ldan boy bermang.
Bozor gullab-yashnagan paytda u imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berdi.
Ko‘plab odamlar texnologiya gullagan davrda imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berishdi.
Imkoniyatni qo‘ldan boy berish juda qimmatga tushishi mumkin.

words.definition: To admit responsibility or confess to an action.
words.definitionUz: Tan olish — mas’uliyatni tan olish yoki biror harakatni bo‘yniga olish.
words.example1: You should own up to your mistake.
words.example1Translation: Xatongizni tan olishingiz kerak.
words.example2: He finally owned up to breaking the window.
words.example2Translation: U nihoyat oynani sindirganini tan oldi.
words.example3: It takes courage to own up.
words.example3Translation: Tan olish uchun jasorat kerak.
extraExamples: Own up and tell the truth.
She owned up to cheating on the test.
The boy owned up to eating the cookies.
Own up to your responsibilities.
He refused to own up at first.
Owning up builds trust.
The manager owned up to the team’s failure.
extraExampleTranslations: Tan oling va haqiqatni ayting.
U imtihonda aldaganini tan oldi.
Bola pechenyelarni yeganini tan oldi.
Mas’uliyatingizni tan oling.
U avvaliga tan olishdan bosh tortdi.
Tan olish ishonchni mustahkamlaydi.
Rahbar jamoaning muvaffaqiyatsizligini tan oldi.

words.definition: Engaged in an important task or purpose, often with urgency or determination.
words.definitionUz: Muhim vazifada — muhim ish yoki maqsad bilan band bo‘lish, ko‘pincha shoshilinchlik yoki qat’iyat bilan.
words.example1: She is on a mission to help the poor.
words.example1Translation: U kambag‘allarga yordam berish vazifasida.
words.example2: The team is on a mission to win the championship.
words.example2Translation: Jamoa chempionlikni yutish vazifasida.
words.example3: He is on a mission to finish the book.
words.example3Translation: U kitobni tugatish vazifasida.
extraExamples: The doctor is on a mission to fight disease.
She is on a mission to change the world.
The soldiers were on a secret mission.
He is on a mission to lose weight.
The company is on a mission to innovate.
They are on a mission to clean the environment.
I am on a mission to learn English well.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor kasalliklarga qarshi kurash vazifasida.
U dunyoni o‘zgartirish vazifasida.
Askarlar maxfiy vazifada edilar.
U vazn tashlash vazifasida.
Kompaniya innovatsiya qilish vazifasida.
Ular atrof-muhitni tozalash vazifasida.
Men ingliz tilini yaxshi o‘rganish vazifasidaman.

words.definition: To complain persistently about something, usually in a low or whining tone.
words.definitionUz: Shikoyat qilmoq — biror narsa haqida doimiy ravishda, odatda past yoki nolali ohangda shikoyat qilish.
words.example1: Stop moaning about the weather.
words.example1Translation: Ob-havo haqida shikoyat qilishni to‘xtat.
words.example2: He is always moaning about his job.
words.example2Translation: U har doim ishi haqida shikoyat qiladi.
words.example3: She moaned about the long wait.
words.example3Translation: U uzoq kutish haqida shikoyat qildi.
extraExamples: Don’t moan about things you can change.
They moaned about the high prices.
He moaned about the traffic every day.
Stop moaning about small problems.
She moaned about her boss all evening.
Moaning about life won’t help.
The customers moaned about the service.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘zgartira oladigan narsalar haqida shikoyat qilmang.
Ular yuqori narxlar haqida shikoyat qilishdi.
U har kuni tirbandlik haqida shikoyat qilardi.
Kichik muammolar haqida shikoyat qilishni to‘xtating.
U butun kechqurun rahbari haqida shikoyat qildi.
Hayot haqida shikoyat qilish yordam bermaydi.
Mijozlar xizmat haqida shikoyat qilishdi.

words.word: On the spur of the moment
words.definition: Done impulsively, without prior planning.
words.definitionUz: Bir zumda — oldindan reja qilmasdan, to‘satdan qilingan.
words.example1: We decided to go on holiday on the spur of the moment.
words.example1Translation: Biz ta’tilga bir zumda qaror qildik.
words.example2: He bought the car on the spur of the moment.
words.example2Translation: U mashinani bir zumda sotib oldi.
words.example3: The idea came on the spur of the moment.
words.example3Translation: G‘oya bir zumda paydo bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: She kissed him on the spur of the moment.
On the spur of the moment, I called my old friend.
The trip was planned on the spur of the moment.
He quit his job on the spur of the moment.
Decisions on the spur of the moment can be risky.
She baked a cake on the spur of the moment.
They got married on the spur of the moment.
extraExampleTranslations: U uni bir zumda o‘pdi.
Bir zumda eski do‘stimga qo‘ng‘iroq qildim.
Sayohat bir zumda rejalashtirildi.
U bir zumda ishdan bo‘shadi.
Bir zumda qaror qilish xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.
U bir zumda tort tayyorladi.
Ular bir zumda turmush qurishdi.

words.word: To be on the same wavelength
words.definition: To understand or think in a similar way as someone else.
words.definitionUz: Bir xil to‘lqin uzunligida bo‘lmoq — boshqa birov bilan bir xil fikrlash yoki tushunish.
words.example1: We are on the same wavelength about the project.
words.example1Translation: Biz loyiha haqida bir xil fikrdamiz.
words.example2: She and I are always on the same wavelength.
words.example2Translation: U va men har doim bir xil to‘lqin uzunligidamiz.
words.example3: It’s great when you’re on the same wavelength with your partner.
words.example3Translation: Turmush o‘rtog‘ingiz bilan bir xil to‘lqin uzunligida bo‘lish juda yaxshi.
extraExamples: The team is on the same wavelength.
We weren’t on the same wavelength during the discussion.
Friends are often on the same wavelength.
It’s nice to work with someone on the same wavelength.
They quickly got on the same wavelength.
Being on the same wavelength makes communication easy.
The couple is on the same wavelength about family.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa bir xil fikrda.
Muhokama paytida biz bir xil fikrda emas edik.
Do‘stlar ko‘pincha bir xil to‘lqin uzunligida bo‘lishadi.
Bir xil to‘lqin uzunligidagi odam bilan ishlash yoqimli.
Ular tezda bir xil to‘lqin uzunligiga tushishdi.
Bir xil to‘lqin uzunligida bo‘lish aloqani osonlashtiradi.
Er-xotin oila haqida bir xil fikrda.

words.definition: To increase in strength, influence, or speed over time.
words.definitionUz: Tezlikni oshirmoq — vaqt o‘tishi bilan kuch, ta’sir yoki tezlikni oshirish.
words.example1: The campaign is gaining momentum.
words.example1Translation: Kampaniya tezlikni oshirmoqda.
words.example2: The movement gained momentum after the speech.
words.example2Translation: Harakat nutqdan keyin kuch oldi.
words.example3: The project is gaining momentum now.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha hozir tezlikni oshirmoqda.
extraExamples: The team gained momentum in the second half.
Her career is gaining momentum.
The idea is gaining momentum among young people.
Sales are gaining momentum this quarter.
The reform gained momentum slowly.
The protest gained momentum quickly.
Innovation is gaining momentum in the country.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa ikkinchi bo‘limda kuch oldi.
Uning karerasi kuchaymoqda.
G‘oya yoshlar orasida kuchaymoqda.
Bu chorakda savdo kuchaymoqda.
Islohot asta-sekin kuch oldi.
Norozilik namoyishi tez kuch oldi.
Innovatsiya mamlakatda kuchaymoqda.

words.definition: Relating to money, finance, or currency.
words.definitionUz: Pul bilan bog‘liq — pul, moliya yoki valyutaga oid.
words.example1: The monetary policy affects the economy.
words.example1Translation: Pul siyosati iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qiladi.
words.example2: Monetary rewards are important for motivation.
words.example2Translation: Pul mukofotlari motivatsiya uchun muhim.
words.example3: Monetary value of the painting is high.
words.example3Translation: Rasmning pul qiymati yuqori.
extraExamples: Monetary support was provided to the victims.
The monetary system needs reform.
Monetary issues dominate the discussion.
She received monetary compensation.
Monetary inflation is rising.
The monetary union benefits trade.
Monetary decisions are made by the central bank.
extraExampleTranslations: Qurbonlarga pul yordami berildi.
Pul tizimi islohotga muhtoj.
Muhokamada pul masalalari ustunlik qilmoqda.
U pul kompensatsiyasini oldi.
Pul inflyatsiyasi oshmoqda.
Pul ittifoqi savdoga foyda keltiradi.
Pul qarorlari markaziy bank tomonidan qabul qilinadi.

words.definition: To attribute one’s achievements to a particular cause, person, or factor.
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatingizni ... ga qarzdor bo‘lmoq — yutuqlaringizni ma’lum bir sabab, shaxs yoki omilga bog‘lash.
words.example1: I owe my success to hard work and dedication.
words.example1Translation: Muvaffaqiyatimni qattiq mehnat va sadoqatga qarzdorman.
words.example2: She owes her success to her teacher’s guidance.
words.example2Translation: U muvaffaqiyatini o‘qituvchisining yo‘l-yo‘rig‘iga qarzdor.
words.example3: The team owes its success to teamwork.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa muvaffaqiyatini jamoaviy ishga qarzdor.
extraExamples: He owes his success to his parents.
We owe our success to the support of our fans.
She owes her success to years of practice.
The company owes its success to innovation.
I owe my success to good mentors.
They owe their success to luck and hard work.
The artist owes her success to originality.
extraExampleTranslations: U muvaffaqiyatini ota-onasiga qarzdor.
Biz muvaffaqiyatimizni muxlislarimizning qo‘llab-quvvatlashiga qarzdormiz.
U muvaffaqiyatini yillar davomidagi mashqlarga qarzdor.
Kompaniya muvaffaqiyatini innovatsiyaga qarzdor.
Men muvaffaqiyatimni yaxshi ustozlarga qarzdorman.
Ular muvaffaqiyatlarini omad va qattiq mehnatga qarzdorlar.
Rassom muvaffaqiyatini o‘ziga xosligiga qarzdor.

words.definition: Lacking ethical principles or a sense of right and wrong.
words.definitionUz: Axloqsiz bo‘lmoq — axloqiy tamoyillar yoki to‘g‘ri va noto‘g‘ri tuyg‘usiga ega bo‘lmaslik.
words.example1: He has no morals and will do anything for money.
words.example1Translation: U axloqsiz va pul uchun hamma narsani qiladi.
words.example2: People with no morals harm society.
words.example2Translation: Axloqsiz odamlar jamiyatga zarar yetkazadi.
words.example3: She believes politicians have no morals.
words.example3Translation: U siyosatchilarning axloqsiz ekanligiga ishonadi.
extraExamples: The criminal has no morals.
Having no morals leads to bad decisions.
He acts like he has no morals.
Society suffers when leaders have no morals.
She was shocked by his lack of morals.
People with no morals often lie and cheat.
The story is about a man with no morals.
extraExampleTranslations: Jinoyatchi axloqsiz.
Axloqsizlik yomon qarorlarga olib keladi.
U o‘zini axloqsizdek tutadi.
Rahbarlar axloqsiz bo‘lsa, jamiyat azob chekadi.
Uning axloqsizligidan u hayratda qoldi.
Axloqsiz odamlar ko‘pincha yolg‘on gapirishadi va aldashadi.
Hikoya axloqsiz odam haqida.

words.definition: Actions taken to reduce the risk of harm or undesirable outcomes.
words.definitionUz: Oldini olish choralari — zarar yoki istalmagan natijalarning oldini olish uchun ko‘riladigan harakatlar.
words.example1: Preventive measures against COVID-19 include wearing masks.
words.example1Translation: COVID-19 ga qarshi oldini olish choralari orasida niqob taqish bor.
words.example2: The government introduced preventive measures to stop crime.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat jinoyatchilikning oldini olish choralarni joriy qildi.
words.example3: Taking preventive measures can save lives.
words.example3Translation: Oldini olish choralari hayotni saqlab qolishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Preventive measures are cheaper than treatment.
Doctors recommend preventive measures for health.
The school took preventive measures against bullying.
Preventive measures helped reduce accidents.
We need better preventive measures for floods.
Preventive measures include regular exercise.
The company implemented preventive measures for data security.
extraExampleTranslations: Oldini olish choralari davolashdan arzonroq.
Shifokorlar sog‘liq uchun oldini olish choralarni tavsiya qilishadi.
Maktab zo‘ravonlikning oldini olish choralarni ko‘rdi.
Oldini olish choralari avtohalokatlarni kamaytirishga yordam berdi.
Biz suv toshqinlariga qarshi yaxshiroq oldini olish choralari kerak.
Oldini olish choralari orasida muntazam sport bor.
Kompaniya ma’lumotlar xavfsizligi uchun oldini olish choralarni amalga oshirdi.

words.definition: The frequency or proportion of deaths in a specific population over a period.
words.definitionUz: O‘lim darajasi — ma’lum bir aholi guruhida ma’lum vaqt ichida o‘limlarning chastotasi yoki ulushi.
words.example1: The mortality rate has decreased due to better healthcare.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi tibbiy yordam tufayli o‘lim darajasi pasaydi.
words.example2: Infant mortality rate is an important health indicator.
words.example2Translation: Chaqaloqlar o‘lim darajasi muhim sog‘liq ko‘rsatkichi.
words.example3: The mortality rate from heart disease is high.
words.example3Translation: Yurak kasalligidan o‘lim darajasi yuqori.
extraExamples: The mortality rate rose during the pandemic.
Governments try to lower the mortality rate.
The study shows a decline in mortality rate.
Mortality rate varies by age and gender.
Traffic accidents contribute to the mortality rate.
The mortality rate in that region is alarming.
Improving nutrition can reduce mortality rate.
extraExampleTranslations: Pandemiya paytida o‘lim darajasi oshdi.
Hukumatlar o‘lim darajasini pasaytirishga harakat qilishadi.
Tadqiqot o‘lim darajasining pasayganini ko‘rsatmoqda.
O‘lim darajasi yosh va jinsga qarab farq qiladi.
Yo‘l-transport hodisalari o‘lim darajasiga hissa qo‘shadi.
O‘sha mintaqadagi o‘lim darajasi xavotirli.
Ovqatlanishni yaxshilash o‘lim darajasini kamaytirishi mumkin.

words.definition: Under no circumstances; absolutely not.
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday holatda — hech qanday sharoitda; mutlaqo yo‘q.
words.example1: On no account should you open the door to strangers.
words.example1Translation: Hech qanday holatda begonalarga eshikni ochmang.
words.example2: On no account will I accept that offer.
words.example2Translation: Men hech qanday holatda o‘sha taklifni qabul qilmayman.
words.example3: On no account leave the child alone.
words.example3Translation: Hech qanday holatda bolani yolg‘iz qoldirmang.
extraExamples: On no account touch the wires.
On no account tell anyone about this.
On no account miss the deadline.
On no account should you drive after drinking.
On no account borrow money from him.
On no account ignore the warning signs.
On no account give up on your dreams.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech qanday holatda simlarga tegmang.
Hech qanday holatda bu haqda hech kimga aytmang.
Hech qanday holatda muddatni o‘tkazib yubormang.
Hech qanday holatda ichib mashina haydamang.
Hech qanday holatda undan pul qarz olmang.
Hech qanday holatda ogohlantirish belgilari e’tiborsiz qoldirmang.
Hech qanday holatda orzularingizdan voz kechmang.

words.definition: Nausea or discomfort caused by movement, typically in a vehicle.
words.definitionUz: Harakat kasalligi — odatda transportda harakat tufayli ko‘ngil aynishi yoki noqulaylik.
words.example1: She suffers from motion sickness on long trips.
words.example1Translation: U uzoq sayohatlarda harakat kasalligidan aziyat chekadi.
words.example2: Motion sickness medicine helped him feel better.
words.example2Translation: Harakat kasalligi dorisi unga yengillik berdi.
words.example3: Reading in the car can cause motion sickness.
words.example3Translation: Mashinada kitob o‘qish harakat kasalligini keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Motion sickness is common on boats.
Children are more prone to motion sickness.
He gets motion sickness on airplanes.
Prevent motion sickness by sitting in the front.
Motion sickness ruined her vacation.
There are natural remedies for motion sickness.
Motion sickness symptoms include dizziness.
extraExampleTranslations: Harakat kasalligi kemalarda keng tarqalgan.
Bolalar harakat kasalligiga ko‘proq moyil.
U samolyotda harakat kasalligini boshdan kechiradi.
Old o‘rindiqda o‘tirib harakat kasalligining oldini oling.
Harakat kasalligi uning ta’tilini buzdi.
Harakat kasalligiga tabiiy vositalar bor.
Harakat kasalligi alomatlariga bosh aylanishi kiradi.

words.definition: To formally suggest a course of action, usually in a meeting or legislative setting.
words.definitionUz: Taklif kiritmoq — odatda yig‘ilish yoki qonunchilik muhitida biror harakat yo‘nalishini rasmiy ravishda taklif qilish.
words.example1: The member proposed a motion to change the rules.
words.example1Translation: A’zo qoidalarni o‘zgartirish haqida taklif kiritdi.
words.example2: She proposed a motion for more funding.
words.example2Translation: U ko‘proq mablag‘ ajratish haqida taklif kiritdi.
words.example3: The chairman asked if anyone wanted to propose a motion.
words.example3Translation: Rais kimdir taklif kiritmoqchimi deb so‘radi.
extraExamples: He proposed a motion to adjourn the meeting.
The motion proposed by the opposition was rejected.
Propose a motion if you have a good idea.
The committee will vote on the proposed motion.
She proposed a motion for environmental protection.
Proposing a motion requires preparation.
The motion to increase taxes was proposed.
extraExampleTranslations: U yig‘ilishni tugatish haqida taklif kiritdi.
Muxolifat kiritgan taklif rad etildi.
Yaxshi g‘oyangiz bo‘lsa, taklif kiriting.
Qo‘mita kiritilgan taklif bo‘yicha ovoz beradi.
U atrof-muhitni himoya qilish haqida taklif kiritdi.
Taklif kiritish tayyorgarlikni talab qiladi.
Soliqlarni oshirish haqida taklif kiritildi.

words.definition: Likely or expected to happen.
words.definitionUz: Ehtimol bor — sodir bo‘lishi ehtimoli yuqori yoki kutilayotgan.
words.example1: A promotion is on the cards for her.
words.example1Translation: Uning lavozim oshirishi ehtimoli bor.
words.example2: Another lockdown is on the cards.
words.example2Translation: Yana bir karantin ehtimoli bor.
words.example3: Success is on the cards if you work hard.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq mehnat qilsangiz, muvaffaqiyat ehtimoli bor.
extraExamples: A move to a new city is on the cards.
Winning the award is on the cards for him.
A price increase is on the cards next month.
Reconciliation is on the cards.
A breakthrough is on the cards soon.
Retirement is on the cards for him next year.
It’s on the cards that they will get married.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi shaharga ko‘chish ehtimoli bor.
Mukofotni yutish uning uchun ehtimol bor.
Kelasi oy narxlar oshishi ehtimoli bor.
Yarashish ehtimoli bor.
Tez orada muhim yutuq ehtimoli bor.
Uning kelasi yil nafaqaga chiqishi ehtimoli bor.
Ularning turmush qurishi ehtimoli bor.

words.definition: To provoke a strong emotional reaction.
words.definitionUz: Og‘riqli joyga teginmoq — kuchli emotsional reaktsiyani uyg‘otish.
words.example1: His comment hit a nerve.
words.example1Translation: Uning izohi og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
words.example2: The question about her family hit a nerve.
words.example2Translation: Oilasi haqidagi savol og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
words.example3: The movie hit a nerve with many viewers.
words.example3Translation: Film ko‘plab tomoshabinlarning og‘riqli joyiga tegdi.
extraExamples: Her criticism hit a nerve.
The joke hit a nerve and he got angry.
Talking about money always hits a nerve.
The news hit a nerve in the community.
His words hit a nerve she didn’t know existed.
The documentary hit a nerve worldwide.
Don’t hit a nerve with your questions.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning tanqidi og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
Hazil og‘riqli joyga tegib u g‘azablandi.
Pul haqida gapirish har doim og‘riqli joyga tegadi.
Yangilik jamoada og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
Uning so‘zlari u bilmagan og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
Hujjatli film butun dunyoda og‘riqli joyga tegdi.
Savollaringiz bilan og‘riqli joyga tegmang.

words.definition: To organise and launch a concerted effort to achieve a goal.
words.definitionUz: Kampaniya o‘tkazmoq — maqsadga erishish uchun birgalikda harakatlarni tashkil qilish va boshlash.
words.example1: The charity mounted a campaign to raise funds.
words.example1Translation: Xayriya tashkiloti mablag‘ yig‘ish uchun kampaniya o‘tkazdi.
words.example2: They mounted a campaign against pollution.
words.example2Translation: Ular ifloslanishga qarshi kampaniya o‘tkazishdi.
words.example3: The government mounted a campaign to promote health.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat sog‘liqni targ‘ib qilish uchun kampaniya o‘tkazdi.
extraExamples: The company mounted a campaign to attract customers.
Activists mounted a campaign for human rights.
She mounted a campaign to save the forest.
The party mounted a successful election campaign.
Mounting a campaign requires planning.
They mounted a campaign to raise awareness.
The school mounted a campaign against bullying.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya mijozlarni jalb qilish uchun kampaniya o‘tkazdi.
Faollar inson huquqlari uchun kampaniya o‘tkazishdi.
U o‘rmonni saqlab qolish uchun kampaniya o‘tkazdi.
Partiya muvaffaqiyatli saylov kampaniyasini o‘tkazdi.
Kampaniya o‘tkazish rejalashtirishni talab qiladi.
Ular xabardorlikni oshirish uchun kampaniya o‘tkazishdi.
Maktab zo‘ravonlikka qarshi kampaniya o‘tkazdi.

words.definition: Occurring or achieved very quickly or unexpectedly.
words.definitionUz: Bir kechada — juda tez yoki kutilmaganda sodir bo‘ladigan yoki erishiladigan.
words.example1: She became famous overnight.
words.example1Translation: U bir kechada mashhur bo‘lib qoldi.
words.example2: The situation changed overnight.
words.example2Translation: Vaziyat bir kechada o‘zgardi.
words.example3: The success didn’t happen overnight.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyat bir kechada sodir bo‘lmadi.
extraExamples: The city grew overnight.
He solved the problem overnight.
Prices rose overnight.
The decision was made overnight.
Overnight success is rare.
The medicine worked overnight.
The team improved overnight.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar bir kechada o‘sdi.
U muammoni bir kechada hal qildi.
Narxlar bir kechada oshdi.
Qaror bir kechada qabul qilindi.
Bir kechada muvaffaqiyat kam uchraydi.
Dori bir kechada ta’sir qildi.
Jamoa bir kechada yaxshilandi.

words.definition: To show audacity or courage to do something bold or challenging.
words.definitionUz: Jasorat qilmoq — jasorat ko‘rsatib, dadil yoki qiyin ishni bajarish.
words.example1: She had the nerve to ask for a raise.
words.example1Translation: U maoshni oshirishni so‘rashga jasorat qildi.
words.example2: He didn’t have the nerve to tell the truth.
words.example2Translation: U haqiqatni aytishga jasorat qilmadi.
words.example3: How did you have the nerve to say that?
words.example3Translation: Buni aytishga qanday jasorat qilding?
extraExamples: She had the nerve to challenge the boss.
He had the nerve to arrive late again.
They had the nerve to complain.
I don’t have the nerve to speak in public.
She had the nerve to wear that outfit.
He had the nerve to ask for help after everything.
Few people have the nerve to take such risks.
extraExampleTranslations: U rahbarga qarshi chiqishga jasorat qildi.
U yana kech qolishga jasorat qildi.
Ular shikoyat qilishga jasorat qilishdi.
Men omma oldida gapirishga jasorat qilmayman.
U o‘sha kiyimni kiyishga jasorat qildi.
U hamma narsadan keyin yordam so‘rashga jasorat qildi.
Kam odam bunday xavflarga dosh berishga jasorat qiladi.

words.definition: To be close to a particular state or event.
words.definitionUz: Chegarasida bo‘lmoq — ma’lum bir holat yoki voqeaga yaqin bo‘lish.
words.example1: The company is on the verge of bankruptcy.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya bankrotlik chegarasida.
words.example2: She was on the verge of tears.
words.example2Translation: U yig‘lash chegarasida edi.
words.example3: The country is on the verge of a breakthrough.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakat muhim yutuq chegarasida.
extraExamples: He is on the verge of giving up.
The project is on the verge of success.
The team was on the verge of victory.
She is on the verge of a big discovery.
The economy is on the verge of collapse.
They are on the verge of signing the contract.
I was on the verge of calling the police.
extraExampleTranslations: U taslim bo‘lish chegarasida.
Loyiha muvaffaqiyat chegarasida.
Jamoa g‘alaba chegarasida edi.
U katta kashfiyot chegarasida.
Iqtisodiyot qulash chegarasida.
Ular shartnomani imzolash chegarasida.
Men politsiyaga qo‘ng‘iroq qilish chegarasida edim.

words.definition: Failure by healthcare professionals to provide adequate care, resulting in harm.
words.definitionUz: Tibbiy beparvolik — tibbiyot xodimlarining yetarli yordam ko‘rsatmasligi va zarar yetkazishi.
words.example1: The patient sued the hospital for medical negligence.
words.example1Translation: Bemor tibbiy beparvolik uchun shifoxonani sudga berdi.
words.example2: Medical negligence can have serious consequences.
words.example2Translation: Tibbiy beparvolik jiddiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: The doctor was accused of medical negligence.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor tibbiy beparvolikda ayblandi.
extraExamples: Medical negligence cases are increasing.
Victims of medical negligence deserve compensation.
Preventing medical negligence is important.
The report highlighted cases of medical negligence.
Medical negligence affects trust in healthcare.
She specializes in medical negligence law.
Medical negligence led to the patient’s death.
extraExampleTranslations: Tibbiy beparvolik holatlari ko‘paymoqda.
Tibbiy beparvolik qurbonlari kompensatsiyaga loyiq.
Tibbiy beparvolikning oldini olish muhim.
Hisobot tibbiy beparvolik holatlarini ta’kidlagan.
Tibbiy beparvolik tibbiyotga bo‘lgan ishonchni buzadi.
U tibbiy beparvolik huquqi bo‘yicha mutaxassis.
Tibbiy beparvolik bemorning o‘limiga olib keldi.

words.definition: To coincide partially in time, space, or content.
words.definitionUz: Bir-biriga mos kelmoq — vaqt, makon yoki mazmun jihatidan qisman bir-biriga to‘g‘ri kelish.
words.example1: Our schedules overlap on Tuesdays.
words.example1Translation: Bizning jadvalimiz seshanba kunlari bir-biriga mos keladi.
words.example2: The two projects overlap in several areas.
words.example2Translation: Ikki loyiha bir necha sohada bir-biriga mos keladi.
words.example3: The circles on the diagram overlap.
words.example3Translation: Diagrammadagi doiralar bir-biriga mos keladi.
extraExamples: Their responsibilities overlap.
The meetings overlap by 30 minutes.
The stories overlap in interesting ways.
The seasons overlap slightly.
The research areas overlap.
Her interests overlap with mine.
The dates overlap, so we need to adjust.
extraExampleTranslations: Ularning mas’uliyatlari bir-biriga mos keladi.
Yig‘ilishlar 30 daqiqa bir-biriga mos keladi.
Hikoyalar qiziqarli tarzda bir-biriga mos keladi.
Fasllar biroz bir-biriga mos keladi.
Tadqiqot sohalari bir-biriga mos keladi.
Uning qiziqishlari menikiga mos keladi.
Sanalar bir-biriga mos keladi, shuning uchun moslashtirishimiz kerak.

words.definition: Expenditure that is unnecessary or avoidable.
words.definitionUz: Keraksiz xarajat — zarur bo‘lmagan yoki oldini olish mumkin bo‘lgan xarajat.
words.example1: Buying that was a needless expense.
words.example1Translation: Buni sotib olish keraksiz xarajat edi.
words.example2: We should avoid needless expenses.
words.example2Translation: Keraksiz xarajatlardan qochishimiz kerak.
words.example3: The trip involved many needless expenses.
words.example3Translation: Sayohat ko‘plab keraksiz xarajatlarni o‘z ichiga oldi.
extraExamples: Repairing it would be a needless expense.
Cutting needless expenses can save money.
The party was full of needless expenses.
She regretted the needless expense.
Needless expenses add up quickly.
The manager reduced needless expenses.
It’s better to avoid needless expenses.
extraExampleTranslations: Uni ta’mirlash keraksiz xarajat bo‘lardi.
Keraksiz xarajatlarni qisqartirish pul tejashga yordam beradi.
Ziyofat ko‘plab keraksiz xarajatlardan iborat edi.
U keraksiz xarajatdan pushaymon bo‘ldi.
Keraksiz xarajatlar tez to‘planadi.
Rahbar keraksiz xarajatlarni kamaytirdi.
Keraksiz xarajatlardan qochgan yaxshi.

words.definition: To counterbalance or compensate for something.
words.definitionUz: Qoplamoq — biror narsani muvozanatlash yoki qoplash.
words.example1: The gains offset the losses.
words.example1Translation: Daromadlar yo‘qotishlarni qoplab berdi.
words.example2: Higher prices were offset by increased sales.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori narxlar sotuvning oshishi bilan qoplandi.
words.example3: The benefits offset the disadvantages.
words.example3Translation: Afzalliklar kamchiliklarni qoplab berdi.
extraExamples: The discount offsets the shipping cost.
Extra work offset the low pay.
The positive reviews offset the negative ones.
Carbon offset programs help the environment.
The new feature offsets the higher price.
Her smile offset her tiredness.
The company uses green energy to offset emissions.
extraExampleTranslations: Chegirma yetkazib berish xarajatini qoplaydi.
Qo‘shimcha ish past maoshni qoplab berdi.
Ijobiy sharhlar salbiy sharhlarni qoplab berdi.
Uglerod qoplash dasturlari atrof-muhitga yordam beradi.
Yangi xususiyat yuqori narxni qoplaydi.
Uning tabassumi charchoqni qoplab berdi.
Kompaniya emissiyalarni qoplash uchun yashil energiyadan foydalanadi.

words.definition: Regardless of cost, effort, or consequences.
words.definitionUz: Har qanday narxda — xarajat, kuch yoki oqibatlaridan qat’i nazar.
words.example1: She wanted to win at any price.
words.example1Translation: U har qanday narxda g‘alaba qilmoqchi edi.
words.example2: We must protect the environment at any price.
words.example2Translation: Biz atrof-muhitni har qanday narxda himoya qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3: He pursued success at any price.
words.example3Translation: U muvaffaqiyatni har qanday narxda ta’qib qildi.
extraExamples: Peace must be achieved at any price.
Don’t compromise your values at any price.
The team wanted the championship at any price.
She fought for justice at any price.
Freedom is worth fighting for at any price.
He was determined to succeed at any price.
The company expanded at any price.
extraExampleTranslations: Tinchlikni har qanday narxda erishish kerak.
Qadriyatlaringizni hech qanday narxda qurbon qilmang.
Jamoa chempionlikni har qanday narxda xohlaydi.
U adolat uchun har qanday narxda kurashdi.
Ozodlik har qanday narxda kurashishga arziydi.
U har qanday narxda muvaffaqiyatga erishishga qat’iy qaror qilgan edi.
Kompaniya har qanday narxda kengaydi.

words.definition: Increasing stress, strain, or anxiety in a situation.
words.definitionUz: Kuchayib borayotgan taranglik — vaziyatdagi kuchayib borayotgan stress, zo‘riqish yoki xavotir.
words.example1: There is mounting tension between the two countries.
words.example1Translation: Ikki mamlakat o‘rtasida kuchayib borayotgan taranglik bor.
words.example2: Mounting tension in the office made everyone nervous.
words.example2Translation: Ofisdagi kuchayib borayotgan taranglik hammani asabiy qildi.
words.example3: The mounting tension before the exam was palpable.
words.example3Translation: Imtihon oldidagi kuchayib borayotgan taranglik sezilib turardi.
extraExamples: Mounting tension led to the argument.
There is mounting tension in the market.
The mounting tension was relieved by the news.
Mounting tension between the players affected the game.
She felt the mounting tension at home.
Mounting tension in politics worries citizens.
The film builds mounting tension effectively.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchayib borayotgan taranglik bahsga olib keldi.
Bozorda kuchayib borayotgan taranglik bor.
Kuchayib borayotgan taranglik yangilik bilan yengillashdi.
O‘yinchilar o‘rtasidagi kuchayib borayotgan taranglik o‘yinga ta’sir qildi.
U uyidagi kuchayib borayotgan taranglikni his qildi.
Siyosatdagi kuchayib borayotgan taranglik fuqarolarni tashvishga solmoqda.
Film kuchayib borayotgan taranglikni samarali yaratadi.

words.definition: Products that are faulty or fail to meet required standards.
words.definitionUz: Nuqsanli tovarlar — nuqsonli yoki talab qilinadigan standartlarga javob bermaydigan mahsulotlar.
words.example1: The store refunded the money for the defective goods.
words.example1Translation: Do‘kon nuqsanli tovarlar uchun pulni qaytardi.
words.example2: Defective goods can damage a company’s reputation.
words.example2Translation: Nuqsanli tovarlar kompaniya obro‘siga putur yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3: Customers complained about the defective goods.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlar nuqsanli tovarlar haqida shikoyat qilishdi.
extraExamples: The factory recalled all defective goods.
Selling defective goods is illegal.
Defective goods were returned to the supplier.
The company replaced the defective goods.
Defective goods caused many complaints.
Quality control prevents defective goods.
The defective goods were destroyed.
extraExampleTranslations: Zavod barcha nuqsanli tovarlarni qaytardi.
Nuqsanli tovarlarni sotish noqonuniy.
Nuqsanli tovarlar yetkazib beruvchiga qaytarildi.
Kompaniya nuqsanli tovarlarni almashtirdi.
Nuqsanli tovarlar ko‘plab shikoyatlarga sabab bo‘ldi.
Sifat nazorati nuqsanli tovarlarning oldini oladi.
Nuqsanli tovarlar yo‘q qilindi.

words.definition: To pass a thread through the eye of a needle; metaphorically, to navigate a difficult task with precision.
words.definitionUz: Ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazmoq — ipni igna teshigidan o‘tkazish; majoziy ma’noda qiyin vazifani aniqlik bilan bajarish.
words.example1: Threading a needle requires good eyesight.
words.example1Translation: Ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazish yaxshi ko‘rish qobiliyatini talab qiladi.
words.example2: She threaded the needle carefully.
words.example2Translation: U ipni igna ko‘zidan ehtiyotkorlik bilan o‘tkazdi.
words.example3: Navigating the negotiations was like threading a needle.
words.example3Translation: Muzokaralarni olib borish ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazishga o‘xshardi.
extraExamples: He managed to thread the needle in the dark.
Threading a needle is harder with old eyes.
The surgeon threaded the needle with precision.
She struggled to thread the needle.
Metaphorically, he threaded the needle of politics.
Thread the needle and start sewing.
It’s like trying to thread a needle in a storm.
extraExampleTranslations: U qorong‘ida ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazishga muvaffaq bo‘ldi.
Eski ko‘zlar bilan ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazish qiyinroq.
Jarroh ipni igna ko‘zidan aniqlik bilan o‘tkazdi.
U ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazishga qiynaldi.
Majoziy ma’noda u siyosat ignasidan ip o‘tkazdi.
Ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazing va tikishni boshlang.
Bu bo‘ronda ipni igna ko‘zidan o‘tkazishga o‘xshaydi.

words.definition: To get onto a horse, often implying readiness to ride.
words.definitionUz: Otga minmoq — otga chiqish, ko‘pincha sayrga tayyorlikni bildiradi.
words.example1: He mounted the horse and rode away.
words.example1Translation: U otga minib jo‘nab ketdi.
words.example2: It’s time to mount the horse and continue the journey.
words.example2Translation: Otga minib sayohatni davom ettirish vaqti keldi.
words.example3: She learned how to mount the horse safely.
words.example3Translation: U otga xavfsiz minishni o‘rgandi.
extraExamples: The knight mounted the horse quickly.
Mount the horse and follow me.
He mounted the horse despite his fear.
She mounted the horse with ease.
Mounting the horse takes practice.
The cowboy mounted the horse in one smooth motion.
They mounted their horses at dawn.
extraExampleTranslations: Ritsar otga tez minidi.
Otga mining va orqamdan keling.
U qo‘rquviga qaramay otga minidi.
U otga osonlik bilan minidi.
Otga minish mashq talab qiladi.
Kovboy otga bir harakatda minidi.
Ular otlariga tongda minishdi.

words.definition: To hurry or proceed more quickly.
words.definitionUz: Tezroq harakatlanmoq — shoshilish yoki tezroq oldinga siljish.
words.example1: Get a move on or we’ll be late!
words.example1Translation: Tezroq harakatlan, aks holda kechikamiz!
words.example2: We need to get a move on with this project.
words.example2Translation: Bu loyihani tezroq davom ettirishimiz kerak.
words.example3: Come on, get a move on!
words.example3Translation: Tezroq harakatlaning!
extraExamples: Get a move on — the train is leaving soon.
She told the kids to get a move on.
We must get a move on if we want to finish today.
Get a move on with your homework.
The boss said to get a move on.
Let’s get a move on before it rains.
He finally got a move on and started working.
extraExampleTranslations: Tezroq harakatlaning — poyezd tez orada jo‘naydi.
U bolalarga tezroq harakatlanishni aytdi.
Bugun tugatmoqchi bo‘lsak, tezroq harakatlanishimiz kerak.
Uy vazifangizni tezroq bajaring.
Rahbar tezroq harakatlanishni aytdi.
Yomg‘ir yog‘ishidan oldin tezroq harakatlanaylik.
U nihoyat tezroq harakatlanib ishlay boshladi.

words.definition: Unattractive or discouraging, causing aversion or discomfort.
words.definitionUz: Bezovta qiluvchi — yoqimsiz yoki tushkunlikka soluvchi, nafrat yoki noqulaylik tug‘diruvchi.
words.example1: His rude behavior was very off-putting.
words.example1Translation: Uning qo‘pol xatti-harakati juda bezovta qilardi.
words.example2: The strong smell was off-putting.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli hid bezovta qilardi.
words.example3: The dark colors in the room felt off-putting.
words.example3Translation: Xonadagi qorong‘u ranglar bezovta qilardi.
extraExamples: Her tone was off-putting during the conversation.
The messy office was off-putting to clients.
Off-putting attitudes can ruin relationships.
The advertisement was strangely off-putting.
His arrogance is very off-putting.
The cold weather was off-putting for outdoor activities.
The long wait was off-putting for customers.
extraExampleTranslations: Suhbat paytida uning ohangi bezovta qilardi.
Tarashsiz ofis mijozlarni bezovta qilardi.
Bezovta qiluvchi munosabatlar munosabatlarni buzishi mumkin.
Reklama g‘alati tarzda bezovta qilardi.
Uning takabburligi juda bezovta qiladi.
Sovuq ob-havo ochiq havoda mashg‘ulotlar uchun bezovta qilardi.
Uzoq kutish mijozlarni bezovta qilardi.

words.word: To be not up to much
words.definition: To be of little quality, importance, or value.
words.definitionUz: Unchalik yaxshi emas — sifati, ahamiyati yoki qiymati past bo‘lish.
words.example1: The movie was not up to much.
words.example1Translation: Film unchalik yaxshi emas edi.
words.example2: His latest book is not up to much.
words.example2Translation: Uning so‘nggi kitobi unchalik ahamiyatli emas.
words.example3: The food was not up to much.
words.example3Translation: Ovqat unchalik mazali emas edi.
extraExamples: The party was not up to much.
Her performance was not up to much.
The hotel was not up to much.
This year’s harvest is not up to much.
The meeting was not up to much.
His excuse was not up to much.
The weather was not up to much today.
extraExampleTranslations: Ziyofat unchalik yaxshi emas edi.
Uning ijrosi unchalik yaxshi emas edi.
Mehmonxona unchalik yaxshi emas edi.
Bu yilgi hosil unchalik yaxshi emas.
Yig‘ilish unchalik samarali emas edi.
Uning bahonasi unchalik ishonarli emas edi.
Bugun ob-havo unchalik yaxshi emas edi.

words.definition: To suppress one’s ego or pride in order to accept a situation or reconcile.
words.definitionUz: G‘ururingizni yutib yubormoq — vaziyatni qabul qilish yoki yarashish uchun o‘z takabburligingizni bosish.
words.example1: He had to swallow his pride and apologize.
words.example1Translation: U g‘ururini yutib uzr so‘rashga majbur bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Sometimes you need to swallow your pride.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zida g‘ururingizni yutib yuborish kerak.
words.example3: She swallowed her pride and asked for help.
words.example3Translation: U g‘ururini yutib yordam so‘radi.
extraExamples: Swallow your pride and admit you were wrong.
He swallowed his pride to save the relationship.
Swallowing your pride can be difficult.
She swallowed her pride and returned the gift.
They had to swallow their pride after the defeat.
Swallow your pride and learn from the mistake.
He finally swallowed his pride and called her.
extraExampleTranslations: G‘ururingizni yutib, xato qilganingizni tan oling.
U munosabatlarni saqlab qolish uchun g‘ururini yutdi.
G‘ururingizni yutish qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
U g‘ururini yutib sovg‘ani qaytardi.
Ular mag‘lubiyatdan keyin g‘ururlarini yutishga majbur bo‘lishdi.
G‘ururingizni yutib xatodan saboq oling.
U nihoyat g‘ururini yutib unga qo‘ng‘iroq qildi.

words.definition: To hear a conversation unintentionally.
words.definitionUz: Tasodifan eshitmoq — suhbatni ataylab emas, tasodifan eshitib qolish.
words.example1: I overheard them talking about the surprise party.
words.example1Translation: Men ularning syurpriz ziyofat haqida gaplashayotganini tasodifan eshitdim.
words.example2: She overheard the boss criticizing her work.
words.example2Translation: U rahbarning uning ishini tanqid qilayotganini tasodifan eshitdi.
words.example3: He overheard the secret by accident.
words.example3Translation: U sirni tasodifan eshitib qoldi.
extraExamples: The children overheard their parents arguing.
I overheard the news in the café.
She overheard the plan and was excited.
Don’t worry if you overhear something.
He overheard the meeting from the next room.
Overhearing gossip is common in offices.
I overheard her saying she was leaving.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar ota-onalarining bahslashayotganini tasodifan eshitishdi.
Men kafeda yangilikni tasodifan eshitdim.
U rejamani tasodifan eshitib hayajonlandi.
Agar biror narsani tasodifan eshitsangiz, tashvishlanmang.
U yig‘ilishni qo‘shni xonadan tasodifan eshitdi.
Ofislarda g‘iybatni tasodifan eshitish odatiy hol.
Men uning ketayotganini tasodifan eshitdim.

words.definition: A situation characterised by confusion or disorder.
words.definitionUz: Katta chalkashlik bo‘ldi — chalkashlik yoki tartibsizlik bilan tavsiflanadigan vaziyat.
words.example1: There was a big muddle with the bookings.
words.example1Translation: Bronlar bilan katta chalkashlik bo‘ldi.
words.example2: The instructions caused a big muddle.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘rsatmalar katta chalkashlikka sabab bo‘ldi.
words.example3: There was a big muddle at the airport.
words.example3Translation: Aeroportda katta chalkashlik bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: There was a big muddle over the dates.
The meeting turned into a big muddle.
A big muddle occurred with the payments.
The files were in a big muddle.
There was a big muddle in the kitchen.
The change caused a big muddle.
We sorted out the big muddle eventually.
extraExampleTranslations: Sanalar bilan katta chalkashlik bo‘ldi.
Yig‘ilish katta chalkashlikka aylandi.
To‘lovlar bilan katta chalkashlik yuz berdi.
Fayllar katta chalkashlikda edi.
Oshxonada katta chalkashlik bo‘ldi.
O‘zgarish katta chalkashlikka sabab bo‘ldi.
Biz nihoyat katta chalkashlikni hal qildik.

words.definition: In close competition, with little to separate the competitors.
words.definitionUz: Boshma-bosh — raqobatda juda yaqin, farq juda oz bo‘lgan holat.
words.example1: The two teams are neck and neck.
words.example1Translation: Ikki jamoa boshma-bosh.
words.example2: They are running neck and neck in the election.
words.example2Translation: Ular saylovda boshma-bosh kurashmoqda.
words.example3: The horses finished neck and neck.
words.example3Translation: Otlar boshma-bosh yakunlashdi.
extraExamples: The candidates are neck and neck.
Sales are neck and neck with last year.
We are neck and neck in the race.
The scores are neck and neck.
The two companies are neck and neck.
They were neck and neck until the end.
The debate was neck and neck.
extraExampleTranslations: Nomzodlar boshma-bosh.
Sotuv o‘tgan yil bilan boshma-bosh.
Biz poygada boshma-boshmiz.
Hisoblar boshma-bosh.
Ikki kompaniya boshma-bosh.
Ular oxirigacha boshma-bosh edilar.
Bahslashuv boshma-bosh edi.

words.definition: In a remote, unusual, or less-known location.
words.definitionUz: Odam kam boradigan joy — olis, g‘ayrioddiy yoki kam ma’lum joyda.
words.example1: We found a beautiful village off the beaten track.
words.example1Translation: Biz odam kam boradigan go‘zal qishloqni topdik.
words.example2: The restaurant is off the beaten track but worth visiting.
words.example2Translation: Restoran odam kam boradigan joyda, lekin borishga arziydi.
words.example3: They like traveling off the beaten track.
words.example3Translation: Ular odam kam boradigan joylarga sayohat qilishni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
extraExamples: The beach is off the beaten track.
We discovered a cafe off the beaten track.
Off the beaten track places are more peaceful.
She prefers destinations off the beaten track.
The temple is off the beaten track.
Exploring off the beaten track is adventurous.
The hotel is a bit off the beaten track.
extraExampleTranslations: Plyaj odam kam boradigan joyda.
Biz odam kam boradigan kafeni topdik.
Odam kam boradigan joylar tinchroq.
U odam kam boradigan manzillarni afzal ko‘radi.
Ibodatxona odam kam boradigan joyda.
Odam kam boradigan joylarni o‘rganish sarguzashtli.
Mehmonxona biroz odam kam boradigan joyda.

words.definition: Confused or unclear reasoning.
words.definitionUz: Chalkash fikrlash — chalkash yoki noaniq mulohaza yuritish.
words.example1: His muddled thinking led to poor decisions.
words.example1Translation: Uning chalkash fikrlashi yomon qarorlarga olib keldi.
words.example2: Muddled thinking won’t solve the problem.
words.example2Translation: Chalkash fikrlash muammoni hal qilmaydi.
words.example3: The stress caused muddled thinking.
words.example3Translation: Stress chalkash fikrlashga sabab bo‘ldi.
extraExamples: Avoid muddled thinking in exams.
Her muddled thinking confused everyone.
Clear your mind of muddled thinking.
Muddled thinking is common when tired.
