The report showed muddled thinking.
He admitted his muddled thinking.
Muddled thinking can be improved with rest.
extraExampleTranslations: Imtihonlarda chalkash fikrlashdan qoching.
Uning chalkash fikrlashi hammani chalkashtirdi.
Ongingizni chalkash fikrlashdan tozalang.
Charchagan paytda chalkash fikrlash odatiy hol.
Hisobot chalkash fikrlashni ko‘rsatdi.
U o‘zining chalkash fikrlashini tan oldi.
Chalkash fikrlashni dam olish bilan yaxshilash mumkin.

words.definition: Important, famous, or easily noticeable.
words.definitionUz: Mashhur / ko‘zga tashlanadigan — muhim, mashhur yoki oson seziladigan.
words.example1: She is a prominent scientist.
words.example1Translation: U mashhur olim.
words.example2: The prominent building is a landmark.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘zga tashlanadigan bino diqqatga sazovor joy.
words.example3: He played a prominent role in the project.
words.example3Translation: U loyihada muhim rol o‘ynadi.
extraExamples: A prominent politician spoke at the event.
The prominent feature of the design is its simplicity.
Prominent figures attended the ceremony.
The mountain is prominent in the landscape.
She comes from a prominent family.
The issue is prominent in the news.
Prominent signs guided the visitors.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashhur siyosatchi tadbirda gapirdi.
Dizaynning ko‘zga tashlanadigan xususiyati soddaligi.
Mashhur shaxslar marosimda ishtirok etishdi.
Tog‘ landshaftda ko‘zga tashlanadi.
U mashhur oiladan chiqqan.
Masala yangiliklarda muhim o‘rin egallamoqda.
Ko‘zga tashlanadigan belgilari mehmonlarni yo‘naltirdi.

words.definition: Close to crying; emotionally overwhelmed.
words.definitionUz: Yig‘lashga yaqin — yig‘lash arafasida; kuchli his-tuyg‘ular bilan to‘lib-toshgan.
words.example1: She was near to tears after the bad news.
words.example1Translation: Yomon xabardan keyin u yig‘lashga yaqin edi.
words.example2: The movie left him near to tears.
words.example2Translation: Film uni yig‘lashga yaqinlashtirdi.
words.example3: He was near to tears with joy.
words.example3Translation: U xursandchilikdan yig‘lashga yaqin edi.
extraExamples: The child was near to tears.
She felt near to tears during the speech.
He was near to tears when he won.
Many in the audience were near to tears.
The story left her near to tears.
Being near to tears shows deep emotion.
The farewell made everyone near to tears.
extraExampleTranslations: Bola yig‘lashga yaqin edi.
U nutq paytida yig‘lashga yaqin his qildi.
U g‘alaba qozonganida yig‘lashga yaqin edi.
Tomoshabinlarning ko‘pi yig‘lashga yaqin edi.
Hikoya uni yig‘lashga yaqinlashtirdi.
Yig‘lashga yaqin bo‘lish chuqur his-tuyg‘uni bildiradi.
Xayrlashuv hammani yig‘lashga yaqinlashtirdi.

words.definition: A soft or low sound, often of speech, complaint, or expression.
words.definitionUz: G‘o‘ng‘illamoq — yumshoq yoki past ovoz, ko‘pincha gap, shikoyat yoki ifoda.
words.example1: She murmured her thanks.
words.example1Translation: U rahmatini g‘o‘ng‘illab aytdi.
words.example2: The crowd began to murmur.
words.example2Translation: Olomon g‘o‘ng‘illay boshladi.
words.example3: He murmured something under his breath.
words.example3Translation: U o‘ziga-o‘zi nimadir g‘o‘ng‘illadi.
extraExamples: The wind murmured through the trees.
She murmured a prayer.
The students murmured during the lecture.
He murmured complaints about the food.
The river murmured softly.
Murmur your answer if you’re shy.
The audience murmured in agreement.
extraExampleTranslations: Shamol daraxtlar orasida g‘o‘ng‘illardi.
U ibodatini g‘o‘ng‘illab o‘qidi.
Talabalar ma’ruzada g‘o‘ng‘illashdi.
U ovqat haqida shikoyatni g‘o‘ng‘illadi.
Daryo ohista g‘o‘ng‘illardi.
Agar uyatchan bo‘lsangiz, javobingizni g‘o‘ng‘illang.
Tomoshabinlar rozi bo‘lib g‘o‘ng‘illashdi.

words.definition: Voluntarily; without being forced.
words.definitionUz: O‘z xohishingiz bilan — majburlanmasdan, ixtiyoriy ravishda.
words.example1: She apologized of her own accord.
words.example1Translation: U o‘z xohishi bilan uzr so‘radi.
words.example2: He left of his own accord.
words.example2Translation: U o‘z xohishi bilan ketdi.
words.example3: The children cleaned their room of their own accord.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar o‘z xohishlari bilan xonani tozalashdi.
extraExamples: He offered help of his own accord.
She decided to study harder of her own accord.
They returned the money of their own accord.
I changed my mind of my own accord.
The team worked overtime of their own accord.
She admitted the mistake of her own accord.
He joined the club of his own accord.
extraExampleTranslations: U yordamni o‘z xohishi bilan taklif qildi.
U o‘z xohishi bilan qattiqroq o‘qishga qaror qildi.
Ular pulni o‘z xohishlari bilan qaytarishdi.
Men fikrimni o‘z xohishim bilan o‘zgartirdim.
Jamoa o‘z xohishlari bilan qo‘shimcha ishlagan.
U xatoni o‘z xohishi bilan tan oldi.
U klubga o‘z xohishi bilan qo‘shildi.

words.definition: Having a natural tendency to do something or be affected by something.
words.definitionUz: Moyil bo‘lmoq — biror narsaga tabiiy moyillik yoki ta’sirlanishga moyil bo‘lish.
words.example1: He is prone to catching colds.
words.example1Translation: U shamollashga moyil.
words.example2: Some people are prone to allergies.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zi odamlar allergiyaga moyil.
words.example3: She is prone to worrying too much.
words.example3Translation: U haddan tashqari tashvishlanishga moyil.
extraExamples: Children are prone to accidents.
He is prone to making mistakes when tired.
The area is prone to flooding.
She is prone to forgetting names.
Older people are prone to certain diseases.
The machine is prone to breaking down.
Some students are prone to procrastination.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar baxtsiz hodisalarga moyil.
U charchaganida xato qilishga moyil.
Bu hudud suv bosishga moyil.
U ismlarni unutishga moyil.
Kattaroq odamlar ba’zi kasalliklarga moyil.
Mashina buzilishga moyil.
Ba’zi talabalar kechiktirishga moyil.

words.definition: Used to indicate the inclusion of everything possible in a category.
words.definitionUz: Nima desangiz ham — bir turkumdagi barcha mumkin bo‘lgan narsalarni qamrab olish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: They sell books, toys, clothes — you name it.
words.example1Translation: Ular kitob, o‘yinchoq, kiyim — nima desangiz ham sotishadi.
words.example2: She can cook anything — pasta, pizza, you name it.
words.example2Translation: U hamma narsani pishiradi — makaron, pitsa, nima desangiz ham.
words.example3: He has every gadget you name it.
words.example3Translation: Uning har xil gadjetlari bor, nima desangiz ham.
extraExamples: The market has fruits, vegetables, you name it.
She knows languages — English, French, you name it.
They faced problems — delays, costs, you name it.
You name it, he has tried it.
The shop sells electronics, furniture, you name it.
He can fix anything — cars, computers, you name it.
The festival had music, dance, food, you name it.
extraExampleTranslations: Bozorda meva, sabzavot, nima desangiz ham bor.
U tillarni biladi — ingliz, fransuz, nima desangiz ham.
Ular muammolarga duch kelishdi — kechikishlar, xarajatlar, nima desangiz ham.
Nima desangiz ham, u sinab ko‘rgan.
Do‘kon elektronika, mebel, nima desangiz ham sotadi.
U hamma narsani tuzatadi — mashinalar, kompyuterlar, nima desangiz ham.
Festivalda musiqa, raqs, ovqat, nima desangiz ham bor edi.

words.definition: Extremely careful and precise, paying great attention to detail.
words.definitionUz: Sinchkov — juda ehtiyotkor va aniq, tafsilotlarga katta e’tibor beruvchi.
words.example1: She is meticulous in her work.
words.example1Translation: U ishida juda sinchkov.
words.example2: The meticulous planning ensured success.
words.example2Translation: Sinchkov rejalashtirish muvaffaqiyatni ta’minladi.
words.example3: He checked the report with meticulous care.
words.example3Translation: U hisobotni sinchkovlik bilan tekshirdi.
extraExamples: The artist is meticulous with every brushstroke.
Meticulous preparation is key to success.
She has a meticulous eye for detail.
The chef is meticulous about ingredients.
Meticulous records were kept.
His meticulous nature makes him reliable.
The team worked with meticulous precision.
extraExampleTranslations: Rassom har bir cho‘tka harakatida sinchkov.
Sinchkov tayyorgarlik muvaffaqiyatning kaliti.
U tafsilotlarga sinchkov qaraydi.
Oshpaz ingredientlarga sinchkov qaraydi.
Sinchkov yozuvlar saqlangan edi.
Uning sinchkov tabiati uni ishonchli qiladi.
Jamoa sinchkov aniqlik bilan ishladi.

words.definition: To be full of self-assurance and certainty.
words.definitionUz: O‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la — o‘ziga bo‘lgan ishonch va aniqlik bilan to‘lib-toshgan.
words.example1: She overflowed with confidence before the performance.
words.example1Translation: U chiqish oldidan o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
words.example2: The young entrepreneur overflowed with confidence.
words.example2Translation: Yosh tadbirkor o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
words.example3: He spoke with confidence that overflowed.
words.example3Translation: U o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la holda gapirdi.
extraExamples: The team overflowed with confidence after the win.
She is overflowing with confidence in her abilities.
His speech was overflowing with confidence.
The child overflowed with confidence on stage.
Overflowing with confidence, she applied for the job.
The leader overflowed with confidence.
He approached the challenge overflowing with confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa g‘alabadan keyin o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
U o‘z qobiliyatlariga ishonch bilan to‘la.
Uning nutqi o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
Bola sahnada o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
O‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la holda u ishga ariza berdi.
Rahbar o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la edi.
U muammoni o‘ziga ishonch bilan to‘la holda hal qildi.

words.definition: Possessing great strength, power, or influence.
words.definitionUz: Kuchli — katta kuch, qudrat yoki ta’sirga ega.
words.example1: The mighty river flooded the valley.
words.example1Translation: Kuchli daryo vodiyini suv bosdi.
words.example2: He is a mighty warrior in the story.
words.example2Translation: U hikoyadagi kuchli jangchi.
words.example3: The mighty empire lasted for centuries.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli imperiya asrlar davom etdi.
extraExamples: The mighty oak tree stood tall.
A mighty effort was required.
The mighty wind blew down trees.
She has a mighty voice.
The mighty king ruled wisely.
Mighty forces were at work.
The team made a mighty comeback.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli eman daraxti baland turardi.
Katta kuch talab qilindi.
Kuchli shamol daraxtlarni ag‘dardi.
Uning ovozi kuchli.
Kuchli qirol donolik bilan hukmronlik qildi.
Kuchli kuchlar ishlamoqda edi.
Jamoa kuchli qaytish qildi.

words.definition: To make a fresh start or change one’s behaviour for the better.
words.definitionUz: Yangi sahifadan boshlamoq — yangi boshlanish qilish yoki xatti-harakatni yaxshilash.
words.example1: After the mistake, he turned over a new leaf.
words.example1Translation: Xatodan keyin u yangi sahifadan boshladi.
words.example2: She decided to turn over a new leaf and quit smoking.
words.example2Translation: U yangi sahifadan boshlab chekishni tashlashga qaror qildi.
words.example3: It’s never too late to turn over a new leaf.
words.example3Translation: Yangi sahifadan boshlash uchun hech qachon kech emas.
extraExamples: The prisoner turned over a new leaf.
He turned over a new leaf after the accident.
Turning over a new leaf requires effort.
She turned over a new leaf in her studies.
The company turned over a new leaf with new management.
Many people turn over a new leaf in the new year.
He promised to turn over a new leaf.
extraExampleTranslations: Mahbus yangi sahifadan boshladi.
Avtohalokatdan keyin u yangi sahifadan boshladi.
Yangi sahifadan boshlash kuch talab qiladi.
U o‘qishida yangi sahifadan boshladi.
Kompaniya yangi rahbariyat bilan yangi sahifadan boshladi.
Ko‘plab odamlar yangi yilda yangi sahifadan boshlashadi.
U yangi sahifadan boshlashga va’da berdi.

words.definition: To inform someone of important or often unpleasant information.
words.definitionUz: Xabarni aytmoq — muhim yoki ko‘pincha yoqimsiz ma’lumotni kimdirga yetkazish.
words.example1: I have to break the news to her gently.
words.example1Translation: Men unga xabarni ohista aytishim kerak.
words.example2: He broke the news to his parents.
words.example2Translation: U ota-onasiga xabarni aytdi.
words.example3: Breaking the news was difficult.
words.example3Translation: Xabarni aytish qiyin edi.
extraExamples: The doctor broke the news to the family.
She broke the news about the move.
He couldn’t break the news himself.
Breaking bad news requires care.
The manager broke the news of the layoffs.
They broke the news at dinner.
It’s hard to break the news to children.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor oilaga xabarni aytdi.
U ko‘chish haqidagi xabarni aytdi.
U xabarni o‘zi aytolmadi.
Yomon xabarni aytish ehtiyotkorlik talab qiladi.
Rahbar ishdan bo‘shatishlar haqidagi xabarni aytdi.
Ular xabarni kechki ovqatda aytishdi.
Bolalarga xabarni aytish qiyin.

words.definition: To flourish, succeed, or achieve wealth and good fortune.
words.definitionUz: Gullab-yashnamoq — muvaffaqiyatga erishish, boylik va omadga ega bo‘lish.
words.example1: The business is prospering.
words.example1Translation: Biznes gullab-yashnamoqda.
words.example2: May you prosper in all your endeavors.
words.example2Translation: Barcha ishlaringizda gullab-yashnashingizni tilayman.
words.example3: The country prospered after the reforms.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakat islohotlardan keyin gullab-yashnadi.
extraExamples: The community is prospering.
Hard work helps you prosper.
The garden is prospering this year.
She prospered in her new career.
The economy is beginning to prosper.
Families prosper when they work together.
The school has prospered under new leadership.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa gullab-yashnamoqda.
Qattiq mehnat gullab-yashnashga yordam beradi.
Bog‘ bu yil yaxshi o‘smoqda.
U yangi karerasida muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
Iqtisodiyot gullab-yashnay boshladi.
Oilalar birgalikda ishlaganda gullab-yashnaydi.
Maktab yangi rahbariyat ostida gullab-yashnadi.

words.definition: Physically unfit or not in good condition; also used metaphorically for poorly functioning systems.
words.definitionUz: Forma yo‘qotgan — jismonan formasi yo‘q yoki yaxshi holatda emas; majoziy ma’noda yomon ishlaydigan tizimlar uchun ham ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I’m out of shape after the holiday.
words.example1Translation: Ta’tildan keyin forma yo‘qotibman.
words.example2: The old car is out of shape.
words.example2Translation: Eski mashina holati yaxshi emas.
words.example3: The team is out of shape and needs training.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa forma yo‘qotgan va mashq kerak.
extraExamples: He felt out of shape after being sick.
The economy is out of shape.
Don’t get out of shape — exercise regularly.
The building is out of shape and needs repair.
She is working to get back in shape.
The system is out of shape and inefficient.
After weeks of rest, he was out of shape.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasal bo‘lgandan keyin u o‘zini forma yo‘qotgan his qildi.
Iqtisodiyot holati yaxshi emas.
Forma yo‘qotmang — muntazam sport bilan shug‘ullaning.
Bino holati yomon va ta’mirtalab.
U qaytadan formaga kirish uchun ishlamoqda.
Tizim yomon ishlamoqda va samarasiz.
Bir necha hafta dam olgandan keyin u forma yo‘qotgan edi.

words.definition: Despite extremely unlikely or difficult circumstances.
words.definitionUz: Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay — juda kam ehtimol yoki qiyin sharoitlarga qaramay.
words.example1: She succeeded against all the odds.
words.example1Translation: U barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
words.example2: The team won against all the odds.
words.example2Translation: Jamoa barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay g‘alaba qozondi.
words.example3: He survived against all the odds.
words.example3Translation: U barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay omon qoldi.
extraExamples: They built the business against all the odds.
Against all the odds, the plan worked.
She recovered against all the odds.
The underdog won against all the odds.
He climbed the mountain against all the odds.
Love prevailed against all the odds.
The country developed against all the odds.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular biznesni barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay qurishdi.
Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay reja ish berdi.
U barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay tuzaldi.
Zaif jamoa barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay g‘alaba qozondi.
U tog‘ga barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay chiqdi.
Sevgi barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay g‘alaba qildi.
Mamlakat barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay rivojlandi.

words.definition: The total quantity of goods produced by factories in a given period.
words.definitionUz: Ishlab chiqarish hajmi — ma’lum bir davrda zavodlar tomonidan ishlab chiqarilgan tovarlarning umumiy miqdori.
words.example1: Manufacturing output increased last quarter.
words.example1Translation: O‘tgan chorakda ishlab chiqarish hajmi oshdi.
words.example2: The factory’s manufacturing output is high.
words.example2Translation: Zavodning ishlab chiqarish hajmi yuqori.
words.example3: A fall in manufacturing output affects the economy.
words.example3Translation: Ishlab chiqarish hajmining pasayishi iqtisodiyotga ta’sir qiladi.
extraExamples: Manufacturing output has doubled.
The country leads in manufacturing output.
New technology boosted manufacturing output.
Manufacturing output fell due to shortages.
They track monthly manufacturing output.
High manufacturing output creates jobs.
The report shows stable manufacturing output.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishlab chiqarish hajmi ikki baravar oshdi.
Mamlakat ishlab chiqarish hajmi bo‘yicha yetakchi.
Yangi texnologiya ishlab chiqarish hajmini oshirdi.
Ishlab chiqarish hajmi tanqislik tufayli pasaydi.
Ular oylik ishlab chiqarish hajmini kuzatib borishadi.
Yuqori ishlab chiqarish hajmi ish o‘rinlarini yaratadi.
Hisobot barqaror ishlab chiqarish hajmini ko‘rsatmoqda.

words.definition: A very small or insignificant part of something much larger.
words.definitionUz: Okeandagi bir tomchi — juda katta narsaning juda kichik yoki ahamiyatsiz qismi.
words.example1: The donation was just a drop in the ocean.
words.example1Translation: Xayriya okeandagi bir tomchi edi.
words.example2: Our efforts are a drop in the ocean compared to the need.
words.example2Translation: Bizning harakatlarimiz ehtiyojga nisbatan okeandagi bir tomchi.
words.example3: This money is a drop in the ocean for the project.
words.example3Translation: Bu pul loyiha uchun okeandagi bir tomchi.
extraExamples: The aid is a drop in the ocean.
One person’s vote is a drop in the ocean.
The improvement is just a drop in the ocean.
His contribution was a drop in the ocean.
Cleaning one beach is a drop in the ocean.
The budget increase is a drop in the ocean.
Every little helps, even if it’s a drop in the ocean.
extraExampleTranslations: Yordam okeandagi bir tomchi.
Bitta odamning ovozi okeandagi bir tomchi.
Yaxshilanish okeandagi bir tomchi.
Uning hissasi okeandagi bir tomchi edi.
Bitta plyajni tozalash okeandagi bir tomchi.
Byudjetning oshishi okeandagi bir tomchi.
Har bir kichik yordam foydali, hatto okeandagi bir tomchi bo‘lsa ham.

words.definition: To interfere in someone else’s affairs or business.
words.definitionUz: Burni bilan aralashmoq — boshqa birovning ishlariga aralashish.
words.example1: Stop sticking your nose into my business.
words.example1Translation: Mening ishimga burningni tiqma.
words.example2: He always sticks his nose into other people’s problems.
words.example2Translation: U har doim boshqalarning muammolariga burningni tiqadi.
words.example3: Don’t stick your nose into things that don’t concern you.
words.example3Translation: O‘zingga tegishli bo‘lmagan narsalarga burningni tiqma.
extraExamples: She likes to stick her nose into everything.
Mind your own business and don’t stick your nose in.
He stuck his nose into the family argument.
Stop sticking your nose into my affairs.
Sticking your nose into politics can be risky.
The journalist stuck his nose into the scandal.
I don’t like people who stick their nose into everything.
extraExampleTranslations: U hamma narsaga burningni tiqishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
O‘z ishing bilan band bo‘l va burningni tiqma.
U oilaviy bahsga burningni tiqdi.
Mening ishlarimga burningni tiqma.
Siyosatga burningni tiqish xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Jurnalist janjalga burningni tiqdi.
Hamma narsaga burningni tiqadigan odamlarni yoqtirmayman.

words.definition: Very close to someone, often in plain view but unnoticed.
words.definitionUz: Burning ostida — kimdirga juda yaqin, ko‘pincha ochiq-oydin ko‘rinib tursa ham sezilmay qoladigan.
words.example1: The keys were just under your nose.
words.example1Translation: Kalitlar burning ostida edi.
words.example2: The answer was right under our noses.
words.example2Translation: Javob to‘g‘ri burningiz ostida edi.
words.example3: Opportunity was just under his nose.
words.example3Translation: Imkoniyat uning burningi ostida edi.
extraExamples: The solution was right under our noses.
She found the letter just under her nose.
The mistake was under everyone’s nose.
Happiness was just under his nose.
The thief was hiding in plain sight under our noses.
The truth is often right under your nose.
The shop is just under your nose.
extraExampleTranslations: Yechim to‘g‘ri burningiz ostida edi.
U xatni burningi ostida topdi.
Xato hammaning burningi ostida edi.
Baxt uning burningi ostida edi.
O‘g‘ri burningimiz ostida yashirinib o‘tirardi.
Haqiqat ko‘pincha burningiz ostida bo‘ladi.
Do‘kon burningiz ostida.

words.definition: To experience a sentimental longing for the past.
words.definitionUz: Sog‘inch his qilmoq — o‘tmishga bo‘lgan sentimental intilishni his qilish.
words.example1: Listening to old songs makes me feel nostalgic.
words.example1Translation: Eski qo‘shiqlar tinglash meni sog‘inch his qildiradi.
words.example2: She felt nostalgic looking at old photos.
words.example2Translation: U eski fotosuratlarga qarab sog‘inch his qildi.
words.example3: The smell of the bakery made him feel nostalgic.
words.example3Translation: Nonvoyxona hidi unga sog‘inch his qildirdi.
extraExamples: Visiting my hometown always makes me feel nostalgic.
He feels nostalgic for his school days.
The movie made the audience feel nostalgic.
Old toys make children feel nostalgic.
She often feels nostalgic in autumn.
The reunion made everyone feel nostalgic.
Certain scents can make you feel nostalgic.
extraExampleTranslations: Tug‘ilgan shahrimni ziyorat qilish har doim meni sog‘inch his qildiradi.
U maktab kunlarini sog‘inadi.
Film tomoshabinlarni sog‘inch his qildirdi.
Eski o‘yinchoqlar bolalarni sog‘inch his qildiradi.
U kuzda tez-tez sog‘inch his qiladi.
Uchrashuv hammani sog‘inch his qildirdi.
Ba’zi hidlar sizni sog‘inch his qildirishi mumkin.

words.definition: Repeated or compulsive actions driven by a persistent preoccupation.
words.definitionUz: Doimiy bir fikr yoki tashvish tufayli takrorlanadigan, o'zini to'xtata olmaydigan xatti-harakat.
words.example1: His obsessive behavior about cleanliness started to affect his daily life.
words.example1Translation: Tozalik haqidagi obsessiv xulq-atvori uning kundalik hayotiga ta'sir qila boshladi.
words.example2: Therapists can help people manage obsessive behavior through various techniques.
words.example2Translation: Terapevtlar turli usullar orqali odamlarga obsessiv xulq-atvorni boshqarishda yordam berishlari mumkin.
words.example3: Her obsessive behavior around checking her phone worried her friends.
words.example3Translation: Uning telefonini tekshirish bilan bog'liq obsessiv xulq-atvori do'stlarini tashvishga soldi.
extraExamples: Obsessive behavior can sometimes be a symptom of an underlying anxiety disorder.
He showed obsessive behavior when it came to organizing his books.
Obsessive behavior around dieting can lead to serious health problems.
The documentary explored obsessive behavior in collectors of rare items.
Her obsessive behavior about deadlines made her a reliable but stressed employee.
Obsessive behavior in relationships can sometimes signal deeper insecurities.
Doctors recommended therapy to address his obsessive behavior.
extraExampleTranslations: Obsessiv xulq-atvor ba'zan yashirin tashvish buzilishining belgisi bo'lishi mumkin.
U kitoblarini tartibga solishda obsessiv xulq-atvor namoyon qildi.
Parhez bilan bog'liq obsessiv xulq-atvor jiddiy sog'liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.
Hujjatli film noyob buyumlar to'plovchilaridagi obsessiv xulq-atvorni o'rgandi.
Muddatlarga nisbatan obsessiv xulq-atvori uni ishonchli, ammo stresli xodim qildi.
Munosabatlardagi obsessiv xulq-atvor ba'zan chuqurroq ishonchsizlikdan dalolat berishi mumkin.
Shifokorlar uning obsessiv xulq-atvorini hal qilish uchun terapiyani tavsiya qilishdi.

words.definition: The main character or leading figure in a literary work, drama, or narrative.
words.definitionUz: Adabiy asar, drama yoki hikoyaning bosh qahramoni yoki yetakchi shaxsi.
words.example1: The protagonist faces many challenges throughout the novel.
words.example1Translation: Romanning bosh qahramoni butun voqealar davomida ko'plab qiyinchiliklarga duch keladi.
words.example2: Readers often connect emotionally with the protagonist's journey.
words.example2Translation: O'quvchilar ko'pincha bosh qahramonning yo'liga hissiy jihatdan bog'lanib qolishadi.
words.example3: The film's protagonist is a young woman searching for her missing brother.
words.example3Translation: Filmning bosh qahramoni o'zining yo'qolgan akasini izlayotgan yosh ayoldir.
extraExamples: The protagonist undergoes significant growth by the end of the story.
A strong protagonist can make even a simple plot engaging.
The play's protagonist struggles with guilt over a past decision.
Unlike typical heroes, this protagonist has many flaws.
The protagonist's relationship with the antagonist drives the plot forward.
She wrote the novel from the protagonist's first-person perspective.
The protagonist must choose between loyalty and personal ambition.
extraExampleTranslations: Bosh qahramon hikoya oxiriga kelib sezilarli darajada o'zgaradi.
Kuchli bosh qahramon hatto oddiy syujetni ham qiziqarli qilishi mumkin.
Spektaklning bosh qahramoni o'tmishdagi qarori haqida aybdorlik bilan kurashadi.
Odatiy qahramonlardan farqli o'laroq, bu bosh qahramon ko'plab kamchiliklarga ega.
Bosh qahramonning antagonist bilan munosabati syujetni oldinga olib boradi.
U romanni bosh qahramonning birinchi shaxs nuqtai nazaridan yozdi.
Bosh qahramon sodiqlik va shaxsiy ambitsiya o'rtasida tanlov qilishi kerak.

words.definition: From the very beginning of an event or process.
words.definitionUz: Voqea yoki jarayonning eng boshidan beri davom etayotgan holat.
words.example1: From the outset, the project faced numerous challenges.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha boshidan beri ko'plab qiyinchiliklarga duch keldi.
words.example2: She made her expectations clear from the outset of the partnership.
words.example2Translation: U hamkorlikning dastlabidan o'z kutgan natijalarini aniq bayon qildi.
words.example3: From the outset, it was clear this would be a difficult negotiation.
words.example3Translation: Boshidan beri bu qiyin muzokara bo'lishi aniq edi.
extraExamples: From the outset, the team knew they had limited resources.
He was honest about the risks from the outset.
From the outset, the company aimed to be environmentally responsible.
The plan had flaws from the outset that were never fully addressed.
She felt confident about the decision from the outset.
From the outset, the goal was to build something sustainable.
They established clear rules from the outset to avoid confusion later.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa boshidan beri cheklangan resurslarga ega ekanini bilardi.
U boshidan beri xavflar haqida halol bo'ldi.
Kompaniya boshidan beri ekologik jihatdan mas'uliyatli bo'lishni maqsad qilgan edi.
Rejada boshidan beri hech qachon to'liq hal qilinmagan kamchiliklar bor edi.
U qaror haqida boshidan beri o'ziga ishongan edi.
Boshidan beri maqsad barqaror narsa qurish edi.
Ular keyinchalik chalkashlikni oldini olish uchun boshidan beri aniq qoidalar o'rnatishdi.

words.definition: The transitional period marking the development from childhood into adulthood.
words.definitionUz: Bolalikdan voyaga yetish davriga o'tishni belgilovchi rivojlanish bosqichi.
words.example1: The novel beautifully captures the passage from boyhood to manhood.
words.example1Translation: Roman bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishni go'zal tasvirlaydi.
words.example2: His journey through war marked his passage from boyhood to manhood.
words.example2Translation: Urush orqali o'tgan yo'li uning bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishini belgiladi.
words.example3: The ritual symbolizes the passage from boyhood to manhood in many cultures.
words.example3Translation: Bu marosim ko'pgina madaniyatlarda bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishni ramziy qiladi.
extraExamples: The story follows a boy's passage from boyhood to manhood during difficult times.
Coming-of-age films often explore the passage from boyhood to manhood.
His grandfather's death marked a turning point in his passage from boyhood to manhood.
The passage from boyhood to manhood is rarely smooth or simple.
Many traditions include ceremonies celebrating the passage from boyhood to manhood.
The character's passage from boyhood to manhood is the central theme of the book.
He reflected on his own passage from boyhood to manhood years later.
extraExampleTranslations: Hikoya qiyin davrlarda bir o'g'il bolaning bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishini hikoya qiladi.
Voyaga yetish haqidagi filmlar ko'pincha bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishni o'rganadi.
Bobosining o'limi uning bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishida burilish nuqtasi bo'ldi.
Bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tish kamdan-kam silliq yoki oddiy bo'ladi.
Ko'pgina an'analar bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishni nishonlaydigan marosimlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
Qahramonning bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishi kitobning markaziy mavzusidir.
U yillar o'tib o'zining bolalikdan voyaga yetishga o'tishi haqida o'yladi.

words.definition: Neighbours who intrusively monitor or interfere in others' affairs.
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarning ishlariga aralashadigan, ularni kuzatadigan qo'shnilar.
words.example1: Their nosy neighbors always seem to know everything happening on the street.
words.example1Translation: Ularning aralashuvchan qo'shnilari ko'chada sodir bo'layotgan hamma narsani bilgandek tuyuladi.
words.example2: The nosy neighbors complained about the loud music every weekend.
words.example2Translation: Aralashuvchan qo'shnilar har dam olish kuni baland musiqadan shikoyat qilishardi.
words.example3: She tried to avoid her nosy neighbors by entering through the back door.
words.example3Translation: U orqa eshikdan kirib, aralashuvchan qo'shnilaridan qochishga harakat qildi.
extraExamples: Their nosy neighbors often peeked through the curtains to see who was visiting.
He felt uncomfortable with such nosy neighbors watching his every move.
The nosy neighbors spread gossip about the new family on the block.
Living next to nosy neighbors made her feel like she had no privacy.
The nosy neighbors asked too many personal questions at the barbecue.
Nosy neighbors can sometimes be helpful, like noticing suspicious activity.
They moved to escape the constant judgment of their nosy neighbors.
extraExampleTranslations: Ularning aralashuvchan qo'shnilari ko'pincha kim kelayotganini ko'rish uchun pardalar orasidan moljallashardi.
Uning har bir harakatini kuzatib turgan bunday aralashuvchan qo'shnilardan u noqulay his qildi.
Aralashuvchan qo'shnilar mahallaga ko'chib kelgan yangi oila haqida g'iybat tarqatishdi.
Aralashuvchan qo'shnilar yonida yashash unga shaxsiy hayoti yo'qdek his qildirardi.
Aralashuvchan qo'shnilar barbekyu vaqtida juda ko'p shaxsiy savollar berishdi.
Aralashuvchan qo'shnilar ba'zan shubhali harakatlarni payqab, foydali bo'lishi mumkin.
Ular aralashuvchan qo'shnilarining doimiy hukmidan qochish uchun ko'chib o'tishdi.

words.definition: To act in accordance with legal requirements.
words.definitionUz: Qonun talablariga muvofiq harakat qilish.
words.example1: All citizens are expected to observe the law, regardless of their personal beliefs.
words.example1Translation: Barcha fuqarolar shaxsiy e'tiqodlaridan qat'i nazar qonunga rioya qilishlari kutiladi.
words.example2: The company was praised for always observing the law in its business practices.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya o'z biznes amaliyotida doimo qonunga rioya qilgani uchun maqtovga sazovor bo'ldi.
words.example3: It's important to observe the law even when no one is watching.
words.example3Translation: Hech kim kuzatmayotgan paytda ham qonunga rioya qilish muhimdir.
extraExamples: Drivers must observe the law and respect traffic signals at all times.
The new immigrants worked hard to observe the law of their new country.
Failing to observe the law can result in serious legal consequences.
Businesses are required to observe the law regarding employee rights.
He always taught his children to observe the law and respect authority.
Observing the law is a basic responsibility of every citizen.
The officer reminded the crowd to observe the law during the protest.
extraExampleTranslations: Haydovchilar har doim qonunga rioya qilishi va svetofor signallarini hurmat qilishi kerak.
Yangi immigrantlar yangi mamlakatlarining qonuniga rioya qilish uchun qattiq mehnat qilishdi.
Qonunga rioya qilmaslik jiddiy huquqiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Kompaniyalar xodimlar huquqlariga oid qonunga rioya qilishlari shart.
U doimo farzandlariga qonunga rioya qilish va hokimiyatni hurmat qilishni o'rgatardi.
Qonunga rioya qilish har bir fuqaroning asosiy mas'uliyatidir.
Politsiya xodimi olomonga norozilik paytida qonunga rioya qilishni eslatdi.

words.definition: To regulate the speed or effort of one's actions to avoid exhaustion or mistakes.
words.definitionUz: Charchash yoki xatolarga yo'l qo'ymaslik uchun harakatlaringiz tezligi yoki kuchini boshqarish.
words.example1: Pace yourself during the marathon so you don't run out of energy too soon.
words.example1Translation: Marafon paytida kuchingizni to'g'ri taqsimlang, shunda energiyangiz erta tugab qolmaydi.
words.example2: You need to pace yourself when studying for multiple exams in one week.
words.example2Translation: Bir hafta ichida bir nechta imtihonga tayyorlanayotganda kuchingizni to'g'ri taqsimlashingiz kerak.
words.example3: He learned to pace himself after burning out from working too hard.
words.example3Translation: U haddan tashqari ko'p ishlab charchaganidan keyin kuchini to'g'ri taqsimlashni o'rgandi.
extraExamples: It's important to pace yourself when starting a new exercise routine.
She paced herself during the project to avoid missing the deadline.
The coach advised the runners to pace themselves during the first lap.
Pace yourself with your spending so the money lasts the whole month.
He didn't pace himself well and felt exhausted by midday.
Pacing yourself is key to completing a long-term project successfully.
Try to pace yourself instead of doing everything at the last minute.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi mashq rejimini boshlaganda kuchingizni to'g'ri taqsimlash muhimdir.
U muddatni o'tkazib yubormaslik uchun loyiha davomida kuchini to'g'ri taqsimladi.
Murabbiy yuguruvchilarga birinchi davra davomida kuchlarini to'g'ri taqsimlashni maslahat berdi.
Xarajatlaringizni to'g'ri taqsimlang, shunda pul butun oy davomida yetadi.
U kuchini yaxshi taqsimlamadi va tushlik vaqtigacha charchab qoldi.
Kuchni to'g'ri taqsimlash uzoq muddatli loyihani muvaffaqiyatli yakunlashning kalitidir.
Hammasini oxirgi daqiqada qilish o'rniga kuchingizni to'g'ri taqsimlashga harakat qiling.

words.definition: Excessively dramatic, extreme, or exaggerated.
words.definitionUz: Haddan tashqari dramatik, haddan ziyod yoki bo'rttirilgan.
words.example1: His reaction to the small mistake was completely over the top.
words.example1Translation: Uning kichik xatoga reaksiyasi mutlaqo haddan tashqari edi.
words.example2: The decorations for the party were a bit over the top, but fun nonetheless.
words.example2Translation: Bayram bezaklari biroz haddan tashqari edi, ammo baribir qiziqarli edi.
words.example3: Some critics felt the movie's special effects were over the top.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi tanqidchilar filmning maxsus effektlari haddan tashqari deb hisoblashdi.
extraExamples: Her speech was passionate, but some thought it was a bit over the top.
The wedding was beautiful, though the fireworks display felt over the top.
He apologized for going over the top with his criticism.
The actor's performance was praised, but some called it over the top.
Their celebration was over the top, with confetti and a live band.
The marketing campaign was so over the top that it became a joke online.
I think the security measures for the event were a bit over the top.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning nutqi ehtirosli edi, ammo ba'zilar buni biroz haddan tashqari deb hisoblashdi.
To'y go'zal edi, ammo otashin namoyishi haddan tashqari tuyuldi.
U tanqidida haddan oshganligi uchun kechirim so'radi.
Aktyorning ijrosi maqtovga sazovor bo'ldi, ammo ba'zilar buni haddan tashqari deb atashdi.
Ularning bayrami konfetti va jonli guruh bilan haddan tashqari edi.
Marketing kampaniyasi shu qadar haddan tashqari ediki, internetda hazilga aylandi.
Menimcha, tadbir uchun xavfsizlik choralari biroz haddan tashqari edi.

words.definition: To have made a formal or informal agreement with someone.
words.definitionUz: Kimsa bilan rasmiy yoki norasmiy kelishuvga ega bo'lish.
words.example1: The two friends had a pact never to keep secrets from each other.
words.example1Translation: Ikki do'st bir-biridan sir saqlamaslik haqida ahdlashgan edi.
words.example2: They have a pact to always support each other through difficult times.
words.example2Translation: Ular qiyin paytlarda doimo bir-birini qo'llab-quvvatlash haqida ahdlashgan.
words.example3: The two countries have a pact to avoid military conflict.
words.example3Translation: Ikki davlat harbiy mojarodan qochish haqida kelishuvga ega.
extraExamples: The siblings have a pact to celebrate every birthday together, no matter where they are.
We have a pact to never let work come between our friendship.
The students have a pact to study together for every exam.
They have a pact about splitting household chores equally.
The roommates have a pact not to bring up money issues at dinner.
The teams have a pact to play fair, regardless of the outcome.
The colleagues have a pact to always be honest with each other.
extraExampleTranslations: Aka-uka yoki opa-singillar qaerda bo'lishidan qat'iy nazar har bir tug'ilgan kunni birga nishonlash haqida ahdlashgan.
Biz ish do'stligimizga to'sqinlik qilishiga hech qachon yo'l qo'ymaslik haqida ahdlashganmiz.
O'quvchilar har bir imtihon uchun birga o'qish haqida ahdlashgan.
Ular uy ishlarini teng taqsimlash haqida ahdlashgan.
Xonadosh do'stlar kechki ovqatda pul masalalarini ko'tarmaslik haqida ahdlashgan.
Jamoalar natijasidan qat'i nazar halol o'ynash haqida ahdlashgan.
Hamkasblar bir-biriga doimo halol bo'lish haqida ahdlashgan.

words.definition: To demonstrate one's abilities, competence, or worth.
words.definitionUz: O'z qobiliyati, malakasi yoki qadr-qimmatini namoyish qilish.
words.example1: She had to prove herself before being given more responsibility at work.
words.example1Translation: U ishda ko'proq mas'uliyat berilishidan oldin o'zini ko'rsatishi kerak edi.
words.example2: New employees often feel pressure to prove themselves quickly.
words.example2Translation: Yangi xodimlar ko'pincha tezda o'zlarini ko'rsatish bosimini his qilishadi.
words.example3: He finally proved himself as a reliable leader during the crisis.
words.example3Translation: U nihoyat inqiroz davrida ishonchli rahbar sifatida o'zini ko'rsatdi.
extraExamples: She worked extra hours to prove herself to her new manager.
You don't need to prove yourself to anyone but yourself.
He proved himself in the final game by scoring the winning goal.
The young scientist proved herself with a groundbreaking discovery.
It took years for him to prove himself in such a competitive industry.
She finally proved herself capable of handling the difficult project.
He felt he had something to prove himself after his earlier mistake.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi menejeriga o'zini ko'rsatish uchun qo'shimcha soatlar ishladi.
Sizga hech kimga emas, faqat o'zingizga o'zingizni isbotlashingiz kerak emas.
U final o'yinida g'alaba golini urib, o'zini ko'rsatdi.
Yosh olim inqilobiy kashfiyot bilan o'zini ko'rsatdi.
Bunday raqobatbardosh sohada o'zini ko'rsatishi uchun unga yillar kerak bo'ldi.
U nihoyat qiyin loyihani boshqarishga qodir ekanligini isbotladi.
U avvalgi xatosidan keyin o'zini isbotlashga ehtiyoj sezdi.

words.definition: To formally inform an employer of one's intention to resign.
words.definitionUz: Ish beruvchiga rasmiy ravishda ishdan bo'shash niyati haqida xabar berish.
words.example1: She handed in her notice after accepting a better job offer.
words.example1Translation: U yaxshiroq ish taklifini qabul qilgandan keyin ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirdi.
words.example2: He plans to hand in his notice at the end of the month.
words.example2Translation: U oy oxirida ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirishni rejalashtirmoqda.
words.example3: After years of dissatisfaction, she finally handed in her notice.
words.example3Translation: Yillar davomidagi norozilikdan keyin u nihoyat ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirdi.
extraExamples: I need to hand in my notice at least a month before leaving.
He handed in his notice without having another job lined up.
She was nervous about handing in her notice to her long-time boss.
Once you hand in your notice, there's usually no turning back.
They were surprised when their top employee handed in his notice.
He handed in his notice the same day he got the new job offer.
Handing in your notice properly helps maintain a good professional relationship.
extraExampleTranslations: Men ketishimdan kamida bir oy oldin ishdan bo'shash arizamni topshirishim kerak.
U boshqa ish topmasdan turib ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirdi.
U uzoq vaqtdan beri ishlagan boshlig'iga ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirishdan asabiy edi.
Ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirgandan keyin odatda orqaga qaytib bo'lmaydi.
Ular eng yaxshi xodimlari ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirganda hayratda qolishdi.
U yangi ish taklifini olgan kunidayoq ishdan bo'shash arizasini topshirdi.
Ishdan bo'shash arizasini to'g'ri topshirish yaxshi professional munosabatni saqlashga yordam beradi.

words.translation: haddan tashqari katta foyda (axloqiy jihatdan shubhali)
words.definition: Extraordinarily large gains, often considered morally or ethically excessive.
words.definitionUz: Axloqiy jihatdan haddan tashqari va shubhali deb hisoblanadigan juda katta foyda.
words.example1: Critics accused the company of making obscene profits during the crisis.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar kompaniyani inqiroz davrida haddan tashqari katta foyda olishda ayblashdi.
words.example2: The pharmaceutical company faced backlash for its obscene profits on essential medicine.
words.example2Translation: Farmatsevtika kompaniyasi zarur dorilardan olgan haddan tashqari katta foydasi uchun keskin tanqidga uchradi.
words.example3: Some argue that obscene profits in certain industries should be taxed more heavily.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zilar ba'zi sohalardagi haddan tashqari katta foyda ko'proq soliqqa tortilishi kerak deb ta'kidlashadi.
extraExamples: The report revealed obscene profits made by oil companies last year.
Activists protested against the obscene profits of fast-fashion retailers.
Obscene profits during a shortage are often viewed as price gouging.
The CEO defended the company's obscene profits as a sign of success.
Many were outraged by the obscene profits reported amid widespread layoffs.
Obscene profits can attract regulatory scrutiny and public criticism.
The documentary exposed how some corporations make obscene profits at workers' expense.
extraExampleTranslations: Hisobotda o'tgan yili neft kompaniyalari olgan haddan tashqari katta foyda ochib berildi.
Faollar tez moda chakana savdo kompaniyalarining haddan tashqari katta foydasiga qarshi norozilik bildirishdi.
Tanqislik davrida haddan tashqari katta foyda ko'pincha narx tortib olish sifatida ko'riladi.
Bosh direktor kompaniyaning haddan tashqari katta foydasini muvaffaqiyat belgisi sifatida himoya qildi.
Keng tarqalgan ishdan bo'shatishlar fonida ma'lum bo'lgan haddan tashqari katta foyda ko'pchilikni g'azablantirdi.
Haddan tashqari katta foyda tartibga soluvchi nazorat va jamoatchilik tanqidini jalb qilishi mumkin.
Hujjatli film ba'zi korporatsiyalar xodimlar hisobiga qanday haddan tashqari katta foyda olishini ochib berdi.

words.definition: Something new, unusual, or unique that attracts attention or interest.
words.definitionUz: Diqqatni jalb qiladigan yangi, g'ayrioddiy yoki noyob narsa.
words.example1: The novelty of the new technology wore off after a few months.
words.example1Translation: Yangi texnologiyaning yangiligi bir necha oydan keyin yo'qolib ketdi.
words.example2: For tourists, the novelty of the city's architecture is a major attraction.
words.example2Translation: Sayyohlar uchun shaharning arxitekturasi yangiligi katta jozibadir.
words.example3: The novelty of working from home eventually became routine.
words.example3Translation: Uydan ishlash yangiligi oxir-oqibat odatiy holga aylandi.
extraExamples: There was a sense of novelty in trying the unfamiliar dish.
The store sells novelty items like quirky mugs and funny T-shirts.
The novelty of social media has shaped how people communicate today.
After the initial novelty wore off, sales of the gadget slowed down.
She enjoyed the novelty of traveling to a country she had never visited.
The film's novelty lies in its unconventional storytelling style.
Children are often drawn to the novelty of new toys.
extraExampleTranslations: Notanish taomni sinab ko'rishda yangilik hissi mavjud edi.
Do'kon g'alati krujkalar va kulgili futbolkalar kabi yangilik mahsulotlarini sotadi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar yangiligi bugungi kunda odamlarning muloqot qilish usulini shakllantirdi.
Dastlabki yangilik yo'qolgandan keyin gadjet sotuvi sekinlashdi.
U hech qachon tashrif buyurmagan mamlakatga sayohat qilish yangiligidan zavqlandi.
Filmning yangiligi uning an'anaviy bo'lmagan hikoya uslubida yotadi.
Bolalar ko'pincha yangi o'yinchoqlarning yangiligiga jalb qilinadi.

words.definition: To experience a sudden, intense physical discomfort.
words.definitionUz: To'satdan paydo bo'lgan kuchli jismoniy noqulaylikni his qilish.
words.example1: She felt a sharp pain in her chest and immediately called for help.
words.example1Translation: U ko'ksida keskin og'riq sezdi va darhol yordam chaqirdi.
words.example2: He felt a sharp pain in his knee after the awkward landing.
words.example2Translation: U noqulay tushishdan keyin tizzasida keskin og'riq sezdi.
words.example3: I felt a sharp pain in my back when I lifted the heavy box.
words.example3Translation: Og'ir qutini ko'targanimda orqamda keskin og'riq sezdim.
extraExamples: She felt a sharp pain in her tooth and made an emergency dentist appointment.
He felt a sharp pain shoot through his arm during the workout.
The patient described feeling a sharp pain whenever she breathed deeply.
I felt a sharp pain in my foot after stepping on something hard.
He felt a sharp pain in his stomach shortly after eating.
She felt a sharp pain in her shoulder while reaching for the shelf.
The runner felt a sharp pain in his ankle and had to stop immediately.
extraExampleTranslations: U tishida keskin og'riq sezdi va shoshilinch stomatolog qabuliga yozildi.
U mashq paytida qo'lida keskin og'riq sezdi.
Bemor chuqur nafas olgan paytda har safar keskin og'riq sezayotganini aytdi.
Qattiq narsaga bosib qolganimdan keyin oyog'imda keskin og'riq sezdim.
U ovqatlangandan ko'p o'tmay qornida keskin og'riq sezdi.
U javonga qo'l cho'zayotganda yelkasida keskin og'riq sezdi.
Yuguruvchi to'piqida keskin og'riq sezdi va darhol to'xtashga majbur bo'ldi.

words.definition: To instigate a dispute or disagreement.
words.definitionUz: Bahs yoki kelishmovchilikni qasddan keltirib chiqarish.
words.example1: He didn't mean to provoke an argument, but his comment upset her.
words.example1Translation: U bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarishni xohlamagan edi, lekin uning izohi uni xafa qildi.
words.example2: She often provokes an argument just to test how others react.
words.example2Translation: U ko'pincha boshqalarning qanday reaksiya berishini sinash uchun bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example3: The controversial topic was likely to provoke an argument at the dinner table.
words.example3Translation: Bahsli mavzu kechki ovqat stoli atrofida bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarishi mumkin edi.
extraExamples: He seems to enjoy provoking an argument whenever possible.
Bringing up politics at family gatherings can easily provoke an argument.
She tried not to provoke an argument, but tensions were already high.
His sarcastic remark provoked an argument among the coworkers.
It's best not to provoke an argument when emotions are running high.
The comment online provoked an argument among hundreds of users.
They avoided certain topics to keep from provoking an argument.
extraExampleTranslations: U imkon qadar bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarishdan zavq olganga o'xshaydi.
Oilaviy yig'ilishlarda siyosatni ko'tarish osongina bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.
U bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarmaslikka harakat qildi, lekin keskinlik allaqachon yuqori edi.
Uning kinoyali izohi hamkasblar orasida bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqardi.
His-tuyg'ular kuchayganida bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarmaslik eng yaxshisidir.
Internetdagi izoh yuzlab foydalanuvchilar orasida bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqardi.
Ular bahs-munozarani keltirib chiqarmaslik uchun ma'lum mavzulardan qochishdi.

words.definition: Occurring at an inappropriate or unusual time, outside the usual period.
words.definitionUz: Odatiy davrdan tashqarida, noo'rin yoki g'ayrioddiy vaqtda sodir bo'lish.
words.example1: Strawberries are more expensive when bought out of season.
words.example1Translation: Mavsumdan tashqari sotib olinganda qulupnay qimmatroq bo'ladi.
words.example2: The resort offers discounted rates for travelers visiting out of season.
words.example2Translation: Kurort mavsumdan tashqari tashrif buyuradigan sayohatchilar uchun chegirma narxlarini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: Hunting certain animals out of season is against the law.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi hayvonlarni mavsumdan tashqari ovlash qonunga zid.
extraExamples: Buying winter coats out of season can save you a lot of money.
The beach town feels quiet and peaceful out of season.
It's hard to find fresh local produce out of season.
They planned their trip out of season to avoid the crowds.
Skiing out of season is impossible without artificial snow.
Flowers grown out of season often cost more due to special care.
The hotel prices drop significantly out of season.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishki kurtkalarni mavsumdan tashqari sotib olish ko'p pul tejashga yordam beradi.
Plyaj shaharchasi mavsumdan tashqari tinch va osoyishta his qilinadi.
Mavsumdan tashqari yangi mahalliy mahsulotlarni topish qiyin.
Ular olomondan qochish uchun sayohatlarini mavsumdan tashqari rejalashtirishdi.
Sun'iy qorsiz mavsumdan tashqari chang'i uchish imkonsiz.
Mavsumdan tashqari o'stirilgan gullar maxsus parvarish tufayli ko'pincha qimmatroq bo'ladi.
Mehmonxona narxlari mavsumdan tashqari sezilarli darajada tushadi.

words.definition: To be of the highest significance or priority.
words.definitionUz: Eng yuqori darajadagi ahamiyat yoki ustuvorlikka ega bo'lish.
words.example1: Safety is of paramount importance during the construction process.
words.example1Translation: Qurilish jarayonida xavfsizlik eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
words.example2: Honesty is of paramount importance in any healthy relationship.
words.example2Translation: Har qanday sog'lom munosabatda halollik eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
words.example3: Customer satisfaction is of paramount importance to our company.
words.example3Translation: Mijozlarning mamnunligi kompaniyamiz uchun eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
extraExamples: In medicine, accuracy is of paramount importance to avoid mistakes.
Education is of paramount importance for a country's long-term development.
Clear communication is of paramount importance during a crisis.
Protecting the environment should be of paramount importance for future generations.
Trust is of paramount importance in any business partnership.
Following safety procedures is of paramount importance on construction sites.
Mental health awareness is of paramount importance in today's society.
extraExampleTranslations: Tibbiyotda xatolarning oldini olish uchun aniqlik eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Ta'lim mamlakatning uzoq muddatli rivojlanishi uchun eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Inqiroz davrida aniq muloqot eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish kelajak avlodlar uchun eng muhim ahamiyatga ega bo'lishi kerak.
Har qanday biznes hamkorligida ishonch eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Qurilish maydonlarida xavfsizlik qoidalariga rioya qilish eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.
Bugungi jamiyatda ruhiy salomatlik haqida xabardorlik eng muhim ahamiyatga ega.

words.definition: An activity one enjoys doing in one's leisure time.
words.definitionUz: Bo'sh vaqtda zavq bilan shug'ullaniladigan faoliyat.
words.example1: Reading novels is my favorite pastime on rainy afternoons.
words.example1Translation: Yomg'irli kunlarning tushdan keyingi vaqtida roman o'qish mening sevimli mashg'ulotim.
words.example2: Gardening has become my favorite pastime since I retired.
words.example2Translation: Nafaqaga chiqqanimdan beri bog'dorchilik mening sevimli mashg'ulotimga aylandi.
words.example3: Hiking in the mountains is my favorite pastime during the summer.
words.example3Translation: Yozda tog'larda sayr qilish mening sevimli mashg'ulotim.
extraExamples: Painting has always been my favorite pastime, even as a child.
Watching old movies is my favorite pastime on weekends.
Cooking new recipes is my favorite pastime when I have free time.
My favorite pastime as a teenager was collecting vinyl records.
Fishing with my grandfather was my favorite pastime growing up.
Photography became my favorite pastime after I bought my first camera.
Chess has been my favorite pastime since college.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo'yash bolaligimdan beri har doim mening sevimli mashg'ulotim bo'lgan.
Eski filmlarni tomosha qilish dam olish kunlarida mening sevimli mashg'ulotim.
Yangi retseptlar bo'yicha ovqat pishirish bo'sh vaqtim bo'lganda mening sevimli mashg'ulotim.
O'smirlik davrida mening sevimli mashg'ulotim vinil plastinkalarni to'plash edi.
Bobom bilan baliq ovlash o'sib ulg'ayganimda mening sevimli mashg'ulotim edi.
Birinchi kamerani sotib olganimdan keyin fotosurat suratga olish mening sevimli mashg'ulotimga aylandi.
Shaxmat universitetdan beri mening sevimli mashg'ulotim bo'lib kelgan.

words.definition: To stroke or lightly touch a dog as a gesture of affection or care.
words.definitionUz: Mehr-muhabbat belgisi sifatida itni yengil silash yoki erkalash.
words.example1: She knelt down to pat the dog before heading inside.
words.example1Translation: U ichkariga kirishidan oldin itni silash uchun cho'kkaladi.
words.example2: The child laughed happily as he patted the dog's soft fur.
words.example2Translation: Bola itning yumshoq junini silab, baxtiyor kulardi.
words.example3: He always pats the dog gently whenever they meet on his walk.
words.example3Translation: U sayr paytida it bilan uchrashganda har doim uni mehr bilan siladi.
extraExamples: I love stopping to pat the dog every time I pass by their house.
She taught her son to pat the dog gently instead of pulling its tail.
He patted the dog on the head as a way to say thank you.
The visitors took turns to pat the dog at the shelter.
She patted the dog softly to calm it down during the storm.
My grandmother always pats the dog before giving it a treat.
The little girl was excited to pat the dog for the first time.
extraExampleTranslations: Ularning uyi yonidan o'tganimda har doim to'xtab itni silashni yaxshi ko'raman.
U o'g'liga itning dumini tortmasdan, uni mehr bilan silashni o'rgatdi.
U minnatdorchilik bildirish uchun itning boshini siladi.
Mehmonlar boqimxonada navbat bilan itni silashdi.
U bo'ron paytida itni tinchlantirish uchun uni yumshoq silab qo'ydi.
Buvim har doim itga taom berishdan oldin uni siladi.
Kichkina qiz birinchi marta itni silaganidan juda xursand bo'ldi.

words.definition: Used to introduce an event that happened unexpectedly or suddenly.
words.definitionUz: Kutilmaganda yoki to'satdan sodir bo'lgan voqeani bayon qilish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I was just chatting with friends, and the next thing I knew, it was midnight.
words.example1Translation: Men shunchaki do'stlarim bilan suhbatlashayotgan edim, o'zim bilmay qoldim, allaqachon yarim tun bo'lib qolgan edi.
words.example2: He started running for fun, and the next thing he knew, he was training for a marathon.
words.example2Translation: U zavq uchun yugurishni boshladi, o'zi bilmay qoldi, marafon uchun mashq qilayotgan edi.
words.example3: She closed her eyes for a second, and the next thing she knew, she had fallen asleep.
words.example3Translation: U ko'zlarini bir lahza yumdi, o'zi bilmay qoldi, allaqachon uxlab qolgan edi.
extraExamples: We were talking about vacation plans, and the next thing I knew, we had booked flights.
I sat down to rest, and the next thing I knew, an hour had passed.
He opened the fridge for a snack, and the next thing he knew, he had eaten everything.
She picked up the book to skim it, and the next thing she knew, she had read three chapters.
I was driving home, and the next thing I knew, I had missed my exit.
They began a small project, and the next thing they knew, it had become a full business.
I clicked on one video, and the next thing I knew, an hour had gone by.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz ta'til rejalari haqida gaplashayotgan edik, o'zimiz bilmay qoldik, allaqachon chiptalarni bron qilib qo'ygan edik.
Men dam olish uchun o'tirdim, o'zim bilmay qoldim, bir soat o'tib ketgan edi.
U gazaklash uchun muzlatgichni ochdi, o'zi bilmay qoldi, hammasini yeb qo'ygan edi.
U kitobni varaqlash uchun oldi, o'zi bilmay qoldi, allaqachon uch bobni o'qib bo'lgan edi.
Men uyga haydab ketayotgan edim, o'zim bilmay qoldim, chiqishimni o'tkazib yuborgan edim.
Ular kichik loyihani boshlashdi, o'zlari bilmay qolishdi, u to'liq biznesga aylangan edi.
Men bitta videoni bosdim, o'zim bilmay qoldim, bir soat o'tib ketgan edi.

words.definition: To be extremely happy or euphoric.
words.definitionUz: Juda baxtli yoki cheksiz quvonchli bo'lish holati.
words.example1: She was on cloud nine after hearing she got accepted into her dream university.
words.example1Translation: U orzu qilgan universitetiga qabul qilinganini eshitgandan keyin osmonda uchib yurdi.
words.example2: He was on cloud nine the day his daughter was born.
words.example2Translation: Qizi tug'ilgan kuni u osmonda uchib yurdi.
words.example3: They were on cloud nine after winning the championship.
words.example3Translation: Chempionatda g'alaba qozonganlaridan keyin ular osmonda uchib yurishdi.
extraExamples: I was on cloud nine when I got the promotion I had worked so hard for.
She has been on cloud nine ever since her boyfriend proposed.
He was on cloud nine after his team won the final match.
Winning the scholarship put her on cloud nine for weeks.
They were on cloud nine when they finally bought their first house.
He felt on cloud nine after finishing his first marathon.
She was on cloud nine after receiving such positive feedback from her boss.
extraExampleTranslations: Men shunchalik qattiq mehnat qilgan ko'tarilishimni olganimda osmonda uchib yurdim.
Yigiti unga taklif qilganidan beri u osmonda uchib yuribdi.
Jamoasi final o'yinida g'alaba qozongandan keyin u osmonda uchib yurdi.
Stipendiyani yutib olish uni bir necha haftaga osmonda uchirib yurdi.
Ular nihoyat birinchi uylarini sotib olganlarida osmonda uchib yurishdi.
U birinchi marafonini tugatgandan keyin osmonda uchib yurganday his qildi.
Boshlig'idan shunday ijobiy fikr-mulohaza olgandan keyin u osmonda uchib yurdi.

words.definition: A chance or favourable situation became available.
words.definitionUz: Qulay vaziyat yoki imkoniyat to'satdan paydo bo'lganini bildiradi.
words.example1: When the opportunity presented itself, she didn't hesitate to take the job.
words.example1Translation: Imkoniyat paydo bo'lganda, u ishni qabul qilishda ikkilanmadi.
words.example2: He had always wanted to travel, and the opportunity presented itself last year.
words.example2Translation: U doimo sayohat qilishni xohlardi va imkoniyat o'tgan yili paydo bo'ldi.
words.example3: The opportunity presented itself for them to expand the business internationally.
words.example3Translation: Ular uchun biznesni xalqaro miqyosda kengaytirish imkoniyati paydo bo'ldi.
extraExamples: She had been waiting for years until the opportunity presented itself.
When the opportunity presented itself, he asked for a promotion.
The opportunity presented itself during a chance meeting at a conference.
They jumped at it when the opportunity presented itself to buy the house.
A great opportunity presented itself, and she took full advantage of it.
The opportunity presented itself to study abroad, and he accepted immediately.
When the opportunity presented itself, the team launched their new product.
extraExampleTranslations: U imkoniyat paydo bo'lguncha yillar davomida kutgan edi.
Imkoniyat paydo bo'lganda, u ko'tarilish so'radi.
Imkoniyat konferensiyada tasodifiy uchrashuv paytida paydo bo'ldi.
Uyni sotib olish imkoniyati paydo bo'lganda, ular uni qo'ldan boy bermadilar.
Ajoyib imkoniyat paydo bo'ldi va u undan to'liq foydalandi.
Chet elda o'qish imkoniyati paydo bo'ldi va u darhol qabul qildi.
Imkoniyat paydo bo'lganda, jamoa yangi mahsulotini taqdim etdi.

words.definition: Sound practical judgement that is independent of specialised knowledge.
words.definitionUz: Maxsus bilimsiz ham to'g'ri qaror qabul qilishga yordam beradigan sog'lom va amaliy fikrlash qobiliyati.
words.example1: Using common sense, she decided not to walk home alone at night.
words.example1Translation: Oddiy mantiqdan foydalanib, u kechasi yolg'iz uyga piyoda bormaslikka qaror qildi.
words.example2: It's just common sense to check the weather before going hiking.
words.example2Translation: Sayrga chiqishdan oldin ob-havoni tekshirish shunchaki oddiy mantiq.
words.example3: He relied on common sense rather than formal training to solve the problem.
words.example3Translation: U muammoni hal qilish uchun rasmiy ta'limdan ko'ra oddiy mantiqqa tayandi.
extraExamples: Common sense tells us not to leave valuables in plain sight in a car.
Sometimes common sense is more valuable than years of formal education.
It takes common sense to know when a deal is too good to be true.
Common sense suggests we should save money for emergencies.
She used common sense to navigate the unfamiliar city safely.
Common sense says you shouldn't mix bleach with other cleaning chemicals.
His common sense helped him avoid an obvious scam.
extraExampleTranslations: Oddiy mantiq bizga mashinada qimmatbaho narsalarni ko'rinib turgan joyda qoldirmaslikni aytadi.
Ba'zan oddiy mantiq yillar davomidagi rasmiy ta'limdan ham qimmatliroqdir.
Bitim juda yaxshi bo'lib, haqiqat bo'lmasligini bilish uchun oddiy mantiq kerak.
Oddiy mantiq bizga favqulodda holatlar uchun pul jamg'arishni tavsiya qiladi.
U notanish shaharda xavfsiz yo'l topish uchun oddiy mantiqdan foydalandi.
Oddiy mantiqqa ko'ra, oqartirgich vositasini boshqa tozalovchi kimyoviy moddalar bilan aralashtirmaslik kerak.
Uning oddiy mantiqi unga aniq firibgarlikdan qochishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: A method based on practicality and real-world effectiveness rather than theory or ideals.
words.definitionUz: Nazariya yoki ideallarga emas, balki amaliylik va real natijaga asoslangan yondashuv.
words.example1: The manager took a pragmatic approach to solving the staffing issue.
words.example1Translation: Menejer xodimlar muammosini hal qilishda amaliy yondashuvni qo'lladi.
words.example2: Instead of debating theory, they adopted a pragmatic approach to the budget cuts.
words.example2Translation: Nazariya haqida bahslashish o'rniga ular byudjet qisqartirilishiga amaliy yondashuvni qabul qilishdi.
words.example3: Her pragmatic approach helped the team finish the project on time.
words.example3Translation: Uning amaliy yondashuvi jamoaga loyihani o'z vaqtida tugatishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: A pragmatic approach often focuses on what works rather than what's ideal.
The government took a pragmatic approach to managing the economic crisis.
His pragmatic approach to negotiations led to a quick agreement.
They prefer a pragmatic approach over rigid, theoretical solutions.
A pragmatic approach to parenting focuses on what truly works for the family.
The doctor recommended a pragmatic approach to managing chronic pain.
A pragmatic approach to climate policy considers both economy and environment.
extraExampleTranslations: Amaliy yondashuv ko'pincha ideal narsaga emas, balki ishlaydigan narsaga e'tibor qaratadi.
Hukumat iqtisodiy inqirozni boshqarishda amaliy yondashuvni qo'lladi.
Uning muzokaralarga amaliy yondashuvi tezkor kelishuvga olib keldi.
Ular qat'iy nazariy yechimlardan ko'ra amaliy yondashuvni afzal ko'rishadi.
Tarbiyaga amaliy yondashuv oila uchun haqiqatan ham ishlaydigan narsaga e'tibor qaratadi.
Shifokor surunkali og'riqni boshqarishda amaliy yondashuvni tavsiya qildi.
Iqlim siyosatiga amaliy yondashuv ham iqtisodiyot, ham atrof-muhitni hisobga oladi.

words.definition: The exact or primary meaning of a word, phrase, or text.
words.definitionUz: So'z, ibora yoki matnning aniq, asosiy va o'zgartirilmagan ma'nosi.
words.example1: The literal meaning of the idiom is very different from its actual usage.
words.example1Translation: Iboraning aniq ma'nosi uning haqiqiy qo'llanilishidan juda farq qiladi.
words.example2: She explained both the literal meaning and the figurative meaning of the phrase.
words.example2Translation: U iboraning ham aniq, ham majoziy ma'nosini tushuntirdi.
words.example3: Translators must consider the literal meaning before interpreting it culturally.
words.example3Translation: Tarjimonlar madaniy talqin qilishdan oldin aniq ma'noni hisobga olishlari kerak.
extraExamples: The literal meaning of "break a leg" has nothing to do with injury.
He took her comment too literally, missing its real intention.
Understanding the literal meaning is the first step in learning idioms.
The literal meaning of the word changed slightly over centuries.
In poetry, the literal meaning is often less important than the symbolism.
Students sometimes confuse the literal meaning with the intended message.
The literal meaning of the Latin phrase is "knowledge is power."
extraExampleTranslations: "Break a leg" iborasining aniq ma'nosi jarohat bilan hech qanday aloqasi yo'q.
U uning izohini juda so'zma-so'z qabul qilib, uning haqiqiy maqsadini tushunmadi.
Aniq ma'noni tushunish iboralarni o'rganishning birinchi qadamidir.
So'zning aniq ma'nosi asrlar davomida biroz o'zgardi.
She'rda aniq ma'no ko'pincha ramziy ma'nodan kamroq muhim hisoblanadi.
O'quvchilar ba'zan aniq ma'noni mo'ljallangan xabar bilan adashtirishadi.
Lotin iborasining aniq ma'nosi "bilim - bu kuch" degani.

words.definition: To be likely to do something, especially something undesirable.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pincha yoqimsiz bir narsani qilish ehtimoli yuqori bo'lish.
words.example1: If you don't water the plant, it's liable to die quickly.
words.example1Translation: Agar o'simlikni sug'ormasangiz, u tezda quriб qolish ehtimoli bor.
words.example2: He's liable to forget important details if he doesn't write them down.
words.example2Translation: Agar muhim tafsilotlarni yozib qo'ymasa, u ularni unutib qo'yish ehtimoli bor.
words.example3: Old wooden bridges are liable to collapse under heavy weight.
words.example3Translation: Eski yog'och ko'priklar og'ir yuk ostida qulash ehtimoli yuqori.
extraExamples: If left unattended, the fire is liable to spread quickly.
She's liable to get upset if you criticize her work in public.
Without proper maintenance, the machine is liable to break down.
He's liable to be late, so don't wait for him to start the meeting.
The road is liable to flood during heavy rain.
Children are liable to lose interest if the lesson goes on too long.
The contract is liable to be canceled if payments aren't made on time.
extraExampleTranslations: Agar e'tiborsiz qoldirilsa, olov tezda tarqalib ketish ehtimoli bor.
Agar siz uning ishini hamma oldida tanqid qilsangiz, u xafa bo'lish ehtimoli bor.
Tegishli texnik xizmatsiz, mashina buzilib qolish ehtimoli yuqori.
U kechikish ehtimoli bor, shuning uchun uchrashuvni boshlash uchun uni kutmang.
Kuchli yomg'ir paytida yo'l suv bosishi ehtimoli bor.
Agar dars juda uzoq davom etsa, bolalar qiziqishni yo'qotish ehtimoli bor.
Agar to'lovlar o'z vaqtida amalga oshirilmasa, shartnoma bekor qilinish ehtimoli bor.

words.definition: To go back over the path previously taken in order to find something or reconsider actions.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani topish yoki harakatlarni qayta ko'rib chiqish uchun avval bosgan yo'lni qaytib o'tish.
words.example1: She had to retrace her steps to find the keys she had dropped.
words.example1Translation: U tushirib yuborgan kalitlarni topish uchun qadamlarini orqaga qaytarishi kerak edi.
words.example2: If you're lost, it's best to retrace your steps back to a familiar location.
words.example2Translation: Agar adashib qolgan bo'lsangiz, tanish joyga qaytib qadamlaringizni orqaga qaytarish eng yaxshisidir.
words.example3: He retraced his steps in the investigation to find where the evidence went missing.
words.example3Translation: U dalillar qaerda yo'qolganini topish uchun tergovda qadamlarini orqaga qaytardi.
extraExamples: I had to retrace my steps to remember where I parked the car.
The detective retraced the victim's steps to reconstruct the timeline.
She retraced her steps through the museum to find the lost ticket.
When his argument fell apart, he had to retrace his steps and start over.
Hikers are advised to retrace their steps if they lose the trail.
He retraced his steps mentally to understand where the project went wrong.
After getting lost in the forest, they retraced their steps carefully.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashinani qayerga qo'yganimni eslash uchun qadamlarimni orqaga qaytarishim kerak edi.
Detektiv vaqt jadvalini tiklash uchun qurbonning qadamlarini orqaga qaytardi.
U yo'qolgan chiptani topish uchun muzey orqali qadamlarini orqaga qaytardi.
Uning dalili parchalanib ketganda, u qadamlarini orqaga qaytarib qaytadan boshlashi kerak edi.
Sayyohlarga yo'lni yo'qotib qo'yishsa qadamlarini orqaga qaytarish maslahat beriladi.
U loyihaning qayerda noto'g'ri ketganini tushunish uchun aqlan qadamlarini orqaga qaytardi.
O'rmonda adashib qolgandan keyin, ular ehtiyotkorlik bilan qadamlarini orqaga qaytarishdi.

words.definition: To correct or humble someone who is behaving arrogantly.
words.definitionUz: Manmanlik qilayotgan kishini kamtarlikka chaqirib, joyiga qo'yish.
words.example1: She put him in his place after he tried to take credit for her work.
words.example1Translation: U o'z ishi uchun e'tirof olishga harakat qilganidan keyin, u uni o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
words.example2: The teacher put the student in his place for being disrespectful.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchi hurmatsizlik qilgani uchun o'quvchini o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
words.example3: His boss put him in his place after he spoke rudely to a customer.
words.example3Translation: Mijozga qo'pol gapirganidan keyin uning boshlig'i uni o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
extraExamples: The captain put the new player in his place when he started bragging.
She didn't hesitate to put the rude customer in his place.
He was finally put in his place after years of arrogant behavior.
The manager firmly put the intern in her place after the mistake.
It felt satisfying to see someone finally put him in his place.
She politely but firmly put her colleague in his place during the meeting.
The coach put the overconfident athlete in his place before the match.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi o'yinchi maqtana boshlaganda, kapitan uni o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
U qo'pol mijozni o'z o'rniga qo'yishda ikkilanmadi.
Yillar davomidagi manman xulq-atvoridan keyin u nihoyat o'z o'rniga qo'yildi.
Menejer xatosidan keyin amaliyotchini qat'iyat bilan o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
Kimnidir nihoyat o'z o'rniga qo'yilganini ko'rish qoniqarli his qildirdi.
U yig'ilish paytida hamkasbini muloyimlik bilan, lekin qat'iyat bilan o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.
Murabbiy o'yindan oldin o'ziga haddan tashqari ishongan sportchini o'z o'rniga qo'ydi.

words.translation: taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, chidab bo'lmaydigan vaziyatda
words.definition: When a situation becomes critical or demanding decisive action.
words.definitionUz: Vaziyat juda muhim yoki hal qiluvchi qaror qabul qilishni talab qiladigan holatga kelganda.
words.example1: When push comes to shove, she always puts her family first.
words.example1Translation: Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, u doimo oilasini birinchi o'ringa qo'yadi.
words.example2: When push comes to shove, he's the kind of person you can count on.
words.example2Translation: Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, u tayanish mumkin bo'lgan odam turidan biri.
words.example3: When push comes to shove, the company will have to cut costs somewhere.
words.example3Translation: Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, kompaniya qayerdandir xarajatlarni kamaytirishga majbur bo'ladi.
extraExamples: When push comes to shove, I know my friends will be there for me.
When push comes to shove, he'll choose loyalty over personal gain.
When push comes to shove, they'll have to decide between the two offers.
When push comes to shove, she always stands up for what's right.
When push comes to shove, the team needs a clear leader to make decisions.
When push comes to shove, you find out who your real friends are.
When push comes to shove, the company will choose its most experienced employees to stay.
extraExampleTranslations: Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, do'stlarim men uchun yonimda bo'lishini bilaman.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, u shaxsiy manfaatdan ko'ra sodiqlikni tanlaydi.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, ular ikkita taklif o'rtasida tanlov qilishlari kerak bo'ladi.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, u doimo to'g'ri narsa uchun kurashadi.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, jamoaga qaror qabul qilish uchun aniq rahbar kerak.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, haqiqiy do'stlaringiz kimligini bilib olasiz.
Taqdir hal qiluvchi pallada, kompaniya qolish uchun eng tajribali xodimlarini tanlaydi.

words.definition: People without specialist or professional knowledge in a particular field.
words.definitionUz: Ma'lum bir sohada maxsus yoki professional bilimga ega bo'lmagan oddiy odamlar.
words.example1: The doctor explained the diagnosis in terms that laymen could understand.
words.example1Translation: Shifokor tashxisni oddiy odamlar tushuna oladigan tilda tushuntirdi.
words.example2: The legal document was too complex for laymen to fully understand.
words.example2Translation: Yuridik hujjat oddiy odamlar uchun to'liq tushunish uchun juda murakkab edi.
words.example3: For laymen, the technical jargon used in the report was confusing.
words.example3Translation: Oddiy odamlar uchun hisobotda ishlatilgan texnik atamalar chalkash edi.
extraExamples: The scientist tried to simplify her explanation for laymen at the conference.
Laymen often rely on experts to interpret complicated financial data.
The book is written for laymen interested in learning about astronomy.
Even laymen could understand the basic concept behind the experiment.
The instructions were written clearly enough for laymen to follow.
Medical terms can be confusing for laymen without a healthcare background.
The lecture aimed to make quantum physics accessible to laymen.
extraExampleTranslations: Olim konferensiyada oddiy odamlar uchun o'z tushuntirishini soddalashtirishga harakat qildi.
Oddiy odamlar ko'pincha murakkab moliyaviy ma'lumotlarni talqin qilish uchun mutaxassislarga tayanishadi.
Kitob astronomiyani o'rganishga qiziqqan oddiy odamlar uchun yozilgan.
Hatto oddiy odamlar ham tajriba ortidagi asosiy tushunchani tushunishlari mumkin edi.
Ko'rsatmalar oddiy odamlar amal qilishi uchun yetarlicha aniq yozilgan edi.
Tibbiy atamalar sog'liqni saqlash sohasida ma'lumotga ega bo'lmagan oddiy odamlar uchun chalkash bo'lishi mumkin.
Ma'ruza kvant fizikasini oddiy odamlar uchun tushunarli qilishni maqsad qilgan edi.

name: Word Mastery
description: Master high-level C1 and B2 collocations

words.definition: Easy to reach or use.
words.definitionUz: Oson yetib boriladigan — biror joyga yoki narsaga osongina yetib borish yoki foydalanish mumkin bo‘lgan.
words.example1: The library is easily accessible by public transport.
words.example1Translation: Kutubxona jamoat transporti orqali osongina yetib boriladi.
words.example2: This website is easily accessible on mobile phones.
words.example2Translation: Bu veb-sayt mobil telefonlarda osongina ochiladi.
words.example3: The park is easily accessible for wheelchair users.
words.example3Translation: Bog‘ nogironlar aravachasida yuruvchilar uchun osongina yetib boriladi.
extraExamples: The hotel is easily accessible from the airport.
Online courses are easily accessible nowadays.
The museum is easily accessible for families.
This information is easily accessible on our website.
The beach is easily accessible by car.
Healthy food is easily accessible in this city.
The gym is easily accessible after work.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmonxona aeroportdan osongina yetib boriladi.
Onlayn kurslar hozirgi kunda osongina mavjud.
Muzey oilalar uchun osongina yetib boriladi.
Bu ma’lumot bizning veb-saytimizda osongina topiladi.
Plyaj mashina bilan osongina yetib boriladi.
Sog‘lom ovqat bu shaharda osongina topiladi.
Sport zaliga ishdan keyin osongina borish mumkin.

words.definition: Easy to obtain or find immediately.
words.definitionUz: Oson topiladigan — darhol olish yoki topish mumkin bo‘lgan.
words.example1: Fresh vegetables are readily available at the market.
words.example1Translation: Yangi sabzavotlar bozorda oson topiladi.
words.example2: Help is readily available if you need it.
words.example2Translation: Agar kerak bo‘lsa, yordam darhol topiladi.
words.example3: This information is readily available online.
words.example3Translation: Bu ma’lumot internetda osongina topiladi.
extraExamples: Trained staff are readily available.
The medicine is readily available in pharmacies.
Support is readily available 24/7.
Public transport is readily available in the city.
Resources are readily available for students.
Water is readily available from the tap.
Books on this topic are readily available in the library.
extraExampleTranslations: Tayyorlangan xodimlar darhol mavjud.
Dori dorixonlarda osongina topiladi.
Yordam 24/7 osongina mavjud.
Shahar ichida jamoat transporti osongina topiladi.
Talabalar uchun resurslar osongina mavjud.
Suv jo‘mdan osongina olinadi.
Bu mavzudagi kitoblar kutubxonada osongina topiladi.

words.definition: To do something by mistake or without intention.
