words.definitionUz: Tasodifan qilmoq — biror ishni xato yoki ataylab emas, tasodifan bajarish.
words.example1: I accidentally deleted the file.
words.example1Translation: Men faylni tasodifan o‘chirib tashladim.
words.example2: She accidentally sent the email to the wrong person.
words.example2Translation: U xatni tasodifan boshqa odamga yubordi.
words.example3: He accidentally broke the glass.
words.example3Translation: U stakanni tasodifan sindirdi.
extraExamples: I accidentally locked myself out.
She accidentally revealed the surprise.
He accidentally spilled coffee on his shirt.
They accidentally met at the airport.
I accidentally liked an old post.
The child accidentally knocked over the vase.
We accidentally took the wrong train.
extraExampleTranslations: Men tasodifan o‘zimni tashqarida qoldirdim.
U tasodifan syurprizni ochib qo‘ydi.
U tasodifan ko‘ylagiga qahva to‘kdi.
Ular tasodifan aeroportda uchrashib qolishdi.
Men tasodifan eski postni yoqtirib qo‘ydim.
Bola tasodifan vazani ag‘darib yubordi.
Biz tasodifan noto‘g‘ri poyezdga chiqib oldik.

words.definition: To change in a sudden and noticeable way.
words.definitionUz: Keskin o‘zgarmoq — to‘satdan va sezilarli darajada o‘zgarish.
words.example1: Her life dramatically changed after the accident.
words.example1Translation: Avtohalokatdan keyin uning hayoti keskin o‘zgardi.
words.example2: The weather can dramatically change in the mountains.
words.example2Translation: Tog‘larda ob-havo keskin o‘zgarishi mumkin.
words.example3: Technology has dramatically changed our lives.
words.example3Translation: Texnologiya hayotimizni keskin o‘zgartirdi.
extraExamples: The city has dramatically changed in the last decade.
His health dramatically changed after the treatment.
The situation can dramatically change overnight.
Prices have dramatically changed this year.
The ending of the movie dramatically changed everything.
The team’s performance dramatically changed.
Fashion trends dramatically change every season.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar so‘nggi o‘n yilda keskin o‘zgardi.
Davolanishdan keyin uning sog‘lig‘i keskin yaxshilandi.
Vaziyat bir kechada keskin o‘zgarishi mumkin.
Narxlar bu yil keskin o‘zgardi.
Filmining oxiri hamma narsani keskin o‘zgartirdi.
Jamoaning natijasi keskin o‘zgardi.
Moda trendlari har faslda keskin o‘zgaradi.

words.definition: Situated in a place that is easy to reach or use.
words.definitionUz: Qulay joylashgan — yetib borish yoki foydalanish uchun qulay joyda joylashgan.
words.example1: The hotel is conveniently located near the beach.
words.example1Translation: Mehmonxona plyaj yaqinida qulay joylashgan.
words.example2: My office is conveniently located in the city center.
words.example2Translation: Mening ofisim shahar markazida qulay joylashgan.
words.example3: The supermarket is conveniently located for residents.
words.example3Translation: Supermarket aholi uchun qulay joylashgan.
extraExamples: The school is conveniently located near public transport.
The restaurant is conveniently located for tourists.
Our clinic is conveniently located in a quiet area.
The gym is conveniently located next to my house.
The station is conveniently located for commuters.
The park is conveniently located for families.
The shop is conveniently located on the main street.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab jamoat transporti yaqinida qulay joylashgan.
Restoran sayyohlar uchun qulay joylashgan.
Klinikamiz tinch hududda qulay joylashgan.
Sport zali mening uyim yonida qulay joylashgan.
Vokzal yo‘lovchilar uchun qulay joylashgan.
Bog‘ oilalar uchun qulay joylashgan.
Do‘kon asosiy ko‘chada qulay joylashgan.

words.definition: To consider something without personal bias or emotion.
words.definitionUz: Xolisona qaramoq — biror narsaga shaxsiy tarafkashlik yoki his-tuyg‘usiz qarash.
words.example1: It’s important to look at the situation objectively.
words.example1Translation: Vaziyatga xolisona qarash muhim.
words.example2: Try to look at the problem objectively.
words.example2Translation: Muammoni xolisona ko‘rib chiqishga harakat qiling.
words.example3: She looked at the feedback objectively.
words.example3Translation: U fikr-mulohazalarga xolisona qaradi.
extraExamples: Scientists must look at data objectively.
It’s hard to look at your own mistakes objectively.
The judge looked at the case objectively.
We need to look at the facts objectively.
Looking at the issue objectively helped us find a solution.
He tried to look at the criticism objectively.
Parents sometimes find it difficult to look at their children objectively.
extraExampleTranslations: Olimlar ma’lumotlarga xolisona qarashlari kerak.
O‘z xatolaringizga xolisona qarash qiyin.
Sudya ishga xolisona qaradi.
Biz faktlarga xolisona qarashimiz kerak.
Masalaga xolisona qarash bizga yechim topishga yordam berdi.
U tanqidga xolisona qarashga harakat qildi.
Ota-onalar ba’zida farzandlariga xolisona qarashni qiyin deb bilishadi.

words.definition: Not expensive when compared to other similar things.
words.definitionUz: Nisbatan arzon — boshqa shunga o‘xshash narsalarga nisbatan qimmat bo‘lmagan.
words.example1: This phone is relatively cheap for its features.
words.example1Translation: Bu telefon o‘z imkoniyatlariga nisbatan nisbatan arzon.
words.example2: The hotel is relatively cheap compared to others in the area.
words.example2Translation: Mehmonxona hududdagi boshqalarga nisbatan nisbatan arzon.
words.example3: Eating out is relatively cheap in this city.
words.example3Translation: Bu shaharda tashqarida ovqatlanish nisbatan arzon.
extraExamples: The flight was relatively cheap during the week.
This brand offers relatively cheap options.
Housing is relatively cheap in the suburbs.
The course is relatively cheap for the quality.
Public transport is relatively cheap here.
The clothes are relatively cheap but good quality.
Books are relatively cheap online.
extraExampleTranslations: Hafta ichida parvoz narxi nisbatan arzon edi.
Bu brend nisbatan arzon variantlarni taklif qiladi.
Shaharcha atrofida uy-joy narxi nisbatan arzon.
Kurs sifatiga nisbatan nisbatan arzon.
Bu yerda jamoat transporti nisbatan arzon.
Kiyimlar nisbatan arzon, lekin sifati yaxshi.
Kitoblar internetda nisbatan arzon.

words.definition: Truly and sincerely happy.
words.definitionUz: Chin dildan baxtli — haqiqatan ham samimiy baxtli.
words.example1: I felt genuinely happy for her success.
words.example1Translation: Men uning muvaffaqiyati uchun chin dildan xursand bo‘ldim.
words.example2: She looked genuinely happy on her wedding day.
words.example2Translation: U to‘y kuni chin dildan baxtli ko‘rinardi.
words.example3: He is genuinely happy with his life.
words.example3Translation: U hayotidan chin dildan mamnun.
extraExamples: The children were genuinely happy to see their grandparents.
It was a genuinely happy occasion.
She made him genuinely happy.
I’m genuinely happy for you.
The team was genuinely happy with the result.
He seems genuinely happy now.
Genuinely happy people spread positivity.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar bobosi va buvisini ko‘rib chin dildan xursand bo‘lishdi.
Bu chin dildan baxtli voqea edi.
U uni chin dildan baxtli qildi.
Men siz uchun chin dildan xursandman.
Jamoa natijadan chin dildan mamnun edi.
U hozir chin dildan baxtli ko‘rinadi.
Chin dildan baxtli odamlar ijobiylik tarqatadi.

words.definition: To make something noticeably better.
words.definitionUz: Sezilarli darajada yaxshilamoq — biror narsani sezilarli darajada yaxshiroq holatga keltirish.
words.example1: Regular exercise can significantly improve your health.
words.example1Translation: Muntazam sport bilan shug‘ullanish sog‘lig‘ingizni sezilarli darajada yaxshilashi mumkin.
words.example2: The new system will significantly improve efficiency.
words.example2Translation: Yangi tizim samaradorlikni sezilarli darajada yaxshilaydi.
words.example3: Her English has significantly improved.
words.example3Translation: Uning ingliz tili sezilarli darajada yaxshilandi.
extraExamples: The medicine significantly improved her condition.
Technology has significantly improved our lives.
The training will significantly improve your skills.
Sales have significantly improved this month.
The situation has significantly improved.
Education can significantly improve opportunities.
The renovation significantly improved the house.
extraExampleTranslations: Dori uning holatini sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.
Texnologiya hayotimizni sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.
Trening ko‘nikmalaringizni sezilarli darajada yaxshilaydi.
Bu oy sotuv sezilarli darajada oshdi.
Vaziyat sezilarli darajada yaxshilandi.
Ta’lim imkoniyatlarni sezilarli darajada yaxshilashi mumkin.
Ta’mir uy holatini sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.

words.definition: To advise something with great enthusiasm or certainty.
words.definitionUz: Qattiq tavsiya qilmoq — biror narsani katta ishtiyoq yoki ishonch bilan maslahat berish.
words.example1: I strongly recommend this book.
words.example1Translation: Men bu kitobni qattiq tavsiya qilaman.
words.example2: Doctors strongly recommend regular check-ups.
words.example2Translation: Shifokorlar muntazam tekshiruvlarni qattiq tavsiya qilishadi.
words.example3: I strongly recommend visiting this place.
words.example3Translation: Men bu joyni ziyorat qilishni qattiq tavsiya qilaman.
extraExamples: She strongly recommends the new restaurant.
The teacher strongly recommends studying every day.
Experts strongly recommend wearing masks.
I strongly recommend this course for beginners.
He strongly recommends saving money early.
The guide strongly recommends taking water.
Parents strongly recommend listening to advice.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi restoranni qattiq tavsiya qiladi.
O‘qituvchi har kuni o‘qishni qattiq tavsiya qiladi.
Mutaxassislar niqob taqishni qattiq tavsiya qilishadi.
Men bu kursni boshlovchilar uchun qattiq tavsiya qilaman.
U pulni erta tejashni qattiq tavsiya qiladi.
Gid suv olishni qattiq tavsiya qiladi.
Ota-onalar maslahatni tinglashni qattiq tavsiya qilishadi.

words.definition: Eventually; at some point in the future.
words.definitionUz: Ertami-kechmi — kelajakda bir payt, oxir-oqibat sodir bo‘ladigan holat.
words.example1: Sooner or later, you will have to make a decision.
words.example1Translation: Ertami-kechmi, siz qaror qabul qilishingizga to‘g‘ri keladi.
words.example2: Sooner or later, the truth always comes out.
words.example2Translation: Ertami-kechmi, haqiqat har doim ochiladi.
words.example3: Sooner or later, I will achieve my goal.
words.example3Translation: Ertami-kechmi, men maqsadimga erishaman.
extraExamples: Sooner or later, technology will change everything.
Sooner or later, she will understand.
Sooner or later, we all make mistakes.
Sooner or later, the weather will improve.
Sooner or later, you will find what you are looking for.
Sooner or later, hard work pays off.
Sooner or later, he will apologize.
extraExampleTranslations: Ertami-kechmi, texnologiya hamma narsani o‘zgartiradi.
Ertami-kechmi, u tushunadi.
Ertami-kechmi, hammamiz xato qilamiz.
Ertami-kechmi, ob-havo yaxshilanadi.
Ertami-kechmi, siz izlayotgan narsani topasiz.
Ertami-kechmi, qattiq mehnat o‘z samarasini beradi.
Ertami-kechmi, u uzr so‘raydi.

words.definition: Occasionally; from time to time.
words.definitionUz: Vaqti-vaqti bilan — ba’zida, vaqti-vaqti bilan sodir bo‘ladigan holat.
words.example1: I still think about that day now and then.
words.example1Translation: Men hali ham o‘sha kun haqida vaqti-vaqti bilan o‘ylayman.
words.example2: We meet now and then for coffee.
words.example2Translation: Biz vaqti-vaqti bilan kofe ichish uchun uchrashamiz.
words.example3: Now and then, I like to read old letters.
words.example3Translation: Vaqti-vaqti bilan eski xatlarni o‘qishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
extraExamples: Now and then, it rains heavily in the desert.
She visits her grandparents now and then.
Now and then, I miss my old school.
We go to the cinema now and then.
Now and then, life surprises you.
He calls me now and then.
Now and then, I cook traditional food.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqti-vaqti bilan cho‘lda kuchli yomg‘ir yog‘adi.
U vaqti-vaqti bilan bobosi va buvisini ko‘rib turadi.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan eski maktabimni sog‘inaman.
Biz vaqti-vaqti bilan kinoga boramiz.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan hayot sizni hayratda qoldiradi.
U vaqti-vaqti bilan menga qo‘ng‘iroq qiladi.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan milliy taomlarni pishiraman.

words.definition: Simple and clear; with no grey areas.
words.definitionUz: Oppoq-qora — oddiy va aniq; oraliq holatlar yo‘q.
words.example1: The issue isn’t as black and white as it seems.
words.example1Translation: Masala ko‘rinishidan oppoq-qora emas.
words.example2: Life is rarely black and white.
words.example2Translation: Hayot kamdan-kam hollarda oppoq-qora bo‘ladi.
words.example3: He sees everything in black and white.
words.example3Translation: U hamma narsani oppoq-qora ko‘radi.
extraExamples: The rules are black and white.
It’s not a black and white situation.
She thinks in black and white terms.
The contract is written in black and white.
Moral questions are not always black and white.
The photo is in black and white.
The law is clear and black and white.
extraExampleTranslations: Qoidalar oppoq-qora.
Bu oppoq-qora vaziyat emas.
U hamma narsani oppoq-qora nuqtai nazardan ko‘radi.
Shartnoma oppoq-qora yozilgan.
Axloqiy savollar har doim ham oppoq-qora bo‘lmaydi.
Rasm oppoq-qora.
Qonun aniq va oppoq-qora.

words.definition: In many different places; everywhere.
words.definitionUz: Hamma joyda — turli joylarda; har yerda.
words.example1: I’ve looked for my keys here, there and everywhere.
words.example1Translation: Kalitlarimni hamma joyda qidirib chiqdim.
words.example2: You can find his posters here, there and everywhere.
words.example2Translation: Uning plakatlarini hamma joyda topish mumkin.
words.example3: She seems to be here, there and everywhere at once.
words.example3Translation: U bir vaqtning o‘zida hamma joyda bo‘lgandek.
extraExamples: The news spread here, there and everywhere.
Flowers are blooming here, there and everywhere.
Children were running here, there and everywhere.
His influence is felt here, there and everywhere.
I’ve searched here, there and everywhere.
The scent was here, there and everywhere.
Problems appeared here, there and everywhere.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangilik hamma joyga tarqaldi.
Gullar hamma joyda gullamoqda.
Bolalar hamma joyda yugurishardi.
Uning ta’siri hamma joyda seziladi.
Men hamma joyda qidirib chiqdim.
Hid hamma joyda tarqalgan edi.
Muammolar hamma joyda paydo bo‘ldi.

words.word: A matter of life and death
words.definition: Extremely important or urgent.
words.definitionUz: Hayot-mamot masalasi — juda muhim yoki shoshilinch holat.
words.example1: To her, winning that competition was a matter of life and death.
words.example1Translation: U uchun o‘sha musobaqada g‘alaba qilish hayot-mamot masalasi edi.
words.example2: This is not a matter of life and death.
words.example2Translation: Bu hayot-mamot masalasi emas.
words.example3: In the hospital, every second is a matter of life and death.
words.example3Translation: Shifoxonada har soniya hayot-mamot masalasidir.
extraExamples: Getting to the hospital in time was a matter of life and death.
For him, football is a matter of life and death.
This decision is a matter of life and death.
Don’t treat everything like a matter of life and death.
The operation was a matter of life and death.
Saving the company became a matter of life and death.
To some people, reputation is a matter of life and death.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifoxonaga o‘z vaqtida yetib borish hayot-mamot masalasi edi.
U uchun futbol hayot-mamot masalasidir.
Bu qaror hayot-mamot masalasidir.
Hamma narsani hayot-mamot masalasidek qabul qilmang.
Operatsiya hayot-mamot masalasi edi.
Kompaniyani saqlab qolish hayot-mamot masalasiga aylandi.
Ba’zi odamlar uchun obro‘ hayot-mamot masalasidir.

words.definition: Learning through experimenting and making mistakes.
words.definitionUz: Xatoliklar orqali o‘rganish — tajriba qilib va xato qilib o‘rganish usuli.
words.example1: I learned to cook through trial and error.
words.example1Translation: Men pishirishni xatoliklar orqali o‘rgandim.
words.example2: Most inventions come from trial and error.
words.example2Translation: Ko‘p ixtirolar xatoliklar orqali paydo bo‘ladi.
words.example3: Parenting is often a process of trial and error.
words.example3Translation: Ota-onalik ko‘pincha xatoliklar orqali o‘rganiladi.
extraExamples: We solved the problem by trial and error.
Learning a language involves trial and error.
The team improved through trial and error.
Trial and error is part of the creative process.
He fixed the bike by trial and error.
Success often comes after many trials and errors.
Children learn best through trial and error.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz muammoni xatoliklar orqali hal qildik.
Til o‘rganish xatoliklar orqali bo‘ladi.
Jamoa xatoliklar orqali yaxshilandi.
Xatoliklar orqali o‘rganish ijodiy jarayonning bir qismi.
U velosipedni xatoliklar orqali tuzatdi.
Muvaffaqiyat ko‘pincha ko‘p xatolar va sinovlardan keyin keladi.
Bolalar xatoliklar orqali eng yaxshi o‘rganishadi.

words.definition: Not right away, but certainly in the future.
words.definitionUz: Darhol emas, lekin albatta — hozir emas, ammo kelajakda shubhasiz sodir bo‘ladigan.
words.example1: You will be mine, not immediately but definitely.
words.example1Translation: Sen meniki bo‘lasan, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
words.example2: The change will happen, not immediately but definitely.
words.example2Translation: O‘zgarish sodir bo‘ladi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
words.example3: Success will come, not immediately but definitely.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyat keladi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
extraExamples: I will achieve my dream, not immediately but definitely.
The results will show, not immediately but definitely.
We will win, not immediately but definitely.
Things will improve, not immediately but definitely.
He will understand, not immediately but definitely.
The project will succeed, not immediately but definitely.
She will forgive you, not immediately but definitely.
extraExampleTranslations: Men orzularimga erishaman, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
Natijalar ko‘rinadi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
Biz g‘alaba qozonamiz, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
Ishlar yaxshilanadi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
U tushunadi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
Loyiha muvaffaqiyatli bo‘ladi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.
U sizni kechiradi, darhol emas, lekin albatta.

words.definition: Over a long period of time; eventually.
words.definitionUz: Uzoq muddatda — uzoq vaqt davomida; oxir-oqibat.
words.example1: Studying hard will benefit you in the long run.
words.example1Translation: Qattiq o‘qish uzoq muddatda sizga foyda keltiradi.
words.example2: In the long run, healthy eating is better.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq muddatda sog‘lom ovqatlanish yaxshiroq.
words.example3: The investment will pay off in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Sarmoya uzoq muddatda o‘zini oqlaydi.
extraExamples: In the long run, patience wins.
Exercise is good for you in the long run.
In the long run, honesty is the best policy.
The decision will be better in the long run.
Saving money helps in the long run.
In the long run, education changes lives.
Hard work pays off in the long run.
extraExampleTranslations: Uzoq muddatda sabr g‘alaba qiladi.
Sport uzoq muddatda siz uchun foydali.
Uzoq muddatda halollik eng yaxshi siyosat.
Qaror uzoq muddatda yaxshiroq bo‘ladi.
Pul tejash uzoq muddatda yordam beradi.
Uzoq muddatda ta’lim hayotni o‘zgartiradi.
Qattiq mehnat uzoq muddatda o‘z samarasini beradi.

words.word: At the end of the day
words.definition: Ultimately; when everything is considered.
words.definitionUz: Oxir-oqibat — hamma narsani hisobga olganda; aslida.
words.example1: At the end of the day, your health is the most important thing.
words.example1Translation: Oxir-oqibat, sog‘lig‘ingiz eng muhim narsa.
words.example2: At the end of the day, it’s just a game.
words.example2Translation: Oxir-oqibat, bu faqat o‘yin.
words.example3: At the end of the day, we all want happiness.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, hammamiz baxtni xohlaymiz.
extraExamples: At the end of the day, money isn’t everything.
At the end of the day, family comes first.
At the end of the day, hard work matters.
At the end of the day, it’s your choice.
At the end of the day, we learn from mistakes.
At the end of the day, honesty wins.
At the end of the day, results speak for themselves.
extraExampleTranslations: Oxir-oqibat, pul hamma narsa emas.
Oxir-oqibat, oila birinchi o‘rinda.
Oxir-oqibat, qattiq mehnat muhim.
Oxir-oqibat, bu sizning tanlovingiz.
Oxir-oqibat, biz xatolardan o‘rganamiz.
Oxir-oqibat, halollik g‘alaba qiladi.
Oxir-oqibat, natijalar o‘zini oqlaydi.

words.definition: Used to introduce a statement that says the opposite of what has been said.
words.definitionUz: Aksincha — oldin aytilgan gapga qarama-qarshi fikrni kiritish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I thought the movie would be boring. On the contrary, it was excellent.
words.example1Translation: Men film zerikarli bo‘ladi deb o‘ylagan edim. Aksincha, u ajoyib edi.
words.example2: He is not lazy. On the contrary, he works very hard.
words.example2Translation: U dangal emas. Aksincha, juda qattiq ishlaydi.
words.example3: It’s not expensive. On the contrary, it’s quite cheap.
words.example3Translation: Bu qimmat emas. Aksincha, ancha arzon.
extraExamples: She is not shy. On the contrary, she is very outgoing.
The weather is not bad. On the contrary, it’s beautiful.
On the contrary, I enjoyed the meeting.
He is not angry. On the contrary, he is happy.
It’s not difficult. On the contrary, it’s easy.
On the contrary, sales have increased.
The book is not boring. On the contrary, it’s fascinating.
extraExampleTranslations: U uyatchan emas. Aksincha, juda ochiqko‘ngil.
Ob-havo yomon emas. Aksincha, juda go‘zal.
Aksincha, men yig‘ilishdan zavq oldim.
U g‘azablanmagan. Aksincha, xursand.
Bu qiyin emas. Aksincha, oson.
Aksincha, sotuv oshgan.
Kitob zerikarli emas. Aksincha, juda qiziqarli.

words.definition: Used to introduce a balanced or fair comment.
words.definitionUz: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda — fikrni adolatli va muvozanatli tarzda bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: To be fair, she did try her best despite the difficulties.
words.example1Translation: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, u qiyinchiliklarga qaramay bor kuchini sarfladi.
words.example2: To be fair, the food was good but the service was slow.
words.example2Translation: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, ovqat yaxshi edi, lekin xizmat sekin edi.
words.example3: To be fair, he has improved a lot this year.
words.example3Translation: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, u bu yil juda ko‘p yaxshilandi.
extraExamples: To be fair, the team played well.
To be fair, it was a difficult decision.
To be fair, she deserves the promotion.
To be fair, the movie had some good moments.
To be fair, prices have risen everywhere.
To be fair, he tried his hardest.
To be fair, the weather could have been worse.
extraExampleTranslations: Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, jamoa yaxshi o‘ynadi.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, bu qiyin qaror edi.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, u lavozim oshirishga loyiq.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, filmda yaxshi lahzalar bor edi.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, narxlar hamma joyda oshgan.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, u bor kuchini sarfladi.
Adolat yuzasidan aytganda, ob-havo bundan ham yomon bo‘lishi mumkin edi.

words.definition: Used to say that something is probably true.
words.definitionUz: Ehtimol / chamasi — biror narsa haqiqatga yaqin ekanligini bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Presumably, the meeting was canceled due to the storm.
words.example1Translation: Ehtimol, yig‘ilish bo‘ron tufayli bekor qilingan.
words.example2: Presumably, she is still at work.
words.example2Translation: Chamasi, u hali ham ishda.
words.example3: Presumably, the train will be late again.
words.example3Translation: Ehtimol, poyezd yana kechikadi.
extraExamples: Presumably, he forgot about the appointment.
Presumably, the package has already arrived.
Presumably, prices will rise next year.
Presumably, they are on holiday.
Presumably, the answer is yes.
Presumably, the test will be difficult.
Presumably, she will call back soon.
extraExampleTranslations: Ehtimol, u uchrashuvni unutgan.
Chamasi, posilka allaqachon yetib kelgan.
Ehtimol, kelasi yil narxlar oshadi.
Ehtimol, ular ta’tilda.
Ehtimol, javob “ha”.
Ehtimol, imtihon qiyin bo‘ladi.
Ehtimol, u tez orada qayta qo‘ng‘iroq qiladi.

words.definition: Used to say that a statement is possibly true or could be argued.
words.definitionUz: Aytish mumkinki — biror fikr haqiqatga yaqin yoki bahslashish mumkinligini bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: He is arguably the best player on the team.
words.example1Translation: Aytish mumkinki, u jamoada eng yaxshi o‘yinchi.
words.example2: This is arguably the most beautiful city in the country.
words.example2Translation: Aytish mumkinki, bu mamlakatdagi eng go‘zal shahar.
words.example3: Arguably, this is the best solution.
words.example3Translation: Aytish mumkinki, bu eng yaxshi yechim.
extraExamples: Arguably, she is the most talented singer.
This book is arguably her best work.
Arguably, the decision was wrong.
He is arguably one of the greatest scientists.
Arguably, the team played better last season.
This restaurant is arguably the most popular in town.
Arguably, technology has improved our lives.
extraExampleTranslations: Aytish mumkinki, u eng iste’dodli qo‘shiqchi.
Bu kitob uning eng yaxshi asari deb aytish mumkin.
Aytish mumkinki, qaror noto‘g‘ri edi.
U dunyodagi eng buyuk olimlardan biri deb aytish mumkin.
Aytish mumkinki, jamoa o‘tgan mavsumda yaxshiroq o‘ynagan.
Bu restoran shahardagi eng mashhuri deb aytish mumkin.
Aytish mumkinki, texnologiya hayotimizni yaxshiladi.

words.definition: Used to introduce a surprising or noteworthy fact.
words.definitionUz: Qiziq tomoni shundaki — kutilmagan yoki diqqatga sazovor faktni kiritish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Interestingly enough, he doesn’t even like chocolate.
words.example1Translation: Qiziq tomoni shundaki, u hatto shokoladni ham yoqtirmaydi.
words.example2: Interestingly enough, the two friends had never met before.
words.example2Translation: Qiziq tomoni shundaki, ikki do‘st ilgari hech uchrashmagan edi.
words.example3: Interestingly enough, the solution was simple.
words.example3Translation: Qiziq tomoni shundaki, yechim oddiy edi.
extraExamples: Interestingly enough, she is afraid of heights.
Interestingly enough, the event was free.
Interestingly enough, they arrived at the same time.
Interestingly enough, no one noticed the mistake.
Interestingly enough, the book was written in one month.
Interestingly enough, he speaks five languages.
Interestingly enough, the answer was right in front of us.
extraExampleTranslations: Qiziq tomoni shundaki, u balandlikdan qo‘rqadi.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, tadbir bepul edi.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, ular bir vaqtda yetib kelishdi.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, hech kim xatoni payqamadi.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, kitob bir oyda yozilgan.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, u besh tilni biladi.
Qiziq tomoni shundaki, javob to‘g‘ri oldimizda edi.

words.definition: Used when something unexpected happens.
words.definitionUz: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni — kutilmagan voqea sodir bo‘lganda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: To my surprise, she agreed to the plan immediately.
words.example1Translation: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, u rejaga darhol rozi bo‘ldi.
words.example2: To my surprise, the exam was quite easy.
words.example2Translation: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, imtihon ancha oson bo‘lib chiqdi.
words.example3: To my surprise, he remembered my birthday.
words.example3Translation: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, u tug‘ilgan kunimni eslab qolgan edi.
extraExamples: To my surprise, the restaurant was empty.
To my surprise, she won the competition.
To my surprise, the package arrived early.
To my surprise, he apologized.
To my surprise, the movie was excellent.
To my surprise, it started raining.
To my surprise, the answer was correct.
extraExampleTranslations: Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, restoran bo‘sh edi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, u musobaqada g‘alaba qozondi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, posilka erta yetib keldi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, u uzr so‘radi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, film ajoyib edi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, yomg‘ir yog‘a boshladi.
Meni hayratlantirgan tomoni, javob to‘g‘ri chiqdi.

words.definition: Generally; on the whole.
words.definitionUz: Umuman olganda — umumiy jihatdan; asosan.
words.example1: By and large, the trip was a great success.
words.example1Translation: Umuman olganda, sayohat katta muvaffaqiyat bo‘ldi.
words.example2: By and large, people are honest.
words.example2Translation: Umuman olganda, odamlar halol.
words.example3: By and large, the project went well.
words.example3Translation: Umuman olganda, loyiha yaxshi o‘tdi.
extraExamples: By and large, the team performed well.
By and large, the book is interesting.
By and large, the weather was good.
By and large, students worked hard.
By and large, the changes were positive.
By and large, life is better now.
By and large, the event was successful.
extraExampleTranslations: Umuman olganda, jamoa yaxshi natija ko‘rsatdi.
Umuman olganda, kitob qiziqarli.
Umuman olganda, ob-havo yaxshi edi.
Umuman olganda, talabalar qattiq mehnat qilishdi.
Umuman olganda, o‘zgarishlar ijobiy bo‘ldi.
Umuman olganda, hayot hozir yaxshiroq.
Umuman olganda, tadbir muvaffaqiyatli o‘tdi.

words.definition: Used to add information that is true or to correct something.
words.definitionUz: Aslida / rostini aytganda — haqiqatni qo‘shish yoki oldingi gapni to‘g‘rilash uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: As a matter of fact, I’ve been there before.
words.example1Translation: Aslida, men u yerda oldin ham bo‘lganman.
words.example2: As a matter of fact, she is my sister.
words.example2Translation: Rostini aytganda, u mening singlim.
words.example3: As a matter of fact, I agree with you.
words.example3Translation: Aslida, men siz bilan roziman.
extraExamples: As a matter of fact, the meeting was canceled.
As a matter of fact, I don’t like coffee.
As a matter of fact, he called me yesterday.
As a matter of fact, the answer is no.
As a matter of fact, I already knew that.
As a matter of fact, prices have gone up.
As a matter of fact, she won the prize.
extraExampleTranslations: Aslida, yig‘ilish bekor qilingan.
Rostini aytganda, men qahvani yoqtirmayman.
Aslida, u kecha menga qo‘ng‘iroq qilgan.
Aslida, javob “yo‘q”.
Aslida, men buni allaqachon bilardim.
Aslida, narxlar oshgan.
Aslida, u mukofotni yutgan.

words.definition: Considering everything; generally.
words.definitionUz: Umuman olganda — hamma narsani hisobga olib; umumiy jihatdan.
words.example1: On the whole, the conference was very well organized.
words.example1Translation: Umuman olganda, konferensiya juda yaxshi tashkil etilgan edi.
words.example2: On the whole, I enjoyed the trip.
words.example2Translation: Umuman olganda, sayohat menga yoqdi.
words.example3: On the whole, the book was interesting.
words.example3Translation: Umuman olganda, kitob qiziqarli edi.
extraExamples: On the whole, the team did well.
On the whole, life is good.
On the whole, the food was excellent.
On the whole, the movie was enjoyable.
On the whole, students passed the exam.
On the whole, the weather was pleasant.
On the whole, it was a successful year.
extraExampleTranslations: Umuman olganda, jamoa yaxshi ishladi.
Umuman olganda, hayot yaxshi.
Umuman olganda, ovqat ajoyib edi.
Umuman olganda, film yoqimli edi.
Umuman olganda, talabalar imtihondan o‘tishdi.
Umuman olganda, ob-havo yoqimli edi.
Umuman olganda, bu muvaffaqiyatli yil bo‘ldi.

words.definition: Used to express an honest opinion.
words.definitionUz: Rostini aytganda / ochig‘ini aytganda — halol fikrni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Frankly speaking, I wasn’t very impressed with the service.
words.example1Translation: Rostini aytganda, xizmat meni unchalik hayratlantirmadi.
words.example2: Frankly speaking, I think the plan needs improvement.
words.example2Translation: Ochig‘ini aytganda, reja yaxshilanishi kerak deb o‘ylayman.
words.example3: Frankly speaking, the movie was disappointing.
words.example3Translation: Rostini aytganda, film umidlarni oqlamadi.
extraExamples: Frankly speaking, I don’t like the idea.
Frankly speaking, you need more practice.
Frankly speaking, the food was too salty.
Frankly speaking, I’m tired of waiting.
Frankly speaking, this is the best option.
Frankly speaking, she did a great job.
Frankly speaking, prices are too high.
extraExampleTranslations: Rostini aytganda, bu g‘oyani yoqtirmayman.
Ochig‘ini aytganda, sizga ko‘proq mashq kerak.
Rostini aytganda, ovqat juda sho‘r edi.
Rostini aytganda, kutishdan charchadim.
Rostini aytganda, bu eng yaxshi variant.
Rostini aytganda, u ajoyib ish qildi.
Rostini aytganda, narxlar juda yuqori.

words.definition: In my opinion.
words.definitionUz: Mening fikrimcha — o‘z fikrimni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: As far as I’m concerned, this is the best solution.
words.example1Translation: Mening fikrimcha, bu eng yaxshi yechim.
words.example2: As far as I’m concerned, the movie was too long.
words.example2Translation: Mening fikrimcha, film juda uzun edi.
words.example3: As far as I’m concerned, we should go now.
words.example3Translation: Mening fikrimcha, biz hozir ketishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: As far as I’m concerned, money isn’t everything.
As far as I’m concerned, she is right.
As far as I’m concerned, the plan is perfect.
As far as I’m concerned, we need more time.
As far as I’m concerned, this restaurant is the best.
As far as I’m concerned, exercise is essential.
As far as I’m concerned, honesty is important.
extraExampleTranslations: Mening fikrimcha, pul hamma narsa emas.
Mening fikrimcha, u haq.
Mening fikrimcha, reja mukammal.
Mening fikrimcha, bizga ko‘proq vaqt kerak.
Mening fikrimcha, bu restoran eng yaxshisi.
Mening fikrimcha, sport zarur.
Mening fikrimcha, halollik muhim.

words.definition: Used to acknowledge that someone has made a valid or convincing argument
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi aytgan fikr to'g'ri yoki mantiqli ekanini tan olish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: You've got a point — we should have checked the schedule first.
words.example1Translation: To'g'ri aytasan — avval jadval bilan tanishib olishimiz kerak edi.
words.example2: You've got a point about the budget. Let's reconsider.
words.example2Translation: Byudjet haqida to'g'ri aytding. Qayta ko'rib chiqaylik.
words.example3: Okay, you've got a point. I was wrong to rush the decision.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi, to'g'ri aytasan. Shoshilib qaror qilganimda xato qilgan ekanman.
extraExamples: You've got a point — silence can sometimes be misunderstood.
Actually, you've got a point. That approach is more efficient.
You've got a point about arriving early. Traffic can be unpredictable.
I didn't think of that, but you've got a point.
You've got a point — we can't ignore customer feedback.
Hmm, you've got a point. The old method was faster.
You've got a point. We should double-check before submitting.
extraExampleTranslations: To'g'ri aytasan — jimlik ba'zan noto'g'ri tushunilishi mumkin.
Rostdan ham, to'g'ri aytasan. Bu usul samaraliroq.
Erta kelish haqida to'g'ri aytasan. Tiqilinch bo'lishi mumkin.
Bu haqda o'ylamagan edim, lekin to'g'ri aytasan.
To'g'ri aytasan — mijozlar fikrlarini e'tiborsiz qoldirib bo'lmaydi.
Hmm, to'g'ri aytasan. Eski usul tezroq edi.
To'g'ri aytasan. Topshirishdan oldin ikki marta tekshirib ko'rishimiz kerak.

words.translation: Umuman qiziq emas / Umuman parvo qilmayman
words.definition: Used to express complete lack of interest or concern about something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki hodisa haqida mutlaqo qayg'urmaslik yoki qiziqmaslikni ifodalaydi
words.example1: I couldn't care less what they think about my choices.
words.example1Translation: Ular mening qarorlarim haqida nima deyishsa ham, menga parvo qilmaydi.
words.example2: He couldn't care less about the gossip in the office.
words.example2Translation: U ofisdagi mish-mishlar haqida umuman parvo qilmaydi.
words.example3: Honestly, I couldn't care less about winning the argument.
words.example3Translation: Rostini aytsam, tortishuvda g'alaba qozonish menga unchalik ham muhim emas.
extraExamples: She couldn't care less about what's trending on social media.
I couldn't care less if they don't invite me.
He couldn't care less about the competition.
I couldn't care less about their opinion of my work.
Frankly, I couldn't care less about the drama.
They couldn't care less about the new policy.
I couldn't care less whether it rains or not.
extraExampleTranslations: U ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda nima trend ekanligiga umuman e'tibor bermaydi.
Ular meni taklif qilmasalar ham, menga parvo qilmaydi.
U raqobat haqida umuman qayg'urmaydi.
Ular mening ishim haqida nima desa ham, menga muhim emas.
Ochig'ini aytganda, bu mojarolar menga parvo qilmaydi.
Ularga yangi qoidalar umuman ta'sir qilmaydi.
Yomg'ir yog'adimi yoki yo'qmi — menga baribir.

words.definition: A warning not to form opinions or make decisions without having all the facts
words.definitionUz: Barcha ma'lumotlarni bilmasdan turib tez xulosa chiqarmaslikka chaqiradi
words.example1: Let's not jump to conclusions — we only heard one side of the story.
words.example1Translation: Shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik — biz faqat bir tomonning gapini eshitdik.
words.example2: The results look bad, but let's not jump to conclusions just yet.
words.example2Translation: Natijalar yomon ko'rinadi, lekin hali shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.
words.example3: Let's not jump to conclusions about who is responsible.
words.example3Translation: Kim aybdor ekanligi haqida shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.
extraExamples: Let's not jump to conclusions — maybe he was just busy.
The evidence is unclear, so let's not jump to conclusions.
Let's not jump to conclusions before the investigation is finished.
I know it looks suspicious, but let's not jump to conclusions.
Let's not jump to conclusions based on one bad review.
Let's not jump to conclusions — there could be another explanation.
She was late, but let's not jump to conclusions about why.
extraExampleTranslations: Shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik — balki u shunchaki band edi.
Dalillar aniq emas, shuning uchun shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.
Tergov tugamaguncha xulosa chiqarmaylik.
Bilaman, shubhali ko'rinadi, lekin shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.
Bitta yomon sharh asosida shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.
Shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik — boshqa tushuntirish ham bo'lishi mumkin.
U kech qoldi, lekin sababi haqida shoshilib xulosa chiqarmaylik.

words.definition: Used to say that something reveals a lot of information without words being needed
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa so'zsiz ko'p narsani anglatadi yoki ko'rsatadi degan ma'noni bildiradi
words.example1: He didn't even apologize — that speaks volumes about his character.
words.example1Translation: U hatto kechirim so'ramadi — bu uning xarakteri haqida ko'p narsani aytadi.
words.example2: The empty chairs at the meeting speak volumes.
words.example2Translation: Yig'ilishdagi bo'sh stullar ko'p narsani anglatadi.
words.example3: Her silence speaks volumes about how she really feels.
words.example3Translation: Uning jimjitligi u haqiqatda qanday his qilishi haqida ko'p narsani bildiradi.
extraExamples: The fact that no one complained speaks volumes about the team.
His reaction speaks volumes — he clearly knew about it.
The low attendance speaks volumes about the event's popularity.
That one decision speaks volumes about their priorities.
The way she handled it speaks volumes about her experience.
His refusal to answer speaks volumes.
The company's growth speaks volumes about their strategy.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech kim shikoyat qilmaganligi jamoa haqida ko'p narsani aytadi.
Uning munosabati ko'p narsani anglatadi — u aniq bu haqda bilgan.
Kam qatnashish tadbirning ommabopligi haqida ko'p narsani bildiradi.
O'sha bitta qaror ularning ustuvorliklari haqida ko'p narsani aytadi.
U buni qanday hal qilgani uning tajribasi haqida ko'p narsani ko'rsatadi.
Uning javob berishdan bosh tortishi ko'p narsani anglatadi.
Kompaniyaning o'sishi ularning strategiyasi haqida ko'p narsani bildiradi.

words.translation: Aytishga oson, amalga oshirish esa qiyin
words.definition: Used to point out that something sounds simple but is actually difficult to do
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa gapda oson ko'rinadi, lekin amalda qilish qiyinroq ekanini bildiradi
words.example1: Just forget about it — easier said than done.
words.example1Translation: Shunchaki unutib yubor — aytishga oson, lekin qilishga qiyin.
words.example2: "Save more money." That's easier said than done on this salary.
words.example2Translation: "Ko'proq pul tejang." Bu maoshda aytishga oson, qilishga qiyin.
words.example3: Changing old habits is easier said than done.
words.example3Translation: Eski odatlarni o'zgartirish aytishga oson, lekin qilishga qiyin.
extraExamples: Starting a business is easier said than done.
Staying calm under pressure — easier said than done.
Learning a new language is easier said than done.
Balancing work and family is easier said than done.
"Just be confident." Easier said than done.
Finishing the project on time was easier said than done.
Letting go of the past is easier said than done.
extraExampleTranslations: Biznes boshlash aytishga oson, amalga oshirish esa qiyin.
Bosim ostida xotirjam qolish — aytishga oson, qilishga qiyin.
Yangi til o'rganish aytishga oson, lekin qilishga qiyin.
Ish va oila o'rtasida muvozanat saqlash aytishga oson, qilishga qiyin.
"Shunchaki o'zingga ishon." Aytishga oson, qilishga qiyin.
Loyihani o'z vaqtida tugatish aytishga oson edi, lekin qilishga qiyin bo'ldi.
O'tmishni unutish aytishga oson, lekin qilishga qiyin.

words.definition: Used to warn someone that they are in a risky situation and could face serious consequences
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi xavfli ish qilayotganini va oqibatlar og'ir bo'lishi mumkinligini ogohlantirish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: You're walking on thin ice with those comments at work.
words.example1Translation: Ishdagi o'sha fikrlaringiz bilan xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz.
words.example2: He's walking on thin ice — one more mistake and he'll be fired.
words.example2Translation: U xavfli holatda — yana bir xato va uni ishdan bo'shatishadi.
words.example3: You're walking on thin ice by ignoring the manager's warnings.
words.example3Translation: Menejerning ogohlantirishlarini e'tiborsiz qoldirib, xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz.
extraExamples: You're walking on thin ice with that attitude.
He's been walking on thin ice since the last incident.
You're walking on thin ice — don't push it further.
She knows she's walking on thin ice with the new team.
You're walking on thin ice by skipping deadlines repeatedly.
After that argument, he's walking on thin ice with his boss.
You're walking on thin ice — be careful what you say next.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu munosabatingiz bilan xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz.
U o'tgan voqeadan beri xavfli holatda yurmoqda.
Xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz — yanada chetga chiqmang.
U yangi jamoa bilan xavfli holatda ekanini biladi.
Muddatlarni qayta-qayta o'tkazib yuborib, xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz.
O'sha janjoldan so'ng, u xo'jayini bilan muammoli holatda.
Xavfli yo'ldan bormoqdasiz — keyin nima deyishingizga ehtiyot bo'ling.

words.translation: To'liq roziman / Men ham xuddi shunday o'ylayman
words.definition: Used to express strong and complete agreement with what someone has said
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi aytgan fikrga to'liq va kuchli ravishda qo'shilishni bildiradi
words.example1: The project needs better planning — I couldn't agree more.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha yaxshiroq rejalashtirish talab qiladi — men ham to'liq roziman.
words.example2: "We should focus on quality, not quantity." I couldn't agree more.
words.example2Translation: "Miqdorga emas, sifatga e'tibor qaratishimiz kerak." Men ham xuddi shunday o'ylayman.
words.example3: I couldn't agree more with your point about communication.
words.example3Translation: Muloqot haqidagi fikringiz bilan to'liq roziman.
extraExamples: I couldn't agree more — the system needs a complete update.
"Teamwork is essential." I couldn't agree more.
I couldn't agree more about the importance of deadlines.
She said rest is just as important as work — I couldn't agree more.
I couldn't agree more with that analysis.
"Customers should always come first." I couldn't agree more.
I couldn't agree more — this process is too slow.
extraExampleTranslations: To'liq roziman — tizimni to'liq yangilash kerak.
"Jamoa ishi juda muhim." Men ham to'liq qo'shilaman.
Muddatlarning ahamiyati haqida to'liq roziman.
U dam olish ham ish kabi muhim dedi — men ham xuddi shunday o'ylayman.
Bu tahlil bilan to'liq qo'shilaman.
"Mijozlar har doim birinchi o'rinda bo'lishi kerak." Men ham roziman.
To'liq roziman — bu jarayon juda sekin.

words.translation: Qabul qil yoki rad et, boshqa yo'l yo'q
words.definition: Used to say that an offer or situation is fixed and there is no room for negotiation
words.definitionUz: Taklif o'zgartirilmaydi va tanlov faqat qabul qilish yoki rad etishdan iborat ekanini bildiradi
words.example1: The price is final — take it or leave it.
words.example1Translation: Narx o'zgarmas — qabul qil yoki rad et.
words.example2: That's my final offer. Take it or leave it.
words.example2Translation: Bu mening so'nggi taklifim. Qabul qil yoki rad et.
words.example3: I don't have time to negotiate — take it or leave it.
words.example3Translation: Muzokaralar olib borishga vaqtim yo'q — qabul qil yoki rad et.
extraExamples: The terms are set. Take it or leave it.
"Can we adjust the deadline?" Take it or leave it.
I've said what I can offer — take it or leave it.
The schedule is fixed. Take it or leave it.
This is the only room available — take it or leave it.
I don't negotiate on this — take it or leave it.
The contract is ready. Take it or leave it.
extraExampleTranslations: Shartlar belgilangan. Qabul qil yoki rad et.
"Muddatni o'zgartirsak bo'ladimi?" Qabul qil yoki rad et.
Taklif qila oladiganimni aytdim — qabul qil yoki rad et.
Jadval belgilangan. Qabul qil yoki rad et.
Bu bo'sh xona yagona variant — qabul qil yoki rad et.
Bu borada muzokaralar olib bormayman — qabul qil yoki rad et.
Shartnoma tayyor. Qabul qil yoki rad et.

words.definition: Used to say that you do not believe what someone is telling you
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi aytayotgan narsaga ishonmasligingizni bildiradi — gaplar to'g'ri yoki chin emas deb o'ylaysiz
words.example1: He said he was sick, but I'm not buying it.
words.example1Translation: U kasal edi dedi, lekin men ishonmayapman.
words.example2: That excuse sounds weak — I'm not buying it.
words.example2Translation: Bu bahona zaif eshitiladi — men ishonmayapman.
words.example3: I'm not buying it. The numbers don't add up.
words.example3Translation: Ishonmayapman. Raqamlar mos kelmaydi.
extraExamples: She said it was an accident, but I'm not buying it.
I'm not buying it — his story keeps changing.
They say it's a coincidence, but I'm not buying it.
I'm not buying it. Something doesn't feel right.
"It was a misunderstanding." Sorry, I'm not buying it.
I'm not buying it — the timing is too convenient.
He looked nervous, and honestly, I'm not buying his explanation.
extraExampleTranslations: U tasodifiy edi dedi, lekin men ishonmayapman.
Ishonmayapman — uning hikoyasi o'zgarib turibdi.
Ular tasodif deyishadi, lekin men ishonmayapman.
Ishonmayapman. Biror narsa noto'g'ri tuyulyapti.
"Bu tushunmovchilik edi." Kechirasiz, ishonmayapman.
Ishonmayapman — vaqt juda qulay to'g'ri keldi.
U asabiylashib qoldi va rostini aytsam, uning tushuntirishiga ishonmayapman.

words.definition: Used to accept a point or situation as reasonable, even if you do not fully agree
words.definitionUz: Biror fikr yoki vaziyatni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlamasangiz ham, mantiqli deb qabul qilishni bildiradi
words.example1: "I need more time to think." Fair enough, take the weekend.
words.example1Translation: "Ko'proq o'ylashim kerak." Yaxshi, dam olish kuni vaqt oling.
words.example2: You don't want to go out tonight? Fair enough.
words.example2Translation: Bu kechqurun chiqishni xohlamaysizmi? Yaxshi, tushunarli.
words.example3: "I disagree with the plan but I'll support it." Fair enough.
words.example3Translation: "Reja bilan rozi emasman, lekin qo'llab-quvvatlayman." Yaxshi, qabul qilaman.
extraExamples: "I can only meet on Thursday." Fair enough, let's do Thursday.
You want to split the cost? Fair enough.
"I'd rather work alone on this." Fair enough.
You need a break — fair enough, take one.
"I'm not ready to decide yet." Fair enough, no pressure.
Fair enough — I see your point.
"Let's try a different approach." Fair enough, let's see.
extraExampleTranslations: "Faqat payshanba kuni uchrasha olaman." Yaxshi, payshanba qilaylik.
Xarajatlarni bo'lishmoqchimisiz? Yaxshi, qabul qilaman.
"Bu ustida yolg'iz ishlashni afzal ko'raman." Yaxshi, mayli.
Dam olish kerak — yaxshi, oling.
"Hali qaror qilishga tayyormasman." Yaxshi, shoshilmaymiz.
Yaxshi — fikringizni tushundim.
"Boshqa yondashuv sinab ko'raylik." Yaxshi, ko'ramiz.

words.definition: the use of technology or machines to perform tasks that were previously done by humans
words.definitionUz: Odamlar bajaradigan ishlarni texnologiya yoki mashinalar yordamida avtomatik ravishda bajarish jarayoni
words.example1: Job automation has replaced many factory workers over the past decade.
words.example1Translation: Ishlarni avtomatlashtirish so'nggi o'n yil ichida ko'plab zavod ishchilarini almashtirib yubordi.
words.example2: Companies invest in job automation to reduce costs and increase efficiency.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyalar xarajatlarni kamaytirish va samaradorlikni oshirish uchun avtomatlashtrishga sarmoya kiritadi.
words.example3: Job automation is changing the skills workers need to stay employed.
words.example3Translation: Ishlarni avtomatlashtirish ishchilarning bandligini saqlash uchun zarur bo'lgan ko'nikmalarini o'zgartirmoqda.
extraExamples: The rise of job automation has made some professions nearly obsolete.
Governments are debating how to manage job automation without causing mass unemployment.
Job automation in agriculture has allowed farms to produce more with fewer workers.
Many economists argue that job automation creates new types of jobs over time.
Small businesses struggle to afford job automation compared to large corporations.
Job automation has been most visible in manufacturing and customer service sectors.
Workers fear job automation more when they lack digital skills.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishlarni avtomatlashtirishning kuchayishi ba'zi kasblari deyarli eskirib ketishiga olib keldi.
Hukumatlar ommaviy ishsizlikka yo'l qo'ymasdan avtomatlashtirishni qanday boshqarish haqida bahslashmoqda.
Qishloqdagi avtomatlashtirish fermerxonalarga kamroq ishchi bilan ko'proq mahsulot yetishtirishga imkon berdi.
Ko'plab iqtisodchilar avtomatlashtirish vaqt o'tishi bilan yangi ish o'rinlarini yaratadi deb hisoblaydi.
Kichik korxonalar yirik korporatsiyalarga nisbatan avtomatlashtirishni amalga oshirishda qiynaladI.
Ishlarni avtomatlashtirish ishlab chiqarish va mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish sohalarida eng ko'p sezilarli bo'ldi.
Ishchilar raqamli ko'nikmalari bo'lmaganda avtomatlashtirishdan ko'proq qo'rqishadi.

words.definition: producing good results without spending a lot of money
words.definitionUz: Kam pul sarflab yaxshi natijaga erishish — ya'ni pul va vaqtni tejagan holda samarali bo'lish
words.example1: Hiring freelancers is often more cost-effective than employing full-time staff.
words.example1Translation: Frilanserlarni yollash ko'pincha to'liq vaqtli xodimlarni ishga olishdan ko'ra tejamkorroqdir.
words.example2: Solar panels are becoming a cost-effective solution for household energy.
words.example2Translation: Quyosh panellari uy energiyasi uchun tejamkor yechimga aylanib bormoqda.
words.example3: The manager chose the most cost-effective supplier without reducing quality.
words.example3Translation: Menejer sifatni pasaytirmasdan eng tejamkor ta'minotchini tanladi.
extraExamples: Online advertising is more cost-effective than printing flyers.
The new production method proved to be highly cost-effective for the company.
Buying in bulk is usually cost-effective for large families.
A cost-effective approach to healthcare can save governments billions.
Remote work has turned out to be cost-effective for both employers and employees.
Repairing the machine was more cost-effective than buying a new one.
The startup focused on cost-effective marketing strategies to grow its audience.
extraExampleTranslations: Internet reklama varaqa tarqatishdan ko'ra tejamkorroq.
Yangi ishlab chiqarish usuli kompaniya uchun yuqori darajada tejamkor bo'lib chiqdi.
Ulgurji xarid qilish odatda katta oilalar uchun tejamkor.
Sog'liqni saqlashga tejamkor yondashuv hukumatlarga milliardlarni tejashga yordam beradi.
Masofaviy ish ham ish beruvchilar ham xodimlar uchun tejamkor bo'lib chiqdi.
Mashinani ta'mirlash yangisini sotib olishdan ko'ra tejamkorroq edi.
Startap o'z auditoriyasini kengaytirish uchun tejamkor marketing strategiyalariga e'tibor qaratdi.

words.definition: to perform a task better than a human in terms of speed, accuracy, or consistency
words.definitionUz: Tezlik, aniqlik yoki chidamlilik jihatidan odamga qaraganda yaxshiroq natija bermoq
words.example1: In chess, computers have been able to outperform humans for decades.
words.example1Translation: Shaxmat o'yinida kompyuterlar o'nlab yillardan beri odamlardan ustun kelmoqda.
words.example2: AI systems can outperform humans at detecting certain medical conditions.
words.example2Translation: Sun'iy intellekt tizimlari ba'zi tibbiy holatlarni aniqlashda odamlardan yaxshiroq ishlashi mumkin.
words.example3: Robots consistently outperform humans on repetitive assembly line tasks.
words.example3Translation: Robotlar takroriy konveyer ishlarida odamlardan doimiy ravishda ustun turadi.
extraExamples: Machine learning models can outperform humans at sorting large amounts of data.
Drones are starting to outperform humans in aerial photography precision.
Some AI tools outperform humans at predicting stock market trends.
Despite outperforming humans in speed, machines still lack emotional intelligence.
Search algorithms outperform humans at finding relevant information instantly.
In certain factory roles, machines outperform humans by working around the clock.
AI translation tools now outperform humans in speed but not always in nuance.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashina o'rganish modellari katta miqdordagi ma'lumotlarni saralashda odamlardan ustun kelishi mumkin.
Dronlar havo fotografiyasi aniqligida odamlardan ustun kela boshladi.
Ba'zi sun'iy intellekt vositalari fond bozori tendentsiyalarini bashorat qilishda odamlardan yaxshiroq ishlaydi.
Tezlikda odamlardan ustun bo'lishiga qaramay, mashinalar hali ham emotsional intellektga ega emas.
Qidiruv algoritmlari tegishli ma'lumotlarni darhol topishda odamlardan ustun keladi.
Ba'zi zavod rollarida mashinalar to'xtovsiz ishlash orqali odamlardan ustun turadi.
Sun'iy intellekt tarjima vositalari hozir tezlikda odamlardan o'zib ketdi, lekin nozik ma'nolarda emas.

words.definition: machines can repeat the same task many times with the same quality and without making mistakes
words.definitionUz: Mashinalar bir xil ishni ko'p marta bajarishda charchamasdan va xato qilmasdan bir xil sifatni saqlaydi
words.example1: Unlike humans, machines produce consistent accurate work even after hours of operation.
words.example1Translation: Odamlardan farqli o'laroq, mashinalar soatlab ishlashdan keyin ham doimiy va aniq natija beradi.
words.example2: In pharmaceutical manufacturing, machines produce consistent accurate work to meet safety standards.
words.example2Translation: Farmatsevtika ishlab chiqarishda mashinalar xavfsizlik standartlarini qondirish uchun doimiy va aniq ishlaydi.
words.example3: Quality control teams rely on machines to produce consistent accurate work across thousands of units.
words.example3Translation: Sifat nazorati guruhlari minglab birliklar bo'ylab doimiy va aniq ish bajarish uchun mashinalarga tayanadi.
extraExamples: Machines produce consistent accurate work in printing, reducing wasted materials.
The fact that machines produce consistent accurate work makes them ideal for medical device production.
Factories prefer machines because they produce consistent accurate work at any hour.
Unlike tired employees, machines produce consistent accurate work throughout the entire shift.
Engineers trust that machines produce consistent accurate work when tolerances are tight.
Machines produce consistent accurate work in food packaging, keeping portion sizes exact.
The ability of machines to produce consistent accurate work reduces the need for human inspection.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashinalar bosib chiqarishda doimiy va aniq ishlaydi, isrof bo'ladigan materiallarni kamaytiradi.
Mashinalarning doimiy va aniq ishlashi ularni tibbiy qurilmalar ishlab chiqarish uchun ideal qiladi.
Zavodlar mashinalarni afzal ko'radi, chunki ular istalgan vaqtda doimiy va aniq ishlaydi.
Charchagan xodimlardan farqli o'laroq, mashinalar butun smenada doimiy va aniq ishlaydi.
Muhandislar toleranslar qat'iy bo'lganda mashinalar aniq ishlashiga ishonadi.
Mashinalar oziq-ovqat qadoqlashda doimiy va aniq ishlaydi, porsiya o'lchamlarini to'g'ri saqlaydi.
Mashinalarning doimiy va aniq ishlash qobiliyati inson nazorati ehtiyojini kamaytiradi.

words.definition: to reduce or destroy a person's ability or desire to think in original and imaginative ways
words.definitionUz: Odamning yangi va original fikrlar topish qobiliyatini yo'q qilmoq yoki susaytirmoq
words.example1: Critics argue that standardized testing kills creativity in students.
words.example1Translation: Tanqidchilar standart testlar o'quvchilardagi ijodkorlikni o'ldirib qo'yadi deb ta'kidlaydi.
words.example2: Strict workplace rules can kill creativity and prevent innovation.
words.example2Translation: Qattiq ish joyi qoidalari ijodkorlikni bo'g'ib, innovatsiyaning oldini olishi mumkin.
words.example3: Over-relying on AI tools might kill creativity if people stop thinking for themselves.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy intellekt vositalariga ortiqcha tayanish, odamlar o'zlari o'ylamaydigan bo'lsa, ijodkorlikni o'ldirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Some teachers worry that too much screen time kills creativity in young children.
Repetitive tasks at work can slowly kill creativity over time.
When employees are micromanaged, it tends to kill creativity across the team.
Copying other people's ideas too often will kill creativity in the long run.
Technology is useful, but using it as a shortcut can kill creativity.
A rigid school curriculum can kill creativity by leaving no room for free thinking.
Constant pressure to meet deadlines can kill creativity even in talented workers.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zi o'qituvchilar ekran oldida ko'p o'tirish kichik bolalardagi ijodkorlikni o'ldiradi deb xavotir oladi.
Ishda takroriy vazifalar vaqt o'tishi bilan ijodkorlikni asta-sekin yo'q qilishi mumkin.
Xodimlar ustidan haddan ziyod nazorat qilinganda, bu jamoadagi ijodkorlikni o'ldiradi.
Boshqalarning g'oyalarini tez-tez nusxa ko'chirish uzoq muddatda ijodkorlikni o'ldiradi.
Texnologiya foydali, lekin uni yorliq sifatida ishlatish ijodkorlikni yo'q qilishi mumkin.
Qattiq o'quv dasturi erkin fikrlashga joy qoldirmasdan ijodkorlikni o'ldirishi mumkin.
Muddatlarni bajarishga doimiy bosim hatto iqtidorli ishchilardagi ijodkorlikni ham yo'q qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: depending on something too much, to the point where it becomes harmful or limiting
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga keragidan ortiq tayanib qolish, shunda u zarar berishi yoki cheklov yaratishi mumkin
words.example1: Over-reliance on smartphones has reduced many people's ability to remember information.
words.example1Translation: Smartfonlarga ortiqcha bog'lanib qolish ko'p odamlarning ma'lumotni eslab qolish qobiliyatini pasaytirdi.
words.example2: The company's over-reliance on a single supplier caused serious problems when deliveries were delayed.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniyaning yagona ta'minotchiga ortiqcha bog'liqligi etkazib berish kechiktirilganda jiddiy muammolarga sabab bo'ldi.
words.example3: Over-reliance on technology in education may leave students unable to think critically on their own.
words.example3Translation: Ta'limdagi texnologiyaga ortiqcha tayanish o'quvchilarni o'zlari tanqidiy fikrlay olmasligiga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Over-reliance on GPS has made many drivers unable to read a map.
Health experts warn about over-reliance on painkillers for managing chronic pain.
A country's over-reliance on oil exports makes its economy fragile.
Over-reliance on one source of news can create a narrow view of the world.
The team's over-reliance on their best player became a weakness in big matches.
Over-reliance on automation can leave workers without skills when systems fail.
Students show over-reliance on search engines instead of developing research skills.
extraExampleTranslations: GPS'ga ortiqcha tayanish ko'p haydovchilarni xaritani o'qiy olmasligiga olib keldi.
Sog'liq mutaxassislari surunkali og'riqni boshqarishda og'riq qoldiruvchi dorilariga ortiqcha tayanish haqida ogohlantiradi.
Mamlakatning neft eksportiga ortiqcha bog'liqligi uning iqtisodiyotini zaif qiladi.
Bitta yangiliklar manbasiga ortiqcha tayanish dunyoga tor nuqtai nazarni yaratishi mumkin.
Jamoaning eng yaxshi o'yinchiga ortiqcha tayanishi muhim o'yinlarda zaiflikka aylandi.
Avtomatlashtirishga ortiqcha tayanish tizimlar ishlamay qolganda ishchilarni ko'nikmasiz qoldirishi mumkin.
O'quvchilar tadqiqot ko'nikmalarini rivojlantirish o'rniga qidiruv tizimlariga ortiqcha tayanishadi.

words.definition: something that puts people's jobs at risk of being reduced or eliminated
words.definitionUz: Odamlarning ish joylarini qisqartirishi yoki yo'q qilishi mumkin bo'lgan xavf yoki holat
words.example1: Many workers see advanced robotics as a direct threat to human employment.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab ishchilar ilg'or robototexnikani inson bandligiga to'g'ridan to'g'ri tahdid sifatida ko'radi.
words.example2: Artificial intelligence is increasingly viewed as a threat to human employment in white-collar industries.
words.example2Translation: Sun'iy intellekt aqliy mehnat sohalarida inson bandligiga tahdid sifatida tobora ko'proq qabul qilinmoqda.
words.example3: Economists disagree on whether automation is truly a threat to human employment in the long term.
words.example3Translation: Iqtisodchilar avtomatlashtirish uzoq muddatda inson bandligiga chinakam tahdidmi yoki yo'qmi deb bahslashadi.
extraExamples: Self-checkout machines are seen as a threat to human employment in retail.
The government released a report on automation as a threat to human employment in transport.
Not everyone agrees that AI is a serious threat to human employment.
Globalization was once the biggest threat to human employment, but technology has taken over.
New legislation aims to address automation as a threat to human employment in manufacturing.
Workers in call centers feel particularly vulnerable to this threat to human employment.
The rapid growth of AI has renewed fears about its threat to human employment worldwide.
extraExampleTranslations: O'z-o'ziga xizmat ko'rsatish kassalari chakana savdoda inson bandligiga tahdid sifatida ko'riladi.
Hukumat transport sohasida inson bandligiga tahdid sifatida avtomatlashtirish bo'yicha hisobot chiqardi.
Hamma ham sun'iy intellekt inson bandligiga jiddiy tahdid deb hisoblamaydi.
Globallashuv bir vaqtlar inson bandligiga eng katta tahdid edi, lekin texnologiya uni almashtirib oldi.
Yangi qonunchilik ishlab chiqarishda inson bandligiga tahdid sifatida avtomatlashtirishni hal etishga qaratilgan.
Qo'ng'iroq markazlaridagi ishchilar inson bandligiga bu tahdiddan ayniqsa zaifroq his qilishadi.
Sun'iy intellektning tez o'sishi butun dunyo bo'ylab uning inson bandligiga tahdidi haqidagi qo'rquvlarni yangiladi.

words.definition: to cause people to lose their jobs, usually because machines or technology take over those roles
words.definitionUz: Odamlarni ish joylaridan mahrum etmoq, ko'pincha mashinalar yoki texnologiya o'sha vazifalarni egallab olganda
words.example1: Automated checkouts have already put many cashiers out of work.
words.example1Translation: Avtomatlashtirilgan kassalar allaqachon ko'plab kassirlarni ishsiz qoldirib yubordi.
words.example2: There is growing concern that AI will put millions of humans out of work within a decade.
words.example2Translation: Sun'iy intellekt o'n yil ichida millionlab odamlarni ishsiz qoldirib qo'yishi haqida o'sib borayotgan xavotir bor.
words.example3: The introduction of machinery in the 19th century put many craftsmen out of work.
words.example3Translation: 19-asrda mashinalarning joriy etilishi ko'plab hunarmandlarni ishsiz qoldirdi.
extraExamples: Driverless trucks could put thousands of delivery drivers out of work.
Some argue that every new technology temporarily puts a group of people out of work.
The textile industry was one of the first sectors to put workers out of work through automation.
AI writing tools are starting to put some junior copywriters out of work.
Farming machines put agricultural laborers out of work across rural communities.
Bank automation has put many tellers and branch staff out of work.
Putting humans out of work through technology raises serious questions about income equality.
extraExampleTranslations: Haydovchisiz yuk mashinalari minglab yetkazib beruvchi haydovchilarni ishsiz qoldirishi mumkin.
Ba'zilar har qanday yangi texnologiya bir guruh odamlarni vaqtincha ishsiz qoldirib qo'yadi deb ta'kidlaydi.
To'qimachilik sanoati avtomatlashtirish orqali ishchilarni ishsiz qoldirgan birinchi sohalardan biri edi.
Sun'iy intellekt yozish vositalari ba'zi kichik nusxa yozuvchilarni ishsiz qoldira boshladi.
Qishloq xo'jaligi mashinalari qishloq jamoalarida qishloq xo'jaligi ishchilarini ishsiz qoldirdi.
Bank avtomatlashtirishi ko'plab kassir va filial xodimlarini ishsiz qoldirdi.
Texnologiya orqali odamlarni ishsiz qoldirish daromad tengligi haqida jiddiy savollar tug'diradi.

words.definition: when machines, AI, or technology begin doing tasks that were previously performed by people
words.definitionUz: Mashinalar, sun'iy intellekt yoki texnologiya ilgari odamlar bajargan ishlarni o'z zimmasiga olishi
words.example1: Robots are gradually taking over human jobs in car manufacturing plants.
words.example1Translation: Robotlar avtomobil ishlab chiqarish zavodlarida odamlar ishlarini asta-sekin egallab olmoqda.
words.example2: Many people fear that chatbots will take over human jobs in customer service.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p odamlar chatbotlar mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatishdagi odam ishlarini egallab olishidan qo'rqadi.
words.example3: As AI improves, it is expected to take over human jobs that require data analysis.
words.example3Translation: Sun'iy intellekt rivojlangani sayin, ma'lumotlar tahlilini talab qiladigan odam ishlarini egallab olishi kutilmoqda.
extraExamples: Automated systems are already taking over human jobs in warehouse management.
There is debate about whether AI will take over human jobs faster than new ones are created.
Delivery drones may eventually take over human jobs in last-mile logistics.
AI-powered tools are beginning to take over human jobs in legal document review.
Not all jobs are at equal risk of being taken over by machines.
History shows that machines taking over human jobs often leads to new industries forming.
Workers are being encouraged to retrain before machines take over their jobs completely.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtomatlashtirilgan tizimlar ombor boshqaruvida allaqachon odam ishlarini egallab olmoqda.
Sun'iy intellekt yangilari yaratilishidan tezroq odam ishlarini egallab olishi haqida bahs bor.
Yetkazib berish dronlari oxir-oqibat so'nggi milya logistikasidagi odam ishlarini egallashi mumkin.
Sun'iy intellekt bilan ishlatiladigan vositalar yuridik hujjatlarni ko'rib chiqishdagi odam ishlarini egallashni boshladi.
Barcha ish joylari mashinalar tomonidan egallab olinish xavfiga teng darajada duchor emas.
Tarix shuni ko'rsatadiki, mashinalarning odam ishlarini egallab olishi ko'pincha yangi sohalar paydo bo'lishiga olib keladi.
Ishchilar mashinalar ishlarini to'liq egallab olmagunicha qayta o'qishga undamoqda.

words.definition: worries or questions about whether something is morally right, fair, or responsible
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa axloqan to'g'ri, adolatli yoki mas'uliyatli ekanligini so'roq qiladigan xavotir va muammolar
words.example1: The use of AI in hiring raises serious ethical concerns about bias and fairness.
words.example1Translation: Yollashda sun'iy intellektdan foydalanish noxolislik va adolat haqida jiddiy axloqiy xavotirlarni keltirib chiqaradi.
words.example2: There are ethical concerns about collecting personal data without users' full knowledge.
words.example2Translation: Foydalanuvchilarning to'liq bilimisiz shaxsiy ma'lumotlarni to'plash haqida axloqiy xavotirlar mavjud.
words.example3: Medical researchers must address ethical concerns before testing new treatments on humans.
words.example3Translation: Tibbiy tadqiqotchilar odamlarda yangi davolash usullarini sinovdan o'tkazishdan oldin axloqiy xavotirlarni hal qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Facial recognition technology has sparked major ethical concerns around privacy.
Ethical concerns about social media algorithms have led to calls for regulation.
Scientists studying gene editing face significant ethical concerns from the public.
The military use of autonomous weapons raises profound ethical concerns.
Ethical concerns in journalism include how to report on trauma without causing harm.
Tech companies are under pressure to take ethical concerns about AI more seriously.
Ethical concerns around child labor remain relevant in global supply chains today.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuz tanish texnologiyasi maxfiylik bo'yicha katta axloqiy xavotirlarni keltirib chiqardi.
Ijtimoiy media algoritmlari haqidagi axloqiy xavotirlar tartibga solish talablariga olib keldi.
Gen tahrirlashni o'rganadigan olimlar jamoatchilikdan jiddiy axloqiy xavotirlarni boshdan kechiradilar.
Avtonom qurollarning harbiy ishlatilishi chuqur axloqiy xavotirlarni keltirib chiqaradi.
Jurnalistikadagi axloqiy xavotirlar orasida travmani zarar etkazmasdan qanday yoritish kiradi.
Texnologiya kompaniyalari sun'iy intellekt haqidagi axloqiy xavotirlarga jiddiyroq munosabatda bo'lishga bosim ostida.
Bolalar mehnati bo'yicha axloqiy xavotirlar bugungi global ta'minot zanjirlarida ham dolzarb bo'lib qolmoqda.

words.definition: Property consisting of land and buildings on it.
words.definitionUz: Yer, uy, bino kabi sotib olinib yoki ijaraga beriladigan mulk turlari.
words.example1: I want to invest in real estate to have a passive income.
words.example1Translation: Men passiv daromad olish uchun ko'chmas mulkka investitsiya qilmoqchiman.
words.example2: Real estate prices in Tashkent have risen sharply this year.
words.example2Translation: Toshkentda ko'chmas mulk narxlari bu yil keskin oshdi.
words.example3: She built her wealth by buying and selling real estate.
words.example3Translation: U ko'chmas mulk sotib olib va sotib boylik to'pladi.
extraExamples: Real estate is often seen as a safe long-term investment.
He works as a real estate agent in the city center.
Investing in real estate requires a large amount of capital.
The real estate market slowed down during the economic crisis.
They decided to enter the real estate business together.
Commercial real estate includes offices, shops, and warehouses.
Many people prefer real estate over stocks for stability.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'chmas mulk ko'pincha uzoq muddatli xavfsiz investitsiya sifatida qaraladi.
U shahar markazida ko'chmas mulk agenti bo'lib ishlaydi.
Ko'chmas mulkka investitsiya qilish katta kapital talab qiladi.
Iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida ko'chmas mulk bozori sekinlashdi.
Ular birga ko'chmas mulk biznesiga kirishishga qaror qilishdi.
Tijorat ko'chmas mulkiga ofislar, do'konlar va omborlar kiradi.
Ko'pchilik barqarorlik uchun aktsiyalar o'rniga ko'chmas mulkni afzal ko'radi.

words.definition: Things of value owned by a person or company that can generate income or be sold.
words.definitionUz: Odamga yoki kompaniyaga tegishli, pul yoki foyda keltiradigan qimmatli narsalar.
words.example1: Real estate and gold are considered valuable assets.
words.example1Translation: Ko'chmas mulk va oltin qimmatli aktivlar hisoblanadi.
words.example2: The company listed all its assets in the financial report.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya moliyaviy hisobotda barcha aktivlarini ko'rsatdi.
words.example3: Building assets early in life gives you financial freedom later.
words.example3Translation: Yoshlikda aktivlar to'plash keyinchalik moliyaviy erkinlik beradi.
extraExamples: His assets include two apartments, a car, and a business.
Digital assets like cryptocurrency are becoming more popular.
The bank evaluated her assets before approving the loan.
Investing in assets is smarter than keeping cash in a drawer.
Stocks and bonds are common financial assets.
She transferred her assets to her children before retirement.
Liquid assets can be converted to cash quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning aktivlari ikki xonadon, avtomobil va biznesdan iborat.
Kriptovalyuta kabi raqamli aktivlar tobora ommabop bo'lib bormoqda.
Bank kreditni tasdiqlashdan oldin uning aktivlarini baholadi.
Aktivlarga investitsiya qilish pulni tortmada saqlashdan aqlliroq.
Aktsiyalar va obligatsiyalar keng tarqalgan moliyaviy aktivlardir.
U nafaqaga chiqishdan oldin aktivlarini farzandlariga o'tkazdi.
Likvid aktivlarni tezda pulga aylantirish mumkin.

words.definition: Losing value over time, especially due to use or age.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt o'tishi yoki ishlatilishi bilan narxi pasayib boradigan narsa.
words.example1: Buying a car is not a great idea as cars are depreciating items.
words.example1Translation: Mashina sotib olish unchalik yaxshi fikr emas, chunki mashinalar qadrsizlanib boradigan narsalardir.
words.example2: Most electronics are depreciating assets the moment you unbox them.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pgina elektron qurilmalar qutidan chiqarilgan zahoti qadrsizlana boshlaydi.
words.example3: He realized his equipment was depreciating faster than expected.
words.example3Translation: U jihozlari kutilganidan tezroq qadrsizlanayotganini tushundi.
extraExamples: A smartphone starts depreciating as soon as a newer model comes out.
Businesses track depreciating assets for tax purposes.
Furniture is a depreciating item, unlike land.
He avoided buying depreciating goods and focused on investments instead.
The machinery in the factory is depreciating at ten percent per year.
Understanding depreciation helps you make smarter purchases.
Unlike real estate, most vehicles are depreciating assets.
extraExampleTranslations: Smartfon yangi model chiqishi bilan qadrsizlana boshlaydi.
Korxonalar soliq maqsadida qadrsizlanayotgan aktivlarni kuzatib boradi.
Mebel, yerdan farqli o'laroq, qadrsizlanuvchi buyumdir.
U qadrsizlanuvchi tovarlar sotib olishdan qochib, o'rniga investitsiyalarga e'tibor qaratdi.
Zavodda mashina-uskunalar yiliga o'n foizga qadrsizlanmoqda.
Amortizatsiyani tushunish sizga aqlliroq xaridlar qilishga yordam beradi.
Ko'chmas mulkdan farqli o'laroq, aksariyat transport vositalari qadrsizlanuvchi aktivlardir.

words.definition: To decrease in worth or price over time.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning vaqt o'tishi bilan narxi yoki qiymati pasayib ketishi.
words.example1: Cars go down in value as soon as you buy them.
words.example1Translation: Mashinalar sotib olinishi bilanoq qiymati tushib ketadi.
words.example2: Old technology tends to go down in value very quickly.
words.example2Translation: Eski texnologiyalar odatda juda tez qadrsizlanib ketadi.
words.example3: Poorly located properties can go down in value over time.
words.example3Translation: Noqulay joylashgan mulklar vaqt o'tishi bilan qadrsizlanishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Luxury goods often go down in value once the trend passes.
Some currencies go down in value during economic instability.
He sold his phone before it went down in value too much.
Collectibles rarely go down in value if kept in good condition.
Stocks can go down in value suddenly due to market changes.
It is important to know which assets go down in value before buying.
Fast fashion items go down in value almost immediately.
extraExampleTranslations: Hashamatli tovarlar moda o'tgach ko'pincha qadrsizlanadi.
Ba'zi valyutalar iqtisodiy beqarorlik davrida qadrsizlanib ketadi.
U telefonini juda ko'p qadrsizlanib ketmasdan oldin sotdi.
Kolleksion buyumlar yaxshi saqlanasa, kamdan-kam qadrsizlanadi.
Aktsiyalar bozor o'zgarishi tufayli to'satdan qadrsizlanishi mumkin.
Sotib olishdan oldin qaysi aktivlar qadrsizlanishini bilish muhim.
Arzon moda buyumlari deyarli darhol qadrsizlanib ketadi.

words.definition: A loan from a bank used to buy property, paid back over many years.
words.definitionUz: Uy yoki bino sotib olish uchun bankdan olinadigan va uzoq yillar davomida qaytariladigan kredit.
words.example1: He took a mortgage to buy his first house.
words.example1Translation: U birinchi uyini sotib olish uchun ipoteka oldi.
words.example2: They struggled to pay their mortgage after losing their jobs.
words.example2Translation: Ular ishini yo'qotgandan keyin ipotekasini to'lashda qiynaldi.
words.example3: Getting a mortgage requires a stable income and good credit history.
words.example3Translation: Ipoteka olish uchun barqaror daromad va yaxshi kredit tarixi kerak.
extraExamples: She applied for a mortgage at three different banks.
The mortgage on their house will be paid off in twenty years.
Rising interest rates made mortgages more expensive this year.
He used his savings as a down payment before taking the mortgage.
Many young people struggle to qualify for a mortgage.
A fixed-rate mortgage keeps your monthly payments the same.
They refinanced their mortgage to get a lower interest rate.
extraExampleTranslations: U uchta turli bankda ipoteka uchun ariza berdi.
Ularning uydagi ipotekasi yigirma yil ichida to'liq uziladi.
Foiz stavkalarining oshishi bu yil ipoteкalarni qimmatlashtirdi.
U ipoteka olishdan oldin boshlang'ich to'lov sifatida jamg'armalaridan foydalandi.
Ko'pgina yoshlar ipotekaga loyiq bo'lishda qiynaladi.
Qat'iy foizli ipoteka oylik to'lovlaringizni bir xil ushlab turadi.
Ular past foiz stavkasini olish uchun ipotekasini qayta moliyalashtirdi.

words.definition: To pay for something in smaller, regular amounts over a period of time instead of all at once.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning to'liq narxini bir yo'la emas, balki vaqti-vaqti bilan kichik qismlarga bo'lib to'lash.
words.example1: I couldn't afford the full price, so I decided to pay in installments.
words.example1Translation: Men to'liq narxini to'lay olmadim, shuning uchun bo'lib to'lashga qaror qildim.
words.example2: Many stores allow you to pay in installments without any interest.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pgina do'konlar foizsiz bo'lib to'lash imkonini beradi.
words.example3: He bought the laptop by agreeing to pay in installments over a year.
