words.example3Translation: U bir yil davomida bo'lib to'lashga rozilik berib, noutbuk sotib oldi.
extraExamples: Paying in installments makes expensive items more affordable.
She chose to pay in installments to manage her monthly budget better.
Some banks charge extra fees if you pay in installments.
You can pay in installments for the course over six months.
They paid in installments for their new furniture set.
Paying in installments helped him buy equipment for his business.
Always check the total cost before agreeing to pay in installments.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo'lib to'lash qimmat narsalarni sotib olishni osonlashtiradi.
U oylik byudjetini yaxshiroq boshqarish uchun bo'lib to'lashni tanladi.
Ba'zi banklar bo'lib to'lashda qo'shimcha to'lov oladi.
Siz kurs uchun olti oy davomida bo'lib to'lashingiz mumkin.
Ular yangi mebel to'plami uchun bo'lib to'lashdi.
Bo'lib to'lash unga biznes uchun jihozlar sotib olishga yordam berdi.
Bo'lib to'lashga rozi bo'lishdan oldin umumiy narxni tekshiring.

words.definition: Money earned regularly with little or no active work required to maintain it.
words.definitionUz: Doimiy ishlamasdan ham o'z-o'zidan kelib turadigan daromad, masalan ijaradan tushadigan pul.
words.example1: I'm planning to buy as many apartments as possible in Tashkent and have a passive income.
words.example1Translation: Men Toshkentda imkon qadar ko'proq xonadon sotib olib, passiv daromad olishni rejalashtirmoqdaman.
words.example2: Renting out a property is one of the most popular ways to earn passive income.
words.example2Translation: Mulkni ijaraga berish passiv daromad olishning eng mashhur usullaridan biridir.
words.example3: He invested in dividend stocks to create a steady passive income.
words.example3Translation: U barqaror passiv daromad yaratish uchun dividend aktsiyalariga investitsiya qildi.
extraExamples: Passive income allows you to earn money while you sleep.
Creating an online course is a smart way to generate passive income.
She earns passive income from the rental property she bought five years ago.
Building passive income takes time and effort at the beginning.
Many financial experts recommend having at least one source of passive income.
His passive income from investments covers all his monthly expenses.
Writing a book can become a source of passive income over time.
extraExampleTranslations: Passiv daromad uxlab yotgan vaqtingizda ham pul ishlash imkonini beradi.
Onlayn kurs yaratish passiv daromad olishning aqlli usuli hisoblanadi.
U besh yil oldin sotib olgan ijaraga berilgan mulkdan passiv daromad olmoqda.
Passiv daromad qurish boshida vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.
Ko'pgina moliya mutaxassislari kamida bitta passiv daromad manbaiga ega bo'lishni tavsiya qiladi.
Uning investitsiyalardan keladigan passiv daromadi barcha oylik xarajatlarini qoplaydi.
Kitob yozish vaqt o'tishi bilan passiv daromad manbaiga aylanishi mumkin.

words.definition: A general increase in prices over time, causing money to buy less than before.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt o'tishi bilan narxlarning oshib borishi va shu sababli pulning xarid quvvati pasayishi.
words.example1: Inflation makes everyday items more expensive every year.
words.example1Translation: Inflyatsiya har yili oddiy narsalarni qimmatroq qiladi.
words.example2: High inflation is causing many families to struggle with basic expenses.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori inflyatsiya ko'p oilalarni asosiy xarajatlarni qoplashda qiyinchilikka solyapti.
words.example3: Governments try to control inflation by adjusting interest rates.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar foiz stavkalarini o'zgartirib inflyatsiyani nazorat qilishga harakat qiladi.
extraExamples: Inflation reduces the purchasing power of your savings over time.
Real estate is often used as a hedge against inflation.
The inflation rate reached fifteen percent last year.
During periods of high inflation, people tend to buy gold.
Low inflation is generally considered healthy for an economy.
Inflation affects everyone, especially those on fixed incomes.
Investors look for assets that can beat inflation in the long run.
extraExampleTranslations: Inflyatsiya vaqt o'tishi bilan jamg'armalaringizning xarid quvvatini kamaytiradi.
Ko'chmas mulk ko'pincha inflyatsiyadan himoya vositasi sifatida ishlatiladi.
O'tgan yil inflyatsiya darajasi o'n besh foizga yetdi.
Yuqori inflyatsiya davrida odamlar ko'pincha oltin sotib oladi.
Past inflyatsiya odatda iqtisodiyot uchun foydali hisoblanadi.
Inflyatsiya hammaga ta'sir qiladi, ayniqsa belgilangan daromadda yashaydigan odamlarga.
Investorlar uzoq muddatda inflyatsiyani yengib o'tadigan aktivlarni qidiradi.

words.definition: A measure of how much profit you make compared to how much money you invested.
words.definitionUz: Investitsiyadan qancha foyda olginingizni ko'rsatadigan ko'rsatkich. Masalan, 1000 dollar sarflab 200 dollar foyda olsangiz, ROI 20% bo'ladi.
words.example1: The return on investment in real estate is quite high in growing cities.
words.example1Translation: O'sib borayotgan shaharlarda ko'chmas mulkdagi investitsiya daromadi ancha yuqori.
words.example2: Before starting a business, always calculate the expected return on investment.
words.example2Translation: Biznes boshlashdan oldin, doim kutilayotgan investitsiya daromadini hisoblang.
words.example3: The marketing campaign had a strong return on investment.
words.example3Translation: Marketing kampaniyasi yuqori investitsiya daromadini ko'rsatdi.
extraExamples: A high return on investment means your money is working efficiently.
They compared the return on investment of different assets before deciding.
Real estate often offers a better return on investment than savings accounts.
The return on investment for that project exceeded their expectations.
Calculating return on investment helps you make smarter financial decisions.
Some investments offer a low return on investment but carry less risk.
He tracks the return on investment of each rental property separately.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori investitsiya daromadi pulingiz samarali ishlayotganini anglatadi.
Ular qaror qilishdan oldin turli aktivlarning investitsiya daromadlarini solishtirishdi.
Ko'chmas mulk ko'pincha jamg'arma hisoblariga qaraganda yuqori investitsiya daromadini taklif qiladi.
O'sha loyihadagi investitsiya daromadi ularning kutganidan oshib ketdi.
Investitsiya daromadini hisoblash aqlliroq moliyaviy qarorlar qabul qilishga yordam beradi.
Ba'zi investitsiyalar past investitsiya daromadini taklif qiladi, lekin xavfi kamroq.
U har bir ijaraga berilgan mulkning investitsiya daromadini alohida kuzatib boradi.

words.definition: A collection of financial investments such as stocks, bonds, real estate, and other assets owned by a person or institution.
words.definitionUz: Bir kishining turli joylarga qo'ygan barcha investitsiyalarining to'plami. Masalan, aktsiyalar, ko'chmas mulk va oltin birgalikda portfelni tashkil qiladi.
words.example1: It's smart to diversify your portfolio by investing in different assets.
words.example1Translation: Turli aktivlarga investitsiya qilib portfelingizni diversifikatsiya qilish aqlli qarordir.
words.example2: His portfolio includes real estate, stocks, and government bonds.
words.example2Translation: Uning portfeli ko'chmas mulk, aktsiyalar va davlat obligatsiyalarini o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3: She reviewed her portfolio every quarter to track performance.
words.example3Translation: U har chorakda portfelini ko'rib chiqib, natijalarni kuzatib bordi.
extraExamples: A balanced portfolio reduces the overall risk of losing money.
He added gold to his portfolio as a safe investment.
Building a strong portfolio takes years of consistent investing.
Your portfolio should match your financial goals and risk tolerance.
During the crisis, many investors saw their portfolios drop in value.
Diversifying your portfolio across different industries is a wise strategy.
She hired a financial advisor to manage her investment portfolio.
extraExampleTranslations: Muvozanatli portfel pul yo'qotish umumiy xavfini kamaytiradi.
U xavfsiz investitsiya sifatida portfeliga oltin qo'shdi.
Kuchli portfel qurish yillar davomida muntazam investitsiya qilishni talab qiladi.
Portfelingiz moliyaviy maqsadlaringiz va xavf tolerantligingizga mos bo'lishi kerak.
Inqiroz davrida ko'p investorlar portfellarining qiymati pasayganini ko'rdi.
Portfelingizni turli sohalarga diversifikatsiya qilish dono strategiyadir.
U investitsiya portfelini boshqarish uchun moliyaviy maslahatchi yolladi.

words.definition: to do something that is illegal or against the law
words.definitionUz: qonunga xilof ish qilmoq, jinoyat qilmoq
words.example1: I saw him commit a crime near the bank.
words.example1Translation: Men uni bank yaqinida jinoyat sodir etayotganini ko'rdim.
words.example2: Anyone who commits a crime must face the consequences.
words.example2Translation: Jinoyat sodir etgan har kim oqibatiga duch kelishi kerak.
words.example3: Young people sometimes commit crimes due to poverty.
words.example3Translation: Yoshlar ba'zan qashshoqlik sababli jinoyat sodir etadilar.
extraExamples: He committed a crime and ran away before the police arrived.
It is never acceptable to commit a crime, even under pressure.
The man was caught on camera committing a crime.
She did not mean to commit a crime, but she broke the law.
Committing a crime can ruin your entire future.
The group planned to commit a crime together.
People who commit crimes often repeat them without proper punishment.
extraExampleTranslations: U jinoyat sodir etib, politsiya kelmasdan oldin qochib ketdi.
Bosim ostida bo'lsa ham jinoyat sodir etish hech qachon to'g'ri emas.
Erkak kamera orqali jinoyat sodir etayotganda ushlandi.
U jinoyat sodir etmoqchi emas edi, lekin qonunni buzdi.
Jinoyat sodir etish butun kelajagingizni xarobaga aylantirishi mumkin.
Guruh birgalikda jinoyat sodir etishni rejalashtirdi.
Jinoyat sodir etgan odamlar to'g'ri jazolanmasdan ko'pincha uni takrorlaydilar.

words.definition: people who have committed a crime or who break the law regularly
words.definitionUz: jinoyat qilgan yoki qonunni buzadigan odamlar
words.example1: The police caught the criminals after a long chase.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya uzoq ta'qibdan keyin jinoyatchilarni ushladi.
words.example2: Criminals often try to hide their identity.
words.example2Translation: Jinoyatchilar ko'pincha o'z shaxsini yashirishga harakat qiladilar.
words.example3: The court sentenced three criminals to prison yesterday.
words.example3Translation: Sud kecha uch jinoyatchini qamoqqa hukm qildi.
extraExamples: Most criminals have a history of difficult childhoods.
The city installed more cameras to monitor criminals.
Criminals who are not caught often become bolder over time.
The government launched a program to stop young people from becoming criminals.
Some criminals return to a normal life after serving their sentence.
Criminals in this area are known to work in organized groups.
The detective studied the behavior of criminals to solve the case.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pchilik jinoyatchilarning qiyin bolalik tarixi bor.
Shahar jinoyatchilarni kuzatish uchun ko'proq kamera o'rnatdi.
Ushlanmagan jinoyatchilar vaqt o'tishi bilan ko'pincha dadilroq bo'lib boradi.
Hukumat yoshlarni jinoyatchi bo'lishdan to'xtatish uchun dastur ishga tushirdi.
Ba'zi jinoyatchilar jazoni o'tab bo'lgach, oddiy hayotga qaytadilar.
Bu hududdagi jinoyatchilar uyushgan guruhlarda ishlashi bilan tanilgan.
Detektiv ishni hal qilish uchun jinoyatchilarning xatti-harakatlarini o'rgandi.

words.definition: to be officially or publicly charged with doing something wrong or illegal
words.definitionUz: biror yomon yoki qonunga xilof ish qilganligi uchun ayblash ostiga olinmoq
words.example1: He was accused of stealing money from the company.
words.example1Translation: U kompaniyadan pul o'g'irlagani uchun ayblanmoq.
words.example2: She was accused of cheating on the exam.
words.example2Translation: U imtihonda aldaganlik uchun ayblanmoq.
words.example3: The politician was accused of accepting bribes.
words.example3Translation: Siyosatchi pora olganlik uchun ayblanmoq.
extraExamples: He was accused of lying to his colleagues during the meeting.
The manager was accused of treating employees unfairly.
Being accused of something you did not do is very stressful.
Two officers were accused of using excessive force.
She was accused of leaking private information to the press.
The company was accused of breaking environmental laws.
He was accused of fraud after the investigation began.
extraExampleTranslations: U yig'ilish davomida hamkasblariga yolg'on gapirgani uchun ayblanmoq.
Menejer xodimlarga adolatsiz munosabatda bo'lgani uchun ayblanmoq.
Qilmagan ishi uchun ayblanmoq juda katta stress.
Ikki xodim haddan tashqari kuch ishlatgani uchun ayblanmoq.
U matbuotga shaxsiy ma'lumot tarqatgani uchun ayblanmoq.
Kompaniya atrof-muhit qonunlarini buzgani uchun ayblanmoq.
Tergov boshlangandan so'ng u firibgarlikda ayblanmoq.

words.definition: the act of offering money or favors to influence someone in a position of power, and the dishonest behavior that results from it
words.definitionUz: mansabdor odamlarga pul yoki imtiyoz berib, ularni o'z manfaatingga bo'ysundirish va buning natijasida yuzaga keladigan halolsizlik
words.example1: Bribery and corruption slow down the development of any country.
words.example1Translation: Poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya har qanday mamlakatning rivojlanishini sekinlashtiradi.
words.example2: The investigation revealed widespread bribery and corruption in the ministry.
words.example2Translation: Tergov vazirlikda keng tarqalgan poraxo'rlik va korrupsiyani oshkor qildi.
words.example3: Fighting bribery and corruption requires strong laws and honest leaders.
words.example3Translation: Poraxo'rlik va korrupsiyaga qarshi kurashish uchun kuchli qonunlar va halol rahbarlar kerak.
extraExamples: Bribery and corruption destroy public trust in the government.
Many businesses refuse to operate in countries with high corruption.
He was fired after being linked to bribery and corruption.
Transparency is the best tool against bribery and corruption.
Citizens reported cases of bribery and corruption to the authorities.
Bribery and corruption in the justice system are especially dangerous.
The new president made fighting bribery and corruption his top priority.
extraExampleTranslations: Poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya hukumatga bo'lgan jamoat ishonchini yo'q qiladi.
Ko'p bizneslar korrupsiya darajasi yuqori mamlakatlarda faoliyat yuritishdan bosh tortadi.
U poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya bilan bog'liqligi aniqlangach, ishdan bo'shatildi.
Shaffoflik poraxo'rlik va korrupsiyaga qarshi eng yaxshi vositadir.
Fuqarolar poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya holatlarini organlarga xabar qildi.
Adolat tizimidagi poraxo'rlik va korrupsiya ayniqsa xavflidir.
Yangi prezident poraxo'rlik va korrupsiyaga qarshi kurashni asosiy ustuvor vazifasiga aylantirdi.

words.definition: a claim that someone has done something wrong or illegal, without necessarily being proven
words.definitionUz: biror odamning noto'g'ri yoki qonunga xilof ish qilgani haqida qilingan da'vo, lekin hali isbotlanmagan
words.example1: The accusation against him shocked the whole office.
words.example1Translation: Unga qarshi ayblov butun ofisni larzaga keltirdi.
words.example2: She denied every accusation made against her.
words.example2Translation: U o'ziga qarshi qilingan barcha ayblovlarni rad etdi.
words.example3: An accusation without evidence is not enough to convict someone.
words.example3Translation: Dalilsiz ayblov odamni sudlash uchun yetarli emas.
extraExamples: The accusation was proven false after a full investigation.
He made a serious accusation against his former business partner.
The accusation spread quickly on social media before anyone checked the facts.
Making a false accusation can have serious legal consequences.
The accusation damaged her reputation even before the trial began.
He stayed calm when faced with the accusation.
The teacher carefully listened to the accusation before responding.
extraExampleTranslations: To'liq tergov o'tkazilgandan so'ng ayblov yolg'on ekanligi isbotlandi.
U sobiq biznes hamkori haqida jiddiy ayblov qildi.
Hech kim faktlarni tekshirmasdan oldin ayblov ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda tez tarqaldi.
Yolg'on ayblov jiddiy huquqiy oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Ayblov sud boshlanmasdan oldin uning obro'siga zarar yetkazdi.
U ayblovga duch kelganda xotirjam qoldi.
O'qituvchi javob berishdan oldin ayblovni diqqat bilan tingladi.

words.definition: a person who carries out a harmful, illegal, or criminal act
words.definitionUz: jinoyat yoki zarar keltiruvchi ish qilgan shaxs
words.example1: The perpetrator was identified through security camera footage.
words.example1Translation: Jinoyatchi xavfsizlik kamerasi tasvirlari orqali aniqlanmoq.
words.example2: Police are still searching for the perpetrator of the attack.
words.example2Translation: Politsiya hujum sodir etgan shaxsni hali ham qidiryapti.
words.example3: The perpetrator confessed to the crime after several hours of questioning.
words.example3Translation: Jinoyatchi bir necha soatlik so'roqdan so'ng jinoyatni bo'yniga oldi.
extraExamples: The perpetrator left no evidence at the scene.
Witnesses helped police identify the perpetrator.
The perpetrator had a history of similar offenses.
Catching the perpetrator quickly prevented more crimes.
The perpetrator was sentenced to ten years in prison.
In many cases, the perpetrator is known to the victim.
The perpetrator tried to blame someone else for the crime.
extraExampleTranslations: Jinoyatchi voqea joyida hech qanday iz qoldirmadi.
Guvohlar politsiyaga jinoyatchini aniqlamoqqa yordam berdi.
Jinoyatchining shunga o'xshash huquqbuzarliklar tarixi bor edi.
Jinoyatchini tez ushlamoq ko'proq jinoyatlarning oldini oldi.
Jinoyatchi o'n yil qamoq jazosiga hukm qilindi.
Ko'p hollarda jinoyatchi jabrlanuvchiga tanish bo'ladi.
Jinoyatchi jinoyatni boshqa birovga ag'darishga urindi.

words.definition: to officially charge someone with a crime and take legal action against them in court
words.definitionUz: biror odamni jinoyatda ayblash va uni sud orqali javobgarlikka tortmoq
words.example1: The state decided to prosecute him for tax fraud.
words.example1Translation: Davlat uni soliq firibgarligi uchun sudga tortishga qaror qildi.
words.example2: It is difficult to prosecute someone without solid evidence.
words.example2Translation: Mustahkam dalilsiz biror odamni sudga tortish qiyin.
words.example3: The company was prosecuted for violating safety regulations.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya xavfsizlik qoidalarini buzgani uchun sudga tortildi.
extraExamples: The attorney decided to prosecute the case despite the lack of witnesses.
They chose not to prosecute him due to his young age.
Anyone found guilty of this offense will be prosecuted.
The government prosecuted several officials for corruption.
She was prosecuted for fraud and lost her license.
The law allows authorities to prosecute offenders even years later.
He was warned that he would be prosecuted if caught again.
extraExampleTranslations: Advokat guvohlar yo'qligiga qaramay, ishni sudga olib borishga qaror qildi.
Ular uning yoshligini hisobga olib, sudga tortmaslikni tanladi.
Bu jinoyatda aybdor topilgan har kim sudga tortiladi.
Hukumat bir nechta amaldorni korrupsiya uchun sudga tortdi.
U firibgarlik uchun sudga tortildi va litsenziyasidan mahrum bo'ldi.
Qonun organlarga jinoyatchini yillar o'tgach ham sudga tortish imkonini beradi.
Unga yana ushlansa, sudga tortilishi haqida ogohlantirish berildi.

words.definition: the act of threatening to reveal damaging information about someone unless they give you money or do what you want
words.definitionUz: biror odamning maxfiy yoki uyatli ma'lumotini oshkor qilish bilan tahdid qilib, undan pul yoki biron narsa talab qilmoq
words.example1: He was arrested for blackmail after threatening to expose private photos.
words.example1Translation: U shaxsiy rasmlarni oshkor qilish bilan tahdid qilgani uchun tovlamachilikda hibsga olindi.
words.example2: She refused to give in to blackmail and went straight to the police.
words.example2Translation: U tovlamachilikning ta'siriga tushishdan bosh tortdi va to'g'ridan-to'g'ri politsiyaga bordi.
words.example3: Blackmail is a serious crime that carries heavy penalties.
words.example3Translation: Tovlamachilik og'ir jazolar nazarda tutadigan jiddiy jinoyatdir.
extraExamples: The politician was a victim of blackmail for years before it was discovered.
Using someone's secrets as blackmail is both illegal and unethical.
He tried to blackmail his former employer with stolen documents.
The blackmail attempt failed when the victim contacted the authorities.
Online blackmail has become more common with the rise of social media.
She was too afraid to report the blackmail at first.
The court sentenced him to five years for blackmail.
extraExampleTranslations: Siyosatchi bu oshkor bo'lguncha yillar davomida tovlamachilikning qurboni bo'ldi.
Kimningdir sirlarini tovlamachilik vositasi sifatida ishlatmoq ham qonunga xilof, ham axloqsizlikdir.
U o'g'irlangan hujjatlar bilan sobiq ish beruvchisini shantaj qilmoqchi bo'ldi.
Jabrlanuvchi organlarga murojaat qilgach, tovlamachilik urinishi muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarning tarqalishi bilan onlayn tovlamachilik ko'payib bormoqda.
U dastlab tovlamachilikning xabar berishdan qo'rqdi.
Sud uni tovlamachilik uchun besh yil qamoqqa hukm qildi.

words.definition: to discourage or prevent someone from doing something by making them afraid of the consequences
words.definitionUz: oqibatlaridan qo'rqitib, biror odamni biror ish qilishdan to'xtatmoq yoki qaytarmoq
words.example1: Harsh punishments are meant to deter people from committing crimes.
words.example1Translation: Qattiq jazolar odamlarni jinoyat sodir etishdan ogohlantirib qaytarish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example2: Security cameras deter thieves from breaking into stores.
words.example2Translation: Xavfsizlik kameralari o'g'rilarni do'konlarga kirishdan qaytaradi.
words.example3: The heavy fine was enough to deter most drivers from speeding.
words.example3Translation: Katta jarima ko'pchilik haydovchilarni tezlikni oshirishdan qaytarish uchun yetarli bo'ldi.
extraExamples: Stronger border controls can deter illegal crossings.
The presence of police officers on the street deters crime.
Fear of failure should not deter you from trying new things.
Public awareness campaigns deter people from drunk driving.
High prices alone are not enough to deter serious criminals.
The new law was designed to deter companies from polluting rivers.
Peer pressure can deter young people from making good choices.
extraExampleTranslations: Chegaradagi kuchaytirish noqonuniy o'tishlarni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Ko'chada politsiya xodimlarining mavjudligi jinoyatni qaytaradi.
Muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan qo'rqish sizni yangi narsalarni sinab ko'rishdan qaytarmasligi kerak.
Jamoat xabardorlik kampaniyalari odamlarni mast holda haydashdan qaytaradi.
Yuqori narxlarning o'zi jiddiy jinoyatchilarni qaytarish uchun yetarli emas.
Yangi qonun kompaniyalarni daryo ifloslantirmoqdan qaytarish uchun ishlab chiqilgan.
Tengdoshlar bosimi yoshlarni to'g'ri tanlov qilishdan qaytarishi mumkin.

words.definition: to reduce the amount of criminal activity in a society to the lowest possible level
words.definitionUz: jamiyatdagi jinoyatlar sonini iloji boricha kamaytirishga harakat qilmoq
words.example1: Better education can help minimize crime in poor neighborhoods.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshiroq ta'lim kambag'al mahallalardagi jinoyatni kamaytirishga yordam berishi mumkin.
words.example2: The city hired more police officers to minimize crime in dangerous areas.
words.example2Translation: Shahar xavfli hududlardagi jinoyatni kamaytirish uchun ko'proq politsiya xodimlarini yollamoqda.
words.example3: Community programs are effective tools to minimize crime among youth.
words.example3Translation: Jamoat dasturlari yoshlar o'rtasidagi jinoyatni kamaytirish uchun samarali vositalardir.
extraExamples: Street lighting is a simple way to minimize crime at night.
Providing jobs helps minimize crime by giving people a reason to stay out of trouble.
The government invested in social programs to minimize crime rates.
Minimizing crime requires long-term planning, not just policing.
Technology such as surveillance systems can minimize crime in public spaces.
Rebuilding trust between police and communities helps minimize crime.
Early intervention programs minimize crime by helping at-risk youth.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'cha yoritgichlari kechasi jinoyatni kamaytirish uchun oddiy usuldir.
Ish joyi yaratish odamlarga muammolardan uzoq turish uchun sabab berib, jinoyatni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Hukumat jinoyat darajasini kamaytirish uchun ijtimoiy dasturlarga sarmoya kiritdi.
Jinoyatni kamaytirish faqat politsiya ishidan emas, uzoq muddatli rejalashtirish talab qiladi.
Kuzatuv tizimlari kabi texnologiyalar jamoat joylarida jinoyatni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Politsiya va jamoatlar o'rtasidagi ishonchni tiklash jinoyatni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
Erta aralashuv dasturlari xavf ostidagi yoshlarga yordam berib, jinoyatni kamaytiradi.

words.definition: To find a fair and workable middle point between two different things or needs.
words.definitionUz: Ikki narsa orasida to'g'ri o'rtacha yo'l topmoq — biriga haddan ziyod e'tibor bermay, ikkinchisini e'tiborsiz qoldirmaslik.
words.example1: I always strike a balance between work and rest.
words.example1Translation: Men doim ish va dam olish o'rtasida muvozanatni saqlashga harakat qilaman.
words.example2: It is hard to strike a balance between saving money and enjoying life.
words.example2Translation: Pul tejash va hayotdan zavqlanish o'rtasida muvozanat saqlash qiyin.
words.example3: Good teachers strike a balance between being strict and being kind.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi o'qituvchilar qat'iylik va mehribonlik o'rtasida muvozanatni saqlaydi.
extraExamples: She strikes a balance between spending time with family and focusing on her career.
The company tries to strike a balance between profit and employee well-being.
He struck a balance between being honest and not hurting her feelings.
Striking a balance between exercise and rest helps the body recover faster.
The government must strike a balance between economic growth and environmental protection.
I find it difficult to strike a balance between screen time and reading.
A good diet strikes a balance between enjoying food and staying healthy.
extraExampleTranslations: U oila bilan vaqt o'tkazish va karerasiga e'tibor berish o'rtasida muvozanat saqlaydi.
Kompaniya foyda va xodimlar farovonligi o'rtasida muvozanat saqlashga harakat qiladi.
U halol bo'lish va uning his-tuyg'ularini inchinmaslik o'rtasida muvozanatni topdi.
Mashq va dam olish o'rtasida muvozanat saqlash tanaga tezroq tiklanishga yordam beradi.
Hukumat iqtisodiy o'sish va atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish o'rtasida muvozanat saqlashi kerak.
Ekran vaqti va o'qish o'rtasida muvozanat saqlash menga qiyin.
Yaxshi ovqatlanish tarzi taomdan zavqlanish va sog'lom bo'lish o'rtasida muvozanatni saqlaydi.

words.definition: To sell something at a price that is higher than the usual or standard market price.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani oddiy narxidan ko'proq pulga sotmoq — odatda u narsa kamyob yoki juda mashhur bo'lganda shunday bo'ladi.
words.example1: These tickets sell at a premium because they are hard to find.
words.example1Translation: Bu chiptalar topish qiyin bo'lganligi sababli bozor narxidan qimmatroqqa sotiladi.
words.example2: Designer bags often sell at a premium due to their brand name.
words.example2Translation: Dizayner sumkalar brendlari tufayli ko'pincha yuqori narxda sotiladi.
words.example3: Organic vegetables sell at a premium in most city supermarkets.
words.example3Translation: Organik sabzavotlar aksariyat shahar supermarketlarida yuqori narxda sotiladi.
extraExamples: Concert tickets for popular artists always sell at a premium.
Apartments near the city center sell at a premium compared to those in the suburbs.
Limited edition sneakers sell at a premium on resale websites.
Fresh seafood sells at a premium in landlocked cities.
Products with eco-friendly packaging tend to sell at a premium.
Handmade goods often sell at a premium because of the time and skill involved.
During the holiday season, many items sell at a premium due to high demand.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashhur san'atkorlarning konsert chiptalari har doim yuqori narxda sotiladi.
Shahar markaziga yaqin kvartiralar chekkadagilarga nisbatan qimmatroqqa sotiladi.
Cheklangan nashrli krossovkalar qayta sotish saytlarida yuqori narxda sotiladi.
Dengizdan uzoq shaharlarda yangi dengiz mahsulotlari qimmatroqqa sotiladi.
Ekologik toza qadoqlangan mahsulotlar ko'pincha yuqori narxda sotiladi.
Qo'lda tayyorlangan buyumlar ularga sarflangan vaqt va mahorat tufayli ko'pincha qimmatroqqa sotiladi.
Bayram mavsumida ko'plab mahsulotlar yuqori talab tufayli bozor narxidan qimmatroqqa sotiladi.

words.definition: To go around or avoid something, such as a place, rule, or process.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki joyni chetlab o'tmoq — unga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri kirmasdan yoki qoidaga rioya qilmasdan boshqa yo'l tanlash.
words.example1: He bypassed traffic by taking a smaller road.
words.example1Translation: U kichik yo'ldan o'tib, tirbandlikni chetlab o'tdi.
words.example2: She bypassed the long queue by using the VIP entrance.
words.example2Translation: U VIP kirishdan foydalanib, uzun navbatni chetlab o'tdi.
words.example3: Some users try to bypass the app's security settings.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi foydalanuvchilar ilovaning xavfsizlik sozlamalarini chetlab o'tishga urinadilar.
extraExamples: The new highway was built to bypass the crowded city center.
He bypassed the formal application process by contacting the manager directly.
The software update bypassed several old security checks.
They built a canal to bypass the waterfall and allow boats to pass.
You cannot bypass the verification step when creating a new account.
The delivery driver bypassed the usual route to save time.
Some employees tried to bypass the approval system without permission.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi avtomagistral gavjum shahar markazini chetlab o'tish uchun qurildi.
U menejer bilan to'g'ridan-to'g'ri bog'lanib, rasmiy ariza jarayonini chetlab o'tdi.
Dasturiy yangilanish bir qancha eski xavfsizlik tekshiruvlarini chetlab o'tdi.
Ular sharsharani chetlab o'tish va kemalar o'tishi uchun kanal qurdilar.
Yangi hisob yaratishda tasdiqlash bosqichini chetlab o'tib bo'lmaydi.
Yetkazib beruvchi haydovchi vaqt tejash uchun odatdagi marshrutni chetlab o'tdi.
Ba'zi xodimlar ruxsatsiz tasdiqlash tizimini chetlab o'tishga urindilar.

words.definition: To deliberately decide to always do something because you think it is important.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani muhim deb bilib, uni doimo ataylab va ongli ravishda qilishga qaror qilmoq.
words.example1: I make it a point to sleep before 11 p.m.
words.example1Translation: Men soat 23:00 dan oldin uxlashga harakat qilaman.
words.example2: She makes it a point to call her parents every Sunday.
words.example2Translation: U har yakshanba ota-onasiga qo'ng'iroq qilishni odat qilib olgan.
words.example3: He makes it a point to arrive five minutes early to every meeting.
words.example3Translation: U har bir uchrashuvga besh daqiqa oldin kelishni odat qilib olgan.
extraExamples: I make it a point to drink at least eight glasses of water every day.
She makes it a point to read for thirty minutes before bed.
We make it a point to eat dinner together as a family.
He makes it a point to thank his team after every project.
I make it a point to review my notes the same day I take them.
They make it a point to visit their hometown at least once a year.
She makes it a point to respond to messages within twenty-four hours.
extraExampleTranslations: Men har kuni kamida sakkiz stakan suv ichishga harakat qilaman.
U uxlashdan oldin o'ttiz daqiqa kitob o'qishni odat qilib olgan.
Biz oila bo'lib kechki ovqatni birga yeyishga harakat qilamiz.
U har bir loyihadan keyin jamoasiga minnatdorchilik bildirishni odat qilib olgan.
Men konspektlarni olgan kunim ko'rib chiqishga harakat qilaman.
Ular yiliga kamida bir marta o'z shaharlariga tashrif buyurishni odat qilib olganlar.
U xabarlarga yigirma to'rt soat ichida javob berishga harakat qiladi.

words.definition: A significantly long time before a particular event or moment.
words.definitionUz: Biror voqea yoki vaqtdan ancha, juda oldin — qisqa vaqt emas, balki uzoq muddat oldin degan ma'noni bildiradi.
words.example1: She moved out long before the new family came.
words.example1Translation: U yangi oila kelishidan ancha oldin ko'chib ketgan edi.
words.example2: Long before smartphones existed, people used paper maps.
words.example2Translation: Smartfonlar paydo bo'lishidan ancha oldin, odamlar qog'oz xaritalardan foydalanganlar.
words.example3: He had already left the office long before the meeting started.
words.example3Translation: U yig'ilish boshlanishidan ancha oldin ofisdan ketib bo'lgan edi.
extraExamples: Long before the internet, people wrote letters to stay in touch.
She had finished her homework long before dinner was ready.
Long before the alarm rang, he was already awake.
The city was already famous long before tourists started coming.
Long before the election, voters had already made up their minds.
He knew the answer long before the teacher asked the question.
Long before the company became successful, the founders worked from a small room.
extraExampleTranslations: Internet paydo bo'lishidan ancha oldin, odamlar aloqada bo'lish uchun xat yozganlar.
Kechki ovqat tayyor bo'lishidan ancha oldin u uy vazifasini tugatib bo'lgan edi.
Soat jiringlashidan ancha oldin u allaqachon uyg'onib bo'lgan edi.
Shahar turistlar kela boshlashidan ancha oldin allaqachon mashhur edi.
Saylovdan ancha oldin, ovozchi beruvchilar allaqachon fikrlarini belgilab olgan edilar.
O'qituvchi savol bermasidan ancha oldin u javobni bilgan edi.
Kompaniya muvaffaqiyatli bo'lishidan ancha oldin, asoschilari kichik xonada ishlagan.

words.definition: To fail to do something that is legally or formally required, especially paying back money that was borrowed.
words.definitionUz: Qarz yoki majburiyatni o'z vaqtida bajarmay qoldirmoq — ayniqsa qarz pulini qaytarmaslik yoki shartnoma shartlarini buzish.
words.example1: He defaulted on his loan and had to pay a fine.
words.example1Translation: U kreditini to'lamadi va jarima to'lashga majbur bo'ldi.
words.example2: The company defaulted on its payments and lost its contract.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya to'lovlarni bajarmadi va shartnomasini yo'qotdi.
words.example3: If you default on rent, the landlord can ask you to leave.
words.example3Translation: Agar ijara haqqini to'lamasangiz, uy egasi ketishingizni so'rashi mumkin.
extraExamples: Several countries defaulted on their national debt during the economic crisis.
He defaulted on his mortgage and lost his house.
The borrower defaulted twice before the bank took action.
Defaulting on a student loan can seriously damage your credit score.
The startup defaulted on its investor agreement within six months.
If a player defaults, the opponent automatically wins the match.
She nearly defaulted on her car payments before getting a second job.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida bir nechta mamlakatlar milliy qarzlarini to'lay olmadi.
U ipoteka kreditini to'lamadi va uyini yo'qotdi.
Bank chora ko'rishidan oldin qarz oluvchi ikki marta to'lovni bajarmadi.
Talaba kreditini to'lamaslik kredit reytingingizga jiddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Startap olti oy ichida investor bilan tuzilgan kelishuvni bajarmadi.
Agar o'yinchi majburiyatni bajarmasa, raqib avtomatik ravishda o'yinni yutadi.
U ikkinchi ish topgunga qadar avtomobil to'lovlarini deyarli bajarmay qoldi.

words.definition: To become known or discovered after being hidden or unknown.
words.definitionUz: Yashiringan yoki noma'lum bo'lgan narsa oshkor bo'lmoq — odamlar bilib qolishi yoki fosh bo'lishi.
words.example1: The mistake came to light after the meeting.
words.example1Translation: Xato yig'ilishdan keyin oshkor bo'ldi.
words.example2: New evidence came to light during the investigation.
words.example2Translation: Tergov davomida yangi dalillar ma'lum bo'ldi.
words.example3: The scandal came to light when a journalist published the report.
words.example3Translation: Jurnalist hisobotni e'lon qilganda, janjal oshkor bo'ldi.
extraExamples: Several errors in the financial report came to light after the audit.
The truth about the accident came to light years later.
More details came to light as witnesses began to speak.
It came to light that the manager had been hiding the losses.
A major security flaw came to light after users reported problems.
The full story only came to light after the trial ended.
Information about the fraud came to light through leaked documents.
extraExampleTranslations: Moliyaviy hisobotdagi bir nechta xatolar audit o'tkazilgandan keyin oshkor bo'ldi.
Baxtsiz hodisa haqidagi haqiqat yillar o'tib ma'lum bo'ldi.
Guvohlar gapira boshlashi bilan qo'shimcha tafsilotlar ma'lum bo'ldi.
Menejerning zararlarni yashirib kelgani oshkor bo'ldi.
Foydalanuvchilar muammo haqida xabar bergandan keyin jiddiy xavfsizlik kamchiligi ma'lum bo'ldi.
To'liq voqea sud jarayoni tugaganidan keyingina oshkor bo'ldi.
Firibgarlik haqidagi ma'lumotlar sizib chiqqan hujjatlar orqali ma'lum bo'ldi.

words.definition: To stop yourself from saying something that you want to say, usually to avoid conflict or trouble.
words.definitionUz: Gapirmoqchi bo'lgan narsangizni aytmaslik — odatda muammo chiqarmaslik yoki vaziyatni yomonlashtirmaslik uchun jimgina turish.
words.example1: I wanted to speak, but I held my tongue.
words.example1Translation: Gapirishni xohladim, lekin tilimni tiyib turdim.
words.example2: She held her tongue during the argument to avoid making things worse.
words.example2Translation: U janjal paytida vaziyatni yomonlashtirmaslik uchun gapirmay turdi.
words.example3: Sometimes it is better to hold your tongue and listen.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zan gapirmasdan tinglash yaxshiroq bo'ladi.
extraExamples: He held his tongue when his boss made an unfair comment.
I had to hold my tongue even though I knew she was wrong.
Hold your tongue if you have nothing helpful to say.
She held her tongue during the interview to stay professional.
It took great effort to hold my tongue in that moment.
He regretted holding his tongue for so long without saying anything.
Knowing when to hold your tongue is a valuable social skill.
extraExampleTranslations: Xo'jayini adolatsiz izoh bildirganida u tilini tiyib turdi.
U noto'g'ri ekanligini bilsam ham, tilimni tiyib turishga majbur bo'ldim.
Foydali gapirish uchun hech narsangiz bo'lmasa, tilingizni tiyib turing.
U intervyu davomida professional bo'lib qolish uchun gapirmasdan turdi.
O'sha lahzada tilimni tiyib turish katta kuch talab qildi.
U shu qadar ko'p vaqt hech narsa demay, tilini tiyib turganidan afsus qildi.
Qachon jimgina turish kerakligini bilish — muhim ijtimoiy ko'nikma.

words.translation: tejash maqsadida sifatni pasaytirmoq / qisqa yo'l tanlamoq
words.definition: To do something in the quickest or cheapest way, often by skipping important steps and reducing quality.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni tezroq yoki arzonroq qilish uchun muhim qadamlarni o'tkazib yubormoq — bu ko'pincha sifatni pasaytiradi yoki xavf tug'diradi.
words.example1: Don't cut corners when it comes to safety.
words.example1Translation: Xavfsizlik masalasida sifatni pasaytirmang.
words.example2: The builder cut corners and used cheap materials.
words.example2Translation: Qurilishchi tejash maqsadida arzon materiallardan foydalandi.
words.example3: Cutting corners on your resume can cost you the job.
words.example3Translation: Rezyumengizni shoshma-shoshar to'ldirish ish o'rni yo'qotishingizga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The restaurant was cutting corners by reusing old cooking oil.
If you cut corners on your studies, you will struggle during the exam.
The project failed because the team cut too many corners.
Cutting corners on product testing led to a massive product recall.
She never cuts corners, which is why her work is always reliable.
They cut corners on maintenance, and the machine broke down within a week.
Investors lost trust in the company after it was found to be cutting corners on safety.
extraExampleTranslations: Restoran eski qovurish moyini qayta ishlatib tejashga urinar edi.
O'qishda qisqa yo'l tanlasangiz, imtihonda qiynalasiz.
Jamoa juda ko'p narsalarni qisqartirgani uchun loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi.
Mahsulotni sinab ko'rishda tejamkorlik qilish katta miqdorda mahsulotni qaytarib olishga olib keldi.
U hech qachon sifatni pasaytirmaydi, shuning uchun uning ishi har doim ishonchli.
Ular texnik xizmatda tejashdi va mashina bir hafta ichida buzildi.
Kompaniya xavfsizlik bo'yicha tejamkorlik qilayotgani ma'lum bo'lgandan keyin investorlar ishonchini yo'qotdi.

words.definition: To remember a piece of information because it might be useful or important later.
words.definitionUz: Biror ma'lumotni unutmaslik — chunki u keyinchalik muhim yoki foydali bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example1: Keep in mind that prices may increase next month.
words.example1Translation: Narxlar kelasi oy oshishi mumkinligini yodda tuting.
words.example2: Keep in mind that the deadline is this Friday.
words.example2Translation: Muddat shu juma ekanligini yodda tuting.
words.example3: When choosing a job, keep in mind how far you have to travel.
words.example3Translation: Ish tanlaganda, qancha yul yurishingizni hisobga oling.
extraExamples: Keep in mind that not everyone learns at the same speed.
When packing for a trip, keep in mind the weather at your destination.
Keep in mind that the store closes early on weekends.
She kept in mind all the feedback she received and improved her work.
Keep in mind that first impressions are difficult to change.
Keep in mind that this offer is only valid until the end of the month.
When making decisions, keep in mind how they will affect others.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma bir xil tezlikda o'rganmasligini yodda tuting.
Sayohat uchun narsa yig'ayotganda, boradigan joyingizning ob-havosini hisobga oling.
Do'kon dam olish kunlari erta yopilishini yodda tuting.
U olgan barcha fikrlarni yodda tutdi va ishini yaxshiladi.
Birinchi taassurotni o'zgartirish qiyin ekanligini yodda tuting.
Bu taklif faqat oy oxirigacha amal qilishini yodda tuting.
Qaror qabul qilayotganda, ular boshqalarga qanday ta'sir qilishini hisobga oling.

words.definition: to have a strong interest in something
words.definitionUz: biror narsaga qiziqish, zavq bilan shug'ullanmoq
words.example1: She is really into learning new languages.
words.example1Translation: U yangi tillarni o'rganishga juda qiziqadi.
words.example2: My brother is into graphic design these days.
words.example2Translation: Akam hozirda grafik dizaynga qiziqib qoldi.
words.example3: Are you into cooking, or do you prefer eating out?
words.example3Translation: Siz ovqat pishirishga qiziqasizmi yoki tashqarida ovqatlanishni afzal ko'rasizmi?
extraExamples: I got into podcasts after my friend recommended one.
He has been into fitness for the past two years.
We are all into this new TV series right now.
She is not really into social media.
They are into traveling and visit a new country every year.
I never thought I would be into gardening, but here I am.
What kind of music are you into?
extraExampleTranslations: Do'stim tavsiya qilganidan keyin podkastlarga qiziqib qoldim.
U so'nggi ikki yil davomida fitnesga qiziqib kelmoqda.
Biz hozir hammamiz shu yangi serialga qiziqib qoldik.
U ijtimoiy tarmoqlarga unchalik qiziqmaydi.
Ular sayohатga qiziqishadi va har yili yangi mamlakatga borishadi.
Bog'bonchilikka qiziqib qolaman deb o'ylamagandim, lekin mana shu ahvolda turibman.
Qanday musiqa eshitishni yoqtirasiz?

words.definition: to completely support or agree with something
words.definitionUz: biror narsa yoki g'oyani to'liq ma'qullash va qo'llab-quvvatlash
words.example1: I am all for giving everyone a second chance.
words.example1Translation: Men hamma odamga ikkinchi imkon berishni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlayman.
words.example2: She is all for working from home on Fridays.
words.example2Translation: U jumagunlari uydan ishlash g'oyasini to'liq ma'qullaydi.
words.example3: The team is all for trying a new approach.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa yangi yondashuvni sinab ko'rishni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
extraExamples: I am all for saving money, but this feels too extreme.
He is all for open communication in the workplace.
We are all for updating the rules if it helps everyone.
She is all for the idea of a four-day workweek.
Are you all for moving the deadline, or do you prefer to keep it?
I am all for healthy eating, but I still enjoy dessert.
They are all for investing in education.
extraExampleTranslations: Men pul tejashni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlayman, lekin bu biroz haddan oshib ketgandek.
U ish joyida ochiq muloqot bo'lishini to'liq ma'qullaydi.
Agar hammaga foydasi bo'lsa, biz qoidalarni yangilashni qo'llab-quvvatlaymiz.
U to'rt kunlik ish haftasi g'oyasini to'liq ma'qullaydi.
Muddat o'zgartirilishini qo'llaysizmi yoki shundayligicha qolsinmi?
Men sog'lom ovqatlanishni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlayman, lekin shirinlikdan ham bahramand bo'laman.
Ular ta'limga sarmoya kiritishni to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlashadi.

words.definition: to oppose or disagree with something
words.definitionUz: biror narsa yoki g'oyaga qarshi turmoq, uni ma'qullamaslik
words.example1: He is against making any changes to the original plan.
words.example1Translation: U asl rejaga o'zgartirish kiritishga qarshi.
words.example2: Many people are against building a new highway through the park.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p odamlar park orqali yangi yo'l qurishga qarshi.
words.example3: Are you against the idea, or do you just need more time to think?
words.example3Translation: Siz g'oyaga qarshimisiz yoki shunchaki ko'proq o'ylash uchun vaqt kerakmi?
extraExamples: I am not against change, I just want it done carefully.
She is against eating fast food every day.
They are against reducing the budget for schools.
He was against the decision at first, but later agreed.
We are against any form of discrimination.
I am against working overtime without proper pay.
The manager is against canceling the project at this stage.
extraExampleTranslations: Men o'zgarishga qarshi emasman, shunchaki ehtiyotkorlik bilan amalga oshirilishini xohlayman.
U har kuni tez ovqat yeyishga qarshi.
Ular maktablar uchun byudjetni qisqartirishga qarshi.
U dastlab qarorga qarshi edi, lekin keyinchalik rozi bo'ldi.
Biz har qanday kamsitishga qarshimiz.
Men tegishli haq to'lanmagan holda qo'shimcha ishlashga qarshiman.
Menejer bu bosqichda loyihani bekor qilishga qarshi.

words.definition: to be related or connected to something
words.definitionUz: biror narsa bilan aloqador yoki bog'liq bo'lmoq
words.example1: The delay is to do with a technical issue in the system.
words.example1Translation: Kechikish tizimidagi texnik muammo bilan bog'liq.
words.example2: Her tiredness is to do with not sleeping enough.
words.example2Translation: Uning charchoqligi yetarli uxlamaslik bilan bog'liq.
words.example3: Most of the complaints are to do with slow service.
words.example3Translation: Shikoyatlarning aksariyati sekin xizmat bilan bog'liq.
extraExamples: The error is to do with a missing file in the folder.
His stress is to do with the upcoming exam.
The conflict is to do with a misunderstanding between the two teams.
Their success is to do with years of consistent effort.
The problem is to do with how the data was entered.
Her confidence is to do with her past experience.
The noise is to do with construction work nearby.
extraExampleTranslations: Xato papkadagi yo'qolgan fayl bilan bog'liq.
Uning stressi yaqinlashib kelayotgan imtihon bilan bog'liq.
Mojaro ikki jamoa o'rtasidagi noto'g'ri tushunish bilan bog'liq.
Ularning muvaffaqiyati yillar davomida izchil mehnat qilish bilan bog'liq.
Muammo ma'lumotlarning qanday kiritilganligi bilan bog'liq.
Uning ishonchi o'tmishdagi tajribalari bilan bog'liq.
Shovqin yaqin atrofdagi qurilish ishlari bilan bog'liq.

words.definition: to be completely ready for something
words.definitionUz: biror narsa uchun hamma jihatdan tayyor bo'lmoq, hech narsa yetishmasligi
words.example1: We are all set for the presentation tomorrow morning.
words.example1Translation: Biz ertangi ertalabki taqdimot uchun to'liq tayyormiz.
words.example2: I checked everything twice and I am all set.
words.example2Translation: Hamma narsani ikki marta tekshirdim va to'liq tayyorman.
words.example3: Just sign here and you will be all set.
words.example3Translation: Faqat bu yerga imzo qo'ying va hamma narsa tayyor bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The team is all set to launch the new product next week.
Are you all set, or do you need a few more minutes?
I packed my bags last night, so I am all set for the flight.
She reviewed her notes and felt all set for the interview.
The venue is all set for the event tonight.
Let me know when you are all set and we will begin.
He downloaded all the files and is now all set to work offline.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa kelasi hafta yangi mahsulotni ishga tushirishga to'liq tayyor.
Siz tayyormisiz yoki yana bir necha daqiqa kerakmi?
Kecha sumkamni yig'dim, shuning uchun parvoz uchun to'liq tayyorman.
U yozuvlarini ko'rib chiqdi va suhbatga to'liq tayyor his qildi.
Maydon bugungi kechki tadbir uchun to'liq tayyor.
Tayyor bo'lganingizda xabar bering, boshlaymiz.
U barcha fayllarni yuklab oldi va endi oflayn ishlashga to'liq tayyor.

words.definition: to stay awake for the entire night without sleeping
words.definitionUz: butun tun davomida uxlamay qolmoq, tun bo'yi biror narsa bilan band bo'lmoq
words.example1: He was up all night fixing the bug in the code.
words.example1Translation: U tun bo'yi koddagi xatoni tuzatdi.
words.example2: I was up all night because the baby kept crying.
words.example2Translation: Chaqaloq yig'laganidan tun bo'yi uxlay olmadim.
words.example3: She was up all night finishing her assignment before the deadline.
words.example3Translation: U muddat tugashidan oldin topshirig'ini tugatish uchun tun bo'yi uxlamadi.
extraExamples: We were up all night talking and lost track of time.
I was up all night with a terrible headache.
He was up all night before the job interview.
They were up all night watching films during the holiday.
I was up all night preparing the report for the morning meeting.
She was up all night worrying about the results.
We were up all night setting up the new server before launch.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz tun bo'yi suhbatlashib vaqtni unutib qo'ydik.
Kuchli bosh og'rig'i tufayli tun bo'yi uxlay olmadim.
U ish suhbatidan oldin tun bo'yi uxlamadi.
Ular bayram kuni tun bo'yi film ko'rib chiqdi.
Ertalabki yig'ilish uchun hisobotni tayyorlashga tun bo'yi uxlamadim.
U natijalardan tashvishlangani uchun tun bo'yi uxlay olmadi.
Biz ishga tushirishdan oldin yangi serverni sozlash uchun tun bo'yi uxlamadik.

words.definition: to treat someone very strictly or criticize them too harshly
words.definitionUz: biror kishiga juda qattiq munosabatda bo'lmoq yoki uni haddan ziyod tanqid qilmoq
words.example1: The coach is very hard on players who miss practice.
words.example1Translation: Murabbiy mashg'ulotni o'tkazib yuborgan o'yinchilarga juda qattiq munosabatda bo'ladi.
words.example2: Try not to be so hard on yourself when you make mistakes.
words.example2Translation: Xato qilganda o'zingizni haddan ziyod qiynamang.
words.example3: She felt her manager was being hard on her for no reason.
words.example3Translation: U menejeri unga sababsiz juda qattiq munosabatda bo'lyapti deb his qildi.
extraExamples: Parents sometimes are hard on their kids because they want the best for them.
I know I was hard on you earlier, and I want to apologize.
He is always hard on himself after losing a match.
The teacher was hard on students who handed in work late.
You do not have to be so hard on your team, they are trying their best.
Being too hard on yourself can affect your confidence.
She was hard on him not to punish, but to push him to improve.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar ba'zida farzandlariga qattiq munosabatda bo'lishadi, chunki ular ular uchun eng yaxshisini xohlashadi.
Bilaman, ilgari sizga qattiq gapirdim va kechirim so'ramoqchiman.
U o'yindan yutqizganidan keyin har doim o'zini qiynaydi.
O'qituvchi ishlarini kech topshirgan o'quvchilarga qattiq munosabatda bo'ldi.
Jamoangizga bunday qattiq bo'lishingiz shart emas, ular qo'llaridan kelganini qilishyapti.
O'zingizga haddan ziyod qattiq bo'lish ishonchingizga ta'sir qilishi mumkin.
U unga jazo berish uchun emas, balki yaxshilanishga undash uchun qattiq gapirdi.

words.definition: to be cancelled, or to not be happening as planned
words.definitionUz: rejalashtirilgan narsa bekor bo'lishi yoki amalga oshmasligi
words.example1: The match is off because of the heavy rain.
words.example1Translation: O'yin kuchli yomg'ir tufayli bekor qilindi.
words.example2: Our dinner plans are off since she is not feeling well.
words.example2Translation: Kechki ovqat rejalarimiz u yaxshi his qilmagani uchun bekor qilindi.
words.example3: The deal is off after they failed to agree on the price.
words.example3Translation: Narx bo'yicha kelisha olmaganlaridan keyin bitim bekor bo'ldi.
extraExamples: The school trip is off due to budget issues.
I heard the concert is off because the singer is sick.
The meeting is off, we will reschedule next week.
Their partnership is off after the disagreement last month.
The flight is off because of a technical problem with the aircraft.
I thought the project was still on, but apparently it is off.
The event is off, so you do not need to come in.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab safari byudjet muammolari sababli bekor qilindi.
Eshitdimki, kontsert qo'shiqchi kasal bo'lgani uchun bekor qilindi.
Yig'ilish bekor bo'ldi, keyingi hafta qayta belgilaymiz.
O'tgan oydagi kelishmovchilikdan keyin ularning hamkorligi bekor bo'ldi.
Parvoz samolyotdagi texnik muammo sababli bekor qilindi.
Loyiha hali davom etayotgan deb o'ylagandim, lekin ko'rinishicha bekor bo'lgan.
Tadbir bekor bo'ldi, shuning uchun kelishingiz shart emas.

words.definition: to feel annoyed or bored because something unpleasant has continued for too long
words.definitionUz: biror narsa uzoq davom etgani uchun to'yib ketmoq yoki juda bezor bo'lmoq
words.example1: I am fed up with waiting for the bus every morning.
words.example1Translation: Har kuni ertalab avtobusni kutishdan bezor bo'ldim.
words.example2: She is fed up with her coworker always being late to meetings.
words.example2Translation: U hamkasbi yig'ilishlarga doim kech kelishidan bezor bo'ldi.
words.example3: He is fed up with receiving too many unnecessary emails.
words.example3Translation: U juda ko'p keraksiz xatlar olishdan bezor bo'ldi.
extraExamples: I am fed up with this slow internet connection.
She is fed up with having the same argument over and over.
They were fed up with the lack of communication from management.
I am fed up with waking up early every weekend.
He got fed up with the noise and moved to a quieter area.
We are all fed up with the delays on this project.
I am fed up with making excuses for other people.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu sekin internet aloqasidan bezor bo'ldim.
U bir xil bahsni qayta-qayta qilishdan bezor bo'ldi.
Ular rahbariyatning aloqa qilmasligi'dan bezor bo'ldi.
Har dam olish kunida erta turishi'dan bezor bo'ldim.
U shovqindan bezor bo'lib, tinchroq joyga ko'chib o'tdi.
Biz hammamiz bu loyihadagi kechikishlardan bezor bo'ldik.
Boshqa odamlar uchun bahona topishdan bezor bo'ldim.

words.definition: to be in a more favorable situation by doing a particular thing
words.definitionUz: biror narsani qilish orqali yaxshiroq ahvolda bo'lmoq, shu yo'lni tanlash foydali ekanligi
words.example1: You are better off applying early before all the spots are filled.
words.example1Translation: Barcha joylar to'lmasidan oldin erta murojaat qilganingiz yaxshiroq.
words.example2: He is better off talking to the manager directly instead of sending emails.
words.example2Translation: U xat yuborish o'rniga menejer bilan bevosita gaplashgani yaxshiroq.
words.example3: We are better off saving money now rather than spending it all.
words.example3Translation: Hammasini sarflab yuborish o'rniga hozir pul tejaganimiz yaxshiroq.
extraExamples: You are better off sleeping early if you have a long day tomorrow.
She is better off working independently on this task.
They are better off choosing the shorter route to avoid traffic.
I am better off cooking at home than eating out every day.
He is better off accepting the offer before it expires.
You are better off asking questions now than guessing later.
We are better off finishing this today while we still have energy.
extraExampleTranslations: Ertaga uzoq kun bo'lsa, erta uxlagan yaxshiroq.
Bu vazifada u mustaqil ishlasa yaxshiroq.
Tirbandlikdan qochish uchun qisqa yo'lni tanlagan yaxshiroq.
Har kuni tashqarida ovqatlanish o'rniga uyda ovqat pishirsam yaxshiroq.
Taklif muddati o'tmasdan qabul qilsa yaxshiroq.
Keyinchalik taxmin qilgandan ko'ra hozir savol berishingiz yaxshiroq.
Hali kuchimiz borida bugun tugatganimiz yaxshiroq.

words.definition: Caring more about money and possessions than anything else
words.definitionUz: Hayotda eng muhim narsa pul va boylik deb hisoblaydigan odam haqida aytiladi
words.example1: The only problem with my friend is he is quite materialistic, but I still respect him.
words.example1Translation: Do'stimning yagona kamchiligi — u juda moddiyatchi, lekin men baribir unga hurmat qilaman.
words.example2: She grew up poor, which is probably why she became so materialistic as an adult.
words.example2Translation: U kambag'al oilada o'sdi, shuning uchun katta bo'lgach moddiyatchi bo'lib qoldi.
words.example3: His materialistic lifestyle left him feeling empty despite all his wealth.
words.example3Translation: Uning moddiyatchi hayot tarzi barcha boyligiga qaramay uni bo'sh his ettirdi.
extraExamples: She only dates men with expensive cars and big houses — she's very materialistic.
A materialistic person often measures success by what they own.
He was so materialistic that he judged people by the brands they wore.
Their children became materialistic after years of being given everything they wanted.
She realized her materialistic goals were making her unhappy.
In a materialistic society, people often forget what truly matters.
He left his materialistic lifestyle behind and moved to the countryside.
extraExampleTranslations: U faqat qimmat mashinali va katta uyli erkaklar bilan uchrashadi — u juda moddiyatchi.
Moddiyatchi odam ko'pincha muvaffaqiyatni nima egallaganiga qarab o'lchaydi.
U odamlarni kiygan brendlariga qarab baholardi — juda moddiyatchi edi.
Ularning bolalari yillar davomida hamma istaganlarini olgach moddiyatchi bo'lib qoldi.
U moddiyatchi maqsadlari uni baxtsiz qilayotganini tushundi.
Moddiyatchi jamiyatda odamlar ko'pincha haqiqatan muhim narsalarni unutadi.
U moddiyatchi hayot tarzini tark etdi va qishloqqa ko'chib ketdi.

words.definition: Too interested in other people's private lives
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarning shaxsiy ishiga aralashishni yoqtiradigan, o'ziga tegishli bo'lmagan narsalarni bilishga harakat qiladigan odam
words.example1: Don't be so nosy! It's none of your business.
words.example1Translation: Bu qadar burnini suqaverma! Bu sening ishingga tegishli emas.
words.example2: My nosy neighbor keeps asking about my salary and relationship status.
words.example2Translation: Mening qiziqqon qo'shnim doim mening maoshim va munosabatlarim haqida so'rayveradi.
words.example3: Stop being nosy and let her handle her own problems.
words.example3Translation: Burnini suqishni qo'y va unga o'z muammolarini o'zi hal qilishga qo'y.
extraExamples: She is so nosy that she reads other people's text messages.
I hate working next to him — he's incredibly nosy.
My aunt is very nosy and always asks personal questions at family dinners.
He gave his nosy coworker a fake answer just to stop the questions.
Being nosy can seriously damage your relationships with people.
She was so nosy that she listened to her roommate's phone calls.
Don't go through my things — that's just nosy.
extraExampleTranslations: U shu qadar qiziqqonki, boshqalarning xabarlarini o'qiydi.
Men unning yonida ishlashdan nafratlanaman — u haddan tashqari qiziqqon.
Mening xolam juda qiziqqon va oilaviy kechalarda doim shaxsiy savollar beradi.
U qiziqqon hamkasbiga savollarni to'xtatish uchun yolg'on javob berdi.
Qiziqqonlik odamlar bilan munosabatingizni jiddiy buzishi mumkin.
U shu qadar qiziqqon ediki, xonadon o'rtog'ining telefon suhbatlarini eshitib o'tirardi.
Mening narsalarimni titkilama — bu shunchaki qiziqqonlik.

words.definition: Saying different things to different people in order to gain advantage or avoid conflict
words.definitionUz: Yuzingizga bir xil, orqangizdan boshqa xil gapiradiganlarni tasvirlash uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: I don't trust her — I suspect she's a bit two-faced.
words.example1Translation: Men unga ishonmayman — u biroz ikkiyuzlamachi bo'lsa kerak deb o'ylayman.
words.example2: He smiled at me in the meeting but complained about my work behind my back — so two-faced.
words.example2Translation: U yig'ilishda menga jilmaydi, lekin orqamdan ishim haqida shikoyat qildi — juda ikkiyuzlamachi.
words.example3: Being two-faced might seem smart short-term, but people always find out eventually.
words.example3Translation: Ikkiyuzlamachilik qisqa muddatda aqlli ko'rinishi mumkin, lekin odamlar buni oxirida bilib qoladi.
extraExamples: She told me she loved my idea, then told the boss it was terrible.
I stopped hanging out with him after I realized how two-faced he was.
A two-faced friend is more dangerous than an open enemy.
She acts sweet to your face but talks badly about you to everyone else.
I found out he was two-faced when I heard what he said about me at the party.
Two-faced people are hard to spot until you see the pattern.
Never share secrets with someone who is known to be two-faced.
extraExampleTranslations: U menga g'oyamni yoqtiradi dedi, keyin bossg'a dahshatli deb aytdi.
Qanchalik ikkiyuzlamachi ekanini anglagach, u bilan muloqotni to'xtatdim.
Ikkiyuzlamachi do'st ochiq dushman dan ko'ra xavfliroq.
U yuzingizga shirin muomala qiladi, lekin hamma boshqalarga siz haqingizda yomon gapiradi.
U ziyofatda men haqimda nima deganini eshitganimda ikkiyuzlamachi ekanini bildim.
Ikkiyuzlamachi odamlarni ko'rish qiyin — siz naqshni ko'rguningizcha.
Ikkiyuzlamachi deb tanilgan birov bilan sir ulashmang.

words.definition: Very unfriendly and aggressive toward someone or something
words.definitionUz: Birovga nisbatan juda qo'pol, g'azabli yoki dushmanona munosabatda bo'lishni anglatadi
words.example1: He is openly hostile towards his parents.
words.example1Translation: U ota-onasiga nisbatan ochiqchasiga dushmanona munosabatda bo'ladi.
words.example2: The new employee received a hostile welcome from the existing team.
words.example2Translation: Yangi xodim mavjud jamoadan dushmanona kutib olindi.
words.example3: She became hostile when I asked her why she was late.
words.example3Translation: Men nega kechikganini so'raganimda u g'azablandi va qo'pol bo'ldi.
extraExamples: The crowd turned hostile after the referee made a bad decision.
His hostile tone made it impossible to have a calm conversation.
She gave me a hostile look when I walked into the room.
The merger created a hostile work environment for many employees.
He becomes hostile whenever someone questions his decisions.
The negotiations broke down because both sides were hostile to compromise.
Growing up in a hostile environment affected his personality deeply.
extraExampleTranslations: Hakam yomon qaror qabul qilganidan keyin olomon dushmanona tus oldi.
Uning qo'pol ohang tinch suhbat olib borishni imkonsiz qildi.
Men xonaga kirganimda u menga dushmanona nazar tashladi.
Birlashma ko'plab xodimlar uchun dushmanona ish muhitini yaratdi.
U kimdir qarorlarini so'roq qilganda dushmanona bo'lib qoladi.
Muzokaralar ikki tomon ham murosaga dushman bo'lganligi sababli barbod bo'ldi.
Dushmanona muhitda o'sish uning shaxsiyatiga chuqur ta'sir qildi.

words.definition: Controlling or influencing others in a clever and unfair way for your own benefit
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarni o'z foydasi uchun yashirin yoki hiyla-nayrang yo'li bilan boshqaradigan odamni tavsiflaydi
words.example1: Don't trust your girlfriend! She seems to be very manipulative.
words.example1Translation: Qiz do'stingga ishonma! U juda manipulyator bo'lsa kerak.
words.example2: He used manipulative tactics to convince his team to work overtime without extra pay.
words.example2Translation: U jamoasini qo'shimcha haq to'lamasdan ishlab qolishga ko'ndirish uchun manipulyativ usullardan foydalandi.
words.example3: Manipulative people often make you feel guilty for things that are not your fault.
words.example3Translation: Manipulyator odamlar ko'pincha sening aybingda bo'lmagan narsa uchun o'zingni aybdor his ettirishadi.
extraExamples: She used tears as a manipulative tool to get what she wanted.
A manipulative boss creates a toxic and stressful work environment.
He was so manipulative that nobody realized he was doing it.
Manipulative behavior in relationships often leads to emotional damage.
She learned to recognize manipulative people after a bad experience.
He twisted the facts in a very manipulative way during the argument.
Leaving a manipulative relationship is hard but necessary.
extraExampleTranslations: U xohlagan narsasini olish uchun ko'z yoshlarini manipulyativ vosita sifatida ishlatdi.
Manipulyator xo'jayin zaharli va stressli ish muhitini yaratadi.
U shu qadar manipulyator ediki, hech kim buni sezmadi.
Munosabatlardagi manipulyativ xulq-atvor ko'pincha hissiy zarar keltiradi.
U yomon tajribadan keyin manipulyator odamlarni tanishni o'rgandi.
U bahsda faktlarni juda manipulyativ tarzda burib tashladi.
Manipulyativ munosabatni tark etish qiyin, lekin zarur.

words.definition: Believing you are better or more important than other people
words.definitionUz: O'zini boshqalardan yuqori qo'yadigan va buni ko'z-ko'z qiladigan odamni tasvirlaydi
words.example1: His arrogant attitude makes him very difficult to work with.
words.example1Translation: Uning takabbur munosabati u bilan ishlashni juda qiyinlashtiradi.
words.example2: She walked into the room with an arrogant look, like she owned the place.
words.example2Translation: U xonaga bu joy uniki kabi takabbur ko'rinish bilan kirdi.
words.example3: The arrogant manager never listened to suggestions from his team.
words.example3Translation: Takabbur menejer hech qachon jamoasining takliflarini tinglamas edi.
extraExamples: He was so arrogant that he never apologized, even when he was wrong.
Her arrogant comments made everyone at the table feel uncomfortable.
Arrogant people often struggle to build genuine friendships.
He became arrogant after receiving a big promotion.
Nobody likes working with arrogant people who take all the credit.
Despite being talented, his arrogant behavior cost him many opportunities.
She used to be arrogant, but a few failures taught her humility.
extraExampleTranslations: U shu qadar takabbur ediki, hatto xato qilganda ham uzr so'ramasdi.
Uning takabbur izohlari stol atrofidagi hamma kishini noqulay his ettirdi.
Takabbur odamlar ko'pincha chin do'stlik o'rnatishda qiynaladi.
U katta lavozimga ko'tarilgandan keyin takabbur bo'lib qoldi.
Hech kim butun sharafni o'ziga oladigan takabbur odamlar bilan ishlashni yoqtirmaydi.
Iste'dodli bo'lishiga qaramay, takabbur xulqi ko'p imkoniyatlarini olib ketdi.
U ilgari takabbur edi, lekin bir nechta muvaffaqiyatsizlik uni kamtarlik o'rgatdi.

words.definition: Unwilling to consider new ideas or different opinions
words.definitionUz: Yangi fikrlarni yoki boshqacha qarashlarni qabul qilishdan bosh tortadigan odamni tasvirlaydi
words.example1: Some people are so narrow-minded they refuse to accept new ideas.
words.example1Translation: Ba'zi odamlar shu qadar tor fikrliki, yangi g'oyalarni qabul qilishdan bosh tortishadi.
words.example2: His narrow-minded views on culture made him unpopular at the international conference.
words.example2Translation: Uning madaniyat bo'yicha tor fikrli qarashlari uni xalqaro anjumanda mashhur bo'lmasligiga olib keldi.
words.example3: Growing up in a narrow-minded environment can limit a person's potential.
words.example3Translation: Tor fikrli muhitda o'sish odamning imkoniyatlarini cheklashi mumkin.
extraExamples: She is too narrow-minded to understand why other cultures do things differently.
Narrow-minded people often fear change more than anything else.
His narrow-minded attitude stopped him from exploring new career paths.
Traveling broadens the mind of even the most narrow-minded person.
It's frustrating to debate with someone who is narrow-minded.
A narrow-minded manager can destroy the creativity of an entire team.
He used to be narrow-minded, but years of reading changed him.
extraExampleTranslations: U boshqa madaniyatlar nima uchun turlicha ish qilishini tushunish uchun juda tor fikrli.
Tor fikrli odamlar ko'pincha hamma narsadan ko'ra o'zgarishdan ko'proq qo'rqishadi.
Uning tor fikrli munosabati yangi martaba yo'llarini o'rganishiga to'sqinlik qildi.
Sayohat hatto eng tor fikrli odamning ham ongini kengaytiradi.
Tor fikrli odam bilan bahslashish asabiylashtiradi.
Tor fikrli menejer butun jamoaning ijodiyotini yo'q qilishi mumkin.
U ilgari tor fikrli edi, lekin yillar davomida o'qish uni o'zgartirdi.

words.definition: Acting suddenly without thinking about the consequences
words.definitionUz: Oqibatlarini o'ylamasdan birinchi fikri bilan harakat qiladigan odamni tasvirlaydi
words.example1: She's very impulsive and often regrets her decisions later.
words.example1Translation: U juda impulsiv va ko'pincha keyinchalik qarorlaridan afsuslanadi.
words.example2: He made an impulsive decision to quit his job without having another one lined up.
words.example2Translation: U boshqa ish topa olmay turib, ishidan chiqib ketish haqida impulsiv qaror qabul qildi.
words.example3: Being impulsive with money can lead to serious financial problems.
words.example3Translation: Pulga nisbatan impulsiv bo'lish jiddiy moliyaviy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She impulsively bought a plane ticket to Paris without telling anyone.
His impulsive nature gets him into trouble more often than he'd like.
Try not to be impulsive when you're angry — wait before you respond.
An impulsive purchase left her with no money for the rest of the month.
Impulsive people often make great decisions under pressure but poor ones at home.
He sent an impulsive angry message and regretted it immediately.
Learning to pause before acting helped her control her impulsive behavior.
extraExampleTranslations: U hech kimga aytmasdan impulsiv ravishda Parijga chipta sotib oldi.
Uning impulsiv tabiati uni xohlaganidan ko'proq muammoga solib qo'yadi.
G'azablanganda impulsiv bo'lmaslikka harakat qiling — javob berish oldidan kuting.
Impulsiv xarid uni oy qolganida pulsiz qoldirdi.
Impulsiv odamlar bosim ostida ajoyib qarorlar qabul qilishadi, lekin uyda yomonroq.
U g'azablangan xabar yubordi va darhol afsuslanadi.
Harakat qilishdan oldin to'xtoash odati uning impulsiv xulqini nazorat qilishga yordam berdi.

words.translation: kinik, hamma narsaga shubha bilan qaraydigan
words.definition: Believing that people only act out of selfish motives and that nothing is genuinely good
words.definitionUz: Odamlarning yaxshi niyatlariga ishonmaydigan va hamma narsani shubha bilan ko'radigan odamni tasvirlaydi
words.example1: He has a very cynical view of politics and politicians.
words.example1Translation: Uning siyosat va siyosatchilarga nisbatan juda kinik qarashi bor.
words.example2: She became cynical after years of broken promises from her employer.
words.example2Translation: U ish beruvchisining yillar davomida bajarilmagan va'dalaridan keyin kinik bo'lib qoldi.
words.example3: His cynical comments ruined the positive mood of the entire team meeting.
words.example3Translation: Uning kinik izohlari butun jamoa yig'ilishining ijobiy kayfiyatini buzdi.
extraExamples: Don't be so cynical — some people genuinely want to help others.
A cynical attitude can stop you from trusting people who actually deserve it.
He grew cynical after watching the same politicians make the same empty promises.
She's not negative — she's just cynical about marketing claims.
Being cynical sometimes protects you, but it can also isolate you.
His cynical outlook on relationships made it hard for him to fall in love.
Even the most cynical people can be surprised by genuine kindness.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu qadar kinik bo'lmang — ba'zi odamlar chindan ham boshqalarga yordam bermoqchi bo'ladi.
Kinik munosabat chindan ham ishonchga loyiq odamlarga ishonishingizni to'xtatishi mumkin.
U bir xil siyosatchilar bir xil bo'sh va'dalar berishini ko'rgandan keyin kinik bo'ldi.
U salbiy emas — u shunchaki marketing da'volariga kinik.
Kinik bo'lish ba'zan sizni himoya qiladi, lekin shuningdek sizni yolg'iz qoldirishi mumkin.
Munosabatlarga nisbatan kinik qarashi uning sevishini qiyinlashtirdi.
Hatto eng kinik odamlar ham chinakam mehribonlikdan hayratda qolishi mumkin.

words.definition: Only thinking about yourself and your own needs, without caring about others
words.definitionUz: Faqat o'zini va o'z ehtiyojlarini o'ylaydigan, boshqalarning his-tuyg'ularini hisobga olmaydigan odamni tasvirlaydi
words.example1: She is quite self-centered and rarely thinks about others' feelings.
words.example1Translation: U juda o'zini o'ylaydi va kamdan-kam boshqalarning his-tuyg'ulari haqida o'ylaydi.
words.example2: His self-centered behavior caused constant arguments in the relationship.
words.example2Translation: Uning o'zini o'ylaydigan xulqi munosabatda doimiy janjallarni keltirib chiqardi.
words.example3: A self-centered leader makes decisions that benefit only themselves.
words.example3Translation: O'zini o'ylaydigan rahbar faqat o'ziga foyda keltiradigan qarorlar qabul qiladi.
extraExamples: He always steers the conversation back to himself — so self-centered.
Self-centered people struggle to maintain long-term friendships.
She didn't even ask how I was feeling — she's incredibly self-centered.
Children can be self-centered naturally, but adults should learn empathy.
His self-centered attitude at work made him deeply unpopular with colleagues.
She realized she had been self-centered and made an effort to change.
Being self-centered is different from having healthy self-confidence.
extraExampleTranslations: U har doim suhbatni o'ziga qaytaradi — shu qadar o'zini o'ylaydi.
O'zini o'ylaydigan odamlar uzoq muddatli do'stlik saqlab qolishda qiynalishadi.
U mening qanday his qilayotganimni so'ramasdi ham — u haddan tashqari o'zini o'ylaydi.
Bolalar tabiiy ravishda o'zini o'ylashi mumkin, lekin kattalar empatiyani o'rganishlari kerak.
Ishda o'zini o'ylaydigan munosabati uni hamkasblar orasida juda mashhur bo'lmasligiga olib keldi.
U o'zini o'ylab kelganini angladi va o'zgarishga harakat qildi.
O'zini o'ylash sog'lom o'ziga ishonchdan farqli narsa.

words.definition: Safe or suitable to be eaten
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa inson tomonidan xavfsiz tarzda eyish mumkin degani
words.example1: Not all wild mushrooms are edible — some are poisonous.
words.example1Translation: Barcha yovvoyi qo'ziqorinlar yesa bo'lavermaydi — ba'zilari zaharli.
words.example2: The flowers on this cake are edible.
words.example2Translation: Bu tortdagi gullar yesa bo'ladi.
words.example3: Always check if a plant is edible before tasting it.
words.example3Translation: O'simlikni tatib ko'rishdan oldin uni yesa bo'lishini tekshiring.
extraExamples: The restaurant uses only edible decorations on their dishes.
Is this fruit edible if it's not fully ripe?
They survived in the forest by finding edible plants.
The packaging is made from edible materials.
Some insects are edible and are eaten in many cultures.
He wasn't sure the leftovers were still edible after three days.
The guide taught them which berries were edible and which were not.
extraExampleTranslations: Restoran taomlarida faqat yesa bo'ladigan bezaklardan foydalanadi.
Bu meva to'liq pishmaganda ham yesa bo'ladimi?
Ular o'rmonda yesa bo'ladigan o'simliklarni topib omon qolishdi.
Qadoqlash yesa bo'ladigan materiallardan tayyorlangan.
Ba'zi hasharotlar yesa bo'ladi va ko'p madaniyatlarda iste'mol qilinadi.
U uch kundan keyin qolgan ovqat hali ham yesa bo'lishiga ishonmadi.
Yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatuvchi qaysi rezavorlar yesa bo'lishini va qaysilari yesa bo'lmasligini o'rgatti.

words.definition: Loud or clear enough to be heard
words.definitionUz: Biror tovush yoki ovoz quloq bilan aniq eshitish uchun yetarli darajada baland yoki ravshan bo'lishi
words.example1: His voice was barely audible over the noise.
words.example1Translation: Uning ovozi shovqin ichida zo'rg'a eshitildi.
words.example2: The announcement was not audible at the back of the room.
words.example2Translation: E'lon xonaning orqa qismida eshitilmadi.
words.example3: She let out an audible sigh of relief.
words.example3Translation: U yengillik bilan eshitilarli darajada xo'rsinib yubordi.
extraExamples: The music was barely audible through the thick walls.
Make sure your microphone is working and your voice is audible.
There was an audible gasp from the audience.
The alarm was audible from three floors away.
He spoke in a low but audible tone.
The click of the door closing was audible in the silent room.
Her laughter was clearly audible from the next room.
extraExampleTranslations: Musiqa qalin devorlar orqali zo'rg'a eshitildi.
Mikrofoningiz ishlayotganini va ovozingiz eshitilishini tekshiring.
Tomoshabinlar orasidan eshitilarli hayrat tovushi keldi.
Signal uch qavatdan narida eshitildi.
U past lekin eshitilarli ohangda gapirdi.
Eshikning yopilishi jim xonada eshitilib ketdi.
Uning kulgisi yongi xonadan aniq eshitildi.

words.definition: Able to be seen or noticed
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa ko'z bilan ko'rish yoki payqash mumkin bo'lgan holda mavjud bo'lishi
words.example1: The damage to the car was clearly visible.
words.example1Translation: Mashinadagi zarar aniq ko'rinib turardi.
words.example2: Stars are only visible at night in clear weather.
words.example2Translation: Yulduzlar faqat tiniq havoda kechasi ko'rinadi.
words.example3: Make sure the exit signs are visible from every corner.
words.example3Translation: Chiqish belgilarining har burchakdan ko'rinishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
extraExamples: The scar on his hand was still visible after years.
The mountain was visible from 50 kilometers away.
There was no visible reason for the delay.
Her frustration was visible on her face.
The text should be visible even on small screens.
Wear bright colors to stay visible in traffic.
The crack in the wall became visible after the rain.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo'lidagi chandiq yillar o'tsa ham ko'rinib turardi.
Tog' 50 kilometr masofadan ko'rinib turardi.
Kechikish uchun ko'rinadigan sabab yo'q edi.
Uning ranjiganligini yuzidan ko'rish mumkin edi.
Matn kichik ekranlarda ham ko'rinib turishi kerak.
Tirbandlikda ko'zga ko'rinib turish uchun yorqin ranglar kiying.
