Devordagi yoriq yomg'irdan keyin ko'rina boshladi.

words.definition: Clear enough to be read easily
words.definitionUz: Yozuv yoki matn oson o'qish uchun yetarlicha ravshan va aniq bo'lishi
words.example1: Please write your name in legible handwriting.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, ismingizni o'qisa bo'ladigan qo'l yozuvi bilan yozing.
words.example2: The old letter was faded and barely legible.
words.example2Translation: Eski maktub so'ngan va zo'rg'a o'qisa bo'lardi.
words.example3: Your signature needs to be legible on official documents.
words.example3Translation: Rasmiy hujjatlardagi imzoyingiz o'qisa bo'ladigan bo'lishi kerak.
extraExamples: The font size was too small to be legible on mobile.
Make sure your notes are legible before the exam.
The prescription was not legible, so the pharmacist asked for clarification.
His handwriting became less legible when he wrote quickly.
The label must be legible under all lighting conditions.
She printed the address clearly to make it legible.
The engraving on the ring was still legible after decades.
extraExampleTranslations: Shrift o'lchami mobil qurilmada o'qish uchun juda kichik edi.
Imtihondan oldin yozuvlaringiz o'qisa bo'lishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
Retsept o'qib bo'lmas edi, shuning uchun dorixona xodimi aniqlik so'radi.
Tez yozganda uning xati kamroq o'qisa bo'ladigan bo'lib qoldi.
Yorliq barcha yoritish sharoitida o'qisa bo'ladigan bo'lishi kerak.
U manzilni aniq o'qisa bo'lishi uchun bosilib yozdi.
Uzukdagi o'yma o'n yillar o'tsa ham o'qisa bo'lardi.

words.definition: Able to be reached, entered, or used easily
words.definitionUz: Biror joyga kirish, uni topish yoki undan foydalanish oson bo'lishi
words.example1: The building is accessible to wheelchair users.
words.example1Translation: Bino nogironlar aravachasidagi foydalanuvchilar uchun kirsa bo'ladigan.
words.example2: The files are accessible to all team members.
words.example2Translation: Fayllar barcha jamoa a'zolari uchun ochiq.
words.example3: The beach is not accessible during high tide.
words.example3Translation: Plyaj suv ko'tarilishi paytida kirsa bo'lmaydi.
extraExamples: The app is designed to be accessible for all age groups.
Public transport should be accessible to everyone.
The information is freely accessible on their website.
The mountain trail is only accessible in summer.
They redesigned the menu to make it more accessible.
The building's upper floors are not accessible without a key card.
Online courses make education accessible to anyone with internet.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilova barcha yosh guruhlari uchun qulay bo'lishi uchun ishlab chiqilgan.
Jamoat transporti hamma uchun qulay bo'lishi kerak.
Ma'lumot ularning veb-saytida erkin foydalanish uchun ochiq.
Tog' yo'li faqat yoz oylarida o'tsa bo'ladi.
Ular menyuni foydalanishrroq qilish uchun qayta ishlab chiqdilar.
Binoning yuqori qavatlariga kalit kartasiz kirsa bo'lmaydi.
Onlayn kurslar ta'limni internet bor har kim uchun ochiq qiladi.

words.definition: Able to be repaired or corrected
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki muammoni tuzatish yoki to'g'rilash mumkin bo'lishi
words.example1: The bug in the code is fixable — it won't take long.
words.example1Translation: Koddagi xato tuzatsa bo'ladi — ko'p vaqt ketmaydi.
words.example2: Luckily, the damage to the roof was fixable.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshiyamki, tomga yetgan zarar tuzatsa bo'lardi.
words.example3: Most relationship problems are fixable with honest communication.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pchilik munosabat muammolari ochiq muloqot orqali tuzatsa bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The error in the report is fixable before the deadline.
Don't panic — this situation is fixable.
The crack in the screen is fixable at a repair shop.
He asked if the engine problem was fixable.
Not every mistake is fixable, so think before you act.
The design flaw was fixable with a small update.
They confirmed the issue was fixable within two days.
extraExampleTranslations: Hisobotdagi xatoni muddat tugashidan oldin tuzatsa bo'ladi.
Vahimaga tushmang — bu vaziyatni tuzatsa bo'ladi.
Ekrandagi yoriqni ta'mirlash do'konida tuzatsa bo'ladi.
U dvigatel muammosini tuzatsa bo'lishini so'radi.
Har bir xatoni tuzatib bo'lavermaydi, shuning uchun ish tutishdan avval o'ylab ko'ring.
Dizayndagi nuqsonni kichik yangilanish bilan tuzatsa bo'lardi.
Ular muammoni ikki kun ichida tuzatsa bo'lishini tasdiqlashdi.

words.definition: Able to be substituted with something or someone else
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki kishini boshqa narsa yoki kishi bilan almashtirish mumkin bo'lishi
words.example1: The battery in this phone is replaceable.
words.example1Translation: Bu telefonning batareyasini almashtirsa bo'ladi.
words.example2: No employee is truly irreplaceable — everyone is replaceable.
words.example2Translation: Hech bir xodim haqiqatda o'rnini to'ldirib bo'lmaydigan emas — hamma almashtirsa bo'ladi.
words.example3: The broken part is replaceable and costs very little.
words.example3Translation: Singan qism almashtirsa bo'ladi va narxi juda arzon.
extraExamples: Cheap furniture is easily replaceable.
In this job market, many roles are becoming replaceable by automation.
The filter is replaceable every three months.
She worried that her skills were replaceable.
The screen is replaceable without changing the whole device.
Old tools are replaceable, but experience is not.
Make sure the parts you order are replaceable in case of damage.
extraExampleTranslations: Arzon mebellarni osongina almashtirsa bo'ladi.
Bu ish bozorida ko'plab lavozimlar avtomatlashtirish bilan almashtirilmoqda.
Filtr har uch oyda bir marta almashtiriladi.
U o'z ko'nikmalarini almashtirsa bo'lishidan xavotir oldi.
Ekranni butun qurilmani almashtirmasdan o'zgartirsa bo'ladi.
Eski asboblarni almashtirsa bo'ladi, lekin tajribani emas.
Zarar yetganda buyurtma qilingan qismlarni almashtirsa bo'lishiga ishonch hosil qiling.

words.definition: Behaving or happening in a way that is expected and can be foreseen
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki kishi kutilganidek harakat qilishi yoki sodir bo'lishi — oldindan bilsa bo'lishi
words.example1: The ending of the movie was too predictable.
words.example1Translation: Filmning oxiri juda taxmin qilsa bo'ladigan edi.
words.example2: His reactions are very predictable — he always gets angry when criticized.
words.example2Translation: Uning reaktsiyalari juda kutilgan — tanqid qilinsa har doim g'azablanadi.
words.example3: The weather in this region is predictable during summer.
words.example3Translation: Bu hududda yozda ob-havo oldindan bilsa bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The plot was so predictable that I guessed the ending early on.
His schedule is predictable — he's at the gym every morning at 7.
A predictable routine helps children feel secure.
The market's behavior is not always predictable.
Her answer was predictable — she always says yes to extra work.
The machine's output is consistent and predictable.
Avoid being too predictable in negotiations.
extraExampleTranslations: Syujet shunchalik taxmin qilsa bo'ladigankiki, oxirini erta topdim.
Uning jadvali oldindan bilinadi — har kuni ertalab soat 7 da sport zalida bo'ladi.
Oldindan biladigan tartib bolalarga xavfsizlik hissini beradi.
Bozorning harakati har doim ham taxmin qilib bo'lavermaydi.
Uning javobi kutilgan edi — qo'shimcha ishga har doim rozi bo'ladi.
Mashinaning chiqishi izchil va taxmin qilsa bo'ladigan.
Muzokaralarda juda taxmin qilinsa bo'ladigan bo'lib qolmang.

words.definition: Able to be changed or moved to fit different conditions or needs
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa turli sharoit yoki ehtiyojlarga moslash uchun o'zgartirish yoki sozlash mumkin bo'lishi
words.example1: The chair has an adjustable height for comfort.
words.example1Translation: Stulning balandligini qulaylik uchun moslashtirsa bo'ladi.
words.example2: The strap is adjustable to fit any size.
words.example2Translation: Tasma har qanday o'lchamga moslashtirsa bo'ladigan.
words.example3: We need an adjustable budget to handle unexpected costs.
words.example3Translation: Kutilmagan xarajatlarni qoplash uchun moslashuvchan byudjet kerak.
extraExamples: The screen brightness is fully adjustable.
This helmet comes with an adjustable chin strap.
The work schedule is adjustable based on your needs.
The shelves in the cabinet are adjustable.
An adjustable loan rate can be both a benefit and a risk.
The thermostat is adjustable between 16 and 30 degrees.
The plan is adjustable if circumstances change.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekran yorqinligini to'liq moslashtirsa bo'ladi.
Bu dubulg'ada moslashtirsa bo'ladigan iyak qayishi mavjud.
Ish jadvali ehtiyojlaringizga qarab moslashtirsa bo'ladi.
Shkaf ichidagi javonlarni moslashtirsa bo'ladi.
Moslashuvchan kredit stavkasi ham foyda, ham xavf bo'lishi mumkin.
Termostat 16 dan 30 darajagacha moslashtirsa bo'ladi.
Reja sharoit o'zgarganda moslashtirsa bo'ladi.

words.definition: Able to be changed back to a previous state or condition
words.definitionUz: Biror o'zgartirish yoki jarayon bekor qilinib, avvalgi holat qayta tiklanishi mumkin bo'lishi
words.example1: Fortunately, the damage caused by the software update is reversible.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshiyamki, dasturiy yangilanish sabab bo'lgan zarar tiklanadigan.
words.example2: Not all medical conditions are reversible.
words.example2Translation: Barcha tibbiy holatlar ham qayta tiklanadigan emas.
words.example3: This decision is reversible — we can change it if needed.
words.example3Translation: Bu qaror o'zgartirsa bo'ladigan — kerak bo'lsa o'zgartirishimiz mumkin.
extraExamples: Climate change effects may not all be reversible.
The chemical reaction in this experiment is reversible.
Hair dye damage is often reversible over time.
Make sure the changes you make to the file are reversible.
Some lifestyle diseases are reversible with proper diet and exercise.
The court ruling was reversible on appeal.
Fortunately, the data loss was reversible with a backup.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o'zgarishi oqibatlarining hammasi ham tiklanadigan bo'lmasligi mumkin.
Bu tajribadagi kimyoviy reaksiya tiklanadigan.
Soch bo'yog'idan kelib chiqadigan zarar ko'pincha vaqt o'tishi bilan tiklanadi.
Faylga kiritgan o'zgartirishlaringizni bekor qilsa bo'lishiga ishonch hosil qiling.
Ba'zi turmush tarzi bilan bog'liq kasalliklar to'g'ri ovqatlanish va jismoniy mashqlar bilan tiklanishi mumkin.
Sud qarori apellyatsiya orqali bekor qilinishi mumkin edi.
Yaxshiyamki, ma'lumot yo'qolishi zaxira nusxa yordamida tiklanishi mumkin edi.

words.definition: used to say that a rule or situation applies to everyone or everything, with nothing left out
words.definitionUz: Biror qoida yoki holat hamma yoki hamma narsaga taalluqli ekanligini bildiradi — hech kim yoki hech narsa bundan chetda emas
words.example1: Education in all schools is terrible — universities are no exception.
words.example1Translation: Barcha maktablardagi ta'lim darajasi yaxshi emas — universitetlar ham bundan mustasno emas.
words.example2: Everyone must follow the safety rules — managers are no exception.
words.example2Translation: Hamma xavfsizlik qoidalariga rioya qilishi kerak — menejerlar ham bundan mustasno emas.
words.example3: Most cities in the country face traffic problems, and the capital is no exception.
words.example3Translation: Mamlakatdagi ko'plab shaharlar tiqilinch muammolariga duch keladi va poytaxt ham bundan mustasno emas.
extraExamples: All employees must attend the training session — senior staff are no exception.
Every smartphone has some design flaws, and this model is no exception.
Most teenagers struggle with self-confidence, and gifted students are no exception.
All countries were affected by the economic crisis — wealthy nations were no exception.
Every profession requires ongoing learning, and teaching is no exception.
Most businesses faced challenges during the pandemic, and large corporations were no exception.
All athletes need rest to perform well — top professionals are no exception.
extraExampleTranslations: Barcha xodimlar o'quv mashg'ulotiga qatnashishi kerak — yuqori lavozimli xodimlar ham bundan mustasno emas.
Har bir smartfon ba'zi dizayn kamchiliklariga ega va bu model ham bundan mustasno emas.
Ko'plab o'smirlar o'ziga ishonch muammolari bilan kurashadi va iqtidorli o'quvchilar ham bundan mustasno emas.
Barcha mamlakatlar iqtisodiy inqirozdan ta'sirlandi — boy davlatlar ham bundan mustasno emas.
Har bir kasb doimiy o'rganishni talab qiladi va o'qitish ham bundan mustasno emas.
Ko'plab korxonalar pandemic davrida qiyinchiliklarga duch keldi va yirik korporatsiyalar ham bundan mustasno emas.
Barcha sportchilar yaxshi ishlash uchun dam olish kerak — top mutaxassislar ham bundan mustasno emas.

words.definition: the right or ability to make your own decisions without being forced or restricted
words.definitionUz: Majburlanmasdan yoki cheklanmasdan o'z qarorlarini o'zi qabul qilish huquqi yoki imkoniyati
words.example1: Wearing uniforms at university is not a must. All students are given freedom of choice.
words.example1Translation: Universitetda forma kiyish shart emas. Barcha talabalarga tanlash imkoniyati berilgan.
words.example2: Consumers today enjoy greater freedom of choice than ever before thanks to online shopping.
words.example2Translation: Bugungi iste'molchilar onlayn xaridlar tufayli avvalgidan ko'ra ko'proq tanlash imkoniyatiga ega.
words.example3: Freedom of choice in education allows students to study subjects they are passionate about.
words.example3Translation: Ta'limdagi tanlash imkoniyati o'quvchilarga qiziqadigan fanlarini o'rganishga imkon beradi.
extraExamples: Freedom of choice is considered a fundamental right in democratic societies.
Parents sometimes limit their children's freedom of choice for safety reasons.
Having too many options can actually make freedom of choice feel overwhelming.
Freedom of choice in the workplace motivates employees to perform better.
Some argue that social media limits freedom of choice by pushing certain content.
Freedom of choice in healthcare means patients can decide their own treatment path.
Respecting freedom of choice is essential when working with diverse groups of people.
extraExampleTranslations: Tanlash imkoniyati demokratik jamiyatlarda asosiy haq hisoblanadi.
Ota-onalar ba'zan xavfsizlik sabablari uchun farzandlarining tanlash imkoniyatini cheklaydi.
Juda ko'p variantga ega bo'lish aslida tanlash imkoniyatini haddan tashqari og'ir his ettirishi mumkin.
Ish joyidagi tanlash imkoniyati xodimlarni yaxshiroq ishlashga undaydi.
Ba'zilar ijtimoiy media muayyan kontentni surib, tanlash imkoniyatini cheklaydi deb ta'kidlaydi.
Sog'liqni saqlashdagi tanlash imkoniyati bemorlar o'z davolash yo'lini belgilashi mumkin degani.
Tanlash imkoniyatini hurmat qilish turli xil guruhlar bilan ishlashda juda muhim.

words.definition: so extreme, great, or unusual that it is impossible to fully picture or understand
words.definitionUz: Shunchalik g'ayrioddiy yoki ulkan bo'lgan narsa — uni to'liq tasavvur qilish yoki tushunish mumkin emas
words.example1: Flying cars are still beyond imagination, but I believe we will have them in the future.
words.example1Translation: Uchuvchi mashinalar hali ham tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada, lekin men kelajakda ularni ko'p bo'lishiga ishonaman.
words.example2: The scale of destruction caused by the earthquake was beyond imagination.
words.example2Translation: Zilzila keltirib chiqargan vayronagarchilik ko'lami tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada edi.
words.example3: The speed at which technology has advanced over the past 30 years is truly beyond imagination.
words.example3Translation: So'nggi 30 yil ichida texnologiya rivojlangan tezlik chinakam tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada.
extraExamples: The amount of data generated by the internet every second is beyond imagination.
For people living a century ago, today's smartphones would be beyond imagination.
The suffering caused by the war was beyond imagination for those who had not seen it.
The wealth of some tech billionaires has grown to levels beyond imagination.
Space travel once seemed beyond imagination, but it is now a growing industry.
The complexity of the human brain is still beyond imagination for scientists.
The size of the universe is so vast it remains beyond imagination for most people.
extraExampleTranslations: Internet har soniyada yaratadigan ma'lumotlar hajmi tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada.
Bir asr avval yashaganlar uchun bugungi smartfonlar tasavvur qilib bo'lmas narsa bo'lar edi.
Urush keltirib chiqargan azob-uqubatlar uni ko'rmaganlar uchun tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada edi.
Ba'zi texnologiya milliarderlari boyligi tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajalarga o'sdi.
Kosmik sayohat bir vaqtlar tasavvur qilib bo'lmas narsa bo'lib tuyular edi, lekin hozir u o'sib borayotgan sanoat.
Inson miyasining murakkabligi olimlar uchun hali ham tasavvur qilib bo'lmas darajada.
Koinotning kattaligi shunchalik ulkanki, u ko'pchilik uchun tasavvur qilib bo'lmas bo'lib qolmoqda.

words.definition: the ability to use something permanently, for as long as you want, without an expiry date
words.definitionUz: Biror narsadan muddatsiz, xohlaganingizcha, bekor qilinish sanasisiz foydalanish imkoniyati
words.example1: In my speaking course, none of the lessons will be deleted. All students will have lifetime access.
words.example1Translation: Mening so'zlashuv kursimda hech qanday dars o'chirilmaydi. Barcha talabalar umrbod foydalanish imkoniyatiga ega bo'ladi.
words.example2: When you buy this software, you get lifetime access with all future updates included.
words.example2Translation: Ushbu dasturni sotib olganingizda, barcha kelajakdagi yangilanishlar bilan birga umrbod foydalanish imkoniyatiga ega bo'lasiz.
words.example3: The premium membership gives you lifetime access to the entire library of courses.
words.example3Translation: Premium a'zolik sizga barcha kurslar kutubxonasidan umrbod foydalanish imkoniyatini beradi.
extraExamples: Many online platforms are moving away from lifetime access toward monthly subscriptions.
The Kickstarter backers were rewarded with lifetime access to the app.
Lifetime access to quality education resources can change a person's career.
Some users prefer lifetime access deals because they cost less in the long run.
The platform offers lifetime access as a one-time payment option.
With lifetime access, students can revisit the material as many times as they need.
Paying for lifetime access upfront is a smart investment if you plan to use the tool regularly.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab onlayn platformalar umrbod foydalanish imkoniyatidan oylik obunalarga o'tmoqda.
Kickstarter homiylariga ilova uchun umrbod foydalanish imkoniyati bilan mukofotlandi.
Sifatli ta'lim resurslariga umrbod foydalanish imkoniyati odamning karerasini o'zgartirishi mumkin.
Ba'zi foydalanuvchilar umrbod foydalanish takliflarini afzal ko'radi, chunki ular uzoq muddatda kamroq xarajat qiladi.
Platforma bir martalik to'lov varianti sifatida umrbod foydalanish imkoniyatini taklif qiladi.
Umrbod foydalanish imkoniyati bilan talabalar materialga kerak bo'lganda qayta-qayta murojaat qilishlari mumkin.
Agar vositadan muntazam foydalanishni rejalashtirsa, umrbod foydalanish imkoniyati uchun oldindan to'lash aqlli investitsiyadir.

words.definition: completely clear and easy to understand, with no confusion or doubt at all
words.definitionUz: Mutlaqo aniq va tushunishga oson — hech qanday chalkashlik yoki shubha yo'q
words.example1: Mr Khusan, your explanation is crystal clear.
words.example1Translation: Xusan aka, sizning tushuntirish aniq-tiniq.
words.example2: The instructions in the manual were crystal clear, so setting up the device took only five minutes.
words.example2Translation: Qo'llanmadagi ko'rsatmalar aniq-tiniq edi, shuning uchun qurilmani sozlash atigi besh daqiqa vaqt oldi.
words.example3: Let me make it crystal clear — late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.
words.example3Translation: Aniq aytib qo'yay — hech qanday holatda kechiktirilgan topshiriqlar qabul qilinmaydi.
extraExamples: His reasons for leaving the company were crystal clear to everyone on the team.
The teacher made the grammar rule crystal clear with three simple examples.
It is crystal clear that more investment is needed in public transport.
After the meeting, the project goals became crystal clear to all departments.
The contract terms were crystal clear, leaving no room for misunderstanding.
Her feedback was crystal clear, which helped the designer fix the problems quickly.
The video tutorial made the coding process crystal clear for complete beginners.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning kompaniyani tark etish sabablari jamoaning hamma uchun aniq-tiniq edi.
O'qituvchi uchta oddiy misol bilan grammatika qoidasini aniq-tiniq qilib tushuntirdi.
Jamoat transportiga ko'proq investitsiya zarurligini aniq-tiniq ko'rinib turibdi.
Yig'ilishdan keyin loyiha maqsadlari barcha bo'limlar uchun aniq-tiniq bo'lib qoldi.
Shartnoma shartlari aniq-tiniq edi va noto'g'ri tushunish uchun joy qoldirmadi.
Uning fikri aniq-tiniq edi, bu dizaynerni muammolarni tezda hal qilishga yordam berdi.
Video qo'llanma kodlash jarayonini yangi boshlovchilar uchun aniq-tiniq qilib tushuntirdi.

words.definition: used to emphasize that something is completely certain or true
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa mutlaqo aniq yoki haqiqat ekanligini ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: Without a doubt, technology has changed the way we live.
words.example1Translation: Shubhasiz, texnologiya bizning yashash tarzimizni o'zgartirdi.
words.example2: She is without a doubt the most talented player on the team.
words.example2Translation: U shubhasiz jamoaning eng iqtidorli o'yinchisi.
words.example3: Without a doubt, this has been the most challenging year for the company.
words.example3Translation: Shubhasiz, bu kompaniya uchun eng qiyin yil bo'ldi.
extraExamples: Without a doubt, learning a second language opens many career opportunities.
This is without a doubt the best meal I have had in years.
Without a doubt, the internet has had the greatest impact on modern communication.
He is without a doubt the hardest-working person in the office.
Without a doubt, early childhood education shapes a person's future success.
This decision will, without a doubt, affect the entire organization.
Without a doubt, regular exercise improves both mental and physical health.
extraExampleTranslations: Shubhasiz, ikkinchi tilni o'rganish ko'plab martaba imkoniyatlarini ochadi.
Bu shubhasiz yillar ichida yegan eng yaxshi taomim.
Shubhasiz, internet zamonaviy muloqotga eng katta ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
U shubhasiz ofisdagi eng ko'p ishlaydigan odam.
Shubhasiz, bolalik ta'limi odamning kelajakdagi muvaffaqiyatini shakllantiradi.
Bu qaror shubhasiz butun tashkilotga ta'sir qiladi.
Shubhasiz, muntazam jismoniy mashqlar ham ruhiy, ham jismoniy salomatlikni yaxshilaydi.

words.definition: over a long period of time, when the final result becomes clear
words.definitionUz: Uzoq vaqt o'tgach, yakuniy natija oydinlashganda — darhol emas, balki kelajakda
words.example1: Studying hard may be difficult now, but in the long run it will pay off.
words.example1Translation: Qattiq o'qish hozir qiyin bo'lishi mumkin, lekin uzoq muddatda bu o'z mevasini beradi.
words.example2: Buying cheap products may save money now, but in the long run it costs more.
words.example2Translation: Arzon mahsulot sotib olish hozir pul tejashi mumkin, lekin uzoq muddatda bu ko'proq xarajat qiladi.
words.example3: In the long run, investing in employee training benefits the entire company.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq muddatda xodimlarni o'qitishga sarmoya kiritish butun kompaniyaga foyda keltiradi.
extraExamples: Eating well and exercising regularly pays off in the long run.
In the long run, renewable energy will be cheaper than fossil fuels.
Cutting corners on safety might save time now, but it causes bigger problems in the long run.
In the long run, building strong relationships matters more than short-term profits.
Learning to manage stress will help you in the long run.
In the long run, honest business practices build more loyal customers.
Spending time with your children now will strengthen your bond in the long run.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi ovqatlanish va muntazam mashq qilish uzoq muddatda o'z mevasini beradi.
Uzoq muddatda qayta tiklanadigan energiya yoqilg'i yonilg'idan arzonroq bo'ladi.
Xavfsizlikka e'tibor bermaslik hozir vaqt tejashi mumkin, lekin uzoq muddatda kattaroq muammolarga olib keladi.
Uzoq muddatda mustahkam munosabatlar qurish qisqa muddatli foyda olishdan muhimroq.
Stressni boshqarishni o'rganish uzoq muddatda yordam beradi.
Uzoq muddatda halol biznes amaliyotlari ko'proq sodiq mijozlarni shakllantiradi.
Hozir bolalaringiz bilan vaqt o'tkazish uzoq muddatda munosabatingizni mustahkamlaydi.

words.word: at the end of the day
words.definition: used to introduce the most important fact or the final conclusion after considering everything
words.definitionUz: Hamma narsani hisobga olgandan keyin eng muhim haqiqat yoki yakuniy xulosa bildirish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: At the end of the day, your health is more important than money.
words.example1Translation: Oxir-oqibat, sog'lig'ingiz puldan muhimroq.
words.example2: We can debate the details for hours, but at the end of the day, we need to make a decision.
words.example2Translation: Biz soatlab tafsilotlar haqida bahslashishimiz mumkin, lekin oxir-oqibat qaror qabul qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3: At the end of the day, the customers decide whether a product succeeds or fails.
words.example3Translation: Oxir-oqibat, mahsulot muvaffaqiyatli yoki muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lishini mijozlar hal qiladi.
extraExamples: At the end of the day, it is your life and you get to choose how to live it.
The team worked hard all year, and at the end of the day, the results showed it.
At the end of the day, kindness costs nothing but means everything.
We can plan all we want, but at the end of the day, results are what matter.
At the end of the day, trust is the foundation of any strong relationship.
The company tried many strategies, but at the end of the day, quality won.
At the end of the day, you have to be happy with the choices you make.
extraExampleTranslations: Oxir-oqibat, bu sizning hayotingiz va uni qanday yashashni siz tanlaysiz.
Jamoa butun yil qattiq ishladi va oxir-oqibat natijalar buni ko'rsatdi.
Oxir-oqibat, mehribonlik hech narsa talab qilmaydi, lekin hamma narsa deganidir.
Xohlagancha reja tuzishimiz mumkin, lekin oxir-oqibat natijalar muhim.
Oxir-oqibat, ishonch har qanday mustahkam munosabatning asosi.
Kompaniya ko'plab strategiyalarni sinadi, lekin oxir-oqibat sifat g'olib chiqdi.
Oxir-oqibat, qabul qilgan tanlovlaringizdan xursand bo'lishingiz kerak.

words.definition: used to suggest that a situation is actually much worse, greater, or more extreme than what you are saying
words.definitionUz: Aslida holat aytilayotgandan ancha yomoni, kattaroq yoki o'tkiroq ekanligini bildirish uchun ishlatiladi — ko'pincha salbiy narsa haqida muloyim gapirganda
words.example1: The service at that restaurant was poor, to say the least.
words.example1Translation: O'sha restoranda xizmat ko'rsatish, eng kamida aytganda, yomon edi.
words.example2: The traffic this morning was terrible, to say the least — I was two hours late.
words.example2Translation: Bu ertalabki tiqilinch, eng kamida aytganda, dahshatli edi — men ikki soat kech qoldim.
words.example3: His presentation was disorganized, to say the least, and nobody understood the main point.
words.example3Translation: Uning taqdimoti, eng kamida aytganda, tartibsiz edi va hech kim asosiy fikrni tushunmadi.
extraExamples: The results of the experiment were surprising, to say the least.
His response to the complaint was unhelpful, to say the least.
The new office layout is uncomfortable, to say the least.
Losing the contract was disappointing, to say the least, for the entire sales team.
The film's plot was confusing, to say the least.
Working without pay for three months was unfair, to say the least.
Her reaction to the news was unexpected, to say the least.
extraExampleTranslations: Tajriba natijalari, eng kamida aytganda, hayratlanarli edi.
Uning shikoyatga javobi, eng kamida aytganda, foydali emas edi.
Yangi ofis tartibi, eng kamida aytganda, noqulay.
Shartnomani yo'qotish butun savdo jamoasi uchun, eng kamida aytganda, hayfanar edi.
Filmning syujeti, eng kamida aytganda, chalkash edi.
Uch oy haqsiz ishlash, eng kamida aytganda, adolatsiz edi.
Uning yangiliklarга munosabati, eng kamida aytganda, kutilmagan edi.

words.definition: used when you suddenly remember something or realize something you had not thought about before
words.definitionUz: Avval o'ylamagan bir narsani to'satdan eslagan yoki anglaganingizda ishlatiladi
words.example1: Come to think of it, I haven't seen him in weeks.
words.example1Translation: Endi o'ylab qarasam, men uni haftalar davomida ko'rmaganman.
words.example2: Come to think of it, she never actually agreed to join the project.
words.example2Translation: Endi o'ylab qarasam, u aslida loyihaga qo'shilishga rozi bo'lmagan edi.
words.example3: Come to think of it, I left my phone charger at the office yesterday.
words.example3Translation: Endi o'ylab qarasam, kecha telefon zaryadlovchimni ofisda qoldirib ketibman.
extraExamples: Come to think of it, I have never tried sushi before.
Come to think of it, that was the last time we all met as a full team.
Come to think of it, he mentioned something about leaving the company last month.
Come to think of it, the deadline might be tomorrow, not next week.
Come to think of it, I have been feeling tired every morning this week.
Come to think of it, we never discussed the budget for that part of the project.
Come to think of it, she asked me about this exact topic just a few days ago.
extraExampleTranslations: Endi o'ylab qarasam, men hech qachon sushi tatib ko'rmaganman.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, bu biz to'liq jamoa sifatida uchrashgan so'nggi marta edi.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, u o'tgan oy kompaniyadan ketish haqida biror narsa aytgan edi.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, muddat keyingi hafta emas, ertaga bo'lishi mumkin.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, men bu hafta har ertalab charchab turganimni sezdim.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, biz hech qachon loyihaning o'sha qismi uchun byudjetni muhokama qilmagan edik.
Endi o'ylab qarasam, u bir necha kun oldin men bilan aynan shu mavzu haqida gaplashgan edi.

words.definition: Over a long period of time, eventually.
words.definitionUz: Hozir emas, balki uzoq vaqt o'tgandan keyin bilinadi degan ma'noda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: It may be hard now, but in the long run, you'll benefit a lot.
words.example1Translation: Hozir qiyin bo'lishi mumkin, lekin uzoq kelajakda siz ko'p foyda ko'rasiz.
words.example2: Eating healthy is difficult at first, but in the long run it saves your health.
words.example2Translation: Sog'lom ovqatlanish dastlab qiyin, lekin uzoq kelajakda u sog'ligingizni saqlaydi.
words.example3: Investing early pays off in the long run.
words.example3Translation: Erta investitsiya qilish uzoq muddatda o'z samarasini beradi.
extraExamples: Learning a new skill is time-consuming, but in the long run it opens many doors.
Cheap products cost more in the long run because they break easily.
In the long run, honesty builds stronger relationships.
Working hard now will pay off in the long run.
In the long run, regular exercise improves your quality of life.
Cutting costs too much can hurt the business in the long run.
In the long run, education is the best investment you can make.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi ko'nikma o'rganish vaqt talab qiladi, lekin uzoq kelajakda ko'p eshiklarni ochadi.
Arzon mahsulotlar tez sinishi sababli uzoq kelajakda qimmatga tushadi.
Uzoq muddatda halollik mustahkamroq munosabatlar qurishga yordam beradi.
Hozir qattiq mehnat qilish uzoq kelajakda o'z samarasini beradi.
Uzoq muddatda muntazam jismoniy mashqlar hayot sifatingizni oshiradi.
Xarajatlarni haddan tashqari qisqartirish uzoq kelajakda biznesga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Uzoq kelajakda ta'lim siz qila oladigan eng yaxshi investitsiyadir.

words.definition: To be responsible for managing or controlling something or someone.
words.definitionUz: Biror ish yoki odamlar uchun mas'ul bo'lish, ularni boshqarish vazifasini bajarish.
words.example1: I'm in charge of organizing the event.
words.example1Translation: Men tadbirni tashkil qilish uchun javobgarman.
words.example2: She is in charge of the marketing department.
words.example2Translation: U marketing bo'limini boshqaradi.
words.example3: Who is in charge of this project?
words.example3Translation: Bu loyiha uchun kim javobgar?
extraExamples: He was put in charge of training new employees.
The manager is in charge of making final decisions.
While the director is away, she is in charge of the office.
I was in charge of the budget for the entire campaign.
He has been in charge of the team for three years.
Being in charge of others is a big responsibility.
They put a senior engineer in charge of the technical side.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi xodimlarni o'qitish uchun mas'ul qilib tayinlandi.
Menejer yakuniy qarorlar qabul qilish uchun javobgardir.
Direktor yo'q paytda u ofisni boshqaradi.
Men butun kampaniya byudjeti uchun javobgar edim.
U uch yildan beri jamoani boshqarib kelmoqda.
Boshqalarning mas'uliyatini olish katta javobgarlikdir.
Ular texnik tomoni uchun katta muhandisni mas'ul qilib tayinlashdi.

words.definition: Certain or very likely to happen.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yuz berishi muqarrar yoki juda ehtimol degan ma'noni anglatadi.
words.example1: He's bound to win the game.
words.example1Translation: U o'yinda albatta g'alaba qozonadi.
words.example2: If you don't sleep enough, you're bound to feel tired.
words.example2Translation: Agar yetarlicha uxlamasangiz, albatta charchoq his qilasiz.
words.example3: With so much practice, she's bound to improve.
words.example3Translation: Buncha mashq bilan u albatta yaxshilanadi.
extraExamples: If you work this hard, you're bound to succeed.
They're bound to make mistakes when learning something new.
The project is bound to face some delays.
With that attitude, he's bound to cause problems.
She's bound to get the job, given her experience.
You're bound to feel nervous before a big presentation.
If prices keep rising, people are bound to complain.
extraExampleTranslations: Shuncha qattiq ishlasangiz, albatta muvaffaqiyatga erishasiz.
Yangi narsa o'rganayotganda ular albatta xato qiladi.
Loyiha albatta ba'zi kechikishlarga duch keladi.
Bunday munosabat bilan u albatta muammo chiqaradi.
Tajribasini hisobga olsak, u albatta ishga olinadi.
Katta taqdimotdan oldin albatta nervingiz bo'ladi.
Narxlar oshishda davom etsa, odamlar albatta norozilik bildiradi.

words.definition: Designed or intended for a specific purpose.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa ma'lum bir maqsad uchun yaratilgan yoki mo'ljallangan degan ma'noni bildiradi.
words.example1: This book is meant to fix your pronunciation mistakes.
words.example1Translation: Bu kitob talaffuz xatolaringizni tuzatish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example2: This tool is meant to make your work faster.
words.example2Translation: Bu vosita ishingizni tezlashtirish uchun mo'ljallangan.
words.example3: The meeting was meant to start at nine, but it was delayed.
words.example3Translation: Yig'ilish soat to'qqizda boshlanishi kerak edi, lekin kechikdi.
extraExamples: This app is meant to help students learn vocabulary.
The new law is meant to protect workers' rights.
That comment was not meant to offend anyone.
This feature is meant to save users time.
The training program is meant to prepare employees for leadership roles.
This discount is meant to attract new customers.
The guide is meant to be used alongside the main textbook.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu ilova o'quvchilarga lug'at o'rganishda yordam berish uchun mo'ljallangan.
Yangi qonun ishchilarning huquqlarini himoya qilish uchun mo'ljallangan.
Bu izoh hech kimni xafa qilish uchun aytilmagan edi.
Bu xususiyat foydalanuvchilar vaqtini tejash uchun mo'ljallangan.
O'quv dasturi xodimlarni rahbarlik rollariga tayyorlash uchun mo'ljallangan.
Bu chegirma yangi mijozlarni jalb qilish uchun mo'ljallangan.
Qo'llanma asosiy darslik bilan birga ishlatilishi uchun mo'ljallangan.

words.definition: Based on the information I currently have, though I may not know everything.
words.definitionUz: Men hozir biladigan ma'lumotga ko'ra, ammo yanglishib ham qolishim mumkin degan ma'noda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: As far as I know, she's still working there.
words.example1Translation: Men bilganimcha, u hali ham u yerda ishlayapti.
words.example2: As far as I know, the meeting hasn't been cancelled.
words.example2Translation: Men bilganimcha, yig'ilish bekor qilinmagan.
words.example3: As far as I know, he has never been to Japan.
words.example3Translation: Men bilganimcha, u hech qachon Yaponiyada bo'lmagan.
extraExamples: As far as I know, the project is still on schedule.
As far as I know, they haven't made a final decision yet.
As far as I know, this is the only available option.
As far as I know, the store opens at nine in the morning.
As far as I know, he doesn't speak French.
As far as I know, no one has complained about this issue.
As far as I know, the price hasn't changed.
extraExampleTranslations: Men bilganimcha, loyiha hali ham jadvalda davom etmoqda.
Men bilganimcha, ular hali yakuniy qaror qabul qilishmagan.
Men bilganimcha, bu yagona mavjud variant.
Men bilganimcha, do'kon ertalab soat to'qqizda ochiladi.
Men bilganimcha, u fransuzcha gapirmaydi.
Men bilganimcha, hech kim bu muammo haqida shikoyat qilmagan.
Men bilganimcha, narx o'zgarmagan.

words.definition: To fail to meet someone's expectations or to disappoint them.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishining umidini oqlamaslik yoki uni xafа qilish, kutganini bajara olmaslik.
words.example1: I promised to help her, and I won't let her down.
words.example1Translation: Men unga yordam berishga va'da berdim va uning ko'nglini qoldirmayman.
words.example2: He let his team down by missing the final match.
words.example2Translation: U yakuniy o'yinni o'tkazib yuborib, jamoasining ko'nglini qoldirdi.
words.example3: Don't let me down — this is really important to me.
words.example3Translation: Ko'nglimni qoldirma — bu men uchun juda muhim.
extraExamples: She worked hard because she didn't want to let her parents down.
He felt terrible for letting his friend down at such a critical moment.
The product let customers down with its poor quality.
I trust you completely, so please don't let me down.
She let her team down by not finishing her part of the project.
He hates letting people down, so he always keeps his promises.
The new software let users down because it crashed constantly.
extraExampleTranslations: U qattiq ishladi, chunki ota-onasining ko'nglini qoldirmoqchi emas edi.
U shunday muhim daqiqada do'stining ko'nglini qoldirgani uchun o'zini yomon his qildi.
Mahsulot past sifati bilan mijozlarning ko'nglini qoldirdi.
Men sizga to'liq ishonaman, shuning uchun ko'nglimni qoldirmang.
U loyihaning o'z qismini tugatmay, jamoasining ko'nglini qoldirdi.
U odamlarning ko'nglini qoldirishni yoqtirmaydi, shuning uchun har doim va'dasini bajaradi.
Yangi dastur doim ishdan chiqishi sababli foydalanuvchilarning ko'nglini qoldirdi.

words.definition: Happening one after another without interruption.
words.definitionUz: Bir narsa to'xtamasdan bir necha marta ketma-ket sodir bo'lishi.
words.example1: He won three games in a row.
words.example1Translation: U ketma-ket uchta o'yinda g'alaba qozondi.
words.example2: She studied for five hours in a row without taking a break.
words.example2Translation: U tanaffussiz besh soat ketma-ket o'qidi.
words.example3: The team lost four matches in a row and decided to change their strategy.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa ketma-ket to'rtta o'yinda yutqazib, strategiyasini o'zgartirishga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: It rained for ten days in a row last month.
She cooked dinner for the whole family three nights in a row.
He checked his phone five times in a row out of boredom.
The company reported profits for the sixth year in a row.
I woke up early four days in a row this week.
They watched three episodes in a row before going to sleep.
The athlete broke his personal record two weeks in a row.
extraExampleTranslations: O'tgan oy o'n kun ketma-ket yomg'ir yog'di.
U uch kecha ketma-ket butun oilaga kechki ovqat pishirdi.
U zerikish tufayli ketma-ket besh marta telefonini tekshirdi.
Kompaniya ketma-ket oltinchi yil foyda ko'rsatdi.
Bu hafta to'rt kun ketma-ket erta uyg'ondim.
Ular uxlashdan oldin ketma-ket uchta epizod ko'rishdi.
Sportchi ikki hafta ketma-ket shaxsiy rekordini yangiladi.

words.definition: During the time between now and a future event, or between two events.
words.definitionUz: Bir narsa sodir bo'lishini kutayotgan vaqt ichida boshqa biror narsa qilish haqida aytiladi.
words.example1: Dinner will be ready soon. In the meantime, set the table.
words.example1Translation: Kechki ovqat tez orada tayyor bo'ladi. Shu orada dasturxon yozing.
words.example2: The package will arrive on Monday. In the meantime, we can use the old one.
words.example2Translation: Paket dushanba kuni yetib keladi. Shu orada eskisidan foydalanamiz.
words.example3: The repair will take two days. In the meantime, you can use my laptop.
words.example3Translation: Ta'mirlash ikki kun davom etadi. Shu orada mening noutbukimdan foydalanishingiz mumkin.
extraExamples: The new hire starts next week. In the meantime, I'll handle her tasks.
The results will come out tomorrow. In the meantime, try not to worry.
Construction will finish in three months. In the meantime, we work from home.
She's still deciding. In the meantime, we should prepare both options.
The update is being installed. In the meantime, please do not turn off your device.
The manager is in a meeting. In the meantime, can I help you?
Lunch isn't ready yet. In the meantime, have some tea.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi xodim kelasi hafta boshlaydi. Shu orada men uning vazifalarini bajaraman.
Natijalar ertaga chiqadi. Shu orada tashvishlanmaslikka harakat qiling.
Qurilish uch oyda tugaydi. Shu orada uydan ishlayapmiz.
U hali qaror qilmoqda. Shu orada ikki variantni ham tayyorlashimiz kerak.
Yangilanish o'rnatilmoqda. Shu orada qurilmangizni o'chirmang.
Menejer yig'ilishda. Shu orada men sizga yordam bera olamanmi?
Tushlik hali tayyor emas. Shu orada choy iching.

words.definition: Happening suddenly and unexpectedly, without any warning.
words.definitionUz: Hech qanday ogohlantiruvchi belgi bo'lmasidan to'satdan yuz beradigan narsa haqida aytiladi.
words.example1: She called me out of the blue.
words.example1Translation: U kutilmaganda menga qo'ng'iroq qildi.
words.example2: Out of the blue, he announced he was leaving the company.
words.example2Translation: U kutilmaganda kompaniyani tark etishini e'lon qildi.
words.example3: The news came out of the blue and shocked everyone.
words.example3Translation: Yangilik kutilmaganda keldi va hammani hayratda qoldirdi.
extraExamples: Out of the blue, my old friend showed up at my door.
He received a job offer out of the blue from a company abroad.
She burst into tears out of the blue during the meeting.
The power went out of the blue during an important presentation.
Out of the blue, they decided to move to another city.
The opportunity came out of the blue, and he had to decide quickly.
Out of the blue, she got a message from someone she hadn't spoken to in years.
extraExampleTranslations: Kutilmaganda eski do'stim eshigimda paydo bo'ldi.
U xorijdagi kompaniyadan kutilmaganda ish taklifi oldi.
U yig'ilish paytida to'satdan yig'lab yubordi.
Muhim taqdimot paytida kutilmaganda elektr o'chib qoldi.
Ular kutilmaganda boshqa shaharga ko'chib o'tishga qaror qilishdi.
Imkoniyat to'satdan paydo bo'ldi va u tez qaror qabul qilishi kerak edi.
Kutilmaganda u bilan yillar davomida gaplashmagan odamdan xabar keldi.

words.translation: kimnidir kutilmaganda ushlab qolmoq, hayratda qoldirmoq
words.definition: To surprise someone when they are not prepared or expecting something.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishini tayyor bo'lmagan paytida to'sатdan ajablantirish yoki u kutmagan vaziyatga tushirib qo'yish.
words.example1: His sudden question caught me off guard.
words.example1Translation: Uning to'satdan bergan savoli meni hayratda qoldirdi.
words.example2: The reporter's question caught the politician off guard.
words.example2Translation: Muxbirning savoli siyosatchini tayyor bo'lmagan paytda ushlab qoldi.
words.example3: She was caught off guard when they threw a surprise party for her.
words.example3Translation: Uning sharafiga kutilmagan ziyofat uyushtirilganda u hayratda qoldi.
extraExamples: The sudden change in plans caught everyone off guard.
His direct criticism caught her off guard in the middle of the meeting.
The loud noise outside caught the whole class off guard.
I was caught off guard when my boss asked me to present on the spot.
The competitor's new product launch caught the company off guard.
Don't let difficult interview questions catch you off guard — prepare well.
The unexpected snow caught many drivers off guard on the highway.
extraExampleTranslations: Rejalardagi to'satdan o'zgarish hammani hayratda qoldirdi.
Uning to'g'ridan-to'g'ri tanqidi yig'ilish o'rtasida uni tayyor bo'lmagan paytda ushlab qoldi.
Tashqaridagi baland ovoz butun sinfni hayratda qoldirdi.
Xo'jayinim meni o'sha zahoti taqdimot qilishni so'raganda tayyor bo'lmagan paytimda ushlab qoldi.
Raqibning yangi mahsulot chiqarishi kompaniyani tayyor bo'lmagan paytda ushlab qoldi.
Qiyin intervyu savollarini tayyor bo'lmagan paytda tushib qolmang — yaxshi tayyorlaning.
Kutilmagan qor ko'pgina haydovchilarni magistralda tayyor bo'lmagan paytda ushlab qoldi.

words.definition: as a precaution, in case something unexpected happens
words.definitionUz: kutilmagan narsa bo'lsa deb, ehtiyot sifatida biror narsa qilmoq yoki olmoq
words.example1: Take a jacket just in case the weather changes.
words.example1Translation: Ob-havo o'zgarib qolsa deb, kurtka ol.
words.example2: I saved her number just in case I need it later.
words.example2Translation: Keyin kerak bo'lib qolsa deb, uning raqamini saqlab qo'ydim.
words.example3: Bring some extra cash just in case the card does not work.
words.example3Translation: Karta ishlamay qolsa deb, qo'shimcha naqd pul ol.
extraExamples: I charged my phone fully just in case we get lost.
She kept the receipt just in case she needed to return the item.
We left an hour early just in case there was traffic.
He wrote down the address just in case he forgot.
Take an umbrella just in case it rains.
I booked an extra room just in case more people showed up.
She packed medicine just in case someone got sick on the trip.
extraExampleTranslations: Adashib qolsak deb, telefonimni to'liq zaryadladim.
U tovarni qaytarishi kerak bo'lsa deb, chekni saqlab qo'ydi.
Tirbandlik bo'lsa deb, bir soat oldin yo'lga chiqdik.
U unutib qo'ysa deb, manzilni yozib oldi.
Yomg'ir yog'sa deb, soyabon ol.
Ko'proq odam kelsa deb, qo'shimcha xona band qildim.
U safarida birov kasal bo'lib qolsa deb, dori solib qo'ydi.

words.definition: used to say that something unexpected or surprising became clear later
words.definitionUz: biror narsa keyinroq ma'lum bo'lib qolganini, ko'pincha kutilmagan tarzda aytish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: It turns out that he was right about everything.
words.example1Translation: Ma'lum bo'ldiki, u hamma narsada haq ekan.
words.example2: It turns out that the restaurant was closed on Mondays.
words.example2Translation: Ma'lum bo'ldiki, restoran dushanba kunlari yopiq ekan.
words.example3: It turns out that they had met before without knowing it.
words.example3Translation: Ma'lum bo'ldiki, ular avval o'zlari bilmagan holda uchrashar ekan.
extraExamples: It turns out that the email was sent to the wrong person.
It turns out that she already knew the answer.
It turns out that the shortcut actually takes longer.
It turns out that he had been working there for ten years.
It turns out that the product we ordered was out of stock.
It turns out that they were cousins all along.
It turns out that my first instinct was correct.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma'lum bo'ldiki, elektron xat noto'g'ri odamga yuborilgan ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, u javobni allaqachon bilar ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, qisqa yo'l aslida ko'proq vaqt oladi ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, u o'sha yerda o'n yildan beri ishlayotgan ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, biz buyurtma qilgan mahsulot omborda yo'q ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, ular doim ham amakivachchalar ekan.
Ma'lum bo'ldiki, mening birinchi sezgim to'g'ri ekan.

words.translation: unda yaxshi fikr bor, u haq
words.definition: to say something that is valid, reasonable, or worth considering
words.definitionUz: biror odamning aytgani mantiqli yoki to'g'ri ekanini e'tirof etmoq
words.example1: You have a point — we should plan this more carefully.
words.example1Translation: Siz haqsiz, buni ancha ehtiyotkorlik bilan rejalashtirish kerak.
words.example2: He has a point about the budget being too high.
words.example2Translation: U byudjet juda yuqori ekanligi haqida haq.
words.example3: I did not agree at first, but she had a point.
words.example3Translation: Dastlab rozi bo'lmadim, lekin u haq ekan.
extraExamples: The manager has a point — the deadline is too tight.
You have a point, but we also need to consider the cost.
He made a strong argument and clearly had a point.
I hate to admit it, but my brother has a point.
She has a point about the location being too far for customers.
They had a point when they said the plan needed more testing.
Even though I disagreed, I had to accept that he had a point.
extraExampleTranslations: Menejer haq, muddat juda qisqa.
Siz haqsiz, lekin xarajatlarni ham hisobga olishimiz kerak.
U kuchli argument keltirdi va aniq haq edi.
Buni tan olish og'ir, lekin akam haq.
U joy mijozlar uchun juda uzoqligi haqida u haq.
Ular reja ko'proq sinovdan o'tishi kerak deganlarida haq edilar.
Rozi bo'lmasam ham, u haq ekanini qabul qilishga majbur bo'ldim.

words.definition: used to show that two things are both not true or not possible
words.definitionUz: ikki narsaning ham yo'qligini yoki ikkalasi ham bo'lmasligini ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: He neither called nor texted me all day.
words.example1Translation: U kun bo'yi na qo'ng'iroq qildi, na xabar jo'natdi.
words.example2: She is neither happy nor sad about the news.
words.example2Translation: U bu xabardan na xursand, na xafa.
words.example3: Neither the manager nor the employees knew about the change.
words.example3Translation: Na menejer, na xodimlar bu o'zgarishdan xabar topdi.
extraExamples: He neither apologized nor explained what happened.
Neither the food nor the service was good at that restaurant.
She speaks neither French nor German.
Neither option seemed right to me.
He was neither excited nor nervous before the presentation.
Neither my phone nor my laptop was working that morning.
They reached neither an agreement nor a compromise.
extraExampleTranslations: U na kechirim so'radi, na nima bo'lganini tushuntirdi.
O'sha restoranda na ovqat, na xizmat yaxshi edi.
U na fransuzcha, na nemischa gapiradi.
Na bitta, na ikkinchi variant menga to'g'ri tuyulmadi.
U taqdimotdan oldin na hayajonlangan, na asabiy edi.
O'sha kuni ertalab na telefonim, na noutbukim ishlamadi.
Ular na kelishuv, na murosaga erisholdi.

words.definition: used to say that something is not surprising given the circumstances
words.definitionUz: biror narsa bo'lishini kutish mumkin edi, ya'ni bu ajablanarli emas, demoqchi bo'lganda ishlatiladi
words.example1: You studied all night — no wonder you are tired.
words.example1Translation: Butun kecha o'qiding — charchagan bo'lsang, ajabmas.
words.example2: No wonder she is upset after what happened.
words.example2Translation: Bo'lgandan keyin u xafa bo'lsa, ajabmas.
words.example3: He skipped breakfast and lunch — no wonder he is starving.
words.example3Translation: U nonushta va tushlik qilmadi — och bo'lsa, ajabmas.
extraExamples: No wonder the team lost — they never practiced.
She works twelve hours a day, no wonder she is exhausted.
No wonder he got the job, he has ten years of experience.
They did not sleep last night, no wonder they look terrible.
No wonder the project failed — no one was in charge.
You ate nothing all day, no wonder you feel weak.
No wonder she is popular — she is kind to everyone.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa yutqazsa, ajabmas — ular hech qachon mashq qilmadi.
U kuniga o'n ikki soat ishlaydi, charchagan bo'lsa, ajabmas.
U ishga kirgan bo'lsa, ajabmas — o'n yillik tajribasi bor.
Ular kecha umuman uxlamadi, ko'rinishlari dahshatli bo'lsa, ajabmas.
Loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lsa, ajabmas — hech kim mas'ul bo'lmadi.
Kun bo'yi hech narsa yemagansiz, o'zingizni nochor his qilsangiz, ajabmas.
U mashhur bo'lsa, ajabmas — u hamma bilan mehribon.

words.definition: to not feel like doing something or not want something at a particular time
words.definitionUz: hozir biror narsa qilgisi kelmayotgani yoki biror narsani xohlamayotganini ifodalaydi
words.example1: I am not in the mood for pizza tonight.
words.example1Translation: Bu kecha pizza yegim kelmayapti.
words.example2: She is not in the mood for jokes right now.
words.example2Translation: U hozir hazil eshitgisi kelmayapti.
words.example3: I am not in the mood for a long conversation.
words.example3Translation: Uzoq suhbat qurishga kayfiyatim yo'q.
extraExamples: He was not in the mood for going out after a long day at work.
I am not in the mood for arguments today.
She was not in the mood for cooking, so they ordered food.
I am not in the mood for loud music right now.
He is not in the mood for visitors this evening.
I am not in the mood for watching a serious film tonight.
She was not in the mood for shopping, even though they had planned it.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishda og'ir kundan keyin u tashqariga chiqgisi kelmadi.
Bugun tortishuvlarga kayfiyatim yo'q.
Ovqat pishirishga kayfiyati bo'lmagani uchun ular tayyor ovqat buyurtma qilishdi.
Hozir baland ovozli musiqa tinglagim kelmayapti.
U kechqurun mehmon qabul qilish kayfiyatida emas.
Bu kecha jiddiy film ko'rgim kelmayapti.
Rejalashtirilgan bo'lsa ham, u xarid qilgisi kelmadi.

words.definition: to be very annoyed and frustrated with something that has been going on for too long
words.definitionUz: uzoq vaqtdan beri davom etayotgan biror narsa yoki odamdan juda charchab, bezor bo'lmoq
words.example1: I am sick and tired of his constant excuses.
words.example1Translation: Uning doim bahona qilishidan bezor bo'ldim.
words.example2: She is sick and tired of doing all the work alone.
words.example2Translation: U barcha ishni yolg'iz bajarishdan bezor bo'ldi.
words.example3: I am sick and tired of waiting — let us just leave.
words.example3Translation: Kutishdan bezor bo'ldim — ketaveraylik.
extraExamples: He is sick and tired of the same routine every single day.
I am sick and tired of people not keeping their promises.
She is sick and tired of being told what to do.
They are sick and tired of the noise from the construction next door.
I am sick and tired of eating the same food every week.
He is sick and tired of working overtime with no extra pay.
We are all sick and tired of these pointless meetings.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni bir xil tartibdan bezor bo'ldi.
Odamlarning va'dalarini bajarmasligidan bezor bo'ldim.
U doim nima qilishini aytib turishlaridan bezor bo'ldi.
Ular qo'shni qurilishdagi shovqindan bezor bo'ldi.
Har hafta bir xil ovqat yeyishdan bezor bo'ldim.
U qo'shimcha haq olmasdan qo'shimcha soatlarda ishlashdan bezor bo'ldi.
Barchamiz bu befoyda yig'ilishlardan bezor bo'ldik.

words.word: all you need to do is
words.translation: siz qilishingiz kerak bo'lgan yagona narsa bu
words.definition: used to say that only one simple action is required to achieve something
words.definitionUz: biror narsaga erishish uchun faqat bitta oddiy ish qilish kifoya ekanini aytadi
words.example1: All you need to do is click the button and it starts.
words.example1Translation: Siz qilishingiz kerak bo'lgan yagona narsa — tugmani bosish, va u boshlanadi.
words.example2: All you need to do is apologize and it will be fine.
words.example2Translation: Kechirim so'rasangiz yetarli, hammasi yaxshi bo'ladi.
words.example3: All you need to do is stay calm and answer honestly.
words.example3Translation: Xotirjam turib, to'g'ri javob berishingiz kifoya.
extraExamples: All you need to do is sign the form and submit it.
All you need to do is ask and I will help you.
All you need to do is practice for thirty minutes a day.
All you need to do is show up on time and do your best.
All you need to do is send an email to confirm your registration.
All you need to do is tell the truth and everything will work out.
All you need to do is follow the instructions step by step.
extraExampleTranslations: Faqat shaklni imzolang va topshiring, shu yetarli.
Faqat so'rang, men sizga yordam beraman.
Kuniga o'ttiz daqiqa mashq qilishingiz kifoya.
O'z vaqtida keling va qo'lingizdan kelganini qiling, shu bas.
Ro'yxatdan o'tishingizni tasdiqlash uchun elektron xat yuboring, shu yetarli.
Faqat haqiqatni ayting, hammasi hal bo'ladi.
Faqat ko'rsatmalarni bosqichma-bosqich bajaring.

words.definition: to find something difficult or to struggle with a task or situation
words.definitionUz: biror ish yoki vaziyat bilan kurashmoq, qiyinchilik his qilmoq
words.example1: I had a hard time understanding her accent at first.
words.example1Translation: Avvaliga uning urg'usini tushunishda qiynaldim.
words.example2: She had a hard time falling asleep after the stressful day.
words.example2Translation: U stressli kundan keyin uxlab qolishda qiynaldi.
words.example3: He is having a hard time finding a job in his field.
words.example3Translation: U o'z sohasida ish topishda qiynalmoqda.
extraExamples: They had a hard time agreeing on a plan.
I am having a hard time remembering all these new words.
She had a hard time adjusting to life in a new country.
He had a hard time staying focused during the long meeting.
We had a hard time finding the venue in the dark.
I had a hard time saying goodbye after so many years together.
The students had a hard time finishing the exam on time.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular reja ustida kelishishda qiynalishdi.
Bu yangi so'zlarning hammasini eslab qolishda qiynalmoqdaman.
U yangi mamlakatdagi hayotga moslashishda qiynaldi.
U uzoq yig'ilish davomida diqqatini jamlashda qiynaldi.
Biz qorong'ida joy topishda qiynaldik.
Ko'p yillik birlikdan keyin xayrlashishda qiynaldim.
Talabalar imtihonni o'z vaqtida tugatishda qiynalishdi.

words.translation: arafasida bo'lmoq, deyarli qilay deb turmoq
words.definition: to be very close to doing something or to something happening, especially something significant
words.definitionUz: biror muhim narsa ro'y berishidan yoki biror ish qilishdan sal oldin bo'lmoq
words.example1: She was on the verge of tears when she heard the news.
words.example1Translation: U bu xabarni eshitganida yig'lab yuboray deb turdi.
words.example2: The company is on the verge of bankruptcy.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya bankrotlik arafasida.
words.example3: He was on the verge of giving up when things finally improved.
words.example3Translation: U tamoman qo'yib yuboray deb turganda, oxirida hamma narsa yaxshilandi.
extraExamples: Scientists are on the verge of a major breakthrough.
She was on the verge of quitting her job when she got a promotion.
The two countries were on the verge of signing a peace agreement.
He looked on the verge of collapse after running the marathon.
We were on the verge of losing the deal before the last-minute negotiation.
The patient was on the verge of recovery after weeks of treatment.
I was on the verge of calling you when you walked in.
extraExampleTranslations: Olimlar katta kashfiyot arafasida turibdi.
U ishdan ketay deb turganda, lavozimi oshirildi.
Ikki mamlakat tinchlik shartnomasi imzolash arafasida edi.
U marafon yugurgandan keyin qulab tushay deb turgandek ko'rindi.
Oxirgi daqiqadagi muzokaralardan oldin biz kelishuvni yo'qotay deb turgandik.
Bemor haftalar davom etgan davolanishdan keyin tuzalish arafasida edi.
Siz kirganingizda men sizni qo'ng'iroq qilay deb turgandim.

words.definition: Having or showing a strong love and support for your country.
words.definitionUz: O'z vatanini chuqur sevadigan va unga sodiq bo'lgan — mamlakatiga g'urur va sadoqat bilan munosabatda bo'ladigan odam haqida aytiladi.
words.example1: He is deeply patriotic and always votes in every election.
words.example1Translation: U chuqur vatanparvar bo'lib, har doim barcha saylovlarda ovoz beradi.
words.example2: The soldiers received a patriotic welcome when they returned home.
words.example2Translation: Askarlar uyga qaytganlarida ularga vatanparvarona kutib olish uyushtirildi.
words.example3: She wore the national colors to show she was patriotic.
words.example3Translation: U vatanparvarligini namoyish etish uchun milliy ranglarni kiydi.
extraExamples: Many patriotic citizens gathered to celebrate the national holiday.
He gave a patriotic speech that moved the entire audience.
Being patriotic does not mean ignoring your country's problems.
She donated to a patriotic fund that supports injured soldiers.
The patriotic song brought tears to many people's eyes.
Young people are encouraged to be patriotic by learning their country's history.
He expressed his patriotic feelings by volunteering in local community projects.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab vatanparvar fuqarolar milliy bayramni nishonlash uchun yig'ildi.
U butun auditoriyani harakatga keltirgan vatanparvarona nutq so'zladi.
Vatanparvar bo'lish mamlakatning muammolarini e'tiborsiz qoldirish degani emas.
U jarohat olgan askarlarga yordam beruvchi vatanparvarlik fondiga xayriya qildi.
Vatanparvarlik qo'shig'i ko'p odamlarning ko'ziga yosh keltirdi.
Yoshlar mamlakatlarining tarixini o'rganish orqali vatanparvar bo'lishga rag'batlantiriladi.
U mahalliy jamoat loyihalarida ko'ngillilik qilib vatanparvarlik his-tuyg'ularini ifodaladi.

words.definition: Having a strong desire to achieve success, power, or a specific goal.
words.definitionUz: Katta maqsadlari bo'lgan va ularni amalga oshirish uchun qattiq harakat qiladigan odam — u doim oldinga intiladi va qanoatlanib to'xtamaydi.
words.example1: She is very ambitious and wants to start her own company by thirty.
words.example1Translation: U juda ambitsiyali va o'ttiz yoshgacha o'z kompaniyasini ochishni xohlaydi.
words.example2: His ambitious goals pushed him to work harder than anyone else.
words.example2Translation: Uning katta maqsadlari uni boshqalardan ko'ra qattiqroq ishlashga undadi.
words.example3: Being ambitious is good, but you also need a clear plan.
words.example3Translation: Ambitsiyali bo'lish yaxshi, lekin sizga aniq reja ham kerak.
extraExamples: The ambitious student applied to ten universities at the same time.
She set an ambitious target to double sales within six months.
He is so ambitious that he wakes up at five every morning to study.
Ambitious people are not always easy to work with.
Her ambitious nature helped her rise quickly in the company.
The government launched an ambitious plan to rebuild the entire city center.
Being ambitious without discipline usually leads to burnout.
extraExampleTranslations: Ambitsiyali talaba bir vaqtning o'zida o'nta universitetga ariza topshirdi.
U olti oy ichida savdoni ikki baravarga oshirish bo'yicha ambitsiyali maqsad qo'ydi.
U shunday ambitsiyaliki, har kuni ertalab soat beshda o'qish uchun turadi.
Ambitsiyali odamlar bilan hamisha ishlash oson emas.
Uning ambitsiyali tabiati unga kompaniyada tez ko'tarilishga yordam berdi.
Hukumat butun shahar markazini qayta qurish bo'yicha ambitsiyali reja e'lon qildi.
Intizombsiz ambitsiyali bo'lish odatda ruhiy charchoqqa olib keladi.

words.definition: Trying to control or influence people in a clever and unfair way, often without them knowing.
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarni o'zi xohlagan narsani qildirishga ko'pincha yashirin va ayyorona yo'llar bilan undaydigan — bu odam odatda halol bo'lmaydi va o'zining manfaatini o'ylaydi.
words.example1: She realized he was being manipulative when he used guilt to control her.
words.example1Translation: U aybdorlik hissidan foydalanib uni boshqarganida, uning manipulyativ ekanligini tushundi.
words.example2: Manipulative people often make others feel responsible for their problems.
words.example2Translation: Manipulyativ odamlar ko'pincha boshqalarni o'z muammolari uchun mas'ul his qildiradi.
words.example3: He used manipulative language to make the deal seem better than it was.
words.example3Translation: U kelishuvni aslidan yaxshiroq ko'rsatish uchun manipulyativ til ishlatdi.
extraExamples: She left the relationship because her partner was too manipulative.
Manipulative advertising tricks customers into buying things they do not need.
He was very charming on the outside but deeply manipulative underneath.
A manipulative boss creates a toxic and stressful work environment.
Children can sometimes be manipulative to get what they want.
She used manipulative tactics to turn her colleagues against each other.
It is hard to trust someone once you discover they are manipulative.
extraExampleTranslations: U sherigi juda manipulyativ bo'lgani uchun munosabatni tark etdi.
Manipulyativ reklama mijozlarni o'zlariga kerak bo'lmagan narsalarni sotib olishga aldaydi.
U tashqaridan juda xushmuomala ko'rinar, ammo ichdan chuqur manipulyativ edi.
Manipulyativ rahbar zaharli va stressli ish muhitini yaratadi.
Bolalar ba'zan o'zlari xohlagan narsani olish uchun manipulyativ bo'lishi mumkin.
U hamkasblarini bir-biriga qarshi qo'yish uchun manipulyativ usullardan foydalandi.
Kimningdir manipulyativ ekanligini bilib olganingizdan keyin unga ishonish qiyin.

words.definition: Able to recover quickly from difficult situations, setbacks, or hardships.
words.definitionUz: Qiyin vaziyatlar yoki muvaffaqiyatsizliklardan tez tiklanadigan va ruhini tushirmay oldinga qaraydigan odam — hayotning qiyinchiliklariga chidamli.
words.example1: She is very resilient and never gives up after a failure.
words.example1Translation: U juda bardoshli va muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan keyin hech qachon taslim bo'lmaydi.
words.example2: Children are often more resilient than adults think.
words.example2Translation: Bolalar ko'pincha kattalar o'ylaganidan ko'ra ko'proq bardoshli bo'ladi.
words.example3: The team was resilient and bounced back after losing three games in a row.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa bardoshli edi va ketma-ket uchta o'yinni yutqazgandan keyin o'zini tikladi.
extraExamples: He proved how resilient he was by rebuilding his business after bankruptcy.
Resilient people do not avoid problems — they face them.
She became more resilient after going through difficult times in her life.
A resilient mindset helps you adapt to unexpected changes.
The community was resilient after the flood and quickly rebuilt their homes.
Resilient employees handle pressure without losing their focus.
Building resilience takes time, practice, and self-awareness.
extraExampleTranslations: U bankrotlikdan keyin biznesini qayta qurib, o'zining qanchalik bardoshli ekanligini isbotladi.
Bardoshli odamlar muammolardan qochmaydi — ular ularga duch keladi.
U hayotida qiyin davrlarni boshidan kechirgandan keyin ko'proq bardoshli bo'ldi.
Bardoshli fikrlash tarziga ega bo'lish kutilmagan o'zgarishlarga moslashishga yordam beradi.
Jamoa sel ofatidan keyin bardoshlilik ko'rsatdi va tezda uylarini qayta qurdi.
Bardoshli xodimlar bosim ostida ham e'tiborini yo'qotmaydi.
Bardoshlilikni shakllantirish vaqt, mashq va o'z-o'zini anglashni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Treating people in a cruel, violent, or harmful way, either physically or with words.
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarga jismoniy yoki so'z bilan zarar yetkazadigan, haqorat qiladigan yoki shafqatsiz munosabatda bo'ladigan — bu xulq-atvor qabul qilib bo'lmaydi.
words.example1: He left the job because his manager was abusive and disrespectful.
words.example1Translation: U menejer haqoratli va hurmatsiz bo'lganligi sababli ishdan ketdi.
words.example2: Abusive language in the workplace is never acceptable.
words.example2Translation: Ish joyida haqoratli til ishlatish hech qachon qabul qilinmaydi.
words.example3: She finally reported the abusive behavior to the school principal.
words.example3Translation: U nihoyat tahqirlovchi xulq-atvor haqida maktab direktoriga xabar berdi.
extraExamples: Abusive relationships can cause long-term damage to a person's confidence.
The online platform banned users who posted abusive comments.
He grew up in an abusive household, which affected his mental health.
No one should stay in an abusive situation out of fear or obligation.
Abusive behavior often escalates over time if it is not stopped.
The coach was fired for using abusive language toward the players.
Victims of abusive relationships often blame themselves, which is not their fault.
extraExampleTranslations: Tahqirlovchi munosabatlar insoning ishonchiga uzoq muddatli zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Onlayn platforma haqoratli izohlar qoldirgan foydalanuvchilarni taqiqladi.
U haqoratli oilada o'sdi va bu uning ruhiy salomatligiga ta'sir qildi.
Hech kim qo'rquv yoki majburiyat tufayli tahqirlovchi vaziyatda qolmasligi kerak.
To'xtatilmasa, tahqirlovchi xulq-atvor vaqt o'tishi bilan kuchayib boradi.
Murabbiy o'yinchilarga haqoratli til ishlatgani uchun ishdan bo'shatildi.
Tahqirlovchi munosabat qurbonlari ko'pincha o'zlarini aybdor his qiladi, ammo bu ularning aybi emas.

words.definition: Thinking only about yourself and your own needs, without caring much about others.
words.definitionUz: Faqat o'z manfaatini o'ylaydigan va boshqalarning ehtiyojlarini kam hisobga oladigan odam — u doim birinchi o'zini qo'yadi.
words.example1: His egoistic attitude made it hard for others to work with him.
words.example1Translation: Uning xudbin munosabati boshqalar uchun u bilan ishlashni qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example2: She made every decision in an egoistic way without asking the team.
words.example2Translation: U jamoani so'ramasdan har bir qarorni o'z manfaatini ko'zlab qabul qildi.
words.example3: Egoistic people often struggle to build lasting friendships.
words.example3Translation: Xudbin odamlar ko'pincha uzoq davom etuvchi do'stlik o'rnatishda qiynaladilar.
extraExamples: His egoistic behavior pushed away the people who genuinely cared about him.
Egoistic leaders rarely earn the true respect of their team.
She was so egoistic that she never acknowledged anyone else's hard work.
An egoistic mindset can stop you from growing as a person.
He made an egoistic choice that hurt everyone around him.
People often confuse being confident with being egoistic.
Over time, his egoistic habits damaged his reputation at work.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning xudbin xulq-atvori uni haqiqatan qayg'urgan odamlarni uzoqlashtirdi.
Xudbin rahbarlar kamdan-kam hollarda jamoasining chin hurmatini qozonadi.
U shunday xudbin ediki, hech qachon boshqa birovning mehnatini tan olmadi.
Xudbin fikrlash tarzi sizning shaxs sifatida o'sishingizga to'siq bo'lishi mumkin.
U o'zini atrofidagi barcha odamlarni inchintiradigan xudbin qaror qabul qildi.
Odamlar ko'pincha o'ziga ishonchni xudbin bo'lish bilan aralashtiradilar.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan uning xudbin odatlari ishidagi obro'siga zarar yetkazdi.

words.definition: A person who expresses judgments or disapproval about something, or someone whose job is to evaluate art, film, books, or performances.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki odamni baholaydigan va kamchiliklarini ko'rsatadigan kishi — ba'zan bu kasb bo'ladi, ba'zan esa shunchaki doim qarshi chiqadigan odam.
words.example1: The film critic gave the movie only two stars out of five.
words.example1Translation: Film tanqidchisi filmga besh yulduzdan atigi ikkitasini berdi.
words.example2: She is her own biggest critic and always finds faults in her work.
words.example2Translation: U o'zining eng qattiq tanqidchisi bo'lib, har doim ishida kamchilik topadi.
words.example3: The new restaurant received mixed reviews from local food critics.
words.example3Translation: Yangi restoran mahalliy oziq-ovqat tanqidchilaridan turli xil baholar oldi.
extraExamples: He was a vocal critic of the government's education policy.
Good critics provide feedback that helps artists improve.
The book received praise from critics but was ignored by the public.
Being a critic does not mean you are always right.
She became a well-known fashion critic after years of writing for magazines.
His harshest critic turned out to be his former business partner.
A constructive critic points out problems and also suggests solutions.
extraExampleTranslations: U hukumatning ta'lim siyosatining ochiq tanqidchisi edi.
Yaxshi tanqidchilar san'atkorlarning rivojlanishiga yordam beradigan fikr-mulohazalar bildiradi.
Kitob tanqidchilardan maqtov oldi, lekin jamoatchilik tomonidan e'tiborga olinmadi.
Tanqidchi bo'lish har doim haq ekanligingiz degani emas.
U yillar davomida jurnallarda yozgandan so'ng mashhur moda tanqidchisiga aylandi.
Uning eng qattiq tanqidchisi sobiq biznes hamkori bo'lib chiqdi.
Quriluvchi tanqidchi muammolarni ko'rsatadi va shu bilan birga yechimlar ham taklif qiladi.

words.definition: Having a firm decision to do something and not letting anything stop you.
words.definitionUz: Maqsadiga erishishga qat'iy qaror qilgan va hech qanday to'siq uni to'xtatmaydigan odam — u shunchaki xohlaydi emas, balki qiladi.
words.example1: She was determined to finish the project before the deadline.
words.example1Translation: U muddatdan oldin loyihani tugatishga qat'iy belgilangan edi.
words.example2: Despite many failures, he remained determined to succeed.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p muvaffaqiyatsizliklarga qaramay, u muvaffaqiyatga erishishga qat'iy edi.
words.example3: Her determined face showed she was not going to give up.
words.example3Translation: Uning qat'iy yuz ifodasi u taslim bo'lmasligini ko'rsatib turardi.
extraExamples: He was determined to learn English, so he practiced every single day.
A determined athlete trains even when they do not feel like it.
She was determined to prove everyone wrong.
The determined young man walked hours every day just to get to school.
Being determined means pushing forward even when progress feels slow.
He entered the competition with a determined mindset and won first place.
Her determined effort eventually paid off when she got the promotion.
extraExampleTranslations: U ingliz tilini o'rganishga qat'iy edi va har kuni mashq qildi.
Qat'iyatli sportchi hatto mashq qilgisi kelmagan paytda ham mashg'ul bo'ladi.
U hamma noto'g'ri ekanligini isbotlashga qat'iy edi.
Qat'iyatli yosh yigit maktabga borish uchun har kuni soatlab piyoda yurdi.
Qat'iyatli bo'lish — rivojlanish sekin his qilinsa ham oldinga intilishni davom ettirishni anglatadi.
U musobaqaga qat'iy fikr bilan kirdi va birinchi o'rinni egalladi.
Uning qat'iyatli sa'y-harakatlari nihoyat lavozim oshirilganda o'z natijasini berdi.

words.definition: Having a natural ability to attract, charm, and inspire people through personality and presence.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarni o'z sehrli shaxsiyati bilan o'ziga jalb qiladigan va ulhanga ilhom beradigan — bunday odam xonaga kirganida hamma uni sezadi.
words.example1: The charismatic leader inspired thousands of people with his speeches.
words.example1Translation: Xarizmali rahbar o'z nutqlari bilan minglab odamlarga ilhom berdi.
words.example2: She is so charismatic that everyone wants to be around her.
words.example2Translation: U shunday xarizmali bo'lib, hamma uning atrofida bo'lishni xohlaydi.
words.example3: His charismatic personality helped him win the election easily.
words.example3Translation: Uning xarizmali shaxsiyati unga saylovda osongina g'alaba qozonishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Charismatic speakers hold the audience's attention from start to finish.
He was not the most experienced candidate, but he was the most charismatic.
Her charismatic presence made every event more lively and engaging.
Some of the most charismatic people are also the most humble.
A charismatic teacher can make even a boring subject feel exciting.
Charismatic leaders are often good at connecting with people on a personal level.
His charismatic style helped the brand grow faster than expected.
extraExampleTranslations: Xarizmali notiqlar tinglovchilarning e'tiborini boshidan oxirigacha ushlab turadi.
U eng tajribali nomzod emas edi, lekin eng xarizmali edi.
Uning xarizmali mavjudligi har bir tadbirni yanada jonli va qiziqarli qildi.
Eng xarizmali odamlarning ba'zilari ayni paytda eng kamtarlar hamdir.
Xarizmali o'qituvchi hatto zerikarli fanini ham qiziqarli his qildira oladi.
Xarizmali rahbarlar ko'pincha odamlar bilan shaxsiy darajada aloqa o'rnatishda yaxshi.
Uning xarizmali uslubi brendning kutilganidan tezroq o'sishiga yordam berdi.

words.definition: Feeling and showing care and concern for people who are suffering or in a difficult situation.
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarning og'riqlarini his qiladigan va ularga yordam berishni istovchi mehribon odam — u shunchaki achinmaydi, balki amaldagi yordam ham beradi.
words.example1: She is a compassionate nurse who always listens to her patients.
words.example1Translation: U har doim bemorlarini tinglaydi — shafqatli hamshira.
words.example2: A compassionate response is more effective than an angry one.
words.example2Translation: Hamdardona javob g'azab bilan berilgan javobdan ko'ra samaraliroq.
words.example3: He showed a compassionate side when he helped the homeless man find shelter.
words.example3Translation: U uysiz odamga boshpana topishda yordam berganda rahmdil tomonini ko'rsatdi.
extraExamples: Compassionate leaders create workplaces where employees feel valued.
She gave a compassionate speech about the struggles of working families.
Being compassionate does not mean ignoring your own needs.
A compassionate friend knows when to listen and when to give advice.
The compassionate teacher spent extra time with the student who was falling behind.
It takes strength to remain compassionate in difficult and stressful situations.
He built his entire career around compassionate care for elderly patients.
extraExampleTranslations: Rahmdil rahbarlar xodimlar o'zini qadrli his qiladigan ish muhitini yaratadi.
U ishlayotgan oilalarning qiyinchiliklari haqida hamdardona nutq so'zladi.
Shafqatli bo'lish o'z ehtiyojlaringizni e'tiborsiz qoldirish degani emas.
Hamdard do'st qachon tinglash va qachon maslahat berish kerakligini biladi.
Rahmdil o'qituvchi o'zlashtirishi past bo'lgan o'quvchi bilan qo'shimcha vaqt o'tkazdi.
Qiyin va stressli vaziyatlarda ham shafqatli bo'lib qolish kuch talab qiladi.
U butun karerasini keksa bemorlarga g'amxo'rlik asosida qurdi.

words.definition: to be discovered to be something after a period of uncertainty
words.definitionUz: biror narsa haqida oxirida kutilmagan yoki aniq natija ma'lum bo'lishi
words.example1: The movie turned out to be much better than I expected.
words.example1Translation: Film kutganimdan ancha yaxshi bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example2: He turned out to be the most reliable person on the team.
words.example2Translation: U jamoaning eng ishonchli odami bo'lib chiqdi.
words.example3: The problem turned out to be a simple settings error.
words.example3Translation: Muammo oddiy sozlama xatosi bo'lib chiqdi.
extraExamples: The shortcut turned out to be longer than the main road.
