She turned out to be the sister of my old classmate.
The job turned out to be completely different from the description.
What seemed like a bad decision turned out to be the right one.
The meeting turned out to be unnecessary after all.
He turned out to be far more experienced than his resume suggested.
The small investment turned out to be very profitable.
extraExampleTranslations: Qisqa yo'l asosiy yo'ldan uzunroq bo'lib chiqdi.
U mening eski sinfdoshimning singlisi bo'lib chiqdi.
Ish tavsifdan butunlay boshqacha bo'lib chiqdi.
Yomon qaror bo'lib ko'ringan narsa to'g'ri qaror bo'lib chiqdi.
Yig'ilish oxir-oqibat keraksiz bo'lib chiqdi.
U rezyumesida ko'rsatilganidan ancha tajribaliroq bo'lib chiqdi.
Kichik investitsiya juda foydali bo'lib chiqdi.

words.definition: to cause something to happen or exist
words.definitionUz: biror narsa yoki o'zgarishning yuz berishiga sabab bo'lmoq
words.example1: The new policy brought about significant changes in the company.
words.example1Translation: Yangi siyosat kompaniyada muhim o'zgarishlarni yuzaga keltirdi.
words.example2: Technology has brought about major shifts in how we communicate.
words.example2Translation: Texnologiya muloqot qilish usulimizda katta o'zgarishlarni yuzaga keltirdi.
words.example3: What factors brought about the sudden drop in sales?
words.example3Translation: Savdoning keskin pasayishiga qanday omillar sabab bo'ldi?
extraExamples: The protest brought about a change in the local transport rules.
His speech brought about a renewed interest in the topic.
The economic crisis brought about widespread unemployment.
Small daily habits can bring about big long-term results.
The merger brought about a complete restructuring of both teams.
What brought about her sudden decision to resign?
New research has brought about a better understanding of the disease.
extraExampleTranslations: Norozilik mahalliy transport qoidalarida o'zgarish yuzaga keltirdi.
Uning nutqi mavzuga yangi qiziqishni yuzaga keltirdi.
Iqtisodiy inqiroz keng tarqalgan ishsizlikka sabab bo'ldi.
Kichik kunlik odatlar uzoq muddatda katta natijalarga olib kelishi mumkin.
Birlashma ikkala jamoaning ham to'liq qayta tuzilishini yuzaga keltirdi.
Uning to'satdan iste'foga chiqish qarorini nima yuzaga keltirdi?
Yangi tadqiqot kasallikni yaxshiroq tushunishga sabab bo'ldi.

words.translation: yuzaga keltirmoq, kelib chiqishiga sabab bo'lmoq
words.definition: to cause something to develop or appear, especially something negative or complex
words.definitionUz: ko'pincha muammo yoki murakkab holat yuzaga kelishiga sabab bo'lmoq
words.example1: The rapid growth of the city gave rise to serious traffic problems.
words.example1Translation: Shaharning tez o'sishi jiddiy tirbandlik muammolarini yuzaga keltirdi.
words.example2: His comments gave rise to a heated debate online.
words.example2Translation: Uning izohlari onlineda qizg'in munozaraga sabab bo'ldi.
words.example3: The new study gave rise to several important questions.
words.example3Translation: Yangi tadqiqot bir qator muhim savollarni yuzaga keltirdi.
extraExamples: Inequality often gives rise to social unrest.
The discovery gave rise to an entirely new field of research.
Poor communication gave rise to misunderstandings between the departments.
The drought gave rise to food shortages across the region.
His success gave rise to a wave of similar startups.
The new law gave rise to widespread criticism from the public.
Overuse of antibiotics has given rise to resistant bacteria.
extraExampleTranslations: Tengsizlik ko'pincha ijtimoiy notinchlikka sabab bo'ladi.
Kashfiyot mutlaqo yangi tadqiqot sohasini yuzaga keltirdi.
Yomon muloqot bo'limlar o'rtasida noto'g'ri tushunishlarga sabab bo'ldi.
Qurg'oqchilik mintaqa bo'ylab oziq-ovqat tanqisligiga sabab bo'ldi.
Uning muvaffaqiyati shunga o'xshash startaplar to'lqinini yuzaga keltirdi.
Yangi qonun jamoatchilikning keng tanqidiga sabab bo'ldi.
Antibiotikni haddan ziyod qo'llash chidamli bakteriyalar paydo bo'lishiga sabab bo'ldi.

words.definition: to gradually stop using, producing, or allowing something over a period of time
words.definitionUz: biror narsa ishlatilishini yoki mavjudligini asta-sekin, bosqichma-bosqich tugatmoq
words.example1: The company plans to phase out plastic packaging by next year.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya kelgusi yilgacha plastik qadoqlashni bosqichma-bosqich tugatishni rejalashtirmoqda.
words.example2: Older software versions are being phased out and replaced with newer ones.
words.example2Translation: Dasturiy ta'minotning eski versiyalari bosqichma-bosqich yangilari bilan almashtirilmoqda.
words.example3: The government decided to phase out coal energy over the next decade.
words.example3Translation: Hukumat kelgusi o'n yil ichida ko'mir energiyasini bosqichma-bosqich tugatishga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: Many schools are phasing out printed textbooks in favour of digital ones.
The old payment system will be phased out by the end of the year.
They phased out the evening shift to reduce operating costs.
Several countries are phasing out petrol cars to cut emissions.
That product line was phased out after poor sales for three years.
The training programme is being phased out and replaced with online courses.
We need to phase out inefficient processes before scaling up.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab maktablar bosma darsliklarni raqamli kitoblar bilan bosqichma-bosqich almashtirib bormoqda.
Eski to'lov tizimi yil oxirigacha bosqichma-bosqich tugatiladi.
Operatsion xarajatlarni kamaytirish uchun kechki smenani bosqichma-bosqich bekor qilishdi.
Bir qancha davlatlar emissiyani kamaytirish uchun benzinli avtomobillarni bosqichma-bosqich chiqarib yubormoqda.
Bu mahsulot liniyasi uch yil davomida past savdo ko'rsatkichlari tufayli bosqichma-bosqich tugatildi.
O'quv dasturi bosqichma-bosqich tugatilmoqda va onlayn kurslar bilan almashtirilmoqda.
Kengayishdan oldin samarasiz jarayonlarni bosqichma-bosqich tugatishimiz kerak.

words.definition: to choose not to use or take advantage of an opportunity
words.definitionUz: yaxshi imkoniyat bo'lishiga qaramay undan foydalanmaslik yoki rad etish
words.example1: He passed up an opportunity to study abroad because of family reasons.
words.example1Translation: U oilaviy sabablarga ko'ra chet elda o'qish imkoniyatini qo'ldan boy berdi.
words.example2: I would never pass up an opportunity to learn something new.
words.example2Translation: Men hech qachon yangi narsa o'rganish imkoniyatini qo'ldan boy bermayman.
words.example3: She passed up a great job offer to stay close to her family.
words.example3Translation: U oilasiga yaqin bo'lish uchun ajoyib ish taklifini qo'ldan boy berdi.
extraExamples: Don't pass up this opportunity, it might not come again.
He passed up the chance to meet his favourite author at the event.
I passed up an opportunity to invest early and now I regret it.
She never passes up an opportunity to improve her skills.
They passed up a huge contract because the terms were unclear.
Passing up that scholarship was one of his biggest regrets.
I almost passed up the opportunity, but a friend encouraged me to apply.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu imkoniyatni qo'ldan boy bermang, u qaytib kelmasligi mumkin.
U tadbirda sevimli muallifi bilan uchrashish imkoniyatini qo'ldan boy berdi.
Erta sarmoya kiritish imkoniyatini qo'ldan boy berdim va endi afsuslanaman.
U mahoratini oshirish imkoniyatini hech qachon qo'ldan boy bermaydi.
Shartlar noaniq bo'lgani uchun ular katta shartnomani qo'ldan boy berishdi.
O'sha grantni qo'ldan boy berish uning eng katta afsuslaridan biriga aylandi.
Imkoniyatni deyarli o'tkazib yubordim, lekin do'stim ariza topshirishga undadi.

words.definition: to become popular or widely accepted, or to begin to understand something
words.definitionUz: biror narsa ko'pchilik orasida mashhur bo'lib ketishi yoki biror narsani tushunib yetmoq
words.example1: The new app caught on quickly among teenagers.
words.example1Translation: Yangi ilova o'smirlar orasida tezda ommalashib ketdi.
words.example2: It took a while for the trend to catch on in this region.
words.example2Translation: Bu mintaqada trend ommalashishi uchun biroz vaqt ketdi.
words.example3: I did not catch on to what he was trying to say at first.
words.example3Translation: Dastlab u nima demoqchi ekanligini tushunmadim.
extraExamples: Electric scooters have really caught on in big cities.
The idea was unusual at first, but it slowly caught on.
Online shopping caught on fast after the pandemic.
She eventually caught on that her colleague was joking.
The phrase caught on and people started using it everywhere.
It took two years for the product to catch on in the market.
He was slow to catch on, but once he did, he excelled.
extraExampleTranslations: Elektr skuterlar yirik shaharlarda chindan ham ommalashib ketdi.
G'oya dastlab g'ayrioddiy edi, lekin asta-sekin ommalashdi.
Pandemiyadan keyin onlayn xarid tezda ommalashdi.
U oxir-oqibat hamkasbi hazillayotganini tushundi.
Ibora ommalashib ketdi va odamlar uni hamma joyda ishlatib ketishdi.
Mahsulotning bozorda ommalashishi uchun ikki yil ketdi.
U tushunishga sekin edi, lekin bir marta tushungach, zo'r natijalarga erishdi.

words.definition: to suddenly become successful or popular very quickly
words.definitionUz: biror narsa yoki kishi to'satdan va tez sur'atda muvaffaqiyatga erishishi
words.example1: Her career really took off after the first album.
words.example1Translation: Uning karera birinchi albomdan keyin chindan ham rivojlanib ketdi.
words.example2: The business took off within the first six months of launching.
words.example2Translation: Biznes ishga tushirilganidan keyin birinchi olti oy ichida jadal rivojlandi.
words.example3: Sales took off as soon as they reduced the price.
words.example3Translation: Narxni kamaytirishi bilanoq savdo keskin oshdi.
extraExamples: The podcast took off after one episode went viral.
His YouTube channel took off when he started posting daily.
The startup really took off once they found the right investors.
Once word spread, the campaign took off overnight.
The product did not take off as expected in the first year.
Her blog took off after she changed her content style.
Things can take off quickly when the timing is right.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir epizod virusli tarqalgandan keyin podkast rivojlanib ketdi.
Uning YouTube kanali har kuni post qo'yishni boshlagandan so'ng rivojlandi.
Startup to'g'ri investorlarni topgandan keyin chindan ham jadal rivojlandi.
So'z tarqalishi bilanoq kampaniya bir kechada rivojlanib ketdi.
Mahsulot birinchi yilda kutilganidek rivojlanmadi.
Uning blogi kontent uslubini o'zgartirgandan keyin rivojlandi.
Vaqt to'g'ri kelganda narsalar tezda rivojlanib ketishi mumkin.

words.definition: to notice or become aware of something that is not obvious, such as a signal or feeling
words.definitionUz: boshqalar sezmaydigan yashirin belgi, his yoki ma'noni payqab qolmoq
words.example1: She picked up on the tension in the room as soon as she walked in.
words.example1Translation: U kirishi bilanoq xonadagi zo'riqishni sezib qoldi.
words.example2: Good listeners pick up on small changes in a person's tone.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi tinglaydiganlar odamning ohangidagi kichik o'zgarishlarni payqab oladi.
words.example3: He picked up on the fact that something was wrong before anyone said a word.
words.example3Translation: Hech kim bir og'iz gapirmasdan oldin u biror narsa noto'g'ri ekanligini sezdi.
extraExamples: Children often pick up on adult emotions without being told anything.
She picked up on a mistake in the report that everyone else missed.
I picked up on a slight hesitation in his voice during the call.
A skilled interviewer picks up on what candidates do not say.
He picked up on her sarcasm even though she was smiling.
Did you pick up on what the professor implied at the end of the lecture?
I picked up on the hint that they wanted us to leave.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar ko'pincha kattalar his-tuyg'ularini hech narsa aytilmasdan sezib olishadi.
U hamma o'tkazib yuborgan hisobotdagi xatoni payqab qoldi.
Suhbat davomida uning ovozidagi engil ikkilanishni sezib qoldim.
Malakali suhbatdosh nomzodlar aytmagan narsalarni ham payqab oladi.
U tabassum qilayotgan bo'lsa ham, u uning kinoyasini sezdi.
Ma'ruzaning oxirida professor nima demoqchi ekanligini sezdingizmi?
Ular ketishimizni xohlayotganlarining ishorasini sezib qoldim.

words.definition: to understand the hidden or implied meaning behind what someone says or writes
words.definitionUz: biror kishi aytgan yoki yozgan narsaning ochiqchasiga aytilmagan yashirin ma'nosini tushunmoq
words.example1: If you read between the lines, it is clear she is not happy with the decision.
words.example1Translation: Satrlar orasini o'qisangiz, u qarordan mamnun emasligini aniq tushunasiz.
words.example2: His message sounded polite, but reading between the lines, he was upset.
words.example2Translation: Uning xabari muloyim eshitildi, lekin satrlar orasini o'qisang, u xafa edi.
words.example3: You need to read between the lines to understand what the report is really saying.
words.example3Translation: Hisobot aslida nima demoqchi ekanligini tushunish uchun satrlar orasini o'qishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: Reading between the lines, I think he wants to leave the company.
Her reply was short, and reading between the lines, she was clearly annoyed.
In diplomacy, you always have to read between the lines.
The statement seemed positive, but if you read between the lines, it was a warning.
I had to read between the lines to understand what my manager really meant.
Good writers make readers read between the lines.
He said everything was fine, but I read between the lines and knew it was not.
extraExampleTranslations: Satrlar orasini o'qisam, u kompaniyadan ketmoqchi deb o'ylayman.
Uning javobi qisqa edi va satrlar orasini o'qisam, u aniq bezovta bo'lgan edi.
Diplomatiyada doim satrlar orasini o'qishingiz kerak.
Bayonot ijobiy ko'rindi, lekin satrlar orasini o'qisangiz, bu ogohlantirish edi.
Menejerim aslida nima demoqchi ekanligini tushunish uchun satrlar orasini o'qishga to'g'ri keldi.
Yaxshi yozuvchilar o'quvchilarni satrlar orasini o'qishga majbur qiladi.
U hamma narsa yaxshi dedi, lekin men satrlar orasini o'qidim va bunday emasligini bildim.

words.definition: to mention or deal with a subject briefly without going into detail
words.definitionUz: biror mavzuni chuqur ko'rib chiqmasdan, faqat qisqacha eslatib yoki aytib o'tmoq
words.example1: The speaker touched on several important issues during the talk.
words.example1Translation: Ma'ruzachi nutq davomida bir nechta muhim masalalarga qisqacha to'xtaldi.
words.example2: We only touched on that topic in the meeting, we will discuss it fully next time.
words.example2Translation: Biz yig'ilishda bu mavzuga faqat qisqacha to'xtaldik, keyingi safar to'liq muhokama qilamiz.
words.example3: The article touched on the effects of social media without going into detail.
words.example3Translation: Maqola ijtimoiy tarmoqlarning ta'sirini chuqurlashtirmasdan qisqacha eslatib o'tdi.
extraExamples: He touched on the budget issue but did not explain the full figures.
The documentary touches on climate change among several other topics.
She touched on her personal experience without sharing too much.
The report touches on areas that need further investigation.
During the interview, they touched on his early career briefly.
We touched on this idea in the last session, let's explore it more today.
The book touches on themes of identity and belonging.
extraExampleTranslations: U byudjet masalasini qisqacha eslatdi, lekin to'liq raqamlarni tushuntirmadi.
Hujjatli film boshqa bir qancha mavzular qatorida iqlim o'zgarishiga ham to'xtaldi.
U ko'p narsani baham ko'rmasdan shaxsiy tajribasini qisqacha eslatdi.
Hisobot qo'shimcha tekshirishni talab qiladigan sohalarga qisqacha to'xtaldi.
Suhbat davomida ular uning dastlabki faoliyatini qisqacha eslatishdi.
O'tgan sessiyada bu g'oyani qisqacha eslatgan edik, bugun ko'proq ko'rib chiqaylik.
Kitob o'zlik va mansublik mavzulariga qisqacha to'xtaldi.

words.definition: To believe something is true without having proof or checking first
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani tekshirmasdan yoki isbotlamasdan to'g'ri deb qabul qilish
words.example1: Don't make assumptions about how someone feels — just ask them directly.
words.example1Translation: Birovning his-tuyg'ulari haqida taxmin qilmang — shunchaki to'g'ridan-to'g'ri so'rang.
words.example2: He made assumptions about the project deadline and missed it completely.
words.example2Translation: U loyiha muddati haqida taxmin qildi va uni butunlay o'tkazib yubordi.
words.example3: Making assumptions in a new workplace can lead to serious misunderstandings.
words.example3Translation: Yangi ish joyida taxmin qilish jiddiy noto'g'ri tushunimlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She made assumptions about his intentions and got completely the wrong idea.
Never make assumptions about a customer's budget without asking first.
I made assumptions about the meeting time and showed up an hour late.
Making assumptions instead of asking questions wastes everyone's time.
He made assumptions about her background that turned out to be completely wrong.
Good managers never make assumptions — they verify everything.
We made assumptions about the market that cost us the entire deal.
extraExampleTranslations: U uning niyatlari haqida taxmin qildi va butunlay noto'g'ri tushundi.
Avval so'ramasdan mijozning byudjeti haqida hech qachon taxmin qilmang.
Men yig'ilish vaqti haqida taxmin qildim va bir soat kech keldim.
Savol o'rniga taxmin qilish hamma vaqtini behuda sarflaydi.
U uning kelib chiqishi haqida taxmin qildiki, bu butunlay noto'g'ri bo'lib chiqdi.
Yaxshi menejerlar hech qachon taxmin qilmaydi — hamma narsani tekshiradilar.
Biz bozor haqida taxmin qildik va bu butun bitimga tushdi.

words.definition: To accept a difficult or painful situation after a period of struggle
words.definitionUz: Qiyin yoki og'riqli vaziyatni bir muddat kurashgandan keyin qabul qilib, unga ko'nikish
words.example1: It took her years to come to terms with her father's death.
words.example1Translation: Unga otasining o'limini qabul qilish uchun yillar kerak bo'ldi.
words.example2: He still hasn't come to terms with losing his job after fifteen years.
words.example2Translation: U o'n besh yildan keyin ishini yo'qotganini hali ham qabul qilmagan.
words.example3: Coming to terms with failure is the first step toward real growth.
words.example3Translation: Muvaffaqiyatsizlikni qabul qilish haqiqiy o'sishga qarab qo'yilgan birinchi qadam.
extraExamples: She is slowly coming to terms with the fact that the relationship is over.
He found it hard to come to terms with his diagnosis at first.
You need to come to terms with the fact that not everything goes as planned.
Coming to terms with change is a skill that takes time to develop.
After months of grief, she finally came to terms with moving on.
He came to terms with his limitations and focused on his strengths instead.
The team had to come to terms with the project being cancelled.
extraExampleTranslations: U asta-sekin munosabat tugaganini qabul qilib bormoqda.
Dastlab u o'z tashxisini qabul qilishni qiyin deb topdi.
Hamma narsa rejalashtirilganidek ketmasligini qabul qilishingiz kerak.
O'zgarishlarni qabul qilish rivojlanishi vaqt talab qiladigan ko'nikmа.
Oylar davom etgan qayg'udan so'ng u nihoyat davom etishni qabul qildi.
U o'z cheklovlarini qabul qildi va buning o'rniga kuchli tomonlariga e'tibor qaratdi.
Jamoa loyiha bekor qilinganini qabul qilishga majbur bo'ldi.

words.definition: To officially or openly mention a worry or problem so others are aware of it
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqidagi tashvish yoki muammoni boshqalar bilsin deb ochiq aytib qo'yish
words.example1: Several employees raised concerns about the new working hours.
words.example1Translation: Bir nechta xodim yangi ish soatlari haqida tashvishlarini bildirdi.
words.example2: She raised concerns about the safety of the building during the inspection.
words.example2Translation: U tekshiruv davomida binoning xavfsizligi haqida tashvishini bildirdi.
words.example3: If you raise concerns early, problems can usually be fixed before they grow.
words.example3Translation: Agar tashvishlaringizni erta bildirsangiz, muammolar odatda kattalashmasdan oldin hal qilinishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The doctor raised concerns about the patient's rapid weight loss.
Parents raised concerns about the school's outdated equipment.
He raised concerns during the meeting but nobody took him seriously.
It's important to raise concerns in a calm and professional way.
The engineer raised concerns about the bridge's structure months before the accident.
Shareholders raised concerns about the company's falling profits.
She raised concerns privately before bringing them to the whole team.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor bemorning tez vazn yo'qotishi haqida tashvishini bildirdi.
Ota-onalar maktabning eskirgan jihozlari haqida tashvishlarini bildirdi.
U yig'ilishda tashvishini bildirdi, lekin hech kim uni jiddiy olmadi.
Tashvishlarni tinch va professional tarzda bildirish muhim.
Muhandis falokatdan oylar oldin ko'prikning tuzilishi haqida tashvishini bildirdi.
Aktsiyadorlar kompaniyaning tushib borayotgan foydasi haqida tashvishlarini bildirdi.
U ularni butun jamoaga keltirmasdan oldin maxfiy ravishda tashvishlarini bildirdi.

words.translation: loyiha boshlamoq, loyihani o'z zimmasiga olmoq
words.definition: To formally agree to start and be responsible for a project or task
words.definitionUz: Loyiha yoki vazifani boshlash va uning uchun mas'uliyatni o'z zimmasiga olish
words.example1: The company decided to undertake a major renovation project this year.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya bu yil yirik ta'mirlash loyihasini boshlashga qaror qildi.
words.example2: He undertook the project alone despite warnings that it was too complex.
words.example2Translation: U juda murakkab degan ogohlantirishlarga qaramay loyihani yolg'iz boshladi.
words.example3: Before you undertake a project, make sure you fully understand its scope.
words.example3Translation: Loyihani boshlamasdan oldin, uning ko'lamini to'liq tushunganingizga ishonch hosil qiling.
extraExamples: The university undertook a research project on urban air pollution.
We cannot undertake this project without the proper budget and resources.
She undertook a personal project to learn a new language in six months.
The government undertook several infrastructure projects after the earthquake.
Undertaking a project of this scale requires careful planning from day one.
He undertook the project with great confidence but underestimated the workload.
Our team is ready to undertake the project as soon as the contract is signed.
extraExampleTranslations: Universitet shahar havo ifloslanishi bo'yicha tadqiqot loyihasini boshladi.
Tegishli byudjet va resurslar bo'lmasa biz bu loyihani boshlay olmaymiz.
U olti oyda yangi til o'rganish uchun shaxsiy loyiha boshladi.
Hukumat zilziladan keyin bir nechta infratuzilma loyihalarini boshladi.
Bu ko'lamdagi loyihani boshlash birinchi kundan boshlab ehtiyotkorlik bilan rejalashtirish talab qiladi.
U loyihani katta ishonch bilan boshladi, lekin ish yukini past baholadi.
Jamoamiz shartnoma imzolangandan so'ng darhol loyihani boshlashga tayyor.

words.definition: To fail to keep up with a schedule, payment, or task that you are responsible for
words.definitionUz: Belgilangan jadval, to'lov yoki topshiriqdan orqada qolish, ulgurmay qolish
words.example1: He fell behind on his rent payments and was at risk of losing his apartment.
words.example1Translation: U ijara to'lovlaridan orqada qoldi va kvartiradan mahrum bo'lish xavfiga tushdi.
words.example2: She fell behind on her coursework after being sick for two weeks.
words.example2Translation: U ikki hafta kasal bo'lgandan keyin dars ishlaridan orqada qoldi.
words.example3: If you fall behind on the project timeline, inform your manager immediately.
words.example3Translation: Agar loyiha jadvalidan orqada qolsangiz, darhol menejeringizni xabardor qiling.
extraExamples: The team fell behind on deliverables after losing two key members.
Don't fall behind on your reading or you'll struggle before the exam.
He fell behind on work emails during his vacation and spent days catching up.
Falling behind on deadlines repeatedly will damage your professional reputation.
She fell behind on her fitness goals after starting her new job.
They fell behind on the construction schedule due to bad weather.
Once you fall behind on savings, it's hard to get back on track.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa ikkita asosiy a'zosini yo'qotgandan keyin topshiriqlardan orqada qoldi.
O'qishdan orqada qolmang aks holda imtihon oldidan qiynalasiz.
U ta'til davomida ish xatlaridan orqada qoldi va ularni to'ldirishga kunlar sarfladi.
Muddatlardan qayta-qayta orqada qolish kasbiy obro'ingizga zarar yetkazadi.
U yangi ishni boshlagandan keyin jismoniy maqsadlaridan orqada qoldi.
Ular yomon ob-havo tufayli qurilish jadvalidan orqada qoldi.
Jamg'armadan orqada qolganingizdan so'ng, yo'lga qaytish qiyin.

words.definition: To face a problem or failure that delays or reduces your progress
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyat yo'lida oldinga siljishni to'xtatadigan yoki kamaytaradigan muammo yoki muvaffaqiyatsizlikka duch kelish
words.example1: The startup experienced a major setback when its main investor pulled out.
words.example1Translation: Startap asosiy investori chiqib ketganda katta to'siqqa duch keldi.
words.example2: Every successful person has experienced setbacks before reaching their goals.
words.example2Translation: Har bir muvaffaqiyatli odam o'z maqsadlariga erishishdan oldin to'siqlarga duch kelgan.
words.example3: The team experienced a setback when the prototype failed during testing.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa prototip sinov davomida ishlamay qolganda to'siqqa duch keldi.
extraExamples: She experienced a serious setback in her recovery after a second injury.
Don't let one setback convince you to give up on the whole plan.
The project experienced a setback due to supply chain delays.
He experienced a financial setback after his business partner disappeared.
Experiencing a setback early on taught them to plan more carefully.
Even after experiencing a setback, she kept moving forward with confidence.
The research team experienced a setback when the lab equipment broke down.
extraExampleTranslations: U ikkinchi jarohatdan keyin tuzalishida jiddiy to'siqqa duch keldi.
Bitta to'siq butun rejadan voz kechishga ishontirmasin.
Loyiha ta'minot zanjiri kechikishlari tufayli to'siqqa duch keldi.
Biznes hamkori yo'qolib ketgandan keyin u moliyaviy to'siqqa duch keldi.
Erta to'siqqa duch kelish ularni ehtiyotkorlik bilan rejalashtirish zarurligini o'rgatdi.
To'siqqa duch kelganidan keyin ham u ishonch bilan oldinga harakat qildi.
Laboratoriya uskunalari ishdan chiqqanda tadqiqot guruhi to'siqqa duch keldi.

words.definition: To represent a danger or risk to someone or something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki birovga xavf yoki tahdid manbai bo'lish
words.example1: The new competitor poses a serious threat to our market share.
words.example1Translation: Yangi raqib bizning bozor ulushimizga jiddiy xavf tug'dirmoqda.
words.example2: Climate change poses a threat to millions of species around the world.
words.example2Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi dunyo bo'ylab millionlab turlarga xavf tug'dirmoqda.
words.example3: Misinformation online poses a growing threat to public trust.
words.example3Translation: Onlaynda tarqalgan noto'g'ri ma'lumot jamoatchilik ishonchiga ortib borayotgan xavf tug'dirmoqda.
extraExamples: The virus was found to pose a significant threat to elderly populations.
Automation poses a threat to millions of low-skill jobs worldwide.
The hacker group poses a serious threat to national security.
Rising sea levels pose a direct threat to coastal cities.
Does artificial intelligence pose a threat to human creativity?
The leaked data poses a threat to the privacy of thousands of users.
A lack of sleep poses a long-term threat to your physical and mental health.
extraExampleTranslations: Virus keksa aholiga sezilarli xavf tug'dirishi aniqlandi.
Avtomatlashtirish dunyo bo'ylab millionlab malakasiz ish o'rinlariga xavf tug'dirmoqda.
Xaker guruhi milliy xavfsizlikka jiddiy xavf tug'dirmoqda.
Ko'tarilayotgan dengiz sathi qirg'oq shaharlariga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri xavf tug'dirmoqda.
Sun'iy intellekt insonning ijodiy qobiliyatiga xavf tug'diradimi?
Sizib chiqqan ma'lumotlar minglab foydalanuvchilarning maxfiyligiga xavf tug'dirmoqda.
Uyqu yetishmasligi jismoniy va ruhiy sog'lig'ingizga uzoq muddatli xavf tug'diradi.

words.translation: muammoning asosiy sababini topmoq, ildizini aniqlash
words.definition: To identify the original or deepest reason a problem exists, not just the visible symptoms
words.definitionUz: Muammoning ko'rinadigan belgilarini emas, balki uning eng chuqur va asosiy sababini topish
words.example1: The engineer worked all night to find the root cause of the system failure.
words.example1Translation: Muhandis tizim nosozligining asosiy sababini topish uchun butun kechani ishlab chiqdi.
words.example2: Treating symptoms without finding the root cause is a waste of time and money.
words.example2Translation: Asosiy sababni topmasdan belgilarni davolash vaqt va pulning behuda sarfi.
words.example3: The HR team held interviews to find the root cause of high staff turnover.
words.example3Translation: HR jamoasi yuqori xodim almashinuvining asosiy sababini topish uchun suhbatlar o'tkazdi.
extraExamples: Finding the root cause of customer complaints improved the product significantly.
They spent weeks trying to find the root cause of the data breach.
A good doctor always tries to find the root cause, not just treat the pain.
We need to find the root cause before we can build a permanent solution.
Finding the root cause of the conflict helped the team move past it.
The investigation was launched to find the root cause of the factory explosion.
Until you find the root cause, the same problem will keep coming back.
extraExampleTranslations: Mijoz shikoyatlarining asosiy sababini topish mahsulotni sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.
Ular ma'lumotlar buzilishining asosiy sababini topish uchun haftalar sarfladi.
Yaxshi shifokor har doim asosiy sababni topishga harakat qiladi, og'riqni davolamasdan.
Doimiy yechim qura olishimiz uchun asosiy sababni topishimiz kerak.
Ziddiyatning asosiy sababini topish jamoaga undan o'tishga yordam berdi.
Zavod portlashining asosiy sababini topish uchun tergov boshlandi.
Asosiy sababni topmaguncha, xuddi shu muammo qayta-qayta qaytib keladi.

words.translation: strategiyani qo'llay boshlamoq, yondashuvni qabul qilmoq
words.definition: To choose and begin using a particular plan or method to achieve a goal
words.definitionUz: Maqsadga erishish uchun aniq bir reja yoki usulni tanlash va undan foydalanishni boshlash
words.example1: The company adopted a new strategy to attract younger customers.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya yosh mijozlarni jalb qilish uchun yangi strategiya qo'llashni boshladi.
words.example2: After several failures, the team adopted a more cautious strategy.
words.example2Translation: Bir necha muvaffaqiyatsizliklardan so'ng, jamoa ehtiyotkorroq strategiyani qo'llashni boshladi.
words.example3: Governments must adopt long-term strategies to deal with climate change.
words.example3Translation: Hukumatlar iqlim o'zgarishi bilan kurashish uchun uzoq muddatli strategiyalarni qo'llashlari kerak.
extraExamples: The coach adopted a defensive strategy after they scored the first goal.
She adopted a strategy of waking up early to get more work done.
Businesses that adopted digital strategies early gained a huge advantage.
The school adopted a new strategy to reduce student dropout rates.
He adopted a strategy of saving twenty percent of every paycheck.
They adopted a customer-first strategy that completely transformed their brand.
Adopting the right strategy at the right time can change everything.
extraExampleTranslations: Murabbiy birinchi gol urganidan keyin mudofaa strategiyasini qo'llashni boshladi.
U ko'proq ish bajarish uchun erta turish strategiyasini qo'llashni boshladi.
Raqamli strategiyalarni erta qo'llagan korxonalar katta ustunlikka ega bo'ldi.
Maktab o'quvchilarning maktabni tark etish darajasini kamaytirish uchun yangi strategiya qo'llashni boshladi.
U har bir ish haqining yigirma foizini tejash strategiyasini qo'llashni boshladi.
Ular brendlarini butunlay o'zgartirgan mijoz-birinchi strategiyasini qo'lladilar.
To'g'ri vaqtda to'g'ri strategiyani qo'llash hamma narsani o'zgartirishi mumkin.

words.translation: foydalanish imkoniga ega bo'lmoq, kirish huquqiga ega bo'lmoq
words.definition: To be able to use, enter, or obtain something when you need it
words.definitionUz: Biror narsadan foydalanish, unga kirish yoki uni olish imkoniyatiga ega bo'lish
words.example1: Not everyone has access to quality healthcare in rural areas.
words.example1Translation: Qishloq hududlarida hamma ham sifatli tibbiy yordamdan foydalanish imkoniga ega emas.
words.example2: Employees have access to the internal database through a secure login.
words.example2Translation: Xodimlar xavfsiz kirish orqali ichki ma'lumotlar bazasiga kirish imkoniga ega.
words.example3: Having access to good mentors early in your career can change your trajectory.
words.example3Translation: Martabangizning boshida yaxshi murabbiylardan foydalanish imkoniga ega bo'lish yo'nalishingizni o'zgartirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Students who have access to the internet perform better in school.
She doesn't have access to her account because she forgot her password.
The new office building gives employees access to a gym and cafeteria.
Having access to capital is one of the biggest advantages in business.
Children in poverty often don't have access to proper nutrition or education.
The app gives you access to thousands of books for a small monthly fee.
He gained access to the restricted files after getting a security clearance.
extraExampleTranslations: Internetdan foydalanish imkoniga ega bo'lgan o'quvchilar maktabda yaxshiroq o'qiydi.
U parolini unutgani uchun hisobiga kirish imkoniga ega emas.
Yangi ofis binosi xodimlarga sport zali va kafeteriadan foydalanish imkonini beradi.
Kapitaldan foydalanish imkoniga ega bo'lish biznesdagi eng katta ustunliklardan biri.
Qashshoqlikdagi bolalar ko'pincha to'g'ri ovqatlanish yoki ta'limdan foydalanish imkoniga ega emas.
Ilova sizga oylik kichik to'lov evaziga minglab kitoblardan foydalanish imkonini beradi.
U xavfsizlik ruxsatnomasi olgandan keyin cheklangan fayllarga kirish imkoniga ega bo'ldi.

words.definition: The act of watching and directing someone or something to ensure things are done correctly
words.definitionUz: Biror ish to'g'ri bajarilishini ta'minlash uchun kuzatib borish va yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatish
words.example1: Children should not use power tools without adult supervision.
words.example1Translation: Bolalar kattalar nazoratisiz elektr asboblaridan foydalanmasligi kerak.
words.example2: The project was completed under the supervision of a senior engineer.
words.example2Translation: Loyiha tajribali muhandis nazorati ostida yakunlandi.
words.example3: New employees work under close supervision during their first month.
words.example3Translation: Yangi xodimlar birinchi oy davomida yaqin nazorat ostida ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The lab requires supervision at all times for safety reasons.
She completed her thesis under the supervision of a professor.
Supervision of the construction site was assigned to the team leader.
Without proper supervision, mistakes are more likely to happen.
The students conducted the experiment under teacher supervision.
He was released from prison under supervision.
Remote supervision has become common with online teams.
extraExampleTranslations: Xavfsizlik sabablari uchun laboratoriya doim nazorat ostida bo'lishi kerak.
U dissertatsiyasini professor nazorati ostida yakunladi.
Qurilish maydonini nazorat qilish jamoaboshiga topshirildi.
Tegishli nazorat bo'lmasa, xatolar ko'proq sodir bo'lishi ehtimoli bor.
Talabalar tajribani o'qituvchi nazorati ostida o'tkazdilar.
U nazorat ostida qamoqdan ozod qilindi.
Masofaviy nazorat onlayn jamoalarda keng tarqalib ketdi.

words.definition: The ability to act independently and make decisions without being told, or a new plan aimed at solving a problem
words.definitionUz: Buyruqsiz o'z-o'zicha harakat qilish qobiliyati, yoki muammoni hal qilishga qaratilgan yangi reja
words.example1: She took the initiative to organize the team meeting herself.
words.example1Translation: U jamoaviy yig'ilishni o'zi tashkil qilish tashabbusini ko'rsatdi.
words.example2: The government launched a new initiative to reduce unemployment.
words.example2Translation: Hukumat ishsizlikni kamaytirish uchun yangi dastur ishga tushirdi.
words.example3: Employers value workers who show initiative.
words.example3Translation: Ish beruvchilar tashabbus ko'rsatadigan xodimlarni qadrlaydi.
extraExamples: The school introduced a reading initiative for younger students.
He took the initiative to fix the problem before anyone noticed.
A new health initiative was launched across the country.
You need to show more initiative if you want to move up.
The initiative aims to improve access to clean water.
She led a community initiative to clean up the local park.
Taking initiative at work can lead to faster career growth.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab kichik o'quvchilar uchun kitob o'qish dasturini joriy qildi.
U hech kim sezmasdan oldin muammoni hal qilish tashabbusini ko'rsatdi.
Butun mamlakat bo'ylab yangi sog'liqni saqlash dasturi ishga tushirildi.
Ko'tarilmoqchi bo'lsangiz, ko'proq tashabbus ko'rsatishingiz kerak.
Dastur toza suvdan foydalanishni yaxshilashga qaratilgan.
U mahalliy parkni tozalash bo'yicha jamoat tashabbusiga rahbarlik qildi.
Ishda tashabbus ko'rsatish martaba o'sishini tezlashtirishi mumkin.

words.definition: One of two or more available options or choices
words.definitionUz: Bir nechta mavjud variantlardan biri — asosiy yo'l bo'lmasa, boshqa yo'l yoki usul
words.example1: If the road is blocked, we need to find an alternative route.
words.example1Translation: Yo'l yopilgan bo'lsa, boshqa yo'l topishimiz kerak.
words.example2: There is no alternative — we have to finish it today.
words.example2Translation: Boshqa variant yo'q — buni bugun tugatishimiz kerak.
words.example3: Cycling is a healthy alternative to driving short distances.
words.example3Translation: Qisqa masofalar uchun velosipedda yurish mashinada haydashga sog'lom alternativa.
extraExamples: We considered several alternatives before making the final decision.
Solar energy is a clean alternative to fossil fuels.
Do you have an alternative plan in case this fails?
The doctor suggested an alternative treatment with fewer side effects.
Working from home is now a popular alternative to office work.
If the meeting room is busy, the cafeteria is a good alternative.
We had no alternative but to cancel the event.
extraExampleTranslations: Yakuniy qaror qabul qilishdan oldin bir nechta variantni ko'rib chiqdik.
Quyosh energiyasi yoqilg'i yonadigan energiyaga toza alternativa.
Bu muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lsa, muqobil rejangiz bormi?
Shifokor kamroq yon ta'sirga ega muqobil davolashni taklif qildi.
Uydan ishlash endi ofis ishiga ommabop alternativaga aylandi.
Yig'ilish xonasi band bo'lsa, kafe yaxshi tanlov.
Tadbirni bekor qilishdan boshqa variantimiz yo'q edi.

words.definition: Something that is considered more important than other things and needs attention first
words.definitionUz: Boshqa narsalardan muhimroq deb hisoblanadigan va birinchi navbatda e'tibor berilishi kerak bo'lgan narsa
words.example1: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
words.example1Translation: Mijozlar mamnuniyati bizning asosiy ustuvorligimiz.
words.example2: You need to set your priorities before starting the week.
words.example2Translation: Haftani boshlashdan oldin ustuvorliklaringizni belgilashingiz kerak.
words.example3: Health should always be a priority, not an afterthought.
words.example3Translation: Sog'liq har doim ustuvorlik bo'lishi kerak, keyinchalik o'ylash emas.
extraExamples: Finishing the report is the priority right now.
The manager listed safety as the number one priority.
Her family is her top priority, no matter what.
We had to change our priorities when the budget was cut.
Education should be a national priority.
Time management helps you focus on what is actually a priority.
Make the urgent tasks your priority and delegate the rest.
extraExampleTranslations: Hozir hisobotni tugatish ustuvorlik.
Menejer xavfsizlikni birinchi o'rindagi ustuvorlik sifatida ko'rsatdi.
Oilasi, har qanday holatda ham, uning asosiy ustuvorligi.
Byudjet qisqartirilganda ustuvorliklarimizni o'zgartirishga to'g'ri keldi.
Ta'lim milliy ustuvorlik bo'lishi kerak.
Vaqtni boshqarish haqiqatda muhim narsaga e'tibor qaratishga yordam beradi.
Shoshilinch vazifalarni ustuvorlik qiling va qolganlarini topshiring.

words.definition: A fact, event, or situation that is observed to exist or happen, especially one that is remarkable or unusual
words.definitionUz: Kuzatilgan yoki sodir bo'lgan voqea yoki holat — ayniqsa e'tiborga sazovor yoki g'ayrioddiy bo'lgani
words.example1: The northern lights are a stunning natural phenomenon.
words.example1Translation: Shimoliy nurlar ajoyib tabiiy hodisa.
words.example2: Social media addiction is a growing phenomenon among teenagers.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlarga qaramlik o'smirlar orasida kuchayib borayotgan hodisa.
words.example3: Scientists are still trying to explain the phenomenon.
words.example3Translation: Olimlar bu hodisani tushuntirishga hali ham harakat qilmoqda.
extraExamples: The viral spread of the video was a modern phenomenon.
Sleep paralysis is a well-documented psychological phenomenon.
The economic boom was a short-lived phenomenon.
Climate change is not a local phenomenon — it affects the whole planet.
The flash mob was an interesting cultural phenomenon.
Researchers studied the phenomenon over a ten-year period.
The rise of remote work is a relatively new phenomenon.
extraExampleTranslations: Videoning virusli tarqalishi zamonaviy hodisa edi.
Uyqu falaji yaxshi hujjatlashtirilgan psixologik hodisa.
Iqtisodiy o'sish qisqa muddatli hodisa bo'ldi.
Iqlim o'zgarishi mahalliy hodisa emas — u butun sayyoraga ta'sir qiladi.
Flash mob qiziqarli madaniy hodisa edi.
Tadqiqotchilar hodisani o'n yil davomida o'rgandilar.
Masofaviy ishning ko'payishi nisbatan yangi hodisa.

words.definition: A limitation or restriction that controls or limits what can be done
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani bajarishni cheklaydigan yoki nazorat qiladigan qoida, chegara yoki holat
words.example1: Budget constraints prevented us from hiring more staff.
words.example1Translation: Byudjet cheklovlari ko'proq xodim yollashimizga to'sqinlik qildi.
words.example2: Time is the biggest constraint in this project.
words.example2Translation: Ushbu loyihada vaqt eng katta cheklov.
words.example3: The designers worked within strict constraints to meet the deadline.
words.example3Translation: Dizaynerlar muddatni bajarish uchun qat'iy cheklovlar doirasida ishladilar.
extraExamples: Legal constraints limit what data companies can collect.
Working under constraints often forces creative solutions.
Space constraints made it difficult to add more furniture.
The constraint of limited resources pushed the team to innovate.
There are no constraints on how you can structure your answer.
Physical constraints stopped him from continuing the sport.
The app was built under significant technical constraints.
extraExampleTranslations: Huquqiy cheklovlar kompaniyalar to'plashi mumkin bo'lgan ma'lumotlarni cheklaydi.
Cheklovlar ostida ishlash ko'pincha ijodiy yechimlarni majburan topishga undaydi.
Joy cheklovi ko'proq mebel qo'yishni qiyinlashtirdi.
Cheklangan resurslar cheklovi jamoani innovatsiya qilishga undadi.
Javobingizni qanday tuzilmasiga cheklov yo'q.
Jismoniy cheklovlar uni sportni davom ettirishdan to'xtatdi.
Ilova sezilarli texnik cheklovlar ostida qurildi.

words.definition: An unintended consequence or negative effect of an action or event, often felt later
words.definitionUz: Biror harakat yoki voqeaning ko'pincha keyinroq seziluvchi kutilmagan va ko'pincha salbiy oqibati
words.example1: His reckless decision had serious repercussions for the whole team.
words.example1Translation: Uning beparvo qarori butun jamoa uchun og'ir oqibatlarga olib keldi.
words.example2: The scandal had political repercussions that lasted for years.
words.example2Translation: Janjal yillar davom etgan siyosiy oqibatlarga sabab bo'ldi.
words.example3: They didn't consider the repercussions of releasing data too early.
words.example3Translation: Ular ma'lumotlarni juda erta chiqarishning oqibatlarini hisobga olmadilar.
extraExamples: Cutting the budget had major repercussions on service quality.
The policy change had repercussions across multiple departments.
He acted without thinking about the repercussions.
The repercussions of that mistake are still being felt today.
Every major decision carries potential repercussions.
The environmental repercussions of the spill were severe.
She feared the repercussions of speaking out against management.
extraExampleTranslations: Byudjetni qisqartirish xizmat sifatiga katta salbiy ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
Siyosat o'zgarishi bir nechta bo'limlarda oqibatlarga sabab bo'ldi.
U oqibatlarini o'ylamasdan harakat qildi.
O'sha xatoning oqibatlari bugun ham sezilmoqda.
Har bir muhim qaror potentsial oqibatlarni o'z ichiga oladi.
To'kilishning atrof-muhit uchun oqibatlari og'ir bo'ldi.
U rahbariyatga qarshi gapirish oqibatlaridan qo'rqdi.

words.definition: A possible effect or consequence of an action, or something suggested without being directly stated
words.definitionUz: Biror harakatning yashirin ma'nosi yoki keltirib chiqarishi mumkin bo'lgan oqibat — to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytilmagan narsa
words.example1: The implications of this research are significant for public health.
words.example1Translation: Bu tadqiqotning oqibatlari jamoat salomatligi uchun muhim ahamiyatga ega.
words.example2: I don't think he understood the full implications of his decision.
words.example2Translation: U qarorining barcha oqibatlarini to'liq tushunmagan deb o'ylayman.
words.example3: The implication of his silence was that he disagreed.
words.example3Translation: Uning jimligining ma'nosi shunda ediki, u rozi emasdi.
extraExamples: We need to consider the long-term implications of this strategy.
The implication of the new law is that prices will rise.
She raised questions about the ethical implications of the study.
There are serious financial implications to this choice.
The report outlines the implications for future policy.
His tone carried the implication that he was not satisfied.
They failed to see the broader implications of the change.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu strategiyaning uzoq muddatli oqibatlarini ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak.
Yangi qonunning ma'nosi shundaki, narxlar ko'tariladi.
U tadqiqotning axloqiy oqibatlari haqida savollar ko'tardi.
Bu tanlovning jiddiy moliyaviy oqibatlari bor.
Hisobot kelajakdagi siyosat uchun oqibatlarni bayon etadi.
Uning ohangida u mamnun emasligining ma'nosi yashiringan edi.
Ular o'zgarishning keng oqibatlarini ko'ra olmadilar.

words.definition: One part or feature of a situation, problem, or subject that can be considered separately
words.definitionUz: Biror masala, muammo yoki mavzuning alohida ko'rib chiqilishi mumkin bo'lgan bir tomoni yoki xususiyati
words.example1: The financial aspect of the project needs more attention.
words.example1Translation: Loyihaning moliyaviy jihatiga ko'proq e'tibor qaratish kerak.
words.example2: We need to consider every aspect of the plan before deciding.
words.example2Translation: Qaror qilishdan oldin rejaning har bir jihatini ko'rib chiqishimiz kerak.
words.example3: The most challenging aspect of the job is time management.
words.example3Translation: Ishning eng qiyin jihati vaqtni boshqarish.
extraExamples: What aspect of the topic would you like to explore first?
The social aspects of remote work are often overlooked.
Safety is the most critical aspect of this design.
He focused on the technical aspects and ignored the human side.
There are many aspects to learning a new language.
The legal aspect of the deal requires careful review.
She examined every aspect of the problem before proposing a solution.
extraExampleTranslations: Mavzuning qaysi jihatini birinchi o'rganmoqchisiz?
Masofaviy ishning ijtimoiy jihatlari ko'pincha e'tibordan chetda qoladi.
Xavfsizlik bu dizaynning eng muhim jihati.
U texnik jihatlarga e'tibor qaratdi va insoniy tomonni e'tiborsiz qoldirdi.
Yangi til o'rganishning ko'p jihatlari bor.
Bitimning huquqiy jihati ehtiyotkorlik bilan ko'rib chiqilishini talab qiladi.
U yechim taklif qilishdan oldin muammoning har bir jihatini o'rgandi.

words.definition: A basic structure or system of rules and ideas used as a foundation for building something or making decisions
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qurish yoki qaror qabul qilish uchun asos bo'lib xizmat qiladigan qoidalar va g'oyalar tizimi
words.example1: The company operates within a strict legal framework.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya qat'iy huquqiy tizim doirasida faoliyat yuritadi.
words.example2: We need a clear framework for evaluating employee performance.
words.example2Translation: Xodimlar faoliyatini baholash uchun aniq tizim kerak.
words.example3: The new curriculum is based on a skills-first framework.
words.example3Translation: Yangi o'quv dasturi ko'nikmalar birinchi tamoyiliga asoslangan tizimga asoslanadi.
extraExamples: The project team agreed on a shared framework for decision-making.
This framework helps break complex problems into smaller parts.
The government introduced a framework for data privacy protection.
Agile is a popular framework used in software development.
Without a clear framework, teams often work in different directions.
The ethical framework of the organization guides all major decisions.
They built the product within a modular framework for easy updates.
extraExampleTranslations: Loyiha jamoasi qaror qabul qilish uchun umumiy tizimga kelishdi.
Bu tizim murakkab muammolarni kichik qismlarga bo'lishga yordam beradi.
Hukumat ma'lumotlar maxfiyligini himoya qilish uchun tizim joriy etdi.
Agile dasturiy ta'minot ishlab chiqishda ishlatiladigan mashhur tizim.
Aniq tizim bo'lmasa, jamoalar ko'pincha turli yo'nalishlarda ishlaydi.
Tashkilotning axloqiy tizimi barcha muhim qarorlarga yo'l-yo'riq beradi.
Ular mahsulotni oson yangilash uchun modulli tizim doirasida qurishdi.

words.definition: a feeling of being calm and free from worry or anxiety
words.definitionUz: Xavotir yoki tashvishsiz tinch va osoyishta his qilish holati — ichki tinchlik
words.example1: Knowing my children are safe at school gives me complete peace of mind.
words.example1Translation: Bolalarim maktabda xavfsiz ekanini bilish menga to'liq xotirjamlik beradi.
words.example2: She bought travel insurance just for peace of mind during her trip abroad.
words.example2Translation: U chet elga sayohat paytida xotirjamlik uchun sayohat sug'urtasini sotib oldi.
words.example3: Having a stable job gives him the peace of mind he needs to focus on his family.
words.example3Translation: Barqaror ish unga oilasiga e'tibor qaratish uchun zarur xotirjamlikni beradi.
extraExamples: Regular health check-ups can give you peace of mind about your wellbeing.
Installing a home security system brought her real peace of mind.
Saving money each month gives families peace of mind during unexpected events.
Finishing your work early brings peace of mind for the rest of the day.
Knowing he had prepared well for the exam gave him peace of mind the night before.
Peace of mind is sometimes more valuable than earning extra money.
A clear conscience is the best source of peace of mind.
extraExampleTranslations: Muntazam sog'liq tekshiruvlari sog'lig'ingiz haqida xotirjamlik berishi mumkin.
Uy xavfsizlik tizimini o'rnatish unga haqiqiy xotirjamlik olib keldi.
Har oy pul tejash oilalarga kutilmagan hodisalarda xotirjamlik beradi.
Ishingizni erta tugatish kunning qolgan qismi uchun xotirjamlik olib keladi.
Imtihonga yaxshi tayyorlanganini bilish unga imtihon oldidan xotirjamlik berdi.
Xotirjamlik ba'zan qo'shimcha pul ishlashdan ko'ra qimmatroq.
Toza vijdon xotirjamlikning eng yaxshi manbaidir.

words.definition: the basic ability to make good judgments and behave sensibly in everyday situations
words.definitionUz: Kundalik hayotda to'g'ri qaror qabul qilish va aqlli harakat qilish qobiliyati — bu maktabda o'rgatiladigan narsa emas, balki hayotiy idrok
words.example1: It is just common sense to wear a seatbelt every time you get in a car.
words.example1Translation: Mashinaga o'tirganda har doim xavfsizlik kamarini taqqan — bu oddiy farosat.
words.example2: She used common sense to calm the situation before it got out of hand.
words.example2Translation: U vaziyat nazoratdan chiqib ketishidan oldin uni tinchitish uchun farosatidan foydalandi.
words.example3: You do not always need a rule for everything — sometimes common sense is enough.
words.example3Translation: Har bir narsa uchun har doim ham qoida kerak emas — ba'zan farosat yetarli.
extraExamples: Common sense tells you not to spend more money than you earn.
A little common sense in the kitchen can prevent most cooking accidents.
The new employee impressed the team with her practical common sense.
Common sense is often more useful in real life than academic knowledge.
Using common sense, he realized the shortcut would actually take longer.
Good parenting involves teaching children common sense alongside academic skills.
Common sense means knowing when to ask for help instead of struggling alone.
extraExampleTranslations: Farosat sizga topgandan ko'proq sarflamaslikni aytadi.
Oshxonada bir oz farosat ko'pgina oshpazlik baxtsizliklarining oldini olishi mumkin.
Yangi xodim o'zining amaliy farosati bilan jamoani hayratga qoldirdi.
Farosat ko'pincha haqiqiy hayotda akademik bilimdan foydali.
Farosatini ishlatib, u yorliq aslida uzoqroq vaqt olishini anglab yetdi.
Yaxshi ota-onalik farzandlarga akademik ko'nikmalar bilan birga farosatni ham o'rgatishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Farosat — yolg'iz kurashish o'rniga qachon yordam so'rash kerakligini bilish.

words.definition: enjoying having a good time and finding pleasure in activities that are entertaining or enjoyable
words.definitionUz: Yaxshi vaqt o'tkazishni yaxshi ko'radigan va hayotdan zavq oladigan — doim tetik va shod ruhli odam
words.example1: Her fun-loving personality made her popular at every social event she attended.
words.example1Translation: Uning xushchaqchaq tabiati uni qatnashgan har bir ijtimoiy tadbirda mashhur qildi.
words.example2: He is a fun-loving person who always knows how to make people laugh.
words.example2Translation: U odamlarni kuldirishni har doim biladigan xushchaqchaq inson.
words.example3: Despite being a serious doctor at work, she is incredibly fun-loving outside the office.
words.example3Translation: Ishda jiddiy shifokor bo'lishiga qaramay, u ofisdan tashqarida inanilmas darajada xushchaqchaq.
extraExamples: The children loved their fun-loving teacher who made every lesson enjoyable.
His fun-loving nature helped the team relax during stressful periods at work.
She described herself in the interview as fun-loving but also highly professional.
A fun-loving attitude can make difficult days much easier to get through.
Their fun-loving group of friends always found creative ways to spend weekends.
Being fun-loving does not mean you are not serious about your responsibilities.
He brought a fun-loving energy to the office that everyone appreciated.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar har bir darsni qiziqarli qilib qo'yadigan xushchaqchaq o'qituvchisini juda yaxshi ko'rishardi.
Uning xushchaqchaq tabiati jamoaga ishda qiyin davrlar mobaynida dam olishga yordam berdi.
U intervyuda o'zini xushchaqchaq, lekin yuqori darajada professionaldek tavsiflab berdi.
Xushchaqchaq munosabat qiyin kunlarni o'tkazishni ancha osonlashtirishi mumkin.
Ularning xushchaqchaq do'stlar guruhi dam olish kunlarini o'tkazishning ijodiy yo'llarini doim topardi.
Xushchaqchaq bo'lish majburiyatlaringizga jiddiy qaraganingiz yo'q degani emas.
U ofisga hamma qadrlagan xushchaqchaq energiya olib keldi.

words.definition: a person who understands and masters new skills or information faster than most people
words.definitionUz: Ko'pgina odamlarga qaraganda yangi ko'nikmalar yoki ma'lumotlarni tezroq tushunib yetadigan va o'zlashtiradigan odam
words.example1: She proved to be a quick learner and mastered the software in just two days.
words.example1Translation: U tez o'rganadigan ekanini isbotladi va dasturni atigi ikki kunda o'zlashtirdi.
words.example2: Employers value quick learners because they can adapt to new tools and processes fast.
words.example2Translation: Ish beruvchilar tez o'rganadigan odamlarni qadrlaydigan, chunki ular yangi vosita va jarayonlarga tez moslasha oladi.
words.example3: Being a quick learner helped him succeed in a rapidly changing industry.
words.example3Translation: Tez o'rganadigan bo'lishi unga tez o'zgarib borayotgan sohada muvaffaqiyat qozonishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: In the interview, he told the hiring manager that he is a quick learner with strong attention to detail.
Children are naturally quick learners when the material is presented in a fun way.
Being a quick learner means you spend less time struggling and more time producing results.
She is a quick learner who picked up Spanish in under six months.
The startup needed quick learners who could handle multiple roles at the same time.
Even as a quick learner, he still made sure to practice skills consistently.
Being a quick learner is one of the most valued traits in fast-growing companies.
extraExampleTranslations: Intervyuda u ishga qabul qilish menejeriga o'zi tafsilotlarga kuchli e'tibor bilan tez o'rganadigan ekanini aytdi.
Bolalar material qiziqarli tarzda taqdim etilganda tabiiy ravishda tez o'rganuvchilar hisoblanadi.
Tez o'rganadigan bo'lish kamroq kurashib, ko'proq natija berasiz degani.
U olti oydan kam vaqt ichida ispancha o'rgangan tez o'rganuvchi.
Startapga bir vaqtning o'zida bir nechta rolni uddalay oladigan tez o'rganuvchilar kerak edi.
Tez o'rganuvchi bo'lsa ham, u ko'nikmalarni izchil mashq qilishga e'tibor berardi.
Tez o'rganadigan bo'lish tez o'sib borayotgan kompaniyalarda eng qadrlanadigan xususiyatlardan biri.

words.definition: having an extremely kind, generous, and caring nature toward others
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarga nisbatan juda samimiy, saxiy va mehr-shafqatli tabiatga ega bo'lish — yuragida yomonlik bo'lmagan inson
words.example1: Despite growing up with very little, she remained golden-hearted and always helped those around her.
words.example1Translation: Juda kam narsada o'sishiga qaramay, u juda mehribon bo'lib qoldi va atrofidagilariga doim yordam berdi.
words.example2: Everyone in the village loved the golden-hearted old man who gave food to anyone in need.
words.example2Translation: Qishloqdagi hamma ehtiyojmandlarga ovqat beradigan juda mehribon cholni yaxshi ko'rardi.
words.example3: She is golden-hearted — she never says no to someone who genuinely needs help.
words.example3Translation: U juda mehribon — chin dildan yordamga muhtoj odamga hech qachon yo'q demaydi.
extraExamples: His golden-hearted nature made him the first person everyone called in a crisis.
The golden-hearted volunteer spent every weekend helping at the local shelter.
Being golden-hearted does not mean being weak — it takes real strength to be kind.
She raised golden-hearted children who genuinely cared about others.
The golden-hearted nurse always found time to comfort patients beyond her duties.
A golden-hearted person finds joy in giving without expecting anything in return.
His golden-hearted attitude inspired the whole community to do more for each other.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning juda mehribon tabiati uni inqiroz paytida hammaning birinchi chaqiradigan odamiga aylantirdi.
Juda mehribon ko'ngilli har dam olish kunini mahalliy boshpanaga yordam berishga sarflardi.
Juda mehribon bo'lish zaif bo'lish degani emas — mehribon bo'lish uchun haqiqiy kuch kerak.
U boshqalarni chin dildan e'zozlaydigan juda mehribon bolalar tarbiyaladi.
Juda mehribon hamshira doimo o'z vazifasidan tashqari bemorlarni tasalli berishga vaqt topardi.
Juda mehribon inson hech narsa kutmasdan berish orqali quvonch topadi.
Uning juda mehribon munosabati butun jamoatni bir-biriga ko'proq qilishga ilhomlantirdi.

words.definition: willing to consider new ideas, opinions, or ways of doing things without judgment
words.definitionUz: Yangi g'oyalar, fikrlar yoki harakat qilish usullarini tanqid qilmasdan ko'rib chiqishga tayyor bo'lish — boshqacha fikrlarni tinglashga ochiq
words.example1: Being open-minded allows you to learn from people who think differently than you.
words.example1Translation: Ochiq fikrli bo'lish sizdan boshqacha o'ylaydigan odamlardan o'rganishga imkon beradi.
words.example2: She is so open-minded that she genuinely listens to all sides before forming an opinion.
words.example2Translation: U shunchalik ochiq fikrliki, fikr shakllantirishdan oldin barcha tomonlarni chinakam eshitadi.
words.example3: Travelling to different countries makes you more open-minded about other cultures.
words.example3Translation: Turli mamlakatlarga sayohat qilish sizni boshqa madaniyatlar haqida ko'proq ochiq fikrli qiladi.
extraExamples: Good leaders are open-minded and welcome feedback from their teams.
Being open-minded does not mean agreeing with everything — it means listening fairly.
He changed his opinion after an open-minded conversation with someone he disagreed with.
Open-minded people tend to adapt more easily to change.
Teachers who are open-minded create better learning environments for their students.
An open-minded approach to problem-solving often leads to better solutions.
She raised her children to be open-minded about people from different backgrounds.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi rahbarlar ochiq fikrli va jamoalaridan fikr-mulohaza qabul qilishni xush ko'radi.
Ochiq fikrli bo'lish hamma narsaga rozi bo'lish degani emas — bu adolatli tinglaish demak.
U rozi bo'lmagan biri bilan ochiq fikrli suhbatdan so'ng o'z fikrini o'zgartirdi.
Ochiq fikrli odamlar o'zgarishlarga osonroq moslashadi.
Ochiq fikrli o'qituvchilar o'quvchilari uchun yaxshiroq o'rganish muhitini yaratadi.
Muammoni hal qilishga ochiq fikrli yondashuv ko'pincha yaxshiroq yechimlarga olib keladi.
U farzandlarini turli xil tarixga ega odamlar haqida ochiq fikrli bo'lishga tarbiyaladi.

words.definition: putting a lot of effort and energy into your work or tasks consistently
words.definitionUz: Ish yoki vazifalaringizga doimiy ravishda ko'p kuch va energiya sarflash — dangasa bo'lmasdan, mas'uliyat bilan ishlash
words.example1: She is one of the most hard-working employees the company has ever had.
words.example1Translation: U kompaniya tarixidagi eng mehnatkash xodimlardan biri.
words.example2: Hard-working students do not always have the most talent, but they get the best results.
words.example2Translation: Mehnatkash o'quvchilarning eng ko'p iste'dodi bo'lmasligi mumkin, lekin ular eng yaxshi natijalarni oladi.
words.example3: His hard-working attitude earned him a promotion within just one year.
words.example3Translation: Uning mehnatkash munosabati atigi bir yil ichida uni lavozimga ko'tarilishiga olib keldi.
extraExamples: Being hard-working is more valuable than waiting for the perfect opportunity.
Hard-working people often inspire those around them to do better.
She balanced two jobs and evening classes — truly one of the most hard-working people I know.
His parents were hard-working farmers who taught him the value of effort.
Even the most talented person needs to be hard-working to reach their potential.
Hard-working teams consistently outperform those that rely only on natural ability.
The hard-working intern impressed everyone and was offered a full-time position.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehnatkash bo'lish mukammal imkoniyatni kutishdan ko'ra qimmatroq.
Mehnatkash odamlar ko'pincha atrofidagilarni yaxshiroq qilishga ilhomlantiradi.
U ikki ish va kechki darslarni muvozanatda tutdi — men biladigan eng mehnatkash odamlardan biri.
Uning ota-onasi unga mehnat qiymatini o'rgatgan mehnatkash dehqonlar edi.
Hatto eng iste'dodli inson ham o'z salohiyatiga yetish uchun mehnatkash bo'lishi kerak.
Mehnatkash jamoalar faqat tabiiy qobiliyatiga tayanadigan jamoalardan doimiy ravishda ustun keladi.
Mehnatkash stajyor hamma tomoni bilan taassurot qoldirdi va to'liq vaqtli lavozim taklif qilindi.

words.definition: staying calm and thinking clearly in difficult or stressful situations without panicking
words.definitionUz: Qiyin yoki stressli vaziyatlarda vahima ko'tarmasdan tinch qolish va aniq fikrlay olish — bosiq va mulohazali odam
words.example1: Her level-headed response during the crisis stopped the situation from getting worse.
words.example1Translation: Uning inqiroz paytidagi sovuqqon munosabati vaziyatning yomonlashishini to'xtatdi.
words.example2: You need a level-headed person in charge when things go wrong under pressure.
words.example2Translation: Bosim ostida ishlar noto'g'ri ketganda mas'ul lavozimda boshini yo'qotmaydigan odam kerak.
words.example3: Despite receiving bad news, he remained level-headed and focused on finding a solution.
words.example3Translation: Yomon xabar olganimiga qaramay, u boshini yo'qotmadi va yechim topishga e'tibor qaratdi.
extraExamples: Level-headed managers make better decisions during company crises.
She stayed level-headed during the argument and avoided saying anything she would regret.
Being level-headed means your emotions do not control your actions.
The pilot remained level-headed throughout the emergency and landed the plane safely.
His level-headed advice helped the team avoid making a costly mistake.
Parents who are level-headed raise children who handle stress well.
A level-headed approach in negotiations leads to better outcomes for both sides.
extraExampleTranslations: Boshini yo'qotmaydigan menejerlar kompaniya inqirozlari paytida yaxshiroq qarorlar qabul qiladi.
U bahslashish paytida sovuqqon qoldi va afsuslanadigan hech narsa aytmaslikka harakat qildi.
Boshini yo'qotmaslik shuni anglatadiki, his-tuyg'ularingiz harakatlaringizni boshqarmaydi.
Pilot favqulodda holat davomida sovuqqon qoldi va samolyotni xavfsiz qo'ndirdi.
Uning sovuqqon maslahati jamoaga qimmatli xato qilishdan qochishga yordam berdi.
Boshini yo'qotmaydigan ota-onalar stressni yaxshi boshqaradigan bolalar tarbiyalaydi.
Muzokaralarda boshini yo'qotmaslik yondashuvi har ikki tomon uchun yaxshiroq natijalarga olib keladi.

words.definition: able to push yourself to work hard and achieve goals without needing encouragement from others
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarning rag'bati yoki bosimisiz o'z-o'zini ishga undab, maqsadlarga intila oladigan odam
words.example1: As a remote worker, you must be self-motivated to stay productive without supervision.
words.example1Translation: Masofadan ishlovchi sifatida, nazorat bo'lmasdan ham samarali bo'lish uchun o'zingizni rag'batlantirishingiz kerak.
words.example2: Self-motivated students do not wait for the teacher to push them — they take initiative.
words.example2Translation: O'zini rag'batlantiradigan o'quvchilar o'qituvchining undovini kutmaydi — ular tashabbusni o'zlari oladi.
words.example3: Her self-motivated nature helped her build a business while raising two young children.
words.example3Translation: Uning o'zini rag'batlantiruvchi tabiati ikki yosh bolani tarbiyalagan holda biznes qurushga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Employers look for self-motivated candidates who do not need constant direction.
Being self-motivated means you set your own goals and work toward them consistently.
He was so self-motivated that he finished the project a week before the deadline.
Self-motivated learners often outperform students who rely on external pressure.
Working from home requires being self-motivated more than any office environment.
She became self-motivated after realizing no one else would chase her dreams for her.
Self-motivated people tend to be more successful because they do not wait for permission.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish beruvchilar doimiy yo'nalishga muhtoj bo'lmagan o'zini rag'batlantiradigan nomzodlarni qidiradi.
O'zini rag'batlantirish shuni anglatadiki, siz o'z maqsadlaringizni belgilaysiz va ularga izchil intilasiz.
U shunchalik o'zini rag'batlantirarli ediki, loyihani muddatdan bir hafta oldin tugatdi.
O'zini rag'batlantiradigan o'rganuvchilar ko'pincha tashqi bosimga tayanadigan o'quvchilardan ustun keladi.
Uydan ishlash har qanday ofis muhitiga qaraganda ko'proq o'z-o'zini rag'batlantirishni talab qiladi.
U hech kim o'rniga uning orzularini quvib ketmasligini anglagandan keyin o'zini rag'batlantirishni boshladi.
O'zini rag'batlantiradigan odamlar ko'proq muvaffaqiyatli bo'ladi, chunki ular ruxsat kutishmaydi.

words.definition: sensible, practical, and not pretending to be more important or special than you actually are
words.definitionUz: Aqlli, amaliy va o'zini aslida bo'lgandan muhimroq yoki alohida ko'rsatishga urinmaydigan — oddiy va kamtarin
words.example1: Despite being a famous actor, he is completely down-to-earth and talks to everyone equally.
words.example1Translation: Mashhur aktyor bo'lishiga qaramay, u butunlay oddiy va hamma bilan teng gaplashadi.
words.example2: Her down-to-earth attitude made her easy to work with at every level of the company.
words.example2Translation: Uning oddiy munosabati uni kompaniyaning har qanday darajasida ishlash uchun qulay qildi.
words.example3: I appreciate how down-to-earth she is — she never makes you feel small or unimportant.
words.example3Translation: Uning qanchalik oddiy ekanligini qadrlayman — u sizni hech qachon kichik yoki ahamiyatsiz his qildirmaydi.
extraExamples: Despite her success, she remains down-to-earth and remembers where she came from.
The CEO surprised everyone by being so down-to-earth during the company lunch.
Down-to-earth people are easier to trust because they do not put on a show.
He gave down-to-earth advice that was actually useful rather than overly complicated.
Being down-to-earth does not mean lacking ambition — it means staying grounded.
Her down-to-earth personality helped her connect with customers from all backgrounds.
The most respected leaders are often the most down-to-earth ones.
extraExampleTranslations: Muvaffaqiyatiga qaramay, u oddiy bo'lib qolmoqda va qayerdan kelganini eslab yuradi.
Bosh ijrochi direktor kompaniya tushligida shunchalik oddiy bo'lgani hamma uchun hayrat bo'ldi.
Oddiy odamlarga ishonish osonroq, chunki ular ko'rsatma o'ynamaydi.
U amalda foydali bo'lgan oddiy maslahat berdi, ortiqcha murakkab emas.
Oddiy bo'lish ambitsiyasizlik degani emas — bu yerga bog'liq bo'lish demak.
Uning oddiy tabiati uni har xil tarixga ega mijozlar bilan muloqot qilishiga yordam berdi.
Eng hurmatli rahbarlar ko'pincha eng oddiy bo'ladi.

words.definition: To visit someone briefly and informally, often without a prior arrangement.
words.definitionUz: Oldindan kelishmasdan yoki qisqa vaqtga biror joyga yoki odamnikiga kirib o'tish.
words.example1: Can you drop by my house today?
words.example1Translation: Bugun uyimga kirib o'ta olasizmi?
words.example2: I'll drop by the office after lunch to pick up my documents.
words.example2Translation: Hujjatlarimni olish uchun tushlikdan keyin ofisga kirib o'taman.
words.example3: She dropped by without calling first, which surprised everyone.
words.example3Translation: U avval qo'ng'iroq qilmasdan kirib qoldi, bu hammani ajablantirdi.
extraExamples: Feel free to drop by whenever you're in the area.
My neighbor dropped by to return the book she had borrowed.
He dropped by the bakery on his way home.
I was just passing by, so I decided to drop by and say hello.
Can you drop by the pharmacy and get some medicine for me?
She dropped by her parents' house every Sunday morning.
The manager dropped by the meeting room to check on the team.
extraExampleTranslations: Atrofda bo'lsangiz, istalgan vaqt kirib o'ting.
Qo'shnim qarz olgan kitobini qaytarish uchun kirib o'tdi.
U uyga qaytayotganda nonvoyxonaga kirib o'tdi.
Men shunchaki yaqindan o'tayotgan edim, shuning uchun salom berib o'tishga qaror qildim.
Dorixonaga kirib, menga dori olib bera olasizmi?
U har yakshanba ertalab ota-onasining uyiga kirib o'tardi.
Menejer jamoani tekshirish uchun majlis xonasiga kirib o'tdi.

words.definition: To disappoint someone by failing to do what they expected or needed.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishining umidini puchga chiqarish yoki kutgandek qila olmaslik orqali uni xafa qilish.
words.example1: He let me down, unfortunately.
words.example1Translation: Afsuski, u mening umidimni puchga chiqardi.
words.example2: Please don't let me down this time.
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, bu safar umidimni qoldirma.
words.example3: The team felt let down when their manager didn't support them.
words.example3Translation: Menejer ularni qo'llamaganida jamoa ko'ngli qolgan his qildi.
extraExamples: I can't believe he let us down at such an important moment.
She worked hard so she wouldn't let her family down.
The product let customers down with its constant technical issues.
He felt deeply let down when his best friend didn't show up.
Don't let yourself down — you're capable of much more.
The new update let many users down because of its missing features.
She promised not to let her team down during the final presentation.
extraExampleTranslations: U shunday muhim lahzada bizni xafa qilganiga ishonolmayman.
U oilasining ko'nglini qoldirmaslik uchun qattiq ishladi.
Mahsulot doimiy texnik muammolari bilan mijozlarning ko'nglini qoldirdi.
Eng yaxshi do'sti kelmay qolganda u juda ko'ngli qoldi.
O'zingizni xafa qilmang, siz bundan ham ko'pga qodirсiz.
Yangi yangilanish yo'qolgan xususiyatlari sababli ko'plab foydalanuvchilarning ko'nglini qoldirdi.
U yakuniy taqdimotda jamoasining ko'nglini qoldirmaslikka va'da berdi.

words.definition: To understand something or find the answer to something after thinking carefully.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani o'ylab topish yoki qiyin savolga javob yoki yechim izlab topish.
words.example1: I cannot figure out how to use it.
words.example1Translation: Men undan qanday foydalanishni tushuna olmayapman.
words.example2: I finally figured out why my phone was not working.
words.example2Translation: Nihoyat, telefonim nega ishlamayotganini tushundim.
words.example3: It took him a week to figure out the solution to the problem.
words.example3Translation: Unga muammo yechimini topish uchun bir hafta kerak bo'ldi.
extraExamples: She couldn't figure out why her code kept crashing.
Can you help me figure out this math problem?
He finally figured out what he wanted to do with his life.
It took the team days to figure out the cause of the error.
I'm still trying to figure out how this software works.
She figured out the shortcut after watching a tutorial.
We need to figure out a plan before the deadline.
extraExampleTranslations: U kodining nima uchun ishdan chiqishini tushuna olmadi.
Bu matematik masalani hal qilishda menga yordam bera olasizmi?
U nihoyat hayotida nima qilmoqchi ekanligini tushundi.
Jamoaga xato sababini aniqlash uchun bir necha kun kerak bo'ldi.
Men hali ham bu dastur qanday ishlashini tushunishga harakat qilyapman.
U qo'llanmani ko'rgandan keyin yorliqni topdi.
Muddat kelishidan oldin reja tuzib olishimiz kerak.

words.definition: To do something badly, make a mistake, or ruin something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani yomon qilish, xato qilish yoki biror narsani buzib qo'yish.
words.example1: I messed up my exam.
words.example1Translation: Men imtihonimni rasvo qildim.
words.example2: He messed up the presentation by forgetting his notes.
words.example2Translation: U yozuvlarini unutib, taqdimotni rasvo qildi.
words.example3: Sorry, I messed up your order — let me fix that for you.
words.example3Translation: Kechirasiz, buyurtmangizni adashtirib yubordim — keling tuzatib beraman.
extraExamples: She messed up the recipe by adding too much salt.
Don't mess up this chance — it may not come again.
He always messes up when he's under pressure.
I messed up my first job interview but learned from it.
They messed up the project timeline by missing key deadlines.
She felt terrible after messing up such an important task.
It's okay to mess up sometimes — what matters is that you learn.
extraExampleTranslations: U juda ko'p tuz solib, retseptni buzib qo'ydi.
Bu imkoniyatni barbod qilmang — u yana kelmaydi.
U bosim ostida bo'lganda doim xato qiladi.
Men birinchi ish suhbatimni rasvo qildim, lekin undan saboq oldim.
Ular muhim muddatlarni o'tkazib yuborib, loyiha jadvalini buzib qo'yishdi.
U shunday muhim vazifani buzib qo'ygandan keyin o'zini yomon his qildi.
Ba'zan xato qilish yaxshi — muhimi bundan saboq olishdir.

words.definition: To make a serious mistake or completely ruin something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani jiddiy darajada xato qilish yoki butunlay buzib qo'yish. Mess up dan ko'ra kuchliroq va ko'proq norasmiy uslubda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I screwed up my job interview by arriving late.
words.example1Translation: Men kech kelib, ish suhbatimni rasvo qildim.
words.example2: He screwed up the entire deal by saying the wrong thing.
words.example2Translation: U noto'g'ri narsa aytib, butun shartnomani barbod qildi.
words.example3: She screwed up her chances of promotion by missing the deadline.
words.example3Translation: U muddatni o'tkazib yuborib, ko'tarilish imkoniyatini yo'qotdi.
extraExamples: I really screwed up this time and I don't know how to fix it.
He screwed up the formula and the whole experiment failed.
Don't screw up this opportunity — it's very rare.
She screwed up her presentation by not preparing enough.
I screwed up by trusting someone I shouldn't have.
The team screwed up the launch because of poor communication.
Everyone screws up sometimes — the key is to take responsibility.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu safar haqiqatan ham ishni rasvo qildim va qanday tuzatishni bilmayapman.
U formulani buzib qo'ydi va butun tajriba muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi.
Bu imkoniyatni qo'ldan boy bermang — u juda kam uchraydi.
U yetarlicha tayyorlanmay, taqdimotini rasvo qildi.
Men ishonmaslim kerak bo'lgan odamga ishonib, xato qildim.
Jamoa yomon muloqot tufayli ishga tushirishni barbod qildi.
Hamma ba'zan xato qiladi — asosiysi javobgarlikni o'z zimmasiga olish.

words.definition: To introduce a topic into a conversation or discussion.
words.definitionUz: Suhbat yoki muhokama davomida biror mavzu yoki masalani gapga olib kirish.
words.example1: She brought up an interesting point during the meeting.
words.example1Translation: U yig'ilish davomida qiziqarli fikr bildirdi.
words.example2: He brought up the issue of low salaries during the team discussion.
words.example2Translation: U jamoa muhokamasi davomida past maoshlar masalasini ko'tardi.
words.example3: I didn't want to bring up the topic of money at dinner.
words.example3Translation: Kechki ovqatda pul mavzusini gapga kiritmoqchi emasdim.
extraExamples: She brought up a problem that no one had noticed before.
He tends to bring up old arguments during every discussion.
