The journalist brought up a sensitive topic during the interview.
Can we bring up the delivery issue in tomorrow's meeting?
It's never easy to bring up personal problems at work.
She brought up the idea of working from home during the budget meeting.
No one wanted to bring up the recent failure in front of the director.
extraExampleTranslations: U hech kim ilgari sezmagan muammoni ko'tardi.
U har bir muhokamada eski bahslarni gapga kiritishga moyil.
Jurnalist intervyu davomida nozik mavzuni ko'tardi.
Ertangi yig'ilishda yetkazib berish muammosini gapga kira olamizmi?
Ishda shaxsiy muammolarni ko'tarish hech qachon oson emas.
U byudjet yig'ilishida uydan ishlash g'oyasini ko'tardi.
Hech kim direktor oldida yaqinda bo'lgan muvaffaqiyatsizlikni gapga kiritmoqchi emas edi.

words.definition: To find or meet something or someone by chance, or to seem a certain way to others.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki odamni tasodifan topish yoki uchrash. Shuningdek, boshqalarga ma'lum bir taassurot qoldirish ma'nosida ham ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I came across an old photo while cleaning my room.
words.example1Translation: Xonamni yig'ishtirayotganda tasodifan eski suratga ko'zim tushdi.
words.example2: She came across as very confident during the interview.
words.example2Translation: U intervyu davomida juda ishonchli taassurot qoldirdi.
words.example3: I came across a great article about investing while browsing online.
words.example3Translation: Internetda ko'rib yurganimda investitsiya haqida ajoyib maqolaga duch keldim.
extraExamples: He came across an interesting book at the second-hand market.
She comes across as shy, but she's actually very outgoing.
I came across his name while doing research for the project.
They came across an abandoned building while hiking.
He didn't mean to come across as rude — he was just tired.
I came across a useful app that helps with vocabulary learning.
She came across some important documents while sorting old files.
extraExampleTranslations: U ikkinchi qo'l bozorida qiziqarli kitobga duch keldi.
U tortinchoq taassurot qoldiradi, lekin aslida juda ochiq yurakli.
Loyiha uchun tadqiqot qilayotganda uning ismiga duch keldim.
Ular sayr qilayotganda tashlandiq binoga duch kelishdi.
U qo'pol taassurot qoldirmoqchi emas edi — shunchaki charchagan edi.
Lug'at o'rganishda yordam beradigan foydali ilovaga duch keldim.
U eski fayllarni tartiblayotganda muhim hujjatlarga duch keldi.

words.definition: To have a friendly and comfortable relationship with someone.
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lish, bir-biriga mos kelish va do'stona muloqot qilish.
words.example1: I get along with my colleagues very well.
words.example1Translation: Men hamkasblarim bilan juda yaxshi til topishaman.
words.example2: She finds it hard to get along with her new roommate.
words.example2Translation: U yangi xona sherik bilan til topishishda qiynalmoqda.
words.example3: Children who get along with others tend to do better at school.
words.example3Translation: Boshqalar bilan til topadigan bolalar maktabda ko'proq muvaffaqiyat qozonishadi.
extraExamples: He gets along with almost everyone he meets.
It's important to get along with your team in a workplace.
They didn't get along at first, but now they're close friends.
I get along with my manager much better than I expected.
Getting along with difficult people is a valuable skill.
She made an effort to get along with her in-laws.
Do you get along with your neighbors?
extraExampleTranslations: U uchrashtirgan deyarli hamma bilan til topishadi.
Ish joyida jamoangiz bilan til topishish muhimdir.
Ular dastlab til topisha olishmadi, lekin endi yaqin do'stlar.
Men menejerim bilan kutganimdan ancha yaxshi til topishaman.
Qiyin odamlar bilan til topishish qimmatli ko'nikmadır.
U qaynonasi bilan til topishishga harakat qildi.
Qo'shnilaringiz bilan til topisha olasizmi?

words.definition: To feel excited and happy about something that is going to happen.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakda bo'ladigan biror yaxshi narsa yoki voqeani sabrsizlik bilan kutish, unga intiq bo'lish.
words.example1: I'm really looking forward to the summer holiday.
words.example1Translation: Men yozgi ta'tilni juda intizorlik bilan kutmoqdaman.
words.example2: She is looking forward to starting her new job next week.
words.example2Translation: U kelasi hafta yangi ishini boshlashni sabrsizlik bilan kutmoqda.
words.example3: We look forward to hearing from you soon.
words.example3Translation: Tez orada sizdan xaber kutamiz.
extraExamples: He has been looking forward to this trip for months.
I'm looking forward to meeting you in person.
The kids are really looking forward to the school trip.
She's been looking forward to this concert all year.
I look forward to working with such a talented team.
We're looking forward to the product launch next month.
He's looking forward to finishing the project and taking a break.
extraExampleTranslations: U oylar davomida bu sayohatni sabrsizlik bilan kutmoqda.
Siz bilan shaxsan uchrashishni kutib turaman.
Bolalar maktab sayohatini juda sabrsizlik bilan kutishmoqda.
U butun yil davomida ushbu kontsertni sabrsizlik bilan kutdi.
Bunday iqtidorli jamoa bilan ishlashni intizorlik bilan kutaman.
Biz kelasi oyda mahsulot taqdimotini sabrsizlik bilan kutmoqdamiz.
U loyihani tugatib, biroz dam olishni sabrsizlik bilan kutmoqda.

words.definition: To refuse an offer, request, or opportunity.
words.definitionUz: Biror taklif, so'rov yoki imkoniyatni qabul qilmasdan rad etish.
words.example1: She turned down the job offer because of the low salary.
words.example1Translation: U past maosh sababli ish taklifini rad etdi.
words.example2: He turned down the invitation because he had other plans.
words.example2Translation: U boshqa rejalari bor ekanligi uchun taklifni rad etdi.
words.example3: I can't believe she turned down such an amazing opportunity.
words.example3Translation: Bunday ajoyib imkoniyatni rad etganiga ishonolmayman.
extraExamples: He turned down a promotion because he didn't want to relocate.
She turned down the deal because the terms weren't fair.
It's never easy to turn down a good opportunity.
They turned down the partnership offer after reviewing the contract.
He turned down every suggestion the team made during the meeting.
She turned down the interview request without giving a reason.
Don't turn down this offer — you might regret it later.
extraExampleTranslations: U ko'chib ketmoqchi bo'lmagani uchun ko'tarilishni rad etdi.
U shartlar adolatli bo'lmagani uchun shartnomani rad etdi.
Yaxshi imkoniyatni rad etish hech qachon oson emas.
Ular shartnomani ko'rib chiqqandan keyin sheriklik taklifini rad etishdi.
U yig'ilish davomida jamoa bergan har bir taklifni rad etdi.
U intervyu so'rovini sabab ko'rsatmasdan rad etdi.
Bu taklifni rad etmang — keyinroq afsuslanishingiz mumkin.

words.definition: Used to say that something failed or did not happen even though you tried hard.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p harakat qilsangiz ham, natija kutganingizday bo'lmagan paytda ishlatiladigan ibora — ko'p kuch sarfladim, lekin bo'lmadi degan ma'noni bildiradi.
words.example1: Despite all my effort, I couldn't pass the exam.
words.example1Translation: Barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, imtihondan o'ta olmadim.
words.example2: Despite all my effort, the project was rejected by the client.
words.example2Translation: Barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, loyiha mijoz tomonidan rad etildi.
words.example3: Despite all my effort to stay calm, I lost my temper.
words.example3Translation: Xotirjam qolishga barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, o'zimni yo'qotib qo'ydim.
extraExamples: Despite all my effort, I couldn't convince him to change his mind.
Despite all my effort, the business failed in its first year.
She felt defeated despite all her effort to save the relationship.
Despite all my effort to be on time, I still arrived late.
Despite all my effort, I couldn't find a solution to the problem.
He gave up despite all his effort because nothing seemed to work.
Despite all my effort to learn the skill quickly, it still took months.
extraExampleTranslations: Barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, uni fikrini o'zgartirishga ko'ndira olmadim.
Barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, biznes birinchi yilida muvaffaqiyatsizlikka uchradi.
U munosabatni saqlab qolish uchun barcha urinishlariga qaramay, o'zini mag'lub his qildi.
O'z vaqtida kelishga barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, baribir kech qoldim.
Barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, muammoga yechim topa olmadim.
Hech narsa ishlamayotgandek ko'ringanligi uchun u barcha urinishlariga qaramay taslim bo'ldi.
Mahoratni tez o'rganishga barcha urinishlarimga qaramay, bu baribir oylar davom etdi.

words.definition: To be as good as you hoped or expected something to be.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa siz kutgandek yaxshi chiqmoq — agar u kutganingizday bo'lmasa, u sizning umidingizni oqlamagan bo'ladi.
words.example1: Unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectation.
words.example1Translation: Afsuski, bu mening kutganimday bo'lmadi.
words.example2: The new phone fully lived up to my expectations — it was worth every penny.
words.example2Translation: Yangi telefon mening barcha kutganlarimni oqladi — har bir so'm arzidi.
words.example3: The sequel never lived up to the original film's expectation.
words.example3Translation: Davomiy film hech qachon asl filmning kutganlarini oqlamadi.
extraExamples: The restaurant was hyped online but didn't live up to my expectation.
He worked hard to live up to his parents' expectations.
The product lived up to every expectation shown in the advertisement.
She felt nervous about living up to the expectations set by her predecessor.
The holiday destination didn't quite live up to what I had imagined.
It is hard to live up to expectations when they are set too high.
The new manager finally lived up to the board's expectations after six months.
extraExampleTranslations: Restoran internetda juda ko'p maqtalgan edi, lekin mening kutganimday bo'lmadi.
U ota-onasining umidlarini oqlash uchun qattiq ishladi.
Mahsulot reklamada ko'rsatilgan barcha kutganlarni oqladi.
U o'zidan oldingi kishining kutganlarini oqlash haqida tashvishlanardi.
Dam olish joyi men tasavvur qilgandek bo'lmadi.
Kutganlar juda baland qo'yilganda ularni oqlash qiyin.
Yangi menejer olti oydan keyin nihoyat kengash kutganlarini oqladi.

words.definition: Used to describe what someone truly feels or believes, even if they do not show it openly.
words.definitionUz: Tashqaridan ko'rinmasa ham, ichkaridan his qilinadigan haqiqiy tuyg'u yoki fikr — odamning yuragining tubida yashiringan narsa.
words.example1: Deep down, I know she loves me.
words.example1Translation: Ich-ichimdan, u meni sevishini bilaman.
words.example2: Deep down, he was scared even though he acted confident.
words.example2Translation: Ich-ichidan u qo'rqardi, garchi ishonchli harakat qilsa ham.
words.example3: She smiled, but deep down she was deeply hurt.
words.example3Translation: U kulimsirab turdi, lekin qalbining tubida u juda ranjigan edi.
extraExamples: Deep down, he knew the decision was wrong but said nothing.
Deep down, she wanted to apologize but could not find the words.
He seems tough, but deep down he is very sensitive.
Deep down, I always believed things would work out in the end.
She pretended not to care, but deep down she was devastated.
Deep down, he missed his hometown more than he admitted.
Deep down, we all want to feel accepted and understood.
extraExampleTranslations: Ich-ichidan u qaror noto'g'ri ekanligini bildi, lekin hech narsa demadi.
Ich-ichidan u uzr so'rashni xohladi, lekin so'zlarini topa olmadi.
U qattiq ko'rinadi, lekin ich-ichidan juda sezgir.
Ich-ichimdan men har doim ishlar oxirida hal bo'lishiga ishonardim.
U parvo qilmayotgandek ko'rindi, lekin qalbining tubida u vayron bo'lgan edi.
Ich-ichidan u o'z yurtini tan olgandan ko'ra ko'proq sog'inardi.
Qalbimizning tubida barchamiz qabul qilinishni va tushunilishni xohlaymiz.

words.translation: barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay / imkonsiz tuyulsa ham
words.definition: Despite very low chances of success or very difficult circumstances.
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyat qozonish deyarli imkonsiz ko'ringanda ham, qiyin sharoitlarga qaramay amalga oshirilgan narsa haqida aytiladi.
words.example1: Against all odds, the small team won the national championship.
words.example1Translation: Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, kichik jamoa milliy chempionatni qo'lga kiritdi.
words.example2: She built a successful business against all odds.
words.example2Translation: U barcha imkonsizliklarga qaramay muvaffaqiyatli biznes qurdi.
words.example3: Against all odds, he recovered fully from the serious accident.
words.example3Translation: Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, u jiddiy baxtsiz hodisadan to'liq tiklandi.
extraExamples: Against all odds, the underdog team reached the final.
She passed the exam against all odds after only two weeks of preparation.
Against all odds, they saved enough money to buy a house.
The startup succeeded against all odds in a very competitive market.
Against all odds, he finished the marathon despite his injury.
They stayed together against all odds and built a happy life.
Against all odds, the rescue team found the missing hikers alive.
extraExampleTranslations: Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, kam kutilgan jamoa finalga chiqdi.
U faqat ikki haftalik tayyorgarlikdan keyin barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay imtihondan o'tdi.
Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, ular uy sotib olish uchun yetarlicha pul yig'ishdi.
Startap juda raqobatbardosh bozorda barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay muvaffaqiyatga erishdi.
Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, u jarohati bo'lishiga qaramasdan marafonni tugatdi.
Ular barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay birga qoldilar va baxtli hayot qurdilar.
Barcha qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, qutqaruv guruhi yo'qolgan sayyohlarni tirik topdi.

words.definition: Used to express that something caused you a strong sense of disappointment.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa sizni juda ko'p umidsizlantirganini ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora — katta umid qo'ygansiz, lekin natija yoqimli bo'lmagan.
words.example1: Much to my disappointment, the event was cancelled at the last minute.
words.example1Translation: Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, tadbir oxirgi daqiqada bekor qilindi.
words.example2: Much to my disappointment, I was not selected for the team.
words.example2Translation: Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, men jamoaga tanlanmadim.
words.example3: Much to my disappointment, the film had a very weak ending.
words.example3Translation: Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, filmning oxiri juda zaif edi.
extraExamples: Much to my disappointment, the concert tickets were already sold out.
Much to my disappointment, he never called back after the interview.
The product arrived broken, much to my disappointment.
Much to my disappointment, the restaurant had closed down permanently.
Much to my disappointment, my favorite team lost in the final.
She left early, much to my disappointment, just as things got interesting.
Much to my disappointment, the holiday weather was cold and rainy the whole week.
extraExampleTranslations: Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, konsert chiptalari allaqachon sotib bo'lgan edi.
Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, u intervyudan keyin hech qachon qo'ng'iroq qilmadi.
Mahsulot singan holda yetib keldi, bu meni qattiq umidsizlantirdi.
Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, restoran butunlay yopib qo'yilgan edi.
Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, sevimli jamoam finalda yutqazdi.
U ertaroq ketib qoldi, bu meni qattiq umidsizlantirdi, aynan qiziqarli bo'la boshlagan paytda.
Mening qattiq umidsizlanganim holda, ta'tilning ob-havosi butun hafta sovuq va yomg'irli bo'ldi.

words.definition: Used to emphasize that you are about to say something completely true, even if it is uncomfortable.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqatni aytishni ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora — hatto bu noqulay bo'lsa ham, to'liq rostini aytmoqchi ekanligingizni bildiradi.
words.example1: In all honesty, I was not ready for the interview.
words.example1Translation: Rostini aytsam, men intervyuga tayyor emas edim.
words.example2: In all honesty, I think the plan has some serious problems.
words.example2Translation: Ochig'ini aytganda, menimcha, rejada bir qancha jiddiy muammolar bor.
words.example3: In all honesty, I had no idea what I was doing at first.
words.example3Translation: Rostini aytsam, boshida nima qilayotganimni bilmasdim.
extraExamples: In all honesty, I do not think this approach will work.
In all honesty, the presentation could have been much better.
She said, in all honesty, that she preferred her old job.
In all honesty, I was relieved when the trip was cancelled.
In all honesty, I never fully understood the topic until last week.
In all honesty, his feedback hurt, but it was exactly what I needed.
In all honesty, I expected more from the new product launch.
extraExampleTranslations: Rostini aytsam, bu yondashuv ishlaydi deb o'ylamayman.
Rostini aytsam, taqdimot ancha yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin edi.
U rostini aytsam, dedi va eski ishini afzal ko'rishini bildirdi.
Rostini aytsam, sayohat bekor qilinganda men yengillik his qildim.
Rostini aytsam, o'tkan haftaga qadar mavzuni to'liq tushunmagan edim.
Rostini aytsam, uning fikr-mulohazasi og'riqli edi, lekin ayni keragim shu edi.
Rostini aytsam, yangi mahsulot taqdimotidan ko'proq narsa kutgan edim.

words.definition: After thinking carefully about something again, often leading to a changed opinion.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqida qayta va chuqurroq o'ylab ko'rgach — bu ibora ko'pincha fikr yoki qaror o'zgarganini bildiradi.
words.example1: On reflection, I think I made the right decision.
words.example1Translation: O'ylab ko'rgach, to'g'ri qaror qilganman deb o'ylayman.
words.example2: On reflection, I should have apologized much earlier.
words.example2Translation: O'ylab ko'rgach, ancha oldinroq uzr so'rashim kerak edi.
words.example3: On reflection, the interview went better than I first thought.
words.example3Translation: O'ylab ko'rgach, intervyu dastlab o'ylaganımdan yaxshiroq o'tdi.
extraExamples: On reflection, I realize I was too hard on him.
On reflection, the project taught me more than I expected.
She said, on reflection, that she would have chosen a different career.
On reflection, the advice I received was actually very useful.
On reflection, I think we should have waited a little longer before deciding.
On reflection, the trip was one of the best experiences of my life.
On reflection, I understand now why he reacted the way he did.
extraExampleTranslations: O'ylab ko'rgach, unga juda qattiq munosabatda bo'lganligimni angladim.
O'ylab ko'rgach, loyiha menga kutganimdan ko'proq narsa o'rgatdi.
U o'ylab ko'rgach dedi va boshqa kasb tanlagan bo'lardim dedi.
O'ylab ko'rgach, olgan maslahatim aslida juda foydali edi.
O'ylab ko'rgach, qaror qilishdan oldin biroz ko'proq kutishimiz kerak edi.
O'ylab ko'rgach, bu sayohat hayotimdagi eng yaxshi tajribalardan biri edi.
O'ylab ko'rgach, endi u nega bunday munosabatda bo'lganini tushunaman.

words.word: when it comes down to it
words.definition: Used to introduce the most basic or important truth about a situation, after setting aside all the details.
words.definitionUz: Barcha tafsilotlarni chetga surib, vaziyatning eng muhim yoki asosiy haqiqatini aytishdan oldin ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: When it comes down to it, hard work is what separates success from failure.
words.example1Translation: Aslida, qattiq mehnat muvaffaqiyatni muvaffaqiyatsizlikdan ajratib turadi.
words.example2: When it comes down to it, you have to make the final decision yourself.
words.example2Translation: Oxir-oqibat, yakuniy qarorni o'zingiz qabul qilishingiz kerak.
words.example3: When it comes down to it, people just want to be heard and respected.
words.example3Translation: Aslida, odamlar shunchaki eshitilishni va hurmatlanishni xohlaydi.
extraExamples: When it comes down to it, money cannot replace good health.
When it comes down to it, trust is the foundation of every relationship.
He had many excuses, but when it comes down to it, he just was not prepared.
When it comes down to it, the quality of your work speaks for itself.
When it comes down to it, consistency matters more than talent.
When it comes down to it, no plan survives without strong execution.
When it comes down to it, we all want the same basic things in life.
extraExampleTranslations: Aslida, pul yaxshi sog'liqni almashtira olmaydi.
Aslida, ishonch har qanday munosabatning asosi.
Uning ko'plab bahonalari bor edi, lekin aslida u shunchaki tayyor emas edi.
Aslida, ishingizning sifati o'z-o'zidan gapiradi.
Aslida, izchillik iste'doddan muhimroq.
Aslida, hech qanday reja kuchli amalga oshirishsiz omon qolmaydi.
Aslida, barchamiz hayotda bir xil asosiy narsalarni xohlaymiz.

words.translation: ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda / shafqatsizlarcha to'g'ri bo'lsam
words.definition: To say the complete and harsh truth without softening it, even if it is uncomfortable to hear.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqatni hech narsa qo'shmasdan va yumshatmasdan aytmoq — eshitish noqulay bo'lsa ham, to'liq va qattiq haqiqatni bildirish.
words.example1: To be brutally honest, I think your presentation needs a lot of work.
words.example1Translation: Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, menimcha, taqdimotingiz ko'p ish talab qiladi.
words.example2: To be brutally honest, that plan has almost no chance of working.
words.example2Translation: Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, bu rejaning ishlash ehtimoli deyarli yo'q.
words.example3: She asked me for feedback and, to be brutally honest, I told her the truth.
words.example3Translation: U mendan fikr so'radi va ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, men unga haqiqatni aytdim.
extraExamples: To be brutally honest, the product is not ready to launch yet.
To be brutally honest, I did not enjoy the event at all.
To be brutally honest, his writing still needs a great deal of improvement.
She was brutally honest with herself about why the relationship failed.
To be brutally honest, the team has not been performing at the expected level.
To be brutally honest, I think you are wasting your time in that job.
Being brutally honest is only helpful when the other person is ready to hear it.
extraExampleTranslations: Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, mahsulot hali ishga tushirishga tayyor emas.
Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, tadbirdan umuman zavqlanmadim.
Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, uning yozuvi hali ham jiddiy takomillashtirish talab qiladi.
U munosabat nima uchun barbod bo'lgani haqida o'zi bilan shafqatsizlarcha halol bo'ldi.
Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, jamoa kutilgan darajada ishlayotgani yo'q.
Ochig'ini juda qattiq aytganda, menimcha, siz o'sha ishda vaqtingizni behuda sarflayapsiz.
Shafqatsizlarcha halol bo'lish faqat boshqa kishi eshitishga tayyor bo'lganda foydali.

words.definition: Used to describe what someone is truly like or what they truly feel deep inside, regardless of how they appear.
words.definitionUz: Tashqi ko'rinishidan qat'iy nazar, insoning haqiqiy tabiati yoki his-tuyg'usini bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora — bu odamning asil qiyofasi.
words.example1: He seems tough, but he is a gentle person at heart.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq ko'rinadi, lekin asl tabiatida muloyim odam.
words.example2: She is a teacher at heart, even though she works in business now.
words.example2Translation: U hozir biznesda ishlasa ham, yurakdan o'qituvchi.
words.example3: At heart, he is still the same kind boy I knew growing up.
words.example3Translation: Asl tabiatida u bolaligimdan bilgan o'sha mehribon bola bo'lib qolmoqda.
extraExamples: Despite his serious face, he is a comedian at heart.
She is an artist at heart and puts creativity into everything she does.
At heart, most people want to be good and do the right thing.
He retired from sports but is still a competitor at heart.
At heart, she never stopped being a small-town girl.
He is a scientist at heart — always asking questions and looking for answers.
At heart, the company still runs on the same values it started with.
extraExampleTranslations: Jiddiy yuziga qaramay, u asl tabiatida komediyachi.
U yurakdan san'atkor va qiladigan har bir ishiga ijodkorlik qo'shadi.
Asl tabiatida ko'pchilik yaxshi bo'lishni va to'g'ri ish qilishni xohlaydi.
U sportdan nafaqaga chiqdi, lekin asl tabiatida baribir musobaqachilik ruhi bor.
Asl tabiatida u hech qachon kichik shahar qizi bo'lishdan to'xtamadi.
U yurakdan olim — har doim savol beradi va javob qidiradi.
Asl tabiatida kompaniya hali ham boshlagandagi qadriyatlar asosida ishlaydi.

words.definition: to formally notify your employer in writing that you are leaving your job
words.definitionUz: ish beruvchiga yozma ravishda rasmiy tarzda ishdan ketayotganingizni bildirmoq
words.example1: She submitted her resignation after ten years at the company.
words.example1Translation: U kompaniyada o'n yil ishlagandan so'ng ishdan ketish arizasini topshirdi.
words.example2: He submitted a resignation because he found a better opportunity abroad.
words.example2Translation: U chet elda yaxshiroq imkoniyat topgani uchun ishdan ketish arizasini topshirdi.
words.example3: It is professional to submit a resignation at least two weeks in advance.
words.example3Translation: Ishdan ketish arizasini kamida ikki hafta oldin topshirish professional hisoblanadi.
extraExamples: She was nervous but finally submitted her resignation on Friday.
He submitted a resignation after the management ignored his concerns.
Submitting a resignation without notice can damage your professional reputation.
The director submitted his resignation following the financial scandal.
She had been planning to submit a resignation for months.
After submitting his resignation, he felt a huge sense of relief.
The team was shocked when their manager submitted a resignation.
extraExampleTranslations: U asabiy bo'lsa ham, juma kuni ishdan ketish arizasini topshirdi.
Rahbariyat uning muammolarini e'tiborsiz qoldirgandan so'ng u ariza topshirdi.
Ogohlantirishsiz ishdan ketish arizasi topshirish professional obro'ingizga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Direktor moliyaviy mojaradan so'ng ishdan ketish arizasini topshirdi.
U oylar davomida ariza topshirishni rejalashtirgan edi.
Arizani topshirgandan so'ng u katta yengillik his qildi.
Jamoani menejerining ishdan ketish arizasi hayratda qoldirdi.

words.definition: a job that offers a high salary or good financial compensation
words.definitionUz: ko'p pul yoki yaxshi maosh to'lanadigan ish
words.example1: She worked hard in university to get a well-paid job after graduation.
words.example1Translation: U universitetda qattiq o'qidi, toki bitirgandan keyin yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish topsin.
words.example2: A well-paid job does not always mean you will be happy at work.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish har doim ham ishda baxtli bo'lasiz degani emas.
words.example3: He left a well-paid job to start his own business.
words.example3Translation: U o'z biznesini boshlash uchun yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ishni tark etdi.
extraExamples: Finding a well-paid job in a small city can be very difficult.
She finally landed a well-paid job after months of searching.
A well-paid job with no free time is not worth it for everyone.
He chose a well-paid job over one he was passionate about.
Many people move abroad in search of a well-paid job.
A well-paid job in tech usually requires specific skills and experience.
She turned down a well-paid job because the company culture did not suit her.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichik shaharda yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish topish juda qiyin bo'lishi mumkin.
U oylab qidirgandan so'ng nihoyat yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish topdi.
Bo'sh vaqtsiz yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish hamma uchun ham to'g'ri kelmaydi.
U o'ziga yoqadigan ishdan ko'ra yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ishni tanladi.
Ko'p odamlar yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish qidirib chet elga ko'chadi.
Texnologiya sohasida yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ish odatda maxsus ko'nikma va tajriba talab qiladi.
U kompaniya madaniyati unga mos kelmagani uchun yaxshi oylik to'lanadigan ishdan bosh tortdi.

words.definition: a market where many companies or individuals are competing strongly for the same customers, positions, or resources
words.definitionUz: ko'p kompaniyalar yoki odamlar bir xil mijozlar, lavozimlar yoki resurslar uchun kuchli kurash olib boradigan bozor
words.example1: Breaking into a highly competitive market requires a unique approach.
words.example1Translation: Juda raqobatli bozorga kirish uchun noyob yondashuv kerak.
words.example2: The smartphone industry is a highly competitive market with very little room for error.
words.example2Translation: Smartfon sanoati xatoga joy deyarli bo'lmagan juda raqobatli bozordir.
words.example3: Graduates today are entering a highly competitive market with thousands of other applicants.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi bitiruvchilar minglab boshqa nomzodlar bilan birga juda raqobatli bozorga kirishmoqda.
extraExamples: In a highly competitive market, branding makes all the difference.
Small businesses often struggle to survive in a highly competitive market.
He studied the highly competitive market carefully before launching his product.
A highly competitive market forces companies to constantly improve their services.
Standing out in a highly competitive market requires creativity and persistence.
The fashion industry is one of the most highly competitive markets in the world.
Even experienced professionals find it tough to advance in a highly competitive market.
extraExampleTranslations: Juda raqobatli bozorda brend hamma narsani hal qiladi.
Kichik bizneslar ko'pincha juda raqobatli bozorda yashab qolishga qiynaladilar.
U mahsulotini ishga tushirishdan oldin juda raqobatli bozorni diqqat bilan o'rgandi.
Juda raqobatli bozor kompaniyalarni xizmatlarini doimiy ravishda yaxshilashga majbur qiladi.
Juda raqobatli bozorda ajralib turish ijodkorlik va qat'iyatni talab qiladi.
Moda sanoati dunyodagi eng raqobatli bozorlardan biridir.
Tajribali mutaxassislar ham juda raqobatli bozorda ilgarilab borishni qiyin deb hisoblaydilar.

words.definition: because many people want or need something, causing pressure on supply or availability
words.definitionUz: ko'p odamlar biror narsani xohlashi yoki unga muhtoj bo'lishi sababli yuzaga keladigan holat
words.example1: Due to high demand, the course was fully booked within hours.
words.example1Translation: Yuqori talab sababli kurs bir necha soat ichida to'liq band bo'ldi.
words.example2: Prices went up due to high demand during the holiday season.
words.example2Translation: Bayram mavsumida yuqori talab sababli narxlar ko'tarildi.
words.example3: Due to high demand, the company hired fifty new employees this year.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori talab sababli kompaniya bu yil ellik yangi xodim yolladi.
extraExamples: Due to high demand, delivery times have increased significantly.
The product sold out within a day due to high demand.
Due to high demand, we are unable to process all requests immediately.
Salaries in this field have risen due to high demand for skilled workers.
Due to high demand, the restaurant now requires a reservation.
The factory increased production due to high demand from overseas buyers.
Due to high demand, tickets for the event are no longer available.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori talab sababli yetkazib berish muddati sezilarli darajada uzaydi.
Mahsulot yuqori talab sababli bir kunda sotildi.
Yuqori talab sababli biz barcha so'rovlarni darhol ko'rib chiqa olmaymiz.
Bu sohada malakali ishchilarning yuqori talabi sababli maoshlar oshdi.
Yuqori talab sababli restoran endi oldindan buyurtma talab qiladi.
Zavod xorijiy xaridorlarning yuqori talabi sababli ishlab chiqarishni oshirdi.
Yuqori talab sababli tadbir chiptalari endi mavjud emas.

words.definition: a job that involves doing the same tasks repeatedly with little variety or challenge
words.definitionUz: deyarli o'zgarishsiz, doim bir xil vazifalarni bajarishni talab qiladigan zerikarli ish
words.example1: He quit his monotonous job and started working as a freelance designer.
words.example1Translation: U zerikarli ishini tashlab, frilanser dizayner sifatida ishlashni boshladi.
words.example2: A monotonous job can lead to burnout if you are not careful.
words.example2Translation: Agar ehtiyot bo'lmasangiz, zerikarli ish kasb charchoqqa olib kelishi mumkin.
words.example3: She felt stuck in a monotonous job with no growth opportunities.
words.example3Translation: U o'sish imkoniyatsiz zerikarli ishda qolib ketganini his qildi.
extraExamples: He found ways to stay motivated despite having a monotonous job.
A monotonous job might suit someone who prefers routine and stability.
After years of a monotonous job, she decided to go back to school.
Many factory workers describe their daily tasks as a monotonous job.
A monotonous job can sometimes give you mental space to think creatively.
He was warned that the position would be a monotonous job before he accepted it.
Switching careers helped her escape the feeling of a monotonous job.
extraExampleTranslations: U zerikarli ishiga qaramay, motivated bo'lib qolish yo'llarini topdi.
Zerikarli ish tartib va barqarorlikni afzal ko'radigan odamlarga mos kelishi mumkin.
Yillar davom etgan zerikarli ishdan keyin u maktabga qaytishga qaror qildi.
Ko'plab zavod ishchilari kundalik vazifalarini zerikarli ish sifatida tasvirlaydi.
Zerikarli ish ba'zan ijodiy fikrlash uchun aqliy bo'shliq berishi mumkin.
U uni qabul qilishidan oldin bu lavozim zerikarli ish bo'lishi haqida ogohlantirildi.
Mutaxassislikni o'zgartirish unga zerikarli ish hissidan qochishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: a work schedule that allows employees to choose when they start and finish work, within certain limits
words.definitionUz: xodimlar ma'lum chegaralar ichida o'zlari ish boshlanish va tugash vaqtini tanlashi mumkin bo'lgan ish tartibi
words.example1: The company offers flexible working hours to help employees balance their personal lives.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya xodimlarga shaxsiy hayotlarini muvozanatlashga yordam berish uchun moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif qiladi.
words.example2: She chose this job specifically because of the flexible working hours.
words.example2Translation: U bu ishni aynan moslashuvchan ish vaqti uchun tanladi.
words.example3: Flexible working hours have been shown to increase employee productivity.
words.example3Translation: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti xodimlar samaradorligini oshirishi isbotlangan.
extraExamples: Flexible working hours allow parents to manage school pick-ups without stress.
He negotiated flexible working hours before accepting the job offer.
Many employees rate flexible working hours as more valuable than a pay rise.
Flexible working hours became standard practice after the pandemic.
She uses her flexible working hours to exercise in the morning.
Not all jobs can offer flexible working hours due to the nature of the work.
The startup attracted top talent by offering flexible working hours and remote options.
extraExampleTranslations: Moslashuvchan ish vaqti ota-onalarga maktabdan bolalarni olip ketishni stresssiz boshqarish imkonini beradi.
U ish taklifini qabul qilishdan oldin moslashuvchan ish vaqtini muzokara qildi.
Ko'plab xodimlar moslashuvchan ish vaqtini maosh oshirishdan ko'ra qimmatroq deb baholaydi.
Moslashuvchan ish vaqti pandemiyadan so'ng standart amaliyotga aylandi.
U moslashuvchan ish vaqtidan ertalab sport bilan shug'ullanish uchun foydalanadi.
Barcha ishlar ham ish tabiatiga ko'ra moslashuvchan ish vaqtini taklif eta olmaydi.
Startap moslashuvchan ish vaqti va masofaviy imkoniyatlarni taklif qilib, yetakchi mutaxassislarni jalb qildi.

words.translation: murakkab va ko'p kuch talab qiladigan vazifa
words.definition: a task that requires a lot of effort, skill, concentration, or physical and mental energy
words.definitionUz: bajarish uchun ko'p kuch, mahorat yoki diqqat talab qiladigan murakkab vazifa
words.example1: Managing a team of twenty people is a demanding task.
words.example1Translation: Yigirma kishilik jamoani boshqarish ko'p kuch talab qiladigan vazifadir.
words.example2: She handled every demanding task with calm and focus.
words.example2Translation: U har qanday murakkab vazifani xotirjamlik va diqqat bilan bajaradi.
words.example3: The project turned out to be more demanding than we expected.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha biz kutgandan ko'ra murakkab bo'lib chiqdi.
extraExamples: Surgeons regularly perform demanding tasks that require years of training.
He thrives under pressure and enjoys a demanding task.
Completing a demanding task on a tight deadline can be exhausting.
The new software update turned out to be a highly demanding task for the team.
She broke down the demanding task into smaller steps to make it manageable.
A demanding task is not always unpleasant — it can also be rewarding.
He avoided the most demanding tasks by delegating them to his team.
extraExampleTranslations: Jarrohlar yillar davomida tayyorgarlikni talab qiladigan murakkab vazifalarni muntazam bajaradilar.
U bosim ostida yaxshi ishlaydi va murakkab vazifadan zavqlanadi.
Qattiq muddatda murakkab vazifani bajarish juda charchatishi mumkin.
Yangi dasturiy yangilanish jamoa uchun juda murakkab vazifaga aylandi.
U murakkab vazifani boshqarish osonroq bo'lishi uchun kichik qadamlarga ajratdi.
Murakkab vazifa har doim ham yoqimsiz emas — u ham mamnuniyat berishi mumkin.
U eng murakkab vazifalardan qochib, ularni jamoasiga topshirdi.

words.definition: the ability to divide your time and energy fairly between work responsibilities and personal life
words.definitionUz: ish va shaxsiy hayot o'rtasida vaqt va energiyani to'g'ri taqsimlash qobiliyati
words.example1: Good work-life balance is essential for long-term health and happiness.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati uzoq muddatli salomatlik va baxt uchun muhimdir.
words.example2: She left her previous job because it offered no work-life balance.
words.example2Translation: U oldingi ishini tark etdi, chunki u ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini ta'minlamadi.
words.example3: Many companies now invest in programs to improve work-life balance.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p kompaniyalar endi ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilash dasturlariga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
extraExamples: Achieving work-life balance is harder when you work from home.
He struggled with work-life balance during his first year as a manager.
A healthy work-life balance reduces stress and prevents burnout.
She set strict boundaries at work to protect her work-life balance.
Remote work can improve work-life balance if managed correctly.
Young professionals today rate work-life balance above salary when choosing jobs.
The company lost several employees because of its poor work-life balance culture.
extraExampleTranslations: Uydan ishlaganda ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatiga erishish qiyinroq.
U menejer sifatida birinchi yilida ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati bilan kurashdi.
Sog'lom ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati stressni kamaytiradi va kasb charchoqining oldini oladi.
U ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini himoya qilish uchun ishda qat'iy chegara qo'ydi.
Masofaviy ish to'g'ri boshqarilsa, ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini yaxshilashi mumkin.
Bugungi yosh mutaxassislar ish tanlashda ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanatini maoshdan yuqori qo'yadilar.
Kompaniya yomon ish va shaxsiy hayot muvozanati madaniyati sababli bir nechta xodimini yo'qotdi.

words.definition: the process of moving forward in your professional life by gaining higher positions, more responsibilities, or better opportunities
words.definitionUz: kasbiy hayotda yuqori lavozimlarga ko'tarilish, ko'proq mas'uliyat va imkoniyat olish jarayoni
words.example1: She chose the company specifically for its career advancement opportunities.
words.example1Translation: U kompaniyani aynan karyera o'sishi imkoniyatlari uchun tanladi.
words.example2: Career advancement often requires continuous learning and skill development.
words.example2Translation: Karyera o'sishi ko'pincha doimiy o'rganish va ko'nikmalarni rivojlantirishni talab qiladi.
words.example3: He felt that his career advancement had stalled in his current role.
words.example3Translation: U hozirgi lavozimida karyera o'sishi to'xtab qolganini his qildi.
extraExamples: Networking plays a huge role in career advancement.
She took on extra responsibilities to show her readiness for career advancement.
Career advancement is not always about a higher salary — it is also about growth.
He moved to a different company to find better career advancement opportunities.
Mentorship programs can significantly speed up career advancement.
Career advancement becomes harder without a clear personal development plan.
The company promotes career advancement by offering regular training and workshops.
extraExampleTranslations: Tarmoq qurish karyera o'sishida katta rol o'ynaydi.
U karyera o'sishiga tayyorligini ko'rsatish uchun qo'shimcha mas'uliyatlar qabul qildi.
Karyera o'sishi har doim ham yuqori maosh emas — bu o'sish haqida ham.
U yaxshiroq karyera o'sishi imkoniyatlarini topish uchun boshqa kompaniyaga o'tdi.
Murabbiylik dasturlari karyera o'sishini sezilarli darajada tezlashtirishi mumkin.
Aniq shaxsiy rivojlanish rejasisiz karyera o'sishi qiyinlashadi.
Kompaniya muntazam treninglar va seminarlar taklif qilib, karyera o'sishini rag'batlantiradi.

words.definition: the feeling of contentment and fulfillment you get from your work
words.definitionUz: ishingizdan mamnun va baxtli his qilish, o'z ishingiz sizga yoqishi va ma'no berishi
words.example1: Job satisfaction is just as important as a good salary for many workers.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p ishchilar uchun ishdan qoniqish yaxshi maosh kabi muhimdir.
words.example2: She reported high job satisfaction after switching to a role she was passionate about.
words.example2Translation: U o'ziga yoqadigan lavozimga o'tgandan so'ng yuqori ishdan qoniqishni e'tirof etdi.
words.example3: Low job satisfaction often leads to employees looking for work elsewhere.
words.example3Translation: Past ishdan qoniqish ko'pincha xodimlarning boshqa joyda ish qidirishiga olib keladi.
extraExamples: Research shows that job satisfaction improves overall mental health.
He found job satisfaction in helping others as a nurse.
A toxic workplace environment destroys job satisfaction quickly.
Job satisfaction increases when employees feel valued and respected.
She had a high salary but low job satisfaction — and eventually quit.
Managers who listen to their teams tend to create higher job satisfaction.
Job satisfaction tends to decline when there are no growth opportunities.
extraExampleTranslations: Tadqiqotlar shuni ko'rsatadiki, ishdan qoniqish umumiy ruhiy salomatlikni yaxshilaydi.
U hamshira sifatida boshqalarga yordam berishda ishdan qoniqish topdi.
Zaharli ish muhiti ishdan qoniqishni tez yo'q qiladi.
Xodimlar qadrlanadi va hurmat qilinadi deb his qilganlarida ishdan qoniqish ortadi.
Uning maoshi yuqori, lekin ishdan qoniqishi past edi — va oxir-oqibat u ishdan ketdi.
Jamoasini tinglaydigan menejerlar ko'proq ishdan qoniqish yaratishga moyil.
O'sish imkoniyatlari bo'lmaganda ishdan qoniqish pasayish tendentsiyasiga ega.

words.word: What I mean by that is
words.definition: used to clarify or explain something you just said
words.definitionUz: az oldin aytgan gapingizni yanada aniqroq tushuntirish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The system is outdated. What I mean by that is it cannot handle modern workloads.
words.example1Translation: Tizim eskirgan. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, u zamonaviy yuklamalarni ko'tara olmaydi.
words.example2: She is very direct. What I mean by that is she never sugarcoats her feedback.
words.example2Translation: U juda to'g'riso'z. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, u fikr-mulohazasini hech qachon yumshatmaydi.
words.example3: The project is at risk. What I mean by that is we may miss the deadline.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha xavf ostida. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, biz muddatni o'tkazib yuborishimiz mumkin.
extraExamples: The app is not user-friendly. What I mean by that is new users get confused immediately.
He is not committed. What I mean by that is he misses half the meetings.
The results were unexpected. What I mean by that is we got far more responses than planned.
The course is intensive. What I mean by that is you study for six hours a day.
Her tone changed. What I mean by that is she stopped being as open as before.
The deal fell through. What I mean by that is both sides failed to agree on terms.
The feedback was mixed. What I mean by that is some loved it and others did not.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilova foydalanuvchi uchun qulay emas. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, yangi foydalanuvchilar darhol chalkashib qoladi.
U sadoqatli emas. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, u yig'ilishlarning yarmini o'tkazib yuboradi.
Natijalar kutilmagan edi. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, biz rejalashtirilganidan ancha ko'p javob oldik.
Kurs juda qizg'in. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, kuniga olti soat o'qiysiz.
Uning ohangi o'zgardi. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, u avvalgidek ochiq bo'lishni to'xtatdi.
Bitim amalga oshmadi. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, ikkala tomon ham shartlar bo'yicha kelisha olmadi.
Fikr-mulohazalar aralash bo'ldi. Bu bilan aytmoqchimanki, bir qismi yoqtirdi, boshqalari esa yoqtirmadi.

words.definition: used to introduce a clearer or more precise restatement of something just said
words.definitionUz: oldin aytilgan gapni aniqroq yoki to'liqroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The office will be closed on Monday, that is to say you do not need to come in.
words.example1Translation: Ofis dushanba kuni yopiq bo'ladi, ya'ni kelishingiz shart emas.
words.example2: She is bilingual, that is to say she speaks two languages fluently.
words.example2Translation: U ikki tilli, ya'ni ikki tilda ravon gaplasha oladi.
words.example3: The position has been filled, that is to say we are no longer accepting applications.
words.example3Translation: Lavozim band qilindi, ya'ni biz endi arizalar qabul qilmayapmiz.
extraExamples: The task is optional, that is to say no one will be penalized for skipping it.
He is self-employed, that is to say he works for himself and has no fixed salary.
The update is mandatory, that is to say all users must install it before Friday.
The event is invite-only, that is to say you need a personal invitation to attend.
The budget has been cut, that is to say we have less money to work with this quarter.
The contract is void, that is to say neither party is bound by it anymore.
The data is anonymized, that is to say no personal information is stored.
extraExampleTranslations: Vazifa ixtiyoriy, ya'ni uni o'tkazib yuborgan uchun hech kim jazolanmaydi.
U o'z hisobiga ishlaydi, ya'ni o'zi uchun ishlaydi va belgilangan maoshi yo'q.
Yangilanish majburiy, ya'ni barcha foydalanuvchilar uni jumagacha o'rnatishi kerak.
Tadbir faqat taklif asosida, ya'ni qatnashish uchun shaxsiy taklif kerak.
Byudjet qisqartirildi, ya'ni bu chorakda ishlash uchun kamroq pulimiz bor.
Shartnoma haqiqiy emas, ya'ni endi hech bir tomon u bilan bog'liq emas.
Ma'lumotlar anonimlashtirilib, ya'ni hech qanday shaxsiy ma'lumot saqlanmaydi.

words.definition: used to add another point, often to strengthen an argument or show accumulation
words.definitionUz: biror fikrga yana bir muhim qo'shimcha ma'lumot yoki dalil qo'shish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The hotel was expensive and far from the centre. On top of that, the Wi-Fi did not work.
words.example1Translation: Mehmonxona qimmat va markazdan uzoq edi. Bundan tashqari, Wi-Fi ham ishlamadi.
words.example2: He arrived late and forgot the documents. On top of that, he had the wrong address.
words.example2Translation: U kech keldi va hujjatlarni unutdi. Ustiga ustak, noto'g'ri manzili ham bor edi.
words.example3: The app crashes regularly. On top of that, it drains the battery very fast.
words.example3Translation: Ilova muntazam ravishda ishdan chiqadi. Bundan tashqari, u batareyani juda tez sarflaydi.
extraExamples: The deadline was moved earlier. On top of that, two team members got sick.
She had no prior experience. On top of that, she had never managed a team before.
The flight was delayed by four hours. On top of that, our luggage was lost.
The product had poor reviews. On top of that, the return policy was very strict.
He was already stressed about work. On top of that, his laptop stopped working.
The training was poorly organized. On top of that, the materials were outdated.
Sales dropped this quarter. On top of that, two major clients cancelled their contracts.
extraExampleTranslations: Muddat oldinroq ko'chirildi. Bundan tashqari, ikki jamoa a'zosi kasal bo'lib qoldi.
Uning oldindan tajribasi yo'q edi. Bundan tashqari, u hech qachon jamoa boshqarmagan edi.
Parvoz to'rt soatga kechikdi. Bundan tashqari, yuklarimiz yo'qoldi.
Mahsulot yomon sharhlar oldi. Bundan tashqari, qaytarish siyosati juda qattiq edi.
U allaqachon ish haqida stress qilardi. Ustiga ustak, noutbuki ham ishdan chiqdi.
O'qitish yomon tashkil etildi. Bundan tashqari, materiallar eskirgan edi.
Bu chorakda savdo tushdi. Bundan tashqari, ikkita yirik mijoz shartnomalarini bekor qildi.

words.definition: used to introduce a personal opinion, often a strong or direct one
words.definitionUz: o'z shaxsiy fikrini, ko'pincha dadil yoki to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ifodalash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: If you ask me, the whole approach needs to be rethought from the start.
words.example1Translation: Mening fikrimcha, butun yondashuvni boshidan qayta ko'rib chiqish kerak.
words.example2: If you ask me, they made the right call by delaying the launch.
words.example2Translation: Menga qolsa, ular ishga tushirishni kechiktirish orqali to'g'ri qaror qilishdi.
words.example3: If you ask me, the real issue is a lack of clear communication.
words.example3Translation: Mening fikrimcha, asosiy muammo aniq muloqotning yo'qligi.
extraExamples: If you ask me, the new design is a step backward.
If you ask me, he is the strongest candidate for the role.
If you ask me, they should have started this project months ago.
If you ask me, the pricing is too high for what you get.
If you ask me, working remotely is far more productive.
If you ask me, the team needs stronger leadership, not more tools.
If you ask me, the biggest mistake was ignoring early user feedback.
extraExampleTranslations: Mening fikrimcha, yangi dizayn bir qadam orqaga.
Menga qolsa, u lavozim uchun eng kuchli nomzod.
Mening fikrimcha, ular bu loyihani oylar oldin boshlashi kerak edi.
Menga qolsa, narx olganingizga nisbatan juda baland.
Mening fikrimcha, masofadan ishlash ancha samaraliroq.
Menga qolsa, jamoaga ko'proq asboblar emas, kuchliroq rahbarlik kerak.
Mening fikrimcha, eng katta xato dastlabki foydalanuvchi fikrlarini e'tiborsiz qoldirish edi.

words.word: Moving on to the next reason
words.definition: used to transition from one point or argument to the next in a structured way
words.definitionUz: nutq yoki bahs davomida bir fikrdan ikkinchisiga o'tishni bildiruvchi ibora
words.example1: The first issue is cost. Moving on to the next reason, the timeline is also a problem.
words.example1Translation: Birinchi muammo xarajat. Keyingi sababga kelsak, muddat ham muammo.
words.example2: We covered the benefits. Moving on to the next reason, let us talk about the risks.
words.example2Translation: Biz afzalliklarni ko'rib chiqdik. Keyingi sababga kelsak, xatarlar haqida gaplashamiz.
words.example3: The first factor is location. Moving on to the next reason, price plays a huge role.
words.example3Translation: Birinchi omil joylashuv. Keyingi sababga kelsak, narx ham katta rol o'ynaydi.
extraExamples: We discussed the environmental impact. Moving on to the next reason, consider the economic costs.
The first point was user experience. Moving on to the next reason, security is equally important.
We have looked at the data. Moving on to the next reason, let us examine the feedback.
The design is one factor. Moving on to the next reason, functionality matters just as much.
Health is the first concern. Moving on to the next reason, lifestyle habits also play a key role.
We covered team structure. Moving on to the next reason, communication tools are also critical.
Cost is one issue. Moving on to the next reason, the lack of support is equally serious.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz atrof-muhitga ta'sirni muhokama qildik. Keyingi sababga kelsak, iqtisodiy xarajatlarni ko'rib chiqing.
Birinchi nuqta foydalanuvchi tajribasi edi. Keyingi sababga kelsak, xavfsizlik ham bir xil muhim.
Biz ma'lumotlarni ko'rib chiqdik. Keyingi sababga kelsak, fikr-mulohazalarni ko'rib chiqamiz.
Dizayn bir omil. Keyingi sababga kelsak, funksionallik ham bir xil ahamiyatga ega.
Sog'liq birinchi tashvish. Keyingi sababga kelsak, turmush tarzi odatlari ham muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Biz jamoa tuzilmasini ko'rib chiqdik. Keyingi sababga kelsak, muloqot vositalari ham muhim.
Xarajat bitta muammo. Keyingi sababga kelsak, qo'llab-quvvatlashning yo'qligi ham bir xil jiddiy.

words.definition: used to say that something is generally true or happens the majority of the time
words.definitionUz: biror narsa ko'pincha yoki aksariyat holatlarda to'g'ri yoki shunday bo'lishini bildiruvchi ibora
words.example1: In most cases, the problem can be fixed with a simple restart.
words.example1Translation: Ko'pgina hollarda muammoni oddiy qayta ishga tushirish orqali hal qilish mumkin.
words.example2: In most cases, early feedback leads to a better final product.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pgina hollarda erta fikr-mulohaza yaxshiroq yakuniy mahsulotga olib keladi.
words.example3: In most cases, users do not read the full terms before agreeing.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pgina hollarda foydalanuvchilar rozi bo'lishdan oldin to'liq shartlarni o'qishmaydi.
extraExamples: In most cases, miscommunication is the root cause of team conflicts.
In most cases, students who study consistently perform better in exams.
In most cases, the cheapest option ends up costing more in the long run.
In most cases, complaints are resolved within three working days.
In most cases, people resist change even when it benefits them.
In most cases, a clear brief saves time and avoids rework.
In most cases, the first draft is never the final version.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pgina hollarda noto'g'ri muloqot jamoa ziddiyatlarining asosiy sababi hisoblanadi.
Ko'pgina hollarda izchil o'qiydigan talabalar imtihonlarda yaxshiroq natija ko'rsatadi.
Ko'pgina hollarda eng arzon variant uzoq muddatda ko'proq xarajatga olib keladi.
Ko'pgina hollarda shikoyatlar uch ish kuni ichida hal qilinadi.
Ko'pgina hollarda odamlar o'zgarish ularga foyda keltirsa ham unga qarshilik qiladi.
Ko'pgina hollarda aniq ko'rsatma vaqtni tejaydi va qayta ishlashdan qochadi.
Ko'pgina hollarda birinchi qoralama hech qachon yakuniy versiya bo'lmaydi.

words.definition: used to introduce a contrasting point after something has just been stated
words.definitionUz: oldin aytilgan fikrga qarama-qarshi yoki uni cheklovchi boshqa fikrni kiritish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The app has some bugs. Having said that, the core features work very well.
words.example1Translation: Ilovada ba'zi xatolar bor. Lekin asosiy xususiyatlar juda yaxshi ishlaydi.
words.example2: The course is quite difficult. Having said that, it is absolutely worth it.
words.example2Translation: Kurs juda qiyin. Shunga qaramay, u mutlaqo bunga arziydi.
words.example3: The hotel was not perfect. Having said that, the location was excellent.
words.example3Translation: Mehmonxona mukammal emas edi. Ammo joylashuvi ajoyib edi.
extraExamples: The salary is lower than expected. Having said that, the benefits package is strong.
He lacks experience. Having said that, his enthusiasm is hard to ignore.
The review process is slow. Having said that, the quality of output is consistently high.
The design looks simple. Having said that, it took months of work to get there.
Sales were down this quarter. Having said that, customer retention improved significantly.
The task was tedious. Having said that, it taught me a lot about attention to detail.
The new policy has drawbacks. Having said that, it solves more problems than it creates.
extraExampleTranslations: Maosh kutilganidan past. Lekin imtiyozlar to'plami kuchli.
Uning tajribasi yetarli emas. Shunga qaramay, uning ishtiyoqini e'tiborsiz qoldirib bo'lmaydi.
Ko'rib chiqish jarayoni sekin. Ammo chiqish sifati izchil yuqori.
Dizayn oddiy ko'rinadi. Lekin unga yetish uchun oylar davomida ish ketdi.
Bu chorakda savdo tushdi. Shunga qaramay, mijozlarni ushlab turish sezilarli darajada yaxshilandi.
Vazifa zerikarli edi. Ammo u menga tafsilotlarga e'tibor berish haqida ko'p narsa o'rgatti.
Yangi siyosatning kamchiliklari bor. Lekin u yaratganidan ko'ra ko'proq muammoni hal qiladi.

words.word: I would put it down to
words.definition: used to say what you believe caused a particular result or situation
words.definitionUz: biror natija yoki holatning sababini o'z fikringizga ko'ra izohlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The project succeeded and I would put it down to strong teamwork.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha muvaffaqiyatli bo'ldi va bunga kuchli jamoaviy ish sababchi deb o'ylayman.
words.example2: I would put the high turnover down to poor management practices.
words.example2Translation: Yuqori kadrlar almashinuviga yomon boshqaruv amaliyotlari sababchi deb o'ylayman.
words.example3: She improved so fast and I would put it down to daily consistent practice.
words.example3Translation: U juda tez yaxshilandi va bunga kunlik izchil mashq sababchi deb o'ylayman.
extraExamples: I would put the low engagement down to a weak onboarding experience.
I would put his confidence down to years of public speaking practice.
I would put the app's success down to its simplicity and speed.
I would put the team's burnout down to unrealistic deadlines.
I would put the drop in sales down to increased competition in the market.
I would put her calm attitude down to a lot of experience handling pressure.
I would put the miscommunication down to unclear roles within the team.
extraExampleTranslations: Past jalb etilishga zaif onboarding tajribasi sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Uning ishonchiga yillar davomida ommaviy nutq amaliyoti sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Ilovaning muvaffaqiyatiga uning soddaligi va tezligi sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Jamoaning charchab ketishiga haqiqatga to'g'ri kelmaydigan muddatlar sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Savdoning tushishiga bozorlardagi raqobatning kuchayishi sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Uning sokin munosabatiga bosim ostida ishlashning ko'p tajribasi sababchi deb o'ylayman.
Noto'g'ri tushunishga jamoaning aniq rollari yo'qligi sababchi deb o'ylayman.

words.word: If I were to give an example I'd say
words.pronunciation: /ɪf aɪ wɜː tuː ɡɪv ən ɪɡˈzɑːmpl aɪd seɪ/
words.definition: used to introduce an illustrative example in a careful or formal way
words.definitionUz: o'z fikrini yoki tushuntirishni aniqroq qilish uchun misol keltirmoqchi bo'lganda ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: If I were to give an example, I'd say look at how streaming changed the music industry.
words.example1Translation: Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, striming musiqa sanoatini qanday o'zgartirganligi haqida o'ylang.
words.example2: If I were to give an example, I'd say a daily review habit changed my productivity completely.
words.example2Translation: Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, kunlik ko'rib chiqish odati mening samaradorligimni butunlay o'zgartirdi.
words.example3: If I were to give an example, I'd say consider how remote work shifted office culture globally.
words.example3Translation: Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, masofadan ishlash ofis madaniyatini butun dunyoda qanday o'zgartirganligi haqida o'ylang.
extraExamples: If I were to give an example, I'd say look at how social media reshaped political campaigns.
If I were to give an example, I'd say consider how electric cars disrupted the auto industry.
If I were to give an example, I'd say think about how smartphones replaced cameras, maps, and wallets.
If I were to give an example, I'd say look at how one negative review can damage a brand's reputation.
If I were to give an example, I'd say consider a student who studied thirty minutes daily and outperformed the rest.
If I were to give an example, I'd say look at how clear onboarding reduces user drop-off significantly.
If I were to give an example, I'd say think about how a single mentor changed the direction of someone's career.
extraExampleTranslations: Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, ijtimoiy tarmoqlar siyosiy kampaniyalarni qanday o'zgartirganligi haqida o'ylang.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, elektr mashinalar avtomobil sanoatini qanday buzib yuborganini ko'rib chiqing.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, smartfonlar kameralar, xaritalar va hamyonlarni qanday almashtirganini o'ylang.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, bitta salbiy sharh brendning obro'sini qanday yo'qotishi mumkinligini ko'ring.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, har kuni o'ttiz daqiqa o'qigan va qolganlardan ustun chiqqan talabani ko'rib chiqing.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, aniq onboarding foydalanuvchilarni qanday sezilarli darajada kamaytirishi haqida o'ylang.
Misol keltiradigan bo'lsam, aytardimki, bitta mentor kimningdir karera yo'nalishini qanday o'zgartirganini o'ylang.

words.definition: used to restate something in a different or simpler way to make it clearer
words.definitionUz: aytilgan fikrni boshqacha, odatda soddaroq tarzda qayta ifodalash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: The margin is too low to sustain the business. To put it another way, we are spending more than we earn.
words.example1Translation: Marj biznesni saqlab turish uchun juda past. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, biz topganimizdan ko'proq sarflamoqdamiz.
words.example2: The interface is not intuitive enough. To put it another way, users cannot figure it out without help.
words.example2Translation: Interfeys yetarlicha intuitiv emas. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, foydalanuvchilar yordamsiz uni tushuna olmaydi.
words.example3: The strategy lacks focus. To put it another way, we are trying to do too many things at once.
words.example3Translation: Strategiya yo'nalishdan mahrum. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, biz bir vaqtning o'zida juda ko'p narsani qilmoqchi bo'lmoqdamiz.
extraExamples: The deadline is not realistic. To put it another way, the team simply does not have enough time.
The content is too technical. To put it another way, the average reader will not understand it.
The onboarding is broken. To put it another way, new users give up before they see the value.
The feedback was harsh. To put it another way, they did not hold back at all.
The results were not what we hoped for. To put it another way, the campaign did not work.
The plan is too vague. To put it another way, nobody knows exactly what they are supposed to do.
He is very detail-oriented. To put it another way, he never lets anything slip through.
extraExampleTranslations: Muddat haqiqatga to'g'ri kelmaydi. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, jamoaning shunchaki yetarli vaqti yo'q.
Kontent juda texnik. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, oddiy o'quvchi uni tushunmaydi.
Onboarding ishlamaydi. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, yangi foydalanuvchilar qiymatni ko'rishdan oldin taslim bo'lishadi.
Fikr-mulohaza qattiq edi. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, ular umuman o'zlarini tutishmadi.
Natijalar umid qilganimizdek bo'lmadi. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, kampaniya ishlamadi.
Reja juda noaniq. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, hech kim nima qilishi kerakligini aniq bilmaydi.
U tafsilotlarga juda e'tibor beradi. Boshqacha qilib aytganda, u hech narsani o'tkazib yubormaslikka e'tibor beradi.

words.definition: To give a good reason for something or show that it is acceptable
words.definitionUz: Biror qaror yoki harakatning to'g'ri yoki zarurligini tushuntirish, sabab ko'rsatmoq
words.example1: You don't need to justify your decision to anyone.
words.example1Translation: Siz hech kimga qaroringizni asoslashingiz shart emas.
words.example2: The manager tried to justify the budget cuts during the meeting.
words.example2Translation: Menejer yig'ilishda byudjet qisqarishini asoslashga harakat qildi.
words.example3: Nothing can justify treating people with disrespect.
words.example3Translation: Hech narsa odamlarga hurmatsizlik bilan munosabatda bo'lishni oqlay olmaydi.
extraExamples: Can you justify why this project is worth the investment?
She struggled to justify her absence from the team meeting.
He justified his late arrival by blaming the traffic.
The results justified all the hard work the team put in.
You should be able to justify every major decision you make at work.
The company could not justify raising prices during an economic crisis.
He tried to justify his behavior, but nobody believed his reasons.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu loyiha nima uchun investitsiyaga arzishini asoslab bera olasizmi?
U jamoa yig'ilishidan qolganini asoslay olmadi.
U kech kelganini tiqilinchga bog'lab oqlashga harakat qildi.
Natijalar jamoaning sarflagan barcha mehnatini oqladi.
Ishda qabul qilgan har bir muhim qaroringizni asoslay olishingiz kerak.
Kompaniya iqtisodiy inqiroz davrida narxlarni oshirishni oqlay olmadi.
U xulqini oqlashga harakat qildi, lekin hech kim uning sabablariga ishonmadi.

words.definition: To say or show that something is the opposite of or very different from something else
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki fikrga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri qarama-qarshi bo'lmoq yoki uni rad etmoq
words.example1: His actions contradict his words completely.
words.example1Translation: Uning harakatlari so'zlariga butunlay zid.
words.example2: The new evidence contradicts what the witness said in court.
words.example2Translation: Yangi dalillar guvohning sudda aytganlariga zid.
words.example3: Don't contradict your manager in front of the whole team.
words.example3Translation: Butun jamoa oldida rahbaringizga qarshi gapirmang.
extraExamples: The two reports contradict each other on almost every point.
She contradicted herself three times during the interview.
His lifestyle directly contradicts the values he claims to have.
The study's findings contradict earlier research on the topic.
It's frustrating when someone contradicts you without any evidence.
He contradicted the official statement with his own version of events.
The data clearly contradicts the company's public claims.
extraExampleTranslations: Ikki hisobot deyarli har bir nuqtada bir-biriga zid.
U intervyu davomida o'ziga uch marta zid gapirdi.
Uning hayot tarzi u da'vo qilgan qadriyatlarga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri zid.
Tadqiqot natijalari mavzu bo'yicha avvalgi tadqiqotlarga zid.
Kimdir hech qanday dalilsiz sizga zid gapirganda asabingiz buziladi.
U rasmiy bayonotga o'zining voqealar versiyasi bilan zid gapirdi.
Ma'lumotlar kompaniyaning ommaviy da'volariga aniq zid.

words.definition: To suggest something without saying it directly
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytmasdan, lekin so'zlar yoki xulq-atvor orqali sezdirmoq
words.example1: His tone implied that he was unhappy with the results.
words.example1Translation: Uning ohangi natijalardan norozi ekanini anglatdi.
words.example2: Are you implying that I made a mistake?
words.example2Translation: Men xato qildim demoqchi bo'lyapsizmi?
words.example3: Her silence implied that she disagreed with the plan.
words.example3Translation: Uning jim turishi rejaga rozi emasligini anglatdi.
extraExamples: He implied that the project would be cancelled without saying it directly.
What exactly are you implying with that comment?
Her body language implied she was nervous, even though she seemed calm.
The article implies that the company knew about the problem early on.
I wasn't accusing you — I was just implying we could improve.
His question implied he didn't trust the team's judgment.
Saying nothing sometimes implies agreement, which can be dangerous.
extraExampleTranslations: U loyiha bekor qilinishini to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytmasdan sezdirdi.
U izoh bilan nima demoqchi ekaningizni ayting.
Uning tana tili asabiylashayotganini anglatdi, garchi u xotirjam ko'rinsa ham.
Maqola kompaniya muammoni boshidanoq bilganini anglatadi.
Men sizni ayblayotgan emasdim — shunchaki yaxshilashimiz mumkinligini sezdirdim.
Uning savoli jamoaning fikriga ishonmasligini anglatdi.
Ba'zan hech narsa demaslih rozilikni anglatadi, bu esa xavfli bo'lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To gradually weaken or damage something or someone's strength, confidence, or authority
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki odamning kuchini, ishonchini yoki obro'sini asta-sekin pasaytirmoq
words.example1: Lack of sleep can seriously undermine your performance at work.
words.example1Translation: Uyqu yetishmasligi ishda ko'rsatkichingizni jiddiy zaiflashi mumkin.
words.example2: His constant criticism undermined her confidence over time.
words.example2Translation: Uning doimiy tanqidi vaqt o'tishi bilan uning ishonchini zaiflashtirdi.
words.example3: Spreading rumors about a colleague undermines the whole team's trust.
words.example3Translation: Hamkasb haqida mish-mish tarqatish butun jamoaning ishonchini zaiflashtiradi.
extraExamples: Poor communication can undermine even the best business strategy.
He tried to undermine her authority by going directly to her boss.
Negative self-talk can undermine your motivation without you realizing it.
The scandal undermined the politician's reputation permanently.
Don't let one bad experience undermine your confidence in yourself.
Constant interruptions during meetings undermine productive discussion.
Their decision to cut training budgets undermined employee development.
extraExampleTranslations: Yomon muloqot hatto eng yaxshi biznes strategiyasini ham zaiflashtirishi mumkin.
U to'g'ridan-to'g'ri xo'jayiniga borib uning obro'sini tushirishga harakat qildi.
Salbiy o'z-o'ziga gapirish siz sezmasdan motivatsiyangizni zaiflashtirishi mumkin.
Janjal siyosatchining obro'sini doimiy ravishda zaiflashtirdi.
Bitta yomon tajriba o'zingizga bo'lgan ishonchingizni zaiflashtirishiga yo'l qo'ymang.
Yig'ilishlarda doimiy uzilishlar samarali muhokamani zaiflashtiradi.
Treninglar byudjetini qisqartirish qarorlari xodimlarning rivojlanishini zaiflashtirdi.

words.definition: To publicly support or recommend a particular idea, policy, or course of action
words.definitionUz: Biror g'oya yoki siyosatni ochiqchasiga qo'llab-quvvatlash va boshqalarni ham unga ishontirishga harakat qilish
words.example1: Many doctors advocate for a balanced and healthy diet.
words.example1Translation: Ko'plab shifokorlar muvozanatli va sog'lom ovqatlanishni targ'ib qiladi.
words.example2: She has spent years advocating for equal pay in the workplace.
words.example2Translation: U yillar davomida ish joyida teng to'lovni qo'llab-quvvatlashga sarfladi.
words.example3: The organization advocates for the rights of homeless people.
words.example3Translation: Tashkilot uysiz odamlarning huquqlarini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
extraExamples: He strongly advocates for renewable energy as a solution to climate change.
Teachers should advocate for smaller class sizes to improve learning.
She became a well-known advocate for mental health awareness.
The charity advocates for better access to education in rural areas.
He advocates a stricter approach to financial regulation.
Young people are increasingly advocating for climate action.
She advocated for her team when management tried to cut resources.
extraExampleTranslations: U iqlim o'zgarishiga yechim sifatida qayta tiklanadigan energiyani qattiq qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
O'qituvchilar o'quv jarayonini yaxshilash uchun kichikroq sinf o'lchamlarini qo'llab-quvvatlashlari kerak.
U ruhiy salomatlik haqida xabardorlikni ommalashtiruvchi yetakchi targ'ibotchiga aylandi.
Xayriya jamiyati qishloq hududlarda ta'limga yaxshiroq kirishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
U moliyaviy tartibga solishga qattiqroq yondashuvni targ'ib qiladi.
Yoshlar tobora ko'proq iqlim uchun harakat qilishni targ'ib qilmoqda.
Rahbariyat resurslarni qisqartirishga uringanda u jamoasi uchun turib qoldi.

words.definition: Covering all or most things in great detail and leaving nothing important out
words.definitionUz: Biror mavzuni barcha muhim tomonlarni qamrab, chuqur va to'liq tarzda o'rganadigan yoki taqdim etadigan
words.example1: This is a comprehensive speaking course that covers every skill you need.
words.example1Translation: Bu kerakli barcha ko'nikmalarni qamrab olgan keng qamrovli gapirish kursi.
words.example2: The doctor ordered a comprehensive health check before the surgery.
words.example2Translation: Shifokor operatsiyadan oldin keng qamrovli tibbiy tekshiruv buyurdi.
words.example3: They published a comprehensive report on air pollution in the city.
words.example3Translation: Ular shahardagi havo ifloslanishi bo'yicha keng qamrovli hisobot e'lon qildi.
extraExamples: We need a comprehensive plan before we start the project.
She gave a comprehensive answer that addressed every question.
The new textbook offers a comprehensive overview of modern history.
A comprehensive background check is required for the position.
The company conducted a comprehensive review of all its policies.
His comprehensive knowledge of the subject impressed everyone.
The report was so comprehensive it took three months to write.
extraExampleTranslations: Loyihani boshlamasdan oldin keng qamrovli rejaga muhtojmiz.
U har bir savolni yoritgan keng qamrovli javob berdi.
Yangi darslik zamonaviy tarixga keng qamrovli umumiy nuqtai nazarni taklif etadi.
Lavozim uchun keng qamrovli tarixiy tekshiruv talab qilinadi.
Kompaniya barcha siyosatlarini keng qamrovli ko'rib chiqdi.
Uning mavzuni keng qamrovli bilimi hamma kishini hayratda qoldirdi.
Hisobot shu qadar keng qamrovli ediki, uni yozish uch oy vaqt oldi.

words.definition: Not based on clear thinking or logic, often driven by emotion rather than reason
words.definitionUz: Mantiq va aqlga asoslanmagan, ko'pincha his-tuyg'ular yoki qo'rquv bilan boshqariladigan fikr yoki xulq
words.example1: It's irrational to worry constantly about things that are out of your control.
words.example1Translation: Nazorating tashqarisidagi narsalar haqida doim tashvishlanish mantiqsiz.
words.example2: His irrational fear of flying stops him from taking many opportunities.
words.example2Translation: Uning uchishdan irrational qo'rquvi ko'p imkoniyatlardan foydalanishiga to'sqinlik qiladi.
words.example3: Making irrational decisions during a crisis can make things much worse.
words.example3Translation: Inqiroz davrida mantiqsiz qarorlar qabul qilish vaziyatni yanada yomonlashtirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She knew her anger was irrational but couldn't control it.
Irrational beliefs can hold people back from reaching their potential.
He made an irrational purchase and spent his rent money on a watch.
Fear often makes people behave in irrational ways.
Therapy helps people identify and challenge their irrational thoughts.
It's completely irrational to blame yourself for things outside your control.
The crowd's irrational panic made the situation far more dangerous.
extraExampleTranslations: U g'azabi mantiqsiz ekanini bilardi, lekin nazorat qila olmasdi.
Irrational e'tiqodlar odamlarni o'z salohiyatiga erishishdan to'sib qo'yishi mumkin.
U mantiqsiz xarid qildi va ijara pulini soatga sarfladi.
Qo'rquv ko'pincha odamlarni mantiqsiz tarzda harakat qilishiga majbur qiladi.
Terapiya odamlarga irrational fikrlarini aniqlash va ularga qarshi turishga yordam beradi.
O'z nazorating tashqarisidagi narsalar uchun o'zingizni ayblash butunlay mantiqsiz.
Olomon irrational vahimasi vaziyatni ancha xavfliroq qildi.

words.definition: Large or important enough to have a noticeable effect or to be worth attention
words.definitionUz: Sezilarli darajada katta yoki muhim bo'lib, e'tiborga olinishga arzigulik ta'sir ko'rsatadigan
words.example1: There has been a significant improvement in her English over the past year.
words.example1Translation: O'tgan yil davomida uning ingliz tilida sezilarli yaxshilanish bo'ldi.
words.example2: The discovery was significant because it changed how scientists understood the disease.
words.example2Translation: Bu kashfiyot muhim edi, chunki u olimlarning kasallikni qanday tushunishini o'zgartirdi.
words.example3: Cost is a significant factor when choosing where to live.
words.example3Translation: Xarajat qayerda yashashni tanlashda muhim omil hisoblanadi.
extraExamples: The new policy had a significant impact on employee satisfaction.
He made a significant contribution to the success of the project.
There is a significant difference between knowing and understanding.
Her absence had a significant effect on the team's performance.
The company reported a significant increase in profits this quarter.
This is a significant moment in the history of the organization.
Even a small change in habit can have a significant impact over time.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi siyosat xodimlarning qoniqishiga sezilarli ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
U loyihaning muvaffaqiyatiga sezilarli hissa qo'shdi.
Bilish va tushunish o'rtasida sezilarli farq bor.
Uning yo'qligi jamoaning ish faoliyatiga sezilarli ta'sir qildi.
Kompaniya bu chorakda foydaning sezilarli oshganini xabar qildi.
Bu tashkilot tarixidagi muhim lahza.
Odatdagi kichik o'zgarish ham vaqt o'tishi bilan sezilarli ta'sir ko'rsatishi mumkin.

words.definition: As a result of something that has just been mentioned
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yuz berganligi sababli, uning oqibatida ro'y beradigan narsani ifodalaydi
words.example1: He missed several deadlines and consequently lost the contract.
words.example1Translation: U bir necha muddatni o'tkazib yubordi va natijada shartnomani yo'qotdi.
words.example2: She didn't sleep well and consequently struggled to focus during the exam.
words.example2Translation: U yaxshi uxlamadi va natijada imtihon davomida diqqatini jamlashda qiynaldi.
words.example3: The company ignored customer feedback and consequently lost market share.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya mijozlarning fikr-mulohazalarini e'tiborsiz qoldirdi va natijada bozor ulushini yo'qotdi.
extraExamples: He trained every day and consequently became one of the best in his field.
The budget was cut and consequently the project was delayed.
They failed to communicate clearly and consequently the whole team was confused.
She worked hard and consequently earned a promotion faster than expected.
The storm damaged the power lines and consequently thousands lost electricity.
He ignored the warning signs and consequently ended up in serious debt.
The product was defective and consequently the company issued a full recall.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni mashq qildi va natijada o'z sohasidagi eng yaxshilardan biriga aylandi.
Byudjet qisqartirildi va natijada loyiha kechikdi.
Ular aniq muloqot qilishmadi va natijada butun jamoa chalkashib qoldi.
U qattiq ishladi va natijada kutilganidan tezroq lavozim oshirishga erishdi.
Bo'ron elektr simlarini shikastladi va natijada minglab odamlar elektrsiz qoldi.
U ogohlantirish belgilarini e'tiborsiz qoldirdi va natijada jiddiy qarzga botdi.
Mahsulot nuqsonli edi va natijada kompaniya to'liq qaytarib olishni e'lon qildi.

words.definition: To carefully examine and judge the quality, value, or importance of something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki vaziyatning sifati, qiymati yoki ahamiyatini sinchkovlik bilan o'rganib baho bermoq
