words.example1: We need to evaluate the results before making a final decision.
words.example1Translation: Yakuniy qaror qabul qilishdan oldin natijalarni baholashimiz kerak.
words.example2: The teacher evaluated each student's writing individually.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchi har bir o'quvchining yozishini alohida baholadi.
words.example3: It's important to evaluate your progress regularly if you want to improve.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshilanishni xohlasangiz, rivojlanishingizni muntazam baholash muhim.
extraExamples: The committee will evaluate all applications before the end of the month.
She took time to evaluate her options before accepting the job offer.
Managers should regularly evaluate their team's performance.
The study evaluated the effectiveness of three different teaching methods.
He evaluated the risks carefully before signing the contract.
You need to evaluate whether this strategy is still working.
The software was evaluated by a team of independent experts.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo'mita oy oxirigacha barcha arizalarni baholaydi.
U ish taklifini qabul qilishdan oldin variantlarini baholashga vaqt ajratdi.
Menejerlar jamoalarining ish faoliyatini muntazam baholashlari kerak.
Tadqiqot uchta xil o'qitish usulining samaradorligini baholadi.
U shartnomani imzolashdan oldin xatarlarni diqqat bilan baholadi.
Ushbu strategiya hali ham ishlayotganligini baholashingiz kerak.
Dasturiy ta'minot mustaqil mutaxassislar guruhi tomonidan baholandi.

words.definition: used to tell someone to stop saying unnecessary things and say what is most important
words.definitionUz: biror kishidan keraksiz gaplarni qoldirib, asosiy fikrni aytishini so'rash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: We only have five minutes, so please get to the point.
words.example1Translation: Bizda faqat besh daqiqa bor, shuning uchun iltimos maqsadga o'ting.
words.example2: He talked for twenty minutes without getting to the point.
words.example2Translation: U yigirma daqiqa maqsadga o'tmasdan gapirdi.
words.example3: I appreciate the context, but can you get to the point?
words.example3Translation: Kontekstni qadrlayman, lekin maqsadga o'ta olasizmi?
extraExamples: Stop giving background and just get to the point.
The manager asked him to get to the point during the meeting.
She always takes too long to get to the point in her emails.
Get to the point, we do not have all day.
I could not follow his speech because he never got to the point.
If you want people to listen, get to the point faster.
He finally got to the point after ten minutes of introduction.
extraExampleTranslations: Fon bermasdan maqsadga o'ting.
Menejer yig'ilish davomida undan maqsadga o'tishini so'radi.
U xatlarida maqsadga o'tishga har doim ko'p vaqt sarflaydi.
Maqsadga o't, butun kunga vaqtimiz yo'q.
O'n daqiqa kirish so'zidan keyin u nihoyat maqsadga o'tdi.
Agar odamlar tinglashini istasangiz, tezroq maqsadga o'ting.
U o'n daqiqalik kirishdan keyin nihoyat maqsadga o'tdi.

words.definition: used to summarize a long or complicated situation in a few words
words.definitionUz: uzoq yoki murakkab voqeani qisqacha xulosa qilish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: Long story short, we missed the deadline and lost the client.
words.example1Translation: Gapni qisqasi, biz muddatni o'tkazib yubordik va mijozni yo'qotdik.
words.example2: There were a lot of complications, but long story short, we made it work.
words.example2Translation: Juda ko'p muammolar bo'ldi, lekin xullas, biz uni ishga tushirdik.
words.example3: Long story short, she got the job after three rounds of interviews.
words.example3Translation: Gapni qisqasi, u uch bosqich suhbatdan keyin ishga olindi.
extraExamples: Long story short, the project was cancelled after six months of work.
I tried to fix it myself, called a technician, waited a week, and long story short, I bought a new one.
Long story short, they never agreed and went their separate ways.
We had a huge argument and long story short, I quit.
Long story short, the idea worked better than anyone expected.
There was a lot of back and forth, but long story short, they signed the deal.
Long story short, I ended up doing the whole thing myself.
extraExampleTranslations: Gapni qisqasi, loyiha olti oylik ishdan keyin bekor qilindi.
O'zim tuzatishga harakat qildim, texnik chaqirdim, bir hafta kutdim va xullas, yangisini sotib oldim.
Gapni qisqasi, ular hech qachon kelisha olmadilar va alohida yo'l tutdilar.
Biz juda katta janjal qildik va xullas, men iste'foga chiqdim.
Gapni qisqasi, g'oya hamma kutganidan yaxshiroq ishladi.
Ko'p muzokaralar bo'ldi, lekin xullas, ular shartnomani imzoladilar.
Gapni qisqasi, oxir-oqibat hamma narsani o'zim qildim.

words.word: That's a bit of a stretch
words.translation: bu biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan, uncha ishonarlimas
words.definition: used to say that a claim or statement is exaggerated or not quite believable
words.definitionUz: biror da'vo yoki fikrning biroz oshirib yuborilganligi yoki ishonarsizligini bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: Saying this app will replace teachers is a bit of a stretch.
words.example1Translation: Bu ilova o'qituvchilarni almashtiradi deyish biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.
words.example2: Calling it a masterpiece is a bit of a stretch, but it is decent.
words.example2Translation: Uni shoh asar deb atash biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan, lekin u yaxshi.
words.example3: That is a bit of a stretch, do you have any data to support it?
words.example3Translation: Bu biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan, uni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun ma'lumotlaringiz bormi?
extraExamples: Saying one good quarter means the company is thriving is a bit of a stretch.
Calling him an expert after one course is a bit of a stretch.
That conclusion feels like a bit of a stretch based on the evidence.
It works well, but calling it perfect is a bit of a stretch.
Saying the whole team failed because of one person is a bit of a stretch.
That comparison is a bit of a stretch, the two situations are very different.
I get what you mean, but that is a bit of a stretch.
extraExampleTranslations: Bitta yaxshi chorak kompaniya rivojlanib ketayotganini anglatadi deyish biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.
Bitta kursdan keyin uni mutaxassis deb atash biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.
Bu xulosa dalillar asosida biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgandek tuyuladi.
U yaxshi ishlaydi, lekin mukammal deb atash biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.
Butun jamoa bir kishi sababli muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi deyish biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.
Bu taqqoslash biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan, ikki holat juda farqli.
Nima demoqchi ekanligingizni tushunaman, lekin bu biroz bo'rtirib yuborilgan.

words.definition: used to say you are extremely busy or overwhelmed with work or problems
words.definitionUz: juda ko'p ish yoki muammolarga botilib ketganlikni, hech qayerga vaqt topolmaslikni bildiruvchi ibora
words.example1: I cannot take on any new tasks right now, I am up to my neck in work.
words.example1Translation: Hozir yangi vazifalar ololmayman, ishga bo'ynimgacha botib ketganman.
words.example2: She has been up to her neck in deadlines all month.
words.example2Translation: U butun oy davomida muddatlarga bo'ynigacha botib yurdi.
words.example3: Sorry I did not call back, I have been up to my neck this week.
words.example3Translation: Qo'ng'iroq qilmaganim uchun kechirasiz, bu hafta bo'ynimgacha band bo'ldim.
extraExamples: We are up to our necks in complaints after the update went live.
I would love to help but I am up to my neck in reports right now.
He has been up to his neck in debt for years.
The whole team is up to their necks in the product launch.
I am up to my neck in messages and cannot reply to everything.
She is up to her neck in family responsibilities on top of her job.
We have been up to our necks since the new client came on board.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangilanish ishga tushirilgandan keyin shikoyatlarga bo'ynimizgacha botib ketdik.
Yordam berishni xohlar edim, lekin hozir hisobotlarga bo'ynimgacha botib ketganman.
U yillar davomida qarzga bo'ynigacha botib yurdi.
Butun jamoa mahsulotni ishga tushirishga bo'ynigacha botib ketdi.
Xabarlarga bo'ynimgacha botib ketganman va hamma narsaga javob bera olmayman.
U ish ustiga oilaviy majburiyatlarga ham bo'ynigacha botib yuradi.
Yangi mijoz qo'shilganidan beri bo'ynimizgacha band bo'lib ketdik.

words.definition: used to ask someone to continue sharing new information about a situation as it develops
words.definitionUz: biror kishi yuz berayotgan holat haqida yangi ma'lumotlarni sizga yetkazib turishini so'rash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: I cannot attend the meeting, but please keep me updated on the decisions made.
words.example1Translation: Yig'ilishga kela olmayman, lekin qabul qilingan qarorlar haqida meni xabardor qilib turing.
words.example2: Keep me updated on how the interview goes.
words.example2Translation: Suhbat qanday o'tgani haqida meni xabardor qilib tur.
words.example3: The situation is changing fast, so keep me updated throughout the day.
words.example3Translation: Vaziyat tez o'zgarmoqda, shuning uchun kun davomida meni xabardor qilib turing.
extraExamples: I am stepping out for an hour, keep me updated if anything urgent comes up.
Keep me updated on the delivery, I need it by noon.
She asked her team to keep her updated while she was travelling.
Keep me updated on the client's response after you send the proposal.
I am counting on you to keep me updated throughout the project.
Keep me updated on any changes to the schedule.
He told the developer to keep him updated on the bug fix progress.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir soatga chiqib ketaman, biror shoshilinch narsa bo'lsa meni xabardor qilib turing.
Yetkazib berish haqida meni xabardor qilib tur, tushgacha kerak.
U safarda bo'lgan paytida jamoasidan uni xabardor qilib turishlarini so'radi.
Taklifni yuborganingizdan keyin mijozning javobi haqida meni xabardor qilib turing.
Loyiha davomida meni xabardor qilib turishingizga ishonaman.
Jadvalga kiritilgan o'zgarishlar haqida meni xabardor qilib turing.
U dasturchi xatoni tuzatish jarayoni haqida uni xabardor qilib turishini so'radi.

words.definition: used to tell someone to stop wasting time and say what is most important directly
words.definitionUz: vaqtni behuda sarflamasdan asosiy fikrni to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytishni bildiruvchi ibora
words.example1: Let's cut to the chase, are you offering the job or not?
words.example1Translation: Gapni qisqartiraylik, siz ish taklif qilyapsizmi yoki yo'qmi?
words.example2: He cut to the chase and told us exactly what the problem was.
words.example2Translation: U gapni qisqartirib, muammoning nima ekanligini aniq aytdi.
words.example3: We have limited time, so let me cut to the chase.
words.example3Translation: Vaqtimiz cheklangan, shuning uchun gapni qisqartirib aytaman.
extraExamples: Cut to the chase, how much does it cost?
After a long introduction, she finally cut to the chase.
I appreciate the background, but can we just cut to the chase?
He is the kind of person who always cuts to the chase in meetings.
Cut to the chase, what do you actually need from us?
The client asked us to cut to the chase and show the final numbers.
Instead of a long email, she called and cut to the chase.
extraExampleTranslations: Gapni qisqartir, bu qancha turadi?
Uzoq kirishdan keyin u nihoyat gapni qisqartirdi.
Fonni qadrlayman, lekin faqat gapni qisqartira olamizmi?
U yig'ilishlarda doim gapni qisqartiradigan odamlar qatoriga kiradi.
Gapni qisqartir, bizdan aslida nima kerak?
Mijoz bizdan gapni qisqartirib yakuniy raqamlarni ko'rsatishimizni so'radi.
Uzun xat o'rniga u qo'ng'iroq qildi va gapni qisqartirdi.

words.word: Hit the nail on the head
words.definition: used to say that someone has described or identified something exactly and correctly
words.definitionUz: biror kishi biron narsani to'liq va aniq ta'riflagan yoki ifodalagan bo'lsa ishlatiladi
words.example1: You hit the nail on the head when you said the problem is poor communication.
words.example1Translation: Muammo yomon muloqot deyishingizda to'g'ri aytdingiz.
words.example2: That analysis hit the nail on the head, everyone agreed immediately.
words.example2Translation: Bu tahlil bor gapni aytdi, hamma darhol rozi bo'ldi.
words.example3: She hit the nail on the head with her description of how the team really feels.
words.example3Translation: U jamoa aslida qanday his qilayotganini tasvirlab, to'g'ri aytdi.
extraExamples: The review hit the nail on the head about the app's biggest weakness.
You really hit the nail on the head with that point about user trust.
His feedback hit the nail on the head and helped us fix the real issue.
That question hits the nail on the head, it is exactly what we need to address.
The consultant hit the nail on the head when he identified the bottleneck.
I think you hit the nail on the head, that is exactly why sales are falling.
Her summary of the situation hit the nail on the head completely.
extraExampleTranslations: Sharh ilovaning eng katta zaif tomonini to'g'ri ko'rsatdi.
Foydalanuvchi ishonchi haqidagi fikringiz bilan to'g'ri aytdingiz.
Uning fikri bor gapni aytdi va haqiqiy muammoni hal qilishimizga yordam berdi.
Bu savol bor gapni aytadi, bu biz hal qilishimiz kerak bo'lgan narsadir.
Konsultant to'siqni aniqlaganida to'g'ri aytdi.
O'ylaymanki, to'g'ri aytdingiz, savdo aynan shuning uchun tushmoqda.
Uning vaziyat haqidagi xulosasi butunlay bor gapni aytdi.

words.definition: used to tell someone you are ready and eager to listen to what they have to say
words.definitionUz: biror kishiga to'liq diqqat bilan tinglashga tayyorligingizni bildiruvchi ibora
words.example1: You said you had an idea for the project. I'm all ears.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha uchun g'oyangiz bor dedingiz. Gapiravering, butunlay tinglayapman.
words.example2: Go ahead and tell me what happened, I'm all ears.
words.example2Translation: Nima bo'lganini ayting, butunlay tinglayapman.
words.example3: If you have feedback on my work, I'm all ears.
words.example3Translation: Ishim haqida fikr-mulohazangiz bo'lsa, butunlay tinglayapman.
extraExamples: You mentioned there was a problem. I'm all ears, what is it?
Tell me your side of the story, I'm all ears.
I have ten minutes and I'm all ears if you want to talk it through.
Whenever you are ready to explain, I'm all ears.
She put her phone down and said she was all ears.
I'm all ears if you have a better solution.
We're all ears, go ahead and present your proposal.
extraExampleTranslations: Muammo borligini aytdingiz. Butunlay tinglayapman, nima gap?
Voqeaning o'z tomoningizni ayting, butunlay tinglayapman.
O'n daqiqam bor va muhokama qilmoqchi bo'lsangiz butunlay tinglayapman.
Tushuntirish uchun tayyor bo'lganingizda, butunlay tinglayapman.
U telefonini qo'yib, butunlay tinglayotganini aytdi.
Yaxshiroq yechimingiz bo'lsa, butunlay tinglayapman.
Biz hammamiz tinglayapmiz, taklifingizni taqdim eting.

words.definition: used to say that something is not surprising given the circumstances
words.definitionUz: biror narsa aniq sabablar ko'rinib turganida ajablanarli emasligini ifodalovchi ibora
words.example1: He stayed up until 3am. No wonder he looks exhausted today.
words.example1Translation: U ertalab soat 3gacha uxlamadi. Bugun charchagan ko'rinishi ajablanarli emas.
words.example2: No wonder the app is slow, it has not been updated in two years.
words.example2Translation: Ilova sekin bo'lishi ajablanarli emas, u ikki yil davomida yangilanmagan.
words.example3: She practises every single day. No wonder her skills are improving so fast.
words.example3Translation: U har kuni mashq qiladi. Uning ko'nikmalari shu qadar tez yaxshilanishi turgan gap.
extraExamples: No wonder he got the promotion, he works harder than anyone.
They skipped testing completely. No wonder there are so many bugs.
No wonder she is stressed, she is managing three projects alone.
He never asks for feedback. No wonder he keeps making the same mistakes.
No wonder the team lost motivation, no one acknowledged their effort.
They launched without research. No wonder users are confused.
No wonder the meeting ran long, there was no agenda.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning lavozimi oshirilishi ajablanarli emas, u hamma narsadan ko'proq ishlaydi.
Ular testni butunlay o'tkazib yuborishdi. Juda ko'p xatolar bo'lishi turgan gap.
U stress ostida bo'lishi ajablanarli emas, u uchta loyihani yolg'iz boshqarmoqda.
U hech qachon fikr-mulohaza so'ramaydi. U doim bir xil xatolarni takrorlashi turgan gap.
Jamoa motivatsiyasini yo'qotishi ajablanarli emas, hech kim ularning harakatlarini tan olmadi.
Ular tadqiqotsiz ishga tushirishdi. Foydalanuvchilar chalkashishi turgan gap.
Yig'ilish uzoq davom etishi ajablanarli emas, hech qanday kun tartibi yo'q edi.

words.translation: to'g'ri aytasan, yana bir bor ayt
words.definition: used to strongly agree with something someone has just said
words.definitionUz: biror kishi aytgan gapga to'liq qo'shilish va uni tasdiqlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora
words.example1: A: This project is taking forever. B: You can say that again.
words.example1Translation: A: Bu loyiha juda cho'zilib ketdi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
words.example2: A: The new update made everything slower. B: You can say that again.
words.example2Translation: A: Yangi yangilanish hamma narsani sekinlashtirdi. B: Yana bir bor ayt.
words.example3: A: That meeting could have been an email. B: You can say that again.
words.example3Translation: A: Bu yig'ilish oddiy xat bo'lishi mumkin edi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
extraExamples: A: It has been a rough week. B: You can say that again.
A: The traffic today was absolutely terrible. B: You can say that again.
A: That presentation went on way too long. B: You can say that again.
A: Working without clear goals is exhausting. B: You can say that again.
A: The instructions were impossible to follow. B: You can say that again.
A: Mondays always feel too short. B: You can say that again.
A: Remote work changed everything. B: You can say that again.
extraExampleTranslations: A: Bu hafta juda og'ir bo'ldi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
A: Bugungi tirbandlik mutlaqo dahshatli edi. B: Yana bir bor ayt.
A: Bu taqdimot juda uzoq cho'zildi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
A: Aniq maqsadlarsiz ishlash charchatadi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
A: Ko'rsatmalarga rioya qilish mumkin emas edi. B: Yana bir bor ayt.
A: Dushanbalar doim juda qisqa bo'ladi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.
A: Masofadan ishlash hamma narsani o'zgartirdi. B: To'g'ri aytasan.

words.definition: the general psychological and social qualities that all people share naturally
words.definitionUz: barcha odamlarda tabiiy ravishda mavjud bo'lgan umumiy xususiyatlar va xatti-harakatlar
words.example1: Jealousy is a common aspect of human nature.
words.example1Translation: Hasad inson tabiatining keng tarqalgan jihatidir.
words.example2: It is human nature to want to be accepted by others.
words.example2Translation: Boshqalar tomonidan qabul qilinishni xohlash inson tabiatiga xos.
words.example3: Human nature makes it difficult for people to change deeply held beliefs.
words.example3Translation: Inson tabiati odamlarga chuqur o'rnashgan e'tiqodlarini o'zgartirishni qiyinlashtiradi.
extraExamples: It is human nature to compare yourself to others around you.
Curiosity is one of the most powerful aspects of human nature.
Human nature drives us to seek comfort and avoid pain.
Understanding human nature helps you become a better leader.
It is simply human nature to fear the unknown.
Greed and generosity both exist side by side in human nature.
He studied philosophy to better understand human nature.
extraExampleTranslations: O'zingizni atrofingizidagilar bilan taqqoslash inson tabiatiga xos.
Qiziquvchanlik inson tabiatining eng kuchli jihatlaridan biridir.
Inson tabiati bizni qulaylik izlashga va og'riqdan qochishga undaydi.
Inson tabiatini tushunish sizni yaxshiroq rahbar bo'lishga yordam beradi.
Noma'lumdan qo'rqish shunchaki inson tabiatiga xos.
Ochko'zlik va saxiylik inson tabiatida yonma-yon mavjud.
U inson tabiatini yaxshiroq tushunish uchun falsafani o'rgandi.

words.translation: asosan bog'liq bo'lmoq, mohiyatan kelib taqalmoq
words.definition: to be the most important factor in a situation or decision
words.definitionUz: biror vaziyat yoki qarorning asosiy sababi yoki hal qiluvchi omili bo'lmoq
words.example1: In the end, it all comes down to how much effort you put in.
words.example1Translation: Oxir-oqibat, hammasi siz qancha kuch sarflashingizga bog'liq.
words.example2: The decision comes down to whether we can afford it or not.
words.example2Translation: Qaror bunga imkonimiz bor-yo'qligiga kelib taqaladi.
words.example3: Success in this field comes down to consistency and patience.
words.example3Translation: Bu sohadagi muvaffaqiyat izchillik va sabr-toqatga kelib taqaladi.
extraExamples: Choosing a career comes down to what you truly value in life.
It all comes down to trust when building long-term relationships.
The match came down to the last few seconds.
At the end of the day, it comes down to personal choice.
The project failed because it all came down to poor planning.
When choosing between two options, it often comes down to timing.
Her success came down to years of quiet, consistent hard work.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasbni tanlash hayotda nimani chin dildan qadrlashingizga kelib taqaladi.
Uzoq muddatli munosabatlar qurish ishonchga kelib taqaladi.
O'yin so'nggi bir necha soniyaga kelib taqaldi.
Oxir-oqibat, hammasi shaxsiy tanlovga bog'liq.
Loyiha muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi, chunki hammasi yomon rejalashtirish masalasiga kelib taqaldi.
Ikki variant o'rtasida tanlaganda, bu ko'pincha vaqtga kelib taqaladi.
Uning muvaffaqiyati yillar davomida tinch va izchil mehnatga kelib taqaldi.

words.definition: to be logical, reasonable, or understandable in a given situation
words.definitionUz: biror narsa mantiqli, oqilona yoki ma'qul bo'lish, tushunish uchun oson bo'lmoq
words.example1: It does not make sense to spend money on things you do not need.
words.example1Translation: Kerak bo'lmagan narsalarga pul sarflash mantiqqa to'g'ri kelmaydi.
words.example2: Does it make sense to drive two hours for a one-hour meeting?
words.example2Translation: Bir soatlik yig'ilish uchun ikki soat mashina haydash mantiqqa to'g'ri keladimi?
words.example3: It makes sense to save money before making a big purchase.
words.example3Translation: Katta xarid qilishdan oldin pul tejash mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
extraExamples: It makes sense to learn the basics before moving to advanced topics.
It does not make sense to argue over something so small.
Moving closer to work makes sense if you spend hours commuting every day.
It makes sense to back up your files before updating your system.
It makes sense to ask questions when you do not understand something.
Hiring more staff makes sense when the business is growing fast.
It did not make sense to continue the project after losing the main investor.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilg'or mavzularga o'tishdan oldin asoslarni o'rganish mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
Shunday kichkina narsa ustida bahslashish mantiqqa to'g'ri kelmaydi.
Agar har kuni soatlab yul yursangiz, ishga yaqinroq ko'chib o'tish mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
Tizimingizni yangilashdan oldin fayllarni zahiralash mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
Biror narsani tushunmasangiz, savol berish mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
Biznes tez o'sayotganda ko'proq xodim yolash mantiqqa to'g'ri keladi.
Asosiy investorni yo'qotgandan so'ng loyihani davom ettirish mantiqqa to'g'ri kelmadi.

words.definition: to make good use of an opportunity, or sometimes to use someone unfairly for your own benefit
words.definitionUz: biror imkoniyatdan yaxshi foydalanmoq, yoki ba'zan boshqa odamni o'z manfaati uchun adolatsiz ishlatmoq
words.example1: You should take advantage of every learning opportunity you get.
words.example1Translation: Siz oldingizga kelgan har qanday o'rganish imkoniyatidan foydalanishingiz kerak.
words.example2: She took advantage of the discount and bought three months in advance.
words.example2Translation: U chegirmadan foydalanib, uch oy oldindan xarid qildi.
words.example3: Some employers take advantage of workers who do not know their rights.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zi ish beruvchilar o'z huquqlarini bilmaydigan ishchilardan noto'g'ri foydalanadilar.
extraExamples: Take advantage of the free trial before committing to a subscription.
He took advantage of the quiet morning to finish his report.
She took advantage of her connections to get an interview at the company.
Do not let others take advantage of your kindness.
They took advantage of the low prices and bought extra supplies.
Take advantage of living in a city with so many cultural events.
He was taken advantage of because he was too trusting.
extraExampleTranslations: Obunaga o'tishdan oldin bepul sinov davridan foydalaning.
U hisobotini tugatish uchun tinch ertalabdan foydalandi.
U kompaniyada intervyu olish uchun aloqalaridan foydalandi.
Boshqalarga sizning mehribonligingizdan noto'g'ri foydalanishiga yo'l qo'ymang.
Ular past narxlardan foydalanib, qo'shimcha ehtiyot zaxiralarini sotib oldi.
Ko'plab madaniy tadbirlar bo'lgan shaharda yashashdan foydalaning.
U haddan ziyod ishonuvchan bo'lgani uchun undan foydalanib qolishdi.

words.definition: to use a situation, opportunity, or resource as fully and effectively as possible
words.definitionUz: biror imkoniyat, vaziyat yoki resursdan mumkin qadar to'liq va samarali foydalanmoq
words.example1: Try to make the most of your time abroad.
words.example1Translation: Chet eldagi vaqtingizdan maksimal darajada foydalanishga harakat qiling.
words.example2: She made the most of her small budget by planning carefully.
words.example2Translation: U puxta rejalashtirish orqali oz byudjetidan maksimal darajada foydalandi.
words.example3: Make the most of your youth — it does not last forever.
words.example3Translation: Yoshligingizdan maksimal foydalaning — u abadiy emas.
extraExamples: He made the most of the extra time by finishing two projects ahead of schedule.
Make the most of this sunny day and go outside.
They made the most of a difficult situation and came out stronger.
She made the most of her internship by asking questions and learning fast.
Make the most of every conversation — you never know what you might learn.
He was determined to make the most of his second chance.
Even with limited resources, they made the most of what they had.
extraExampleTranslations: U qo'shimcha vaqtdan foydalanib, ikkita loyihani jadvaldan oldin tugatdi.
Bu quyoshli kundan foydalaning va tashqariga chiqing.
Ular qiyin vaziyatdan maksimal foydalanib, kuchliroq bo'lib chiqdi.
U savol berib va tez o'rganib, amaliyotidan maksimal foydalandi.
Har qanday suhbatdan maksimal foydalaning — nima o'rganib qolishingizni hech qachon bilmaysiz.
U ikkinchi imkoniyatidan maksimal foydalanishga qat'iy edi.
Cheklangan resurslar bilan ham ular mavjud narsalardan maksimal foydalandilar.

words.definition: in order to help, benefit, or preserve something or someone
words.definitionUz: biror narsa yoki kimningdir manfaati, farovonligi yoki saqlanishi uchun biror ish qilmoq
words.example1: For the sake of your health, please stop smoking.
words.example1Translation: Sog'lig'ingiz uchun, iltimos, chekishni to'xtating.
words.example2: They stayed together for the sake of their children.
words.example2Translation: Ular farzandlarining manfaati uchun birga qoldilar.
words.example3: For the sake of clarity, let me explain this step by step.
words.example3Translation: Aniqlik uchun, buni bosqichma-bosqich tushuntiraman.
extraExamples: For the sake of peace, she chose not to argue.
He gave up his dream job for the sake of his family.
For the sake of honesty, I have to tell you what really happened.
They made sacrifices for the sake of a better future.
For the sake of the team, he kept his frustrations to himself.
She moved cities for the sake of her career.
For the sake of everyone involved, we need to find a solution quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Tinchlik uchun u bahslashmaslikni tanladi.
U oilasining manfaati uchun orzu qilgan ishidan voz kechdi.
Halollik uchun sizga aslida nima bo'lganini aytishim kerak.
Ular yaxshiroq kelajak uchun qurbonlik qildilar.
Jamoa manfaati uchun u asabiylashishini o'zida saqladi.
U karyerasi uchun boshqa shaharga ko'chdi.
Barcha manfaatdor tomonlar uchun tezda yechim topishimiz kerak.

words.definition: without being affected or stopped by something; no matter what
words.definitionUz: biror narsa to'sqinlik qilishidan yoki mavjudligidan qat'i nazar, baribir davom etmoq
words.example1: Regardless of any difficulties, you should keep going.
words.example1Translation: Har qanday qiyinchiliklarga qaramay, davom etishingiz kerak.
words.example2: She finished the race regardless of the pain she was in.
words.example2Translation: U og'riqqa qaramay, poygani tugatdi.
words.example3: Everyone is treated equally here regardless of their background.
words.example3Translation: Bu yerda hamma kelib chiqishidan qat'i nazar tenglik bilan muomala qilinadi.
extraExamples: He showed up to work regardless of how he was feeling.
Regardless of the outcome, I am proud of how hard you worked.
The rule applies to everyone regardless of their position in the company.
She kept her promise regardless of the personal cost.
Regardless of what others say, trust your own judgment.
The event will go ahead regardless of the weather.
He supported her regardless of the decisions she made.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'zini qanday his qilishidan qat'i nazar ishga keldi.
Natijadan qat'i nazar, qancha qattiq ishlaganingizdan faxrlanaman.
Qoida kompaniyadagi lavozimidan qat'i nazar hamma uchun amal qiladi.
U shaxsiy xarajatlardan qat'i nazar va'dasini bajardi.
Boshqalar nima deyishidan qat'i nazar, o'z mulohazangizga isoning.
Ob-havoga qaramay, tadbir davom etadi.
U qabul qilgan qarorlardan qat'i nazar uni qo'lladi.

words.definition: used to say that something is excellent and cannot be improved
words.definitionUz: biror narsa juda zo'r ekanini va undan yaxshisi bo'lishi mumkin emasligini ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: The food was delicious and the service was perfect — it couldn't be better.
words.example1Translation: Ovqat mazali va xizmat mukammal edi — bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
words.example2: How is the new apartment? It couldn't be better — I love everything about it.
words.example2Translation: Yangi kvartira qanaqa? Bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas — men unda hamma narsani sevaman.
words.example3: The timing for this partnership couldn't be better.
words.example3Translation: Bu hamkorlik uchun vaqt bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
extraExamples: The weather on our wedding day couldn't have been better.
My relationship with my team couldn't be better right now.
The location of the hotel couldn't be better — right in the city center.
After months of hard work, the results couldn't be better.
His performance in the final exam couldn't have been better.
The conditions for starting a business right now couldn't be better.
She said the support from her family couldn't be better.
extraExampleTranslations: To'yimiz kunidagi ob-havo bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emasdi.
Hozir jamoam bilan munosabatim bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
Mehmonxonaning joylashuvi bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas — aynan shahar markazida.
Oylar davom etgan mehnatdan so'ng natijalar bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
Uning yakuniy imtihonadagi ko'rsatkichi bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emasdi.
Hozir biznes boshlash uchun sharoitlar bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emas.
U oilasidan ko'rilayotgan yordam bundan yaxshiroq bo'lishi mumkin emasligini aytdi.

words.word: at the end of the day
words.definition: used to introduce the most important fact or conclusion after considering everything
words.definitionUz: hamma narsani hisobga olgandan keyin eng muhim xulosa yoki haqiqatni aytish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: At the end of the day, what matters most is that you tried your best.
words.example1Translation: Oxir-oqibat, eng muhimi siz qo'lingizdan kelganini qilganingizdir.
words.example2: At the end of the day, the customer always comes first.
words.example2Translation: Oxir-oqibat, mijoz doim birinchi o'rinda turadi.
words.example3: We debated for hours, but at the end of the day we all agreed.
words.example3Translation: Soatlab bahslashdik, lekin oxir-oqibat barchamiz rozi bo'ldik.
extraExamples: At the end of the day, you are responsible for your own happiness.
We can plan all we want, but at the end of the day results are what count.
At the end of the day, kindness costs nothing.
They had many differences, but at the end of the day they were family.
At the end of the day, the decision is yours and yours alone.
Arguments aside, at the end of the day we want the same thing.
At the end of the day, hard work and patience always pay off.
extraExampleTranslations: Oxir-oqibat, o'z baxtingiz uchun siz mas'ulsiz.
Xohlagancha reja qilishimiz mumkin, lekin oxir-oqibat natijalar muhimdir.
Oxir-oqibat, mehribonlik hech narsaga tushmaydigan.
Ularning ko'p farqlari bor edi, lekin oxir-oqibat ular oila edi.
Oxir-oqibat, qaror faqat sizniki va faqat sizniki.
Bahslar yoqlab, oxir-oqibat biz bir xil narsani xohlaymiz.
Oxir-oqibat, mehnat va sabr-toqat har doim o'z mevasini beradi.

words.translation: og'ir paytda, haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda
words.definition: when a situation becomes very serious or difficult and you are forced to act or make a decision
words.definitionUz: vaziyat jiddiy tus olganda va harakat qilishga yoki qaror qabul qilishga majbur bo'lganda
words.example1: When push comes to shove, she always knows what to do.
words.example1Translation: Og'ir payt kelganda, u har doim nima qilishni biladi.
words.example2: We argue a lot, but when push comes to shove, we support each other.
words.example2Translation: Biz ko'p bahslashamiz, lekin qiyin vaqtda bir-birimizni qo'llaymiz.
words.example3: When push comes to shove, he always chooses the safe option.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda, u har doim xavfsiz variantni tanlaydi.
extraExamples: When push comes to shove, most people prioritize family over work.
She seemed confident, but when push came to shove, she froze.
When push comes to shove, you find out who your real friends are.
He talks big, but when push comes to shove, he never delivers.
When push comes to shove, teamwork is what saves the project.
I was not sure I could do it, but when push came to shove, I managed.
When push comes to shove, good preparation makes all the difference.
extraExampleTranslations: Qiyin vaqtda ko'pchilik oilani ishdan ustun qo'yadi.
U ishonchli ko'rinardi, lekin haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda, u qotib qoldi.
Qiyin paytda haqiqiy do'stlaringiz kimligini bilib olasiz.
U katta gapiradi, lekin haqiqiy sinov vaqti kelganda, hech qachon bajarmaydi.
Qiyin vaqtda loyihani qutqaradigan narsa jamoaviy ish.
Uddasidan chiqa olarmikanman deb bilmas edim, lekin qiyin payt kelganda, uddasidan chiqdim.
Qiyin sinov vaqtida yaxshi tayyorgarlik hamma narsani hal qiladi.

words.definition: Sometimes, but not regularly or very often.
words.definitionUz: Ba'zan, lekin muntazam ravishda emas — gohida sodir bo'ladigan narsa haqida aytiladi.
words.example1: I read books from time to time.
words.example1Translation: Men vaqti-vaqti bilan kitob o'qiyman.
words.example2: From time to time, I like to cook a new recipe I have never tried before.
words.example2Translation: Vaqti-vaqti bilan men hech qachon sinab ko'rmagan yangi retseptni tayyorlashni yaxshi ko'raman.
words.example3: She calls her old classmates from time to time just to catch up.
words.example3Translation: U eski sinfdoshlariga vaqti-vaqti bilan yangiliklarini bilish uchun qo'ng'iroq qiladi.
extraExamples: From time to time, I go for a long walk just to clear my head.
He checks his old emails from time to time and finds useful things.
From time to time, the manager holds informal meetings with the team.
I visit my grandparents from time to time, but not as often as I should.
From time to time, she volunteers at the local community center.
We go on short trips from time to time to get away from the city.
From time to time, I review my goals to see if I am still on track.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqti-vaqti bilan men miyamni tozalash uchun uzoq piyoda sayr qilaman.
U vaqti-vaqti bilan eski elektron pochta xabarlarini ko'rib chiqadi va foydali narsalar topadi.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan menejer jamoa bilan norasmiy uchrashuvlar o'tkazadi.
Men vaqti-vaqti bilan buvi-bobomni ziyorat qilaman, lekin keragidek tez-tez emas.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan u mahalliy jamoat markazida ko'ngillilik qiladi.
Biz shahardan uzoqlashish uchun vaqti-vaqti bilan qisqa sayohatlarga chiqamiz.
Vaqti-vaqti bilan men hali ham yo'lda ekanligimni ko'rish uchun maqsadlarimni ko'rib chiqaman.

words.definition: Repeatedly, many times over, often with a sense of frustration or emphasis.
words.definitionUz: Bir narsa ko'p marta takrorlanishi — ko'pincha bu bezovtalanish yoki ta'kidlash bilan aytiladi, ya'ni bir xil narsa doim qaytariladi.
words.example1: I see the same advertisements time after time.
words.example1Translation: Men bir xil reklamalarni qayta-qayta ko'raman.
words.example2: Time after time, she proved that she was the best in her field.
words.example2Translation: Qayta-qayta u o'z sohasida eng yaxshi ekanligini isbotladi.
words.example3: He made the same mistake time after time without learning from it.
words.example3Translation: U undan o'rganmasdan qayta-qayta bir xil xatoni qildi.
extraExamples: Time after time, the team failed to meet the deadline.
She had warned him time after time, but he never listened.
Time after time, the same issues kept coming up in meetings.
He tried to fix the relationship time after time, but nothing changed.
Time after time, the data showed the same pattern.
The coach told the players time after time to stay focused.
Time after time, she chose the wrong people to trust.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayta-qayta jamoa muddatni bajara olmadi.
U uni qayta-qayta ogohlantirgan edi, lekin u hech qachon quloq solmadi.
Qayta-qayta yig'ilishlarda bir xil muammolar paydo bo'ldi.
U qayta-qayta munosabatni tuzatishga urindi, lekin hech narsa o'zgarmadi.
Qayta-qayta ma'lumotlar bir xil naqshni ko'rsatdi.
Murabbiy o'yinchilarga qayta-qayta e'tiborli bo'lishni aytdi.
Qayta-qayta u ishonish uchun noto'g'ri odamlarni tanladi.

words.translation: muntazam emas, goh bo'lib goh to'xtab
words.definition: Not continuously — happening sometimes and then stopping, repeatedly over a period of time.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa doimiy emas, balki gohida bo'lib, gohida to'xtab turishi — bir maromda emas, tartibsiz ravishda sodir bo'ladigan holat.
words.example1: I do speaking practice on and off, so I still cannot speak English fluently.
words.example1Translation: Men goh mashq qilib goh to'xtab gapirishni mashq qilaman, shuning uchun hali ham ravon inglizcha gapira olmayman.
words.example2: They have been friends on and off for the past ten years.
words.example2Translation: Ular o'tgan o'n yil davomida goh do'st bo'lib, goh uzilib yurganlar.
words.example3: It has been raining on and off all day, so I stayed inside.
words.example3Translation: Butun kun davomida goh yomg'ir yog'ib goh to'xtadi, shuning uchun men ichkarida qoldim.
extraExamples: She has been going to the gym on and off but never consistently.
He has been working on the novel on and off for three years.
I have been experiencing headaches on and off this week.
They dated on and off for two years before finally breaking up.
He has been learning guitar on and off since he was a teenager.
The internet connection was on and off all morning, which made it hard to work.
I have been following a healthy diet on and off, but I need to be more consistent.
extraExampleTranslations: U goh sportzalga borib goh to'xtaydi, lekin hech qachon muntazam emas.
U uch yildan beri romni goh yozib goh to'xtab ishlaydi.
Bu hafta men goh bosh og'rig'ini his qilib, goh yo'q.
Ular nihoyat ajrashishdan oldin ikki yil davomida goh tanishib goh uzilib yurishdi.
U o'smirligidan beri goh gitara o'rganib goh to'xtab yuradi.
Butun ertalab internet aloqasi goh bo'lib goh uzildi, bu ishlashni qiyinlashtirdi.
Men goh sog'lom parhez tutib goh tashlab yuribman, lekin izchilroq bo'lishim kerak.

words.definition: In most cases or more than half of the time — used to describe something that happens frequently.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p hollarda yoki yarmidan ko'p vaqt — tez-tez sodir bo'ladigan narsani ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladigan ibora.
words.example1: More often than not, I pay the bills when my friends and I go to a restaurant.
words.example1Translation: Ko'pincha do'stlarim bilan restoranga borganimizda men hisobni to'layman.
words.example2: More often than not, the early bus arrives late.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pincha erta avtobus kech keladi.
words.example3: More often than not, first impressions turn out to be accurate.
words.example3Translation: Ko'pincha birinchi taassurotlar to'g'ri bo'lib chiqadi.
extraExamples: More often than not, the simplest solution is the best one.
More often than not, he finishes his work before anyone else.
More often than not, the cheapest option ends up costing more in the long run.
She more often than not stays late at the office to finish her tasks.
More often than not, arguments start over small misunderstandings.
More often than not, people regret the things they did not do.
More often than not, consistent effort beats natural talent.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pincha eng oddiy yechim eng yaxshisi bo'ladi.
Ko'pincha u ishini boshqalardan oldin tugatadi.
Ko'pincha eng arzon variant oxir-oqibat uzoq muddatda qimmatroqqa tushadi.
U ko'pincha vazifalarini tugatish uchun ofisda kech qoladi.
Ko'pincha bahslar kichik noto'g'ri tushunishlardan boshlanadi.
Ko'pincha odamlar qilmagan ishlariga afsus qiladilar.
Ko'pincha izchil harakat tabiiy iste'doddan ustun keladi.

words.definition: Almost never — used to say that something happens very rarely.
words.definitionUz: Deyarli hech qachon bo'lmaydigan narsa haqida aytiladi — juda kam hollarda sodir bo'ladi, ammo to'liq yo'q degani ham emas.
words.example1: I hardly ever go shopping.
words.example1Translation: Men deyarli hech qachon xarid qilgani bormayman.
words.example2: She hardly ever misses a deadline at work.
words.example2Translation: U ishda deyarli hech qachon muddatni o'tkazib yubormaydi.
words.example3: He hardly ever eats fast food since he started cooking at home.
words.example3Translation: U uyda ovqat pishirishni boshlaganidan beri deyarli hech qachon tezkor ovqat yemaydi.
extraExamples: I hardly ever watch television anymore.
She hardly ever complains, even when things are difficult.
They hardly ever argue, which is why their relationship is so strong.
He hardly ever takes a day off, even when he is sick.
I hardly ever use cash since everything can be paid by card.
She hardly ever reads fiction — she prefers non-fiction books.
He hardly ever arrives late, so today was very unusual.
extraExampleTranslations: Men endi deyarli hech qachon televizor tomosha qilmayman.
U deyarli hech qachon shikoyat qilmaydi, hatto qiyin paytlarda ham.
Ular deyarli hech qachon janjallashmaydi, shuning uchun munosabatlari juda kuchli.
U hatto kasal bo'lganida ham deyarli hech qachon dam olish kunini olmaydi.
Hamma narsani karta bilan to'lash mumkin bo'lganligi sababli men deyarli hech qachon naqd pul ishlatmayman.
U deyarli hech qachon badiiy adabiyot o'qimaydi — u publitsistik kitoblarni afzal ko'radi.
U deyarli hech qachon kech qolmaydi, shuning uchun bugun juda g'ayrioddiy edi.

words.definition: Occasionally — sometimes but not on a regular or frequent basis.
words.definitionUz: Goho, ba'zida — muntazam emas, lekin vaqti-vaqti bilan sodir bo'ladigan narsa. "From time to time" bilan deyarli bir xil ma'noda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Every now and then, I like to take a long walk with no destination in mind.
words.example1Translation: Vaqt-vaqt bilan men hech qanday manzilsiz uzoq piyoda yurish qilishni yaxshi ko'raman.
words.example2: Every now and then, my old school friend sends me a message.
words.example2Translation: Vaqt-vaqt bilan maktabdagi eski do'stim menga xabar yuboradi.
words.example3: Every now and then, I treat myself to a nice meal at a good restaurant.
words.example3Translation: Vaqt-vaqt bilan men o'zimga yaxshi restoranda chiroyli ovqat iste'mol qilishni ravo ko'raman.
extraExamples: Every now and then, she revisits her old journals and reflects on how much she has grown.
Every now and then, the team gets together outside of work just to relax.
Every now and then, I find an old photo that brings back great memories.
Every now and then, he checks in on his neighbors to make sure they are okay.
Every now and then, it is good to step back and evaluate your progress.
Every now and then, I get a sudden urge to rearrange my room.
Every now and then, the manager gives the team an unexpected afternoon off.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqt-vaqt bilan u eski kundalik daftarlarini qayta o'qib, qanchalik o'sganini o'ylaydi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan jamoa ishdan tashqarida shunchaki dam olish uchun yig'iladi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan men ajoyib xotiralar uyg'otadigan eski fotosuratni topaman.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan u qo'shnilarining yaxshi ekanligiga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ularning ahvolini so'rash uchun boradi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan orqaga chekinib, rivojlanishingizni baholash yaxshi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan menga xonamni qayta tartibga solish istagi tug'iladi.
Vaqt-vaqt bilan menejer jamoaga kutilmagan tarzda tushlik vaqtini beradi.

words.translation: ertaroq yoki keyinroq, bir kun albatta
words.definition: At some point in the future — used to say that something will definitely happen, even if the exact time is unknown.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakda albatta sodir bo'ladigan narsa haqida aytiladi — qachon bo'lishi noma'lum, lekin bu muqarrar.
words.example1: Sooner or later, you will have to face the consequences of your actions.
words.example1Translation: Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, siz harakatlaringizning oqibatlariga duch kelishingizga to'g'ri keladi.
words.example2: Sooner or later, the truth always comes out.
words.example2Translation: Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, haqiqat doim oshkor bo'ladi.
words.example3: If you keep working this hard, sooner or later you will burn out.
words.example3Translation: Agar shunday qattiq ishlashda davom etsangiz, ertaroq yoki keyinroq ruhiy charchoqqa uchrasiz.
extraExamples: Sooner or later, every business has to adapt to changes in the market.
Sooner or later, he will realize that he made the wrong choice.
If you ignore your health, sooner or later it will catch up with you.
Sooner or later, the two sides will have to reach an agreement.
Sooner or later, hard work pays off — you just have to be patient.
Sooner or later, people who cut corners get caught.
Sooner or later, technology will replace many jobs we have today.
extraExampleTranslations: Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, har bir biznes bozordagi o'zgarishlarga moslashishi kerak.
Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, u noto'g'ri tanlov qilganligini anglaydi.
Sog'lig'ingizni e'tiborsiz qoldirsangiz, ertaroq yoki keyinroq bu sizni quvib yetadi.
Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, ikki tomon kelishuvga erishishi kerak bo'ladi.
Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, qattiq mehnat o'z natijasini beradi — faqat sabr qilishingiz kerak.
Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, sifatni pasaytiradigan odamlar qo'lga tushadi.
Ertaroq yoki keyinroq, texnologiya bugun mavjud ko'plab ishlarni almashtiradi.

words.definition: Over a long period of time — used to describe what will happen or what will be true eventually, not immediately.
words.definitionUz: Hozir emas, balki uzoq vaqt o'tgandan keyin ko'rinadigan natija yoki haqiqat haqida aytiladi — qisqa muddatda emas, kelajakda.
words.example1: Eating well and exercising regularly will benefit you in the long run.
words.example1Translation: To'g'ri ovqatlanish va muntazam mashq qilish sizga uzoq muddatda foyda beradi.
words.example2: In the long run, investing in quality is always cheaper than buying cheap products.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq muddatda sifatga sarmoya kiritish doim arzon mahsulot sotib olishdan ko'ra arzonroq.
words.example3: The decision was hard, but in the long run, it was the right one.
words.example3Translation: Qaror qiyin edi, lekin uzoq muddatda bu to'g'ri qaror bo'ldi.
extraExamples: In the long run, building good habits matters more than short-term results.
Cutting costs now may hurt the company in the long run.
In the long run, honesty in business builds stronger customer loyalty.
Learning a second language is hard at first, but it pays off in the long run.
In the long run, strong relationships are more valuable than money.
Skipping sleep to work more will damage your productivity in the long run.
In the long run, companies that invest in their employees perform better.
extraExampleTranslations: Uzoq muddatda yaxshi odatlar shakllantirish qisqa muddatli natijalardan muhimroq.
Hozir xarajatlarni qisqartirish uzoq muddatda kompaniyaga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
Uzoq muddatda biznesdagi halollik mustahkamroq mijozlar sadoqatini shakllantiradi.
Ikkinchi tilni o'rganish dastlab qiyin, lekin uzoq muddatda o'z natijasini beradi.
Uzoq muddatda kuchli munosabatlar puldan qimmatroq.
Ko'proq ishlash uchun uyquni qisqartirish uzoq muddatda mahsuldorligingizga zarar yetkazadi.
Uzoq muddatda xodimlarga sarmoya kiritadigan kompaniyalar yaxshiroq ishlaydi.

words.definition: Very rarely — used to describe something that almost never happens.
words.definitionUz: Juda kamdan-kam sodir bo'ladigan narsa haqida aytiladi — deyarli hech qachon bo'lmaydi, ammo bir-ikki marta bo'lgan.
words.example1: I only eat sweets once in a blue moon because I am trying to stay healthy.
words.example1Translation: Men sog'lom bo'lishga harakat qilayotganim uchun shirinliklarni juda kamdan-kam yeyaman.
words.example2: Once in a blue moon, she goes back to her hometown to visit old friends.
words.example2Translation: U juda kamdan-kam eski do'stlarini ko'rish uchun o'z shahrini ziyorat qiladi.
words.example3: He calls me once in a blue moon, so I was surprised to hear from him.
words.example3Translation: U menga juda kamdan-kam qo'ng'iroq qiladi, shuning uchun undan xabar olganim meni hayratda qoldirdi.
extraExamples: Once in a blue moon, we get a chance to see the whole family together.
She goes out dancing once in a blue moon but always enjoys it when she does.
Once in a blue moon, I take a full day off and do nothing at all.
He reads fiction once in a blue moon — he mostly prefers reading news.
Once in a blue moon, the team gets a perfect score on a project.
I cook a full traditional meal once in a blue moon when I have enough time.
Once in a blue moon, something truly unexpected and wonderful happens.
extraExampleTranslations: Juda kamdan-kam butun oilani birga ko'rish imkoniyati tug'iladi.
U juda kamdan-kam raqsga tushgani chiqadi, lekin har doim bunga quvonadi.
Juda kamdan-kam men to'liq bir kun dam olaman va hech narsa qilmayman.
U juda kamdan-kam badiiy adabiyot o'qiydi — u asosan yangiliklar o'qishni afzal ko'radi.
Juda kamdan-kam jamoa loyihada mukammal ball oladi.
Men vaqtim bo'lganda juda kamdan-kam to'liq an'anaviy ovqat tayyorlayman.
Juda kamdan-kam haqiqatan kutilmagan va ajoyib narsa sodir bo'ladi.

words.definition: Gradually — as time passes, things change or develop slowly.
words.definitionUz: Vaqt o'tishi bilan sekin-asta o'zgaradigan yoki rivojlanadigan narsa haqida aytiladi — bu bir anda emas, bir muddat davomida sodir bo'ladi.
words.example1: Over time, his English improved significantly.
words.example1Translation: Vaqt o'tishi bilan uning ingliz tili sezilarli darajada yaxshilandi.
words.example2: Over time, she learned to manage stress more effectively.
words.example2Translation: Vaqt o'tishi bilan u stressni samaraliroq boshqarishni o'rgandi.
words.example3: Trust is built over time through consistent actions, not words.
words.example3Translation: Ishonch so'zlar emas, balki izchil harakatlar orqali vaqt o'tishi bilan shakllanadi.
extraExamples: Over time, the small savings added up to a significant amount.
Over time, they developed a strong working relationship.
The city changed dramatically over time due to rapid development.
Over time, the pain of the loss became easier to carry.
Over time, bad habits become harder to break.
Over time, her confidence in public speaking grew noticeably.
Over time, even small daily actions create big changes in your life.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqt o'tishi bilan kichik jamg'armalar sezilarli miqdorga to'plandi.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan ular kuchli ish munosabatlarini rivojlantirdilar.
Tez rivojlanish tufayli shahar vaqt o'tishi bilan tubdan o'zgardi.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan yo'qotish og'rig'ini ko'tarish osonroq bo'ldi.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan yomon odatlarni sindirish qiyinroq bo'ladi.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan ommaviy nutq so'zlashdagi uning ishonchi sezilirli darajada o'sdi.
Vaqt o'tishi bilan hattoki kichik kundalik harakatlar hayotingizda katta o'zgarishlar yaratadi.

words.definition: Not expensive and easy to afford.
words.definitionUz: Narxi past bo'lib, ko'pchilik uchun sotib olish oson bo'lgan narsa.
words.example1: This restaurant is pocket-friendly and the food is delicious.
words.example1Translation: Bu restoran qulay narxda va ovqatlari mazali.
words.example2: I'm looking for a pocket-friendly phone with good features.
words.example2Translation: Men yaxshi xususiyatlarga ega, qulay narxdagi telefon qidirmoqdaman.
words.example3: The market offers many pocket-friendly options for students.
words.example3Translation: Bozor talabalar uchun ko'plab qulay narxdagi variantlarni taklif qiladi.
extraExamples: They found a pocket-friendly hotel near the city center.
This app helps you find pocket-friendly flights.
She always looks for pocket-friendly alternatives when shopping.
The cafe is popular because it is pocket-friendly and cozy.
He bought a pocket-friendly laptop for his studies.
Pocket-friendly options are always a priority when traveling on a budget.
The brand is known for producing pocket-friendly clothing.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular shahar markaziga yaqin qulay narxdagi mehmonxona topishdi.
Bu ilova arzon aviabiletlarni topishga yordam beradi.
U xarid qilayotganda doim qulay narxdagi muqobillarni qidiradi.
Kafe qulay narxda va shinam bo'lgani uchun mashhur.
U o'qishi uchun qulay narxdagi noutbuk sotib oldi.
Byudjet bilan sayohat qilayotganda qulay narxdagi variantlar doim ustuvordir.
Brend qulay narxdagi kiyimlar ishlab chiqarishi bilan mashhur.

words.translation: ikkala tomon uchun ham manfaatli vaziyat
words.definition: A situation where everyone involved benefits and no one loses.
words.definitionUz: Ikki tomon ham foyda ko'radigan va hech kim zarar ko'rmaydigan holat.
words.example1: Offering remote work is a win-win situation for both employees and employers.
words.example1Translation: Masofaviy ish taklif qilish xodimlar va ish beruvchilar uchun ham manfaatli vaziyat.
words.example2: Sharing the cost of the trip is a win-win situation for all of us.
words.example2Translation: Sayohat xarajatlarini bo'lishib olish barchimiz uchun manfaatli vaziyat.
words.example3: The deal turned out to be a win-win situation for both companies.
words.example3Translation: Kelishuv ikkala kompaniya uchun ham manfaatli vaziyatga aylandi.
extraExamples: Teaching others while learning yourself is a win-win situation.
The partnership created a win-win situation for both sides.
Using solar energy is a win-win situation for families and the environment.
The discount strategy was a win-win situation for the store and its customers.
Working together on the project was a win-win situation for both teams.
Internships can be a win-win situation for students and companies alike.
Finding a compromise that satisfies everyone is the ideal win-win situation.
extraExampleTranslations: O'rganayotganda boshqalarga o'rgatish ham o'zingiz, ham ular uchun manfaatli vaziyat.
Hamkorlik ikkala tomon uchun ham manfaatli vaziyat yaratdi.
Quyosh energiyasidan foydalanish oilalar va atrof-muhit uchun manfaatli vaziyat.
Chegirma strategiyasi do'kon va uning mijozlari uchun manfaatli vaziyat bo'ldi.
Loyihada birgalikda ishlash ikkala jamoa uchun ham manfaatli vaziyat edi.
Stajirovkalar talabalar va kompaniyalar uchun ham manfaatli vaziyat bo'lishi mumkin.
Hammani qoniqtiradigan murosaga kelish ideal manfaatli vaziyatdir.

words.definition: Cheap enough for most people to be able to buy.
words.definitionUz: Ko'pchilik uchun sotib olish mumkin bo'lgan, haddan tashqari qimmat bo'lmagan narsa.
words.example1: We need to find an affordable apartment in the city center.
words.example1Translation: Shahar markazida qulay narxdagi kvartira topishimiz kerak.
words.example2: The new model is much more affordable than the previous one.
words.example2Translation: Yangi model avvalgisiga qaraganda ancha hamyonbop.
words.example3: Affordable housing is becoming harder to find in big cities.
words.example3Translation: Katta shaharlarda qulay narxdagi uy-joy topish tobora qiyinlashmoqda.
extraExamples: She chose the most affordable plan that still met her needs.
The store offers high-quality products at affordable prices.
Affordable education is a right, not a privilege.
He found an affordable gym membership close to his home.
The brand made electric cars more affordable for ordinary people.
Affordable travel options are available if you plan ahead.
They designed the app to be affordable for small businesses.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'z ehtiyojlarini qoplagan holda eng qulay narxdagi rejani tanladi.
Do'kon qulay narxlarda yuqori sifatli mahsulotlar taklif qiladi.
Qulay narxdagi ta'lim imtiyoz emas, huquqdir.
U uyiga yaqin qulay narxdagi fitnes zali a'zoligini topdi.
Brend elektr mashinalarini oddiy odamlar uchun hamyonbop qildi.
Oldindan rejalashtirish orqali qulay sayohat variantlari mavjud.
Ular ilovani kichik biznes uchun hamyonbop qilib loyihalashdi.

words.definition: Suitable for someone who does not have much money to spend.
words.definitionUz: Byudjet yoki tejash rejasiga mos keladigan, ortiqcha pul sarflamasdan sotib olinadigan narsa.
words.example1: She shared a list of budget-friendly meals for the week.
words.example1Translation: U hafta uchun byudjetga mos ovqatlar ro'yxatini ulashdi.
words.example2: We planned a budget-friendly vacation without sacrificing fun.
words.example2Translation: Biz dam olishdan voz kechmasdan byudjetga mos ta'til rejalashtirdik.
words.example3: The blog focuses on budget-friendly tips for new homeowners.
words.example3Translation: Blog yangi uy egalariga byudjetga mos maslahatlar beradi.
extraExamples: There are plenty of budget-friendly options for home decoration.
He found a budget-friendly way to renovate his apartment.
Budget-friendly travel is possible with proper planning.
The supermarket offers a range of budget-friendly products.
She runs a YouTube channel about budget-friendly cooking.
The company launched a budget-friendly version of its popular product.
Budget-friendly solutions helped them cut company costs significantly.
extraExampleTranslations: Uy bezatish uchun ko'plab byudjetga mos variantlar mavjud.
U kvartirasini ta'mirlashning byudjetga mos usulini topdi.
To'g'ri rejalashtirish bilan byudjetga mos sayohat mumkin.
Supermarket byudjetga mos mahsulotlarning keng assortimentini taklif qiladi.
U byudjetga mos pishirish haqida YouTube kanali yuritadi.
Kompaniya mashhur mahsulotining byudjetga mos versiyasini chiqardi.
Byudjetga mos yechimlar ularga kompaniya xarajatlarini sezilarli darajada qisqartirishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: To spend all your money before the next payday, with no savings left over.
words.definitionUz: Oylik maosh tamom bo'lgunicha pulni ishlatib yuborish va keyingi maoshgacha hech qanday jamg'armasiz yashamoq.
words.example1: Many families in the city live paycheck to paycheck.
words.example1Translation: Shahardagi ko'p oilalar maoshdan maoshgacha amallab yashaydi.
words.example2: He realized he was living paycheck to paycheck and decided to change his spending habits.
words.example2Translation: U maoshdan maoshgacha yashayotganini anglab, xarajat odatlarini o'zgartirishga qaror qildi.
words.example3: Living paycheck to paycheck makes it impossible to handle unexpected expenses.
words.example3Translation: Maoshdan maoshgacha yashaganingizda kutilmagan xarajatlarni qoplash deyarli mumkin emas.
extraExamples: She worked two jobs but still lived paycheck to paycheck.
Living paycheck to paycheck is stressful and leaves no room for savings.
After getting a raise, he finally stopped living paycheck to paycheck.
A budget plan can help you stop living paycheck to paycheck.
Millions of workers around the world live paycheck to paycheck.
She didn't realize she was living paycheck to paycheck until she lost her job.
Living paycheck to paycheck is a sign that your expenses exceed your income.
extraExampleTranslations: U ikki joyda ishladi, lekin hali ham maoshdan maoshgacha amallab yashadi.
Maoshdan maoshgacha yashamoq stressli bo'lib, jamg'armaga joy qoldirmaydi.
Maoshi oshgandan keyin u nihoyat maoshdan maoshgacha yashashni to'xtatdi.
Byudjet rejasi maoshdan maoshgacha yashashni to'xtatishga yordam beradi.
Dunyodagi millionlab ishchilar maoshdan maoshgacha amallab yashaydi.
U ishini yo'qotmaguncha maoshdan maoshgacha yashayotganini sezmadi.
Maoshdan maoshgacha yashamoq xarajatlaringiz daromadingizdan oshib ketayotganining belgisi.

words.word: feel like a fish out of water
words.pronunciation: /fiːl laɪk ə fɪʃ aʊt əv ˈwɔːtər/
words.translation: o'zini noqulay his qilmoq, joyiga to'g'ri kelmaslik
words.definition: To feel uncomfortable or out of place in a situation that does not suit you.
words.definitionUz: Yangi yoki o'ziga mos bo'lmagan muhitda o'zini noqulay, begona yoki bezovta his qilish.
words.example1: At the formal dinner, he felt like a fish out of water.
words.example1Translation: Rasmiy kechki ovqatda u o'zini noqulay his qildi.
words.example2: Moving to a new country can make you feel like a fish out of water.
words.example2Translation: Yangi mamlakatga ko'chib borish sizni noqulay his qildirishi mumkin.
words.example3: She felt like a fish out of water at the tech conference because she wasn't familiar with the topics.
words.example3Translation: U mavzularga tanish bo'lmagani uchun tech konferentsiyasida o'zini noqulay his qildi.
extraExamples: Starting a new job often makes people feel like a fish out of water.
He felt like a fish out of water at the art gallery — he knew nothing about painting.
Moving from a small town to a big city made her feel like a fish out of water.
I always feel like a fish out of water at large social events.
It's normal to feel like a fish out of water when you first join a new team.
He felt like a fish out of water during the business negotiation.
After years abroad, she felt like a fish out of water when she returned home.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi ishga kirish ko'pincha odamlarni noqulay his qildiradi.
U san'at galereyasida hech narsa bilmagani uchun o'zini noqulay his qildi.
Kichik shahardan katta shaharga ko'chish uni noqulay his qildirdi.
Men katta ijtimoiy tadbirlarda doim noqulay his qilaman.
Yangi jamoaga qo'shilganingizda noqulay his qilish tabiiy hol.
U biznes muzokaralari davomida o'zini noqulay his qildi.
Xorijda yillar o'tkazgach, u uyiga qaytganida o'zini begona his qildi.

words.definition: The amount of money needed to cover basic expenses such as housing, food, and transport in a particular place.
words.definitionUz: Biror shaharda yoki mamlakatda yashash uchun zarur bo'lgan uy-joy, ovqat, transport kabi asosiy xarajatlar miqdori.
words.example1: The cost of living in Tashkent has increased significantly over the last few years.
words.example1Translation: Toshkentda yashash narxi so'nggi bir necha yil ichida sezilarli darajada oshdi.
words.example2: Many people move to smaller cities because the cost of living is lower.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pchilik yashash narxi pastroq bo'lgani uchun kichik shaharlarga ko'chib ketadi.
words.example3: He compared the cost of living in different countries before deciding where to move.
words.example3Translation: U ko'chib borish joyini tanlashdan oldin turli mamlakatlardagi yashash narxini solishtirib ko'rdi.
extraExamples: The high cost of living in big cities is pushing people out to suburbs.
Her salary barely covers the cost of living in that city.
The cost of living has risen faster than wages in recent years.
Understanding the cost of living helps you plan your budget better.
Retirees often move to countries with a lower cost of living.
The government is struggling to address the rising cost of living.
A high cost of living doesn't always mean a better quality of life.
extraExampleTranslations: Katta shaharlardagi yuqori yashash narxi odamlarni chekka hududlarga surib chiqarmoqda.
Uning maoshi o'sha shaharda yashash narxini zo'rg'a qoplaydi.
So'nggi yillarda yashash narxi maoshdan tezroq oshdi.
Yashash narxini tushunish byudjetni yaxshiroq rejalashtirish imkonini beradi.
Pensionerlar ko'pincha yashash narxi pastroq mamlakatlarga ko'chib ketadi.
Hukumat o'sib borayotgan yashash narxini hal qilishda qiynalmoqda.
Yuqori yashash narxi doim ham yaxshi hayot sifatini anglatmaydi.

words.definition: The money left over after paying taxes and essential expenses, available to spend or save freely.
words.definitionUz: Soliqlar va zarur xarajatlarni to'lagandan keyin qoladigan pul — uni xohlagan narsaga sarflash yoki jamg'arish mumkin.
words.example1: After paying rent and bills, my disposable income is quite limited.
words.example1Translation: Ijara va to'lovlarni to'lagandan keyin mening erkin daromadim juda cheklangan.
words.example2: People with higher disposable income tend to spend more on entertainment.
words.example2Translation: Erkin daromadi yuqori bo'lgan odamlar ko'proq ko'ngilxushlikka pul sarflaydi.
words.example3: She uses her disposable income to invest in stocks every month.
words.example3Translation: U har oy erkin daromadini aktsiyalarga investitsiya qilish uchun ishlatadi.
extraExamples: Rising prices are reducing people's disposable income.
He tracks his disposable income carefully to avoid overspending.
Families with low disposable income struggle to save money.
Tax cuts can increase the disposable income of workers.
A large portion of her disposable income goes toward travel.
Disposable income is a key indicator of economic wellbeing.
When disposable income rises, consumer spending usually goes up too.
extraExampleTranslations: Narxlarning oshishi odamlarning erkin daromadini qisqartirmoqda.
U ortiqcha xarajat qilmaslik uchun erkin daromadini sinchkovlik bilan kuzatadi.
Erkin daromadi past bo'lgan oilalar pul jamg'arishda qiynaladi.
Soliq imtiyozlari ishchilarning erkin daromadini oshirishi mumkin.
Uning erkin daromadining katta qismi sayohatlarga ketadi.
Erkin daromad iqtisodiy farovonlikning asosiy ko'rsatkichi hisoblanadi.
Erkin daromad oshganda, iste'molchilar xarajatlari ham odatda oshadi.

words.definition: A heavy financial responsibility or cost that causes stress and difficulty.
words.definitionUz: Odamga yoki oilaga katta stress va qiyinchilik keltiradigan og'ir moliyaviy majburiyat yoki xarajat.
words.example1: Medical bills can be a serious financial burden for many families.
words.example1Translation: Tibbiy to'lovlar ko'p oilalar uchun jiddiy moliyaviy og'irlik bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example2: He didn't want his education costs to become a financial burden on his parents.
words.example2Translation: U ta'lim xarajatlari ota-onasiga moliyaviy yuk bo'lishini xohlamadi.
words.example3: The new tax policy reduced the financial burden on small businesses.
words.example3Translation: Yangi soliq siyosati kichik biznesdan moliyaviy yukni kamaytirdi.
extraExamples: Losing a job suddenly can create a huge financial burden.
She tried to manage her debt to reduce her financial burden.
The high cost of childcare is a financial burden for many parents.
Government support programs help ease the financial burden on low-income families.
Starting a business without savings can become a financial burden.
Unexpected home repairs can add a serious financial burden.
He felt relieved once the financial burden of the loan was finally gone.
extraExampleTranslations: To'satdan ish yo'qotish katta moliyaviy yuk yaratishi mumkin.
U moliyaviy yukni kamaytirish uchun qarzini boshqarishga harakat qildi.
Bolalar parvarishi xarajatlarining yuqoriligi ko'plab ota-onalar uchun moliyaviy yukdir.
Hukumat dasturlari kam daromadli oilalardagi moliyaviy yukni yengillashtiradi.
Jamg'armasiz biznes boshlash moliyaviy yukka aylanishi mumkin.
Kutilmagan uy ta'mirlari jiddiy moliyaviy yuk qo'shishi mumkin.
Kredit bo'yicha moliyaviy yuk nihoyat yo'qolganda u yengillik his qildi.

words.definition: Money saved specifically for unexpected or difficult situations in the future.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakda kutilmagan qiyin vaziyatlar yoki muammolar uchun alohida ajratib qo'yilgan jamg'arma pul.
words.example1: Everyone should have a rainy day fund for emergencies.
words.example1Translation: Hamma favqulodda holatlar uchun qora kun jamg'armasiga ega bo'lishi kerak.
words.example2: She dipped into her rainy day fund when her car broke down.
words.example2Translation: Mashinasi buzilganda u qora kun jamg'armasidan foydalandi.
words.example3: Building a rainy day fund should be your first financial priority.
words.example3Translation: Qora kun jamg'armasini tuzish sizning birinchi moliyaviy ustuvorligingiz bo'lishi kerak.
extraExamples: His rainy day fund helped him survive three months without a job.
Financial experts recommend saving at least three months of expenses in a rainy day fund.
She started her rainy day fund by setting aside ten percent of her salary each month.
Without a rainy day fund, any unexpected expense can cause serious problems.
He felt much more secure once he had built up his rainy day fund.
A rainy day fund gives you peace of mind during uncertain times.
They used their rainy day fund to cover medical costs after the accident.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning qora kun jamg'armasi uch oy ish yo'q paytida yashashga yordam berdi.
Moliya mutaxassislari qora kun jamg'armasida kamida uch oylik xarajatlarni saqlashni tavsiya qiladi.
U har oy maoshining o'n foizini ajratib, qora kun jamg'armasini boshladi.
Qora kun jamg'armasiz har qanday kutilmagan xarajat jiddiy muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U qora kun jamg'armasini to'plaganidan keyin o'zini ancha xotirjam his qildi.
Qora kun jamg'armasi noaniq davrda xotirjamlik beradi.
Ular baxtsiz hodisadan keyin tibbiy xarajatlarni qoplash uchun qora kun jamg'armasidan foydalanishdi.

words.translation: keng fikrlaydigan, boshqalarning fikrini ham inobatga oladigan
words.definition: willing to consider different ideas, opinions, and ways of thinking without rejecting them unfairly
words.definitionUz: Boshqalarning fikrlarini inkor etmasdan ko'rib chiqishga tayyor bo'lish — o'z fikridan boshqacha g'oyalarga ham quloq soladigan odam
words.example1: An open-minded teacher encourages students to question ideas rather than just accept them.
words.example1Translation: Keng fikrlaydigan o'qituvchi o'quvchilarni g'oyalarni shunchaki qabul qilish o'rniga savol berishga undaydi.
words.example2: You need to be open-minded when working in a team with people from different backgrounds.
words.example2Translation: Turli xil tarixga ega odamlar bilan jamoada ishlashda keng fikrli bo'lish kerak.
words.example3: She remained open-minded during the debate and even changed her view after hearing new arguments.
words.example3Translation: U munozara davomida keng fikrli bo'lib qoldi va yangi dalillarni eshitgandan so'ng fikrini ham o'zgartirdi.
extraExamples: Being open-minded helped him discover career paths he had never considered before.
Open-minded people tend to have more interesting and diverse friendships.
Try to stay open-minded when receiving feedback — it can help you grow.
An open-minded approach to problem-solving leads to more creative solutions.
She became more open-minded after living abroad for a year.
Open-minded leaders create workplaces where people feel safe sharing their ideas.
Being open-minded does not mean having no opinions — it means holding them loosely.
extraExampleTranslations: Keng fikrli bo'lish unga ilgari hech qachon ko'rib chiqmagan martaba yo'llarini kashf etishga yordam berdi.
Keng fikrli odamlar ko'proq qiziqarli va xilma-xil do'stliklarga ega bo'ladi.
Fikr-mulohaza olganda keng fikrli bo'lishga harakat qiling — bu rivojlanishga yordam berishi mumkin.
Muammolarni hal qilishga keng fikrli yondashuv ko'proq ijodiy yechimlarga olib keladi.
U bir yil chet elda yashagandan so'ng ko'proq keng fikrli bo'lib qoldi.
Keng fikrli rahbarlar odamlar o'z g'oyalarini baham ko'rishda o'zlarini xavfsiz his qiladigan ish joylari yaratadi.
Keng fikrli bo'lish fikrsiz bo'lish degani emas — bu ularni qattiq ushlab turmaslik demak.

words.translation: kuchli xohishli; katta maqsadlar qo'yib faqat olg'a intiladigan
words.definition: having a strong desire to achieve success, power, or a high level of achievement
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyat yoki yuqori natijalarga erishish uchun kuchli istak va intilishga ega bo'lish — katta maqsadlari bor va ular uchun harakat qiladigan odam
words.example1: She is so ambitious that she became a manager before the age of thirty.
words.example1Translation: U shunchalik kuchli xohishli ediki, o'ttiz yoshdan oldin menejer bo'ldi.
words.example2: Being ambitious is a great quality, but it needs to be balanced with patience.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli xohishli bo'lish ajoyib xususiyat, lekin uni sabr bilan muvozanatlash kerak.
words.example3: The company set an ambitious goal to expand into ten new markets within three years.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya uch yil ichida o'nta yangi bozorga kengayish bo'yicha katta maqsad qo'ydi.
extraExamples: Ambitious people are often willing to take risks that others avoid.
His ambitious plans for the startup impressed every investor he met.
Being ambitious means you never settle for less than what you are capable of.
She was ambitious from a young age and always pushed herself to improve.
Ambitious students stay after class and ask extra questions to get ahead.
An ambitious goal without a clear plan is just a wish.
He was ambitious but also knew the importance of lifting others up along the way.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli xohishli odamlar ko'pincha boshqalar qochadigan tavakkalchilikka tayyor bo'ladi.
Uning startap uchun katta rejalari uchrashgan har bir investorni hayratga qoldirdi.
Kuchli xohishli bo'lish qobiliyatingizdan past narsaga rozi bo'lmasligingiz degani.
U yoshligidan kuchli xohishli edi va doimo o'zini takomillashtirishga undardi.
Kuchli xohishli o'quvchilar darsdan keyin qolishadi va oldinga chiqish uchun qo'shimcha savollar berishadi.
Aniq rejasiz katta maqsad faqat xolos.
U kuchli xohishli edi, lekin yo'l davomida boshqalarni ko'tarish muhimligini ham bilardi.

words.translation: yaxshi tomonni o'ylaydigan, yaxshi narsani umid qiladigan
words.definition: tending to believe that good things will happen and that situations will turn out well
words.definitionUz: Yaxshi narsalar sodir bo'lishiga va vaziyatlar yaxshi yakunlanishiga ishonishga moyil bo'lish — har doim umidli va ijobiy qarashga ega bo'lgan odam
words.example1: Even after failing the exam twice, she stayed optimistic and kept studying.
words.example1Translation: Imtihondan ikki marta yiqilganidan keyin ham u umidli bo'lib qoldi va o'qishda davom etdi.
words.example2: Being optimistic does not mean ignoring problems — it means believing you can solve them.
words.example2Translation: Umidli bo'lish muammolarni e'tiborsiz qoldirish degani emas — bu ularni hal qila olishingizga ishonish demak.
words.example3: He is optimistic about the future of the company despite the recent challenges.
words.example3Translation: U so'nggi qiyinchiliklarga qaramay kompaniyaning kelajagi haqida umidli.
extraExamples: Optimistic people tend to recover from setbacks faster than pessimists.
She stayed optimistic throughout her recovery and it made a real difference.
Being optimistic at work helps teams stay motivated during difficult projects.
An optimistic attitude attracts positive people and better opportunities.
He was cautiously optimistic about the results, not wanting to celebrate too early.
Raising optimistic children starts with modeling positive thinking at home.
Research suggests that optimistic people tend to live longer and healthier lives.
extraExampleTranslations: Umidli odamlar muvaffaqiyatsizliklardan pessimistlarga qaraganda tezroq tiklanadi.
U tiklash jarayoni davomida umidli bo'lib qoldi va bu haqiqiy farq yaratdi.
Ishda umidli bo'lish jamoalarga qiyin loyihalar davomida rag'batlantirilishiga yordam beradi.
Umidli munosabat ijobiy odamlar va yaxshiroq imkoniyatlarni jalb qiladi.
U juda erta nishonlamaslik uchun natijalar haqida ehtiyotkorlik bilan umidli edi.
Umidli bolalar tarbiyalash uyda ijobiy fikrlashni namoyish etishdan boshlanadi.
Tadqiqotlar umidli odamlar uzoqroq va sog'lom hayot kechirishga moyil ekanligini ko'rsatmoqda.

words.translation: moslashuvchan, har xil vaziyatlarga moslashib keta oladigan
words.definition: able to change your behavior or approach to suit different situations or environments
words.definitionUz: Turli vaziyatlar yoki muhitlarga mos ravishda o'z xatti-harakatingiz yoki yondashuvingizni o'zgartira olish qobiliyati
words.example1: Adaptable employees are highly valued because workplaces are always changing.
words.example1Translation: Moslashuvchan xodimlar juda qadrlanadi, chunki ish joylari doim o'zgarib turadi.
words.example2: Living in three different countries made her incredibly adaptable to new environments.
words.example2Translation: Uchta turli mamlakatda yashash uni yangi muhitlarga inanilmas darajada moslashuvchan qildi.
words.example3: You have to be adaptable in a startup where your role can change from week to week.
words.example3Translation: Rolingiz haftadan haftaga o'zgarishi mumkin bo'lgan startapda moslashuvchan bo'lish kerak.
extraExamples: Adaptable people see change as an opportunity rather than a threat.
Being adaptable helped him transition smoothly from teaching to corporate training.
The most successful athletes are both skilled and adaptable to different opponents.
She showed how adaptable she was by learning three new software tools in one month.
In a fast-changing industry, being adaptable is more important than having fixed expertise.
Adaptable teams deliver better results because they respond quickly to new information.
Raising adaptable children means letting them face and work through challenges on their own.
extraExampleTranslations: Moslashuvchan odamlar o'zgarishni tahdid emas, imkoniyat sifatida ko'radi.
Moslashuvchan bo'lish unga o'qitishdan korporativ treningga muammosiz o'tishga yordam berdi.
Eng muvaffaqiyatli sportchilar ham mohir, ham turli raqiblarga moslashuvchan.
U bir oy ichida uchta yangi dasturiy ta'minot vositasini o'rganib moslashuvchanligi ko'rsatdi.
Tez o'zgaruvchan sohada moslashuvchan bo'lish qat'iy mutaxassislikka ega bo'lishdan muhimroq.
Moslashuvchan jamoalar yangi ma'lumotlarga tezda munosabat bildirishi sababli yaxshiroq natijalar beradi.
Moslashuvchan bolalar tarbiyalash ularga muammolarni o'zlari yechishga imkon berish demak.

words.definition: behaving as if you are more important or better than others, in a way that is unpleasant
