words.definitionUz: O'zini boshqalardan muhimroq yoki yaxshiroq deb hisoblab, yoqimsiz tarzda munosabatda bo'lish — kibrli va manmanlik bilan harakat qilish
words.example1: His arrogant attitude made it difficult for anyone to work with him on the team.
words.example1Translation: Uning kibrli munosabati jamoada hech kimning u bilan ishlashini qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example2: She was talented but arrogant, which stopped her from ever asking for help.
words.example2Translation: U iqtidorli edi, lekin kekkaygan edi, bu esa uning hech qachon yordam so'rashini to'xtatdi.
words.example3: The arrogant manager never listened to his team and made several costly mistakes.
words.example3Translation: Kibrli menejer hech qachon jamoasini eshitmadi va bir nechta qimmat xatolar qildi.
extraExamples: Arrogant people often believe they already know everything, so they stop learning.
His arrogant tone in the meeting offended several important clients.
Being confident is attractive, but being arrogant pushes people away.
She came across as arrogant in the interview because she dismissed all the interviewer's suggestions.
Arrogant leaders lose the respect and loyalty of their teams over time.
He realized he had been arrogant and made a genuine effort to listen more.
Arrogant behavior usually hides deep insecurity underneath.
extraExampleTranslations: Kibrli odamlar ko'pincha hamma narsani allaqachon bilishlariga ishonadi, shuning uchun o'rganishni to'xtatadi.
Yig'ilishdagi uning kibrli ohang bir nechta muhim mijozlarni xafa qildi.
O'ziga ishonch jozibali, lekin kibr odamlarni uzoqlashtiradi.
U intervyuda suhbatdoshning barcha takliflarini rad etgani uchun kibrli taassurot qoldirdi.
Kibrli rahbarlar vaqt o'tishi bilan jamoalarining hurmat va sodiqligini yo'qotadi.
U kibrli bo'lganligini anglab yetdi va ko'proq tinglashga chin dildan harakat qildi.
Kibrli xulq-atvor odatda ichida chuqur ishonchsizlikni yashiradi.

words.definition: not afraid of anything, or willing to do things that most people would find frightening
words.definitionUz: Ko'pchilik odamlar qo'rqadigan narsalarni qo'rqmasdan qilishga tayyor bo'lish — jasur va dadil harakat qiladigan odam
words.example1: The fearless journalist traveled to conflict zones to report the truth.
words.example1Translation: Jasur jurnalist haqiqatni xabar qilish uchun mojaro zonalariga bordi.
words.example2: She gave a fearless speech about topics most politicians refuse to discuss.
words.example2Translation: U ko'pchilik siyosatchilar muhokama qilishdan bosh tortadigan mavzular haqida jasur nutq so'zladi.
words.example3: To start your own business, you need to be fearless enough to risk failure.
words.example3Translation: O'z biznesingizni boshlash uchun muvaffaqiyatsizlik xavfini qo'rqmasdan qabul qilishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: The fearless firefighter ran into the burning building without hesitation.
She was fearless as a child, always climbing the tallest trees in the neighborhood.
Being fearless does not mean feeling no fear — it means acting despite it.
His fearless attitude in negotiations earned him a reputation as a tough deal-maker.
Fearless leaders inspire their teams to take bold action.
She made a fearless career change at forty and never looked back.
The fearless athlete attempted a move no one had ever tried in competition before.
extraExampleTranslations: Jasur o't o'chiruvchi ikkilanmasdan yonayotgan binoga yugurdi.
U bolaligida qo'rqmas edi va doim mahallaning eng baland daraxtlariga chiqardi.
Jasur bo'lish qo'rqmaslik degani emas — bu qo'rqimga qaramay harakat qilish demak.
Muzokaralardagi uning jasur munosabati unga qattiq shartnoma tuzuvchi sifatida obro' qozondi.
Jasur rahbarlar jamoalarini qo'pol harakatlar qilishga ilhomlantiradi.
U qirqda jasur martaba o'zgarishini qildi va hech qachon orqasiga qaramadi.
Jasur sportchi musobaqada hech kim hech qachon sinab ko'rmagan harakatni amalga oshirdi.

words.translation: qo'pol, tajovuzkor, tez urishib ketishga moyil
words.definition: behaving in an angry, forceful way that can frighten or upset other people
words.definitionUz: Boshqa odamlarni qo'rqitadigan yoki xafa qiladigan g'azabli va qo'pol tarzda harakat qilish — tez jahli chiqadigan va tajovuzkor bo'lgan odam
words.example1: His aggressive tone during the meeting made several colleagues uncomfortable.
words.example1Translation: Uning yig'ilishdagi qo'pol ohang bir nechta hamkasblarini noqulay his qildirdi.
words.example2: The aggressive driver kept honking and cutting in front of other cars.
words.example2Translation: Tajovuzkor haydovchi doim signal chaldi va boshqa mashinalar oldiga kesildi.
words.example3: She felt intimidated by his aggressive response to a simple question.
words.example3Translation: U oddiy savolga uning tajovuzkor javobidan qo'rqib qoldi.
extraExamples: Aggressive behavior in the workplace can lead to formal complaints and disciplinary action.
He became aggressive when he felt his ideas were being ignored.
An aggressive sales approach can push potential customers away.
Children who witness aggressive behavior at home often repeat it at school.
The coach was aggressive in his criticism, which lowered the team's confidence.
Being assertive is healthy, but crossing into aggressive behavior damages relationships.
She left the conversation because his aggressive attitude made it impossible to reason with him.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish joyida tajovuzkor xulq-atvor rasmiy shikoyatlar va intizomiy choralarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U o'z g'oyalari e'tiborga olinmayotganini his qilganda tajovuzkor bo'lib qoldi.
Tajovuzkor savdo yondashuvi potentsial mijozlarni uzoqlashtirishi mumkin.
Uyda tajovuzkor xulq-atvorga guvoh bo'lgan bolalar ko'pincha uni maktabda takrorlaydi.
Murabbiy o'z tanqidida tajovuzkor edi va bu jamoaning ishonchini tushirdi.
Qat'iy bo'lish sog'lom, lekin tajovuzkor xulq-atvorga o'tish munosabatlarni buzadi.
U suhbatni tark etdi, chunki uning tajovuzkor munosabati u bilan muhokama qilishni imkonsiz qildi.

words.definition: friendly, confident, and enjoying meeting and talking to new people
words.definitionUz: Do'stona, o'ziga ishongan va yangi odamlar bilan uchrashish hamda gaplashishdan zavq oladigan — tez tanishib, osongina muloqot qura oladigan odam
words.example1: Her outgoing personality made her a natural choice to lead the welcome team.
words.example1Translation: Uning chiqishuvchan tabiati uni kutib olish jamoasini boshqarish uchun tabiiy tanlov qildi.
words.example2: Even though he is outgoing at parties, he needs quiet time alone to recharge.
words.example2Translation: U ziyofatlarda chiqishuvchan bo'lsa ham, u qayta kuchini to'plash uchun yolg'iz tinch vaqtga muhtoj.
words.example3: Being outgoing helped her build a wide professional network very quickly.
words.example3Translation: Chiqishuvchan bo'lish unga juda tez keng professional tarmoq qurish imkonini berdi.
extraExamples: Outgoing people often find it easier to settle into new environments.
Her outgoing nature meant she never struggled to make new friends.
The outgoing salesperson was able to connect with clients from every background.
Being outgoing is helpful in customer-facing roles but not always necessary behind the scenes.
He was shy as a child but became outgoing after joining the school drama club.
Outgoing team members often help quieter colleagues feel more included.
She is naturally outgoing and makes everyone feel welcome the moment they walk in.
extraExampleTranslations: Chiqishuvchan odamlar ko'pincha yangi muhitlarga o'rganishni osonroq topadi.
Uning chiqishuvchan tabiati yangi do'stlar topishda hech qachon qiynalmasligini anglatardi.
Chiqishuvchan sotuvchi har xil tarixga ega mijozlar bilan muloqot qilishga qodir edi.
Chiqishuvchan bo'lish mijozlar bilan aloqada bo'lgan rollar uchun foydali, lekin har doim sahna ortida kerak emas.
U bolaligida uyatchan edi, lekin maktab drama to'garagiga qo'shilganidan keyin chiqishuvchan bo'ldi.
Chiqishuvchan jamoa a'zolari ko'pincha jimroq hamkasblarning o'zlarini ko'proq qamrab olingan his qilishiga yordam beradi.
U tabiiy ravishda chiqishuvchan va kirgan zahotiyoq hamma o'zini xush kelibsiz his qildiradi.

words.definition: feeling or showing no hope that a situation will improve, or having no chance of success
words.definitionUz: Vaziyat yaxshilanishiga umid yo'q deb his qilish yoki ko'rsatish — muvaffaqiyat imkoniyati bo'lmagan holat yoki odam
words.example1: After losing his job and savings, he felt completely hopeless about the future.
words.example1Translation: Ishini va tejamkorligini yo'qotgandan so'ng, u kelajak haqida butunlay umidsiz his qildi.
words.example2: The situation seemed hopeless, but the team refused to give up.
words.example2Translation: Vaziyat umidsiz tuyular edi, lekin jamoa taslim bo'lishni rad etdi.
words.example3: She felt hopeless when three months of job applications brought no results.
words.example3Translation: Uch oylik ish arizalari hech qanday natija bermay qolganida u umidsiz his qildi.
extraExamples: Feeling hopeless is a sign that you need to talk to someone you trust.
He thought the project was hopeless until a new idea changed everything.
Hopeless situations can sometimes turn around with a change of approach.
She never let her students feel hopeless, even when they were struggling.
The team was in a hopeless position with five minutes left in the match.
Feeling hopeless about a subject often means you just need a better teacher or method.
No situation is truly hopeless — circumstances can always change.
extraExampleTranslations: Umidsiz his qilish ishongan birov bilan gaplashish kerakligingizning belgisi.
U yangi g'oya hamma narsani o'zgartirguncha loyiha umidsiz deb o'yladi.
Umidsiz vaziyatlar ba'zan yondashuv o'zgarishi bilan o'zgarishi mumkin.
U hatto qiynalayotgan paytda ham o'quvchilarni umidsiz his qildirmadi.
Jamoa o'yinda besh daqiqa qolganda umidsiz vaziyatda edi.
Biror mavzu haqida umidsiz his qilish ko'pincha shunchaki yaxshiroq o'qituvchi yoki usul kerakligini anglatadi.
Hech qanday vaziyat haqiqatan ham umidsiz emas — sharoitlar har doim o'zgarishi mumkin.

words.definition: saying or showing what you genuinely feel or believe, without pretending or hiding anything
words.definitionUz: Hech narsa yashirmasdan yoki ko'rsatmasdan, haqiqatan his qilgan yoki ishongan narsangizni aytish yoki ko'rsatish — qalban halol va ochiq bo'lgan odam
words.example1: Her sincere apology meant much more than a simple sorry ever could.
words.example1Translation: Uning samimiy uzr so'rashi oddiy kechirim so'rashdan ko'ra ancha ko'proq ma'noga ega edi.
words.example2: He gave sincere praise to his team after they delivered results under pressure.
words.example2Translation: U bosim ostida natija berganidan keyin jamoasiga samimiy maqtov berdi.
words.example3: People trust her advice because they know she is always sincere.
words.example3Translation: Odamlar uning maslahatiga ishonadi, chunki u doim samimiy ekanini bilishadi.
extraExamples: A sincere thank you means far more to people than a formal one.
She could tell his compliment was sincere because it was specific and personal.
Being sincere in a job interview helps you stand out from candidates who just say what they think employers want to hear.
Sincere friendships are built on honesty, not just shared interests.
His sincere concern for his students made him one of the most respected teachers in the school.
People can usually tell the difference between a sincere smile and a fake one.
A sincere effort, even if it fails, is always more respected than no effort at all.
extraExampleTranslations: Samimiy rahmat rasmiy rahmatdan odamlarga ancha ko'proq ma'no anglatadi.
U uning maqtovi u aniq va shaxsiy bo'lgani uchun samimiy ekanini bila oldi.
Ish intervyusida samimiy bo'lish ish beruvchilar eshitishni xohlaydi deb o'ylaydigan narsalarni aytadigan nomzodlardan ajralib turishga yordam beradi.
Samimiy do'stliklar faqat umumiy manfaatlar emas, balki halollik asosida quriladi.
Uning o'quvchilariga samimiy g'amxo'rligi uni maktabdagi eng hurmatli o'qituvchilardan biriga aylantirdi.
Odamlar odatda samimiy tabassum va soxta tabassumning farqini bila oladi.
Samimiy harakat, hatto muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lsa ham, har doim hech qanday harakatsizlikdan ko'ra hurmatlidir.

words.definition: Used to say that something is partly true or true from a certain point of view
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa to'liq emas, lekin ma'lum bir nuqtai nazardan to'g'ri yoki qisman haqiqat ekanini bildiradi
words.example1: It's, in a way, my biggest mistake.
words.example1Translation: Bu, qaysidir ma'noda, mening eng katta xatom.
words.example2: In a way, losing that job was the best thing that happened to me.
words.example2Translation: Qaysidir ma'noda, o'sha ishni yo'qotish menga yuz bergan eng yaxshi narsa edi.
words.example3: I feel, in a way, responsible for what happened.
words.example3Translation: Bir tomondan, sodir bo'lgan narsa uchun o'zimni javobgar his qilaman.
extraExamples: In a way, I'm glad the project got cancelled.
She was, in a way, relieved when it was all over.
In a way, his criticism actually helped me improve.
It was, in a way, the beginning of something new.
In a way, failing early taught me more than succeeding did.
He was, in a way, the reason everything fell apart.
In a way, I think we both needed that conversation.
extraExampleTranslations: Qaysidir ma'noda, loyiha bekor qilinganidan xursandman.
U, bir tomondan, hamma narsa tugaganda yengil tortdi.
Qaysidir ma'noda, uning tanqidi aslida yaxshilanishimga yordam berdi.
Bu, bir tomondan, yangi narsaning boshlanishi edi.
Qaysidir ma'noda, erta muvaffaqiyatsizlik menga g'alaba qozonishdan ko'ra ko'proq narsa o'rgatti.
U, bir tomondan, hamma narsaning barbod bo'lish sababi edi.
Qaysidir ma'noda, o'sha suhbat ikkalamizga ham kerak edi deb o'ylayman.

words.definition: Used to say that something happens or is true, but without specifying exactly how
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa aniq qanday ekanini bilmasdan, lekin qandaydir tarzda sodir bo'lishini yoki to'g'ri ekanini bildiradi
words.example1: Learning a new language can, in some way, broaden your horizons.
words.example1Translation: Yangi til o'rganish qandaydir tarzda dunyoqarashingizni kengaytirishi mumkin.
words.example2: Everything we go through in some way shapes who we become.
words.example2Translation: Boshdan kechirganimiz hamma narsa qandaydir tarzda kim bo'lishimizni shakllantiradi.
words.example3: I feel like this experience changed me in some way.
words.example3Translation: Bu tajriba meni qandaydir tarzda o'zgartirganday his qilaman.
extraExamples: In some way, every failure teaches you something valuable.
She had in some way always known it would end like this.
The two events are connected in some way.
In some way, travel makes you a more open-minded person.
He felt that he had in some way let the team down.
The decision affected everyone in some way.
In some way, her words gave me the confidence I needed.
extraExampleTranslations: Qandaydir tarzda, har bir muvaffaqiyatsizlik sizga qimmatli narsa o'rgatadi.
U qandaydir tarzda bu shunday yakunlanishini har doim bilganday edi.
Ikki voqea qandaydir tarzda bog'liq.
Qandaydir tarzda, sayohat sizni yanada ochiqfikrli qiladi.
U qandaydir tarzda jamoani hafsalasi pir qilganday his qildi.
Qaror qandaydir tarzda hamma narsaga ta'sir ko'rsatdi.
Qandaydir tarzda, uning so'zlari menga kerakli ishonch bag'ishladi.

words.definition: Used to refer to a specific moment in time when something happened or changed
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa sodir bo'lgan yoki o'zgargan aniq bir vaqt momentini ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: I failed the exam; at that point, I was extremely disappointed.
words.example1Translation: Imtihondan yiqildim; o'sha vaqtda juda hafsalam pir bo'ldi.
words.example2: At that point, we had no choice but to leave.
words.example2Translation: O'sha paytda ketishdan boshqa variantimiz yo'q edi.
words.example3: She had been working for ten hours at that point and needed a break.
words.example3Translation: O'sha paytda u o'n soat ishlagan edi va dam olish kerak edi.
extraExamples: At that point in the meeting, everyone was exhausted.
I had already made my decision at that point.
At that point, the project was only halfway complete.
He walked out, and at that point I knew it was over.
At that point, we realized something had gone seriously wrong.
The team had lost three games; at that point, morale was very low.
At that point in my life, I had no idea what I wanted to do.
extraExampleTranslations: Yig'ilishdagi o'sha paytda hamma charchagan edi.
O'sha paytda allaqachon qarorimni qabul qilgan edim.
O'sha paytda loyiha faqat yarmigacha yakunlangan edi.
U chiqib ketdi, va o'sha paytda hammasi tugaganini tushundim.
O'sha paytda biror jiddiy narsa noto'g'ri ketganini angladik.
Jamoa uch o'yin yutqazdi; o'sha paytda ruh juda past edi.
Hayotimdagi o'sha davrda nima qilishni bilmay qolgan edim.

words.definition: Used when something happens but you do not know or cannot explain why
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa sodir bo'layotganini bilasiz, lekin aniq sababini bilmasangiz yoki tushuntirolmasangiz ishlatiladi
words.example1: For some reason, the computer keeps crashing, but I can't figure out why.
words.example1Translation: Nima uchundir kompyuter o'chib-yonib turibdi, lekin sababini topolmayapman.
words.example2: For some reason, I woke up feeling really anxious this morning.
words.example2Translation: Nima uchundir bu ertalab juda xavotirlanib uyg'ondim.
words.example3: For some reason, she stopped replying to my messages.
words.example3Translation: Biror sababga ko'ra, u xabarlarimga javob berishni to'xtatdi.
extraExamples: For some reason, the file won't open on my device.
For some reason, I always feel tired on Mondays.
He quit the team, for some reason, right before the finals.
For some reason, nobody mentioned the problem in the meeting.
I can't explain it, but for some reason I trusted him immediately.
For some reason, the system logged me out automatically.
For some reason, that song always makes me feel nostalgic.
extraExampleTranslations: Nima uchundir fayl qurilmamda ochilmayapti.
Nima uchundir dushanba kunlari har doim charchagan his qilaman.
U nima uchundir final oldidan jamoani tark etdi.
Nima uchundir hech kim yig'ilishda muammo haqida eslatmadi.
Tushuntirolmayman, lekin nima uchundir unga darhol ishondim.
Nima uchundir tizim meni avtomatik tarzda chiqarib yubordi.
Nima uchundir o'sha qo'shiq har doim menga nostalji his uyg'otadi.

words.definition: Used to emphasize the full distance traveled or the complete extent of something
words.definitionUz: Butun masofani bosib o'tganini yoki biror narsaning to'liq darajasini ta'kidlash uchun ishlatiladi
words.example1: I came on foot all the way down here.
words.example1Translation: Men shu yerga piyoda kelib yetdim.
words.example2: The queue stretched all the way down the street.
words.example2Translation: Navbat ko'cha oxirigacha cho'zilgan edi.
words.example3: She climbed all the way down the mountain before sunset.
words.example3Translation: U quyosh botgunga qadar tog'dan to'liq tushib oldi.
extraExamples: The roots grow all the way down to the water table.
He scrolled all the way down to the bottom of the page.
We hiked all the way down to the valley floor.
The price dropped all the way down to almost nothing.
She read all the way down to the last footnote.
The cable runs all the way down to the basement.
They walked all the way down to the river before stopping.
extraExampleTranslations: Ildizlar er osti suv qatlamigacha pastga o'sadi.
U sahifaning eng pastiga qadar aylantirdi.
Biz vodiy tagigacha yurish qildik.
Narx deyarli nolgacha tushib ketdi.
U oxirgi izohgacha o'qidi.
Kabel yerto'lagacha cho'zilgan.
Ular to'xtashdan oldin daryo bo'yigacha yurdilar.

words.translation: So'nggi yangiliklardan xabardor bo'lmoq / ko'rishib suhbatlashmoq
words.definition: To get information about recent events you missed, or to spend time doing something you haven't had time for
words.definitionUz: O'tkazib yuborilgan voqealar haqida ma'lumot olish yoki vaqt topa olmagan narsani bajarish
words.example1: We usually catch up on the latest news over coffee.
words.example1Translation: Biz odatda qahva ustida eng so'ngi yangiliklar bilan tanishamiz.
words.example2: I need to catch up on my emails after the holiday.
words.example2Translation: Ta'tildan keyin xatlarimni ko'rib chiqishim kerak.
words.example3: Let's meet this weekend and catch up on everything.
words.example3Translation: Keling, dam olish kunida uchrashamiz va hamma narsa haqida gaplashamiz.
extraExamples: She stayed up late to catch up on the series she had missed.
I like to catch up on reading during long flights.
We haven't spoken in months — we really need to catch up.
He used the weekend to catch up on sleep.
I'm trying to catch up on work after being sick for a week.
They met for lunch to catch up on each other's lives.
She called her friend to catch up on everything that had happened.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'tkazib yuborgan serialni ko'rish uchun kech yotdi.
Uzoq parvozlarda kitob o'qish bilan qolgan ishlarni qoplashni yaxshi ko'raman.
Oylar davomida gaplashmadik — rostdan ham uchrashishimiz kerak.
U dam olish kunini uyqusini qoplash uchun ishlatdi.
Bir hafta kasal bo'lganimdan keyin ishlarimni qoplashga harakat qilmoqdaman.
Ular bir-birining hayotidan xabardor bo'lish uchun tushlik uchun uchrashdilar.
U do'stiga sodir bo'lgan hamma narsa haqida gaplashish uchun qo'ng'iroq qildi.

words.definition: To have known someone for a very long time and share a long history together
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi bilan uzoq vaqtdan buyon tanish bo'lish va birga ko'p narsalarni boshdan kechirgan bo'lish
words.example1: John and I go back a long way — we've been friends since primary school.
words.example1Translation: Jon va men bir-birimizni anchadan beri bilamiz — boshlang'ich maktabdan buyon do'stmiz.
words.example2: Those two families go back a long way in this town.
words.example2Translation: Bu ikki oila bu shaharda anchadan beri bir-birini biladi.
words.example3: She and her business partner go back a long way.
words.example3Translation: U va uning biznes hamkori bir-birini anchadan beri biladi.
extraExamples: We go back a long way — I was at his wedding.
The two companies go back a long way in their partnership.
My mentor and I go back a long way — she hired me for my first job.
They go back a long way, so they can be honest with each other.
Those two coaches go back a long way from their playing days.
We go back a long way, which is why I trust him completely.
She and I go back a long way — we grew up on the same street.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz bir-birimizni anchadan beri bilamiz — men uning to'yida bo'lganman.
Ikki kompaniya hamkorligida bir-birini uzoq vaqtdan beri biladi.
Mening murabbiyim va men bir-birimizni anchadan beri bilamiz — u meni birinchi ishimga oldi.
Ular bir-birini uzoq vaqtdan beri bilishadi, shuning uchun bir-biriga ochiq gapira olishadi.
O'sha ikki murabbiy o'yinchi paytlaridan beri bir-birini biladi.
Biz bir-birimizni anchadan beri bilamiz, shuning uchun unga to'liq ishonaman.
U va men bir-birimizni anchadan beri bilamiz — bir ko'chada o'sdik.

words.translation: Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham / bir yo'l bilan bo'lsa ham
words.definition: Used to say that something will happen or be done regardless of the method used
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa qanday usul qo'llanilishidan qat'iy nazar albatta sodir bo'lishini yoki bajarilishini bildiradi
words.example1: I'll find a solution to this problem one way or another.
words.example1Translation: Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham bu muammoga yechim topaman.
words.example2: One way or another, we'll get this project finished by Friday.
words.example2Translation: Qanday yo'l bilan bo'lsa ham, juma kuni bu loyihani tugatamiz.
words.example3: She was determined to succeed one way or another.
words.example3Translation: U qanday qilib bo'lsa ham muvaffaqiyat qozonishga qat'iy edi.
extraExamples: One way or another, the truth will come out.
We'll make it work one way or another.
One way or another, this needs to be resolved today.
He was going to get what he wanted one way or another.
One way or another, we'll find the money for the trip.
She said she'd be there one way or another.
One way or another, the decision has to be made by tomorrow.
extraExampleTranslations: Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham, haqiqat ma'lum bo'ladi.
Qanday yo'l bilan bo'lsa ham, buni ishga tushiramiz.
Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham, bu bugun hal qilinishi kerak.
U qanday yo'l bilan bo'lsa ham xohlagan narsasiga erishmoqchi edi.
Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham, sayohat uchun pul topamiz.
U qanday yo'l bilan bo'lsa ham u yerda bo'lishini aytdi.
Qanday qilib bo'lsa ham, qaror ertaga qabul qilinishi kerak.

words.definition: Used to transition from a serious or heavy topic to something more cheerful or amusing
words.definitionUz: Jiddiy yoki og'ir mavzudan ko'tarinki yoki qiziqroq narsaga o'tishni bildiradi
words.example1: On a lighter note, the team celebrated with a surprise party after the long week.
words.example1Translation: Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, jamoa uzoq haftadan keyin kutilmagan ziyofat bilan nishonladi.
words.example2: On a lighter note, I heard we're getting free lunch on Friday.
words.example2Translation: Yengilroq gapga o'tadigan bo'lsak, juma kuni bepul tushlik bo'lishini eshitdim.
words.example3: On a lighter note, the new office dog is already everyone's favorite.
words.example3Translation: Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, yangi ofis iti allaqachon hamma sevimligiga aylandi.
extraExamples: On a lighter note, the meeting ended early for once.
On a lighter note, our intern just won an award.
On a lighter note, someone brought homemade cookies today.
On a lighter note, the weather is finally getting better.
On a lighter note, I just heard a really funny story about that.
On a lighter note, we hit our sales target this month.
On a lighter note, the team photo turned out better than expected.
extraExampleTranslations: Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, yig'ilish bir marta erta yakunlandi.
Yengilroq gapga o'tadigan bo'lsak, bizning stajiyor mukofot oldi.
Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, bugun kimdir uy pishirig'i olib keldi.
Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, ob-havo nihoyat yaxshilanmoqda.
Yengilroq gapga o'tadigan bo'lsak, bu haqda juda kulgili hikoya eshitdim.
Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, bu oy savdo rejamizga erishdik.
Yengilroq mavzuga o'tadigan bo'lsak, jamoa surati kutilgandan yaxshiroq chiqdi.

words.translation: Shuni hisobga olgan holda / ammo shunga qaramay
words.definition: Used to introduce a contrasting or qualifying statement after something has just been said
words.definitionUz: Aytilgan narsadan keyin qarama-qarshi yoki qo'shimcha fikr kiritish uchun ishlatiladi — "lekin shunday bo'lsa ham" ma'nosida
words.example1: The project has challenges. That being said, I believe we can still succeed.
words.example1Translation: Loyihada qiyinchiliklar bor. Ammo shunga qaramay, muvaffaqiyat qozonishimiz mumkin deb ishonaman.
words.example2: The salary isn't great. That being said, the experience is invaluable.
words.example2Translation: Maosh unchalik yaxshi emas. Biroq shunga qaramay, tajriba bebaho.
words.example3: The results were disappointing. That being said, we learned a lot from the process.
words.example3Translation: Natijalar hafsala pir qildi. Ammo shunga qaramay, jarayondan ko'p narsa o'rgandik.
extraExamples: The plan has risks. That being said, it's worth trying.
The work is demanding. That being said, it's also rewarding.
That being said, we shouldn't ignore the concerns raised.
The feedback was harsh. That being said, most of it was fair.
It's a tough market. That being said, our product stands out.
That being said, I respect his decision even if I disagree.
The timeline is tight. That being said, the team is ready.
extraExampleTranslations: Rejada xavflar bor. Ammo shunga qaramay, sinab ko'rishga arziydi.
Ish talab qiluvchi. Biroq shunga qaramay, u mamnunlik keltiradi.
Shunga qaramay, ko'tarilgan muammolarni e'tiborsiz qoldirib bo'lmaydi.
Fikr-mulohaza qattiq edi. Ammo shunga qaramay, aksariyati adolatli edi.
Bu qiyin bozor. Shunga qaramay, mahsulotimiz ajralib turadi.
Shunga qaramay, rozi bo'lmasam ham uning qarorini hurmat qilaman.
Muddat qisqa. Ammo shunga qaramay, jamoa tayyor.

words.definition: Having moods that change quickly and unpredictably, often being bad-tempered or unhappy
words.definitionUz: Kayfiyati tez va kutilmagan tarzda o'zgaradigan, ko'pincha xafa yoki jahldor bo'lib turadigan odam
words.example1: He gets moody when he hasn't had enough sleep.
words.example1Translation: U yetarlicha uxlamasa kayfiyati buziladi.
words.example2: She's been moody all week and nobody knows why.
words.example2Translation: U bir hafta davomida xomush yurdi va hech kim sababini bilmaydi.
words.example3: Teenagers are often moody due to hormonal changes.
words.example3Translation: O'smirlar gormonal o'zgarishlar sababli ko'pincha kayfiyatsiz bo'ladi.
extraExamples: He can be moody at times, but he's generally kind.
Don't take it personally — she's just moody today.
Working with a moody colleague can be exhausting.
He turned moody after the argument and barely spoke.
She gets moody when plans change at the last minute.
The moody weather matched how everyone was feeling.
He's a bit moody in the mornings before his coffee.
extraExampleTranslations: U ba'zan xomush bo'ladi, lekin umuman olganda mehribon.
Shaxsan qabul qilmang — u bugun shunchaki kayfiyatsiz.
Kayfiyati o'zgaruvchan hamkasb bilan ishlash charchatishi mumkin.
U janjoldan keyin xomush tortdi va deyarli gapirmadi.
Rejalar oxirgi daqiqada o'zgarganda kayfiyati buziladi.
Xira havo hamma his qilayotgan narsaga mos tushdi.
U ertalab qahvasini ichmasdan oldin biroz xomush bo'ladi.

words.definition: Willing to accept opinions, behaviors, or people that are different from your own without judgment
words.definitionUz: O'zidan farq qiladigan fikrlar, xulq-atvor yoki odamlarni hukm qilmasdan qabul qila oladigan
words.example1: A good teacher needs to be tolerant of different learning styles.
words.example1Translation: Yaxshi o'qituvchi turli o'rganish uslublariga chidamli bo'lishi kerak.
words.example2: He is tolerant of other people's opinions even when he disagrees.
words.example2Translation: U rozi bo'lmasa ham boshqalarning fikrlariga bag'rikeng munosabatda bo'ladi.
words.example3: Living in a diverse city made her more tolerant and open-minded.
words.example3Translation: Xilma-xil shaharda yashash uni yanada bag'rikeng va ochiqfikrli qildi.
extraExamples: Being tolerant doesn't mean you agree with everything.
She is remarkably tolerant of noise while working.
The organization promotes a tolerant and inclusive environment.
He was tolerant of his roommate's habits, even the annoying ones.
Raising children requires a tolerant and patient approach.
A tolerant society accepts people regardless of background.
She remained tolerant even when the criticism was unfair.
extraExampleTranslations: Bag'rikeng bo'lish hamma narsaga rozi ekanligingizni bildirmaydi.
U ishlayotganda shovqinga ajoyib darajada chidamli.
Tashkilot bag'rikeng va inklyuziv muhitni targ'ib qiladi.
U xonadon sherigining odatlariga, hatto asabiylashtiradigan odatlariga ham chidamli edi.
Bolalarni tarbiyalash bag'rikeng va sabr-toqatli yondashuvni talab qiladi.
Bag'rikeng jamiyat odamlarni kelib chiqishidan qat'iy nazar qabul qiladi.
U tanqid adolatsiz bo'lganda ham bag'rikeng qoldi.

words.definition: Relaxed, calm, and not easily worried or upset by things
words.definitionUz: Xotirjam, osoyishta va narsalar uchun osongina xavotirlanmaydigan yoki bezovtalanmaydigan
words.example1: My new manager is very easy-going — he never stresses over small things.
words.example1Translation: Yangi menejerim juda muomalasi yoqimli — u hech qachon mayda narsalar uchun bezovtalanmaydi.
words.example2: She's easy-going and gets along with everyone in the office.
words.example2Translation: U muomalasi yoqimli va ofisdagi hamma bilan chiqishib ketadi.
words.example3: I prefer an easy-going lifestyle over a busy and stressful one.
words.example3Translation: Men band va stressli hayotdan ko'ra xotirjam turmush tarzini afzal ko'raman.
extraExamples: He's so easy-going that he never complains about anything.
Their easy-going attitude made the trip enjoyable for everyone.
She's easy-going but still takes her work seriously.
An easy-going personality helps in team environments.
He was easy-going about the schedule change.
I enjoy working with easy-going people — it reduces stress.
Despite being easy-going, she always meets her deadlines.
extraExampleTranslations: U shunchalik muomalasi yoqimliki, hech narsadan shikoyat qilmaydi.
Ularning xotirjam munosabati sayohatni hamma uchun qiziqarli qildi.
U muomalasi yoqimli, lekin baribir ishini jiddiy qabul qiladi.
Xotirjam xarakter jamoa muhitida yordam beradi.
U jadval o'zgarishiga osongina moslashdi.
Muomalasi yoqimli odamlar bilan ishlashni yaxshi ko'raman — stress kamayadi.
Muomalasi yoqimli bo'lishiga qaramay, u har doim muddatlarini bajaradi.

words.definition: Having a natural ability to attract, inspire, and influence other people through personal charm and confidence
words.definitionUz: Tabiiy joziba va ishonch orqali boshqalarni o'ziga tortish, ilhom berish va ta'sir o'tkazish qobiliyatiga ega bo'lish
words.example1: The charismatic speaker held the audience's attention for two hours.
words.example1Translation: Xarizmatik notiq ikki soat davomida tomoshabinlar diqqatini o'zida ushlab turdi.
words.example2: She's so charismatic that people naturally follow her lead.
words.example2Translation: U shunchalik xarizmatikki, odamlar o'z-o'zidan uning ketidan ergashadi.
words.example3: He was charismatic and convincing — everyone believed in his vision.
words.example3Translation: U xarizmatik va ishonchli edi — hamma uning tasavvuriga ishondi.
extraExamples: Charismatic leaders tend to inspire loyalty in their teams.
She walked into the room and everyone noticed — she's incredibly charismatic.
He used his charismatic personality to win the debate.
Being charismatic doesn't always mean being loud — it can be subtle.
The charismatic CEO made investors feel confident about the company.
People are drawn to him because he's so charismatic and genuine.
She was charismatic enough to turn a boring topic into an engaging talk.
extraExampleTranslations: Xarizmatik rahbarlar ko'pincha jamoalarida sadoqatni ilhom qiladi.
U xonaga kirdi va hamma uni payqadi — u ajoyib darajada xarizmatik.
U xarizmatik shaxsiyatini tortishuvda g'alaba qozonish uchun ishlatdi.
Xarizmatik bo'lish har doim shovqinli bo'lishni anglatmaydi — bu nozik bo'lishi mumkin.
Xarizmatik bosh direktor investorlarni kompaniya haqida ishonchli his qildirdi.
Odamlar unga tortiladi, chunki u juda xarizmatik va samimiy.
U zerikarli mavzuni qiziqarli nutqqa aylantira oladigan darajada xarizmatik edi.

words.definition: The ability to find things funny, enjoy jokes, and laugh at amusing situations including about oneself
words.definitionUz: Narsalarni kulgili deb topa olish, hazillardan zavqlanish va o'zi haqidagi hazillarni ham qabul qila olish qobiliyati
words.example1: She has a great sense of humor and always makes the team laugh.
words.example1Translation: Uning hazil tuyg'usi zo'r va u har doim jamoani kuldiради.
words.example2: You need to have a sense of humor to survive in this job.
words.example2Translation: Bu ishda omon qolish uchun hazil tuyg'usiga ega bo'lish kerak.
words.example3: He has a dry sense of humor that not everyone understands at first.
words.example3Translation: Uning quruq hazil tuyg'usi bor, dastlab hamma tushunmaydi.
extraExamples: Having a sense of humor makes difficult situations more bearable.
I love working with people who have a good sense of humor.
She has a sharp sense of humor that always catches people off guard.
He doesn't have much of a sense of humor — he takes everything literally.
A sense of humor is one of the most attractive qualities in a person.
Having a sense of humor about your mistakes helps you bounce back faster.
Their shared sense of humor is what keeps their friendship strong.
extraExampleTranslations: Hazil tuyg'usiga ega bo'lish qiyin vaziyatlarni ko'tarinkilashtiradi.
Yaxshi hazil tuyg'usiga ega odamlar bilan ishlashni yaxshi ko'raman.
Uning keskin hazil tuyg'usi bor, bu odamlarni doim taajjubga soladi.
Uning hazil tuyg'usi unchalik rivojlanmagan — hamma narsani to'g'ridan-to'g'ri qabul qiladi.
Hazil tuyg'usi odamdagi eng jozibali fazilatlardan biri.
Xatolaringiz haqida hazil qila olish tezroq o'zingizga kelishingizga yordam beradi.
Ularning umumiy hazil tuyg'usi do'stliklarini mustahkam saqlaydigan narsa.

words.definition: Very pleasant and attractive in a way that makes people like you
words.definitionUz: Odamlarga juda yoqimli va jozibali bo'lgan — odamlarni o'ziga muhabbat qildiradigan tarzda
words.example1: He was charming and polite — everyone liked him immediately.
words.example1Translation: U maftunkor va odobli edi — hamma darhol uni yoqtirdi.
words.example2: She gave a charming smile that made everyone feel welcome.
words.example2Translation: U maftunkor tabassum qildi va hamma o'zini xush kelibsiz his qildi.
words.example3: The charming old town attracted thousands of tourists every year.
words.example3Translation: Maftunkor qadimiy shaharcha har yili minglab sayyohlarni jalb qildi.
extraExamples: He can be very charming when he wants something.
The charming host made every guest feel special.
She has a charming personality that draws people in.
The village was small but absolutely charming.
His charming manner helped him succeed in sales.
She found his charming sense of humor irresistible.
The charming little café became their favorite spot.
extraExampleTranslations: U biror narsani xohlaganda juda maftunkor bo'lishi mumkin.
Maftunkor mezbon har bir mehmonni o'zini alohida his qildirdi.
Uning odamlarni o'ziga tortadigan maftunkor shaxsiyati bor.
Qishloq kichik edi, lekin mutlaqo maftunkor.
Uning maftunkor xulq-atvori savdoda muvaffaqiyat qozonishiga yordam berdi.
U uning maftunkor hazil tuyg'usiga qarshilik qila olmadi.
Maftunkor kichik kafe ularning sevimli joyiga aylandi.

words.definition: Extremely cute, lovable, or charming in a way that makes people feel affection
words.definitionUz: Odamlarda mehribonlik va muhabbat uyg'otadigan darajada juda yoqimli, shirin yoki jozibali
words.example1: The puppy was absolutely adorable — everyone wanted to hold it.
words.example1Translation: Kuchukcha mutlaqo yoqimtoy edi — hamma uni qo'lga olishni xohladi.
words.example2: Their little daughter is adorable and makes everyone smile.
words.example2Translation: Ularning kichkina qizi yoqimtoy va hammani kuldiради.
words.example3: That was an adorable thing to say — it really touched my heart.
words.example3Translation: Bu juda shirin gap edi — bu yuragimga yetdi.
extraExamples: The kids dressed up as animals — they were absolutely adorable.
She has an adorable laugh that lights up the room.
That little café with the flower pots is just adorable.
The baby's first steps were the most adorable thing I've ever seen.
He did something adorable — he left a note with her morning coffee.
The way she talks to her cat is honestly adorable.
Their friendship is adorable — they've been inseparable since kindergarten.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar hayvon kiyimlarini kiyganicha — ular mutlaqo yoqimtoy edilar.
Uning xonani yoritib yuboradigan yoqimtoy kulgisi bor.
Gullar qo'yilgan o'sha kichkina kafe juda yoqimtoy.
Chaqaloqning birinchi qadamlari men ko'rgan eng yoqimtoy narsa edi.
U shirin bir narsa qildi — ertalabki qahvasi yoniga xat qoldirdi.
U mushugi bilan gaplashish tarzi rostdan ham yoqimtoy.
Ularning do'stligi yoqimtoy — bog'chadan buyon ajralishmasdan kelishmoqda.

words.definition: Tending to hide your thoughts, feelings, or actions from other people
words.definitionUz: O'z fikrlari, his-tuyg'ulari yoki harakatlarini boshqalardan yashirishga moyil bo'lgan
words.example1: He's very secretive about his personal life and rarely shares anything.
words.example1Translation: U shaxsiy hayoti haqida juda sir saqlaydigan va kamdan-kam narsa ulashadi.
words.example2: She became secretive after the argument and stopped talking to everyone.
words.example2Translation: U janjoldan keyin yashirin bo'lib qoldi va hamma bilan gaplashishni to'xtatdi.
words.example3: The company was secretive about its plans for the new product.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya yangi mahsulot rejalari haqida sir saqlaydigan edi.
extraExamples: He's always been secretive — nobody really knows much about him.
She got secretive about where she was going every evening.
Being too secretive at work can make colleagues distrust you.
The secretive nature of the project made everyone curious.
He was secretive about his past and changed the subject whenever it came up.
She noticed he was being secretive and started to worry.
The organization is known for being secretive about its funding.
extraExampleTranslations: U har doim sir saqlaydigan — hech kim u haqda ko'p narsa bilmaydi.
U har kechqurun qayerga borayotgani haqida sir saqlay boshladi.
Ishda juda sir saqlaydigan bo'lish hamkasblarning ishonchsizligiga sabab bo'lishi mumkin.
Loyihaning maxfiy tabiati hammani qiziqtirdi.
U o'tmishi haqida sir saqlar va mavzu ko'tarilganda suhbatni o'zgartirardi.
U uning sir saqlayotganini sezdi va xavotirlana boshladi.
Tashkilot o'z moliyalashtirishi haqida sir saqlab kelgani bilan mashhur.

words.definition: Highly motivated and determined to achieve goals, often putting in great effort to succeed
words.definitionUz: Maqsadlarga erishishga kuchli intilish va qat'iyat bilan yondashuvchi — muvaffaqiyat uchun ko'p kuch sarflashga tayyor
words.example1: She's one of the most driven people I've ever worked with.
words.example1Translation: U men birga ishlagan eng shijoatli odamlardan biri.
words.example2: He is driven to succeed and never gives up when things get tough.
words.example2Translation: U muvaffaqiyatga erishishga intiladi va qiyin bo'lganda hech qachon taslim bo'lmaydi.
words.example3: The company looks for driven candidates who can work independently.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya mustaqil ishlay oladigan tirishqoq nomzodlarni qidiradi.
extraExamples: She's driven by a desire to make a real difference in the world.
Driven people tend to set high goals and push through obstacles.
He's incredibly driven — he studies even on weekends.
Being driven is useful, but you also need to rest and recharge.
She was driven by her passion for helping others.
The team is driven and focused on delivering results.
His driven personality helped him rise quickly in the company.
extraExampleTranslations: U dunyoda haqiqiy o'zgarish qilish istagi bilan harakatlanadi.
G'ayratli odamlar yuqori maqsadlar qo'yish va to'siqlarni engib o'tishga moyil.
U ajoyib darajada tirishqoq — dam olish kunlari ham o'qiydi.
G'ayratli bo'lish foydali, lekin dam olish va kuchni tiklash ham kerak.
U boshqalarga yordam berish ishtiyoqi bilan harakatlangan.
Jamoa g'ayratli va natijalarga erishishga e'tibor qaratgan.
Uning shijoatli shaxsiyati kompaniyada tez yuksalishiga yordam berdi.

words.definition: To have a friendly and positive relationship with someone, without conflict or tension
words.definitionUz: Biror kishi bilan do'stona va ijobiy munosabatda bo'lish — ziddiyat yoki keskinliksiz
words.example1: Despite the disagreement, they managed to stay on good terms.
words.example1Translation: Kelishmovchilikka qaramay, ular yaxshi munosabatda qolishga muvaffaq bo'ldilar.
words.example2: It's important to be on good terms with your neighbors.
words.example2Translation: Qo'shnilaringiz bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lish muhim.
words.example3: After the project ended, all the team members were still on good terms.
words.example3Translation: Loyiha tugagandan keyin barcha jamoa a'zolari hali ham yaxshi munosabatda edi.
extraExamples: He made sure to be on good terms with everyone in the department.
They broke up but are still on good terms.
Being on good terms with your colleagues makes work more enjoyable.
She tried to be on good terms with her ex-business partner.
It's hard to be on good terms with someone who is always negative.
They were not on good terms after the argument.
He worked hard to be on good terms with the new management.
extraExampleTranslations: U bo'limdagi hamma bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lishga harakat qildi.
Ular ajrashdi, lekin hali ham yaxshi munosabatda.
Hamkasblaringiz bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lish ishni yoqimliroq qiladi.
U sobiq biznes hamkori bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lishga harakat qildi.
Har doim salbiy bo'lgan odam bilan yaxshi munosabatda bo'lish qiyin.
Janjoldan keyin ular yaxshi munosabatda emasdilar.
U yangi rahbariyat bilan yaxshi munosabat o'rnatishga harakat qildi.

words.definition: to support or agree with an idea, plan, or action
words.definitionUz: Biror g'oya, reja yoki harakatni ma'qullash yoki uning tarafdori bo'lish — biror narsani yaxshi deb hisoblash va uni qo'llab-quvvatlash
words.example1: She is in favor of stricter laws to protect the environment.
words.example1Translation: U atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun qattiqroq qonunlarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
words.example2: Most employees were in favor of the new flexible working hours policy.
words.example2Translation: Ko'pchilik xodimlar yangi moslashuvchan ish soatlari siyosatini qo'llab-quvvatladilar.
words.example3: The committee voted in favor of expanding the public transport system.
words.example3Translation: Qo'mita jamoat transport tizimini kengaytirish tarafida ovoz berdi.
extraExamples: Are you in favor of lowering the voting age to sixteen?
The majority of parents were in favor of adding more sports to the school curriculum.
She has always been in favor of giving people second chances.
Not everyone on the board was in favor of the merger.
He spoke publicly in favor of free healthcare for all citizens.
The survey showed that most residents were in favor of building a new park.
Being in favor of change does not mean you are against tradition.
extraExampleTranslations: Ovoz berish yoshini o'n oltiga tushirishni qo'llab-quvvatlaysizmi?
Ota-onalarning aksariyati maktab dasturiga ko'proq sport qo'shishni qo'llab-quvvatladi.
U doim odamlarga ikkinchi imkoniyat berishni qo'llab-quvvatlagan.
Kengashtdagi hamma ham birlashishni qo'llab-quvvatlamadi.
U barcha fuqarolar uchun bepul sog'liqni saqlashni ommaviy ravishda qo'llab-quvvatladi.
So'rovnoma ko'pchilik aholi yangi bog' qurishni qo'llab-quvvatlaganini ko'rsatdi.
O'zgarishni qo'llab-quvvatlash an'anaga qarshi ekanligingiz degani emas.

words.definition: used to say that doing something will not achieve anything or make any difference
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilish hech narsaga erisha olmasligini yoki hech qanday farq qilmasligini bildirish uchun ishlatiladi — bu harakat befoyda
words.example1: It's no use waiting anymore — the last bus already left.
words.example1Translation: Endi kutishning foydasi yo'q — oxirgi avtobus allaqachon ketdi.
words.example2: It's no use complaining about the weather — we can't change it.
words.example2Translation: Ob-havo haqida shikoyat qilishning foydasi yo'q — biz uni o'zgartira olmaymiz.
words.example3: It's no use trying to convince him — he has already made up his mind.
words.example3Translation: Uni ishontirishga urinishning foydasi yo'q — u allaqachon qaror qildi.
extraExamples: It's no use pretending everything is fine when it clearly isn't.
It's no use rushing now — we have already missed the deadline.
It's no use blaming others for a problem you helped create.
It's no use worrying about things outside your control.
It's no use sending more emails — they are clearly not checking their inbox.
It's no use studying the night before if you haven't prepared all semester.
It's no use apologizing without actually changing your behavior.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma narsa yaxshi ekanligini ko'rsatishning foydasi yo'q, chunki bu aniq emas.
Endi shoshilishning foydasi yo'q — biz allaqachon muddatni o'tkazib yubordik.
Siz ham yaratishga yordam bergan muammo uchun boshqalarni ayblashning foydasi yo'q.
Nazorat qila olmagan narsalaringiz haqida xavotir olishning foydasi yo'q.
Ko'proq elektron pochta yuborishning foydasi yo'q — ular kirish qutisini tekshirmayotgani aniq.
Agar butun semestr davomida tayyorlanmagan bo'lsangiz, imtihon oldidan o'qishning foydasi yo'q.
Xulq-atvoringizni aslida o'zgartirmasdan kechirim so'rashning foydasi yo'q.

words.definition: used to say that an action has no purpose or will not produce a useful result
words.definitionUz: Biror harakatning maqsadi yo'q yoki foydali natija bermaydi degan ma'noni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi — bu narsaning ma'nosi yoki sababi yo'q
words.example1: There's no point in arguing — both sides have already decided.
words.example1Translation: Bahslashishning ma'nosi yo'q — har ikkala tomon allaqachon qaror qildi.
words.example2: There's no point in buying new clothes if you never wear what you already have.
words.example2Translation: Agar allaqachon borini kiymasangiz, yangi kiyim sotib olishning ma'nosi yo'q.
words.example3: There's no point in working hard on a project if the deadline has already passed.
words.example3Translation: Agar muddat allaqachon o'tgan bo'lsa, loyihada qattiq ishlashning ma'nosi yo'q.
extraExamples: There's no point in memorizing facts you can look up in seconds.
There's no point in attending the meeting if you have nothing to contribute.
There's no point in keeping clothes that no longer fit you.
There's no point in rushing if the train has already gone.
There's no point in learning the theory if you never practice.
There's no point in having a great product if nobody knows it exists.
There's no point in making promises you have no intention of keeping.
extraExampleTranslations: Soniyalar ichida qidirishi mumkin bo'lgan faktlarni yod olishning ma'nosi yo'q.
Agar hissa qo'shiladigan hech narsa bo'lmasa, yig'ilishga qatnashishning ma'nosi yo'q.
Endi sizga to'g'ri kelmaydigan kiyimlarni saqlashning ma'nosi yo'q.
Agar poyezd allaqachon ketgan bo'lsa, shoshilishning ma'nosi yo'q.
Agar hech qachon mashq qilmasangiz, nazariyani o'rganishning ma'nosi yo'q.
Agar hech kim uning mavjudligini bilmasa, ajoyib mahsulotga ega bo'lishning ma'nosi yo'q.
Bajarishni niyat qilmagan va'dalar berishning ma'nosi yo'q.

words.definition: to have enough value or benefit to justify the time, effort, or cost involved
words.definitionUz: Sarflangan vaqt, kuch yoki xarajatni oqlash uchun yetarli qiymat yoki foyda berish — bu narsaga ketkazilgan narsa arziydi
words.example1: This book is worth reading at least twice.
words.example1Translation: Bu kitob kamida ikki marta o'qishga arziydi.
words.example2: The restaurant is expensive, but it is absolutely worth trying at least once.
words.example2Translation: Restoran qimmat, lekin uni kamida bir marta sinab ko'rishga mutlaqo arziydi.
words.example3: Learning a second language is always worth the effort, no matter how long it takes.
words.example3Translation: Ikkinchi tilni o'rganish qancha vaqt ketishidan qat'iy nazar, har doim sarflangan kuchga arziydi.
extraExamples: The hike was tough, but the view from the top was worth every step.
That new film is definitely worth watching if you enjoy thrillers.
It is worth asking your manager about a pay rise — the worst they can say is no.
The course costs a lot, but the skills you gain are worth investing in.
Some experiences are worth paying more for.
It is worth checking the reviews before booking a hotel.
Not everything that costs a lot of money is worth buying.
extraExampleTranslations: Piyoda yurish og'ir edi, lekin tepadagi manzara har bir qadamga arzidi.
Agar triller filmlari yoqsa, bu yangi film albatta tomosha qilishga arziydi.
Menejeringizdan maosh oshirish haqida so'rash arziydi — eng yomoni yo'q deyishidir.
Kurs ko'p pul turadi, lekin siz qozongan ko'nikmalar investitsiya qilishga arziydi.
Ba'zi tajribalar ko'proq to'lashga arziydi.
Mehmonxona bron qilishdan oldin sharhlarni tekshirishga arziydi.
Ko'p pul turadigan hamma narsa sotib olishga arziyvermaydi.

words.definition: to have the ability, skill, or qualities needed to do something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilish uchun zarur qobiliyat, ko'nikma yoki xususiyatlarga ega bo'lish — bu ishni qila olish imkoniyati mavjud
words.example1: He is capable of solving complex problems under pressure.
words.example1Translation: U bosim ostida murakkab muammolarni hal qilishga qodir.
words.example2: Every student in this class is capable of passing the exam with the right preparation.
words.example2Translation: Bu sinfda har bir o'quvchi to'g'ri tayyorgarlik bilan imtihondan o'tishga qodir.
words.example3: Do not underestimate her — she is capable of achieving far more than people expect.
words.example3Translation: Uni past baholamang — u odamlar kutganidan ancha ko'proq narsaga erishishga qodir.
extraExamples: With enough practice, you are capable of speaking English fluently.
The new software is capable of processing thousands of requests per second.
He never knew he was capable of running a marathon until he tried.
A good team is capable of achieving things no individual could do alone.
Children are capable of learning multiple languages at the same time.
She proved she was capable of leading the department when her manager was away.
Never tell someone they are not capable of something without giving them a chance.
extraExampleTranslations: Yetarli mashq bilan siz ingliz tilida ravon gaplashishga qodirsiz.
Yangi dasturiy ta'minot soniyada minglab so'rovlarni qayta ishlashga qodir.
U sinab ko'rgunicha marafon yugurish imkoniyatiga ega ekanligini hech qachon bilmagan edi.
Yaxshi jamoa hech bir shaxs yolg'iz qila olmaydigan narsalarga erisha oladi.
Bolalar bir vaqtning o'zida bir nechta tilni o'rganishga qodir.
Menejer yo'q paytida u bo'limni boshqarishga qodirligini isbotladi.
Hech qachon kimgadir imkoniyat bermay turib, biror narsaga qodir emasligini aytmang.

words.definition: to feel fear or worry about doing something or about something happening
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilishdan yoki biror narsa sodir bo'lishidan qo'rqish yoki xavotir olish
words.example1: She is afraid of flying, so she always travels by train.
words.example1Translation: U uchishdan qo'rqadi, shuning uchun u har doim poyezd bilan sayohat qiladi.
words.example2: Many people are afraid of making mistakes when speaking a foreign language.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p odamlar xorijiy tilda gaplashayotganda xato qilishdan qo'rqadi.
words.example3: He is afraid of failing again after his first business did not succeed.
words.example3Translation: U birinchi biznesi muvaffaqiyatli bo'lmaganidan keyin yana muvaffaqiyatsizlikka uchrishdan qo'rqadi.
extraExamples: Are you afraid of speaking in front of large groups of people?
She was afraid of being judged, so she kept her opinions to herself.
Many children are afraid of going to the doctor.
He was afraid of committing to a long-term relationship after his divorce.
Being afraid of change is natural, but it can hold you back.
She was afraid of losing her job, so she worked extra hours every week.
Do not be afraid of asking for help — it is a sign of self-awareness, not weakness.
extraExampleTranslations: Katta odamlar guruhining oldida gapirrishdan qo'rqasizmi?
U muhokama qilinishidan qo'rqardi, shuning uchun o'z fikrini o'zida saqladi.
Ko'p bolalar shifokorga borishdan qo'rqadi.
U ajrashganidan keyin uzoq muddatli munosabatga sodiq bo'lishdan qo'rqar edi.
O'zgarishdan qo'rqish tabiiy, lekin bu sizni ushlab qolishi mumkin.
U ishini yo'qotishdan qo'rqardi, shuning uchun har hafta qo'shimcha soatlar ishlardi.
Yordam so'rashdan qo'rqmang — bu o'zini bilishning belgisi, zaiflik emas.

words.definition: to be fully dedicated to doing something and determined to continue with it
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilishga to'liq bag'ishlangan va undan qaytmaslik uchun qat'iy qarorli bo'lish — so'z bergan narsangizga sodiq qolish
words.example1: They are committed to improving the quality of education in rural areas.
words.example1Translation: Ular qishloq hududlarida ta'lim sifatini yaxshilashga bag'ishlangan.
words.example2: She is committed to exercising every morning no matter how busy her schedule is.
words.example2Translation: U qanchalik band bo'lishidan qat'iy nazar, har ertalab mashq qilishga sodiq.
words.example3: The company is committed to reducing its carbon footprint by forty percent.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya o'zining uglerod izini qirq foizga kamaytirishga bag'ishlangan.
extraExamples: Being committed to learning means studying even when you do not feel like it.
He is committed to being a better father than he had growing up.
The team is committed to finishing the project on time despite the setbacks.
Are you truly committed to making this relationship work?
She is committed to volunteering at the shelter every weekend.
Being committed to your goals means saying no to distractions.
The organization is committed to providing equal opportunities for all applicants.
extraExampleTranslations: O'rganishga bag'ishlangan bo'lish xohlamasangiz ham o'rganishni davom ettirish demak.
U o'sib ulg'ayganida bo'lganidan yaxshiroq ota bo'lishga sodiq.
Jamoa qiyinchiliklarga qaramay loyihani o'z vaqtida tugatishga bag'ishlangan.
Bu munosabatni rivojlantirish uchun haqiqatan ham bag'ishlangan bo'lasizmi?
U har dam olish kuni boshpanada ko'ngilli bo'lishga sodiq.
Maqsadlaringizga bag'ishlangan bo'lish chalg'ituvchilarga yo'q deyish demak.
Tashkilot barcha abituriyentlarga teng imkoniyatlar berishga bag'ishlangan.

words.definition: to disagree with or be against an idea, plan, or action
words.definitionUz: Biror g'oya, reja yoki harakatga rozi bo'lmaslik yoki unga qarshi bo'lish — bu narsani yaxshi deb bilmaslik
words.example1: He is strongly opposed to the new policy on overtime pay.
words.example1Translation: U qo'shimcha vaqt haqidagi yangi siyosatga qattiq qarshi.
words.example2: Many residents are opposed to building a new factory near the residential area.
words.example2Translation: Ko'plab aholi turar-joy hududiga yaqin yangi zavod qurishga qarshi.
words.example3: She is opposed to using animals for cosmetic testing.
words.example3Translation: U kosmetik sinovlar uchun hayvonlardan foydalanishga qarshi.
extraExamples: The union is strongly opposed to the proposed salary cuts.
He is opposed to any form of censorship in the media.
Not everyone who is opposed to the plan has offered an alternative solution.
She is opposed to her children spending too much time on social media.
The council voted, with three members opposed to the new development project.
Being opposed to an idea does not always mean you are right.
Many teachers are opposed to standardized testing as the main measure of student ability.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasaba uyushmasi taklif qilingan maosh qisqartirishlariga qattiq qarshi.
U ommaviy axborot vositalarida har qanday tsenzuraga qarshi.
Rejaga qarshi bo'lgan hamma ham muqobil yechim taklif qilmadi.
U farzandlarining ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda ko'p vaqt o'tkazishiga qarshi.
Kengash ovoz berdi, uchta a'zo yangi qurilish loyihasiga qarshi.
Biror g'oyaga qarshi bo'lish har doim to'g'ri ekanligingizni anglatmaydi.
Ko'plab o'qituvchilar o'quvchi qobiliyatining asosiy o'lchovi sifatida standartlashtirilgan testlarga qarshi.

words.definition: to have a duty to do something or to be the person who caused something to happen
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilish majburiyatiga ega bo'lish yoki biror narsa sodir bo'lishiga sabab bo'lgan shaxs bo'lish — bu ish yoki natijaga javobgar bo'lish
words.example1: She is responsible for managing the entire team and reporting to the director.
words.example1Translation: U butun jamoani boshqarish va direktorga hisobot berish uchun mas'ul.
words.example2: Each student is responsible for completing their own assignments on time.
words.example2Translation: Har bir o'quvchi o'z topshiriqlarini o'z vaqtida bajarish uchun mas'ul.
words.example3: The manager was responsible for making the final decision on the new hire.
words.example3Translation: Menejer yangi ishga qabul qilish bo'yicha yakuniy qaror qabul qilish uchun mas'ul edi.
extraExamples: Who is responsible for organizing the end-of-year company event?
Parents are responsible for teaching their children basic values.
He is responsible for checking all outgoing emails before they are sent.
The team leader is responsible for making sure deadlines are met.
Each department is responsible for managing its own budget.
She felt responsible for supporting her younger siblings after their parents passed away.
Being responsible for others means putting their needs above your own comfort.
extraExampleTranslations: Yil oxiri kompaniya tadbirini tashkil qilish uchun kim mas'ul?
Ota-onalar farzandlariga asosiy qadriyatlarni o'rgatish uchun mas'ul.
U yuborilishidan oldin barcha chiquvchi elektron pochta xabarlarini tekshirish uchun mas'ul.
Jamoa rahbari muddatlar bajarilishini ta'minlash uchun mas'ul.
Har bir bo'lim o'z byudjetini boshqarish uchun mas'ul.
U ota-onalari vafot etganidan keyin kenja aka-ukalarini qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun o'zini mas'ul his qildi.
Boshqalar uchun mas'ul bo'lish ularning ehtiyojlarini o'z qulayligingizdan ustun qo'yish demak.

words.definition: to be familiar with something because you have done it or experienced it many times before
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani ilgari ko'p marta qilgan yoki boshdan kechirganingiz sababli u bilan tanish bo'lish — bu narsa sizga odatiy holga aylangan
words.example1: I am used to waking up early — I have done it my whole life.
words.example1Translation: Men erta uyg'onishga odatlanganman — butun hayotim davomida shunday qilganman.
words.example2: She is used to working under pressure after years in a busy hospital.
words.example2Translation: U band kasalxonada yillar o'tkazganidan keyin bosim ostida ishlashga odatlangan.
words.example3: It takes time, but you will eventually get used to living in a new country.
words.example3Translation: Bu vaqt talab qiladi, lekin siz oxir-oqibat yangi mamlakatda yashashga odatlanasiz.
extraExamples: He is used to traveling alone and actually prefers it.
Are you used to eating spicy food, or do you find it difficult?
She was not used to being praised publicly and felt embarrassed.
After a few weeks, I got used to the noise of living near the train station.
He is used to managing large teams, so this project is no challenge for him.
It took her a while, but she is now used to cooking for one person.
Moving to a cold country was hard at first, but I am used to it now.
extraExampleTranslations: U yolg'iz sayohat qilishga odatlangan va aslida uni afzal ko'radi.
Siz achchiq taom yeyishga odatlanganmisiz yoki qiyin his qilasizmi?
U ommaviy ravishda maqtanishga odatlanmagan edi va o'zini xijolat his qildi.
Bir necha haftadan so'ng men poyezd stantsiyasi yaqinida yashash shovqiniga odatlandim.
U katta jamoalarni boshqarishga odatlangan, shuning uchun bu loyiha unga qiyin emas.
Bu unga bir oz vaqt talab qildi, lekin u endi bir kishi uchun pishirishga odatlangan.
Sovuq mamlakatga ko'chish avvaliga qiyin edi, lekin men hozir bunga odatlandim.
